Genesis1:1 Eng' taunet
Genesis1:2 Ki ma komi kiy ng'wony ak ki ma kotinyei itoon age tugul. Ki mi mesundeito paragutap rireet ak ki wendoti Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet eng' paragutap peek.
Genesis1:3 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:4 Kogeer anyun Kamuktaindet lapkeiyet kole myee
Genesis1:5 Ki kuure Kamuktaindet lapkeiyet Peet ak koguure mesundeito Kemoi. Koimen ak koeech
Genesis1:6 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:7 Koyai Kamuktaindet soet si kobesyee peek che mi kurereetap soet ak che mi paragutap soet. Ak kiyaak ko uu nooto.
Genesis1:8 Koguure Kamuktaindet soet parak
Genesis1:9 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:10 Koguure Kamuktaindet emet ne ma mi pei
Genesis1:11 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:12 Ki piityo anyun tuguuk eng' ng'wony
Genesis1:13 Koimen ak koeech
Genesis1:14 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:15 ingoek chooto che iluu eng' soetap kipsengwet si kobiit koluuchi ng'wony.” Ak kiyaak ko uu nooto.
Genesis1:16 Koyai Kamuktaindet tuguuk aeng' che eecheen che iluu
Genesis1:17 Konde Kamuktaindet chooto soetap kipsengwet si kobiit koluuchi ng'wony
Genesis1:18 si koboi peet ak kemoi ak koobeesyo lapkeiyet ak mesundeito. Ki keer Kamuktaindet kole myee.
Genesis1:19 Koimen ak koeech
Genesis1:20 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:21 Ki toi Kamuktaindet koyai njireenik che eecheen ak kiy age tugul ne sabei ne wendote peek ko uu kergeindonywa
Genesis1:22 Ki iberuur anyun icheek koleenji
Genesis1:23 Koimen ak koeech
Genesis1:24 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:25 Ki yai anyun Kamuktaindet tyong'ik che po ng'wony ko uu kergeindonywa; kiyagiik ko uu kergeindonywa ak tyong'ik tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony ko uu kergeindonywa. Ak ki keer Kamuktaindet kole myee.
Genesis1:26 Yeityo komwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:27 Ki toi anyun Kamuktaindet koyai chiito eng' itoondonyi
Genesis1:28 Ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet icheek ak koleenji
Genesis1:29 Yeityo komwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis1:30 Kaagoochi anyun keetiik alak tugul che nyaliileen koek amitwogigap tyony age tugul ne po ng'wony
Genesis1:31 Ki keer anyun Kamuktaindet tuguuk tugul che kiga koyai kole myachen miising'. Koimen ak koeech
Genesis2:1 Ki kigees anyun yaetap kipsengwet ak ng'wony ak chaang'indonywa tugul.
Genesis2:2 Ki igees Kamuktaindet eng' peetuutap tisap poisyonikyik che kiga koyai. Ki imuuny eng' peetuunooto po tisap eng' poisyonikyik tugul che kiga koyai.
Genesis2:3 Ki iberuur anyun Kamuktaindet peetuutap tisap ak kotabaan
Genesis2:4 Uu ni anyun ole ki kiyaita kipsengwet ak ng'wony eng' peetuunooto
Genesis2:5 Ki tomo kobiit keet ne po keeweet eng' ng'wony
Genesis2:6 Ago ki mong' peek eng' ng'wony ak koobis ng'wony komugul.
Genesis2:7 Ak ki yai Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiito eng' ng'ung'unyek
Genesis2:8 Ki kool Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet mbareet eng' Eden eng' komostap kong'asiis
Genesis2:9 Ak ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kobiit keet age tugul eng' ng'wony ne karaaran eng' keeret ak ne myee eng' ameet. Ki mi eng' kwenutap mbareet keetit ne po saboondo ak keetit ne po naet ne kinae ne myee ak ne ya.
Genesis2:10 Ki mang'une Eden aineet ne ibisi mbareet; yeityo kopcheigei koek ainoosyek ang'wan.
Genesis2:11 Kainetap ne po tai ko Pison. Ainooni ko ne yiemei emet komugul ne po Havilah ole mi thahabu ak
Genesis2:12 myachen thahabu che po emonooto; miitei olooto nyamdutik che ng'uu che kiguure Bedola ak koik che po kamanuut che kiguure Soam.
Genesis2:13 Kiguure aineet ne po aeng' Gihon; nooto ne yiemei emet komugul ne po Kush.
Genesis2:14 Kiguure aineet ne po somok Tigris. Ainooni ko ne wendi komostap kong'asiis ne po Assyria. Kiguure aineet ne po ang'wan Yufrets.
Genesis2:15 Ki imut Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiito kwo kotebee mbareetap Eden si kobiit koseemberi ak koriibei.
Genesis2:16 Ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiichooto koleenji
Genesis2:17 ago amat iam che po keetit ne po naet ne kinae ne myee ak ne ya. Amu eng' peetuut ne keam che po keetoto
Genesis2:18 Yeityo komwa Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kole
Genesis2:19 Ara ki yai anyun Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet tyony age tugul ne po ng'wony eng' ng'ung'unyek
Genesis2:20 Ki toochi anyun chiichooto kainai kiyak tugul
Genesis2:21 Ara ki yai anyun Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiichooto koru rwondo ne nyigiis
Genesis2:22 Ak eng' karasato ki inemune chiichooto
Genesis2:23 Yeityo komwa anyun chiichooto kole
Genesis2:24 Amu nooto anyun
Genesis2:25 Ki mi aach ngor tuwai
Genesis3:1 Ki ng'aaliindet ndaret kosiir tyony age tugul ne po ng'wony ne kiga koyai Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet. Ki leenji anyun kwondo
Genesis3:2 Ki leenji kwondo ndaret
Genesis3:3 ago ki mwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis3:4 Koleenji ndaret kwondo
Genesis3:5 Amu ingen Kamuktaindet kole eng' peetuut ne koam che po keetoto
Genesis3:6 Ye kingo keer anyun kwondo kole myee keetooto eng' ameet
Genesis3:7 Ki yaatagis anyun konyekwak icheek tuwai ak konai kole mi aach ngor. Ki nabanap anyun sogeegap mogoywet
Genesis3:8 Ak ki kas `icheek Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kowendoti eng' mbar ye kiga kogaititit koskoleny
Genesis3:9 Ki kuur anyun `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiichooto koleenji
Genesis3:10 Kowolji chiichooto koleenji
Genesis3:11 koteebee Kamuktaindet koleenji; “Ng'oo ne kamwaun kole imi aach ngor? Ka iam logoek che po keetooto ki ang'atiin ale amat iam?”
Genesis3:12 Kowolji chiito koleenji; “Kwonyoo ki igoono ketebi tuwai
Genesis3:13 koteebee `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kwondo koleenji
Genesis3:14 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ndaret
Genesis3:15 Andoi punyondiit kwenung'wong' inyee ndareet ak kwondo ak kwenutap iyoteng'ung' ak iyotennyi. Tuei ineendet meting'ung' ak isuse aginye kwaryandennyi”
Genesis3:16 Koleenji anyun `Kamuktaindet kwondo
Genesis3:17 Yeityo Koleenji Adam
Genesis3:18 iiun `ng'wony katook che toorei piich ak che rutei piich
Genesis3:19 Iame amitwogik eng' kaotigap togeng'ung' kot koit iweekyigei ng'wony amu ki kinemunenen yooto; amu ii ng'ung'uny
Genesis3:20 Kiguure `Adam kwondonyi Hawa
Genesis3:21 Ak kinapchi `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet Adam ak kwondonyi ngoroik
Genesis3:22 Ak ki mwa `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kole
Genesis3:23 ko ki imaanda `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ineendet eng' mbareetap Eden
Genesis3:24 Ki oon anyun chiichooto koomaanda ak konde Kerubik kotebee komostap kong'asiis ne po mbareetap Eden. Yeityo konde rootwetap chok ne ilyeli ne tokyingei komoswek tugul si koriip ooreet ne tokyingei keetitap saboondo.
Genesis4:1 Ki ituiyogei chiichooto ak kwondonyi Hawa
Genesis4:2 Ak ki sich kogeny weeriit ne tupcho
Genesis4:3 Kingo pata peetuusyo
Genesis4:4 Ki kwerichi Abel agine iyoteetap tai che akwaen che po akweennyi. Ak ki cham `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abel ak kagachinennyi
Genesis4:5 ago ma cham Kain ak kagachinennyi. Ki nereech Kain miising' kot ko siriny togeennyi.
Genesis4:6 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kain
Genesis4:7 Ngot iyai ne myee
Genesis4:8 Ki ng'alaalji `Kain ng'eetap kamet Abel. Ak ye kingo ta komi tuwai kewanin
Genesis4:9 koteebee `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kain anyun koleenji
Genesis4:10 koteebee Kamuktaindet koleenji
Genesis4:11 Nguno anyun ko ii chuboot eng' ng'wonyut ne kaiseng'eng' kotaach korotiigap ne otupche kobun euneguk:
Genesis4:12 si ye ibatii ng'wony
Genesis4:13 Koleenji `Kain Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Genesis4:14 Keer anyuno
Genesis4:15 Ki ng'at anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Genesis4:16 Ki wo Kain anyun eng' ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kwo komeny emetap Nod ne mi komostap kong'asiis eng' Eden.
Genesis4:17 Ki ituiyogei Kain ak kwondonyi
Genesis4:18 Ki sich `Enok Irad; kosich `Irad Meujael; kosich `Meujael Methushael; ak kosich `Methushael Lamek.
Genesis4:19 Ki itun `Lamek kwonyiik aeng' che kainaikwak ko ki Adah ak Zillah.
Genesis4:20 Ki sich `Adah Jabel ne ineendet ko kwandap icheeget che kimeng'ooti emaisyek ak koyagi kiyagiik.
Genesis4:21 Ki kiguure ne tupcho
Genesis4:22 Ki sich `Zillah agine Tubal-Kain ne ki kitang'indetap sugunonik ak kariik. Ki kiguure chepkametap Tubal-Kain
Genesis4:23 Ki mwachi `Lamek chebyosokyik koleenji
Genesis4:24 Ngot ko ki kiyaakyi mugetuut Kain konyil tisap
Genesis4:25 Ak ye kingo testai komeng'iis Adam ak kwondonyi
Genesis4:26 Ki sich Seth agine weeriit ne kiguure Enos. Kong'etee yooto anyun kotoi piik koguur kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Genesis5:1 Ni ko sireet ne po teteetap iyoteetap kap Adam. Eng' peetuut ne ki toi Kamuktaindet koyai chiito
Genesis5:2 Ki yai icheek
Genesis5:3 Ki tar Adam kenyiisyek pogol ak sosom kosich weeriit eng' kergeindonyi ak eng' itoondonyi
Genesis5:4 Ye kingo kagosich `Adam Seth
Genesis5:5 Ki ilil Adam kotinyei kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak sosom.
Genesis5:6 Ye kingo tinyei Seth kenyiisyek pogol ak muut
Genesis5:7 Ki tar Seth kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak tisap ye kingo kagosich Enosh
Genesis5:8 Eng' tugul
Genesis5:9 Kingo po Enosh kenyiisyek tamanwogik sogool
Genesis5:10 Ki tar Enosh kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak taman ak muut ye kingo kagosich Kenan
Genesis5:11 Ki ilil Enosh ko po kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak muut.
Genesis5:12 Ki po Kenan kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap kosichei Mahalalel.
Genesis5:13 Komeng'iis Kenan kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak artam ye kingo kagosich Mahalalel ak kosich weeriik alak ak tiibiik.
Genesis5:14 Ki ilil Kenan ko po kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak taman.
Genesis5:15 Kosich `Mahalalel Jared kotinyei kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo ak muut.
Genesis5:16 Ak ki tebi Mahalalel kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak sosom ye kingo kagosich Jared
Genesis5:17 Ki po Mahalalel kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak tamanwogik sogool ak muut ye kingo lili.
Genesis5:18 Kingo po Jared kenyiisyek pogol ak tamanwogik lo ak aeng' kosich Enok.
Genesis5:19 Eng' kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ye kingo kagosich `Jared Enok
Genesis5:20 Ki ilil Jared ko po kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak tamanwogik lo ak aeng'.
Genesis5:21 Kingo po Enok kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo ak muut kosich Methuselah.
Genesis5:22 Ki pendat Enok ak Kamuktaindet eng' kenyiisyek pogol somok ye kingo kagosich Methuselah ak ki sich weeriik alak ak tiibiik.
Genesis5:23 Peetuusyek tugul che po sabeetap Enok ko ki kenyiisyek pogol somok ak tamanwogik lo ak muut.
Genesis5:24 Kibendoti Enok ak Kamuktaindet; ak ki mata kiro amu ki imut ineendet `Kamuktaindet!
Genesis5:25 Kingo tinyei Methuselah kenyiisyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak tisap kosich Lamek.
Genesis5:26 Ki meng'iis Methuselah kenyiisyek pogol tisap ak tamanwogik sisiit ak aeng' ye kingo kagosich Lamek ak ki sich weeriik alak ak tiibiik.
Genesis5:27 Ki ilili Methuselah ko po kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak tamanwogik lo ak sogool.
Genesis5:28 Ki tar Lamek kenyiisyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak aeng'
Genesis5:29 Kiguure kainennyi Noah
Genesis5:30 Ki meng'iis Lamek kenyiisyek pogol muut ak tamanwogik sogool ak muut ye kingo kagosich Noah
Genesis5:31 Ki po Lamek kenyiisyek pogol tisap ak tamanwogik tisap ak tisap ye kingo lili.
Genesis5:32 Ak ye kingo tinyei Noah kenyiisyek pogol muut
Genesis6:1 Ye kingo toi kotesagis piik eng' ng'wony ak kosich tiibiik
Genesis6:2 kogeer anyun `weeriigap Kamuktaindet tiibiichooto po piik kole korooron
Genesis6:3 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Genesis6:4 Ki miitei Piik che eecheen che uu chemosin ng'wony eng' peetuusyechooto
Genesis6:5 Ki keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Genesis6:6 Ki riir let Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo chii ne ki yai eng' ng'wony
Genesis6:7 Ak ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Genesis6:8 Ago ki chamak Noah eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Genesis6:9 Chu isubi ko ooreetap kap Noah. Ki chiito Noah ne po imanda ak kogesunotkei eng' ibindanyi. Kibendoti ineendet ak Kamuktaindet.
Genesis6:10 Ki sich `Noah weeriik somok; Shem
Genesis6:11 Ak kiga kong'emak emet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ak ki oo puunyoondit eng' ng'wony.
Genesis6:12 Ki iro Kamuktaindet ng'wony kole ki kong'emak
Genesis6:13 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Noah
Genesis6:14 Yachigei moinget ne po keetiigap taragonik; ak ipchei kooriik che mengeechen eng' moinget ak imale manget oriit ak saang'.
Genesis6:15 Yai moinget ko uu ni: koindonyi ko mitainik pogol ak sosom ak sogool ak tebeesindonyi ko mitainik tiptem ak muut
Genesis6:16 Yai ole punu lapkeiyet eng' moinget
Genesis6:17 Aipchini ng'wony maraneet ne oo si ang'eme tugul che saptos
Genesis6:18 Ka agimiit kayomisennyu kobooten
Genesis6:19 Ketu alak eng' tuguuk tugul che saptos kobwa moinget oriit
Genesis6:20 Ingobwa kora toriitik ko uu kergeindonywa
Genesis6:21 Iyum anyun ak iipchigei amitwogik alak tugul che kiamei
Genesis6:22 Ki yai anyun Noah ko uu nooto; ki yai kiy tugul ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ineendet.
Genesis7:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Noah
Genesis7:2 Ketuu tyong'ik alak tugul che tiliileen kobwanune tisap tisap
Genesis7:3 ak che po toriitik che po parak ak icheek
Genesis7:4 Amu tomo peetuusyek tisabu si ayookyi ropta ng'wony koroobon peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam
Genesis7:5 Ak ki yai Noah tugul ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet.
Genesis7:6 Kingo po Noah kenyiisyek pogol lo
Genesis7:7 Ki chut anyun Noah moinget ak weeriikyik
Genesis7:8 Ki pa moinget anyun tyong'ik che tiliileen ak che ma tiliileen eng' toriitik ak tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony
Genesis7:9 aeng' aeng' kobooto Noah ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet; ne kiruk ak ne subeen.
Genesis7:10 Kingo pata anyun peetuusyek tisabu
Genesis7:11 Eng' kenyiit ne ki ite Noah kenyiisyek pogol lo
Genesis7:12 Kirobonji ng'wony peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam.
Genesis7:13 Ki chut anyun moinget Noah eng' peetuunooto kobooto weeriikyik
Genesis7:14 Kichut ak tyony age tugul ko uu kergeindonyi
Genesis7:15 Kichut moinget ole mi Noah icheek tugul che saptos ak kotinyei kabuusetap saboondo
Genesis7:16 Eng' icheek che kichut
Genesis7:17 Kimaranee peek ng'wony peetuusyek artam. Kitesak kot koganap `maraneet moinget kwo parak kot kolooit eng' ng'wony.
Genesis7:18 Kichang'a ak kogimegitu miising' peek eng' ng'wony kot koreresan moinget eng' peek parak.
Genesis7:19 Ki kimegitu peek miising' eng' ng'wony komugul kot kotuch tuloonook tugul che kooen eng' kurereetap kipsengwet.
Genesis7:20 Kichaang'it kot kosiir tuloonook
Genesis7:21 Ak ki pek tuguuk tugul che saptos eng' ng'wony; toriitik
Genesis7:22 Ki pek tugul che saptos
Genesis7:23 Ki kibar kiwoong' kiy age tugul ne ki sabei ne ki mi emet komugul; kimugulmet
Genesis7:24 Kimaran peechooto kotuch emet peetuusyek pogol ak konom.
Genesis8:1 Ki ibwaat anyun `Kamuktaindet Noah
Genesis8:2 Kigerogis kong'iik che kutune peek che po rireet ak che punu peek eng' kipsengwet ak kegirinda ropta eng' soet parak.
Genesis8:3 Ki testai koteenyo peek eng' ng'wony kot ko kingo kesugei peetuusyek pogolu ak konom
Genesis8:4 Ki tonon moinget eng' arawetap tisap
Genesis8:5 Ki ng'ering'itu peek miising' kot ko eng' arawetap taman peetuut ne po tai
Genesis8:6 Ye kingo pata peetuusyek artamu
Genesis8:7 ak koyookto chepkugit. Ki tirirenot kot koteenyo peek eng' ng'wony.
Genesis8:8 Ki iyookto cheptuget agine
Genesis8:9 Ki ma nyoor cheptuget ole namei ak komung'ee amu kita komi peek emet komugul
Genesis8:10 Kita kotebi peetuusyek alak tisap
Genesis8:11 Ki week cheptugonooto eng' koskoleny koibune kutinnyi sogoot ne tuon; ak ki nai Noah anyun kole teng'oti peek.
Genesis8:12 Ki tebi Noah peetuusyek alak tisap
Genesis8:13 Kingo po Noah kenyiisyek pogol lo ak agenge eng' arawetap tai
Genesis8:14 Ki yaam emet eng' arawet ne po aeng'
Genesis8:15 Ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet Noah koleenji
Genesis8:16 “Mandee eng' moinget
Genesis8:17 Yaatu komong' tyong'ik tugul che saptos che mi kobooten; toriitik
Genesis8:18 Ki manda anyun Noah ak weeriikyik
Genesis8:19 Ki manda eng' moinget tyony age tugul
Genesis8:20 Kiteekyi `Noah Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet
Genesis8:21 Kingo ng'uuchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyinyindo kobun kaptisiisyo
Genesis8:22 Kotee kota komi ng'wony
Genesis9:1 Ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet Noah ak weeriikyik ak koleenji
Genesis9:2 Iyweok ak koarageni tyony age tugul ne po ng'wony agobo okweek; agot toriit alak tugul che po parak
Genesis9:3 Egu amitwogikwok kiy age tugul ne sabei ne wendoti; kagoonok tugul ko uu ye kiga agoonok tuguuk che piitos alak tugul che nyalileen.
Genesis9:4 Ago moam panyeek kobooto saboondonyi ne nooto ko korotiik.
Genesis9:5 Amagenok ne matiny korotiigap saboonwekwok agobo saboondap chii
Genesis9:6 Chii age tugul ne tumdoi korotiigap chii
Genesis9:7 Osigisye ak otesage osigisye kot ochaang'e miising' eng' ng'wony.”
Genesis9:8 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Noah ak weeriikyik
Genesis9:9 “Ogaso! Kaagimiit kayomisenyu kobootok ak kobooto iyoteng'wong' ne piitu let
Genesis9:10 ak kobooto kiy age tugul ne sabei ne mi kobootok; eng' toriitik
Genesis9:11 Ak agimiit kayomisennyu kobootok ale
Genesis9:12 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet kole
Genesis9:13 Kande chemng'isiryennyu poolik parak
Genesis9:14 Ye kabiit poolik eng' parak
Genesis9:15 abwaat anyun kayomisennyu ne mi kwenunnyoo
Genesis9:16 Ye took anyun chemng'isiryet eng' poolik
Genesis9:17 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Noah
Genesis9:18 Weeriigap Noah che ki mong' eng' moinget ko ki Shem
Genesis9:19 Chuuto somok ko ki weeriigap Noah
Genesis9:20 Ki toi Noah koek kabatindet
Genesis9:21 Ak kie maiyek ak kobogit
Genesis9:22 Ki keer Ham
Genesis9:23 Ki ng'eetyo Shem ak Japhet konem sambut
Genesis9:24 Ye kingo ng'eet anyun Noah eng' pogitennyi
Genesis9:25 ak ki le
Genesis9:26 Ak ki le
Genesis9:27 Ingobara `Kamuktaindet Japhet
Genesis9:28 Ki tar Noah kenyiisyek alak pogol somok ak konom ye kingo pata maraneet.
Genesis9:29 Kenyiisyek tugul che ki tar Noah ko pogol sogool ak konom; yeityo koolil.
Genesis10:1 Chu isubi ko piigap ooreetap weeriigap Noah: Shem
Genesis10:2 Weeriigap Japhet ko; Gomer
Genesis10:3 Weeriigap Gomer ko; Ashkenas
Genesis10:4 Weeriigap Javan ko; Elisha
Genesis10:5 Ki kipchechi icheek emotinwek che neegitee nyanjosyek che po pororyosyek eng' emotinwekwak; chii age tugul eng' kutinnyi
Genesis10:6 Weeriigap Ham ko chu: Kush
Genesis10:7 Weeriigap Kush ko: Seba
Genesis10:8 Ki sich `Kush Nimrod
Genesis10:9 Ki kiplogotyot ne nyigan eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ko uu nooto anyun kemwae keele
Genesis10:10 Taunetap laitornatennyi ko ki Babel
Genesis10:11 Ki manda eng' emonooto kwo Assyria
Genesis10:12 ak Resen ne mi kwenutap Nineveh ak Kala ne nooto ko nganaseet ne oo.
Genesis10:13 Ki sich `Misiri Ludik
Genesis10:14 Patrusik
Genesis10:15 Ki sich `Kanaan Sidon weeriinnyi ne po tai
Genesis10:16 ak Jebusik
Genesis10:17 Hibiik
Genesis10:18 Aribadiik
Genesis10:19 Kiwotetap Kanaanik ko ki taunegei Sidon
Genesis10:20 Chuuto ko weeriigap Ham
Genesis10:21 Ki sich Shem agine lagok
Genesis10:22 Weeriigap Shem chu: Elam
Genesis10:23 Weeriigap Aram ko: Us
Genesis10:24 Ak ki sich `Arbaksat Shelah
Genesis10:25 Ki sich `Eber weeriik aeng'
Genesis10:26 Ki sich `Joktan Almodad
Genesis10:27 Hadoram
Genesis10:28 Obal
Genesis10:29 Opir
Genesis10:30 Ak ki iboch meng'ootennywa Mesha
Genesis10:31 Chuuto anyun weeriigap Shem
Genesis10:32 Chuuto ko ortinwegap weeriigap Noah
Genesis11:1 Ki ng'alaali ng'wony komugul kutit agenge ak ng'alaalet agenge.
Genesis11:2 Ak ye kingo ta kobendi kong'etee kong'asiis
Genesis11:3 Ki ng'alaaljigei anyun icheegei kole
Genesis11:4 Yeityo komwachigei kole

Genesis11:7 Ongebe
Genesis11:8 Ko uu nooto anyun
Genesis11:9 Ki kiguure nganasanooto Babel
Genesis11:10 Chu isubi komwaiwech agobo ortinwegap Shem; ye kingo po Shem kenyiisyek pogol
Genesis11:11 Ki meng'iis Shem kenyiisyek pogol muut ye kingo kagosich Arbaksat
Genesis11:12 Ki meng'iis Arbaksat kenyiisyek sosom ak muut
Genesis11:13 Ki meng'iis Arbaksat kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak somok ye kingo kagosich Shelah
Genesis11:14 Ki meng'iis Shelah kenyiisyek sosom
Genesis11:15 Kotar Shelah kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak somok ye kingo kagosich Eber
Genesis11:16 Ki meng'iis Eber kenyiisyek sosom ak ang'wan
Genesis11:17 Ak ki tar Eber kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak sosom ye kingo kagosich Peleg
Genesis11:18 Ki meng'iis Peleg kenyiisyek sosom
Genesis11:19 Ki tar Peleg kenyiisyek pogol aeng' ak sogool ye kingo kagosich Reu
Genesis11:20 Ki meng'iis Reu kenyiisyek sosom ak aeng'
Genesis11:21 Ak ki tar Reu kenyiisyek pogol aeng' ak tisap ye kingo kagosich Serug
Genesis11:22 Ki meng'iis Serug kenyiisyek sosom
Genesis11:23 Ak ki tar Serug kenyiisyek pogol aeng' ye kingo kagosich Nahor
Genesis11:24 Ki meng'iis Nahor kenyiisyek tiptem ak sogool
Genesis11:25 Ak ki tar Nahor kenyiisyek pogol ak taman ak sogool ye kingo kagosich Tera
Genesis11:26 Ki meng'iis Tera kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap
Genesis11:27 Chu ko ortinwegap Tera; ki sich `Tera Abram
Genesis11:28 Ki me Haran eng' taitap kwandanyi Tera eng' emet ne ki kisikyin

Genesis11:30 Ki sonen Sarai; ki ma kotinyei lakwa.

Genesis11:32 Peetuusyegap sabeetap Tera
Genesis12:1 Ki leenji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abram
Genesis12:2 Ayain iegu pororyet ne oo

Genesis12:5 Ki imut `Abram chebyosennyi Sarai
Genesis12:6 Ki wo Abram kobun emet kween agoi koit ole mi keetitap Moreh eng' Shekem. Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki mi Kanaanik emonooto.
Genesis12:7 Ki mong'ji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abram ak koleenji
Genesis12:8 Kiu kwo eng' olooto kotokyigei emetap tuloonook eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po Bethel
Genesis12:9 Ki u Abram kogeny kotokyigei komostap Murot Tai.
Genesis12:10 Ki piit rubeet eng' emonooto
Genesis12:11 Ye ki neegit komong'ji Misiri

Genesis12:19 Ki lya si imwa ile

Genesis21:2 Ki manach Sarah ak ki sikyi Abraham weeriit eng' osindanyi eng' kasarta ne kiga koarorchi Kamuktaindet.
Genesis21:3 Ki kuure `Abraham weeriinnyi ne ki sikyin Sarah
Genesis21:4 Eng' peetuut ne po sisiit

Genesis21:10 Ki mwachi anyun `ineendet Abraham koleenji
Genesis21:11 Ki yait miising' kot ng'olyoondoni eng' Abraham agobo weeriinnyi.
Genesis21:12 Ago ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet Abraham koleenji
Genesis21:13 Ak tuun ayae weeriitap chebyosoni otwogin agine koek pororyet amu ineendet ko iyoteng'ung'.”
Genesis21:14 Ki ng'eet anyun Abraham eng' peetuut ne ki isubi kota ko karon miising' ak ki ip amitwogik ak soteet ne po peek kogoochi Hagar ak lakweet. Ki indochi tigikyennyi tuguuchooto yeityo kounda icheek koba. Ki wo anyun koombenot eng' surkwen ne po Beer-sheba.
Genesis21:15 Ye kingo keskei peek eng' soteet
Genesis21:16 Ki wo kotep ng'wony eng' ye loo kitigin
Genesis21:17 Ki kas Kamuktaindet koriirei weerooto ak kiguur malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne mi kipsengwet Hagar
Genesis21:18 Ng'eet ui ing'eet lakweet ak inamate eng' eung'ung'
Genesis21:19 Ki yaat Kamuktaindet konyegap kwonyooto ak ki keer keriingetap peek. Ki wo anyun konyiit peek soteet yeityo konaga lakweet.
Genesis21:20 Ki mi Kamuktaindet kobooto lakweet ak kiner koeet. Ki meng'oot surkwen ak koek mwogindet.
Genesis21:21 Ki meng'oot ineendet surkwen ne po Paran ak ki cheeng'ji kamet Chemisiryot kotun.
Genesis21:22 Ki ng'alaalji eng' peetuusyechooto Abimelek ak Pikol
Genesis21:23 Iyosyeiwo anyun nguno eng' Kamuktaindet si metila let anan eng' weeriinnyu anan eng' mochogoronikyuk
Genesis21:24 Ak ki leenji Abraham
Genesis21:25 Kingo kergong' `Abraham Abimelek amu keriingetap peek ne kiga rebe otwogigap Abimelek eng' koroomnateet
Genesis21:26 kole Abimelek
Genesis21:27 Ki nam anyun Abraham keechiirek ak tuuga kogoochi Abimelek ak ki iyomiskei icheek tuwai.
Genesis21:28 Ki itabaan anyun Abraham subeenwek tisap che po keechiir koba taban icheegei.
Genesis21:29 Ak kiteebe `Abimelek Abraham koleenji
Genesis21:30 Kowol ineendet kole
Genesis21:31 Kiguure yooto anyun Beer-sheba
Genesis21:32 Ki iyomiskei anyun eng' Beer-sheba
Genesis21:33 Ki miin Abraham keetit eng' Beer-sheba ak ki kuur eng' olooto kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Genesis21:34 Ak ki ek toondet Abraham eng' emetap Philistik peetuusyek che chaang'.

Genesis23:7 Ki ng'eet ak kong'uruukyi Abraham anyun piigap emetap Het.

Genesis23:9 kogoono kebenennyi

Genesis23:11 “Achicha
Genesis23:12 Yeityo kong'uruuk Abraham anyun eng' taitap piigap emet.
Genesis23:13 Ak ki ng'alaal ak Epron
Genesis23:14 Ki wolji `Epron Abraham koleenji
Genesis23:15 “Kiptaiyandennyu

Genesis23:18 ki kigoochi Abraham kobunji eng' taitap weeriigap Het

Genesis23:20 Kigamanji ak kogoochi anyun `piigap Het Abraham mbareet ak kebeneet ne ki mi olooto
Genesis24:1 Kiga koosit Abraham; ki neegit kwo kalilot

Genesis24:6 Koleenji Abraham
Genesis24:7 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Genesis24:8 Ak ngot koma cham chebooto kosubun
Genesis24:9 Konde anyun otwogindet eunnyi kubestap Abraham kiptaiyandennyi
Genesis24:10 Ki kwei anyun otwogindonooto tambeesik taman che po kiptaiyandennyi ak kwo
Genesis24:11 Ki chop tambeesik kogutung'so eng' saang' ne po nganaseet ole ki neegitee keriingetap peek; ki saisyegap koskoleny ye pendi kobogorisyek kosiile peek.

Genesis24:13 Keero

Genesis31:1 Ki kas anyun Jakobo kong'alaaldos weeriigap Laban koleen
Genesis31:2 Ak ki keer `Jakobo togeetap Laban kole ma ko uu atkinye tai.
Genesis31:3 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jakobo
Genesis31:4 Ki iyookto Jakobo chii kwo kewaniin ole mi akweennyi koguur Rael ak Leah
Genesis31:5 ak ipkoleenji
Genesis31:6 Ongen ole ki aoot kwandang'wong' eng' kimnateennyu tugul.
Genesis31:7 Nga ki koberbera kwandang'wong' ak ki kowal melektanyu konyil taman
Genesis31:8 Ye kingo mwa kole
Genesis31:9 Ko uu nooto anyun-i
Genesis31:10 Ak ye kingo machei korisyo neego
Genesis31:11 Ki kuura malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet eng' karwotitoet
Genesis31:12 Kole
Genesis31:13 Anee Kamuktaindet ne po Bethel
Genesis31:14 Ki wolji anyun Rael ak Leah koleenji
Genesis31:15 Tos ma ki itech keele ki po oor age? Ki koaldech ak kigoamenech tuguuk.
Genesis31:16 Nenyo ak lagokyok mogornatoni ki ibe Kamuktaindet kwandanyo. Ara anyun yai kiy age tugul ne kagomwaun Kamuktaindet.”
Genesis31:17 Ki ng'eet anyun Jakobo
Genesis31:18 Ki kweri akwotisyekyik tugul
Genesis31:19 Kichoor Rael kanamonigap kwandanyi Laban
Genesis31:20 Ki ng'aal `Jakobo Laban Syrianindet
Genesis31:21 Ki imweito anyun tuguuk tugul che ki tinyei; ak king'eet kolandae aineet
Genesis31:22 Ye ki ngemwachi Laban eng' peetuutap somok keleenji
Genesis31:23 komut tupchosyekyik
Genesis31:24 Ki nyoonji `Kamuktaindet Laban Syrianindet kemoi eng' karwotitoet koleenji
Genesis31:25 Ki it anyun Laban ole mi Jakobo. Kiga teech Jakobo emainnyi eng' tulweet. Ki nyo koteech Laban ak tupchosyekyik ak icheek tulweetap Gilead.
Genesis31:26 Koleenji `Laban Jakobo
Genesis31:27 Kilya si imweu iung'anugei ak ing'ala
Genesis31:28 ak ma igang'wa ang'utut weeriikyuk ak tiibiikyuk? Ki iyai eng' perberyo.
Genesis31:29 Atinye kimnateet ayaiywok ne ya; ago kong'alaalwo Kamuktaindetap kwandang'wong' lagat koleenjo
Genesis31:30 Ago angen ale koitau panda
Genesis31:31 Kowolji `Jakobo Laban koleenji
Genesis31:32 Ago meei age tugul ne inyoorchini kanamoniguk. Inyit eng' taitap tupchosyekyok kiy age tugul ne neng'ung' ne atinye si iip.” Amu ki ma nai Jakobo kole kichoor Rael tuguuchooto.
Genesis31:33 Ki chut anyun Laban emaitap Jakobo
Genesis31:34 Kingo kagoip Rael kanamonichooto konde tuguuk oriit che ki iitoe tambeesik ak kotebee. Ak ki isyach Laban ola tugul kosapsabat eng' emait ago ma nyoor.
Genesis31:35 Ak ki leenji `Rael kwandanyi
Genesis31:36 Ki nereech anyun Jakobo ak kobolyo ak Laban. Ki wolji `Jakobo Laban koleenji
Genesis31:37 Nga kaisyach ak isapsabate tuguukyuk tugul
Genesis31:38 Ki atebi kobooten eng' kenyisyechu tiptem; ma oos keechiireguk ak ng'orooreguk
Genesis31:39 Ak ki ma aibun ne ki par tyondo kotonaton; ki ageerunenen nenyu. Ki imagena nooto
Genesis31:40 Ki atebi ko uu nooto
Genesis31:41 Ki atebee koong'ung' eng' kenyisyechu tiptem; ki aootin kenyiisyek taman ak ang'wan agobo tiibiiguk aeng'
Genesis31:42 Nda ki ma komi kobooto Kamuktaindet ne po abba
Genesis31:43 Eng' yooto kowolji `Laban Jakobo koleenji
Genesis31:44 Ara anyun
Genesis31:45 Ki nam anyun Jakobo koita kolumda koek toloita.
Genesis31:46 Ak koleenji Jakobo tupchosyekyik
Genesis31:47 Ak kiguure Laban yooto Jegar-sahadutha
Genesis31:48 Ki le Laban
Genesis31:49 ak ki kiguure kogeny Mispa
Genesis31:50 Ngot ko tuun ius tiibiikyuk
Genesis31:51 Yeityo koleenji `Laban Jakobo

Genesis41:56 Ye kingo yom rubonooto emet komugul

Genesis42:6 Ki pounindet Joseph ne po emet
Genesis42:7 Ak ki keer `Joseph tupchosyekyik ak konyit
Genesis42:8 Nganda ki nai `Joseph tupchosyekyik
Genesis42:9 Ki ibwaat kogeny Joseph karwotitaosyek che kiga korwotyi agobo icheek
Genesis42:10 Ki leenji `icheek ineendet
Genesis42:11 Ki weeriigap chiito agenge acheek tugul
Genesis42:12 Ago ki leenji icheek
Genesis42:13 Ak ki leenji
Genesis42:14 Ago ki leenji `Joseph icheek
Genesis42:15 Kimuuchi ketyemenak ng'olyoondoni: ko uu ye sabei Pharaoh

Genesis42:17 Ak kiger tugul kip agenge peetuusyek somok.
Genesis42:18 Eng' peetuutap somok koleenji `Joseph icheek
Genesis42:19 ngo oo piigap iman
Genesis42:20 Ak omutwaa ng'eetap komet ne ming'in; si kotook ng'aleekwok ngo po iman
Genesis42:21 Ki ng'alaaljigei icheegei kole
Genesis42:22 Ak ki wolji Reuben
Genesis42:23 Ki ma nai kole kasei Joseph ng'aleekwak

Genesis42:26 Ki ratyi peechooto chwaget sigirokwak

Genesis42:35 Ye kingo abuch lolotinwekwak

Genesis42:38 Ago ki le

Genesis43:2 Ak ye kingo kagotar peek che ki ibune Misiri

Genesis43:5 Ago ngot ko mechamji kwo
Genesis43:6 Ki le Israel

Genesis43:10 Amu nda ki ma kigagei
Genesis43:11 Yeityo koleenji `kwandanywa Israel icheek

Genesis47:21 Ki yai anyun `ineendet piik koek otwogikyik kong'etee tabanda age agoi tabanda age ne po Misiri.

Genesis50:4 Ye kingo kagobata peetuusyek che po riirek
Genesis50:5 Kimakwo abba ayasyo

Genesis50:8 ak kootap Joseph komugul
Genesis50:9 Ki pa kobooto ineendet kariisyek ak piik che ketei paraisisyek. Ki piik che chaang' kot.
Genesis50:10 Ye kingo it rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Atad
Genesis50:11 Ye kingo keer che menyei emonooto
Genesis50:12 Ki yachi anyun weeriikyik ko uu ye kiga ng'at ineendet icheek.
Genesis50:13 Kisut poortannyi weeriikyik kwo emetap Kanaan
Genesis50:14 Kingo kagotup Joseph kwandanyi

Genesis50:19 Ago ki leenji Joseph
Genesis50:20 Okweek
Genesis50:21 Amata oiywei anyun nguno. Abook kobooto lagokwok.” Ak ki igaigai icheek ak kong'alaalji eng' talasyet.

Genesis50:23 Ki keer Joseph lagogap Ephraim agoi ibinda ne po somok

Genesis50:26 Kime anyun Joseph
Exodus1:1 Chu anyun kainaigap weeriigap Israel che ki it Misiri kobooto Jakobo; ki wo chii tugul ak koonnyi:
Exodus1:2 Reuben
Exodus1:3 Issakar
Exodus1:4 Dan
Exodus1:5 Ki tamanwogik tisap piik tugul che po iyoteetap Jakobo. Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki mi Joseph Misiri.
Exodus1:6 Ki it anyun kolil Joseph
Exodus1:7 Ak ki sigiis piigap Israel
Exodus1:8 Ki piit anyun laitoryat age ne ki poi Misiri ne ki ma kongen Joseph.
Exodus1:9 Ki leenji `ineendet piikyik
Exodus1:10 Kanyool anyun keng'ulatiitu si ma tesagis
Exodus1:11 Ki inde anyun kipnyeberainik si kobiit konyaliil icheek eng' otisyet ne ki nyigiis. Ki teech koteekyi Pharaoh ole kigonoree tuguuk; nganasoogap Pitom ak Raamses.
Exodus1:12 Ago ye kingo tesak kanyaliilet ne ki kinyalil piigap Israel
Exodus1:13 Ki pirto `Misiriik piigap Israel eng' koroomnateet ne oo.
Exodus1:14 Ki igoochi saboonwekwak kong'woneegitu eng' otwoknateet ne koroom eng' poisyetap meneet ak matubaruuk
Exodus1:15 Ki ng'at anyun `laitoryatap Misiri chebyosogap sigisyo che po Yahudik che ki kiguure Sipra ak Pua
Exodus1:16 koleenji; “Ye osigisyechi kwonyiik che po Yahudik ak ngo keer eng' ng'echereetap sigisyo lakweet ne kagisich ole weeriit
Exodus1:17 Ki iywei chebyosochooto po sigisyo Kamuktaindet
Exodus1:18 Ki kuur laitoryat chebyosochooto ak koteepse koleenji
Exodus1:19 Kowolji `chebyosochooto Pharaoh koleenji; “Ma kergei kwonyiigap Yahudik ak che po Misiriik. Kiimeen icheek ak isip kosigisyei kotom koitita chebyosetap sigisyo.”
Exodus1:20 Ki yachi Kamuktaindet ne myee chebyosochooto po sigisyo
Exodus1:21 Amu kayweet ne ki iywei chebyosochooto po sigisyo Kamuktaindet
Exodus1:22 Ki ng'at `Pharaoh piikyik kogeny koleenji; “Owiirchi weeriit age tugul ne kisichei aino ak omete chepto age tugul kosap.”
Exodus2:1 Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki itunis chiito age ne po pororyetap Lawi
Exodus2:2 Ak ki manach osotyondonooto ak kosich weeriit
Exodus2:3 Ye ki mata komuuchi kouny kosiir yooto
Exodus2:4 Kitonone chepkamet ye ma loo
Exodus2:5 Ki choortagei cheptap Pharaoh kwo kouungei eng' aino. Ye kibendoti tiibiik eng' tabandap aineet che ki mi kobooto ineendet
Exodus2:6 Kingo yaat kogeer lakweet ne weeriit koriirei. Kiriree `ineendet lakwanooto ak kole; “Agenge lakwani eng' che po Yahudik.”
Exodus2:7 ki teebee chepkametap lakwanooto cheptap Pharaoh koleenji; “Tos myee awo aguurun cheplakwet eng' osotigap Yahudik si koriibun lakwaniito?”
Exodus2:8 Koleenji cheptap Pharaoh; “Ee
Exodus2:9 Ki leenji `cheptap Pharaoh ineendet; “Imut lakwani
Exodus2:10 Kingo kagoner ak koeet lakweet
Exodus2:11 Eng' peetuusyek alak ye kiga koeet Musa
Exodus2:12 Kigusyigong' Musa komosi ak komosi
Exodus2:13 Ki wo kogeny eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ak ki keer kobiregei piik aeng'u che po Yahudik. Koleenji ineendet ne ki kalel
Exodus2:14 Kowolji koleenji
Exodus2:15 Kingo kas Pharaoh ng'olyoondonooto
Exodus2:16 Ki pwa tiibiik tisabu che po tisiindet age ne po Midian si kosiil peek konyiit moingonik si kobiit konaga akweetap keechiiregap kwandanywa.
Exodus2:17 Ak ki pwa mestoweek koon tiipchooto
Exodus2:18 Ye kingo it tiipchooto ole mi kwandanywa Reuel
Exodus2:19 Kowol icheek kole; “Katoretech Misirindet eng' eunegap mestoweek
Exodus2:20 Koleenji icheek; “Mi ano chiichooto? Amu nee si omete? Oguur konyo koamis.”
Exodus2:21 Ki cham Musa kotebi ak chiichooto
Exodus2:22 Ki sich `Ziporah weeriit
Exodus2:23 Ye kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang'
Exodus2:24 Ki kas Kamuktaindet tigenoikwak
Exodus2:25 Ki keer Kamuktaindet piigap Israel

Exodus3:2 Eng' yooto

Exodus3:15 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Musa kogeny
Exodus3:16 Ui
Exodus3:17 Ak kaatil ale
Exodus3:18 Tuun kasei iit kuting'ung' icheek. Eng' yooto
Exodus3:19 Angen ale ma chamwok laitoryatap Misiri obe
Exodus3:20 Ara achuule eunnyu abiree Misiriik kwang'utik che amache ayai eng' kwenunnywa ak ye ibata chooto kotyachak obe.
Exodus3:21 Ak agoonok onyooru chameet eng' taitap Misiriik si ye obe
Exodus3:22 Ingosoom anyun kwondo age tugul chiitap kokwennyi
Exodus4:1 Ki wolji anyun Musa koleenji
Exodus4:2 koteebee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Exodus4:3 Koleenji Kamuktaindet
Exodus4:4 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa; “Iyogoite eung'ung'
Exodus4:5 “Si kobiit koyan icheek kole
Exodus4:6 Ak ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny
Exodus4:7 Koleenji Kamuktaindet; “Ketite euut irookte tegeng'ung'.” Ki iweech Musa euut korookto tegeennyi ak ye kingo nem
Exodus4:8 “Ngo ma kasin
Exodus4:9 Ago
Exodus4:10 Ago ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus4:11 Ak kiteebe `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koleenji; “Ng'oo ne kiyaei kutitap chii? Anan ne yaei chii konamak kuut
Exodus4:12 Ara anyun
Exodus4:13 Ago ki le Musa
Exodus4:14 Ki koromitu nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa
Exodus4:15 Ing'alaaljini ineendet ak imwachi ng'aleek che mwaei. Ami anee kobooten eng' ng'alaaleng'ung'
Exodus4:16 Egu ineendet kuting'ung'
Exodus4:17 Ara anyun
Exodus4:18 Kingo pata koweek Musa kwo kap `Jethro; kapyugoinnyi ak koleenji
Exodus4:19 Kingo ta komiitei Musa oliin po Midian kong'alaalji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Exodus4:20 Ki imut Musa osotyonnyi ak weeriikyik ak kolaany sigiryet
Exodus4:21 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa; “Ye igetitegei Misiri
Exodus4:22 Ileenjini Pharaoh
Exodus4:23 ak kaamwaun aleenjin
Exodus4:24 Ye kita komi kootap toek eng' ooreet kowendi
Exodus4:25 Ki nam anyun Ziporah koita ne ng'atip
Exodus4:26 Ki pagaakta `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. Ak ki le osotyondonooto
Exodus4:27 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron
Exodus4:28 Ak ki mwachi `Musa Aron ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kiga koyooktoe
Exodus4:29 Yetyo koba Musa ak Aron koyum poisyek tugul che po piigap Israel.
Exodus4:30 Ki mwa anyun Aron ng'aleek tugul che kiga komwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus4:31 ak ki iyan piik. Ak ye kingo kas kole kagonyonji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Israel
Exodus5:1 Kingo pata chuuto koba Musa ak Aron ak koleenji Pharaoh
Exodus5:2 koteebee Pharaoh koleenji
Exodus5:3 Ak ki le icheek
Exodus5:4 Ago ki wolji `laitoryatap Misiri icheek koleenji
Exodus5:5 Ki le Pharaoh
Exodus5:6 Eng' peetuut nooto kong'at `Pharaoh kipnyeberainigap piik ak pounik
Exodus5:7 “Amata ogoochi piik kogeny mobeek che cham koyae matubaruuk. Ingoba icheegei kocheeng'jigei.
Exodus5:8 Ago obirchini icheek koyai matubaruuk che tee che kocham koyaei eng' kotugul. Amochuchuch kiy eng' chooto. Choriren pichu
Exodus5:9 Otesyi icheek poisyet ne nyigiis
Exodus5:10 Ki manda anyun kipnyeberainik ak chemogenikwak
Exodus5:11 oba okweegei
Exodus5:12 Ki yestaat anyun piik eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri koyumat mobeek che beelee matubaruuk.
Exodus5:13 Ki ichirchir `kipnyeberainik piik
Exodus5:14 Ki kibir anyun kipnyeberainigap piigap Israel
Exodus5:15 Ak ki pa anyun pounigap piigap Israel koriirchi Pharaoh
Exodus5:16 Ma ki koonech mobeek
Exodus5:17 Ago ki leenji
Exodus5:18 Ara anyun
Exodus5:19 Ki keer pounigap piigap Israel kole tinyei nyalilda
Exodus5:20 Ye kingo manda icheek eng' kap Pharaoh
Exodus5:21 ak ki leenji icheek
Exodus5:22 Ak kiweekyigei Musa ye mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koleenji
Exodus5:23 Amu kobooch ngap anyoo kap Pharaoh ang'alaalji eng' kaineng'ung'
Exodus6:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus6:2 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet Musa koleenji; “Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Exodus6:3 Ki among'ji Abraham
Exodus6:4 Ki agimiit kayomisennyu kobooto icheek
Exodus6:5 Kobooto nooto
Exodus6:6 Ileenji anyun piigap Israel
Exodus6:7 Anamok oegu piikyuk
Exodus6:8 Ak amutwak obwa emet ne ki aitoochi eunnyu agoochi Abraham
Exodus6:9 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Musa piigap Israel ko uu nooto. Nga no
Exodus6:10 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus6:11 “Mande
Exodus6:12 Ago ki ng'alaal Musa eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Exodus6:13 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron agobo piigap Israel ak Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri
Exodus6:14 Chu ko poisyegap kooriigap weeriigap Reuben taitap Israel: Hanok
Exodus6:15 Weeriigap Simion ko ki: Jemuel
Exodus6:16 Chu ko kainaigap weeriigap Lawi ko uu ortinwekwak: Gerson
Exodus6:17 Weeriigap Gerson ko ki: Libni ak Shimei
Exodus6:18 Ak weeriigap Kohat ko ki: Amram
Exodus6:19 Weeriigap Merari ko ki: Mali ak Musi. Chuuto ko kooriigap Lawiik ko uu ortinwekwak.
Exodus6:20 Ki itun anyun Amram sengennyi Jokebed
Exodus6:21 Weeriigap Itshar ko: Kora
Exodus6:22 Ki weeriigap Uzziel ko Mishael
Exodus6:23 Ki itun `Aron Eliseba
Exodus6:24 Weeriigap Kora ko: Asir
Exodus6:25 Ak ki itun Eleazar weeriitap Aron age eng' tiibiigap Putiel
Exodus6:26 Ki Aron ak Musa che ki mwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji: “Omoong'u piigap Israel eng' emetap Misiri ko uu lugosyekwak.”
Exodus6:27 Ki icheeget Musa ak Aron che ki mwachi Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri
Exodus6:28 Ak eng' peetuunooto ne ki ng'alaaljin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' emetap Misiri
Exodus6:29 kong'alaalji koleenji
Exodus6:30 Ago ki mwa Musa eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Exodus7:1 Ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus7:2 Imwachini ng'eetap komet Aron tuguuk tugul che ang'atiin
Exodus7:3 Auuiiti muguleldap Pharaoh
Exodus7:4 ago ma imuuchi kogasaak Pharaoh
Exodus7:5 Ye achuul eunnyu atokyi Misiri
Exodus7:6 Ki yai anyun Musa ak Aron ko uu nooto
Exodus7:7 Kiga koit kenyiisyegap Musa tamanwogik sisiit
Exodus7:8 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron
Exodus7:9 “Ye teebenak Pharaoh kwang'utyet
Exodus7:10 Ko uu nooto ko ki pa Musa ak Aron anyun kap Pharaoh
Exodus7:11 Ki guur agine Pharaoh piik che tinyei utaatyet ak orgoik. Ak ki yai ak icheek ko uu nooto eng' ng'oorsennywa piigap Misiri che ng'oorsei ak che ng'oomen.
Exodus7:12 Ki wiirchi chii age tugul eng' icheek kiroktonyi ng'wony ak kiwalogis koek erenook. Ago kilugui kirokto ne po Aron kirokweekwak.
Exodus7:13 Ki iuit muguleldap Pharaoh
Exodus7:14 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus7:15 Ara anyun ui karon kap Pharaoh amu wendi aino. Tonone tabandap aineet si otuiyechi yooto. Ip kirokto nooto kowalak koek ereneet eng' eung'ung'
Exodus7:16 ui ak ileenji ineendet
Exodus7:17 Kamwa anyun ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus7:18 Pegu njireenik che mi aineet
Exodus7:19 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus7:20 Ki yai Musa ak Aron ko uu ye ki kang'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus7:21 Ki pek njireenik che ki mi aineet ak kibul aineet kot ko mata komuuch Misiriik koe peegap aineet
Exodus7:22 Ago ye kingo yai ko uu nooto eng' ng'oorsennywa ak icheek piik che ng'oomen che ng'oorsei che po Misiri
Exodus7:23 Kiweektagei anyun Pharaoh kwo koonnyi
Exodus7:24 Kibalaat anyun Misiriik tugul ole neegitee aineet koleen tamangap konyoor peek che eei
Exodus7:25 Ki iwong'kei peetuusyek tisabu kobooch ngap kokwer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor aineet.
Exodus8:1 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus8:2 Ngot ietee koba
Exodus8:3 Nyiei aineet mororochik
Exodus8:4 Togostaenen inyee
Exodus8:5 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus8:6 Ki chuul anyun Aron eunnyi kotokyi peegap Misiri
Exodus8:7 Ago ki yai piik che ng'oomen che ng'oorsei eng' ng'oorsennywa ko uu nooto
Exodus8:8 Ki kuur anyun `Pharaoh Musa ak Aron ak koleenji
Exodus8:9 Koleenji Musa Pharaoh
Exodus8:10 Ak ki wol kole
Exodus8:11 Istoenengei mororochik
Exodus8:12 Ki manda anyun Musa ak Aron eng' kap Pharaoh ak koriirchi `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koisto mororochik che kiga ibookyine Pharaoh.
Exodus8:13 Ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ng'olyootap Musa ak ki pek mororochik eng' kooriik
Exodus8:14 Ak ki kiiyumat keburusyek che chaang'
Exodus8:15 Ago kingo keer Pharaoh kole ma komi mororochik
Exodus8:16 Koleenji kogeny `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus8:17 Ki yai inee ko uu nooto. Ki chuul eunnyi Aron ak kokwere kiroktonyi temburyek che po ng'wony
Exodus8:18 Kityem piik che ng'oomen che ng'oorsei eng' ng'oorsennywa komong' isireek
Exodus8:19 Ki mwachi anyun pichooto ng'oomen che ng'oorsei
Exodus8:20 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus8:21 Ago ngot ko mechamji piikyuk koba
Exodus8:22 Ago abestosi atabaani eng' peetuunooto emetap Goshen ole menyei piikyuk si ma it kalyang'ik olooto ak si kobiit inai inyee ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi emet.
Exodus8:23 Andai kiwateet kwenutap piikyuk ak piiguk. Piitu kaboorunonooto mutai.”
Exodus8:24 Ak ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto; Kichang'a kalyang'ik miising' eng' kootap Pharaoh
Exodus8:25 Kiyookto Pharaoh keguur Musa ak Aron
Exodus8:26 Ago ki wolji Musa Koleenji
Exodus8:27 Nyolu keebe panda ne po peetuusyek somok eng' surkwen
Exodus8:28 Kowol kole Pharaoh
Exodus8:29 Koleenji Musa
Exodus8:30 Ki wo anyun Musa eng' ole mi Pharaoh kwo kosa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Exodus8:31 Ak ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu saaetap Musa. Ki istoe kalyang'ik Pharaoh
Exodus8:32 Nga no
Exodus9:1 Ki leenji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus9:2 Ago ngot ietee koba ak kota iraany icheek
Exodus9:3 keero
Exodus9:4 Ibestos Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuugap Israel eng' tuugap Misiri si ma me kiy agot agenge eng' tugul che po piigap Israel.’ ”
Exodus9:5 Ak ki inde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kasarta
Exodus9:6 Ki yai Kamuktaindet kioto eng' peetuut ne ki isubi ak ki pek kiyagiik tugul che po Misiri
Exodus9:7 Ki iyookto `Pharaoh piik kooro agobo kiyagiik che po piigap Israel
Exodus9:8 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron
Exodus9:9 Egu chooto temburyek che puspus eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri
Exodus9:10 Ki ip anyun icheek oreegap maat ne oo
Exodus9:11 Ak ki ma imuuch kotononso piik che ng'oomen che ng'oorsei eng' taitap Musa
Exodus9:12 Ago
Exodus9:13 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus9:14 Amu ayookyini korotwek che ng'woneen muguleldang'ung'
Exodus9:15 Amu kata achuule eunnyu abariin ak piiguk eng' koroito
Exodus9:16 ago kaachamun isap
Exodus9:17 Ta ilasugei iraanye piikyuk
Exodus9:18 Amu nooto anyun
Exodus9:19 Iyookte anyun
Exodus9:20 Ineendet ne ki iywei ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' otwogigap Pharaoh ko ki imweito otwogikyik ak akwotisyekyik koba kooriik.
Exodus9:21 Ago ineendet ne ki ma iit ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kiy
Exodus9:22 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus9:23 Ki chuul anyun Musa kiroktonyi kotokyi kipsengwet
Exodus9:24 Ki piit anyun koigap ropta kobooto maat ne ki ilyeli eng' kimnateet ne oo kot
Exodus9:25 Ki pir koigap ropta tugul che ki mi timiin eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri
Exodus9:26 Emetap Goshen ineegei
Exodus9:27 Eng' yooto anyun
Exodus9:28 Osaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kagoyam tuleennyi ak koik; agoonok anee obe
Exodus9:29 Koleenji Musa ineendet
Exodus9:30 Ago angen ale
Exodus9:31 Ki kibir minutik alak che ki kiguure mabuteek ak baale amu kigaba met baale ak kiga yesyo taaptogap mabuteek.
Exodus9:32 Ago ki ma kibir nganuuk ak peek alak che kiguure kusemet amu ki tomo koeegitu.
Exodus9:33 Ki manda Musa eng' nganaseet kwo eng' ole mi Pharaoh. Yeityo koitoochi eunekyik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus9:34 Ye kingo keer Pharaoh kole ma komi ropta ak koigap ropta ak tuleet
Exodus9:35 Ko uu ye kiga komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa
Exodus10:1 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus10:2 Si kobiit omwa kogas lagokwak ak mochogorenikwok ole ki aite Misiriik koek che perber

Exodus10:4 Keero
Exodus10:5 Tuchei emet
Exodus10:6 Nyiei kooriguk
Exodus10:7 koteebee otwogikyik Pharaoh koleenji
Exodus10:8 Eng' nooto anyun
Exodus10:9 Kowolji Musa koleenji
Exodus10:10 Ak ki `leenji ineendet icheek
Exodus10:11 Ma uu nooto. Ma chamwok omut lagokwak. Oba okweegei murenik
Exodus10:12 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus10:13 Kochuul anyun Musa eunnyi ak kotokyi kiroktonyi emetap Misiri. Kogoon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor usoonet ne punu kong'asiis kousyi emet peetuunooto komugul
Exodus10:14 Ki togos chereng'endet kobookyi emet komugul ne po Misiri
Exodus10:15 Amu ki tuch emet komugul
Exodus10:16 Ki iyookto anyun Pharaoh keguur Musa ak Aron eng' chokyinet
Exodus10:17 Nooto anyun
Exodus10:18 Ki wo eng' ole mi Pharaoh
Exodus10:19 Ki wol Kamuktaindet ne Toroor usoonet ne kiim miising' kousune cherongo

Exodus10:21 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus10:22 Ki chuul anyun Musa eunnyi kotokyi kipsengwet
Exodus10:23 Ki ma imuuch chii kogeer chii eng' Misirik
Exodus10:24 Ki kuur `Pharaoh Musa yeityo koleenji
Exodus10:25 Ago ki leenji Musa
Exodus10:26 Kikwerye akwotisyekyok ak icheek. Ma ng'etu agot agenge. Amu chooto che kekwerye si keboisyechine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

Exodus11:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus11:2 Mwachi anyun piik kogas komyee ileenji kosoom chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi tuguuk che po fedha ak che po thahabu.”
Exodus11:3 Ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun piik konyoor chameet eng' Misiriik. Ne siirei nooto
Exodus11:4 Ki leenji `Musa Pharaoh
Exodus11:5 Pegu anyun kiboretook tugul eng' emetap Misiri kobooch taita ne po Pharaoh ne tebee ng'echereetap pounateet agoi taita ne po kwondo ne otwogindet ne ng'aisei. Agot kirgit age tugul ne twatei tyony age tugul
Exodus11:6 Piitu kateiyet ne oo ne kitom kobiitu eng' emetap Misiri komugul ak ma kobiitu ne uu nooto kogeny.
Exodus11:7 Ago eng' piigap Israel koma mi agot seset ne imuuchi koseng'eng'ji chii anan tyony. Si kobiit onai ole ibestos `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiriik ak Israel.
Exodus11:8 Yeityo kochoorgei anyun otwogichuguk kobwa ole ami ak kong'uruukso eng' tainnyu eng' konyit ne oo
Exodus11:9 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus11:10 Nganda ki yai Musa ak Aron kwang'utichuuto tugul eng' taitap Pharaoh
Exodus12:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron eng' emetap Misiri
Exodus12:2 “Egu eng' okweek arawani taunetap arawek ak koek arawet ne po tai eng' kenyiit.
Exodus12:3 Omwachi tuiyet komugul ne po Israel oleenji eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawani
Exodus12:4 Ngo ng'ering' piik eng' kapchii ne ma imuuchi koam arwanooto
Exodus12:5 Egu arweng'wong' mengit ne libwoop ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Oleweni arwanooto eng' keechiirek anan ko ng'oroorek.
Exodus12:6 Yeityo otabaan agoi koit peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawaniito
Exodus12:7 Ingonam icheek anyun korotiik ak koilee tugatugik tuwai ak rateiywotap tugatuk eng' koot age tugul ne ki ame arwanooto.
Exodus12:8 Amei kemounooto panyechooto kagibeel eng' ma
Exodus12:9 Amoam ko tuonen
Exodus12:10 Ne siirei nooto ko mat kong'et agot kitigin kot koeekyi. Ago ne kang'et agoi koeech obeel eng' ma.
Exodus12:11 Oame anyun ko kaoratkei
Exodus12:12 Amu eng' kemounooto
Exodus12:13 Egu anyun korotichooto ko oile tugatugik kaboorunet eng' okweek eng' kooriikwok ole omi. Ye ageer korotiik asiirtoenok ak ma ityinok koroato konyo kong'emak ye abare emetap Misiri
Exodus12:14 Egu peetuuniito peetuutap kabwaatet eng' okweek. Oriip kobunji igoorto ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oyai igoorito koek ng'atuutyet eng' ibinwekwok tugul agoi koigeny.
Exodus12:15 Oam magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek peetuusyek tisap. Oistoi eng' peetuut ne tai mermereek eng' kooriikwok. Amu king'etoi age tugul eng' Israel ne kaam magatiinik che mi mermereek eng' kong'etee peetuut ne po tai agoi ne po tisap.
Exodus12:16 Peetuut ne po tai ak ne po tisap ko egu eng' okweek peetuutap kayumetapkei ne itabaanat ne tiliil. Ma kiyaei poisyo age tugul eng' peetuusyechooto
Exodus12:17 Oriip igoori po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek amu ki eng' peetuuni ne ki among'u lugosyekwok komang'une emetap Misiri. Amu nooto anyun oriip ak oyai igoori eng' peetuuniito eng' ibinwekwok tugul ak koek ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny.
Exodus12:18 Oame anyun magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' arawet ne po tai eng' koskoleng'utap peetuutap taman ak ang'wan agoi koskoleng'utap peetuutap tiptem ak agenge.
Exodus12:19 Ma kinyoorchin kooriikwok mermereek eng' peetuusyechooto tisap: King'etoi eng' Israel age tugul ne amei ne kaginde mermereek
Exodus12:20 Moame kiy age tugul ne kaginde mermereek. Oame magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul.”
Exodus12:21 Ki kuur anyun `Musa poisyek tugul che po Israel ak koleenji
Exodus12:22 Onam ratuutyetap keetiik che kiguure husop
Exodus12:23 Amu nyoo kosiirtoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kowendi kobarei taiywegap Misiriik. Ye keer korotiik eng' rateiywotap tugatuk ak eng' tugatugik tuwai eng' kooriikwok
Exodus12:24 Oriibe anyun ng'olyoondoni koek ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' inyee ak weeriiguk.
Exodus12:25 Ak ye tuun oit emet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki koaror oriip anyun igoorito.
Exodus12:26 Ye tuun teebenak lagokwok
Exodus12:27 Oleenji anyun icheek
Exodus12:28 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel koyai ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron.
Exodus12:29 Kingo it kemoi kween
Exodus12:30 Ki ng'eet anyun Pharaoh kemoi kobooto otwogikyik tugul ak Misiriik tugul. Ki piit kateiyet ne oo eng' Misiri amu ki ma ng'et koot agot agenge ne ki ma mee chii.
Exodus12:31 Eng' kemounooto
Exodus12:32 Okweri keechiirekwok ak tuukwok ak obe
Exodus12:33 Ki ichirchir `Misiriik piik kochaakta komanda eng' emet
Exodus12:34 Ki nam anyun piik magatiinik che tuonen che tomo kinde mermereek ak tereenikwak che kikwang'e ak ye kingo kagorate ngoroikwak
Exodus12:35 Ki yai piigap Israel ko uu ng'olyootap Musa
Exodus12:36 Ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiriik kocham Yahudik
Exodus12:37 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel kong'eetyee Rameses agoi koit Sukoth. Ki neegit murenik eliphuusyek pogol lo che ki pendi eng' keelyek
Exodus12:38 Ki pa kobooto icheeget tuiyet ne oo ne po piik alak tugul che teerchiin; kobooto keechiirek ak tuuga che chaang'.
Exodus12:39 Ki peel magatiinik che tuonen che mengeechen che ki ma kinde mermereek che ki ibune Misiri. Ki ma kinde mermereek amu ki kioon eng' Misiri ak ki mata komuuch konyoor poroindo ne chopchinegei amitwogik alak tugul.
Exodus12:40 Kiga kotebi anyun piigap Israel eng' Misiri kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak sosom.
Exodus12:41 Kingo pata kenyisyechooto pogol ang'wan ak sosom
Exodus12:42 Kemounooto ki riip Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kosar piigap Israel
Exodus12:43 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron
Exodus12:44 ago otwogindet ne po chii age tugul ne ki kiale silingisyek ne kigeyatita
Exodus12:45 Ma amei punootyot anan otwogindet ne nyooru melekto.
Exodus12:46 Kiame koot agenge; amat oip peeny komanda saang' agot kitigin. Amat oiri kawet age tugul.
Exodus12:47 Kanyool anyun koyai ko uu nooto Israel komugul.
Exodus12:48 Ago ngo rutochin kiprutoiyot ne machei koboiboenji paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus12:49 Ng'atuutyet niito ko agenge ak kogergei eng' ne ki kisikyin emeng'wong' ak eng' ne toondet ne rutochinok.”
Exodus12:50 Ki yai piigap Israel tugul ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron.
Exodus12:51 Ak ki imaanda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto piigap Israel eng' emetap Misiri eng' lugosyekwak.
Exodus13:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus13:2 “Itabaanwa kiboretook tugul. Punjino age tugul ne yaatei iyoteet eng' piigap Israel
Exodus13:3 Yeityo koleenji `Musa piik
Exodus13:4 Omandoi rani eng' arawetap Abib.
Exodus13:5 Ye kagomutak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor oit emetap Kanaanik
Exodus13:6 Oame magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' peetuusyek tisap ak koek igoortap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuutap tisap.
Exodus13:7 Ki amei eng' peetuusyechooto tugul tisap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek. Amat kenyoorchi chii magatiinik che ki kinde mermereek ak amat kobiitune emeng'ung' komugul mermereek.
Exodus13:8 Tuun anyun imwachini weeriing'ung' eng' peetuunooto ileenjini
Exodus13:9 Ak tuun egu nooto kaboorunet eng' eung'ung' ak koek kabwaatet ne mi kwenutap konyeguk si kobiit kotebee ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kuting'ung'. Amu ki imoong'wok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor omang'une Misiri eng' euut ne kiim.
Exodus13:10 Ara anyun oyai igoori eng' peetuunnyi ne ki king'atyi eng' kenyiit age tugul.
Exodus13:11 “Ye tuun iitak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emetap Kanaanik ko uu ye ki iyasyeun ak kwanisyeguk kole koonok
Exodus13:12 itabaan anyun kobunji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tugul che yaatei iyoteet. Ak che po tai tyong'ik ko punjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Exodus13:13 Ityachi ne twatei sigiryet
Exodus13:14 Ye tuun teebenen weeriing'ung' eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei
Exodus13:15 Ak ye kingo etenech Pharaoh keebe
Exodus13:16 Egu niito kaboorunet eng' eung'ung' ak koek ratuutik che kirate anook eng' turyetap togeng'ung'. Amu ki imutwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' euut ne kiim kemang'une Misiri.”
Exodus13:17 Kingo kagounda `Pharaoh piik koba
Exodus13:18 Ago ki indochinot `Kamuktaindet piik kobun surkwen ne tokyingei Araraita ne Piriir. Ki togosta anyun piigap Israel komanda eng' emetap Misiri ko kagolaach kariik.
Exodus13:19 Ki ip `Musa kawegap Joseph. Amu kiga kogimgim `ineendet piigap Israel koyasyo koleenji
Exodus13:20 Ki inam anyun pandanywa kong'eetyee Sukoth
Exodus13:21 Ki indoe icheek `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' toloitap pooldet peet
Exodus13:22 Ki ma isto ineendet eng' taitap piik toloitap pooldet peet
Exodus14:1 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus14:2 “Mwachi lagogap Israel koweek komuung'e taitap Pi-hairot kwenutap Migdol ak nyanjet ole itoorchingei Baal-sepon ak komuung'e yooto neegitee nyanjet.
Exodus14:3 Amu tuun mwaei Pharaoh agobo piigap Israel koleen
Exodus14:4 Eng' yooto kogeny auuiiti muguleldap Pharaoh si koosup icheek ak anyoorunee teegisto Pharaoh ak lugeennyi tugul si konai Misiriik kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ki yai anyun piigap Israel ko uu nooto.
Exodus14:5 Ki ngemwachi laitoryatap Misiri keleenji
Exodus14:6 Ki chop anyun chepkichutitap paraisiit ak komut asigarikyik che po lugeet.
Exodus14:7 Ki ip kariisyegap paraisisyek che po lugeet pogol lo che ki kilewen ak kariisyegap paraisisyek che po lugeet alak che po Misiri kotinyei age tugul kiptainikwak che ki pou.
Exodus14:8 Ki iuit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldap Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri ak ki isup piigap Israel che kimondoi eng' kimnateet ne oo.
Exodus14:9 Ki isup `Misiriik icheek ak paraisisyek tugul
Exodus14:10 Ye kingo riikta Pharaoh
Exodus14:11 Ki ing'ung'ung'ji `icheek Musa ak koleenji
Exodus14:12 Tos ma ki kimwaun eng' Misiri keleenjin
Exodus14:13 Ago ki wolji `Musa piik koleenji
Exodus14:14 Yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet lugeet agobo okweek; osisye okweek.”
Exodus14:15 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus14:16 Namji parak kiroktong'ung' ak ichuul eung'ung' itokyi nyanjet
Exodus14:17 Auuiiti aneendet mugulelwegap Misiriik
Exodus14:18 Ye kaanyoorunee teegisto Pharaoh
Exodus14:19 Ki wo anyun let malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne ki indoe piigap Israel ak ki wo kora toloitap pooldet ne ki mi tainnywa ak kotonone let.
Exodus14:20 Kitonone kwenutap lugeetap Misiriik ak tuiyetap Israel. Kingo imen
Exodus14:21 Ki chuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi nyanjet ak ki iyook Kamuktaindet usoonet ne punu kong'asiis kous kemout komugul koobeesyo peek si kobiit emet ne yaamaat; ak kipcheigei peek.
Exodus14:22 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel kobun emet ne yaamaat eng' kwenutap nyanjet. Kitoten peek eng' komostap tai ak eng' komostap kaataam.
Exodus14:23 Ki isup `Misiriik icheek kochoorchigei kwenutap nyanjet; paraisisyek tugul che po Pharaoh ak kariisyekyik ak piikyik che ketei paraisisyek.
Exodus14:24 Eng' riipseet ne po karon
Exodus14:25 Kichun keelyegap kariisyekwak ak kong'onng'onio kot ko ye ki kwerye ko uueen. Kole anyun Misiriik
Exodus14:26 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus14:27 Ki chuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi nyanjet ak ki weigei peek kotuiyo ko uu yegonye ko kaeech. Ki mweiso Misiriik ye kingo keer peek kotokyingei icheeget ago kitoorchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiriik kwenutap nyanjet.
Exodus14:28 Ki weigei peek komaaluuch kariisyek
Exodus14:29 Ago ki pun piigap Israel ng'wonyut ne yaamaat eng' kwenutap nyanjet ko katoten peek eng' komosi ak komosi.
Exodus14:30 Ki sar eng' peetuunooto anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eng' eunegap Misiriik ak ki keer `Israel Misiriik ko kagobek komi ngeguutap nyanjet.
Exodus14:31 Ki keer Israel poisyet ne kiim ne ki yachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiriik. Ki iywei anyun `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koyan `icheek ineendet ak Musa otwogindennyi.
Exodus15:1 Ki tyen tyeni Musa kobooto piigap Israel kotyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Exodus15:2 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kimnateennyu ak tyendanyu
Exodus15:3 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ko ne po lugeet. Kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Exodus15:4 Ki wiirchi araraita kariisyegap Pharaoh kobooto lugeennyi. Ki imaluuch Araraita ne Piriir kiptainikyik che ki lewen.
Exodus15:5 Ki tuch icheek rirosyek ak kirorokta koba rirosyek ko uu koita.
Exodus15:6 Eung'ung' ne po tai
Exodus15:7 Iluuli icheek che ng'eetyinin eng' ooindap telunateng'ung'. Iyooktoi nereegeguk; peelei icheek kowong'kei ko uu mobeek.
Exodus15:8 Ki iyumgei peek amu kimnateetap kabuuset ne po seruneguk; kitononso peek kotooten; kinamgei peek kouegitu eng' araraita kween.
Exodus15:9 Ki le puunyoot
Exodus15:10 Ki iusyi eng' usooneng'ung'
Exodus15:11 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus15:12 Ki ichuul eung'ung' ne po tai ak kilugui `ng'wony icheek.
Exodus15:13 Ki indochi inyee eng' rireeneng'ung' piik che ki ityaach komanda; ki indochi icheek eng' kimnateng'ung' koba oldang'ung' ne tiliil.
Exodus15:14 Ki kas pororyosyek alage
Exodus15:15 Ki tang'any anyun kirwoogik che po Edom; potandos che kiimeen che po Moabik; kachootyo tugul che menyei Kanaan.
Exodus15:16 Kanam icheek kamuiset ak kaiyweisyet; eng' etunatetap eung'ung'
Exodus15:17 Imutu icheek komong' ak inde icheek kominogis eng' tulweetap poroteng'ung'
Exodus15:18 Laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny ak koigeny.”
Exodus15:19 Kingo pa paraisisyek che po Pharaoh nyanjet kobooto kariisyekyik ak piikyik che ketei paraisisyek ko ki iweech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peegap nyanjet kogeny kotuch icheek; ago kibun piigap Israel emet ne yaamaat eng' kwenutap nyanjet.
Exodus15:20 Ki nam anyun Miriam kwondo ne maotyoo
Exodus15:21 Ki wolji Miriam koleenji
Exodus15:22 Ki indochi `Musa Yahudik koba eng' Araraita ne Piriir ak ki it surkwen ne po Sur. Ki pa pandap peetuusyek somok eng' surkwen ak ki ma nyoor peek.
Exodus15:23 Kingo it Marah
Exodus15:24 Ki ing'unyng'ung'ji `piik Musa
Exodus15:25 Ki riirchi `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki iboorchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet keetit. Ki nam keetoto yeityo kowiirchi peek ak ki anyinyitu. Kichopchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' olooto ng'atuutyet ak kirwooget kotyeme icheeget:
Exodus15:26 ak ki le
Exodus15:27 Ki it anyun icheek ole kiguure Elim
Exodus16:1 Ki inam anyun pandanywa kong'eetyee Elim
Exodus16:2 Ki ing'unyng'ung'ji tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel Musa ak Aron eng' surkwen.
Exodus16:3 Ki leenji `piigap Israel icheek
Exodus16:4 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa anyun
Exodus16:5 Eng' peetuut ne po lo
Exodus16:6 Ki leenji `Musa ak `Aron piigap Israel tugul
Exodus16:7 ak ogeer karon telunatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kasei ineendet kang'unyng'unyeng'wong' ne ong'unyng'ung'jini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Acheek anyun ko king'o si ong'unyng'ung'jech?”
Exodus16:8 Ki le Musa
Exodus16:9 Ki leenji `Musa Aron
Exodus16:10 Ak ye kita kong'alaaljin `Aron tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel
Exodus16:11 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus16:12 “Kaagas kang'unyng'unyetap piigap Israel. Mwachi ileenji
Exodus16:13 Ki pwa taok koskoleny konyi nganaseet ak ki ibut rewoot karon koyiem nganaseet.
Exodus16:14 Ye kingo togosta rewoot ne koga ibut
Exodus16:15 Ye kingo keer piigap Israel tuguuchooto
Exodus16:16 Niito kiit ne kong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Exodus16:17 Ki yai ko uu nooto piigap Israel ak ki iyum alak che chaang'
Exodus16:18 Ye kingo ker eng' kerebet
Exodus16:19 Ki leenji `Musa icheek
Exodus16:20 Ago ki ma kas iit alage eng' icheek kiit ne kimwachin Musa. Ki ituuch kotep kot koeech ak ki am kuutik ak ki pulyo. Ki nereekyi anyun `Musa pichooto.
Exodus16:21 Ki iyumi karonet age tugul che yamei koam chii tugul ak kingo ng'wanit asiis kochootyo.
Exodus16:22 Ki iyum eng' peetuut ne po lo che tee che cham koyumi konyil aeng': kereboonik aeng' chii tugul. Ak ki pa pounik tugul che po tuiyet komwachi Musa.
Exodus16:23 Ki leenji `Musa icheek
Exodus16:24 Ki konor kobunji mutai ko uu ye ki mwachi Musa
Exodus16:25 Ki le Musa
Exodus16:26 Oyumi eng' peetuusyek lo; ago eng' peetuutap tisap ko sabato
Exodus16:27 Ki pa alage eng' peetuutap tisap koleen koyumat
Exodus16:28 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus16:29 Onai ole kagoonok anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor sabato; eng' nooto anyun agoonok amitwogik eng' peetuutap lo che yamei peetuusyek aeng'; ingotebee chii tugul oldanyi
Exodus16:30 Ki imuuny anyun piik eng' peetuutap tisap.
Exodus16:31 Ki kuure kootap Israel amitwogichooto Mana: ki kergei tuguuchooto ak peek che mubere che leelach ak ki chamu magatiinik che mengeechen che ki kikwanda kumyat.
Exodus16:32 Ki le Musa
Exodus16:33 Ki leenji `Musa Aron
Exodus16:34 Ki igonor anyun Aron eng' taitap paornateet kole keriip ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.
Exodus16:35 Ki am piigap Israel mana kenyiisyek artam agoi koit emet ne menyei piik. Ki am mana agoi koit kiwotosyegap emetap Kanaan.
Exodus16:36 Kerebonooto kigeree mana ne kiguure omer ko aechin ak kebebertap taman ne po epah.
Exodus17:1 Ki inam panda anyun tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel kong'eetyee surkwen ne po Sin
Exodus17:2 Amu nooto
Exodus17:3 Ki am piik melelda eng' olooto
Exodus17:4 Ki riirchi `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Exodus17:5 Ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus17:6 Atonone taing'ung' eng' yooto po rwandet eng' Horeb. Ikwere rwandanooto komang'une peek si kobiit koe piik.” Ki yai anyun Musa ko uu nooto eng' taitap poisyegap Israel.
Exodus17:7 Ak ki kuure yooto Masa ak Meriba
Exodus17:8 Ki pwa anyun Amelek nyoo kobaregei ak Israel eng' Rephidim.
Exodus17:9 Ki leenji `Musa Joshua
Exodus17:10 Ki yai anyun Joshua ko uu ye kiga komwachi Musa ak ki wo kobargei ak Amelek. Ki togosta anyun Musa tulweet parak kobooto Aron ak Hur.
Exodus17:11 Ki yaak ko uu ni: ye kingo namji Musa parak eunnyi koterteeris Israel
Exodus17:12 Kingo ng'etyo anyun eunegap Musa
Exodus17:13 Ki iterteer anyun `Joshua Amelek ak piikyik eng' rotwetap chok.
Exodus17:14 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus17:15 Ki teech Musa kaptisisyet
Exodus17:16 Ak ki le
Exodus18:1 Ki kas anyun Jethro tisiindetap Midian
Exodus18:2 Ki imut anyun `Jethro Ziporah
Exodus18:3 ak weeriikyik aeng'. Ki kiguure age Gerson
Exodus18:4 ak ki kiguure age Elieser; amu ki le
Exodus18:5 Ki wo anyun Jethro kobooto weeriigap Musa ak osotyonnyi ole ki mi Musa eng' surkwen komuunyi eng' tulweetap Kamuktaindet.
Exodus18:6 Ki iyookto ineendet keleenji Musa
Exodus18:7 Ki manda anyun Musa kwo kotorookta kapyugoinnyi. Ki ing'uruuk ak kotoroochkei ak kiteebegei chametapkei yeityo komanda koba emait oriit.
Exodus18:8 Ki mwachi Musa anyun kapyugoinnyi tuguuk tugul che ki koyachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Pharaoh ak Misiriik agobo Israel
Exodus18:9 Ki paibait Jethro amu myeeindo tugul ne kiga koyachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel kosar icheek komang'une eunegap Misiriik.
Exodus18:10 Ki le Jethro
Exodus18:11 Angen nguno anyun ale oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir kamuktaik tugul. Amu ki sar piik eng' eunegap Misiriik che ki yachi pichooto kiit ne ya eng' menoteet.”
Exodus18:12 Eng' yooto anyun konam Jethro kabyugoitap Musa kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak tiseiywot ak koeng'ji Kamuktaindet. Ki nyo Aron kobooto poisyek tugul che po Israel koamis ak kabyugoitap Musa eng' taitap Kamuktaindet.
Exodus18:13 Eng' karonet ne po aeng'
Exodus18:14 Ye kingo keer kabyugoitap Musa tuguuk tugul che ki yachin `Musa piik
Exodus18:15 Kowolji `Musa kapyugoinnyi koleenji
Exodus18:16 Ye tinyei ng'olyoo kobwonjino
Exodus18:17 Koleenji anyun `kapyugoinnyi Musa
Exodus18:18 Iwong'ugei kimnateng'ung' inyee ak ne po pichu omiitei tugul. Amu siirei kimnateng'ung' niito ago memuuchi iyai inyegei.
Exodus18:19 Kas anyun ng'olyoondennyu aboorun kiit ne iyae ak ingotep Kamuktaindet kobooten. Myee iegu ne ing'alaaljini Kamuktaindet ne kata piik ak iipchi Kamuktaindet ng'aleekwak.
Exodus18:20 Ineet icheek kaneetisyosyek
Exodus18:21 Nyolu kogeny ilewenote eng' piik tugul piik che kiimeen
Exodus18:22 Ingoek icheek kirwoogik che irwookyin piik eng' peetuusyek tugul ak koibun ng'olyoot age tugul ne uui. Ago ingobesyechi icheek ng'olyoo age tugul ne ming'in
Exodus18:23 Ngot iyai kiito anyun ak ngo ng'atin Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto
Exodus18:24 Ki kas anyun Musa ng'aleegap kapyugoinnyi ak ki yai chooto tugul kamwachi ineendet.
Exodus18:25 Ki lewenot piik che kiimeen eng' Israel tugul ak konde koboi piik koek pounik che po eliphuusyek
Exodus18:26 Ki irwookyin `icheek piik eng' peetuusyek tugul. Ki ipchi Musa ng'aleek che uueen ago ki ibesyechi icheek ng'olyoo age tugul ne ming'in.
Exodus18:27 Yeityo kochamji anyun `Musa kapyugoinnyi kwo. Ki wo anyun pandanyi agoi emennyi.
Exodus19:1 Ki it anyun piigap Israel surkwen ne po Sinai eng' arawet ne po somok kobooch ngap komanda eng' emetap Misiri.
Exodus19:2 Kingo kagoba eng' Rephidim ak koit surkwen ne po Sinai
Exodus19:3 Ki togosta Musa kwo ole mi Kamuktaindet ak kiguur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' tulweet koleenji
Exodus19:4 ‘Ki ogeer kiit ne ki ayachi Misiriik ak ko uu ye ki agesenenak kebebaigap kipsichinik amutwak obwanjo.
Exodus19:5 Eng' nooto anyun
Exodus19:6 Oegu eng' anee laitornatetap tisiik ak pororyet ne itabaanat. Chuuto ng'aleek che iwendi imwachini piigap Israel.’ ”
Exodus19:7 Ki nyo anyun Musa koguur poisyegap pichooto ak kotetyi icheek ng'aleechooto tugul che ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet.
Exodus19:8 Ki wol piik tugul eng' kibagenge kole
Exodus19:9 ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus19:10 koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet
Exodus19:11 Ingochopkei agobo peetuut ne po somok: amu choorchingei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tulweetap Sinai eng' peetuutap somok eng' taitap piik tugul.
Exodus19:12 Tilji piik ole iboch ak ileenji; ‘Oriipkei si motogoste tulweet anan otwaa kiwotennyi. Kibarei age tugul ne tiinyei tulweet.
Exodus19:13 Ma kitiinyei eng' euut chii ne katiny kobatee kilage koik anan kemwok. Ama sabei age tugul
Exodus19:14 Ki choortagei Musa anyun kwo ole mi piik
Exodus19:15 Ki leenji piik
Exodus19:16 Eng' peetuutap somok anyun
Exodus19:17 Ki indochi `Musa piik ak komuut komong' eng' nganaseet koba kotuiyo ak Kamuktaindet. Ki pa anyun piik kotononie tulweet keel.
Exodus19:18 Ki iyeni tulweet komugul ne po Sinai amu kichoorchigei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tulwoonooto eng' maat. Ki togosta iyetanyi ne uu ne po maat ne oo kot ak ki potan tulweet miising'.
Exodus19:19 Kingo tesak cheetap iryageet kwo parak miising'
Exodus19:20 Kichoorchigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tulweetap Sinai parak ak kiguur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa kwo tulweet parak
Exodus19:21 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus19:22 Ingoanyinygei tisiik ak icheek che riikyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si ma par icheek.”
Exodus19:23 Ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus19:24 Ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koleenji
Exodus19:25 Ki choortagei anyun Musa kwo ole mi piik
Exodus20:1 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet ng'aleechu tugul kole
Exodus20:2 “Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus20:3 Amecheeng'jigei cheptalelisyek che teer
Exodus20:4 Ameyachigei kanamwet anan itoondap kiy age tugul ne mi parak kipsengwet anan ne mi ng'wony anan ne mi nyanjet ng'wony oriit;
Exodus20:5 ameng'uruukyi anan ioot icheek
Exodus20:6 Ago ariiree eliphuusyek eng' icheek che chama ak kosubi ng'atuutikyuk.
Exodus20:7 Amemwa kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' tangoi. Amu iityin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'oogisto ne mwaei kainennyi eng' tangoi.
Exodus20:8 Ibwaat peetuutap sabato
Exodus20:9 Iboisyee peetuusyek lo ak iyai poisyoniguk tugul
Exodus20:10 ago peetuutap tisap ko sabato ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Ameyai poisyo eng' peetuunooto inyee anan weeriing'ung' anan cheptong'ung'
Exodus20:11 Amu ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kipsengwet ak ng'wony
Exodus20:12 Teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung' si kochang'a peetuusyeguk eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Exodus20:13 Amerumisye.
Exodus20:14 Amoipkei.
Exodus20:15 Amechoorse.
Exodus20:16 Amebaoryanji chiitap kokweng'ung' eng' lembech.
Exodus20:17 Amegase myat kootap chiitap kokweng'ung'. Amegase myat osotyotap chiitap kokweng'ung' anan otwogindennyi ne muren anan otwogindennyi ne tye anan eitonyi anan sigiryennyi anan kiy age tugul ne po chiitap kokweng'ung'.”
Exodus20:18 Ye kingo keer piik tugul kalyelosyek ak tulweet ne ki iyeni
Exodus20:19 Ak ki leenji `icheek Musa
Exodus20:20 Koleenji `Musa piik
Exodus20:21 Kitononso piik anyun eng' ole loo ak kiriikta Musa ole mi Kamuktaindet eng' pooldet ne tuui.
Exodus20:22 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus20:23 Amat oyachigei kanamonik otesena che po fedha
Exodus20:24 Teekwo kaptisyet ne po ng'ung'unyek ak ieng'wo eng' kaptisisyonooto kagoochinoiguk che kibeelei ak kagoochinoiguk che po kaalyeet
Exodus20:25 Ngimache iteekwo kaptisisyet ne po koik
Exodus20:26 Ametogoste iwe kaptisisyennyu ibune lang'eiywot si mewe aach ngor.’ ”
Exodus21:1 Chu anyun ng'atuutik che indechini tainnywa:
Exodus21:2 Ngial otwogindet ne Hebranindet
Exodus21:3 Ngo ki nyonei ineegei
Exodus21:4 Ago ngo ki igoochin kiptaiyandennyi osotyot ak kosikyi weeriik anan ko tiibiik
Exodus21:5 Ngo mwa ineegei eng' chamennyi otwogindet kole achame anee kiptaiyandennyu
Exodus21:6 komut anyun kiptaiyandennyi chiichooto kwo taitap Kamuktaindet. Yeityo kimut konyo kurgat anan tugatukyetap kurgeet ak kobarbar itinnyi kiptaiyandennyi eng' kateet si koot ineendet agoi.
Exodus21:7 Ngo alda chii cheptonyi koek otwogindet koma mandoi chebooto ko uu otwogik che muren.
Exodus21:8 Ngo ma ibaibai chebooto kiptaiyandennyi ne ki lewen kole si tuun koek osotyonnyi
Exodus21:9 Ngo koochi weeriinnyi koek osotyonnyi
Exodus21:10 Ngo syon
Exodus21:11 Ngo ma yachi ineendet tuguuchooto somok
Exodus21:12 Ineendet ne pirei chii kot kome
Exodus21:13 Ago chii ne kama koyaei ko kwetyin
Exodus21:14 Ngosetyi chii chiitap kokwennyi ak kobar ineendet eng' ng'aalseet
Exodus21:15 Ineendet ne pirei kwan anan kamet
Exodus21:16 Ineendet ne choorei chii ak koalda anan ngenamji komi eunekyik
Exodus21:17 Ineendet ne sasei kwan anan kamet
Exodus21:18 “Ngo pooryo piik ak kewire age koita
Exodus21:19 ak ngot kong'eet kowendot kotebenoti kiroktonyi
Exodus21:20 “Ngo pir chii otwogindennyi ne muren anan ne tye eng' kirokto kot komechi eunekyik
Exodus21:21 Ago ngot koeekyi peetuut agenge anan ko aeng' ama me
Exodus21:22 “Ngo pooryo piik kot kokwer osotyot ne tomono ak kororok moet ama koam kiy osotyondonooto
Exodus21:23 Ago ngo yaak kiy ne ya
Exodus21:24 konda eng' konda
Exodus21:25 peelset eng' peelset
Exodus21:26 “Ngo kwer chii kondap otwogindennyi ne muren anan ne tye
Exodus21:27 Ngo kwer keldetap otwogindennyi ne muren anan otwogindennyi ne tye kot kochun
Exodus21:28 “Ngo toor kirgit muren anan kobogoryo ak kome
Exodus21:29 Ago ngo kocham kobarei piich kirgooto ak kigemwachi chiitap ko po ama koger ineendet
Exodus21:30 Ago ngemage ineendet kagerutyet kotyagegei
Exodus21:31 Kiyae ko uu kirwoogoniito ngo ki par kirgooto weeriit anan ko chepto.
Exodus21:32 Ngo toor kirgit otwogindet ne muren anan otwogindet ne tye
Exodus21:33 “Ngo yaat chii keriinget anan ngo pal keriing' ama koger ak kororokyi tany anan sigiryo
Exodus21:34 kogeeri chiichooto po keriinget
Exodus21:35 “Ngo par kirgit kirgitap chiito age kot kome
Exodus21:36 Ago ngot kingen keele ki cham kobarisyei kirgooto
Exodus22:1 “Ngo choor chii tany anan keechiir ak koeeny anan koalda
Exodus22:2 Ngenam choorindet kobutisyei komachei kochoorso ak kebar
Exodus22:3 Ago ngebar ineendet ko kagochor asiis
Exodus22:4 Ngenyoorchi eunnyi kioto kachoor kota kosabei
Exodus22:5 “Ngo yage chiito tennyi mbareetap chiito age anan ko mbareet ne po sabibuk
Exodus22:6 “Ngo lal maat ak konam ng'ootweet si kobeel peek che mi mbar anan ko peek che iyumotiin anan kobeel mbareet
Exodus22:7 “Ngo koochi chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi chepkondok anan tuguuk kogonorchi ak kechoor eng' kootap chiichooto
Exodus22:8 Ago ngo ma ki nam choorindet
Exodus22:9 “Ngot komi tiyet age tugul agobo kiy age tugul; ngo ne po tany anan sigiryo anan keechiir anan ne po ingor anan kiy age tugul ne ki pet ak komaiytos piik aeng'u koleen age tugul
Exodus22:10 “Ngomanaakyi chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi sigiryet anan eito anan keechiir anan tany age tugul
Exodus22:11 kotebee kayosyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwenutap pichooto tuwai
Exodus22:12 Ago ngot ko ki kichoor iman
Exodus22:13 Ngot ko ki nam tyony kotonaton
Exodus22:14 “Ngosoom chii chiitap kokwennyi kiy koboisyee
Exodus22:15 Ago ngo ki mi chiitap ko po
Exodus22:16 “Ngo kaigai `chii pergeiyat ne tomo keyachi koito ak koruiyo ak ineendet
Exodus22:17 Ngo eesyo kwandap pergeiyandanooto eng' kimnateet
Exodus22:18 “Amemete poonindet kosap.
Exodus22:19 “Kibarei age tugul ne ruitos ak tyony.
Exodus22:20 “Chii age tugul ne eeng'jin tiseiywot kamuktain age tugul ne ma Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus22:21 “Ameyachi ne ya too anan inyaliil. Amu ki oo toek ak okweek eng' emetap Misiri.
Exodus22:22 Ameus kwony age tugul ne kagosiirtoe manong'otyonnyi anan lakwa ne ma tinyei sigiik.
Exodus22:23 Ngius icheek eng' kiy age tugul ak koriircho
Exodus22:24 ak kolaany parak nereegekyuk ak abarenak rotwetap chok
Exodus22:25 “Ngi pesenji piikyuk robiinik
Exodus22:26 Nginame pesendo ngoryeetap chiitap kokweng'ung'
Exodus22:27 amu nooto kityo ngoryeet ne tugegei. Tos tugegei nee koruei? Ngo riircho agasyini amu atinye rireenet.
Exodus22:28 “Amat isas Kamuktaindet. Amat ichup pounindetap piiguk.
Exodus22:29 “Amegagei si igoitoi kobun chaang'indap tuguuguk ak eng' che kieei. Igoono taitang'ung' ne weeriit.
Exodus22:30 Yai ko uu nooto eng' tuguuk ak icheek ak eng' keechiireguk. Igoochi kotebi ak kamet peetuusyek tisap ak igoono eng' peetuut ne po sisiit.
Exodus22:31 Oegu piigap tiliilindo eng' anee. Eng' nooto anyun
Exodus23:1 “Amemwaate ng'aleek che po lembech. Amonamge ak kiptengekyot iegu paoryat ne ma po iman.
Exodus23:2 Amesup tuiyet iwe iyai kiy ne ya. Ye ibaoryan eng' kapkirwook ko matonamgei ak tuiyet ibaoryan lembech
Exodus23:3 Ametiytiy kibanania eng' ng'aleekyik.
Exodus23:4 “Nginyooru tetap punyondeng'ung' anan sigiryennyi ne petoti
Exodus23:5 Nginyooru sigiryetap ne wechin ko kagobut amu tuguuk che laei
Exodus23:6 “Amat imaas kirwoogetap kibananiandeng'ung' eng' kirwoogutikyik.
Exodus23:7 Istegei looitu eng' kirwoogutik che kirwookyin chii eng' lembech; amebar che ma tinyei yaityo ak che po imanda
Exodus23:8 Ametaach tuguuk che po asoya
Exodus23:9 “Amenyaliil toondet amu ongen ole teptoi muguleldap toondet amu ki oo toek eng' emetap Misiri.
Exodus23:10 “Igoole mbareeng'ung' kenyiisyek lo ak iges ruratennyi
Exodus23:11 ago mete eng' kenyiit ne po tisap kotep komuuny. Niito ko si kobiit konyoor turoonik kibananogap piiguk
Exodus23:12 “Yai poisyeng'ung' eng' peetuusyek lo ak imuuny eng' peetuutap tisap. Iyae niito si kobiit komuuny eitang'ung' ak sigiryeng'ung' ak konyoor kamuung'et weeriitap otwogindeng'ung' ne tye ak toondet.
Exodus23:13 Riip tuguuk tugul che kaamwaun. Amat imwa kainaigap kamuktaik
Exodus23:14 “Iyaiywo igoorto konyil somok eng' kenyiit age tugul.
Exodus23:15 Yai igoortap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek. Iame eng' peetuusyek tisap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek ko uu ye ki ang'atiin eng' peetuut ne ki kiaror eng' arawetap Abib; amu arawanooto ne ki omang'une Misiri. Amat konyo chii tainnyu ak euut puch.
Exodus23:16 Riip igoorto ne po kesisyet eng' tongoanigap minutikyik che igooljini mbar. Riip kora igoortap peetuusyek che kiyumune tuguugap mbar eng' kagesunetap kenyiit
Exodus23:17 Pwoonei taitap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor murenik tugul konyil somok eng' kenyiit agenge.
Exodus23:18 “Ameibu korotiigap tiseiywondennyu kobooto magatiinik che kaginde mermereek. Amengoeekyi mwanigap igoortanyu.
Exodus23:19 “Kanyool iibu tuguuk che po tai eng' tongoanik che po emeng'ung' kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. “Ameyoe aarwet cheegap kamet.
Exodus23:20 “Ayooktoi anyun malaikaiyat kondoenak koriibootok eng' ooreet ak komutaak obe ole ki achop.
Exodus23:21 Oriipkei eng' tainnyi ak ogas iit ng'aleekyik; ama ta obistoe ineendet. Amu ma nyochin kaat pistoeng'wong' amu mi kainennyu eng' ineendet.
Exodus23:22 Ago ngigas iit ng'aleekyik
Exodus23:23 Amu wendi malaikaiyandennyu kondoenen
Exodus23:24 Amat isaa kanamonikwak
Exodus23:25 Oboisyeiwo anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Exodus23:26 Ma piitu ne rorogu moet anan ne oosu anan ne soneni eng' emeng'ung'. Ayae kosulda koitetap peetuusyeguk.
Exodus23:27 “Ayooktoi kamuisennyu kondoenen ak anyaliil piik tugul che mi ole iite ak ayai puuniguk tugul komweenen.
Exodus23:28 Ayooktoi kaaraamyet kondoenen kwo koon Hibik
Exodus23:29 Maone icheek koba eng' taing'ung' eng' kenyiit agenge
Exodus23:30 Ago aoone komutya koba eng' taing'ung' agoi itesage ak inyaban emet.
Exodus23:31 Andoi kiwoteng'ung' koboochit Araraita ne Piriir agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian ak koboochit surkwen agoi aineet. Amu andoi piigap emonooto eunekwok
Exodus23:32 Amoyai arorut ak icheek
Exodus23:33 Amat komeny emeng'ung' si ma koonin iyaiywo tengek. Amu imuuch ioot kamuktaikwak koek nooto iman mesteet eng' inyee.”
Exodus24:1 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus24:2 Nyoonei Musa ineegei koriikyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus24:3 Ki nyo anyun Musa komwachi piik ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kirwoogutik tugul
Exodus24:4 Ki sir Musa ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak king'eet karon ko tuui ak koteech kaptisisyet eng' tulweet keel. Kiteeche koik tolochik taman ak aeng' ko uu ortinwek taman ak aeng' che po Israel.
Exodus24:5 Yeityo koyookto murenik che neran che po piigap Israel kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kieng'ji tuuga Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek tiseiywegap kaalyeet.
Exodus24:6 Kisiil Musa korotiik kebeber
Exodus24:7 Yeityo konam kitabuutap arorutyet ak kosomanji piik kogas
Exodus24:8 Kingo pata konam Musa korotiik ak koisote piik komwae koleen
Exodus24:9 Ki togosta anyun Musa ak Aron
Exodus24:10 Ki keer anyun icheek Kamuktaindet ne po Israel. Ki mi keelyekyik keel koita ne keguure sapphire ne uu sengwetyet eng' tiliilindanyi.
Exodus24:11 Nga ki keer icheek kondoigap Israel Kamuktaindet
Exodus24:12 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Musa
Exodus24:13 Ki ng'eet anyun Musa ak Joshua kiboityondennyi
Exodus24:14 Ki leenji poisyek
Exodus24:15 Ki togosta anyun Musa kwo tulweet ak ki tuch `pooldet tulweet.
