Exodus24:16 Ki tebee liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tulweetap Sinai ak ki tuch `pooldet tulwoonooto peetuusyek lo. Eng' peetuutap tisap koguur `Kamuktaindet Musa eng' pooldet oriit.
Exodus24:17 Ki uu itoondap liilindap Kamuktaindet maat ne peelei kowong'u eng' tulweet parak ko uu ye kigeerei piigap Israel.
Exodus24:18 Ki wo Musa pooldet oriit ak kotogosta tulweet. Ki tebee ineendet tulweet peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam.
Exodus25:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus25:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel koibwa konunoik. Iname konunoichooto kobun chii age tugul ne ichirchirchin muguleldanyi kogoon konunoikyuk.”
Exodus25:3 Chu konunoik che itaache eng' icheek: thahabu
Exodus25:4 angook che buluu
Exodus25:5 ak magatogap mengichik che ki kisal kobiriritu
Exodus25:6 mwaitap kiit ne ikweng'sei
Exodus25:7 koik che kiguure soam
Exodus25:8 Ko uu nooto kora
Exodus25:9 Oyai ole teptoi emaitap Kamuktaindet ak ole teptoi tuguuk tugul che kindoi oriit ko uu ye aboorun.
Exodus25:10 Ingoyai piigap Israel moinget eng' keetiigap chebitoik
Exodus25:11 Iliige thahabu che tiliileen oriit ak parak ak itegele tegeleiywotap thahabu iyieme paragunnyi tugul.
Exodus25:12 Itang'ji peteinik ang'wan che po thahabu ak inde peteinichooto luuita age tugul ne po moinget ole po keel. Indoi aeng' komosta age
Exodus25:13 Iyae keetiik che kiname che po chebitoik ak iliige thahabu.
Exodus25:14 Yeityo irookte keetichooto peteinik che mi tabanwegap moinget si koek che kitandane moingonooto.
Exodus25:15 Tebee keetichooto peteinigap moinget
Exodus25:16 Ak inde `paornateet ne agoonin moingonooto oriit.
Exodus25:17 Yeityo iyai kerwennyi ne po rireenet ne po thahabu che tiliileen; ne koindonyi ko sendimita pogol agenge ak taman ak tebeesindanyi ko tamanwogik lo ak lo.
Exodus25:18 Iyae kora kerubisyek aeng' eng' thahabu che kitaanyi eng' tabanwek aeng' che po kerwetap rireenet.
Exodus25:19 Yai kerubit age kotebee tabanda age ak inde age kotabon komosta age. Kinamdos kerwet ne po rireenet ak kerubit eng' tabanda age tugul.
Exodus25:20 Itoorchingei togoochigap kerubisyek ak ko koegitu kebebaikwak koba parak
Exodus25:21 Inde kerwanooto po rireenet paragutap moinget ak inde moinget oriit paornateet ne tuun agoonin.
Exodus25:22 Yeityo ketuiye ak inyee eng' olooto ak keng'alaal kobooten ko katebee kerwanooto po rireenet parak
Exodus25:23 Iyae meset eng' keetiigap chebitoik. Koindonyi ko sendimita sosom ak sisiit
Exodus25:24 Iliige thahabu che tiliileen ak itegele tegeleiywotap thahabu iyieme paragunnyi tugul.
Exodus25:25 Chop tegeleiywot ne sendimita tamanwogik lo ak lo tebeesindanyi koyiem kioto ak iyai tegeleiywotap thahabu koyiem tabanwekyik tugul kotegel.
Exodus25:26 Yachi peteinik ang'wan che po thahabu ak inde peteinichooto luukwek ang'wan
Exodus25:27 Ingoriikyi peteinichooto tegeleiywot koek che chutei keetiik che ki ibe meset.
Exodus25:28 Yai keetiik che po chebitoik ak iliige thahabu si kobiit keibe meset.
Exodus25:29 Itaany thahabu che tiliileen iyai koek taabookyik
Exodus25:30 Inde magatiinik che itabaanatiin meset kotebee tainnyu kotugul.
Exodus25:31 Ak iyai keldap tait eng' thahabu che tiliileen. Iyae thahabu che kitaanyi keloto
Exodus25:32 Sachei anyun mooriik koek lo eng' toloita nooto; sachei mooriik somogu eng' komosta age ne po keloto ak sachei mooriik somogu ko uu nooto eng' komosin.
Exodus25:33 Tinyei temeet ne po komosta age kigombok somok che ki kiyai koigei taaptook che kiguure almond ak mulwet ak taapteet. Kotinyei ko uu nooto temeet ne po komosta nin age kigombok somok che ki kiyai koigei taptochooto kiguure almond ak mulwet ak taapteet. Kergeitu anyun eng' mooriik tugul lo che sage keloto komugul.
Exodus25:34 Ak miitei ole po toloita ineendet kigombok ang'wan che ki kiyai kogergeit ak taaptogap almond kobooto mulonokyik ak tapokyik.
Exodus25:35 Eng' ye kisage mooriik aeng'u
Exodus25:36 Namegei mulonokwak ak mooriikwak koek kiy agenge. Kitang'e kioto komugul thahabu che tiliileen.
Exodus25:37 Yeityo iyai taisyekyik tisap ak inam si kobiit kokweny ole mi.
Exodus25:38 Yae kora thahabu che tiliileen kanameiywondennyi ak taabookyik che mengeechen.
Exodus25:39 Iyae tainooto ak tuguuchuuto tugul thahabu che tiliileen che po keruutik sosom ak muut.
Exodus25:40 Riip si iyai tugul ko uu kergeindenywa ne ki kiboorun eng' tulweet.
Exodus26:1 Ne siirei nooto anyun
Exodus26:2 Koindap angeet age tugul ko mitainik taman ak aeng' ak tebeesindo ko mitainik aeng'. Aechindos angoochooto tugul.
Exodus26:3 Kiropchindos angook muut ak keropchin angook alak muut ak icheek.
Exodus26:4 Napchi pelelutik che buluu eng' tabandap angeet age eng' ole kurmanat ak eng' ole kagituiyechi. Iyae ko uu nooto eng' tabandap angeet age ne tabanu parak eng' ole kagituiye ne po aeng'.
Exodus26:5 Napchi angeet age pelelutik konom ak inapchi pelelutik konom eng' tabandap angeet ne po aeng' eng' ole kagituiyechi; tokyindos pelelutik tugul.
Exodus26:6 Iyae kariik konom che po thahabu che kiname angook si ituiye angook karichooto si koek agenge emaitap Kamuktaindet.
Exodus26:7 Nap angook taman ak agenge inabe koroorigap ng'oroorek koek emait ne kituge emaitap Kamuktaindet.
Exodus26:8 Koindap angeet age tugul ko mitaitinik taman ak somok ak mitainik aeng' tebeesindap age tugul. Aechindos anyun angoonochooto tugul tamanu ak agenge.
Exodus26:9 Ituiye angook muut koek agenge ak ituiye alak lo koek agenge ak icheek yeityo iliich anganooto po lo eng' ole kimandoe eng' emait.
Exodus26:10 Yeityo iyachi pelelutik konom eng' tabandap angeet age ne tabanu parak eng' ole kituiyechin ak iyachi pelelutik konom eng' tabandap angeet ne po aeng' eng' ole kituiyechin.
Exodus26:11 Ne rupei iyai kariik konom che po sugunonik ak irooch karichooto pelelutik si ituiye emait koek agenge.
Exodus26:12 Kebeberta ne kang'etune ngetunenigap angoogap emait
Exodus26:13 Ko kebeberwek che ng'etune komoswek tuwai eng' kooindap angoogap emait
Exodus26:14 Inabe muiywegap mengichigap keechiirek che ki kisal kobiriritu si ketuge emait ak inap muiywegap mengichigap peek kotabon parak.
Exodus26:15 Iyae pagoinik che tonondos che po keetiigap chebitoik kobunji emaitap Kamuktaindet.
Exodus26:16 Iyae koek mitainik sisiit kooindap pagoiyot
Exodus26:17 Iyae pagoiyot age tugul konyoor ng'elyebwek aeng' che ki ituiyogei; yai ko uu nooto eng' pagoinik tugul che po emaitap Kamuktaindet.
Exodus26:18 Yai pagoinigap emaitap Kamuktaindet che itei tiptem ak inde ole tokyingei murot tai
Exodus26:19 ak ibarbar fedha isikyi kong'iik artam si koobeesyo kapkelyenutap pagoinichooto tiptem
Exodus26:20 ak che po komosta age ne po koot ole tokyingei murot kaataam
Exodus26:21 ak kong'iikwak artam che po fedha
Exodus26:22 Yai anyun pagoinik lo kobunji koot patai ole tokyingei cherongo.
Exodus26:23 Yeityo iyai pagoinik aeng' kobunji luukwek che po ko che mi patai.
Exodus26:24 Terchindos aeng' kobooch ng'wony agoi parak ago kituiye tugul peteiyot eng' parak. Kiyaei ko uu nooto eng' tuwai kindoi luukwek aeng'.
Exodus26:25 Egu chooto anyun pagoinik sisiit ak kong'iikwak che po fedha taman ak lo: kong'iik aeng' eng' kapkelyenutap pagoiyot agenge ak kong'iik aeng' eng' kapkelyenutap pagoiyot age.
Exodus26:26 Ak iyai eng' chebitoik keetiik che uu rateiywek; iyae muut che po pagoinik che po komosta agenge ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet
Exodus26:27 ak rateiywek muut che po pagoinik che po komosta age ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet ak rateiywek muut che po pagoinik che po komosta age ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet ne mi patai ole tokyingei cherongo.
Exodus26:28 Ingobochit tabanda age agoi tabanda age rateiywot ne po kween ne muroksei ne mi kwenutap pagoinichooto.
Exodus26:29 Iliige thahabu pagoinik ak iyai peteinikwak che po thahabu koek chooto ole kirooktoi rateiywek ak iliige rateiywechooto thahabu.
Exodus26:30 Ingotonon anyun koyooto ko uu ye ki king'at ak kiboorun eng' tulweet.
Exodus26:31 Iyae angeet ne ki kioiye emaitap Kamuktaindet ne buluu ak ne aruus ne piriir
Exodus26:32 Isonginine lumeiywek ang'wan che po keetiigap chebitoik che kiliige thahabu; po thahabu ireusyekwak ak tonone lumeiywechooto kong'iik ang'wan che po fedha che ki kibal.
Exodus26:33 Isonginine anganooto kapkelyenutap kariik che kiname angook ak iibu moinget ne po paornateet inde koot ne po oriit ne tilate angeet
Exodus26:34 Inde kerwet ne po rireenet moinget ne po paornateet eng' ole-tiliil miising'.
Exodus26:35 Inde meset koot ne sip kemong'jin
Exodus26:36 Nap angeet ne kigeree kurgeetap emait. Inabe ngoryoniito ne buluu
Exodus26:37 Yeityo iyachi ngoryonooto lumeiywek muut che po keetiigap chebitoik ak iliige thahabu ak punjin thahabu ireusyekwak. Itang'ji eng' sugunwet kong'iik muut che kilolonda.
Exodus27:1 “Teech kaptisisyet eng' keetiigap chebitoik koek koindo mitainik aeng' ak robo ak koek tebeesindo mitainik aeng' ak robo. Aechin komoswek tugul ang'wanu che po kaptisisyonooto ak ingoek koindo ne po tononennyi mitait agenge ak robo.
Exodus27:2 Iyae kuinoikyik eng' luukwekyik ang'wan: itaanyi inoichooto konomnyo ak kaptisisyet koek kiy agenge ak iliige sugunwet.
Exodus27:3 Min tereenikyik che ki ibe oreek ak kechigosyekyik che eecheen
Exodus27:4 Yeityo iyai kora sugunonik che kiregeri ak inde sugunonichooto kagireger peteinik ang'wan eng' luukwekyik ang'wan.
Exodus27:5 Inde karnanooto kagireger kapkelyenutap mireiywot ne yiemei kaptisisyet komosta ole po keel si komuurmuur kaptisisyet.
Exodus27:6 Yachi kaptisisyet keetiik che ki ibe; chooto ko keetiigap chebitoik ak iliige sugunwet.
Exodus27:7 Kirooktoi keetichooto peteinik ak tebee keetichooto komoswek aeng' che po kaptisisyet si kobiit keibe.
Exodus27:8 Itete pagoinik koek moinget eng' kaptisisyonooto: ingoyai piik ko uu ye ko ki porun eng' tulweet.
Exodus27:9 “Iyae seremut ne ng'ootaat ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet. Eng' ole tokyingei murot tai
Exodus27:10 Egu tiptem lumeiywek che po sugunonik che keratyin ngoroichooto ak kong'iikwak tiptem che po sugunonik che tononie
Exodus27:11 Uu nooto koindo agine eng' komostap murot kaataam
Exodus27:12 Eng' tebeesindap seremut eng' komostap cherongo
Exodus27:13 Ingoek mitainik tiptem ak aeng' tebeesindo ne po seremut ne tokyingei kong'asiis
Exodus27:14 koek mitainik lo ak kebeberyat angook che uu emait che po komosta age ak lumeiywekwak somok ak kong'iikwak somok che tononie.
Exodus27:15 Ingoek che po komosta age angook che yamei mitainik lo ak kebeberyat kobooto lumeiywekwak somok ak kong'iikwak somok che tononie.
Exodus27:16 Iyae koek angook che po ormariichet ne po seremut mitainik lo iyae che buluu
Exodus27:17 Po fedha rateiywek che keratote lumeiywek tugul che yiemei seremut
Exodus27:18 Iteeche koek kooindap seremut mitainik artam ak ang'wan
Exodus27:19 Ingobunji sugunonik tuguuk tugul che keboisyee eng' poisyetap emaitap Kamuktaindet
Exodus27:20 “Ng'at piigap Israel koibun mwaita ne tiliil ne po mseituni ne ki kitui si kobunji kiit ne ikweng'sei si kobiit kolal tait kotugul.
Exodus27:21 Ingochobei Aron ak weeriikyik lapkeiyonooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'etee koskoleny agoi karon eng' emait ne kituiyechin eng' ole sip kemong'jin eng' angeet ne iyoitos emaitap Kamuktaindet
Exodus28:1 “Imutu anyun Aron ng'eetap komet konyo ole ami kobooto weeriikyik
Exodus28:2 Napchi Aron ng'eetap komet ngoroik che itabaanatiin che po teegisto ak korooronindo.
Exodus28:3 Yeityo ing'alaalji tugul che tinyei muguleldo ne po kaguiyet
Exodus28:4 Chu angook che nabei icheek: ngoryeet ne kilaakyin tegeet
Exodus28:5 Ingoboisyee icheek usiisyek che ililii
Exodus28:6 “Yae icheek ephod eng' thahabu che buluu
Exodus28:7 Tinyei eng' tigigoik kebeberwek che ituitos ngoroichooto tuwai koek ngoryeet agenge.
Exodus28:8 Ak ki kinap pireneet eng' ng'omnateet ki tuiyo kogergeit ak ephod si kerategei. Kinabe thahabu
Exodus28:9 “Nam koik aeng' che kiguure soam ak iwachi eng' sireet kainaigap piigap Israel ko uu ortinwekwak;
Exodus28:10 sirchi koita age kainaik lo
Exodus28:11 Sirchi koichooto aeng' kainaigap piigap Israel
Exodus28:12 Yeityo inde koichooto aeng' tigigoigap ephod si koek koichooto kabwaatet agobo piigap Israel. Ingoibot Aron kainaikwak eng' tigigoikyik aeng' eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kabwaatet.
Exodus28:13 Iyae tuguuk che togulotin eng' thahabu
Exodus28:14 ak sirimoik aeng' che po thahabu che tiliileen. Ilet koigei rogoonik ak iratyi sirimwechooto kagilet tuguuchooto togulotin.
Exodus28:15 “Nap eng' poisyetap nabiindet ne ng'oom
Exodus28:16 Ingoaechin koindo ak tebeesindo ko kagiliich. Ingoek kakwautyennyi olo po sendimita tiptem ak aeng' eng' koindo ak eng' tebeesindo.
Exodus28:17 Inde ngoryonooto koik che tetotin eng' ortinwekwak ang'wan. Inde ooreet ne po tai sardio
Exodus28:18 ak inde ooreet ne po aeng' sumaragdo
Exodus28:19 Eng' ooreet ne po somok inde huakinto
Exodus28:20 Eng' ooreet ne po ang'wan inde berulo
Exodus28:21 Egu koichooto taman ak aeng' ko uu kainaigap piigap Israel. Pendi ko uu kainaikwak ko uu ye kiwaei ng'ookset
Exodus28:22 Napchi ngoryonooto po tegeet sirimwek che uu rogoonik che po thahabu che tiliileen che ki kilet ko uu rogoet.
Exodus28:23 Napchi kora peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak inde peteinichooto aeng' tabanwegap luukwek aeng' che po ngoryonooto po tegeet.
Exodus28:24 Yeityo inde sirimwechooto aeng' po thahabu che ki kilet peteinik aeng' che mi tabanwek aeng' che po ngoryonooto po tegeet.
Exodus28:25 Nam anyun komoswechuun alak aeng' che po sirimwechooto aeng' ki kilet ak irooch kelongonik aeng' che ki kitogul yeityo ituiye ak ephod eng' komostap tigigoik ole tabanu tai.
Exodus28:26 Chop peteinik aeng' che po thahabu yeityo inapchji ngoryonooto po tegeet eng' komostap luukwek aeng' eng' tabanwekyik che tabanu komostap oriit eng' ephod keel.
Exodus28:27 Chop anyun peteinik aeng' che po thahabu inapchi tuguuchooto tigigoigap ngoryonooto kiguure ephod eng' komostap kapkelyen ole tabanu tai eng' ole neegitee ye ki kituiye
Exodus28:28 Igiichi icheek ngoryeetap tegeet eng' peteinikyik koratyin ak peteinigap ephod
Exodus28:29 Ye mandoi Aron ole-tiliil
Exodus28:30 Inde ngoryonooto po tegeet ne po kirwooget Urim ak Tumim si kotebee chooto muguleldap Aron ye mandoi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Eng' nooto anyun koibei Aron kirwoogetap piigap Israel eng' muguleldanyi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul.
Exodus28:31 “Inabe ngoryeet ne kiroochigei ne po ephod ne ki kisal konyalilit ne ais kityo.
Exodus28:32 Ak inap ole kirooktoi metit eng' kwenunnyi ak igurman kaatit ko uu poisyetap laindet ak ko uu ye kichobei ngoroigap lugeet si ma kereer.
Exodus28:33 Napchi ngoryonooto tabandap keel logoek che buluu
Exodus28:34 Indoi twolyot ne po thahabu yeityo inde logoiyandanooto korupkei ak itilate ko uu nooto korubatkei agoi tabandap ngoryeet komugul.
Exodus28:35 Ak ingolaach Aron si koboisyee ak kegas cheetap cheptingilinichooto ye wendi ole-tiliil eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus28:36 “Itaany kora thahabu che tiliileen kolebelitu ak iwai eng' paragunnywa waet ne uu ne po ng'ookset
Exodus28:37 Iratee rogoet ne buluu si kotebee naaryeet chepkulet ak kotebee naaryeet ole po togoch.
Exodus28:38 Tebee togeetap Aron ak koibot Aron tengektap tuguuk che tiliileen
Exodus28:39 Inapchini Aron ngoryeet ne kooi eng' katanit ne karaaran ak inde lelesta ak inap ko uu nooto naaryeet ne po katanit ne karaaran ak inap pireneet.
Exodus28:40 “Eng' weeriigap Aron inapchini ngoroik che kooen
Exodus28:41 Yeityo ilaakyi ng'eetap komet Aron tuguuchooto ak weeriikyik ak icheek ak iil
Exodus28:42 Inapchini icheek sulwalisyek che ng'ete suet agoi kubesoik che po katanit si kobiit kotuge aach ngorinnywa.
Exodus28:43 Ilaachi Aron ak weeriikyik tuguuchooto ye pendi emaitap oriit
Exodus29:1 “Ni kiit ne iyachini icheek ianyinyi
Exodus29:2 kobooto magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek
Exodus29:3 Indoi ateruut agenge ak iibune ateruunooto yeityo igetu kirgit kobooto mengichichooto aeng'.
Exodus29:4 Imutu Aron ak weeriikyik kobwa kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin ak iun icheek eng' peek.
Exodus29:5 Nam ngoroik ak ilaakyi Aron ngoryeet ne kooi
Exodus29:6 Kerchinee metinnyi naaryeet ak iratyi kuutweet ne tiliil ne po thahabu paragutap naryonooto.
Exodus29:7 Yeityo inam mwaita ne ki ilse iroong'ji metinnyi ak iil ineendet.
Exodus29:8 “Imutu weeriikyik ak icheek ak ilaakyi ngoroik che kooen.
Exodus29:9 Yeityo igermen Aron ak weeriikyik eng' pirenaik ak igerchinee metowekwak chepkuloik che mengeechen. Si konam poisyonooto po tiseinateet eng' ng'atuutyet ne po agoi. Itoroorchi anyun Aron ak weeriikyik poisyonooto po tiliilindo.
Exodus29:10 “Ketu anyun kirgit konyo taitap emait ne kituiyechin. Ingogonoor Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak metitap kirgooto.
Exodus29:11 Yeityo ieny kirgooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin.
Exodus29:12 Taach korotiigap kirgooto ak iilee tolochigap kaptisisyet eng' morneng'ung' yeityo iroong'ji korotichooto tugul kaptisisyet keel.
Exodus29:13 Put mwanik tugul che ki ilaach moet ak kwambelelyet ne tuchei kooet
Exodus29:14 Ki peel eng' maat panyeegap kirgooto
Exodus29:15 “Nam mengit agenge agine
Exodus29:16 Eeny mengit ak itaach korotiikyik ak iisote kaptisisyet.
Exodus29:17 Yeityo itonaton panyeegap mengoto
Exodus29:18 Beel mengoto komugul eng' kaptisisyet: niito ko kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; nyamdutyet ne anyiny
Exodus29:19 “Nam mengit ne po aeng'
Exodus29:20 Eeny anyun mengoto ak itaach korotiik che iilee walisyegap itigap tai che po Aron ak weeriikyik
Exodus29:21 Ye ibata inam korotiik che mi kaptisisyet parak ak mwaita ne kiilse
Exodus29:22 “Inemune mengit mwanikyik
Exodus29:23 Eng' ateruut ole mi magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek
Exodus29:24 Yeityo inde chooto tugul eunegap Aron ak eunegap weeriikyik ak iongoi inyee koek kagoochinet ne kiruuri eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Exodus29:25 Icheru tuguuchooto eng' eunekwak ak ibeel eng' kaptisisyet eng' paragutap kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Exodus29:26 “Iip tagateet ne po mengitap poisyet ne po katabaanet ne po Aron
Exodus29:27 Itabaan tagateet ne po kagoochinet ne kiongoi ak kubesto ne po kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak
Exodus29:28 Punjin chooto Aron ak weeriikyik koek ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' piigap Israel
Exodus29:29 “Tuun punjin weeriikyik ngoroichooto itabaanatiin che po Aron
Exodus29:30 Ilaachi ngoroichooto peetuusyek tisap
Exodus29:31 “Nam mengit ne po poisyetap katabaanet si iyo panyeekyik eng' ole ki kitiliil
Exodus29:32 ak koam Aron ak weeriikyik panyeegap mengoto ak magatiinik che mi ateruut eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin.
Exodus29:33 Amei icheegei tuguuchooto che kiyae kagaigaet
Exodus29:34 Ngo ng'et panyeek che po nooto ki kitabaanji poisyetap katabaanet anan eng' magatiinik
Exodus29:35 “Yachi Aron anyun ak weeriikyik ko uu tugul che kang'atiin. Inde icheek poisyonooto tiliil eng' peetuusyek tisap.
Exodus29:36 Igoitoi inyee peetuut age tugul kirgit ne neran ne po kagoochinet ne po tengekto kobunji kagaigaet. Ianyinyi kaptisisyet ye iyachini kagaigaet agobo ineendet. Yeityo iil ianyiny.
Exodus29:37 Iyae kagaigaet agobo kaptisisyet eng' peetuusyek tisap ak itiliil. Si kotiliilit kaptisisyet miising'
Exodus29:38 “Chu che igoitoi eng' kaptisiisyo; igoitoi peetuut age tugul aarek aeng' che mengichik che po keechiir che ma siirei kenyiit agenge koek kiit ne po agoi.
Exodus29:39 Igoite aarwet age karon ak igoite aarwet ne po aeng' koskoleny.
Exodus29:40 Itesyini aarwet age keruutyet agenge ne po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che kagiburukto litait agenge ne po mwaita ne pitunee tuisyet
Exodus29:41 Igoite aarwet age koskoleny ak iyachi ko uu kagoochinetap peek ni kabo karon ak ko uu kagoochinennyi ne kirong'u
Exodus29:42 Egu nooto kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul eng' ibinwekwok tugul eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus29:43 Kituiyechini yooto ak piigap Israel ak itiliili toroornatennyu yooto.
Exodus29:44 Atiliilii emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisyet. Atabaani Aron ak weeriikyik ak icheek si koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet.
Exodus29:45 Amenye kwenutap piigap Israel ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa.
Exodus29:46 Ak konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa ne ki among'u eng' emetap Misiri
Exodus30:1 “Iyae anyun kaptisisyet ole kibeelee nyamdutik iyae keetiigap chebitoik.
Exodus30:2 Ingoek koindonyi ak tebeesindanyi sendimita artam ak muut. Aechindos koindo ak tebeesindo. Koindap tononennyi ko egu sendimita tamanwogik sogool. Namegei kapkorosuut ak kuinoikyik koegu kiit agenge.
Exodus30:3 Iliige thahabu che tiliileen paragunnyi ak komoswekyik tugul ak kuinoikyik. Yeityo itaany tegeleiywotap thahabu iyieme.
Exodus30:4 Itaany peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak inde tuguuchooto koobeesyo tegeleiywot keel eng' tegeet ne po komosi ak ne po komosin
Exodus30:5 Yae keetichooto ki ibe keetiigap chebitoik ak iliige thahabu.
Exodus30:6 Indoi kaptisisyonooto taitap angeet ne ioitos koot
Exodus30:7 Peelei Aron nyamdutik che po tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny eng' olooto eng' karonet age tugul ye chobei taisyek
Exodus30:8 ak peelei ineendet ye inaami taisyek koskoleny
Exodus30:9 Amobeele olooto nyamdutik che teer anan tiseiywek che kibeelei anan che po peek. Amoroong'ji yooto kagoochinoik alak tugul che kiee.
Exodus30:10 Ingoyai Aron kagaigaet eng' kuinoigap kaptisisyonooto konyil agenge eng' kenyiit age tugul. Yaei kagaigaet eng' korotiigap kagoochinetap tengekto ne po kagaigaet konyil agenge eng' kenyiit age tugul eng' ibinwekwok tugul. Nooto ne tiliil miising' eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”
Exodus30:11 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus30:12 “Ye iit piigap Israel ko uu eng' koiitennywa
Exodus30:13 Chu che koonu icheek: koonu chii age tugul kebebertap chepkondok ko uu chepkondogap ole-tiliil
Exodus30:14 Igoochin chii age tugul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet
Exodus30:15 Ingogon che kergei mogoryot kibananiat
Exodus30:16 Taach fedha che po kagaigaet eng' piigap Israel ak igoite kobunji poisyetap emaitap tuiyet. Si koek nooto kabwaatet agobo piigap Israel eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si koyai kagaigaet agobo saboonwekwok.”
Exodus30:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus30:18 “Yai karait agine ne po sugunwet ak iyae sugunwet ng'echerennyi si kiuunse. Inde kwenutap Emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisyet ak iroong'ji peek.
Exodus30:19 Si koune Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak ak keelyekwak.
Exodus30:20 Iunegei icheek ye mandoi emait ne kituiyechin si ma pek anan ye riikyin kaptisisyet si kobois ye peelei kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunei maat.
Exodus30:21 Iuni anyun eunekwak ak keelyekwak si ma pek
Exodus30:22 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa kogeny koleenji
Exodus30:23 “Inemunote tuguuk che myachen kosiir
Exodus30:24 ak keruutik lo che po kasia
Exodus30:25 Yeityo ichop tuguuchooto koburugogis koek mwaita ne tiliil ne ki iilse ne ng'uu ne anyiny ne poisyetap ng'amotyot ne puruchi tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny. Egu mwaita ne tiliil ne ki iilse.
Exodus30:26 Iil emait ne kituiyechin eng' mwaita ak moinget ne po paornateet
Exodus30:27 ak meset ak tuguukyik tugul
Exodus30:28 ak kaptisisyet ne kibeelee tiseiywot ak tuguukyik tugul ak taabeet ak kelunnyi.
Exodus30:29 Itabaan anyun tuguuchooto si kotiliiliitu miising'
Exodus30:30 Iil Aron ak weeriikyik
Exodus30:31 Ak ing'alaalji piigap Israel ileenji
Exodus30:32 Ma kiroong'jin poortap chii age tugul mwai
Exodus30:33 Chii age tugul ne puruchi mwai age tugul koigei niito anan chii age tugul ne iilee mwaiita toondet
Exodus30:34 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus30:35 Iyae eng' chooto nyamdutik
Exodus30:36 Yeityo itui alak eng' chooto komengegitu ak inde chooto taitap paornateet eng' emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus30:37 Amat oyachigei nyamdutik alak tugul che kergei ak chuuto. Egu ne tiliil eng' inyee ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Exodus30:38 Ngo yai chii age tugul alak che uu chooto kole kogas ng'uunennyi
Exodus31:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus31:2 “Keero
Exodus31:3 ak kaanyiit ineendet Kabuuset ne po Kamuktaindet
Exodus31:4 Imuuchi inee koyai poisyonigap musoknateet ne kiboisyee thahabu
Exodus31:5 ak waetap koik che kitetyin kelongonik
Exodus31:6 Ak asi kotoret ineendet
Exodus31:7 emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus31:8 meset ak tuguukyik
Exodus31:9 kaptisisyet ne po tiseiywek che kibeelei ak tuguukyik tugul ak taabeet kobooto ng'echerennyi ne tebee
Exodus31:10 ngoroik che kisalei kogororonitu che itabaanatiin che po Aron tisiindet ak ngoroigap weeriikyik si koboisyee eng' tisiisyet;
Exodus31:11 ak mwaita ne ki iilse ak nyamdutigap tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny che po ole-tiliil. Yaei anyun icheek ko uu tugul che kaang'atiin.”
Exodus31:12 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus31:13 “Ng'alaalji piigap Israel ileenji
Exodus31:14 Nooto anyun oriip sabato amu itabaanat eng' okweek. Kibarei iman age tugul ne imurwooni.’ ” Ago king'etoi eng' piikyik chii age tugul ne yaei poisyet age tugul eng' peetuunooto.
Exodus31:15 Kiyaei poisyet peetuusyek lo
Exodus31:16 Eng' nooto anyun ko kanyool koriip piigap Israel sabato ak kotabaan eng' ibinwekwak tugul koek arorutyet ne po koigeny.
Exodus31:17 Kaboorunet niito eng' kwenunnyu ak piigap Israel ne po agoi
Exodus31:18 Ye kingo kagogees Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'alaalet ne ki ng'alaali ak Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai
Exodus32:1 Ye kingo keer piik kole kagogagei Musa eng' tulweet ama choorgei
Exodus32:2 Koleenji `Aron pichooto
Exodus32:3 Ki icher piik tugul anyun munaok tugul che po thahabu che ki mi itiikwak ak koipchi Aron.
Exodus32:4 Kitaach tuguuchooto kobunu eunekwak. Yeityo kobeel kochotyo ak kochop eng' karnet ne kiboisyee kotany kanamwet ne po moita. Ak ki mwa piik eng' poiboiyet kole
Exodus32:5 Ye kingo keer Aron poiboiyennywa
Exodus32:6 Ki ng'eetyo karon miising' eng' peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto ak kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei. Ki ip kagoochinoigap kaalyeet
Exodus32:7 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus32:8 Kagosip komasta kometo ooreet ne kiga ang'atyi. Kagoyachigei kanamwet ne po moita ne ki kitaany
Exodus32:9 Ki testai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'alaalji Musa ak koleenji
Exodus32:10 Pagaakta anyun
Exodus32:11 Ki igaigai `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi
Exodus32:12 Amu nee si komwa tuun Misiriik kole
Exodus32:13 Ibwaat Abraham
Exodus32:14 Ki wol anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutikyik agobo yaityonooto ki kamwa kole yachin piikyik.
Exodus32:15 Ki weigei Musa kochoortagei eng' tulweet
Exodus32:16 Ki poisyetap Kamuktaindet koichooto ak siruutichooto ko ki siruutigap Kamuktaindet che ki kagisir kewai eng' koichooto.
Exodus32:17 Ye kingo kas Joshua polatetap piik koboldos
Exodus32:18 Ago ki le Musa
Exodus32:19 Ye kingo riik nganaseet ak kogeer kanamwetap moita ak ureryet
Exodus32:20 Ki nam kanamwonooto po moita ne kiga kotany
Exodus32:21 Ki leenji `Musa Aron
Exodus32:22 Kowol Aron kole
Exodus32:23 Amu ki leenjo
Exodus32:24 Ara ki aleenji icheek
Exodus32:25 Ye kingo keer Musa kole kabistoe piik
Exodus32:26 kotonon anyun eng' ormariichetap nganaseet ak kole
Exodus32:27 Yeityo koleenji `ineendet icheek
Exodus32:28 Ki yai weeriigap Lawi ko uu ng'olyootap Musa. Ki pek piik peetuunooto che itei eliphuusyek somok.
Exodus32:29 Ak ki le Musa
Exodus32:30 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi
Exodus32:31 Kiweekyigei `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koleenji
Exodus32:32 Ago ngot icham
Exodus32:33 Ago ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus32:34 Ui anyun nguno
Exodus32:35 Ki pir anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik amu ki ilas kanamwetap moita ne ki yai Aron.
Exodus33:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus33:2 Ayooktoi malaikaiyat kondoenak
Exodus33:3 Ara oba agoi emonooto ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo. Ago ma togostoi kobootok amu oo piik che uueen kaat
Exodus33:4 Kingo kas piik ng'aleechooto yaacheen
Exodus33:5 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus33:6 Ki ireek piigap Israel tuguukwak tugul che po lele kong'etee tulweetap Horeb ak kwo tai.
Exodus33:7 Kibiteetap Musa koip emait ak koteech eng' ye loo eng' saang'utap nganaseet. Kiguure emainooto
Exodus33:8 Ye kingo manda Musa kwo ole mi Emait
Exodus33:9 Ye kingo chut `Musa Emainooto
Exodus33:10 Ye kingo keer piik toloata po pooldet kotonone kurgeetap Emait
Exodus33:11 Ki ng'alaaljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Musa kimni
Exodus33:12 Ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor “Keero
Exodus33:13 Ara anyun asoomin ale
Exodus33:14 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet
Exodus33:15 Ki leenji Musa
Exodus33:16 Amu kinae nee nguno keele
Exodus33:17 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus33:18 Kole Musa
Exodus33:19 Kowolji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Exodus33:20 Memuuchi igeer togeennyu
Exodus33:21 Yeityo kole Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus33:22 ak ye siirtoi liilindanyu
Exodus33:23 Yeityo aiste eunnyu ak igeer patennyu
Exodus34:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus34:2 Chopkei karon ak imusu tulweetap Sinai
Exodus34:3 Amat otogosu ak chii age tugul
Exodus34:4 Ki pet anyun `Musa koik aeng' che lebeleen ko uu che po tai
Exodus34:5 Ki choorgei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pooldet ak kotonon kobooto ineendet eng' yooto ak komwa kainennyi
Exodus34:6 Ki pun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tainnyi ak komwaita kole
Exodus34:7 ne italachingei eliphuusyek
Exodus34:8 Kichirchiren Musa kong'uruuk agoi ng'wony
Exodus34:9 Yeityo komwa kole
Exodus34:10 Kowol Kamuktaindet kole
Exodus34:11 Riip anyun chuuto kang'atiin rani. Keero
Exodus34:12 “Riipkei
Exodus34:13 Ago obut kapkorosusyekwak. Otuatui kanamonikwak kotonogis ak oluul Aserikwak
Exodus34:14 among'urukyi kamuktain age tugul. Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kainennyi ko ng'etkong'
Exodus34:15 “Oriipkei si moyai arorut kobooto piik che menyei emonooto
Exodus34:16 Ak ye itunji weeriiguk tiibiikwak
Exodus34:17 “Ameyachigei kanamonik che kitaanyi.”
Exodus34:18 “Kanyool iriip igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek. Iame magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' peetuusyek tisap ko uu ye ki ang'atiin eng' peetuusyek che ki kiaror eng' arawetap Abib. Amu ki omong'u eng' Misiri eng' arawanooto.
Exodus34:19 Chechuuk tugul che yaatei iyoteet ak tugul che twati tuuga ak keechiirek
Exodus34:20 Ityachi ne twatei sigiryet ityage aarwet. Ngo metyach
Exodus34:21 “Yai poisyet peetuusyek lo
Exodus34:22 Riip igoortap wigisyek
Exodus34:23 Pwoonei mureniguk taitap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus34:24 Amu aoone pororyosyek eng' taing'ung' ak abaroi kiwotosyeguk. Ak ma piitu chii age tugul ne machei emeng'ung'
Exodus34:25 “Amegoite korotiigap tiseiywondennyu kobooto magatyat ne kaginde mermereek. Amat kong'et kot koeech tiseiywotap igoortap paska.
Exodus34:26 Ibu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Exodus34:27 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Exodus34:28 Ki tebi Musa ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' olooto peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam. Ma am amit ama ee pei. Ki sirchi ng'aleegap arorutyet; ng'atuutik taman koichooto lebeleen.
Exodus34:29 Ye kingo choorgei Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai koibu koik aeng' che po paornateet eng' eunnyi
Exodus34:30 Ye kingo keer `Aron ak `lagok tugul che po Israel Musa
Exodus34:31 Ki kuur `Musa icheek ak kiweektagei Aron ak pounik tugul che po tuiyet ole mi ineendet ak ki ng'alaalji `Musa icheek.
Exodus34:32 Eng' let koriikyi lagok tugul che po Israel
Exodus34:33 Ye kingo kagogees Musa ng'alaalennyi kobooto icheek
Exodus34:34 Ago ki ireegu Musa kitambaanooto ye kingo mandoi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kowendi kong'alaaldos ak ineendet agoi komong'. Ago ye kingo mong' konyo kong'alaal ak piigap Israel
Exodus34:35 ak ki keer piigap Israel togeetap Musa kole iluu iriryotap togeennyi. Kituge anyun Musa togeennyi kitaambaet kogeny agoi komanda kwo kong'alaal ak Kamuktaindet.
Exodus35:1 Ki iyum `Musa tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel ak koleenji
Exodus35:2 Kiyaei poisyet peetuusyek lo
Exodus35:3 Amat olaal ma age tugul eng' meng'otosyekwok eng' peetuutap sabato.”
Exodus35:4 Ki ng'alaalji Musa tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel koleenji
Exodus35:5 Oip eng' kwenung'wong' kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Chii age tugul ne tinyei muguleldo ne chamei
Exodus35:6 angook che buluu
Exodus35:7 magatogap mengichik che ki kisal kobiriritu
Exodus35:8 Kobooto mwaitap kiit ne ikweng'sei
Exodus35:9 koik che kiguure soam
Exodus35:10 “Ingonyo chii age tugul eng' okweek ne tinyei muguleldo ne po kaguiyet
Exodus35:11 emaitap Kamuktaindet
Exodus35:12 moinget ak keetikyik che ki ibe
Exodus35:13 meset ak keetikyik che ki ibe
Exodus35:14 keldap tait agine ne po kiit ne ikweng'sei ak tuguukyik
Exodus35:15 kapkorosuut ne kibeelee nyamdutik ak keetikyik che ki ibe
Exodus35:16 kaptisisyet ne kibeelee kagoochinoik ak sugunwennyi ne ki kireger
Exodus35:17 kobooto angook che kisonginindos
Exodus35:18 tigongenik che po koot
Exodus35:19 ngoroik che ki kisal kogororonitu si keboisyee eng' ole-tiliil
Exodus35:20 Ki pa tuiyetap piigap Israel komugul eng' taitap Musa.
Exodus35:21 Ki nyo age tugul ne ki ichirchir muguleldanyi
Exodus35:22 Ki pwa murenik ak kwonyiik
Exodus35:23 Ki ip chii tugul ne ki tinyei angook che buluu
Exodus35:24 Chii age tugul ne ki kon kagoochinoik che po fedha ak che po sugunonik
Exodus35:25 Ki ilet anyun rogoonik kobogorisyek tugul che tinyei ng'omnateet
Exodus35:26 Ki ilet koroorigap ng'oroorek kobogorisyek tugul che ki ichirchir mugulelwekwak eng' ng'omnateet.
Exodus35:27 Ki ip pounik koik che kiguure soam
Exodus35:28 tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny
Exodus35:29 Ki ipchi `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che po chamyet; muren age tugul ak kobogoryo age tugul che ki igiil mugulelwekwak koip tuguuk che po poisyonooto tugul
Exodus35:30 Ki leenji `Musa piigap Israel
Exodus35:31 ak kagonyiit ineendet Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet
Exodus35:32 Si kobiit konai ole choptoi poisyonigap musoknateet koboisyee thahabu
Exodus35:33 kowai koik che kitetyin kelongonik
Exodus35:34 Ki inde ng'omnateet muguleldanyi si komuuch koneet ineendet kobooto Aholiab
Exodus35:35 Ki konyiit `ineendet ng'omnateet mugulelwekwak
Exodus36:1 Ingobois anyun Bezalel
Exodus36:2 Ki kuur `Musa Bezalel
Exodus36:3 Kitaach icheek kagoochinoik tugul eng' Musa che kiga koip piigap Israel keyae poisyetap ole-tiliil. Ki ipchi kogeny karonet age tugul kagoochinoik alak che po chamyet.
Exodus36:4 Ara ki pwa anyun piik tugul che ng'oomen nyoo koyai poisyet tugul ne po ole-tiliil.
Exodus36:5 Ki ng'alaalji `icheek Musa koleenji
Exodus36:6 Ki ng'at Musa anyun kemwaitaat eng' nganaseet komugul keele
Exodus36:7 amu kiga koyam keyae poisyonooto tuguuk che kiga keip kot kosiirto.
Exodus36:8 Ki yai chii age tugul ne ng'oom eng' icheek che poisyei
Exodus36:9 Ki mitainik taman ak aeng' kooindap angeet age tugul ak mitainik aeng' tebeesindap angeet age tugul. Ki aechin angoochooto tugul.
Exodus36:10 Kiropchindos angook muut ak kiropchindos chuun alak muut ak icheek
Exodus36:11 Kinapchi ineendet pelelutik che buluu eng' tabandap angeet age eng' ole kurmanat
Exodus36:12 Kinapchi angeet age pelelutik konom
Exodus36:13 Yeityo koyai kariik konom che po thahabu che kiname angook
Exodus36:14 Yeityo koyai angook taman ak agenge koyae koroorigap ng'oroorek koek emait ne tuge emaitap Kamuktaindet.
Exodus36:15 Ki mitainik taman ak somok kooindap angeet age tugul
Exodus36:16 Ki ituiyo angook muut koek agenge icheegei ak ki ituiyo angook lo kogeny koek agenge icheegei.
Exodus36:17 Kinapchi pelelutik konom tabandap angeet age ne tabanu parak
Exodus36:18 Ki itaany kariik che kiname angook konom che po sugunonik che ituiye emait koek agenge.
Exodus36:19 Yeityo konap magatogap mengichik che ki kisal kobiriritu
Exodus36:20 Ki yai pagoinik che tonondos che po keetiigap chebitoik kobunji emaitap Kamuktaindet.
Exodus36:21 Koindap pagoiyot age tugul ko ki mitainik ang'wan
Exodus36:22 Ki tinyei pagoiyot age tugul ng'elyebwek aeng' che ki tuiyo. Ki yai ko uu nooto pagoinik tugul che po koot.
Exodus36:23 Ki yai pagoinik che po koot
Exodus36:24 Kibarbar fedha kosikyi kong'iik artam
Exodus36:25 Eng' komosta age ne po aeng' ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet
Exodus36:26 ak kong'ichooto artam che po fedha
Exodus36:27 Ki yai anyun pagoinik lo kobunji emaitap Kamuktaindet patai
Exodus36:28 Ki yai kogeny pagoinik aeng' kobunji luukwek che po koot che mi patai.
Exodus36:29 Ki kitwakyin aeng' kobooch ng'wony agoi parak
Exodus36:30 Ki mi pagoinik sisiitu
Exodus36:31 Ki yai keetiigap chebitoik koek rateiywek; ki yai pagoinik muut che po komosta agenge ne po koot
Exodus36:32 ak rateiywek muut che po pagoinik che po komosta age ne po koot
Exodus36:33 Ki yai rateiywotap kween kwo kong'etee taban agoi taban
Exodus36:34 Ki iliige thahabu pagoinik
Exodus36:35 Ki yai angeet ne kioiye koot eng' ne buluu
Exodus36:36 Ki yachi angoonochooto lumeiywek ang'wan che po chebitoik ak koliige thahabu. Ki po thahabu ireusyekwak; ak ki itang'ji kong'iik ang'wan che po fedha che ki kibarbar.
Exodus36:37 Kinap angeet ne po kurgeetap Emait
Exodus36:38 ak lumeiywekwak muut ak ireusyekwak. Ki iliige thahabu metowegap lumeiywek
Exodus37:1 Ki yai Bezalel moinget eng' keetiigap chebitoik
Exodus37:2 Ki iliige thahabu che tiliileen oriit ak saang' ak kitegele tegeleiywotap thahabu koyieme paragunnyi tugul.
Exodus37:3 Ki itang'ji peteinik ang'wan che po thahabu luukwekwak ang'wan. Ki inde aeng' komosta age ak aeng' eng' komosta age.
Exodus37:4 Ki yai keetiik che ki ibe che po chebitoik ak koliige thahabu.
Exodus37:5 Ki irooch keetichooto peteinik che miitei tabanwegap moinget
Exodus37:6 Ki yai kerwetap rireenet eng' thahabu che tiliileen. Koindonyi kogi sendimita pogol ak taman ak tebeesindanyi kogi sendimita tamanwogik lo ak lo.
Exodus37:7 Yeityo koyai kerubisyek aeng' eng' thahabu che kitaanyi
Exodus37:8 Ki tebee kerubit age komosi
Exodus37:9 Kiiito kerubisyek kebebaikwak koba parak
Exodus37:10 Ki yai meset eng' keetiigap chebitoik
Exodus37:11 Ki iliige thahabu che tiliileen ak ki yachi tegeleiywotap thahabu kotegele
Exodus37:12 Ki yachi tegeleiywot ne yamei mitainik tamanwogik tisap ak muut tebeesindanyi koyiem kioto ak ki yai tegeleiywotap thahabu koyieme tabanwekyik tugul.
Exodus37:13 Ki itang'ji peteinik ang'wan che po thahabu ak ki inde peteinichooto luukwek ang'wan eng' komoswegap keelyekyik ang'wan.
Exodus37:14 Ki mi peteinichooto ole neegitee tegeleiywot
Exodus37:15 Ki yai keetichooto eng' keetiigap chebitoik ak koliige thahabu
Exodus37:16 Ki yai kora eng' thahabu che tiliileen tuguuk che ki mi meset parak
Exodus37:17 Ki itaany kogeny tait eng' thahabu che tiliileen. Kiyae keloto po tait thahabu che kitaanyi
Exodus37:18 Kisage mooriik lo toloita nooto
Exodus37:19 Ki tinyei temeet agenge kigombok somok che ki kiyai koigei taaptook che kiguure almond
Exodus37:20 Ki miitei ole po toloita ineendet kigombok ang'wanu che ki kiyai kogergeit ak taaptogap almond
Exodus37:21 Eng' komaswechooto tugul lo ye kigasage mooriik aeng'u
Exodus37:22 Ki namgei mulonokwak ak mooriikwak
Exodus37:23 Ki yai taisyekyik koek tisap koyae thahabu che tiliileen
Exodus37:24 Ki yai kioto eng' thahabu che yamei keruutik sosom ak muut kobooto tuguukyik tugul.
Exodus37:25 Ki yai kapkorosuut ole kibeelee nyamdutik koyae keetiigap chebitoik. Ki mitainik artam ak muut koindonyi ak ki mitainik artam ak muut tebeesindanyi
Exodus37:26 Ki iliige thahabu che tiliileen
Exodus37:27 Ki itaany peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak ki inde tuguuchooto kotabon tegeleiywot keel eng' tegeet
Exodus37:28 Ki yai keetiik che ki ibe
Exodus37:29 Ki chop mwaita ne tiliil ne ki ilse
Exodus38:1 Ki yai kaptisisyet ole kibeelee tiseiywot eng' keetiigap chebitoik. Ki achin koindonyi ak tebeesindannyi ko mitainik aeng' ak robo eng' mitainik aeng' ak robo ak tononennyi kogimitait agenge ak robo.
Exodus38:2 Ki yai kosikyi kuinoik eng' luukwekyik ang'wan
Exodus38:3 Ki itaany tuguuk tugul che po kaptisisyet
Exodus38:4 Ki yachi kaptisyet sugunonik che kiregeri
Exodus38:5 Ki itang'ji peteinik ang'wan luukwek ang'wan che po kioto po sugunwet ne ki kireger
Exodus38:6 Ki yai keetichooto eng' chebitoik ak koliige sugunwet.
Exodus38:7 Ki irooch keetichooto peteinik oriit che mi komoswegap kaptisisyet si kobiit ketandane. Ki yai kioto koek moinget oriit.
Exodus38:8 Ki itaany taabeet ne po sugunwet
Exodus38:9 Ne rubei
Exodus38:10 ki tiptem lumeiywekwak ak ki tiptem kong'iikwak che po sugunonik che tononie. Ki po fedha ireusyegap lumeiywek kobooto rateiywekwak che kituiye.
Exodus38:11 Ki mi angook murot kaataam che yamei mitainik artam ak ang'wan ak lumeiywekwak tiptem ak kong'iikwak che tononie tiptem che po sugunonik. Ki po fedha ireusyek che po lumeiywek kobooto rateiywekwak che kituiye.
Exodus38:12 Eng' komosta ne tokyingei cherongo
Exodus38:13 Kitabanu komostap kong'asiis angook che yamei mitainik tiptem ak aeng'.
Exodus38:14 Ki mitainik lo ak kebeberyat angook che po kurgeet komosta age ak ki tinyei lumeiywekwak somok
Exodus38:15 ak ki iliige nooto komosta ne po aeng'. Ki mi kurgeet ne po seremut komosi ak komosi angook che yamei mitainik lo ak kebeberyat
Exodus38:16 Angook tugul che kiyiemei seremut ko ki po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet.
Exodus38:17 Ki po sugung'iik che kitononie lumeiywek
Exodus38:18 Ki nap nabiindet konde lelesta angeet ne po kurgeetap seremunooto ng'ootaat eng' che buluu
Exodus38:19 Ki po sugunonik lumeiywekwak ang'wanu ak kong'iikwak ang'wan che tononie. Ki po fedha ireusyekwak ak ki kituge fedha metowegap lumeiywekwak ak rateiywekwak che kiga kituiyote.
Exodus38:20 Ki po sugunonik tigongenik tugul che po emaitap Kamuktaindet ak tigongenik tugul che yiemei seremut.
Exodus38:21 Koitetap tuguuk che po emaitap Kamuktaindet anyun chu
Exodus38:22 Ak ki yai Bezalel
Exodus38:23 Ki mi ak ineendet Aholiab weeriitap Aisamak
Exodus38:24 Ki ek thahabu tugul che ki kiboisyee eng' poisyet tugul ne po ole-tiliil
Exodus38:25 Fedhaisyegap icheeget che ki kiit che po tuiyet
Exodus38:26 Ki kon chii tugul beka
Exodus38:27 Keruutik eliphuusyek somok che po fedha ko ki kitaanyi kobwa kong'iik che uu kelongonik che po ole-tiliil ak kong'iik pogol che tononie lumeiywegap angeet ne ki kioiye koot
Exodus38:28 Ki itaany keruutik taman ak tisap ak kramuisyek tamanwogik tisap ak muut koek ireusyek che po lumeiywek ak kotuge fedha metowekwak ak koyachi rateiywek che ki kituiyote.
Exodus38:29 Kiyamei keruutik eliphuusyek aeng' pogol agenge ak tiptem ak ang'wan che po sugunwet ne po kagoochinet.
Exodus38:30 Ki itaany chuuto Bezalel koek kong'iik che po kurgeet che tononie lumeiywegap emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus38:31 kong'iik che tononie lumeiywegap seremut
Exodus39:1 Ki yai pichooto ngoroik che ki kisal kogororonitu eng' tuguuk che buluu
Exodus39:2 Ki yai Ephod ne po thahabu
Exodus39:3 Ki itaany thahabu koterteeritu yeityo korar koigei tapsinok
Exodus39:4 Kinapchi kioto kebeberwegap tigigoik
Exodus39:5 Ole kiga kiyaita pireneet
Exodus39:6 Ki wai koik che kiguure soam
Exodus39:7 Ki inde koichooto ephod ole po tigigoik
Exodus39:8 Ki yai ngoryeetap tegeet
Exodus39:9 Ki aechin tebeesindo ak koindo ak ki kiliich ngoryonooto po tegeet koek aeng'. Ki ek koindonyi ak tebeesindannyi olo po sendimita tiptem ak aeng' eng' tiptem ak aeng' ko kagiliich.
Exodus39:10 Kitetyi kioto ortinwek ang'wan che po koik che po kamanuut. Ki inde ooreet ne po tai sardio
Exodus39:11 Konde ooreet ne po aeng'
Exodus39:12 Eng' ooreet ne po somok ko ki inde
Exodus39:13 Ooreet ne po ang'wan ko ki inde
Exodus39:14 Kite koichooto kainaigap piigap Israel. Ki taman ak aeng'
Exodus39:15 Kinapchi ngoryonooto po tegeet sirimwek che uu rogoonik che po thahabu che tiliileen
Exodus39:16 Kitagul thahabu koek morik aeng'
Exodus39:17 Ki irookto sirimwechooto aeng' po thahabu che ki kilet peteinichooto aeng' che mi tabanwegap luukwek aeng'
Exodus39:18 Ki nam komoswechuun alak aeng' che po sirimwechooto aeng' ki kilet ak korooch kelongonik aeng' che ki kitagul
Exodus39:19 Ki yai peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak konapchi ngoryonooto po tegeet ole po luukwek aeng'
Exodus39:20 Ki yai peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak konapchi tuguuchooto tigigoigap ephod eng' ole po keel
Exodus39:21 Ki igiich icheek ngoryeetap tegeet eng' peteinikyik
Exodus39:22 Kinap ngoryeet ne kiroochegei
Exodus39:23 ak kinap ngoryonooto kween ole chutei metit
Exodus39:24 Kinapchi ngoryonooto tabandap keel logoek che buluu
Exodus39:25 Ki itaany cheptingilook che po thahabu che tiliileen
Exodus39:26 ye ki inde cheptingilyet
Exodus39:27 Kinap ngoroik che kooen che po katanit ne karaaran che ki kila kobunji Aron ak weeriikyik
Exodus39:28 ak chepkulet ne po katanit ne karaaran
Exodus39:29 ak pireneet ne po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet
Exodus39:30 Ki itaany naaryeet ne tiliil
Exodus39:31 Kiratyi rogoet ne buluu
Exodus39:32 Ki igeskei anyun poisyonik tugul che po kootap emait ne kituiyechin. Ak ki yai piigap Israel ko uu tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.
Exodus39:33 Yeityo koipchi `icheek emaitap Kamuktaindet Musa
Exodus39:34 emaitap magatogap mengichik
Exodus39:35 moingetap paornateet
Exodus39:36 meset ak tuguukyik tugul ak magatiinik che itabaanatiin
Exodus39:37 keeldo ne tiliil ne po tait kobooto taisyekyik
Exodus39:38 kapkorosutap thahabu
Exodus39:39 kaptisisyetap sugunwet
Exodus39:40 angook che songinindos che po serumut ak lumeiywekyik ak kong'iikwak che tononi
Exodus39:41 ak ngoroik che ki kisal kogororonitu si keboisyee eng' ole-tiliil
Exodus39:42 Ki yai anyun piigap Israel poisyet tugul ne ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.
Exodus39:43 Kigeerot Musa poisyonichooto tugul
Exodus40:1 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Exodus40:2 “Lumde koyooto po emait ne kituiyechin eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawet ne po tai.
Exodus40:3 Inde moingetap paornateet koot oriit ak ituch eng' ngoryonooto kioiye koot.
Exodus40:4 Yeityo iibu meset inde ko ak itet komyee tuguuk che tebee paragunnyi ak iibu keldap tait
Exodus40:5 Inde kapkorosuut ne po thahabu ne kibeelee nyamdutik eng' taitap moingetap paornateet
Exodus40:6 Inde kaptisisyet ne kibeelee tiseiywot taitap kurgeetap koyooto po emait ne kituiyechin.
Exodus40:7 Inde taabeet ne kiuunse kwenutap emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisyet ak iroong'ji peek kioto.
Exodus40:8 Lumde ng'ootweetap seremut kot kotuiyo ak isonginin angeet kurgeetap seremut.
Exodus40:9 “Iipe mwanik che ki ilse ak iil emaitap Kamuktaindet ak tuguuk tugul che mi oriit; itabaan ak tuguukyik tugul
Exodus40:10 Yeityo iil kaptisisyet ne kibeelee tiseiywot ak tuguukyik tugul; itiliil kaptisisyet
Exodus40:11 Iil taabeet ne kiuunse ak ng'echerennyi ak itabaan.
Exodus40:12 “Imutu Aron ak weeriikyik kobwa kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin ak iune peek.
Exodus40:13 Yeityo ilaakyi Aron ngoroik che ki kitabaan ak iil ineendet ak itabaan
Exodus40:14 Imutu weeriikyik ak ilaakyi ngoroik che kooen
Exodus40:15 ak iil icheek ko uu ye ki iil kwandanywa
Exodus40:16 Ki yai anyun Musa ko uu nooto
Exodus40:17 Ki kilumda anyun koyooto eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' eng' arawet ne tai eng' peetuut ne po tai.
Exodus40:18 Ki lumda Musa anyun koot
Exodus40:19 Yeityo koiito anyun emait eng' emaitap Kamuktaindet parak ak kotuge angook alak koliich
Exodus40:20 Yeityo koip paornateet konde moinget oriit
Exodus40:21 Kingo pata
Exodus40:22 Ki inde meset emaitap Kamuktaindet ne kituiyechin
Exodus40:23 Kitet magatiinik eng' meset eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus40:24 Ki inde keldap tait emait ne kituiyechin
Exodus40:25 Ki inaam taisyek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Exodus40:26 Ki inde kapkorosuut ne po thahabu emaitap Kamuktaindet ne kituiyechin eng' koyooto sip kemong'jin
Exodus40:27 ak kibeelee kapkorosunooto nyamdutik che po tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny
Exodus40:28 Yeityo kosonginin angeet eng' kurgeetap emaitap Kamuktaindet.
Exodus40:29 Ki inde kaptisisyet ne kibeelee tiseiywot eng' kurgeetap emaitap Kamuktaindet ne po emait ne kituiyechin. Ki igoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak ne po peek
Exodus40:30 Ki inde taabeet ne kiuunse kwenutap emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisyet ak koroong'ji peek oriit
Exodus40:31 Ki iun Musa ak Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak ak keelyekwak eng' kioto.
Exodus40:32 Ki iuni ko uu nooto ye kichutei emait ne kituiyechin oriit ak ye kimachei koriikyi kaptisisyet
Exodus40:33 Ki lumda ng'ootweetap seremut koyiem koot ak kaptisisyet ak konde angeet kurgeetap seremut. Ki iges anyun Musa poisyonooto.
Exodus40:34 Ki nyo kotuch anyun pooldet emait ne kituiyechin ak ki nyi emait `liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Exodus40:35 Ki ma imuuch Musa kochut emait ne kituiyechin amu kigatebee pooldet paragutap koyooto ak kiganyi emaitap Kamuktaindet liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Exodus40:36 Ye kingo naam kotogosta pooldet eng' koyooto
Exodus40:37 Ago ye kingo ma togosta pooldet
Exodus40:38 Amu kiteben poldetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emaitap Kamuktaindet parak peet
Leviticus1:1 Ki kuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak kong'alaalji eng' emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus1:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Leviticus1:3 “Ngo kagoochinennyi ko po tiseiywot ne kibeelei ne po tuuga
Leviticus1:4 Ingogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinonooto kibeelei si ketaach nooto ak keyai kagaigaet agobo ineendet.
Leviticus1:5 Yeityo koeeny kirgooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ingoip korotiik tisiik
Leviticus1:6 Ak koeeny ineendet kagoochinonooto kibeelei
Leviticus1:7 Ingonde maat kaptisisyet weeriigap Aron tisiindet ak kotetyi kweenik ma.
Leviticus1:8 Ye ibata kotet panyechooto kagesach tisiik
Leviticus1:9 Ago ingoun eng' peek tuguugap ke kobooto keelyekyik ak kobeel tisiindet kirgooto komugul eng' kaptisisyet. Niito ko tiseiywot ne kibeelei
Leviticus1:10 “Ngo po kagoochinennyi ne kibeelei neego che po keechiirek anan che po ng'oroorek ko ingogoitoi mengit anan kwesta ne libwoop.
Leviticus1:11 Ingoeeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kaptisisyet ole tokyingei murot kaataam. Ye ibata koisote tisiik weeriigap Aron korotiik kaptisisyet komoswek tugul.
Leviticus1:12 Ingosach anyun ineendet panyeek kobiit kebeberwekyik
Leviticus1:13 Ago ingoun tuguugap ke ak keelyek eng' peek. Ingogoito tisiindet panyeek tugul ak kobeel eng' kaptisisyet. Niito ko kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus1:14 “Ngo po toriitik kagoochinennyi ne kebeelei ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus1:15 Yeityo koip tisiindet konyo kaptisisyet ak koiiny kaatinnyi kong'et metit. Ingobeel eng' kaptisisyet ak kochiilji korotiikyik tabandap kaptisisyet.
Leviticus1:16 Ingonem kebonjorennyi ak tuguukyik ak kowiirchi kaptisisyet taban ole tokyingei kong'asiis
Leviticus1:17 Yeityo kogereer kopcheune aeng' kebebaikyik amat koobeesyo. Ingobeel tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet eng' kweenik che mi ma. Niito kagoochinet ne kigoitoi kebeel
Leviticus2:1 Ye igoitoi chii age tugul kagoochinet ne po peek che igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus2:2 Yeityo koipchi ineendet weeriigap Aron tisiik. Muguti tisiindet anyun chooto konyiti euut kobooto mwaitanyi ak tuguuk che nyamdut tugul
Leviticus2:3 Che kang'et eng' kagoochinet ne po peechooto ng'ootiin tambulul
Leviticus2:4 “Ye igoitoi inyee kagoochinetap peek che kibeelee eng' ma
Leviticus2:5 Ngo kagoochineng'ung' ko kagoochinet ne po peek che kagibeel eng' kirambenit
Leviticus2:6 Itiloti komengegitu
Leviticus2:7 Ngo po peek kagoochineng'ung' che kagibeel eng' taabeetap karnet
Leviticus2:8 Ara ipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinetap peek che kagechop eng' tuguuchuuto
Leviticus2:9 Yeityo konem tisiindet che po kabwaatet eng' kagoochinonooto po peek
Leviticus2:10 Kagoochinetap peek che kang'et ko punjin Aron ak weeriikyik. Niito ko tiliil miising' kot kosiir
Leviticus2:11 “Amat onde mermereek kagoochinet age tugul ne po peek ne ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu mobeele mermereek anan kumyat age tugul
Leviticus2:12 Ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus2:13 Inde muunyuk kagoochineng'ung' age tugul ne po peek; amengorartae kagoochinetap peek muunyuk che po kayomisetap Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Igoitoi muunyuk kobooto kagoochinoiguk tugul.
Leviticus2:14 “Ngigoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinetap peek che po tongoanik
Leviticus2:15 Rong'ji mwaita ak inde tuguuk che nyamdut; niito ko kagoochinet ne po peek.
Leviticus2:16 Ingobeel tisiindet kabwaatet ne po nooto
Leviticus3:1 “Ngo kagoochinennyi ko tiseiywotap kaalyeet
Leviticus3:2 Ye ibata kogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinennyi ak koeeny eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus3:3 Igoitoi ineendet eng' tiseiywotap kaalyeet kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunei maat: mwanik che ki ilaach moet ak sunetik tugul che po moo
Leviticus3:4 soromokyik tuwai kobooto mwanikwak
Leviticus3:5 Yeityo kobeel weeriigap Aron chooto eng' kaptisisyet; ingonde paragutap tiseiywot ne kibeelei
Leviticus3:6 “Ngo po neego kagoochinennyi ne po tiseiywotap kaalyeet ne ipchin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ngo mengit anan kwesta anan ko subeendo
Leviticus3:7 Ngo koitoi mengit koek kagoochinennyi
Leviticus3:8 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinennyi ak koeeny eng' taitap emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus3:9 Ngo koitoi che po tiseiywotap kaalyeet koek kagoochinet ne punei maat ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus3:10 soromok tuwai
Leviticus3:11 Peelei chooto tisiindet eng' kaptisisyet koek amitwogigap kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunei maat.
Leviticus3:12 “Ngo po ng'orooryet kagoochinennyi
Leviticus3:13 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitap ng'orooryanooto
Leviticus3:14 Eng' chooto kogoochin `ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne punei maat; mwanik che ki ilaach moet
Leviticus3:15 soromok tuwai ak mwanik che ki ilaach soromochooto che mi ole neegitee kipkitit ak kwambelelyet ne miitei kooet kobooto soromok.
Leviticus3:16 Ak kobeel tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet; amitwogigap kagoochinet chuuto
Leviticus3:17 Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' ibinwekwok tugul eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul
Leviticus4:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus4:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Leviticus4:3 Ngo yai tengekto tisiindet ne ki kiil kot koipchi piik ng'oogisto
Leviticus4:4 Ingoget kirgooto konyo kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogonoor eunnyi metitap kirgooto
Leviticus4:5 Taachei tisiindet ne ki kiil korotiigap kirgooto ak koip kobwa oriit ne po emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus4:6 yeityo korooch mornennyi korotiik ak koisisye korotichooto konyil tisap eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus4:7 Ye ibata konde tisiindet alak eng' korotichooto kuinoigap kapkorosuut ne po nyamdutik che ng'uu ne anyiny che kibeelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus4:8 Ingobut mwanik tugul che po kirgooto po kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus4:9 kobooto soromok tuwai
Leviticus4:10 Putei mwanichooto ko uu ye kibutei che po kirgit ne tiseiywotap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. Yeityo kobeel tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet ne kibeelee kagoochinoik.
Leviticus4:11 Ago muitap kirgooto ak panyeekyik tugul kobooto metinnyi
Leviticus4:12 nooto kirgooto komugul
Leviticus4:13 “Ngo lel tuiyet komugul ne po Israel ak koung'ak lelutyonooto eng' taitap tuiyet
Leviticus4:14 Ye kagonaak lelutyonooto kayai
Leviticus4:15 Ingogonoor poisyegap tuiyet eunekwak metitap kirgooto
Leviticus4:16 Ye ibata koip tisiindet ne ki kiil korotiigap kirgooto kobwa oriit ne po emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus4:17 ak korooch mornennyi korotiik ak koisisye eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyil tisap
Leviticus4:18 Yeityo konde korotichooto alak kuinoigap kapkorosuut ne miitei taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emait ne kituiyechin. Roong'jin korotiik tugul kelutap kaptisisyet ne kibeelee kagoochinoik ne miitei kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin.
Leviticus4:19 Putei mwanikyik tugul ak kobeel eng' kaptisisyet
Leviticus4:20 ak koyachi kirgooto ko uu ye ki yachi kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengekto. Eng' niito anyun koyae tisiindet kagaigaet agobo icheek ak kenyochigaat.
Leviticus4:21 Ingola ineendet kirgit kwo saang'utap nganaseet ak kobeel ko uu ye kigabeel kirgit ne po tai. Niito ko kagoochinetap tengekto ne po tuiyet.
Leviticus4:22 “Ye kalel pounindet
Leviticus4:23 ak ngiboorchi ineendet tengektanyi ne ki yai
Leviticus4:24 Ingogonoor eunnyi metitap kwesta ak koeeny eng' ole kieng'e kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Niito kagoochinetap tengekto.
Leviticus4:25 Yeityo konam tisiindet korotichooto po kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus4:26 Ak kobeel mwanikyik tugul eng' kaptisisyet
Leviticus4:27 “Ngo lel chii age tugul ne po tuiyet
Leviticus4:28 ak ngiboorchi ineendet tengektanyi ne koyai
Leviticus4:29 Yeityo kogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinonooto po tengekto ak koeeny eng' ye kigoitoe kagoochinoik che kibeelei.
Leviticus4:30 Ye ibata konam tisiindet korotiigap artanooto eng' mornennyi ak koiilate kuinoigap kaptisisyet ne po kagoochinoik che kibeelei
Leviticus4:31 Ak kobut mwanikyik tugul ko uu ye kibutei mwanigap tiseiywot ne po kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. Yeityo kobeel tisiindet eng' kaptisisyet koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet ak kenyochigaat.
Leviticus4:32 “Ngo kagoochinennyi ne po tengekto ko keechiiryet
Leviticus4:33 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinonooto po tengekto
Leviticus4:34 Yeityo konam tisiindet korotichooto po kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus4:35 Ak kobut mwanikyik tugul ko uu ye kibutei mwanigap keechiiryet ne po tiseiywotap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. Ingobeel tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet ak konde paragutap kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che punei maat. Eng' niito
Leviticus5:1 “Ngo yai chii age tugul tengek
Leviticus5:2 Anan ngo twa chii age tugul kiy age tugul ne ng'waan ne kame
Leviticus5:3 Anan ngo twa murwoonindap chii
Leviticus5:4 Anan ngo yosyo chii eng' kutinnyi kosartae
Leviticus5:5 Ye kagonam chii age tugul tengekto eng' age eng' tuguuchooto
Leviticus5:6 ak koip kagoochinetap chalwoktanyi
Leviticus5:7 “Ago ngo ma imuuchi koal aarwet ne punu akweet
Leviticus5:8 Ingoipchi chooto tisiindet
Leviticus5:9 ak koisee korotiigap kagoochinetap tengekto tabandap kaptisisyet
Leviticus5:10 Yeityo kogoito ne po aeng' koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus5:11 “Ago ngo ma imuuchi koal cheptugenik aeng' anan ko aarek aeng' che po toriitik
Leviticus5:12 Ak koipchi tisiindet
Leviticus5:13 Yaei anyun tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet amu tengektanyi ne koyai eng' age tugul eng' chooto
Leviticus5:14 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus5:15 “Ngo yai chii age tugul chalwokto
Leviticus5:16 Igeeri nooto king'em
Leviticus5:17 “Ngo yai chii age tugul tengek ago nganda kama kongen
Leviticus5:18 Ketu anyun mengit ne libwoop ne punu akweetap keechiirek kogetyi tisiindet
Leviticus5:19 Niito kagoochinetap chalwokto; ki konam ineendet iman chalwokto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”
Leviticus6:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus6:2 “Ngo yai chii age tugul tengek
Leviticus6:3 anan ngo nyoor kiy ne ki pet ak komwa lembech
Leviticus6:4 Ngo kagoyai chii anyun tengek ak konam ineendet lelutyet
Leviticus6:5 anan kiy age tugul ne ki iyasyo eng' lembech agobo kioto. Ingoweekta kogeesta ak kotesyi kebeberta agenge eng' muut
Leviticus6:6 Ye ibata nooto
Leviticus6:7 Yae tisiindet tisiisyet agobo ineendet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus6:8 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus6:9 “Ng'at Aron ak weeriikyik ileenji: ni ng'atuutyetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei; ingotebee ma eng' kaptisisyet kagoochinonooto kigoitoi kebeel kemout komugul agoi koeech
Leviticus6:10 Ingolaach tisiindet ngoryennyi ne po tisiisyet
Leviticus6:11 Yeityo koreek ngoroikyik ak kolaach ngoroik alak
Leviticus6:12 Kiriibei maat ne mi kaptisisyet si ma me
Leviticus6:13 Ingoriip maat kolal kotugul eng' kaptisisyet
Leviticus6:14 “Ni ko ng'atuutyetap kagoochinetap peek; igoitoi weeriigap Aron eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus6:15 Kimuguti konyi euut eng' peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che po kagoochinetap peek ak eng' mwanik kobooto tuguuk che nyamdut tugul che miitei kagoochinetap peek parak
Leviticus6:16 Amei Aron ak weeriikyik che kong'etune chooto. Kiamei ama kinde mermereek eng' komosta ne tiliil; amei eng' seremutap emait ne kituiyechin.
Leviticus6:17 Ma kibeelei kobooto mermereek; kaagoite nooto koek kebebertanywa eng' kagoochinoikyuk kobun maat; tiliil niito miising'; uu kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus6:18 Amei chooto age tugul ne muren eng' lagogap Aron ak koek nooto ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' ibinwekwok eng' kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kigoochin kobun maat. Kiy age tugul ne tiinyei ko tiliilitu.”
Leviticus6:19 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus6:20 “Ni kagoochinetap Aron ak weeriikyik
Leviticus6:21 Kibeelei kobooto mwaita eng' kirambenit
Leviticus6:22 Ko uu nooto
Leviticus6:23 Kibeelei kogeskei kagoochinet age tugul ne po peegap tisiindet; ma ki amei.”
Leviticus6:24 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus6:25 “Mwachi Aron ak weeriikyik ileenji
Leviticus6:26 Tisiindet ne igoitoi kagoochinetap tengek ko amei kebeber eng' nooto. Ki amei eng' komosta ne itabaanat eng' seremutap emait ne kituiyechin.
Leviticus6:27 Tiliilitu kiy age tugul ne tiinyei panyechooto. Ngosachi korotiigap kioto ngor age tugul
Leviticus6:28 Kituei tereet ne kagiyoe panyechooto. Ngo kagiyoe tereetap sugunwet
Leviticus6:29 Amei age tugul ne muren eng' tisiik
Leviticus6:30 Ma ki amei kagoochinet age tugul ne po tengek ne kagiip korotiikyik kobwa emait ne kituiyechin keyaei kagaigaet eng' ole-tiliil; kibeelei eng' ma.”
Leviticus7:1 “Ni ng'atuutyet agobo kagoochinetap chalwok. Tiliil niito miising'.
Leviticus7:2 Ki eng'e kagoochinet agobo chalwok ole kieng'e kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus7:3 Igoitoi tisiindet eng' panyechooto mwanikyik tugul; cho po saruryet
Leviticus7:4 soromok tuwai ak mwanik che ki ilaach soromochooto che mi ole neegitee kipkitit ak kwambelelyet ne miitei kooet kobooto soromok.
Leviticus7:5 Peelei tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet koek kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun maat. Niito kagoochinetap chalwok.
Leviticus7:6 Amei mureno age tugul eng' tisiik panyechooto; ki amei eng' komosta ne tiliil. Tiliil niito miising'.
Leviticus7:7 Uu kagoochinetap tengek kagoochinetap chalwok
Leviticus7:8 Tisiindet ne igoitoi kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po chii age tugul
Leviticus7:9 Punjin tisiindet ne igoitoi kagoochinet. Punjin ineendet kagoochinet age tugul ne po peek che kibeelei eng' ma ak che kigelei eng' taabeet ak che kigelei eng' kirambenit.
Leviticus7:10 Kagoochinet age tugul ne po peek
Leviticus7:11 “Ni ng'atuutyetap tiseiywotap kagoochinoik agobo kaalyeet ne igoochin `chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Leviticus7:12 Ngo koitoi chii kagoitoet agobo kongoi
Leviticus7:13 Igoitoi kagoochinennyi kobooto magatiinik che mengeechen che kaginde mermereek
Leviticus7:14 Igoitoi magatyat agenge eng' chooto kobun kagoochinet age tugul
Leviticus7:15 Ki amei panyeegap tiseiywot ne po kagoochinet agobo kaalyeet eng' peetuunooto kegoitoi
Leviticus7:16 Ago
Leviticus7:17 Ago che kong'etune panyeegap tiseiywot kot koit peetuutap somok
Leviticus7:18 Ngot koam chii panyeegap tiseiywot ne po kagoochinet agobo kaalyeet eng' peetuutap somok koma iyanaat ak ma ki ityin ineendet ne igoitoi. Ki iti keele kagong'wanit ak ibei tengektanyi chiito ne amei chooto.
Leviticus7:19 “Ma ki amei panyeek che katiiny kiy age tugul ne ng'waan; kibeelei eng' ma. Ak panyeek tugul che ma twa kiy
Leviticus7:20 Ago chii ne amei panyeegap tiseiywotap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotinyei murwoonindo
Leviticus7:21 Ye katiiny chii age tugul kiy ne ng'waan
Leviticus7:22 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus7:23 “Mwachi piigap Israel ileenji
Leviticus7:24 Kimuuchi keboisyee eng' poisyon alak mwaitap ne kameei ineegei anan ko mwaitap ne katon tyong'in
Leviticus7:25 Ngot koam chii age tugul mwaitap tyony ne igoitoi piik koek kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun maat
Leviticus7:26 Amat oam korotiik alak tugul
Leviticus7:27 King'etoi eng' piikyik chii age tugul ne amei korotiik.”
Leviticus7:28 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus7:29 “Mwachi piigap Israel ileenji: ‘Ineendet ne igoitoi tiseiywotap kagoochinoikyik che po kaalyeet kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus7:30 Ibu ineendet eng' eunekyik kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun maat. Ibu mwanik kobooto tagateet si keongoi tagateet koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Leviticus7:31 Peelei tisiindet mwanik eng' kaptisisyet
Leviticus7:32 Ogoochi tisiindet chaatit ne po komostap tai koek kagoochinet ne punu tiseiywegap kagoochinoikwok che po kaalyeet.
Leviticus7:33 Ineendet eng' weeriigap Aron ne igoitoi korotiigap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet ak mwanik
Leviticus7:34 Kaataach eng' piigap Israel kagoochinetap tagateet ne kiongoi
Leviticus7:35 Niito kebebertap Aron ak weeriikyik che punu kagoochinoik che kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus7:36 Chuuto che ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kigoochi icheek ko kagiil
Leviticus7:37 Chuuto ng'atuutigap kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus7:38 che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai eng' peetuut ye king'atei ineendet piigap Israel kole kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoikwak
Leviticus8:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus8:2 “Imut Aron ak weeriikyik
Leviticus8:3 yeityo iyum tuiyet komugul eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin.”
Leviticus8:4 Ki yai Musa anyun ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus8:5 Ki leenji `Musa tuiyet
Leviticus8:6 Ki imut `Musa Aron ak weeriikyik ak koun icheek eng' peek.
Leviticus8:7 Ki ilaakyi ineendet Aron ngoryeet ne kooi ak koratyi pireneet ak kolaakyi kora ngoryeet age ne kooi ak ephod
Leviticus8:8 Ki ilaakyi ineendet ngoryeetap tegeet ak konde ngoryonooto Urim ak Tumim.
Leviticus8:9 Ki igonor naaryeet metitap Aron ak konde komostap togoch kiit ne tiliil ne po thahabu
Leviticus8:10 Yeityo konam `Musa mwaita ne ki ilse ak koiil koot kobooto tuguuk tugul che ki miitei ko
Leviticus8:11 Ki ise mwaiata kapkorosuut konyil tisap
Leviticus8:12 Kiroong'ji mwaita ne ki ilse metitap Aron ak koiil si kotabaan ineendet.
Leviticus8:13 Ki imut `Musa weeriigap Aron ak kolaakyi ngoroik che kooen. Kiratyi icheek mosibisyek ak kolakyi metowekwak chepkuloik che mengeechen
Leviticus8:14 Kingo pata
Leviticus8:15 Ki eeny `Musa kirgooto ak kotaach korotiik
Leviticus8:16 Kibut `Musa mwanik tugul che po moo ak kwambelelyet ne miitei kooet
Leviticus8:17 Ki peel kirgit kobooto muitonyi
Leviticus8:18 Ki kweri mengitap kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus8:19 Ki eeny ak koisee `Musa korotiik kaptisisyet komoswek tugul.
Leviticus8:20 Kitil `Musa mengoto kosach
Leviticus8:21 Ki iun eng' peek tuguugap moo ak keelyek
Leviticus8:22 Ki kweri mengitap aeng'
Leviticus8:23 Ki eeny `Musa mengoto ak kotaach korotiik
Leviticus8:24 Ki imut `Musa kora weeriigap Aron ak konde korotiik walitap itiikwak che po tai
Leviticus8:25 Kibut mwanik
Leviticus8:26 Ki inem magatyat agenge ne ming'in ne ma kinde mermereek
Leviticus8:27 Ki inde chooto tugul eunegap Aron ak eunegap weeriikyik
Leviticus8:28 Ki inem `Musa tuguuchooto eng' eunekwak ak koip kobeel eng' kaptisisyet eng' paragutap kagoochinet ne kibeelei. Ki ek che itabaanatiin
Leviticus8:29 Ki ip `Musa tagateet ak koongoi koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki kebebertap Musa nooto eng' mengoto po poisyetap katabaanet
Leviticus8:30 Ki inem Musa kebebertap mwaata ki ilse ak kebebertap korotiik che ki mi kaptisisyet ak koisee Aron ak ngoroikyik
Leviticus8:31 Ki leenji `Musa Aron ak weeriikyik
Leviticus8:32 Obeel eng' ma panyeek ak magatiinik che kang'et.
Leviticus8:33 Momandoi eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin eng' peetuusyek tisap agoi kosulda peetuusyekwok che kitabaananenok
Leviticus8:34 Tuguuk che kageyai rani
Leviticus8:35 Otebee kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin peetuusyek tisap
Leviticus8:36 Ki yai anyun Aron ak weeriikyik tuguuk tugul che ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun Musa.
Leviticus9:1 Eng' peetuutap sisiit
Leviticus9:2 ak koleenji Aron
Leviticus9:3 Ng'alaalji piigap Israel ileenji
Leviticus9:4 kirgit ak mengit kobunji kagoochinoigap kaalyeet che kienyei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus9:5 Kiget icheek chooto ki kang'at Musa kobwa taitap emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus9:6 Ki mwa Musa kole
Leviticus9:7 Ki leenji `Musa Aron
Leviticus9:8 Ki wo Aron kaptisisyet ak koeeny moita ne po kagoochinetap tengekto ne nenyi.
Leviticus9:9 Ki igoochi weeriikyik ineeendet korotiik. Ki irookta mornennyi korotiik ak koiilate kuinoigap kaptisisyet
Leviticus9:10 Ki peel mwanik kobooto soromok
Leviticus9:11 Ki peel eng' ma panyeek ak muito eng' saang'utap nganaseet.
Leviticus9:12 Yeityo koeeny kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak ki ip weeriikyik korotiik koba ole mi Aron
Leviticus9:13 Ki ipchi `icheek ineendet kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus9:14 Ki iun tuguugap moo ak keelyek
Leviticus9:15 Ki igoito kora Aron kagoochinetap piik
Leviticus9:16 Ki ip kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus9:17 Ki ip kagoochinetap peek
Leviticus9:18 Ki eeny kirgit kobooto mengit
Leviticus9:19 Ago mwanigap kirgit ak che po mengit; che po saruryennyi
Leviticus9:20 ki igonoor `icheek mwanichooto tagatok
Leviticus9:21 Ki ongoi `Aron tagatok ak chaatit ne po komostap tai koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus9:22 Ki iito Aron eunekyik kotokyi ole mi piik ak koberuur icheek
Leviticus9:23 Ki pa Musa ak Aron emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus9:24 Ak ki mong' maat kobunu taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus10:1 King'etyo anyun weeriigap Aron
Leviticus10:2 Ki mong' anyun maat ne ki pun taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kobeel icheek
Leviticus10:3 Ki leenji Musa anyun Aron
Leviticus10:4 Ki kuur anyun `Musa Mishael ak Elzaphan
Leviticus10:5 Ki pwa anyun pichooto ak kosut icheek
Leviticus10:6 Ki leenji `Musa Aron ak weeriikyik
Leviticus10:7 Amomande eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus10:8 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron koleenji
Leviticus10:9 “Amat iee divain anan maiyo alak tugul inyee ak weeriiguk ye obendi emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus10:10 Obeesye anyun che itabaanatiin ak che ma itabaanatiin
Leviticus10:11 Oneet piigap Israel ng'atuutik tugul che ki komwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' Musa.”
Leviticus10:12 Ki leenji `Musa Aron ak weeriikyik che ki ng'et
Leviticus10:13 Oame eng' ole-tiliil
Leviticus10:14 Ago omuuchi oam inyee ak weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk eng' komosta ne tiliil tagateet ne kiongoi ak chaatit ne kinamjin parak; amu kagigonnin chooto koek kebebertang'ung' ak lagoguk eng' tiseiywegap kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet eng' piigap Israel.
Leviticus10:15 Ibu `icheek chaatit ne kinamjin parak ak tagateet ne kiongoi kobooto kagoochinoik che punei maat che po mwanik ak koongoi koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus10:16 Ki cheeng' anyun Musa miising' ng'orooryet ne po kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus10:17 “Amu nee si moam kagoochinetap tengekto eng' ole-tiliil? Amu tiliil miising' kot; kagogoonok ineendet nooto koip tengektap tuiyet
Leviticus10:18 Ko uu ye ma ki ip korotiikyik kobwa ole itabaanat oriit
Leviticus10:19 Ak ki leenji `Aron Musa
Leviticus10:20 Ak ye kingo kas Musa nooto
Leviticus11:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji:
Leviticus11:2 “Omwachi piigap Israel oleenji: Chu tyong'ik che oame eng' tyong'ik tugul che miitei ng'wony.
Leviticus11:3 Oame age tugul ne pcheotin siyok ak ko petotin komyee ak che itari paroi.
Leviticus11:4 Ago moame chu eng' icheek che itari paroi anan eng' icheek che pcheotin siyok: tambeesik
Leviticus11:5 Keneryet
Leviticus11:6 Kiplengwet
Leviticus11:7 Tooreet
Leviticus11:8 Amat oam panyeekwak
Leviticus11:9 “Omuuchi oam age tugul ne tinyei kebebaik ak peerik eng' tugul che mi peek
Leviticus11:10 Ago tugul che ma tinyei kebebaik ak peerik eng' nyanjosyek anan ainoosyek
Leviticus11:11 Ingoek chooto che kiwechei eng' okweek
Leviticus11:12 Age tugul ne ma tinyei kebebaik ak peerik eng' peek
Leviticus11:13 “Chu eng' toriitik che ma ki amei ak che kiwechei: kipsiichit
Leviticus11:14 chesirereet
Leviticus11:15 chepkugit age tugul ak che kergei;
Leviticus11:16 tyondap songolik
Leviticus11:17 sugurut ne ming'in
Leviticus11:18 sugurut ne tinyei kuinoik
Leviticus11:19 kong'onyot
Leviticus11:20 “Egu che kiwechei eng' okweek chooto tugul che tinyei kebebaik ak kong'onioti eng' ng'wony.
Leviticus11:21 Ago omuuchi oam chu
Leviticus11:22 Eng' chooto tugul omuuchi oam chu: chereng'endet ak alak che po ooreennyi
Leviticus11:23 Ago egu che kiwechei eng' okweek alak tugul che tinyei kebebaik che ing'oniote keelyek ang'wan.
Leviticus11:24 “Omurwoniitu eng' tuguuchooto; ak age tugul ne twaei poortap tyonyooto kagome ko murwoniitu agoi koimen.
Leviticus11:25 Age tugul ne ibei kebebertap poortap tyonyooto kagome komwetei ngoroikyik ak ko murwoniitu agoi koimen.
Leviticus11:26 Ng'waan eng' okweek tyony age tugul ne pcheotin siyok
Leviticus11:27 Alak tugul che pendote mugungonikwak
Leviticus11:28 Ingomwet ngoroikyik ne ibei poortap tyonyooto kame
Leviticus11:29 “Ng'woneen eng' okweek chu eng' che ichuutegei ng'wony: kungundo
Leviticus11:30 ne po ooreetap chepswererit
Leviticus11:31 Chuuto che ng'woneen eng' okweek eng' tugul che ichuutegei
Leviticus11:32 Ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne ibutyin ne kagome eng' chooto
Leviticus11:33 Ngo putyi age tugul eng' chooto tereetap ng'ung'unyek oriit
Leviticus11:34 Ng'woneegitu amitwogik alak tugul che kechobe peegap teronooto
Leviticus11:35 Ak kiy age tugul ne ibutyin kebebertap poorto ne po tyondo ne kagome ko ng'wanitu. Ngo kapkoimaut
Leviticus11:36 Ago konda ne kutune peek anan keriinget ne mi peek ko tiliiliitu
Leviticus11:37 Ngo putyi peny age tugul ne po tyonyooto kame kesweek che ki koolei
Leviticus11:38 Ago nginur keswechooto ak kobutyi peny age tugul ne po tyony ne kame
Leviticus11:39 “Ngo me tyony age tugul ne oame
Leviticus11:40 Ak ne amei panyeegap nooto kame ko ingomwet ngoroikyik ak murwoniitu agoi koimen. Ingomwet ngoroik ne ibei tyonyooto kame ak murwoon ineendet agoi koimen.
Leviticus11:41 “Egu eng' okweek ne kiwechei kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng'wony; ma ki amei.
Leviticus11:42 Kiy age tugul ne ichuute moet ng'wony ak ne punei keelyek ang'wan
Leviticus11:43 Among'wanitkei eng' kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng'wony
Leviticus11:44 Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Leviticus11:45 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki amutwak otogosu omang'une emetap Misiri
Leviticus11:46 Ni ng'atuutyet anyun agobo tyong'in
Leviticus11:47 si kobiit koobeesyo che ng'woneen ak che ma ng'woneen
Leviticus12:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus12:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel ileenji: Ngo manach kwony age tugul ak kosich weeriit
Leviticus12:3 Ak eng' peetuut ne po sisiit kimuratani iriryotap poortap weerooto.
Leviticus12:4 Ingotebee kwonyooto korotiigap katiliilennyi peetuusyek sosom ak somok. Matwaei ineendet kiy age tugul ne itabaanat
Leviticus12:5 Ago ngo sich chepto
Leviticus12:6 “Ye kagogeskei peetuusyegap katiliilennyi
Leviticus12:7 Igoitoi ineendet chooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus12:8 “Ngo ma imuuchi koal kwonyooto aarwetap keechiir
Leviticus13:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji
Leviticus13:2 “Ngoobwa iriryotap poortap chii
Leviticus13:3 Keerei tisiindonooto koroyooto miitei iriryotap poorto ak ngo kogowalak koroorik che mi koroyooto koleelagitu ak ngo kogororokto moanooto kwo oriit
Leviticus13:4 Ago ngo leel ngosyat ne mi iriryotap poortanyi
Leviticus13:5 Keerei tisiindet ineendet eng' peetuut ne po tisap
Leviticus13:6 Keerei tisiindet ineendet kogeny eng' peetuut ne po tisap
Leviticus13:7 Ago ngo nender moet eng' iriryot ye kagoboorchigei tisiindet agobo katiliilennyi
Leviticus13:8 Keerei tisiindet
Leviticus13:9 “Ye kagonam chii myandap mogondos
Leviticus13:10 Keerei anyun tisiindet
Leviticus13:11 ko mogondos che ki koamei keny iriryotap poortanyi
Leviticus13:12 Ngo mang'une mogondosaik ola tugul eng' iriryonnyi
Leviticus13:13 kogeer anyun tisiindet
Leviticus13:14 Ago ye katook panyeek ko uu yegonye
Leviticus13:15 Keerei tisiindet panyechooto ak komwaita kole murwoon chiichito. Murwooneen panyeechooto taagu
Leviticus13:16 Ago ngo walak panyeek kogeny koleelagitu
Leviticus13:17 ak kogeer tisiindet ineendet
Leviticus13:18 “Ngo pitunee iriryotap poorto ondiryet
Leviticus13:19 ak ngo pitunee ole kami ondiryet kibwondo ne leel
Leviticus13:20 Keerei tisiindet
Leviticus13:21 Ago ngo keer tisiindet kole ma mi koroorik che leelach
Leviticus13:22 Ngo nenderi eng' iriryot
Leviticus13:23 Ago ngo matesak ngosiandanooto konender
Leviticus13:24 “Anan ye tinyei chii ole kalal eng' iriryot ak kotook panyeekyik eng' olooto kalal
Leviticus13:25 kogeer anyun tisiindet kioto. Ngo kogowalak koroorik koleelagitu ak ko lolondoot
Leviticus13:26 Ago ngo keer tisiindet kole ma mi koroorik che leelach ngosiandanooto ak ma lolondoot eng' iriryot ak ma taagu miising'
Leviticus13:27 Ak kogeer tisiindet ineendet kogeny eng' peetuut ne po tisap
Leviticus13:28 Ago ngo matesak ngosiandanooto konender eng' iriryot
Leviticus13:29 “Ye tinyei mureno anan kobogoryo koroito eng' metit anan ko eng' tamnet
Leviticus13:30 kogeer anyun tisiindet koroyooto. Ak ngo keer ko lolondoot eng' iriryot
Leviticus13:31 Ago ngo keer tisiindet moanooto uu kacheet kole ma lolondoot eng' iriryot
Leviticus13:32 Ak kogeer tisiindet koroyooto eng' peetuut ne po tisap
Leviticus13:33 kicherchi anyun metit
Leviticus13:34 ak eng' peetuut ne po tisap kogeer tisiindet moanooto. Ngo ma tesoksei moet eng' iriryot
Leviticus13:35 Ago ngo tesak moet eng' iriryot ko kagobata katiliilennyi
Leviticus13:36 kogeer anyun tisiindet ineendet. Ngo tesoksei moet eng' iriryot
Leviticus13:37 Ago ngo keer kole ma tesoksei kachaanooto ak kooro kole kogobityo koroorik che tuuen eng' yooto
Leviticus13:38 “Ye tinyei mureno anan kobogoryo ole ibwanat ne uu ngosenik eng' iriryotap poortanyi
Leviticus13:39 kogeer anyun tisiindet
Leviticus13:40 “Ngo pek suumeek eng' metitap chii
Leviticus13:41 Ak ngo pek suumeek eng' met ole po togoch
Leviticus13:42 Ago ngo miitei myando ne ibooru leelindo ne piriir eng' poosto anan eng' togoch
Leviticus13:43 Kogeer anyun tisiindet ineendet
Leviticus13:44 ko ineendet ko chii ne po mogondos ak ko murwoon. Mwaitoi anyun tisiindet kole murwoon chiichi
Leviticus13:45 “Ilachei ne tinyei mogondosaik ngoroik che kibetak
Leviticus13:46 Murwoniitu ineendet peetuusyek tugul kotee koamei myanooto. Meng'iisyei ineegei; meng'ootennyi ko saang'utap nganaseet.
Leviticus13:47 “Kiboorchin tisiindet ngoryeet ne mi koroitap mogondosaik
Leviticus13:48 anan ngo mitune usiisyek che ki kitoor anan che ki kimur
Leviticus13:49 ngo machei konyaliil anan ngo machei kobiriir koroyooto eng' ngoryeet
Leviticus13:50 Ak kogeer tisiindet koroyooto
Leviticus13:51 Keerei koroyooto eng' peetuut ne po tisap
Leviticus13:52 Peelei ngoryonooto anyun eng' ma
Leviticus13:53 “Ngo keer tisiindet kole ma tesaksei koroyooto eng' ngoryeet
Leviticus13:54 kong'at anyun tisiindet kole kemwet kioto tinyei koroito
Leviticus13:55 ak kogeer tisiindet
Leviticus13:56 “Ak ngo keer tisiindet kole ma kotaagu komyee koroyooto ko kagemwet
Leviticus13:57 ak ngo ta ko taagu eng' ngoryeet
Leviticus13:58 Ago ngo kogobagaakta koroito ngoryeet
Leviticus13:59 Ni ng'atuutyet ne po koroitap mogondosaik ne mi ngoryeetap koroorigap keechiirek anan ko ne po katanit
Leviticus14:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus14:2 “Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po chiito ne tinyei mogondosaik eng' peetuut ne po katiliilennyi. Kimutyin ineendet tisiindet
Leviticus14:3 mandoi tisiindet eng' nganaseet ak kogeer ineendet. Ngo kogosap koroitap mogondosaik eng' chiichooto komyani
Leviticus14:4 kong'at anyun tisiindet keip toriitik aeng' che tiliileen che saptos agobo ineendet ne kitiliili
Leviticus14:5 Ak kong'at tisiindet kole kobar toriityon age eng' tereet ne po ng'ung'unyek
Leviticus14:6 Namei tisiindet toriityon ne sabei ak keetitap taragonik
Leviticus14:7 Ak koisee ineendet ne kitiliili eng' mogondosaik konyil tisap
Leviticus14:8 Mwetei ngoroikyik anyun chiichooto kitiliili
Leviticus14:9 Eng' peetuutap tisap konem suumeekyik tugul eng' metinnyi ak tamnennyi ak koroorigap koonyek. Inemu agot koroorikyik tugul
Leviticus14:10 “Ak konam eng' peetuut ne po sisiit aarek aeng' che mengichik che libwoben
Leviticus14:11 Igoitoi tisiindet ne itiliili ineendet
Leviticus14:12 Ak konam tisiindet mengit agenge eng' areechooto po keechiir
