Leviticus14:13 Enyei anyun mengoto ming'in eng' komosta ne kieng'e kagoochinetap tengekto ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Leviticus14:14 Namei tisiindet korotiik alak eng' che po kagoochinetap chalwokto
Leviticus14:15 Yeityo konem tisiindet mwanik alak che mi taabeet
Leviticus14:16 ak korooch tisiindet mornennyi ne po tai mwaata mi eunnyi ne po kaataam
Leviticus14:17 Ak mwaita ne kang'etune eutap tisiindet konde walitap itit ne po tai ne po ineendet ne kitiliili
Leviticus14:18 Yeityo koroong'ji mwaita ne kang'etune euut metitap ineendet ne kitiliili
Leviticus14:19 Igoitoi tisiindet kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus14:20 ak kogoito kagoochinetap peek eng' kaptisisyet
Leviticus14:21 “Ago ngo kibanania
Leviticus14:22 Ibu kora cheptugenik aeng'
Leviticus14:23 Ingoipchi ineendet tisiindet tuguuchooto eng' peetuut ne po sisiit
Leviticus14:24 Ak konam tisiindet aarwetap keechiir ne po kagoochinetap chalwokto
Leviticus14:25 Yeityo koeny arwanooto po kagoochinetap chalwokto
Leviticus14:26 Ak koroong'ji tisiindet mwanik alak rubeitap eunnyi ne po kaataam
Leviticus14:27 ak koisisye eng' mornennyi ne po tai mwanik alak che mi eunnyi ne po kaataam konyil tisap eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Leviticus14:28 Ak konde tisiindet mwanichooto alak che mi eunnyi
Leviticus14:29 Yeityo koroong'ji tisiindet mwanik che kang'etune eunnyi
Leviticus14:30 Ye ibata kogoito agenge eng' cheptugenik
Leviticus14:31 agot ko uu ye imuuchi konyoor
Leviticus14:32 Niito ng'atuutyet ne po ineendet ne miitei koroitap mogondosaik oriitinnyi
Leviticus14:33 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron
Leviticus14:34 “Ye oit emetap Kanaan
Leviticus14:35 konyo anyun chiitap koyooto konyo komwachi tisiindet
Leviticus14:36 Kong'at anyun tisiindet kimaanda tuguuk tugul eng' ko
Leviticus14:37 Keerei koroito
Leviticus14:38 komanda anyun tisiindet eng' koyooto agoi kurgat ak koger koyooto peetuusyek tisap.
Leviticus14:39 Ak konyo tisiindet kogeny eng' peetuut ne po tisap
Leviticus14:40 kong'at anyun tisiindet
Leviticus14:41 Ng'atei ineendet keng'oing'oi koot komoswek tugul eng' koot oriit
Leviticus14:42 Yeityo koip koik alak
Leviticus14:43 “Ngo mong' koroito kogeny kotook eng' koot
Leviticus14:44 konyo anyun tisiindet ko konyo kogeer
Leviticus14:45 Ingobut koyooto
Leviticus14:46 Ak kogeny
Leviticus14:47 Mwetei ngoroikyik ne karu koyooto ak ineendet ne kaamisye koyooto.
Leviticus14:48 “Ago ngwo ko tisiindet ak kogeer ko matesak koroito eng' koyooto ko kagemal
Leviticus14:49 Asi ki anyiny koyooto
Leviticus14:50 Parei toriityon age eng' tereetap ng'ung'unyek eng' paragutap peek che rootei
Leviticus14:51 ak konam keetitap taragonik
Leviticus14:52 Ianyinyi anyun koot eng' korotiik che po toriityanooto
Leviticus14:53 Ago ingounda anyun toriityon ne sabei kotiriren komanda eng' nganaseet kwo kewanin. Yaei anyun ko uu nooto kagaigaet agobo koot
Leviticus14:54 Ni ng'atuutyet ne po koroito age tugul ne po mogondosaik
Leviticus14:55 ne po ngoryeet ne tinyei mogondosaik
Leviticus14:56 ole ibwansei
Leviticus14:57 si kenae ye murwonen ak ye tiliileen. Niito ng'atuutyetap mogondosaik.
Leviticus15:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron
Leviticus15:2 “Omwachi piigap Israel
Leviticus15:3 Ak ni murwoonindanyi ne po kuseroonooto: agot ngomandoi tuguuchooto eng' poortanyi anan ngo kerak
Leviticus15:4 Ng'wanitu itoogut age tugul ne rue ineendet ne tinyei kusereet
Leviticus15:5 Ak mwetei chii age tugul ngoryennyi ne twaei itogunnyi
Leviticus15:6 Mwetei ngoroikyik
Leviticus15:7 Mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne twaei poortap chiichooto tinyei kusereet
Leviticus15:8 Ak ngo ng'utyi ne tinyei kuseroonooto chiito ne tiliil; komwetei anyun ngoroikyik
Leviticus15:9 Ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne ki itoi
Leviticus15:10 Ago murwoniitu agoi koimen chii age tugul ne twaei kiy age tugul ne mi ole tebee. Ak mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne ibei tuguuchooto
Leviticus15:11 Mwetei ngoroikyik chii age tugul ne katwa nooto ne tinyei kuseroonooto
Leviticus15:12 Ak kituei tereet ne ki kiyai eng' ng'ung'unyek ne katwa chiichooto tinyei kusereet
Leviticus15:13 “Ye sap chiichooto eng' myanooto po kusereet
Leviticus15:14 Ak kocheeng'jigei eng' peetuut ne po sisiit cheptugenik aeng'
Leviticus15:15 ak kogoito tisiindet chooto kobunji age kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus15:16 “Ngo rwotito chii age tugul
Leviticus15:17 Ak kemwet ngoryeet age tugul
Leviticus15:18 Ak ngo tuiyogei muren ak kwony ak komaanda kesweegap iyoteet
Leviticus15:19 “Ngo tyech ng'wony kobogoryondo
Leviticus15:20 Ak ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne syebei eng' murwoonindanyi
Leviticus15:21 Kanyool anyun komwet ngoroikyik chii age tugul ne twaei itogunnyi
Leviticus15:22 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik chii age tugul ne twaei kiy age tugul ne katebee kobogoryondonooto
Leviticus15:23 Ngo mi tuguuchooto itoogut
Leviticus15:24 Ngo ruiyo chii age tugul ak kobogoryondonooto
Leviticus15:25 “Ngo pwoonei korotiik eng' kobogoryot eng' peetuusyek che chaang' che ma eng' peetuusyek che kitabaane
Leviticus15:26 Kergeitu itoogut age tugul ne rue eng' peetuusyek che mang'une korotiik ak itoogutap peetuusyegap katabaanennyi. Murwoniitu kiy age tugul ne tebee ko uu murwoonindap katabaanennyi.
Leviticus15:27 Murwoniitu age tugul ne twaei tuguuchooto
Leviticus15:28 Ago ngo kagogeskei mandaetap simwekyik
Leviticus15:29 Eng' peetuut ne po sisiit konamjigei cheptugenik aeng'
Leviticus15:30 Ak kogoito tisiindet age kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus15:31 “Ara anyun otabaani piigap Israel ko uu nooto agobo simwekwak
Leviticus15:32 Po ng'atuutyoni ineendet ne tinyei kusereet
Leviticus15:33 Po kora kobogoryot ne kitabaani amu simwekyik
Leviticus16:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Leviticus16:2 koleenji
Leviticus16:3 Nyoonei Aron ole tiliil ak kirgit ne neran kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus16:4 Ingolaach ngoryeet ne kooi ne itabaanat ne po katanit
Leviticus16:5 Ak koget eng' tuiyetap piigap Israel kwesik aeng' kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus16:6 “Igoitoi Aron kirgit kai
Leviticus16:7 Yeityo kokweri kwesichooto aeng'
Leviticus16:8 Iseri Aron parbareek agobo kwesichooto aeng'; punjin age Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus16:9 Yeityo kogoito Aron kwesta ne kagobutyi parbaryat
Leviticus16:10 Ago kwesta ne kagobutyi parbaryat ne po Asasel
Leviticus16:11 “Yeityo kogoito Aron eito ne po kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus16:12 Ak konem tereet ne nyiitaat ng'etetyot ne punu maatap kaptisisyet ne mi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus16:13 Indoi ineendet nyamdutik ma
Leviticus16:14 Ak konem korotiik alak che po kirgooto
Leviticus16:15 “Yeityo koeny kwesta ne po kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus16:16 Yaei anyun kagaigaet agobo ole-tiliil
Leviticus16:17 Amat kobiit chii ne mi emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus16:18 Yeityo komanda saang'
Leviticus16:19 Ak koisee korotiik kaptisisyet eng' mornennyi konyil tisap
Leviticus16:20 “Ye kagogees kagaigaetap ole-tiliil
Leviticus16:21 ak kogonoor Aron eunekyik tuwai metitap kweata sabei
Leviticus16:22 ak kogesen anyun kweata tengekwogikwak tugul koba emet ole ma menyei chii
Leviticus16:23 “Yeityo konyo Aron agoi emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus16:24 Ak kouungei eng' komosta ne tiliil
Leviticus16:25 Peelei mwanik eng' kaptisisyet
Leviticus16:26 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne kweryei kwesta ne punjin Asasel
Leviticus16:27 Ak keip koba saang'utap nganaseet kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus16:28 Mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne kabeelei tuguuchooto ak kouungei. Ye ibata
Leviticus16:29 “Ak punjin koigeny kaneetisyoni eng' okweek: oming'inge eng' arawetap tisap
Leviticus16:30 Amu kiyaiywok kagaigaet peetuunooto
Leviticus16:31 Peetuunooto ko sabato ne po kamuung'et eng' okweek
Leviticus16:32 Ak koyai kagaigaet tisiindet ne ki ili
Leviticus16:33 Yae kagaigaet agobo koot ne tiliil
Leviticus16:34 Egu niito anyun ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' okweek
Leviticus17:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus17:2 “Mwachi Aron
Leviticus17:3 Chii age tugul ne po kootap Israel ne enyei kirgit
Leviticus17:4 ama ket konyo kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus17:5 Niito ko si kobiit koget piigap Israel tiseiywekwak che kata enyei eng' kewanin
Leviticus17:6 Ak koisee tisiindet korotiik kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus17:7 Si mata koeng'ji oik tiseiywekwak kogeny
Leviticus17:8 “Ak ileenji icheek
Leviticus17:9 ama ket agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin
Leviticus17:10 “Ngo am korotiik alak tugul chii age tugul ne po kootap Israel
Leviticus17:11 Amu mi saboondap poorto korotiik. Ki agoonok korotichooto oyachinegei kagaigaet eng' kaptisiisyo amu saboonwekwok. Amu korotiik che yaei kagaigaet agobo saboondo.
Leviticus17:12 Ki amwachi anyun piigap Israel amu nooto aleenji
Leviticus17:13 “Ngo par chii age tugul ne po piigap Israel
Leviticus17:14 Amu korotiik ko saboondo ne po poorto komugul
Leviticus17:15 “Ak chii age tugul ne amei kiy ne kame ineegei
Leviticus17:16 Ago ngo ma mwet
Leviticus18:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus18:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenji
Leviticus18:3 Amat oyai tuguuk che kiyaei emetap Misiri
Leviticus18:4 Oyai kirwoogutikyuk ak oriip ng'atuutikyuk
Leviticus18:5 Oriip anyun ng'atuutikyuk ak kirwoogutikyuk: amu ngo yai chiito chooto
Leviticus18:6 “Amat koriikyi age tugul eng' okweek tilyennyi kong'aany aach ngorinnyi. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Leviticus18:7 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap kwandang'ung'
Leviticus18:8 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap osotyotap kwandang'ung'; amu nooto aach ngoritap kwandang'ung'.
Leviticus18:9 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap chepkomet
Leviticus18:10 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap cheptap weeriing'ung'
Leviticus18:11 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap cheptap osotyotap kwandang'ung'
Leviticus18:12 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap isengeng'ung'; amu ineendet ko kwondo ne neegit ne tilya
Leviticus18:13 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap chepkametap kamenng'ung'; amu ineendet ko kwondo ne neegit ne tilya
Leviticus18:14 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap ng'eetap kametap kwandang'ung'
Leviticus18:15 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap osotyotap weeriing'ung'; amu osotyotap weeriing'ung'; amat ing'aany aach ngorinnyi.
Leviticus18:16 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap imbomurtang'ung'; amu aach ngoritap ng'eetap kamenng'ung'.
Leviticus18:17 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap kobogoryo ak cheptonyi; amemut cheptap weeriinnyi
Leviticus18:18 Amat imutyige chepkametap osotyondeng'ung'
Leviticus18:19 “Amat iriikyi kobogoryo ing'aany aach ngorinnyi
Leviticus18:20 Amat oipkei ak osotyotap chiitap kokweng'ung'
Leviticus18:21 “Amegoite iyoteng'ung' ibeelji Molek
Leviticus18:22 “Amoruiye ak muren ko uu ye ruitos chii ak osotyo; etan nooto.
Leviticus18:23 Amoruiye ak tyony age tugul si imurwongei. Amat koruiyo kobogoryondo ak tyony; sogornat nooto.
Leviticus18:24 “Amat omurwongei eng' alak tugul eng' chuuto
Leviticus18:25 Ki komurwoniit emet ak aiityini tengekto amu nooto
Leviticus18:26 Ago oriip anyun ng'atuutikyuk ak kirwoogutikyuk amu nooto
Leviticus18:27 (amu ki yai piigap emoni chooto tugul samisen
Leviticus18:28 si ma ing'ung'dak ak okweek emet
Leviticus18:29 Amu king'etoi eng' piikwak chii age tugul ne yaei kiy age tugul eng' tuguuchu samis.
Leviticus18:30 Oriip anyun katigonutikyuk amu nooto
Leviticus19:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus19:2 “Mwachi tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel
Leviticus19:3 Ingoiywei chii age tugul kamennyi
Leviticus19:4 Amat omaste osup tuguuk che ma tilei kiy
Leviticus19:5 “Ak ye ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywot ne po kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet
Leviticus19:6 Ki amei eng' peetuunooto ogoitoi
Leviticus19:7 Egu kiit ne kiwechei ngot keam agot kitigin eng' peetuut ne po somok; ma kitaachei
Leviticus19:8 ak ibei tengektanyi chii age tugul ne amei
Leviticus19:9 “Ye ogesisye eng' emeng'wong'
Leviticus19:10 Ak ameturote mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk
Leviticus19:11 “Amochoorse
Leviticus19:12 Amoyosyechigei eng' kainennyu eng' lembech
Leviticus19:13 “Amesastae chiitap kokweng'ung'
Leviticus19:14 Amat isas chii ne miing'at
Leviticus19:15 “Amat oyai ne ma po iman eng' kirwooget; ametiytiy kibananook anan igonyit che eecheen; ago irwookyi chiitap kokweng'ung' eng' imanda.
Leviticus19:16 Amewe komosi ak komosi ichaamate piiguk. Ameuny ne kabar chiitap kokweng'ung'. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Leviticus19:17 “Amewech ne otupche eng' muguleldang'ung'
Leviticus19:18 Ameyaakyi mugetuut anan isus ng'al agobo lagogap piiguk
Leviticus19:19 “Oriip ng'atuutikyuk. Amengorie tuuga cheguuk alage che teer che ma tuuga. Amegol mbareeng'ung' kesweek aeng' che teerchiin. Amelaach ngoryeet ne ki kiyae usiisyek che teerchiin.
Leviticus19:20 “Age tugul ne ruitos ak chepto ne otwogindet
Leviticus19:21 Ago ketu chiichooto kagoochinennyi ne po chalwokto konyo ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus19:22 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet
Leviticus19:23 “Ye oit emonooto ak ye kaomiin keetiik alak tugul che kiamei
Leviticus19:24 Ago ki anyinyi logoekwak tugul eng' kenyiit ne po ang'wan
Leviticus19:25 Ak oam logoekwak eng' kenyiit ne po muut
Leviticus19:26 “Amat oam kiy age tugul kobooto korotiikyik. Amoboisyee ponisyet anan ong'oorse.
Leviticus19:27 Amobior metowekwok
Leviticus19:28 Amotil poorwekwok agobo piik che pegu
Leviticus19:29 “Amegoite cheptong'ung' koyait koek chepkugonio
Leviticus19:30 Oriip sabatosyekyuk
Leviticus19:31 “Amobe ye mi che poisyee oik anan pooniik; amocheeng'ate
Leviticus19:32 “Tononji ne tinyei kalwalek ak igonyit poiyo
Leviticus19:33 “Ameyachi ne ya toondet ne mi kobooten eng' emeng'wong'.
Leviticus19:34 Igeitu toondet ne meng'iisyei kobootok ak ne kisikyin kaa
Leviticus19:35 “Amoyai ne ma po iman eng' kirwooget anan ye okwai eng' koindo
Leviticus19:36 Oboisyee kerutik che aechin ak koik che kigerisye eng' nyigiisindo che po iman: epah ak hin che po iman. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne ki amutwak omang'une emetap Misiri.
Leviticus19:37 Kanyool anyun osup ng'atuutikyuk tugul ak kirwoogutikyuk tugul
Leviticus20:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus20:2 “Ileenji piigap Israel
Leviticus20:3 Wechei togeennyu chiichooto ak ang'etoi eng' piikyik; amu koigoochi ineendet lagokyik Molek si komurwon koonnyu ne tiliil
Leviticus20:4 Ak ngo yaigei piigap emet ko uu yo ma keer chiichooto
Leviticus20:5 eng' yooto anyun aboorchi chiichooto nereegegap togeennyu ak piigap koonnyi. Ak ang'etoi ineendet eng' piikwak
Leviticus20:6 “Aboorchini nereegegap togeennyu chiito ne mastoi kosubi ne poisyee oik ak pooniik
Leviticus20:7 Otabaange anyun
Leviticus20:8 Oriip ng'atuutikyuk ak oyai. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atabaanok.
Leviticus20:9 Amu kibarei chii age tugul ne sasei kwan anan kamet. Amu kasas kwandanyi ak kamennyi
Leviticus20:10 “Chiito ne ibegei ak osotyotap chiito age
Leviticus20:11 Chiito ne ruitos ak osotyotap kwandanyi
Leviticus20:12 Ngo ruiyo chii ak osotyotap weeriinnyi
Leviticus20:13 Ngo ruiyo mureno ak muren
Leviticus20:14 Ngo tun chii chepto kobooto kamet
Leviticus20:15 Ngo ruiyo chii ak tyony
Leviticus20:16 Ngo riikyi kobogoryondo tyony age tugul ak koruiyo tuwai
Leviticus20:17 “Ngomut chii chepkamet
Leviticus20:18 Ngo ruiyo chii ak kobogoryo ne katyech ng'wony
Leviticus20:19 Amat ing'aany poortap chepkametap kamenng'ung'
Leviticus20:20 Ngo ruiyo chii ak osotyotap imamet ko kagong'aany poortap imamet. Ibei icheek tengektonywa; pegu ama sich lagok.
Leviticus20:21 Ngo ipkei chii ak osotyotap ng'eetap kamet ko murwoonindo nooto; kagong'aany poortap ng'eetap kamet. Pegu ama sich lagok.
Leviticus20:22 “Oriip anyun ng'atuutikyuk tugul amu nooto
Leviticus20:23 Amobendate pitonwegap pororyet ne aoone eng' taing'wong'. Amu ki yai icheek tuguuchuuto tugul
Leviticus20:24 Ago ki amwaiwok aleenjok
Leviticus20:25 Obeesye anyun tyong'ik che anyiny ak che ng'woneen
Leviticus20:26 Oegu che tiliileen eng' anee
Leviticus20:27 “Kibarei iman ne poisyee oik
Leviticus21:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Leviticus21:2 kobatee eng' tilyonutikyik che neegit
Leviticus21:3 ak eng' chepkamet ne pergeiya
Leviticus21:4 Amat komurwongei
Leviticus21:5 Amat kocher metowekwak anan tabanwegap tamnokwak
Leviticus21:6 Egu che tiliileen eng' Kamuktaindennywa
Leviticus21:7 Amat kotun chepkugonio anan ne murwoon. Amat kotun osotyot ne ki oon manong'otyondennyi
Leviticus21:8 Itiliil ineendet anyun amu nooto
Leviticus21:9 Ak ngo murwongei cheptap tisiindet age tugul
Leviticus21:10 “Ineendet ne tisiindet ne oo eng' che tupcho
Leviticus21:11 Amat kwo ole miitei muusto
Leviticus21:12 Amat komanda eng' ole-tiliil anan komurwon ole-tiliil ne po Kamuktaindennyi
Leviticus21:13 Ingotun anyun chepto ne pergeiya.
Leviticus21:14 Amat kotun kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot anan ne kigeon
Leviticus21:15 amat konyerat iyotennyi eng' piikyik. Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atiliilii ineendet.”
Leviticus21:16 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus21:17 “Mwachi Aron ileenji
Leviticus21:18 Amu ma riiktoi chii age tugul ne ma libwoop
Leviticus21:19 anan ne ki il keeldo
Leviticus21:20 anan ne kibalbut
Leviticus21:21 Amat koriikta chii ne ma libwoop ne po lagogap Aron tisiindet
Leviticus21:22 Amei ineendet amitwogigap Kamuktaindennyi chooto tiliileen miising' ak eng' chooto tiliileen.
Leviticus21:23 Ago ma wendi ineendet angeet oriit ne ki kioiye koot
Leviticus21:24 Ki mwachi anyun Musa ko uu nooto Aron ak weeriikyik ak piigap Israel tugul.
Leviticus22:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus22:2 “Ileenji Aron ak weeriikyik
Leviticus22:3 Ileenji
Leviticus22:4 Amat koam tuguuk che tiliileen chii age tugul eng' lagogap Aron ne tinyei mogondos
Leviticus22:5 anan age tugul ne twaei ne ichuutegei ng'wony
Leviticus22:6 ng'wanitu agoi koimen ne twaei age eng' chooto
Leviticus22:7 Ye karorokto asiis
Leviticus22:8 Amat koam panyeegap tyong'ik che pegu icheegei
Leviticus22:9 Riibei anyun katigonutikyuk
Leviticus22:10 “Ma amei kipsagarin age tugul tuguuk che tiliileen. Ma amei punootyot ne po tisiindet
Leviticus22:11 ago ngo al tisiindet chii
Leviticus22:12 Ngo tun cheptap tisiindet kipsagarin
Leviticus22:13 Ago ngo kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot cheptap tisiindet
Leviticus22:14 Ak ngo am chii age tugul tuguuk che tiliileen koma nai
Leviticus22:15 Amat koreeny tisiik tuguuk che tiliileen che po piigap Israel
Leviticus22:16 si konyoor ng'oogisto; ye amei tuguukwak che tiliileen. Amu anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atiliilii icheek.”
Leviticus22:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus22:18 “Mwachi Aron ak weeriikyik ak piigap Israel tugul
Leviticus22:19 si kobiit ketaachak
Leviticus22:20 Ago amat ogoite ne ma libwoop
Leviticus22:21 Ak chii age tugul ne igoitoi tiseiywot ne po kagoochinoigap kaalyeet kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus22:22 Amat ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne koraat
Leviticus22:23 Imuuchi igoite koek kagoochinetap chamyet kirgit anan aarwetap keechiir ne tinyei tuguuk che uu kunduenik
Leviticus22:24 Amat ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki kibir kitik
Leviticus22:25 Amotaach eng' eutap kipsagarin amitwogigap Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Leviticus22:26 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus22:27 “Ye kagii kirgit
Leviticus22:28 Ago amat oeny teta ne rooryat anan keechiiryet ne kotoy
Leviticus22:29 Ak ye oeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywotap kongoi
Leviticus22:30 Ki amei eng' peetuunooto
Leviticus22:31 “Ara oriip anyun ng'atuutikyuk amu nooto ak oyai. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Leviticus22:32 Amoreeny kainennyu ne tiliil
Leviticus22:33 ne ki amutwak omang'une emetap Misiri
Leviticus23:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus23:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Leviticus23:3 Kiyaei poisyet peetuusyek lo
Leviticus23:4 “Chu igoorwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki king'at
Leviticus23:5 “Eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawet ne po tai
Leviticus23:6 Egu igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek
Leviticus23:7 Egu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuut ne po tai; amat oyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot.
Leviticus23:8 Ago ogoite kagoochinet ne punei maat ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus23:9 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus23:10 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Leviticus23:11 Koongoi anyun ineendet peechooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus23:12 Ak eng' peetuunooto oongoi okweek peek
Leviticus23:13 Ak egu kagoochinennyi ne po peek kiloinik aeng' che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che kagiburukto mwaita
Leviticus23:14 Amat oam magatya anan peek che kigelei
Leviticus23:15 “Oiityigei kong'etee peetuut ne po aeng' ko kagobata sabato
Leviticus23:16 Oiit peetuusyek konom agoi peetuut ne po aeng' ko kagobata sabato ne po tisap
Leviticus23:17 Oibu eng' meng'otosyekwok magatiinik aeng' che kiongoi che kichoben kiloinik aeng' che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul
Leviticus23:18 Ak ogoite kobooto magatiinik aarek tisap che libwoben che po keechiir che ma siirei kenyiit agenge ak kirgit agenge ne neran
Leviticus23:19 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto
Leviticus23:20 Ak koongoi tisiindet chooto kobooto magatiinik che po tongoanik koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus23:21 Oititen eng' peetuunooto; piitu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' okweek; amat oyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot. Niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul eng' ibinwekwok tugul.
Leviticus23:22 “Ye ogesisye eng' emeng'wong'
Leviticus23:23 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus23:24 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Leviticus23:25 Amat oyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot ak ogoite kagoochinet ne punei maat kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”
Leviticus23:26 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus23:27 “Ago egu peetuutap kagaigaet eng' peetuutap taman eng' arawaniito po tisap. Egu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' okweek
Leviticus23:28 Amat oyai poisyo age tugul eng' peetuunooto
Leviticus23:29 Amu chii age tugul ne ma iming'inegei eng' peetuunooto
Leviticus23:30 Chii age tugul ne yaei poisyet age tugul eng' peetuunooto
Leviticus23:31 Amat oyai poisyo age tugul. Niito ko ng'atuutyet eng' ibinwekwok tugul eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul.
Leviticus23:32 Egu sabato ne po kamuung'et eng' okweek ak oming'inge. Oriip sabato neng'wong' peetuut ne po sogool ne po arawet
Leviticus23:33 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus23:34 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Leviticus23:35 Egu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuut ne po tai
Leviticus23:36 Ogoitoi kagoochinet ne punei maat
Leviticus23:37 “Chuuto igoorwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki king'at
Leviticus23:38 Konunoichu kosiirei che po sabatoisyek che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus23:39 “Ago ye kaoyum ruroteetap emet eng' peetuutap taman ak muut
Leviticus23:40 Obutyigei eng' peetuut ne po tai logoegap keetiik che korooron
Leviticus23:41 Oriip nooto koek igoortap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tisap eng' kenyiit. Niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' ibinwekwok; oriip anyun igoorata eng' arawetap tisap.
Leviticus23:42 Omenye keryosyek peetuusyek tisap
Leviticus23:43 si kobiit konai ibinwekwok che piitu let kole
Leviticus23:44 Ki mwachi anyun Musa piigap Israel igoorwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki king'at.
Leviticus24:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus24:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel koibun mwanigap mseituni che tiliileen che ki kitui agobo lapkeiyet
Leviticus24:3 Chobei Aron tait eng' saang'utap angeet ne ki kioiye koot
Leviticus24:4 Chobei ineendet taisyek eng' keldap tait ne tiliil eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul.
Leviticus24:5 “Inemu peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul kiloinik taman ak aeng' ak ibeel magatiinik taman ak aeng'. Yamei magatyat agenge kiloinik aeng'.
Leviticus24:6 Ak itet koek ortinwek aeng'
Leviticus24:7 Ak inde ooreet age tugul tuguuk che tiliileen che nyamdut
Leviticus24:8 Tetei ineendet kioto eng' sabato age tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; nooto ko amu piigap Israel
Leviticus24:9 Punjin Aron ak weeriikyik
Leviticus24:10 Ki manda ye mi piigap Israel weeriitap kobogoryotap Israel
Leviticus24:11 ki sas ak kochup Kainet weerooto po kobogoryotap Israel. Ak ki imut `icheek ineendet kwo ole mi Musa. Ki kiguure kainetap kamet Selomit
Leviticus24:12 Ak kiger `icheek ineendet
Leviticus24:13 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus24:14 “Imoong'u ineendet ne kosasiis kwo saang'utap nganaseet; ak ingogonoor eunekwak metinnyi icheek tugul che kogasei kosasisyei
Leviticus24:15 Ak imwachi piigap Israel ileenji
Leviticus24:16 Ineendet ne chubei kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebarei iman. Lage koik iman tuiyet komugul chiichooto; ngo punootyo anan ne kisikyin kaa
Leviticus24:17 Kibarei iman chii age tugul ne parei chiito age.
Leviticus24:18 Igeeri age ineendet ne kabar ne po akweet; saboondo eng' saboondo.
Leviticus24:19 Ngo nde chiito peruut chiitap kokwennyi
Leviticus24:20 moet eng' moet
Leviticus24:21 Ineendet ne parei ne po akweet kogeeri age
Leviticus24:22 Egu agenge ng'atuutyeng'wong'
Leviticus24:23 Ara ki ng'alaalji `Musa piigap Israel ak ki imut `icheek chiichooto kisasisyei kwo saang'utap nganaseet ak kelage ineendet koik. Ki yai anyun piigap Israel ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.
Leviticus25:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai koleenji
Leviticus25:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Leviticus25:3 Igoole mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk kenyiisyek lo
Leviticus25:4 ago egu sabato eng' kenyiit ne po tisap ne imuunyi emet
Leviticus25:5 Amat iges kolgeinik che po mbareeng'ung'
Leviticus25:6 Ago egu ruroteetap emet eng' sabatonooto amitwogikwok; cheguuk
Leviticus25:7 ak ko po akweeng'ung' ak tyong'ik che mi emeng'ung'
Leviticus25:8 “Iityigei sabatoisyek tisap che po kenyiisyek
Leviticus25:9 Yeityo iguut iryageet ne cheei miising'
Leviticus25:10 Ak otabaan kenyiit ne po konom
Leviticus25:11 Egu jubilii eng' okweek kenyinooto po konom. Mogolse anan oges kolgeinik eng' olooto
Leviticus25:12 Amu jubilii
Leviticus25:13 “Ak oweekyigei chii tugul ole ki nenyi eng' kenyini po jubilii.
Leviticus25:14 Ngialdochi kiy chiitap kokweng'ung' anan ngial kiy eng' chiitap kokweng'ung'
Leviticus25:15 Iale chiitap kokweng'ung' ne yamegei ak koitetap kenyiisyek
Leviticus25:16 Itese alyennyi ko uu chaang'indap kenyiisyek ak ichuchuch alyennyi ko uu ng'ering'indap kenyiisyek
Leviticus25:17 Ago amoyachigei ne ya
Leviticus25:18 “Amu nooto anyun
Leviticus25:19 Ak kooi `emet logoek ak oam obiye
Leviticus25:20 Ak ngot ole
Leviticus25:21 Ang'ate anyun perurtanyu eng' okweek eng' kenyiit ne po lo
Leviticus25:22 Ye ogoolse eng' kenyiitap sisiit
Leviticus25:23 “Ma ki aldoi emonooto agoi
Leviticus25:24 Ogoite katyaget ne po emet
Leviticus25:25 “Ngo ek panan ne otupche ak koalda kebebertap oldanyi
Leviticus25:26 Ngo ma tinyei chiito chii ne ityaachi
Leviticus25:27 ingoiit anyun kenyiisyek kobooch ngap koalda
Leviticus25:28 Ago ngo ma imuuch kotyakyigei
Leviticus25:29 “Ngo alda chii koot ne ki menyei ne mi nganaseet ne ki kiyieme irimeet
Leviticus25:30 Ngo ma kityaach eng' kenyinooto komugul
Leviticus25:31 Ago ki iti kooriik che mi nganasook che ma kiyieme irimeet
Leviticus25:32 Ago imuuchi Lawiik kotyach nganasookwak
Leviticus25:33 Ak ngo tyach chiito age ne po Lawiik
Leviticus25:34 Ago amat kealda emet ole agete tuukwak che po nganasookwak
Leviticus25:35 “Ngo ek kibanania tupcheng'ung' ama sich kiy ne toretegei
Leviticus25:36 Amat image ineendet kelunet anan che tesatiin. Ago iywei Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Leviticus25:37 Amegoochi siling'isyeguk ile si inyoorunee che siirtoot
Leviticus25:38 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Leviticus25:39 “Ngo ek kibanania tupcheng'ung' ne mi kobooten
Leviticus25:40 Ingotebi kobooten ko uu otwogindet ne nyooru melekto anan ko uu punootyot. Ak kootin agoi kenyiitap jubilii.
Leviticus25:41 Yeityo anyun komanda eng' oldang'ung'
Leviticus25:42 Amu icheek ko otwogikyuk
Leviticus25:43 Amat ibou ineendet eng' kimnateet ne koroom
Leviticus25:44 Ago eng' ng'olyootap otwogiguk che murenik ak che tiibiik
Leviticus25:45 Oale eng' lagogap punootik che meng'iisyei eng' kwenung'wong'
Leviticus25:46 Ak oyai chooto koek poroteetap lagokwok
Leviticus25:47 “Ngot koek mogoryo ne kipsagarin anan punootyo ne mi kobooten
Leviticus25:48 kimuuchi kityaach kogeny ye kagialda; imuuchi kotyach age eng' tupchosyekyik.
Leviticus25:49 Imuuchi kotyach ineendet chiitap ooreennyi anan weeriitap ne po ooreennyi
Leviticus25:50 Koiit tuwai kobooto chiichooto ki alei ineendet kobooch kenyiit ne ki aldaegei agoi kenyiitap jubilii. Ak kotenit che ki kialdae ineendet koitetap kenyiisyek; tebyei kobooto ineendet che yamegei ak peetuusyegap otwogindet ne nyooru melekto eng' otisyennyi.
Leviticus25:51 Ngo ta komi kenyiisyek che chaang'
Leviticus25:52 Ak ngo ta komi kenyiisyek che ng'ering' kityo si koit kenyiitap jubilii
Leviticus25:53 Ngo tebi kobooto ineendet ko uu otwogindet ne nyooru melekto eng' kenyiit agoi kenyiit; amat koboi ineendet eng' kimnateet ne koroom eng' taing'ung'.
Leviticus25:54 Ago ngo ma kityaach chiichooto eng' ortinwechooto
Leviticus25:55 Amu otwogikyuk piigap Israel; icheeget otwogikyuk che ki amutu komang'une emetap Misiri. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.
Leviticus26:1 “Amat koyachigei tuguuk che ma tilei kiy
Leviticus26:2 Oriip sabatosyekyuk
Leviticus26:3 “Ngo pendate kaneetisyosyekyuk ak oriip ng'atuutikyuk
Leviticus26:4 agoonok anyun ropta eng' peetuusyekyik
Leviticus26:5 Yamei kesuutik che obore
Leviticus26:6 Ak agoonu kaalyeet eng' emet ak oruiye
Leviticus26:7 Oone puunikwok ak kobutyo eng' taing'wong' eng' rotwetap chok.
Leviticus26:8 Oonei piikwok muutu piik pogol
Leviticus26:9 Atokyinok agane togeennyu ak agoonok iyoteet
Leviticus26:10 Oam anyun tuguuk che konorotiin che po keny
Leviticus26:11 Ak ande koonnyu kwenung'wong'
Leviticus26:12 Awendotee kwenung'wong' ak aegu Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Leviticus26:13 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Leviticus26:14 “Ago ngo mogasa iit
Leviticus26:15 ak ngot oeesye kaneetisyosyekyuk
Leviticus26:16 ayaiywok ni agane: ang'ate kamuiset konyonjok
Leviticus26:17 Aboorwok nereegekyuk
Leviticus26:18 Ago ngo mogasa iit eng' tuguuchuuto
Leviticus26:19 Airie anyun menoteetap kimnateng'ung'
Leviticus26:20 Oboisyee puch kimnateeng'wong'
Leviticus26:21 “Ngo testai oeesya
Leviticus26:22 Ayoogu tyong'ik che po timiin kobwa kwenung'wong'
Leviticus26:23 “Ngot ko amu kergong'yani komocham owekyogei
Leviticus26:24 aeesyok anyun ak okweek ak abirok anyun aneendet konyil tisap amu tengekwogikwok.
Leviticus26:25 Aibwok rotwetap chok ne yaakwok mugetuut ne po kayomiset. Ye oyumjigei nganasookwok
Leviticus26:26 Ye atil amitwogikwok kong'ering'itu
Leviticus26:27 “Ak ngo mogasa iit eng' tuguuchu tugul
Leviticus26:28 atilok let anyun eng' pandanyu eng' nereegek che pichiien
Leviticus26:29 Ak oam panyeegap poorwegap weeriikwok ak che po tiibiikwok.
Leviticus26:30 Ang'eme awong'u komoswekwok che torooreen ak aluul kanamonikwok che po asiista
Leviticus26:31 Ayae nganasookwok koek karotwek
Leviticus26:32 Ak ayai emet koek surkwen ak kokwong'yo puunikwok che menyei olooto.
Leviticus26:33 Ak aiyestochok pororyosyek alak
Leviticus26:34 “Yeityo kobaibaitune anyun emet sabatoisyekyik
Leviticus26:35 Imuunyi emet kota ko kuberot
Leviticus26:36 Ak eng' icheeget che ng'etu eng' okweek
Leviticus26:37 Koriichkei icheegei eng' icheegei
Leviticus26:38 Eng' let olusyi pororyosyek ak koluguak emetap puunikwok.
Leviticus26:39 Ak ichuchui che ng'etu eng' okweek eng' tengekwogikwak eng' emotinwegap puunikwok; ak kogeny amu tengekwogigap kwanisyekwak kochuchui ko uu icheek.
Leviticus26:40 “Ago ngot kong'aany tengekwogikwak
Leviticus26:41 ak ki atil let agane icheek
Leviticus26:42 abwaat anyun kayomisennyu ne ki ayomisyi Jakobo; kayomisennyu agine ne kayomisyi Isak ak abwaat agine kayomisennyu ne ki ayomisyi Abraham
Leviticus26:43 “Ak kometo icheek emet ak kobaibait eng' sabatoisyekyik
Leviticus26:44 Agot nganda uu chooto tugul
Leviticus26:45 Ago abwaati amu icheek kayomiset ne ki ayomisyi poisyekwak che ki among'u eng' emetap Misiri kogeeronu pororyosyek
Leviticus26:46 Chu anyun kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik ak ng'atuutik che ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak piigap Israel eng' tulweetap Sinai eng' Musa.
Leviticus27:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Leviticus27:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin icheek
Leviticus27:3 itaune kamanuutyeng'ung' ne irogendochini; murenik che po kong'etee kenyiisyek tiptem agoi che po kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo
Leviticus27:4 Ak ngo kobogoryo
Leviticus27:5 Ngo po kenyiisyek muut agoi kenyiisyek tiptem
Leviticus27:6 Ngo po arawet agenge agoi kenyiisyek muut
Leviticus27:7 Ngo po kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo ak kwo tai
Leviticus27:8 Ngo panan chiichooto kosiir kamanuutyeng'ung'
Leviticus27:9 “Ngogoito piik kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus27:10 Amat kowal chii
Leviticus27:11 “Ngo tyony age tugul ne ng'waan
Leviticus27:12 koiit tisiindet anyun ole tee
Leviticus27:13 Ago ngo machei iman kotyach tyonyooto
Leviticus27:14 “Ye itabaani chii koonnyi koek ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus27:15 Ngo machei kotyach koonnyi chiichooto koitabaani
Leviticus27:16 “Ngo tabaanji chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebebertap mbareennyi
Leviticus27:17 Ngo tabaan mbareennyi kobooch kenyiitap jubilii
Leviticus27:18 Ago ngo tabaan ineendet mbareennyi ko kagosiirto jubilii
Leviticus27:19 Ak ngo tyach iman mbareet ineendet ne ki itabaani
Leviticus27:20 Ago ngo ma ityaach ineendet mbaranooto
Leviticus27:21 Tiliilitu mbaranooto eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Leviticus27:22 “Ngo tabaanji chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mbareet ne ki koal
Leviticus27:23 koiityi anyun tisiindet ineendet ole tenitu kamanuutyetap mbaranooto agoi kenyiitap jubilii
Leviticus27:24 Kiweekyin mbaranooto chiito ne ki kiale eng' kenyiitap jubilii
Leviticus27:25 Ak uu kamanuutiguk tugul shekelisyek che po ole-tiliil: tinyei shekel agenge gerahisyek tiptem.
Leviticus27:26 “Che kitwatei eng' che kiyagi
Leviticus27:27 Ngo po tyong'ik che ng'woneen
Leviticus27:28 “Ago ma ki aldoi
Leviticus27:29 Ma kityaachi chii tugul ne kagi tabaanji ng'emisyet
Leviticus27:30 “Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebeberwegap taman che po emet
Leviticus27:31 Ngo machei chii kotyach alak eng' kebebertanyi ne po taman
Leviticus27:32 Kebeberwek tugul che po taman che po tuuga anan neego
Leviticus27:33 Amat kogilgilye ngo myee anan ngo ya
Leviticus27:34 Chuuto anyun ng'atuutik che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa agobo piigap Israel eng' tulweetap Sinai.
Numbers1:1 Eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' eng' arawet ne po aeng' eng' peetuut ne po tai
Numbers1:2 “Iit tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. Sir ko uu koitetap kainaik
Numbers1:3 Oiit ak Aron murenik tugul che imuuchi koba lugeet eng' Israel koosup pcheutigap lugosyekwak
Numbers1:4 Ak mi kobootok chiitap ooreet age tugul
Numbers1:5 Chu kainaigap murenik che tonondos kobootok si kotoretook: Eng' ooreetap Reuben ko Elisur weeriitap Sedeur;
Numbers1:6 Eng' ooreetap Simion ko Selumiel weeriitap Surisadai;
Numbers1:7 Eng' ooreetap Judah ko Nason weeriitap Aminadab;
Numbers1:8 Eng' ooreetap Issakar ko Natanel weeriitap Suar;
Numbers1:9 Eng' ooreetap Zebulun ko Eliap weeriitap Helon;
Numbers1:10 Eng' lagogap Joseph: eng' che po Ephraim ko Elisama weeriitap Amihud; eng' che po Manasseh ko Gamaliel weeriitap Pedasur;
Numbers1:11 Eng' ooreetap Benjamin ko Abidan weeriitap Gideoni;
Numbers1:12 Eng' ooreetap Dan ko Aieser weeriitap Amisadai;
Numbers1:13 Eng' ooreetap Asher ko Pagiel weeriitap Okran;
Numbers1:14 Eng' ooreetap Gad ko Eliasap weeriitap Deuel;
Numbers1:15 Eng' ooreetap Naphtali ko Aira weeriitap Enan.”
Numbers1:16 Chuuto che ki kikwei eng' tuiyet
Numbers1:17 Ki imut anyun `Musa ak `Aron murenichooto kagemwa kainaikwak
Numbers1:18 ak ki iyum `Musa ak `Aron tuiyet komugul kotuiyo eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap aeng'. Kisirgei piik ko uu ortinwekwak eng' kooriigap kwanisyekwak
Numbers1:19 Ki iit anyun Musa icheek eng' surkwen ne po Sinai ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Numbers1:20 Eng' ooreetap Reuben weeriit ne po tai ne po Israel
Numbers1:21 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Reuben ko ki murenik eliphuusyek artam ak lo ak pogol muut.
Numbers1:22 Eng' ooreetap Simion
Numbers1:23 Icheek che ki kiit eng' che po ooreetap Simion ko ki eliphuusyek konom ak sogool ak pogol somok.
Numbers1:24 Eng' ooreetap Gad
Numbers1:25 Icheek tugul che ki kiit eng' che po ooreetap Gad ko ki eliphuusyek artam ak muut ak pogol lo ak konom.
Numbers1:26 Eng' ooreetap Judah
Numbers1:27 Piik che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Judah ko ki eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap ak ang'wan ak pogol lo.
Numbers1:28 Eng' ooreetap Issakar
Numbers1:29 Piik tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Issakar ko ki eliphuusyek konom ak ang'wan ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers1:30 Eng' ooreetap Zebulun
Numbers1:31 Che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Zebulun
Numbers1:32 Eng' ooreetap Joseph
Numbers1:33 Che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Ephraim ko ki eliphuusyek artam ak pogol muut.
Numbers1:34 Eng' ooreetap Manasseh
Numbers1:35 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Manasseh ko ki eliphuusyek sosom ak aeng' ak pogol aeng'.
Numbers1:36 Eng' ooreetap Benjamin
Numbers1:37 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Benjamin ko ki eliphuusyek sosom ak muut ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers1:38 Eng' ooreetap Dan
Numbers1:39 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Dan ko ki eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak aeng' ak pogol tisap.
Numbers1:40 Eng' ooreetap Asher
Numbers1:41 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Asher ko ki eliphuusyek artam ak agenge ak pogol muut.
Numbers1:42 Eng' ooreetap Naphtali
Numbers1:43 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Naphtali ko ki eliphuusyek konom ak somok ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers1:44 Chuuto piik che ki iit Musa ak Aron ak pounik taman ak aeng' che po Israel kobunu age tugul kootap kwanisyekyik.
Numbers1:45 Piik tugul che ki kiit kosupkei ak koorigap kwanisyekwak
Numbers1:46 ko ki ek tugul eliphuusyek pogol lo ak somok ak pogol muut ak konom.
Numbers1:47 Ago ki ma kiit anyun Lawiik kosupkei ak pororyetap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers1:48 Kigamwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers1:49 “Amat iit ooreetap Lawi iitite piigap Israel
Numbers1:50 ago inde Lawiik koboi kootap paornateet
Numbers1:51 Ye kimachei kisiipto koot kwo tai
Numbers1:52 Teptos anyun piigap Israel eng' pitonwek
Numbers1:53 Ago menyei koyiemei Lawiik kootap paornateet si manyonji nereeknateet tuiyetap piigap Israel; riibei Lawiik kootap paornateet.”
Numbers1:54 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto piigap Israel
Numbers2:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji
Numbers2:2 “Ingoteech chii age tugul eng' piigap Israel ole miitei songolyennyi
Numbers2:3 “Ingoteech komostap kong'asiis ole charunee asiista icheeget che iboortoi songolyetap nganaseetap Judah kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Ingoek Nason weeriitap Aminadab pounindetap piigap Judah
Numbers2:4 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap ak ang'wan ak pogol lo.
Numbers2:5 Che teechei korupkei ko che po ooreetap Issakar
Numbers2:6 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek konom ak ang'wan ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers2:7 Yeityo koosup pororyetap Zebulun
Numbers2:8 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek konom ak tisap ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers2:9 Ki ek tugul che ki kiit che po nganaseetap Judah eliphuusyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak lo ak pogol ang'wan kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Icheeget che tau panda.
Numbers2:10 “Tebee kweanet ne po nganaseetap Reuben komostap murot tai
Numbers2:11 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek artam ak lo ak pogol muut.
Numbers2:12 Che teechei korupkei ko che po ooreetap Simion. Egu Selumiel weeriitap Surisadai pounindetap lagogap Simion
Numbers2:13 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek konom ak sogool ak pogol somok.
Numbers2:14 Yeityo koosup pororyetap Gad; egu Eliasap weeriitap Reuel pounindetap lagogap Gad
Numbers2:15 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek artam ak muut ak pogol lo ak konom.
Numbers2:16 Icheek tugul che ki kiit che po nganaseetap Reuben ko eliphuusyek pogol ak konom ak agenge ak pogol ang'wan ak konom
Numbers2:17 “Wendi emait ne kituiyechin kobooto kweanetap Lawiik eng' kwenutap chuun alak; ko uu ye teechei emaisyekwak
Numbers2:18 “Tebee kweanet ne po nganaseetap Ephraim cherongo kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Egu Elisama weeriitap Amihud pounindetap lagogap Ephraim
Numbers2:19 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek artam ak pogol muut.
Numbers2:20 Ne rubei ineendet ko pororyetap Manasseh. Egu Gamaliel weeriitap Pedasur pounindetap lagogap Manasseh
Numbers2:21 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek sosom ak aeng' ak pogol aeng'.
Numbers2:22 Yeityo koosup pororyetap Benjamin. Egu Abidan weeriitap Gideoni pounindetap lagogap Benjamin
Numbers2:23 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek sosom ak muut ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers2:24 Icheek tugul che ki kiit eng' nganaseetap Ephraim ko eliphuusyek pogol ak sisiit ak pogol agenge
Numbers2:25 “Tebee kweanet ne po nganaseetap Dan murot kaataam
Numbers2:26 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak aeng' ak pogol tisap.
Numbers2:27 Che teechei korupkei ak ineendet ko che po pororyetap Asher. Egu Pagiel weeriitap Okran pounindetap lagogap Asher
Numbers2:28 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek artam ak agenge ak pogol muut.
Numbers2:29 Yeityo koosup che po pororyetap Naphtali. Egu Aira weeriitap Enan pounindetap lagogap Naphtali
Numbers2:30 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek konom ak somok ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers2:31 Icheek tugul che ki kiit che po nganaseetap Dan ko eliphuusyek pogol ak konom ak tisap ak pogol lo. Pendi icheeget koletu
Numbers2:32 Chuuto anyun che ki kiit eng' piigap Israel ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. Che ki kiit tugul che po nganasook kosupkei ak lugosyekwak ko ki eliphuusyek pogol lo ak somok ak pogol muut ak konom.
Numbers2:33 Ago ki ma ki itito Lawiik piigap Israel
Numbers2:34 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto piigap Israel
Numbers3:1 Chu ortinwegap Aron ak Musa eng' peetuut ne ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai.
Numbers3:2 Chu ko kainaigap weeriigap Aron: Nadap ne po tai
Numbers3:3 Chooto ko kainaigap weeriigap Aron
Numbers3:4 Ago ki pek Nadap ak Abiu koma tinyei lagok eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' surkwen ne po Sinai
Numbers3:5 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers3:6 “Imutu ooreetap Lawiik kobwa icheek taitap Aron tisiindet
Numbers3:7 Ingoyai icheek poisyetap Aron
Numbers3:8 Ingoriip icheek tuguuk tugul che po emait ne kituiyechin oriit; ak ye yaei poisyet ne po koot koyaei poisyet ne kata yaei piigap Israel.
Numbers3:9 Igoochi `Aron ak `weeriikyik Lawiik si kotoret poisyet; Lawiik ko piigap Israel che ki kigoochi Aron iman.
Numbers3:10 Inde Aron ak weeriikyik si koriip tisiisyet
Numbers3:11 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers3:12 “Keero! Aneendet ne ki anam Lawiik eng' kwenutap piigap Israel si ageere weeriik che po tai che yaatei iyoteet eng' piigap Israel. Punjino Lawiik
Numbers3:13 amu chechuuk weeriik tugul che po tai. Eng' peetuut ne ki abar weeriik tugul che po tai eng' emetap Misiri
Numbers3:14 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' surkwen ne po Sinai koleenji
Numbers3:15 “Iit lagogap Lawiik ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak ak ko uu ortinwekwak. Iit weeriik tugul kobooch che po arawet agenge ak kwo tai.”
Numbers3:16 Ki iit Musa anyun icheek ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki ng'at ineendet.
Numbers3:17 Chu ko kainaigap weeriigap Lawi: Gerson
Numbers3:18 Chu ko kainaigap weeriigap Gerson ko uu kooriikwak: Libni ak Shimei.
Numbers3:19 Weeriigap Kohat ko uu ortinwekwak ko ki: Amram
Numbers3:20 Weeriigap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak ko ki: Mali ak Musi. Chuuto ortinwegap Lawiik ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers3:21 Koorigap Libnik ak Simeik ko iyoteetap Gerson; chuuto ko ki kooriigap Gershonik.
Numbers3:22 Ki ek tugul che ki kiit
Numbers3:23 Ingoteech che po kooriigap Gershonik kootap tuiyet patai eng' komostap cherongo
Numbers3:24 ak koek Eliasap weeriitap Lael pounindetap Gershonik eng' kootap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers3:25 Ingoriip weeriigap Gerson eng' emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers3:26 angook che king'ote seremut
Numbers3:27 Koorigap Amramik
Numbers3:28 Ki ek tugul kobooch che po arawet agenge ak kwo tai murenik eliphuusyek sisiit ak pogol lo; chuuto che ki riibei poisyetap ole-tiliil.
Numbers3:29 Ingoteech weeriigap Kohat murot tai ne po koot
Numbers3:30 ak koek Elizaphan weeriitap Uzziel pounindetap kooriigap Kohatik eng' kootap kwandanywa.
Numbers3:31 Ingoriip icheek moinget
Numbers3:32 Ingoek Eleazar weeriitap Aron tisiindet ne oo eng' pounigap Lawiik
Numbers3:33 Koorigap Malik ak Musik ko iyoteetap Merari; icheeget kooriigap Merari.
Numbers3:34 Ki ek tugul kobooch che po arawet agenge ak kwo tai murenik eliphuusyek lo ak pogol aeng'.
Numbers3:35 Ingoboi Suriel weeriitap Abiail koot ne po kwanisyegap kooriigap Merari. Ingoteech icheek komostap murot kaataam ne po koot.
Numbers3:36 Ki kigoochi weeriigap Merari koriip poisyetap pagoinik che po koot
Numbers3:37 ak lumeiywek che yiemei seremut
Numbers3:38 Musa ak Aron ak weeriikyik che teechei komostap kong'asiis ne po koot
Numbers3:39 Ki ek tugul murenik che ki iit Musa ak Aron che po Lawiik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng'. Ki kiit che po kong'etee arawet agenge ak kwo tai
Numbers3:40 Ki leenji kogeny `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers3:41 Itabaanwo Lawiik kobunjo
Numbers3:42 Ki iit anyun Musa weeriik tugul che po tai eng' piigap Israel ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet.
Numbers3:43 Ki ek weeriik tugul che po tai che ki kiit
Numbers3:44 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers3:45 “Nam Lawiik ak iwalee weeriik tugul che po tai eng' piigap Israel ak inam kiyagigap Lawiik iwalee kiyagigap piigap Israel ak punjino Lawiik. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Numbers3:46 Eng' katyagetap weeriik che po tai che po piigap Israel chooto pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik tisap ak somok che siirei Lawiik
Numbers3:47 iitoche eng' chii tugul shekelisyek muut
Numbers3:48 Igoochini Aron ak weeriikyik shekelisyek che po chooto siirtootiin che kityage pichooto.”
Numbers3:49 Kitaach anyun Musa shekelisyek che po katyaget kobun icheek che ki chaang' kosiir che ki ityaach Lawiik.
Numbers3:50 Kitaach eng' kiboretogap piigap Israel shekelisyechooto eliphuut agenge ak pogol somok ak tamanwogik lo ak muut
Numbers3:51 Ki igoochi anyun Musa shekelisyechooto po katyaget Aron ak weeriikyik
Numbers4:1 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji
Numbers4:2 “Iit weeriigap Kohat icheegei eng' lagogap Lawiik ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers4:3 Iit piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi che po kenyiisyek konom; tugul che imuuchi poisyet
Numbers4:4 Poisyetap weeriigap Kohat eng' emait ne kituiyechin ko koriip tuguuk che tiliileen kosiir.
Numbers4:5 “Ye katoi piik panda
Numbers4:6 ak kooliige magatogap mengichigap-pei
Numbers4:7 “Ingoitoe pichooto angeet ne buluu meset ne po magatiinik che po kabartaet ak konde paragunnyi taabook
Numbers4:8 Yeityo kotuge tuguuchooto angeet ne piriir ak koliige magatogap mengichigap-pei
Numbers4:9 “Ingonam icheek angeet ne buluu ak kotuge keldap tait ak taisyekyik
Numbers4:10 Ara ingonde tuguuchooto magateet oriit ne po mengitap-pei
Numbers4:11 “Ne isubi koitoe angeet ne buluu kapkorosuut ne po thahabu ak koliige magatogap mengichigap peek
Numbers4:12 Ingonam icheek tuguuk tugul che po poisyet che kiboisyee eng' ole-tiliil ak koliige angeet ne buluu
Numbers4:13 Ingoram anyun oreek eng' kaptisisyet ak kotumda ak koitoe paragunnyi angeet ne aruus ne piriir.
Numbers4:14 Yeityo konde paragunnyi tuguukyik tugul che kiboisyee eng' kaptisisyonooto
Numbers4:15 Ye kagogees Aron ak weeriikyik poisyet ne po tuugeetap ole-tiliil ak tuguuk tugul che po ole-tiliil
Numbers4:16 Poisyetap Eleazar weeriitap Aron tisiindet ko koriip mwaitap tait
Numbers4:17 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji
Numbers4:18 “Among' kobet koniinda ooreetap kooriigap Kohatik eng' Lawiik.
Numbers4:19 Ara oyachi ko uu ni si kosapcho amabek icheek ye riikyin tuguuk che tiliileen miising' kosiir: pendi ko Aron ak weeriikyik ak koboorchi chii age tugul eng' icheek poisyennyi ak tuguuk che laei.
Numbers4:20 Ago amat ochamji Kohatik koba ko kogeer ole-tiliil agot kitigin
Numbers4:21 Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers4:22 “Iit weeriigap Gerson ak icheek ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak ak ko uu ortinwekwak.
Numbers4:23 Iiti murenik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi konom che pendi ko koboisyei eng' emait ne kituiyechin.
Numbers4:24 Ni poisyet ne po kooriigap Gershonik ye poisyei ak ye laisei:
Numbers4:25 ibei icheek angook che po koot
Numbers4:26 Ibei angook che uu emait che kiyieme seremut
Numbers4:27 Pou Aron ak weeriikyik poisyonik tugul che yaei weeriigap Gershonik
Numbers4:28 Niito poisyet ne po kooriigap weeriigap Gershonik eng' emait ne kituiyechin. Pou poisyennywa Ithamar weeriitap Aron tisiindet.
Numbers4:29 “Iit weeriigap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers4:30 Iiti murenik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi konom
Numbers4:31 Ni ng'atuutyetap laisennywa ko uu poisyennywa tugul eng' emait ne kituiyechin. Laei icheek pagoinik che po koot
Numbers4:32 ak lumeiywek che yiemei seremut kotuiyo
Numbers4:33 Niito poisyet ne po kooriigap weeriigap Merari ko uu poisyennywa tugul eng' emait ne kituiyechin ak pou icheek Ithamar weeriitap Aron tisiindet.”
Numbers4:34 Ki iit anyun Musa ak Aron ak pounigap tuiyet weeriigap Kohatik ko uu ortinwekwak ak kooriigap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers4:35 Tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi che po kenyiisyek konom
Numbers4:36 ko ki ek eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol tisap ak konom.
Numbers4:37 Chu che ki kiit eng' kooriigap Kohatik
Numbers4:38 Ki kiit che po weeriigap Gerson ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers4:39 Piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi che po kenyiisyek konom che ki pwa kobois eng' emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers4:40 kaitennywa ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' pogol lo ak sosom.
Numbers4:41 Chu koitetap kooriigap weeriigap Gerson
Numbers4:42 Ki kiit che po ortinwegap weeriigap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers4:43 Tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi konom
Numbers4:44 ko uu kooriikwak
Numbers4:45 Chuuto icheek che ki kiit che po kooriigap weeriigap Merari. Ki iit Musa ak Aron icheek ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa.
Numbers4:46 Chooto Lawiik tugul che ki iit Musa ak Aron ak pounigap Israel ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers4:47 Tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi che po kenyiisyek konom
Numbers4:48 ko ki ek eliphuusyek sisiit ak pogol muut ak tamanwogik sisiit.
Numbers4:49 Ki kiit chii tugul ko uu poisyennyi ak ko uu laisennyi konamgei ak ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa. Ki kiit anyun icheek ko uu nooto
Numbers5:1 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers5:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel koisto age tugul ne tinyei mogondosaik eng' nganaseet
Numbers5:3 Oiste koba saang'utap nganaseet chooto tugul che murenik ak kwonyiik; ma nyolu komurwon nganasennywa
Numbers5:4 Ki yai piigap Israel ko uu nooto; ki isto icheek koba saang'utap nganaseet. Ki yai ko uu nooto anyun piigap Israel ko uu ye ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.
Numbers5:5 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers5:6 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin: Ye kachalwogenji muren anan ko kwony chii age tugul
Numbers5:7 ak nyolu kong'aany ng'oogisto ne koyai
Numbers5:8 Ago ngo ma tinyei chiichooto chiito ne tilya ne kimuuchi keeweekyi tuguuchooto po ng'oogisto
Numbers5:9 Punjin tisiindet kagoochinoik tugul che tiliileen che po piigap Israel che igoochin icheek ineendet.
Numbers5:10 Ak punjin tisiindet tuguuk che itabaanatiin; punjin ineendet kiy age tugul ne igoochin chii.”
Numbers5:11 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers5:12 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Numbers5:13 ak ngot koipkei ak chii ak koung'ak kioto eng' manong'otyondennyi
Numbers5:14 Ngot koam ng'etkong' chiichooto eng' saboondanyi ak konereech agobo osotyonnyi amu koimurwongei anan ngo nyoor kang'unyet chiichooto eng' saboondanyi ak konereech agobo osotyonnyi nganda ma imurwongei osotyondonooto
Numbers5:15 komutyin anyun chiichooto osotyonnyi tisiindet ak koip kagoochinennyi agobo osotyondonooto. Ibu ineendet kererutik che po peegap sairi che ng'ootiin. Ma roong'jin ineendet mwaita anan konde tuguuk che nyamdut
Numbers5:16 “Imutu anyun `tisiindet osotyondonooto koriik ak konde taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Numbers5:17 Yeityo konam tisiindet peek che tiliileen eng' taabeet ne ki kiyae ng'ung'unyek ak komugut ng'ung'unyek che mi koot ng'wony ak konde peechooto.
Numbers5:18 Ye kagonde tisiindet kwonyooto taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers5:19 Yeityo komwachi tisiindet kwonyooto koyasyo kole: Ngo ma oipkei ak chii anan ngo ma igesesenote imi pounatetap manong'otyondeng'ung'
Numbers5:20 Ago ngo ki igesesen iman
Numbers5:21 ko ngo mwachi anyun tisiindet kwonyooto koyasyo kayasyoet ne po chubisyet
Numbers5:22 Ingochut peechu ibu chubisyet agutaniguk ak kosoonen ak konun moeng'ung'. Wolu kwonyooto kole
Numbers5:23 “Ye ibata ko sirchin tisiindet chubisyosyechuuto kitabuut ak koundo koba peegap ng'wanindo.
Numbers5:24 Igoochin kwonyooto koe peechooto po chubisyo
Numbers5:25 Inemu tisiindet kagoochinetap peek che po ng'etkong' eng' eutap kwonyooto ak koongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers5:26 Muguti tisiindet kagoochinonooto po peek konyi euut koek kabwaatet ak kobeel eng' kaptisisyet
Numbers5:27 Ye kagogoochi koe peechooto
Numbers5:28 Ago ngot kotom komurwongei kwonyooto ak ko tiliil
Numbers5:29 “Niito ng'atuutyetap ng'etkonda ye kagesesen osotyot ye mi pounatetap manong'otyondennyi ak komurwongei
Numbers5:30 anan ye kaam chii ng'etkong' eng' saboondanyi ak konereech agobo osotyonnyi. Imutu `manong'otyonnyi ineendet taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koyachi tisiindet ng'atuutyoniito tugul.
Numbers5:31 Ago ma nyooru chiichooto yaityo
Numbers6:1 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers6:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Numbers6:3 ko ingoistoegei divaik ak maiyek. Amat koe peek alak tugul che mindilil che po divaik anan ko maiyek alak tugul. Amat koe peegap sabibuk anan koam sabibuk che tuonen anan che yamyotiin.
Numbers6:4 Eng' peetuusyekyik tugul che po katabaanennyi kotee kota ko Nasaretindet
Numbers6:5 “Amat kocher metinnyi eng' peetuusyekyik tugul che po kayosyennyi ne po katabaanet
Numbers6:6 Amat koriikyi muusto eng' peetuusyechooto tugul che itabaanjinegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Numbers6:7 Amat kong'wanitkei agobo kwan anan kamet anan ng'eetap kamet anan chepkamet ye kabek icheek
Numbers6:8 Tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po katabaanennyi.
Numbers6:9 “Ak ngo me chii eng' chokyinet eng' ole neegitee ineendet
Numbers6:10 Ak eng' peetuutap sisiit koipchi tisiindet cheptugenik aeng' anan ko aarek aeng' che po toriitik koba kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin.
Numbers6:11 Igoitoi tisiindet age kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto ak kobunji age kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Numbers6:12 Ingotabaanji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuusyegap katabaanennyi
Numbers6:13 “Ni ng'atuutyetap Nasiritindet
Numbers6:14 yeityo kogoochi kagoochinennyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge ne libwoop koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Numbers6:15 Igoitoi kogeny kerebet ne oo ne mi magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek
Numbers6:16 “Igoitoi tisiindet tuguuchooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogoito kagoochinet ne po tengekto ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei.
Numbers6:17 Igoitoi mengit koek tiseiywot ne po kagoochinetap kaalyeet kobooto kebebertap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek
Numbers6:18 Inemu Nasaretindonooto metinnyi ne po katabaanennyi eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin ak koip sumeechooto konde maat ne kibeelee tiseiywegap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet.
Numbers6:19 “Yeityo konem tisiindet kusto ne kagiyo ne po mengit ak konem eng' kerebet magatyat agenge ne ming'in ne ma kinde mermereek ak magatyat agenge ne terter ne ma kinde mermereek
Numbers6:20 Yeityo koongoi tisiindet chooto koek kagoochinoik che kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; tiliileen chooto ak punjin tisiindet kobooto tagateet ne kiongoi ak chaatit ne kigoitoi. Ye ibata nooto anyun
Numbers6:21 “Ni ng'atuutyetap Nasiritindet ne yae kayasyaennyi. Kagoochinennyi ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko nyolu kosupkei ak katabaanennyi
Numbers6:22 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers6:23 “Mwachi Aron ak weeriikyik ileenji Koberuur piigap Israel ko uu ni
Numbers6:24 ‘Ingoberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koriibin;
Numbers6:25 Ingokwenyin lapkeiyetap togeetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak korirenen.
Numbers6:26 Ingotokyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor togeennyi ak kogoonin kaalyeet.’
Numbers6:27 “Indoi kainennyu piigap Israel
Numbers7:1 Kingo kagolumda Musa koot
Numbers7:2 yeityo kogoito kagoochinoik
Numbers7:3 Ki ip pounichooto kagoochinoikwak kobwa taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kariisyek lo che tugootiin
Numbers7:4 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers7:5 “Taach tuguuchooto eng' icheek si kobiit kobunji poisyetap emait ne kituiyechin. Igoochi Lawiik tuguuchooto
Numbers7:6 Ara kitaach Musa kariisyek ak eiik ak kogoochi Lawiik.
Numbers7:7 Ki igoochi weeriigap Gerson kariisyek aeng' ak eiik ang'wan
Numbers7:8 Ki igoochi weeriigap Merari kariisyek ang'wan ak eiik sisiit
Numbers7:9 Ago ma igoochi kiy weeriigap Kohat amu ki nenywa poisyetap ole-tiliil; ki ibe tuguuchooto tigigoikwak.
Numbers7:10 Ki igoito pounik kagoochinoik agobo katabaanetap kaptisisyet eng' peetuut ne ki kiile
Numbers7:11 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers7:12 Eng' peetuut ne po tai
Numbers7:13 Kagoochinnyi ko ki sanit agenge ne po fedha
Numbers7:14 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;
Numbers7:15 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:16 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:17 ak tiseiywot ne po kagoochinetap kaalyeet ko eiik aeng'
Numbers7:18 Ki igoito eng' peetuut ne po aeng' kagoochinennyi Nethanel weeriitap Suar
Numbers7:19 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom
Numbers7:20 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;
Numbers7:21 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:22 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:23 ak tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet ko eiik aeng'
Numbers7:24 Eng' peetuut ne po somok
Numbers7:25 Kagoochinennyi kogisanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom
Numbers7:26 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;
Numbers7:27 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:28 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:29 ak tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet
Numbers7:30 Eng' peetuut ne po ang'wan
Numbers7:31 Kagoochinennyi kogisanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom
Numbers7:32 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman
Numbers7:33 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:34 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:35 ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet
Numbers7:36 Eng' peetuut ne po muut
Numbers7:37 Kagoochinennyi kogi sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom
Numbers7:38 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman
Numbers7:39 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:40 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:41 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u
Numbers7:42 Eng' peetuut ne po lo
Numbers7:43 Kagoochinennyi kogi sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom
Numbers7:44 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman
Numbers7:45 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:46 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:47 ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u
Numbers7:48 Eng' peetuut ne po tisap
Numbers7:49 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom
Numbers7:50 ak nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman
Numbers7:51 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:52 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:53 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u
Numbers7:54 Eng' peetuut ne po sisiit
Numbers7:55 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom
Numbers7:56 ak nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman
Numbers7:57 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:58 ak kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:59 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u
Numbers7:60 Eng' peetuut ne po sogool
Numbers7:61 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap
Numbers7:62 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman
Numbers7:63 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:64 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinet ne po tengekto;
Numbers7:65 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u
Numbers7:66 Eng' peetuut ne po taman
Numbers7:67 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap
Numbers7:68 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman
Numbers7:69 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:70 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinet ne po tengekto;
Numbers7:71 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet
Numbers7:72 Eng' peetuut ne po taman ak agenge
Numbers7:73 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom
Numbers7:74 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman
Numbers7:75 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:76 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:77 ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u
Numbers7:78 Eng' peetuut ne po taman ak aeng'
Numbers7:79 sanit agenge ne po fedha
Numbers7:80 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu
Numbers7:81 kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers7:82 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto;
Numbers7:83 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u
Numbers7:84 Chuuto kagoochinoik che po pounigap Israel agobo katabaanet ne po kaptisisyet
Numbers7:85 Nyigiisindap sanit age tugul kogi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom ak kiyamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap taabeet age tugul. Ki ek tugul shekelisyek eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol ang'wan
Numbers7:86 Ki ek nyigiisindap gramisyek taman ak aeng' che po thahabu
Numbers7:87 Ki ek tuuga tugul che po kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Numbers7:88 Ki ek anyun tuuga tugul che po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet kiruugik tiptem ak ang'wan
Numbers7:89 Ye kingwo Musa emait ne kituiyechin kwo kong'alaal ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers8:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers8:2 “Mwachi Aron ileenji
Numbers8:3 Ki yai anyun Aron ko uu nooto; ki inaam taisyekyik si kobiit kokweng'so eng' taitap keldap tait
Numbers8:4 Ki uu ni yaetap keldap tainooto: ki kiyae thahabu che ki kitaany
Numbers8:5 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers8:6 “Iste Lawiik eng' kwenutap piigap Israel ak ianyiny icheek.
Numbers8:7 Yachi ko uu ni ye ianyinyi icheek: ise peek che po kagaigaet
Numbers8:8 Yeityo koget icheek kirgit ne neran ak kagoochinennyi ne po peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita
Numbers8:9 Imutu Lawiik kobwa taitap emait ne kituiyechin ak iyum tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel.
Numbers8:10 Imutu Lawiik kobwa taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogonoor `piigap Israel eunekwak icheek.
Numbers8:11 Yeityo kogoito Aron Lawiik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi agobo piigap Israel
Numbers8:12 Ye ibata
Numbers8:13 “Ye imut Lawiik koba taitap Aron ak taitap weeriikyik
Numbers8:14 Ko uu nooto anyun
Numbers8:15 Ye kaianyiny icheek ak igoite koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi
Numbers8:16 Amu ki kigoono icheek inne eng' piigap Israel
Numbers8:17 Amu chechuuk tugul che po tai eng' piigap Israel
Numbers8:18 Ak ki anam Lawiik kobunjo awale weeriik tugul che po tai eng' piigap Israel.
Numbers8:19 Eng' piigap Israel
Numbers8:20 Ki yai ko uu nooto anyun Musa
Numbers8:21 Ki ianyinygei anyun Lawiik ak kimwet ngoroikwak. Ki igoito anyun Aron icheek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi ak ki yai kagaigaet agobo icheek koanyiny.
Numbers8:22 Ye kingo pata nooto
Numbers8:23 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers8:24 “Po arorutichu Lawiik: kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ak kwo tai kobendi ko koyai poisyet ne po emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers8:25 ago ye kagoit kenyiisyekwak konom kobagaakta poisyonooto ak ma koboisyee agoi.
Numbers8:26 Ago toreti kotononjin riipseet kobooto che tupcho eng' emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers9:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' surkwen ne po Sinai eng' kenyiitap aeng' eng' arawet ne po tai kobooch ngap komong' icheek eng' emetap Misiri koleenji
Numbers9:2 “Ingoriip anyun piigap Israel paska eng' peetuut ne ki king'at.
Numbers9:3 Oriibe niito eng' koskoleny ne po peetuutap taman ak ang'wan eng' arawani
Numbers9:4 Ki mwachi anyun `Musa piigap Israel koriip paska.
Numbers9:5 Ara ki riip icheek paska eng' arawet ne po tai
Numbers9:6 Ago ki miitei piik alage che ki ma imuuch koriip paska eng' peetuunooto amu ki ing'wanitkei agobo muustap chiito. Ki pwa anyun taitap Musa ak Aron eng' peetuunooto
Numbers9:7 ak ki leenji `pichooto ineendet
Numbers9:8 Ak ki leenji `Musa icheek
Numbers9:9 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers9:10 “Mwachi piigap Israel
Numbers9:11 Ingoriip icheek paska nooto eng' koskoleny ne po peetuutap taman ak ang'wan eng' arawet ne po aeng'. Amei icheek magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek ak ingweek che ng'woneen.
Numbers9:12 Amat kotuuch kot koeekyi anan koiri kowet
Numbers9:13 Ago chiito ne tiliil ne ma miitei rutoito ama riip paska
Numbers9:14 “Ak ngo mi chii ne punootyon ne meng'iisyei eng' kwenung'wong' ak komachei koriip paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers9:15 Eng' peetuunooto ne ki kilumdae koyooto
Numbers9:16 Ki uu nooto kotugul; ki tuch pooldet koyooto ak kitaagu poldanooto ko uu maat kemoi.
Numbers9:17 Ye ki ngetogosta parak pooldet eng' Emainooto
Numbers9:18 Kibendi piigap Israel eng' ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers9:19 Ye kingo tebee pooldet koot peetuusyek che chaang'
Numbers9:20 Ak ye katebee pooldet koyooto peetuusyek che ng'ering'
Numbers9:21 Ki peetuusyek alak kotebee pooldet koyooto koskoleny agoi karon. Ak ki ngetogostae pooldet karon
Numbers9:22 Kingo tebee pooldet paragutap koot
Numbers9:23 Ki meng'iisyei eng' ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko ki pendi eng' ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kiriibooti ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa.
Numbers10:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers10:2 “Yachigei igondisyek aeng'; yae che po fedha che kitaanyi si iboisyee tuguuchooto ye iguure tuiyet ak eng' panwegap nganasook.
Numbers10:3 Ak ye kuut icheek tuguuchooto tuwai koyumjigei tuiyet komugul ole imi
Numbers10:4 Ak ngo kuut igoondit agenge
Numbers10:5 Ye oguut ne po waagaat
Numbers10:6 Ak ye oguut ne po waagaatap aeng'
Numbers10:7 Ago ye machei koyumgei tuiyet
Numbers10:8 Kuutei weeriigap Aron
Numbers10:9 “Ye obe lugeet eng' emeng'wong' obaregei ak puunyoot ne usook
Numbers10:10 Eng' peetuut ne po kaagaaseng'wong' po kei ak eng' igoorwekwok che ki king'at
Numbers10:11 Eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' arawetap aeng' eng' peetuut ne po tiptem
Numbers10:12 Ki inam anyun piigap Israel panwekwak koba eng' surkwen ne po Sinai
Numbers10:13 Ki toi anyun pandanywa ne po tai ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa.
Numbers10:14 Ak ki indo songolyetap nganaseet ne po lagogap Judah kosupkei ak pcheutigap lugosyekwak
Numbers10:15 Ki pou Nethanel weeriitap Suar lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Issakar.
Numbers10:16 Ak ki pou Eliap weeriitap Elon lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Zebulun.
Numbers10:17 Ki kibut anyun koot yeityo kotoi koba weeriigap Gerson ak weeriigap Merari
Numbers10:18 Ki toi panda nganaseetap Reuben koosup songolyennywa kosupkei ak pcheutigap lugosyekwak
Numbers10:19 Ki pou Selumiel weeriitap Surisadai lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Simion.
Numbers10:20 Ak ki pou Eliasap weeriitap Deuel lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Gad.
Numbers10:21 Ki toi anyun koba Kohatik kolaei tuguuk che tiliileen
Numbers10:22 Ki toi panda nganaseetap lagogap Ephraim kosupkei ak pcheutigap lugosyekwak kosubi songolyennywa
Numbers10:23 Ak ki pou Gamaliel weeriitap Pedasur lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Manasseh.
Numbers10:24 Ki pou anyun Abidan weeriitap Gideoni lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Benjamin.
Numbers10:25 Ne kiletu eng' nganasook tugul
Numbers10:26 Ki pou Pagiel weeriitap Okran lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Asher.
Numbers10:27 Ak ki pou Aira weeriitap Enan lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Naphtali.
Numbers10:28 Ki uu nooto anyun panwegap piigap Israel ko uu lugosyekwak
Numbers10:29 Ki leenji `Musa Hobap weeriitap Reuel Midianindet
Numbers10:30 Ki wol ineendet kole
Numbers10:31 Ago ki leenji Musa
Numbers10:32 Ngot keebe tugul
Numbers10:33 Ara ki toi icheek panda ne po peetuusyek somok kong'etye tulweetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki indoe icheek moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pandap peetuusyek somok
Numbers10:34 Ki mi paragunnywa poldetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peet ye kingo toi panda eng' nganaseet.
Numbers10:35 Atkai tugul ye kingwo tai moinget
Numbers10:36 Ak ye kingo tonon
Numbers11:1 Ki toi anyun piik kong'unyng'uny ak komwaei che yaach kogasei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers11:2 Ki riirchi anyun `piik Musa ak ki sa `ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogesunotkei maat.
Numbers11:3 Ara ki kiguure yooto Tabera
Numbers11:4 Ki mi piich alak che chaang' che teerchiin che ki mi kwenutap piigap Israel ak ki sich mageet ne ya pichuuto. Ki riiryo piigap Israel ak icheek kogeny kole
Numbers11:5 Ki ibwaati njireenik che ki kiame puch eng' Misiri
Numbers11:6 Ago tinyei saboonwekyok munyasta; ma mi kiy age tugul ne kigeeree kobatee mana chu.”
Numbers11:7 Ki kergei mana ak peek che mubere che leelach ak ki uu itoondanywa kiit ne kiguure bedola.
Numbers11:8 Kibendoti piik kokweoti
Numbers11:9 Ye kingo putyi rewoot nganaseet kemoi
Numbers11:10 Ki kas Musa koriirtos piik eng' kooriikwak
Numbers11:11 Ak ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers11:12 Tos anee ne ki asiche pichu tugul? Tos anee ne ki asich kot ileenjo
Numbers11:13 Anyoorchini ano panyeek che agoochini pichu tugul? Amu riirchino koleen
Numbers11:14 Ma muuchi aneege agesen pichu; amu nyigiis kot eng' anee.
Numbers11:15 Ngot iyaiywo ko uu ni
Numbers11:16 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers11:17 Achoorugei anyoone keng'alaal ak inyee eng' olooto
Numbers11:18 Ileenji piik
Numbers11:19 Moame eng' peetuut agenge
Numbers11:20 ago oame eng' arawet komugul
Numbers11:21 Ago ki le Musa
Numbers11:22 Tos kieng'ji keechiirek ak tuuga si koyam icheek? Anan kiyumi ngirenik tugul che mi nyanjet si koyam icheek?”
Numbers11:23 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers11:24 Ki manda anyun Musa kwo saang' komwachi piik ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki iyum murenik tamanwogik tisap eng' poisyegap pichooto ak kotet eng' ole neegitee Emait.
Numbers11:25 Ki choorgei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pooldet ak kong'alaalji Musa
Numbers11:26 Ki kang'et piik aeng'u eng' nganaseet; ki kiguure age Eldad
Numbers11:27 Ak kilabat murenet age ne neran kwo komwachi Musa koleenji
Numbers11:28 Ki wol Joshua weeriitap Nun
Numbers11:29 Ago ki leenji `Musa ineendet
Numbers11:30 Kiweektagei anyun Musa ak poisyegap Israel nganaseet.
Numbers11:31 Ki us anyun usoonet ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers11:32 Ki ng'eetyo piik peetuunooto komugul
Numbers11:33 Ye kingo ta komi panyechooto kutusweekwak
Numbers11:34 Ko uu nooto ko ki kiguuree yooto Kibrot-hataaba
Numbers11:35 Ki pa piik eng' Kibrot-hataaba agoi koit Haserot ak ki meny olooto.
Numbers12:1 Kichaam anyun `Miriam ak `Aron Musa amu kobogoryotap Kush ne ki itun; amu ki itun Chepkusyot.
Numbers12:2 Ki le icheek
Numbers12:3 Ago ki chii ne tala miising' Musa kosiir piik tugul che ki mi ng'wony.
Numbers12:4 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' yooto Musa
Numbers12:5 Ki choorgei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' toloitap pooldet ak kotonone kurgeetap Emait. Ki kuur Aron ak Miriam ak ki pwa icheek tuwai.
Numbers12:6 Ki leenji anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers12:7 Ma uu nooto eng' kiboityondennyu Musa; po iman ineendet eng' koonnyu komugul.
Numbers12:8 Ki ng'alaaljindos ak ineendet kimni
Numbers12:9 Ki toi anyun konereech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo icheek
Numbers12:10 Ye kingo togosta parak pooldet eng' Emait
Numbers12:11 Ki leenji anyun `Aron Musa
Numbers12:12 Asaain ale amat koigei ineendet ne kagome
Numbers12:13 Ki riirchi anyun `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Numbers12:14 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers12:15 Ki kigerchi anyun Miriam saang'utap nganaseet peetuusyek tisap. Ki ma testai piik eng' pandanywa agoi kimut Miriam kogeny konyo kaa.
Numbers12:16 Kingo pata nooto koba piik eng' Haserot
Numbers13:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers13:2 “Iyookte murenik koba kosegei emetap Kanaan ne agoochini piigap Israel. Oyooktoi chiito agenge ne kandoindet eng' icheek kwanisyekwak eng' ooreet age tugul ne po.”
Numbers13:3 Ki iyookto anyun `Musa pichooto eng' surkwen ne po Paran ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Icheeget tugul ko ki kandoik eng' piigap Israel.
Numbers13:4 Ki chu kainaikwak: Eng' ooreetap Reuben ko ki Samua weeriitap Sakur.
Numbers13:5 Eng' ooreetap Simion ko ki Sapat weeriitap Hori.
Numbers13:6 Eng' ooreetap Judah ko ki Kaleb weeriitap Jepune.
Numbers13:7 Eng' ooreetap Issakar ko ki Igal weeriitap Joseph.
Numbers13:8 Eng' ooreetap Ephraim ko ki Hoshea weeriitap Nun.
Numbers13:9 Eng' ooreetap Benjamin
Numbers13:10 Eng' ooreetap Zebulun ko ki Gadiel weeriitap Sodi.
Numbers13:11 Eng' ooreetap Joseph ne po ooreetap Manasseh ko ki Gadi weeriitap Susi.
Numbers13:12 Eng' ooreetap Dan ko ki Amiel weeriitap Gemali.
Numbers13:13 Eng' ooreetap Asher ko ki Setur weeriitap Mikael.
Numbers13:14 Eng' ooreetap Naphtali ko ki Nabi weeriitap Bopsi.
Numbers13:15 Ak eng' ooreetap Gad ko ki Geuel weeriitap Maki.
Numbers13:16 Chooto kainaigap murenik che ki iyookto Musa koba kosegei emet. (Ak kiguure Musa Hoshea weeriitap Nun
Numbers13:17 Ki iyookto anyun Musa koba kosegei emetap Kanaan. Ki leenji anyun pichooto
Numbers13:18 Ogeer emet kiit ne uu ak piik che menyei olooto
Numbers13:19 Ogeer ole uu emet ne menyei pichooto
Numbers13:20 Ogeer kogeny kiit ne uu emet
Numbers13:21 Ki togosta anyun pichooto koba kosegei emet kong'etee surkwen ne po Sin agoi Rehob
Numbers13:22 Ki pa anyun kotogostae murot tai agoi koit Hebron. Olooto ole ki menye Ahiman
Numbers13:23 Ye kingo it atebweetap Eskol
Numbers13:24 Ki kiguure olooto atebweetap Eskol amu logoek che kitil piigap Israel eng' olooto.
Numbers13:25 Kingo keskei peetuusyek artamu
Numbers13:26 Ki pwa anyun agoi ole mi Musa ak Aron ak tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel eng' surkwen ne po Paran
Numbers13:27 Ki mwachi `pichooto Musa koleenji
Numbers13:28 Ago kiimeen piik che menyei emonooto
Numbers13:29 Menyei Amelegik komostap murot tai; komenyei tuloonook Hitik
Numbers13:30 Ki mwachi anyun `Kaleb piik kosiisyo eng' taitap Musa ak koleenji
Numbers13:31 Ago ki le piik che kiga togosta koba kobooto ineendet
Numbers13:32 Ak ki ipchi piigap Israel ng'aleek che yaacheen agobo emonooto kiga segei. Ki le icheek
Numbers13:33 Ki kigeerchi olooto Nepilik
Numbers14:1 Kiwaach anyun tuiyet komugul koriiryo ak ki iteiyo kemout komugul.
Numbers14:2 Ki ing'unyng'ung'ji piigap Israel tugul Musa ak Aron ak koleenji
Numbers14:3 Amu nee si komutwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebwa emoni
Numbers14:4 Ki ng'alaaljigei anyun icheegei kole
Numbers14:5 Ki ing'uruukso anyun Musa ak Aron kot kotiiny togoochikwak ng'wony eng' taitap piik tugul che po tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel.
Numbers14:6 Ki pet ngoroikwak Joshua weeriitap Nun ak Kaleb weeriitap Jepune; chuuto tuwai ko ki mi kobooto icheek che kigaba kosegei emet
Numbers14:7 ak ki ng'alaalji tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel koleenji
Numbers14:8 Ngot kobaibai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' acheek
Numbers14:9 Ago kaigai amongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anan oiywei piigap emet
Numbers14:10 Ago kimwae tuiyet komugul kole kelach icheek eng' koik. Ki took ak komong'ji piigap Israel tugul liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emait ne kituiyechin.
Numbers14:11 Ak kiteebe `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers14:12 Abare koroito ak aistoegei icheek
Numbers14:13 Ki leenji anyun `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers14:14 komwachi piigap emoniito. Ki kogas icheek kole imi inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwenutap pichu. Amu itaagu inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kimni
Numbers14:15 Ngot ibar pichu kibagenge
Numbers14:16 ‘Ki kobarchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pichooto surkwen amu ki ma imuuch ineendet komut icheek koba emet ne kiga koyasyechi.’
Numbers14:17 Asaain anyun nguno ale
Numbers14:18 ‘Ma sip konereechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko nyiitaat rireenet
Numbers14:19 Asaain ale nyochi kaat anyun pichu tengektonywa ko uu ooindap rireeneng'ung' ak ko uu ye ki inyochigaat pichu kobooch Misiri agoi kora.”
Numbers14:20 Ki wol Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Numbers14:21 Ago iman
Numbers14:22 koma mi agot agenge eng' pichu tugul che ki kogeer toroorindanyu ak kaboorunoikyuk che ki ayai eng' Misiri ak eng' surkwen. Ko uu ye ki kotyema konyil taman
Numbers14:23 koma keerei iman emonooto ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwak. Ama keerei age tugul eng' icheek che kisasa.
Numbers14:24 Kobatee kiboityondennyu Kaleb amu ki tinyei sabeet age ak ki isuba eng' kagesunatetapkei
Numbers14:25 Amu menyei atebweet Amelegik ak Kanaanik
Numbers14:26 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji
Numbers14:27 “Amuitoi eng' tuiyoni ya ne ing'unyng'ung'jino kot kotyanit? Koagas kang'unyng'unyetap piigap Israel che ing'unyng'ung'jino.
Numbers14:28 Ileenji icheek
Numbers14:29 Obekyini ong'atani tugul che ki kiit eng' okweek
Numbers14:30 mooite emonooto iman ne ki ayosyechigei ale agoonok omeny olooto
Numbers14:31 Ago amuti lagokwok che ki ole egu luulenik koba emonooto
Numbers14:32 Ago okweek
Numbers14:33 Iyogisyote lagokwok eng' ong'atani kenyiisyek artam ak koibot kugoinateng'wong' agoi kigees ne po let eng' okweek koek muuswek eng' surkwen.
Numbers14:34 Ko uu koitetap peetuusyek che ki otar eng' segeetap emet
Numbers14:35 Kaamwa anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers14:36 Ki pek pichooto che ki iyookto Musa koba kosegei emet
Numbers14:37 Ki pek icheek ki ip ng'aleek che yaach agobo emet ko ki pek tugul eng' koroito eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Numbers14:38 Ago ki ng'et Joshua weeriitap Nun ak Kaleb weeriitap Jepune
Numbers14:39 Ye kingo mwachi `Musa piigap Israel ng'aleechuuto tugul
Numbers14:40 Ki ng'eetyo anyun karon miising' ak kotogosta agoi tulweet parak koleen
Numbers14:41 Ago ki leenji Musa
Numbers14:42 Amat otogoste amu ma mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootok
Numbers14:43 Amu mi taing'wong' eng' olooto Amelegik ak Kanaanik. Amu ki oweegei let ama osup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers14:44 Agot nga uu nooto
Numbers14:45 Ki choorgei anyun Amelegik ak Kanaanik che ki menyei tulwoonooto ak ki par icheek ak ki oon agoi koit Horma.
Numbers15:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers15:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Numbers15:3 ak omach ochopchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne punei maat
Numbers15:4 ko ingogoito anyun ineendet ne igoitoi kagoochinennyi kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers15:5 Ingoito anyun litait agenge ne po divaik kobunji kagoochinet ne kieei
Numbers15:6 Ngo mengit
Numbers15:7 ak igoite kagoochinet ne kieei ne po litait agenge ak kebeberyat ne po divaik koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
