Numbers15:8 Ye ichop kirgit ne ming'in koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei anan ko ne po tiseiywot
Numbers15:9 ingogoito anyun kobooto kirgooto kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin che po keruutik somok che ki kiburukto mwaita ne po litaisyek aeng'.
Numbers15:10 Ak igoite divaik che po litaisyek aeng' koek kagoochinet ne kieei
Numbers15:11 “Kiyachin ko uu nooto kirgit age tugul
Numbers15:12 Oyachini age tugul ko uu koiitennywa
Numbers15:13 Yaei ko uu nooto tugul che salu kaa
Numbers15:14 Ak ngo mi kipsagarin kobootok anan chii age tugul ne mi kobootok eng' ibinwekwok tugul ak komach kogoito kagoochinet ne punei maat kobunji nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers15:15 Agenge ng'atuutyet ne po chii age tugul eng' okweek agot eng' kiprutoiyot ne meng'iisyei kobootok
Numbers15:16 Egu ng'atuutyet agenge ak kirwooget agenge eng' okweek ak eng' chii ne punootyot ne mi kobootok.”
Numbers15:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers15:18 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Numbers15:19 ak ye oam amitwogigap emonooto
Numbers15:20 Ogoitoi magatyat ne ming'in kobunji kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak eng' magatinikwok che po tai
Numbers15:21 Ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor magatyandeng'wong' ne po tai koek kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak eng' ibinwekwok tugul.
Numbers15:22 “Ak ye oleel
Numbers15:23 tugul che king'ataak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa kobooch ye kigon ng'atuutik agoi ibinwekwok tugul.
Numbers15:24 Ko ngo lel chii ama nai tuiyet
Numbers15:25 Ingoyai anyun tisiindet kagaigaet agobo tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel
Numbers15:26 Ak kenyochigaat tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel kobooto toondet ne meng'iisyei eng' kwenunnywa
Numbers15:27 “Ago ngo lel chii age tugul amaingen
Numbers15:28 Ingoyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo chiichooto lelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers15:29 Ng'atuutyoni agenge koboisye eng' okweek kogergeit eng' chiito ne kalel kiy age tugul amaingen
Numbers15:30 “Ago chiito ne yaei kiy age tugul kokwetyin
Numbers15:31 Amu kasas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kagobut ng'atuutyennyi
Numbers15:32 Ak ye kita komi piigap Israel surkwen
Numbers15:33 Ki imut piik che kinyooru chiichooto koyumi kweenik kwo ole mi Musa ak Aron
Numbers15:34 ak kigerchi ineendet ko amu kitom kemwa kiit ne ki itoi chiichooto.
Numbers15:35 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers15:36 Ara ki imut `tuiyet komugul ineendet kwo saang'utap nganaseet ak kolage koik agoi kome
Numbers15:37 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers15:38 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin konapchigei tuguuk che uu sawoik eng' tabanwegap ngoroikwak eng' ibinwek tugul ak kogurmane usiit ne buluu paragutap sawoichooto mi tabanda age tugul.
Numbers15:39 Egu anyun sawoiyot eng' okweek ne ogeere ak obwaat ng'atuutik tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oyai
Numbers15:40 Si kobiit obwaat ak oyai ng'atuutikyuk tugul ak oegu che tiliileen eng' Kamuktaindeng'wong'.
Numbers15:41 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Numbers16:1 Ki iyum piik anyun `Kora weeriitap Itshar
Numbers16:2 ak kong'eetyo kongelelso eng' taitap Musa kobooto piigap Israel alak. Ki mi kobooto icheeget pounik
Numbers16:3 Ki iyumgei icheegei si kobiit kotil let Musa ak Aron
Numbers16:4 Ye kingo kas Musa ng'olyoondonooto
Numbers16:5 Yeityo komwachi Kora ak piikyik koleenji
Numbers16:6 Inyee Kora
Numbers16:7 onde mastinwek tereenichooto oriit ak onde mutai karon nyamdutik che kibeelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tiliil anyun chiichooto leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kaoeetkei okweek weeriigap Lawi.”
Numbers16:8 Ki leenji `Musa Kora
Numbers16:9 Tos ogeere ole ming'in ng'olyoondoni eng' okweek amu ki itabaanak Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel eng' tuiyetap Israel
Numbers16:10 Ki komutwak ooriigu ak tupchosyeguk tugul weeriigap Lawi. Tos omache tiseinateet agine?
Numbers16:11 Koyumgei anyun inyee oegu agenge ak piiguk otil let Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Aron ko ng'oo kot ong'unyng'ung'ji?”
Numbers16:12 Ki iyookto `Musa chiito keguur Datan ak Abiram weeriigap Eliap. Ago ki le
Numbers16:13 Tos igeere ile kiy ne ming'in ye ki imutwech ketogosu eng' emet ne kinyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo si ibarchech ong'atani? Ak nguno imache iegu pounindet
Numbers16:14 Kosiir nooto koma imutyech emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo ama igoonech poroteetap mbareenik ak che po sabibuk. Tos ngiroo ko ki piik acheek che king'ale? Ma kibwane!”
Numbers16:15 Ki nereech Musa miising' ak ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers16:16 Yeityo koleenji `Musa Kora
Numbers16:17 Ingoip chii tugul tereennyi ak konde nyamdutik che kibeelei
Numbers16:18 Ki ip anyun chii tugul tereennyi ak konde maat oriit
Numbers16:19 Ye kita koiyumi `Kora tuiyet komugul kotil let icheek eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers16:20 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji
Numbers16:21 “Otabaanegei tuiyoni okweek si kobiit awong' icheek.”
Numbers16:22 Ago ki ing'uruukso icheek kot kotiiny togoochikwak ng'wony ak kole
Numbers16:23 Ak ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers16:24 “Mwachi tuiyet ileenji
Numbers16:25 Ki ng'eet Musa kwo kap Datan ak Abiram ak ki isup ineendet poisyegap Israel.
Numbers16:26 Ki mwachi tuiyet koleenji
Numbers16:27 Ki istogei anyun icheek eng' komosta age tugul ne po meng'ootetap Kora
Numbers16:28 Ki le Musa
Numbers16:29 Ngot kobek pichu ko uu ye pegu piik tugul anan ngot keyachi icheek ko uu ye kiyachin piik tugul ko kaagaa ma iyookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Numbers16:30 Ago ngot koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy ne taunen
Numbers16:31 Ak kingo kagomwa ng'aleechooto tugul kogees
Numbers16:32 Ki yaat ng'wony kutinnyi kolugui icheek ak piikwak
Numbers16:33 Ki pa keriinget kosaptos pichooto ak icheeget che ki mi tugul. Ki tuch `ng'wony icheek ak ki lusyo anyun eng' tuiyet.
Numbers16:34 Ki mweiso anyun Yahudik tugul che ki mi ole neegitee icheek ye kingo kas kateennywa
Numbers16:35 Ki mong' maat anyun eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki peel pichooto pogol aeng' ak konom che ki igoitoi nyamdutik che kibeelei.
Numbers16:36 Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers16:37 “Mwachin Eleazar weeriitap Aron tisiindet koisto tereenik eng' maat ak iwas maat eng' olooto
Numbers16:38 Ara agobo tereenigap kiptengeginik che kogorwookyigei icheegei kot kobek
Numbers16:39 Ki ip anyun Eleazar tereenichooto po sugunonik
Numbers16:40 Ki ek nooto kabwaatet eng' piigap Israel si ma riik toondet ne ma po ooreetap Aron
Numbers16:41 Ago ki ing'unyng'ung'ji Musa ak Aron `tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel eng' peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto kole
Numbers16:42 Ak ye kingo kagoyumgei tuiyet
Numbers16:43 Ak ki pa Musa ak Aron taitap emait ne kituiyechin.
Numbers16:44 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers16:45 “Oistoegei tuiyoni
Numbers16:46 Yeityo koleenji `Musa Aron
Numbers16:47 Ki ip anyun Aron tereennyi ko uu ye kagamwa Musa ak kilabat kwo kwenutap tuiyet. Kooro kole
Numbers16:48 Ki tonon eng' kwenutap che kagobek ak che saptos
Numbers16:49 Icheek che ki pek eng' koroito
Numbers16:50 Yeityo koweek anyun Aron kwo ole mi Musa agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers17:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers17:2 “Ng'alaalji piigap Israel ak iibune kirokweek taman ak aeng': kirokto agenge eng' koot age tugul ne po kwanisyekwak eng' pounikwak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. Sirchi kainetap chii age tugul kiroktonyi.
Numbers17:3 Sirchi kainetap Aron kirokto ne po Lawi
Numbers17:4 Yeityo igonor kirokwechooto eng' emait ne kituiyechin eng' taitap paornateet
Numbers17:5 Yeityo kong'at kirokto ne po chiito ne aleweni
Numbers17:6 Ara ki ng'alaalji `Musa piigap Israel
Numbers17:7 Ki igonor Musa kirokwechooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emaitap paornateet.
Numbers17:8 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi
Numbers17:9 Ki ip anyun Musa kirokweek tugul kobunu taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si konde taitap piigap Israel tugul. Ki keer
Numbers17:10 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers17:11 Ki yai anyun Musa ko uu nooto
Numbers17:12 Ki mwachi `piigap Israel Musa koleenji
Numbers17:13 Meei chii age tugul ne riikyin kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos kiwong'ugei acheek tugul?”
Numbers18:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron
Numbers18:2 Ara imutu koriik tupchosyeguk ak icheek che po ooreetap Lawi
Numbers18:3 Ak koriip icheek ng'atuutyeng'ung' ak ng'atuutyet ne po Emait komugul. Ago amat keriikyi tuguuk che po ole-tiliil anan kapkorosuut
Numbers18:4 Kiyomenen pichooto si koriip icheek ng'atuutyetap emait ne kituiyechin ak agobo poisyet tugul ne po Emait. Ak amat koriikyok toondet age tugul.
Numbers18:5 Oriip oyai ng'atuutyetap ole-tiliil ak ng'atuutyetap kapkorosuut
Numbers18:6 Kaatabaan anee tupchosyekwok Lawiik eng' piigap Israel koek icheek kagoochinet eng' okweek. Kigoochin icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobois eng' emait ne kituiyechin.
Numbers18:7 Oriip inyee ak weeriiguk tiseinateng'wong' agobo kiy age tugul ne po kapkorosuut ak che po chooto mi oriit eng' angeet ne ki kioye
Numbers18:8 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron
Numbers18:9 Egu cheguuk tuguuchooto eng' che tiliileen miising'
Numbers18:10 Iame tuguuchooto eng' ole-tiliil. Amei age tugul ne muren; egu ne tiliil eng' inyee.
Numbers18:11 “Neng'ung' ni agine: kagoochinennywa ne kinamjin parak ne po konunenywa eng' kagoochinoikwak tugul che kiongoi che po piigap Israel. Kaagoonin chooto kobooto weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk
Numbers18:12 “Kaagoonin tongoanikwak tugul che kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers18:13 Punjinin tongoanik che po tuguuk tugul che mi emennywa
Numbers18:14 Punjinin kiy age tugul ne itabaanat eng' Israel.
Numbers18:15 “Punjinin age tugul ne yaatei iyoteet
Numbers18:16 Chooto che kityaachi eng' icheeget
Numbers18:17 Ago amat ityaach ne twatei teta
Numbers18:18 Ak kobunjiin panyeekwak
Numbers18:19 “Kaagoonin kobooto weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk kagoochinoik tugul che kinamjin parak che po tuguuk che tiliileen
Numbers18:20 Ki leenji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron
Numbers18:21 “Kaagoochi lagogap Lawi kebeberwek tugul che po taman eng' Israel koek porotennywa
Numbers18:22 Kobooch nguno ko mariikyin piigap Israel emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers18:23 Ago yaei Lawiik poisyetap emait ne kituiyechin
Numbers18:24 Amu kaagoochi Lawiik koek porotennywa kebebertap taman ne po piigap Israel
Numbers18:25 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers18:26 “Mwachi kogeny Lawiik ileenji: Ye otaach kebeberwegap taman eng' piigap Israel
Numbers18:27 Ki ityok kagoochineng'wong' ne kinamjin parak
Numbers18:28 Ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak okweek ko uu nooto kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak ne po kebeberwekwok tugul che po taman
Numbers18:29 Ogoitoi kagoochinet age tugul ne kinamjin parak ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers18:30 Mwachi anyun icheek amu nooto ileenji: Ye onamjini parak eng' chooto myachen
Numbers18:31 Oam chooto eng' komoswek tugul
Numbers18:32 Moibe tengekto eng' nooto
Numbers19:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji
Numbers19:2 “Kaneetisyet ni ne po ng'atuutyet ne ki kong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Mwachi piigap Israel kogetun rooryat ne piriir ne ma tinyei peruut
Numbers19:3 Igoochi Eleazar tisiindet
Numbers19:4 “Ak korooch Eleazar mornennyi korotiigap rooryandanooto
Numbers19:5 Ingebeel `chiito rooryandanooto eng' tainnyi; kobooto muitonyi
Numbers19:6 Ak konam tisiindet tarakwet
Numbers19:7 Yeityo komwet tisiindet ngoroikyik ak kouungei eng' peek. Ye ibata konyo nganaseet
Numbers19:8 Mwetei ngoroikyik agine ineendet ne peelei rooryandanooto
Numbers19:9 Ingoyum anyun oreegap rooryandanooto chiito ne ma ng'waan
Numbers19:10 Mwetei ngoroikyik ne iyumi orechooto ak komurwoniit agoi koimen. Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' piigap Israel ak toondet ne meng'iisyei eng' kwenunnywa.
Numbers19:11 “Murwoniitu peetuusyek tisap ineendet ne twaei muusto ne po chii age tugul.
Numbers19:12 Ianyinyegei peechooto ineendet eng' peetuutap somok ak eng' peetuutap tisap
Numbers19:13 Imurwoni kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor age tugul ne twaei muustap chii age tugul ne kame
Numbers19:14 “Ng'atuutyet ni ne po chii ne kame eng' emait oriit: murwoniitu eng' peetuusyek tisap chii age tugul ne wendi emainooto oriit ak age tugul ne mi emait.
Numbers19:15 Ng'waan kiy age tugul ne yaataat; ne ma ki rat kiit ne kigeree.
Numbers19:16 Age tugul ne twaei eng' kewanin chii ne ko ki par eng' rotwetap chok
Numbers19:17 “Agobo ineendet ne murwoon ko ingoip icheek oreegap kagoochinet ne kagebeel ne po tengekto
Numbers19:18 Ak konam anyun chiito ne ki kianyiny husop ak korooch peechooto
Numbers19:19 Ak kois chiito ne ki kianyiny
Numbers19:20 “Ak chiito ne murwoon
Numbers19:21 Egu ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' icheek. Mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne isisye peegap katabaanet
Numbers19:22 Ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne twaei chiichooto murwoon
Numbers20:1 Ki iit tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel surkwen ne po Sin eng' arawet ne po tai
Numbers20:2 Ki ma nyoor anyun piik peek ak ki iyumgei icheek ak kobolji Musa ak Aron.
Numbers20:3 Kibolyo piik ak Musa
Numbers20:4 Amu nee si omutu tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobwa ong'atani? Tos ki omutwech si kobiit kebegu eng' oli; ak tuukyok?
Numbers20:5 Amu nee si omoong'wech ketogosu eng' Misiri
Numbers20:6 Ki pa Musa ak Aron eng' ole mi tuiyet agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin. Ki ing'uruukso kot kotiiny togoochikwak ng'wony ak komong'ji `liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek.
Numbers20:7 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers20:8 “Nam kirokto
Numbers20:9 Ki inem anyun `Musa kirokto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers20:10 Ki iyum `Musa ak `Aron tuiyet kotuiyo eng' taitap rwandet
Numbers20:11 Ki namji anyun Musa eunnyi parak ak kokwer rwandet eng' kiroktonyi konyil aeng'. Ki isururgei peek che chaang'
Numbers20:12 Ago ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron
Numbers20:13 Po peechu Meribah
Numbers20:14 Ki iyookto `Musa piik eng' Kadesh koba kaplaitoryatap Edom
Numbers20:15 ko uu ye kichoortagei kwanisyekyok koba Misiri
Numbers20:16 Kingeriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogas riirekyok ak ki iyook malaikaiyat konyo komutwech kemang'une Misiri. Ki mi nguno Kadesh
Numbers20:17 Kaigai igoonech kebun emeng'ung'. Ma kibune mbar anan mbareenigap sabibuk
Numbers20:18 Ago ki leenji `Edom
Numbers20:19 Ki leenji piigap Israel
Numbers20:20 Ago ki le
Numbers20:21 Ki eetee anyun `Edom Israel kobun kiwotennyi; ak ki weigei anyun Israel kobagaakta ineendet.
Numbers20:22 Ki pa eng' Kadesh
Numbers20:23 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron eng' tulweetap Hor
Numbers20:24 “Tuun kiyumi Aron kobooto piikyik; ma itei emet ne ki agoochi piigap Israel amu ki obistoe ng'olyoondennyu eng' peegap Meribah.
Numbers20:25 Imutu Aron ak weeriinnyi Eleazar
Numbers20:26 ireegune Aron ngoroikyik
Numbers20:27 Ki yai anyun Musa ko uu ye kang'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Ki togosta koba tulweetap Hor kogeeroti tuiyet komugul.
Numbers20:28 Ki ireegune `Musa Aron ngoroikyik ak kolaakyi weeriinnyi Eleazar
Numbers20:29 Ye kingo keer tuiyet komugul kole kagome Aron
Numbers21:1 Ki kas laitoryatap Arad kanaanindet ne ki menyei murot tai
Numbers21:2 Ki iyasyechi `Yahudik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers21:3 Ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleegap Yahudik
Numbers21:4 Ki pa anyun eng' tulweetap Hor kobun ooreetap Araraita ne Piriir
Numbers21:5 Ki ing'unyng'ung'ji anyun `piik Kamuktaindet kobooto Musa
Numbers21:6 Ki iyookyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pichooto erenook che ng'woneen susennywa ko uu maat. Kisus piik ak ki pek piik che chaang' che po Israel.
Numbers21:7 Ki pa `piik kap Musa koleenji
Numbers21:8 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers21:9 Ki itaany anyun `Musa ereneet ne po sugunwet ak ki inde keetit ak kootonon. Ngo sus ereneet chii age tugul
Numbers21:10 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel
Numbers21:11 Ki pa eng' Obot agoi komuung'e Iye-abarim ne mi surkwen ne tokyingei Moab
Numbers21:12 Ki pa eng' olooto
Numbers21:13 Ki pa eng' olooto
Numbers21:14 Siraat eng' kitabuutap Lugosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu nooto
Numbers21:15 ak eng' atebwosyek che choorchingei ole menyei Ar
Numbers21:16 Ak ki pa eng' olooto agoi Beer
Numbers21:17 Kityen anyun Yahudik tyeni: “Kuutu peek
Numbers21:18 Keriinget ne kibalei che taagunotiin
Numbers21:19 Ki pa eng' Matana agoi Nahaliel
Numbers21:20 Ki pa eng' Bamot agoi atebweet ne mi mbareetap Moab
Numbers21:21 Ki iyookto `Yahudik piik koba kap Sihon laitoryatap Amorik koleenji
Numbers21:22 “Chamwo abun emeng'ung'. Ma kimastoi kebendi mbareenik
Numbers21:23 Ago ma chamji `Sihon piigap Israel kobun kiwotennyi. Ago ki iyum `Sihon piikyik tugul ak koba kobargei ak piigap Israel eng' surkwen
Numbers21:24 Ki par `Israel ineendet eng' rotwetap chok ak konam emennyi kobooch Arnon agoi Jabbok
Numbers21:25 Kiluul piigap Israel nganasochooto tugul
Numbers21:26 Amu Hesbon ko ki nganaseetap Sihon laitoryatap Amorik
Numbers21:27 Mwaei eng' nooto anyun icheek eng' kalewenaik kole
Numbers21:28 Amu kamandae maat Hesbon
Numbers21:29 Pwo! Inyee Moab! Kaolusye
Numbers21:30 Kagolus
Numbers21:31 Ara ki meny anyun Yahudik emetap Amorik.
Numbers21:32 Ki iyookto `Musa piik kosegei Jaser
Numbers21:33 Ki week anyun kotogosta kobun ooreetap Bashan. Ki manda anyun Og laitoryatap Bashan ak piikyik tugul
Numbers21:34 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers21:35 Ki par anyun `icheek ineendet kobooto weeriikyik ak piikyik tugul
Numbers22:1 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel
Numbers22:2 Ki keer Balak weeriitap Sipor tuguuk tugul che ki yachi Yahudik Amorik.
Numbers22:3 Ki iywei `Moabik pichooto miising' amu ki chaang'; ak kitoptobenso Moabik amu piigap Israel.
Numbers22:4 Ki leenji `Moabik poisyegap Midian
Numbers22:5 ak ki iyookto piik koba kap Balaam weeriitap Beor
Numbers22:6 Asaain anyun nguno ale
Numbers22:7 Ara ki pa anyun poisyegap Moab ak che po Midian koibei eng' eunekwak kagoochinoigap ng'oorset. Ki it kap Balaam
Numbers22:8 Ki leenji `Balaam pichooto
Numbers22:9 Ki nyoonji `Kamuktaindet Balaam
Numbers22:10 Ak ki wolji `Balaam Kamuktaindet kole
Numbers22:11 ‘Kayom emet piik che ki punu Misiri; ara anyun
Numbers22:12 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Balaam
Numbers22:13 Ki ng'eet Balaam karon
Numbers22:14 Ara king'eetyo pounigap Moab koba ole mi Balak ak koleenji
Numbers22:15 Ki iyookto Balak kogeny pounik alak che chaang' che siirei
Numbers22:16 Ki it kap Balam
Numbers22:17 amu aeetin inyooru teegisto ne oo
Numbers22:18 Ago ki wolji `Balaam otwogigap Balak koleenji
Numbers22:19 Asoomok anyun ale
Numbers22:20 Ki nyoonji `Kamuktaindet Balaam kemoi
Numbers22:21 Ara king'eet Balaam karon
Numbers22:22 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki wo
Numbers22:23 kogigeer sigiryet malakaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotononi eng' ooreet
Numbers22:24 Ki tonon malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ooreet ne mariich eng' mbareenigap sabibuk
Numbers22:25 Ye ki keer sigiryet malakaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers22:26 Ki inakta malakaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwo tai
Numbers22:27 Ye ki keer sigiryet malakaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers22:28 Ak ki yaat `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutitap sigiryet kotwek
Numbers22:29 Ak ki leenji `Balaam sigiryet
Numbers22:30 Ki wolji `sigiryet Balaam koleenji
Numbers22:31 Ki yaat anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyegap Balaam
Numbers22:32 Ki leenji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers22:33 Kageera sigiryet
Numbers22:34 Ki leenji `Balaam malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers22:35 Ago ki leenji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Balaam
Numbers22:36 Kingo kas Balak kole kagonyo Balaam
Numbers22:37 Ki leenji `Balak Balaam
Numbers22:38 Ki wolji `Balaam Balak koleenji
Numbers22:39 Ki pa anyun Balaam ak Balak
Numbers22:40 Ki eeny Balak tuuga ak keechiirek
Numbers22:41 Kingo kagoeech
Numbers23:1 Ki leenji `Balaam Balak
Numbers23:2 Ki yai Balak ko uu ye ki kamwa Balaam
Numbers23:3 Yeityo koleenji `Balaam Balak
Numbers23:4 Ki tuiyo Kamuktaindet ak Balaam
Numbers23:5 Ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoot kutitap Balaam
Numbers23:6 Ara `week Balam ole mi Balak
Numbers23:7 Ki toi Balaam kalewenennyi kole
Numbers23:8 Achuptoi ano ne ma chup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak anereekyindoi ano ne ma nereekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?
Numbers23:9 Amu ageere Israel ami rwandosyek parak
Numbers23:10 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koiit chaang'indap Jakobo
Numbers23:11 Ki leenji `Balak Balaam
Numbers23:12 Ki wolji koleenji
Numbers23:13 Ki leenji anyun `Balak ineendet
Numbers23:14 Ara ki imut ineendet anyun agoi koit kooretap Sopim eng' tulweet parak ne kiguure Piska. Ki teech kaptisisyosyek tisap
Numbers23:15 Ki leenji `Balaam Balak
Numbers23:16 Ki torook `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Balaam ak konde ng'olyoot kutinnyi ak koleenji
Numbers23:17 Ki wo anyun ole mi ineendet
Numbers23:18 Ak ki mwa kalewenennyi kole
Numbers23:19 Ma chiito Kamuktaindet
Numbers23:20 Keero
Numbers23:21 Tomo kogeerchi Jakobo tengekto
Numbers23:22 Ki imutu Kamuktaindet icheek eng' Misiri
Numbers23:23 Ma mi iman pondit ne kimuuchi kebane Jakobo
Numbers23:24 Keero
Numbers23:25 Ki leenji `Balak Balam
Numbers23:26 Ago ki wolji `Balaam Balak
Numbers23:27 Ki leenji `Balak Balaam
Numbers23:28 Ki imut anyun `Balak Balaam agoi tulweetap Peor parak
Numbers23:29 Ki leenji `Balaam Balak
Numbers23:30 Ki yai anyun Balak ko uu ye kagamwa Balaam
Numbers24:1 Ki keer anyun Balaam kole chamei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koberuur Yahudik
Numbers24:2 Kitabendo anyun Balaam ak ki keer Yahudik komeng'iisyei ko katetkei ko uu ortinwekwak. Ki nyoonji Kabuusetap `Kamuktaindet ineendet
Numbers24:3 ak kigetyigei kalewenennyi
Numbers24:4 kale ineendet ne kasei ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet
Numbers24:5 Ee Jakobo
Numbers24:6 Kauitogei ko uu atebwosyek
Numbers24:7 Rootune peek tereenikyik
Numbers24:8 Ki imutu Kamuktaindet komong' eng' Misiri
Numbers24:9 Kiribis
Numbers24:10 Ki nereech kot Balak agobo Balaam. Ki irabaach eunekyik ak ki leenji Balaam
Numbers24:11 Ara mwei ui oldang'ung' nguno! Ki aleen si aeetin inyooru teegisto ne oo
Numbers24:12 Ki leenji `Balaam Balak
Numbers24:13 ‘Agot ngo koono Balak fedha ak thahabu che nyiei koonnyi
Numbers24:14 “Kawe nguno ole mi piikyuk
Numbers24:15 Ak kigetyigei kalewenennyi ak kole
Numbers24:16 mwaei ineendet ne kasei ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet
Numbers24:17 Ageere ineendet
Numbers24:18 Kiluulei Edom
Numbers24:19 Laitorani ne mang'une Jakobo
Numbers24:20 Yeityo kogeer `Balaam Amelegik
Numbers24:21 Yeityo kogeer `ineendet Kenindet
Numbers24:22 Ago kibeeti Kenik
Numbers24:23 Ki mwa kalewenennyi kogeny
Numbers24:24 Punu melisyek ngeguutap Kitim
Numbers24:25 Ki ng'eet anyun Balaam kwo oldanyi
Numbers25:1 Ye kita komenyei `Israel Shitim
Numbers25:2 ak kiguur `tiipchooto piik koba ole kigoochine kanamonikwak tiseiywek. Ki amis piik ak kogutung'ji kanamonik.
Numbers25:3 Ara ki namgei Israel ak Baal ne po Peor. Ak kinereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel.
Numbers25:4 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers25:5 Ak ki leenji `Musa kirwoogigap Israel
Numbers25:6 Eng' yooto
Numbers25:7 Ye kingo keer Phineas weeriitap Eleazar
Numbers25:8 ak koosup Yahudyondonooto agoi emait. Kitoore ng'otit icheek tuwai kosore moetap chiichooto po Israel ak kwonyooto agine. Ki siis anyun koroito eng' piigap Israel.
Numbers25:9 Eng' yooto che ki pek eng' koroyooto
Numbers25:10 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers25:11 “Kagoisto Phineas weeriitap Eleazar weeriitap Aron tisiindet
Numbers25:12 Amu niito
Numbers25:13 Kayai kayomiset ne po tiseinateet ne po koigeny eng' ineendet ak eng' iyotennyi ne piitu let. Amu ki tinyei pekyinet agobo Kamuktaindet ak kagoyachi kagaigaet piigap Israel.”
Numbers25:14 Ki kiguure chiichooto po Israel ki kibar kobooto kwony ne po Midianik
Numbers25:15 Ak kainetap kwonyooto po Midianik ki kibar
Numbers25:16 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers25:17 “Inyalil Midianik ak ibar iwong'u icheek
Numbers25:18 amu iimok eng' kaberberisyennywa
Numbers26:1 Kingo pata koroyooto
Numbers26:2 “Oit piigap Israel ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak
Numbers26:3 Ki mwachi `Musa ak Eleazar icheek eng' warengetap Moab ole neegitee Jordan ole po Jeriko
Numbers26:4 “Oiit piik kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai
Numbers26:5 Reuben
Numbers26:6 Hesron
Numbers26:7 Che ki kiit eng' ortinwegap piigap Reuben ko ki ek tugul eliphuusyek artam ak somok ak pogol tisap ak sosom.
Numbers26:8 Weeriitap Palu ko ki Eliap.
Numbers26:9 Weeriigap Eliap chu: Nemuel
Numbers26:10 Ki yaat `ng'wony kutinnyi ak kolugui icheek kobooto Kora
Numbers26:11 Nganda ki ma pek weeriigap Kora.
Numbers26:12 Weeriigap Simion chu ko uu ortinwekwak: Nemuel
Numbers26:13 che po Zerah
Numbers26:14 Chuuto ortinwegap piigap Simion
Numbers26:15 Weeriigap Gad ko uu ortinwekwak ko chu: che po Sepon
Numbers26:16 che po Osni
Numbers26:17 che po Arod
Numbers26:18 Chuuto ortinwegap weeriigap Gad; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek artam ak pogol muut.
Numbers26:19 Weeriigap Judah chu: Er ak Onan
Numbers26:20 Weeriigap Judah ko uu ortinwekwak ko ki: che po Shelah
Numbers26:21 Weeriigap Peres ko ki: Hesron
Numbers26:22 Chuuto ortinwegap Judah; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap ak lo ak pogol muut.
Numbers26:23 Weeriigap Issakar ko uu ortinwekwak chu: Tola
Numbers26:24 che po Jasub
Numbers26:25 Chuuto ortinwegap Issakar
Numbers26:26 Weeriigap Zebulun chu ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Sered
Numbers26:27 Chuuto ortinwegap Sebulunik; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak pogol muut.
Numbers26:28 Weeriigap Joseph chu ko uu ortinwekwak: Manasseh ak Ephraim.
Numbers26:29 Weeriigap Manasseh chu: che po Makir
Numbers26:30 Weeriigap Gilead chu: Ieser
Numbers26:31 Asriel
Numbers26:32 ak Shemida
Numbers26:33 Ak ki ma kotinyei weeriik Zelophehad weeriitap Hepher
Numbers26:34 Chuuto ortinwegap Manasseh; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek konom ak aeng' ak pogol tisap.
Numbers26:35 Weeriigap Ephraim ko uu ortinwekwak chu: che po Sutela
Numbers26:36 Ak chu weeriigap Sutela: che po Eran
Numbers26:37 Chuuto ortinwegap weeriigap Ephraim; ki ek icheek eliphuusyek sosom ak aeng' ak pogol muut. Chuuto weeriigap Joseph ko uu ortinwekwak.
Numbers26:38 Weeriigap Benjamin chu ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Bela
Numbers26:39 che po Sepupam
Numbers26:40 Ard ak Naaman ko ki weeriigap Bela: che po Ard
Numbers26:41 Chooto ko weeriigap Benjamin ko uu ortinwekwak; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek artam ak muut ak pogol lo.
Numbers26:42 Weeriigap Dan chu ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Suham
Numbers26:43 Ki ek tugul che po Suhamik eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak ang'wan ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers26:44 Weeriigap Asher chu ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Imnah
Numbers26:45 Che po weeriigap Beriah: che po Heber
Numbers26:46 Ak kainetap cheptap Asher ko ki Zerah.
Numbers26:47 Chooto ortinwegap Asher che ki kiit; ki ek icheek eliphuusyek konom ak somok ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers26:48 Weeriigap Naphtali ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Jaseel
Numbers26:49 che po Jeser
Numbers26:50 Chooto ko ortinwegap Naphtali ko uu tilyonutikwak che ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek artam ak muut ak pogol ang'wan.
Numbers26:51 Ki ek eliphuusyek pogol lo ak agenge ak pogol tisap ak sosom chooto che ki kiit eng' piigap Israel.
Numbers26:52 Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers26:53 “Kipchechin emet chuuto koek poroteet ko uu koitetap kainaik.
Numbers26:54 Che kasiirto koiitennywa itesyini poroteet
Numbers26:55 Ago kipcheei emet eng' seretap parbareek. Nyabani age tugul ko uu kainaigap ortinwegap kwanisyekwak.
Numbers26:56 Kipchechin porotennywa ko uu ole teptoi seretap parbareek eng' che chaang' ak eng' che ng'ering'.”
Numbers26:57 Chu che ki kiit eng' Lawiik ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Gerson
Numbers26:58 Chuuto ortinwegap Lawiik: kootap Libnitik
Numbers26:59 Ak kainetap osotyotap Amram ko ki Jokebed
Numbers26:60 Aron ko ki kwandap Nadap
Numbers26:61 Ago ki pek Nadap ak Abihu ye ki igoitoi kogoochinet eng' maat ne teer eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Numbers26:62 Muren age tugul kobooch ne po arawet agenge ak kwo tai che ki kiit
Numbers26:63 Chuuto che ki iit Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet ye ki iti piigap Israel eng' warengetap Moab eng' ole neegitee Jordan eng' Jeriko.
Numbers26:64 Ago eng' chuuto
Numbers26:65 Amu ki kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo icheek kole
Numbers27:1 Ki pa koriikta anyun tiibiigap Zelophehad weeriitap Hepher
Numbers27:2 Ki pa icheek kotononso eng' taitap Musa
Numbers27:3 “Kimechi surkwen kwandanyo. Ki ma ko pooto ineendet tuiyetap Kora ne ki iyumgei icheegei si kotil let Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ago kime ineegei amu tengektanyi
Numbers27:4 Amu nee si keisto kainetap kwandanyo eng' ooreennyi amu ki ma kotinyei weeriit? Ogoonech poroteet kobooto tupchosyegap kwandanyo.”
Numbers27:5 Ara ki ip anyun Musa ng'aleekwak koba taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Numbers27:6 Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers27:7 “Kamwa iman tiibiigap Zelophehad. Igoochini iman tiipchooto poroteet kobunji kobooto tupchosyegap kwandanywa
Numbers27:8 Yeityo imwachi piigap Israel ileenji
Numbers27:9 Ak ngo ma tinyei chepto agine
Numbers27:10 Ak ngo ma tinyei che tupcho
Numbers27:11 Ago ngo ma tinyei `kwandanyi che tupcho
Numbers27:12 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers27:13 Ak ye kaigeer
Numbers27:14 Amu ki ongelelji ng'olyoondennyu okweek tuwai eng' surkwen ne po Sin
Numbers27:15 Ki mwachi `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Numbers27:16 “Ingolewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers27:17 ne imuuchi komuti koba saang'
Numbers27:18 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers27:19 yeityo inde ineendet taitap Eleazar tisiindet kobooto tuiyet komugul ak ing'at ineendet eng' tainnywa.
Numbers27:20 Ak inde ineendet kebebertap teegistang'ung'
Numbers27:21 Ingotonon ineendet eng' taitap Eleazar tisiindet
Numbers27:22 Ki yai Musa ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. Ki imut Joshua kotonon eng' taitap Eleazar tisiindet ak eng' taitap tuiyet komugul.
Numbers27:23 Yeityo kogonoor Musa eunekyik ineendet ak kong'at ineendet
Numbers28:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers28:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel ileenji: ‘Oriip si ogoono eng' peetuusyekwok che nyoljin
Numbers28:3 Ileenji icheek: Ni kagoochinet ne punei maat ne ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; aarek aeng' che libwoben che mengichik che ma siirei kenyiit agenge
Numbers28:4 Igoitoi aarwet agenge karon ak igoite age koskoleny
Numbers28:5 kobooto keruutyet agenge ne po peek che ng'ootiin
Numbers28:6 Nooto kagoochinet ne kibeelei peetuut age tugul ne ki king'at eng' tulweetap Sinai koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny
Numbers28:7 Ingoek kagoochinennyi ne keei litait agenge eng' aarwet ne mengit age tugul. Oroong'jini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ole-tiliil kagoochinonooto kieei che ng'woneen.
Numbers28:8 Igoite aarwet ne mengit age koskoleny
Numbers28:9 “Igoite aarek aeng'
Numbers28:10 Niito kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' sabato age tugul
Numbers28:11 “Eng' taunetap arawet age tugul
Numbers28:12 Kobooto keruutik somok che po peek che ng'ootiin
Numbers28:13 eng' aarwetap keechiir age tugul
Numbers28:14 Ingoek kagoochinoikwak che keei litaisyek aeng' che po divaik eng' kiruk age tugul
Numbers28:15 Kigoitoi nooto ketesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei kotugul kobooto kagoochinet ne kieei
Numbers28:16 “Piitu paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' arawet ne po tai
Numbers28:17 Ak egu igoorto eng' peetuut ne po taman ak muut ne po arawaniito. Ki amei magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' peetuusyek tisap.
Numbers28:18 Piitu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuut ne po tai; amoyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot.
Numbers28:19 Ago ogoite kagoochinet ne punei maat
Numbers28:20 Kagoochinennywa ne po peek che ng'ootiin
Numbers28:21 ak igoitoi keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto tisap.
Numbers28:22 Ak koek kwesta agenge kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers28:23 Ogoitoi chuuto otesyini kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po karon
Numbers28:24 Ogoitoi ko uu nooto eng' peetuut age tugul
Numbers28:25 Ingoek kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuutap tisap; amoyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot.
Numbers28:26 “Kogeny ye ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers28:27 Ogoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kiruugik aeng' che neran
Numbers28:28 Kagoochinennywa ne po peek che ng'ootiin che kiburuktoi mwaita
Numbers28:29 ak keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto tisap
Numbers28:30 kobooto kwesta agenge
Numbers28:31 Ogoitoi che kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul
Numbers29:1 “Eng' arawet ne po tisap
Numbers29:2 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny: kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers29:3 Ogoochi kobooto kagoochinennywa ne po peek che ng'ootiin che kiburuktoi mwaita
Numbers29:4 ak keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto tisap
Numbers29:5 ak kwesta agenge kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers29:6 Ogoitoi che kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po arawet ne kaleel ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei kotugul
Numbers29:7 “Ak onyooru kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawetap tisap
Numbers29:8 Ago ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny: kirgit agenge ne neran
Numbers29:9 Kagoochinennywa ne igoitoi koek kagoochinet ne po peek che ng'ootiin che kiburuktoi mwaita
Numbers29:10 ak keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto tisap.
Numbers29:11 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge ne po kagoochinetap tengekto. Kitesyin chooto kagoochinetap tengekto ne po kaigaigaet ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei.
Numbers29:12 “Ak onyooru kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuutap taman ak muut eng' arawetap tisap
Numbers29:13 Ogoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne punei maat
Numbers29:14 Kobooto kagoochinennywa eng' kirgit age tugul eng' kirugichooto taman ak somok ogoitoi kagoochinet ne po peek che ng'ootiin che kiburuktoi mwaita keruutik somok
Numbers29:15 ak keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto taman ak ang'wan.
Numbers29:16 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers29:17 “Eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ogoite kiruugik taman ak aeng' che neran
Numbers29:18 Kobooto kirugichooto
Numbers29:19 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers29:20 “Eng' peetuut ne po somok ogoite kiruugik taman ak agenge
Numbers29:21 Kobooto kirugichooto
Numbers29:22 Ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers29:23 “Eng' peetuut ne po ang'wan ogoite kiruugik taman
Numbers29:24 Ogoitoi kobooto kirugichooto
Numbers29:25 Ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers29:26 “Eng' peetuut ne po muut ogoitoi kiruugik sogool
Numbers29:27 Ogoitoi kobooto kirugichooto
Numbers29:28 Ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers29:29 “Eng' peetuut ne po lo
Numbers29:30 Ogoitoi kobooto kirugichooto
Numbers29:31 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers29:32 “Eng' peetuutap tisap
Numbers29:33 Ogoitoi kobooto kirugichooto
Numbers29:34 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers29:35 “Eng' peetuut ne po sisiit oyai tuiyetap kaming'inetapkei
Numbers29:36 Ogoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei
Numbers29:37 Kobooto kagoochinoik che po kirgit
Numbers29:38 Ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto
Numbers29:39 “Ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chuuto eng' igoorwekwok che ki king'at. Chuuto che kitesyin kaarortaosyekwok ak kagoochinoikwok che ogoitoi eng' chamyet
Numbers29:40 Ki mwachi anyun `Musa piigap Israel ko uu tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet.
Numbers30:1 Ki mwachi `Musa pounigap ortinwegap piigap Israel koleenji: “Ni kiit ne ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:
Numbers30:2 “Ye iarorchi `chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy
Numbers30:3 “Ye iarorchi kobogoryondo neta ko neran Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy ak korategei ng'atuutyet
Numbers30:4 ak kogas kwandanyi kaarortaennyi anan ratuutyennyi ne korate saboondanyi ago ma mwa kiy
Numbers30:5 Ago ngo etee kwandanyi eng' peetuut ne kagas koma tonondos kaarortaosyekyik agot agenge anan ratuutikyik che korate saboondanyi
Numbers30:6 Ngitun kobogoryondonooto kota komiitei eng' ineendet kaarortaosyekyik
Numbers30:7 “Ak kogas manong'otyondennyi
Numbers30:8 Ago ngo etee manong'otyondennyi eng' peetuut ne kagas
Numbers30:9 Ago kaarortaetap kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot anan ko ne po ineendet ne ki kibesyo ak manong'otyot
Numbers30:10 “Ngo aror ineendet komi kootap manong'otyondennyi anan korat saboondanyi eng' ratuutyetap kayasyoet
Numbers30:11 ak kogas manong'otyondennyi ago ma mwa kiy
Numbers30:12 Ago ngo wal manong'otyondennyi tuguuchooto koek puch eng' peetuut ne ki kas
Numbers30:13 Imuuchi kogimit manong'otyot anan koyai koek puch kaarortaet age tugul anan kayasyoet age tugul ne ratisyei ne inyalili saboondo.
Numbers30:14 Ago ngo siis manong'otyondennyi eng' ineendet peetuut age tugul
Numbers30:15 Ago ngo put koek puch ko kagogas ye kagobataita kasaryan
Numbers30:16 Chuuto ng'atuutik che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Numbers31:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers31:2 “Yaakyi mugetuut Midianik amu piigap Israel. Ye ibata nooto kiyumin iwe ole mi piiguk.”
Numbers31:3 Ki mwachi anyun `Musa piik koleenji
Numbers31:4 Oyookte eliphuut eng' ooreet age tugul
Numbers31:5 Ara ki kikwei murenik eliphuusyek taman ak aeng' che tinyei kariigap lugeet; eliphuut agenge agenge kobun ooreet age tugul eng' eliphusyegap Israel.
Numbers31:6 Ak ki iyookto `Musa icheek
Numbers31:7 Ki pargei ak Midianik
Numbers31:8 Ki par kobooto piik chuun alak laitorinik muut che po Midian: Ebi
Numbers31:9 Ki iluul `piigap Israel kwonyiigap Midianik
Numbers31:10 Ki peel nganasookwak tugul ole menyei ak meng'otosyekwak tugul.
Numbers31:11 Ki ip tuguuk tugul che ki kiluul eng' piik ak eng' tyong'ik
Numbers31:12 ki imut luulenik
Numbers31:13 Ki pa Musa
Numbers31:14 Ki nereekyi `Musa kandoigap lugeet
Numbers31:15 Ak kiteebe `Musa icheek koleenji
Numbers31:16 Icheeget chuuto che ki isup ng'olyootap Balaam ak ki igoochi piigap Israel koleelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'olyootap Peor
Numbers31:17 Ara anyun obar weeriit age tugul eng' lagok ak obar kwony age tugul ne ki koruiyo ak muren.
Numbers31:18 Ago oriip kosapcho kobunjook tiibiik tugul che tomo koruiyo ak muren.
Numbers31:19 Chii age tugul ne kogobar chii anan chii age tugul ne kogotwa muustap ne ko ki parei
Numbers31:20 Ak otiliil ngoryeet age tugul
Numbers31:21 Ki leenji `Eleazar tisiindet murenigap lugeet che ki pa pooryeet
Numbers31:22 Thahabu
Numbers31:23 ak kiy age tugul ne ma chootei eng' maat obeel anyun chooto eng' ma si kotiliiliitu. Ago kitiliili kora eng' peek che po katabaanet. Ak onde peek tuguuk tugul che chotoos eng' maat.
Numbers31:24 Eng' peetuutap tisap omwet ngoroikwok ak oanyinyitu. Ye ibata obwa nganaseet oriit.”
Numbers31:25 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers31:26 “Iit luulenik tugul che ki kenam
Numbers31:27 Opcheune che ki oluul kebeberwek aeng'
Numbers31:28 Yeityo inemu aisuruut ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' murenigap lugeet che ki pa pooryeet. Agenge eng' pogol muut
Numbers31:29 Onemune chooto kebebertanywa ak igoochi tisiindet Eleazar
Numbers31:30 Inemu eng' kebebertap piigap Israel
Numbers31:31 Ki yai Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.
Numbers31:32 Ak che ki ng'at eng' che ki nam murenigap lugeet
Numbers31:33 eng' tuuga ko ki eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap ak aeng'
Numbers31:34 sigiroik ko ki eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak agenge
Numbers31:35 ak kobogorisyek che ki tomo koruiyo ak muren ko ki eliphuusyek sosom ak aeng' tugul.
Numbers31:36 Koitetap kebeberta
Numbers31:37 ak aisuruutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po kechirechooto ko ki pogol lo ak tamanwogik tisap ak muut.
Numbers31:38 Ki ek che po tuuga eliphuusyek sosom ak lo
Numbers31:39 Sigiroik ko ki eliphuusyek sosom ak pogol muut ak aisuruutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chooto ko ki tamanwogik lo ak agenge.
Numbers31:40 Ki ek piik eliphuusyek taman ak lo ak aisuruutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chooto po piik ko sosom ak aeng'.
Numbers31:41 Ki igoochi `Musa Eleazar tisiindet kebeberta
Numbers31:42 Ak eng' kebebertap piigap Israel
Numbers31:43 ko ki ek keechiirek eliphuusyek pogol somok ak sosom ak tisap ak pogol muut
Numbers31:44 che po tuuga ko eliphuusyek sosom ak lo
Numbers31:45 sigiroik ko eliphuusyek sosom ak pogol muut
Numbers31:46 ak piik eliphuusyek taman ak lo.
Numbers31:47 Ki inem Musa eng' kebebertap piigap Israel
Numbers31:48 Ak ki pwa ole mi Musa `kandoik che po eliphuusyek che ki yai lugeet
Numbers31:49 ak kole
Numbers31:50 Ara kageibu koek kagoochinetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiit ne konyoor chii age tugul
Numbers31:51 Kitaach anyun Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet thahabu che po tuguuchooto eng' icheek
Numbers31:52 Thahabu tugul che po kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak che ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers31:53 (Ki ipchigei chii tugul eng' murenigap lugeet tuguuk che ki kiluul.)
Numbers31:54 Ak kitaach Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet thahabu eng' kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak che po pogolusyek
Numbers32:1 Ki tinyei akwotisyek che chaang' miising' lagogap Reuben ak lagogap Gad. Ye kingo keer emetap Jaser ak emetap Gilead kole emet ne nyoljin akwotisyek
Numbers32:2 kobwa lagogap Gad ak lagogap Reuben kong'alaalji Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet ak pounigap tuiyet
Numbers32:3 “Emotinwegap Ataroth
Numbers32:4 emonooto ki par Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap tuiyetap Israel
Numbers32:5 Ngo koginyooru chameet eng' taing'ung'
Numbers32:6 Ki leenji `Musa lagogap Gad ak lagogap Reuben
Numbers32:7 Amu nee si omu piigap Israel si ma landa koba emet ne ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?
Numbers32:8 Ki yai kwanisyekwok ko uu nooto
Numbers32:9 Amu ye kingo pa atebweetap Eskol
Numbers32:10 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto
Numbers32:11 ‘Amu ma isubwo icheek eng' kagesunatetapkei
Numbers32:12 Kobatee Kaleb weeriitap Jepune Kenisindet ak Joshua weeriitap Nun
Numbers32:13 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel
Numbers32:14 Ara oyaei nguno ko uu ye ki yai kwanisyekwok
Numbers32:15 Amu ngo maste omete ineendet
Numbers32:16 Ki pwa icheek ole mi ineendet ak kole
Numbers32:17 Ki chobootiin acheek kilaach kariik keebe kindoe piigap Israel agoi kiit icheek oldanywa. Ak komeny lagokyok nganasook che ng'ootaatiin
Numbers32:18 Ma kiweeksei kebendi kaa agoi konyoor chii tugul eng' piigap Israel porotennyi.
Numbers32:19 Amu ma kinyabani kobooto icheek eng' pitoniindo po Jordan anan oliin po tai
Numbers32:20 Ki leenji `Musa icheek
Numbers32:21 ak ngwo mureno age tugul ne kagolaach kariik kolandae Jordan eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers32:22 ak kiterteer pichooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers32:23 Ago ngot ko moyai ko uu nooto
Numbers32:24 Oteekyi nganasook lagokwok ak ong'otyi keechiirekwok piusyek
Numbers32:25 Ki mwachi `lagogap Gad ak `lagogap Reuben Musa koleenji
Numbers32:26 Tebee nganasoogap Gilead lagokyok
Numbers32:27 ago landoi otwogiguk
Numbers32:28 Ki iyomis anyun `Musa Eleazar tisiindet
Numbers32:29 Ki leenji `Musa icheek
Numbers32:30 Ago ngo ma cham olande tugul kotinyei kariik
Numbers32:31 Ki wolji lagogap Gad ak lagogap Reuben koleenji
Numbers32:32 Kilandoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Numbers32:33 Ki igoochi `Musa icheek
Numbers32:34 Ki teech kogeny lagogap Gad Dibon
Numbers32:35 Atrot-sopan
Numbers32:36 Beth-nimra ak Beth-haran
Numbers32:37 Ki teech kogeny lagogap Reuben Hesbon
Numbers32:38 Nebo ak Baal-meon (ki kiwal kainaikwak)
Numbers32:39 Ki pa lagogap Makir weeriitap Manasseh Gilead. Ki nam ak koon komaanda Amorik che ki mi olooto.
Numbers32:40 Ki igoochi `Musa Makir weeriitap Manasseh
Numbers32:41 Ki wo Jair weeriitap Manasseh konam nganasookwak
Numbers32:42 Ak ki wo Noba konam Kenat kobooto nganasookyik che mengeechen
Numbers33:1 Chu panwegap piigap Israel
Numbers33:2 Ki sir Musa agobo mandaennywa ye kingo naam panwekwak ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki uu chu panwekwak ko uu mandaennywa.
Numbers33:3 Ki pa anyun kong'eetyee Rameses eng' arawet ne po tai
Numbers33:4 kota kotubei Misiriik weeriikwak tugul che po tai
Numbers33:5 Ki pa piigap Israel eng' Rameses ak koba komuung'e Sukoth.
Numbers33:6 Ki pa eng' Sukoth ak komuung'e Etam ne mi ole pooch surkwen.
Numbers33:7 Ak ki pa eng' Etam
Numbers33:8 Ki pa eng' Pi-Hairot
Numbers33:9 Ki pa eng' Marah ak kiit Elim. Ki mi Elim kong'igap peek tamanu ak aeng' ak tiironigap sosik tamanwogik tisap; ak ki imuung'ee icheek olooto.
Numbers33:10 Ki pa eng' Elim ak komuung'e ole neegitee Araraita ne Piriir.
Numbers33:11 Ki pa eng' Araraita ne Piriir ak ki imuung'ee surkwen ne po Sin.
Numbers33:12 Ki pa eng' surkwen ne po Sin ak komuung'e Dobka.
Numbers33:13 Ak ki pa eng' Dobka
Numbers33:14 Ki pa eng' Alus ak komuung'e Rephidim
Numbers33:15 Ki pa eng' Rephidim ak ki imuung'ee surkwen ne po Sinai.
Numbers33:16 Ki pa eng' surkwen ne po Sinai ak ki imuuny eng' Kibrot-hataaba.
Numbers33:17 Ak ki pa eng' Kibrot-hataaba
Numbers33:18 Ki pa eng' Haserot ak komuung'e Ritma.
Numbers33:19 Ki pa kogeny eng' Ritma ak ki imuung'ee Rimon-peres.
Numbers33:20 Ak ki pa eng' Rimon-peres kot komuung'e Libna.
Numbers33:21 Kingo pa eng' Libna ko ki imuung'ee Risa.
Numbers33:22 Ki pa eng' Risa ak ki imuung'ee Kehelata.
Numbers33:23 Ki pa eng' Kehelata ak ki imuung'ee tulweetap Seper.
Numbers33:24 Ki pa eng' tulweetap Seper ak ki imuuny eng' Harada.
Numbers33:25 Ki pa eng' Harada ak ki imuuny eng' Makelot.
Numbers33:26 Ki pa eng' Makelot ak ki imuuny eng' Tahat.
Numbers33:27 Ki pa anyun eng' Tahat ak ki imuuny eng' Tera.
Numbers33:28 Ki pa eng' Tera ak ki imuuny eng' Mitka.
Numbers33:29 Ki pa kogeny eng' Mitka ak komuuny eng' Hasmona.
Numbers33:30 Ki pa eng' Hasmona ak ki imuung'ee Moserot.
Numbers33:31 Ki pa eng' Moserot ak ki imuung'ee Bene-jaakan.
Numbers33:32 Ki pa eng' Bene-jaakan ak ki imuung'ee Horagidgad.
Numbers33:33 Ki pa anyun eng' Horagidgad ak ki imuung'ee Jotbata.
Numbers33:34 Ki pa icheek eng' Jotbata ak ki imuung'ee Abrona.
Numbers33:35 Ki pa eng' Abrona ak ki imuung'ee Esion-geber.
Numbers33:36 Ki pa eng' Esion-geber ak ki imuung'ee surkwen ne po Sin (nooto Kadesh).
Numbers33:37 Ki pa eng' Kadesh ak ki imuung'ee tulweetap Hor
Numbers33:38 Ki togosta anyun Aron tisiindet tulweetap Hor
Numbers33:39 Kiga kotar Aron kenyiisyek pogol ak tiptem ak somok ye kingo meei eng' tulweetap Hor.
Numbers33:40 Ki kas anyun laitoryatap Arad kanaanindet ne ki menyei murot tai eng' emetap Kanaan
Numbers33:41 Ki pa icheek eng' tulweetap Hor ak komuung'e Salmona.
Numbers33:42 Ki pa eng' Salmona ak ki imuung'ee Bunon.
Numbers33:43 Ki pa eng' Bunon ak ki imuung'ee Obot.
Numbers33:44 Ki pa eng' Obot ak ki imuung'ee Iyeabarim
Numbers33:45 Ki pa eng' Iyim ak ki imuung'ee Dibon-gad.
Numbers33:46 Ki pa eng' Dibon-gad ak ki imuung'ee Almon-diblataim.
Numbers33:47 Ki pa eng' Almon-diblataim ak ki imuung'ee tuloonoogap Abarim
Numbers33:48 Ki pa eng' tuloonoogap Abarim ak ki imuung'ee warengetap Moab ole neegitee Jordan eng' Jeriko.
Numbers33:49 Ak ki imuung'ee ole neegitee Jordan
Numbers33:50 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' warengetap Moab
Numbers33:51 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin: Ye olandoe Jordan obe emetap Kanaan
Numbers33:52 oon anyun piik tugul che menyei emonooto koba eng' taing'wong'. Ong'em koikwak che saaei
Numbers33:53 Yeityo onam emet kobunjook ak omeny
Numbers33:54 Opchechigei emonooto onyabani eng' seretap parbareek ko uu ortinwekwok. Ogoochini che chaang' poroteet ne oo ak ogoochini che ng'ering' poroteet ne ming'in. Oldo tugul ole kaibutyi parbaryatap chii koek nenyi nooto. Onyabani ko uu pororyosyegap kwanisyekwok.
Numbers33:55 Ago ngo moon piik che menyei emet koba eng' taing'wong'
Numbers33:56 Ak tuun ayaiywok okweek ko uu ye ki abwaati ale ayachini icheek.”
Numbers34:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers34:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel ileenji: Ye oit emetap Kanaan
Numbers34:3 Komostang'wong' ne po murot tai kong'etee surkwen ne po Sin korop tabandap Edom. Kiwoteng'wong' ne po murot tai kong'etee tabandap Araraita ne po Munyuk ne tokyingei kong'asiis.
Numbers34:4 Ak koweigei kiwoteng'wong' kotokyigei murot tai eng' ole kitogostoe kebendi Akrabbim
Numbers34:5 Yeityo koweigei kiwateet kong'etee Asmon agoi kererutap Misiri ak koboochit kiwotosyekyik Nyanjet ne po Mediterenian.
Numbers34:6 “Egu Nyanjetap Mediterenian kiwoteng'wong' ne mi cherongo.
Numbers34:7 “Kiwoteng'wong' ne po murot kaataam ko ni: kong'etee Nyanjetap Mediterenian
Numbers34:8 ak kobooch tulweetap Hor
Numbers34:9 ak itei kiwateet Sipron ak poochitu tabanwekyik Hasarenan. Niito kiwoteng'wong' ne po murot kaataam.
Numbers34:10 “Yeityo oarorote kiwoteng'wong' ne po komostap kong'asiis kobooch Hasar-enan agoi Sepam.
Numbers34:11 Chortagei kiwateet kong'etee Sepam agoi Ribla
Numbers34:12 Ingochoortagei anyun kiwateet koosup Jordan agoi koit tabanwekyik Araraita ne po Munyuk. Egu niito emeng'wong' ko uu kiwotosyekyik che yiemei tugul.”
Numbers34:13 Ki ng'at `Musa piigap Israel koleenji
Numbers34:14 Amu ki kotaach porotennywa ooreetap lagogap Reuben
Numbers34:15 Ki kotaach porotennywa ortinwechooto aeng'u ak kebeber eng' Jordan pitoni eng' Jeriko ole tokyingei kong'asiis.”
Numbers34:16 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers34:17 “Chu kainaigap piik che pcheiywok emet koek poroteng'wong': Eleazar tisiindet ak Joshua weeriitap Nun.
Numbers34:18 Ak olewen pounindet ne po ooreet age tugul
Numbers34:19 Kainaigap pichooto chu: Eng' ooreetap Judah
Numbers34:20 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Simion
Numbers34:21 Eng' ooreetap Benjamin
Numbers34:22 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Dan
Numbers34:23 Eng' lagogap Joseph
Numbers34:24 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Ephraim
Numbers34:25 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Zebulun
Numbers34:26 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Issakar ko pounindet Paltiel weeriitap Asan.
Numbers34:27 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Asher
Numbers34:28 Ak eng' ooreetap lagogap Naphtali
Numbers34:29 Chuuto piik che ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kopchechi emetap Kanaan piigap Israel koek porotennywa.
Numbers35:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' warengetap Moab ole neegitee Jordan eng' ole po Jeriko
Numbers35:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel kogoochi Lawiik nganasook eng' porotennywa si komeny
Numbers35:3 Ingomeny icheek nganasochooto ak koek olooto ole agete tuukwak
Numbers35:4 Emet olooto agete
Numbers35:5 Okwae kogergeitu eng' komoswek tugul koek mitainik pogol sogool
Numbers35:6 Ogoochini Lawiik nganasook lo che kimwechin
Numbers35:7 Nganasook tugul che ogoochini Lawiik
Numbers35:8 Ak eng' nganasochooto ogoitoi eng' che po piigap Israel
Numbers35:9 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji
Numbers35:10 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin: Ye olandoe Jordan obe emetap Kanaan
Numbers35:11 otabaanjigei nganasook alak eng' chooto koek nganasook che omwechini si kobiit komwechi olooto age tugul ne karumis eng' lelset.
Numbers35:12 Egu nganasochooto che omwechini si ma nyoorwok ne yaaktoi mugetuut
Numbers35:13 Ak nganasochooto lo ogoitoi
Numbers35:14 Ogoitoi nganasook somok eng' Jordan pitoniin ak ogoite nganasook somok eng' emetap Kanaan
Numbers35:15 Egu nganasochooto lou ole mwechin piigap Israel
Numbers35:16 “Ago ngo kikwere karnet ak kogoon aseenet ko rumin chiichooto
Numbers35:17 Ngo ki wiiree koita ne yamei kobar chii
Numbers35:18 Anan ngo kikwere keetit ne yamei kobar chii
Numbers35:19 Parei yaaktaindetap mugetuut rumindonooto. Ngo tuiyo ak ineendet
Numbers35:20 “Ak ngo toorta amu wegeet anan ngo wiir eng' kiy ak kobar kome
Numbers35:21 anan ngo rabach eng' puunyoondit
Numbers35:22 “Ago ngo toorta eng' yooto ama eng' puunyoondit
Numbers35:23 anan kowiir eng' koita ne yamei kobar chii ama keer ineendet ak kome
Numbers35:24 korwooch anyun tuiyet agobo parindonooto ak yaaktaindetap mugetuut agobo korotiik ko uu ole teptoi kirwoogutichu.
Numbers35:25 Myee kosar tuiyet rumindonooto eng' eutap yaaktaindetap mugetuut agobo korotiik ak koweekyi icheek ineendet nganasennyi ole kiga mwechi. Ingomeny olooto agoi kome tisiindet ne oo ne ki kiile mwaita ne tiliil.
Numbers35:26 Ago ngot kosiir rumindonooto kiwotetap nganasennyi ne kiga mwechi
Numbers35:27 ak konyoorchi ineendet yaaktaindetap mugetuut agobo korotiik saang'utap nganasennyi ne kimwechin
Numbers35:28 Amu kata nyoljin kotebee nganasennyi ne kimwechin agoi kome tisiindet ne oo. Ago ye kagome tisiindet ne oo koweekyigei anyun rumiindet emennyi.
Numbers35:29 “Egu tuguuchuuto ng'atuutyetap kirwooget eng' okweek eng' ibinwekwok tugul ak eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul.
Numbers35:30 “Eng' ng'olyoo age tugul agobo ne parei chii
Numbers35:31 “Amotaach kiy ne kityage saboondap rumiindet ne irwookyinot konyoor meet; ki parei ineendet iman.
Numbers35:32 Amotaach kiy ne kityage chii ne kamwechi nganasennyi ne kimwechin
Numbers35:33 Amomurwon anyun emet ne omi. Amu imurwoni emet korotiik. Ak ma mi kiy ne ki anyinyee emet amu korotiik che kitumjigei kobatee korotiigap ineendet ne kitumda korotichooto.
Numbers35:34 Ameng'wanit anyun emet ne omenye
Numbers36:1 Ki pwa anyun che eecheen eng' kooriigap kwanisyek che po ooreetap lagogap Gilead
Numbers36:2 Ki le icheek: “Ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandennyu kole
Numbers36:3 Ara anyun ngot kotun icheek weeriigap pororyosyek alak che po piigap Israel
Numbers36:4 Ye iit kenyiitap Jublii ne po piigap Israel
Numbers36:5 Ara ki ng'at `Musa piigap Israel ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Numbers36:6 Kang'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoni agobo tiibiigap Zelophehad
Numbers36:7 si ma kiuto poroteet age tugul ne po piigap Israel
Numbers36:8 Chepto age tugul ne punjin poroteet eng' pororyet age tugul ne po piigap Israel
Numbers36:9 Ma kimuuchi kiuto poroteet age tugul kong'etee pororyet age agoi age
Numbers36:10 Ki yai tiibiigap Zelophehad ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.
Numbers36:11 Tipchooto po Zelophehad; Mahlah
Numbers36:12 Ko uu ye ki kitunji icheek ortinwegap weeriigap Manasseh weeriitap Joseph
Numbers36:13 Chuuto anyun ng'atuutik ak kirwoogutik che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Israel eng' Musa eng' warengetap Moab ole neegitee Jordan eng' Jeriko.
Deuteronomy1:1 Chu ng'aleek che ki mwachi `Musa Yahudik tugul komi surkwen eng' Jordan pitoniin. Yooto ko Arabah ne tokyingei Suph
Deuteronomy1:2 Imuuch kotar peetuusyek taman ak agenge panda ne kebendi kong'etee Horeb eng' ooreet ne punei tulweetap Seir agoi Kadesh-barnea.
Deuteronomy1:3 Eng' peetuutap tai ne po arawetap taman ak agenge
Deuteronomy1:4 Ki mwachin `Musa Yahudik ng'atuutichuuto ye kingo kagoterteer Sihon laitoryatap Amorik
Deuteronomy1:5 Eng' Jordan pitoniin eng' emetap Moab
Deuteronomy1:6 Ki mwaiwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy1:7 Otau pandang'wong'
Deuteronomy1:8 Ogeero
Deuteronomy1:9 Ki leenji `Musa piik
Deuteronomy1:10 Ki kotesaak `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy1:11 Ingotesaak `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy1:12 Amuktoi ano aneege agesen kaimutikwok
Deuteronomy1:13 Olewenjigei piik che ng'oomen che tinyei utaatyet ne nin ak ko che taagunotiin kobun ortinwekwok si agoochi kondoiywok.
Deuteronomy1:14 Ki owolwo oleenjo
Deuteronomy1:15 Ki anam anyun kandoigap ortinwekwok
Deuteronomy1:16 “Ki ang'at kirwoogikwok peetuunooto aleenji
Deuteronomy1:17 Amotiytiy piik eng' kirwooget; ago ogasyi ne ming'in ak ne oo kogergeit. Amoiywei togoch ne po chii amu po kirwooget Kamuktaindet. Ng'olyoot ne katemenak oibwa si agas.’
Deuteronomy1:18 Ki ang'ataak eng' peetuunooto agobo tuguuk tugul che kanyool oyai.”
Deuteronomy1:19 “Ki kibe eng' Horeb kebune surkwen nooto oo tugul ak ko oo kamuiset. Ki kibunu ooreet ne po emetap tuloonook ne po Amorik ko uu ye king'atech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy1:20 Ki aleenjok anyun
Deuteronomy1:21 ak kagonde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emet taing'ung'. Ara togoste anyun nam kobunjiin ko uu ye kimwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy1:22 “Ak ko ki obwa tugul ole ami oleenjo
Deuteronomy1:23 Ki ibaibaa kioto komyee ak ki alewen anyun murenik taman ak aeng' eng' okweek
Deuteronomy1:24 Ki pa kotogosta tulweet ak ki it atebweetap Eskol ak ki segei `icheek olooto
Deuteronomy1:25 ak kobut logoegap emonooto koibwech. Ki ibwech ng'aleek ak icheek komwa kole
Deuteronomy1:26 “Ago ki ma ocham otogoste olooto
Deuteronomy1:27 Ki ong'unyng'ung'se eng' emaisyekwok ole
Deuteronomy1:28 Ki togostoi kebendi ano anyun? Ago kagoochi tupchosyekyok mugulelwekyok kochootyo ye ka ngo leenjech eecheen piik ak ko kooen kosiirech
Deuteronomy1:29 Ki aleenjok anyun
Deuteronomy1:30 Yaei pooryeet agobo okweek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne indoenok ko uu tugul che kiyaiywok eng' Misiri
Deuteronomy1:31 ak eng' surkwen ole ki igeer ile kigesenunenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy1:32 Ago ma oyan Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' ng'olyoondoni
Deuteronomy1:33 ineendet ne ki indoenak eng' ooreet si kocheeng'wok ole oteeche emaisyekwok si koboorwok eng' maat ooreet ne obendi kemoi ak eng' pooldet peet.
Deuteronomy1:34 “Ak ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tweguunetap ng'aleekwok ak kinereech ak koyasyo kole
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Ma keerei iman agot agenge eng' pichu po ibini ya emet ne karaaran ne ki ayosye ale agoochini kwanisyekwok
Deuteronomy1:36 kobatee Kaleb weeriitap Jepune. Agoochini ineendet kobooto lagokyik emonooto kityech. Amu ki isup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kagesunatetapkei.’
Deuteronomy1:37 Ki nereekyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu okweek kole: ‘memandoi aginye olooto
Deuteronomy1:38 ak ko itei Joshua weeriitap Nun ineendet ne tononi eng' taing'ung'. Ara anyun igimit ineendet amu igoochin `ineendet Israel konyaban emonooto.
Deuteronomy1:39 Ak itei olooto lagokwok che mengech che ki omwa ole egu luulenik ak lagokwok che nguno koma ingen ne myee anan ne ya. Eng' iman ko chooto che itei olooto ak agoochini icheek emet kobunji.
Deuteronomy1:40 Ago oweege okweek ak onam pandang'wong' agoi omande surkwen eng' ooreet ne wendi Nyanjet ne Piriir.’
Deuteronomy1:41 “Ki owolwo anyun oleenjo
Deuteronomy1:42 Ago ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ileenji
Deuteronomy1:43 Ki ang'alaalwok anyun ko uu nooto
Deuteronomy1:44 Kimong'jok Amorik che ki menyei tulwoonooto
Deuteronomy1:45 Ki oweege oriirye eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy1:46 Ki otebee anyun Kadesh peetuusyek che chaang' che tee peetuusyek che ki otar eng' yooto.
Deuteronomy2:1 “Ki kiweege anyun kenam pandanyo keebe surkwen eng' ooreet ne wendi Araraita ne Piriir
Deuteronomy2:2 Eng' let komwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘kogoyam peetuusyek che ki omuut tulwooni. Ara anyun oweege oba murot kaataam.’
Deuteronomy2:4 Ng'at piik ileenji
Deuteronomy2:5 ko oriipkei miising' anyun si momoiye kiy ak icheeget
Deuteronomy2:6 Oale icheeget amitwogik eng' fedha si oam
Deuteronomy2:7 “Amu ki koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' poisyet tugul ne po euneguk. Ki konai pandang'ung' eng' ong'atani oo. Ki imi kobooten Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' kenyisyechu artam ak ma rarun kiy.
Deuteronomy2:8 “Ki kirop anyun kiwotetap tupchosyekyok lagogap Esau che menyei Seir kebun ooreetap Arabah ne wegegei Elath ak Esiongeber ak ki kiweege kebun ooreetap surkwen ne po Moab.
Deuteronomy2:9 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy2:10 (Ki menyei Emik olooto keny
Deuteronomy2:11 Ki iti icheeget keele Repaik
Deuteronomy2:12 Ak ki menyei Horik ak icheek keny Seir
Deuteronomy2:13 “Kileenjech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy2:14 Kobooch ngap keng'eetye eng' Kadesh-barnea
Deuteronomy2:15 Ki kirindoi icheek eutap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobar icheek eng' nganaseet kot kogeskei tugul.
Deuteronomy2:16 “Kingo kagobek piik tugul che po lugeet kowong'kei
Deuteronomy2:17 koleenjo `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Isiirtoe rani Ar kiwotetap Moab
Deuteronomy2:19 ak ye iriikte ole neegitee lagogap Amonik
Deuteronomy2:20 (Ki iti keele po emonooto agine Repaik. Ki menyei Repaik keny olooto. Kuuree Amonik pichooto Samsumik.
Deuteronomy2:21 Piik che eecheen ak ko chaang' ak ko kooen
Deuteronomy2:22 ko uu ye ki yachi lagogap Esau
Deuteronomy2:23 Ki pwa Kaptorik che ki punu Kaptor kobwa kobar Abik che ki menyei kestonik agoi Gaza ak komeny olooto kogeer icheek.)
Deuteronomy2:24 “Yeityo kong'atech `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun koleenjech

Deuteronomy3:1 `Kingeweege anyun `ketogoste ooreet ne wendi Bashan
Deuteronomy3:2 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy3:3 Ki indewech eunekyok anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy3:4 Ki kiluul nganasookyik tugul eng' peetuusyechooto ak ki ma piit nganaseet agot agenge ne ma kiluul. Eng' tugul ko nganasook tamanwogik lo eng' emet komugul ne po Argob nooto ki laitorani Og ne po Bashan.
Deuteronomy3:5 Kiga king'ote nganasochuuto tugul irimosyek che kooen ak ki tinyei kurgotik
Deuteronomy3:6 Ki king'em anyun kiwong'u
Deuteronomy3:7 Ago ki kiluul kobunjech tuuga tugul ak tuguuk che ki mi nganasook.
Deuteronomy3:8 Ki kirep emet eng' peetuusyechooto eng' eunegap laitorinik aeng' che po Amorik che ki mi Jordan pitoniin. Yuto ko kobooch atebweetap Arnon agoi tulweetap Hermon
Deuteronomy3:9 ne kuure Sidonik Hermon Sirion ak kuure Amorik tulwoonooto Senir.
Deuteronomy3:10 Kiga kiluul nganasook tugul che po warenget
Deuteronomy3:11 (Amu ki ng'et Og ineegei

Deuteronomy3:13 Ki agoochi kebeberta age ne po emetap Gilead ak Bashan komugul ne ki laitorani Og ak emet tugul ne po Argob agot Bashan komugul ooreetap Manasseh. (Kiguure nooto emetap Repaik.
Deuteronomy3:14 Kiluul Jair weeriitap Manasseh emet komugul ne po Argob
Deuteronomy3:15 Ki agoochi Makir emetap Gilead.

Deuteronomy3:17 Ki agoochi kobooto Arabah ak Jordan kobooto kiwotennyi kobooch Kineret agoi araraita ne miitei Arabah ak Araraitap Munyuk ne miitei kelutap Piska ole tokyingei kong'asiis.

Deuteronomy4:1 Ki testai Musa kong'alaal ak ki le ara anyun
Deuteronomy4:2 Amotesyi kiy ng'olyoot ne ang'atook anan ochuchuch alak
Deuteronomy4:3 Ki kogeer konyekwok tuguuk che ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Baal-peor. Amu ki kobar Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' kwenung'ung' piik tugul che ki isup Baal-peor.
Deuteronomy4:4 Ago okweek che ki onamgei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' kosabei ra age tugul eng' okweek.
Deuteronomy4:5 Ki aneetak ng'atuutik ak kirwoogutik ko uu ye king'ata Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu
Deuteronomy4:6 Oriip anyun ak oyai
Deuteronomy4:7 Amu ngoro pororyet ne oo ne tinyei kamuktain ne neegitee icheek ko uu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy4:8 Ak tos ngoro pororyet ne oo ne tinyei etanutik ak kirwoogutik che po imanda ko uu ng'atuutichu tugul che kande taing'wong' peetuuni?
Deuteronomy4:9 Riipkei anyun
Deuteronomy4:10 Eng' peetuut ne ki itonone taitap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' Horeb
Deuteronomy4:11 Ki obwa oriigu otononse eng' tulweet keel ye kingo lalei maat eng' tulweet agoi kipsengwet kween
Deuteronomy4:12 Ak ki ng'alaalwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komi kwenutap maat: ki ogas tweguunetap ng'aleek ak kutit kityo
Deuteronomy4:13 Kimwaiwok anyun kayomisennyi ne king'ataak oyai
Deuteronomy4:14 Ak king'ata Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto aneetaak ng'atuutik ak kirwoogutik
Deuteronomy4:15 Oriipkei anyun miising'; amu ki ma ogeer itoon age tugul eng' peetuut ki ng'alaalwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Horeb eng' maat.
Deuteronomy4:16 Ama mong'emgei oyachigei kanamwet eng' kergeindap kiy age tugul: Eng' itoondap muren anan kwony
Deuteronomy4:17 anan itoondap tyony age tugul ne mi ng'wony
Deuteronomy4:18 Anan itoondap kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng'wony
Deuteronomy4:19 Riipkei anyun si ma ye inyal parak
Deuteronomy4:20 Ago konamak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy4:21 Kobooto nooto
Deuteronomy4:22 Ago amechini anee emoni
Deuteronomy4:23 Oriipkei anyun si moutye kayomisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy4:24 Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko maat ne iwong'u ak kotinyei ng'et kong'.
Deuteronomy4:25 Ye tuun kaomeng'iisye eng' emet ak osich lagok ak mochogoronik
Deuteronomy4:26 ko kaaguur kipsengwet ak ng'wony kobaoryanjin peetuuni
Deuteronomy4:27 Iiyestaak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor oyomu pororyosyek ak ong'etu che ng'ering' eng' pororyosyek ole imutok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Deuteronomy4:28 Ak oot kanamonik che poisyetap eunegap piik
Deuteronomy4:29 Ago ngo cheeng' eng' olooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy4:30 Ak ye imiitei nyalilda
Deuteronomy4:31 Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po rireenet ma metoin
Deuteronomy4:32 Teep anyun nguno agobo peetuusyek che ki kosiirto che kisip kondounenen kobooch ngap kotoi Kamuktaindet koyai chii eng' ng'wony
Deuteronomy4:33 Tos ki kogasei piik ole kigoi kutitap Kamuktaindet kong'alaali eng' kwenutap maat ko uu ye ki igas ak kosapcho?
Deuteronomy4:34 Anan kityem Kamuktaindet au komutyigei pororyet eng' pororyet age
Deuteronomy4:35 Ki kiboorun inyee si kobiit inai ile Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy4:36 Ki koonin igas kutinnyi ne mang'une kipsengwet si kobiit kogerin kong' ak ki koonin igeer maannyi ne oo eng' ng'wony. Ki igas ng'aleekyik komang'une kwenutap maat.
Deuteronomy4:37 Amu ki chamei kwanisyeguk
Deuteronomy4:38 Ki oon pororyosyek eng' taing'ung' che eecheen ak ko kiimeen kosiirin si komutun imong'u olito
Deuteronomy4:39 Nai anyun rani ak igonor eng' muguleldang'ung' ile
Deuteronomy4:40 Riip anyun kaneetisyosyekyik ak ng'atuutikyik che `kang'atiin rani si komyeeit eng' inyee
Deuteronomy4:41 Ki itabaan anyun Musa nganasook somok eng' Jordan pitoniin ole po kong'asiis
Deuteronomy4:42 si komwechi olooto rumiindet
Deuteronomy4:43 Nganasochooto ko Beser eng' surkwen eng' emetap warenget kobunji piigap Reuben
Deuteronomy4:44 Ni ng'atuutyet ne ki inde Musa taitap piigap Israel.
Deuteronomy4:45 Chuuto kora paornatosyek
Deuteronomy4:46 komiitei Jordan pitoniin eng' atebweet ne tokyingei Beth-peor
Deuteronomy4:47 Ki nam emennyi kobunji ak emetap Og laitoryatap Bashan. Laitorinichooto aeng' che po Amorik che ki menyei Jordan pitoniin eng' komostap kong'asiis;
Deuteronomy4:48 kobooch Aroer
Deuteronomy4:49 Kobooto Arabah tugul ne mi Jordan pitoniin eng' komostap kong'asiis agoi nyanjet ne mi Arabah ne miitei Piska keel.
