Deuteronomy9:22 “Ki otach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny
Deuteronomy9:23 Ye kingo yootok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Kadesh-barnea koleenjok
Deuteronomy9:24 Ki ongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch peetuut ne ki anaak.
Deuteronomy9:25 “Ki abutyi ng'wony eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyechooto artam ak kemousyechooto artam amu ki kale Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iwong'wok.
Deuteronomy9:26 Ki asaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor aleenji
Deuteronomy9:27 Amat igeer uuindap met ne po pichu anan yaityennywa
Deuteronomy9:28 Ngot ibar iwong'u
Deuteronomy9:29 Icheeget ko piiguk ak ko poroteng'ung' che ki imoong'u eng' kimnateng'ung' ne oo
Deuteronomy10:1 “Ki leenjo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto
Deuteronomy10:2 Asirchini koichooto ng'aleek cho ki mi koik che ki po tai cho ki itue
Deuteronomy10:3 “Ki ayai anyun moinget eng' keetiigap chebitoik ak awai koik aeng' che lebeleen che uu cho ki po tai yeityo atogoste tulweet aibe koichooto aeng' eng' eunnyu.
Deuteronomy10:4 Ki sir anyun kosirchi koichooto lebeleen ko uu eng' tai
Deuteronomy10:5 Ki aweege anyun achorugei eng' tulweet ak ande koichooto moinget ne kiga ayai
Deuteronomy10:6 Ki pa piigap Israel eng' Berot Bene-jaakan agoi koit Mosera. Kime Aron ak ki kitupchi olooto. Ki yai Eleazar weeriinnyi tisiisyet kogeer ineendet.
Deuteronomy10:7 Ki testai koba eng' olooto agoi Gudgoda
Deuteronomy10:8 Eng' peetuusyechooto
Deuteronomy10:9 Ko uu nooto
Deuteronomy10:10 Ki atebi eng' tulweet peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam ko uu eng' tai
Deuteronomy10:11 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy10:12 “Ara anyun Israel
Deuteronomy10:13 ak iriip ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kaneetisyosyekyik
Deuteronomy10:14 Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kipsengwet ak kipsengwet ne po kipsengwet
Deuteronomy10:15 Ago ki paibait Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwanisyeguk ki cham icheek ak kolewen iyotennywa ne piitu let
Deuteronomy10:16 Omuratan mugulelwekwok anyun
Deuteronomy10:17 Amu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko Kamuktaindet ne siirei kamuktaik ak ko Kiptaiyatap kiptainik
Deuteronomy10:18 Ineendet ne yachin imanda ne ma tinyei sigiik ak kwony age tugul ne kagosiirtoe manong'otyonnyi
Deuteronomy10:19 Ocham anyun toek amu ki oo toek eng' emetap Misiri.
Deuteronomy10:20 Iywei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak iboisyechi ineendet. Onamgei ak ineendet ak iyasye eng' kainennyi.
Deuteronomy10:21 Ineendet kalasuneng'ung' ak ko Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy10:22 Ki piik tamanwogik tisap kwanisyeguk ye kichoortogei kobendi Misiri
Deuteronomy11:1 Cham anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak iriip kotigonennyi
Deuteronomy11:2 Onai niito ra
Deuteronomy11:3 kaboorunoikyik ak poisyonikyik che ki yachi Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri ak emennyi komugul eng' kwenutap Misiri.
Deuteronomy11:4 Kiit ne ki yachi lugeetap Misiri
Deuteronomy11:5 Ma lagokwok che ki iro kiit ne kiyaiywok eng' surkwen agoi oitu yuto
Deuteronomy11:6 ak kiit ne ki yachi Datan ak Abiram weeriigap Eliap
Deuteronomy11:7 Ago ki kogeer konyekwok poisyonik tugul che eecheen che ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Deuteronomy11:8 Oriip anyun ng'atuutyet komugul ne kaang'atak rani si ogimegitu ak oit emet ne obendi oname kobunjook.
Deuteronomy11:9 Si kobiit kochang'a peetuusyekwok eng' emonooto
Deuteronomy11:10 Amu ma uu emet ne obendi oname kobunjook emetap Misiri ne ki obunu ole ki igoole kesweguk ak ki ibisisye keeldong'ung' ko uu kabungui.
Deuteronomy11:11 Ago emet ne olang'jini omenye
Deuteronomy11:12 Riibei emonooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ko keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emonooto kobooch taunetap kenyiit agoi kogeskei kenyiit.
Deuteronomy11:13 Ngot ogas iit eng' kagiiletapkei ng'atuutikyuk che kang'atak rani ak ngo cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' oboisyechi ineendet eng' mugulelwekwok tugul ak eng' saboonwekwok tugul
Deuteronomy11:14 agoonok anyun ropta ne po emeng'wong' eng' peetuusyekyik
Deuteronomy11:15 Agoonu susweek che po tuguuk eng' emeng'ung'
Deuteronomy11:16 Oriipkei anyun si ma kiberber mugulelwekwok
Deuteronomy11:17 Ngo yai ko uu nooto
Deuteronomy11:18 Ogonoree anyun ng'aleechuchuk mugulelwekwok ak saboonwekwok ak oratyi eunekwok koek kaboorunet
Deuteronomy11:19 Oneet lagokwok chooto ye ong'alaaldosi
Deuteronomy11:20 Sirchi tugatugigap koong'ung'
Deuteronomy11:21 si ko uu ye ta komi kipsengwet ak ng'wony
Deuteronomy11:22 “Amu ngo riip eng' kagiiletapkei ng'atuutyoni komugul kaang'atak rani
Deuteronomy11:23 koon anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyechu tugul eng' taing'wong' ak oluul pororyosyek che eecheen che kiimeen kosiirok.
Deuteronomy11:24 Punjinok oldo tugul ole katyech keelyekwok. Egu kiwoteng'wong' kobooch surkwen ak Lebanon ak kobooch aineetap Yufrets agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian nooto tokyingei ole roroktoe asiista.
Deuteronomy11:25 Ma piitu chii ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taing'wong'. Igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' koiyweak ak kogonyitok emet komugul ne otyeche ko uu ye ki mwaiwok.
Deuteronomy11:26 “Kande taing'wong' rani kaberuret ak chubisyet:
Deuteronomy11:27 egu kaberuret ngo kas ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' che kaang'atak rani.
Deuteronomy11:28 Ago egu chubisyet ngo mogas ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy11:29 Ak ye tuun kagoitin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emet ne iname kobunjiin
Deuteronomy11:30 Tos ma mi chooto Jordan pitoniin
Deuteronomy11:31 Amu olandae Jordan obendi oname emet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy11:32 Oriip anyun ak oyai kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik tugul che kande taing'wong' rani.
Deuteronomy12:1 “Chu kirwoogutik ak atebosyek che tuun oriibe oyae eng' emet ne ki koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy12:2 Ong'em anyun ak owong'u oldinwek tugul ole kioote kanamonikwak pororyosyek che oluule. Ong'em oldinwek chooto tugul che mi tuloonook che kooen
Deuteronomy12:3 Obut kapkorosusyekwak ak otonaton tolochikwak ak obeel lumeiwegap Aserik. Oluul kanamonikwak che ki kiwai
Deuteronomy12:4 “Amoyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko uu ye yachin icheek kamuktaikwak.
Deuteronomy12:5 Ocheeng' anyun ole menyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' ole leweni ineendet eng' ortinwekwok tugul kole konde kainennyi. Yooto ye nyolu obe
Deuteronomy12:6 oibe kagoochinoikwok che kibeelei
Deuteronomy12:7 Oamisye eng' olooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy12:8 “Amat oyai tuguuk ko uu ye kiyae rani ko uu ye keerei chii age tugul kochamei
Deuteronomy12:9 amu tomo oit kamuung'et ak poroteet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.
Deuteronomy12:10 Ago ye kaolande eng' Jordan obe omeny emet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' onyaban ak kogoonok kamuung'et eng' puunikwok tugul che mi komoswek tugul
Deuteronomy12:11 Egu anyun ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' konde kainennyi kotebee
Deuteronomy12:12 Oboiboitu eng' olooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy12:13 Riipkei si megoite kagoochinoiguk che kibeelei eng' oldo tugul ole igeere
Deuteronomy12:14 ago eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' age ne po ortinweguk
Deuteronomy12:15 “Ago imuuchi ieny ak iam panyeek eng' ole imenye ko uu ye machei muguleldang'ung'
Deuteronomy12:16 Ago amat oam korotiik
Deuteronomy12:17 Amat oam eng' kurgotikwok kebebertap peeguk
Deuteronomy12:18 Ago iame tuguuchooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' inyee
Deuteronomy12:19 Riipkei amebagaakte Lawindet ko tee isabe eng' emeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy12:20 “Ye katesun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kiwoteet ko uu ye ki iarorun
Deuteronomy12:21 Ngot ko loo eng' inyee ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' konde kainennyi
Deuteronomy12:22 Ko uu ye ki amei kenyeleet ak teweretyot iam anyun ko uu nooto. Amei che ng'woneen ak che ma ng'woneen.
Deuteronomy12:23 Kobatee amat iam korotiik. Amu saboondo korotiik ara anyun meam saboondo kobooto panyeek.
Deuteronomy12:24 Amat iam
Deuteronomy12:25 Amat iam si komyeeit eng' inyee ak eng' lagoguk che piitu let ye iyae nooto myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Deuteronomy12:26 Koek kityo iibe tuguuguk che tiliileen che itinye
Deuteronomy12:27 ak igoite kagoochinoiguk che kibeelei
Deuteronomy12:28 Riip ak iepchi iit ng'aleechu tugul che kang'atiin si komyeeit eng' inyee ak eng' lagoguk che piitu let agoi koigeny
Deuteronomy12:29 “Ye tuun ing'eto eng' taing'ung' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' pororyosyek che iwendi inam si kobunjiin chooto
Deuteronomy12:30 iriipkei anyun si ma riichin ak isup icheek
Deuteronomy12:31 Ameyachi ko uu nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Amu kiy age tugul ne wegot eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne wechei ineendet
Deuteronomy12:32 “Oriip kiy age tugul ne ang'atook oyai. Amat otes anan ichuchuch.
Deuteronomy13:1 “Ngo piit maotyondo anan karwotitoindo ak koboorun tartet anan kaboorunet
Deuteronomy13:2 koyaak tartanooto anan kaboorunonooto ne kimwaun kole
Deuteronomy13:3 ko meepchi iit ng'aleegap maotyondonooto anan karwotitoindonooto. Amu tyemok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' si konai ngo chame Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' mugulelwekwok ak eng' saboonwekwok.
Deuteronomy13:4 Obendate osup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy13:5 Kibarei maotyondonooto anan karwotitoindonooto amu kamwa kiit ne ibeeti piik kobagaakta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy13:6 “Ngo kaigain eng' ung'oot ng'eetap kamenng'ung' anan weeriing'ung' anan cheptong'ung' anan osotyondeng'ung' ne ichame anan chorweng'ung' ne ichame ko uu ye ichame saboondang'ung' koleenjin
Deuteronomy13:7 kanamonigap pororyosyek che mi tabanwekwok
Deuteronomy13:8 Ko ameyanji anan igasyi. Ama
Deuteronomy13:9 Ago par anyun ineendet iman. Ngo sip kobar ineendet eung'ung' ak ye ibata kobar piik tugul.
Deuteronomy13:10 Lach eng' koik kot kome amu ki cheeng'ei komaasin imete Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne ki imutun imang'une emetap Misiri eng' kootap otwoknateet.
Deuteronomy13:11 Ye iyai ko uu niito
Deuteronomy13:12 “Ngigas keng'alaale age eng' nganasoguk ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' imeny keleen
Deuteronomy13:13 Kamang'une kwenung'ung' piik alak che yaach
Deuteronomy13:14 igililjigei anyun ak iteep anyun ak icheeng' igin
Deuteronomy13:15 ibar iwong'u anyun piigap nganasanooto
Deuteronomy13:16 Iyumji tuguukyik tugul kwenutap ooreetap nganasanooto ak ibeel nganaseet ak tuguukyik tugul kogeskei
Deuteronomy13:17 Amenam eng' eung'ung' kiy age tugul ne kigeisto
Deuteronomy13:18 Ye iepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak iriip ng'atuutikyik tugul che kang'atiin rani
Deuteronomy14:1 “Oo lagogap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong': amowat poorwekwok anan amotuumet agobo chii ne kame.
Deuteronomy14:2 Amu ii pororyet ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ki kolewenin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iegu pororyennyi ne itabaanat kosiir pororyosyek tugul che mi ng'wony.
Deuteronomy14:3 “Amat iam kiy age tugul ne kiwechei.
Deuteronomy14:4 Chu tyong'ik che oame: teta
Deuteronomy14:5 ak che uu teweretyot
Deuteronomy14:6 Ome tyony age tugul ne pcheotin siyok
Deuteronomy14:7 Ago amat oam chu eng' che itori paroi anan che petotin siyok: tambeesyet
Deuteronomy14:8 Moam tooreet amu petotin siyok ago ma itari paroi; ng'waan nooto eng' okweek: Amat oam panyeekwak
Deuteronomy14:9 “Chu che oame eng' che mi peek: oam age tugul ne tinyei kebebaik ak peerik.
Deuteronomy14:10 Ago matoam age tugul ne ma tinyei kebebaik ak peerik; ng'waan nooto eng' okweek.
Deuteronomy14:11 “Omuuchi oam toriitik alak tugul che myachen.
Deuteronomy14:12 Ago amat oam chu: kipsiichit
Deuteronomy14:13 chepkupkupchyet ak chesirereet
Deuteronomy14:14 Amat oam chepkuginik ak tugul che kergei;
Deuteronomy14:15 tyondap songolik
Deuteronomy14:16 Ma ki amei sugurut ne ming'in anan sugurut ne oo sugurut ne tinyei kuinoik;
Deuteronomy14:17 chebo kibabaa
Deuteronomy14:18 kong'onyot
Deuteronomy14:19 Ng'woneen eng' okweek tuguuk tugul che ing'onioti che tinyei kebebaik: ma ki amei.
Deuteronomy14:20 Omuuchi oam toriitik alak tugul che myachen.
Deuteronomy14:21 Amat oam ne kame ineegei. Imuuchi igoochi kiprutoiyot ne mi kurgotiguk koam anan ialdochi toondet: amu ii pororyet ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Amat iyoe aarwetap ng'oroor cheegap kamet.
Deuteronomy14:22 “Igoite iman kebebertap taman ne po iyoteet tugul ne po kesweguk che piitu eng' mbar kenyiit age tugul.
Deuteronomy14:23 Iamisyei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy14:24 Ye tuun iberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' me muuchi iip kebeberwechooto ak kouit panda eng' inyee amu loo eng' olooto ki lewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' konde kainennyi
Deuteronomy14:25 ialde anyun iwal koek chepkondok ak irat si iip eng' eung'ung' ak iwe komosta ne leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy14:26 Ye iit olooto
Deuteronomy14:27 Amebagaakte Lawindet ne mi kurgotiguk; amu ma tinyei kebeberta anan poroteet kobooten.
Deuteronomy14:28 Ye igeskei kenyiit age tugul ne po somok inemu kebeberwegap taman che po rurateng'ung' tugul eng' kenyinooto ak igonoree oldang'ung'
Deuteronomy14:29 si konyo Lawindet amu ma tinyei kebeberta anan poroteet kobooten. Nyoonei kora toondet ak ne ma tinyei sigiik
Deuteronomy15:1 “Ye igeskei kenyiit age tugul ne po tisap ichop katyaget.
Deuteronomy15:2 Ak uu ni katyagonooto: ingobagaakta age tugul ne yaaksei tugul che ki kobesendochi chiitap kokwennyi
Deuteronomy15:3 Imuuchi iyaach punootyot
Deuteronomy15:4 “Ma piitunenen kibananook
Deuteronomy15:5 ngigiilgei igas kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak igeer iman ile keyai ng'atuutichuuto tugul kang'atiin rani.
Deuteronomy15:6 Amu iberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko uu ye ki iarorun ak ibesendochi pororyosyek che chaang'
Deuteronomy15:7 “Ngo mi kibanania kwenung'wong' ne po tupchosyeguk eng' nganaseet age ne mi age eng' kurgotiguk ne mi emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy15:8 Ago ng'aang'ji eung'ung' iman
Deuteronomy15:9 Riipkei si ma piitune muguleldang'ung' kabwaatutyet ne ya
Deuteronomy15:10 Igoochi ineendet anyun iman
Deuteronomy15:11 Amu ma petos kibananook eng' emet agoi
Deuteronomy15:12 “Ngealdaun tupcheng'ung' Hebranindet ne muren anan ne kwondo ak koboisyeun kenyiisyek lo
Deuteronomy15:13 Ak ye kaityaach
Deuteronomy15:14 igoochi eng' aiyebindo che po keechiireguk ak che po rwanyung'ung' ak che po ole kitue sabibuguk. Igoochi anyun ko uu ye ki koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy15:15 Ibwaat ile ki ii otwogin eng' emetap Misiri ak ki ityaachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung': kang'atiin anyun agobo ng'olyoondoni rani amu nooto.
Deuteronomy15:16 Ago ngo leenjin
Deuteronomy15:17 inam kateet anyun irute itinnyi itisyi kurgeet ak koek otwogindeng'ung' koigeny. Yachi ko uu nooto agine otwogindeng'ung' ne tye.
Deuteronomy15:18 Amat kouiit eng' inyee ye kemete kwo eng' oldang'ung'
Deuteronomy15:19 “Itabaanji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eiik tugul che twatei tuuga ak mengichik ak kwesik che twatei neego. Ameboisyee eitang'ung' ne kitwatei anan itil koroorigap mengit ne kitwatei.
Deuteronomy15:20 Iame chooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' inyee ak piigap koong'ung'
Deuteronomy15:21 Ngo ma libwoop
Deuteronomy15:22 Iame eng' kurgotiguk ak koamei che ng'woneen ak che ma ng'woneen kogergeit
Deuteronomy15:23 Kobatee amat iam korotiikyik; tumji chooto ng'wony ko uu peek.
Deuteronomy16:1 “Riip arawetap Abib ak iyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' paska. Amu ki imoong'une `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' Misiri kemoi eng' arawetap Abib.
Deuteronomy16:2 Igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' tiseiywot ne po paska eng' keechiirek ak eng' tuuga eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotebee kainennyi.
Deuteronomy16:3 Ameam magatiinik che ki kinde mermereek. Am eng' peetuusyek tisap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek
Deuteronomy16:4 Amat kegeerchin mermereek eng' komosweguk tugul eng' peetuusyek tisap
Deuteronomy16:5 Amat ieny che po paska eng' komosta age tugul ne po kurgotiguk ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy16:6 kobatee eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kotebee kainennyi
Deuteronomy16:7 Iiyo anyun si iam eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' yeityo iweege karon iwe ole mi emaisyeguk.
Deuteronomy16:8 Am peetuusyek lo magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek ak koek eng' peetuutap tisap tuiyetap kaming'inetapkei eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy16:9 “Iityigei wigisyek tisap. Iit wigisyechooto tisap kobooch peetuut ne ketau iges peek.
Deuteronomy16:10 Ye ibata wigisyechooto
Deuteronomy16:11 Ibaibaitu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' inyee
Deuteronomy16:12 Nyolu ibwaat ile ki ii otwogindet eng' Misiri ak riip anyun kaneetisyosyechu ak iyai.
Deuteronomy16:13 “Ye kaiyum tuguuk che punu rwanyung'ung' ak che punu ole kitue sabibuguk
Deuteronomy16:14 Paibaitu eng' igoortang'ung'
Deuteronomy16:15 Riipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' igoorto eng' peetuusyek tisap eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu iberuurun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' tuguuk tugul che inyooru
Deuteronomy16:16 “Ingobwa mureniguk tugul taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' konyil somok eng' kenyiit eng' ole leweni ineendet eng' igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek
Deuteronomy16:17 Ingogoito chii age tugul ko uu ye imuuchi
Deuteronomy16:18 “Inde kirwoogik ak pounik kurgotiguk tugul che koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko uu ortinweguk si korwookyi piik eng' kirwooget ne po imanda.
Deuteronomy16:19 Amemaas kirwooget. Ametiytiy piik anan itaach che po kagaigaet
Deuteronomy16:20 Isup che po imanda kityo
Deuteronomy16:21 “Amat iminji keetit age tugul ne po Asera ole neegitee kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne tuun iteekyinigei.
Deuteronomy16:22 Amat iteech toloiwagap kanamonik
Deuteronomy17:1 “Ameeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eito anan keechiiryet ne tinyei peruut
Deuteronomy17:2 “Ngo pitunee kwenung'ung' eng' kurgotiguk alak tugul che koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' chii ne muren anan ne kwony
Deuteronomy17:3 ak kwo koot kanamonik kogutung'ji anan asiista anan arawet anan age tugul ne po chaang'indap kipsengwet ne ma ang'at
Deuteronomy17:4 ak kemwaun
Deuteronomy17:5 imutu anyun murenonooto anan kwonyooto ne kayai kioto ya konyo kurgotiguk si ilach eng' koik kot kome.
Deuteronomy17:6 Kibarei chiichooto eng' ng'aleegap paorinik aeng' anan ko somok ama ki parei eng' paornateetap chiito agenge.
Deuteronomy17:7 Ingosip kolach paorinichooto yeityo kolach anyun piik tugul. Iste anyun ko uu nooto yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'.
Deuteronomy17:8 Ngo piit ng'olyoot ne uui eng' kirwooget ne temeneen
Deuteronomy17:9 ak inyoo ole mi tisiik Lawiik
Deuteronomy17:10 Iyae anyun kiy age tugul ne kamwaun ak che iboorun eng' komosta ne leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy17:11 Ye kagoweny ko uu ng'olyootap ng'atuutyet ne ineetin pichooto ak ko uu kirwooget ne mwaun
Deuteronomy17:12 Chii age tugul ne yae kiy eng' menoteet ak koeesyo kogas ng'aleegap tisiindet ne tononi koboisyei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' anan kirwoogindet
Deuteronomy17:13 Ak kogas piik tugul
Deuteronomy17:14 “Ye kaiit emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak inam kobunjiin ak imeny ak ile
Deuteronomy17:15 inde anyun ineendet ne leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Inde age eng' tupchosyeguk koek laitoryat ne poun. Amat inde punootyot ko poun ne ma ne otupche.
Deuteronomy17:16 Ago amat kotesyigei paraisisyek anan kogoochi piik koweektagei Misiri si kotesigei paraisisyek. Amu kimwaiwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Deuteronomy17:17 Amat kotes osotik si ma kuskong' muguleldanyi
Deuteronomy17:18 Ye kagotebee ng'echereetap laitornatennyi
Deuteronomy17:19 Ngo tepto ak kosoman ko tee kosabei
Deuteronomy17:20 Amat koeetkei eng' muguleldanyi kosiir tupchosyekyik anan ak komasta kometo ng'atuutyet
Deuteronomy18:1 Ki ng'alaalji Musa piigap Israel Koleenji
Deuteronomy18:2 Ma nyooru poroteet eng' tupchosyekwak amu porotennywa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki mwachi.
Deuteronomy18:3 “Ni melektap tisiik eng' che koonu piik eng' tiseiywegap icheeget che igoitoi eito anan keechiir: kusto ak tagilgilik tuwai ak moet.
Deuteronomy18:4 Igoochi ineendet tongoanigap peeguk
Deuteronomy18:5 Amu kalewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ineendet eng' ortinweguk tugul kobois eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ak weeriikyik koigeny.
Deuteronomy18:6 “Ngo pun Lawindet kurgotiguk alak tugul eng' Israel
Deuteronomy18:7 ko ingobois anyun eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi ko uu ye yaei tupchosyekyik tugul; Lawiik che tonondos eng' olooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Deuteronomy18:8 Ingoam kebeberwek che aechin kobooto che nyoorunee aldaetap tuguuk che po kwandanyi.
Deuteronomy18:9 “Ye kaiit emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy18:10 Amat kobiit eng' okweek ne igoitoi weeriinnyi anan cheptonyi kobun maat anan ne poisyee ng'oorset anan sageiywek anan ne isagisyei anan poonindet
Deuteronomy18:11 anan ne abusisyei anan ne ng'alaali ak oik anan poonindet anan ne ng'alaali ak che ki kobek.
Deuteronomy18:12 Amu wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chii age tugul ne yaei tuguuchooto. Oone Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' icheek eng' taing'ung' amu tuguuchu wechei.
Deuteronomy18:13 Egu ne ititaat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy18:14 “Amu pororyosyechu tuun iluule
Deuteronomy18:15 “Tuun ing'eetun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' maotyot eng' che otupche ak eng' kwenung'ung' ne uu anee.
Deuteronomy18:16 Ara anyun ogas iit ineendet. Niito ko kosupkei ak tugul che ki imach eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' peetuutap tuiyet eng' Horeb ile
Deuteronomy18:17 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy18:18 Ang'eetyini anyun maotyot eng' tupchosyekwak ne uu inyee ak ande ng'aleekyuk kutinnyin
Deuteronomy18:19 Ak age tugul ne ma machei kogas ng'aleekyuk che tuun mwaei eng' kainennyu ko tuun ateebee ineendet.
Deuteronomy18:20 Ago maotyot ne mwaei ng'olyoo eng' menoteetapkei eng' kainennyu ne ma ang'at ineendet komwa anan ne ng'alaali eng' kainaigap kamuktaik alak komeei.’ ”
Deuteronomy18:21 “Ak ngile eng' muguleldang'ung'
Deuteronomy18:22 Ye kang'alaal maotyot eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy19:1 Ye kagoon `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyek che nenywa emenooto koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak inam imeny nganasookwak ak kooriikwak
Deuteronomy19:2 itabaanjigei anyun nganasook somok eng' kwenutap emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobunjiin.
Deuteronomy19:3 Chopchigei ooreet ak ipchei kiwotosyegap emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobunjiin koek kebeberwek somok
Deuteronomy19:4 Ni ng'olyootap chiito ne karumis: ineendet ne kabar chiitap kokwennyi ne ki ma kowechei eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto ama nai
Deuteronomy19:5 ko uu ye kawo chiito timiin koep keetit kobooto chiitap kokwennyi ak ye kasut aiywet komachei koep keetit ak kochun aiywet eng' kungit kochililji chiitap kokwennyi ak kome
Deuteronomy19:6 Asi ma amu loo orte koosup ne igeeri korotiik kota kolaldos nereegekyik ak konam ak kokwer kome
Deuteronomy19:7 Kang'atiin anyun amu nooto ale
Deuteronomy19:8 Ak ngo paraun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kiwoteng'ung' ko uu ye ki koyasyechi kwanisyeguk ak kogoonin emet komugul ne ki iarorchi kwanisyeguk kole igoochin.
Deuteronomy19:9 Ngiriip ng'atuutyoni komugul ne kang'atiin rani ak iyai icham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy19:10 Si ma kitumda korotiik che ma tinyei tengek eng' emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteet si ma namin korotichooto.
Deuteronomy19:11 Ago ngo wech chii chiitap kokwennyi
Deuteronomy19:12 koyookto anyun poisyek che po nganasennyi kimut eng' olooto kamwechi nyoo konde eutap ne yaaktoi korotiik si kobar.
Deuteronomy19:13 Ama ye igeer
Deuteronomy19:14 Amenaktae kiwotetap chiitap kokweng'ung' ne ki indoi piik che po keny
Deuteronomy19:15 Amat kobaoryanji chii paoryat agenge eng' tengek age tugul anan eng' chalwok age tugul
Deuteronomy19:16 Ngo ng'eet paoryat ne ma po iman kobaoryanji chii age tugul agobo yaityet
Deuteronomy19:17 ingotononso anyun icheek tuwai chooto ibelegei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy19:18 Asi kogin kirwoogik ko ki iljigei. Ngo ma po iman paoryat amu kabaoryanji ne tupcho eng' lembech
Deuteronomy19:19 oyachi anyun ko uu ye kata machei koyachi ne tupcho. Iste ko uu nooto anyun yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'.
Deuteronomy19:20 Ak kogas che kong'et ak koiyweis si mata koyai yaityet ne uu nooto eng' kwenung'ung' kogeny.
Deuteronomy19:21 Ama ye igeer
Deuteronomy20:1 “Ye iwe obargei ak puuniguk ak iroo kotinyei paraisisyek
Deuteronomy20:2 Ye neegit iyai lugeet
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Ogaso
Deuteronomy20:4 Amu wendi kobootok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' koyae pooryeet agobo okweek eng' puunikwok ak kosarwok.’
Deuteronomy20:5 Ye ibata
Deuteronomy20:6 Tos mi chii ne kimin mbareetap sabibuk ak tomo kobut logoekyik? Ngo mi ko ingoweek kwo koonnyi si ma me eng' pooryeet ak koboisyee chiito age logoekyik.
Deuteronomy20:7 Tos mi chii ne ki kigoochi chepto ak tomo kotun? Ngo mi
Deuteronomy20:8 Ingong'alaalji `kandoik piik kogeny koleenji
Deuteronomy20:9 Ak ye kagogees kandoik ng'aleekwak eng' piik
Deuteronomy20:10 Ye ibookyi nganaseet ne obaregei tuwai
Deuteronomy20:11 Ak ngo waluun kole ma chamei koyai kaalyeet eng' kwenung'ung' ak icheeget ak koyatun kurgotikwak
Deuteronomy20:12 Ngo ma cham koyai kaalyeet kobooten ago komach koyai lugeet kobooten

Deuteronomy20:14 Ago luul kobunjiin kwony age tugul
Deuteronomy20:15 Iyachini ko uu nooto nganasook tugul che looen miising' eng' inyee che ma nganasoogap pororyosyechu.
Deuteronomy20:16 Ago eng' nganasook che po pororyosyechu che koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteet
Deuteronomy20:17 ago iwong'u kot koma ng'et; Hitik
Deuteronomy20:18 Si ma ineetin isup iyai tuguukwak tugul che kiwechei
Deuteronomy20:19 “Ye kaiyiem nganaseet peetuusyek che chaang'

Deuteronomy21:1 Ngo piit muusto eng' timiin ne ki kibarei eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobunjiin ama ki nai ne kibarei
Deuteronomy21:2 Ko ingomanda anyun poisyeguk ak kirwoogiguk ak kobiman kong'etee ole mi muusto agoi nganasook che mi komoswek tugul.
Deuteronomy21:3 Ingokweri anyun poisyegap nganaseet ne neegitee muusto rooryat ne punu akweet ne tomo kobois ak ko ne tomo keratyi chogit
Deuteronomy21:4 kwo atebweet ne roote peek ne tomo kibat anan kegol ak koiiny kaatitap rooryandanooto eng' atebwonooto.
Deuteronomy21:5 Yeityo koriikta yooto tisiik weeriigap Lawi. Amu chooto che ki lewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koboisyechi ak koberuuris eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak tebyei ko uu ng'olyoonnywa kiit age tugul ne kagimoitos ak pireet age tugul.
Deuteronomy21:6 Yeityo koun eunekwak poisyek tugul che po nganasanooto neegitee muusto eng' paragutap rooryandanooto kagiiny kaatit eng' atebweet.
Deuteronomy21:7 Ak komwa kole
Deuteronomy21:8 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy21:9 Ye keyai ne nyolu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy21:10 “Ye kewe obargei ak puuniguk ak konde euneguk `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak imut koek luulenik
Deuteronomy21:11 ak ngigeer eng' kwenutap luulenichooto kwondo ne karaaran ak imach ineendet imutyigei koek osotyondeng'ung'
Deuteronomy21:12 imut anyun kwo koong'ung'
Deuteronomy21:13 ak kolakta ngoroik che ki kiluuldoi. Ye kagotebee koong'ung' anyun ak kagoriirchi kwandanyi ak kamennyi arawet agenge komugul
Deuteronomy21:14 Ngo mecham ineendet imete kwo ole machei. Ago amat ialde eng' silingisyek
Deuteronomy21:15 “Ngo tinyei chii osotik aeng' ak kochamei age ko usei age ago ngo ki kosikyi lagok tuwai; chamaneet ak chepkinyaryat; ago ngo kisip kosich ne sasei weeriit
Deuteronomy21:16 ko eng' peetuut ne pchechin chiichooto weeriikyik tuguukyik
Deuteronomy21:17 Kanyool koyani kole weeriit ne oo weeriitap ne ma chamei ak kogochi ineendet kebeberwek aeng' eng' tugul che tinyei. Amu ineendet taunetap kimnateennyi chechiik tuguuk che nyoljin weeriit ne oo.
Deuteronomy21:18 “Ngo tinyei chii weeriit ne uui met ak ko ngelelyo ne ma kase iit kutitap kwan anan kamet
Deuteronomy21:19 konam anyun kwandanyi ak kamennyi
Deuteronomy21:20 ak koleenji poisyegap nganasennyi
Deuteronomy21:21 Ye Ibata kolage koik murenik tugul che po nganasennyi agoi kome. Iste anyun yaityet ko uu nooto eng' kwenung'ung' si kogas Israel tugul ak koywei.
Deuteronomy21:22 “Ngo yai chii tengekto ne nyoljin meet ak kebar ak isonginin eng' keetit
Deuteronomy21:23 ko mat kotebee muusto keetit parak agoi koeech
Deuteronomy22:1 Ama ye igeer tetap ne otupche anan keechiiryennyi kobetoti iung'egei
Deuteronomy22:2 Ngo ma neegitenen ne otupche anan ngo mengen ineendet
Deuteronomy22:3 Yai ko uu nooto eng' sigiryennyi
Deuteronomy22:4 Ama ye igeer sigiryetap tupcheng'ung' anan tennyi ne kagobut eng' ooreet taban iung'egei. Kanyool itoret kong'eet.
Deuteronomy22:5 Amat kolaach kobogoryondo che po murenik anan kolaach mureno ngoryeet ne po kobogoryo. Amu age tugul ne yaei tuguuchuuto ko wegot eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy22:6 Ngigeer keswetap toriityon eng' ooreet
Deuteronomy22:7 Ago kanyool imete kamet kwo
Deuteronomy22:8 Ye iteech koot ne leel
Deuteronomy22:9 Ameminji mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk kesweek che po ortinwek aeng' che teerchiin
Deuteronomy22:10 Ameratyine eito ak sigiryet ye ibati mbareet.
Deuteronomy22:11 Amelaach ngoryeet ne ki kiburuch koroorigap keechiirek ak katanit.
Deuteronomy22:12 Napchi sawoinik ngoryeeng'ung' ne itugegei eng' tabanwekyik ang'wan.
Deuteronomy22:13 Ngo tun chii osotyot ak kwo ole mi ak kowech
Deuteronomy22:14 ak komwaita ng'aleegap teweernateet agobo ineendet
Deuteronomy22:15 Koipchi anyun kwandap chebooto ak kamet poisyek eng' ormariichetap nganaseet tuguuk che ibooru pergeinatetap chebooto.
Deuteronomy22:16 Yeityo koleenji kwanitap chebooto poisyek
Deuteronomy22:17 Ne siirei nooto ko ki koteweer kole
Deuteronomy22:18 Ingonam anyun poisyegap nganasanooto murenonooto kotigon
Deuteronomy22:19 ak komage ineendet shekelisyek pogol che po fedha
Deuteronomy22:20 Ago ngo po iman ng'olyoondoniito keele ma ki nyoorchi chebooto tuguuk che ibooru pergeinateet
Deuteronomy22:21 kimut anyun chebooto agoi kurgeetap kootap kwandanyi ak kolage ineendet koik murenigap nganasennyi kot kome. Amu ki yai abusnateet eng' Israel
Deuteronomy22:22 “Nginyooru chii ne ibegei ak kwondo ne ki kitunji chiito age
Deuteronomy22:23 “Ngo mi chepto ne pergeiyat ne kigeyachi koito ak konyoorchi chii nganaseet ak koruiyo ak ineendet
Deuteronomy22:24 omutu tuwai kobwa kurgeetap nganaseet ak olage koik kobek: chebooto amu ma waach ago kimi nganaseet ak murenonooto amu kagoteweer osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi. Iste anyun ko uu nooto yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'.
Deuteronomy22:25 “Ago ngo nyoor mureno chepto eng' timiin
Deuteronomy22:26 Ago meite kiy chebooto amu ma tinyei tengekto ne nyoljin meet. Amu uu chiito ne kang'eetyi chiitap kokwennyi ak kobar
Deuteronomy22:27 Amu ki nyoorchi timiin ak ki waach chebooto kiga keyachi koito ama piit chii ne ki sar.
Deuteronomy22:28 “Ngo nyoor mureno chepto ne pergeiyat ne tomo kigoochi chii ak kosuup ak koruiyo tuwai ak kenyoor
Deuteronomy22:29 ko ingogoochi murenonooto karuiyo tuwai kwandap chebooto shekelisyek konom che po fedha. Ma imuuchi kobagaakta agoi
