Deuteronomy23:1 “Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne ki kitui kitik anan ne ki kitil toriityennyi.
Deuteronomy23:2 “Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne po sarbuch. Amat komanda tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi ibinda ne po taman.
Deuteronomy23:3 “Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Amonindet anan Moabindet. Agot agoi eng' ibinda ne po taman
Deuteronomy23:4 Amu ki ma torogunenok icheek magatiinik ak peek ye ki omangune Misiri
Deuteronomy23:5 Nga ki yai ko uu nooto ko ki ma kasyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' Balaam
Deuteronomy23:6 Amat icheeng' kalyennywa anan porotennywa eng' peetuusyeguk tugul koigeny.
Deuteronomy23:7 “Amewech Edomindet amu ineendet ko ng'eetap kamet. Amewech Misirindet amu ki ii toondet eng' emennyi.
Deuteronomy23:8 Ingomanda ole mi tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lagokwak che sichei eng' ibinda ne po somok.
Deuteronomy23:9 “Ye kebokte nganaseet obargei ak puuniguk
Deuteronomy23:10 Ngo mi chii age tugul eng' okweek ne murwoon amu rwondo ne ya kemoi
Deuteronomy23:11 Ago ingouungei koskoleny ak ye kagororokta asiista konyo nganaseet oriit.
Deuteronomy23:12 “Nyolu agine itinye ole imasyini eng' saang'utap nganaseet
Deuteronomy23:13 ak ko myee itinye kiit ne uu mogombet kobooto kariguk si ye imache imaste ibaale ole imasyini ak ye kaigeesu itup.
Deuteronomy23:14 Amu wendote `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kwenutap nganaseng'ung' kosaruun ak koon puuniguk eng' taing'ung'. Amu niito
Deuteronomy23:15 “Amat iweekyi otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi ne kimweune.
Deuteronomy23:16 Ingomeny kobooten eng' kwenung'ung' eng' ole leweni eng' age ne po kurgotiguk ole machei
Deuteronomy23:17 “Amat kobiit chepkugonio eng' tiibiigap Israel anan eng' weeriigap Israel.
Deuteronomy23:18 Ameibu melektap chepkugoniot anan che ki ale seset kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' kaarorunet age tugul. Amu wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' chooto tuwai.
Deuteronomy23:19 “Amebesendochi tupcheng'ung' ile tuun inyoorunee keljinet
Deuteronomy23:20 Imuuchi ibesendochi punootyot si tuun inyoorunee keljinet. Ago mebesendochi ne otupche ile tuun inyoorunee keljinet
Deuteronomy23:21 “Ye iarorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kaarorunet ko mat igaegei
Deuteronomy23:22 Ago ngo ma iarorchi kiy koma egu tengek eng' inyee.
Deuteronomy23:23 Riip iyai ne kemwa eng' kuting'ung' ko uu ye ki arorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kagoochinetap chamyet ne kaiaroru eng' kuting'ung'.”
Deuteronomy23:24 “Ye iwe mbareetap sabibuk ne po chiitap kokweng'ung' iam anyun logoek agoi ibiye ko uu ye imache. Ago amat inde kitong'eng'ung'.
Deuteronomy23:25 Ye iwe mbareetap chiitap kokweng'ung' ne mi peek imuuchi ibach peek
Deuteronomy24:1 Ngo tunis mureno ama nyoor osotyonnyi chameet eng' tainnyi amu kageerchi chiichooto kiy ne ya kwonyooto
Deuteronomy24:2 Ak ye kagomanda kwonyooto eng' kootap chiichooto
Deuteronomy24:3 Ngo wech ineendet manong'otyot ne po let ak kosirchi sireetap peesyet ak konde eunnyi yeityo koon eng' koonnyi anan ngo me manong'otyot ne po let ne ki itun ineendet
Deuteronomy24:4 ko mat komut manong'otyondennyi ni ki po tai ne ki oonei ineendet kole koek osotyonnyi kogeny amu ki king'wanit ak ko wegot yautyet ne uu nooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amat igoochi emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteet koyai tengek.
Deuteronomy24:5 “Ye kagotunis chiito
Deuteronomy24:6 “Amat koip chii koitap pai anan isyet kobunji kaarorunet: amu ngo nam ko uu nooto ko uu yo kabunji ineendet saboondap chiitap ko po.”
Deuteronomy24:7 “Ngenyoor chii ne kachoor tupchennyi age ne po piigap Israel ak koyachi ko uu otwogin anan koalda
Deuteronomy24:8 “Riipkei eng' koroitap mogondosaik
Deuteronomy24:9 Ibwaat kiit ne ki ita `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' Miriam
Deuteronomy24:10 “Ye ibesendochi chiitap kokweng'ung' kiy age tugul
Deuteronomy24:11 Ago tonone saang' inyee ne iyaaksei
Deuteronomy24:12 Ak ngo kibanania chiichooto
Deuteronomy24:13 Iweekyi kinnyi ko karorokto asiista si kobiit kotugegei ye ruei ak koberuurin ak koek nooto imanda eng' inyee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.”
Deuteronomy24:14 “Amesastae otwogindet ne nyooru melekto ne kibanania ne nyalili
Deuteronomy24:15 Igoochi ineendet melektanyi eng' peetuunnyi ne po melekto. Ameng' kororokto asiista kotom igoochi amu kibanania ak imang'u chooto. Si ma riirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo inyee ak koek tengekto eng' inyee.”
Deuteronomy24:16 “Ma kibarei kwanisyek amu lagok anan kebar lagok amu kwanisyek. Ago ki parei chii age tugul ineegei agobo tengektanyi.”
Deuteronomy24:17 Amemaas kirwoogetap toondet anan ne ma tinyei sigiik anan iname pesendo ngoryeetap mosoget.
Deuteronomy24:18 Ago ibwaat ile ki ii otwogin eng' Misiri ak ki ityaachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' olooto. Kang'atiin anyun amu nooto ale iyai kiito.
Deuteronomy24:19 “Ye igesisye eng' mbareeng'ung' ak iutye ratuutigap peek eng' mbar
Deuteronomy24:20 Ye itui logoegap emitiguk ko megetyinotegei iturote eng' mooriik. Ago ingobunji toondet
Deuteronomy24:21 Ye ibute logoegap mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk
Deuteronomy24:22 Ak ibwaat ile ki ii otwogindet eng' emetap Misiri: kang'atiin anyun eng' nooto ale iyai ng'olyoondoniito.”
Deuteronomy25:1 “Ngopiit tiyet eng' piik ak kobwa kapkirwook korwookyi kirwoogik; ko ngo iityi imanda anyun ne po imanda ak kogikyi ne ya;
Deuteronomy25:2 ak ngo keer kirwoogindet kole nyoljin chiichooto ya pireet
Deuteronomy25:3 Imuuchi kobir pirutik artam amat kotes. Amu ngo siir chooto ak kebir pirutik che chaang'
Deuteronomy25:4 “Amerat kutitap eito ye tyechei peek koboorei.”
Deuteronomy25:5 Ngo meng'jindos che tupcho ak ngo me age ama sich weeriit
Deuteronomy25:6 Ingetoochi weeriit ne po tai ne isip kosichei kwonyooto kainetap ng'eetap kam ne kime si ma purburenok kainennyi eng' Israel.
Deuteronomy25:7 Ak ngo ma machei chiichooto kondi osotyotap ng'eetap kamet
Deuteronomy25:8 Yeityo koguur poisyegap nganasennyi chiichooto kong'alaalsechi. Ak ngo tonon kole
Deuteronomy25:9 Kwo osotyotap ng'eetap kamet eng' taitap poisyek
Deuteronomy25:10 Ak keguure kainennyi eng' Israel
Deuteronomy25:11 “Ngo pirgei piik ak kwo osotyotap age kosar manong'otyondennyi eng' ne pirei ak kosapchi konam kitik
Deuteronomy25:12 itil anyun eunnyi amat iriiree.”
Deuteronomy25:13 Amat inde loleng'ung' ratilisyek che teerchiin
Deuteronomy25:14 Ametepte eng' koong'ung' tuguuk che teerchiin che kigeree peek; ne oo ak ne ming'in.
Deuteronomy25:15 “Ago tepte ratilit ne nyolu ne po imanda ak itepte kiit ne kigeree peek ne nyolu ne po imanda. Si kochang'a peetuusyeguk eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy25:16 Amu wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' tugul che yaei tuguuk che uu chooto tugul che yaei che ma po iman.”
Deuteronomy25:17 “Ibwaat kiit ne kimwaun Amelek eng' ooreet ye ki obunu Misiri;
Deuteronomy25:18 ko uu ye kinyoorchin ooreet ak kobar piiguk che ki mi let tugul che kinyalulyotin che kiletu ye ki neegit itanui ak ye kiga ing'et miising'. Ama iywei Amelek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Deuteronomy25:19 Ye tuun kagogoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kamuung'et eng' puuniguk tugul che mi komosweguk tugul
Deuteronomy26:1 “Ye kaiit emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteet kobunjiin ak imeny olooto
Deuteronomy26:2 inam anyun eng' tongoanik tugul che po logoek che po emet che iibu eng' emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak inde kitonget yeityo iip koba ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kondai kainennyi.
Deuteronomy26:3 Iwendi anyun ole mi tisiindet ne mi eng' peetuusyechooto ak ileenji
Deuteronomy26:4 “Yeityo koip tisiindet kitonget eng' eung'ung' ak konde taitap kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy26:5 Ak iwolu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ile
Deuteronomy26:6 Kingo yaiywech ne ya Misiriik
Deuteronomy26:7 keriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy26:8 Ara ki imoong'wech anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Misiri
Deuteronomy26:9 Ki komutwech keitu olito ak ki koonech emoni nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo.
Deuteronomy26:10 Nguno anyun ko kaibu tongoanik che po logoek che po emet ne ki igoono inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’ Yeityo inde ng'wony eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ilasu Ineendet.
Deuteronomy26:11 Ak ibaibaitu eng' myeeindo tugul ne kigoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' inyee ak koong'ung' Lawindet ak toondet ne mi kwenung'ung'.
Deuteronomy26:12 Ye kainemu iges kebeberwek che po taman che po kebeberwegap rurateng'ung' eng' kenyiit ne po somok
Deuteronomy26:13 Yeityo imwa eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ile
Deuteronomy26:14 Ma aam tuguuchooto eng' riirekyuk ama aiste alak eng' chooto aboisyee eng' poisyet ne ma tiliil
Deuteronomy26:15 Keer anyun ng'wony eng' meng'ooteng'ung' ne tiliil
Deuteronomy26:16 “Kang'atiin rani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iyai kaneetisyosyechu ak kirwoogutichu. Riip anyun ak iyai eng' muguleldang'ung' komugul ak eng' saboondang'ung' komugul.
Deuteronomy26:17 Keng'aany rani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ile
Deuteronomy26:18 Kang'aany Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani kole
Deuteronomy26:19 ak koyain itororitu isiir pororyosyek tugul che ki yai ineendet
Deuteronomy27:1 Ki ng'at anyun `Musa ak poisyegap Israel piik koleenji
Deuteronomy27:2 Ak eng' peetuut ne olandoe Jordan obendi emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy27:3 Yeityo isirchi koichooto ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni ye kailande Jordan
Deuteronomy27:4 Ye kailandae Jordan
Deuteronomy27:5 Iteekyi eng' olooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kaptisisyet ne po koik che ma kiyae karna.
Deuteronomy27:6 Teekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kaptisisyet eng' koik che ma kiwai yeityo igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' olooto
Deuteronomy27:7 ak ieny kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet ak iamisye eng' olooto. Si ibaibaitu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy27:8 Yeityo anyun isirchi ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni koichooto kotook komyee.”
Deuteronomy27:9 Yeityo komwachi `Musa ak tisiik che Lawiik Yahudik tugul koleenji
Deuteronomy27:10 Ara anyun kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak iyai ng'atuutikyik ak kaneetisyosyekyik che kaang'atiin ra.”
Deuteronomy27:11 Ki ng'at anyun `Musa piik peetuunooto koleenji
Deuteronomy27:12 “Tonondos Simion
Deuteronomy27:13 Ak ko tonondos Reuben
Deuteronomy27:14 ak kowol Lawiik koleenji piik tugul che po Israel eng' kutit ne oo kole
Deuteronomy27:15 “Chuboot ne yaei kanamwet ne wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nooto ne kiwaei anan kiy ne kitaanyi eng' musoknateet ak kelumda eng' ung'oot.” Ak kowol piik tugul kole
Deuteronomy27:16 “Chuboot chii ne sasei kwanda anan kamet.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:17 “Chuboot chii ne inaktoe kiwotetap chiitap kokwennyi.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:18 “Chuboot chii ne ibeeti ne koraat.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:19 “Chuboot chii ne imaasi kirwoogetap ne toondet ak ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:20 “Chuboot chii ne ibegei ak osotyotap kwandanyi; amu kang'aany aach ngoryeetap kwandanyi.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:21 “Chuboot chii ne ibegei ak tyony age tugul.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:22 “Chuboot chii ne ibegei ak chepkamet ne cheptap kwandanyi anan ne cheptap kamet.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:23 “Chuboot chii ne ibegei ak korgetap yugoi.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:24 “Chuboot chii ne pirei chiitap kokwennyi eng' ung'oot.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:25 “Chuboot chii ne taachei melekto si kobar chii ne ma tinyei tengek.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy27:26 “Chuboot chii ne ma igimit ng'aleegap ng'atuutyoni koyai.” Ak kole piik tugul
Deuteronomy28:1 “Ago ngiepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' kagiiletapkei
Deuteronomy28:2 Pwonjinin kaberurosyechu tugul ak koityin ngiepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy28:3 “Kiberuurin eng' nganaseet kiberuurin eng' mbar.
Deuteronomy28:4 “Kiberuuri iyoteng'ung'
Deuteronomy28:5 “Kiberuuri kitongeng'ung' ak tereeng'ung' ne kikwong'e peek.
Deuteronomy28:6 Kiberuurin ye imong'u ak kiberuurin ye imandoi saang'.
Deuteronomy28:7 Igoitoi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puuniguk che ng'eetyinin kiterteer eng' taing'ung'. Ipookyinin eng' ooreet agenge
Deuteronomy28:8 Ng'atei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor perurto konyonjin eng' chogeniguk ak eng' tugul che iyai eng' eung'ung' ak iberuurin eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy28:9 “Ngiriip ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy28:10 Ye keer pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony kole kiguurtoenen kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy28:11 Iyabin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ibaraitu iegu ne nyiitaat myeeindo
Deuteronomy28:12 Amu yaatun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konorwennyi ne karaaran nooto ko kipsengwet korobonji emeng'ung' eng' peetuusyekyik ak koberuur poisyonik tugul che po euneguk. Ibesendochini pororyosyek che chaang' ago mebeseni.
Deuteronomy28:13 Yain Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iegu metit ago meegu katutyet ak iegu ne mi parak kityo ago meegu ne mi ng'wony
Deuteronomy28:14 ne meistoegei ng'olyoo age tugul ne ang'atiin rani
Deuteronomy28:15 “Ago ngo meepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iriip ak iyai ko uu ng'atuutikyik tugul ak kaneetisyosyekyik che ang'atiin rani
Deuteronomy28:16 Kichubin eng' nganaseet ak kichubin eng' mbar.
Deuteronomy28:17 Kichubei kitongeng'ung' ak tereeng'ung' ne kikwonge peek.
Deuteronomy28:18 Kichubei iyoteng'ung'
Deuteronomy28:19 Kichubin ye imong'u ak kichubin ye imandoi saang'.
Deuteronomy28:20 “Iyogun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chubisyet
Deuteronomy28:21 Koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koroito konamin agoi kowong'un eng' emet ne iwendi iname kobunjiin.
Deuteronomy28:22 Pirin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chebuonit
Deuteronomy28:23 Yamei ko aiegeitu sugunwet kipsengwet ne mi paragung'ung' ak kogergeitu ak karnet ng'wony ne ityeche.
Deuteronomy28:24 Yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor roptap emeng'ung' koek temburyek ak ng'ung'unyek ak kochoorchiningei chooto eng' kipsengwet agoi igeesuge.
Deuteronomy28:25 “Igoitoin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koterteerin puuniguk. Ibookyini eng' ooreet agenge ak imwee eng' tainnywa eng' ortinwek tisap ak konaatiin laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony.
Deuteronomy28:26 Ak koek muustong'ung' amditap toriitik tugul che po parak ak tyong'ik che po ng'wony. Ma piitu chii ne iyestoi.
Deuteronomy28:27 Pirenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ondirik che po Misiri ak kabwondo
Deuteronomy28:28 Pirenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iywek
Deuteronomy28:29 Iwendi isabsabisyoti peet kween ko uu ye sabsabisyoti kipkoraatyat eng' mesundeito
Deuteronomy28:30 “Ituni osotyot ak koipkei ak chiito age. Iteeche koot
Deuteronomy28:31 Kienyei eitang'ung' igeere ameame panyeekyik. Kirebenen sigiryeng'ung' eng' koroomnateet igeere
Deuteronomy28:32 Kigoochin pororyet age weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk
Deuteronomy28:33 “Amei pororyet ne mengen logoegap emeng'ung' ak poisyoniguk tugul. Kinyaliilin ak ketyekyinin ng'wony kotugul
Deuteronomy28:34 agoi koamin iywek amu tugul che igeere eng' konyeguk.
Deuteronomy28:35 Pirei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutung'oiguk ak keelyeguk eng' ondirik che ng'woneen che ma kimuuchi kisoobun
Deuteronomy28:36 “Imutin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto laitoryandeng'ung' ne tuun indoi koboun agoi iit pororyet ne mengen inyee anan kwanisyeguk
Deuteronomy28:37 Ak iegu kwang'utyet
Deuteronomy28:38 Iibe kesweek che chaang' mbar ago igese che ng'ering'; amu tarei chereng'endet.
Deuteronomy28:39 Imiine mbareenigap sabibuk ak isemberi ago mee divaikyik anan ibut logoek
Deuteronomy28:40 Itinye mseituni eng' kiwotosyeguk tugul
Deuteronomy28:41 Isiche weeriik ak tiibiik ago ma egu cheguuk
Deuteronomy28:42 Punjin chereng'endet keetiiguk tugul ak ruroteetap emeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy28:43 “Tororitu toondet ne mi kwenung'ung' kosiirin; ak iming'initu miising'.
Deuteronomy28:44 Pesendoun ineendet ago mebesendochini. Egu ineendet metit ak iegu katutyet.
Deuteronomy28:45 “Pwonjinin anyun chubisyosyechu tugul
Deuteronomy28:46 Tebenen chooto koek kaboorunet ak kwang'utyet
Deuteronomy28:47 “Amu meboisyechini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' poiboiyet
Deuteronomy28:48 Iote anyun puuniguk che imutun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'eetyin eng' rubeet
Deuteronomy28:49 “Imutun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyet ne punu ole loo eng' tabandap ng'wony ne megase ng'aleekwak konyo ko uu ye tirireni kipsiichit inyoo koboryenen
Deuteronomy28:50 pororyet ne koroom igeere ne meiiti chii ne oos ama riiree lakwa.
Deuteronomy28:51 Amei iyoteetap tuguuk ak ruroteetap emeng'ung'
Deuteronomy28:52 Yiemin eng' kurgotiguk tugul agoi koluulyo irimoiguk che kooen che ng'ootaatiin che imang'u eng' emeng'ung' komugul. Yiemin eng' kurgotiguk tugul eng' emeng'ung' komugul ne ki kogoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy28:53 Eng' pichiindo ne ibu yiemet ne yiemin puuniguk
Deuteronomy28:54 Keere kong' ne ya chiito ne ko kiptalbisyo ak ko ng'arng'ar moo ne mi kwenung'wong' ng'eetap kamet ak osotyonnyi ne chamei ak lagokyik che kang'et
Deuteronomy28:55 kot koma chamei kobutyi chii age tugul eng' icheek panyeegap lagokyik che amei
Deuteronomy28:56 Agot kwony ne mi kwenung'wong' ne cheptalbisyo ak ko ng'arng'ar moo ne ma chamei kotyegaat ng'wony amu talbistanyi ak ng'arng'arindap moo
Deuteronomy28:57 ak eng' sindaryet ne sichei ineendet ak eng' lagokyik che sichei. Amei eng' ung'oot amu pananda amu kamuutetap nganaseet ak amu rubeet amu keret ne kerei kurgotiguk puuniguk.
Deuteronomy28:58 “Ngo meriip iyai ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni che ki kisirchi kitabuuni
Deuteronomy28:59 koyai anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor korotweguk koek che kikwong'ee ak korotwegap iyoteng'ung'
Deuteronomy28:60 Iweekyinin myanwogik tugul che po Misiri che ki iywei ak konamin.
Deuteronomy28:61 Kogeny ko ibun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor myando age tugul ak koroito age tugul ne ma ki sirchi bukuitap ng'atuutyoni
Deuteronomy28:62 Si ong'etu che ng'ering' eng' che ki aechin chaang'indang'wong' ak kecheigap kipsengwet. Amu ki ma iepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy28:63 Ko uu ye ki paibait Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' okweek koyaiywok ne myee ak kotesak
Deuteronomy28:64 Ak koiyestak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor obe pororyosyek tugul
Deuteronomy28:65 Amenyooru kamuung'et eng' pororyosyechooto
Deuteronomy28:66 “Menae ole teptoi sabeeng'ung' ak iyweisyei kemoi ak peet ak menae ole itei saboondang'ung'.
Deuteronomy28:67 Ileen karon
Deuteronomy28:68 Ak koweekyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiri kogeny eng' melisyek
Deuteronomy29:1 Chu ng'aleegap kayomiset ne ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koyai kobooto piigap Israel eng' emetap Moabik
Deuteronomy29:2 Ki kuur `Musa Yahudik tugul ak koleenji
Deuteronomy29:3 Ki keer konyeguk tyemuutik che eecheen
Deuteronomy29:4 Ago kitom kogoonok `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldo ne oguiye anan koonyek che ogeere anan itiik che ogase
Deuteronomy29:5 “Ki andoiywok eng' kenyiisyek artam eng' surkwen. Eng' kenyiisyek chooto tugul koma osegitu ngoroik che olaachi ama osegitu kweoniguk eng' kelyekwok.
Deuteronomy29:6 Ma oam magatiinik ama oee divaik anan maiyek: si kobiit onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.
Deuteronomy29:7 Ak ye kingo itu oli
Deuteronomy29:8 ak ki kinam emennywa ak ki kigoochi piigap Reuben
Deuteronomy29:9 Oriip anyun ng'aleegap kayomisoni ak oyai
Deuteronomy29:10 “Otonondosi ra okweek tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy29:11 lagokwok
Deuteronomy29:12 Si kobiit oarorchigei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ak kayosyennyi
Deuteronomy29:13 Si kogimitin rani iegu pororyennyi ak koek Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy29:14 Ma yamisok okweegei eng' kayomisoni ak kayasyoni
Deuteronomy29:15 ago kobooto ineendet agine ne ma mi kobootech rani.
Deuteronomy29:16 Amu ongen ole ki kiteptoi eng' emetap Misiri ak ole ki kibwanunde eng' kwenutap pororyosyek che ki obun kwenunnywa.
Deuteronomy29:17 Ki ogeer tuguukwak che kiwechei ak kanamonikwak
Deuteronomy29:18 Si ma piit chii eng' okweek mureno anan kwondo
Deuteronomy29:19 Ye kas ng'aleegap chubisyoni
Deuteronomy29:20 Ma metoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiichooto ago iyenjin chiichooto nereegek ak ng'etkonda che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kotebee chiichooto chubisyoni tugul ne ki kisirchi kitabuuni ak kobukto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kainennyi eng' kurereetap kipsengwet.
Deuteronomy29:21 Ibesye anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiichooto ortinwek tugul che po Israel kobunji yaityet
Deuteronomy29:22 Yeityo kogeer ibinda ne piitu
Deuteronomy29:23 Keerei kole ki kowalak emet komugul koek tuguuk che laldos ak muunyuk
Deuteronomy29:24 Teebegei anyun pororyosyek tugul koleen
Deuteronomy29:25 Kole anyun piik
Deuteronomy29:26 Ki pa koot kanamonik ak kogutung'ji che ki ma kongen ak che ki ma chamji ineendet.
Deuteronomy29:27 Ki lal anyun nereeknatetap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu nooto agobo emoni ak koipchi chubisyosyek tugul che ki kisirchi bukuini.
Deuteronomy29:28 Ki itut `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek komong' eng' emennywa eng' nereegek
Deuteronomy29:29 Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy30:1 “Ye pwaanjin anyun tuguuchu tugul ki ande taing'ung'; perurto ak chubisyet
Deuteronomy30:2 ak ngiweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy30:3 kowal anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' luuleet ne ki kiluulin ak korirenen ak koweek koyumin eng' pororyosyek tugul ole ki iyestoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Deuteronomy30:4 Ngo mi che ki iyestoochi tabanwegap kipsengwet
Deuteronomy30:5 Imutyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emet ne ki po kwanisyeguk si kobunjiin ak koyaun ne myee
Deuteronomy30:6 Imuratani `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' muguleldang'ung' ak mugulelwegap iyoteng'ung'
Deuteronomy30:7 Indoi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' chubisyosyechu tugul puuniguk ak eng' icheek che wechin che kiusin.
Deuteronomy30:8 Ak iweege igas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak iyai ng'atuutikyik tugul che ang'atiin rani.
Deuteronomy30:9 Yain `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iegu ne tinyei chaang'indap perurto eng' poisyonik tugul che po euneguk
Deuteronomy30:10 ngigas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy30:11 “Amu ma uui miising' eng' inyee ng'atuutyoni kaang'atiin rani ama loo.
Deuteronomy30:12 Ma mi kipsengwet ne imuuch iteep ile
Deuteronomy30:13 Ama mi nyanjet pitoniin ne tos imwa ile
Deuteronomy30:14 Ago neegiteenen ng'olyoondoni miising'
Deuteronomy30:15 “Keero
Deuteronomy30:16 Amu kaang'atiin rani ale icham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iwendote ortinwekyik
Deuteronomy30:17 Ago ngo masta muguleldang'ung' amecham igas
Deuteronomy30:18 aboorwok rani ale olustosi iman ak koma chaang'itu peetuusyekwok eng' emet ole olang'jini eng' Jordan iwendi inam.
Deuteronomy30:19 Kaaguur kipsengwet ak ng'wony kobaoryanjok rani ale
Deuteronomy30:20 Cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Deuteronomy31:1 Ki wo Musa anyun komwachi Yahudik tugul ng'aleechu.
Deuteronomy31:2 Koleenji
Deuteronomy31:3 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ineendet ne landoi kondoenen si kobar pororyosyechu mi taing'ung' ak inam icheek. Landoi Joshua kondoenen ko uu ye ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Deuteronomy31:4 Yachin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyechu ko uu ye ki yachi Sihon ak Og
Deuteronomy31:5 Indewok `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunekwok eng' taing'wong' ak oyachi pichooto ko uu ng'atuutyet komugul ne ki ang'ataak.
Deuteronomy31:6 Ogimegitu
Deuteronomy31:7 Yeityo koguur `Musa Joshua
Deuteronomy31:8 Ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne indoenen ak mi kobooten
Deuteronomy31:9 Ki sir anyun `Musa ng'atuutyoni ak kogoochi tisiik weeriigap Lawiik che ki ibei moinget ne po arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak poisyek tugul che po Israel.
Deuteronomy31:10 Yeityo kong'at `Musa pichooto koleenji
Deuteronomy31:11 ye kabwa Israel tugul koboorgei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' ole tuun leweni
Deuteronomy31:12 Iyum piik
Deuteronomy31:13 Oyai niito si kogas lagokwak che tomo konai ak koneetkei koywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' peetuusyek tugul kotee osaptosi eng' emet ne olandoe Jordan obendi oname.”
Deuteronomy31:14 Ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `Musa
Deuteronomy31:15 Ak ki took Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Emait eng' toloitap pooldet. Kitonone toloitap pooldet kurgeetap Emait.
Deuteronomy31:16 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa
Deuteronomy31:17 Ye ai ko uu nooto kolalei anyun nereeknatennyu eng' peetuunooto agobo icheek ak abagaakte
Deuteronomy31:18 Aunye iman togeennyu peetuunooto amu yaitwogik tugul che ki yai amu kaweektagei koot kanamonik.”
Deuteronomy31:19 “Osirchigei anyun nguno tyeni
Deuteronomy31:20 Amu ye kaamut koit emet ne ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwak
Deuteronomy31:21 Ye tuun kagobwonji yaitwogik che chaang' ak nyalilwogik
Deuteronomy31:22 Ki sir anyun `Musa tyeni peetuunooto ak koneet piigap Israel.
Deuteronomy31:23 Ki igoochi anyun Joshua weeriitap Nun ng'atuutyet ak koleenji
Deuteronomy31:24 Ak ye kingo kagosir kogees `Musa ng'aleegap ng'atuutyoni eng' bukuit
Deuteronomy31:25 kong'at `Musa Lawiik che ki ibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Deuteronomy31:26 “Oip bukuini po ng'atuutik ak onde ole neegitee moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Deuteronomy31:27 Amu angen ngelelnateng'ung' ak uuindap kaating'ung'. Ogeero
Deuteronomy31:28 Oyumwa poisyek tugul che po ortinwekwok ak kiptainikwok kobwa yu ami si amwachi ng'aleechu koba itiikwak
Deuteronomy31:29 Amu angen ale ye kaamei ong'emge miising' kot
Deuteronomy31:30 Kityenji anyun `Musa tuiyet komugul ne po Israel ng'aleegap tyeni tugul ak ki kas icheek komyee.
Deuteronomy32:1 Oebit
Deuteronomy32:2 Rong'ugei kaneetisyennyu ko uu ropta
Deuteronomy32:3 Amu amwaitoi kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Oiityi etunateet Kamuktaindennyo.
Deuteronomy32:4 Rwandet ineendet
Deuteronomy32:5 King'emgei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kalilano eng' icheek amu ma ko lagokyik icheeget; icheek ko pororyet ne ngelelyo ago mastaat.
Deuteronomy32:6 Tos kongoi ne ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ni
Deuteronomy32:7 Ibwaat peetuusyek che po keny
Deuteronomy32:8 Ye ki igoochi `Ne Toroor Miising' pororyosyek porotennywa
Deuteronomy32:9 Amu piikyik kebebertap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; porotennyi Jakobo.
Deuteronomy32:10 Kinyoorchi ineendet surkwen
Deuteronomy32:11 Ko uu ye ing'eeti kipsiichit aarekyik
Deuteronomy32:12 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei ne ki indochi ineendet
Deuteronomy32:13 Ki igoochi kolaany oldinwek che sutotin che po ng'wony; ki am ruroteetap mbareet. Ki igoochi kochuchun kumyat eng' rwandet
Deuteronomy32:14 Kibae icheek mwaitap cheego ne po akweet
Deuteronomy32:15 Ago kiner Jesurun
Deuteronomy32:16 Ki igoochi koam ng'etkonda amu kamuktaik che teer
Deuteronomy32:17 Ki eng'ji tiseiywek oik
Deuteronomy32:18 Mebwaati Rwandet ne kwandang'ung'
Deuteronomy32:19 Ki keer anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kinereech
Deuteronomy32:20 Ak ki le
Deuteronomy32:21 Ki koono ng'etkonda eng' otetap che ma Kamuktaindet; Kitacha eng' tangoitanywa: Ara anyun nguno ko kagoochi icheek ng'etkonda eng' che ma poror; Atache icheek eng' pororyet ne abusat.
Deuteronomy32:22 Amu kalal maat ne po nereegekyuk
Deuteronomy32:23 Atesyini yaitwogik; Ak amwoge icheek kipchabonikyuk:
Deuteronomy32:24 Sagitos eng' rubeet
Deuteronomy32:25 Eng' ole po saang'
Deuteronomy32:26 Ki ale
Deuteronomy32:27 Nda ki ma aiywei tagisyetap puunyoot
Deuteronomy32:28 Amu icheek ko pororyet ne ma tinyei korwooch
Deuteronomy32:29 Nda ka utaatiin
Deuteronomy32:30 Kotos imuktoi ano koon `chii agenge eliphuut
Deuteronomy32:31 Amu ma uu rwandennywa rwandennyo
Deuteronomy32:32 Amu ketinnywa ne po sabibuk kobunu keetitap Sodom
Deuteronomy32:33 Uu `divaikwak ng'wonetap maswetisyek
Deuteronomy32:34 “Tos ma konorotiin eng' oldanyu chuuto
Deuteronomy32:35 Nenyu mugetuut ak kageeret. Neegit peetuut ne kagochabaita keelyekwak: Karik peetuutap nyalildanywa
Deuteronomy32:36 Eng' iman ko irwookyinechin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik
Deuteronomy32:37 Yeityo koteep kole
Deuteronomy32:38 Mi ano nguno kamuktaichooto ki amei mwanigap tiseiywekwak
Deuteronomy32:39 Ogeer anyun nguno ole anee
Deuteronomy32:40 Amu kanamji eunnyu kipsengwet
Deuteronomy32:41 Ngalit rotwennyu po chok ne ilyeli
Deuteronomy32:42 Agoochini kipchabonikyuk kobogite korotiik
Deuteronomy32:43 “Oboiboitu okweek pororyosyek
Deuteronomy32:44 Ki nyo anyun Musa ak Hoshea weeriitap Nun ak komwachi piik ng'aleek tugul che po tyeni kogas eng' itiikwak.
Deuteronomy32:45 Ye kingo kes `Musa ng'aleechu tugul che komwachin Israel tugul
Deuteronomy32:46 koleenji
Deuteronomy32:47 Amu ma tangoi eng' okweek ni ak ko saboondang'wong'. Otese peetuusyekwok eng' emet ole obendi olandoe Jordan oname kobunjook amu niito.”
Deuteronomy32:48 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa peetuunooto
Deuteronomy32:49 “Togoste tulwooni po Abarim
Deuteronomy32:50 Si imechi tulweet ole itogosyini ak kiyumin kobooto piiguk
Deuteronomy32:51 Amu ki ongelelja eng' kwenutap piigap Israel eng' peegap Meribah ne po Kadesh eng' surkwen ne po Sin; amu ki ma ogonyita eng' kwenutap piigap Israel.
Deuteronomy32:52 Igeere emet eng' taing'ung'
Deuteronomy33:1 Ni kaberuret ne ki iberuur `Musa chiitap Kamuktaindet piigap Israel kotom kome:
Deuteronomy33:2 Ki toi komwa kole
Deuteronomy33:3 Ee
Deuteronomy33:4 King'atwech `Musa ng'atuutyet
Deuteronomy33:5 Ki ek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitoryat eng' Jesurun
Deuteronomy33:6 Ki mwa ni anyun Musa agobo Reuben: “Ingosap Reuben
Deuteronomy33:7 Ni kaberuretap Judah: ki le
Deuteronomy33:8 Ki mwa ni `Musa agobo Lawi
Deuteronomy33:9 Ne ki mwa agobo kwandanyi ak kamennyi kole
Deuteronomy33:10 Ineeti Jakobo kirwoogutiguk
Deuteronomy33:11 Ee
Deuteronomy33:12 Ki le agobo Benjamin
Deuteronomy33:13 Ak ki le agobo Joseph
Deuteronomy33:14 Ingiberuur eng' tuguuk che korooron kot che po logoegap asiista
Deuteronomy33:15 Ingiberuur eng' tuguuk che eecheen miising' che po tuloonoogap keny
Deuteronomy33:16 Iberuurot amu tuguuk che korooron che po ng'wony ak nyiennyi
Deuteronomy33:17 Twateiyot ne punu kirginnyi kotinyei toroornatet; ak kuinoikyik ko kuinoigap soet. Toortoe chooto pororyosyek tugul agoi ole poochin ng'wony. Chooto tamanusyegap eliphusyegap Ephraim
Deuteronomy33:18 Yeityo kole Musa agobo Zebulun
Deuteronomy33:19 Kuurei icheek pororyosyek kobwa tulweet
Deuteronomy33:20 Kingo tar kole agobo Gad
Deuteronomy33:21 Ki lewenjigei kebeberta ne po tai
Deuteronomy33:22 Yeityo kole agobo Dan
Deuteronomy33:23 Ye rup komwa ni agobo Naphtali kole
Deuteronomy33:24 Ak ki le agobo Asher
Deuteronomy33:25 Egu kweoniguk kariik ak sugunonik
Deuteronomy33:26 “Ee Jesurun
Deuteronomy33:27 Meng'ateng'ung' Kamuktaindet ne po koigeny
Deuteronomy33:28 Meng'iisyei anyun Israel eng' kaalyeet
Deuteronomy33:29 Ee Israel
Deuteronomy34:1 Kingo pata
Deuteronomy34:2 Naphtali komugul
Deuteronomy34:3 Ki iboorchi murot tai ak warenget ne po atebweet ne po Jeriko
Deuteronomy34:4 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Deuteronomy34:5 Ki me anyun `Musa kiboityotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' olooto eng' emetap Moab ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Deuteronomy34:6 Ak ki tupchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa atebweet eng' emetap Moab ole tokyingei Beth-peor. Ago ama mi chii ne ingen kererinnyi agoi rani.
Deuteronomy34:7 Kiga kotar `Musa kenyiisyek pogol ak tiptem ye kimeei. Ki ma Kor ama igeskei kimnateennyi.
Deuteronomy34:8 Ki riirchi piigap Israel Musa eng' warengetap Moab peetuusyek sosom. Ki igeskei anyun peetuusyegap kateiyet ak riirek agobo Musa.
Deuteronomy34:9 Ki nyiitaat Joshua weeriitap Nun muguleldo ne po utaatyet. Amu kiga kogonoor Musa eunekyik ineendet. Ki kas iit anyun lagogap `Israel ineendet ak ki yai ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.
Deuteronomy34:10 Tomo kobiit eng' Israel maotyot ne uu Musa ne ki nai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kimni;
Deuteronomy34:11 eng' kaboorunoik tugul
Deuteronomy34:12 Eng' euut komugul ne kiim ak kamuiset komugul ne oo
Joshua1:1 Kingo kagome `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua1:2 “Kogome otwogindennyu Musa. Ara ng'eet anyun nguno inyee ak pichu tugul
Joshua1:3 Komosta age tugul ole katyech keelyekwok
Joshua1:4 Kobooch surkwen ak Lebanon agoi aineet ne oo
Joshua1:5 Ma piitu chii ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taing'ung' peetuusyek tugul kotee isabe. Ko uu ye ki ami kobooto Musa
Joshua1:6 Kimitu ak inyiganitu amu igoochini pichu konam emet ne ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwak ale agoochini.
Joshua1:7 Kimitu ak inyiganitu miising'
Joshua1:8 Amat komanda bukuini po ng'atuutik eng' kuting'ung'
Joshua1:9 Tos ma anee ne ki ang'atiin? Kimitu ak inyiganitu. Meiywei anan itoptoben amu mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobooten eng' ui tugul ole iwendi.”
Joshua1:10 Ki ng'at anyun `Joshua kiptainigap piik koleenji
Joshua1:11 “Obun kwenutap nganaseet ak ong'at piik oleenji
Joshua1:12 Ki ng'alaalji `Joshua ooreetap Reuben
Joshua1:13 “Obwaat ng'olyoot ne ki ng'ataak `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Joshua1:14 Tebee osotikwok
Joshua1:15 Otoret icheek agoi kogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tupchosyekwok kamuung'et ko uu okweek
Joshua1:16 Kowolji `icheek Joshua koleenji
Joshua1:17 Ko uu ye ki kigase iit Musa eng' tuguuk tugul
Joshua1:18 Chii age tugul ne kabisto chooto ing'ate
Joshua2:1 Ki iyookto Joshua weeriitap Nun piik aeng' eng' Shitim koba eng' ung'oot kosegei emet. Ki ng'at icheek koleenji
Joshua2:2 Ki kimwachi laitoryatap Jeriko keleenji
Joshua2:3 Ki iyookto `laitoryat piik koba koleenji Rahab “Imong'u kobwa saang' pichoo ko kabwa koong'ung'
Joshua2:4 Ago ki imut kwonyooto pichooto aeng' kouny yeityo kole
Joshua2:5 Kongoimen
Joshua2:6 Kiga komut `ineendet icheek koba koot parak ak kotuge mobegap mabuteek che kiga kotet komyee eng' koot.
Joshua2:7 Ki pa anyun pichooto koosup icheek eng' ooreet kotokyigei Jordan kot koit tabarwek ole kilandoe. Ak ne matyanit ko kata kobendi pichooto ki isubi icheek
Joshua2:8 Ye kitom koruiyo segeik
Joshua2:9 ak koleenji
Joshua2:10 Kigegas ole ki iyaamnda `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Araraita ne Piriir eng' taing'wong' ye ki obwane obunu Misiri
Joshua2:11 Ye ki ngegas agobo nooto
Joshua2:12 Asaok nguno ale
Joshua2:13 amat obar kwandanyu ak kamennyu
Joshua2:14 Koleenji `pichooto ineendet
Joshua2:15 Ki choortae anyun icheek rogoet kobun tirisyet. Amu ki mi koonnyi irimeetap nganaseet parak ak ki menyei irimonooto parak.
Joshua2:16 Ki leenji icheek
Joshua2:17 Ki leenji `pichooto ineendet
Joshua2:18 Keero
Joshua2:19 Ngomanda chii age tugul eng' kurgeetap koong'ung' kwo ooreet
Joshua2:20 Ago ngot ing'ande poisyoninyo koma namech ng'oogistap kayosyeng'ung' ne kesimjech kiyasyeun.”
Joshua2:21 Kowol ineendet
Joshua2:22 Ki pa anyun pichooto agoi tulweet ak kotebee olooto peetuusyek somok
Joshua2:23 Ki week anyun pichooto aeng'u kochoorgei eng' tulweet. Ki pa kolanda
Joshua2:24 Ak ki leenji `pichooto Joshua
Joshua3:1 Kong'eet anyun Joshua karon miising'
Joshua3:2 Kingo pata peetuusyek somogu
Joshua3:3 ak kong'at piik koleenji
Joshua3:4 Osup si kobiit onai ooreet ne nyoljinok obun
Joshua3:5 Ki leenji `Joshua piik
Joshua3:6 Ki ng'alaalji `Joshua tisiik koleenji
Joshua3:7 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua
Joshua3:8 Ng'at tisiik che ibei moingetap arorutyet ileenji
Joshua3:9 Koleenji anyun `Joshua piigap Israel
Joshua3:10 Ki testai Joshua kole
Joshua3:11 Ogeero
Joshua3:12 Olewen anyun piik taman ak aeng' eng' ortinwegap Israel
Joshua3:13 Ye tononie keelyegap tisiik che ibei moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua3:14 Ye kingo ng'eetyo piik eng' emaisyekwak koba kolandae Jordan
Joshua3:15 Ago ye kingo it Jordan che ki ibei moinget ak kingo tyech tabandap peek
Joshua3:16 kotononso anyun peek che punu meto koba parak. Kitoten eng' ole loo eng' Adam
Joshua3:17 Kitononso tisiik che ki ibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ole yaamaat eng' kwenutap Jordan
Joshua4:1 Ye kingo kagolanda pororyet tugul eng' Jordan
Joshua4:2 “Olewen anyun murenik taman ak aeng' eng' piik
Joshua4:3 ak ong'at icheek oleenji
Joshua4:4 Ki kuur `Joshua pichooto taman ak aeng'
Joshua4:5 ak koleenji
Joshua4:6 si kobiit koek niito kaboorunet eng' kwenung'wong'. Ye tuun teebenak lagokwok eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei kole
Joshua4:7 Oleenji amu kipcheigei peegap Jordan eng' taitap moingetap arorutyet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua4:8 Ki yai anyun piigap Israel ko uu ye ki ng'at `Joshua. Ki kwei koik taman ak aeng' eng' kwenutap Jordan
Joshua4:9 Ki iruruuch anyun Joshua koichooto taman ak aeng' eng' kwenutap Jordan eng' ole kitonone keelyegap tisiik che ki ibei moingetap arorutyet; ak mi olooto agoi ra.
Joshua4:10 Kitonone kwenutap Jordan tisiik che ki ibei moinget agoi kobata tuguuk tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua komwachi piik
Joshua4:11 ak kingo kagolanda piik tugul kogestagei
Joshua4:12 Ki landa piigap Israel kondoe weeriigap Reuben
Joshua4:13 Ki landa piik olo po eliphuusyek artam che po lugeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua4:14 Ki itoroor `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua eng' peetuunooto eng' taitap Israel tugul. Ki iywei `ineendet piigap Israel eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi
Joshua4:15 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji
Joshua4:16 “Ng'at tisiik che ibei moingetap paornateet kotogos eng' Jordan.”
Joshua4:17 Ki ng'at anyun `Joshua tisiik koleenji
Joshua4:18 Ye kingo togos tisiik che ki ibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jordan
Joshua4:19 Ki togos piik eng' Jordan eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawetap tai ak koteech emaisyek eng' Gilgal
Joshua4:20 Ki iruruuch Joshua koichooto taman ak aeng' eng' Gilgal
Joshua4:21 Ki ng'alaalji piigap Israel koleenji
Joshua4:22 oarorchi icheek konai kole kilong'une Israel Jordan yu ko kagoyaam
Joshua4:23 amu ki yai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' Araraita ne Piriir koyaam eng' tainnyo agoi kelong'u
Joshua4:24 si kobiit konai piik tugul che po ng'wony kole kiim eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' koigeny.”
Joshua5:1 Ye kingo kas laitorinik tugul che po Amorik che ki mi komostap cherongo eng' Jordan
Joshua5:2 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua eng' peetuusyechooto koleenji
Joshua5:3 Ki yai anyun `Joshua rotoogap sengwetoik ak koyatita piigap Israel eng' tulweetap Kamuratanet.
Joshua5:4 Kiit ne ki igoochi Joshua koyatitais ko ni; murenik tugul che ki mang'une Misiri
Joshua5:5 Nganda kiga kiyatita piik tugul che kigamong' eng' olooto
Joshua5:6 Ki pendat piigap Israel kenyiisyek artam eng' surkwen kot kobek pororyet tugul. Ki pek murenigap lugeet che ki mang'une Misiri amu ma kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kiga koyasyechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kole ma chamjin kogeer emet ne kiga koyasyechi kogoochi kwanisyekwak
Joshua5:7 Ki imuratan `Joshua lagokwak si kogeer icheek
Joshua5:8 Kingo kagimuratan pororyet tugul
Joshua5:9 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji
Joshua5:10 Ki teech piigap Israel emaisyekwak eng' Gilgal
Joshua5:11 Eng' peetuunooto ne ki isubi paska
Joshua5:12 Kitilak mana eng' peetuunooto ki iamei kesuutigap emonooto che po kenyiit. Mata konyoor kogeny piigap Israel mana; ki am eng' kenyinooto amitwogigap emetap Kanaan.
Joshua5:13 Ye ki neegit koit Joshua Jeriko
Joshua5:14 Kowol chiichooto kole
Joshua5:15 Ki mwachi `kiptaiyat ne po lugeetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji
Joshua6:1 Kiga kiger Jeriko kot amu piigap Israel. Ki ma komandoi chii anan kochut oriit.
Joshua6:2 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji
Joshua6:3 Oyiem nganaseet; murenik tugul che po lugeet omuuti nganaseet konyil agenge. Oyae ko uu nooto eng' peetuusyek lo.
Joshua6:4 Ngo ip tisiik tisabu igondisyek tisap che po kuinoigap mengichik eng' taitap moinget. Eng' peetuut ne po tisap
Joshua6:5 Ye ogas cheetap igoondit ko kagoguut tisiik koek keny
Joshua6:6 Ki kuur `Joshua weeriitap Nun tisiik koleenji
Joshua6:7 Kong'at piik koleenji
Joshua6:8 Ko uu ye ki mwachi `Joshua piik
Joshua6:9 Ki indoe murenik che ki ilaachi kariik tisiik che kiguutei igondisyek
Joshua6:10 Ki ng'at `Joshua piik koleenji
Joshua6:11 Ki ip anyun moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kimuute nganaseet konyil agenge
Joshua6:12 Ki ng'eet Joshua karon miising'
Joshua6:13 Ki pa ko uu nooto kotugul tisiik tisabu che ki ibei igondisyek tisap che po kuinoigap mengichik kondoe moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koguutei igondisyek. Ki indoe icheek murenik che ki ilaachi kariik ak ki isup piik che kiletu moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koguutoti tisiik igondisyek ak kobendi.
Joshua6:14 Kiyiem nganaseet peetuut ne po aeng' konyil agenge
Joshua6:15 Eng' peetuut ne po tisap
Joshua6:16 Eng' ne po tisap koguutei tisiik igondisyek
Joshua6:17 Nganaseet ak tugul che mi oriitinnyi kitabaanjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. King'emei kobatee Rahab chepkugoniot ak tugul che mi koonnyi amu kiuny piik che ki kiyogu.
Joshua6:18 Oriipkei okweeget eng' kiy ne itabaanat si ma ye kaotabaan
Joshua6:19 Ago fedhaisyek
Joshua6:20 Ki waakyo piik ak koguut tisiik igondisyek. Kingo kas piik cheetap igoondit
Joshua6:21 Kibaree rotwetap chok tugul che ki mi nganaseet kogees: murenik ak kwonyiik
Joshua6:22 Ki leenji `Joshua pichooto aeng' che kigaba kosegei emet
Joshua6:23 Ki pa ko anyun murenjoto aeng' segeik
Joshua6:24 Ye kingobata
Joshua6:25 Ki pagaach `Joshua Rahab chepkugoniot kosap
Joshua6:26 Ki ng'at `Joshua icheek koyastos kole: “Chuboot eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chii ne ng'eetei koteechei nganasani po Jeriko! Age tugul ne lumei lumeiywondennyi
Joshua6:27 Ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Joshua
Joshua7:1 Ago ki yai chalwok piigap Israel agobo tuguuk che itabaanatiin. Ki ip Akan weeriitap Karmi
Joshua7:2 Ki iyookto `Joshua piik eng' Jeriko koba Ai
Joshua7:3 Ki week ole ki mi Joshua ak koleenji
Joshua7:4 Ki pa piik olo po eliphuusyek somok
Joshua7:5 Kibaris piigap Ai kobar piigap Israel
Joshua7:6 Kigereer Joshua ngoroikyik ak kong'uruuk kot koit ng'wony togeennyi
Joshua7:7 Ki le Joshua
Joshua7:8 Ee Kiptaiyat
Joshua7:9 Tuun kasei Kanaanik ak tugul che menyei emet agobo kiito
Joshua7:10 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua
Joshua7:11 Kogoyai Israel tengekto
Joshua7:12 Nooto anyun amu nee si ma imuuchi piigap Israel kotononso eng' taitap puunikwak
Joshua7:13 Ng'eet ianyiny piik ak ileenji
Joshua7:14 Kimutwok karon oriigu kobee pororyosyekwok. Pororyet ne namei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua7:15 Chii ne kinyoorchin kiit ne itabaanat
Joshua7:16 Kong'eet anyun `Joshua karon miising' ak komut Israel koriik kobee pororyosyekwak
Joshua7:17 Ki imut `ineendet ortinwegap Judah koriik ak ki kinam ooreetap Seraik. Ki imut ooreetap Seraik koriik konyonune chiito agenge agenge ak ki kinam Sabdi.
Joshua7:18 Ki imut koonnyi konyonune chiito agenge agenge ak ki kinam Akan
Joshua7:19 Koleenji Joshua Akan
Joshua7:20 Ki wolji `Akan Joshua koleenji
Joshua7:21 Kinga keer eng' tuguuk che ki kiluul ngoryeet ne karaaran ne po Babilon ak shekelisyek pogol aeng' che po fedha
Joshua7:22 Ki iyookto anyun `Joshua piik
Joshua7:23 Ki inem eng' kwenutap emait ak koipchi Joshua
Joshua7:24 Yeityo konam `Joshua ak Israel tugul Akan weeriitap Zerah kobooto fedha
Joshua7:25 Ki leenji Joshua
Joshua7:26 Ki iruruuch koik eng' paragunnyi ak mi koichooto agoi ra. Ki istogei anyun nereegek eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki kiguure anyun yooto atebweetap Akor agoi ra.
Joshua8:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji
Joshua8:2 Iyachini Ai ak laitoryandennyi ko uu ye ki iyachi Jeriko ak laitoryandennyi. Ago tuguukyik ak tuukyik che kiluulei
Joshua8:3 Ki ng'eet anyun Joshua ak piik tugul che po lugeet koba kobookyi Ai. Ki lewen `Joshua piik eliphuusyek sosom
Joshua8:4 Ak kong'at icheek koleenji
Joshua8:5 Ariikyini nganaseet anee ak piik tugul che mi kobooto
Joshua8:6 Mongu icheek koonwech kot kirete eng' nganaseet
Joshua8:7 ong'eetyee eng' ribiseet ak onam nganaseet
Joshua8:8 Ye kaonam nganaseet
Joshua8:9 Ki iyookto anyun `Joshua icheek koba; ak ki pa koribisyo kotebee kwenutap Bethel ak Ai
Joshua8:10 Ki ng'eet Joshua karon miising' ak koyum piik
Joshua8:11 Ki togosta piik tugul che po lugeet che ki mi kobooto ineendet ak ki pa koriikta ole pooch nganaseet ak koba koteekso eng' murot kaataam ne po Ai
Joshua8:12 Ki imut piik `Joshua olo po eliphuusyek muut
Joshua8:13 Ki inde piik anyun kotebi ko uu nooto
Joshua8:14 Ye kingo keer laitoryatap Ai kochirchiren
Joshua8:15 Ak ki yaigei Joshua ak Israel tugul ko uu yo kagiterter eng' tainnywa
Joshua8:16 Ak ki kiguur piik tugul che ki mi nganaseet koba koon icheek
Joshua8:17 Ki ma komi chii ne ki ng'et eng' Ai anan ko Bethel
Joshua8:18 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua
Joshua8:19 Ye kingo tokyi Joshua ng'otit nganaseet
Joshua8:20 Ye kingo kuskong' piigap Ai
Joshua8:21 Ye kingo keer Joshua ak Israel tugul kole kagonam nganaseet pichu karibistos ak kogeer kotogostoi iyeto eng' nganaseet
Joshua8:22 Ki pwa ak icheek che ki mi nganaseet kobargei ak pichooto; kotebee anyun kwenutap `Israel piigap Ai; ki mi alak komosi
Joshua8:23 Ago ki nam laitoryatap Ai kosabei ak komutyi Joshua.
Joshua8:24 Kingo kagogees Israel pareetap piik tugul che ki menyei Ai eng' warenget eng' surkwen ole ki oonee icheek
Joshua8:25 Murenik ak kwonyiik tugul che ki kibar eng' piigap Ai eng' peetuunooto ko ki eliphuusyek taman ak aeng'.
Joshua8:26 Amu ma aruny Joshua eunnyi ne kigaiito koname ng'otit agoi kobar kogees piik tugul che ki menyei Ai.
Joshua8:27 Ki kweri Israel tuuga ak parunenigap nganasanooto kobunji ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki kang'at Joshua.
Joshua8:28 Ki peel Joshua Ai ak koyai koek tulwo ne tebyei agoi
Joshua8:29 Ki isonginin laitoryatap Ai eng' keetit kot koimen. Kingo rorokta asiista
Joshua8:30 Kiteekyi anyun `Joshua Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua8:31 ko uu ye ki kang'at `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Israel ak ko uu ye ki kisir eng' bukuitap ng'atuutigap Musa
Joshua8:32 Ak eng' yooto
Joshua8:33 Kitononso Israel tugul
Joshua8:34 Ye ibata kosoman Joshua ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutik
Joshua8:35 Ma mi ng'olyoo eng' ng'aleek tugul che ki ng'at Musa ne masoman Joshua eng' taitap tuiyet tugul ne po Israel
Joshua9:1 Ye kingo kas laitorinik tugul (laitorinigap Hitik
Joshua9:2 koyumgei kobargei ak Joshua ak Israel.
Joshua9:3 Ago kingo kas piigap Gibeon kiit ne ki kayachi `Joshua Jeriko ak Ai
Joshua9:4 koyai ng'aalseet ak icheek: ki pa koigei piik che kiyooktoi
Joshua9:5 Ki ilaach kweonik che ki koosegitu che kigeginogin ak kolaach ngoroik che oosen. Magatiinik tugul che ki amitwogikwak ko kiga koyaamyo ak ko kiga koucho.
Joshua9:6 Ki pa ole mi Joshua eng' nganaseet eng' Gilgal
Joshua9:7 Koleenji piigap Israel Hibik
Joshua9:8 Koleenji `icheek Joshua
Joshua9:9 Kowol kole
Joshua9:10 ak tuguuk tugul che ki yachi laitorinik aeng' che po Amorik che ki mi Jordan pitoniin
Joshua9:11 Kimwaiwech poisyekyok ak tugul che menyei emennyo kole
Joshua9:12 Ki kiibu magatinichuchok eng' kooriikyok kota komi ma eng' peetuut ne ki king'eetosi kebwane oling'wong'
Joshua9:13 Kileelach lolotinwechu kiga kinyiit divaik ak ko nguno ko ki kogereeris. Ki koosegitu ngoroikyok ak kweonikyok amu panda ne kooi kot.”
Joshua9:14 Ki am icheek amitwogigap pichooto ama teep ng'olyoo kobun kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Joshua9:15 Ki yai Joshua ak icheeget kayanjinetap kaalyeet
Joshua9:16 Ago kingo pata peetuusyek somogu ko kagoyai arorutyet ak icheek
Joshua9:17 Ki pa piigap Israel ak koit nganasoogap pichooto eng' peetuutap somok. Nganasokwak ko ki Gibeon
Joshua9:18 Ago ma par `piigap Israel icheek
Joshua9:19 Ago ki leenji pounik tugul tuiyet komugul
Joshua9:20 Kiyachini ko uu ni; kibagaaktoi kosapcho
Joshua9:21 Ki leenji `pounik icheek
Joshua9:22 Ki iyookto anyun Joshua keguur icheek
Joshua9:23 Ara anyun oo chubootiin
Joshua9:24 Ki wolji `icheek Joshua koleenji
Joshua9:25 Ki mi anyun nguno euneguk. Iyaiywech ko uu ye igeere ile myee eng' inyee.”
Joshua9:26 Ki yachi anyun ko uu nooto
Joshua9:27 Ki yai `Joshua icheek eng' peetuunooto koek che petei kweenik ak koramjin peek tuiyet ak kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ole leweni ineendet
Joshua10:1 Kingo kas Adoni-sedek laitoryatap Jerusalem kole ki konam Joshua Ai ak kong'em kogees; ko kogoyachi Ai ak laitoryandennyi ko uu ye kigayachi Jeriko ak laitoryandennyi
Joshua10:2 Ki iywei miising' amu ki nganaseet ne oo Gibeon
Joshua10:3 Ki iyookto anyun Adoni-sedek laitoryatap Jerusalem
Joshua10:4 “Otogosu oldanyu obwa otoreta si kibookyin Gibeon
Joshua10:5 Ki iyumgei anyun laitorinik muutu che po Amorik: laitoryatap Jerusalem
Joshua10:6 Ki iyookto `piigap Gibeon Joshua eng' nganaseet eng' Gilgal
Joshua10:7 Ki togosta anyun Joshua eng' Gilgal ak piik tugul che po lugeet
Joshua10:8 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua
Joshua10:9 Kiche anyun Joshua icheek
Joshua10:10 Ki iyeesta `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' taitap Israel ak kobar icheek eng' pareet ne oo eng' Gibeon. Ak koon icheek kobun ooreet ne togostoi Beth-horon ak kobarat kot koit Aseka ak Makeda.
Joshua10:11 Ye ki mwee eng' taitap Israel
Joshua10:12 Eng' peetuut ne ki igoito Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Amorik kogoochin piigap Israel
Joshua10:13 Ki tonon asiista ak kosiis arawet
Joshua10:14 Kitom kobiitu peetuut ne uu nooto eng' tai amata kobiit eng' let ne ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutitap chii. Amu ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lugeet agobo Israel.
Joshua10:15 Ki week Joshua anyun kobooto Israel tugul koba nganaseet eng' Gilgal.
Joshua10:16 Kimwei anyun laitorinichooto muutu ak kounygei eng' kebeneet eng' Makeda.
Joshua10:17 Ki kimwachi Joshua keleenji
Joshua10:18 Kole Joshua
Joshua10:19 Amat otebi okweeget
Joshua10:20 Kingo kagobar Joshua ak piigap Israel icheek kogees eng' pareet ne oo miising' kot koek tutigin che ki ng'et ak koba nganasook che ng'ootaatiin.
Joshua10:21 Ki week anyun piik tugul eng' kaalyeet koba nganaseet ole mi Joshua eng' Makeda. Ma piit chii ne kitwek komwa ng'olyoo ne ya agobo piigap Israel.
Joshua10:22 Komwa Joshua anyun kole
Joshua10:23 Ki yai ko uu nooto
Joshua10:24 Kingo kagomut laitorinichooto kagomutyi Joshua
Joshua10:25 Koleenji `Joshua icheek
Joshua10:26 Ye ibata
Joshua10:27 Ye kimachei kororokto asiista
Joshua10:28 Ki nam `Joshua Makeda peetuunooto
Joshua10:29 Ak kisiirto Joshua eng' Makeda ak Israel tugul koba Libna ak kobookyi olooto.
Joshua10:30 Ki igoito Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganasanooto agine kobooto laitoryandennyi konde eunegap Israel. Ki par nganasanooto ak piik tugul che ki mi oriit eng' rotwetap chok. Ki ma pagaakta agot agenge eng' oriit. Ak ki yachi laitoryandennyi ko uu ye kigayachi laitoryatap Jeriko.
Joshua10:31 Ki pa Joshua ak Israel tugul eng' Libna koba Lakish; ki teech taitap nganasanooto ak kobargei.
Joshua10:32 Ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Lakish eunegap Israel ak ki nam eng' peetuut ne po aeng'. Ki par kobooto piik tugul che ki mi oriit eng' rotwetap chok
Joshua10:33 Kigatogos Horam laitoryatap Gezer koleen kotoret Lakish
Joshua10:34 Ki isiptogei Joshua eng' Lakish kobooto Israel tugul koba Eglon ak koteech taitap nganasanooto
Joshua10:35 Ki nam eng' peetuunooto ak kobar eng' rotwetap chok piik tugul che ki mi oriit. Ki par kogeskei eng' peetuunooto
Joshua10:36 Ki togosta Joshua ak Israel tugul eng' Eglon koba Hebron ak ki par olooto.
Joshua10:37 Ki nam ak kobar eng' rotwetap chok piik tugul che ki mi oriit kobooto laitoryandennyi ak nganasookyik tugul
Joshua10:38 Ki week anyun Joshua kobooto Israel tugul koba Debir ak kobar olooto.
Joshua10:39 Ak ki nam kobooto laitoryandennyi ak nganasookyik tugul ak kobar eng' rotwetap chok ak piik tugul che ki mi oriit kowong'. Ma pagaakta agot agenge. Ki yachi Debir ak laitoryandennyi ko uu ye kigayachi Hebron kobooto laitoryandennyi
Joshua10:40 Ki par anyun Joshua emet tugul; emetap tuloonook
Joshua10:41 Ki par `Joshua icheek kobooch Kadesh-barnea agoi Gaza ak emet komugul ne po Goshen agoi Gibeon.
Joshua10:42 Ki nam `Joshua laitorinichooto tugul ak emotinwekwak eng' peetuusyechooto
Joshua10:43 Kiweektagei Joshua kobooto Israel tugul koba nganaseet eng' Gilgal.
Joshua11:1 Ye kingo kas Jabin laitoryatap Hasor agobo niito
Joshua11:2 ak koyookto kwo kap laitorinik che ki mi murot kaataam ne po emetap tuloonook
Joshua11:3 Ki iyookyi ng'olyoo kora Kanaanik eng' kong'asiis
Joshua11:4 Ki pwa komong' anyun icheeget ak lugosyekwak tugul. King'iisyat icheek kobooto paraisisyekwak ak kariisyek ko uu ng'aniek che mi ngeguutap nyanjet eng' chaang'indo.
Joshua11:5 Ki tuiyo laitorinichuuto tugul ak kobwa koteech komosta agenge eng' ye neegitee peegap Merom si kobargei ak Israel.
Joshua11:6 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua
Joshua11:7 Konyo anyun `Joshua kobooto piikyik tugul che po lugeet eng' ye neegitee peegap Merom ak kobookyi icheek.
Joshua11:8 Ak ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunegap Israel
Joshua11:9 Ki yachi `Joshua icheek ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki ep kwarinigap paraisisyekwak yeityo kobeel kariisyekwak eng' maat.
Joshua11:10 Ki week `Joshua eng' ak konam Hasor ak kobar laitoryandennyi eng' rotwetap chok. Ki ne oo Hasor eng' tai eng' laitornatosyechooto tugul.
Joshua11:11 Ki par piik tugul che ki mi nganasanooto eng' rotwetap chok kobar kogees; ma ng'et agot agenge
Joshua11:12 Ki nam Joshua nganasook tugul che po laitorinichooto ak laitorinikwak tugul; ak kobar kooges icheek eng' rotwetap chok ko uu ye ki kang'at `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Joshua11:13 Ago ki ma peel `Israel nganasook che kitonondos eng' tuloonookwak kobatee Hasor kityo ne ki peel Joshua.
Joshua11:14 Ki ip Israel tuguuk tugul che po nganasochuuto ak kokweri tuuga koek chechwaak. Ki par chii age tugul eng' rotwetap chok
Joshua11:15 Ko uu ye ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa otwogindennyi
Joshua11:16 Ki nam anyun Joshua emet komugul: emetap tuloonook
Joshua11:17 Ki nam kora kobooch tulweetap Halak ne tokyingei Seir agoi Baal-gad eng' atebweetap Lebanon eng' Hermon keel. Ki nam laitorinikwak tugul
Joshua11:18 Ki yai Joshua lugeet eng' peetuusyek che chaang' kobooto laitorinichooto.
Joshua11:19 Ma piit nganaseet agot agenge ne ki yai kaalyeet ak piigap Israel kobatee Hibik che ki menyei Gibeon. Ki nam chooto tugul eng' pooryeet.
Joshua11:20 Ki ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki iuit mugulelwekwak si kobargei ak Israel eng' lugeet
Joshua11:21 Ki nyo Joshua eng' peetuusyechooto kobar Anagik kowong' eng' emetap tuloonook
Joshua11:22 Ma ng'et agot agenge Anagichooto eng' emetap piigap Israel; kobatee king'etune Gaza
Joshua11:23 Ki nam anyun Joshua emet komugul
Joshua12:1 Chu ko laitorinigap emonooto che ki par `piigap Israel ak konam emennywa kobunji; eng' Jordan pitoniin ole tokyingei kong'asiis
Joshua12:2 Sihon laitoryatap Amorik ne ki menyei Hesbon
Joshua12:3 Ki pou kora Arabah agoi nyanjetap Kinnereth kong'asiis kot koit nyanjetap Arabah ne nooto Araraitap Munyuk
Joshua12:4 ak Laitoryat Og ne po Bashan
Joshua12:5 Ki pounisyei ineendet eng' tulweetap Hermon

Joshua12:7 Chuuto laitorinigap emonooto che ki par `Joshua ak piigap Israel eng' Jordan pitoniin ole tokyingei cherongo

Joshua12:24 ak laitoryatap Tirzah agenge. Ki ek laitorinichooto tugul sosom ak agenge.
Joshua13:1 Kiga koosit Joshua amu kiga kotar kenyiisyek che chaang'. Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Joshua13:2 Ni emet ne ta ko ng'etunot: komoswek tugul che po Philistiik ak che po Gesurik
Joshua13:3 kiityin keele po `Kanaanik koroniito kobooch Sihor ne mi murot tai ne po Misiri
Joshua13:4 eng' murot tai
Joshua13:5 ak emetap Gebalik
Joshua13:6 Piik tugul che menyei emetap tuloonook kong'etee Lebanon kot koit Misrepotmaim agot Sidonik tugul
Joshua13:7 Pchechi anyun pororyosyechuuto sogool ak kebebertap eng' che po Manasseh.”
Joshua13:8 Ki sich porotennywa piigap Reuben ak che po Gad kobooto ne kigaigoochi Musa eng' Jordan pitoniin tokyingei kong'asiis
Joshua13:9 kobooch Aroer
Joshua13:10 nganasook tugul che po Sihon laitoryatap Amorik
Joshua13:11 Gilead ak kiwotetap Gesurik ak Maakatik ak tulweet tugul ne po Hermon ak Bashan tugul agoi Saleka
Joshua13:12 laitornatet tugul ne po Og eng' Bashan
Joshua13:13 Ago maon piigap Israel Gesurik anan ko Maakatik. Ki meny Gesurik ak Maakatik kwenutap Israel agoi ra.
Joshua13:14 Pororyetap Lawiik kityo ne ma igoochi poroteet
Joshua13:15 Ki igoochi `Musa pororyetap lagogap Reuben ko uu ortinwekwak.
Joshua13:16 Ki pooch kiwotennywa Aroer ne mi tabandap atebweetap Arnon ak nganaseet ne mi kwenutap atebweet kobooto warenget tugul ne neegitee Medeba
Joshua13:17 ak Hesbon ak nganasookyik tugul che mi warenget; Dibon ak Bamotbaal ak Beth-baal-meon
Joshua13:18 ak Jahas
Joshua13:19 Kiriataim
Joshua13:20 Beth-peor
Joshua13:21 Nganasook tugul che po warenget
Joshua13:22 Ki par `piigap Israel Balaam agine weeriitap Beor orgoiyot eng' rotwetap chok.
Joshua13:23 Kiwotetap lagogap Reuben ko ki Jordan ak tabandanyi. Niito poroteetap lagogap Reuben ko uu ortinwekwak
Joshua13:24 Ki igoochi `Musa pororyetap Gad
Joshua13:25 Kiwotennywa ko ki Jaser
Joshua13:26 kobooch Hesbon kot koit Ramat-mispe ak Betonim. Kobooch Mahanaim kot koit kiwotetap Debir
Joshua13:27 ak eng' atebweet
Joshua13:28 Niito ko poroteetap lagogap Gad ko uu ortinwekwak
Joshua13:29 Ki igoochi `Musa kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh poroteet. Ki punji icheek kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh ko uu ortinwekwak.
Joshua13:30 Kiboch kiwotennywa Mahanaim
Joshua13:31 Kibooto kebebertap Gilead
Joshua13:32 Chuuto ko porotosyek che kipchei `Musa eng' warengosyegap Moab Jordan pitoniin eng' Jeriko ne tokyingei kong'asiis.
Joshua13:33 Ago ma igoochi `Musa pororyetap Lawiik poroteet age tugul. Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua14:1 Chu ko porotosyek che kinyoor piigap Israel eng' emetap Kanaan che kipchechi icheek `Eleazar tisiindet
Joshua14:2 Ki pchei kosube parbareegap porotennywa ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa agobo pororyosyechooto sogool ak kebeberyat.
Joshua14:3 Kiga kogoochi `Musa poroteet pororyosyechooto aeng' ak kebeberyat eng' Jordan pitoniin. Ma igoochi `Lawiik poroteet age tugul eng' kwenunnywa.
Joshua14:4 Ki pororyosyek aeng' lagogap Joseph
Joshua14:5 Kipchei emet piigap Israel ko uu ye ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.
Joshua14:6 Ki riikta piigap Judah ole ki mi Joshua eng' Gilgal. Ki mwachi `Kaleb weeriitap Jepune Kenisindet ineendet koleenji
Joshua14:7 Ki abo kenyiisyek artam ye ki iyookwo `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Kadesh-barnea anyo asegei emet. Ki aipchi ineendet ng'olyoot ko uu ye ki mi muguleldanyu.
Joshua14:8 Ki igoochi tupchosyekyuk che ki kitogostoi tugul mugulelwegap piik komeiyo
Joshua14:9 Ki iyasyo anyun Musa peetuunooto kole
Joshua14:10 Ko uu nooto anyun
Joshua14:11 Ta atinye kimnateet rani ko uu eng' atkinye koyooktaa Musa. Kiit ne ki uu kimnateennyu eng' peetuunooto
Joshua14:12 Ara anyun
Joshua14:13 Ki iberuur `Joshua ineendet ak kogoochi Kaleb weeriitap Jepune Hebron koek porotennyi.
Joshua14:14 Ki ek anyun `Hebron poroteetap Kaleb weeriitap Jepune Kenisindet agoi ra
Joshua14:15 Kainetap Hebron eng' tai ko ki Kiriath-arba. Ki chiito ne oo Arba kosiir tugul eng' Anagik. Ki imuuny emet eng' lugeet.
Joshua15:1 Kebeberta ne ki ibutyi pororyetap lagogap Judah
Joshua15:2 Kibochit kiwotennywa ne po murot tai tabandap Araraitap Munyuk
Joshua15:3 Wendi kotokyigei murot tai ne po Akrabbim ak kosiirto kot koit Sin
Joshua15:4 Ki siirto kwo Asmon ak kwo komandae aineetap Misiri ak kwo kiwotonooto agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian. Egu nooto kiwoteng'wong' ne po murot tai.
Joshua15:5 Kiwotet eng' kong'asiis ko ki itei Araraitap Munyuk agoi Jordan. Kiwotetap kebeberta ne po murot kaataam
Joshua15:6 ak kwo kiwoteet kot koit Beth-hogla ak kosiirto kobun murot kaataam ne po Beth-araba
Joshua15:7 Kong'eetee yooto
Joshua15:8 Kwo kotestai kiwoteet agoi atebweetap weeriitap Hinom
Joshua15:9 Kong'eetee tulweet parak
Joshua15:10 Kong'eete Baala kotokyigei kiwotet cherongo agoi tulweetap Seir ak kosiirto kwo tabandap tulweetap Jearim eng' murot kaataam
Joshua15:11 Ki manda kiwoteet kora ak kwo tabandap Ekron murot kaataam
Joshua15:12 Kiwotet ne po cherongo
Joshua15:13 Ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua
Joshua15:14 Ki oon Kaleb eng' olooto weeriik somok che po Anak: Sheshai
Joshua15:15 Kong'eetee yooto kotogosta kwo kobargei ak che ki menyei Debir. Kainetap Debir eng' tai ko ki Kiriath-sepher.
Joshua15:16 Ki mwa Kaleb kole
Joshua15:17 Ki nam Othniel weeriitap Kenas ng'eetap kametap Kaleb nganasanooto
Joshua15:18 Kingo nyo kwonyooto ole mi ineendet
Joshua15:19 Kowol kole
Joshua15:20 Ni ko poroteetap pororyetap Judah ko uu ortinwekwak.
