Joshua16:1 Kebeberta ne ki ibutyi eng' parbaryat lagogap Joseph kotaune Jordan eng' Jeriko eng' kong'asiis agoi surkwen
Joshua16:2 Ki wo komanda eng' Bethel kwo komong'ji Luz ak kosiirto kot koit kooretap Arikik eng' Ataroth.
Joshua16:3 Ak kwo kochoortagei kotokyigei cherongo agoi kooretap Japhletik
Joshua16:4 Ki nam anyun lagogap Joseph
Joshua16:5 Kooretap lagogap Ephraim ko uu ortinwekwak ko uu ni; kiwotetap koorennywa kong'etee kong'asiis ne po Ataroth-addar kot koit Beth-horon parak
Joshua16:6 ak kwo kiwoteet kot koit araraitap Mediterenian. Eng' murot kaataam kowendi kiwoteet kong'etee Mikmethath agoi kong'asiis ne po Taanath-shiloh kosiirto kotogosta agoi kong'asiis ne po Janoah.
Joshua16:7 Kong'eete Janoah kochoortagei kwo Ataroth ak Naarah koit Jeriko ak kwo kot komong'ji Jordan.
Joshua16:8 Eng' cherongo
Joshua16:9 kobooto nganasook tugul ak kokwotinwekwak che ki kitabaanji Ephraim ak lagokyik eng' kwenutap poroteetap lagogap Manasseh.
Joshua16:10 Ago ma imuuch `icheek ko oon Kanaanik che ki menyei Gezer. Ki meny anyun Kanaanik kwenutap Ephraim agoi rani ak ki ek otwogik che yaei poisyonigap otwoknateet.
Joshua17:1 Ni ko kebeberta ne ki ibutyi eng' parbaryat pororyetap Manasseh; amu kitaita ne po Joseph. Ko uu Makir
Joshua17:2 Ki punji lagogap Manasseh che ki ng'et
Joshua17:3 Kimasich weeriik Zelophehad weeriitap Hepher
Joshua17:4 Ki pwa icheek tait ne po Eleazar tisiindet
Joshua17:5 Ki sich Manasseh kebeberwek taman koma pooto emetap Gilead ak Bashan
Joshua17:6 amu ki tinyei tiibiigap Manasseh poroteet kobooto weeriikyik. Ak ki punji emetap Gilead weeriigap Manasseh che ki ng'et.
Joshua17:7 Kiwotetap Manasseh kong'etee Asher kot koit Mikmethath
Joshua17:8 Ki po Manasseh emetap Tappuah
Joshua17:9 Kichoortage kiwoteet kwo aineetap Kanah. Nganasochooto mi komostap tai kobunjiin Ephraim koek che kaginemu eng' nganasoogap Manasseh. Kiwotetap Manasseh komi komostap kaataam ne po aineet ak kwo komong'ji nyanjetap Mediterenian.
Joshua17:10 Po Ephraim ne mi komostap tai
Joshua17:11 Eng' Issakar ak eng' Asher
Joshua17:12 Ago ki ma imuuch lagogap Manasseh koon piik che ki menyei nganasochooto. Amu kigamach Kanaanik komeng'iis eng' emonooto
Joshua17:13 ko ye kiga kogimegitu piigap Israel
Joshua17:14 Ki ng'alaalji `lagogap Joseph Joshua koleenji
Joshua17:15 Ak ki leenji Joshua icheek
Joshua17:16 Ki mwa `lagogap Joseph kole
Joshua17:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Joshua kootap Joseph che Ephraim ak Manasseh koleenji
Joshua17:18 ago punjinin emetap tuloonook
Joshua18:1 Ki iyumgei tuiyet tugul ne po piigap Israel eng' Shiloh ak koteech eng' olooto emait ne kituiyechin. Ki iterteerat anyun emonooto eng' tainnywa.
Joshua18:2 Ki ng'et eng' piigap Israel pororyosyek tisabu che kitom kopchei porotennywa.
Joshua18:3 Ara anyun ki leenji `Joshua piigap Israel
Joshua18:4 Olewenjigei piik somok eng' pororyet age tugul
Joshua18:5 Ngo pchei koek kebeberwek tisap
Joshua18:6 Osir emonooto koek kebeberwek tisap yeityo oibwa siranooto
Joshua18:7 Amu ma tinyei Lawiik kebeberta eng' kwenung'wong'
Joshua18:8 Ara anyun king'eetyo piik ak koba; ak ki iyomis `Joshua piik che kigaba kosiir oleteptoi emet koleenji
Joshua18:9 Ki pa anyun pichooto kobun emet ak kosirchi bukuit kobee nganasook koek kebeberwek tisap yeityo kobwa ole mi Joshua eng' nganaseet eng' Shiloh.
Joshua18:10 Ak ki iser `Joshua parbareek agobo icheek eng' Shiloh eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Ak kipchechi `Joshua emet piigap Israel ko uu pcheutikwak eng' olooto.
Joshua18:11 Ki piit kuraitap pororyetap lagogap Benjamin ko uu ortinwekwak. Ak ki wo kiwotetap parbaryannywa
Joshua18:12 King'eete kiwotennywa ne po komostap kaataam Jordan ak kitogosta kiwotennywa kobun tabandap Jeriko eng' murot kaataam ak kotogosta kobun emetap tuloonook kotokyigei cherongo. Kimong'ji kiwotennywa surkwen ne po Beth-aben.
Joshua18:13 Ki wo kiwoteet eng' olooto agoi Luz
Joshua18:14 Yeityo keetil kiwoteet keyiem komostap cherongo ole tokyingei murot tai kong'etee tulweet ne mi taitap Beth-horon ne tokyingei murot tai komong'ji kiwotennyi Kiriath-baal (nooto ko Kiriath-Jearim) nganaseetap lagogap Judah: niito ko ki komostap cherongo.
Joshua18:15 King'eete murot tai tabandap Kiriath-Jearim
Joshua18:16 Yeityo kochoortagei kiwoteet agoi tabandap tulweet ne mi taitap atebweetap weeriitap Hinom
Joshua18:17 Yeityo kiwech kobun murot kaataam
Joshua18:18 ak kosiirto kobun tabanda ne tokyingei Arabah murot kaataam ak kochoortagei kot koit Arabah.
Joshua18:19 Yeityo kwo kiwoteet kobun tabandap Beth-hogla kotokyigei murot kaataam ak komong'ji ole kiluktoegei peek murot kaataam ne po Araraita ne po Munyuk eng' murot tai ye pooch Jordan: niito ko ki kiwootet ne po murot tai.
Joshua18:20 Ki Jordan kiwotennyi eng' komostap kong'asiis. Niito ko ki poroteetap lagogap Benjamin ko uu kiwotosyekyik che ki imut komoswek tugul ko uu ortinwekwak.
Joshua18:21 Nganasoogap pororyetap lagogap Benjamin ko uu ortinwekwak ko ki Jeriko
Joshua18:22 Beth-araba
Joshua18:23 Abim
Joshua18:24 Keparamoni
Joshua18:25 Gibeon
Joshua18:26 Mispe
Joshua18:27 Rekem
Joshua18:28 Shelah
Joshua19:1 Ki mong' parparyatap aeng' kobutyi pororyetap lagogap Simion ko uu ortinwekwak. Ki imii porotennywa kwenutap poroteetap lagogap Judah.
Joshua19:2 Kigebeberta ne po porotennywa Beer-sheba
Joshua19:3 Hasarsual
Joshua19:4 Eltolat
Joshua19:5 Ziklag
Joshua19:6 Beth-lebaot ak Saruen. Tugul kogi nganasook taman ak somok kobooto kokwotinwekwak.
Joshua19:7 Ain
Joshua19:8 ak kokwotinwek tugul che ki yiem nganasochuuto agoi Balat-Beer
Joshua19:9 Ki pun poroteetap lagogap Simion kebeberta ne po lagogap Judah; ki amu ki oo kebeberta ne po Judah kosiir
Joshua19:10 Ki mong' parparyatap somok kobutyi lagogap Zebulun ko uu ortinwekwak. Kiwotetap porotennywa kogiwo agoi Sarid
Joshua19:11 ak kotogosta kotokyigei cherongo kot koit Marala ak kotiny Dabeset
Joshua19:12 Kong'eetee Sarid
Joshua19:13 Kisiirto kong'etee yooto kotokyigei kong'asiis kwo Get-eper agoi Et-kasin
Joshua19:14 Kiyiemak kiwoteet eng' murot kaataam kwo Hannathon ak kobekyi atebweetap Ipta-el
Joshua19:15 Katat
Joshua19:16 Ni ko poroteetap lagogap Zebulun ko uu ortinwekwak; nganasochu kobooto kokwotinwekwak.
Joshua19:17 Ki mong' parparyatap ang'wan ne po lagogap Issakar ko uu ortinwekwak.
Joshua19:18 Ki it kiwotennywa Jezreel
Joshua19:19 Aparaim
Joshua19:20 Rabit
Joshua19:21 Remet
Joshua19:22 Kitiiny kora kiwoteet Tabor
Joshua19:23 Ni ko poroteet ne po pororyetap lagogap Issakar ko uu ortinwekwak; kokwatinwek kobooto nganasookwak che mengeechen.
Joshua19:24 Ki mong' paraparyatap muut kobutyi pororyetap lagogap Asher ko uu ortinwekwak.
Joshua19:25 Ki kiwotennywa Helkat
Joshua19:26 Alamelek
Joshua19:27 Kong'eetee yooto koweek kotokyigei kong'asiis ak kwo agoi Beth-dagon
Joshua19:28 ak Hebron
Joshua19:29 Eng' yooto koweegak kiwoteet kwo Ramah ak koit nganaseetap Tyro ne ki king'ot
Joshua19:30 Uma
Joshua19:31 Ni ko poroteet ne po pororyetap lagogap Asher ko uu ortinwekwak; nganasochu ak kokwotinwekwak.
Joshua19:32 Ki mong' parparyat ne po lo kobutyi lagogap Naphtali ko uu ortinwekwak.
Joshua19:33 King'eete kiwotennywa Helep
Joshua19:34 Eng' yooto koweek kiwoteet kotokyigei cherongo kwo Asnot-tabor
Joshua19:35 Nganasook che kiga king'ot ko Sidim
Joshua19:36 Adama
Joshua19:37 Kedesh
Joshua19:38 Iron
Joshua19:39 Ni ko poroteet ne po pororyetap lagogap Naphtali ko uu ortinwekwak; nganasook kobooto kokwotinwekwak.
Joshua19:40 Ki mong' parparyat ne po tisap kobutyi pororyetap lagogap Dan ko uu ortinwekwak.
Joshua19:41 Kiwotetap porotennywa ko ki Sora
Joshua19:42 Saalabin
Joshua19:43 Elon
Joshua19:44 Elteke
Joshua19:45 Jeud
Joshua19:46 Mejarkon ak Rakon
Joshua19:47 Ye ki ngerebee koreet lagogap Dan
Joshua19:48 Ni ko poroteet ne po pororyetap Dan ko uu ortinwekwak; nganasochu ak kokwotinwekwak.
Joshua19:49 Kingo kes anyun kopchee takwegap emet ko porotosyek
Joshua19:50 Ki igoochi nganaseetap Timnatsera eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim ne kigasoom ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua19:51 Chu porotosyek che kipchei eng' parbarek tisiindet Eleazar ak Joshua weeriitap Nun kobooto che eecheen eng' kooriigap kwanisyek che po pororyosyegap piigap Israel. Kipchei eng' Shiloh koek poroteet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin. Ki iges anyun pcheetap emet.
Joshua20:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji
Joshua20:2 Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin
Joshua20:3 Mwechin rumiindet age tugul ne kalel ko manai ak koek eng' okweek ole kimwechin keungei ineendet ne yaaktoi korotiik.
Joshua20:4 Mwechin `rumindonooto age eng' nganasochooto yeityo kotonon eng' kurgeetap nganaseet ak komwa ng'aleekyik kogas poisyegap nganasanooto. Ye ibata
Joshua20:5 Ngot koon ineendet ne yaaktoi korotiik koma igoitoi poisyek rumindonooto kwo eunekyik
Joshua20:6 Myee anyun komeny nganasanooto agoi kwo kotonon eng' taitap tuiyet si kirwookyi. Menye olooto kot kome tisiindet ne oo ne mi eng' peetuusyechooto. Ye me tisiindonooto
Joshua20:7 Amu nooto anyun
Joshua20:8 Eng' Jordan pitoniin eng' Jeriko ne tokyingei kong'asiis
Joshua20:9 Chuuto kogi nganasook che ki kitabaanji lagok tugul che po Israel ak che po punootyot ne menyei kwenunnywa. Ki kiitabaan keele si komwechi olooto chii age tugul ne kabar chii ama nai si ma me eng' eutap ne yaaktoi korotiik kot kotonon eng' taitap tuiyet.
Joshua21:1 Kingo pata
Joshua21:2 Ki ng'alaalji icheek eng' Shiloh eng' emetap Kanaan
Joshua21:3 Ak ki igoochi `piigap Israel Lawiik eng' porotennywa ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua21:4 King'eyai kurainik
Joshua21:5 Ki sich eng' kuraitap lagogap Kohat che ki ng'et nganasook taman eng' ortinwegap pororyosyegap Ephraim
Joshua21:6 Ki sich eng' kurait lagogap Gerson nganasook taman ak somok eng' ortinwegap ooreetap Issakar
Joshua21:7 Ki sich eng' kurait lagogap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak nganasook taman ak aeng' eng' pororyetap Reuben
Joshua21:8 Ki igoochi anyun eng' kurait `piigap Israel Lawiik nganasochooto kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' eutap Musa.
Joshua21:9 Ki igoito eng' pororyetap lagogap Judah ak eng' pororyetap lagogap Simion nganasochu kagimwa eng' yu eng' kainaik:
Joshua21:10 Ki punji chooto lagogap Aron che po ortinwegap Kohatik che ki po lagogap Lawi: amu ki nenywa kuraitap tai.
Joshua21:11 Ki igoochi Kiriath-arba kwandap Anak (nooto ko Hebron) eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Judah kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye che kiyiem.
Joshua21:12 Ago ki igoochi Kaleb weeriitap Jepune korotinwegap nganaseet kobunji kobooto kokwotinwekwak.
Joshua21:13 Ki igoochi icheek `lagogap Aron tisiindet Hebron kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
Joshua21:14 ak Jatir kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
Joshua21:15 Holon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Debir kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
Joshua21:16 ak Ain kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Juta kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
Joshua21:17 Eng' pororyetap Benjamin
Joshua21:18 Anatoth kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Almon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook ang'wan.
Joshua21:19 Nganasook tugul che po lagogap Aron
Joshua21:20 Ak ki sich ortinwegap lagogap Kohat
Joshua21:21 Ki igoochi icheek Shekem kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim
Joshua21:22 Ak Kibasaim kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Beth-horon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook ang'wan.
Joshua21:23 Eng' pororyetap Dan
Joshua21:24 Aijalon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Gat-rimon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook ang'wan.
Joshua21:25 Ak eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh
Joshua21:26 Nganasook tugul che po ortinwegap lagogap Kohat che ki ng'et ko ki taman kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye.
Joshua21:27 Ki igoochi lagogap Gerson eng' ortinwegap Lawiik eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh
Joshua21:28 Eng' pororyetap Issakar ko ki Kision kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
Joshua21:29 Jarmut kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak En-ganim kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye; nganasook ang'wan.
Joshua21:30 Eng' pororyetap Asher
Joshua21:31 Elkat kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Rehob kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
Joshua21:32 Ak eng' pororyetap Naphtali
Joshua21:33 Nganasook tugul che po Gershonik ko uu ortinwekwak
Joshua21:34 Ki igoochi ortinwegap lagogap Merari che icheek che ki ng'et eng' Lawiik eng' pororyetap Zebulun
Joshua21:35 Dimna kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
Joshua21:36 Eng' pororyetap Reuben
Joshua21:37 Kedemot kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Mepaat kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook ang'wan.
Joshua21:38 Eng' pororyetap Gad
Joshua21:39 ak Hesbon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
Joshua21:40 Chuuto tugul kogi nganasoogap lagogap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak kobooto che ki ng'et eng' ortinwegap Lawiik; ak kurainnywa kogi nganasook taman ak aeng'.
Joshua21:41 Nganasook tugul che po Lawiik eng' kwenutap emetap piigap Israel kogi nganasook artam ak sisiit kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye.
Joshua21:42 Ki tinyei age tugul eng' nganasochuuto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye che kiyiem ak ki uu nooto eng' nganasochuuto tugul.
Joshua21:43 Ki igoochi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel emet tugul ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyekwak kole tuun igoochin ak ki nam kobunji ak komeny
Joshua21:44 ak ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kamuung'et eng' komoswek tugul
Joshua21:45 Ki isulda ng'aleek tugul che myach che kiga komwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Israel
Joshua22:1 Ki kuur anyun `Joshua piigap Reuben
Joshua22:2 ak koleenji icheek
Joshua22:3 Ma omete tupchosyekwok eng' peetuusyechu chaang' agoi peetuuni ago ki oriip kayomisetap ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.
Joshua22:4 Ak nguno ko kagogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' tupchosyekwok kamuung'et ko uu ye ki mwachi. Oweeige anyun nguno ak obe emaisyekwok agoi emet ne kibunjok ne ki koonok Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jordan pitoniin.
Joshua22:5 Ago oriipkei miising' oyai kayomisutyet ak ng'atuutyet che king'ataak Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua22:6 Ki iberuur anyun `Joshua icheek ak koleenji koba
Joshua22:7 Kiga kogoochi `Musa kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh poroteet eng' Bashan: ak ki igoochi `Joshua kebeberta age ne po pororyonooto poroteet eng' kwenutap tupchosyekwak eng' Jordan pitoniin ole tokyingei cherongo. Ak kingo machei `Joshua komwachi icheek koba emaisyekwak koberuur
Joshua22:8 ak kong'alaalji koleenji
Joshua22:9 Ki week anyun lagogap Reuben
Joshua22:10 Ye kingo it emet ne neegit Jordan
Joshua22:11 Kingo kas piigap Israel kemwaei koleen kogoteech kaptisisyet lagogap Reuben
Joshua22:12 koyumgei tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel eng' Shiloh kole koba kobargei ak pichooto.
Joshua22:13 Ki iyookto piigap Israel piik che ki indochin Phineas weeriitap Eleazar tisiindet koba emetap Gilead ole mi lagogap Reuben
Joshua22:14 Ki mi kobooto Phineas pounik tamanu; kobunu pounindet age tugul kootap kwanisyek eng' pororyetap age tugul ne po pororyosyegap Israel ak age tugul ko ki ne oo eng' kootap kwanisyekwak eng' eliphusyegap Israel.
Joshua22:15 Ki pwa anyun ole mi lagogap Reuben
Joshua22:16 “Kamwa ko uu ni tuiyet komugul ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Joshua22:17 Tos mayamech tengektap Peor ne tomo kitiliilgei eng' tengegoto agoi ra
Joshua22:18 Ago kaomaste rani eng' kasubet ne osubi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Amu kaongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani
Joshua22:19 Ago ngo ma ianyinyat emet ne neng'wong'
Joshua22:20 Tos ki ma ibutyi nereegek tuiyet komugul ne po Israel amu ki yai Akan weeriitap Zerah chalwokto eng' kiit ne ki itabaanat ak tos kimalus chiichooto ineegei eng' tengektanyi?”
Joshua22:21 Ki wol anyun lagogap Reuben
Joshua22:22 “Ingen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua22:23 keteekyigei kaptisisyet kemaste eng' kasubet ne kisubi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anan ngot kemache kigoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei anan ngot ko kagoochinetap peek anan ngot kigoite korosegap kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet ko ingoyaakta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei.
Joshua22:24 Anan ngot ko ki kiyai kii eng' riibetapkei agobo kiy keele
Joshua22:25 Amu ki yai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jordan koek kiwotennyo ak okweek lagogap Reuben ak lagogap Gad. Motinye kebeberta eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua22:26 Nooto anyun ko kogimwa keele
Joshua22:27 ago si koek paornateet eng' kwenunnyo acheek ak okweek ak eng' kwenutap ibinwek che piitu let eng' acheek si kobiit keyai poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tainnyi eng' kagoochinoikyok che kibeelei ak eng' tiseiywekyok ak eng' kagoochinoikyok che po kaalyeet
Joshua22:28 Amu nooto
Joshua22:29 Ingolooit eng' acheek ama kingelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua22:30 Kingo kas Phineas tisiindet
Joshua22:31 Ki wolji Phineas weeriitap Eleazar tisiindet lagogap Reuben
Joshua22:32 Eng' yooto koweek Phineas weeriitap Eleazar tisiindet kobooto pounik eng' ole mi lagogap Reuben
Joshua22:33 Ki ibaibai kioto piigap Israel
Joshua22:34 Ki kuure anyun lagogap Reuben ak lagogap Gad kaptisisyonooto Ed
Joshua23:1 Kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang' ye kingo kagogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel kamuung'et eng' puunikwak tugul eng' komoswek tugul
Joshua23:2 koguur anyun `Joshua Israel tugul
Joshua23:3 Ki ogeer tuguuk tugul che ki koyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' pororyosyechu tugul amu okweek
Joshua23:4 Ki apcheiywok pororyosyechu kang'et koek poroteetap ortinwekwok kobooch Jordan
Joshua23:5 Timdoi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' icheek eng' taing'wong' ak koon si ma ogeere; ak onam emennywa kobunjook
Joshua23:6 Onyiganitu anyun miising' si oriip ak oyai tuguuk tugul che ki kisir eng' bukuitap Ng'atuutik ne po Musa
Joshua23:7 si mobe kwenutap pororyosyechu chuuto kong'et eng' kwenung'wong' anan omwa kainaigap kanamonikwak anan oyosye eng' icheek anan oot anan ogutung'ji.
Joshua23:8 Ago onamge ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko uu ye ki oyai agoi ra.
Joshua23:9 Amu ki koon `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taing'wong' pororyosyek che eecheen ak ko kiimeen. Ago ma piit chii ne ki tonon eng' taing'wong' agoi ra.
Joshua23:10 Oone chiito agenge eng' okweek eliphuut amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne yaei lugeet agobo okweek ko uu ye kimwaiwok.
Joshua23:11 Oriipkei anyun miising' si ocham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.
Joshua23:12 Amu ngot ochuchuigei obe let eng' kiy age tugul ak onamge ak pororyosyechuuto ki ng'et eng' kwenung'wong'
Joshua23:13 onai komyee ole ma koonei kogeny Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' pororyosyechuuto eng' taing'wong'
Joshua23:14 “Awendi anyun rani ooreet ne pendi piik tugul che po ng'wony. Ongen eng' mugulelwekwok tugul ak eng' saboonwekwok tugul
Joshua23:15 Ago onai anyun ole
Joshua23:16 “Ngo ngelelji kayomisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Joshua24:1 Ki iyum anyun `Joshua pororyosyek tugul che po Israel koba Shekem
Joshua24:2 Yeityo kong'alaal `Joshua ak koleenji piik tugul
Joshua24:3 Ki amutu kwandang'wong' Abraham eng' aineet pitoniin ak amutate eng' emet tugul ne po Kanaan ak ates iyotennyi agoochi Isak.
Joshua24:4 Ki agoochi `Isak Jakobo ak Esau
Joshua24:5 Ki ayookte `Musa ak Aron
Joshua24:6 Yeityo anyun amutu kwanisyekwok komang'une Misiri ak ki obwa agoi nyanjet. Ki oon Misiriik kwanisyekwok eng' kariisyek ak piik che ketei paraisisyek kot koit Araraita ne Piriir.
Joshua24:7 Kingo riirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konde mesundeito kwenung'wong' ak Misiriik ak koip nyanjet komaaluuch icheek ak kotuch. Ki keer iman konyekwok kiit ne ki ayai eng' Misiri. Eng' let ko ki omeny surkwen peetuusyek che chaang'.
Joshua24:8 Yeityo amutwak oitu emetap Amorik che ki menyei Jordan pitoniin. Ki yai lugeet ak okweek ak ki ande icheeget eunekwok ak ki onam emennywa kobunjook
Joshua24:9 Ki ng'eet anyun Balak weeriitap Sipor laitoryatap Moab ak kobargei ak Israel. Ki iyookto ineendet keguur Balaam weeriitap Beor konyo kochubok.
Joshua24:10 Ago ma acham agas ng'aleegap Balaam. Eng' nooto anyun
Joshua24:11 Ki olong'une `Jordan obwa Jeriko ak ki yai lugeet ak okweek piigap Jeriko
Joshua24:12 Ki ayookte kaaraamyet kondoenak eng' taing'wong' ne ki oon laitorinichooto aeng' po Amorik; ma eng' rotweng'ung' po chok anan kwangeng'ung'.
Joshua24:13 Ki agoonok emet ne kimaoyai kiy
Joshua24:14 “Oiywei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oboisyechi ineendet eng' muguleldo ne ma tinyei keniisyet ak eng' imanit. Oiste kanamonik che kiotei kwanisyekwok eng' aineet pitoniin ak eng' Misiri
Joshua24:15 Ago ngot ogeere ko ya oboisyechini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua24:16 Ki wol pichooto kole
Joshua24:17 Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joshua24:18 Ki oon `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik tugul koba eng' tainnyo
Joshua24:19 Koleenji `Joshua piik
Joshua24:20 Ngot omete Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oot kamuktaik che too
Joshua24:21 Ak ki leenji `piik Joshua
Joshua24:22 Ak ki leenji `Joshua piik
Joshua24:23 Ara anyun
Joshua24:24 Koleenji `piik Joshua
Joshua24:25 Koyomiskei `Joshua anyun ak pichooto peetuunooto
Joshua24:26 Ki sir ng'aleechuuto `Joshua eng' bukuitap ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet. Ki inem koita ne oo ak konde kotonon eng' keetitap alayet keel ne ki mi ye po ole-tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Joshua24:27 Yeityo komwachi `Joshua piik tugul koleenji
Joshua24:28 Ki leenji anyun Joshua piik koba
Joshua24:29 Kingo pata tuguuchuuto
Joshua24:30 Kitup `icheek ineendet anyun eng' kiwotetap porotennyi eng' Timnat-sera ne mi emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim
Joshua24:31 Kiboisyechi Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Joshua ak eng' peetuusyek tugul che po poisyek che kita komi ko kagome Joshua
Joshua24:32 Kitup icheek kawegap Joseph eng' Shekem che ki ibu piigap Israel eng' Misiri eng' kebebertap emet ne kigaal Jakobo eng' weeriigap Hamor kwandap Shekem eng' fedhaisyek pogol
Joshua24:33 Kime agine Eleazar weeriitap Aron
Judges1:1 Kingo pata meetap Joshua
Judges1:2 Kole Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges1:3 Ki leenji `Judah tupchennyi Simion
Judges1:4 Ki togosta anyun Judah ak ki inde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunekwak Kanaanik ak Perisik. Ki par piik eliphuusyek taman eng' Besek.
Judges1:5 Ki nyoor `icheek Adoni-besek eng' Besek
Judges1:6 Ki mwei Adoni-besek; ago ki oon ineendet ak ki nam ak kotil moriikyik che eecheen che po eunek ak che po keelyek.
Judges1:7 Ki mwa Adoni-besek kole
Judges1:8 Ki ibookyi `lagogap Judah Jerusalem ak konam. Kibare rotwetap chok ak kobeel nganaseet eng' maat.
Judges1:9 Kingo pata
Judges1:10 Kibargei Judah kora ak Kanaanik che ki menyei Hebron
Judges1:11 Ki wo eng' yooto kobargei ak piik che ki menyei Debir. Kainetap Debir eng' tai ko ki Kiriath-sepher.
Judges1:12 Ki mwa Kaleb kole
Judges1:13 Ki nam nganaseet Othniel weeriitap Kenas
Judges1:14 Kingo nyo Achsah ole mi Othniel
Judges1:15 Kole ineendet
Judges1:16 Ki togosta lagogap Kenindet
Judges1:17 Ki pa Judah ak Simion ng'eetap kamet
Judges1:18 Ki nam Judah nganasoogap Gasar
Judges1:19 Ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Judah
Judges1:20 Ki kigoochi Kaleb Hebron ko uu ye ki kamwa Musa
Judges1:21 Ma oon `lagogap Benjamin Jebusik che ki menyei Jerusalem; ko uu nooto
Judges1:22 Ki pa kotogosta che po kootap Joseph ak icheek kobargei ak Bethel
Judges1:23 Ki iyookto che po kootap Joseph piik koba kosegei Bethel. Kainetap nganasanooto eng' tai ko ki Luz.
Judges1:24 Kingo keer segeik chiito ne ki mang'une nganaseet
Judges1:25 Ki iboorchi ole kibunei kechutei nganaseet ak ki par nganaseet eng' rotwetap chok. Ki pagaakta chiichooto ak koonnyi tugul kobechigei.
Judges1:26 Ki wo chiichooto emetap Hitik ak koteech nganaseet
Judges1:27 Ma oon Manasseh meng'iigap Beth-shean ak nganasookyik
Judges1:28 Kingo kagogimegitu Israel
Judges1:29 Ma oon Ephraim agine Kanaanik che ki menyei Gezer
Judges1:30 Ma oon Zebulun piik che ki menyei Kitron anan che ki menyei Naalal. Ki testai Kanaanik komeny kwenunnywa ak koek che yaei poisyetap otwoknateet.
Judges1:31 Ma oon Asher piik che ki menyei Ako
Judges1:32 Ago kimeng'iis Aserik eng' kwenutap Kanaanik che ki menyei emonooto
Judges1:33 Ma oon Naphtali meng'iigap Beth-shemesh
Judges1:34 Ki toorta `Amorik lagogap Dan koweekyi emetap tuloonook
Judges1:35 Kimach Amorik komeny tulweetap Heres eng' Aijalon
Judges1:36 Ki wo kiwotetap Amorik kong'etee ole togosyin Akrabbim kot koit Shelah ak kotogosta.
Judges2:1 Ki togos malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Gilgal konyo Bochim ak kole
Judges2:2 Eng' kebebertang'wong' ko mat oyai arorut ak piik che menyei emoni. Obut kapkorosusyekwak.’ Ago ma ogas iit kutinnyu. Nee ni ka oyai?
Judges2:3 Ki amwa ale ma oone icheek koba eng' taing'wong'
Judges2:4 Kingo kagomwachi malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleechu lagok tugul che po Israel
Judges2:5 Ak kiguure yooto Bochim
Judges2:6 Kingo kagoleenji `Joshua piik koba
Judges2:7 Kiboisyechi `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Joshua
Judges2:8 Kime Joshua weeriitap Nun otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko po kenyiisyek pogol ak taman.
Judges2:9 Kitup `icheek ineendet eng' kiwotetap emennyi eng' Timnat-heres
Judges2:10 Ki pek ak icheek tugul che po ibinato ak ki kiyumji kapkwanisyekwak. Ki piit ibinda age eng' let ne ki ma kongen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges2:11 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koot Baalik.
Judges2:12 Ki meto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges2:13 Ki meto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges2:14 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel
Judges2:15 Komosta age tugul ole ki pa icheek
Judges2:16 Ki ing'eetyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kirwoogik
Judges2:17 Nga no
Judges2:18 Kingo ng'eetyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwoogik
Judges2:19 Ago kingo me kirwoogindet
Judges2:20 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel ak komwa kole
Judges2:21 koma aoone eng' tainnywa age tugul eng' pororyosyek che ki pagaakta Joshua ye kingo kagome.
Judges2:22 Aboisyee icheek atyemee Israel si ageer ngot komuuchi koriip kobendatee iman ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki riip kwanisyekwak.”
Judges2:23 Ki pagaakta anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyechooto
Judges3:1 Chu pororyosyek che ki pagaakta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobiit kotyeme Israel tugul chooto ki ma nai agobo lugosyegap Kanaan
Judges3:2 (si kobiit konai agobo lugeet ibinwegap piigap Israel
Judges3:3 icheek ko ki kiptainik muut che po Philistiik
Judges3:4 Ki kibagaakta icheek si kobiit ketyeme Israel
Judges3:5 Ara ki meny piigap Israel kwenutap Kanaanik
Judges3:6 Ki imut tiibiikwak koek osotikwak
Judges3:7 Ki yai ne ya piigap Israel eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges3:8 Nooto anyun kinereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel
Judges3:9 Ye kingo riirchi `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges3:10 Ki nyoonji ineendet Kabuuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges3:11 Ak ki imuuny emet kenyiisyek artam. Ak ki me Othniel weeriitap Kenas.
Judges3:12 Ki yai ne ya piigap Israel kogeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges3:13 Ki iyum Elgon lagogap Ammon ak Amelek kobwa kobar Israel
Judges3:14 Ki oot piigap Israel Eglon laitoryatap Moabik kenyiisyek taman ak sisiit.
Judges3:15 Ago ye kingo riirchi piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges3:16 Ki itang'jigei Ehud rotwetap chok ne ng'atiben komoswek tuwai
Judges3:17 Ki ipchi `ineendet kagoochinonooto Eglon laitoryatap Moab. Ki chiito ne neraat miising' Eglon.
Judges3:18 Ye kingo kagogoito kagoochinonooto
Judges3:19 Ago ki week ineendet eng' ole ki mi kanamonik eng' ole neegitee Gilgal
Judges3:20 Ki nyo Ehud ole mi ineendet; ye kitebyei ineegei eng' koonnyi ne ki uuree. Ak ki le Ehud
Judges3:21 Ki iyogoito eunnyi ne po kaataam Ehud ak konem rotwetap chok eng' kubestanyi ne po tai ak kotoor moennyi.
Judges3:22 Ki wo rotweet oriit kobooto kungit; ak ki tuch sundet rotwonooto
Judges3:23 Ki manda anyun Ehud kwo serem ak koger kurgotik
Judges3:24 Ye kingo kagomanda
Judges3:25 Ki igenis anyun kot kolilaanso. Kingo keer icheek kole ma yaat ineendet kurgotigap koot
Judges3:26 Ki chilil Ehud ye kita koogenisyei icheek ak kwo kosiirtoe kanamonik
Judges3:27 Kingo it Ehud emennyi
Judges3:28 Ki leenji icheek
Judges3:29 Ki par icheek eng' peetuunooto murenik olo po eliphuusyek taman che po Moab
Judges3:30 Ki kiterteer Moab peetuunooto eng' eutap Israel. Ak ki imuuny emet eng' kenyiisyek tamanwogik sisiit.
Judges3:31 Kingo pata ineendet kobiit Shamgar weeriitap Anat ne ki par murenik pogol lo che po Philistiik eng' kiplitwet. Ki sar ineendet agine Israel.
Judges4:1 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet kogeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye kingo kagome Ehud.
Judges4:2 Ki alda `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek koba eunegap Jabin laitoryatap Kanaan
Judges4:3 Ki riirchi anyun `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki tinyei kariisyegap kariik pogol sogool
Judges4:4 Eng' peetuusyechooto
Judges4:5 Ki tebee tiiretap Debora keel eng' kwenutap Ramah ak Bethel eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim. Ki cham kotogosu piigap Israel ole mi ineendet kobwanei kirwooget.
Judges4:6 Ki iyookto ineendet kole keguur Barak weeriitap Abinoam eng' Kedes-naptali ak koleenji
Judges4:7 Amutun Sisera kandoindet ne po lugeetap Jabin
Judges4:8 Kowolji Barak kole
Judges4:9 Kole
Judges4:10 Ki kuur `Barak Zebulun ak Naphtali kobwa Kedesh. Ki togosta koba kiplugotinik eliphuusyek tamanu koosup ineendet
Judges4:11 Kiga kotabaanegei Heber Kenindet
Judges4:12 Ye ki ngemwachi Sisera keleenji kowa Barak weeriitap Abinoam kotogosta tulweetap Tabor
Judges4:13 koyum kariisyekyik tugul
Judges4:14 Koleenji Debora Barak
Judges4:15 Ki iseer `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Sisera kobooto kariisyekyik tugul ak lugeennyi tugul eng' rotwetap chok eng' taitap Barak. Ki choorgei Sisera eng' chepkichutinnyi ak komwei eng' keeldo.
Judges4:16 Ki oon Barak kariisyek kobooto lugeet kot koit Haroset. Ki pek lugeet komugul ne po Sisera eng' rotwetap chok kot koma ng'et chii.
Judges4:17 Ki mwei Sisera kobun keeldo
Judges4:18 Ki manda Jael kotorookto Sisera ak koleenji ineendet
Judges4:19 Yeityo koleenji
Judges4:20 Ki leenji chiichooto ineendet
Judges4:21 Ki inem Jael osotyotap Heber tigongyotap emait ak kiriswet ak kwo kosapchi yeityo kotoree tigongyondonooto mwaitap kondanyi kot komanda kwo kotoor ng'wonyut; ki ruei ineendet miising' amu ki kang'et
Judges4:22 Ye kingo ta koonei `Barak Sisera
Judges4:23 Eng' peetuunooto anyun
Judges4:24 Kong'eete peetuunooto

Judges5:7 Kimatagomi pounik eng' Israel
Judges5:8 Ki lewen kamuktaik alak
Judges5:9 Tokyingei muguleldanyu pounigap Israel

Judges5:11 Eng' cheetap putiik
Judges5:12 Ng'eet

Judges5:31 Ingobek kowong'kei puuniguk tugul
Judges6:1 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunegap Midian kenyiisyek tisap.
Judges6:2 Ak ki iterteer eutap `Midian Israel. Ki paljigei piigap Israel keriingonik eng' tuloonook
Judges6:3 Ye kingo kagogolso Israel
Judges6:4 Kibwane konyo koteech emennywa ak kong'em ruroteetap emet
Judges6:5 Amu ki pwa kotogos ak tuukwak ak emaisyekwak
Judges6:6 Ara kinyoor Israel nyalilda ne oo amu Midianik
Judges6:7 Ak ye kingo riirchi piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu Midianik
Judges6:8 koyookyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek maotyot. Ki mwachi koleenji
Judges6:9 Ki atyachak eng' eutap Misiriik
Judges6:10 Ki aleenjok
Judges6:11 Ki nyo malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kotebee keetitap alayet keel ne ki mi Ophrah
Judges6:12 Ak ki mong'ji ineendet malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koleenji
Judges6:13 Ak ki leenji `Gideon ineendet
Judges6:14 Ak kigusyi kong' `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ak koleenji
Judges6:15 Koleenji Gideon
Judges6:16 Ak ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges6:17 Ki leenji Gideon
Judges6:18 Asaain ale amat iwe eng' yu agoi anyo ole imi
Judges6:19 Ki wo anyun Gideon koonnyi
Judges6:20 Ki leenji malaikaiyatap `Kamuktaindet ineendet
Judges6:21 Ki iyogoito malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor walitap kirokto ne ki tinyei eng' eunnyi ak kotwae panyechooto ak magatinichooto ma kinde mermereek. Ki togosta maat eng' koyata ak kobeel panyeek ak magatinichooto ma kinde mermereek. Yeityo kobetito kwo malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tainnyi ne mata kogeer.
Judges6:22 Ak ki keer Gideon kole kaagaa ineendet ko malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges6:23 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet
Judges6:24 Koteekyi Gideon anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet eng' yooto
Judges6:25 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet kemounooto
Judges6:26 Yeityo iteekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kaptisisyet eng' paragutap irimoniito
Judges6:27 Ki imut anyun Gideon piik taman eng' otwogikyik ak koyai ko uu ye kamwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu ki iywei piigap kootap kwandanyi ak piigap nganaseet
Judges6:28 Ye kingo ng'eetyo piigap nganaseet kota ko karon inne
Judges6:29 Koleenjigei
Judges6:30 Koleenji piigap nganaseet Joash
Judges6:31 Ago ki leenji Joash piik tugul che ki ibeligei ak ineendet
Judges6:32 Koguure anyun ineendet eng' peetuunooto Jerubaal
Judges6:33 Ki iyumgei anyun Midianik tugul ak Amelegik ak piigap kong'asiis
Judges6:34 Ago ki nyoonji Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gideon; ak ki kuut igoondit ak ki iyumgei Abiesrik koosup ineendet.
Judges6:35 Ki iyookto piik koba Manasseh komugul
Judges6:36 Ki leenji `Gideon Kamuktaindet
Judges6:37 keero
Judges6:38 Ak ki ek ko uu nooto. Eng' peetuut ne po aeng' koging'eet kota ko karon miising'
Judges6:39 Ki leenji `Gideon Kamuktaindet
Judges6:40 Ara ki yai Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto kemounooto. Ki saiyo koroorik icheegei ak ki piit rewoot eng' ng'wonyut tugul.

Judges7:2 Ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gideon
Judges7:3 Ui anyun nguno

Judges7:7 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gideon

Judges7:11 Ui ak igas kiit ne mwaei icheek; ak ye ibata inyiganitu ak ichoortegei ibookyi nganaseet.” Ki choortagei anyun ak otwogindennyi Pura agoi koit ole pooch piik che ki mi nganaseet che tinyei kariik.
Judges7:12 Kiga ruiyo Midianik
Judges7:13 Kingo it Gideon yooto

Judges7:18 Ye aguut igoondit

Judges7:20 Ki kuut kweanaichooto somogu igondisyek
Judges7:21 Ak ki tonon chii tugul eng' komostanyi ko kayiem nganaseet. Ak ki rwai lugeet tugul che ki mi nganaseet oriit
Judges7:22 Ye ki kiguute igondisyechooto pogol somok

Judges8:2 Ago ki leenji ineendet
Judges8:3 Kogonde Kamuktaindet eunekwok pounigap Midianik
Judges8:4 Ki it Gideon kobooto murenik pogol somok Jordan ak kolanda. Nganda kiga kong'etyo icheek
Judges8:5 Ara ki leenji piigap Sukoth
Judges8:6 Ago ki wol pounigap Sukoth kole
Judges8:7 Ak ki le Gideon

Judges8:9 Ak ki mwachi piigap Penuel koleenji
Judges8:10 Ki mi Seba ak Salmuna Karkor kobooto lugosyekwak
Judges8:11 Ak kitogosta Gideon kobun ooreetap piik che ki menyei emaisyek eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po Noba ak Jogbea
Judges8:12 Ki mwei Seba ak Salmuna. Ki oon `ineendet icheek; ki nam laitorinichooto aeng' po Midian koek piik che ratotiin
Judges8:13 Kingo pata pooryeet kogiweek Gideon weeriitap Joash eng' lugeet kobun ole kitogostoe ne po Heres.
Judges8:14 Ki nam anyun muren age ne po piigap Sukoth ak koteepse. Ki sirchi ineendet kainaigap pounik ak poisyegap nganaseet Sukoth
Judges8:15 Ki nyo ineendet ole mi piigap Sukoth ak koleenji
Judges8:16 Ki nam anyun poisyegap nganaseet ak koip katogap surkwen ak katook che rutei piich
Judges8:17 Ki iluul teeksonooto kooi po Penuel ak kobar piigap nganasanooto.

Judges8:19 Ki le ineendet

Judges9:1 Ki wo Shekem Abimelek weeriitap Jerubaal ye mi kapimamet ak piik tugul che po kootap kwandap kamennyi ak kong'alaalji icheek koleenji
Judges9:2 “Kaigai omwachi piik tugul che po Shekem kogas: Nee ne myee eng' okweek: koboiywok weeriik tugul che po Jerubaal chooto tamanwogik tisabu anan poiywok chiito agenge? Obwaat kogeny ole aa kawekwok ak ko aa panyeekwok.”
Judges9:3 Ara ki mwachi imamosyekyik piik tugul che po Shekem ng'aleechooto kogas
Judges9:4 Ki igoochi `pichooto ineendet fedhaisyek tamanwogik tisap eng' kootap Baal-berit
Judges9:5 Ki wo anyun kootap kwandanyi eng' Ophrah
Judges9:6 Ki iyumgei anyun piik tugul che po Shekem ak che po kootap Milo ak koba koyai Abimelek koek laitoryat
Judges9:7 Ye ki ngemwachi Jotham
Judges9:8 Ki pa peetuut age keetiik koiil age koek laitoryat ne pou icheek. Ki leenji keetitap mseituni
Judges9:9 Ago ki leenji `mseituni icheek
Judges9:10 Yeityo koleenji `keetiik mogoywet
Judges9:11 Ago ki leenji `mogoywet icheek
Judges9:12 Ki leenji keetiik anyun keetitap sabibuk
Judges9:13 Ki wol keetitap sabibuk kole
Judges9:14 Yeityo koleenji `keetiik tugul keetit ne ming'in ne po katook
Judges9:15 Ak ki leenji `keetoto ming'in keetiik
Judges9:16 “Nooto anyun nguno ngo ki oyai ne po iman ak ne litit
Judges9:17 amu ki yai lugeet abba agobo okweek
Judges9:18 ago kong'eetyi kootap abba ra ak obar weeriikyik
Judges9:19 ngot ko ki oyachi Jerubaal ne po iman ak ne litit kobooto koonnyi rani
Judges9:20 Ngot koma uu nooto
Judges9:21 Yeityo kolabat Jotham komwei kwo Beer
Judges9:22 Ki ek pounindet Abimelek eng' Israel kenyiisyek somok.
Judges9:23 Ki iyookyi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tamirmiryet ne ya kwenutap Abimelek ak piigap Shekem
Judges9:24 Ki yaak niito si kobiit koityi kolgolyet Abimelek ak piigap Shekem ko uu ye ki yachi weeriigap Jerubaal tamanwogik tisap
Judges9:25 Ki inde `piigap Shekem murenik che ki ribistos koriibei ineendet eng' tuloonook parak
Judges9:26 Ak ki nyo Gaal weeriitap Ebed kobooto tupchosyekyik kolanda koba komeny Shekem. Ki iyan ineendet piigap Shekem.
Judges9:27 Ki pa mbareennywa kobut sabibuk ak kotui
Judges9:28 Ki le Gaal weeriitap Ebed
Judges9:29 Ak nda kami pichu eunnyu
Judges9:30 Ak kingo kas Sebul pounindetap nganaseet ng'aleegap Gaal weeriitap Ebed
Judges9:31 Ki iyookto piik koba kap Abimelek eng' ng'aalseet
Judges9:32 Ng'eet nguno anyun kemoi
Judges9:33 ak mutai karon
Judges9:34 Ki ng'eet anyun Abimelek kemoi ak piik tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet ak kiribisyo icheek agobo Shekem eng' kweanaik ang'wan.
Judges9:35 Ye kimando Gaal weeriitap Ebed ak kotonon eng' ole kibunei eng' kurgeetap nganaseet koging'eet anyun Abimelek ak piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet eng' ole koga ribisye.
Judges9:36 Kingo keer `Gaal piik koleenji Sebul
Judges9:37 Ago ki mwa Gaal kogeny kole
Judges9:38 Koleenji anyun `Sebul ineendet
Judges9:39 Komanda Gaal kondoe piigap Shekem ak kobargei ak Abimelek.
Judges9:40 Ara ki oon `Abimelek ineendet ak ki mwei eng' tainnyi. Ki ibutyo che chaang' che ki kiguoten
Judges9:41 Ki meny anyun Abimelek Aruma
Judges9:42 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi
Judges9:43 Ki imut `ineendet piik
Judges9:44 Ye kingo rwaei Abimelek ak kweanaik che ki mi kobooto ineendet koba tai ak kotononso eng' ye kibunei eng' kurgeetap nganaseet
Judges9:45 Kibargei Abimelek ak nganasanooto peetuut komugul; ak ki nam nganaseet ak ki par piik che ki mi oriit. Kibut nganaseet ak koseerchi olooto muunyuk.
Judges9:46 Kingo kas piik tugul che po teekseet ne kooi ne po Shekem agobo ng'olyoondonooto
Judges9:47 Ki kimwachi Abimelek keleenji
Judges9:48 Ki togosta anyun Abimelek tulweetap Salmon
Judges9:49 Ara ki ep chii tugul temennyi ne po keetit ak koosup Abimelek
Judges9:50 Yeityo kwo Abimelek Tebes
Judges9:51 Ago ki miitei irimeet ne kiim eng' nganasanooto
Judges9:52 Ki nyo Abimelek teeksonooto kooi ak kobargei ak pichooto
Judges9:53 Kitururchi kobogoryot age metitap Abimelek isyet ak kitui metinnyi.
Judges9:54 Ki kuur kochokyi Abimelek muren age ne ki ipchin kariik
Judges9:55 Kingo keer piigap Israel kole kagome Abimelek
Judges9:56 Ki yaakta mugetuut anyun Kamuktaindet agobo tengektap Abimelek ne ki yachi kwandanyi
Judges9:57 Ki yaaktechi Kamuktaindet mugetuut piigap Shekem agobo tengekto tugul ne ki yai. Ki nyoonji anyun icheek chubetap Jotham weeriitap Jerubaal.
Judges10:1 Kingo pata peetuusyegap Abimelek kong'eet Tola weeriitap Pua
Judges10:2 Ki irwookyi Israel kenyiisyek tiptem ak somok
Judges10:3 Kingo pata peetuusyegap Tola
Judges10:4 Ki tinyei weeriik sosom che ki laanyei moek sosom che po sigiroik
Judges10:5 Kime anyun Jair ak ki kitupchi Kamon.
Judges10:6 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet kogeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki oot `icheek Baalik ak Astarot
Judges10:7 Ki nereech kot anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel ak ki aldochi `icheek eunegap Philistiik ak eunegap lagogap Ammon.
Judges10:8 Ki iim ak konyaliil piigap Israel kenyinooto. Ak ki inyaliil piigap Israel
Judges10:9 Kilandae Jordan lagogap Ammon koba kobargei ak Judah
Judges10:10 Ki riirchi `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges10:11 Ak ki mwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Israel
Judges10:12 Ye ki inyaliilak ak icheek Sidonik
Judges10:13 Ago ki ometa ak oot kanamonik. Nooto anyun
Judges10:14 Oba oriirchi kamuktaik che ki olewen! Ingosarwok icheek eng' peetuutap nyalildang'wong'.”
Judges10:15 Ki leenji `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges10:16 Ki isto anyun kanamonik che too eng' kwenunnywa ak koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki iimak saboondanyi amu nyalildap Israel.
Judges10:17 Ki iyumgei anyun lagogap Ammon ak koba koteech Gilead. Ki iyumgei piigap Israel ak icheek ak koteech Mispa.
Judges10:18 Kimwachigei piik
Judges11:1 Ki nyiganeet ne kiim ak ko po lugeet Jephta Gileadindet. Ki sich `Gilead Jephta ago kamennyi ko ki chepkugoniot.
Judges11:2 Ki sich `osotyotap Gilead weeriik
Judges11:3 Komwei anyun Jephta eng' ole mi tupchosyekyik
Judges11:4 Kingo pata peetuusyek alak
Judges11:5 Kingo yai lugeet lagogap Ammon ak Israel
Judges11:6 Ki leenji `icheek Jephta
Judges11:7 Ago ki leenji `Jephta poisyegap Gilead
Judges11:8 Ki leenji `poisyegap Gilead Jephta
Judges11:9 Ki leenji `Jephta poisyegap Gilead
Judges11:10 Ak ki leenji poisyegap Gilead Jephta
Judges11:11 Ki wo Jephta anyun kobooto poisyegap Gilead
Judges11:12 Ki iyookto `Jephta piik koba kaplaitoryatap lagogap Ammon
Judges11:13 Ki wolji laitoryatap lagogap Ammon piik che kiga iyookto Jephta
Judges11:14 Ak ki iyookto `Jephta piik kogeny koba kaplaitoryatap lagogap Ammon:
Judges11:15 ak ki pa komwa pichooto kole
Judges11:16 Ye kitogosu Israel eng' Misiri
Judges11:17 koyookto anyun `Israel piik koba kaplaitoryatap Edom koleenji
Judges11:18 Yeityo kobun surkwen
Judges11:19 Ki iyookto Israel piik koba kap Sihon laitoryatap Amorik
Judges11:20 Ago ma iyan Laitoryat Sihon kobun Israel kiwotennyi. Ki iyum Sihon piikyik tugul ak koteech Jahas
Judges11:21 Ki inde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges11:22 Ki nam kiwoteet tugul ne po Amorik kobunji
Judges11:23 Ki oon anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges11:24 Tos meibe kobunjiin ne kigoonin Kemos kamuktaindeng'ung'? Nooto anyun
Judges11:25 Tos ii kaigai inyee eng' kiy age tugul isiir Balak weeriitap Sipor
Judges11:26 Ye kita komenyei Israel Hesbon ak nganasookyik
Judges11:27 Tom ayaun anee tengek
Judges11:28 Ago ma kas laitoryatap lagogap Ammon ng'aleek che ki iyookyi Jephta ineendet.
Judges11:29 Ki nyoonji anyun `Kabuuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jephta
Judges11:30 Ak ki yai Jephta kaarortaet koarorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Judges11:31 ko kiy age tugul ne torookwo eng' kurgennyu
Judges11:32 Ki landa anyun Jephta kwo ole mi lagogap Ammon
Judges11:33 Ak ki par icheek
Judges11:34 Ye ki nyo koweeksei Jephta koonnyi eng' Mispa
Judges11:35 Kingo keer ineendet
Judges11:36 Koleenji `lakwanooto ineendet
Judges11:37 Kotestai koleenji kwandanyi
Judges11:38 Ak ki wol kole
Judges11:39 Kingo keskei arawek aeng'u
Judges11:40 keele
Judges12:1 Ki iyumgei piigap Ephraim ak koba kotokyigei murot kaataam. Ki mwachi `icheek Jephta koleenji
Judges12:2 Ak ki wolji `Jephta icheek koleenji
Judges12:3 Ak ye ki ageer ale ma osarwo
Judges12:4 Yeityo koyum `Jephta piik tugul che po Gilead ak kobargei ak Ephraim. Ki par piigap Gilead Ephraim
Judges12:5 Ki nam Gileadik tabarwegap Jordan
Judges12:6 koteebe koleenjin
Judges12:7 Ki irwookyi `Jephta Israel kenyiisyek lo. Yeityo kome Jephta Gileadindet
Judges12:8 Kingo pata Jephta korwookyi Ibsan ne po Bethlehem Israel.
Judges12:9 Ki tinyei weeriik sosom ak tiibiik sosom che ki igoito kitunoot eng' komoswek alak
Judges12:10 Kime Ibsan ak ki kitupchi Bethlehem.
Judges12:11 Kingo pata ineendet
Judges12:12 Kime Elon Sebulunindet agine ak ki kitupchi Aijalon eng' emetap Zebulun.
Judges12:13 Kingo pata Elon
Judges12:14 Ki tinyei weeriik artam ak weeriik sosom che po weeriikyik che ki laanyei moek tamanwogik tisap che po sigiroik. Ki irwookyi Israel kenyiisyek sisiit.
Judges12:15 Kime Abdon weeriitap Hilel Piratonindet ak ki kitupchi Piraton eng' emetap Ephraim
Judges13:1 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet kogeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges13:2 Ak ki miitei chiito age ne po Sora
Judges13:3 Kimong'ji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwonyooto ak koleenji
Judges13:4 Nooto anyun
Judges13:5 Amu imanachi iman ak isich weeriit. Ma kicheru suumeekyik
Judges13:6 Ki wo anyun kwonyooto ak komwachi manong'otyondennyi koleenji
Judges13:7 Ago kaleenjo ineendet
Judges13:8 Ki sa anyun `Manoa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Judges13:9 Ki kas Kamuktaindet kutitap Manoa
Judges13:10 Kichaakta anyun kwonyooto
Judges13:11 Ki ng'eet anyun Manoa ak koosup osotyonnyi koit ole mi chiichooto ak koleenji ineendet
Judges13:12 Ak ki le Manoa
Judges13:13 Koleenji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Manoa
Judges13:14 Matkoam kiy age tugul ne punu keetitap sabibuk
Judges13:15 Ki mwachi `Manoa malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Judges13:16 Koleenji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Manoa
Judges13:17 koleenji `Manoa malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges13:18 Kowolji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Judges13:19 Ki ip anyun Manoa arwanooto kobooto kagoochinetap peek
Judges13:20 amu ye ki togostoi liplibenetap maat kotokyigei kipsengwet eng' kaptisisyet
Judges13:21 Kingo pata niito ko ki mata komong'ji kogeny `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Manoa anan ko osotyonnyi. Konai anyun Manoa kole ineendet ko ki malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Judges13:22 Koleenji `Manoa osotyonnyi
Judges13:23 Ago ki leenji osotyonnyi
Judges13:24 Ki sich kwonyooto weeriit ak koguuree kainennyi Samson. Ki eet lakweet ak ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet.
Judges13:25 Ki toi Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobois eng' ineendet eng' Maane-dan
Judges14:1 Ki choortagei Samson eng' peetuut age kwo Timnah ak ki keer eng' olooto chepto agenge eng' tiibiigap Philistiik.
Judges14:2 Ak ki togos ineendet
Judges14:3 Ki leenji `kwandanyi ak `kamennyi ineendet
Judges14:4 Ki ma nai kwandanyi ak kamennyi kole punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondonooto; amu ki cheeng'ei poroindo ne yachine lugeet Philistiik. Ki pou Philistiik Israel eng' peetuusyechooto.
Judges14:5 Ki choortagei anyun Samson
Judges14:6 Ki nyoonji ineendet `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateet
Judges14:7 Ki choortagei anyun kwo kong'alaalji kwonyooto
Judges14:8 Ak ye matyanit kogiweek kwo komut kotun. Ki wo taban kogeer poortap ng'etunyooto ki kabar ak ki mi segemik kebomborwetap ng'etunyooto
Judges14:9 Ki inem eng' eunekyik ak kwo koamat ye kitese tai kowendi. Ki it ole mi kwandanyi ak kamennyi ak ki igoochi ak ki am ak icheek. Ago ma mwachi koleenji kaanemune kumyat kebomborwetap ng'etundo.
Judges14:10 Ki choortagei kwandanyi kwo ole mi kwonyooto
Judges14:11 Ak ye kingo keer `Philistiik ineendet komut choronok sosom kotep kobooto ineendet.
Judges14:12 Ki mwachi `Samson icheek koleenji
Judges14:13 Ago ngot ko momuuchi omwaiwo
Judges14:14 Ara ki leenji `ineendet icheek
Judges14:15 Eng' peetuutap tisap
Judges14:16 Ki riir ne po Samson eng' tainnyi
Judges14:17 Ki riir eng' tainnyi peetuusyek tisap eng' peetuusyechooto po igoortanywa. Amu kiim Samson
Judges14:18 Ki mwachi piigap nganaseet ineendet eng' peetuutap tisap kotom kororokto asiista koleenji: “Mi nee ne anyiny kosiir kumyat? Ak nee ne kiim kosiir ng'etundo?” Ak ki leenji `ineendet icheek
Judges14:19 Ki nyoonji ineendet `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateet
Judges14:20 Ago ki kigoito ne po Samson kigoochi chiito ne ki cham kobendoti tuwai
Judges15:1 Ago kingo pata peetuusyek alak
Judges15:2 Ki le kwandap osotyondonooto
Judges15:3 Ki leenji `Samson icheek
Judges15:4 Ara ki wo Samson ak konam lelwek pogol somok
Judges15:5 Kingo kagonde maat kegenganichooto kounda koba ole mi peegap Philistiik che tomo koges
Judges15:6 Koteep anyun Philistiik
Judges15:7 Koleenji `Samson icheek
Judges15:8 Ki par icheek komugus eng' pareet ne oo. Yeityo kochoortagei kwo komeny ole kibetak eng' rwandetap Etam.
Judges15:9 Ki togosta anyun Philistiik ak koteech Judah
Judges15:10 Ki le piigap Judah
Judges15:11 Ki choortagei anyun piik eliphuusyek somogu che po Judah koba ole kibetak eng' rwandetap Etam
Judges15:12 Ak ki leenji `icheek ineendet
Judges15:13 Ki mwachi ineendet koleenji
Judges15:14 Kingo it Lei
Judges15:15 Ki nyoor anyun kowetap tagilgilyetap sigiryet ne tomo koyaam
Judges15:16 Ak ki le Samson
Judges15:17 Kingo kagogees ng'alaalanooto
Judges15:18 Ak ye ki ame melelda ne oo
Judges15:19 Ago ki pet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole ki mi keriinget eng' Lei ak ki mang'une peek yooto; ak kingo kagoee koweek Kabuusennyi kogeny
Judges15:20 Ki irwookyi `Samson Israel kenyiisyek tiptem eng' peetuusyegap Philistiik.
Judges16:1 Eng' peetuut age kogiwo Samson Gaza
Judges16:2 Ki kimwachi Gasik keleenji
Judges16:3 Ki ru Samson agoi kemoi kween
Judges16:4 Kingo pata nooto kocham `Samson kwondo age ne ki mi atebweetap Sorek
Judges16:5 Ki togos kiptainigap Philistiik kobwa ole mi kwonyooto ak koleenji ineendet
Judges16:6 Ki leenji anyun `Delila Samson
Judges16:7 Ki wolji `Samson ineendet kole
Judges16:8 Ki ipchi anyun `kiptainigap Philistiik osotyondonooto inoik tisap che ta ko leelach
Judges16:9 Ki tinyei piik che ki riibei che ki mi koot ne po oriit. Ak ki leenji ineendet
Judges16:10 Ki leenji anyun `Delila Samson
Judges16:11 Ki leenji ineendet
Judges16:12 Konam anyun Delila rogoosyek che leelach
Judges16:13 Ki leenji `Delila Samson
Judges16:14 Kiratyi sumeechooto tigongyot ak koleenji
Judges16:15 Ki leenji `kwonyooto ineendet
Judges16:16 Ak kingo kagoiim peetuusyek che chaang' eng' ng'aleekyik
Judges16:17 Ara ki mwachi tugul che ki mi muguleldanyi koleenji
Judges16:18 Kingo keer Delila kole kagomwachi ineendet tugul che ki mi muguleldanyi
Judges16:19 Ki igoochi `kwonyooto Samson koru eng' kutung'oikyik
Judges16:20 Ki le Delila
Judges16:21 Ki nam `Philistiik ineendet ak kobol konyekyik ak ki imut ineendet kwo Gaza. Kirate ineendet sirimwegap sugunonik
Judges16:22 Ago ki piityo suumeekyik kogeny ye kingo kagicher.
Judges16:23 Ki iyumgei `kiptainigap Philistiik koboiboitu ak kogoochi korosyot ne oo Dagon kamuktaindennywa. Amu ki mwa kole
Judges16:24 Kingo keer `piik ineendet
Judges16:25 Ak kingo kaskei mugulelwekwak
Judges16:26 Ki leenji `Samson lakweet ne kinamoti euut
Judges16:27 Ki nyiitaat piik koyooto: ki mi yooto kiptainik tugul che po Philistiik
Judges16:28 Ki kuur `Samson Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Judges16:29 Ki nam anyun Samson tolochik aeng' che kitonone koot
Judges16:30 Ki le Samson
Judges16:31 Kingo pata kochoorgei anyun tupchosyekyik ak piik tugul che po kootap kwandanyi ak kosut ineendet. Ki imut ak kola kotupchi ineendet kwenutap Sora ak Estaol eng' ole kitupchin piik
Judges17:1 Ki mi chiito age ne po emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim
Judges17:2 Ki leenji kamennyi
Judges17:3 Ki weekyi kamennyi fedhaisyechooto eliphuut agenge ak pogol
Judges17:4 Ak ye ki weekyi kamennyi fedhaisyechooto
Judges17:5 Ki tinyei chiichito kiguure Mikah kootap kanamonik
Judges17:6 Ki ma komi peetuusyechooto laitoryat eng' Israel. Kiyaei chii tugul ko uu ye keerei eng' konyekyik kole myee.
Judges17:7 Ki mi mureno age ne ki punu Beth-lehem-juda
Judges17:8 Ak ki wo chiichooto eng' nganasanooto
Judges17:9 Ki leenji Mikah
Judges17:10 Ak ki leenji Mikah ineendet
Judges17:11 Ki cham Lawindet anyun komeny ak chiichooto
Judges17:12 Ki itabaan anyun `Mikah Lawindonooto koek tisiindennyi ak ki tebee kootap Mikah.
Judges17:13 Kole anyun Mikah
Judges18:1 Ki ma komi laitoryat Israel peetuusyechooto. Ak eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki cheeng'jigei pororyetap Danik ole menyei; amu agoi peetuusyechooto ko kitom konyoor porotennywa eng' ortinwegap Israel.
Judges18:2 Ki iyookto `lagogap Dan piik muut eng' ooreenywa
Judges18:3 Kingo mi ye neegitee kootap Mikah
Judges18:4 Ki leenji `ineendet icheek
Judges18:5 Ki leenji `icheek ineendet
Judges18:6 Ki leenji tisiindonooto icheek
Judges18:7 Ki pa anyun pichooto muutu
Judges18:8 Yeityo kobwa ole mi tupchosyekwak eng' Sora ak Estaol. Ki mwachi icheek tupchosyekwak koleenji
Judges18:9 Ak ki le
Judges18:10 Ye oit olooto
Judges18:11 Ki pa anyun eng' olooto piik pogolusyek lo
Judges18:12 Ki togosta icheek ak koteech Kiriath-Jearim
Judges18:13 Ki pun yooto kot koit emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim
Judges18:14 Yeityo kowol pichooto muutu che ki pa kosegei emetap Lais
Judges18:15 Ara ki wo yooto
Judges18:16 Kitononso eng' ye neegitee ye kibunei eng' ormariich pichooto pogolusyek lo che ki po lagogap Dan
Judges18:17 Ki togosta murenjoto muutu che kigaba kosegei emet
Judges18:18 Kingo kagoba pichuuto kootap Mikah ak koip kanamwet ne ki kiwai
Judges18:19 Ki leenji `icheek ineendet
Judges18:20 Ki paibait muguleldap tisiindonooto
Judges18:21 Ki week anyun icheek
Judges18:22 Kingo kagoba ole machei ko loo kitigin eng' kootap Mikah
Judges18:23 Ak kiwaage `icheek lagogap Dan. Ak kiguskong' ak koleenji Mikah
Judges18:24 Ak ki wol kole
Judges18:25 Ak ki leenji `lagogap Dan ineendet
Judges18:26 Ak ki pa anyun lagogap Dan. Kingo keer Mikah kole kiimeen eng' ineendet
Judges18:27 Ki ip tuguuchooto kiyaei Mikah
Judges18:28 Ki ma piit saruunindet
Judges18:29 Kiguure icheek nganasanooto Dan
Judges18:30 Kilumdochigei `lagogap Dan kanamwet ne ki kiwai kotonon. Ki ek tisiigap pororyetap Danik
Judges18:31 Ki lumda anyun kotonon kanamwet ne ki kiwai ne po Mikah ne kiyaei ineendet
Judges19:1 Ak eng' peetuusyechooto
Judges19:2 Ki yai kugoinatet chebaigeiyandennyi kosas ineendet
Judges19:3 Ki ng'eet manong'otyondennyi koosup ineendet
Judges19:4 Kimach kapyugoinnyi
Judges19:5 Ak eng' peetuutap ang'wan
Judges19:6 Ki tebi ng'wony ak ki amis ak koeeiso icheek tuwai. Ak ki leenji kwandap kwonyooto chiichooto
Judges19:7 Kingo ng'eet chiichooto kole kwo
Judges19:8 Ki ng'eet karon miising' eng' peetuut ne po muut kole kwo
Judges19:9 Kingo ng'eet chiichooto kole kwo
Judges19:10 Ago ma cham chiichooto kotebi kemounooto
Judges19:11 Kingo mi ye neegitee Jebus
Judges19:12 Ago ki leenji kiptaiyandennyi
Judges19:13 Ki leenji otwogindennyi
Judges19:14 Kisiirto anyun koba pandanywa ak kirorokta asiista kota kobendi ko neegit koit Gibea
Judges19:15 Ki masta icheek koba olooto
Judges19:16 Ki nyo poiyot age ne ki punu poisyennyi eng' mbar koskoleny. Ki po chiichooto emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim
Judges19:17 Ye kitabendo inee kogeer kiprutoiyot eng' ooreetap nganaseet
Judges19:18 Ki wol ineendet kole
Judges19:19 Ago ki tinyei mobeek ak amitwogik che ki kigonor che po sigirokyok. Atinye magatyat ak divaik
Judges19:20 Ki le poiyondonooto
Judges19:21 Komut anyun kwo koonnyi ak kogoochi sigiroik amitwogik. Ki iun keelyekwak
Judges19:22 Ye kita koboiboi mugulelwekwak
Judges19:23 Ki manda anyun chiichooto po koot
Judges19:24 Ogeero
Judges19:25 Ago ma cham pichooto kogasyi ineendet ng'aleek. Ki nam anyun chiichooto chebaigeiyandennyi ak komutyi icheek eng' saang'. Kisuup kwonyooto ak koteweer ineendet agoi koeech. Kingo machei koeech
Judges19:26 Ki nyo anyun kwonyooto ko kairir emet
Judges19:27 Ki ng'eet kiptaiyandennyi karon
Judges19:28 Ki leenji ineendet
Judges19:29 Kingo kakwo koonnyi oriit
Judges19:30 Ki mwa tugul che ki keer kole
Judges20:1 Ki manda anyun piigap Israel tugul
Judges20:2 Ki iyomechigei tuiyet taitap Kamuktaindet
Judges20:3 (Ki kas anyun lagogap Benjamin kole kagotogosta piigap Israel koba Mispa.) Ak ki le piigap Israel
Judges20:4 Ak ki wol Lawindet manong'otyotap kwonyooto ki kibarei kole
Judges20:5 Ki ng'eetyo piigap Gibea kobwa koyiem koot ne ki ami kemoi. Ki machei kole kobara aneendet
Judges20:6 Ki anam chebaigeiyandennyu ak aton
Judges20:7 Ogeero
Judges20:8 Ki ng'eetyo piik tugul koigei chiichak kole
Judges20:9 Ago nguno ko ni kiit ne keyachini Gibea: kitogostoi kebendi yooto eng' seretap parbareek.
Judges20:10 Kinemu murenik taman eng' pogolut age tugul eng' pororyosyek tugul che po Israel
Judges20:11 Koyumjigei anyun tugul che po Israel nganasanooto
Judges20:12 Ki iyookto `ortinwegap Israel piik koba komoswek tugul eng' ooreetap Benjamin
Judges20:13 Omong'u anyun pichooto yaacheen
Judges20:14 Ki iyumgei lagogap Benjamin che ki mang'une nganasook
Judges20:15 Ki kiit lagogap Benjamin peetuunooto che ki mang'une nganasook
Judges20:16 Eng' kwenutap pichuuto tugul che ki kilewen ko ki mi murenik pogolwogik tisabu che po kaataam
Judges20:17 Ki ek murenigap Israel tugul che po lugeet eliphuusyek pogol ang'wan che ki kiit ama pooto Benjamin. Chuuto tugul ko ki murenigap lugeet.
Judges20:18 Ki ng'eetyo piigap Israel kotogosta Bethel
Judges20:19 Ki ng'eetyo anyun piigap Israel karon
Judges20:20 Ki manda piigap Israel kobargei ak Benjamin
Judges20:21 Ki mong' lagogap Benjamin eng' Gibea ak ki par eng' peetuunooto murenik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng' kobutyi ng'wony che po Yahudik.
Judges20:22 Ki igimitkei piik
Judges20:23 (Ki togosta piigap Israel koba koriiryo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi koskoleny
Judges20:24 Ki riikyi `piigap Israel lagogap Benjamin eng' peetuut ne po aeng'.
Judges20:25 Ki manda Benjamin eng' Gibea ak kobargei ak icheek eng' peetuut ne po aeng'
Judges20:26 Yeityo kotogosta lagok tugul che po Israel
Judges20:27 Ak kiteebe `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Judges20:28 ak kitonone taitap moingonooto Phineas
Judges20:29 Ara ki inde Israel piik che ribistos koyiem Gibea koriip.
Judges20:30 Ki togosta Israel koba kobargei ak lagogap Benjamin eng' peetuut ne po somok
Judges20:31 Ki manda lagogap Benjamin kobookyi pichooto
Judges20:32 Ki mwa lagogap Benjamin kole
Judges20:33 Ki ng'eetyo piik tugul che po Israel eng' komostanywa ak koba kotetkei eng' Baal-tamar. Ki mong' eng' komostanywa piik che kiribistos che po Israel
Judges20:34 Ki pwa kobargei ak Gibea
Judges20:35 Ki par `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Benjamin eng' taitap Israel. Ki par piigap Israel eng' peetuunooto murenik eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut ak pogol che po Benjamin. Ki tinyei chuuto tugul rotoogap chok.
Judges20:36 Ki keer lagogap Benjamin anyun kole kagebar. Amu ki istochigei piigap Israel Benjamin
Judges20:37 Kichaakta piik che karibistos korwai Gibea. Ki iseergei pichooto
Judges20:38 Ki mi kaboorunet ne kiga kichop eng' kwenutap piigap Israel ak piik che kiribistos keele konaam iyeto ne oo kotogosta eng' nganaseet
Judges20:39 ko nyolu koweek anyun murenigap Israel eng' pooryeet. Ki toi Benjamin kowiir ak kobar murenigap Israel olo po piik sosom
Judges20:40 Ago kingo toi kotogosta iyeto ne uu toloita eng' nganaseet
Judges20:41 Ki week anyun piigap Israel ak ki kwong'yo piigap Benjamin
Judges20:42 Ki mweiso anyun icheek eng' taitap piigap Israel kotuktoochi patai
Judges20:43 Ki yiem `icheek Benjaminik konde kween
Judges20:44 Ki pek piik eliphuusyek tamanu ak sisiit che po Benjamin
Judges20:45 Ki week ak komweiso kotokyigei surkwen kot koit rwandetap Rimon. Ak kikweat piik eliphuusyek muut eng' icheek
Judges20:46 Ki pek anyun eng' peetuunooto piik eliphuusyek tiptemu ak muut che po Benjamin che ki tinyei rotoogap chok
Judges20:47 Ago ki week piik pogolwogik lo
Judges20:48 Ki weekyigei kogeny piigap Israel lagogap Benjamin ak kobar eng' rotwetap chok
Judges21:1 Kiga koyasyo piigap Israel eng' Mispa
Judges21:2 Ki pwa piik Bethel ak kotep ng'wony eng' yooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet kot koit koskoleny
Judges21:3 Ak kole
Judges21:4 Ak ki eng' mutai kong'eetyo piik kota ko karon
Judges21:5 Ki le piigap Israel
Judges21:6 Ago ki sich riirge piigap Israel agobo Benjamin tupchennywa
Judges21:7 Kiyae nee si konyoor osotik icheek che kong'et
Judges21:8 Ak ki le icheek
Judges21:9 Amu ye kingo kagiit piik
Judges21:10 Ara ki iyookto `tuiyet piik eliphuusyek taman ak aeng' che po che nyigoonen eng' tugul
Judges21:11 Kiit ne obendi oyae ko ni; obare ogesu muren age tugul ak kwony age tugul ne ki koruiyo ak muren.”
Judges21:12 Ki nyoor eng' piik che ki menyei Jabes-gilead pergeinik pogol ang'wan che neranik
Judges21:13 Ki iyookto tuiyet komugul piik koba kong'alaalji lagogap Benjamin che ki mi rwandetap Rimon oriit
Judges21:14 Ki week Benjamin eng' peetuusyechooto; ak ki igoochi icheek kwonyiik che ki sar kosapcho eng' che po kwonyiigap Jabes-gilead; ago ki ma yam icheek.
Judges21:15 Ki aragenso piik agobo Benjamin amu ki koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koyaatak oldo age eng' ortinwegap Israel.
Judges21:16 Ki le anyun poisyegap tuiyet
Judges21:17 Ak ki le icheek
Judges21:18 Ago ma kimuuchi kigoochi icheek osotik eng' tiibiikyok.” Amu kiga koyasyo piigap Israel
Judges21:19 Ak ki le icheek
Judges21:20 Ak ki ng'at lagogap Benjamin
Judges21:21 ak ogeer
Judges21:22 Ak ye pwa kwanisyekwak anan ko tupchosyekwak koboljech
Judges21:23 Ki yai ko uu nooto lagogap Benjamin
Judges21:24 Ki pa piigap Israel eng' peetuusyechooto
Judges21:25 Ki ma komi laitoryat Israel eng' peetuusyechooto. Kiyaei chii tugul ko uu ye kigeerei kole myee.
Ruth1:1 Eng' peetuusyek che ki irwoochi kirwoogik
Ruth1:2 Kainetap chiichooto ko ki Elimelek
Ruth1:3 Ki me Elimelek manong'otyotap Naomi ak ki ng'et Naomi ak weeriikyik aeng'.
Ruth1:4 Ki itun `weerchooto osotik eng' kwonyiigap Moab ne kainetap age ko ki Orpa
Ruth1:5 Ki pek ak icheek Malon ak Kilion
Ruth1:6 Ki ng'eet ineendet anyun kobooto kwonyiigap weeriikyik komachei koweektagei eng' emetap Moab
Ruth1:7 Ki wo eng' komosta ne ki mi ak osotigap weeriikyik aeng'
Ruth1:8 Ki leenji `Naomi osotichooto aeng' po weeriikyik
Ruth1:9 Ingogoonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor onyooru kaalyeet
Ruth1:10 Koleenji `icheek ineendet
Ruth1:11 Koleenji Naomi
Ruth1:12 Oba tiibiikyuk
Ruth1:13 ko tos ogen kot koechegitu? Tos otebii koma kitunook? Achicha tiibiikyuk! Ki kong'wanit miising' eng' anee kosiirook
Ruth1:14 Ki testai kowaakyo icheek. Inga ki ng'utut `Orpa korgennyi po yugoi kosaiseret
Ruth1:15 Koleenji `Naomi Ruth
Ruth1:16 Ago ki wolji Ruth koleenji
Ruth1:17 Ole imechini
Ruth1:18 Kingo keer Naomi kole kiga kobegechi koba tuwai
Ruth1:19 Ki pa anyun tuwai kot koit Bethlehem. Kingo it Bethlehem
Ruth1:20 Koleenji `ineendet icheek
Ruth1:21 Ki awendi ko aa nyiitaat
Ruth1:22 Ki week anyun Naomi eng' emetap Moab kobooto Ruth cheptap Moab osotyotap weeriinnyi. Ki it Bethlehem ko katoygei kesisyetap baale.
Ruth2:1 Ki tinyei `Naomi chiitap ooreetap manong'otyonnyi
Ruth2:2 Ak ki leenji `Ruth chemoabindet Naomi
Ruth2:3 Ki wo anyun Ruth mbar ak koturisyot kosubi piik che kesisyei. Ki it keljiinennyi
Ruth2:4 Ki it anyun koit Boaz kobunu Bethlehem
Ruth2:5 koteebeee `Boaz otwogindennyi ne kitononjin piik che kesisyei koleenji
Ruth2:6 Kowolji `otwogindet ne kitononjin piik che kesisyei koleenji
Ruth2:7 Koleenjo ineendet
Ruth2:8 Koleenji `Boaz Ruth
Ruth2:9 Tokyi konyeguk kogeer mbareet ne kesei icheeget
Ruth2:10 Ki ing'uruuk Ruth kot kotiiny ng'wony togeennyi eng' teegis
Ruth2:11 Kowolji `Boaz ineendet koleenji
Ruth2:12 Ingoyaagun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poisyeng'ung'
Ruth2:13 Koleenji Ruth
Ruth2:14 Kingo it saitap amitwogik
Ruth2:15 Kingo kang'eet kwo koturisyot
Ruth2:16 Ong'usyi metoweegap peek eng' ratuutik
Ruth2:17 Kiturisyot anyun Ruth eng' mbar agoi koskoleny. Kiboor che kagoturot
Ruth2:18 Kila koip turoonik kwo nganaseet ak koboorchi korgennyi po yugoi che tee che kagotur. Ki ipchi amitwogik che kigaituuch ko kagobiyo
Ruth2:19 koteebeee Naomi koleenji
Ruth2:20 Koleenji `Naomi osotyondonooto ki po weeriinnyi
Ruth2:21 Kole Ruth
Ruth2:22 Koleenji `Naomi Ruth
Ruth2:23 Ki tebi kobois anyun ak otwogik che kwonyiik agoi kegosor baale ak nganuuk
Ruth3:1 Ki leenji `Naomi korgennyi po yugoi
Ruth3:2 Tos ma po ooreennyo Boaz
Ruth3:3 Iungei nguno ak iilgei
Ruth3:4 Ye kagoru
Ruth3:5 Ki leenji `Ruth Naomi
Ruth3:6 Ki choortagei anyun kwo ole mi rwanyut
Ruth3:7 Ye kingo kagoamis Boaz ak koe ak kobaibait muguleldanyi
Ruth3:8 Ak kingo ek kemoi kween kosiir chiichooto eng' rwondo
Ruth3:9 Ki le ineendet
Ruth3:10 Ki le chiichooto
Ruth3:11 Nooto anyun cheptonyu
Ruth3:12 Iman aa chiitap ooreet ne neegit
Ruth3:13 Tebi kemouni
Ruth3:14 Ki ru eng' keelyekyik agoi koeech
Ruth3:15 Ki leenji
Ruth3:16 Kingo it Ruth ole mi korgennyi po yugoi
Ruth3:17 Ak ki le
Ruth3:18 Ki le anyun
Ruth4:1 Kingo togosta Boaz kwo ormariichetap nganaseet ak kotep ng'wony eng' yooto
Ruth4:2 Ki kuur `Boaz poisyek taman che po nganaseet ak koleenji
Ruth4:3 Ki leenji anyun `Boaz chiitap ooreet ne neegit
Ruth4:4 Koabwaat amwaun ale ial koronooto eng' taitap pichu ibuuri eng' yu
Ruth4:5 Ki testai kole Boaz
Ruth4:6 Ki le chiichooto po ooreet ne neegit
Ruth4:7 Ki uu ni piteet ne ki mi Israel agobo katyaget ak agobo waleet: si ki kimiit kayanjinet
Ruth4:8 Koleenji anyun `Boaz chiichooto po ooreet ne neegit
Ruth4:9 Ki leenji `Boaz poisyek ak piik tugul
Ruth4:10 Kogeny
Ruth4:11 Ki le anyun piik tugul che ki mi ormariichet kobooto poisyek
Ruth4:12 Ak eng' kesweek che tuun koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwonyi
Ruth4:13 Ki imut anyun `Boaz Ruth ak ki ek osotyonnyi. Ki ituiyogei ak ineendet ak ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komanach
Ruth4:14 Ki leenji `kwonyiik Naomi
Ruth4:15 Egu ineendet ne weegun saboondang'ung' ak koek ne riibin eng' osindang'ung'; amu osotyotap weeriing'ung'
Ruth4:16 Ki nam `Naomi lakweet ak kotiny eng' tegeennyi
Ruth4:17 Ki toochi kainet kwonyiigap kokwet
Ruth4:18 Chu anyun ko ortinwegap Peres: ki sich `Peres Hesron
Ruth4:19 kosich `Hesron Ram ak kosich `Ram Aminadab
Ruth4:20 ki sich `Aminadab Nason
Ruth4:21 ki sich `Salmon Boaz
Ruth4:22 ki sich `Obed Jesse ak kosich Jesse Daudi.
1Samuel1:1 Ki mi chii ne ki kiguure Elkanah ne po Ramataim ne ki po Suphim ne po emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim. Ki weeriitap Jeroham
1Samuel1:2 Ki tinyei osotik aeng'; kainetap age ko ki Hannah ak kainetap age ko ki Peninnah. Ki tinyei Peninnah lagok ago ki ma kotinyei Hannah lakwa.
1Samuel1:3 Ki cham kotogostoi chiichooto eng' nganasennyi eng' kenyiit age tugul kowendi kosaaei ak kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek tiseiywek eng' Shiloh. Ki mi yooto weeriik aeng' che po Eli
1Samuel1:4 Kingo it peetuut ne igoitoi Elkanah tiseiywek
1Samuel1:5 ago ki igoochin Hannah kebeberwek aeng' amu ki chamei `Elkanah ineendet nga kiga rat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor moennyi.
1Samuel1:6 Kitach `syennyi ineendet kole si kogereer met amu kiga rat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor moennyi.
1Samuel1:7 Ki testai ko uu nooto Elkanah eng' kenyiit age tugul
1Samuel1:8 Ki leenji `Elkanah manong'otyondennyi
1Samuel1:9 Ki ng'eet anyun Hannah ye kingo kagoamis ak koeeiso eng' Shiloh. Ki tisiindet Eli ne kitebyei eng' ye po tugatukyetap kurgeet ne po hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel1:10 Eng' ng'wanindo ne ki tinyei eng' saboondanyi ko ki sa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' riirek ak eng' ng'wanindo.
1Samuel1:11 Ki yai kayasyoet kole
1Samuel1:12 Ye kita kosaaei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel1:13 Ki ng'alaali Hannah eng' muguleldanyi. Kitwau kutinnyi kityo ago ki ma kegasei tweguunennyi. Eng' nooto
1Samuel1:14 Koleenji Eli
1Samuel1:15 Ago ki wol Hannah kole
1Samuel1:16 Meit cheptong'ung' ne otwoget ile chii puch. Amu koang'alaal agoi rani eng' chaang'indap kang'unyng'unyennyu ak choteet ne kichoto ak ketacha.”
1Samuel1:17 Ki wol anyun Eli kole
1Samuel1:18 Kole Hannah
1Samuel1:19 Eng' peetuut ne ki rubei
1Samuel1:20 Ki manach anyun Hannah ak kosich weeriit. Kiguure kainennyi Samuel koleen
1Samuel1:21 Ki togosta Elkanah kobooto koonnyi tugul kwo kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywotap kenyiit age tugul ak koyaakta kaarortoennyi.
1Samuel1:22 Ago ma togosta Hannah
1Samuel1:23 Ki mwachi `Elkanah manong'otyondennyi koleenji
1Samuel1:24 Ye kingo kagoluge ak ye kita ko ming'in lakwanooto
1Samuel1:25 Ki eeny kirgit ak komutyi Eli lakweet.
1Samuel1:26 Ak ki mwa kwonyooto kole
1Samuel1:27 Lakwani ne ki asoome ak kigogoono `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor soomennyu ne ki asoom ineendet.
1Samuel1:28 Nooto anyun
1Samuel2:1 Ak ki sa Hannah kole: “Igasegei muguleldanyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel2:2 Ma mi ne tiliil ko uu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel2:3 Among'alaal eng' menoteet
1Samuel2:4 Ildos kwangogap piik che nyigoonen
1Samuel2:5 Icheeget che ki piyong'otiin
1Samuel2:6 Parei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kosaabi. Choortoi koba kererit ak komutu kotogos.
1Samuel2:7 Ibanani `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chii ak komogornoni. Iming'ini ak koeeti.
1Samuel2:8 Ing'eeti kibananook komang'une temburyek
1Samuel2:9 Riibei keelyegap piik che iywei ineendet
1Samuel2:10 Ki ng'emei che ibeligei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; tuljin icheek ko uu ilat ne ng'eete kipsengwet. Irwookyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'wony komugul; igoochin kimnateet laitoryandennyi
1Samuel2:11 Kingo pata
1Samuel2:12 Weeriigap Eli ko kingelelik; ki ma kotinyei kaiyweisyo agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel2:13 Kingo koito chii tiseiywot ko uu piteetap tisiik eng' piik
1Samuel2:14 si korookta karnanooto tereet oriit anan kibiriget anan saburyet anan ko tereetap ng'ung'unyek si koipchigei `tisiindet panyeek tugul che kainem karnanooto. Ki yachin ko uu nooto piigap Israel tugul eng' Shiloh che kibwanei yooto.
1Samuel2:15 Kingo tomo kobeel mwaita
1Samuel2:16 Ngot koleenji `chiito ineendet
1Samuel2:17 Ki oo miising' tengektap murenjooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel2:18 Nga ki lakwa Samuel
1Samuel2:19 Eng' kenyiit age tugul koginapchin kamet ngoryeet ne ming'in ak koipchi ineendet ye kibendi ak manong'otyondennyi kogoitoi tiseiywegap kenyiit age tugul.
1Samuel2:20 Ki iberuur `Eli Elkanah ak osotyonnyi
1Samuel2:21 Ki rutoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hannah ak kingo manach
1Samuel2:22 Nga kiga koosit Eli miising'
1Samuel2:23 Ki leenji icheek
1Samuel2:24 Achicha
1Samuel2:25 Ngot koyachi chii chiito age tengek
1Samuel2:26 Ki eet anyun lakwanooto Samuel ak ki chamat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak eng' piik ak icheek.
1Samuel2:27 Ki nyoonji `chiitap Kamuktaindet Eli ak koleenji
1Samuel2:28 Ak ki alewen ineendet eng' pororyosyek tugul che po Israel koek tisiindennyu
1Samuel2:29 Amu nee anyun si otyar tiseiywekyuk ak kagoochinoikyuk che ki ang'at eng' meng'ootennyu? Amu nee si igonyit weeriiguk kosiiro ak oneryee kagoochinoik che eecheen eng' tugul che po piikyuk Israel?’
1Samuel2:30 Nooto anyun mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindetap Israel kole
1Samuel2:31 Keero pwoonei peetuusyek che atile eung'ung' ak eutap kootap kwandang'ung' kot koma piit poiyo eng' koong'ung'.
1Samuel2:32 Iimigei ye igeere mogornateet tugul ne igoochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel
1Samuel2:33 Ak chiing'ung' ne ma istoi anee eng' kapkorosunnyu koegu ne igeesu konyeguk ak kogoochi arageneet muguleldang'ung'. Pegu iyoteet tugul ne po koong'ung' kota ko neran.
1Samuel2:34 Ak egu ni kaboorunet ne tuun nyoonjin weeriiguk aeng' Hopni ak Phineas; pegu tuwai eng' peetuut agenge.
1Samuel2:35 Ak ang'eetyigei tisiindet ne kiyani ne tuun yaei kiit ne mi muguleldanyu ak eng' kabwaatutikyuk ak ateekyi ineendet koot ne kiim
1Samuel2:36 Tuun nyoonei age tugul ne kang'et eng' koong'ung' konyo kong'uruukyi ineendet si konyoor fedhaiyat ak magatyat ak kole
1Samuel3:1 Ki poisyechin lakwanooto `Samuel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap Eli. Ki ma kota kegasei ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyechooto
1Samuel3:2 Ye kingo ru Eli peetuut age eng' oldanyi
1Samuel3:3 ye kitom kome tait ne po Kamuktaindet
1Samuel3:4 koguur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel
1Samuel3:5 Ak kilabat ole mi Eli ak koleenji
1Samuel3:6 Ki kuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny kole
1Samuel3:7 Kitom konai `Samuel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kitom keng'aang'ji ineendet ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel3:8 Ki kuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel kogeny ne po somok. Ak king'eet kwo ole mi Eli ak koleenji
1Samuel3:9 Koleenji anyun `Eli Samuel
1Samuel3:10 Ki nyo `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kotonon
1Samuel3:11 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel
1Samuel3:12 Eng' peetuunooto ayachini Eli tuguuk tugul che ki amwa agobo koonnyi
1Samuel3:13 Ki amwachi aleenji arwookyini koonnyi koigeny amu tengekto ne ki ingen amu ki ipchigei `weeriikyik chubisyet ama kergong'.
1Samuel3:14 Nooto anyun ki ayosye agobo kootap Eli ale
1Samuel3:15 Ki ru anyun Samuel agoi koeech
1Samuel3:16 Ki kuur `Eli Samuel ak koleenji
1Samuel3:17 Ak kiteepsee Eli kole
1Samuel3:18 Ki mwachi anyun Samuel kiy age tugul
1Samuel3:19 Ki eet Samuel ak ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet
1Samuel3:20 Kobooch Dan agoi Beer-sheba ko ki nai Israel tugul kole Samuel iman ko maotyotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel3:21 Ak ki testai koboorgei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Shiloh: king'aang'jigei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel eng' Shiloh kobun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel4:1 Ki ityi ng'olyootap `Samuel Israel tugul. Ki manda Israel anyun koba kobargei ak Philistiik. Ki teech Yahudik emainnywa eng' ole neegitee Eben-haezer
1Samuel4:2 Ki tetkei Philistiik si kobargei ak Israel. Ye kingo tuiyo lugeet
1Samuel4:3 Ye kingo it piigap lugeetap Israel nganaseet
1Samuel4:4 Ki kiyookto anyun piik koba Shiloh
1Samuel4:5 Ye kingo it moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseet
1Samuel4:6 Kingo kas Philistiik polatetap waagaat
1Samuel4:7 koywei amu ki le
1Samuel4:8 Pwo acheek! Ng'oo ne sarwech eng' kamuktaichu kiimeen? Chu ko kamuktaik cho ki parei Misiriik koboree korotwo alak tugul eng' surkwen.
1Samuel4:9 Ogimegitu ak oegu murenik
1Samuel4:10 Ki yai Philistiik lugeet ak koterteer Israel
1Samuel4:11 Ki kiip moingetap Kamuktaindet ak kebar Hopni ak Phineas
1Samuel4:12 Ki labat chii ne po ooreetap Benjamin eng' ole kimi lugeet peetuunooto agoi Shiloh ko kagogereer ngoroikyik ak komi ng'ung'unyek metinnyi.
1Samuel4:13 Ye kingo it
1Samuel4:14 Kingo kas `Eli polatetap riirek koteep kole
1Samuel4:15 Ki po Eli kenyiisyek tamanwogik sogool ak sisiit
1Samuel4:16 Ki mwachi `chiichooto Eli koleenji
1Samuel4:17 Kowol ineendet ne ki ibu ng'aleek kole
1Samuel4:18 Kingo mwa agobo moingetap Kamuktaindet
1Samuel4:19 Ki tomono osotyotap Phineas weeriitap Eli ak ki neegit kosigiis. Ye kingo kas ng'aleek keele kageip moingetap Kamuktaindet
1Samuel4:20 Ye ki neegit kome
1Samuel4:21 Kiguure lakwanooto Ikabod koboor kole kagoistogei toroornatet eng' Israel
1Samuel4:22 Ki mwa kole
1Samuel5:1 Kingo luul Philistiik moingetap Kamuktaindet
1Samuel5:2 Ki ip Philistiik moingonooto po Kamuktaindet ak konde kootap Dagon
1Samuel5:3 Ye kingo ng'eetyo piigap Ashdod karon miising' eng' peetuutap aeng' ko kiga koluul Dagon kosyep moo eng' taitap moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki ing'eet Dagon ak konde komostanyi kogeny.
1Samuel5:4 Ago ye kingo ng'eetyo karon miising' eng' peetuutap somok
1Samuel5:5 Nooto anyun amu nee si agoi ra ko matyechei kurgeetap Dagon eng' Ashdod tisiigap Dagon ak tugul che chutei hekaluutap Dagon.
1Samuel5:6 Kinyigiisyi `eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Ashdod ak kogoochi icheek koaragenso ak kobire myando ne ibwansei Ashdod komugul ak kiwotosyekyik.
1Samuel5:7 Kingo keer piigap Ashdod tuguuk che ki yaagiis
1Samuel5:8 Ki iyookto che kiyooktoi kole kiyum kiptainik tugul che po Philistiik kobwa ole mi icheek ak koleenji
1Samuel5:9 Ago ye kingo kagoip
1Samuel5:10 Ki iyookto moingetap Kamuktaindet kwo Ekron. Kingo it moingetap Kamuktaindet Ekron
1Samuel5:11 Ki iyookto ak icheek che kiyooktoi ak koyum kiptainik tugul che po Philistiik kotuiyo ak kole
1Samuel5:12 Piik che ma pek ko ki kibiree myando ne ibwansei; kitogosta kipsengwet riiregap nganaseet.
1Samuel6:1 Ki tebee moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emetap Philistiik arawek tisap.
1Samuel6:2 Ki kuur anyun Philistiik tisiik ak che ng'oorsei ak koleenji
1Samuel6:3 Ak ki wol kole
1Samuel6:4 Koteep anyun kole
1Samuel6:5 Nooto anyun
1Samuel6:6 Amu nee anyun si ouiit mugulelwekwok ko uu ye ki iuit Misiriik ak Pharaoh mugulelwekwak? Kingo kagoyai tuguuk eng' kwong'eet eng' kwenunnywa
1Samuel6:7 Oyai anyun chepkichutit ne leel ak onam tuuga aeng' che aboen che tomo kerat; oratyi chepkichutinooto tuchaata
1Samuel6:8 Oip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak onde chepkichutit; ak onde sandugut ne mi tabandanyi
1Samuel6:9 Ak ogeer; ngot kotogosta kobun kiwotennyi kowendi Beth-shemesh
1Samuel6:10 Ki yai pichooto ko uu nooto. Ki ket tuuga aeng' che aboen ak koratyi chepkichutit ak koger moekwak eng' kaa.
1Samuel6:11 Yeityo konde moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chepkichutit ak sandugut ne mi mureek che po thahabu ak itoonwegap kabwanutikwak che ki kiyai.
1Samuel6:12 Ki pun tuuga chooto ooreet ne litit ne wendi Beth-shemesh. Ki pun ooreet ne oo koutyoti ama masta koba eutap tai anan ko ne po kaataam ak ki isup kiptainigap Philistiik kot koit kiwotetap Beth-shemesh.
1Samuel6:13 Kigesei nganuukwak piigap Beth-shemesh eng' atebweet. Kitobendo ak kogeer moinget
1Samuel6:14 Ki it chepkichutinooto mbareetap Joshua ne po Beth-shemesh
1Samuel6:15 Ki inem `Lawiik moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak sandugut ne ki mi yooto ne ki mi tuguuk che po thahabu oriit ak konde paragutap koyato oo. Ki igoito piigap Beth-shemesh kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak koeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywot eng' peetuunooto.
1Samuel6:16 Kingo kagogeer kiptainik muutu che po Philistiik tuguuchooto
1Samuel6:17 Chu ko kabwanutik che ki kiyae thahabu che kiweektoochi `Philistiik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinetap chalwokto: po agenge Ashdod
1Samuel6:18 Ki iyookto kora mureek che ki kiyae thahabu
1Samuel6:19 Ki pir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Beth-shemesh amu ki it moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeer oriit. Ki par `ineendet piik tamanwogik tisap eng' pichooto ak piik eliphuusyek konom. Ki riiryo piik amu ki par `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik eng' pareet ne oo.
1Samuel6:20 Ki le piigap Beth-shemesh
1Samuel6:21 Ki iyookto piik koba ole mi meng'iigap Kiriath-Jearim koleenji
1Samuel7:1 Ki pwa anyun piigap Kiriath-Jearim ak koip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotogosta. Ki ip kwo kootap Abinadab eng' tulweet ak kotabaan `Eleazar weeriinnyi si koriip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel7:2 Kichaang'it peetuusyek kobooch ngo tebee moinget Kiriath-Jearim; ki ek kenyiisyek tiptem
1Samuel7:3 Ki leenji `Samuel koot tugul ne po Israel
1Samuel7:4 Ki isto anyun `piigap Israel Baalik ak Astarot ak koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei.
1Samuel7:5 Ki le Samuel
1Samuel7:6 Ki iyumjigei tugul Mispa ak kiram peek ak kotumda eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki irugutkei peetuunooto ak komwa eng' yooto kole
1Samuel7:7 Kingo kas Philistiik kole koiyumgei piigap Israel eng' Mispa
1Samuel7:8 Ki leenji `piigap Israel Samuel
1Samuel7:9 Ki nam Samuel aarwetap keechiir ne reryei ak kogoito komugul koek kagoochinet ne kibeeljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki riirchi `Samuel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet.
1Samuel7:10 Ye kingo ta kogoitoi Samuel kagoochinet ne kibeelei
1Samuel7:11 Ki manda piigap Israel eng' Mispa koba koon Philistiik ak kobarat agoi koit Beth-ka keel.
1Samuel7:12 Ki nam `Samuel koita konde kwenutap Mispa ak Sen
1Samuel7:13 Ki kiterteer anyun Philistiik
1Samuel7:14 Ki kiweekyi Israel nganasook che kiga koibe Philistiik
1Samuel7:15 Ki irwookyi `Samuel Israel eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi.
1Samuel7:16 Kiwendi eng' kenyiit age tugul komuutoti Bethel
1Samuel7:17 Kiweekyingei Ramah
1Samuel8:1 Kingo osit Samuel
1Samuel8:2 Kainetap taaitanyi ko ki Joel
1Samuel8:3 Ma pendate weeriikyik ortinwekyik
1Samuel8:4 Ki iyumgei anyun poisyek tugul che po Israel ak kobwa ole mi Samuel eng' Ramah
1Samuel8:5 ak koleenji ineendet
1Samuel8:6 Ki ma paibait Samuel kingo mwa icheek kole
1Samuel8:7 ak koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel
1Samuel8:8 Ko uu poisyonik tugul che ki koyai icheek kobooch peetuut ne ki amutu kotogos eng' Misiri kot koit ra
1Samuel8:9 Kasyi anyun ng'aleekwak
1Samuel8:10 Ki mwachi `Samuel pichooto kisoomei eng' ineendet laitoryat ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel8:11 Ki le
1Samuel8:12 ak kolewenjigei icheeget koek kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak kiptainigap konomusyek
1Samuel8:13 Namei tiibiikwok koek che yaei nyamdutik
1Samuel8:14 Rebenak mbareenikwok ak mbareenikwok che po sabibuk ak che po mseituni che korooron eng' tugul ak kogoochi otwogikyik.
1Samuel8:15 Ibei kebeberta agenge eng' taman ne po kesweekwok ak ne po mbareenikwok che po sabibuk si kogoochi kiboitiinikyik ak otwogikyik.
1Samuel8:16 Ak korebenak otwogikwok che murenik
1Samuel8:17 Ibei kora kebeberta agenge eng' taman ne po keechiirekwok ak oegu okweek otwogikyik.
1Samuel8:18 Ak oriirye eng' peetuunooto amu laitoryandeng'wong' ne olewenjinigei
1Samuel8:19 Ago ki eesyo piik kogas kateunetap Samuel
