1Samuel8:20 si keigei ak acheek pororyosyek tugul ak si korwookwech laitoryandennyo ak komandoi kondoenech koyaiywech lugosyekyok.”
1Samuel8:21 Kingo kas Samuel ng'aleek tugul che po piik
1Samuel8:22 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel
1Samuel9:1 Ki mi chii ne ki tagunoot ak ko kiim ne po ooreetap Benjamin ne kainennyi ko ki Kish weeriitap Abiel
1Samuel9:2 Ki tinyei weeriit ne ki kiguure kainennyi Saulo
1Samuel9:3 Eng' pesyo ko kibetyo sigiroigap Kish kwandap Saulo. Ki leenji `Kish weeriinnyi Saulo
1Samuel9:4 Ki pa kobun emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim ak emetap Salisa
1Samuel9:5 Kingo it emetap Suph
1Samuel9:6 Koleenji otwogindet
1Samuel9:7 Koleenji `Saulo otwogindennyi
1Samuel9:8 Kowolji `otwogindonooto Saulo kogeny koleenji
1Samuel9:9 (Kingwo chii keny eng' Israel kwo koteebe Kamuktaindet ng'olyoo
1Samuel9:10 Koleenji anyun `Saulo otwogindennyi
1Samuel9:11 Ye kingo togostoi kobendi nganaseet
1Samuel9:12 Kowolji tiipchooto koleenji
1Samuel9:13 Ne po oititoi kityo nganaseet
1Samuel9:14 Ki togosta anyun koba nganaseet ak ye kingo chut nganaseet oriit
1Samuel9:15 Eng' peetuut kotomo koit Saulo
1Samuel9:16 “Koteni asiis mutai
1Samuel9:17 Kingo keer `Samuel Saulo
1Samuel9:18 Ki wo Saulo ole kimi Samuel eng' ormariichet oriit ak koleenji
1Samuel9:19 Kowolji `Samuel Saulo koleenji
1Samuel9:20 Ko sigiroiguk che kogobetyot peetuusyek somok che kogosiirto
1Samuel9:21 Kowol Saulo kole
1Samuel9:22 Ki imut anyun `Samuel Saulo ak otwogindennyi koba kootap toek ak kogoochi kotebee ole tagunoot kosiir tugul eng' kwenutap che kiga kiguur che ki olo po piik sosom.
1Samuel9:23 Ki leenji `Samuel kwang'indet
1Samuel9:24 Ki inem kwang'indonooto kubesto ak che ki mi paragutap peenyooto yeityo konde taitap Saulo. Kole Samuel
1Samuel9:25 Ki choorgei eng' kapkoros ak koba nganaseet
1Samuel9:26 Kingo kairir emet
1Samuel9:27 Kingo choortogei eng' ye pooch nganaseet
1Samuel10:1 Ki inem anyun Samuel chuboitap mwaita ak koroong'ji metinnyi
1Samuel10:2 Ye iwe rani eng' yu
1Samuel10:3 Iwendi tai eng' yooto kot iit keetitap Tabor
1Samuel10:4 “Igatin ak kogoonin magatiinik aeng' che itaache kobun eunnywa.
1Samuel10:5 Ye ibata
1Samuel10:6 Nyonjinin Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateet
1Samuel10:7 Ye pwaanjin kaboorunoichu
1Samuel10:8 Yeityo ichoortegei indoena iwe Gilgal amu achoorugei ole imi
1Samuel10:9 Ye kingo welelgei kwo eng' ole mi Samuel
1Samuel10:10 Kingo it tulweet
1Samuel10:11 Ye kingo keer piik tugul che ki ingen ineendet eng' tai komaoteni ak maotik
1Samuel10:12 Kowol chii age eng' yooto kole
1Samuel10:13 Ye kingo kagogees komaoteni
1Samuel10:14 ki teebee `imametap Saulo ineendet ak otwogindennyi koleenji
1Samuel10:15 Komwa `imametap Saulo kole
1Samuel10:16 Koleenji `Saulo imamennyi
1Samuel10:17 Ki kuur `Samuel piik koyumgei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Mispa
1Samuel10:18 yeityo koleenji piigap Israel
1Samuel10:19 Ago kaoeesye ra Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne ineendet ko sarwok eng' pichiinwekwok ak nyalilwogikwok tugul. Komwa ole
1Samuel10:20 Ki imut anyun `Samuel pororyet age tugul eng' che po Israel koriik ak eng' parbaryat kenam pororyetap Benjamin.
1Samuel10:21 Ak ki imut pororyetap Benjamin koriik kobwanune ortinwekwak ak ki kinam ooreetap Matirik. Eng' let ko ki kinam Saulo weeriitap Kish. Ago ye ki ngecheeng' ineendet
1Samuel10:22 Koteebse `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun kogeny koleenji
1Samuel10:23 Ki rwai piik koba komut ineendet eng' olooto
1Samuel10:24 Koleenji `Samwel piik tugul
1Samuel10:25 Komwachi `Samuel piik maguutik ak poisyonigap laitornatet. Yeityo kosirchi bukuit ak konde taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kingo pata komwachi `Samuel piik tugul koba. Ki wo chii tugul koonnyi.
1Samuel10:26 Ki wo Saulo agine koonnyi eng' Gibea ak ki pa ak murenik che nyigoonen che kiga twa Kamuktaindet mugulelwekwak.
1Samuel10:27 Ago ki mwa abusanik alage kole
1Samuel11:1 Ki togos Nahas Amonindet ak konam Jabes-gilead. Ki le `piik tugul che po Jabes Nahas
1Samuel11:2 Ak ki leenji `Nahas Amonindet icheek
1Samuel11:3 Koleenji `poisyegap Jabes ineendet
1Samuel11:4 Kingo it anyun piik che kiga kiyookto Gibea ne po Saulo ak komwachi piik ng'aleechuuto kogas
1Samuel11:5 Ogeero
1Samuel11:6 Ye kingo kas ng'aleechooto
1Samuel11:7 Ki nam eiik aeng' che po chogit ak kotonaton yeityo koyooktoe piik koba komoswek tugul che po Israel koleenji
1Samuel11:8 Ki iit icheek eng' Besek ak ki ek piigap Israel eliphuusyek pogol somok
1Samuel11:9 Ki leenji pichooto kiga kiyok chu kiga pwa
1Samuel11:10 Ki leenji anyun `piigap Jabes Amonik
1Samuel11:11 Kingo eech kopcheune `Saulo piik kweanaik somok. Ki it kwenutap nganaseet eng' riipseet ne po karon ak kobar Amonik kot kong'wanit asiis. Kiyesta che kiga ng'et kot ko mata kenyoor che mi aeng' eng' komosta agenge.
1Samuel11:12 Ak ki leenji `piik Samuel
1Samuel11:13 Ago ki le Saulo
1Samuel11:14 Ki leenji `Samuel piik
1Samuel11:15 Ara ki pa piik tugul Gilgal
1Samuel12:1 Ki leenji `Samuel Israel tugul
1Samuel12:2 Kobooch ra
1Samuel12:3 Ang'ni anee! Obaoryanjo yaityo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak eng' taitap nenyi ne iilaat. Ki arebee ng'oo tennyi? Anan ki arebee ng'oo sigiryennyi? Anan ki aberber ng'oo? Ki aus ng'oo? Anan ki anam eng' eutap ng'oo tugun che po asoya si atuge konyekyuk? Ngo mi aweekwok.”
1Samuel12:4 Kowol piik kole
1Samuel12:5 Kowolji Samuel kole
1Samuel12:6 Komwachi `Samuel piik koleenji
1Samuel12:7 Otononie anyun nguno si kobiit ateiywok eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo poisyonik tugul che po imanda che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kiyaiywok ak kwanisyekwok.
1Samuel12:8 “Ye kingo nyo Jakobo Misiri
1Samuel12:9 Ago kiutye `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
1Samuel12:10 Ki riirchi `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
1Samuel12:11 Ki iyook `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeru-baal
1Samuel12:12 Ago ye kingo keer `Nahas laitoryatap lagogap Ammon konyonjook obargei
1Samuel12:13 Wei
1Samuel12:14 Ngot oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oot ineendet
1Samuel12:15 Ago ngot ko mogas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel12:16 Ara anyun otononse si ogeer kitap kwang'utyet ne machei koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ogeere.
1Samuel12:17 Kasarta ne po kesisyetap nganuuk ni. Aguure Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si koyook tuleet ak ropta
1Samuel12:18 Ki kuur anyun `Samuel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel12:19 Koleenji `piik tugul Samuel
1Samuel12:20 Kowolji `Samuel piik koleenji
1Samuel12:21 Momaste osup tuguugap puch che ma imuuchi kotoret kiy anan kosar amu puch.
1Samuel12:22 Kosupkei ak kainennyi ne oo
1Samuel12:23 Eng' anee
1Samuel12:24 Ne siirei tugul
1Samuel12:25 Amu ngot otestai eng' yaityenng'wong'
1Samuel13:1 Kiga kotar Saulo kenyiisyek (sosom) ye ki tau kolaitorani
1Samuel13:2 Ki lewenjigei `Saulo murenik eliphuusyek somok che po Israel. Ki mi eliphuusyek aeng'u eng' chooto kobooto Saulo eng' Mikmas ak eng' tulweetap Bethel ak kimi eliphuut agenge kobooto Jonathan eng' Gibea ne po Benjamin. Ki iyookto kiplugotinik che kiga ng'et koba kaa.
1Samuel13:3 King'em `Jonathan irimeetap kiplugotinigap Philistiik ne ki miitei Geba ak ki kas Philistiik agobo niito. Ki ng'at Saulo keguut iryageet eng' emet tugul
1Samuel13:4 Ki kas Israel tugul kole kogobar `Saulo irimeetap kiplugotinigap Philistiik ak kole ki koek Israel ne kiwechei eng' Philistiik. Ki iyumgei piik koosup Saulo koba Gilgal.
1Samuel13:5 Ki iyumgei Philistiik si kobargei ak Israel kotinyei kariisyek eliphuusyek sosom ak piik eliphuusyek lo che ketei paraisisyek
1Samuel13:6 Kingo keer piigap Israel kole mi eng' pichiindo
1Samuel13:7 Kiga kolandae Jordan Yahudik alage koba emetap Gad ak Gilead. Ago kita komi Saulo Gilgal
1Samuel13:8 Kingo kenis peetuusyek tisap
1Samuel13:9 Kole Saulo
1Samuel13:10 Eng' sainooto ki igeesune kagoitoetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei
1Samuel13:11 Ago ki le Samuel
1Samuel13:12 Abwaat anyun ale chorugei Philistiik nguno kobwanei ole ami eng' Gilgal kotom asoom chametap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel13:13 Koleenji `Samuel Saulo
1Samuel13:14 Ago nguno koma kotebyei laitornateng'ung' agoi. Kagocheeng'jigei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne iboiboi muguleldanyi
1Samuel13:15 Ki ng'eet Samuel ak kwo kotogosta eng' Gilgal agoi Gibea ne po Benjamin. Ki it `Saulo kiplugotinik che ki ng'et kobooto ineendet
1Samuel13:16 Ki tebee Saulo ak Jonathan weeriinnyi ak kiplugotinik che ki mi ak ineendet Geba ne po Benjamin
1Samuel13:17 Ki mong' luulik eng' nganaseetap Philistiik kopcheunegei somok. Ki pun kweanet age ooreet ne wendi Ophrah agoi emetap Saulo
1Samuel13:18 kobun kweanet age ooreet ne wendi Beth-horon
1Samuel13:19 Ki ma komiitei kitang'indet emet komugul ne po Israel. Ki iywei Philistiik kole imuuch koyachigei Yahudik rotoogap chok anan ng'otwek.
1Samuel13:20 Ki choortagei Yahudik tugul kobendi ole mi Philistiik
1Samuel13:21 Ki kigoito kebeberta aeng' eng' somok che po shekel eng' marusyek
1Samuel13:22 Ki ma piit eng' peetuutap lugeet rotwetap chok anan ko ng'otit eng' eutap chii age tugul ne ki mi kobooto Saulo ak Jonathan
1Samuel13:23 Ak kimanda lugeetap Philistiik koba ole kibunei eng' Mikmas.
1Samuel14:1 Eng' peetuut age
1Samuel14:2 Ki tebee Saulo tabandap Gibea eng' keetit keel ne po logoek ne mi Migron. Ki olo po pogol lo murenik che ki mi ak ineendet.
1Samuel14:3 Ki mi olooto Ahija
1Samuel14:4 Ki mi rwandet ne ng'atip komosi
1Samuel14:5 Kiga tonon rwandet age eng' murot kaataam ne po taitap Mikmas
1Samuel14:6 Ki leenji `Jonathan murenooto ki ipchin kariikyik che po lugeet
1Samuel14:7 Koleenji `chiito ne ki ipchin kariik
1Samuel14:8 Yeityo koleenji Jonathan
1Samuel14:9 Ngot komwaiwech kole
1Samuel14:10 Ago ngot koleenjech
1Samuel14:11 Ki iboorchigei anyun icheek tuwai lugeetap Philistiik. Ak ki le Philistiik
1Samuel14:12 Ki leenji `piigap lugonooto Jonathan kobooto chiito ne ki ipchin kariik
1Samuel14:13 Ki wo Jonathan kolaany eng' eunek ak keelyek ak ki isubi ineendet chiichooto ki ipchin kariik. Ki ibutyo Philistiik eng' taitap Jonathan ak ki parat icheek eng' let chiito ne ki ipchinoti kariik.
1Samuel14:14 Eng' paronooto po tai ko ki par Jonathan ak chiito ne ki ipchin kariik piik olo po tiptem eng' kooret ne po kebebertap ekait.
1Samuel14:15 Ki piit potanet eng' nganaseet
1Samuel14:16 Ki keer riibiigap Saulo eng' Gibea ne po Benjamin; ogeero
1Samuel14:17 Koleenji anyun `Saulo piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet
1Samuel14:18 Koleenji `Saulo Ahija
1Samuel14:19 Ye kita kong'alaaljin `Saulo tisiindet
1Samuel14:20 Ki iyumgei piik tugul che ki mi ak Saulo ak koba pooryeet. Ki nyoor Philistiik komi eng' wasetapkei ak ki par chii tugul chiito ne kitokyigei
1Samuel14:21 Ki week Yahudik che ki mi kobooto Philistiik ko uu ye ki uu eng' tai
1Samuel14:22 Ye kingo kas piik tugul che po Israel che kiga unygei eng' emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim kole kamwei Philistiik
1Samuel14:23 Kosar anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eng' peetuunooto; ak ki landa lugeet kwo Beth-aben.
1Samuel14:24 Ki iimak kiplugotinigap Israel eng' peetuunooto. Ko uu ye kiga konde Saulo kotebee kayasyoet kiplugotinik kole
1Samuel14:25 Ki pa piik tugul timiin
1Samuel14:26 Ye kingo it piik timiin
1Samuel14:27 Ago ki tomo kogas Jonathan kole kigong'at kwandannyi piik eng' kayasyoet. Ki iyogoito anyun kirokto ne ki mi eunnyi
1Samuel14:28 Kowol anyun age eng' piik kole
1Samuel14:29 Ki le Jonathan anyun
1Samuel14:30 Kotam nee nda kagaam piik tuguugap puunikwak che kanyoor ko uu ye machei? Kata piitu pareet ne oo eng' Philistiik.”
1Samuel14:31 Ki par Philistiik eng' peetuunooto kobooch Mikmas agoi Aijalon
1Samuel14:32 Ki rwochi piik tuguuk che ki nyaban; ak ki nam keechiirek ak tuuga kobooto moek ak koeny eng' yooto ak ki am piik panyechooto kobooto korotiik.
1Samuel14:33 Ye ki ngemwachi Saulo keleenji
1Samuel14:34 Ak ki le Saulo
1Samuel14:35 Kiteekyi anyun `Saulo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet; nooto ko ki kaptisisyet ne po tai ne kiteekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel14:36 Ak ki le Saulo
1Samuel14:37 ki teebee `Saulo Kamuktaindet kiit ne yaei kole
1Samuel14:38 Ki le anyun Saulo
1Samuel14:39 Amu ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne saru Israel
1Samuel14:40 Yeityo komwachi `Saulo Israel tugul koleenji
1Samuel14:41 Ki le anyun Saulo “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel14:42 Ak ki le Saulo
1Samuel14:43 Ki leenji anyun `Saulo Jonathan
1Samuel14:44 Kole `Saulo
1Samuel14:45 Ago ki leenji `piik Saulo
1Samuel14:46 Ki togosta anyun Saulo ko mata koosup Philistiik
1Samuel14:47 Kingo kagonam anyun Saulo laitornatet eng' Israel
1Samuel14:48 Ki yai eng' nyiganateet ak ki par Amelegik ak kosar Israel eng' eunegap icheek che kiga koluul.
1Samuel14:49 Weeriigap Saulo anyun ko ki Jonathan
1Samuel14:50 Kainetap osotyotap Saulo ko ki Ainoam cheptap Ahimaaz. Kiptaiyatap lugeennyi ko ki kiguuree Abner weeriitap Ner
1Samuel14:51 Kwandap Saulo ko ki Kish
1Samuel14:52 Eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Saulo
1Samuel15:1 Ak ki leenji `Samuel Saulo
1Samuel15:2 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
1Samuel15:3 Ui anyun nguno ibookyi Amelek ak ing'em igeesu tuguuk tugul che tinyei. Amat ibagaakte chii
1Samuel15:4 Ki kuur anyun `Saulo piik ak koiit icheek eng' Telaim: piik eliphuusyek pogol aeng' che punei keelyek ak piik eliphuusyek taman che po Judah.
1Samuel15:5 Ki wo `Saulo kot koit nganaseetap Amelek ak koribis eng' atebweet.
1Samuel15:6 Ki mwachi `Saulo Kenik koleenji
1Samuel15:7 Ki par anyun `Saulo Amelegik kobooch Havilah agoi Sur
1Samuel15:8 Ki nam Agag laitoryatap Amelegik kosabei; ak kobar piik tugul kogees eng' rotwetap chok.
1Samuel15:9 Ago ki pagaach Agag `Saulo ak `piik ak keechiirek che korooron eng' tugul
1Samuel15:10 Ki ityi anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `Samuel koleenji
1Samuel15:11 “Ki ma ta myee aeet Saulo koek laitoryat. Amu kagoweektagei let mata kosuba
1Samuel15:12 Ki ng'eet Samuel karon miising' kwo kotuiyo ak Saulo. Ki kimwachi Samuel keleenji kanyo Saulo Karmel ak koteekyigei kiit ne kibwaatee ineendet
1Samuel15:13 Ye kingo nyo Samuel ole mi Saulo
1Samuel15:14 Ak ki le Samuel
1Samuel15:15 Kole Saulo
1Samuel15:16 Komwachi anyun `Samuel Saulo koleenji
1Samuel15:17 Ki mwa Samuel kole
1Samuel15:18 ak ki iyookten Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iwe panda ak kole
1Samuel15:19 Amu nee anyun si me kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel15:20 Koleenji `Saulo Samuel
1Samuel15:21 Ago koget piik parunenik
1Samuel15:22 Ak ki mwa Samuel kole
1Samuel15:23 Amu kergei ngelelnateet ak tengektap ponisyet ak kergei uuindap met ak chalwokto ak saaetap kanamonik. Amu koieesye ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel15:24 Ak ki mwachi `Saulo Samuel koleenji
1Samuel15:25 Ara asaain anyun nguno ale
1Samuel15:26 Ak ki mwachi `Samuel Saulo koleenji
1Samuel15:27 Ye kingo welelgei Samuel kwo
1Samuel15:28 Ki mwachi `Samuel ineendet koleenji
1Samuel15:29 Ma mwaei lembech Kimnateetap Israel ama sigu; amu ineendet koma chiito si kowalak.”
1Samuel15:30 Komwa Saulo kole
1Samuel15:31 Koweek anyun Samuel koosup Saulo ak ki kutung'ji `Saulo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel15:32 Yeityo komwa Samuel kole
1Samuel15:33 Ago ki mwa Samuel kole
1Samuel15:34 Yeityo kwo anyun Samuel Ramah
1Samuel15:35 Ak ki mata konyo kogeny Samuel kogeer Saulo agoi peetuutap meennyi. Nga no ko ki riirchi `Samuel Saulo; amu ki riir let Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kiga koyai Saulo koek laitoryat koboi Israel.
1Samuel16:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel koleenji
1Samuel16:2 Ki mwa Samuel kole
1Samuel16:3 Kuur Jesse konyo ole itisisye si aboorun kiit ne iyae
1Samuel16:4 Ki yai Samuel kioto ki kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kingo it Bethlehem
1Samuel16:5 Ak ki le
1Samuel16:6 Kingo it kogeer Eliap ak ki ibwaat kole
1Samuel16:7 Ago ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel
1Samuel16:8 Koguur anyun `Jesse Abinadab ak koleenji kosiirto eng' taitap Samuel. Ago ki le Samuel
1Samuel16:9 Yeityo koleenji Jesse Shammah kosiirto. Ago ki le
1Samuel16:10 Ki leenji `Jesse weeriikyik tisap kosiirto eng' taitap Samuel. Ago ki leenji `Samuel Jesse
1Samuel16:11 Ki leenji `Samuel Jesse
1Samuel16:12 Ki iyookto chiito
1Samuel16:13 Konem anyun Samuel lalet ne ki mi mwaita ak koiil ineendet eng' kwenutap tupchosyekyik. Ki nyoonji `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi eng' kimnateet kobooch peetuunooto agoi. Kingo pata
1Samuel16:14 Kiga kwo Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Saulo
1Samuel16:15 Ki mwachi `otwogikyik Saulo koleenji
1Samuel16:16 Ingong'at kiptaiyandennyo otwogikyik che mi tainnyi kocheeng' chiito ne putiin ketubet. Asi ye nyoonji tamirmiryet ne ya ne punu Kamuktaindet kobut ketubet eng' eunnyi si isap.”
1Samuel16:17 Koleenji `Saulo otwogikyik
1Samuel16:18 Ki wolji anyun age eng' murenjoto chiget koleenji
1Samuel16:19 Koyookto anyun `Saulo piik koba kap Jesse
1Samuel16:20 Ki chop `Jesse sigiryet ak koganapchi amitwogik
1Samuel16:21 Ki it `Daudi kap Saulo ak koboisyechi ineendet. Ki cham `Saulo ineendet miising' ak ki yai koek chiito ne ipchin kariikyik.
1Samuel16:22 Ki iyookto `Saulo chiito kwo kap Jesse koleenji
1Samuel16:23 Ye kanyonji Saulo `tamirmiryet ne ya ne punu Kamuktaindet
1Samuel17:1 Ki iyum anyun Philistiik lugosyekwak koba lugeet
1Samuel17:2 Ki iyumgei piigap Israel kobooto Saulo ak ki teech atebweetap Elah ak kotet lugeet si kobargei ak Philistiik.
1Samuel17:3 Kitonone `Philistiik tulweet komosta age
1Samuel17:4 Ki mong' nyiganeet age eng' nganaseetap Philistiik ne ki kiguure Goliat ne po Gath. Ki koindonyi ko ki olo po mitainik somok.
1Samuel17:5 Ki tinyei kuutweet ne po sugunwet eng' metinnyi ak ki ilaachi ngoryeet ne po kariik. Nyigiisindap ngoryonooto ko ki shekelisyek eliphuusyek muut che po sugunonik.
1Samuel17:6 Ki tinyei kariigap sugunonik eng' keelyekyik ak ndiritap sugunwet eng' patennyi.
1Samuel17:7 Ki kergei irumetap ndirinnyi ak keetit ne taachin usiisyek chiito ne nabisyei. Nyigiisindap meleitap ng'otinnyi ko ki shekelisyek pogol lo che po kariik
1Samuel17:8 Ki tonon ak kotwekyi lugosyegap Israel eng' kutit ne oo koleenji
1Samuel17:9 Ngot komuuch kebarge tuwai ak kobara keegu anyun otwogikwok. Ago ngot aterteer ineendet ak abar
1Samuel17:10 Ki le Philistindonooto
1Samuel17:11 Kingo kas Saulo ak Israel tugul ng'aleechooto po Philistindet
1Samuel17:12 Daudi ko ki weeriitap Epratindetap Beth-lehem-juda ne ki kainennyi ko Jesse. Ki tinyei weeriik sisiit
1Samuel17:13 Kigaba lugeet weeriik che eecheen somogu che po Jesse koosup Saulo. Kainaigap weeriichooto somok che kigaba lugeet ko kitaita Eliap
1Samuel17:14 Ki ne ming'in Daudi. Kiga isup Saulo chooto eecheen somogu.
1Samuel17:15 Kiwendi `Daudi kap Saulo ak koweeksei koyagi keechiiregap kwandanyi eng' Bethlehem.
1Samuel17:16 Eng' peetuusyek artam
1Samuel17:17 Pesyet age
1Samuel17:18 Ipchi kora mugunichu taman po cheego kiptaiyannywa ak igeer chametapkei ne po tupchosyeguk yeityo iibu waluunennywa.”
1Samuel17:19 Ki mi Saulo ak icheek kobooto piik tugul che po Israel atebweetap Elah
1Samuel17:20 Ki ng'eet `Daudi karon miising' ak kobagakyi keechiirek riibindet yeityo kwo ko uu ye kiga ng'at Jesse koibei tuguuchooto. Ki it ole mi kariisyek ye kiwaachei lugeet agobo pooryeet komachei komanda koba koyai lugeet.
1Samuel17:21 Kitet lugeet Israel ak Philistiik kotoorchingei lugoosyek tuwai.
1Samuel17:22 Ki pagaakyi Daudi tuguukyik riibindetap tuguuk ak kolabat ye mi lugeet kwo kogat weeriik che tupcho.
1Samuel17:23 Ye kita kong'alaaldos ak icheek kotogos nyiganeet
1Samuel17:24 Kingo keer piik tugul che po `Israel chiichooto
1Samuel17:25 Ki le piigap Israel
1Samuel17:26 Ki ng'alaalji `Daudi piik che kitonondos eng' ye mi ineendet koleenji
1Samuel17:27 Ki wolji `pichooto ineendet ko uu ni koleenji
1Samuel17:28 Kingo kas Eliap ng'eetap kamet ne oo kong'alaaljin pichooto
1Samuel17:29 Ak ki le Daudi
1Samuel17:30 Kiwelelgei kotokyigei chiito age ak komwa ko uu atkai. Ki wolji `piik ineendet kogeny ko uu tai.
1Samuel17:31 Ye ki ngegas ng'aleek che ki mwa Daudi
1Samuel17:32 Kingo it koleenji `Daudi Saulo
1Samuel17:33 Koleenji `Saulo Daudi
1Samuel17:34 Ki leenji `Daudi Saulo
1Samuel17:35 awe asu
1Samuel17:36 Ki par otwogindeng'ung' tyong'ichooto tuwai
1Samuel17:37 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kisarwo eng' siyoogap ng'etundo ak eng' siyoogap tyonyooto
1Samuel17:38 Ki ilaakyi `Saulo Daudi ngoryennyi ne po lugeet
1Samuel17:39 Kiratyi Daudi ngoryennyi rotwennyi po chok yeityo kotyem kole kwo amu kitom kotyemei. Ki leenji `Daudi Saulo
1Samuel17:40 Ki nam kiroktonyi ak kokwechigei kibargoinik muut eng' kereruut ak konde loletap mestoweek ne ki tinyei
1Samuel17:41 Ki nyo Philistindet koriikyi Daudi ak ki indoe ineendet chiito ne ki ipchin long'eet.
1Samuel17:42 Ak kingo keerot Philistindet ola tugul
1Samuel17:43 Koleenji `Philistindet Daudi
1Samuel17:44 Ki leenji `Philistindet Daudi
1Samuel17:45 Koleenji `Daudi Philistindonooto
1Samuel17:46 Indein rani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunnyu. Awirin abariin ak atil meting'ung' yeityo agoochi rani muuswegap lugeetap Philistiik toriitik che po parak
1Samuel17:47 Nae tuiyoni tugul kole
1Samuel17:48 Kingo ng'eet Philistindet konyo koriik
1Samuel17:49 Ki irooch Daudi euut lolennyi ak konem koita konde chemasindaryet ak kowiir Philistindet kokwer turyetap togeet. Kichut koita togeet oriit ak ki ibut kondoe met.
1Samuel17:50 Ki iterteer anyun `Daudi Philistindet eng' chemasindaryanooto ak koita
1Samuel17:51 Ki labat anyun Daudi ak kotonone Philistindet
1Samuel17:52 Ki ng'eetyo piigap Israel ak che po Judah ak kowaach yeityo koon Philistiik agoi koit Gath
1Samuel17:53 Kingo week piigap Israel eng' oneet ne ki oonei Philistiik
1Samuel17:54 Ki ip Daudi metitap Philistindonooto konyo Jerusalem
1Samuel17:55 Kingo keer `Saulo Daudi kowendi kobaregei ak Philistindet
1Samuel17:56 Ak ki le laitoryat
1Samuel17:57 Ye kingo weeksei Daudi kobunu pareetap Philistindet
1Samuel17:58 Kingo it koteebe Saulo koleenji
1Samuel18:1 Ye kingo kagogees Daudi kong'alaaljindos ak Saulo
1Samuel18:2 Kong'eetee peetuunooto
1Samuel18:3 Ki iyomiskei anyun Jonathan ak Daudi
1Samuel18:4 Ki ireek Jonathan ngoryennyi ne po parak ne ki ilaachi ak kogoochi Daudi kobooto ngoryennyi ne kooi
1Samuel18:5 Ki wo Daudi oldo age tugul ole ki iyookto Saulo
1Samuel18:6 Ye kingo pwanei icheek koweeksei Daudi kobunu pareetap Philistindet
1Samuel18:7 Kityendos kwonyichooto kourerendos koleen
1Samuel18:8 Ki nereech Saulo kot. Ma ibaibai ineendet mwaonooto ak ki mwa kole
1Samuel18:9 Kobooch peetuunooto agoi
1Samuel18:10 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto
1Samuel18:11 Ki toorta ng'otinooto Saulo kotokyi Daudi
1Samuel18:12 Ki iywei `Saulo Daudi
1Samuel18:13 Ki isto Saulo anyun ineendet eng' ole mi
1Samuel18:14 Ki tebi Daudi eng' ng'omnateet eng' ortinwekyik tugul ak ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet.
1Samuel18:15 Kingo keer Saulo kotebyei Daudi eng' ng'omnateet ne oo
1Samuel18:16 Ago ki cham `Israel tugul ak `Judah Daudi
1Samuel18:17 Ki leenji `Saulo Daudi
1Samuel18:18 Ak ki leenji `Daudi Saulo
1Samuel18:19 Ago eng' peetuut ne kita kigoochin Daudi Merap cheptap Saulo
1Samuel18:20 Ago ki cham `Mikal cheptap Saulo Daudi. ki ngemwachi Saulo ko ki ibaibai ng'olyoondonooto ineendet.
1Samuel18:21 Ki ibwaat anyun Saulo kole
1Samuel18:22 Ki ng'at `Saulo otwogikyik koleenji
1Samuel18:23 Ki mwachi anyun `otwogigap Saulo Daudi ng'aleechooto kogas. Ago ki mwa Daudi kole
1Samuel18:24 Ki mwachi anyun otwogikyik `Saulo koleenji
1Samuel18:25 Kole Saulo
1Samuel18:26 Kingo mwachi `otwogikyik Daudi ng'aleechuuto
1Samuel18:27 kong'eet `Daudi kwo kobooto piikyik kobar Philistiik piik pogol aeng'. Ki ip Daudi irirenikwak ak kogoochi laitoryat irirenichooto tugul si koek saania eng' kaplaitoryat. Ko uu nooto anyun
1Samuel18:28 Kingo keer ak konai Saulo kole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Daudi
1Samuel18:29 kotes koiywei Daudi. Ki ek Saulo puunyootap Daudi peetuut age tugul.
1Samuel18:30 Ki manda anyun pounigap Philistiik
1Samuel19:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Saulo Jonathan weeriinnyi kobooto otwogikyik tugul koleenji kobar Daudi.
1Samuel19:2 Ago ki paibai miising' Jonathan weeriitap Saulo agobo Daudi. Ara ki mwachi `Jonathan Daudi koleenji
1Samuel19:3 Amandai ak awe atonon eng' ye neegitee abba eng' keeweet eng' ole imi ak keng'alaal ak ineendet agobo inyee. Ngot ageer kiy amwaun.”
1Samuel19:4 Ki ng'alaalji `Jonathan Saulo kwandanyi ak kochoi Daudi koleenji
1Samuel19:5 Ma iit saboondanyi ak kogobar Philistindet ak ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetunet ne oo agobo Israel tugul. Ki igeer kioto aginye ak ki ibaibaitu
1Samuel19:6 Ki kas `Saulo ng'olyootap Jonathan
1Samuel19:7 Ki kuur anyun `Jonathan Daudi ak komwachi ineendet tuguuchooto tugul. Ki imut `Jonathan Daudi kwo ole mi Saulo ak ki tebee tainnyi ko uu eng' tai.
1Samuel19:8 Ki piit lugeet kogeny
1Samuel19:9 Ago ki nyoonji Saulo `tamirmiryet ne ya ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye kitebyei eng' koonnyi kotinyei ng'otit eng' eunnyi. Kibutei Daudi kibugandet eng' eunnyi.
1Samuel19:10 Kileen Saulo kotoor Daudi eng' ng'otit kosoree inaat
1Samuel19:11 Ki iyookto `Saulo piik koba kootap Daudi koriip ineendet kole si kobar ineendet karon. Ki mwachi Daudi `Mikal osotyonnyi koleenji
1Samuel19:12 Ki choorta anyun `Mikal Daudi kwo ng'wony kobun tirisyet
1Samuel19:13 Ki nam `Mikal kanamwet ak komogon eng' itoogut ak kotichine metit mutoit ne po koroorigap ng'oroorek yeityo kotuge ngoroik.
1Samuel19:14 Ye kingo yookto `Saulo piik koba konam Daudi
1Samuel19:15 Ki iyookto `Saulo pichooto koba kogeer Daudi ak koleenji
1Samuel19:16 Kingo pwa ko pichooto
1Samuel19:17 Ki leenji `Saulo Mikal
1Samuel19:18 Kimwei anyun Daudi
1Samuel19:19 Ki kimwachi Saulo keleenji
1Samuel19:20 Ara anyun ki iyookto `Saulo piik koba konam Daudi
1Samuel19:21 ki ngemwachi Saulo ng'aleechooto
1Samuel19:22 Ki wo ineendet agine Ramah kot koit ole mi keriinget ne oo ne po peek ne miitei Seku. Kiteep kole
1Samuel19:23 Ki wo olooto po Naiot eng' Ramah
1Samuel19:24 Ki ireek ngoroikyik ak komaoten agine eng' taitap Samuel. Ki ru aach ngor peetuunooto tugul ak kemounooto tugul. Nooto anyun kimwaei keleen
1Samuel20:1 Kimwei Daudi eng' Naiot eng' Ramah ak kwo komwa eng' taitap Jonathan kole
1Samuel20:2 Koleenji Jonathan
1Samuel20:3 Ak ki iyasyo Daudi kogeny kole
1Samuel20:4 Koleenji anyun `Jonathan Daudi
1Samuel20:5 Ki leenji `Daudi Jonathan
1Samuel20:6 Ngot kogeer kwandang'ung' kole ma mi
1Samuel20:7 Ngot komwa kole
1Samuel20:8 Eng' nooto anyun iyachi ne myee otwogindeng'ung'; amu ki iyachi otwogindeng'ung' arorutyet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten: ago ngot atinye tengekto
1Samuel20:9 Ki le Jonathan
1Samuel20:10 Koleenji anyun `Daudi Jonathan
1Samuel20:11 Koleenji `Jonathan Daudi
1Samuel20:12 Ki leenji `Jonathan Daudi
1Samuel20:13 Ingoyachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jonathan ko uu nooto ak kosiir
1Samuel20:14 Ngo ta asabe
1Samuel20:15 ko meiste myeeindong'ung' eng' koonnyu koigeny. Achicha meiste agot ye kagoisto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puunik alak tugul che po Daudi eng' ng'wony.
1Samuel20:16 Ki yai anyun `Jonathan arorutyet kobooto kootap Daudi kole
1Samuel20:17 Ki iyasyechi `Jonathan Daudi ne po aeng'
1Samuel20:18 Ki leenji anyun `Jonathan ineendet
1Samuel20:19 Ye kaibeni peetuusyek somok
1Samuel20:20 Amwoge tabandanyi eng' kipchabonik somok; ko uu ye kamwoge kiy.
1Samuel20:21 Yeityo ayoogu muren aleenji
1Samuel20:22 Ago ngot amwachi weerooto aleenji
1Samuel20:23 Ak agobo ng'aleek chu kagagimwa inyee ak anee
1Samuel20:24 Ki unygei Daudi anyun eng' turguin
1Samuel20:25 Ki tebee laitoryat ng'echerennyi ko uu peetuusyek alak eng' ng'echereet ne kineegite inaat: ak ki tonon Jonathan
1Samuel20:26 Ago ki ma mwa ng'olyoo age tugul peetuunooto Saulo. Amu ki ibwaat kole
1Samuel20:27 Eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ko kagoleel arawet
1Samuel20:28 Kowolji `Jonathan Saulo koleenji
1Samuel20:29 kole
1Samuel20:30 Ki nereekyi anyun `Saulo Jonathan ochei
1Samuel20:31 Amu kotee kota kosabei weeriitap Jesse eng' ng'wony
1Samuel20:32 Kowolji `Jonathan kwandanyi Saulo koleenji
1Samuel20:33 Kitoor `Saulo ineendet eng' ng'otit koleen kobar. Konae nooto anyun Jonathan kole kogotil kwandanyi kobar Daudi.
1Samuel20:34 Kong'eet anyun Jonathan eng' meset eng' nereegek che ng'woneen. Ma amis eng' peetuutap aeng' ne po arawet
1Samuel20:35 Ki eng' karon
1Samuel20:36 Ak ki leenji weeroto ming'in
1Samuel20:37 Kingo it lakwanooto ole ki mi kipchabet ne kiga mwokto Jonathan
1Samuel20:38 Ki kuur `Jonathan weeroto koleenji
1Samuel20:39 Ago ki ma nai kiy age tugul. Jonathan ak Daudi icheegei che ki ingen ng'aleechooto.
1Samuel20:40 Ki igoochi Jonathan kariikyik lakwanatonyi ak koleenji
1Samuel20:41 Kingwo weerooto
1Samuel20:42 Ki leenji `Jonathan Daudi
1Samuel21:1 Ki wo anyun Daudi Nob kap Ahimelek tisiindet. Ki nyo Ahimelek kotorook Daudi kobotanonu ak koleenji
1Samuel21:2 Kowolji `Daudi Ahimelek tisiindet koleenji
1Samuel21:3 Ara itinye nee anyun nguno eng' eung'ung'? Koono magatiinik muut anan ko kiit age tugul ne itinye.”
1Samuel21:4 Ago ki wolji `tisiindonooto Daudi koleenji
1Samuel21:5 Kowolji `Daudi tisiindonooto koleenji
1Samuel21:6 Kogoochi anyun `tisiindet ineendet magatiinik che itabaanatiin
1Samuel21:7 Ki mi yooto chiito age ne po otwogigap Saulo eng' peetuunooto ne ki kiraany kotebi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kainennyi ko ki Doeg
1Samuel21:8 Ki teebe `Daudi Ahimelek koleenji
1Samuel21:9 Kowol tisiindonooto kole
1Samuel21:10 Ki ng'eet anyun `Daudi komwei peetuunooto amu ki iywei Saulo ak kwo kap Akis laitoryatap Gath.
1Samuel21:11 Ago ki leenji `otwogikyik Akis
1Samuel21:12 Kigonor `Daudi ng'aleechuuto eng' muguleldanyi; ak ki iywei `Akis laitoryatap Gath Daudi miising'.
1Samuel21:13 Ara ki wal atebeennyi eng' tainnywa ak ki yaigei koigei kibiywet eng' eunekwak
1Samuel21:14 Ki leenji anyun `Akis otwogikyik
1Samuel21:15 Tos korerwo kibionik kot omutwaa chiichi konyo koiiywen eng' tainnyu? Tos nyolu konyo chiichi koonnyu?”
1Samuel22:1 Ki wo `Daudi anyun eng' olooto kochilil kwo kebeneetap Adulam. Kingo kas tupchosyekyik ak piik tugul che po kootap kwandanyi
1Samuel22:2 Ki iyumjigei ineendet chii age tugul ne kinyalili
1Samuel22:3 Ki wo eng' olooto `Daudi kwo Mispe ne po Moab ak koleenji laitoryatap Moab
1Samuel22:4 Ki imut icheek kobwa taitap laitoryatap Moab
1Samuel22:5 Ago ki leenji maotyot `Gad Daudi
1Samuel22:6 Ki kas `Saulo anyun kole ki kenyoor Daudi kobooto murenik che mi ak ineendet. Kitepchei ng'wony `Saulo eng' Gibea eng' keetit keel eng' Ramah
1Samuel22:7 Ki leenji `Saulo otwogichooto kitonondos
1Samuel22:8 kot ko kochaama okweek tugul? Ma mi agot agenge eng' okweek ne ng'ang'wa ye yaei arorutyet weeriinnyu ak weeriitap Jesse
1Samuel22:9 Eng' yooto
1Samuel22:10 Kiteepsechi Ahimelek eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo ineendet yeityo kogoochi amitwogik ak rotwetap chok ne ki po Goliat Philistindet.”
1Samuel22:11 Ki iyookto anyun laitoryat keguur tisiindet Ahimelek
1Samuel22:12 Ki le `Saulo
1Samuel22:13 Ki mwachi `Saulo ineendet koleenji
1Samuel22:14 Kowolji anyun `Ahimelek laitoryat koleenji
1Samuel22:15 Tos katau rani ateepsechi ineendet eng' Kamuktaindet? Ingolooit eng' anee
1Samuel22:16 Ago ki le laitoryat
1Samuel22:17 Yeityo koleenji `laitoryat riibiik che kitonondos eng' ye neegitee ineendet
1Samuel22:18 Eng' yooto
1Samuel22:19 Ki par kora Nob nganaseetap tisiik eng' rotwetap chok; murenik ak kwonyiik
1Samuel22:20 Kichilil age eng' weeriigap Ahimelek weeriitap Ahitub
1Samuel22:21 Ki mwachi `Abiathar Daudi koleenji
1Samuel22:22 Ki leenji `Daudi Abiathar
1Samuel22:23 Tebi kobooto
1Samuel23:1 ki ngemwachi Daudi keleenji
1Samuel23:2 koteebe anyun Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
1Samuel23:3 Ago ki leenji `piikyik Daudi
1Samuel23:4 koteebee anyun Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny
1Samuel23:5 Ki wo `Daudi Keila kobooto piikyik kobargei ak Philistiik. Kiluul tuukwak ak kobar piik eng' pareet ne oo. Ki sar anyun `Daudi piigap Keila.
1Samuel23:6 Kingo mwechi Abiathar weeriitap Ahimelek Daudi eng' Keila
1Samuel23:7 ki ngemwachi Saulo keleenji
1Samuel23:8 Ki kuur anyun `Saulo piik tugul kochoortagei koba lugeet eng' Keila
1Samuel23:9 Ago ki nai Daudi kole chobei `Saulo yaityet agobo ineendet. Ki leenji Abiathar tisiindet
1Samuel23:10 Yeityo komwa Daudi kole
1Samuel23:11 Tos indea piigap Keila eunnyi? Chorugei Saulo
1Samuel23:12 Kotep `Daudi anyun kole
1Samuel23:13 Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi kobooto piikyik che ki olo po pogol lo ak koba eng' Keila
1Samuel23:14 Ki tebee `Daudi irimoik eng' surkwen ak ki tebee emetap tuloonook eng' surkwen ne po Ziph. Ki cheeng'ei `Saulo ineendet eng' peetuut age tugul
1Samuel23:15 Kingo mi Daudi surkwen ne po Ziph eng' timiin
1Samuel23:16 Ki ng'eet Jonathan weeriitap Saulo ak kwo ole mi Daudi eng' timiin kogimit ineendet eng' Kamuktaindet.
1Samuel23:17 Ki leenji ineendet
1Samuel23:18 Ki iyomiskei tuwai eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki tebee Daudi timiin ak ko ki wo Jonathan koonnyi.
1Samuel23:19 Ki pa anyun `Sipik kotogosta ole mi Saulo eng' Gibea koba koleenji
1Samuel23:20 Ara anyun
1Samuel23:21 Kowol `Saulo kole
1Samuel23:22 Asoomok anyun ale oba ocheeng' komyee si ogeer ak onai ole mi
1Samuel23:23 Ogeer anyun ak onai komoswek tugul ole ung'egei yeityo obwa kogeny yu ami oibu ng'aleek che po iman
1Samuel23:24 Ki ng'eetyo koba Ziph kondoe Saulo
1Samuel23:25 Ki pa Saulo ak piikyik koba kocheeng' ineendet. Ak ki ngemwachi Daudi
1Samuel23:26 Ak ki pun Saulo tulweet komosi
1Samuel23:27 Ago ki nyo chii komwachi Saulo koleenji
1Samuel23:28 Ki week anyun `Saulo mata koosup Daudi ak ki wo kobargei ak Philistiik. Kiguure yooto anyun Sela-hamalekot.
1Samuel23:29 Ak kitogosta Daudi eng' yooto kwo komeny irimoigap En-gedi.
1Samuel24:1 Ye kingo kagoweek `Saulo eng' kasubet ne ki isubi Philistiik
1Samuel24:2 Kingo kas ko uu nooto Saulo konam murenik eliphuusyek somok che ki kilewen eng' Israel tugul
1Samuel24:3 Ki it ole mi piusyegap keechiirek eng' ooreet eng' ole ki mi kebeneet. Ki wo Saulo oriit ak kotoretkei. Ki mi Daudi ak piikyik kebenooto oriit miising'.
1Samuel24:4 Ak ki leenji `piikyik Daudi
1Samuel24:5 Eng' let kogas Daudi ng'wanindo eng' muguleldanyi
1Samuel24:6 Ki leenji piikyik
1Samuel24:7 Ki eetee anyun `Daudi piikyik ng'aleechuuto ama chamji kong'eetyo kobar Saulo. Ki ng'eet Saulo kwo eng' kebeneet ak kwo pandanyi.
1Samuel24:8 Yeityo kong'eet Daudi agine ak kwo eng' kebeneet ak komwachi Saulo eng' kutit ne oo
1Samuel24:9 Koleenji `Daudi Saulo
1Samuel24:10 Kaigeer eng' konyeguk rani ile kaindein Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunnyu eng' kebeneet. Kamwaiwo piik alage kole abariin
1Samuel24:11 Kogeny
1Samuel24:12 Ingooiyech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel24:13 Ko uu ye mwaei kalewenetap piik che po keny
1Samuel24:14 Kamong' saang' laitoryatap Israel koon ng'oo? Ioone ng'oo? Ioone seset ne ki kome
1Samuel24:15 Ingoek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwoogindet
1Samuel24:16 Kingo kagogees `Daudi ng'aleechooto kimwachin Saulo
1Samuel24:17 Ki mwachi `laitoryat Daudi koleenji
1Samuel24:18 Kaibarte rani ile kaiyaiywo ne myee
1Samuel24:19 Amu tos ngot konyoor chii punyondennyi
1Samuel24:20 Nguno anyun
1Samuel24:21 Iyosyeiwo anyun eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ile
1Samuel24:22 Ara anyun ki iyasyechi `Daudi Saulo. Yeityo kwo Saulo kaa
1Samuel25:1 Kime Samuel
1Samuel25:2 Ki mi chii Maon ne ki mi tuguukyik Karmel. Ki chii ne ki tagunoot chiichooto ak ki tinyei keechiirek eliphuusyek somok ak ng'oroorek eliphuut agenge
1Samuel25:3 Kainetap chiichooto ko ki Nabal
1Samuel25:4 Kingo mi `Daudi surkwen
1Samuel25:5 Ara ki iyookto anyun `Daudi murenik taman koleenji
1Samuel25:6 yeityo omwachi ineendet ne meng'iisyei eng' kaberuret oleenji
1Samuel25:7 Kaagas keele itinye piik che tilei koroorigap keechiirek; kogotebi mestoweguk kobootech ama ki yachi kiy ne ya
1Samuel25:8 Teebe murenjotoguget si komwaun. Ingonyoor anyun chameet murechuchuk eng' taing'ung'
1Samuel25:9 Ye kingo it murenjoto po Daudi
1Samuel25:10 Ki wolji `Nabal otwogigap Daudi koleenji
1Samuel25:11 Amu nee si anam amitwogikyuk
1Samuel25:12 Kiwelelgei anyun murenjoto po Daudi ak koweektagei ak koba komwachi ineendet ng'aleechuuto tugul.
1Samuel25:13 Koleenji `Daudi piikyik
1Samuel25:14 Ago ki mwachi age eng' murenjoto Abigail osotyotap Nabal koleenji
1Samuel25:15 Ago kiyaiywech ne myee kot pichooto ama amenech kiy
1Samuel25:16 Ki ek icheek ng'ootwennyo kemoi ak peet eng' peetuusyek tugul ye ki kimiitei tugul ak icheek kiyagi keechiirek.
1Samuel25:17 Nai anyun ak ibwaat kiit ne iyae
1Samuel25:18 Kichirchiren anyun Abigail ak konam magatiinik pogol aeng' ak sotonik aeng' che po divaik
1Samuel25:19 Yeityo koleenji piikyik
1Samuel25:20 Ye kita kobunei sigiryennyi
1Samuel25:21 Kigale `Daudi
1Samuel25:22 Ingoyachi Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto puunigap Daudi ak kotes koosir ngot abagaakte kiy age tugul ne nenyi mutai kaeech agot lakweet agenge ne ng'etet.”
1Samuel25:23 Ye kingo keer `Abigail Daudi
1Samuel25:24 Ki ibutyi keelyekyik ak koleenji
1Samuel25:25 Asaain kiptaiyandennyu ale mat iit kipyaitwani ile kiy
1Samuel25:26 Ara anyun kiptaiyandennyu
1Samuel25:27 Ingigoochi kagoochinoni kaipchin otwogindeng'ung' kiptaiyandennyu
1Samuel25:28 Asaain ale nyochi kaat cheptong'ung' ne otwogindet lelutyennyi
1Samuel25:29 Nganda ng'eetei chii konaatiin ak kocheeng' saboondang'ung'
1Samuel25:30 Ye kagoyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandennyu ko uu myeeindo tugul ne kimwaitaenen ak kondein iegu pounindetap Israel
1Samuel25:31 koma egu niito arageneet eng' inyee
1Samuel25:32 Ki leenji `Daudi Abigail
1Samuel25:33 Iberuurot ng'omnateng'ung'
1Samuel25:34 Amu iman
1Samuel25:35 Yeityo kotaach anyun `Daudi tuguuk che kiga ipchi ineendet osotyondonooto
1Samuel25:36 Kingo it Abigail ole mi Nabal
1Samuel25:37 Eng' karon ko kogasap Nabal
1Samuel25:38 Kingo keskei olo po peetuusyek taman
1Samuel25:39 Ye kingo kas `Daudi kole kagome Nabal kole
1Samuel25:40 Kingo it otwogigap Daudi ole mi Abigail eng' Karmel
1Samuel25:41 Ki ng'eet anyun ak kong'uruuk kotiing'e togeennyi ng'wony ak kole
1Samuel25:42 Kichirchiren Abigail ak kong'eet ak kolaany sigiryet kobooto tiibiik muut che ki tinyei che ki isup ineendet ak kwo koosup piigap Daudi ak ki ek osotyonnyi.
1Samuel25:43 Ki imut `Daudi agine Ainoam ne po Jezreel ak ki ek tuwai osotikyik.
1Samuel25:44 Kiga kogoochi `Saulo Mikal cheptonyi
1Samuel26:1 Ki pwa Sipik ole mi Saulo eng' Gibea ak koleenji
1Samuel26:2 Kong'eet anyun `Saulo kochoortagei kwo surkwen ne po Ziph komi ak murenik eliphuusyek somok che po Israel che ki kilewen
1Samuel26:3 Ki teech `Saulo emanyii eng' tulweetap Hakilah ne tokyingei surkwen ole ne neegitee ooreet. Ago ki tebee Daudi nenyi eng' surkwen ak ki keer kole kogosup `ineendet Saulo konyo surkwen.
1Samuel26:4 Ki iyookto anyun `Daudi segeik ak ki inai komyee kole kogonyo Saulo.
1Samuel26:5 Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi ak kwo ole kiga teech Saulo. Ki keer Daudi ole kiruee Saulo kobooto Abner weeriitap Ner ne ki kiptaiyatap lugeennyi. Kiruee `Saulo kwenutap kariisyek ak ki teech piik koyiem ineendet.
1Samuel26:6 ki teebee anyun `Daudi Ahimelek Hitindet ak Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah
1Samuel26:7 Ki it anyun Daudi ak Abisai kemoi ole mi piik
1Samuel26:8 Koleenji anyun `Abisai Daudi
1Samuel26:9 Ago ki leenji `Daudi Abisai
1Samuel26:10 Yeityo kole `Daudi
1Samuel26:11 Ingolooit eng' anee eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si ma chuul eunnyu abar ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ago asoomin ale ip ng'otit ne mi ye neegitee metinnyi kobooto soteetap peek yeityo keebe.”
1Samuel26:12 Ki ip anyun `Daudi ng'otit ak soteetap peek che ki mi ye neegitee metitap Saulo
1Samuel26:13 Yeityo kwo Daudi pitoniin ak kotonon eng' tulweet parak eng' ole loo. Ki loochin kot.
1Samuel26:14 Kitwekyi `Daudi piik kobooto Abner weeriitap Ner
1Samuel26:15 Ak ki leenji `Daudi Abner
1Samuel26:16 Ma myee kii koiyai. Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel26:17 Kingo nai `Saulo kutitap Daudi
1Samuel26:18 Amu nee si kosubot `kiptaiyandennyu otwogindennyi? Koayai nee? Anan nee yaityet ne mi eunekyuk?
1Samuel26:19 Nooto anyun asoomin ale
1Samuel26:20 Ara anyun
1Samuel26:21 Kole anyun Saulo
1Samuel26:22 Ki wol Daudi kole
1Samuel26:23 Yaakyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chii age tugul imandanyi ak myeeindonyi; amu kagondein `ineendet eunnyu rani ago ma acham achuul eunnyu abar ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Samuel26:24 Kogeny
1Samuel26:25 Koleenji anyun `Saulo Daudi
1Samuel27:1 Ki mwa Daudi eng' muguleldanyi kole
1Samuel27:2 Ara king'eet `Daudi kolanda ak piik pogol lo che ki mi kobooto ineendet kot koit ole mi Akis weeriitap Maok laitoryatap Gath.
1Samuel27:3 Ki tebi Daudi ak Akis eng' Gath kobooto piikyik. Ki tebi chii age tugul ak piigap koonnyi agot Daudi ak osotikyik aeng'
1Samuel27:4 ki ngemwachi `Saulo keleenji
1Samuel27:5 Ki leenji `Daudi Akis
1Samuel27:6 Ara ki igoochi anyun Akis ineendet Ziklag eng' peetuunooto. Nooto anyun ki punji Ziklag laitorinigap Judah agoi ra.
1Samuel27:7 Ki meny `Daudi emetap Philistiik peetuusyek che itei kenyiit agenge ak arawek ang'wan.
1Samuel27:8 Ki togosta anyun `Daudi ak piikyik kobookyi Gesurik
1Samuel27:9 Ki par `Daudi emonooto
1Samuel27:10 ki teebee Akis koleenji
1Samuel27:11 Ma pagaakta Daudi muren anan kwony kosap
1Samuel27:12 Ki iyan Akis ng'aleegap Daudi kole
1Samuel28:1 Ki iyum Philistiik lugosyekwak eng' peetuusyechooto koba lugeet kobargei ak Israel. Ki leenji `Akis Daudi
1Samuel28:2 Kowolji `Daudi Akis koleenji
1Samuel28:3 Eng' kasarata
1Samuel28:4 Ki iyumgei `Philistiik ak koba koteech Sunem
1Samuel28:5 Kingo keer `Saulo lugeetap Philistiik
1Samuel28:6 Ye kingo leen koteebe `Saulo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Samuel28:7 Koleenji anyun `Saulo otwogikyik
1Samuel28:8 Kiwalgei `Saulo kolaach ngoroik alak yeityo kwo ineendet kobooto piik aeng' ak ki it kemoi ole ki mi kwonyooto. Ki leenji `Saulo kwonyooto
1Samuel28:9 Koleenji `kwonyooto ineendet
1Samuel28:10 Ki iyasyechi `Saulo ineendet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
1Samuel28:11 Ki le anyun `kwonyooto
1Samuel28:12 Kingo keer `kwonyooto Samuel
1Samuel28:13 Koleenji `laitoryat ineendet
1Samuel28:14 Koteebe `Saulo ineendet koleenji
1Samuel28:15 Ki mwachi `Samuel Saulo koleenji
1Samuel28:16 Koleenji `Samuel
1Samuel28:17 Kigoboisyechigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki mwa eng' anee. Ki kobetenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatet ak kogoochi chiitap kokweng'ung' Daudi.
1Samuel28:18 Amu ma igas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ama isuldochi nereegekyik che koroomen eng' Amelek
1Samuel28:19 Kogeny
1Samuel28:20 Ki ibutyi ng'wony Saulo anyun kogutuny
1Samuel28:21 Kingo nyo `kwonyooto ole mi Saulo ak kogeer kole tinyei arageneet ne oo
1Samuel28:22 Asoomin anyun ale
1Samuel28:23 Ago ki eesyo Saulo ak kole
1Samuel28:24 Ki tinyei kwonyooto eng' ko moita ne neraat. Ara kichaakta kwo koeny. Ki inem peek ak kokwany ak kobeel magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek.
1Samuel28:25 Yeityo koip amitwogichooto ak kogoochi Saulo ak otwogikyik koam. Ki am icheek yeityo kong'eetyo ak koba pandanywa kemounooto.
1Samuel29:1 Ki iyumji anyun `Philistiik lugosyekwak tugul Apek: ak ki teech Israel ye neegitee kondap peek ne mi Jezreel.
1Samuel29:2 Kingo pendi kiptainigap Philistiik
1Samuel29:3 Kiteep `pounigap Philistiik kole
1Samuel29:4 Ago ki nereekyi `ineendet pounigap Philistiik. Ki leenji pounigap Philistiik ineendet
1Samuel29:5 Tos ma Daudi niito
1Samuel29:6 Ara ki kuur anyun `Akis Daudi ak koleenji
1Samuel29:7 Ara anyun weektegei
1Samuel29:8 Ago ki leenji `Daudi Akis
1Samuel29:9 Kowolji `Akis Daudi koleenji
1Samuel29:10 Nooto anyun
1Samuel29:11 Ki ng'eet anyun `Daudi karon miising' ak piikyik
1Samuel30:1 Kingo it `Daudi ak piikyik Ziklag eng' peetuutap somok
1Samuel30:2 Kiga koluul kwonyiik che ki mi yooto
1Samuel30:3 Kingo it `Daudi ak piikyik nganaseet
1Samuel30:4 Kiwaach `Daudi ak piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet
1Samuel30:5 Kiga kiluul osotigap Daudi tuwai
1Samuel30:6 Ki iimgei miising' `Daudi
1Samuel30:7 Ki leenji `Daudi Abiathar tisiindet
1Samuel30:8 Kingo ip koteebe `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
1Samuel30:9 Ki wo `Daudi anyun
1Samuel30:10 Ago ki isup `Daudi pichooto kobooto murenik pogol ang'wan. Amu ki tebi piik pogolwogik aeng'u che ki ma imuuchi kolandae kererutap Besor amu kiga kong'etyo miising'.
1Samuel30:11 Ki nyoor `pichooto Misirindet eng' keeweet ak ki imutyi Daudi. Ki igoochi amitwogik ak ki am ak ki inaga peek koe.
1Samuel30:12 Yeityo kogoochi magatyat ne ming'in ne po mogoonik ak mooriik aeng' che po sabibuk che yamyotiin. Kingo kagoam kosap
1Samuel30:13 ki teebee `Daudi ineendet koleenji
1Samuel30:14 Kiga kibookyi murot tai ne po Keretik
1Samuel30:15 koteebee `Daudi ineendet koleenji
1Samuel30:16 Ye kingo kagomut kochoortagei
1Samuel30:17 Ki par `Daudi icheek kobooch ko karatarat agoi koskoleng'utap peetuut ne po aeng'
1Samuel30:18 Ki sar `Daudi tugul che kiga luul Amelegik. Ki sar `Daudi kora osotikyik tuwai.
1Samuel30:19 Ki ma petee kiy icheek
1Samuel30:20 Ki kweri `Daudi akwotisyek tugul che po keechiirek ak che po tuuga
1Samuel30:21 Ki it anyun Daudi ole ki mi murenjoto pogolwogik aeng'u
1Samuel30:22 Ago ki wol anyun piik tugul che yaacheen
1Samuel30:23 Ago ki le `Daudi
1Samuel30:24 Ng'oo ne kasok eng' ng'aleechu? Amu ko uu ole tenitu kebebertap ne wendi lugeet
1Samuel30:25 Ki ek ko uu nooto kobooch peetuunooto agoi. Ki yai koek ng'atuutyet ak kayomiset agobo Israel agoi rani.
1Samuel30:26 Kingo nyo `Daudi Ziklag
1Samuel30:27 Ki iyookyi che ki mi Bethel
1Samuel30:28 che ki mi Aroer
1Samuel30:29 che ki mi Rakal
1Samuel30:30 che ki mi Horma
1Samuel30:31 ak che ki mi Hebron ak komoswek tugul che ki cham koitei Daudi ak murenikyik.
1Samuel31:1 Ki pargei anyun Philistiik ak Israel; ak kimweiso murenigap Israel eng' taitap Philistiik ak kebar kobutyo eng' tulweetap Gilboa.
1Samuel31:2 Ki oon `Philistiik miising' Saulo ak weeriikyik. Kingo riikyi
1Samuel31:3 Ki koromit pooryeet miising' eng' Saulo
1Samuel31:4 Eng' yooto
1Samuel31:5 Kingo keer chiito ne ki ipchin kariik kole
1Samuel31:6 Ki me anyun Saulo
1Samuel31:7 Kingo keer piigap Israel che ki mi atebweet komosin ak icheek che ki mi Jordan pitoniin
1Samuel31:8 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi nooto
1Samuel31:9 Kitil metinnyi ak koreegune kariikyik
1Samuel31:10 Ki inde kariikyik kootap Astarot ak koratyi muustonyi inaatutap Beth-san.
1Samuel31:11 Kingo kas piik che ki menyei Jabes-gilead agobo kiit ne ki yachi `Philistiik Saulo
1Samuel31:12 kong'eetyo murenik tugul che nyigoonen ak koba eng' kemout komugul. Ki inem muustap Saulo ak muuswegap weeriikyik eng' inaatutap Beth-san ak koba kot koit Jabes ak kobeel eng' olooto muuswechooto.
1Samuel31:13 Yeityo koip kawekwak ak kotupchi keetit keel eng' Jabes
2Samuel1:1 Kingo pata meetap Saulo
2Samuel1:2 Eng' peetuutap somok
2Samuel1:3 Ki teebee `Daudi ineendet koleenji
2Samuel1:4 koteebee `Daudi ineendet koleenji
2Samuel1:5 koteebee `Daudi murenonooto kimwachin ineendet koleenji
2Samuel1:6 Koleenji murenenooto Daudi
2Samuel1:7 Ye kingo welelgei
2Samuel1:8 koteebeena koleenjo
2Samuel1:9 Ak ki leenjo
2Samuel1:10 Ki atonone anyun ineendet eng' yooto ki miitei ak abar
2Samuel1:11 Ki nam anyun `Daudi ngoroikyik kogereer. Ki yai ko uu nooto piik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet yooto.
2Samuel1:12 Ki iteiyo ak koriiryo ak korugutkei agoi koskoleny agobo Saulo
2Samuel1:13 Ki teebee `Daudi murenonooto ki mwachin ineendet ng'aleechooto koleenji
2Samuel1:14 koteebee anyun `Daudi ineendet koleenji
2Samuel1:15 Kingo pata
2Samuel1:16 Yeityo koleenji `Daudi ineendet
2Samuel1:17 Ki riirchi `Daudi Saulo ak Jonathan weeriinnyi eng' riirechu
2Samuel1:18 ak ki mwachi icheek koneet piigap Judah tyendap kwanget
2Samuel1:19 Ee Israel
2Samuel1:20 Mat omwaite eng' Gath
2Samuel1:21 Okweek tuloonoogap Gilboa
2Samuel1:22 Eng' korotiigap che ki kibar
2Samuel1:23 Ki korooron Saulo ak Jonathan
2Samuel1:24 Okweek tiibiigap Israel
2Samuel1:25 Ki ibututa ano che kiimeen eng' kwenutap pooryeet! Ki kibar Jonathan eng' komosweguk che torooreen.
2Samuel1:26 Aarageni amu inyee
2Samuel1:27 Ki ibututa ano che kiimeen
2Samuel2:1 Kingo pata tuguuchuuto koteebe `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
2Samuel2:2 Kotogosta anyun `Daudi olooto kobooto osotikyik aeng'
2Samuel2:3 Ki imut `Daudi piikyik che ki mi kobooto ineendet kotogosta
2Samuel2:4 Ki pwa piigap Judah kobwa koiil Daudi eng' olooto koek laitoryatap kootap Judah. Ki ngemwachi Daudi keleenji ki piigap Jabes-gilead che ki tubei Saulo
2Samuel2:5 koyookto `Daudi piik koba oldap piigap Jabes-gilead koleenji icheek
2Samuel2:6 Ingoboorwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogoonok myeeindo ak imanit
2Samuel2:7 Ingogimegitu anyun eunekwok ak oegu che nyigoonen
2Samuel2:8 Kiga komut Abner weeriitap Ner
2Samuel2:9 Ki inde ineendet koek laitoryat koboi Gilead
2Samuel2:10 (Ki po Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo kenyiisyek artam ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Samuel2:11 Ak peetuusyek che ki laitoran Daudi eng' Hebron eng' kootap Judah ko ki kenyiisyek tisap ak arawek lo.
2Samuel2:12 Ki pa Abner weeriitap Ner ak otwogigap Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo kong'etee Mahanaim koba Gibeon.
2Samuel2:13 Ki pa ak icheek Joab weeriitap Zeruiah ak otwogigap Daudi ak kituiyechi ak Abner tamboiyotap Gibeon. Ki ibuure alak tamboiyot komosi
2Samuel2:14 Ki leenji `Abner Joab
2Samuel2:15 Ki ng'eetyo anyun koba ak ki kiit; ki taman ak aeng' che po Benjamin ak che po Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo
2Samuel2:16 Ki nam age tugul metitap age ak kotoorgei karasaik eng' rotoogap chok
2Samuel2:17 Kiga koromit pooryeet miising' eng' peetuunooto ak ki kiterteer Abner kobooto piigap Israel eng' taitap otwogigap Daudi.
2Samuel2:18 Ki mi yooto weeriik somogu che po Zeruiah: Joab
2Samuel2:19 Ki oon `Asahel Abner. Ma masta kwo eutap tai anan ko murot kaataam ye ki oonei Abner.
2Samuel2:20 Kiguskong' Abner ak koteebe koleenji
2Samuel2:21 Ak ki leenji `Abner ineendet
2Samuel2:22 Ak ki leenji `Abner Asahel kogeny
2Samuel2:23 Ago kingo eesyo komasta
2Samuel2:24 Ago ki oon `Joab ak Abisai Abner. Ye kingo roroktoi asiista
2Samuel2:25 Ki iyumgei lagogap Benjamin konamgei ak Abner koek lugeet agenge yeityo kotononso eng' tulweet parak.
2Samuel2:26 Ki kuur `Abner Joab koleenji
2Samuel2:27 Kowol kole Joab
2Samuel2:28 Ki kuut anyun Joab iryageet ak kitononso piik tugul
2Samuel2:29 Ki pa Abner ak piikyik kemounooto tugul kobun Arabah ak kilandae Jordan kobun tugul Pitron ak ki it Mahanaim.
2Samuel2:30 Ki week anyun Joab ma ta koosup Abner. Kingo kagoyum piik tugul
2Samuel2:31 Ago kiga kobar otwogigap Daudi che po Benjamin ak murenigap Abner kot kobek piik pogolwogik somogu ak tamanwogik lo.
2Samuel2:32 Kila `icheek Asahel ak kotupchi kereritap kwandanyi ne ki miitei Bethlehem. Yeityo koba Joab ak piikyik kemout tugul ak kieekyi eng' Hebron.
2Samuel3:1 Ki piit pooryeet eng' peetuusyek che chaang' eng' kootap Saulo ak kootap Daudi. Ki kimiit Daudi kotesak
2Samuel3:2 Ki kisikyi `Daudi weeriik eng' Hebron; Taaitanyi ko ki Amnon
2Samuel3:3 Weeriinnyi ne po aeng' ko ki Kileap
2Samuel3:4 Ne po ang'wan ko ki Adonijah weeriitap Haggith ak ne po muut ko ki Shepatiah weeriitap Abital.
2Samuel3:5 Ne po lo ko ki Itream ne kisichei Eglah osotyotap Daudi. Ki kisikyi chuuto Daudi eng' Hebron.
2Samuel3:6 Ye kibortos kootap Saulo ak kootap Daudi
2Samuel3:7 Ki tinyei `Saulo chebaigeiyat ne ki kiguure kainennyi Rispa
2Samuel3:8 Ki nereech anyun miising' `Abner amu ng'aleegap Ishbosheth
2Samuel3:9 Ingoyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto Abner
2Samuel3:10 Autoi laitornatet eng' kootap Saulo ak alumde ng'echereetap Daudi kolaitoran eng' Israel ak Judah kobooch Dan agoi Beer-sheba.”
2Samuel3:11 Ki mata komuuch kowolji Abner ng'olyoot age
2Samuel3:12 Yeityo koyookto piik `Abner koba kap Daudi ne kita wendi ineendet koleenji
2Samuel3:13 Kowol `Daudi kole
2Samuel3:14 Yeityo koyookto `Daudi piik koba kap Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo koleenji
2Samuel3:15 Ara ki iyookto Ishbosheth piik koba komutune manong'otyondennyi; nooto ko Paltiel weeriitap Lais.
2Samuel3:16 Ki pa ak monong'otyondennyi koriiroti manong'otyondennyi kosubi kwonyooto kot koit Baurim. Eng' yooto po Baurim
2Samuel3:17 Ki ng'alaal Abner ak poisyegap Israel kole
2Samuel3:18 Ara anyun oyai
2Samuel3:19 Ki ng'alaalji `Abner Benjamin agine kogas. Yeityo kogeny kwo Abner komwachi Daudi kogas eng' Hebron tuguuk tugul che kigeerei Israel ak kootap Benjamin tugul kole nyolu.
2Samuel3:20 Kigoit anyun `Abner ole mi Daudi eng' Hebron
2Samuel3:21 Ki leenji `Abner Daudi
2Samuel3:22 Ki pwanei eng' sainooto otwogigap Daudi ak Joab kobunu lugeet ak ki ibu parunenik che chaang'. Ago king'oitu koma mi Abner kobooto Daudi eng' Hebron
2Samuel3:23 Kingo it Joab ak lugeet tugul ne ki mi ak ineendet
2Samuel3:24 Konyo anyun `Joab ole mi laitoryat ak koleenji
2Samuel3:25 Ingen inyee Abner weeriitap Ner ile kanyo koberberin si konai mandaeng'ung' ak nyonuneng'ung' ak konai tuguuk tugul che iyae.”
2Samuel3:26 Kingo mong' Joab eng' kap Daudi
2Samuel3:27 Kingo kagoweek Abner konyo Hebron
2Samuel3:28 Kingo kas `Daudi eng' let
2Samuel3:29 Ingotebee metitap Joab ak kotebee kootap kwandanyi tugul. Amat kobet eng' kootap Joab chii ne tinyei kusereet anan ne tinyei mogondos anan ne tebenoti kirokto anan ne kibarei eng' rotwetap chok anan ko ne ma tinyei amitwogik.”
2Samuel3:30 (Ki par anyun `Joab ak Abisai ng'eetap kamet
2Samuel3:31 Yeityo koleenji `Daudi Joab kobooto piik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet
2Samuel3:32 Kitupchi Abner Hebron
2Samuel3:33 Ki riir laitoryat agobo Abner kole; Konyolji Abner kome ko uu ye meei chiito ne abusat?
2Samuel3:34 Ki ma ko ratotiin euneguk
2Samuel3:35 Yeityo kobwa piik tugul komwachi Daudi koamis ye kita ko peet. Ago ki iyasyo Daudi kole
2Samuel3:36 Ki keer piik tugul kioto
2Samuel3:37 Ki nai anyun piik tugul ak Israel tugul eng' peetuunooto kole
2Samuel3:38 Yeityo koleenji laitoryat otwogikyik
2Samuel3:39 Aa nyalulat rani
2Samuel4:1 Kingo kas Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo kole kogome Abner eng' Hebron
2Samuel4:2 Nguno anyun ko ki tinyei weeriitap Saulo murenik aeng' che ki kiptainigap kweanaigap lugeet. Ki kiguure kainetap age Baanah
2Samuel4:3 ak kimwechi Berotik Gitaim ak ki pa koek punootik eng' olooto agoi ra.)
2Samuel4:4 Ki tinyei Jonathan weeriitap Saulo weeriit ne kimeiyotiin keelyek. Ki po kenyiisyek muut ineendet ye ki itu ng'aleegap Saulo ak Jonathan eng' Jezreel ak kiganap cheplakwet ak komwei. Ye ki chooktoi komwei cheplakwanooto
2Samuel4:5 Ki pa weeriigap Rimon Berotindet
2Samuel4:6 Ki pa kwenutap koot
2Samuel4:7 Kigaba icheek ak kingo it ko anyun
2Samuel4:8 Ki ip metoto po Ishbosheth koipchi Daudi eng' Hebron ak koleenji laitoryat
2Samuel4:9 Ki wolji `Daudi Regap ak Baanah ng'eetap kamet
2Samuel4:10 ye kingo mwaiwo chiito age kole
2Samuel4:11 Siirei ne tya ye kabar piik che yaacheen chiito ne po iman eng' koonnyi komi itogunnyi
2Samuel4:12 Ara anyun ki ng'at `Daudi murenikyik ak ki par icheek. Kitil eunekwak ak keelyekwak ak kosonginin eng' ole neegitee tamboiyot ne mi Hebron. Ago ki ip metitap Ishbosheth ak kotupchi kereritap Abner eng' Hebron.
2Samuel5:1 Ki pwa anyun pororyosyek tugul che po Israel ole mi Daudi eng' Hebron ak komwachi koleenji
2Samuel5:2 Eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto ye ki laitoryat Saulo ne kiboiywech
2Samuel5:3 Ki pwa anyun poisyek tugul che po Israel ole mi laitoryat eng' Hebron; ak ki yai `Laitoryat Daudi arorutyet kobooto icheek eng' Hebron eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Samuel5:4 Ki po Daudi kenyiisyek sosom ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Samuel5:5 Ki laitoran eng' Hebron kobou Judah kenyiisyek tisap ak arawek lo
2Samuel5:6 Yeityo kwo laitoryat ak piikyik kobookchi Jerusalem. Ki ibwaati `Jebusik che ki menyei emonooto koleen ma imuuch Daudi kobar icheeget. Ara ki mwachi `icheek Daudi koleenji
2Samuel5:7 Ago ki nam Daudi irimeetap Zion
2Samuel5:8 Eng' peetuunooto kole `Daudi
2Samuel5:9 Ki meny anyun `Daudi irimonooto ak koguure nganaseetap Daudi. Ki teech `ineendet komoswek tugul kong'etee Milo agoi oriit.
2Samuel5:10 Ki eet Daudi kotesak amu ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Samuel5:11 Ki iyookto `Iram laitoryatap Tyro piik koba kap Daudi koibei taragonik
2Samuel5:12 Ak ki nai Daudi kole kigogimiit `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koek laitoryat ne pou Israel
2Samuel5:13 Kingwo Daudi eng' Hebron
2Samuel5:14 Chu ko kainaigap che ki kisikyi ineendet eng' Jerusalem; Shamua
2Samuel5:15 Ibar
2Samuel5:16 Elishama
2Samuel5:17 Kingo kas Philistiik kole ki kiil Daudi koek laitoryat koboi Israel
2Samuel5:18 Kingo pwa Philistiik ak koyom atebweetap Repaim
2Samuel5:19 koteebe `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
2Samuel5:20 Ki it `Daudi Baal-perasim ak ki par icheek eng' yooto. Ki le
2Samuel5:21 Ki pagaakta kanamonikwak Philistiik eng' yooto ak ki ip Daudi ak piikyik.
2Samuel5:22 Ki togos Philistiik kogeny ne po aeng' ak koyom atebweetap Repaim.
2Samuel5:23 Ak ye kingo teebee `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Samuel5:24 Ye igas cheetap panda eng' keetichooto po logoek parak
2Samuel5:25 Ara ki yai Daudi ko uu nooto ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Samuel6:1 Ki iyum `Daudi kogeny murenik eliphuusyek sosom che po Israel che ki kilewen.
2Samuel6:2 Ki ng'eet Daudi ak kwo kobooto piik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet eng' Baale Judah koba koip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne ki kimwaitae kainet
2Samuel6:3 Ki inde icheek moingetap Kamuktaindet chepkichutit ne leel ak koip konyo eng' kootap Abinadab ne ki mi tulweet. Ki kweri weeriigap Abinadab Uzzah ak Ahio
2Samuel6:4 Ki ip konyo eng' kootap Abinadab ne ki mi tulweet
2Samuel6:5 Kiboiboitu Daudi ak koot tugul ne po Israel eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobutei kibugandisyek tugul
2Samuel6:6 Kingo it icheek rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Nakon
2Samuel6:7 Eng' yooto
2Samuel6:8 Ki ma cham Daudi
2Samuel6:9 Ki iywei `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto
2Samuel6:10 Ara ma cham Daudi anyun koip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo ole mi ineendet eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ago ki ip `ineendet kwo taban
2Samuel6:11 Ki tebee moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Obed-edom Getindet arawek somok
2Samuel6:12 Ki kimwachi Daudi keleenji
2Samuel6:13 Kingo kagoba mitainik lo icheeget che ki ibei moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Samuel6:14 Kogagermenegei `Daudi ephod ne po katanit
2Samuel6:15 Ki ibu anyun `Daudi ak koot tugul ne po Israel moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotyenonu ak koguutonu iryagook.
2Samuel6:16 Kingo it moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseetap Daudi
2Samuel6:17 Ki ip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo ko
2Samuel6:18 Kingo kagogees Daudi kagoitoetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet
2Samuel6:19 Kipchechi magatyat
2Samuel6:20 Ye kingo week Daudi koberuur piigap koonnyi
2Samuel6:21 Koleenji `Daudi Mikal
2Samuel6:22 Iman
2Samuel6:23 Ak ma sich Mikal cheptap Saulo lakwa agoi peetuutap meennyi.
2Samuel7:1 Ye kingo meny laitoryat koonnyi ak kogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet kamuung'et eng' puunikyik tugul che ki mi eng' komoswek tugul
2Samuel7:2 koleenji `laitoryat Nathan maotyot
2Samuel7:3 Koleenji `Nathan laitoryat
2Samuel7:4 Ak ki ityi Nathan ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kemounooto
2Samuel7:5 “Ui imwachi otwogindennyu Daudi ileenji
2Samuel7:6 Amu tomo amenye ko kobooch peetuut ne ki amutu piigap Israel eng' Misiri agoi peetuuni
2Samuel7:7 Eng' komoswek tugul ole ki awendotee ak lagok tugul che po Israel
2Samuel7:8 Ara anyun
2Samuel7:9 Ki atebi kobooten eng' oldo tugul ole ki iwe ak ki aiste puuniguk tugul eng' taing'ung'. Aeeti kaineng'ung'
2Samuel7:10 Alewenjini yeto piikyuk Israel ak amiine icheek
2Samuel7:11 kobooch peetuut ne ki ang'at kirwoogik koboi piikyuk Israel
2Samuel7:12 Ye igeskei peetuusyeguk ak oruiye ak kwanisyeguk
2Samuel7:13 Tuun teekyin koot ineendet kainennyu ak agimiit ng'echereetap laitornatennyi koigeny.
2Samuel7:14 Aegu kwandanyi ak koek weeriinnyu. Ngot koyai inee tengek
2Samuel7:15 Ago ma istoegei ineendet rireenennyu ko uu ye ki arebee Saulo
2Samuel7:16 Ki kimiiti koong'ung' ak laitornateng'ung' koigeny eng' taing'ung'. Ki kimiiti ng'echereetap laitornateng'ung' agoi koigeny.’ ”
2Samuel7:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Nathan Daudi ko uu ole teptoi ng'aleechooto tugul ak ko uu ng'ang'utyoni tugul.
2Samuel7:18 Kingo pata
2Samuel7:19 Ko uu yo kiy niito ne ming'in eng' taing'ung' ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Samuel7:20 Nee age neta komuuchi Daudi komwaun? Amu ingen inyee otwogindeng'ung'
2Samuel7:21 Amu kaiyai etunatoni tugul agobo ng'olyoondeng'ung' ak ko uu muguleldang'ung' inyegei
2Samuel7:22 Ii oo amu nooto
2Samuel7:23 Ngoro pororyet ne kergei ak piiguk Israel ne ki wo Kamuktaindet kotyakyigei koek piikyik ak koyachigei kainet? Ngoro pororyet ne ki yachi tuguuk che eecheen agobo okweek ak tuguuk che po kamuiset agobo emeng'ung' eng' taitap piiguk? Icheek che ki ityaach eng' Misiri koek cheguuk
2Samuel7:24 Ki igimityigei piiguk Israel koek piiguk koigeny; ak ki iegu inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa.
2Samuel7:25 Ara anyun
2Samuel7:26 Ingitoroor kaineng'ung' koigeny keele
2Samuel7:27 Amu ki ing'aang'ji inyee otwogindeng'ung'
2Samuel7:28 Ara anyun
2Samuel7:29 Ingobaibain iberuur kootap otwogindeng'ung' si kobiit kotep koigeny eng' taing'ung'. Amu kaimwa inyee
2Samuel8:1 Kingo pata niito
2Samuel8:2 Ki iterteer ak kobar Moab. Ki ng'at icheek koruiyo eng' ng'wony yeityo kokwa icheek eng' porowet ak kokwa icheeget eng' porowet. Ki kibar kobek piik eng' uitugul ye ite kakwaindap poroonik aeng'
2Samuel8:3 Ki par kogeny `Daudi Hadadeser weeriitap Rehob
2Samuel8:4 Kiluule `Daudi ineendet murenikyik eliphuut agenge ak pogol tisap che ki laanyei paraisisyek ak eliphuusyek tiptem che kibunei keelyek. Ki ep Daudi kutung'oigap paraisisyek tugul che ki ichuuti kariisyek
2Samuel8:5 Kingo pwa piigap Syria che menyei Damasko kotoret Hadadeser laitoryatap Soba
2Samuel8:6 Ki inde anyun Daudi irimosyek Syria ne po Damasko. Ki ek piigap Syria otwogigap Daudi ak ki ip kagoochinoik. Ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi katerteeret eng' komosta age tugul ne ki wo.
2Samuel8:7 Ki ip `Daudi long'onigap thahabu che ki tinyei otwogigap Hadadeser ak ki ip kobwa Jerusalem.
2Samuel8:8 Ki ip Laitoryat `Daudi sugunonik che chaang' miising' eng' Beta ak eng' Berotai
2Samuel8:9 Kingo kas `Toi laitoryatap Hamath kole kogobar `Daudi lugeet tugul ne po Hadadeser
2Samuel8:10 koyookto anyun `Toi Joram weeriinnyi kwo kaplaitoryat Daudi
2Samuel8:11 Ki itabaanji `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuchuuto ak icheek
2Samuel8:12 che po Syria
2Samuel8:13 Ki eet kainetap Daudi ye ki weeksei kobunu pareet ne ki parei piigap Syria eng' Atebweetap Munyuk
2Samuel8:14 Ki inde irimosyek Edom komugul
2Samuel8:15 Ak ki laitoran Daudi eng' Israel tugul; ak ki irwookyi Daudi piikyik tugul eng' lititindo ak iman.
2Samuel8:16 Ki pou Joab weeriitap Zeruiah lugeet
2Samuel8:17 Ki tisiik Zadok weeriitap Ahitub ak Ahimelek weeriitap Abiathar
2Samuel8:18 Ki pou Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada Keretik ak Peletik ak ki tisiik weeriigap Daudi.
2Samuel9:1 Eng' peetuut age
2Samuel9:2 Ki mi eng' kootap Saulo otwogindet ne ki kiguure kainennyi Siba ak ki kiguur kwo ole mi Daudi. ki teebee anyun `laitoryat ineendet koleenji
2Samuel9:3 Yeityo koteebe laitoryat koleenji
2Samuel9:4 koteebee `laitoryat ineendet koleenji
2Samuel9:5 Ki iyookto anyun `Daudi kimut ineendet konyo eng' kootap Makir weeriitap Amiel eng' Lo-debar.
2Samuel9:6 Ki nyo ole mi Daudi `Mephibosheth
2Samuel9:7 Ki leenji anyun `Daudi ineendet
2Samuel9:8 Ki ing'uruuk Mephibosheth ak kole
2Samuel9:9 Ki kuur anyun `laitoryat Siba otwogindetap Saulo
2Samuel9:10 Ibatyi emet inyee
2Samuel9:11 Ki wolji anyun `Siba laitoryat koleenji
2Samuel9:12 Ki tinyei `Mephibosheth weeriit ne ming'in
2Samuel9:13 Ki meny anyun Mephibosheth Jerusalem; amu ki amisye kotugul meesetap laitoryat
2Samuel10:1 Kingo pata niito
2Samuel10:2 Ki le anyun `Daudi
2Samuel10:3 koleenji `pounigap Hanun kiptaiyannywa
2Samuel10:4 Ki nam anyun Hanun otwogigap Daudi
2Samuel10:5 ki ngemwachi Daudi ng'olyoondonooto
2Samuel10:6 Kingo keer lagogap Ammon kole kagoyaagitu icheeget eng' Daudi
2Samuel10:7 Kingo kas `Daudi
2Samuel10:8 Ki pwa lagogap Ammon ak kotet lugeet eng' ye kibunei eng' ormariich. Ki mi icheegei piigap Syria che menyei Soba
2Samuel10:9 Kingo keer Joab kole kagetet lugeet agobo ineendet eng' tai ak let
2Samuel10:10 Ki inde piik che kiga ng'et
2Samuel10:11 Yeityo kole
2Samuel10:12 Nyiganitu ak ingeegu murenik agobo piikyok ak nganasoogap Kamuktaindennyo
2Samuel10:13 Kingo riikta anyun Joab ak murenik che ki mi ak ineendet koba lugeet kobargei ak piigap Syria
2Samuel10:14 Kingo keer lagogap Ammon kole kagomwei piigap Syria
2Samuel10:15 Kingo keer piigap Syria kole kagiterter icheek eng' taitap Israel
2Samuel10:16 Ak ki iyookto Hadareser kimut piigap Syria che ki mi aineet pitoniin
2Samuel10:17 Ki ngemwachi Daudi
2Samuel10:18 Ki mwee `piigap Syria Israel kogeny
2Samuel10:19 Kingo keer laitorinik tugul che ki otwogigap Hadareser kole kagiterter icheek eng' taitap Israel
2Samuel11:1 Kingo it kasartap kenyiit ne cham kobee laitorinik lugeet
2Samuel11:2 Kingo it koskoleny eng' pesyet age
2Samuel11:3 Ki iyookto `Daudi piik koteep agobo kwonyooto. Ak ki le age
2Samuel11:4 Ki iyookto anyun `Daudi piik koba kimut
2Samuel11:5 Ki manach kwonyooto
2Samuel11:6 Ara anyun ki iyookto `Daudi chii kwo ole mi Joab
2Samuel11:7 Kingo it Uriah ole mi ineendet
2Samuel11:8 Yeityo koleenji `Daudi Uriah
2Samuel11:9 Ago ki ru Uriah kurgeetap kootap laitoryat kobooto otwogik tugul che po kiptaiyandennyi
2Samuel11:10 Ak kingo kagomwachi `icheek Daudi koleenji
2Samuel11:11 Kowolji `Uriah Daudi koleenji
2Samuel11:12 Koleenji `Daudi Uriah
2Samuel11:13 Ak kingo kuur `Daudi ineendet
2Samuel11:14 Kingo kagoeech
2Samuel11:15 Ki sir eng' parwaanooto kole
2Samuel11:16 Ak kingo ta koriibei Joab nganaseet
2Samuel11:17 Ak kimanda piigap nganaseet koba kobargei ak Joab. Ki pek piik alak eng' icheek
2Samuel11:18 Ki iyookto anyun Joab kemwachi Daudi tuguuk tugul agobo lugeet.
2Samuel11:19 Ki ng'at chiito ne kiga iyookto koleenji
2Samuel11:20 ko ngot konereech laitoryat ak koleenjin
2Samuel11:21 Ng'oo ne ki par Abimelek weeriitap Jerubeset? Ki ma wiiree kwondo age ineendet isyet eng' irimeet
2Samuel11:22 Ki wo anyun ne ki kiyookto ak kiit ak koboorchi Daudi tuguuk tugul che kiga iyooktoe Joab ineendet.
2Samuel11:23 Ki leenji `chiichooto Daudi
2Samuel11:24 Kimwok `mwoogik otwogiguk eng' irimeet; ak ki pek alak eng' otwogigap laitoryat
2Samuel11:25 Koleenji `Daudi chiichooto kagiyogu
2Samuel11:26 Kingo kas osotyotap Uriah kole kogome manong'otyondennyi
2Samuel11:27 Ak kingo pata kateet
2Samuel12:1 Ki iyookto `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Nathan kwo ole mi Daudi. Ak ye kingo nyo ole mi ineendet koleenji
2Samuel12:2 Ki tinyei ne ki mogoryot akwotisyek che chaang' miising' che po keechiirek ak tuuga.
2Samuel12:3 Ago ki ma kotinyei kiy ne ki kibananiat
2Samuel12:4 Ki nyo anyun kiprutoiyo kap mogoryondonooto
2Samuel12:5 Ki nereekyi miising' `Daudi chiichooto ak ki leenji Nathan
2Samuel12:6 ak koyook arwanooto konyil ang'wan amu ki yai kiito ak amu ki ma kotinyei rireenet.”
2Samuel12:7 Koleenji `Nathan Daudi
2Samuel12:8 Ki agoonin kootap kiptaiyandeng'ung' ak ki agoonin osotigap kiptaiyandeng'ung' kobwa tegeng'ung' ak agoonin kootap Israel ak ne po Judah. Nda kiga ng'ering'itu chooto
2Samuel12:9 Amu nee anyun si isas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iyai kiit ne ya eng' tainnyi? Koibar Uriah Hitindet eng' rotwetap chok
2Samuel12:10 Nguno anyun
2Samuel12:11 Kamwa anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
2Samuel12:12 Koiyai eng' ung'oot
2Samuel12:13 Koleenji `Daudi Nathan
2Samuel12:14 Ago amu kaigoochi eng' yaityoni puunigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poroindo ne oo kochubis
2Samuel12:15 Kingo kakwo Nathan koonnyi
2Samuel12:16 Ki sa `Daudi Kamuktaindet agobo lakwanooto. Ki irugutkei Daudi ak ki wo ko
2Samuel12:17 Ki ng'eetyo poisyegap koonnyi kotononio eng' ye mi ineendet koleen kong'eet ineendet
2Samuel12:18 Eng' peetuut ne po tisap
2Samuel12:19 Ago kingo keer Daudi kochaamjingei otwogikyik
2Samuel12:20 Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi eng' ng'wony kwo koun kei
2Samuel12:21 Ki leenji anyun `otwogikyik
2Samuel12:22 Ki wol kole
2Samuel12:23 Ago nguno ko kagome
2Samuel12:24 Ki igaigai `Daudi Bathsheba osotyonnyi yeityo kwo ole mi ineendet kotuiyogei. Ki sich weeriit ak koguuree kainennyi Solomon. Amu ki cham `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet
2Samuel12:25 ko ki iyooktoe ng'aleek Nathan maotyot
2Samuel12:26 Kibargei `Joab ak Rabbah ne po lagogap Ammon
2Samuel12:27 Ki iyookto `Joab piik koba ole mi Daudi komwachi koleenji
2Samuel12:28 Ara anyun
2Samuel12:29 Ki iyum `Daudi piik tugul yeityo koba Rabbah kobargei ak nganasanooto ak koluul.
2Samuel12:30 Ki inemune laitoryannywa naaryeetap laitornatet
2Samuel12:31 Ak ki imut piik che ki mi oriit komong'
2Samuel13:1 Ki tinyei Absalom weeriitap Daudi chepkamet ne karaaran
2Samuel13:2 Ki iimgei Amnon kot komyan amu chepkametinnyi Tamar
2Samuel13:3 Nguno anyun ko ki tinyei Amnon chorweet
2Samuel13:4 ki teebee `Jonadab Amnon koleenji
2Samuel13:5 Koleenji `Jonadab ineendet
2Samuel13:6 Ara ki ru anyun Amnon
2Samuel13:7 Koyookto anyun Daudi keguur Tamar eng' kaa ak koleenji
2Samuel13:8 Ko uu nooto anyun
2Samuel13:9 Yeityo konam taabeetap karnet ak koluluk eng' tainnyi kogoochi
2Samuel13:10 Ki leenji `Amnon Tamar
2Samuel13:11 Ago ye kingo kagoip magatinichooto koba ye neegitee ineendet si koam
2Samuel13:12 Ak ki wolji `Tamar koleenji
2Samuel13:13 Si awo ano anyun anee eng' teweernatennyu? Ak iigei inyee age eng' che yaacheen che abusotiin eng' Israel. Ara anyun
2Samuel13:14 Ago ma cham kogas ng'aleekyik
2Samuel13:15 Kingo pata kosas `Amnon ineendet eng' saset ne oo miising'
2Samuel13:16 Kowol Tamar koleenji ineendet
2Samuel13:17 Yeityo koguur otwogindet ne kiboisyechin konyo ole mi ak koleenji
2Samuel13:18 Ki ilaachi chebooto ngoryeet ne kooi
2Samuel13:19 Ki inde Tamar oreek metinnyi ak kogereer ngoryennyi ne kooi ne ki ilaachi. Kinamatkei met ak kwo koriiroti eng' kutit ne oo.
2Samuel13:20 Ki leenji `Absalom ng'eetap kametap Tamar ineendet
2Samuel13:21 Ago kingo kas Laitoryat `Daudi tuguuchuuto tugul
2Samuel13:22 Ma mwachi `Absalom Amnon kiy ne myee anan ko ne ya. Ki sas `Absalom Amnon
2Samuel13:23 Ye kingo siirto kenyiisyek aeng'u
2Samuel13:24 Ki wo Absalom ole mi laitoryat ak koleenji
2Samuel13:25 Kowolji `laitoryat Absalom koleenji
2Samuel13:26 Ki soom anyun Absalom kole
2Samuel13:27 Ago ki igaigai `Absalom ineendet
2Samuel13:28 Ki ng'at `Absalom otwogik koleenji
2Samuel13:29 Ki yachi `otwogigap Absalom Amnon ko uu ye kiga ng'at Absalom. Ki ng'eetyo anyun weeriik tugul che po laitoryat kolaany chii tugul nyumbunnyi ak komwei.
2Samuel13:30 Ye kita kobendi eng' ooreet
2Samuel13:31 Ki ng'eet anyun laitoryat kogereer ngoroikyik ak koru eng' ng'wony. Ki tononso otwogikyik tugul eng' ole mi ineendet ko kagogereer ngoroikwak.
2Samuel13:32 Ki wol Jonadab weeriitap Simea
2Samuel13:33 Nooto anyun
2Samuel13:34 Kimwei Absalom. Ak kitabendo murenet age ne kiriipsei
2Samuel13:35 Ki leenji `Jonadab laitoryat
2Samuel13:36 Kingo kagogees ng'alaalet
2Samuel13:37 Ago ki mwei Absalom kwo ole mi Talmai weeriitap Amiur laitoryatap Gesur. Ki riirchi `Daudi weeriinnyi peetuut age tugul.
2Samuel13:38 Kimwei anyun Absalom kwo Gesur ak ki tebee olooto kenyiisyek somok.
2Samuel13:39 Ak kimach miising' Laitoryat Daudi kwo ole mi Absalom
2Samuel14:1 Ki nai Joab weeriitap Zeruiah kole tokyingei kabwaatutigap muguleldap Laitoryat Absalom.
2Samuel14:2 Ara anyun ki iyookto `Joab keguur kwondo ne utaat eng' Tekoa yeityo koleenji
2Samuel14:3 Yeityo iwe kaplaitoryat ak ing'alaalji ko uu ni.” Ki inde anyun Joab ng'aleek kutitap kwonyooto.
2Samuel14:4 Ara anyun ki wo kwonyotok po Tekoa kaplaitoryat
2Samuel14:5 Ki teebee `laitoryat ineendet koleenji
2Samuel14:6 Ak ki tinyei otwogindeng'ung' weeriik aeng'
2Samuel14:7 Ki ng'eetyo koot komugul koborye otwogindeng'ung' ak ki le
2Samuel14:8 Ki leenji `laitoryat kwonyooto
2Samuel14:9 Ago ki leenji kwonyooto po Tekoa laitoryat
2Samuel14:10 Kowol laitoryat kole
2Samuel14:11 Yeityo komwa kwonyooto kole
2Samuel14:12 Kole anyun kwonyooto
2Samuel14:13 Ki le kwonyooto
2Samuel14:14 Amu nyoljinech kebegu ne matiny ak ki uu peek che kagitumji ng'wony
2Samuel14:15 Nooto anyun kaanyo amwachi ng'olyoondoni kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat
2Samuel14:16 Amu kasei laitoryat ak kosarwo anee otwogindennyi eng' eutap chiito ne machei kobara ak weeriinnyu koistoenech poroteetap Kamuktaindet.
2Samuel14:17 Amwa anyun anee otwogindeng'ung' ale
2Samuel14:18 Ki wolji anyun laitoryat kwonyooto koleenji
2Samuel14:19 Koteebee laitoryat koleenji
2Samuel14:20 Ki yai otwogindeng'ung' Joab kiito
2Samuel14:21 Ki leenji anyun `laitoryat Joab
2Samuel14:22 Ki ibutyi ng'wony Joab
2Samuel14:23 Ki ng'eet anyun Joab kwo Gesur
2Samuel14:24 Ago ki le laitoryat
2Samuel14:25 Ki ma komi eng' Israel tugul chiito ne ki kilasu eng' korooronindo ko uu Absalom. Ki ma kotinyei perutyet kong'etee keldebesyet agoi metinnyi parak.
2Samuel14:26 Kingo nem metinnyi
2Samuel14:27 Ki kisikyi Absalom weeriik somok ak chepto agenge
2Samuel14:28 Ki tebee Absalom kenyiisyek aeng' Jerusalem koma keerei laitoryat togoch.
2Samuel14:29 Ki iyookto anyun Absalom keguur Joab
2Samuel14:30 Ki leenji anyun Absalom otwogikyik
2Samuel14:31 Kong'eet anyun `Joab ak konyo ole mi Absalom eng' koonnyi
2Samuel14:32 Ak ki wolji `Absalom Joab koleenji
2Samuel14:33 Ki nyo anyun `Joab kaplaitoryat ak komwachi; ak kingo kageguur Absalom
2Samuel15:1 Kingo pata ni
2Samuel15:2 Ki ng'eetei Absalom karon miising' ak kotonon eng' ye neegitee ormariichet. Ak kingo tinyei chii age tugul ng'olyoo ne ibei kwo kaplaitoryat kirwookyinechi
2Samuel15:3 Yeityo koleenji Absalom ineendet
2Samuel15:4 Ki le kogeny Absalom
2Samuel15:5 Kingo riikyi chii age tugul kwo kong'uruuk eng' tainnyi
2Samuel15:6 Ki yachi Absalom ko uu nooto Israel tugul che ki pendi kaplaitoryat agobo kirwooget
2Samuel15:7 Kingo keskei kenyiisyek ang'wanu
2Samuel15:8 Amu ki aaroorte anee otwogindeng'ung' ye kita ami Gesur eng' Syria ale
2Samuel15:9 Kingo leenji laitoryat ineendet
2Samuel15:10 Ago ki iyookto Absalom segeik koba pororyosyek tugul che po Israel
2Samuel15:11 Ki pa piik pogolwogik aeng'u eng' Jerusalem kobooto Absalom che kiga kiguur ak ki pa eng' perberindanywa komengen kiy.
2Samuel15:12 Ki iyookto Absalom keguur Ahitopel Gilonindet
2Samuel15:13 Ki nyo chiito kap Daudi ne ki ibu ng'aleek
2Samuel15:14 Ak ki leenji `Daudi otwogikyik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet eng' Jerusalem
2Samuel15:15 Kowolji `otwogik laitoryat koleenji
2Samuel15:16 Ki manda laitoryat ak ki isup ineendet `piik tugul che po koonnyi. Ago ki pagaakta laitoryat chebaigeinik taman koriip kootap laitornatet.
2Samuel15:17 Ki manda laitoryat anyun ak ki isup ineendet `piik tugul
2Samuel15:18 Ki pa otwogikyik tugul kobun ye neegitee ineendet. Ki indoe ineendet Keretik
2Samuel15:19 Yeityo koleenji laitoryat Itai Gitindet
2Samuel15:20 Amu koiitu amut
2Samuel15:21 Ago ki wolji `Itai laitoryat koleenji
2Samuel15:22 Koleenji `Daudi Itai
2Samuel15:23 Ki waach emet komugul eng' kutit ne oo yooto ki pendi kolondoi
2Samuel15:24 Ki mi Zadok agine kobooto Lawiik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet koibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet. Ki itu
2Samuel15:25 Yeityo koleenji `laitoryat Zadok
2Samuel15:26 Ago ngot komwa kole
2Samuel15:27 Ki mwachi anyun laitoryat kogeny Zadok tisiindet koleenji
2Samuel15:28 Atebee ole kilandoe kebendi surkwen
2Samuel15:29 Ki ip anyun Zadok ak Abiathar moingetap Kamuktaindet kogeny kwo Jerusalem
2Samuel15:30 Ki togosta Daudi kobun ooreet ne kitogostoe kebendi tulweetap mseituni koriiroti. Kiga tuchkei met ago ma tinyei kweonik. Kituchkei met chii age tugul eng' piik tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet ak kotogostoi
2Samuel15:31 Ak ki kimwachi Daudi keleenji
2Samuel15:32 Kingo it `Daudi tulweet parak ole ki cham kilasune Kamuktaindet
2Samuel15:33 Ki leenji `Daudi ineendet
2Samuel15:34 Ago ngot iweege iwe nganaseet ak ileenji Absalom
2Samuel15:35 Tos ma mi kobooten tisiik
2Samuel15:36 Tinyei icheek eng' yooto weeriikwak aeng'
2Samuel15:37 Ki it anyun nganaseet Hushai chorweetap Daudi ye kingo itei Absalom Jerusalem.
2Samuel16:1 Kingo kagosiir `Daudi tulweet parak kitigin
2Samuel16:2 Ki teebee `laitoryat Siba koleenji
2Samuel16:3 Koteebee `laitoryat Siba koleenji
2Samuel16:4 Yeityo koleenji `laitoryat Siba
2Samuel16:5 Kingo it `laitoryat Daudi Baurim
2Samuel16:6 Kilach `ineendet Daudi ak otwogikyik eng' koik nga kimi piik tugul che nyigoonen eunnyi ne po tai ak eunnyi ne po kaataam.
2Samuel16:7 Ki mwa Shimei ye kichubisyei kole
2Samuel16:8 Kagoweekyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor korotiik tugul che po kootap Saulo
2Samuel16:9 Ki teebee anyun `Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah laitoryat koleenji
2Samuel16:10 Koleenji `laitoryat
2Samuel16:11 Yeityo koleenji `Daudi Abisai
2Samuel16:12 Abeere keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yaityet ne kagiyaiywo
2Samuel16:13 Ki pa anyun Daudi ak piikyik pandanywa: ki wo Shimei korob tulweet kotoorchigei ineendet
2Samuel16:14 Ki it laitoryat ak piik tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet ko kang'etyo kot
2Samuel16:15 Eng' kasarata ko ki it Jerusalem `Absalom ak piik tugul
2Samuel16:16 Kingo it Hushai Arkindet
2Samuel16:17 Ago kiteebe `Absalom Hushai koleenji
2Samuel16:18 Kowolji `Hushai Absalom koleenji
2Samuel16:19 Kogeny
2Samuel16:20 Koleenji anyun `Absalom Ahitopel
2Samuel16:21 Koleenji `Ahitopel Absalom
2Samuel16:22 Ara ki teekyi anyun `icheek Absalom emait eng' paragutap koot
2Samuel16:23 Eng' peetuusyechooto anyun
2Samuel17:1 Ki leenji `Ahitopel Absalom kogeny
2Samuel17:2 Si ache kota ko ng'etat koma imuuchi koyai kiy
2Samuel17:3 ak amutun piik tugul. Uu meetap chiichooto icheeng'e
2Samuel17:4 Ki ibaibai Absalom ng'olyoondonooto
2Samuel17:5 Yeityo komwa `Absalom kole
2Samuel17:6 Kingo it Hushai ole mi Absalom
2Samuel17:7 Ki leenji `Hushai Absalom
2Samuel17:8 Ki le kogeny Hushai
2Samuel17:9 Agot nguno ko kogiuny eng' keriinget
2Samuel17:10 Agot ineendet ne nyigan
2Samuel17:11 Ago arwoochi aleen
2Samuel17:12 Si keche ineendet eng' komosta ne kaginyoorchi ak kibutyi ineendet ko uu ye ibutyin rewoot ng'wony. Ma kituuchi agot agenge eng' ineendet ak piik tugul che mi kobooto ineendet.
2Samuel17:13 Ak kogeny
2Samuel17:14 Kole anyun Absalom ak piik tugul che po Israel
2Samuel17:15 Ki leenji anyun `Hushai Zadok ak Abiathar tisiik
2Samuel17:16 Ara anyun oyookte ng'olyoot ochokyi ak omwachi Daudi oleenji
2Samuel17:17 Ki tebi Jonathan ak Ahimaaz eng' ole neegitee En-rogelo. Ki cham kowendi chepto ne otwogindet komwachin icheek ng'aleek
2Samuel17:18 Ago ki keer icheek ng'etet age
2Samuel17:19 Ki nam osotyonnyi kerwet ak kogeree kutitap keriingonooto ak komae nganuuk che kagibor paragunnyi
2Samuel17:20 Ki pwa otwogigap Absalom ole mi kwonyooto eng' koyooto ak kingo teebee koleenji
2Samuel17:21 Kingo kagoba icheek
2Samuel17:22 Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi ak piik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet ak kolandae Jordan. Kingo choru asiista
2Samuel17:23 Kingo keer Ahitopel kole mata koosup chii kirwoogennyi
2Samuel17:24 Ki it `Daudi Mahanaim
2Samuel17:25 Kiga kolewen `Absalom Amasa koboi lugeet kogeer Joab. Amasa ko ki weeriitap chiito ne kainennyi ko ki Itra Yahudyot
2Samuel17:26 Ki teech Israel ak Absalom emetap Gilead.
2Samuel17:27 Kingo it `Daudi Mahanaim
2Samuel17:28 itogusyek
2Samuel17:29 kobooto kumyat
2Samuel18:1 Ki iit `Daudi piik che ki mi ak ineendet ak konde kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak kiptainigap pogolwogik koboi icheek.
2Samuel18:2 Ak kipchei Daudi lugeet kobee kweanaik somok: ki inde Joab kondochi kebeberta agenge eng' somok. Konde Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah
2Samuel18:3 Ago ki le piik
2Samuel18:4 Koleenji `laitoryat icheek
2Samuel18:5 Ki ng'at `laitoryat Joab ak Abisai ak Itai koleenji
2Samuel18:6 Ki manda anyun piik koba kobargei ak Israel eng' keeweet
2Samuel18:7 Ki par otwogigap Daudi piigap Israel eng' yooto
2Samuel18:8 Kiyom emet tugul lugonooto
2Samuel18:9 Ki chunji `Absalom otwogigap Daudi. Kibunei Absalom nyumbunnyi
2Samuel18:10 Kingo keer chiito age
2Samuel18:11 Koleenji `Joab chiichooto kimwachin ineendet
2Samuel18:12 Ago ki leenji `chiichooto Joab
2Samuel18:13 Nda kagaayachi saboondanyi ko uu nooto
2Samuel18:14 Kole anyun Joab
2Samuel18:15 Ak kiyiem ineendet murenik tamanu
2Samuel18:16 Yeityo koguut `Joab iryageet ak ki week piik kobagaakta ooreet ne ki oone Israel
2Samuel18:17 Kisut Absalom ak kowiirchi keriinget ne oo eng' timiin ak korurukyi ineendet karurugutyet ne oo ne po koik. Kimwei Israel tugul
2Samuel18:18 Ye kita kosabei Absalom
2Samuel18:19 Ki le anyun Ahimaaz weeriitap Zadok
2Samuel18:20 Ago ki leenji `Joab ineendet
2Samuel18:21 Yeityo koleenji `Joab Kusindet
2Samuel18:22 Koleenji anyun Ahimaaz
2Samuel18:23 Ago ki le
2Samuel18:24 Ki tebee Daudi kwenutap ormariichok aeng'
2Samuel18:25 Ki kuurso riibindet ak komwachi laitoryat. Kole laitoryat
2Samuel18:26 kogeer riibindet chiito age kolabotu
2Samuel18:27 Ki le riibindet
2Samuel18:28 Ki kuurso Ahimaaz ak koleenji laitoryat
2Samuel18:29 Ki teebee laitoryat kole
2Samuel18:30 Ki leenji laitoryat
2Samuel18:31 Ki it Kusindet ak kole
2Samuel18:32 Ki teebe `laitoryat Kusindet koleenji
