2Kings14:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Amasia weeriitap Joash laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap aeng' ne po Joash weeriitap Jehoahas laitoryatap Israel.
2Kings14:2 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings14:3 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings14:4 Ago ki ma kiisto komoswek che torooreen. Kita koenyei piik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswek che torooreen.
2Kings14:5 Ak ye ki kata ki kimiit pounateet eng' eunnyi
2Kings14:6 Ago ma par lagogap rumichooto
2Kings14:7 Ki par piigap Edom eliphuusyek taman eng' Atebweetap Munyuk
2Kings14:8 Kiyookto anyun Amasia piik koba kap Jeoas
2Kings14:9 Ago ki iyookyi piik Jehoas laitoryatap Israel Amasia laitoryatap Judah koleenji
2Kings14:10 Ki ibar iman Edom
2Kings14:11 Ago ma cham Amasia kogas. Kotogosta anyun Jehoas laitoryatap Israel; ak kigeergei ineendet ak Amasia laitoryatap Judah togoch eng' Beth-shemesh ne po Judah.
2Kings14:12 Ki kiterteer Judah eng' taitap Israel
2Kings14:13 Ki imut Jehoas laitoryatap Israel Amasia laitoryatap Judah
2Kings14:14 Ki ip thahabu tugul ak fedha
2Kings14:15 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jehoas che ki yai
2Kings14:16 Ki ru Jehoas kobooto kwanisyekyik ak ki kitup eng' Samaria kobooto laitorinigap Israel. Ak ki laitoran Jeroboam weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Kings14:17 Kita kosap Amasia weeriitap Jehoas laitoryatap Judah kenyiisyek taman ak muut kingo pata meetap Jehoas weeriitap Jehoahas laitoryatap Israel.
2Kings14:18 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Amasia
2Kings14:19 Kichaam `icheeget ineendet eng' Jerusalem; ak ki mwei kwo Lakish
2Kings14:20 Kilaune ineendet paraisisyek ak ki kitupchi Jerusalem kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi.
2Kings14:21 Ki nam piik tugul che po Judah Azariah
2Kings14:22 Ki teech Elath
2Kings14:23 Ki toi kolaitoran Jeroboam weeriitap Joash laitoryatap Israel eng' Samaria
2Kings14:24 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ma istoegei tengekwogik tugul che po Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat
2Kings14:25 Ki weech ineendet kiwotetap Israel kobooch ye kibunei kebendi Lebo-hamath agoi nyanjetap Arabah
2Kings14:26 Amu ki keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyalildap Israel
2Kings14:27 Ak ma mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
2Kings14:28 Poisyonik tugul che po Jeroboam
2Kings14:29 Ki ru Jeroboam kobooto kwanisyekyik
2Kings15:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Azariah weeriitap Amasia laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak tisap kobooch kolaitoran Jeroboam eng' Israel.
2Kings15:2 Ki po kenyiisyek taman ak lo ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings15:3 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings15:4 Ago ki ma kiisto komoswek che torooreen; kita koenyei piik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswechooto.
2Kings15:5 Ki pir Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitoryat
2Kings15:6 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Azariah
2Kings15:7 Ki ru Azariah kobooto kwanisyekyik ak ki kitup kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ak ki laitoran Jotham weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Kings15:8 Ki laitoran Zekariah weeriitap Jeroboam eng' Israel eng' Samaria arawek lo eng' kenyiitap sosom ak sisiit kobooch kolaitoran Azariah eng' Judah.
2Kings15:9 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings15:10 Kichaam ineendet Shallum weeriitap Jabes
2Kings15:11 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Zekariah
2Kings15:12 Niito ko ng'olyoot ne ki mwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jehu
2Kings15:13 Ki toi kolaitoran Shallum weeriitap Jabes eng' kenyiitap sosom ak sogool kobooch kolaitoran Uzziah eng' Judah. Ak ki laitoran arawet agenge eng' Samaria.
2Kings15:14 Ki togosta Menaem weeriitap Gadi eng' Tirzah
2Kings15:15 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Shallum
2Kings15:16 Ki par anyun Menaem Tiphsah
2Kings15:17 Ki toi Menaem weeriitap Gadi kolaitoran eng' Israel eng' kenyiitap sosom ak sogool ne po Azariah laitoryatap Judah
2Kings15:18 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings15:19 Kiseet Pul laitoryatap Assyria koleen kobar emet; ak ki igoochi Menaem Pul keruutik eliphuusyek sosom ak tisap che po fedha
2Kings15:20 Kirep Menaem fedhaisyek eng' Israel
2Kings15:21 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Menaem
2Kings15:22 Ki ru Menaem kobooto kwanisyekyik. Ak ki laitoran Pekaia weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Kings15:23 Ki toi kolaitoran Pekaia weeriitap Menaem eng' Israel eng' Samaria
2Kings15:24 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ma istoegei tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat
2Kings15:25 Kichaam ineendet Pekah weeriitap Remaliah
2Kings15:26 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Pekaia
2Kings15:27 Ki toi kolaitoran Pekah weeriitap Remaliah eng' Israel eng' Samaria
2Kings15:28 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ma istoegei ineendet tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat
2Kings15:29 Ki nyo Tiglat-peleser laitoryatap Assyria eng' peetuusyegap Pekah laitoryatap Israel ak ki nam Ijon
2Kings15:30 Kichaam Hoshea weeriitap Elah Pekah weeriitap Remaliah
2Kings15:31 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Pekah
2Kings15:32 Ki toi kolaitoran Jotham weeriitap Uzziah laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap aeng' kobooch kolaitoran Pekah weeriitap Remaliah eng' Israel.
2Kings15:33 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani. Ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak lo eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamennyi Jerusha cheptap Zadok.
2Kings15:34 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings15:35 Agos ma ki isto komoswek che torooreen; kita koenyei piik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswek che torooreen. Ki teech ineendet ormariichetap meto ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Kings15:36 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jotham
2Kings15:37 Ki toi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyechooto koyookyi Rezin laitoryatap Syria ak Pekah weeriitap Remaliah
2Kings15:38 Ki ru Jotham ak kwanisyekyik ak ki kitup eng' nganaseetap Daudi kwandanyi. Ak ki laitoran Ahaz weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Kings16:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Ahaz weeriitap Jotham laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap taman ak tisap kobooch kolaitoran Pekah weeriitap Remaliah.
2Kings16:2 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem Ahaz ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings16:3 Ago ki wendotee ortinwegap laitorinigap Israel
2Kings16:4 Ki enyei ineendet tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswek che torooreen
2Kings16:5 Konyo anyun Jerusalem Rezin laitoryatap Syria kobooto Pekah weeriitap Remaliah kobookyi kobargei ak Jeusalem
2Kings16:6 Eng' peetuusyechooto kogiweekyi Rezin laitoryatap Syria piigap Syria nganaseetap Elath
2Kings16:7 Ki iyookto anyun Ahaz piik koba kap Tiglat-peleser laitoryatap Assyria
2Kings16:8 Ak ki nam Ahaz fedha ak thahabu che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings16:9 Ki kasyi ineendet laitoryatap Assyria
2Kings16:10 Ki wo Laitoryat Ahaz Damasko kotorookto Tiglat-peleser laitoryatap Assyria ak ki keer kaptisisyet ne ki mi Damasko. Ki iboorchi Laitoryat Ahaz Urija tisiindet kiit ne uu kaptisisyonooto
2Kings16:11 Ki teech Urija tisiindet kaptisisyet
2Kings16:12 Kingo it laitoryat kobunu Damasko
2Kings16:13 Ki peel kagoochinennyi ne kibeelei ak kagoochinennyi ne po peek che ng'ootiin
2Kings16:14 Ki ip kaptisisyetap sugunwet ne ki mi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo eng' taitap koot
2Kings16:15 Ki ng'at anyun Laitoryat Ahaz Urija tisiindet
2Kings16:16 Ki yai ko uu nooto Urija tisiindet
2Kings16:17 Ki til Laitoryat Ahaz tabanwegap ng'echerok ak koisto taabeet ne oo eng' kwenutap tuguuchooto. Ki inem nyanjet ne ki mi paragutap eigap sugunonik
2Kings16:18 Ki wal ooreet ne kerat ne po sabato ne kiga kiyai eng' ko
2Kings16:19 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che ki yai Ahaz
2Kings16:20 Ki ru Ahaz ak ki kitup kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ki laitoran Hezekiah weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Kings17:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Hoshea weeriitap Elah eng' Samaria eng' Israel
2Kings17:2 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings17:3 Ki togos Shalmaneser laitoryatap Assyria kobargei ak ineendet
2Kings17:4 Ak ki nai laitoryatap Assyria kole chaamsei Hoshea
2Kings17:5 Yeityo kotogos laitoryatap Assyria konyo kowendot eng' emet komugul ak kitogosta kwo Samaria
2Kings17:6 Ki nam laitoryatap Assyria Samaria
2Kings17:7 Ki yaak ko uu nooto
2Kings17:8 ak kobendatee ng'atuutigap pororyosyek
2Kings17:9 Ki yai piigap Israel eng' ung'oot tuguuk che ma lititen koyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
2Kings17:10 Ki lumda tolochik ak Aserik eng' tulweet age tugul ne kooi
2Kings17:11 Kibeelee yooto nyamdutik eng' komoswek tugul che torooreen
2Kings17:12 Ki oot kanamonik
2Kings17:13 Ago kibaoryan Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kora agobo Israel
2Kings17:14 Ago ma cham kogas kora
2Kings17:15 Ki eesyo ng'atuutikyik ak kayomisennyi ne ki iyomiskei ak kwanisyekwak
2Kings17:16 Ki meto icheek ng'atuutik tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
2Kings17:17 Ki igoito weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak kobun maat. Kiboisyee ng'oorset ak ponisosyek ak koaldagei koyai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings17:18 Ki nereekyi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel miising'
2Kings17:19 Ma riip agine Judah ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
2Kings17:20 Ki eesyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kesweek tugul che po Israel; ki inyaliil icheek ak konde eunegap piik che kiluul icheek
2Kings17:21 Ye kibut Israel eng' kootap Daudi
2Kings17:22 Kibendate piigap Israel tengekwogik tugul che po Jeroboam che ki yai; ma istoegei
2Kings17:23 agoi kong'eeto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eng' tainnyi
2Kings17:24 Ki imut `laitoryatap Assyria piik eng' Babilon
2Kings17:25 Ye ki toi komeny olooto
2Kings17:26 Komwachi anyun laitoryatap Assyria
2Kings17:27 Kong'at anyun laitoryatap Assyria kole
2Kings17:28 Ki nyo anyun age eng' tisiik che kiga kimut koba eng' Samaria
2Kings17:29 Ago kiga yai pororyet age tugul kanamonikwak
2Kings17:30 Ki yai piigap Babilon Sukot-benot
2Kings17:31 ki yai Abik Nibas ak Tartak
2Kings17:32 Koiywei icheek anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings17:33 Ki iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ago kiote kora kanamonikwak
2Kings17:34 Yaei kora ko uu atebosyek che ki po tai agoi ra. Ma iywei `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings17:35 Ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koyomiset ak icheeget
2Kings17:36 Ago oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki imutwak otogosu eng' emetap Misiri eng' kimnateet ne oo
2Kings17:37 Oriip oyai eng' peetuusyek tugul agoi
2Kings17:38 Amat outye kayomiset ne ki kiyomiske kobootok
2Kings17:39 Ago oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'; ineendet ne sarwok eng' eunegap puunikwok tugul.”
2Kings17:40 Ago ma kas
2Kings17:41 Ki iywei anyun pororyosyechuuto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings18:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Hezekiah weeriitap Ahaz laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap somok kobooch kolaitoran Hosea weeriitap Elah eng' Israel.
2Kings18:2 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings18:3 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings18:4 Ki isto komoswek che torooreen
2Kings18:5 Ki imong' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings18:6 Amu ki namgei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings18:7 Ak ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet; kibor eng' komosta age tugul ne ki wo. Ki ingelelji laitoryatap Assyria
2Kings18:8 Ki par Philistiik kot koit Gaza ak kiwotosyekyik
2Kings18:9 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po ang'wan ne po Hezekiah
2Kings18:10 Ak kingo pata kenyiisyek somogu
2Kings18:11 Ki imut `laitoryatap Assyria Israel koba Assyria
2Kings18:12 Amu ki ma kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
2Kings18:13 Ki togos Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria eng' kenyiitap taman ak ang'wan ne po laitoryat Hezekiah
2Kings18:14 Ki iyookto Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah chiito kwo kaplaitoryatap Assyria eng' Lakish
2Kings18:15 Ki igoochi `Hezekiah ineendet fedhaisyek tugul che ki mi eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings18:16 Ki inem Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto thahabu eng' kereiywegap kurgotik ak eng' tolochik che kiga koliige Hezekiah kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings18:17 Ki iyookto laitoryatap Assyria Tartan ak Rab-saris ak Rabsake eng' Lakish kobooto lugeet ne oo
2Kings18:18 Kingo kuur laitoryat
2Kings18:19 Ki leenji `Rabsake icheek
2Kings18:20 Ing'alaali ile
2Kings18:21 Keero
2Kings18:22 Ago ngot oleenjo: “Kimang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings18:23 Ara asoomin anyun nguno ale
2Kings18:24 Imuktoi ano anyun iweech togeetap kiptaiyat agenge ne ming'in eng' otwogik tugul che po kiptaiyandennyu
2Kings18:25 Ara anyun
2Kings18:26 Koleenji anyun Eliakim weeriitap Hilkiah
2Kings18:27 Ago ki leenji `Rabsake icheek
2Kings18:28 Yeityo kotonon Rabsake ak komwa eng' kutit ne oo eng' kutitap Yahudik ak kong'alaal kole
2Kings18:29 Kamwa laitoryat kole
2Kings18:30 Among' kogoonok Hezekiah omang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
2Kings18:31 Amat ogas ng'aleegap Hezekiah. Kamwa ko uu ni laitoryatap Assyria
2Kings18:32 agoi anyo amutak obe emet ne kergei ak emeng'wong'
2Kings18:33 Tos ki kobiit eng' kamuktaigap pororyosyek ne ki sar emennyi eng' eutap laitoryatap Assyria?
2Kings18:34 Mi ano kamuktaigap Hamath
2Kings18:35 Ng'oo eng' kamuktaik tugul che po emotinwek
2Kings18:36 Ago ki siisyo piik
2Kings18:37 Ki pa anyun Eliakim weeriitap Hilkiah ne ki pou koot
2Kings19:1 Ak kingo kas Laitoryat Hezekiah
2Kings19:2 Ki iyookto Eliakim
2Kings19:3 Ki leenji ineendet
2Kings19:4 Abeere imuuchi kogas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ng'aleek tugul che po Rabsake
2Kings19:5 Kobwa anyun otwogigap Laitoryat Hezekiah ole mi Isaiah.
2Kings19:6 Ki leenji `Isaiah icheek
2Kings19:7 Keero! Andoi ineendet chesawil
2Kings19:8 Kingo kas Rabsake kole kikwa laitoryatap Assyria eng' Lakish
2Kings19:9 Kingo kas kemwaei agobo Tiraka laitoryatap Kush
2Kings19:10 “Omwachini Hezekiah
2Kings19:11 Ki igas iman kiit ne ki koyachi laitorinigap Assyria emotinwek tugul
2Kings19:12 Tos ki sar icheek `kamuktaigap pororyosyek che ki par kwanisyekyuk
2Kings19:13 Mi ano laitoryatap Hamath
2Kings19:14 Ki nam Hezekiah parweet eng' eutap piik che kiga kiyok ak kosoman. Ki togosta Hezekiah kwo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koiito parwaanooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Kings19:15 Ak ki sa Hezekiah eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
2Kings19:16 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings19:17 Iman
2Kings19:18 Ki kowiirchi ma kanamonikwak ak king'em anyun tuguuchooto. Ki ma ko kamuktaik
2Kings19:19 Ara anyun
2Kings19:20 Ki iyookto anyun Isaiah weeriitap Amos chiito kwo kap Hezekiah
2Kings19:21 Ni ng'olyoot ne kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo ineendet: Kasasin pergeiyat cheptap Zion
2Kings19:22 Ng'oo ne ki ichot ak ichup? Ng'oo ne ki ibolji? Ak ng'oo ne injururi? Nooto ko Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel!
2Kings19:23 Koichot Kiptaiyat eng' piiguk che koiyoogu
2Kings19:24 Ki abal che ki ma angen
2Kings19:25 ‘Tom igas ole ki ayaite eng' keny? Ki ayai eng' peetuusyek che po keny nooto kaasulde nguno
2Kings19:26 Ki ek anyun piikwak
2Kings19:27 Ago angen kabuureng'ung'
2Kings19:28 Amu nereegeguk che koroomen agobo anee
2Kings19:29 Yeityo komwachi `Isaiah laitoryat Hezekiah “Egu ni kaboorunet ne kiboorun: oame eng' kenyini che piitos icheegei
2Kings19:30 Ak iywoktogei kobendi ng'wony tigitigap che ng'etu eng' kootap Judah ak koiyo logoek eng' parak.
2Kings19:31 Amu mandoi eng' Jerusalem che kang'et
2Kings19:32 “Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo laitoryatap Assyria
2Kings19:33 Weegegei ooreet ne ki punu
2Kings19:34 ‘Amu ariibe nganasani
2Kings19:35 Ki manda malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kemounooto ak kobar piik eliphuusyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak muut eng' nganaseetap piigap Assyria. Kingo ng'eetyo piik karon
2Kings19:36 Kwo anyun Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria
2Kings19:37 Ak ye kita kosaaei eng' kootap Nisrok kanamwennyi
2Kings20:1 Kimyan Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto kot ko neegit kome. Ki nyoonji maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos
2Kings20:2 Kowelel anyun togeennyi kogeer inaat
2Kings20:3 “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings20:4 Ak ye ki tomo koit Isaiah kwenutap nganaseet
2Kings20:5 “Weege kogeny
2Kings20:6 Atesyini peetuusyeguk kenyiisyek taman ak muut. Ak asaruun kobooto nganasani eng' eunegap laitoryatap Assyria. Ariibe nganasani agobo anee
2Kings20:7 Ki le Isaiah
2Kings20:8 Ki leenji `Hezekiah Isaiah
2Kings20:9 Ki mwa Isaiah kole
2Kings20:10 Ki mwa Hezekiah kole
2Kings20:11 Ki riirchi maotyot `Isaiah Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak kiweech urwet kwo let tilutik taman
2Kings20:12 Ki iyookyi Berodak-baladan weeriitap Baladan
2Kings20:13 Ki kas Hezekiah icheek
2Kings20:14 Ki nyo anyun Isaiah maotyot ole mi Laitoryat Hezekiah ak koleenji
2Kings20:15 Ak ki le ineendet
2Kings20:16 Ki leenji Isaiah Hezekiah
2Kings20:17 Keero
2Kings20:18 Tuun kimuti alak eng' weeriiguk che mong'unenen
2Kings20:19 Koleenji anyun `Hezekiah Isaiah
2Kings20:20 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Hezekiah
2Kings20:21 Ki ru Hezekiah kobooto kwanisyekyik. Ak ki laitoran Manasseh weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Kings21:1 Ki po kenyiisyek taman ak aeng' Manasseh ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings21:2 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings21:3 Amu ki teech kogeny komoswek che torooreen che kiga kobut Hezekiah kwandanyi; kiteekyi Baal kapkorosusyek ak koyai Asera ko uu ye kiga yai Ahab laitoryatap Israel. Kigutung'ji ineendet tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet ak koot.
2Kings21:4 Ki teech kapkorosusyek eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo koyooto kole
2Kings21:5 Kiteekyi kapkorosusyek tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet eng' seremusyek tuwai che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Kings21:6 Ki igoito weeriinnyi kobun maat
2Kings21:7 Ki inde kanamwet ne ki kiwai ne po Asera koot ne ki kamwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi ak weeriinnyi Solomon
2Kings21:8 Ama agoochini keelyegap Israel koombenot kogeny koba eng' emet ne ki agoochi kwanisyekwak; ngot koriip koyai ko uu tugul che ki ang'at icheek
2Kings21:9 Ago ma kas icheek. Ki ichuut Manasseh icheek koyai yaityet kosiir ne ki yai pororyosyek
2Kings21:10 Ki ng'alaal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' otwogikyik maotik kole
2Kings21:11 “Amu kogoyai Manasseh laitoryatap Judah tuguuchu kiwechei
2Kings21:12 ko kamwa anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings21:13 Aiitoi anweetap Samaria kobun Jerusalem
2Kings21:14 Atoortai che kang'et che po porotennyu
2Kings21:15 amu ki koyai yaityet eng' tainnyu ak ki kotacha anereech
2Kings21:16 Kitumda kogeny Manasseh korotiik che chaang' kot
2Kings21:17 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Manasseh
2Kings21:18 Ki ru Manasseh kobooto kwanisyekyik ak ki kitupchi mbareetap koonnyi
2Kings21:19 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak aeng' Ammon ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings21:20 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings21:21 Kiwendote ortinwek tugul che kiwendote kwandanyi
2Kings21:22 Ki meto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings21:23 Kichaam otwogikyik Ammon
2Kings21:24 Ago ki par piigap emet icheek tugul che kichaamei Laitoryat Ammon
2Kings21:25 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Ammon che ki yai
2Kings21:26 Ki kitupchi kererinnyi eng' mbareetap Uzzah. Ak ki laitoran Josiah weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Kings22:1 Ki po kenyiisyek sisiit Josiah ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings22:2 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kowendote ortinwek tugul che po Daudi kwandanyi
2Kings22:3 Ak eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po laitornatennyi
2Kings22:4 “Togoste kap Hilkiah tisiindet ne oo
2Kings22:5 Ingogoochi kiboitiinikyik che poisyei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ingogoochi kiboitiinik che mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings22:6 che icheeget ko musogik che po pagoinik
2Kings22:7 Ago ma kiit fedhaisyek che kiga kigoochi pichooto; amu kiboisyei eng' imanda.”
2Kings22:8 Ki leenji `Hilkiah tisiindet ne oo Sapan siriindet
2Kings22:9 Ki nyo Sapan siriindet kaplaitoryat ak koipchi laitoryat ng'olyoot kogeny
2Kings22:10 Ki mwachi Sapan siriindet laitoryat
2Kings22:11 Kingo kas laitoryat ng'aleegap bukuitap Ng'atuutik
2Kings22:12 Ki ng'at `laitoryat Hilkiah tisiindet
2Kings22:13 “Oba
2Kings22:14 Ki pa anyun Hilkiah tisiindet ak Aikam
2Kings22:15 Ki mwachi icheek koleenji
2Kings22:16 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Aibu yaityet konyonji koroni kobooto piikyik
2Kings22:17 Amu kimetaa icheek ak kobeelji nyamdutik kamuktaik ak kotacha anereech eng' poisyonikwak tugul che po eunekwak
2Kings22:18 Ago omwachini laitoryatap Judah
2Kings22:19 amu kang'arng'arit muguleldang'ung'
2Kings22:20 Ara anyun ayumin iwe ole mi kwanisyeguk
2Kings23:1 Ki iyookto laitoryat kiyumji ineendet poisyek tugul che po Judah ak che po Jerusalem.
2Kings23:2 Ki togosta laitoryat kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto piik tugul che po Judah
2Kings23:3 Ki tonon laitoryat eng' ye po toloita ak koyai arorutyet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings23:4 Ki ng'at `laitoryat Hilkiah tisiindet ne oo
2Kings23:5 Ki isto tisiigap kanamonik
2Kings23:6 Ki ip Asera komong' eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings23:7 Kibut kooriigap sodomik
2Kings23:8 Ki imut Josiah tisiik tugul komong' eng' nganasoogap Judah ak kong'waniit komoswek che torooreen ole kibeelee tisiik nyamdutik
2Kings23:9 Ago ma togos tisiigap komoswek che torooreen kobwa ye miitei kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jerusalem
2Kings23:10 Ki ing'wanit Topet
2Kings23:11 Ki isto paraisisyek che kiga kogoochi laitorinigap Judah asiista. Ki mi ye kimandoe kebendi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings23:12 Kibut laitoryat kapkorosusyek che ki mi koot parak eng' koot ne tabanu parak ne po Ahaz
2Kings23:13 Ki ing'wanit laitoryat komoswek che torooreen che ki mi taitap Jerusalem
2Kings23:14 Kituatui anyun ineendet tolochik ak koep Aserik koluul
2Kings23:15 Kibut kapkorosuut ne ki mi Bethel
2Kings23:16 Kingo welelgei Josiah
2Kings23:17 Kiteep ineendet kole
2Kings23:18 Ak ki le
2Kings23:19 Ki isto Josiah kooriik tugul che po komoswek che torooreen che ki mi nganasoogap Samaria
2Kings23:20 Ki par tisiik tugul che po komoswek che torooreen che ki mi yooto
2Kings23:21 Ki ng'at `laitoryat piik tugul koleenji
2Kings23:22 Ki mata keyai paska ne uu nooto kobooch peetuusyegap kirwoogik che ki irwookyin Israel
2Kings23:23 Ago ki kiyai paska niito eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po Laitoryat Josiah
2Kings23:24 Ki isto `Josiah icheek che kiboisyee oik
2Kings23:25 Ki ma piit eng' tai anan eng' let laitoryat ne kergei ak ineendet
2Kings23:26 Agot nganda uu nooto koma meto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koroomnatetap nereegekyik che eecheen
2Kings23:27 Ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings23:28 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Josiah
2Kings23:29 Ki togosta Pharaoh-neko laitoryatap Misiri eng' peetuusyegap Josiah kobookyi laitoryatap Assyria
2Kings23:30 Kila ineendet otwogikyik eng' chepkichutit eng' Megiddo ko kagome ak kola agoi Jerusalem ak kotupchi ineendet kererinnyi. Ak ki imut `piigap emet Jehoahas weeriitap Josiah
2Kings23:31 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak somok Jehoahas ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings23:32 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu tugul che kiga yai kwanisyekyik.
2Kings23:33 Ki rat `Pharaoh-neko ineendet eng' Ribla eng' emetap Hamath
2Kings23:34 Ki yai `Pharaoh-neko Eliakim weeriitap Josiah koek laitoryat kogeer Josiah kwandanyi
2Kings23:35 Ki igoochi Jehoiakim fedha ak thahabu Pharaoh
2Kings23:36 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut Jehoiakim ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings23:37 Ak ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings24:1 Ki togos Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon eng' peetuusyekyik
2Kings24:2 Ki iyookyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet lugosyegap Kaldeik
2Kings24:3 Ki ityi kii Judah iman ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings24:4 ak agobo korotiik che ma tinyei tengek che kitumda. Amu ki inyiit ineendet Jerusalem korotiik che ma tinyei tengek
2Kings24:5 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jehoiakim
2Kings24:6 Koru anyun Jehoiakim kobooto kwanisyekyik. Ak ki laitoran Jehoiakin weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Kings24:7 Ki mata konyo kogeny laitoryatap Misiri komong' eng' emennyi
2Kings24:8 Ki po kenyiisyek taman ak sisiit Jehoiakin ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings24:9 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi.
2Kings24:10 Ki togos eng' peetuusyechooto otwogigap Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon kobwa Jerusalem
2Kings24:11 Ak ki nyo nganaseet Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon
2Kings24:12 Ki manda Jehoiakin laitoryatap Judah
2Kings24:13 Ak ki ip eng' yooto konoraik tugul che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak che ki mi kootap laitoryat. Kituatui tereenik tugul che po thahabu komengegitu che kiga yai Solomon laitoryatap Israel eng' Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings24:14 Ki imut piik tugul che po Jerusalem: pounik tugul
2Kings24:15 Ki imut `Nebukadnezar Jehoiakin kwo Babilon. Ki imut kora kobooto ineendet eng' Jerusalem koba Babilon
2Kings24:16 Ki imut chooto laitoryatap Babilon koluul koba Babilon piik tugul che po lugeet eliphuusyek tisap
2Kings24:17 Ki yai `laitoryatap Babilon Mattaniah ng'eetap kametap kwandanyi
2Kings24:18 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak agenge Zedekiah ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Kings24:19 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings24:20 Ki piit tuguuchooto amu nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jerusalem ak Judah
2Kings25:1 Ak eng' kenyiitap sogool ne po laitornatennyi
2Kings25:2 Kiyiem anyun nganaseet agoi kenyiitap taman ak agenge ne po Laitoryat Zedekiah.
2Kings25:3 King'wanit rubeet eng' nganaseet eng' peetuutap sogool ne po arawetap ang'wan
2Kings25:4 Kibut anyun piik irimeetap nganaseet ak komweiso murenik tugul che po lugeet kemoi kobun ooreetap ormariichet ne ki mi kwenutap inatusyek aeng' ole ki neegitee seremutap laitoryat. Nga kiga yiem Kaldeik nganaseet
2Kings25:5 Ago ki oon lugeetap Kaldeik laitoryat
2Kings25:6 Ki imut anyun laitoryat kwo ole mi laitoryatap Babilon eng' Ribla
2Kings25:7 Ki par weeriigap Zedekiah kogeerei ineendet. Kibol konyegap Zedekiah ak korat ineendet eng' nyororosyek
2Kings25:8 Ak ki nyo Jerusalem `Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik
2Kings25:9 Ki peel kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings25:10 Kibut lugeet tugul ne po Kaldeik ne ki mi ak kiptaiyatap riibiik
2Kings25:11 Ki imut koluul `Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik piik che kiga ng'et eng' nganaseet
2Kings25:12 Ago ki pagaakta kiptaiyatap riibiik
2Kings25:13 Kitui Kaldeik tolochigap sugunonik che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Kings25:14 Ki ip tereenik
2Kings25:15 Ki ip kiptaiyatap riibiik tuguuk che ki ibe maat ak taabook
2Kings25:16 Tolochichooto aeng'
2Kings25:17 Koindap tononetap toloita agenge ko ki mitainik sisiit
2Kings25:18 Ki imut `kiptaiyatap riibiik Seraiah tisiindet ne oo ak Zephaniah tisiindet ne po aeng' ak riibiik somok che ki riibei kurgeet.
2Kings25:19 Ki imut eng' nganaseet kiptaiyat ne ki pou murenigap lugeet ak piik muut eng' icheek che kigeerei togeetap laitoryat che ki mi nganaseet. Ki imut kora siriindet
2Kings25:20 Ki imut `Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik pichooto
2Kings25:21 Ki par laitoryatap Babilon pichooto eng' Ribla eng' emetap Hamath. Ki kimut anyun Judah keluul komanda eng' emennyi.
2Kings25:22 Ki yai Nebukadnezar Gedalia weeriitap Aikam weeriitap Sapan koek pounindetap piik che kiga ng'et eng' emetap Judah
2Kings25:23 Kingo kas kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek
2Kings25:24 Ki iyasyechi icheek Gedalia ak piikwak
2Kings25:25 Ago ki nyo eng' arawetap tisap Ishmael weeriitap Netania
2Kings25:26 Ki ng'eetyo komwei piik tugul che mengech ak che eecheen
2Kings25:27 Eng' kenyiitap sosom ak tisap ne po luuleetap Jehoiakin laitoryatap Judah
2Kings25:28 Ki ng'alaalji ineendet eng' rireenetapkei ak kieet ineendet kotororit kosiir laitorinik che ki mi kobooto ineendet eng' Babilon.
2Kings25:29 Ki wal ineendet ngoroikyik che po korgoreet ak ki amis eng' tainnyi kotugul eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi.
2Kings25:30 Ki igoochi laitoryat ineendet kotugul kebebertanyi ne po amitwogik

1Chronicles5:19 Ki yai lugeet ak Hagrik
1Chronicles5:20 Ki kitoret kobargei ak icheeget

1Chronicles6:51 Buki weeriinnyi
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiot weeriinnyi
1Chronicles6:53 Zadok weeriinnyi
1Chronicles6:54 Chu ko komoswekwak che ki menyei ko uu ole kiga teekta eng' kiwotosyekwak. Ki kigoochi weeriigap Aron che po ortinwegap Kohatik
1Chronicles6:55 ki igoochi Hebron eng' emetap Judah
1Chronicles6:56 Ago ki igoochi Kaleb weeriitap Jepune mbareenigap nganaseet ak nganasookyik che mengeechen.
1Chronicles6:57 Ki igoochi weeriigap Aron nganasook che kimwechin
1Chronicles6:58 Ileen ak Debir ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
1Chronicles6:59 Asan ak Beth-shemesh ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisye.
1Chronicles6:60 Ak ki igoochi eng' che po pororyetap Benjamin: Geba ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
1Chronicles6:61 Ki kigoochi eng' parbaryat che ki ng'et eng' weeriigap Kohat nganasook taman
1Chronicles6:62 Ki kigoochi weeriigap Gershom nganasook taman ak somok ko uu ortinwekwak
1Chronicles6:63 Ki kigoochi weeriigap Merari nganasook taman ak aeng' eng' parbaryat
1Chronicles6:64 Ki igoochi piigap Israel Lawiik nganasochooto kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye.
1Chronicles6:65 Ki igoochi eng' parbaryat eng' pororyetap lagogap Judah
1Chronicles6:66 Ki tinyei alak eng' ortinwegap weeriigap Kohat nganasook che po kiwotosyekwak eng' pororyetap Ephraim.
1Chronicles6:67 Ki igoochi icheek nganasook che kimwechin
1Chronicles6:68 Jokmeam kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
1Chronicles6:69 Aijalon ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Gatrimon ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisye.
1Chronicles6:70 Ki igoochi eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh; Aner kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Bileam ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
1Chronicles6:71 Ki kigoochi weeriigap Gershom
1Chronicles6:72 Eng' pororyetap Issakar koginyoor Kedesh kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye
1Chronicles6:73 Ramot kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye

1Chronicles9:1 Ki kiit anyun Israel tugul kobee tetuutigap ibinwekwak che ki kosiirto ak ki kisirchi kitabuutap laitorinigap Israel. Ki kimut Judah keluul kwo Babilon amu pistoennywa.

1Chronicles12:1 Chu ko che ki pwa ole mi Daudi eng' Ziklag

1Chronicles12:5 Elusai

1Chronicles13:1 Ki inaisechigei Daudi ak kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak che po pogolusyek
1Chronicles13:2 Ki leenji Daudi tuiyet tugul ne po Israel

1Chronicles13:4 Ki iyan tuiyet tugul kole yaei ko uu nooto
1Chronicles13:5 Koyum anyun Daudi tuiyet tugul ne po Israel
1Chronicles13:6 Ki togosta Daudi kobooto Israel tugul koba Baala yooto ko Kiriath-Jearim

1Chronicles13:8 Ki ureren Daudi kobooto Israel tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet eng' kimnateennywa tugul

1Chronicles14:1 Ki iyookto `Hiram laitoryatap Tyro piik koba kap Daudi koipchi taragonik; kiyookyi piik che waei koik ak musogigap pagoinik koba koteekyi ineendet koot.
1Chronicles14:2 Ak ki nai Daudi kole kogogimiit `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koek laitoryatap Israel amu ki kitoroor laitornatennyi

1Chronicles15:2 Yeityo kong'at Daudi kole

1Chronicles15:29 Kingo it `moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseetap Daudi
1Chronicles16:1 Ki ip anyun moingetap Kamuktaindet ak konde kwenutap emait ne kiga teekyi Daudi ak ki igoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet.
1Chronicles16:2 Kingo kagogees Daudi kogoitoetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet
1Chronicles16:3 Yeityo kogoochi chii age tugul ne po Israel
1Chronicles16:4 Ki lewen alak eng' Lawiik kobois eng' taitap moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Chronicles16:5 Chooto ko ki chu: ki ne oo Asaph
1Chronicles16:6 ak kiguutei kotugul iryagook tisiik Benaiah ak Jahasyel eng' taitap moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet.
1Chronicles16:7 Ki ng'at ne po tai anyun Daudi eng' peetuunooto Asaph ak tupchosyekyik kole kewekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi.
1Chronicles16:8 Oweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Chronicles16:9 Otyenji
1Chronicles16:10 Olasunegei kainennyi ne tiliil; ingoboiboitu mugulelwegap icheek che cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
1Chronicles16:11 Ocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kimnateennyi; ocheeng' togeennyi kotugul.
1Chronicles16:12 Obwaat poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee che ki koyai; kwang'utikyik ak kirwoogutigap kutinnyi
1Chronicles16:13 ee okweek kesweegap Israel kiboityondennyi
1Chronicles16:14 Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Chronicles16:15 Ibwaate kayomisennyi koigeny

1Chronicles16:27 Mi tainnyi teegisto ak etunateet; mi oldanyi kimnateet ak kagasetapkei.
1Chronicles16:28 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

1Chronicles16:35 Omwa ole
1Chronicles16:36 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

1Chronicles16:38 Ki pagaach kora Obed-edom kobooto tupchosyekwak
1Chronicles16:39 Ki pagaach Daudi Zadok tisiindet ak tupchosyekyik tisiik
1Chronicles16:40 si kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' kaptisisyetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei kotugul
1Chronicles16:41 Ki mi kobooto icheek Herman ak Jeduthun ak che kiga ng'et tugul che ki kilewen
1Chronicles16:42 Ki mi kobooto icheek Herman ak Jeduthun che ki tinyei iryagook ak sanisyek che po sugunonik che kibirei
1Chronicles16:43 Ki pa piik tugul
1Chronicles17:1 Ye ki menyei Daudi koonnyi
1Chronicles17:2 Ki leenji `Nathan Daudi
1Chronicles17:3 Ak eng' kemounooto konyonji ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet Nathan koleenji
1Chronicles17:4 ui ileenji Daudi otwogindennyu kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Meteekwo koot ne amenye.
1Chronicles17:5 Tomo ameny koot kobooch peetuut ne ki amutu Israel kotogos
1Chronicles17:6 Eng' komoswek tugul che ki awendotee kobooto Israel
1Chronicles17:7 Nooto anyun imwachini otwogindennyu Daudi ileenjini
1Chronicles17:8 Ki atebi kobooten eng' komosta age tugul ne ki iwe ak ki aiste puuniguk eng' taing'ung'. Nguno ayaun kainet ne uu kainaigap piik che eecheen che mi ng'wony.
1Chronicles17:9 Alewenjini oldo piikyuk Israel ak amiine icheek si kobiit komeny oldanywa
1Chronicles17:10 ak kobooch peetuut ne ki ang'ate kirwoogik koboi piikyuk Israel. Ak aterteeri puuniguk tugul. Kogeny amwaun ale teegun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koot.
1Chronicles17:11 Ye igeskei peetuusyeguk ak iwe ole mi kwanisyeguk
1Chronicles17:12 Teekwa `ineendet koot
1Chronicles17:13 Aegu kwandanyi
1Chronicles17:14 Ago andoi ineendet kotebee koonnyu ak kotebee laitornatennyu koigeny; ak ki kimiti ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet koigeny.”
1Chronicles17:15 Ki mwachi `Nathan Daudi ko uu ng'aleechuuto tugul
1Chronicles17:16 Yeityo kwo ko Laitoryat Daudi
1Chronicles17:17 Ee Kamuktaindet

1Chronicles18:1 Kingo pata niito
1Chronicles18:2 Ki iterteer kora Moab
1Chronicles18:3 Ne siire nooto kogibar Daudi Hadareser laitoryatap Soba eng' Hamath
1Chronicles18:4 Kirebe Daudi ineendet kariisyek eliphuut
1Chronicles18:5 Ki par `Daudi piigap Syria che menyei Damasko piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng'
1Chronicles18:6 Ki inde anyun Daudi riibiik Syria ne po Damasko
1Chronicles18:7 Ki ip Daudi long'onigap thahabu che ki tinyei otwogigap Hadareser kobwa Jerusalem.
1Chronicles18:8 Ki ip Daudi sugunonik che chaang' eng' Tibat ak Kun

1Chronicles18:12 Ki par kogeny Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah piigap Edom eliphuusyek taman ak sisiit eng' Atebweetap Munyuk.
1Chronicles18:13 Ki inde riibiik Edom
1Chronicles18:14 Ki laitoran Daudi eng' Israel tugul; ki irwookyi piikyik tugul eng' lititindo ak iman.
1Chronicles18:15 Ki pou Joab weeriitap Zeruiah lugeet; ak kisiriindetap tuguuk che piitu Jehoshaphat weeriitap Ahilud.
1Chronicles18:16 Ki tisiik Zadok weeriitap Ahitub ak Abimelek weeriitap Abiathar; ak ki siriindet Sabsa;
1Chronicles18:17 ki pou Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada Keretik ak Peletik; ak ki che eecheen weeriigap Daudi che ki tebee ye neegitee laitoryat.

1Chronicles23:1 Ye kiga koosit Daudi ak kiga kochang'a peetuusyekyik
1Chronicles23:2 Ki iyum pounik tugul che po Israel
1Chronicles23:3 Ki kiit Lawiik kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom ak che siirei
1Chronicles23:4 Ki tononjin poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eliphuusyek tiptemu ak ang'wan eng' pichooto; ak ki eliphuusyek lo kiptainik ak kirwoogik.
1Chronicles23:5 Ki eliphuusyek ang'wan riibiigap kurgotik ak ki ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eliphuusyek ang'wanu eng' kibugandinik che ki ayae anee
1Chronicles23:6 Kipchei `Daudi icheek
1Chronicles23:7 Che po Gerson ko ki Ladan ak Shimei.
1Chronicles23:8 Weeriigap Ladan: ne oo ko ki Jehiel
1Chronicles23:9 Weeriigap Shimei ko ki: Selomot
1Chronicles23:10 Ak weeriigap Shimei ko ki: Jahat
1Chronicles23:11 Ki ne oo Jahat ak ne po aeng' ko Sia
1Chronicles23:12 Weeriigap Kohat ko ki: Amram
1Chronicles23:13 Weeriigap Amram ko ki: Aron ak Musa. Ki kitabaan Aron
1Chronicles23:14 Ago ki kiitito weeriigap Musa chiitap Kamuktaindet
1Chronicles23:15 Weeriigap Musa ko ki: Gershom ak Elieser.
1Chronicles23:16 Ne ki oo eng' weeriigap Gershom ko ki Sebuel.
1Chronicles23:17 Ki tinyei `Elieser Reabia
1Chronicles23:18 Weeriigap Itshar: ne oo ko ki Selomit.
1Chronicles23:19 Weeriigap Hebron: ne oo ko ki Jeria
1Chronicles23:20 Weeriigap Uzziel: ne oo ko ki Mikah
1Chronicles23:21 Weeriigap Merari ko ki: Mali ak Musi. Weeriigap Mali ko ki: Eleazar ak Kish.
1Chronicles23:22 Kime Eleazar ama sich weeriik
1Chronicles23:23 Weeriigap Musi ko ki: Mali
1Chronicles23:24 Chuuto ko ki weeriigap Lawi ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak

1Chronicles23:26 ma koiboti Lawiik koot ne kituiyechin kobooto tuguukyik tugul che po poisyennyi.
1Chronicles23:27 Amu ki kiit weeriigap Lawi eng' ng'aleegap Daudi che po let
1Chronicles23:28 Amu kiboisyennywa koboisyechi weeriigap Aron agobo poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Chronicles23:29 agobo magatinigap kabartaet ak icheek

1Chronicles23:32 Si koriipso eng' riipseetap emait ne kituiyechin

1Chronicles27:1 Ki ek piigap Israel
1Chronicles27:2 Ki pou riipseet ne po tai ne po arawet ne po tai Jasobeam weeriitap Sabdiel. Ki mi riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptemu ak ang'wan.
1Chronicles27:3 Ki po lagogap Peres
1Chronicles27:4 Ki pou riipseet ne po arawet ne po aeng' Dodai Ahoindet
1Chronicles27:5 Ki kiptaiyat ne po somok ne po lugeet eng' arawetap somok ko Benaiah
1Chronicles27:6 Benaia-ini ko ki chiito ne nyigan eng' piik sosom
1Chronicles27:7 Ki Asahel ng'eetap kametap Joab kiptaiyat ne po ang'wan eng' arawet ne po ang'wan
1Chronicles27:8 Ki Samut Israindet kiptaiyat ne po muut eng' arawetap muut. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan.
1Chronicles27:9 Ki Ira weeriitap Ikes Tekoindet kiptaiyat ne po lo eng' arawet ne po lo. Ki tinyei piik eng' riipsennyi eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan.
1Chronicles27:10 Ki Heles Pelonindet
1Chronicles27:11 Ki Sibekai Husatindet ne po Seraik
1Chronicles27:12 Ki Abiezer Anatotindet ne po Benjaminik
1Chronicles27:13 Ki Maarai Netopatindet ne po Seraik
1Chronicles27:14 Ki Benaiah Piratonindet ne po lagogap Ephraim
1Chronicles27:15 Ki Heldai Netopatindet ne po Othniel kiptaiyat ne po taman ak aeng' eng' arawetap taman ak aeng'. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan.
1Chronicles27:16 Ki chu pounigap pororyosyegap Israel: ki Elieser weeriitap Zikri ne po piigap Reuben; eng' piigap Simion
1Chronicles27:17 eng' kap Lawi
1Chronicles27:18 eng' kap Judah
1Chronicles27:19 eng' kap Zebulun
1Chronicles27:20 eng' lagogap Ephraim ko ki Hoshea weeriitap Azaziah; eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh
1Chronicles27:21 eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh
1Chronicles27:22 eng' kap Dan
1Chronicles27:23 Ago ki ma iit Daudi che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak koba ng'wony
1Chronicles27:24 Ki toi Joab weeriitap Zeruiah koiit
1Chronicles27:25 Ki pou ole kigonoree tuguugap laitoryat Asmabet weeriitap Adiel. Ki pou Jonathan weeriitap Uzziah ole kigonoree tuguugap mbareenik
1Chronicles27:26 Ki pou Isri weeriitap Kelub icheek che kiyaei poisyetap mbar
1Chronicles27:27 Ki pou Shimei Ramatindet mbareenigap sabibuk. Ki pou Sabdi Sipmindet ruroteetap mbareenigap sabibuk che ki konori.
1Chronicles27:28 Ki pou Baal-hanan Gederindet keetiigap mseituni ak mogoonik che ki mi emet ne soi. Ki pou Joash ole kigonoree mwanik.
1Chronicles27:29 Ki pou Sitrai Sharonindet akwotisyek che ki agetoos eng' Sharon. Ki pou Sapat weeriitap Adlai akwotisyek che ki mi atebwosyek.
1Chronicles27:30 Ki pou Obil Ismaelindet tambeesik
1Chronicles27:31 Ki pou Jasiis Hagrindet akwotisyegap keechiirek. Chuuto tugul ko ki pounigap tuguugap Laitoryat Daudi.
1Chronicles27:32 Ki kirwoogindet Jonathan weeriitap ng'eetap kametap Daudi
1Chronicles27:33 Ki kirwoogindet Ahitopel ne po kaplaitoryat. Ki chorweetap laitoryat
1Chronicles27:34 Ki rubei Jehoiada weeriitap Benaiah ak Abiathar
1Chronicles28:1 Ki iyum `Daudi pounik tugul che po Israel eng' Jerusalem
1Chronicles28:2 Ki tonon anyun Laitoryat Daudi ak kole
1Chronicles28:3 Ago ki leenjo Kamuktaindet
1Chronicles28:4 Ago ki lewena Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Chronicles28:5 Ki lewen Solomon weeriinnyu eng' weeriikyuk tugul
1Chronicles28:6 Ki mwaiwo kole
1Chronicles28:7 Agimiiti laitornatennyi koigeny
1Chronicles28:8 “Ara anyun nguno
1Chronicles28:9 “Nai anyun inyee Solomon weeriinnyu
1Chronicles28:10 Riipkei anyun; amu ki kolewenin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iteech koot ne po ole-tiliil. Kimitu anyun ak iteech.”
1Chronicles28:11 Yeityo kogoochi `Daudi Solomon weeriinnyi kergeindap keterut
1Chronicles28:12 Ki igoochi ineendet kergeindap tuguuk tugul che ki iboorchi agobo seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Chronicles28:13 Ki igoochi kogeny pcheutigap riipsosyegap Tisiik ak Lawiik
1Chronicles28:14 Ki igoochi karagendoetap thahabu ngebiman ne po tuguuk che po thahabu
1Chronicles28:15 Ki igoochi kogeny ole tee thahabu che po keelyegap tait
1Chronicles28:16 ak thahabu ngebiman che po mesosyegap magatinigap kabartaet che po meset age tugul; ak fedha che po mesosyegap fedha;
1Chronicles28:17 ak kariik che kirutunee panyeek
1Chronicles28:18 ak thahabu che tiliileen ngebiman che po kapkorosuut ne kibeelee nyamdutik. Ki igoochi kora thahabu che po kergeindap chepkichutit
1Chronicles28:19 Ki kigoono aguiyo chuuto tugul eng' siruutik kobun eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

1Chronicles29:1 Ki leenji `Laitoryat Daudi tuiyet tugul
1Chronicles29:2 Ki achop anyun eng' kimnateennyu tugul

1Chronicles29:4 talendaisyek eliphuusyek somok che po thahabu
1Chronicles29:5 che po thahabu agobo tuguugap thahabu

1Chronicles29:21 Eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ko ki eeny tiseiywek koeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
1Chronicles29:22 Ki amis ak koeeiso icheek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto eng' kagasetapkei ne oo. Ki yai Solomon weeriitap Daudi koek laitoryat kogeny

2Chronicles1:1 Ki kimiit Solomon weeriitap Daudi eng' laitornatennyi
2Chronicles1:2 Ki ng'alaalji `Solomon Israel tugul
2Chronicles1:3 Ki wo anyun Solomon kobooto tuiyet tugul
2Chronicles1:4 Kiga koip `Daudi moingetap Kamuktaindet kotogos eng' Kiriath-Jearim konyo ole kiga kochopchi Daudi: amu kiga koteekyi emait eng' Jerusalem.
2Chronicles1:5 Ki mi yooto kaptisisyet ne po sugunwet ne kiyaei Bezalel weeriitap Uri
2Chronicles1:6 Ki togosta Solomon kwo ole miitei kaptisisyet ne po sugunwet
2Chronicles1:7 King'aang'jigei anyun `Kamuktaindet Solomon kemounooto ak koleenji
2Chronicles1:8 Ki leenji `Solomon Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles1:9 Ara anyun
2Chronicles1:10 Koono anyun utaatyet ak naet
2Chronicles1:11 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Solomon
2Chronicles1:12 kagegoonin anyun utaatyet ak naet. Ak agoonin mogornatosyek
2Chronicles1:13 Konyo anyun Solomon eng' komosato toroor ne ki mi Gibeon
2Chronicles1:14 Ki iyum Solomon kariisyegap lugeet ak piik che ketei paraisisyek; ki tinyei kariisyek eliphuut agenge ak pogol ang'wan ak piik eliphuusyek taman ak aeng' che ketei paraisisyek
2Chronicles1:15 Ki yai laitoryat fedha ak thahabu eng' Jerusalem kot kotenit koik
2Chronicles1:16 Ki kigetune Misiri paraisisyek che ki tinyei Solomon; ki alei chemung'arainigap laitoryat kobee akwotisyek.
2Chronicles1:17 Ki ale chepkichutit eng' Misiri shekelisyek pogol lo che po fedha
2Chronicles2:1 Ki pegechi anyun Solomon koteekyi koot kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koot ne po pounatennyi.
2Chronicles2:2 Ki iit Solomon piik eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap che laisei
2Chronicles2:3 Ki iyookto Solomon koba kap Huram laitoryatap Tyro
2Chronicles2:4 Keero
2Chronicles2:5 Oo koot ne ateeche
2Chronicles2:6 Ago ng'oo anyun ne imuuchi koteekyi ineendet koot
2Chronicles2:7 Ara anyun
2Chronicles2:8 Iyookwo kogeny keetiigap taragonik
2Chronicles2:9 si kochobwa keetiik che chaang' miising'
2Chronicles2:10 Agoochini otwogiguk piik che ebei keetiik
2Chronicles2:11 Kowolji anyun Huram laitoryatap Tyro eng' parweet ne ki iyookyi Solomon
2Chronicles2:12 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles2:13 Kaayogu anyun chiito ne utaat
2Chronicles2:14 weeriitap kwondo ne po tiibiigap Dan ak ki po Tyro kwandanyi. Tinyei ineendet utaatyet ne imuuchi koyai poisyetap thahabu ak fedha
2Chronicles2:15 Ingoyokyi anyun `kiptaiyandennyu otwogikyik nganuuk
2Chronicles2:16 si keep keetiik che tee che imache eng' Lebanon ak kiyogun ko ratotiin kobun peek eng' nyanjetap Mediterenian agoi Joppa. Yeityo iip eng' yooto kotogosta koba Jerusalem.”
2Chronicles2:17 Ki iit Solomon toek tugul che ki mi emetap Israel
2Chronicles2:18 Ki inde piik eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap che laisei
2Chronicles3:1 Ki toi anyun Solomon koteech kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jerusalem eng' tulweetap Moriah
2Chronicles3:2 Ki toi koteekso eng' kenyiitap ang'wan ne po laitornatennyi
2Chronicles3:3 Chu anyun lumeiywek che ki lumda Solomon agobo teekseetap kootap Kamuktaindet. Ki ek koindo mitainik tiptem ak tisap ak ki ek tebeesindo mitainik sogool.
2Chronicles3:4 Ki aechin tebeesindap koot ak kooindap keterut ne ki mi taitap koot
2Chronicles3:5 Kitetee koot ne oo keetiigap piribirinik che ki iliige thahabu che korooron ak kiwachinot itoonwegap tiironigap sosik ak nyororosyek.
2Chronicles3:6 Ak kilelesonji koot eng' koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo si kogararanit. Ak thahabu che kiboisyee ko ki punu Parbaim.
2Chronicles3:7 Ki iliige kogeny thahabu koot
2Chronicles3:8 Ki teech koot ne tiliil miising'. Ki aechin tebeesindap koot ak koindonyi
2Chronicles3:9 Ki ek nyigiisindap kipchumarisyek shekelisyek konom che po thahabu. Ak ki iliige thahabu kooriik che po parak.
2Chronicles3:10 Ki inde itoonwek aeng' che po kerubisyek koot ne tiliil miising' ak koliige thahabu.
2Chronicles3:11 Ki ek mitainik sogool kooindap kebebaigap kerubisyek tuwai. Koindap kebepchet agenge ko ki mitainik aeng' ak robo
2Chronicles3:12 Ak ki mitainik aeng' ak robo kebepchetap kerubit age
2Chronicles3:13 Kiga uitogei kebebaigap kerubisyechuuto tuwai koit mitainik sogool. Ki tonondos eng' keelyekwak ak kiga tokyigei togoochikwak koot.
2Chronicles3:14 Kinap angeet ne kioiye koot
2Chronicles3:15 Ak ki yai kogeny tolochik aeng' eng' taitap koot
2Chronicles3:16 Ki yai nyororosyek eng' koot ne po oriit
2Chronicles3:17 Ki lumda tolochichooto eng' taitap Hekaluut
2Chronicles4:1 Ki yai kogeny kaptisisyetap sugunonik
2Chronicles4:2 Ki yai nyanjet ne kitanyi ne po mitainik ang'wan ak kebeberyat
2Chronicles4:3 Ak kimi itoonwegap eiik ng'wonyutap mireiywot
2Chronicles4:4 Kiga tonone nyanjanooto itoonwegap eiik
2Chronicles4:5 Ak ki aechin tebeesindanyi ak nyigiisindap euut; ak ki kiyai mireiywondennyi kogergeit ak mireiywotap kigombet
2Chronicles4:6 Ak ki yai taabook taman che eecheen
2Chronicles4:7 Ak ki yai keelyek taman che po tait eng' thahabu ko uu ng'atuutyet ne ki king'at agobo tuguuchooto; ak ki inde Hekaluut oriit
2Chronicles4:8 Ak ki yai kogeny mesosyek taman
2Chronicles4:9 Ak ki yai kogeny seremutap tisiik
2Chronicles4:10 Ak ki inde nyanjanooto komostap tai
2Chronicles4:11 Ak ki yai Huram tereenik
2Chronicles4:12 tolochik aeng'
2Chronicles4:13 ak itoonwegap logoek pogol ang'wan che po karichooto aeng' regerotiin; ortinwek aeng' che po logoek che po karnet age tugul ne ki kireger
2Chronicles4:14 Ki yai kogeny ng'echerok ak taabookwak che eecheen
2Chronicles4:15 nyanjanooto agenge
2Chronicles4:16 Ak ki yai kwandap Huram tereenik ak icheek
2Chronicles4:17 Ki yai laitoryat tuguuchooto eng' Atebweetap Jordan
2Chronicles4:18 Ki yai anyun Solomon tuguuchuuto tugul eng' chaang'indo: amu ma imuuch chii konai nyigiisindap sugunonik.
2Chronicles4:19 Ak ki yai Solomon tuguuk tugul che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles4:20 kiyae thahabu che tiliileen keelyegap taisyek kobooto taisyekwak
2Chronicles4:21 ak kiyae thahabu
2Chronicles4:22 ak magasisyek
2Chronicles5:1 Ki igeskei anyun ko uu nooto poisyet tugul ne ki yai Solomon agobo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki ip Solomon tuguuk che kiga kotabaan Daudi kwandanyi kobwa ko
2Chronicles5:2 Ki iyum anyun `Solomon poisyek che po Israel ak kandoik tugul che po ortinwek
2Chronicles5:3 Ki iyumgei piik tugul che po Israel eng' ole kimi laitoryat eng' igoorto
2Chronicles5:4 Kingo pwa poisyek tugul che po Israel
2Chronicles5:5 ak ki ip icheek moinget
2Chronicles5:6 Ki iyumjigei taitap moinget Laitoryat Solomon ak tuiyet tugul ne po Israel
2Chronicles5:7 Ki ip tisiik anyun moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo ole tebee eng' koot ne po oriit
2Chronicles5:8 Kiga iito kerubisyek kebebaikwak kouur ole mi moinget ak ki tuch kerubisyek moinget ak keetiikyik che ki ibe.
2Chronicles5:9 Kigooen keetichooto miising'
2Chronicles5:10 Ki ma komi kiy moinget oriit kobatee koik aeng' che lebeleen che ki indoi Musa eng' Horeb
2Chronicles5:11 Ak kingo mong' tisiik eng' ole-tiliil
2Chronicles5:12 Kitononso Lawiik tugul ak icheek che kityenik
2Chronicles5:13 Ki iyomogei piik che kuutei iryagook ak tyeniik kibagenge
2Chronicles5:14 kot ko mata komuuch tisiik kotononso kobois amu poldanooto
2Chronicles6:1 Ki ng'alaal anyun Solomon kole
2Chronicles6:2 Kaateegun koot ne imenye
2Chronicles6:3 Kiwelelgei laitoryat ak koberuur tuiyet tugul ne po Israel: ak ki tonon tuiyet tugul ne po Israel.
2Chronicles6:4 Ki le ineendet
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kobooch peetuut ne ki amutu piikyuk eng' emetap Misiri
2Chronicles6:6 Ago ki alewen Jerusalem si kobiit kotebee yooto kainennyu

2Chronicles6:9 Nganda uu nooto

2Chronicles6:12 Ki tonon ineendet eng' taitap kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles6:13 Kiga yai Solomon eng' sugunwet ole kitororit

2Chronicles6:17 Ara anyun
2Chronicles6:18 Ago tos menyei Kamuktaindet ak piik iman eng' ng'wony? Keero
2Chronicles6:19 Ago konyit saaetap otwogindeng'ung' ak soomennyi
2Chronicles6:20 Ingogeer konyeguk kooi peet ak kemoi
2Chronicles6:21 Ak igas soomutigap otwogindeng'ung' ak piiguk Israel
2Chronicles6:22 Ngot koleelji chii chiitap kokwennyi ak kebirchi ineendet koyasyo ak konyo koyasyo eng' taitap kaptisisyeng'ung' eng' kooi
2Chronicles6:23 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet ak iyai. Ye irwooksechi otwogiguk
2Chronicles6:24 “Ngot kebar piiguk Israel eng' taitap puunik
2Chronicles6:25 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet
2Chronicles6:26 Ye kerak kipsengwet ak kobet ropta amu ki koyaun icheek tengekto
2Chronicles6:27 kaigai kas anyun eng' kipsengwet
2Chronicles6:28 “Ngot kobiit rubeet anan ko koroito eng' emet. Ngot kobiit chelalityet
2Chronicles6:29 ko saaet anan ko soomet age tugul ne kasoom chii age tugul
2Chronicles6:30 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet oldang'ung' ole imenye
2Chronicles6:31 si kobiit koiywein ak kobendatee ortinweguk kotee kosaptos eng' emet ne ki igoochi kwanisyekyok.”

2Chronicles6:33 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet eng' oldang'ung' ole imenye

2Chronicles6:35 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet saaennywa ak soomennywa
2Chronicles6:36 “Ngot koyaun tengek
2Chronicles6:37 ago ngot kobwaatkei eng' emet ne ki kimut koek luulenik ak kosik

2Chronicles6:41 “Ara anyun
2Chronicles6:42 Ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet
2Chronicles7:1 Ye kingo kes Solomon saaet
2Chronicles7:2 Ko uu ye kiganyi liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles7:3 Ye kigeerei lagok tugul che po Israel kochoorugei maat ak kotebee liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paragutap koot
2Chronicles7:4 Kogoito anyun laitoryat kobooto piik tugul tiseiywek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Chronicles7:5 Ki igoito Laitoryat Solomon tiseiywek che po eiik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng' ak keechiirek eliphuusyek pogol ak tiptem. Ara ki itabaan anyun laitoryat ak piik tugul kootap Kamuktaindet.
2Chronicles7:6 Kitononso anyun tisiik kobee poisyonikwak; ki yai ko uu nooto Lawiik ak icheek che ki tinyei kibungandinigap tyenwogik che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles7:7 Kogeny ki itiliil Solomon kwenutap seremut ne ki mi taitap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles7:8 Eng' peetuusyechooto kogiyai anyun Solomon igoorto peetuusyek tisap
2Chronicles7:9 Eng' peetuutap sisiit
2Chronicles7:10 Eng' peetuutap tiptem ak somok ne po arawetap tisap ko ki mwachi piik koba emaisyekwak
2Chronicles7:11 Kogees anyun Solomon kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kootap laitoryat. Ak ki yai Solomon eng' aiyebindo tuguuk tugul che ki ibwaat ineendet eng' muguleldanyi
2Chronicles7:12 Kimong'ji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Solomon kemoi ak koleenji ineendet
2Chronicles7:13 Ngot ager kipsengwet si ma robon
2Chronicles7:14 ngot koming'ingei piikyuk che kemwaitoe kainennyu
2Chronicles7:15 Kogeer anyun konyekyuk ak kogas itiikyuk saaet ne ki saaei eng' yuto.
2Chronicles7:16 Amu kaalewen kooi ak atabaan si kobiit kotebee kainennyu olooto koigeny. Ak tebee yuto konyekyuk ak muguleldanyu kotugul.
2Chronicles7:17 Ak ngot iwendote inyee tainnyu ko uu ye kiwendote Daudi kwandang'ung'
2Chronicles7:18 agimiit anyun ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po pounateng'ung'
2Chronicles7:19 Ago ngot omaaste
2Chronicles7:20 atutu anyun icheek eng' emennyu ne ki agoochi; ak awirte kooi eng' tainnyu ne ki atabaanji kainennyu
2Chronicles7:21 Ak kwong'ei age tugul ne siirei yuto
2Chronicles7:22 Yeityo kowol kole
2Chronicles8:1 Kingo kagogeskei kenyiisyek tiptemu
2Chronicles8:2 ki teech Solomon nganasook che kiga kogoochi `Huram ineendet ak kogoochi piigap Israel komeny olooto.
2Chronicles8:3 Ki wo Solomon kobookyi Hamat-seba ak koterteer olooto.
2Chronicles8:4 Ki teech Tadmor eng' surkwen ak nganasook tugul che kigonoree tuguuk eng' Hamath.
2Chronicles8:5 Ki teech kogeny Beth-horon ne po meto ak Beth-horon ne rektoot
2Chronicles8:6 ak Baalat
2Chronicles8:7 Piik tugul che ki ng'et eng' Hitik
2Chronicles8:8 che kiga ng'et eng' emet
2Chronicles8:9 Ago eng' piigap Israel
2Chronicles8:10 Chu ko ki kiptainik che eecheen che po Laitoryat Solomon
2Chronicles8:11 Ki imut `Solomon cheptap Pharaoh kotogos eng' nganaseetap Daudi konyo koot ne kiga koteekyi ineendet: amu ki le
2Chronicles8:12 Ki igoochi anyun `Solomon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles8:13 ko uu ye yamei poisyetap peetuut age tugul
2Chronicles8:14 Ko uu ng'atuutyetap Daudi kwandanyi koging'at riipsosyegap tisiik eng' otisyennywa
2Chronicles8:15 Ki ma meto ng'atuutyetap laitoryat ne ki ng'at Tisiik ak Lawiik agobo ng'olyoot age tugul
2Chronicles8:16 Ara kichobok anyun poisyetap Solomon kobooch peetuut ne ki kilume lumeiywotap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi kogeskei. Ki igeskei anyun poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Chronicles8:17 Yeityo kwo Solomon Esion-geber ak Elot
2Chronicles8:18 Ki iyookyi Huram melisyek ineendet koyooktoe otwogikyik
2Chronicles9:1 Kingo kas laitoryatap Sheba ne ki kwony kalasunetap Solomon
2Chronicles9:2 Ki wolji `Solomon ineendet teebutikyik tugul; ak ki ma komi kiy age tugul ne ki ma nai Solomon anan ne kitemenee kowolji ineendet.
2Chronicles9:3 Kingo kagogeer laitoryandanooto po Sheba utaatyetap Solomon
2Chronicles9:4 amitwogik che mi mesennyi
2Chronicles9:5 Ara ki leenji `kwonyooto laitoryat
2Chronicles9:6 Ago ki ma ayan ng'aleekwak kot kotee anyo ageerchigei eng' konyekyuk. Abeere ki ma kimwaiwo agot kebebertap ooindap utaatyeng'ung'; isiire kalasunoni ki agase.
2Chronicles9:7 Poiboi piiguk! Poiboi otwogichuguk
2Chronicles9:8 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
2Chronicles9:9 Ki igoochi `kwonyooto laitoryat talendaisyek pogol ak tiptem che po thahabu
2Chronicles9:10 Ki ip ak icheek otwogigap Huram ak otwogigap Solomon thahabu eng' Opir
2Chronicles9:11 Kiboisyee laitoryat keetichooto po almug koyae ole kitogostoe eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak eng' kootap laitoryat; kiyae kora ketubosyek ak kibugandinik che po tyeniik. Kitomo kogeerei chii tuguuk che uu chooto eng' emetap Judah.
2Chronicles9:12 Kosupkei ak nooto
2Chronicles9:13 Ki ek nyigiisindap thahabu che ki kiipchi Solomon eng' kenyiit agenge tanisyek eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut
2Chronicles9:14 ama pooto che ki ibu piik che aldooti ak che ki ibu chemung'arainik
2Chronicles9:15 Ki yai Laitoryat Solomon
2Chronicles9:16 Ki yai long'onik che mengeechen pogol somok che po thahabu che ki kitany; ki kiyae long'eet agenge keruutik somok che po thahabu. Kigonoree laitoryat long'onichooto Kootap Osnetap Lebanon.
2Chronicles9:17 Ki yai kogeny laitoryat ng'echereet ne oo ne po laitornatet eng' kelegap peeleek ak koliige thahabu che tiliileen.
2Chronicles9:18 Ki mi lang'eiywot ne tinyei tuguuk lo che kityegoti ketogosyin ng'echereetap laitornatet
2Chronicles9:19 Ki tonondos itoonwek tamanu ak aeng' che po ng'etuunyik eng' komoswek tuwai eng' tuguuchooto lo kityegoti ketogostoi. Ki ma komi age ne kergei ak nooto ne ki kiyai eng' laitornatet age tugul.
2Chronicles9:20 Ki po thahabu tuguuk tugul che kieise Laitoryat Solomon
2Chronicles9:21 Amu ki tinyei laitoryat melisyek che ki pendi Tarsis kobooto otwogigap Huram
2Chronicles9:22 Ki siir anyun Laitoryat Solomon laitorinik tugul che po ng'wony eng' mogornatosyek ak utaatyet.
2Chronicles9:23 Ki cheeng' laitorinik tugul che po ng'wony kogeer Solomon kole kogas utotyennyi
2Chronicles9:24 Ki ip chii tugul kagoochinennyi
2Chronicles9:25 Ki tinyei Solomon kooriik eliphuusyek ang'wan che po paraisisyek ak kariisyek
2Chronicles9:26 Ki pou laitorinik tugul kobooch Aineetap Yufrets agoi emetap Philistiik
2Chronicles9:27 Ki yai laitoryat fedha eng' Jerusalem koigei koik
2Chronicles9:28 Ki kigetyi Solomon paraisisyek eng' Misiri
2Chronicles9:29 Poisyonigap Solomon che kang'et
2Chronicles9:30 Ki laitoran Solomon eng' Jerusalem koboi Israel tugul kenyiisyek artam.
2Chronicles9:31 Ki ru Solomon kobooto kwanisyekyik
2Chronicles10:1 Ki wo Rehoboam Shekem
2Chronicles10:2 Kingo kas Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat agobo nooto
2Chronicles10:3 Ki iyookto keguur ineendet; ak ki nyo Jeroboam kobooto Israel tugul
2Chronicles10:4 “Ki yai kwandang'ung' choginnyo kouiit. Ara anyun
2Chronicles10:5 Ki leenji icheek
2Chronicles10:6 Kong'alaal Laitoryat Rehoboam ak poisyek
2Chronicles10:7 Ki mwachi koleenji
2Chronicles10:8 Ago ki pagaakta ng'aleegap poisyek
2Chronicles10:9 Ki leenji icheek
2Chronicles10:10 Ki wolji neranik che kinerchindos ak ineendet koleenji
2Chronicles10:11 Nguno anyun
2Chronicles10:12 Kobwa anyun Jeroboam ak piik tugul ole mi Rehoboam eng' peetuutap somok
2Chronicles10:13 Ki wolji laitoryat icheek eng' koroomnateet. Ki meto Laitoryat Rehoboam ng'aleegap poisyek
2Chronicles10:14 ak kong'alaalji icheek ko uu ye ki kamwachi neranik
2Chronicles10:15 Ara ki ma kasyi anyun laitoryat pichooto
2Chronicles10:16 Kingo keer Israel tugul kole mata kogasyi laitoryat icheek
2Chronicles10:17 Ago ki laitoran Rehoboam eng' piigap Israel che ki menyei nganasoogap Judah.
2Chronicles10:18 Ki iyookto anyun `Rehoboam Hadoram
2Chronicles10:19 Ara ki ingelelji anyun Israel kootap Daudi agoi ra.

2Chronicles11:2 Ago ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Semaiah chiitap Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles11:3 ng'alaalji Rehoboam weeriitap Solomon
2Chronicles11:4 kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni

2Chronicles11:6 Ki teech Bethlehem

2Chronicles11:9 Adoraim
2Chronicles11:10 Sora
2Chronicles11:11 Ki kimiit irimoik
2Chronicles11:12 Ki inde nganaseet age tugul long'onik ak ng'otwek
2Chronicles11:13 Ki pwanji kotoret ineendet `Tisiik ak `Lawiik che ki mi Israel tugul
2Chronicles11:14 Amu ki pagaakta Lawiik emotinwekwak che kiyagisye ak tuguukwak
2Chronicles11:15 Ki lewenjigei tisiik che po komoswek che torooreen

2Chronicles11:20 Yeityo kotun Maaka cheptap Absalom
2Chronicles11:21 Ki cham Rehoboam Maaka cheptap Absalom kosiir osotikyik tugul ak chebaigeiniyik (amu ki itun osotik taman ak sisiit ak chebaigeinik tamanwogik lo
2Chronicles11:22 Ki inde Rehoboam Abijah weeriitap Maaka koek ne oo
2Chronicles11:23 Ki yai eng' ng'omnateet
2Chronicles12:1 Kingo kagigimit pounatetap Rehoboam ak kogimit agine
2Chronicles12:2 Ak amu kiga kongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko ki togos Sisak laitoryatap Misiri konyo kobar Jerusalem eng' kenyiit ne po muut ne po Laitoryat Rehoboam.
2Chronicles12:3 Ki tinyei ineendet kariisyek eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak piik eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo che ketei paraisisyek. Ki ma ko iitoksei piik che kigabwa kobooto ineendet eng' Misiri: piigap Libya
2Chronicles12:4 Ki nam nganasook che ng'ootaatiin che ki po Judah ak kobwa Jerusalem.
2Chronicles12:5 Ki nyo `maotyot Semaiah kap Reoboam
2Chronicles12:6 Ki iming'ingei anyun pounigap Israel kobooto laitoryat
2Chronicles12:7 Kingo keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kagoming'ingei
2Chronicles12:8 Ago egu icheek otwogikyik
2Chronicles12:9 Ki togos anyun Sisak laitoryatap Misiri kobar Jerusalem
2Chronicles12:10 Ki yai Laitoryat Rehoboam long'onik che po sugunonik kogeere chooto
2Chronicles12:11 Ak eng' peetuut age tugul ne kanyo laitoryat kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles12:12 Kingo ming'ingei
2Chronicles12:13 Ki igimitkei anyun Laitoryat Rehoboam eng' Jerusalem ak kolaitoran. Ki po kenyiisyek artam ak agenge Rehoboam ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Chronicles12:14 Ki yai yaityet
2Chronicles12:15 Ak poisyonigap Rehoboam
2Chronicles12:16 Ki ru Rehoboam kobooto kwanisyekyik ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Daudi. Ak ki laitoran Abijah weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Chronicles13:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Abijah eng' Judah eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po laitornatetap Jeroboam.
2Chronicles13:2 Ki laitoran kenyiisyek somok eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Mikaia cheptap Uriel ne po Gibea. Ki tinyei lugeet Abijah ak Jeroboam eng' kwenunnywa.
2Chronicles13:3 Kitet lugeet Abijah kobooto lugeetap murenik che nyigoonen che po lugeet
2Chronicles13:4 Ki tonon anyun Abijah eng' tulweetap Semaraim ne mi emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim
2Chronicles13:5 Tos manyoljok onai ole ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles13:6 Ago king'eet Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat
2Chronicles13:7 Ki iyumjigei ineendet piik che yaach weeriigap Belial che ki igimitkei kobargei ak Rehoboam weeriitap Solomon
2Chronicles13:8 “Ak nguno oleen omuuchi ogirinde laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi eunegap weeriigap Daudi
2Chronicles13:9 Tos ma oonu tisiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles13:10 Ago Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindennyo acheek
2Chronicles13:11 Peeljin `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei
2Chronicles13:12 Ogeero
2Chronicles13:13 Ago ki chop Jeroboam piik kobwa koribisyo eng' let
2Chronicles13:14 Ak kingo keer piigap Judah let
2Chronicles13:15 ak kowaach anyun piigap Judah. Ak ye kita kowaachei piigap Judah
2Chronicles13:16 Kimwei piigap Israel eng' taitap Judah
2Chronicles13:17 Ki par `Abijah ak piikyik icheek eng' pareet ne oo; kobek anyun piik che ki kilewen eliphuusyek pogol muut.
2Chronicles13:18 Ki kiming'in ko uu nooto piigap Israel eng' peetuusyechooto
2Chronicles13:19 Ki oon `Abijah Jeroboam
2Chronicles13:20 Mata konyoor kimnateet kogeny Jeroboam eng' peetuusyegap Abijah. Ki par `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet.
2Chronicles13:21 Ago kitesak Abijah kogimit. Ki itun osotik taman ak ang'wan
2Chronicles13:22 Ki kisirchi poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Abijah
2Chronicles14:1 Ki ru anyun Abijah kobooto kwanisyekyik
2Chronicles14:2 Ki yai Asa ne myee ak ne po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi.
2Chronicles14:3 Ki isto kapkorosusyek che teer
2Chronicles14:4 Ki ng'at Judah kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles14:5 Ki isto kogeny eng' nganasook tugul che po Judah komoswek che torooreen ak ole kibeeljine kanamonik kagoochinoik; ak ki tinyei kaalyeet laitornatet eng' tainnyi.
2Chronicles14:6 Ki teech nganasook che ng'ootaatiin eng' Judah. Ki mi kaalyeet emet ak ki ma kotinyei lugeet eng' kenyisyechooto
2Chronicles14:7 Ki mwachi piigap Judah koleenji
2Chronicles14:8 Ki tinyei Asa lugeet ne po piik eliphuusyek pogol somok che po Judah che ki tinyei long'onik ak ng'otwek
2Chronicles14:9 Ki nyo kobargei ak icheek `Zerah Ethiopiaindet
2Chronicles14:10 Ki wo anyun Asa kotorookta ineendet ak kitet lugeet eng' atebweetap Sepata ne mi Maresha.
2Chronicles14:11 Ki riirchi `Asa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi
2Chronicles14:12 Kobar anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Ethiopik eng' taitap Asa ak eng' taitap Judah. Kimwei Ethiopik
2Chronicles14:13 ak ki oon Asa ak piik che ki mi tugul agoi Gerar. Ki pek Ethiopik che chaang' ne mata komuuch kosargei; amu ki kibar eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles14:14 Ki par nganasook tugul che ki mi ole neegitee Gerar
2Chronicles14:15 Ki par kogeny kaptugusyek
2Chronicles15:1 Ki nyoonji `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Azariah weeriitap Obed
2Chronicles15:2 ak ki wo kotorookta Asa
2Chronicles15:3 Kiga kotebee Israel egosyek che chaang' ama tinyei Kamuktaindet ne po iman
2Chronicles15:4 Ago kingo weekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles15:5 Ki ma komi kaalyeet eng' peetuusyechooto eng' ineendet ne mandoi anan ko eng' ineendet ne nyoonei ko
2Chronicles15:6 Kibargei
2Chronicles15:7 Ago ogimegitu
2Chronicles15:8 Kingo kas Asa ng'aleechuuto
2Chronicles15:9 Ki iyum `inee Judah tugul ak Benjamin
2Chronicles15:10 Koyumgei anyun eng' Jerusalem eng' kenyiitap taman ak muut eng' arawetap somok ne po laitornatetap Asa.
2Chronicles15:11 Ki eng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywek eng' peetuunooto
2Chronicles15:12 Ki yai arorutyet kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles15:13 ak kole
2Chronicles15:14 Ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komwa eng' kutit ne oo
2Chronicles15:15 Kiboiboitu Judah tugul amu kayasyonooto; amu kigayosyo eng' mugulelwekwak tugul
2Chronicles15:16 Ki isto `Asa kamennyi Maaka agine
2Chronicles15:17 Ago ki ma kiisto komoswek che torooreen eng' Israel. Nganda ki uu nooto ko ki igeesunotkei muguleldap Asa eng' peetuusyekyik tugul.
2Chronicles15:18 Ki ip kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet tuguuk che kigaitabaan kwandanyi kobooto che kiga kotabaan ineendet: fedha
2Chronicles15:19 Ki mata kobiit lugeet kogeny agoi kenyiitap sosom ak muut ne po laitornatetap Asa.
2Chronicles16:1 Eng' kenyiitap sosom ak lo ne po laitornatetap Asa
2Chronicles16:2 Ki inem anyun `Asa fedha ak thahabu eng' ole kigonoree tuguugap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kootap laitoryat
2Chronicles16:3 “Miitei kasyinet kwenunnyo

2Chronicles17:1 Ki laitoran weeriinnyi Jehoshaphat kogeer ineendet ak kogimitkei kobargei ak Israel.
2Chronicles17:2 Ki inde lugoosyek nganasook tugul che ng'ootaatiin che po Judah
2Chronicles17:3 Ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Jehoshaphat amu kiwendote ortinwek che po tai che po kwandanyi Daudi. Ki ma cheeng' `ineendet Baalik
2Chronicles17:4 ago ki cheeng' Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap kwandanyi ak kowendote ng'atuutikyik
2Chronicles17:5 Ki igimit anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatet eng' eunnyi. Ki ipchi piik tugul che po `Judah Jehoshaphat kagoochinoik
2Chronicles17:6 Ki itoroorok muguleldanyi eng' ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles17:7 Eng' kenyiitap somok ne po laitornatennyi
2Chronicles17:8 Ki mi kobooto icheek Lawiik
2Chronicles17:9 Ki ineetisyot eng' Judah
2Chronicles17:10 Ki ibutyi `kamuisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatosyek tugul che po emotinwek che ki mi tabanwegap Judah
2Chronicles17:11 Ki ipchi Philistiik alak Jehoshaphat kagoochinoik ak fedha koek aisuruut
2Chronicles17:12 Kitesak Jehoshaphat koeet miising'. Ki teech irimoik ak nganasook che kigonoree tuguuk eng' Judah.
2Chronicles17:13 Ki tinyei poisyonik che chaang' eng' nganasoogap Judah; kobooto piigap lugeet
2Chronicles17:14 Chu kaitosyekwak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak: che po kap Judah
2Chronicles17:15 Ne kirubei ineendet ko ki Jeohanan ne ki kiptaiyat
2Chronicles17:16 kirubei ineendet Amasia weeriitap Zikri
2Chronicles17:17 Eng' che po kap Benjamin ko ki Eliada ne kiim ak ko nyigan
2Chronicles17:18 ak kirubei ineendet Jeosabad ne ki tinyei piik eliphuusyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit che ki chobootiin koyai lugeet.
2Chronicles17:19 Chuuto ko che kiboisyechin laitoryat
2Chronicles18:1 Ki tinyei Jehoshaphat mogornatosyek eng' chaang'indo ak teegisto ak kigaangei ak Ahab.

2Chronicles18:30 Kiga ng'at `laitoryatap Syria kiptainigap kariisyekyik

2Chronicles18:34 Kitesak lugeet peetuunooto

2Chronicles20:2 Ki pwa piik alak komwachi Jehoshaphat
2Chronicles20:3 Ki iyweis anyun Jehoshaphat
2Chronicles20:4 Ki iyumgei Judah tugul kocheeng' toreteet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki pwa eng' nganasook tugul che po Judah kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
