2Chronicles20:15 Ki le ineendet
2Chronicles20:16 Orektee mutai obargei ak icheek. Togosu icheek eng' tegeiyetap Sis; ak onyoorchini ye igeesunegei atebweet
2Chronicles20:17 Ma okweek che oyae lugoni. Otetkei
2Chronicles20:18 Ki ing'uruuk anyun Jehoshaphat kot kotiiny togeet ng'wony
2Chronicles20:19 Kitononso Lawiik
2Chronicles20:20 Ki ng'eetyo karon miising'
2Chronicles20:21 Kingo kagong'alaal ak piik
2Chronicles20:22 Kingo toi kotyenso ak kolasu
2Chronicles20:23 Amu kitononso lagogap Ammon ak Moab kobargei ak che ki menyei tulweetap Seir
2Chronicles20:24 Kingo it piigap Judah teekseet ne kooi ne kiriipse eng' surkwen
2Chronicles20:25 Kingo nyo Jehoshaphat kobooto piikyik konam tuguuk
2Chronicles20:26 Ki iyumjigei atebweetap Beraka eng' peetuutap ang'wan; amu eng' olooto ko ki ilas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki kiguure anyun kainetap yooto Atebweetap Beraka
2Chronicles20:27 Ki week tugul che po Judah ak Jerusalem
2Chronicles20:28 Ki pwa Jerusalem kobutonu kibugandinik ak ketubosyek
2Chronicles20:29 Ki nam kaiyweisyet ne iywei Kamuktaindet laitornatosyek tugul che po emotinwek
2Chronicles20:30 Ki imuuny anyun pounatetap Jehoshaphat
2Chronicles20:31 Ara ki laitoran Jehoshaphat eng' Judah. Ki po kenyiisyek sosom ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Chronicles20:32 Kiwendote ortinwegap kwandanyi Asa ak ma masta kometo
2Chronicles20:33 Ago ma ki isto komoswek che torooreen; ki tomo kogiil piik mugulelwekwak kotokyi Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak.
2Chronicles20:34 Ki kisirchi poisyonigap Jehoshaphat che ng'etunotiin
2Chronicles20:35 Kingo pata niito konamgei Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah ak Ahasia laitoryatap Israel
2Chronicles20:36 Ki namgei ak ineendet si kobiit koteech melisyek koba Tarsis; ak ki teech melisyechooto eng' Esion-geber.
2Chronicles20:37 Ki maoten Elieser weeriitap Dodabahu ne po Maresha agobo Jehoshaphat
2Chronicles21:1 Ki ru Jehoshaphat ak kwanisyekyik ak ki kitupchi ole ki kitupchi kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ki laitoran anyun Jehoram weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Chronicles21:2 Ki tinyei ineendet weeriik alak che tupcho
2Chronicles21:3 Ki igoochi `kwandanywa icheek kagoochinoik che eecheen
2Chronicles21:4 Kingo kagonam Jehoram pounatetap kwandanyi ak kogimitkei
2Chronicles21:5 Ki po Jehoram kenyiisyek sosom ak aeng' ye ki tau kolaitorani ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek sisiit eng' Jerusalem.
2Chronicles21:6 Kiwendote ortinwegap laitorinigap Israel
2Chronicles21:7 Agot nganda ki uu nooto koma cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'em kootap Daudi amu kayomiset ne kiga koyomisyi Daudi
2Chronicles21:8 Ki ingelelji `Edomik pounatetap Judah eng' peetuusyekyik ak ki ieetyigei laitoryat ne pou icheek.
2Chronicles21:9 Ki wo anyun Jehoram kolanda kobooto kiptainikyik kotinyei kariisyekyik tugul. Ki ng'eet kemoi ak kobookyi Edomik che kigayiem ineendet kobooto kiptainigap kariisyek.
2Chronicles21:10 Ki ingelel anyun Edomik kobagaakta pounatetap Judah agoi rani. Ki ingelel agine Libna eng' peetuusyechooto
2Chronicles21:11 Ma nooto kityo
2Chronicles21:12 Ki nyoonji ineendet parweet ne ki punu maotyot Elijah
2Chronicles21:13 ago ki iwendote ortinwegap laitorinigap Israel
2Chronicles21:14 ara anyun
2Chronicles21:15 Inyooru myando ne oo eng' moet
2Chronicles21:16 Ki ing'eet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nereeknatetap Philistik ak ne po Arabuuk che menyei ole neegitee Ethiopik kobargei ak Jehoram.
2Chronicles21:17 Ki togos icheek kobookyi Judah
2Chronicles21:18 Kingo pata chuuto tugul
2Chronicles21:19 Kingo pata kenyiisyek aeng'u komong' agutanikyik amu myandanyi
2Chronicles21:20 Ki po kenyiisyek sosom ak aeng' ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Chronicles22:1 Ki inde piik che ki menyei Jerusalem Ahasia weeriinnyi ne ming'in koek laitoryat kogeer ineendet: amu ki par kweanet ne kigabwa nganaseet kobooto Arabuuk
2Chronicles22:2 Ki po kenyiisyek artam ak aeng' Ahasia ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiit agenge eng' Jerusalem. Kainetap kamennyi ko ki Athaliah cheptap Omri.
2Chronicles22:3 Kiwendote agine ortinwegap kootap Ahab
2Chronicles22:4 Ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles22:5 Ki isup kaneetisyennywa
2Chronicles22:6 Ki week konyo kinya eng' Jezreel
2Chronicles22:7 Ki punu Kamuktaindet ng'emisyetap Ahasia
2Chronicles22:8 Ye kita korwookyin Jehu kootap Ahab
2Chronicles22:9 Ki cheeng' Ahasia
2Chronicles22:10 Kingo keer Athaliah kametap Ahasia kole ki kome weeriinnyi
2Chronicles22:11 Ago ki imut komweito Jehoshabeat
2Chronicles22:12 Ki tebi kobooto icheek ko ung'aat eng' kootap Kamuktaindet kenyiisyek lo
2Chronicles23:1 Ki nyoor nyiganateet Jehoiada eng' kenyiitap tisap
2Chronicles23:2 Kibendat icheek koyom Judah komugul
2Chronicles23:3 Ak ki iyomiskei ak laitoryat tuiyet komugul eng' kootap Kamuktaindet. Ak ki leenji
2Chronicles23:4 Ni kiit ne oyae: egu riibiigap kurgotik kebeberta agenge eng' somok eng' okweek
2Chronicles23:5 kotebee kebeberta agenge eng' somok kootap laitoryat; kotebee kebeberta agenge eng' somok kurgeetap lumeiywot: ak ingotebee piik tugul seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Chronicles23:6 Ago amochamji chii konyo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles23:7 Si koyiem Lawiik laitoryat
2Chronicles23:8 Koyai anyun Lawiik ak Judah tugul kiit ne kang'at icheek Jehoiada tisiindet: komut chii tugul piikyik
2Chronicles23:9 Ak ki igoochi Jehoiada tisiindet kiptainigap pogolwogik ng'otwek
2Chronicles23:10 Ak kitet piik tugul
2Chronicles23:11 Komong' anyun weeriitap laitoryat
2Chronicles23:12 Ak kingo kas Athaliah polatetap piik che rwaoti ak kolasu laitoryat
2Chronicles23:13 Ak ki keerot
2Chronicles23:14 Komut anyun Jehoiada tisiindet kiptainigap pogolwogik
2Chronicles23:15 Koistochigei anyun icheek ineendet; ak ki wo ye kichutei ormariichetap paraisiit ne po kootap laitoryat; ak ki parchi yooto.
2Chronicles23:16 Koyomiskei anyun Jehoiada ak piik tugul
2Chronicles23:17 Ak ki pa piik tugul kootap Baal
2Chronicles23:18 Ak ki ng'at Jehoiada poisyonigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koboi tisiik
2Chronicles23:19 Ak ki inde riibiik kurgotigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles23:20 Ak ki nam kiptainigap pogolwogik
2Chronicles23:21 Koboiboitu anyun piik tugul che po emet
2Chronicles24:1 Ki po Joash kenyiisyek tisap ye ki tau kolaitorani; ki laitoran kenyiisyek artam eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Sibia
2Chronicles24:2 Ki yai Joash ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Jehoiada tisiindet.
2Chronicles24:3 Ak ki itunji Jehoiada ineendet osotik aeng'
2Chronicles24:4 Kingo pata chooto komach Joash koteech kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole kiga kobutok.
2Chronicles24:5 Ki iyum Tisiik ak Lawiik ak koleenji
2Chronicles24:6 Koguur anyun `laitoryat tisiindet ne oo Jehoiada
2Chronicles24:7 Amu ki kobut weeriigap Athaliah
2Chronicles24:8 Kong'at anyun laitoryat
2Chronicles24:9 Ki kimwaita eng' Judah ak Jerusalem keipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor aisuruut ne ki ng'at Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet eng' surkwen agobo Israel.
2Chronicles24:10 Kiboiboitu pounik tugul ak piik tugul
2Chronicles24:11 Ak kingo kagoip Lawiik moinget konyo kootap laitoryat
2Chronicles24:12 Ki igoochi `laitoryat ak `Jehoiada fedhaisyechooto piik che kitononjin poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki sir `icheek musogigap koik ak che po pagoinik si koteech kogeny kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles24:13 Kobois anyun kiboitiinik
2Chronicles24:14 Kingo kagogees
2Chronicles24:15 Ago ki oosit Jehoiada ko uu ye kiga kochang'a peetuusyekyik
2Chronicles24:16 Ak ki kitupchi ineendet nganaseetap Daudi kobooto laitorinik
2Chronicles24:17 Kingo kagome Jehoiada kobwa pounigap Judah ak kogutung'ji laitoryat. Kogasyi anyun laitoryat ng'aleekwak.
2Chronicles24:18 Kometo anyun kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles24:19 Agos ki iyookyi icheek maotik kole komut icheek koweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kibaoryan kogirinda icheek
2Chronicles24:20 Ki nyoonji `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zekariah weeriitap Jehoiada tisiindet; ki tonon eng' ole toroor ak koleenji piik
2Chronicles24:21 Ago kichaam ineendet ak kolage koik eng' ng'atuutyetap laitoryat eng' seremutap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Chronicles24:22 Nooto anyun
2Chronicles24:23 Ak kingo keskei kenyiit
2Chronicles24:24 Nganda ki nyo lugeetap piigap Syria komut kweanet ne ming'in
2Chronicles24:25 Ye kingo pa icheek
2Chronicles24:26 Ak chu ko icheek che kichaam ineendet: Sabad weeriitap Simeat Jebamonindet
2Chronicles24:27 Ogeero
2Chronicles25:1 Ki po Amasia kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem ak sogool eng' Jerusalem. Kainetap kamennyi ko ki Jehoadan ne po Jerusalem.
2Chronicles25:2 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles25:3 Kingo kagogimiit laitornatennyi
2Chronicles25:4 Ago ma par lagokwak
2Chronicles25:5 Kogeny
2Chronicles25:6 Ki sir kogeny piik eliphuusyek pogol che kiimeen ak ko nyigoonen eng' Israel eng' talendaisyek pogol che po fedha.
2Chronicles25:7 Ago ki nyo chiitap Kamuktaindet ole mi
2Chronicles25:8 Ago ngot imache iwe
2Chronicles25:9 Ak ki leenji `Amasia chiitap Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles25:10 Koweekta anyun Amasia icheek
2Chronicles25:11 Konyiganit anyun Amasia
2Chronicles25:12 Ak kiluul `lagogap Judah piik alak eliphuusyek taman
2Chronicles25:13 Ago ki par piigap lugeet che kiweektoi Amasia kole amaba tugul lugeet
2Chronicles25:14 Ak kingo punu Amasia pareetap Edomik
2Chronicles25:15 Kolalyo anyun nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Amasia
2Chronicles25:16 Ak ye kita kong'alaaldos ak ineendet
2Chronicles25:17 Korwooch anyun Amasia laitoryatap Judah
2Chronicles25:18 Ak ki iyookyi Joash laitoryatap Israel piik Amasia laitoryatap Judah
2Chronicles25:19 Imwae ile
2Chronicles25:20 Ago ma cham Amasia kogas; amu ki punu Kamuktaindet kioto
2Chronicles25:21 Ki togosta anyun Joash laitoryatap Israel; ak kigeergei ineendet ak Amasia laitoryatap Judah togoch eng' Beth-shemesh
2Chronicles25:22 Ak ki kiterteer Judah eng' taitap Israel; ak ki mwei chii tugul kwo emainnyi.
2Chronicles25:23 Ak ki imut Joash laitoryatap Israel Amasia laitoryatap Judah weeriitap Joash weeriitap Jehoahas
2Chronicles25:24 Ak ki ip thahabu tugul ak fedha
2Chronicles25:25 Ak kita kosap Amasia weeriitap Joash laitoryatap Judah kenyiisyek taman ak muut kingo pata meetap Joash weeriitap Jehoahas laitoryatap Israel.
2Chronicles25:26 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Amasia
2Chronicles25:27 Kichaam `piik Amasia eng' Jerusalem
2Chronicles25:28 Ak kilaune ineendet paraisisyek
2Chronicles26:1 Yeityo konam piik tugul che po Judah Uzziah ne ki po kenyiisyek taman ak lo
2Chronicles26:2 Ki teech Elot ak koweekyi Judah
2Chronicles26:3 Ki po Uzziah kenyiisyek taman ak lo ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek konom ak aeng' eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Jekilia ne po Jerusalem.
2Chronicles26:4 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles26:5 Ki igiil muguleldanyi kocheeng' Kamuktaindet eng' peetuusyegap Zekariah
2Chronicles26:6 Ki wo anyun kobargei ak Philistiik
2Chronicles26:7 Kitoret `Kamuktaindet ineendet kobargei ak Philistiik
2Chronicles26:8 Ki igoochi Amonik Uzziah kagoochinoik
2Chronicles26:9 Kogeny
2Chronicles26:10 Ak ki teech teeksosyek che kooen eng' surkwen
2Chronicles26:11 Ki tinyei kogeny Uzziah lugeet ne po piigap pooryeet
2Chronicles26:12 Koitet komugul ne po kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek
2Chronicles26:13 Ki mi eunekwak kiplugotinik che ineetatin eliphuusyek pogol somok ak tisap ak pogol muut
2Chronicles26:14 Kichopchi Uzziah lugeet tugul
2Chronicles26:15 Ak ki yai injinisyek eng' Jerusalem
2Chronicles26:16 Ago ye kingo kagogimiit
2Chronicles26:17 Ki wo Azariah tisiindet koosup ineendet
2Chronicles26:18 Ki kirinda Uzziah laitoryat ak koleenji
2Chronicles26:19 Ki nereech anyun Uzziah. Ki tinyei ineendet tereet eng' eunnyi ne kibeelee nyamdutik; ak ye kinereekyin tisiik
2Chronicles26:20 Ye ki keer Azariah tisiindet ne oo
2Chronicles26:21 Ki am mogondosaik Uzziah laitoryat agoi peetuutap meennyi
2Chronicles26:22 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Uzziah
2Chronicles26:23 Koru anyun Uzziah ak kwanisyekyik; ak ki kitup ineendet ak kwanisyekyik
2Chronicles27:1 Ki po Jotham kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak lo eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamennyi Jerusha cheptap Zadok.
2Chronicles27:2 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles27:3 Ki teech kurgeet ne po meto eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles27:4 Ki teech kogeny nganasook eng' emetap tuloonook che po Judah
2Chronicles27:5 Kibargei Jotham ak laitoryatap `lagogap Ammon
2Chronicles27:6 Ki kimiit anyun Jotham amu ki chop ortinwekyik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi.
2Chronicles27:7 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jotham
2Chronicles27:8 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani
2Chronicles27:9 Ki ru Jotham ak kwanisyekyik ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Daudi. Ak ki laitoran Ahaz weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet.
2Chronicles28:1 Ki po Ahaz kenyiisyek tiptem ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak lo eng' Jerusalem. Ki ma yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles28:2 Ago kiwendote ortinwegap laitorinigap Israel
2Chronicles28:3 Ki peel kogeny nyamdutik eng' atebweetap weeriitap Hinom ak kobeel lagokyik eng' maat
2Chronicles28:4 Ak kieny tiseiywek ak kobeel nyamdutik eng' komoswek che torooreen
2Chronicles28:5 Ki inde Ahaz anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi eutap laitoryatap Syria
2Chronicles28:6 Ki par Pekah weeriitap Remaliah piik eng' Judah eliphuusyek pogol agenge ak tiptem eng' peetuut agenge
2Chronicles28:7 Ak ki par Zikri
2Chronicles28:8 Kiluul piigap Israel tupchosyekwak eliphuusyek pogol aeng'
2Chronicles28:9 Ago kimi maotyotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor olooto
2Chronicles28:10 Ak nguno omache oyai lagogap Judah ak Jerusalem che murenik ak che kwonyiik koek otwogikwok. Ago motinye okweek kachiliilutik che ki ochiliilji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'?
2Chronicles28:11 Ogasa anyun
2Chronicles28:12 Yeityo kotononso alak eng' kandoigap lagogap Ephraim
2Chronicles28:13 ak koleenji icheek
2Chronicles28:14 Ara ki pagaakta anyun murenigap luuget luulenik ak parunenik eng' taitap pounik ak tuiyet tugul.
2Chronicles28:15 Ki ng'eetyo anyun piik che ki kimwa kainaikwak ak komut luulenik
2Chronicles28:16 Ki iyookto eng' peetuusyechooto `Laitoryat Ahaz piik koba kaplaitorinigap Assyria kotoret ineendet.
2Chronicles28:17 Amu kigabwa kogeny Edomik kobookyi ak koterteer Judah
2Chronicles28:18 Kiga kobookyi ak icheek Philistiik nganasook che po atebweet
2Chronicles28:19 Amu ki iming'in `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Judah agobo Ahaz laitoryatap Israel
2Chronicles28:20 Ak ki nyoonji ineendet `Tilgath-pilneser laitoryatap Assyria
2Chronicles28:21 Ki inem Ahaz kebeberta ne ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles28:22 Ak kites kosiir kongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyegap nyalildanyi
2Chronicles28:23 Amu kieng'ji tiseiywek kamuktaigap Damasko
2Chronicles28:24 Ki iyum Ahaz tereenigap kootap Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles28:25 Ak ki yai komoswek che torooreen eng' nganaseet age tugul ne po Judah
2Chronicles28:26 Ak poisyonikyik che ng'etunotiin
2Chronicles28:27 Ak ki ru Ahaz kobooto kwanisyekyik
2Chronicles29:1 Ki tau Hezekiah kolaitorani ko po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem ak sogool eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamennyi Abijah cheptap Zekariah.
2Chronicles29:2 Ak ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles29:3 Ki yaat kurgotigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles29:4 Ki imut Tisiik ak Lawiik kobwa ko
2Chronicles29:5 ak koleenji
2Chronicles29:6 Amu ki kochiliil kwanisyekyok ak koyai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo
2Chronicles29:7 Kigoger kurgotigap keterut
2Chronicles29:8 Ki nyoonji anyun nereegegap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Judah ak Jerusalem
2Chronicles29:9 Kigebar kwanisyekyok eng' rotoogap chok
2Chronicles29:10 Ara anyun
2Chronicles29:11 Weeriikyuk
2Chronicles29:12 Ki ng'eetyo anyun Lawiik
2Chronicles29:13 ak eng' weeriigap Elizaphan
2Chronicles29:14 ak eng' weeriigap Herman
2Chronicles29:15 Ki iyum tupchosyekwak ak koanyinygei
2Chronicles29:16 Ki pa tisiik komosta ne po oriit miising' eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles29:17 Ki toi anyun koanyinyis eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawet ne po tai
2Chronicles29:18 Ki pa anyun ole mi Hezekiah laitoryat eng' ko ak koleenji
2Chronicles29:19 Kogechop ak ki anyiny tuguuk tugul che kiga wiirta Laitoryat Ahaz eng' laitornatennyi ye kiga kobistoe; keero
2Chronicles29:20 Ki ng'eet anyun Hezekiah laitoryat karon inne ak koyum pounigap nganaseet ak kotogosta kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Chronicles29:21 Kiget kiruugik tisap
2Chronicles29:22 Ki eeny anyun kiruugik
2Chronicles29:23 Kiget kwesigap kagoochinetap tengekto koriik taitap laitoryat ak tuiyet; ak ki igonoor eunekwak paragunnywa.
2Chronicles29:24 Ki eeny anyun tisiik ak ki igoito korotiikwak eng' kaptisisyet koek kagoochinetap tengekto
2Chronicles29:25 Ki inde Lawiik kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles29:26 Ara kitononso Lawiik kotinyei kibugandinigap Daudi
2Chronicles29:27 Ki ng'at Hezekiah kigoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' kaptisisyet. Ak ki ngetoi kigoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei
2Chronicles29:28 Ki ing'uruukso tuiyet tugul
2Chronicles29:29 Kingo kagogees kagoitoet tugul
2Chronicles29:30 Ki ng'at kogeny `Laitoryat Hezekiah ak `pounik
2Chronicles29:31 Yeityo kowol Hezekiah kole
2Chronicles29:32 Ak ki ek koitetap kagoochinoik che kibeelei che kiget tuiyet
2Chronicles29:33 Ki ek tuguuk che ki kitabaan eiik pogol lo ak keechiirek eliphuusyek somok.
2Chronicles29:34 Ago king'ering' tisiik kot koma imuuch koeny kagoochinoik tugul che kibeelei; kotoret anyun Lawiik tupchosyekwak
2Chronicles29:35 Ak ki chaang' kogeny kagoochinoik che kibeelei
2Chronicles29:36 Ak ki paibait Hezekiah
2Chronicles30:1 Ki iyookto anyun Hezekiah keguur Israel tugul ak Judah
2Chronicles30:2 Amu kiga komwa laitoryat kobooto pounik ak tuiyet tugul eng' Jerusalem
2Chronicles30:3 Ki ma imuuch koyai eng' peetuusyechooto
2Chronicles30:4 Ak ki myeiit kioto eng' taitap laitoryat ak tuiyet tugul.
2Chronicles30:5 Kogimit anyun ng'atuutyet kole kemwaita eng' Israel tugul
2Chronicles30:6 Ki ip anyun piik che kiga kiyookto
2Chronicles30:7 Amoigei kwanisyekwok ak tupchosyekwok
2Chronicles30:8 Amoegu anyun che uui kaat
2Chronicles30:9 Amu ngo weekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles30:10 Ki pun anyun piik che kiga kiyookto nganaseet age tugul eng' emetap Ephraim ak Manasseh
2Chronicles30:11 Agos ki iming'ingei alak che po Asher
2Chronicles30:12 Ki mi kogeny eutap Kamuktaindet Judah si kogoochi icheek muguleldo agenge koyai ng'atuutyetap laitoryat ak pounik eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Chronicles30:13 Ki iyumjigei Jerusalem tuiyet ne ki oo kot si koriip igoortap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' arawetap aeng'.
2Chronicles30:14 Kong'eetyo anyun ak koisto kaptisisyosyek che ki mi Jerusalem
2Chronicles30:15 Ki eeny anyun aarwetap paska eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan eng' arawetap aeng'. Ki ililanso Tisiik ak Lawiik
2Chronicles30:16 Ak ki tononso eng' komostanywa ko uu ye kiga king'at
2Chronicles30:17 Amu kimi che chaang' eng' tuiyet che kitom koanyinygei; ko uu nooto anyun ko ki poisyetap Lawiik koeng'ji paska chiito age tugul ne ki ma ko tiliil
2Chronicles30:18 Amu kitom koanyinygei che chaang' eng' pichooto
2Chronicles30:19 ne chobei muguleldanyi kocheeng' Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles30:20 Ki kasyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hezekiah ak kosoop piik.
2Chronicles30:21 Ak ki riip piigap Israel che ki mi Jerusalem igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek peetuusyek tisap eng' kagasetapkei ne oo; ak ki ilas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Lawiik ak tisiik peetuut age tugul
2Chronicles30:22 Kicheer anyun `Hezekiah Lawiik tugul che ki ineetatin eng' otisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Koamis anyun eng' igoorto tugul eng' peetuusyek tisap
2Chronicles30:23 Ki chamyechi anyun tuiyet komugul kole kota koriip igoorto peetuusyek alak tisap; ak ki riip peetuusyek alak tisap eng' kagasetapkei.
2Chronicles30:24 Amu ki igoochi `Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah tuiyet kiruugik eliphuut ak keechiirek eliphuusyek tisap koek kagoochinoik; ak ki igoochi pounik tuiyet kiruugik eliphuut ak keechiirek eliphuusyek taman. Ki ianyinygei anyun tisiik eng' chaang'indo.
2Chronicles30:25 Kiboiboitu tuiyet komugul ne po Judah
2Chronicles30:26 Ki piit poiboiyet ne oo anyun eng' Jerusalem
2Chronicles30:27 Ki ng'eetyo anyun Tisiik ak Lawiik ak koberuur piik; ak ki kigas kutinnywa
2Chronicles31:1 Kingo kagogeskei chuuto tugul
2Chronicles31:2 Kipchei Hezekiah riipsosyegap Tisiik ak Lawiik kobee riipsosyekwak
2Chronicles31:3 Ki ng'at laitoryat agine kebeberta ne po tuguukyik koek kagoochinoik che kibeelei
2Chronicles31:4 Ki ng'at kogeny piik che ki menyei Jerusalem kogoito kebeberta ne punjin Tisiik ak Lawiik
2Chronicles31:5 Ak kingo kasak ng'atuutyet eng' emet
2Chronicles31:6 Ak ki ip ak icheek piigap Israel ak Judah che ki menyei nganasoogap Judah
2Chronicles31:7 Ki toi koyumat eng' arawetap somok
2Chronicles31:8 Kingo nyo Hezekiah ak pounik ak kogeer kayumanik
2Chronicles31:9 Ki teebee anyun `Hezekiah Tisiik ak Lawiik agobo kayumanichooto.
2Chronicles31:10 Ki wolji Azariah tisiindet ne oo ne po kootap Zadok koleenji
2Chronicles31:11 Ki ng'at anyun Hezekiah kechop kooriik che mengeechen eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki chop.
2Chronicles31:12 Koip anyun kobwa ko eng' kayaneet
2Chronicles31:13 Ak Jehiel
2Chronicles31:14 Ki pou Kore weeriitap Imnah Lawindet
2Chronicles31:15 Kirubei ineendet Eden
2Chronicles31:16 koma pooto icheek che ki kiit kobee tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto che po murenik
2Chronicles31:17 Ki kiyai koitet ne po tisiik ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak; chooto po Lawiik che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak che siirei ko uu poisyennywa
2Chronicles31:18 Ki kiit tisiik kobooto lagokwak che mengeechen
2Chronicles31:19 Ak uu nooto agine eng' weeriigap Aron
2Chronicles31:20 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto Hezekiah eng' Judah komugul; ki yai ne myee ak ne litit ak ne po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi.
2Chronicles31:21 Ak eng' poisyet age tugul ne ki toi koyai eng' otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles32:1 Kingo pata tuguuchooto tugul ki yai Hezekiah eng' iman
2Chronicles32:2 Kingo keer Hezekiah kole kagonyo Sennacherib
2Chronicles32:3 kong'alaaljiin ak pounikyik ak kiplugotinik che kiimeen agobo si koger peek eng' kondametusyek che ki mi saang'utap nganaseet; ak kitoret pichooto ineendet.
2Chronicles32:4 Koyumgei anyun piik che chaang'
2Chronicles32:5 Kibegeechi koteech irimeet tugul ne kiga kobutok ak ki teech teeksosyek che kooen eng' paragunnyi. Ki teech irimeet age ne tobonu saang'eng' ni Kai ak kogiimit Milo eng' nganaseetap Daudi
2Chronicles32:6 Ki inde kiptainigap lugeet koboi piik
2Chronicles32:7 “Ogimegitu ak onyiganitu. Amoiyweisye anan otoptobense amu laitoryatap Assyria ak tuiyet tugul ne mi kobooto ineendet; amu mi ne oo kobootech kosiir ne mi ak ineendet.
2Chronicles32:8 Mi kobooto ineendet kityo euut ne po poorto; ago mi kobootech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo
2Chronicles32:9 Kingo pata niito
2Chronicles32:10 “Kamwa ko uu ni Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria kole: Omang'u nee
2Chronicles32:11 Ye mwaei Hezekiah kole
2Chronicles32:12 Tos ma Hezekiah niito ne ki isto komoswek che torooreen ak kapkorosusyekyik
2Chronicles32:13 Tos mongen kiit ne ki kiyachi anee ak kwanisyekyuk pororyosyek tugul che po emotinwek? Tos ki imuuchi kamuktaigap pororyosyek che po emotinwek kosar emennywa eng' oor age tugul eng' eunnyu?
2Chronicles32:14 Ng'oo eng' kamuktaik tugul che po pororyosyechooto che ki par kwanisyekyuk kogees ne ki imuuch kosar piikyik eng' eunnyu
2Chronicles32:15 Nooto anyun among' koberberak Hezekiah anan kogaigaak eng' oor ne uu ni. Matoyan ineendet amu ma mi kamuktain ne po poror age tugul
2Chronicles32:16 Ki tes otwogikyik kong'alaal che yaach agobo Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ak otwogindennyi Hezekiah.
2Chronicles32:17 Ki sir kogeny paronok kole kochurachur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles32:18 Kiwaage pichooto piigap Jerusalem che ki mi irimeet parak eng' waagaat ne oo
2Chronicles32:19 Ki ng'alaal agobo Kamuktaindetap Jerusalem koyanie kanamonigap piik che po ng'wony
2Chronicles32:20 Ki sa Laitoryat Hezekiah ak maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos koriirchi kipsengwet agobo niito.
2Chronicles32:21 Ak ki iyookto `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor malaikaiyat ne ki par murenik tugul che kiimeen che nyigoonen ak kandoik ak kiptainik eng' nganaseet ne po laitoryatap Assyria. Ki week anyun ineendet eng' kalilanet kwo emennyi. Kingo it kootap kanamwennyi
2Chronicles32:22 Ki sar anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hezekiah ak piik che ki menyei Jerusalem
2Chronicles32:23 Ki ipchi piik che chaang' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik kobwa Jerusalem
2Chronicles32:24 Kimyan Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto ak ki neegit kome. Ki sa `ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles32:25 Ago ma yai Hezekiah ko uu ye kiga kiyachi ne myee; amu kiimeen. Ki nyoonji anyun nereeknateet ineendet ak Judah ak Jerusalem.
2Chronicles32:26 Ago ki iming'ingei Hezekiah kometo menoteetap muguleldanyi
2Chronicles32:27 Ki tinyei Hezekiah mogornatosyek che chaang' miising' ak teegisto; ak kichopchigei ole kigonoree fedha
2Chronicles32:28 chogenik che po peek che karuryo
2Chronicles32:29 Kichopchigei nganasook
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekiah niito ne ki imaas peegap kondametut ne mi meto eng' Gihon
2Chronicles32:31 Ago eng' ng'aleegap piik che ki iyook pounigap Babilon
2Chronicles32:32 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Hezekiah
2Chronicles32:33 Ki ru Hezekiah kobooto kwanisyekyik
2Chronicles33:1 Ki po Manasseh kenyiisyek taman ak aeng' ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek konom ak muut eng' Jerusalem.
2Chronicles33:2 Ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles33:3 Ki teech komoswek che torooreen che kiga kobut kwandanyi Hezekiah
2Chronicles33:4 Ki teech kapkorosusyek eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles33:5 Ak kiteekyi kapkorosusyek tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet
2Chronicles33:6 Ak ki igoito kogeny lagokyik kobun maat eng' atebweetap weeriitap Hinom: ak king'orso ak ki isogis
2Chronicles33:7 Ak ki inde kiit ne ki kiwai ne po kanamwet ne ki yai ineendet
2Chronicles33:8 amaistoi kogeny keldap Israel eng' emet ne ki aaroorchi kwanisyekwak: ngot koriip koyai tugul che ki ang'at icheek eng' Musa
2Chronicles33:9 Ak ki igoochi anyun Manasseh Judah ak piik che ki menyei Jerusalem
2Chronicles33:10 Ak ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Manasseh ak piikyik; ago ki ma mage kiy.
2Chronicles33:11 Komutyi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kiptainigap lugeet ne po laitoryatap Assyria che ki imut Manasseh ko rataat eng' nyororosyek ak mugurek
2Chronicles33:12 Ak kingo mi eng' nyalilda kosa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi
2Chronicles33:13 Ak ki sa
2Chronicles33:14 Kingo pata niito koteech irimeet ne po saang' ne po nganaseetap Daudi eng' komostap cherongo ne po Gihon
2Chronicles33:15 Ak ki isto kanamonik che too ak kanamwet ne ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kapkorosusyek tugul che kiga koteech eng' tulweetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles33:16 Ak ki teech kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogoitoe yooto tiseiywegap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet ak che po kongoi
2Chronicles33:17 Agos kita koeny piik tiseiywek eng' komoswek che torooreen
2Chronicles33:18 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Manasseh
2Chronicles33:19 Ki kisirchi agine saaennyi
2Chronicles33:20 Ki ru anyun Manasseh kobooto kwanisyekyik
2Chronicles33:21 Ki po Ammon kenyiisyek tiptem ak aeng' ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek aeng' eng' Jerusalem.
2Chronicles33:22 Ak ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki yai kwandanyi Manasseh: ak kieng'ji Ammon tiseiywek kanamonik tugul che ki kiwai che kiga koyai kwandanyi Manasseh
2Chronicles33:23 Ak ki ma iming'ingei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki iming'ingei kwandanyi Manasseh; ago kites Ammon koyai chalwokto miising' kosiir.
2Chronicles33:24 Ak kichaam ineendet otwogikyik
2Chronicles33:25 Ak ki par piigap emonooto pichooto tugul kichaam laitoryat Ammon; ak ki ieet piigap emet Josiah weeriinnyi koek laitoryat kogeer ineendet.
2Chronicles34:1 Ki po Josiah kenyiisyek sisiit ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek sosom ak agenge eng' Jerusalem.
2Chronicles34:2 Ak ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles34:3 Amu eng' kenyiitap sisiit ne po laitornatennyi
2Chronicles34:4 Ak kibut kapkorosusyegap Baalik eng' tainnyi; ak koluul kanamonik che po asiista che ki miitei paragunnywa; ak kituatui Aserik
2Chronicles34:5 Ak ki peel kawegap tisiik eng' kapkorosusyekwak
2Chronicles34:6 Ak ki yachi ko uu nooto nganasoogap Manasseh ak Ephraim
2Chronicles34:7 Ak kibut kapkorosusyek
2Chronicles34:8 Ak eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po laitornatennyi
2Chronicles34:9 Ak ki pwa ole mi Hilkiah
2Chronicles34:10 Ak ki igoochi kiboitiinik che kitononjin kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki igoito kiboitiinik che kiboisyei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobiit kechobe ak keteege ole kiga kobutok eng' koot;
2Chronicles34:11 ki igoochi musogik ak teegik
2Chronicles34:12 Ak ki yai pichooto poisyet koek piik che kiyani: ak kandoigap pichooto ko ki Jahat ak Obadiah
2Chronicles34:13 Ak ki pou kogeny piik che kilaei milosyek
2Chronicles34:14 Ak ye kingo nem fedhaisyek che kiga kiip kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles34:15 Ak ki wolji Hilkiah Sapan siriindet
2Chronicles34:16 Ak ki ipchi Sapan laitoryat bukuinooto
2Chronicles34:17 Ak ki koip fedhaisyek tugul che ki kinyoorchi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles34:18 Ak ki mwachi Sapan siriindet laitoryat koleenji
2Chronicles34:19 Ak kingo kas laitoryat ng'aleegap ng'atuutichooto
2Chronicles34:20 Ak ki ng'at laitoryat Hilkiah
2Chronicles34:21 Oba oteebunena Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles34:22 Ki pa anyun Hilkiah ak icheek che ki iyookto laitoryat
2Chronicles34:23 Ak ki leenji icheek
2Chronicles34:24 kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni
2Chronicles34:25 amu ki kometa
2Chronicles34:26 Ago oleenji laitoryatap Judah
2Chronicles34:27 amu kitangus muguleldang'ung'
2Chronicles34:28 Keero
2Chronicles34:29 Koyookto anyun laitoryat kiyum poisyek tugul che po Judah ak Jerusalem.
2Chronicles34:30 Ak kitogosta laitoryat kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles34:31 Ak ki tonon laitoryat eng' komostanyi
2Chronicles34:32 Ak ki ng'at piik tugul che ki mi Jerusalem ak Benjamin kotononso koyan ng'aleechooto. Ak ki yai che ki menyei Jerusalem ko uu kayomisetap Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles34:33 Ak ki isto Josiah tuguuk tugul che kiwechei eng' emotinwek tugul che po Israel
2Chronicles35:1 Ak kiriipchi `Josiah Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paska eng' Jerusalem; ak kieny aarwetap paska eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawet ne po tai.
2Chronicles35:2 Ak ki inde tiisik riipsosyekwak
2Chronicles35:3 Ak ki leenji Lawiik che ki ineeti Israel tugul
2Chronicles35:4 Ak ochopkei obee kooriigap kwanisyekwok ko uu riipsosyekwok
2Chronicles35:5 Ak otononse eng' ole-tiliil ko uu ole ki kipcheita kooriigap kwanisyek che po tupchosyekwok lagogap piik
2Chronicles35:6 Ak oeny aarwetap paska ak oanyinyge
2Chronicles35:7 Ak ki igoochi `Josiah piik
2Chronicles35:8 Ak ki igoochi pounikyik piik ak tisiik
2Chronicles35:9 Ak ki igoochi Konaniah
2Chronicles35:10 Kochobok anyun otisyet ak kotononso tisiik eng' komostanywa
2Chronicles35:11 Ak kieny aarwetap paska
2Chronicles35:12 Ak ki isto kagoochinoik che kibeelei
2Chronicles35:13 Ak ki peel aarwetap paska eng' maat ko uu kayomiset: ak ki iyo kagoochinoik che tiliileen eng' tereenik
2Chronicles35:14 Ye ibata kochopchigei ak tisiik; amu kichirchirendos tisiik weeriigap Aron kogoitoi kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak mwanik agoi kemoi: kichopchigei anyun Lawiik
2Chronicles35:15 Ak kimi komostanywa tyeniik weeriigap Asaph
2Chronicles35:16 Kichobok anyun otisyet tugul ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto
2Chronicles35:17 Ki riip piigap Israel che ki mi yooto
2Chronicles35:18 Ak kitom kobiit paska age kobooch peetuusyegap maotyot Samuel ne kergei ak nooto ki kiriip eng' Israel; ama riip age tugul eng' laitorinigap Israel ne uu nooto koyai Josiah
2Chronicles35:19 Ki kiriip paskainooto eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po laitornatetap Josiah.
2Chronicles35:20 Kingo pata chooto tugul ko kagochop Josiah Hekaluut
2Chronicles35:21 Ago ki iyookto Neko piik koba ole mi ineendet
2Chronicles35:22 Ago ki ma cham Josiah kobagaakta ineendet
2Chronicles35:23 Ak kimwok mwogik Laitoryat Josiah; ak ki leenji laitoryat otwogikyik
2Chronicles35:24 Komut anyun otwogikyik ineendet eng' chepkichutit
2Chronicles35:25 Ak ki riir Jeremiah agobo Josiah: ak ki riirchi Josiah tyeniik tugul che murenik ak kwonyiik
2Chronicles35:26 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Josiah
2Chronicles35:27 ak poisyonikyik
2Chronicles36:1 Ki ieet anyun `piigap emet Jehoahas weeriitap Josiah koek laitoryat eng' Jerusalem kogeer kwandanyi.
2Chronicles36:2 Ki po Jehoahas kenyiisyek tiptem ak somok ye ki tau kolaitorani: ak ki laitoran arawek somok eng' Jerusalem.
2Chronicles36:3 Ak kiriibe laitornatennyi laitoryatap Misiri eng' Jerusalem
2Chronicles36:4 Ak ki ieet laitoryatap Misiri ng'eetap kamet Eliakim koboi Judah ak Jerusalem
2Chronicles36:5 Ki po Jehoiakim kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak agenge eng' Jerusalem; ak ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi.
2Chronicles36:6 Ki togos Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon konyo kobargei ak ineendet
2Chronicles36:7 Ki ip kogeny Nebukadnezar tereenigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koba Babilon
2Chronicles36:8 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jehoiakim
2Chronicles36:9 Ki po Jehoiakin kenyiisyek sisiit ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran arawek somok ak peetuusyek taman eng' Jerusalem: ak ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Chronicles36:10 Ak ye kingo keskei kenyiit koyook Laitoryat Nebukadnezar piik komut ineendet konyo Babilon
2Chronicles36:11 Ki po Zedekiah kenyiisyek tiptem ak agenge ye ki tau kolaitorani: ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak agenge eng' Jerusalem.
2Chronicles36:12 Ak ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi; ki ma iming'injigei maotyot Jeremiah ye ki ng'alaal ng'aleek che punu kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
2Chronicles36:13 Ak ki ingelelji kogeny Laitoryat Nebukadnezar
2Chronicles36:14 Ki ingelelso kogeny miising' tisiik tugul che eecheen
2Chronicles36:15 Ak ki iyooktoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
2Chronicles36:16 Ago ki reeny pichooto ki iyooktoi Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles36:17 Komutyi anyun icheeget laitoryatap Kaldeik
2Chronicles36:18 Ak ki ip anyun tuguuk tugul che po kootap Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles36:19 Ak ki peel kootap Kamuktaindet
2Chronicles36:20 Ak ki imut koba Babilon che kiga chililye rotwetap chok; ak ki ek otwogikyik ak che po weeriikyik agoi laitornatetap Persia:
2Chronicles36:21 si kosulda ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' kutitap Jeremiah
2Chronicles36:22 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Cyrus laitoryatap Persia
2Chronicles36:23 kamwa ko uu ni Cyrus laitoryatap Persia
Ezra1:1 Eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Cyrus laitoryatap Persia
Ezra1:2 “Kamwa ko uu ni Cyrus laitoryatap Persia
Ezra1:3 Ingotogosta Jerusalem ne mi Judah age tugul eng' okweek che oo piikyik
Ezra1:4 Ak chii age tugul ne kang'et eng' oldo tugul ole menyei
Ezra1:5 Ki ng'eetyo anyun che eecheen eng' kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po Judah ak Benjamin ak tisiik
Ezra1:6 Ki igoochi tugul che ki mi ak icheek tuguuk che po fedha
Ezra1:7 Ne siirei ko ki inem Laitoryat Cyrus tuguuk che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezra1:8 Ki ip chooto Cyrus laitoryatap Persia eng' eutap Mitredat konorindet ak koiityi Sesbasar
Ezra1:9 Chu ko koitetap tuguuchooto: taabook sosom che po thahabu
Ezra1:10 taabook sosom che mengeechen che po thahabu
Ezra1:11 Tereenik tugul che po thahabu ak fedha
Ezra2:1 Chu anyun ko piigap emonooto che kiga togos kobunu ole kiga kiluulji
Ezra2:2 Kigabwa icheek kobooto Zerubabel
Ezra2:3 Lagogap Paros ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol ak tamanwogik tisap ak aeng'.

Ezra2:5 Lagogap Ara ko ki pogol tisap ak tamanwogik tisap ak muut.
Ezra2:6 Lagogap Pahat-moap
Ezra2:7 Lagogap Elam ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak konom ak ang'wan.
Ezra2:8 Lagogap Satu ko ki pogol sogool ak artam ak muut.
Ezra2:9 Lagogap Sakai ko ki pogol tisap ak tamanwogik lo.
Ezra2:10 Lagogap Bani ko ki pogol lo ak artam ak aeng'.
Ezra2:11 Lagogap Bebai ko ki pogol lo ak tiptem ak somok.
Ezra2:12 Lagogap Askad ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak tiptem ak aeng'.

Ezra2:14 Lagogap Bigbai ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' ak konom ak lo.
Ezra2:15 Lagogap Adin ko ki pogol ang'wan ak konom ak ang'wan.

Ezra2:17 Lagogap Besai ko ki pogol somok ak tiptem ak somok.

Ezra2:30 Lagogap Magbis ko ki pogol agenge ak konom ak lo.

Ezra2:32 Lagogap Harim ko ki pogol somok ak tiptem.

Ezra2:34 Lagogap Jeriko ko ki pogol somok ak artam ak muut.
Ezra2:35 Lagogap Senaa ko ki eliphuusyek somok ak pogol lo ak sosom.
Ezra2:36 Tisiik: lagogap Jedaiah
Ezra2:37 Lagogap Imer ko ki eliphuut agenge ak konom ak aeng'.
Ezra2:38 Lagogap Pasur ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak artam ak tisap.
Ezra2:39 Lagogap Harim ko ki eliphuut agenge ak taman ak tisap.
Ezra2:40 Lawiik: lagogap Jeshua ak Kadmiel
Ezra2:41 Tyeniik: lagogap Asaph ko ki pogol agenge ak tiptem ak sisiit.

Ezra2:46 lagogap Hagap
Ezra2:47 lagogap Gidel
Ezra2:48 lagogap Rezin
Ezra2:49 lagogap Uzzah
Ezra2:50 lagogap Asna
Ezra2:51 lagogap Bakbuk

Ezra2:53 lagogap Barkos
Ezra2:54 lagogap Nesia
Ezra2:55 Lagogap otwogigap Solomon: lagogap Sotai
Ezra2:56 lagogap Jaala
Ezra2:57 lagogap Shepatiah
Ezra2:58 Otwogigap Hekaluut tugul ak lagogap otwogigap Solomon
Ezra2:59 Chu ko che ki togosta eng' Tel-mela
Ezra2:60 Lagogap Delaiah
Ezra2:61 Ak che po lagogap tisiik: Lagogap Habaia
Ezra2:62 Ki cheeng' chuuto kiit ne ki kisirchi kainaikwak
Ezra2:63 Ak ki leenji Tirsata icheek
Ezra2:64 Ki ek tuiyet tugul eliphuusyek artam ak aeng' ak pogol somok ak tamanwogik lo
Ezra2:65 koma pooto otwogikwak che murenik ak che tiibiik
Ezra2:66 Paraisisyekwak ko ki pogol tisap ak sosom ak lo. Nyumbokwak ko ki pogol aeng' ak artam ak muut;
Ezra2:67 tambeesikwak ko ki pogol ang'wan ak sosom ak muut. Sigiroik ko ki eliphuusyek lo ak pogol tisap ak tiptem.
Ezra2:68 Kingo pwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi Jerusalem
Ezra2:69 Ki igoito ko uu kamugennywa
Ezra2:70 Ki meny anyun nganasookwak tisiik
Ezra3:1 Kingo it arawetap tisap ye kiga komeng'iis piigap Israel eng' nganasookwak
Ezra3:2 Yeityo kotonon anyun `Jeshua weeriitap Josadak ak tupchosyekyik tisiik
Ezra3:3 Nga ki tinyei; amu ki tinyei kaiyweisyet amu piigap emotinwek alak
Ezra3:4 Ki riip igoorto ne po keryosyek
Ezra3:5 Ye kingo pata kogoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul
Ezra3:6 Kitau kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap tisap
Ezra3:7 Ki igoochi kogeny fedhaisyek musogigap koik
Ezra3:8 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' ngap koit kootap Kamuktaindet eng' Jerusalem
Ezra3:9 Ki tonon anyun Jeshua kobooto weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik
Ezra3:10 Kingo lumda teegik lumeiywotap Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezra3:11 Kiwoljingei kotyeni kolasu ak komwachin kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleen
Ezra3:12 Ago ki riiryo eng' kutit ne oo tisiik che chaang' ak Lawiik ak kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek
Ezra3:13 Ki ma mata komuuch piik koobeesyo waagaat ne po poiboiyet ak ne po riiregap piik
Ezra4:1 Kingo kas anyun puunigap Judah ak Benjamin kole kateekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezra4:2 koriikta anyun ole mi Zerubabel ak kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek
Ezra4:3 Ago ki leenji icheek `Zerubabel kobooto Jeshua ak kandoik tugul che po kooriigap kwanisyek che po Israel
Ezra4:4 Ki yai anyun `piigap emonooto piigap Judah komeiyo mugulelwogik ak koim icheek eng' teekseet.
Ezra4:5 Ki igoochi `asoya kandoik che pcheu melekto
Ezra4:6 Eng' taunetap laitornatetap Aasuerus
Ezra4:7 Ak eng' peetuusyegap Artaserses kosirchi parweet Bislam
Ezra4:8 Ki sir anyun parweet Reum pounindetap kirwooget ak Simsai siriindet
Ezra4:9 Ki sir anyun Reum pounindetap kirwooget ak Simsai siriindet
Ezra4:10 ak pororyosyek alak che ki imutu Osnaper ne oo ak ko tagunoot
Ezra4:11 Chu anyun ng'aleek che po parwaanooto ki kiyooktochin Laitoryat Artaserses: “Kigotiin acheek otwogiguk che kemi pitoni.
Ezra4:12 Ingonaak eng' laitoryat kole Yahudik chooto kobunu oldang'ung' ko kogoitwech ak kogoit Jerusalem ak koteechei kogeny nganasanooto ya ago ngelelyo. Teechei kogeny irimoik ak lumeiywot ne kiga kobutok.
Ezra4:13 Ingonaak nguno eng' laitoryat kole ngot koteech nganasani ak kogees irimoikyik
Ezra4:14 Ara anyun
Ezra4:15 si kobiit kecheeng' eng' bukuit ne po ng'aleegap peetuusyegap kwanisyeguk. Inyooru eng' bukuinooto po ng'aleegap peetuusyek ak inai ile ngelelyo nganasani ak koiimi laitorinik ak emotinwek
Ezra4:16 Kiboorchini anyun laitoryat keleenjini
Ezra4:17 Ki iyookyi anyun laitoryat waluunet Reum pounindetap kirwooget ak Simsai siriindet ak choronokwak tugul che ki menyei Samaria
Ezra4:18 Parweet ne ki kooyokwech ko kagesomannywa komyee eng' tainnyu.
Ezra4:19 Koang'at ak kogecheeng'
Ezra4:20 Ki miitei kogeny laitorinik che ki kiimeen che ki pou Jerusalem che ki pou emet tugul ne mi aineet pitoniin ak ki kigoochin konunoik
Ezra4:21 Ong'at anyun kiit ne igoochin pichooto kosiisyo
Ezra4:22 Oriipkei anyun si mogaegei ng'olyoondonooto. Amu nee si kotesak ng'emisyet ne inyalili laitorinik?
Ezra4:23 Kingo kagesoman ng'aleegap parweetap Laitoryat Artaserses eng' taitap Reum ak Simsai siriindet ak choronokwak
Ezra4:24 Ki tonon anyun poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem agoi kenyiit ne po aeng' ne po laitornatetap Darius laitoryatap Persia.
Ezra5:1 Kingo maoten maotichu; maotyot Haggai ak Zekariah weeriitap Ido
Ezra5:2 kong'eet anyun Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel ak Jeshua weeriitap Josadak ak kotoi koteech kootap Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem. Ki mi kobooto icheek maotigap Kamuktaindet kotoreti.
Ezra5:3 Ki pwanji icheek eng' peetuusyechooto Tatenai ne ki pounindet eng' aineet pitoniin
Ezra5:4 Kotep kogeny kole
Ezra5:5 Ago ki riip konyegap Kamuktaindennywa poisyegap Yahudik ak ma mwachi icheek kobagaach poisyonooto. Ki riip kot koit ng'olyoot kap Darius ak keeweech waluunet eng' parweet agobo ng'olyoondoniito.
Ezra5:6 Chu ng'aleegap parweet ne ki iyookto Tatenai pounindet ne po aineet pitoniin
Ezra5:7 Ki iyookyi ineendet parweet
Ezra5:8 Myee konaak eng' laitoryat kole ki kibe emetap Judah agoi kootap Kamuktaindet ne oo
Ezra5:9 Ki kiteebe anyun poisyechooto
Ezra5:10 Ki kiteebe kainaikwak kogeny si kobiit kiboorun
Ezra5:11 Ak kiwolwech anyun
Ezra5:12 Ago kingo kagotach `kwanisyekyok Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet kot konereech
Ezra5:13 Ago eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Cyrus laitoryatap Babilon
Ezra5:14 Ki inem Laitoryat Cyrus eng' hekaluutap Babilon
Ezra5:15 ak ki leenji ineendet
Ezra5:16 Ki nyo anyun Sesbasar niito ak kolum lumeiywegap kootap Kamuktaindet ne miitei Jerusalem. Kobooch peetuusyechooto agoi ra
Ezra5:17 Ara anyun
Ezra6:1 Ki ng'at anyun Laitoryat Darius ak ki kicheeng' koot ne po bukuisyek ole ki kigonoree tuguuk eng' Babilon.
Ezra6:2 Ak ki kinyoorchi kitabuut Ekbatana eng' kootap laitoryat ne mi emetap Media
Ezra6:3 Eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Laitoryat Cyrus
Ezra6:4 kobooto ortinwek somok che po koik che eecheen
Ezra6:5 Kora ko ingeweekta kogeny tereenik che po thahabu ak che po fedha che po kootap Kamuktaindet
Ezra6:6 Ki ng'at Laitoryat kole; “Ara oistegei anyun inyee Tatenai pounindetap aineet pitoniin
Ezra6:7 Oistoegei poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet
Ezra6:8 Kang'at kogeny agobo kiit ne oyachini poisyechooto po Yahudik agobo teekseetap koiito po Kamuktaindet. Kigoochin pichooto eng' kagiiletapkei tuguuk che kiyaaktoi che po laitoryat che tuguugap aisuruut eng' aineet pitoniin
Ezra6:9 Tuguuk che makyingei ko uu kiruugik che mengeechen
Ezra6:10 si kobiit kogoochi Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet korosegap nyamdutik che anyiny ak kosa agobo saboondap laitoryat ak weeriikyik.
Ezra6:11 Kang'at kogeny ale
Ezra6:12 Ngo par Kamuktaindet ne ki inde kainennyi komeny olooto
Ezra6:13 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto kochokyi Tatenai pounindetap aineet pitoniin kobooto Setar-bosenai ak choronokwak
Ezra6:14 Kiteekso anyun poisyegap Yahudik ak koboor eng' maonateetap maotyot Haggai ak Zekariah weeriitap Ido. Kiteekso ak ki iges ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel ak ko uu ng'atuutyetap Cyrus
Ezra6:15 Ki kigees anyun koyooto eng' peetuut ne po somok eng' arawetap Adar ne ki po kenyiit ne po lo eng' laitornatetap Laitoryat Darius.
Ezra6:16 Ki itabaan koyooto po Kamuktaindet eng' poiboiyet piigap Israel
Ezra6:17 Ki igoito kiruugik pogol agenge
Ezra6:18 Ki inde `icheek tisiik ko uu pcheutikwak ak Lawiik ko uu riipsosyekwak agobo otisyetap Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem
Ezra6:19 Ki riip anyun paska `lagogap luulenik eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawet ne po tai.
Ezra6:20 Amu kiga koanyinygei Tisiik ak Lawiik
Ezra6:21 Ki am paska piigap Israel che ki weeksei kobunu ole kiga kiluulji ak tugul che kiga istoegei simdap pororyosyegap emonooto
Ezra6:22 Kiboiboitu eng' poiboiyet ne oo
Ezra7:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu eng' laitornatetap Artaserses laitoryatap Persia
Ezra7:2 weeriitap Shallum
Ezra7:3 weeriitap Amariah
Ezra7:4 weeriitap Seraiah
Ezra7:5 weeriitap Abisua
Ezra7:6 Ki togosta anyun Ezrah niito eng' Babilon. Ki siriindet ne ng'oom eng' ng'atuutigap Musa che kiga kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezra7:7 Ki togosta alak che po piigap Israel ak che po tisiik
Ezra7:8 Ki it `Ezra Jerusalem eng' arawet ne po muut ne ki kenyiit ne po tisap ne po laitoryat.
Ezra7:9 Ki katoi kotogos eng' Babilon eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawet ne po tai ak eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap muut
Ezra7:10 Amu kiga kogiilgei eng' muguleldanyi Ezrah kocheeng' ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezra7:11 Chu ng'aleegap parweet ne ki igoochi `Laitoryat Artaserses Ezrah tisiindet
Ezra7:12 Anee Artaserses
Ezra7:13 Kang'at ale
Ezra7:14 Amu kagoyookten laitoryat ak kirwoogikyik tisap iwe iteep agobo Judah ak Jerusalem ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne mi kobooten.
Ezra7:15 Ne siirei
Ezra7:16 Ip kobooto fedha tugul ak thahabu che inyoorchini emet tugul ne po Babilon
Ezra7:17 Myee anyun iale fedhaisyechu
Ezra7:18 Kiit age tugul ne ogeere inyee ak tupchosyeguk ole myee oyae fedhaisyek tugul che kang'et ak thahabu
Ezra7:19 Igoite eng' taitap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Jerusalem tereenik che kigoonin agobo otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Ezra7:20 Kiit age tugul neta kemakyin kootap Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne kanyool igoite
Ezra7:21 Ang'ate anee
Ezra7:22 kot koit talendaisyek pogol che po fedha
Ezra7:23 Kiit age tugul ne ng'atei Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet
Ezra7:24 Kiboorwok kogeny keele
Ezra7:25 Lewen inyee Ezrah ko uu utaatyetap Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne mi eung'ung'
Ezra7:26 Age tugul ne ma chamei koyai ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ng'atuutigap laitoryat
Ezra7:27 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezra7:28 ne kigoiitwa ak anee rireenet eng' taitap laitoryat ak kirwoogikyik ak eng' taitap pounik tugul che kiimeen che po laitoryat. Ak ki anyiganitu amu ki mi kobooto eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu ak kiayum eng' Israel piik che taagunotiin ketogoste tugul.
Ezra8:1 Chu ko kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyekwak ak tetuutigap ibinwekwak che ki kosiirto che ki kitogosu tugul eng' Babilon eng' peetuusyegap laitornatetap Laitoryat Artaserses:
Ezra8:2 Eng' weeriigap Phineas
Ezra8:3 Eng' weeriigap Shekaneiah
Ezra8:4 Eng' weeriigap Pahat-moap
Ezra8:5 Eng' weeriigap Shekaneiah ko weeriitap Jahasyel
Ezra8:6 Eng' weeriigap Adin
Ezra8:7 Eng' weeriigap Elam
Ezra8:8 Eng' weeriigap Shepatiah
Ezra8:9 Eng' weeriigap Joab
Ezra8:10 Eng' weeriigap Selomit
Ezra8:11 Eng' weeriigap Bebai
Ezra8:12 Eng' weeriigap Askad
Ezra8:13 Eng' weeriigap Adonikam
Ezra8:14 Ak eng' weeriigap Bigbai
Ezra8:15 Ki ayumji icheek aineet ne rootyin Ahaba. Ki kitebee yooto peetuusyek somok ak ki ageerote piik ak tisiik ak ma anyooru weeriigap Lawi.
Ezra8:16 Ki ayookte anyun keguur Elieser
Ezra8:17 ayookte icheek koba kap Ido ne ki oo eng' ole kiguure Kasipia. Ki amwachi kiit ne kanyool komwachi Ido ak tupchosyekyik otwogigap Hekaluut eng' komosato po Kasipia
Ezra8:18 Amu kimi kobootech euut ne myee ne po Kamuktaindennyo
Ezra8:19 ak Hasabia ak ki mi kobooto ineendet Jesaia ne po weeriigap Merari tupchosyekyik ak weeriikwak
Ezra8:20 Eng' otwogigap Hekaluut che kiga konde Daudi ak pounik agobo otisyetap Lawiik
Ezra8:21 Yeityo ang'at anyun karugutetapkei
Ezra8:22 Amu ki alilan asoom laitoryat kweanet ne po kiplugotinik ak piik che ketei paraisisyek si kotoretech kegirindee puunik che mi ooreet. Amu kiga kemwachi laitoryat keleenji
Ezra8:23 Ki kirugutkei anyun ak kesaa Kamuktaindennyo agobo niito ak kigaswech.
Ezra8:24 Ki atabaan anyun taman ak aeng' che eecheen eng' tisiik
Ezra8:25 ak ki agerchi icheek fedha
Ezra8:26 Ki agerchi icheek talendaisyek pogol lo ak konom che po fedha ak tuguuk che po fedha che yamei talendaisyek pogol ak thahabu che yamei talendaisyek pogol
Ezra8:27 ak taabook tiptem che po thahabu
Ezra8:28 Yeityo aleenji icheek
Ezra8:29 Oriipse ak oriip tuguuchooto agoi obiman eng' kooriik che po oriit eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap che eecheen eng' tisiik
Ezra8:30 Kitaach anyun Tisiik ak Lawiik nyigiisindap fedha ak thahabu ak tereenik
Ezra8:31 Eng' peetuutap taman ak aeng' ne po arawet ne po tai
Ezra8:32 Kingeitu Jerusalem
Ezra8:33 Eng' peetuut ne po ang'wan ko ki kiger fedha ak thahabu ak tereenik eng' kootap Kamuktaindennyo
Ezra8:34 Ki kiit tuguuk tugul ak keger
Ezra8:35 Ki igoito lagogap luulenik
Ezra8:36 Ki igoochi kora ng'atuutigap laitoryat kandoik che po kaplaitoryat ak pounik che ki mi aineet pitoniin
Ezra9:1 Kingo kagoyaak tuguuchu
Ezra9:2 Amu ki kotun tiibiikwak
Ezra9:3 Ak kinga kas ng'olyoondoni
Ezra9:4 Ki iyumjagei anyun chii age tugul ne kibotani agobo ng'aleegap Kamuktaindetap Israel
Ezra9:5 Yeityo ang'eet eng' kaming'inennyu pogei ye ki kigoitoi kagoochinetap koskoleny
Ezra9:6 ak ale
Ezra9:7 Ki keegu kiptengegiinik miising' kobooch peetuusyegap kwanisyekyok agoi rani
Ezra9:8 Kagiboorwech anyun nguno eng' poroini ming'in myeeindo ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezra9:9 Nga ki otwogik
Ezra9:10 Ara anyun
Ezra9:11 che kigeng'at eng' otwogiguk maotik
Ezra9:12 Amogoochi anyun tiibiikwok weeriikwak
Ezra9:13 Kigobwanjech chooto tugul amu poisyonikyok che yaach ak ng'oogistonyo ne oo. Amu ma ibirech inyee Kamuktaindennyo ko uu ye yamegei ak tengekwogikyok
Ezra9:14 ko tos kibut kogeny ng'atuutiguk ak kenamge ak piik che yaei tuguuchu kiwechei? Tos menereekyinech kot igeswech kot koma mi che ng'etu anan che chilildos?
Ezra9:15 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezra10:1 Ye kita kosaaei Ezrah ak kong'aanyei chalwogik
Ezra10:2 Ak ki wolji Shekaneiah weeriitap Jehiel
Ezra10:3 Ongiyomiske anyun ak Kamuktaindennyo keiste osotik tugul ak lagok che kisichei osotichooto ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung' inyee kiptaiyandennyu ak ne po icheeget che kabotanso amu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindennyo ak ingoyaak ko uu ng'atuutyet.
Ezra10:4 Ng'eet anyun; amu neng'ung' ng'olyoondoniito ak kimi
Ezra10:5 Kong'eet anyun Ezrah ak kong'at che eecheen eng' tisiik
Ezra10:6 Kong'eet anyun Ezrah eng' taitap kootap Kamuktaindet ak kwo koot ne po oriit ne po Jeohanan weeriitap Eliasib. Kingo it yooto
Ezra10:7 Kimwaita eng' Judah tugul ak Jerusalem
Ezra10:8 Age tugul ne ma nyo ko kagobata peetuusyek somogu
Ezra10:9 Ki iyumjigei anyun Jerusalem `piik tugul che po Judah ak Benjamin kotomo kogeskei peetuusyek somogu. Ki arawetap sogool eng' peetuutap tiptem ne po arawanooto
Ezra10:10 Yeityo kotonon anyun Ezrah tisiindet ak koleenji icheek
Ezra10:11 Ong'aang'ji anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezra10:12 Ki wol anyun tuiyet tugul eng' kutit ne oo kole
Ezra10:13 Chaang' piik che mi yu ak nguno ko peetuusyegap ropta ne oo. Ma kimuuchi ketononse eng' saang'
Ezra10:14 Ingelewen anyun pounikyok agobo tuiyet tugul ak ingobwa icheek tugul che mi nganasookyok che ki itun tiibiik che toek. Ingobwa eng' peetuusyek che king'atei ak Ingobwa kobooto icheek poisyegap nganaseet age tugul ak kirwoogikyik agoi koistoeneigei nereegek che koroomen che po Kamuktaindennyo
Ezra10:15 Jonathan weeriitap Asahel ak Jaseia weeriitap Tikba icheegei che kitononso kogirinda ng'olyoondoniito
Ezra10:16 Ki yai ko uu nooto lagogap piik che kiga kiluul. Ki kitabaan tisiindet Ezrah kobooto kandoik alak che po kooriigap kwanisyek kobee kooriigap kwanisyekwak ak icheek tugul ko uu kainaikwak ak ki tebi ng'wony eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap taman kogin ng'aleechooto.
Ezra10:17 Ki iges eng' peetuut ne po tai eng' arawet ne po tai ng'aleek tugul che po murenik che kiga kotun tiibiik che toek.
Ezra10:18 Ki piit eng' weeriigap tisiik che kiga kotun tiibiik che toek: eng' weeriigap Jeshua
Ezra10:19 Ki iyasyo icheek kole istoi osotikwak
Ezra10:20 Eng' weeriigap Imer ko ki Hanani ak Sebadia.
Ezra10:21 Eng' weeriigap Harim ko ki Maaseia
Ezra10:22 Eng' weeriigap Pasur ko ki Elioenai
Ezra10:23 Eng' Lawiik ko ki Josabad
Ezra10:24 Eng' tyeniik ko ki Eliasib
Ezra10:25 Eng' Israel
Ezra10:26 Eng' weeriigap Elam ko ki Mattaniah
Ezra10:27 Eng' weeriigap Satu ko ki Elioenai
Ezra10:28 Eng' weeriigap Bebai ko ki Jeohanan
Ezra10:29 Eng' weeriigap Bani ko ki Mesulam
Ezra10:30 Eng' weeriigap Pahat-moap ko ki Adna
Ezra10:31 Eng' weeriigap Harim ko ki Elieser
Ezra10:32 Benjamin
Ezra10:33 Eng' weeriigap Asum ko ki Matenai
Ezra10:34 Eng' weeriigap Bani ko ki Madai
Ezra10:35 Benaiah
Ezra10:36 Bania
Ezra10:37 Mattaniah
Ezra10:38 Bani
Ezra10:39 Selemya
Ezra10:40 Maknadebai
Ezra10:41 Asarel
Ezra10:42 Shallum
Ezra10:43 Eng' weeriigap Nebo ko ki Jeiel
Ezra10:44 Kiga kotun `chuuto tugul tiibiik che toek ak ki tinyei alak osotik che kiga kosikyi lagok.
Nehemiah1:1 Che isubi ko ng'aleegap Nehemiah weeriitap Hakalia: Eng' arawetap Kisleb eng' kenyiitap tiptem
Nehemiah1:2 konyo Hanani
Nehemiah1:3 Kimwaiwo icheek kole
Nehemiah1:4 Ye kinga kas ng'aleechuuto
Nehemiah1:5 Yeityo ale; “Asaain
Nehemiah1:6 ingoep iit itiiguk ak koyatagis konyeguk
Nehemiah1:7 Ki keyaun ne ya miising'
Nehemiah1:8 Asaain ale
Nehemiah1:9 ago ngot oweekyage
Nehemiah1:10 Ara anyun chuuto ko otwogiguk ak ko piiguk
Nehemiah1:11 Asaain
Nehemiah2:1 Eng' arawetap Nisan
Nehemiah2:2 koteebena laitoryat koleenjo
Nehemiah2:3 Ki aleenji laitoryat
Nehemiah2:4 Komwaiwo anyun laitoryat koleenjo
Nehemiah2:5 yeityo aleenji laitoryat
Nehemiah2:6 Ak kiteebena laitoryat koleenjo
Nehemiah2:7 Ki amwachi kogeny laitoryat aleenji
Nehemiah2:8 Ingogoono parweet ne kisirchin Asaph riibindetap timdap laitoryat
Nehemiah2:9 Ki ait anyun ye mi pounik che ki mi aineet pitoniin
Nehemiah2:10 Kingo kas ng'aleechu `Sanbalat Horonindet ak Tobia otwogindet ne Amonindet
Nehemiah2:11 Ki ait anyun Jerusalem ak ki atebee yooto peetuusyek somok.
Nehemiah2:12 Ki ang'eet kemoi anee ak piik che ng'ering' che ki mi kobooto
Nehemiah2:13 Ki amande kemoi eng' ormariichet ne po atebweet
Nehemiah2:14 Ki awe anyun ormariichetap kondap peek agoi tamboiyotap laitoryat
Nehemiah2:15 Ki atogoste anyun kemoi abun tabandap kereruut ak atoben amarar irimeet
Nehemiah2:16 Ki ma nai pounik ole kigawe anan kiit ne ki ayai
Nehemiah2:17 Yeityo aleenji
Nehemiah2:18 Ki amwachi kora icheek agobo euut ne myee ne po Kamuktaindennyu ne ki mi kobooto
Nehemiah2:19 Ago kingo kas Sanbalat Horonindet
Nehemiah2:20 Ki awolji anyun icheek aleenji
Nehemiah3:1 Ki ng'eet anyun Eliasib tisiindet ne oo kobooto tupchosyekyik tisiik ak koteech ormariichetap keechiirek. Ki ianyiny ak konde kurgotikyik. Ki ianyiny ak koteech kogeny agoi teekseet ne kooi ne po Hamea kot koit teekseet ne kooi ne po Hananel.
Nehemiah3:2 Kiteeksei korubei ineendet piigap Jeriko
Nehemiah3:3 Ki teech weeriigap Hasenaa ormariichet ne po njireenik. Ki inde tugatugigap kurgotik
Nehemiah3:4 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Meremot weeriitap Uriah
Nehemiah3:5 Che kirubei ko ki Tekoitik
Nehemiah3:6 Ki teech kogeny ormariichet ne po keny Joiada weeriitap Pasea ak Mesulam weeriitap Besodeia. Ki inde tugatugigap kurgotikyik
Nehemiah3:7 Ne kirubei icheek ko ki Melatia Gibeonindet
Nehemiah3:8 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Uzziel weeriitap Haraia
Nehemiah3:9 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Repaiah weeriitap Hur ne pounindetap kebebertap kooretap Jerusalem.
Nehemiah3:10 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Jedaiah weeriitap Harumap
Nehemiah3:11 Kiteechei kebeberta age Malkija weeriitap Harim
Nehemiah3:12 Ki teech kogeny korubei icheek Shallum weeriitap Haloes
Nehemiah3:13 Ki teech kogeny Hanun kobooto piik che ki menyei Sanoa ormariichet ne po atebweet. Ki teech icheek ak konde kereiywekyik
Nehemiah3:14 Ki teech kogeny ormariichetap kiptangasyat Malkija weeriitap Regap
Nehemiah3:15 Ki teech kogeny ormariichetap kondap peek Shallum weeriitap Kolhose
Nehemiah3:16 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Nehemiah weeriitap Asbuk pounindetap kebebertap kooretap Beth-zur
Nehemiah3:17 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Lawiik
Nehemiah3:18 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko kitupchosyekwak
Nehemiah3:19 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Eser weeriitap Jeshua
Nehemiah3:20 Ne kirubei ko ki Baruk weeriitap Sabai ne ki teech kogeny eng' kagiiletapkei kebeberta age kobooch ole weegegei irimeet agoi kurgeetap kootap Eliasib tisiindet ne oo.
Nehemiah3:21 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei ineendet ko ki Meremot weeriitap Uriah weeriitap Akos
Nehemiah3:22 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko kitisiik
Nehemiah3:23 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Benjamin ak Hasub ole tokyingei koonnywa. Che kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Azariah weeriitap Maaseia weeriitap Anania ole neegitee koonnyi.
Nehemiah3:24 Ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei ineendet ko ki Binui weeriitap Henadad
Nehemiah3:25 Ki teech kogeny Palal weeriitap Usai ole tokyingei ole weegegei irimeet ak teekseet ne kooi ne ki ichumda eng' koot ne po parak ne po kootap laitoryat ne neegitee seremutap riibiik. Ki teech kogeny korup ineendet Pedaiah weeriitap Paros.
Nehemiah3:26 (Ki menyei otwogigap Hekaluut Ophel
Nehemiah3:27 Che kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei ineendet ko ki Tekoitik che tokyingei teekseet ne kooi ne ki ichumda agoi irimeetap Ophel.
Nehemiah3:28 Ki teech kogeny tisiik paragutap ormariichetap paraisiit; kiteechei age tugul ne tokyingei koonnyi.
Nehemiah3:29 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Zadok weeriitap Imer kotokyingei koonnyi
Nehemiah3:30 Ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei ineendet ko ki Hananiah weeriitap Selemya ak Hanun weeriit ne po lo ne po Salap. Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Mesulam weeriitap Berekiah kotokyingei koonnyi ne po oriit.
Nehemiah3:31 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Malkija ne ki age eng' kitang'igap thahabu kot koit kootap otwogigap Hekaluut ak ne po chemung'arainik
Nehemiah3:32 Ki teech kogeny kitang'igap thahabu ak chemung'arainik kwenutap ole kitogostoe eng' luuita ak ormariichetap keechiirek.
Nehemiah4:1 Ago ye kingo kas Sanbalat kole kiteechei irimeet
Nehemiah4:2 ak ki ng'alaal eng' taitap tupchosyekyik ak lugeetap Samaria kole
Nehemiah4:3 Ki mi ak ineendet Tobia Amonindet ak ki le
Nehemiah4:4 Kas ee Kamuktaindennyo amu kisasech. Iweekyi icheek churisyennywa kotebee metowekwak ak igoite icheek keluul koba emet ne kiluuljin.
Nehemiah4:5 Amat ketuch tengektonywa
Nehemiah4:6 Ki kiteech anyun irimeet; ak ki kituiyo irimeet tugul kot koit kebeberta ne po kooindap tononennyi amu ki tinyei piik mugulelwek che chamei poisyet.
Nehemiah4:7 Ago kingo kas Sanbalat
Nehemiah4:8 Ki irwooch tugul kibagenge kole kobwa ak kobargei ak Jerusalem ak kong'eet pooryeet eng' yooto.
Nehemiah4:9 Ago ki kisaa Kamuktaindennyo ak ki kinde riibiik koriipso peet ak kemoi amu icheek.
Nehemiah4:10 Ki toi piigap Judah kong'unyng'ung'so ak kole
Nehemiah4:11 Ak kileen ak icheek puunikyok
Nehemiah4:12 Kingo pwa Yahudik che ki menyei ole neegitee icheek
Nehemiah4:13 Ki ande anyun piik komoswek che rektoot eng' irimeet patai eng' ole ma mi kiy
Nehemiah4:14 Ak ye ki ageer ole uu
Nehemiah4:15 Kingo kas puunikyok kole kigegas kiito ak ki kowal Kamuktaindet kirwoogennywa koek puch
Nehemiah4:16 Kobooch peetuunooto ak kwo tai
Nehemiah4:17 che kiteechei irimeet
Nehemiah4:18 ak eng' teegik
Nehemiah4:19 Ki aleenji piik che taagunotiin ak pounik kobooto piik tugul
Nehemiah4:20 Oldo tugul ole kogasyi iryageet
Nehemiah4:21 Ki kiyai anyun poisyet kobooch ko kachor asiista agoi kogatook kecheik
Nehemiah4:22 Ki aleenji piik anyun eng' peetuunooto
Nehemiah4:23 Eng' kasarata
Nehemiah5:1 Ki piit riirek che ng'woneen eng' piik ak eng' osotikwak agobo tupchosyekwak Yahudik.
Nehemiah5:2 Amu kimi che ki mwa kole ki chaang' acheek kobooto weeriikyok ak tiibiikyok: ongecheeng'jige peek
Nehemiah5:3 Ki mi alak kogeny che ki mwa kole kigoitoi mbareenikyok
Nehemiah5:4 Ki mi alak kogeny che ki mwa kole kogiarorte mbareenikyok
Nehemiah5:5 Ago kergei anyun poorwekyok ak che po tupchosyekyok
Nehemiah5:6 Ak ki anereech miising' kinga kas riirekwak ak ng'aleechuuto.
Nehemiah5:7 Ki abwaat anyun aneege
Nehemiah5:8 Ak ki aleenji icheek
Nehemiah5:9 Ki amwa kogeny ale kiit ne oyae koma myee. Tos ma nyoljinok obendate kaiyweisyetap Kamuktaindennyo si kogiring'da chotisyetap pororyosyek che puunikyok?
Nehemiah5:10 Ak ki kibesendochi `icheek fedhaisyek ak peek ko uu nooto
Nehemiah5:11 Asoomok oweekyi icheek rani mbareenikwak
Nehemiah5:12 Komwa anyun kole
Nehemiah5:13 Ki aleglekte kogeny ngoryennyu ale
Nehemiah5:14 Kogeny kobooch peetuut ne ki kindea aek pounindennywa eng' emetap Judah

Nehemiah5:19 Ibwaata
Nehemiah6:1 Ak ki ngemwachi anyun Sanbalat
Nehemiah6:2 koyook Sanbalat ak Gesem ng'olyo koleenjo
Nehemiah6:3 Ki ayookyi piik icheek koba koleenji
Nehemiah6:4 Ki iyook ng'olyoo ko uu nooto konyil ang'wan
Nehemiah6:5 Eng' ne po muut
Nehemiah6:6 ne ki kisir keele mwaat eng' pororyosyek ak komwaei Gasmu ko uu nooto kole inyee ak Yahudik ko ongelel. Ara nooto ne koonok oteech irimeet
Nehemiah6:7 Ki ilewen kogeny maotik si kobiit komwaita ng'aleek agobo inyee eng' Jerusalem kole mi laitoryat Judah. Nae anyun laitoryat ng'aleechuuto. Ara anyun nyoo si kirwooch tugul.
Nehemiah6:8 Ki ayooktoochi chiito kwo koleenji
Nehemiah6:9 Kita machei pichooto tugul komuech
Nehemiah6:10 Eng' pesyo ko ki awe kootap Semaiah weeriitap Delaiah

Nehemiah6:14 “Ibwaat

Nehemiah6:19 Ki ng'alaal kogeny agobo poisyonikyik che myach eng' tainnyu
Nehemiah7:1 Ye kingo kageteech irimeet ak ande kereiywegap kurgotik
Nehemiah7:2 alewen anyun tupchennyu Hanani ak Hananiah pounindetap irimeet koboi Jerusalem

Nehemiah7:4 Ki tebees anyun nganaseet ak ko paraa

Nehemiah7:65 Ki ng'at `Tirsata icheek kole manyolji koam tuguuk che tiliileen miising'
Nehemiah7:66 Ki ek tuiyet tugul eliphuusyek artam ak aeng' ak pogol somok ak tamanwogik lo
Nehemiah7:67 koma pooto otwogikwak che murenik ak che tiibiik
Nehemiah7:68 Paraisisyekwak ko ki pogol tisap ak sosom ak lo
Nehemiah7:69 tambeesik ko ki pogol ang'wan ak sosom ak muut ak sigiroik ko ki eliphuusyek lo ak pogol tisap ak tiptem.
Nehemiah7:70 Kigon alak eng' kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek tuguugap poisyet. Kigon `Tirsata keruutik sisiit che po thahabu
Nehemiah7:71 Ak kigon kandoik alak che po kooriigap kwanisyek Keruutik pogol agenge ak tamanwogik lo ak sisiit che po thahabu ak keruutik eliphuut agenge pogol aeng' ak konom che po fedha
Nehemiah7:72 Konunoigap piik tugul ko ki keruutik pogol agenge ak tamanwogik lo ak sisiit che po thahabu
Nehemiah7:73 Ki meny anyun nganasookwak tisiik
Nehemiah8:1 Ki iyumgei piik tugul ko uu chiichak eng' komosta ne paraa ne ki mi taitap ormariichetap peek. Ki leenji `pichooto Ezrah siriindet koip kitabuutap ng'atuutigap Musa
Nehemiah8:2 Eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap tisap
Nehemiah8:3 Kisoman ng'atuutichooto eng' taitap komosta ne paraa ne ki miitei taitap ormariichetap peek
Nehemiah8:4 Ki tonon Ezrah siriindet eng' komosta ne ki kiteege keetiik kotororit
Nehemiah8:5 Ki ng'aany `Ezra bukuinooto eng' taitap piik tugul (amu kimi ye toroor kosiir piik) ak kingo ng'aany bukuinooto kotononso piik tugul.
Nehemiah8:6 Ki ilas `Ezra Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Nehemiah8:7 Kitooret piik koguiyo Ng'atuutik Lawiik: Jeshua
Nehemiah8:8 Kisoman eng' bukuit kogasak komyee ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet
Nehemiah8:9 Ak ki leenji piik tugul `Nehemiah
Nehemiah8:10 Koleenji icheek `Nehemiah
Nehemiah8:11 Ki igaigai anyun `Lawiik piik tugul koleenji
Nehemiah8:12 Ki pa piik tugul koamis
Nehemiah8:13 Eng' peetuut ne po aeng'
Nehemiah8:14 Ki nyoor kole ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutik ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa kole
Nehemiah8:15 ak kora kobarta ak komwaita icheek eng' nganasookwak tugul ak eng' Jerusalem kole
Nehemiah8:16 Ki pa anyun piik
Nehemiah8:17 Kiteekyigei keryosyek tuiyet tugul ne po piik che ki weeksei che kiga kiluul ak komeny keryosyechooto
Nehemiah8:18 Kisoman kogeny peetuut age tugul bukuit ne po Ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet
Nehemiah9:1 Ki iyumgei anyun Yahudik eng' peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawanooto ak korugutkei
Nehemiah9:2 Ki itabaanegei `iyoteetap Israel toek tugul yeityo kotononso kong'aany tengekwogikwak ak tengekwogigap kwanisyekwak.
Nehemiah9:3 Kitononso eng' komostanywa
Nehemiah9:4 Yeityo kotononso eng' lang'eiywotap Lawiik: Jeshua
Nehemiah9:5 Yeityo komwa Lawiik: Jeshua
Nehemiah9:6 Ii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Nehemiah9:7 Ii Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet
Nehemiah9:8 Ki igeer ile po iman muguleldanyi eng' taing'ung'
Nehemiah9:9 Ki igeer nyalilwogigap kwanisyekyok eng' Misiri
Nehemiah9:10 Ki ibarte kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik eng' Pharaoh
Nehemiah9:11 Ki ipchei nyanjet eng' tainnywa
Nehemiah9:12 Ki indochi icheek kogeny peet eng' toloitap pooldet
Nehemiah9:13 Ki ichoorchigei kogeny tulweetap Sinai
Nehemiah9:14 Ki iboorchi icheek konai sabatoing'ung' ne tiliil ak ing'atyi icheek ng'atuutik ak katigonutik ak Ng'atuutyet
Nehemiah9:15 Eng' rubennywa
Nehemiah9:16 Ago kiboisye icheek ak kwanisyekyok menoteet ak kouiit kaatinnywa ama kas iit ng'atuutiguk.
Nehemiah9:17 Ki eesyo icheek kogas iit
Nehemiah9:18 Ee
Nehemiah9:19 koma imete icheek eng' surkwen amu rireenosyeguk che chaang'. Ma istoegei paragunnywa peet toloitap pooldet si kondochi icheek eng' ooreet. Ama istoegei icheek toloita ne po maat kemoi
Nehemiah9:20 Ki igoochi kogeny icheek Kabuuseng'ung' ne myee koneet
Nehemiah9:21 Ee
Nehemiah9:22 Ki igoochi kogeny icheek laitornatosyek ak pororyosyek che ki ipchechi icheek kobee kebeberwekwak. Ki nam icheek anyun emetap Sihon
Nehemiah9:23 Kogeny
Nehemiah9:24 Ki pa anyun lagochooto ak konam emet kobunji
Nehemiah9:25 Ki nam `icheek nganasook che ng'ootaatiin
Nehemiah9:26 Ago ma kasin iit ak ki ingeleljin. Ki wiirta Ng'atuutiguk kotuktoochi patai ak kobar maotiguk che kibaoryanji
Nehemiah9:27 Nooto anyun
Nehemiah9:28 Ago kingo kagomuuny
Nehemiah9:29 Ki ibaoryanji icheek itigon
Nehemiah9:30 Ki imuitoochi icheek eng' kenyiisyek che chaang'. Ki iteechine icheek Kabuuseng'ung' kobun maotiguk
Nehemiah9:31 Ago eng' rireenosyeguk che chaang' koma igeesu icheek anan imete
Nehemiah9:32 Ara anyun Kamuktaindennyo ne oo ne po kamuktaet
Nehemiah9:33 Ago ii po iman eng' tuguuk tugul che ki kobwanjech
Nehemiah9:34 ama riip laitorinikyok kobooto pounikyok
Nehemiah9:35 Amu ma otin eng' laitornatennywa ak eng' myeeindong'ung' ne oo ne ki igoochi ak eng' emet ne paraa ak ko akwai ne ki igoochi eng' tainnywa ama meto poisyonikwak che yaacheen.
Nehemiah9:36 Keero
Nehemiah9:37 Ak rurei emoniito miising' korurchin laitorinik che ki inde koboiywech amu tengekwogikyok. Tinyei kogeny kimnateet koboi poorwekyok
Nehemiah9:38 Agot eng' chooto tugul ko kagiyai arorutyet ne kiim

Nehemiah11:1 Ki meny anyun Jerusalem `kandoigap piik
Nehemiah11:2 Ki iberuur piik murenik tugul che ki igoitogei eng' chamyet komeny Jerusalem.
Nehemiah11:3 Chu ko piik che eecheen che po emotinwek che ki meny Jerusalem
Nehemiah11:4 Ak ki meny Jerusalem alak eng' lagogap Judah ak eng' lagogap Benjamin. Che po lagogap Judah ko ki Ataia weeriitap Uzziah
Nehemiah11:5 ak Maaseia weeriitap Baruk
Nehemiah11:6 Ki ek weeriik tugul che po Peres che ki menyei Jerusalem pogol ang'wan ak tamanwogik lo ak sisiit
Nehemiah11:7 Eng' weeriigap Benjamin: Salu weeriitap Mesulam
Nehemiah11:8 Kirubei ineendet Gabia
Nehemiah11:9 Ki pounindennywa Joel weeriitap Zikri
Nehemiah11:10 Che po tisiik ko ki: Jedaiah weeriitap Joiarib
Nehemiah11:11 Seraiah weeriitap Hilkiah
Nehemiah11:12 ak tupchosyekwak che ki yai poisyetap koot
Nehemiah11:13 ak tupchosyekyik
Nehemiah11:14 ak tupchosyekwak
Nehemiah11:15 Che po Lawiik ko ki Semaiah weeriitap Hasub
Nehemiah11:16 ak Sabetai
Nehemiah11:17 ak Mattaniah weeriitap Mikah
Nehemiah11:18 Lawiik tugul che ki mi nganaseet ne tiliil ko ki pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik sisiit ak ang'wan.
Nehemiah11:19 Kogeny
Nehemiah11:20 Ak che ki ng'et che po Israel
Nehemiah11:21 Ago ki meny otwogigap Hekaluut Ophel. Ki pou otwogichooto po Hekaluut Siha ak Gispa.
Nehemiah11:22 Ki pounindetap Lawiik eng' Jerusalem Usi weeriitap Bani
Nehemiah11:23 Amu kimi ng'atuutyet ne king'atyi icheek laitoryat
Nehemiah11:24 Petaia weeriitap Mesesabel
Nehemiah11:25 Eng' nganasook kobooto mbareenikwak
Nehemiah11:26 eng' Jeshua
Nehemiah11:27 ak eng' Hasar-sual
Nehemiah11:28 eng' Ziklag
Nehemiah11:29 eng' En-rimon
Nehemiah11:30 Sanoa ak Adulam ak nganasookwak
Nehemiah11:31 Ki meny lagogap Benjamin ak icheek kobooch Geba ak kwo tai
Nehemiah11:32 eng' Anatoth
Nehemiah11:33 Hasor
Nehemiah11:34 Hadid

Nehemiah11:36 Ki iyomogei ak Benjamin
Nehemiah12:1 Chu anyun ko Tisiik ak Lawiik che kitogosta kobooto Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel ak Jeshua: Seraiah

Nehemiah12:3 Shekaneiah
Nehemiah12:4 Ido
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamin
Nehemiah12:6 Semaiah
Nehemiah12:7 Salu
Nehemiah12:8 Lawiik ko ki: Jeshua
Nehemiah12:9 Kitokyindos ak icheeget eng' riipsosyekwak tupchosyekwak Bakbukia ak Uno.
Nehemiah12:10 Ki sich `Jeshua Joiakim ak kosich Joiakim Eliasib
Nehemiah12:11 kosich Joiada Jonathan
Nehemiah12:12 Eng' peetuusyegap Joiakim
Nehemiah12:13 ne po Ezrah ko Mesulam
Nehemiah12:14 ne po Maluki ko Jonathan
Nehemiah12:15 ne po Harim ko Adna
Nehemiah12:16 ne po Ido ko Zekariah
Nehemiah12:17 ne po Abijah ko Zikri
Nehemiah12:18 ne po Bilga ko Samua
Nehemiah12:19 ne po Joiarib ko Matenai
Nehemiah12:20 ne po Salai ko Kalai
Nehemiah12:21 ne po Hilkai ko Hasabia
Nehemiah12:22 Kandoigap Lawiik che ki kisir eng' peetuusyegap koek kandoigap kooriikwak ko
Nehemiah12:23 Ki kisirchi bukuitap ateptap peetuusyek
Nehemiah12:24 Ki che eecheen che po Lawiik ko ki Hasabia
Nehemiah12:25 Che ki riibiigap kurgotik ko: Mattaniah
Nehemiah12:26 Ki mi chuuto eng' peetuusyegap Joiakim weeriitap Jeshua
Nehemiah12:27 Eng' peetuut ne ki kitabaane irimeetap Jerusalem
Nehemiah12:28 Ki iyumgei ak icheek weeriigap tyeniik kobunu warenget ne kiyiem Jerusalem ak nganasoogap Netopatik.
Nehemiah12:29 Ki pun kogeny Beth-gilgal ak mbareenigap Geba ak Asmabet. Amu kiga koteekyigei tyeniik nganasook koyiem Jerusalem.
Nehemiah12:30 Ye kingo kagoanyinygei Tisiik ak Lawiik
Nehemiah12:31 Yeityo amutu pounigap Judah kobwa irimeet parak ak alewen kweanaik aeng' che eecheen che mwaei kongoi ak koba kotendeen. Ki wo kweanet agenge komostap eutap tai kobun irimeet kotokyigei ormariichetap ng'atateek.
Nehemiah12:32 Ki isup icheek Hosaia ak kebebertap pounigap Judah
Nehemiah12:33 ak Azariah
Nehemiah12:34 Judah
Nehemiah12:35 ak alak eng' weeriigap tisiik kotinyei iryagook. Chooto ko Zekariah weeriitap Jonathan
Nehemiah12:36 ak tupchosyekyik
Nehemiah12:37 Ki togostae ye neegitee ormariichetap kondametut
Nehemiah12:38 Ak ki wo kweanet age ne po pichooto che kimwaei kongoi
Nehemiah12:39 Ki pun paragutap ormariichetap Ephraim ak ormariichet ne oos
Nehemiah12:40 Ki tononso anyun kweanaichooto tuwai che po icheeget che kimwaei kongoi eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ak ki kimi tugul ak icheek kobooto kebeberta ne po pounik
Nehemiah12:41 tisiik
Nehemiah12:42 ak Maaseia
Nehemiah12:43 Ak ki igoito peetuunooto tiseiywek che eecheen ak koboiboitu
Nehemiah12:44 Ki kilewen eng' peetuunooto piik koriip kooriik che po oriit ole kigonoree tuguuk
Nehemiah12:45 Kitononji riipseetap Kamuktaindennywa ak riipseetap kaanyinyet. Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto tyeniik ak riibiik ko uu ng'atuutyetap Daudi ak ne po Solomon weeriinnyi.
Nehemiah12:46 Amu kobooch peetuusyegap Daudi ak Asaph
Nehemiah12:47 Ara anyun ki igoito `Israel tugul kebeberwegap tyeniik ak che po riibiigap kurgotik eng' peetuusyegap Zerubabel ak eng' peetuusyegap Nehemiah
Nehemiah13:1 Kingesoman eng' peetuunooto bukuitap Musa kogas piik
Nehemiah13:2 amu ki ma toroogune piigap Israel amitwogik ak peek. Machutei amu ki igoochi Balaam melekto kogirinda icheek ak kochupto icheek
Nehemiah13:3 Kingo kas icheek Ng'atuutyet
Nehemiah13:4 Ye ki tomo koyaak ng'olyoondoniito
Nehemiah13:5 koot ne ki kigonoree kobooch keny kagoochinoik che po peek che ng'ootiin
Nehemiah13:6 Ago eng' peetuusyechooto tugul kitesei tai ng'aleechu
Nehemiah13:7 Ki anyoo Jerusalem ak agas yaityet ne kiga koyai Eliasib agobo Tobia
Nehemiah13:8 Ki koono niito aaragen miising'. Ki awirte anyun komanda eng' koyooto po oriit tuguuk tugul che po kootap Tobia.
Nehemiah13:9 Yeityo ang'at kitiliil koorichooto po oriit. Ki aip kogeny tuguugap kootap Kamuktaindet koba yooto
Nehemiah13:10 Ki anai ale ma kigoochi Lawiik kebeberwekwak
Nehemiah13:11 Ki ager kong' anyun pounik aleenji
Nehemiah13:12 Ki ip anyun Judah tugul kebeberwegap taman che po peek ak che po divaik ak che po mwanik
Nehemiah13:13 Ki ande riibiik koriip ole kigonoree tuguuk
Nehemiah13:14 Ibwaata
Nehemiah13:15 Ki ageer eng' peetuusyechooto eng' Judah alak che kityechei sabibuk eng' ole kituisye eng' peetuutap sabato
Nehemiah13:16 Kimenyei olooto piigap Tyro ak icheek che ki ibu njireenik ak tuguuk alak tugul che po mung'aaret
Nehemiah13:17 Yeityo ager kong' piik che taagunotiin che po Judah
Nehemiah13:18 Tos ki ma yai ko uu nooto kwanisyekwok ak tos ki ma ibwech Kamuktaindennyo yaityoni tugul ak nganasani? Ang'ni ra koipchi Israel nereegek che siirei eng' ng'emetap sabato.”
Nehemiah13:19 Ye kingo mach koimen eng' ormariichogap Jerusalem ye kitom koit sabato
Nehemiah13:20 Ki tebee anyun saang'utap Jerusalem konyil agenge anan aeng' chemung'arainik ak che aldoi tuguuk alak tugul che po mung'aaret.
Nehemiah13:21 Ki awagee icheek aleenji
Nehemiah13:22 Ki ang'at Lawiik koanyinygei ak kobwa koriip ormariichok
Nehemiah13:23 Ki ageer kogeny eng' peetuusyechooto Yahudik che kiga kotun tiibiigap Ashdod
Nehemiah13:24 Ki ng'alaali kebeber eng' lagokwak ng'aleegap Asdodik anan ko kutusweegap pororyennywa amu ki ma komuuchi kong'alaal kutitap Yahudik.
Nehemiah13:25 Ki ager kong' icheek ak achup
Nehemiah13:26 Tos ki ma yai tengek Solomon laitoryatap Israel eng' tuguuchu? Nganda ki ma komi laitoryat ne uu ineendet eng' pororyosyek che chaang' ak ki chamat eng' Kamuktaindennyi
Nehemiah13:27 Tos kigasak iit anyun ak keyai yaityoni oo tugul
Nehemiah13:28 Ki saania eng' kap Sanbalat Horonindet age eng' weeriigap Joiada
Nehemiah13:29 Ibwaat icheek
Nehemiah13:30 Ki aanyiny Tisiik ak Lawiik anyun eng' piigap pororyosyek tugul
Nehemiah13:31 Ki ang'at tuguuk che po kagoochinetap kweenik ak che po tongoanik keip eng' peetuusyek che ki king'at. Ibwaata
Job1:1 Ki mi chii eng' emetap Us ne ki kiguure Job. Ki igeesunotkei ineendet ak ko po iman. Ki iywei Kamuktaindet ak koistoegei yaityo.
Job1:2 Ki kisikyi weeriik tisap ak tiibiik somok.
Job1:3 Ki tinyei keechiirek eliphuusyek tisap
Job1:4 Ak ki pendi weeriikyik kootap age tugul eng' peetuut ne ki kichopchi
Job1:5 Ye kingo keskei peetuusyekwak che po igoorto
Job1:6 Ki mi anyun peetuut ye kibwanei weeriigap Kamuktaindet kotonondos eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki nyo agine Setani kobooto icheek.
Job1:7 ki teebee anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani koleenji
Job1:8 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani
Job1:9 Kowolji anyun `Setani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Job1:10 Tos ma iyieme ng'ootweet ineendet kobooto koonnyi
Job1:11 Chuul ibak eung'ung' ak itwa tuguuk tugul che tinyei si iroo ngo ma eesyeen eng' taing'ung'.”
Job1:12 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani
Job1:13 Eng' peetuut age ye ki amisyei ak koeei divaik weeriikyik ak tiibiikyik eng' kootap weeriit ne oo ne tupcho
Job1:14 koit ole ki mi Job `chii ne kiga kiyook ak koleenji
Job1:15 koseet anyun piigap Sabe ak kokweri akwotisyechooto. Kagobar otwogik eng' rotwetap chok; kachilil aneege
Job1:16 Ye kita kong'alaali
Job1:17 Ye kita kong'alaali
Job1:18 Ye kita kong'alaali
Job1:19 Ak matyanit kous usoonet ne oo kobunu surkwen ak koryep luukwek ang'wan che po koot koluulji murenik ak kagobek
Job1:20 Ki ng'eet anyun Job ak kobet ngoryennyi ne po parak ak kocher metinnyi yeityo kobutyi ng'wony kosa.
Job1:21 Ak ki le
Job1:22 Ma yai Job tengek eng' chuuto tugul anan koiityi Kamuktaindet yaityo.
Job2:1 Ki mi kogeny peetuut ye kibwanei weeriigap Kamuktaindet kotonondos eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki nyo agine Setani kobooto icheek
Job2:2 Ki teebee `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani koleenji
Job2:3 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani
Job2:4 Ki wolji `Setani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Job2:5 Chuul ibak eung'ung' nguno ak itwaa kawekyik ak panyeekyik
Job2:6 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani
Job2:7 Kwo anyun Setani eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kobiree Job ondirik che ng'woneen kobooch keldebesyennyi agoi metit parak.
Job2:8 Ki inem anyun Job rokyet ak kong'irireegei kotebee oreek.
Job2:9 Ki leenji `osotyonnyi Job
Job2:10 Ago ki leenji `Job ineendet
Job2:11 Kingo kas anyun choronok somogu che po Job
Job2:12 Ye kingo tooben `icheek ineendet eng' ye loo ama inyit ineendet
Job2:13 Ki tebee ng'wony anyun ak ineendet peetuusyek tisap ak kemousyek tisap
Job3:1 Kingo pata chuuto kotwek Job ak kochup peetuutap sigeennyi.
Job3:2 Ki mwa Job kole;
Job3:3 “Ingobet peetuut ne ki kisigeno
Job3:4 Ingoimenit peetuunooto! Amat komage kiy Kamuktaindet eng' parak
Job3:5 Ingonam peetuunooto `mesundeito ak imenindo kobunji. Ingotebee `pooldet peetuunooto
Job3:6 Ingonam `mesundeito kemounooto. Amat kogaskei peetuunooto eng' peetuusyek che po kenyiit
Job3:7 Ee
Job3:8 Ingochup peetuunooto `icheek che chubei peetuut
Job3:9 Ingoimenitu kecheik che po ye karatarat; ingocheeng' lapkeiyet
Job3:10 Amu ki ma rat moetap iyoteetap kamennyu
Job3:11 Amu nee si ki ma ameei ami moo? Amu nee si ma ameei ko kagisicha?
Job3:12 Kilya si kotoroocha kutung'oik
Job3:13 Amu kita arue ak asiis; kita anuuchi
Job3:14 kobooto laitorinik ak kirwoogik che po ng'wony che ki teekyigei komoswek che ki koguber
Job3:15 anan kobooto pounik che ki tinyei thahabu
Job3:16 Kitagaigai nda kiga ki oswo si ma piitu
Job3:17 Olooto koma iimi sogoranik
Job3:18 Eng' olooto ko imuunyi che ratotiin; ma kasei agot kutitap kayagindet.
Job3:19 Mi olooto ne ming'in ak ne oo
Job3:20 Amu nee si kigoochi lapkeiyet ne mi eng' nyalilda
Job3:21 che igeni meet
Job3:22 che poiboitu miising'
Job3:23 Amu nee si kigoochin lapkeiyet chii ne ung'aat ooreennyi
Job3:24 Amu nyoonei aragenennyu kotom aamisye
Job3:25 Kiit ne ki aiywei ko kanyoonjo
Job3:26 Ma tinyei talbis

Job4:8 Ko uu ye ki aroo
Job4:9 Petos eng' kabuusetap Kamuktaindet
Job4:10 Porisenetap ng'etundo
