Job5:1 “Kuurse anyun; tos mi ne wolu? Iwendi kap ng'oo eng' che tiliileen?
Job5:2 Parei nereegek chiito ne perber
Job5:3 Ki ageer kolumdogei chiito ne perber
Job5:4 Mi lagokwak iman ole mi ng'oiyondit
Job5:5 Amei peekwak kogesu che amei rubeet
Job5:6 Amu ma mang'une nyalilda ng'wonyut
Job5:7 Ago kisikyin chiito kaimetapkei
Job5:8 Nda ka anee
Job5:9 Ineendet ne yaei tuguuk che eecheen che ma isiagaksei
Job5:10 Igoochin `ropta ng'wony
Job5:11 Ieeti che nyerootiin; ak kotoroori che tigendos eng' riirek kotebee ole riiboot.
Job5:12 Ng'emei chobutigap piik che ng'aalik
Job5:13 Namei che utaatiin eng' ng'ulaatyetap ng'aalseennywa
Job5:14 Nyoonjin `icheek mesundeito peet
Job5:15 Ago saru ne panani eng' rotwetap chok ne po kutinnywa
Job5:16 Tinyei anyun kibananiat kamang'unet
Job5:17 Paibai chii ne nyooru kergong'yet kobun `Kamuktaindet; amesas anyun katigonetap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet.
Job5:18 Amu iguoteni ak konya
Job5:19 Saruun eng' nyalilwogik lo; ee
Job5:20 Ityachin eng' rubeet si ma parin
Job5:21 Ki unyin eng' piretap ng'elyepta
Job5:22 Irorechini ng'emisyet ak rubeet
Job5:23 Amu onamegei ak koigap warenget
Job5:24 Inae ile mi kaalyeet emaing'ung'
Job5:25 Inae ile chaang'aitu iyoteng'ung' ak kotenit lagoguk susweegap ng'wony.
Job5:26 Iwendi kerering'ung' eng' kalilet ko uu peek che ki kiyum kotononso eng' peetuusyegap kesisyet.
Job5:27 Keero
Job6:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole
Job6:2 ee
Job6:3 Amu nyigisitu kosiir ng'aniek che po nyanjosyek. Kasartae anyun ng'aleekyuk.
Job6:4 Mi oriitinnyu kipchabonigap ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet
Job6:5 Tos iteei oloitigeet ye tinyei susweek
Job6:6 Tos ki amei kiit ne ma chamu kiy ama kinde muunyuk? Anan tos chamu kiy kebeberta ne leel ne po mayaiyat?
Job6:7 Eesyoi saboondanyu kotwa che uu chooto; uu amitwogik che samis eng' anee.
Job6:8 Ee
Job6:9 agot nda chamei Kamuktaindet korurunya
Job6:10 Ta kaanyooru anyun kagaigaet; ta kaabaibaitu eng' ng'wanindo ne ma pagaaktoi chii; amu ma atiiye ng'aleegap Ineendet ne Tiliil.
Job6:11 Nee kimnateennyu si kobiit agen? Ak nee kagesunennyu si kobiit amuita?
Job6:12 Tos uu kimnateennyu kimnateetap koik? Anan po poortanyu sugunwet?
Job6:13 Tos ma amu ma tinye anee toreteet eng' oriitinnyu
Job6:14 Icheeget che eeteen chorweet rireenet
Job6:15 Ki koyai tupchosyekyuk kaberberisyet ko uu kereruut
Job6:16 Che katuuegitu amu koigap ropta
Job6:17 Ak ye kalalang'it kobetyo
Job6:18 Mastoi che rutoe ooreenywa
Job6:19 Ki keer kiprutoinigap Tema
Job6:20 Ki ililanso amu kiga komong'; ki pwa yooto
Job6:21 Amu oo puch nguno; ogeere kamuiset ak oiyweisye.
Job6:22 Tos ki amwa ale
Job6:23 Anan ale osarwo eng' eutap puunyoot? Anan ki ale otyacha eng' eutap usiik?
Job6:24 Oneeta
Job6:25 Kiimeen ne tya ng'aleegap imanda! Ago kertoi kong' ano tiiyeng'wong'?
Job6:26 Oleen ogere kong' ng'aleek? Uu usoonet ng'alaalutigap ineendet ne ki kogeskei kamang'unennyi.
Job6:27 Omache oseer parbareek agobo ne ma tinyei sigiik
Job6:28 Ago nguno anyun
Job6:29 Asaak ale
Job6:30 Tos mi keniisyet ng'elyeptanyu? Tos ma muuchi abesyo tuguugap yaityet?

Job7:3 ko kagigoono anyun arawek che po puch kobunjo

Job8:1 Ki wol anyun Bildad Suindet kole
Job8:2 “Imwae tuguuchuuto kot kotyanit
Job8:3 Tos igunuuri `Kamuktaindet kirwooget? Anan imaasi Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet imanda?
Job8:4 Ngot ko ki koyachi `lagoguk ineendet tengekto
Job8:5 Ngot icheeng' Kamuktaindet eng' kagiiletapkei
Job8:6 ngot ko ii tiliil ak ko ii litit
Job8:7 Ak nganda ki ming'in tauneng'ung'
Job8:8 Asaain anyun ale
Job8:9 Amu ki po acheek amut ak ma kingen kiy
Job8:10 Tos ma ineetin ak komwaun
Job8:11 Tos imuuchi koeet mutwot ama mi nyanyawet? Tos imuuchi kobiit mutwot ama mi peek?
Job8:12 Yeta konyaliil ak kotom ketil
Job8:13 Uu chooto ortinwek che po `tugul che utye Kamuktaindet; petei kamang'unetap chiito ne ma po iman.
Job8:14 Ng'emaksei kamang'unennyi
Job8:15 Tiegei koonnyi
Job8:16 Nyalilitu eng' peetuusyegap asiista
Job8:17 Taachingei tigitikyik karurugutyetap koik; keerei komostap koik.
Job8:18 Ngot keng'em eng' komostanyi
Job8:19 Keero
Job8:20 Keero
Job8:21 Inyiiti kuting'ung' roryot ak konyiit kuting'ung' poiboiyet.
Job8:22 Kilaakyin kalilanet icheeget che wechin; ama komi emaitap kiptengeginik.”
Job9:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole
Job9:2 angen iman ale uu nooto. Ago imuktoi ano chiito koek ne po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet?
Job9:3 Ngot kochamei chiichooto kobelgei ak ineendet
Job9:4 Utaat ineendet eng' muguleldo
Job9:5 Ineendet ne iutoi tuloonook ama naei icheek
Job9:6 ne kitumdumi ng'wonyut koistogei eng' komostanyi
Job9:7 Ne ng'atei asiista si ma chor; ak ko ng'oochei kecheik.
Job9:8 Ineendet ineegei ne iitoi kipsengwet
Job9:9 Ineendet ne yaei kecheik che uu tyondo
Job9:10 Ineendet ne yaei tuguuk che eecheen che ma kiguitos
Job9:11 Ye punei ye neegiteena
Job9:12 Keero
Job9:13 Ma istoi Kamuktaindet nereegekyik; ing'uruuksei toretigap Rahab eng' keelyekyik.
Job9:14 Amuuchi anee awoljindo ano? Alewendoi ano ng'aleekyuk che kimwae ak ineendet?
Job9:15 Ne agot ngo aa po iman
Job9:16 Nda ki kaguur ak kowolwo; ta mayani ale kita kasei kutinnyu.
Job9:17 Amu tuena usoonet ne oo
Job9:18 Ma chamwo abuus
Job9:19 Ngeng'alaal agobo kabeletapkei
Job9:20 Agot ngo po iman
Job9:21 Nga aa ititaat
Job9:22 Agenge tugul; nooto amwae anyun ale
Job9:23 Ngot kobaris pireet kochokyi
Job9:24 Ki kinde ng'wonyuni eunegap kiptengeginik; tuchei togoochigap kirwoogikyik. Ngot koma ineendet
Job9:25 Ruaei peetuusyekyuk kosiir ne labatindet; mweei
Job9:26 Kagosiirto ko uu melisyek che rwaei; ko uu kipsiichit ne choorchingei tyondo ne machei kobar.
Job9:27 Ngot amwa ale
Job9:28 Aiywei aragenosyekyuk tugul
Job9:29 Kirwookwo
Job9:30 Agot ngaunegei peegap teluji
Job9:31 Agot ngo uu nooto iwiirchino keriinget
Job9:32 Amu ineendet koma chii
Job9:33 Amu ma mi ne ioitoseech
Job9:34 Ingoistoena kiroktonyi
Job9:35 si ang'alaal anyun
Job10:1 Aweche sabeennyu; amwaitoi kang'unyng'unyennyu
Job10:2 Aleenjini Kamuktaindet: Amerwookwo; iboorwo anyun kiit ne kagoonin kibelgei.
Job10:3 Tos myee iusisye
Job10:4 Tos itinye koonyek che po kipkosabei? Tos igeere ko uu ye keerei kimugulmet?
Job10:5 Tos kergei peetuusyeguk ak peetuusyegap chii
Job10:6 kot icheeng' tengektonyu
Job10:7 agot ngingen ile ma aa chii ne ya
Job10:8 Kiyaa euneguk ak komimia. Nguno anyun ko tos igeesua inyee?
Job10:9 Ibwaat anyun ile ki imimia ko uu meneet; ara tos igetyina ng'ung'unyek kogeny?
Job10:10 Tos ma iroong'wa ko uu cheego
Job10:11 Ki ilaakwa iriryot ak panyeek
Job10:12 Ki igoono sabeet ak chamyet ne oo
Job10:13 Ago ki iung'ee tuguuchooto muguleldang'ung'; angen ale mi niito kobooten.
Job10:14 Ngot ayai tengek
Job10:15 Ngot ko aa ya
Job10:16 Ngot ang'eet metinnyu
Job10:17 Ileelityina paoriniguk
Job10:18 “Kilya anyun si icham kesicho? Kita kaigai ame
Job10:19 Aiegeitu chii ne ma piit
Job10:20 Tos ma ng'ering' peetuusyekyuk? Siis anyun ak ibagaakta
Job10:21 kotom awe ole ma aweeksei
Job10:22 emetap imenindo ne oo
Job11:1 Ki wol anyun Zophar Naamatindet kole
Job11:2 tos ma nyoljin kewol ng'aleechu chaang'? Tos ki ityin imanda chii ne chaang' ng'ala?
Job11:3 Tos igoochin piik kosiisyo kachaunasyeguk pogei? Ye ichotisyei
Job11:4 Amu imwae ile
Job11:5 Kata myee kong'alaal Kamuktaindet
Job11:6 ak koboorun ung'ootik che po utaatyet
Job11:7 “Tos imuuchi inyooru Kamuktaindet ngisyach? Tos imuuchi inyooru ole poochin Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet?
Job11:8 Toroor kosiir kipsengwet
Job11:9 Kakwautyennyi ko kooi kosiir ng'wony
Job11:10 Ngot kosiirto inee
Job11:11 Ingen `ineendet piik che ma tilei kiy; ye keerei ineendet tengekto
Job11:12 Ago ma tinyei kaguiyet chiito ne ma tilei kiy
Job11:13 Ngot ichop muguleldang'ung' kolititiit
Job11:14 ngo mi tengekto eung'ung'
Job11:15 Ngiyai ko uu nooto
Job11:16 Iutye nyalildang'ung'
Job11:17 Lapkeitu sabeeng'ung' kosiir peet kween; agot ngo mi mesundeito kogergeitu ak karon.
Job11:18 Ak itebi eng' nyiganateet
Job11:19 Irue anyun
Job11:20 Ago keroksei konyegap kiptengeginik
Job12:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole
Job12:2 iman
Job12:3 Ago anyun atinye kaguiyet agane
Job12:4 Auu chiito ne rorechin piigap kokwennyi; ne kiguur Kamuktaindet
Job12:5 Sasei nyaliil chii ne tebyei eng' kaalyeet; eng' ineendet ko kigechopchi nyaliilda icheek che ichabaitoi keelyekwak.
Job12:6 Poorei emaisyegap choriik
Job12:7 Teebee tyong'ik
Job12:8 ng'alaalji ng'wony
Job12:9 Ng'oo ne ma naei eng' chuuto tugul
Job12:10 Mi eunnyi saboondap kiy age tugul ne sabei
Job12:11 Tos matyemei itit ng'aleek
Job12:12 Tos ma mi utaatyet kobooto poisyek che oosen? Ak tos ma piitu kaguiyet eng' chaang'indap peetuusyek?
Job12:13 Mi utaatyet ak kamuktaet kobooto ineendet; tinyei kirwooget ak naet.
Job12:14 Putei
Job12:15 Ngot koeet peek
Job12:16 Mi kobooto ineendet kimnateet ak utaatyet; nenyi ne kiberberi ak kaberberindet.
Job12:17 Imuti kirwoogik aach ngor koloegitu
Job12:18 Ityachi ratuutyetap laitorinik
Job12:19 Imuti tisiik ko luulenik
Job12:20 Istoi tweguunetap che kiyani
Job12:21 Rong'jin pounik sasisyet
Job12:22 Nyooru tuguuk che ung'ootiin eng' mesundeito
Job12:23 Ieetu pororyosyek
Job12:24 Ibee `kaguiyet pounigap piik che po ng'wony
Job12:25 Tung'dung'yoti eng' mesundeito ama tinyei lapkeiyet
Job13:1 Ki kogeer konyekyuk chuuto tugul
Job13:2 Kiit ne ongen
Job13:3 Iman amache ang'alaalji Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet
Job13:4 Ago okweek
Job13:5 Kata myee osisye miising'! Si koek niito utaatyeng'wong'.
Job13:6 Ogas anyun ng'aleekyuk che amwae
Job13:7 Tos omwae che ma po iman agobo Kamuktaindet
Job13:8 Tos otiytiy ineendet? Tos obeligei ak Kamuktaindet?
Job13:9 Tos myeiit eng' okweek ye isyachak? Anan oberberi ineendet ko uu ye kiberberi chii?
Job13:10 Kerok kong' iman
Job13:11 Tos ma koonin etunatennyi iywei? Ak kobutyin kaiyweisyennyi?
Job13:12 Ng'aleekwok che kibwaati ko kalewenaigap oreek
Job13:13 Osisye
Job13:14 Tos aname poortanyu kelekyuk
Job13:15 Agot ngo para
Job13:16 Egu niito agine yetunennyu; amu ma nyoonei tainnyi chiito ne ya.
Job13:17 Ogas ng'aleekyuk eng' kagiiletapkei
Job13:18 Ogeer anyuno
Job13:19 Ng'oo ineendet ne kibeligei tuwai? Amu asise ak amee.
Job13:20 Iyaiywo kityo tuguuk aeng'
Job13:21 Istoena eung'ung' kolooit eng' anee; amat komua kamuiseng'ung'.
Job13:22 Kuurse anyun
Job13:23 Ata ng'oogiswekyuk ak tengekwogikyuk? Koono anai pistoennyu ak tengektonyu.
Job13:24 Amu nee anyun si iuny togeng'ung'
Job13:25 Tos inyalili sogoot ne ibei usoonet? Ak isubi mobeek che yamyotiin?
Job13:26 Amu ki isir ng'aleek che ng'woneen agobo anee
Job13:27 Iratyini keelyekyuk temeleiywek ak igeer ortinwekyuk tugul; isire kiwoteet ole poochin keelyekyuk.
Job13:28 Ara igeesugei chii ko uu kiit ne kigonun
Job14:1 Ng'ering' peetuusyegap chii
Job14:2 Piitei ko uu taapteet ak kores; labati ko uu urwet ama tononi.
Job14:3 Tos igeere chii ne uu nooto? Tos imuta keebe tuwai kapkirwook?
Job14:4 Ng'oo ne imuuchi komoong'une ne anyiny ole ng'waan? Ma mi
Job14:5 Amu ki ing'at peetuusyegap chii
Job14:6 Ituktoochi patai ineendet anyun
Job14:7 Amu mi kamang'unet agobo keetit; ngot kiluul
Job14:8 Agot ngo osegitu tigitikyik eng' ng'ung'unyek
Job14:9 ago ing'ati ko kagas anyinyindap peek
Job14:10 Ago igeesugei chii
Job14:11 Ko uu ye teng'dos peegap nyanjet
Job14:12 ko uu nooto anyun
Job14:13 Ee

Job14:16 Ago iiti nguno kakwautikyuk

Job14:19 Ko uu ye amei `peek koik
Job14:20 Iterteeri ineendet agoi kosiirto
Job14:21 Nyooru weeriikyik teegisto
Job14:22 Ago tinyei ng'wanindo poortanyi
Job15:1 Ki wol anyun Eliphas Temanindet kole
Job15:2 tos nyolu kowol chii ne utaat eng' naet ne po puch? Anan konyiit moennyi usoonet ne po kong'asiis?
Job15:3 Tos nyolu korwooch eng' ng'aleek che ma tilei kiy
Job15:4 Ago imetoi kaiyweetap Kamuktaindet
Job15:5 Amu ineeti tengektong'ung' kuting'ung'
Job15:6 Irwoogun kuting'ung'
Job15:7 Tos inyee chiito ne kisip kesich? Anan kisip kesichin kotom kobiit tuloonook?
Job15:8 Tos ki igas kirwoogutigap ung'oot che po Kamuktaindet? Ak iityinige inyegei utaatyet?
Job15:9 Nee ne ingen ne ma kingen? Nee kaguiyet ne itinye ne ma ki tinyei?
Job15:10 Ki mi ak poisyek che po kalwalek ak che ki koosegitu miising'
Job15:11 Tos nyerootiin kagaigaosyegap Kamuktaindet eng' inyee
Job15:12 Amu nee si kobeetin muguleldang'ung'
Job15:13 kot iwal muguleldong'ung' kongelelji Kamuktaindet
Job15:14 Nee chii
Job15:15 Ngo ma imang'u Kamuktaindet piikyik che tiliileen; ak ngo ma tiliileen kipsengwet eng' tainnyi
Job15:16 kotam nee ineendet ne kewechei ak ko samis
Job15:17 Kasa anyun asi aboorun
Job15:18 che kimwau piik che ng'oomen
Job15:19 Che ki kigoochi emet icheegei
Job15:20 Kasei ng'wanindo kiptengekyot eng' peetuusyekyik tugul
Job15:21 Mi itiikyik tuugeetap kamuisosyek; ibookyin ineendet `luulindet eng' peetuusyekyik che po poroteet.
Job15:22 Ma iyani kole weeksei eng' mesundeito
Job15:23 Ombenoti kocheeng'oti amitwogik ak koleen
Job15:24 Imui nyalilda ak ng'wanindo; iterteeri `icheek ineendet
Job15:25 Amu kigochuul ineendet eunnyi kogirinda Kamuktaindet
Job15:26 Labatyin ineendet eng' kaatit ne uui
Job15:27 Amu ki kotuch togeennyi nerateennyi
Job15:28 Ki komeny nganasook che ki koguber
Job15:29 Ma egu mogoryo ama tebyei tuguukyik
Job15:30 Ma istoegei mesundeito; iyami liplibenetap maat mooriikyik
Job15:31 Amat komong' tuguugap puch
Job15:32 Isuldoi kotom koit peetuunnyi
Job15:33 Itumdumi sabibuk che tomo koruryo ko uu keetiigap sabibuk
Job15:34 Amu egu soon tuiyetap che ma iywei Kamuktaindet
Job15:35 Manachi yaityet ak kosich tengekto
Job16:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole
Job16:2 “Ki agas tuguuk che chaang' che uu chooto; okweek tugul ko oo kagoigoik che otese nyalilda.
Job16:3 Tos tinyei ng'aleegap puch ole igeesunegei? Anan nee ne kaiimin kot irang'u ng'al che chaang'?
Job16:4 Amuuchi ang'alaal agane ko uu okweek
Job16:5 Kata agimiitok eng' kutinnyu
Job16:6 Agot ngang'alaali
Job16:7 Kago koono nguno Kamuktaindet ang'et; ak kaigoochi koonnyu tugul koguber.
Job16:8 Kaigiicha miising'
Job16:9 Kagogereera inee eng' nereegekyik ak kousa
Job16:10 Kagoyatya kuut ak kororecho icheek; kagorabacha eng' chotisyet
Job16:11 Igoochino `Kamuktaindet piik che yaacheen
Job16:12 Ki amuunyi
Job16:13 yiema mwogikyik. Petei suennyu
Job16:14 Kagoiria konyil che chaang'; labatyina ko uu chiito chemosit.
Job16:15 Kaanapchi kuniok poortanyu
Job16:16 Kagong'emak togeennyu eng' riirek
Job16:17 Agot ngo ma mi koroomnateet eunekyuk
Job16:18 Ee ng'wony
Job16:19 Agot nguno
Job16:20 Sasa choronokyuk: roong'jin konyekyuk peegap kong' Kamuktaindet.
Job16:21 Kata myee nda kang'alaali chii ne kata anee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
Job16:22 Amu ye kagosiirto kenyiisyek che ng'ering'
Job17:1 “Kago keskei saboondanyu
Job17:2 Iman mi kobooto che chotisyei
Job17:3 Koono kiit ne po kayasyoet
Job17:4 Amu keuny muguleldanywa si ma iguiyo; metoroori anyun icheek amu nooto.
Job17:5 Ineendet ne igoitoi choronokyik agobo kelunet
Job17:6 Kagoyaa aek kalewenet eng' piik; ak kaaegu ne kiwechei ne keerei piik tugul.
Job17:7 Kagoimenitu konyekyuk amu arageneet
Job17:8 Kwong'dos piik che po iman agobo niito
Job17:9 Agot ngo uu nooto kowendi ne po iman eng' ooreennyi
Job17:10 Ago oweeige okweek tugul
Job17:11 Kagosiirto peetuusyekyuk
Job17:12 Walei icheek kemout koek peet; leen
Job17:13 Imuuch acheeng' ye mi che ki kobek koek koonnyu
Job17:14 Ngot aleenji ng'emisyet
Job17:15 komi ano anyun kamang'unennyu? Keerei ng'oo anyun kamang'unennyu?
Job17:16 Tos chortogei agoi temeleiywegap ye mi che ki kobek? Tos kibe tuwai ole mi temburyek?”
Job18:1 Ki wol anyun `Bildad Suindet kole
Job18:2 “Oriiche mestetap ng'aleek kot kotyanit? Obwaat
Job18:3 Amu nee si kiitech keele ki tyong'ik
Job18:4 Imuuchi igereer suumeeguk eng' nereegek
Job18:5 Ki misi lapkeiyetap kiptengegeginik
Job18:6 Imenitu lapkeiyet eng' emainnyi
Job18:7 Kisagiti tyegutigap kimnateennyi
Job18:8 Amu ki kowiirchi keelyekyik ineendet mesteet ne uu regereiywot
Job18:9 Namei mesteetap porowet kwaryandennyi
Job18:10 Kagiuny eng' ng'wony mesteetap rogoet agobo ineendet
Job18:11 Igoochin kamuisosyek ineendet koiyweis eng' komosta age tugul
Job18:12 Amei rubeet kimnateennyi
Job18:13 Amei kebeberwegap poortanyi
Job18:14 Kitutu ineendet eng' emainnyi ne ki imang'u; Ak kimutyi laitoryatap kamuisosyek.
Job18:15 Menyei emainnyi kiit ne ma nenyi: Kiseere meng'ootennyi koik che laldos.
Job18:16 Yaamdos tigitikyik eng' oriit
Job18:17 Lusei kabwaatennyi eng' ng'wony
Job18:18 Ki oonei eng' ole mi lapkeiyet kwo mesundeito
Job18:19 Ma nyooru `ineendet weeriit anan mochogoret eng' piikyik
Job18:20 Kwong'dos eng' peetuunnyi icheeget che piitu let
Job18:21 Uu nooto iman meng'otosyegap che ma po iman
Job19:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole
Job19:2 “Onyaliilii saboondanyu agoi kotyanit
Job19:3 Ka ochota konyil taman. Nyolu olilanse amu oyaiywo eng' koroomnateet.
Job19:4 Ngo ki alel iman
Job19:5 Ngot oeetkei agobo anee
Job19:6 Onai anyun ole kagogabua Kamuktaindet
Job19:7 Ogeero
Job19:8 Kago ng'oot ooreennyu kot koma muuchi abun
Job19:9 Kago reegunena toroornatennyu
Job19:10 Kagotua eng' komosta age tugul
Job19:11 Kagolalyo kogeny nereegekyik agobo anee
Job19:12 Pwoonei kweanaikyik che po lugeet kobookyino
Job19:13 Kagoistoena tupchosyekyuk kolooena
Job19:14 Kagobagaakta tilyonutikyuk
Job19:15 Kagoiita piik che menyei koonnyu ak otwogikyuk che tiibiik aige too: Aa kipsagarin eng' tainnywa.
Job19:16 Aguure otwogindennyu
Job19:17 Kagoek kabusennyu kiy ne too eng' kwondanyu
Job19:18 Saso agot lagok che mengech
Job19:19 Wecha choronokyuk che ko ki chamdosi miising'
Job19:20 Namegei kawekyuk ak iriryonnyu ak panyeekyuk
Job19:21 Orirena
Job19:22 Amu nee si ousa ko uu Kamuktaindet
Job19:23 Ee
Job19:24 Kesire kalamitap karnet ak ngosyelait
Job19:25 Ago angen ale sabei Katyagindennyu
Job19:26 Ak ye kagong'emak iriryondennyu ko uu ni
Job19:27 Ne tuun ageere kimni
Job19:28 Ngot omwa ole
Job19:29 Oiywei rotwetap chok
Job20:1 Kowol anyun Zophar Naamatindet kole
Job20:2 “Koono kabwaatutikyuk waluunet
Job20:3 Ka agas kereetap kong' ne kagoono alilan
Job20:4 Tos ki tom iguiye niito kobooch keny
Job20:5 ile
Job20:6 Agot ngo togosta etunatennyi kipsengwet
Job20:7 kolusei koigeny ko uu ng'atateekyik. Teebei che ki kogeer ineendet kole
Job20:8 Siirtoi ko uu karwotitoet
Job20:9 Ma kogeerei kogeny konda ne kiga kogeer ineendet
Job20:10 Cheeng'ei lagokyik chameet eng' kibananook
Job20:11 Nyiitaat kawekyik ming'inatennyi
Job20:12 Nganda anyiny tengekto eng' kutinnyi
Job20:13 nganda riiree ama chamjin kwo
Job20:14 ago walaksei amitwogikyik eng' moennyi
Job20:15 Ki kolugui mogornatosyek ak kong'ung'u kogeny; tumdoi Kamuktaindet chooto eng' moennyi.
Job20:16 Chuchuni ng'wonetap erenook; parei ineendet `ng'elyeptap ereneet.
Job20:17 Ma keerei ainoosyek
Job20:18 Iweegu tuguuk che ki kobirtochigei eng' poisyet
Job20:19 Amu ki inyaliil kibananook ak kometo
Job20:20 Amu ki ma nai kamuung'et eng' oriitinnyi
Job20:21 Ma ng'et kiy ne ki ma am. Nooto anyun
Job20:22 Pichiityin eng' chaang'indap tuguukyik
Job20:23 Ye machei konyiit moennyi
Job20:24 Nga mwee `icheek kariigap lugeet
Job20:25 Ng'usu
Job20:26 Kagigonorchi mesundeito tuguukyik che korooron; peelei ineendet maat ne maguutei chii
Job20:27 Ng'aanyei kipsengwet tengektanyi
Job20:28 Istogei mogornateetap koonnyi
Job20:29 Niito kebeberta ne po kiptengekyot
Job21:1 Kowol anyun Job kole
Job21:2 “Oepchi iit komyee ng'alaalennyu; ak ingoek niito kagaigaeng'wong'.
Job21:3 Ogang'wa
Job21:4 Tos ariir anee agobo chii? Ak amu nee si ma egu chii ne ma muitoi?
Job21:5 Ogeera
Job21:6 Agot ye abwaat tuguuk che ki ityo
Job21:7 Amu nee si kosaptos kiptengeginik
Job21:8 Kimegitu iyotennywa eng' tainnywa
Job21:9 Mi kaalyeet kooriikwak
Job21:10 Riisyei kirginnywa
Job21:11 Imaandoi lagokwak ko uu akweetap keechiirek
Job21:12 Tyendos eng' sugutit ak ketubet
Job21:13 Poisyee peetuusyekwak eng' poroteet
Job21:14 Ago ki leenji Kamuktaindet
Job21:15 Ng'oo Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet
Job21:16 Ogeero
Job21:17 Kimisi tait ne po kiptengeginik konyil ata? Kot konyonji icheeget pichiindanywa? Kot kopcheita Kamuktaindet aragenosyek eng' nereegekyik?
Job21:18 Ak koigei icheek mobeek eng' taitap usoonet
Job21:19 Oleen konorchin Kamuktaindet lagogap chiichooto tengektanyi. Ago aleen
Job21:20 Ingogeer konyekyik ng'emisyennyi
Job21:21 Amu igoochin koonnyi ineendet poiboiyo nee ye kagobata ineendet
Job21:22 Tos ineeti chii Kamuktaindet naet? Amu irwookyin che torooreen.
Job21:23 Meei age ko nyiitaat kimnateennyi
Job21:24 Nyiitootiin kinaikyik cheego
Job21:25 Meei age eng' ng'wanindap saboondo
Job21:26 Kergei tugul
Job21:27 Ogeero
Job21:28 Amu oleen
Job21:29 Tos ma oteebe icheek che siirtoi? Amongen kaboorunaikwak?
Job21:30 Ole
Job21:31 Ng'oo ne mwaitoi ooreennyi eng' tainnyi? Ak ng'oo ne yaakyin ineendet kiit ne kayai?
Job21:32 Nganda uu nooto kelaei kwo kererit
Job21:33 Anyinyitu eng' ineendet mogooroonigap atebweet
Job21:34 Omuktoi ano anyun ogaigaa puch
Job22:1 Kowol anyun Eliphas Temanindet kole
Job22:2 tos imuuchi chii kotoret Kamuktaindet? Toretigei iman ineendet ne ng'oom.
Job22:3 Tos poiboitu Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet ngeele ii po iman? Anan tos nyooru ineendet kelunet amu iyae ortinweguk koek che ititaatiin?
Job22:4 Tos kerin kong' amu kaiyweisyet ne iywei ineendet
Job22:5 Tos ma oo tengektong'ung'? Ama tinyei tengekwogiguk ole igeesunegei.
Job22:6 Amu ki iyasyechi puch ne otupche
Job22:7 Ki ma inage peek ne kang'et
Job22:8 Ago ki po emet chiito ne nyigan; Ak ki meny olooto chiito ne tinyei teegisto.
Job22:9 Ki ioon mosoogik koba ak euut puch
Job22:10 Kayiemin anyun mestonok
Job22:11 Anan mesundeito
Job22:12 Tos ma mi Kamuktaindet ole toroor eng' kipsengwet? Ak keero
Job22:13 Ak imwae ile
Job22:14 Tuchei ineendet poolik che eecheen
Job22:15 Isubi ooreet ne po keny ne kityech piik che yaacheen?
Job22:16 Che ki king'us kotom kogeskei peetuusyekwak
Job22:17 Che ki leenji Kamuktaindet
Job22:18 Ago ki inyiit ineendet kooriikwak tuguuk che myach: Ago loo eng' anee kirwoogetap kiptengeginik.
Job22:19 Keerei nooto che po iman
Job22:20 Koleen
Job22:21 Onaiye anyun ak ineendet ak itebee kaalyeet: Si konyonjin kiit ne myee.
Job22:22 Asaain ale
Job22:23 Ngot iweekyigei Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet
Job22:24 Ak igonor konoraiguk eng' ng'ung'unyek
Job22:25 Ak koek Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet konorweng'ung'
Job22:26 Ibaibaegei anyun Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet
Job22:27 Isa anyun ineendet ak kogasin: Ak iyaakte arorutiguk.
Job22:28 Ing'ate kogeny kiy
Job22:29 Ye kiwiirchin ng'wony
Job22:30 Saru agot ineendet ne ma po iman: Ee
Job23:1 Kowol anyun Job kole
Job23:2 kang'wanit rani kang'unyng'unyennyu. Nyigiis pirennyu kosiir tigenennyu.
Job23:3 Kata myee nda kangen ole anyoorchini ineendet
Job23:4 Ta achobe ng'olyoondennyu eng' tainnyi
Job23:5 Si anae ng'aleek che wolwo
Job23:6 Tos kibeligei eng' ooindap kamuktaennyi? Achicha; epchino iit.
Job23:7 Imuuchi ne po iman kong'alaaljin ak ineendet eng' olooto. Si kesarwo koigeny eng' ineendet ne irwokwo.
Job23:8 Ogeero awendi tai
Job23:9 Awendi murot kaataam ole poisyee
Job23:10 Ago ingen ineendet ooreet ne abune
Job23:11 Kagonamgei keldanyu ak tyegutikyik; Kaasup ooreennyi
Job23:12 Ma aweege let amete ng'atuutyetap kutinnyi; Kaagonor ng'aleek che punu kutinnyi kosiir amitwogik che nyoljino.
Job23:13 Ne siirei
Job23:14 Amu yaei ineendet nooto kageng'atwa. Ak mi tuguuk che chaang' che uu chooto kobooto ineendet.
Job23:15 Anyalili anyun eng' tainnyi; Ye abwaat
Job23:16 Amu kagogoochi `Kamuktaindet muguleldanyu kotanui
Job23:17 Amu ki ma kiistoo kotom kobiit mesundeito
Job24:1 “Amu nee si ma konor Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet peetuusyek? Ak amu nee si ma keer peetuusyekyik icheek che ingen ineendet?
Job24:2 Mi che istoi kiwotosyek. Rebei icheek eng' kimnateet akwotisyegap keechiirek
Job24:3 Kweryei icheek sigiryetap che ma tinyei sigiik
Job24:4 Imaasi che panandos; ung'egei uwak kibananogap ng'wony.
Job24:5 Pendi icheek poisyennywa ko uu oloitigeet eng' surkwen
Job24:6 Kesei amitwogikwak eng' mbar
Job24:7 Ruitos aach ngor kemout komugul
Job24:8 Inesyin roptap tuloonook icheek
Job24:9 Mi che ng'use kinaik che ma tinyei kwanisyek
Job24:10 Kot kobendat aach ngor
Job24:11 Che yaei mwanik eng' oriititap inatusyegap pichuuto
Job24:12 Tigendos piik eng' nganaseet ne chaang' piik
Job24:13 Chuuto ko che po icheek che ingeleljin lapkeiyet. Ma naei ortinwekyik
Job24:14 Ng'eetei rumiindet ko kaeech kobar kibananook ak che ma tinyei kiy
Job24:15 Igeni kondap ne ibegei ko ratarat
Job24:16 Yaatei kooriik kemoi
Job24:17 Amu karon eng' icheek tugul ko uu urwetap meet; Amu ingen kamuisosyegap urwetap meet.
Job24:18 Labatee ineendet paragutap peek; Chuboot kebebertanywa eng' ng'wony. Ma punei ooreetap mbareenigap sabibuk.
Job24:19 Istoi kemeut ak kiptoret peegap teluji: Uu nooto
Job24:20 Utye moet ne kisichei ineendet. Amei kuutik ineendet eng' anyinyindo. Ma kibwaati kogeny
Job24:21 Amei ineendet ne soon
Job24:22 Ichuuti che kiimeen ak icheek eng' kamugennyi: Ng'eetei
Job24:23 Igoochin Kamuktaindet icheek kotebee ole mi kaalyeet
Job24:24 Kitoroori
Job24:25 Ak ngot koma uu nooto anyun
Job25:1 Kowol anyun Bildad Suindet kole
Job25:2 pounateet ak kaiyweisyet ko po Kamuktaindet. Yaei kaalyeet eng' komoswekyik che torooreen.
Job25:3 Tos iitoksei lugosyekyik? Ak ng'oo ne ma iluuchin lapkeiyennyi?
Job25:4 Imuktoi ano anyun chii koek ne po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet? Ak tiliilitundoi ano ineendet ne ki sich kwony?
Job25:5 Ngot ko agot arawet koma tinyei kaluunet
Job25:6 kotam nee anyun chiito
Job26:1 Kowol anyun Job kole
Job26:2 ketoretite ano chii ne ma tinyei kamuget! Kesaruunde ano eutap ineendet ne ma tinyei kimnateet!
Job26:3 Ketigonde ano ineendet ne ma tinyei utaatyet
Job26:4 Kamwaun ng'oo ng'aleechu? Ak po ng'oo naet ne ki mong'unenen?
Job26:5 Potandos icheek che ki kobek che mi peek oriit ak che menyei olooto.
Job26:6 Mi puch ye mi che ki kobek eng' tainnyi
Job26:7 Iitoi murot kaataam ole ma mi kiy
Job26:8 Ratei peek eng' polikyik che eecheen; Ama petoksei pooldet eng' kurereetap peechooto.
Job26:9 Unyei togeetap arawet
Job26:10 Ki inde kiwoteet koyiem nyanjosyek
Job26:11 Potandos tolochigap kipsengwet ak ko kwong'dos eng' kerennyi po kong'.
Job26:12 Wasei nyanjet eng' kamuktaennyi
Job26:13 Ki lelesonjine kipsengwet kabuusennyi; kotoor eunnyi ereneet ne chepchep.
Job26:14 Chuuto kogiwotosyegap ortinwekyik
Job27:1 Kigetyigei kogeny `Job kalewenennyi ak komwa kole:
Job27:2 ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet
Job27:3 kotee kota kochamegei saboondanyu eng' oriitinnyu
Job27:4 Iman
Job27:5 Achicha
Job27:6 Aname imandanyu kouiit
Job27:7 Ingogergeit punyondennyu ak kiptengekyot
Job27:8 Nee kamang'unetap chii ne ma iywei Kamuktaindet
Job27:9 Tos kasei Kamuktaindet riirekyik
Job27:10 Tos ibaibaegei Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet
Job27:11 Aneetook agobo eutap Kamuktaindet
Job27:12 Ki ogeer nooto okweek tugul
Job27:13 Niito ko kebebertap kiptengekyot eng' Kamuktaindet
Job27:14 nga tesatiin lagokyik
Job27:15 Che kang'etune ineendet
Job27:16 Agot ngobas fedhaisyek ko uu temburyek
Job27:17 Imuuchi kochop
Job27:18 Teechei koonnyi ko uu ne po kiproroktet
Job27:19 Ruei ko mogoryo
Job27:20 Namei ineendet kamuisosyek ko uu peek
Job27:21 Ibei ineendet usoonet ne po kong'asiis
Job27:22 Amu wiirei `Kamuktaindet ineendet ama riiree. Machei komwee eunnyi.
Job27:23 Iraprabi piik eunekwak agobo ineendet
Job28:1 “Iman
Job28:2 Kibalune kariik ng'wony
Job28:3 Chobei chiito lapkeiyet eng' mesundeito
Job28:4 Palei keriinget ole looe ole menyei piik. Utye icheeget che siirtoi; Igartatotiin icheeget eng' ole looe piik
Job28:5 Mang'une `ng'wony amitwogigap ng'wony
Job28:6 Ingen chiito kocheeng' koigap komostap sapphire
Job28:7 Ma naei oranooto toriityon ne parisyei
Job28:8 Tom kotyech yooto tyong'ik che menot
Job28:9 Iyogoitoi eunnyi si kotwaei rwandet ne uui
Job28:10 Petei ole punei peek eng' rwandosyek; Ak kogeerei kondanyi kiit age tugul ne po kamanuutyet.
Job28:11 Kerei ainoosyek si maroot
Job28:12 Ago kinyoorchin ano utaatyet? Ak menyei ano komostap kaguiyet?
Job28:13 Ma naei chii alyetap nooto
Job28:14 Leen rireet
Job28:15 Ma kimuuchi keale thahabu
Job28:16 Ma kimuuchi kiroge thahabu che po Opir
Job28:17 Ma kimuuchi ki aechine ng'omnateet thahabu ak klasit. Ama kiwale tuguuk che po thahabu che korooron.
Job28:18 Ma kimwaei tuguuk che piriireen che mi ngeguut anan sonoek che korooron. Ee
Job28:19 Ma ki aechindos ak topasio ne po Kush
Job28:20 Punu ano anyun utaatyet? Ak menyei ano komostap kaguiyet?
Job28:21 Amu ki kiung'e konyegap tuguuk che saptos
Job28:22 Leen Ng'emisyet ak Meet
Job28:23 Ingen Kamuktaindet ooreennyi
Job28:24 Amu keerei ineendet ole poochin ng'wony
Job28:25 Si kogoochi usoonet nyigiisindo
Job28:26 Ye kingo yai ng'atuutyetap ropta
Job28:27 Kogeer anyun ak komwaita; Ki igimit
Job28:28 Ak ki mwachi chiito
Job29:1 Ak kigetyigei Job kogeny kalewenennyi kole
Job29:2 “Kata kaigai nda ka uu kiit ne ki auu eng' arawek che po keny
Job29:3 Ye ki iluuchin tainnyi metinnyu
Job29:4 Ko uu ye ki auu eng' peetuusyegap neratennyu
Job29:5 ye kita komi kobooto Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet
Job29:6 Ye ki kiuune tyegutikyuk mwaitap cheego
Job29:7 Chooto peetuusyek che ki awendi agoi ormariichetap nganaseet
Job29:8 Kigeera murenik ak kounygei
Job29:9 Kisiisyo pounik
Job29:10 Ki ma twek piik che taagunotiin
Job29:11 Amu ye ki ngegasa
Job29:12 Amu ki asaru kibananiat ne kirirei
Job29:13 Ki nyoonjo kaberuretap ineendet ne kimachei kolus: Ak ki agoochi muguleldap mosoget kotyen eng' poiboiyet.
Job29:14 Ki alaach imanda ak kitucha. Ki uu imandanyu ngoryeet ne po teegisto ak chepkuletap toroornatet.
Job29:15 Ki aegu konyegap kipkoraatyat
Job29:16 Ki aegu kwandap che ma tinyei kiy: Ak ki asyaach kirwoogetap ineendet ne ki ma angen.
Job29:17 Ak ki airii tagilgiligap piik che ma po iman
Job29:18 Ki ale anyun
Job29:19 Iwaktoi tigitikyuk kobendi peek
Job29:20 Ta ko leel toroornatennyu ne mita
Job29:21 Ki epcha iit piik
Job29:22 Kingo kaang'alaal
Job29:23 Ak ki igeno ko uu ye igeni ropta; Ak ki iseng'eng'so miising' ko uu ye igeni ropta ne po let.
Job29:24 King'a ng'erechi icheek
Job29:25 Ki alewenji ooreenywa
Job30:1 Ago rorechino nguno che mengeechen eng' anee
Job30:2 Ee
Job30:3 Sogityotin eng' pananda ak rubeet. Amei ng'ung'unyek che yamyotiin
Job30:4 Putei sogegap keetitap muunyuk eng' ole neegitee timdo; ak amitwogikwak tigitigap junipa.
Job30:5 Ki oonei koba eng' kwenutap piik
Job30:6 Kanyool komeny ole petotin eng' kereruusyek che yamyotiin
Job30:7 Iteitos eng' timiin ko uu sigiroik
Job30:8 Icheeget ko lagogap piik che abusotiin
Job30:9 Kaaegu nguno tyendanywa
Job30:10 Wecha
Job30:11 Amu ki kotyach porowennyi ak konyalila
Job30:12 Ng'eetos eng' eunnyu ne po tai piik che yaacheen; ak kotoorta keelyekyuk koba taban
Job30:13 Ng'emei ooreennyu ak kotesei nyalildanyu
Job30:14 Pwonjino eng' ole kiundur kobarait: Miljinagei eng' ole kigoguber.
Job30:15 Kagiweekyo kamuisosyek
Job30:16 Katumdagei anyun saboondanyu
Job30:17 Kitoorei kawekyuk kemoi
Job30:18 Kang'emak ngoryennyu amu kimnateet ne oo ne po myandanyu. Igiicha ko uu kaatitap ngoryennyu.
Job30:19 Kagowiircha ng'atateek
Job30:20 Ariirchinin
Job30:21 Kaigoromitu eng' anee. Iusena kimnateetap eung'ung'.
Job30:22 Iganapchino usoonet ak igoono alaany; Iwirtoto eng' usoonet ne oo.
Job30:23 Ak angen ale imutyina meet
Job30:24 Eng' Iman koma tokyin chii eunnyi karaita ne ki korurugok
Job30:25 Tos ma ariir agobo ineendet ne ki mi nyalilda? Tos ma aragen saboondanyu agobo che ma tinyei kiy?
Job30:26 Ye kinga cheeng' ne myee
Job30:27 Lalei moennyu
Job30:28 Ariiroti
Job30:29 Aa tupchetap lelwek
Job30:30 Tuui iriryondennyu ak kosinditi
Job30:31 Kawalak cheetap ketubennyu koek riirek. Ak kawalak cheetap ndurerunnyu koek cheetap icheeget che riirtos.
Job31:1 Ki kiyomiske ak konyekyuk; si ma keer pergeiyat.
Job31:2 Nee kebebertanyu ne punu Kamuktaindet eng' parak
Job31:3 Tos ma ityin nyalilda che ma po iman
Job31:4 Tos ma keerei ortinwekyuk
Job31:5 Ngot ko ki awendotee tangoita
Job31:6 Ko ngegera anyun eng' karagendoet ne po iman
Job31:7 Ngot ko kagomasta kakwaennyu
Job31:8 ko myee agoolso anyun ak ingoam chiito age; Ee
Job31:9 Ngot ko ki kochuut kwony muguleldanyu
Job31:10 ko ingong'aisechi anyun osotyondennyu chiito age
Job31:11 Amu kasetap myat ko tengekto ne oo
Job31:12 Amu nooto ko maat ne igeesu agoi Ng'emisyet
Job31:13 Ngot ko ki asas ng'olyootap otwogindennyu ne muren anan ne tye
Job31:14 Ko tos ayaei nee anyun ye kang'eet Kamuktaindet? Ak ye nyo koteepso
Job31:15 Ineendet ne kiyaa eng' moet
Job31:16 Tos ki amelel kibananook magennywa
Job31:17 Anan tos ki aam kererutyennyu aneege
Job31:18 Achicha
Job31:19 Ngot ko ki ageer chii age tugul kobetei amu ma tinyei ngoroik
Job31:20 ngot koma iberuuro suenutikyik
Job31:21 ngot ko ki anamji parak eunnyu agirinde ne ma tinyei sigiik
Job31:22 ko ingobut anyun tigikyennyu eng' puita
Job31:23 Amu ki kamuiset eng' anee nyalilda ne punu Kamuktaindet
Job31:24 Ngot ko ki amang'u thahabu
Job31:25 ngot ko ki abaibaitu amu oo mogornatennyu
Job31:26 ak ngot ko ki ageer asiista ye ki iluu
Job31:27 kot ki kigaigai muguleldanyu eng' ung'oot
Job31:28 ko myee koek niito agine tengekto ne irwookyin kirwoogik: Amu ta kiga amwachi lembech Kamuktaindet ne mi parak.
Job31:29 Ngot ko ki abaibaitu eng' ng'emisyetap ineendet ne wecho
Job31:30 achicha
Job31:31 Ngot koma mwa piigap emainnyu kole ng'oo ne imuuchi konyoor chii ne ma piyonyi panyeegap Job?
Job31:32 Ma ru toondet ooreet
Job31:33 Ngot ko ki atuch pistoennyu ko uu ye yaei alak
Job31:34 amu ki aiywei tuiyet ne oo
Job31:35 ee
Job31:36 Iman
Job31:37 Kata amwachini ineendet koitetap kakwautikyuk
Job31:38 Ngo waagena emennyu
Job31:39 ngot ko ki aam logoekyik ama aal
Job31:40 ko ingobiityo anyun katook che rutei piich kogeer nganuuk
Job32:1 Kosiisyo anyun pichooto somogu
Job32:2 Ki nereech anyun kot Elihu weeriitap Barakel Busindet
Job32:3 Ki nereech kogeny kot agobo choronokyik somok
Job32:4 Kiga igen Elihu kong'alaalji `icheek Job amu ki eecheen eng' kenyiisyek icheeget kosiir ineendet.
Job32:5 Ye kingo keer Elihu kole ma nyoor pichooto somogu kiit ne wolu
Job32:6 Kowol anyun Elihu weeriitap Barakel Busindet kole aa neran
Job32:7 Koale
Job32:8 Ago mi `kabuuset chiito
Job32:9 Ma kotugul che oosen ko utaatiin
Job32:10 Amwae anyun ale ogasa; si aboor agane ole abwaatitai.
Job32:11 Koageni ng'aleekwok
Job32:12 Koaepchok iit
Job32:13 Oriipkei si momwa ole kageegu che utaatiin. Ne iterteeri ko Kamuktaindet
Job32:14 Amu ma tokyo ng'aleekyik
Job32:15 Kwong'dos icheek
Job32:16 Tos kanyool agen
Job32:17 Awolu agane kebebertanyu
Job32:18 Amu kigonyiia ng'aleek; igiila kabuuset ne atinye.
Job32:19 Ogeero
Job32:20 Ang'alaali
Job32:21 Asaok ale
Job32:22 Amu mangen agoito kainaik che kilasunegei puch; si ma istoa Yaindennyu kochokyo.
Job33:1 “Ago asaain anyun Job ale
Job33:2 Neegit anyun ang'alaal
Job33:3 Ibooru `ng'aleekyuk imandap muguleldanyu; ak mwaei kutinnyu tuguuk che po iman
Job33:4 Ki koyaa kabuuset ne po Kamuktaindet
Job33:5 Ngimuuchi
Job33:6 Kiit ne iuu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
Job33:7 Mat kogoonin kamuisennyu iyweisye
Job33:8 Iman
Job33:9 ‘Aa tiliil
Job33:10 Nyoorchino tuguuk che irwogunena
Job33:11 Indoi keelyekyuk temeleiywek
Job33:12 Awolun
Job33:13 Amu nee si oborye ineendet? Ago ma tetyin chii ng'aleekyik agot agenge.
Job33:14 Amu ng'alaali Kamuktaindet konyil agenge
Job33:15 Eng' karwotitoet
Job33:16 Yaatei anyun itigap piik
Job33:17 si kobiit koisto chiito eng' kiit ne tokyingei
Job33:18 Riibei saboondanyi si ma ibutyi kererit
Job33:19 Kitigone kogeny ng'wanindo eng' itogunnyi
Job33:20 Kot kowech `sabeennyi amitwogik
Job33:21 Sagiiti poortanyi
Job33:22 Ee
Job33:23 Ngot komi malaikaiyat kobooto ineendet
Job33:24 koriiree ineendet anyun
Job33:25 Ng'arng'aritu poortanyi kosiir ne po lakweet
Job33:26 Saaei Kamuktaindet ak kogasyi ineendet; kot konyo tainnyi eng' poiboiyet
Job33:27 Tyeni eng' taitap piik ak kole ki ayai tengekto
Job33:28 Kigosar saboondanyu si ma wo kererit
Job33:29 Yaei Kamuktaindet tuguuchuuto tugul
Job33:30 si koweech saboondanyi komang'une Keriinget
Job33:31 Keer komyee
Job33:32 Ngitinye kiy age tugul ne imwae
Job33:33 Ngo ma uu nooto
Job34:1 Ki testai `Elihu kole
Job34:2 “Ogas ng'aleekyuk
Job34:3 Amu tyemei itit ng'aleek
Job34:4 Ongelewenjige kiit ne po iman
Job34:5 Amu kamwa Job kole
Job34:6 Nganda a po iman ko ki kiita keele aa kiplembechwa
Job34:7 Ngoro chii ne uu Job
Job34:8 Ne wendoti kobooto yaigap tengekto
Job34:9 Amu ki komwa kole
Job34:10 Ogas anyun amu nooto
Job34:11 Amu yaakyin chiito ko uu poisyonikyik
Job34:12 Ee
Job34:13 Ng'oo ne ki ng'at ineendet si koriip ng'wony? Anan ng'oo ne ki inde ineendet ng'wony komugul ole tebee?
Job34:14 Ngot komach Kamuktaindet koweekyigei saboondo ak kabuusetap chiichooto
Job34:15 kobegu anyun piik tugul kibagenge
Job34:16 Ngot itinye anyun kaguiyet igas niito. Epchi iit ng'aleekyuk.
Job34:17 Tos imuuchi kobounis ineendet ne wechei imanda? Ak tos igikyini inyee ineendet ne po iman ak ko kiim?
Job34:18 Ng'oo ne leenji laitoryat
Job34:19 Kotam nee anyun eng' ineendet ne ma konyiti pounik
Job34:20 Pegu eng' ye matya
Job34:21 Amu keerei konyekyik ortinwegap chii
Job34:22 Ma mi mesundeito
Job34:23 Amu ma nyooljin ineendet kota kobwaat chiito
Job34:24 Tonatoni piik che kiimeen eng' ortinwek che ma naoksei
Job34:25 Nae anyun poisyonikwak
Job34:26 Pirei icheek amu yaitwogikwak
Job34:27 amu kimasta
Job34:28 Kot kogoochi riiregap kibananook koit ole mi ineendet
Job34:29 Ye kasiis ineendet
Job34:30 Ma igoochin kolaitoran chiito ne ma iywei Kamuktaindet
Job34:31 Tos amu nee si ma mwachi chii age tugul Kamuktaindet
Job34:32 Ineeta che ma keere; ngot ko ki ayai tengekto
Job34:33 Tos piitu yaakyinennyi ko uu ye ichame amu ieesyoi? Amu kanyool ilewen
Job34:34 Leenjino piik che tinyei naet
Job34:35 ng'alaali Job koma tinyei naet
Job34:36 Kata myee ketyem Job agoi let
Job34:37 Amu tesyin ngelelnateet tengektanyi
Job35:1 Kowol kogeny Elihu kole
Job35:2 “Tos ileen imandang'ung' niito
Job35:3 ye iteebe ile
Job35:4 Awolun anyun
Job35:5 Inyal kipsengwet ak igeer; keer poolik
Job35:6 Ngot ko keiyai tengek
Job35:7 Ngot ii po iman
Job35:8 Imuuchi kogoochi yaityeng'ung' ng'wanindo kipkosabei age; ak imuuchi imandang'ung' kogoochi keljinet kipkosabei age.
Job35:9 Riirtos amu chaang'indap usiisyosyek; Riirtos komachei toreteet amu eutap ineendet ne tinyei kamuget.
Job35:10 Ago ma mi ne mwaei kole
Job35:11 Ne ineetech kosiir tyong'igap ng'wony
Job35:12 Riirtos anyun
Job35:13 Iman ma kasei Kamuktaindet tangoita
Job35:14 Kotam nee ye imwae ileen ma keere ineendet
Job35:15 Ne siirei
Job35:16 Ko yaat anyun Job kutinnyi komwa ng'aleegap puch; Tesei ng'aleek che ma tinyei naet.”
Job36:1 Kitestai Elihu eng' ng'alaalennyi ak komwa kole
Job36:2 “Kang'wa kitigin
Job36:3 Aibune naennyu ole loo
Job36:4 Amu ma lembech ng'aleekyuk iman: Mi kobooten ineendet ne ititaat eng' naet.
Job36:5 Iman
Job36:6 Ma riibei sabeetap che yaacheen
Job36:7 Ma istoe konyekyik piik che po iman: ago indoi icheek kotebi koigeny kobooto laitorinik eng' ng'echeretap laitornatet
Job36:8 Ak ngot keerat eng' mugurek
Job36:9 Koboorchi anyun icheek poisyennywa
Job36:10 Yaatei kogeny itiikwak si kogas kaneetisyet
Job36:11 Ngot kogas iit ineendet ak koot
Job36:12 Ago ngot koma kas iit
Job36:13 Ago icheek che ma iywei Kamuktaindet eng' muguleldo
Job36:14 Pegu ye ta ko neran
Job36:15 Ago saru che kinyaliili eng' nyalildanywa
Job36:16 Ee
Job36:17 Ago kagonyiin kirwoogutigap chii ne ya; Namin kirwooget ak imanda.
Job36:18 Amu mi nereegek
Job36:19 Tos yamin mogornatosyeguk
Job36:20 Amat imach kemout
Job36:21 Riipkei
Job36:22 Keero
Job36:23 Ng'oo ne kigong'at ooreennyi? Anan ng'oo ne imuuchi komwa kole
Job36:24 Ibwaat itoroor poisyennyi
Job36:25 Kagogeer piik tugul nooto; Keerei piik eng' ole loo.
Job36:26 Oo Kamuktaindet
Job36:27 Amu ichuuti ineendet peek eng' kibungwerennyi
Job36:28 Che rong'u poolik
Job36:29 Tos imuuchi chii koguiyo kaiyestaetap poolik
Job36:30 Keer
Job36:31 Amu irwookyinee piik chuuto; ak koonu amitwogik eng' chaang'indo.
Job36:32 Tugee `eunekyik kalyeleet; ak kong'at ole kwere.
Job36:33 Mwaitoi `tuleet ineendet
Job37:1 Potani muguleldanyu agobo niito kora
Job37:2 Ogas anyun cheetap tuugeennyi
Job37:3 Iyooktoi kwo kureret tugul ne po kipsengwet
Job37:4 Ye ibata kotugul; kotul eng' tuugeetap etunatennyi
Job37:5 Tulei Kamuktaindet eng' tuugeennyi eng' kwong'eet; Yaei tuguuk che eecheen
Job37:6 Amu leenjin teluji
Job37:7 Eng' kasarata
Job37:8 Pendii anyun tyong'ik ole ung'egei
Job37:9 Punu usoonet ne oo kooriigap murot tai: Kobun kaitityet murot kaataam.
Job37:10 Koonu kabuusetap Kamuktaindet peek che ki kogau: Ak kogau chaang'indap peek.
Job37:11 Igoochin ineendet pooldet ne nyigiis peek; Iitoi poldetap kalyelennyi.
Job37:12 Weleligei eng' kandoisyennyi
Job37:13 Ngo po katigonet
Job37:14 Kas ng'olyoondoni
Job37:15 Tos ingen inyee ole ng'atitoi Kamuktaindet icheek
Job37:16 Tos ingen ole songinindoi poolik
Job37:17 Lalang'en miising' ngoroiguk
Job37:18 Tos imuuchi iite sengwetyet kobooto ineendet
Job37:19 Ineetech kiit ne kimwachini ineendet; Amu ma kimuuchi ketet ng'aleekyok amu mesundeito.
Job37:20 Tos kimwachin ineendet keleenjin
Job37:21 Ma keerei anyun piik lapkeiyetap asiista ne iluu eng' sengwetisyek
Job37:22 Punu murot kaataam kakweng'et ne uu thahabu. Tinyei Kamuktaindet etunateet ne kiywei.
Job37:23 Ma kimuuchi kegeer Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet; tinyei telunateet eng' kamuktaet: Ma inyalilisyei eng' kirwooget ak eng' imanda ne oo.
Job37:24 Iywei anyun `piik ineendet; ma tiytiy age tugul ne utaat eng' muguleldo.
Job38:1 Ki wolji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job eng' kipchurchuryet
Job38:2 “Ng'oo niito indoi kirwooget mesundeito
Job38:3 Kermengei anyun nguno ko uu muren; amu ating'enen ng'olyoo
Job38:4 Ki imi ano ye ki andoi lumeiywegap ng'wony? Mwau anyun
Job38:5 Mwaiwo ile ng'oo ne king'atei kakwautikyik
Job38:6 Ki kiratyi ano lumeiywekyik? Anan ng'oo ne ki inde koitanyi ne po luuita;
Job38:7 ye kityenso kecheigap karon kibagenge
Job38:8 Anan ng'oo ne kigeree `kurgotik nyanjet
Job38:9 ye ki ayai pooldet koek ngoryennyi
Job38:10 ak ang'atyi ng'atuutyennyu
Job38:11 ak ale
Job38:12 Tos ki ing'at karonet kobooch ngo piit peetuusyeguk
Job38:13 si kobiit konam ole poochin ng'wony
Job38:14 Kiwalei ko uu meneet ye king'oochi; ak kotononso tuguuk tugul ko uu ngoryeet.
Job38:15 Ki etee piik che yaacheen lapkeiyennywa
Job38:16 Tos ki ichut kondametusyegap nyanjet? Anan ki iwendote komoswek che ung'ootiin che po rireet?
Job38:17 Tos ki kibooruun ormariichogap meet? Anan tos ki igeer kurgotigap urwetap meet?
Job38:18 Tos ki inai tebeesindap ng'wony? Mwau
Job38:19 Mi ano ooreet ne wendi ole menyei lapkeiyet
Job38:20 si kobiit iip kot koit kiwotennyi
Job38:21 Ingen iman
Job38:22 Tos ki ichut ole kigonoree teluji
Job38:23 che ki agonorchi peetuutap nyalilda
Job38:24 Kipcheune ano lapkeiyet
Job38:25 Ng'oo ne ki pet ooreetap maraneet
Job38:26 si kogoochi korobonji emet ole ma mi chii; ak korobonji surkwen ole ma mi chii
Job38:27 si kobiyo emet ne karaatya ne kigoguber
Job38:28 Tos tinyei ropta kwanda? Anan ng'oo ne ki sich rewoot ne sau?
Job38:29 Ki punu moetap ng'oo peek che ki kogau? Ak ng'oo ne ki sich chepkoset ne punu kipsengwet?
Job38:30 Uueen peek ko uu koita
Job38:31 Tos imuuchi irat karurugutigap Koremerik
Job38:32 Tos imuuchi indochi Masarot eng' peetuusyekwak? Anan tos imuuchi indochi kecheik magalaluut ak lagokyik?
Job38:33 Tos ingen ng'atuutik che ki king'atyi kipsengwet? Tos imuuchi igimit pounatap taboik eng' ng'wony?
Job38:34 Tos imuuchi koit kuting'ung' poolik
Job38:35 Tos imuuchi iyookte kalyelosyek si koba
Job38:36 Ng'oo ne ki inde utaatyet kebeberwek che po oriit? Anan ng'oo ne ki igoochi kaguiyet kundit?
Job38:37 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koiit poolik eng' utaatyet? Ng'oo ne tumu chuboinigap kipsengwet
Job38:38 Ye kayumgei temburyek koek tulwo
Job38:39 Tos ilogotenjini ng'etuny ne kotoy? Anan ibai neranigap ng'etuunyik kobiyong'so
Job38:40 ye ribistos eng' kebenonikwak
Job38:41 Ng'oo ne paei chepkugit
Job39:1 “Tos ingen peetuusyek che ye iytos sitok? Anan igeere ye iytos kenyelok?
Job39:2 Imuuchi iit arawek che tarei? Anan ingen peetuusyek ye iytos?
Job39:3 Ing'uruuktos
Job39:4 Tebee chametapkei aarekwak
Job39:5 Ng'oo ne ki ityaach sigiryet ne po timiin? Anan ng'oo ne ki ityaach ratuutigap oloitigeet?
Job39:6 Che ki agoochi komeny surkwen
Job39:7 Sasei polatetap nganaseet
Job39:8 Agetye parautyetap tuloonook
Job39:9 Tos cham soet koboisyeun? Anan tos tebee ole neegitee piung'ung'?
Job39:10 Tos imuuchi iratyi soet mogombet? Anan tos piruun mbareet ne kaibat?
Job39:11 Tos imang'u ineendet
Job39:12 Tos imang'u ineendet
Job39:13 Paibai tyondap songol kobirobirto kebebaikyik eng' lelesta; nganda ma imuuchi kotirirenot eng' parak.
Job39:14 Amu metechin mayaikyik ng'ung'unyek parak
Job39:15 ak koutye kole tuei keeldo
Job39:16 Koromjin lagokyik ko uu yo ma chechiik; agot ngo ek puch poisyennyi
Job39:17 amu ki eetee Kamuktaindet utaatyet
Job39:18 Ago ye ing'eet met kolabat
Job39:19 Tos igoochini paraisiit kimnateet? Anan ilaakyini kaatinnyi masek che usausi?
Job39:20 Tos inyee ne igoochini ineendet kotoromben ko uu chereng'endet? Imui piich toroornatetap waagaatap seruunekyik.
Job39:21 Kutei atebweet
Job39:22 Chotei kaiyweisyet
Job39:23 Poljin ineendet motyetap kipchabonik
Job39:24 Lugui emet eng' koroomnateet ak nereegek; ama teleli eng' cheetap iryageet.
Job39:25 Sait age tugul ye cheei iryageet
Job39:26 Tos tirirene keeret utaatyeng'ung'
Job39:27 Tos tirirene kipsiichit ng'atuutyeng'ung'
Job39:28 Menyei rwandet
Job39:29 Segei eng' yooto tyondanyi; toobeni konyekyik ole loo.
Job39:30 Chuchuni lagokyik ak icheek korotiik; ak ole mi muuswek
Job40:1 Ki wolji kogeny `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job koleenji
Job40:2 “Tos imache inyee ne imesesi obelegei ak Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet? Ingowol chuuto ineendet ne tiitos ak Kamuktaindet.”
Job40:3 Kowolji anyun `Job Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Job40:4 “Keero
Job40:5 Ki amwa konyil agenge
Job40:6 Kowolji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job eng' kipchurchuryet
Job40:7 “Kermenge ko uu muren; amagenen ng'olyoo
Job40:8 Tos iwale kirwoogennyu koek puch? Tos irwokwo
Job40:9 Anan itinye euut ne uu ne po Kamuktaindet? Ak imuuchi itul eng' tuugeet ko uu ineendet?
Job40:10 Ilaakyigei anyun telunateet ak etunateet; ilaakyigei teegisto ak korooronindo.
Job40:11 Rong'u nereegeguk che ing'irtogei
Job40:12 Keer age tugul ne meenei ak iming'iin
Job40:13 Ung'e temburyek kibagenge; tuch togoochikwak eng' ole ung'aat.
Job40:14 Si abarten ale
Job40:15 Keer anyun magasta ne ki ayai ko uu ye ki ayain
Job40:16 Keer anyun
Job40:17 Pirabirtoi saruryennyi ko uu tarakwet; king'walgei tigitigap chotikyik.
Job40:18 Uu kawekyik kariik che kiimeen che po sugunwet; uu karaaswekyik temeleiywegap kariik.
Job40:19 Po tai ineendet eng' poisyonik che eecheen che po Kamuktaindet; ineendet ne ki yai tyonyooto
Job40:20 Iman paei ineendet tuloonook; ole urerense tyong'ik tugul che po kewanin.
Job40:21 Rue keetit keel ye mi urwet
Job40:22 Iuuri ineendet keetiik; yiemei ineendet keetiigap kereruusyek.
Job40:23 Agot ngo nyi peek aineet kot kong'irtagei
Job40:24 Tos imuuchi chii konam tyonyooto ye riipsei
Job41:1 “Tos imuuchi ing'usune ting'ong'et kombetap njireenik? Anan iratee `porowet ng'elyeptanyi?
Job41:2 Tos imuuchi inde rogoet serunnyi? Anan itoore tagilgilyennyi kombet?
Job41:3 Tos saisain konyil che chaang'? Anan tos ng'alaalun ng'aleek che tangus?
Job41:4 Tos oyomiske ak ineendet
Job41:5 Tos iurerenji ko uu toriityon? Anan tos irat kobunji tiibiiguk?
Job41:6 Tos imuuch ko aldaat che namei njireenik? Tos kipchechi ineendet chemung'arainik?
Job41:7 Tos imuuchi inyiit iriryondennyi kibitinoik
Job41:8 Ngot konam ineendet eung'ung'
Job41:9 Keero
Job41:10 Ma mi ne koroom ne kanyei kong'eet. Ng'oo anyun ineendet ne imuuchi kotonone tainnyu?
Job41:11 Ng'oo ne kisip kogoono
Job41:12 Ma siisei agobo kebeberwekyik
Job41:13 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koreegune ngoryennyi ne po parak? Ng'oo ne riikyin kotinyei karnet ne kagilikyin aeng' ne kiratyin kutit?
Job41:14 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koyaat kurgotigap togeennyi? Ki yiem kamuiset kelekyik.
Job41:15 Perikyik che kiimeen ko menatennyi. Ki namgei ko uu ng'ookset.
Job41:16 Rikyindos miising'
Job41:17 Ki namgei; Ki tiinygei
Job41:18 Ilyeli karyonennyi
Job41:19 Mang'une kutinnyi kegenganigap mastinwek
Job41:20 Mang'une iyeto seruunekyik
Job41:21 Inaami kabusennyi nesek
Job41:22 Mi kimnateet kaatinnyi
Job41:23 Ki namgei tagalosyekyik tugul; Ki igiigei ak ma kimuuchi keisto.
Job41:24 Uui muguleldanyi ko uu koita
Job41:25 Ye kang'eet
Job41:26 Ngo leen chii koep
Job41:27 Iiti karnet ko uu susweek
Job41:28 Ma mwee kipchabet; Uu `koik che kewirtoe porowet mobeek.
Job41:29 Uu `rungusyek mobeek eng' ineendet; rorechin ndirit ne kitooree.
Job41:30 Uu moennyi rokyonik che ng'atiben; iitoi eng' ng'atateek tuguuk che kiboorsee.
Job41:31 Igoochin rireet kowaskei ko uu tereet ne mi ma; yaei nyanjet koigei mwaita.
Job41:32 Leelitu ole kabunei. Meen chiito kaek rireet kalwalek.
Job41:33 Ma mi ne kergei ak ineendet eng' ng'wony
Job41:34 Keerei kiit age tugul ne toroor; laitoryat ineendet ne pou menotik tugul.”
Job42:1 Kowolji anyun `Job Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Job42:2 “Angen ale imuuchi iyai tuguuk tugul. Ama kimuuchi kegirinda mageng'ung'.
Job42:3 Keteep ile
Job42:4 Asaain ale kaswa
Job42:5 Ki agasin kityo kibiit; ago ageerin nguno
Job42:6 Kasaskei anyun amu nooto
Job42:7 Ak kingo kagomwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job ng'aleechuuto
Job42:8 Onam anyun kiruugik tisap
Job42:9 Ki pa anyun Eliphas Temanindet
Job42:10 Kowal anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ratetap Job
Job42:11 Kobwa weeriik tugul che tupcho
Job42:12 Ki iberuur anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuusyek che po let che po Job kosiir peetuusyekyik che po tai
Job42:13 Ki tinyei kogeny weeriik tisap ak tiibiik somok.
Job42:14 Ak kiguure kainetap ne po tai
Job42:15 Ak ki ma komiitei emet tugul kwonyiik che korooron kosiir tiibiigap Job
Job42:16 Ak kingo pata niito kotar Job kenyiisyek pogol agenge ak artam. Ki keer weeriikyik ak weeriigap weeriikyik
Job42:17 Ki ilil anyun Job
Psalms1:1 Iberuurot chii ne ma namei ng'aleegap piik che yaacheen
Psalms1:2 Ago paibaitune ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kobwaatoti ng'atuutyennyi peet ak kemoi.
Psalms1:3 Kergeitu ineendet ak keetit ne ki kiminji ole neegitee ainoosyek
Psalms1:4 Ma uu nooto che yaacheen; ago kergei icheek ak meteteek che ibei usoonet.
Psalms1:5 Eng' nooto anyun ma tonondos che yaacheen eng' kirwooget
Psalms1:6 Amu ingen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ooreetap che po imanda; ago petei ooreetap kiptengeginik.
Psalms2:1 Amu nee si koyumgei pororyosyek ak koboldos? Amu nee si kobwaatoti piik tuguuk che ma namegei ak kiy?
Psalms2:2 Tetegei laitorinigap ng'wony
Psalms2:3 Mwaei icheek kole
Psalms2:4 Roryei ineendet ne tebyei eng' kipsengwet; ak kochot `Kiptaiyat icheek.
Psalms2:5 Ak kong'alaalji anyun eng' nereegekyik
Psalms2:6 “Kande laitoryandennyu `Zion tulweennyu ne tiliil.”
Psalms2:7 Abartoi ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet. Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms2:8 Sooma
Psalms2:9 Itue icheek `kirokto ne po karnet; ak ituatui icheek ko uu rokyetap cheptereniot.”
Psalms2:10 Nooto anyun
Psalms2:11 Oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kaiyweisyet; ak oboiboitu eng' potanet.
Psalms2:12 Oming'inityigei weeriit si ma nereech
Psalms3:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms3:2 Miitei che chaang' che mwaei agobo saboondanyu
Psalms3:3 Ago inyee
Psalms3:4 Ariirchini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kutinnyu
Psalms3:5 Ki alyelde eng' ng'wony ak anuuch
Psalms3:6 Ma ywei piik tamanusyegap eliphuusyek
Psalms3:7 Ng'eet
Psalms3:8 Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetunet; ingotebee perurtang'ung' piiguk.
Psalms4:1 Wolwo ye aguurin
Psalms4:2 Ee okweek
Psalms4:3 Ago onai ni ole ki kotabaanjigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne po iman; kasei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye aguure ineendet.
Psalms4:4 Eng' nereegekwok ko moyai tengek; ye omi itook
Psalms4:5 Ogoite tiseiywek che po imanda
Psalms4:6 Mwaei che chaang' kole
Psalms4:7 Ki inde muguleldanyu kaagaasetapkei
Psalms4:8 Alyeldoi ak anuuchi eng' kaalyeet
Psalms5:1 Epchi iit ng'aleekyuk
Psalms5:2 Kas ye atwegu ariire
Psalms5:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms5:4 Ma ii Kamuktaindet ne ibaibaitune yaityo; ama tebee oldang'ung' yaityo.
Psalms5:5 Ma tonondos eng' taing'ung' menotik; iweche yaigap yaityet tugul.
Psalms5:6 Ing'eme che mwaei lembechek; wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tumdaindetap korotiik ak ng'aaliindet.
Psalms5:7 Ago anee
Psalms5:8 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms5:9 Ma mi lititindo eng' kutusweekwak; tengek kityo mugulelwekwak. Kererit ne yaataat mookwekwak; ak lasei piich eng' ng'elyebwekwak.
Psalms5:10 Iityi icheek tengekto
Psalms5:11 Ago ingoboiboitu icheek tugul che imang'un
Psalms5:12 Amu inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iberuuri chiito ne po imanda; iyieme ineendet chamyeng'ung' ko uu long'eet.
Psalms6:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms6:2 Rireena
Psalms6:3 Nyalili agine saboondanyu miising'
Psalms6:4 Iweege
Psalms6:5 Ma mi chii ne ibwaatin eng' ye mi meet. Mwaun ng'oo kongoi eng' ye mi che ki kobek?
Psalms6:6 Kaang'et eng' tigenoikyuk; marane peegap kong' itogunnyu kemout age tugul; sachin peekyuk po kong' ole arue.
Psalms6:7 Machei kong'emogis konyekyuk amu arageneet; kagoosegitu amu puunikyuk tugul.
Psalms6:8 Oistoenage
Psalms6:9 Kagogas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor soomsennyu; taachei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor saaennyu.
Psalms6:10 Ililandos puunikyuk tugul ak konyalildos miising'; weechegei let ak kolilaanso eng' yooto.
Psalms7:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms7:2 Si ma kereer saboondanyu ko uu ng'etundo
Psalms7:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms7:4 ngo ki ayaakyi yaityo ne ki kimi tuwai eng' kaalyeet
Psalms7:5 ko ingoon anyun puunyoot saboondanyu kot konam; ingotyekyi ng'wony saboondanyu
Psalms7:6 Ng'eet
Psalms7:7 Ingoyiemin tuiyetap pororyosyek
Psalms7:8 Ibesyechin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyek; irwookseiywa
Psalms7:9 Ingowong'kei tengektap kiptengeginik
Psalms7:10 Long'ennyu Kamuktaindet
Psalms7:11 Kamuktaindet ko kirwoogindet ne po iman
Psalms7:12 Ngot ko masik chii
Psalms7:13 Ki kochop kariikyik che kiimeen
Psalms7:14 Ogeero ole manaktoi `icheek yaityet
Psalms7:15 Kogochop keriinget
Psalms7:16 Weekyingei metinnyi yaityennyi; ak kobutyi paragutap metinnyi koroomnatennyi.
Psalms7:17 Aweekyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi ko uu imandanyi; ak atyenjini kalasunet kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms8:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms8:2 Ki ing'at kimnateet kobun kutusweegap lagok ak che reritos
Psalms8:3 Ye ageere kipsengwetisyeguk
Psalms8:4 ale
Psalms8:5 Ki iyai ineendet koming'init kitigin eng' Kamuktaindet
Psalms8:6 Ki igoochi ineendet koboi poisyonigap euneguk; ki inde tuguuk tugul keldebesaigap keelyekyik kogas iit:
Psalms8:7 keechiirek tugul ak tuuga tugul
Psalms8:8 toriitik che mi parak
Psalms8:9 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms9:1 Aweekyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi eng' muguleldanyu tugul; aboortoi kwang'utiguk tugul.
Psalms9:2 Abaibaitu ak agasigei eng' inyee; atyenjini kalasunet kaineng'ung'
Psalms9:3 Ye kaweek let puunikyuk
Psalms9:4 Amu ki iyai kirwoogennyu ak ng'aleekyuk; ki itebee ng'echereetap laitornatet
Psalms9:5 Ki iger kong' pororyosyek
Psalms9:6 Ki igeskei kobetito puunik koek karatwek koigeny; ki ing'em nganasookwak
Psalms9:7 Ago laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny; Ki kochopchi ng'echerennyi po laitornatet kirwooget.
Psalms9:8 Irwookyin ineendet ng'wony eng' imanda
Psalms9:9 Egu `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor irimeetap ne kiusei
Psalms9:10 Ak imang'un icheek che ingen kaineng'ung'
Psalms9:11 Otyenji kalasunet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne menyei Zion. Omwaite poisyonikyik eng' kwenutap piik.
Psalms9:12 Amu ibwaati icheek ne yaaktoi mugetuut agobo korotiik; ma utye riiregap kibananook.
Psalms9:13 Rireena
Psalms9:14 si kobiit abarta kalasuneng'ung' tugul; ak eng' kurgotigap cheptap Zion
Psalms9:15 Kagororokyi pororyosyek keriinget ne ki palei; kagonam keelyekwak mesteet ne kiga uny icheek.
Psalms9:16 Kigoboorgei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms9:17 Weechegei kiptengeginik kobendi ye mi meet
Psalms9:18 Ago ma kiutye kotugul kibananook
Psalms9:19 Ng'eet
Psalms9:20 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms10:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms10:2 Inyalili `kiptengeginik che menoot kibananook eng' koroomnateet; ingonam icheek mestonok che ki kobwaat.
Psalms10:3 Ilasunegei kiptengekyot mageetap muguleldanyi
Psalms10:4 Leen kiptengekyot eng' menatennyi
Psalms10:5 Ortinwekyik ko poorei kotugul; mi parak kirwoogutiguk
Psalms10:6 Leen eng' muguleldanyi
Psalms10:7 Nyiitaat kutinnyi chubisyet ak ng'aalseet ak sastaet; miitei ng'elyeptanyi mastaet ak yaityet.
Psalms10:8 Tebee ole ung'egei eng' nganasook; parei che ma tinyei ng'oogi eng' komoswek che ung'ootiin. Sapchin konyekyik ineendet ne nyeraat;
Psalms10:9 saptoi eng' ole ung'aat ko uu ng'etundo eng' kebenennyi; sapchin kole si konam kibananook; namei kibananiat eng' mestennyi ak kochuut.
Psalms10:10 Ribisi
Psalms10:11 Leen eng' muguleldanyi
Psalms10:12 Ng'eet
Psalms10:13 Amu nee si kosas `kiptengekyot Kamuktaindet? Ak koleen eng' muguleldanyi
Psalms10:14 Ago igeertoi inyee; igeere inyee mastaet ak tagisyet
Psalms10:15 Irii eutap kiptengekyot; cheeng' tengektap ne ya kot koma komi.
Psalms10:16 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Laitoryat koigeny ak koigeny; ki ko petyo pororyosyek eng' emennyi.
Psalms10:17 Ki igas inyee
Psalms10:18 Ibesyechini ne ma tinyei sigiik ak ne kisastae
Psalms11:1 Amang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; teptoi ano si oleenji saboondanyu: “Tiriren ko uu toriityon agoi tuloonook
Psalms11:2 ogeero
Psalms11:3 Ngot keng'em lumeiywek
Psalms11:4 Miitei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor hekalunnyi ne tiliil
Psalms11:5 Tyemei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiitap imanda; ak wechei saboondanyi kiptengekyot ak ineendet ne chamei koroomnateet.
Psalms11:6 Robonjin `inee kiptengeginik ng'etetyotap maat ak tuguuk che laldos; egu `usoonet ne peelsei kebebertap kigombennywa.
Psalms11:7 Po imanda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak chamei imanda; keerei `che po iman togeennyi.
Psalms12:1 Saru
Psalms12:2 Ng'alaaljingei tangoita
Psalms12:3 Ibeeti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutusweek tugul che ng'alaali chemwaigutnateet
Psalms12:4 Che ki le
Psalms12:5 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: “Amu sastaetap kibananook
Psalms12:6 Tiliileen ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ko uu fedha ne kityemei eng' maat ne oo
Psalms12:7 Riibech
Psalms12:8 Pendi kiptengeginik komoswek tugul
Psalms13:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms13:2 Agereeri met eng' saboondanyu kot kotyanit
Psalms13:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms13:4 si ma mwa punyondennyu kole
Psalms13:5 Ago ki amang'u rireeneng'ung'; igaseegei muguleldanyu yetuneng'ung'.
Psalms13:6 Atyenjini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms14:1 Ki komwa ne perber eng' muguleldanyi
Psalms14:2 Keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kipsengwet weeriigap piik
Psalms14:3 Ki komasta tugul
Psalms14:4 Ma tinyei kaguiyet yaigap tengekto? Amei piikyuk ko uu ye amei amitwogik
Psalms14:5 Ki iyweis miising' eng' olooto
Psalms14:6 Ki oteweer ng'aleegap kibananiat
Psalms14:7 Kita myee nda kiga pun yetunetap Israel Zion! Ye tuun iweechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik che ki kiluul
Psalms15:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms15:2 Ineendet ne wendoti eng' lititindo ak koyaei imanda
Psalms15:3 ne ma itaami chii eng' ng'elyeptanyi
Psalms15:4 ne sasei ineendet ne eesyoot
Psalms15:5 ne ma pesendoi fedhaisyekyik si kosige che siirtoot
Psalms16:1 Riibo
Psalms16:2 Kaaleenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms16:3 Ago eng' che tiliileen che mi ng'wony
Psalms16:4 Icheeget che leweni kamuktain age ko tesoksei nyalilwogikwak; ma tumdoi anee kagoochinoikwak che kieei che po korotiik
Psalms16:5 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kebebertap porotennyu ak ne po kigombennyu; iname parbaryandennyu.
Psalms16:6 Kagokwaiywa komoswek che myachen; ee
Psalms16:7 Alasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki ing'omita; ee
Psalms16:8 Kande Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tainnyu peetuusyek tugul; amu mi ineendet eunnyu ne po tai
Psalms16:9 Paibai muguleldanyu amu nooto
Psalms16:10 Memetoi saboondanyu eng' ye mi meet; amechamjini kogeer neng'ung' ne tiliil nunet.
Psalms16:11 Iboorwo ooreetap saboondo; mi kagasetapkei taing'ung' ne nyiitaat
Psalms17:1 Kas imanda
Psalms17:2 Ingomong' kirwoogennyu eng' ole imi; ingogeer konyeguk tugul che nyolunotin.
Psalms17:3 Ki ityem muguleldanyu; ki inyoonjo kemoi
Psalms17:4 Ago eng' poisyonigap piik
Psalms17:5 Ki konamgei tyegutikyuk ak ortinweguk
Psalms17:6 Kaguurin
Psalms17:7 Ibooru chamyeng'ung' ne tala ne kikwong'ee
Psalms17:8 Riibo ko uu laptetap konda
Psalms17:9 si ma twaa kiptengeginik che usa
Psalms17:10 Kager icheeget mugulelwekwak agobo riirge; ng'alaale menoteet kutusweekwak.
Psalms17:11 Kagoalachech komoswek tugul; kagochiiljech kong' si kowiirchech ng'wony.
Psalms17:12 Kergei ineendet ak ng'etundo ne machei kochumji kiit ne amei
Psalms17:13 Ng'eet
Psalms17:14 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms17:15 Ago ageere anee togeng'ung' eng' imanda; abiyonyi itoondong'ung' ye ang'eete.
Psalms18:1 Achamin
Psalms18:2 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko rwandennyu
Psalms18:3 Aguure Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms18:4 Ki alachan poroonigap meet
Psalms18:5 Ki yiema poroonigap ye mi che ki kobek
Psalms18:6 Eng' pichiindanyu ko ki aguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms18:7 Ki kirgiren ng'wony anyun ak kobotan
Psalms18:8 Ki togostae iyeto seruunekyik
Psalms18:9 Ki im kipsengwet ak icheek
Psalms18:10 Ki laany kerubindet
Psalms18:11 Ki yai mesundeito koek emainnyi ne mi komoswekyik tugul
Psalms18:12 Eng' kaluunet ne ki mi tainnyi
Psalms18:13 Kitul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kipsengwet
Psalms18:14 Ki iyookto kipchabonikyik
Psalms18:15 Ki took anyun kereruusyegap peek
Psalms18:16 Ki iyook eunnyi eng' parak
Psalms18:17 Kisarwo eng' punyondennyu ne kiim
Psalms18:18 Kichea eng' peetuutap nyalildanyu
Psalms18:19 Ki imuta amanda awo ole paraa; kisarwo
Psalms18:20 Ki koono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu imandanyu; ki koono ko uu tiliilindap eunekyuk.
Psalms18:21 Amu ki ariip ortinwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms18:22 Amu kimi tainnyu kirwoogutikyik tugul
Psalms18:23 Ki ageesunotkei eng' tainnyi
Psalms18:24 Ki koono anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu imandanyu
Psalms18:25 Eng' che tinyei rireenetapkei ii po rireenetapkei; ak eng' chiito ne ititaat ibartoige ile ii ititaat.
Psalms18:26 Eng' che tiliileen ibartoige ile ii tiliil
Psalms18:27 Amu isaru che nyerootiin
Psalms18:28 Amu inaami tainnyu; ikweng'wa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu mesundeitonyu.
Psalms18:29 Amu aiyestoi lugeet eng' inyee; eng' Kamuktaindennyu atorombeni asiire irimeet.
Psalms18:30 Ititaat ooreetap Kamuktaindet; naat ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Ineendet long'eetap icheeget tugul che imang'u.
Psalms18:31 Amu tos ng'oo Kamuktaindet
Psalms18:32 Ineendet Kamuktaindet ne ratwa kimnateet
Psalms18:33 Yaei ineendet keelyekyuk koigei che po kenyeleet
Psalms18:34 Ineeti eunekyuk koyai lugeet
Psalms18:35 Ki igoono long'eetap yetuneng'ung' agine; ki kotiia eung'ung' ne po tai
Psalms18:36 Ki ibaraiywa kakwautikyuk
Psalms18:37 Aoone puunikyuk agoi anam: amaweechigei agoi kowong'kei.
Psalms18:38 Atue kot koma komuuchi kong'eetyo; ibutyin icheek keelyekyuk keel.
Psalms18:39 Amu ki iratwa kimnateet ne po lugeet; ki iterteerwa aboi che king'eetya.
Psalms18:40 Ki iwelel puunikyuk kotuktocha patai
Psalms18:41 Ki riiryo
Psalms18:42 Ki atonaton eng' nooto komengegitu koigei temburyek che ibei usoonet; ki awaste ko uu ng'atateek che mi ortinwek.
Psalms18:43 Ki isarwo eng' pooryosyegap piik; ki igoono aek metitap pororyosyek. Tuun ota piik che tomo anai.
Psalms18:44 Ye kas agobo anee
Psalms18:45 Pegunoti toek kowandogei
Psalms18:46 Sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Iberuurot rwandennyu
Psalms18:47 Kamuktaindet ne yaaktoiywo mugetuut
Psalms18:48 Sarwo ineendet eng' puunikyuk; ee
Psalms18:49 Eng' niito aweegun kongoi anyun
Psalms18:50 Igoochin laitoryandennyi saruunet ne oo; ak koboorchin nenyi ne iilaat chamyennyi ne tala
Psalms19:1 Mwaitoi kipsengwet liilindap Kamuktaindet; ibartoi soet poisyonigap eunekyik.
Psalms19:2 Mwachin `peetuut peetuut age ng'olyoot
Psalms19:3 Ma mi ng'alaalet anan ng'aleek; ma kigasei tweguunennywa.
Psalms19:4 Itei kutinnywa ng'wony komugul
Psalms19:5 ko uu sandet ne mang'une koonnyi
Psalms19:6 Itei chorunennyi tabandap kipsengwet
Psalms19:7 Ititaat ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms19:8 Lititen kaneetisyosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms19:9 Tiliil kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms19:10 Chooto che kemachei kosiir thahabu
Psalms19:11 Kogeny eng' chooto kitigoni otwogeng'ung'; miitei melekto ne oo ngeriip chooto.
Psalms19:12 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koguiyo lelutikyik? Itiliila eng' tuguuk che ung'ootiin.
Psalms19:13 Keer otwogeng'ung' si ma yai tuguuk che po menoteet; amegoochi koboiywa. Si aek ne ititaat
Psalms19:14 Ng'aleegap kutinnyu ak kabwaatutigap muguleldanyu
Psalms20:1 Ingowolun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap nyalilda; ingoeetin kainetap Kamuktaindetap Jakobo.
Psalms20:2 Ingoyogun toreteet eng' Hekaluut
Psalms20:3 Ingobwaat kagoochinoiguk tugul
Psalms20:4 Ingogoonin ko uu ye machei muguleldang'ung'
Psalms20:5 Kigasegei acheek yetuneng'ung'
Psalms20:6 Angen nguno ale saru Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nenyi ne iilaat; woljin ineendet kobun kipsengwet nenyi tiliil eng' eunnyi ne po tai kogoochin katerteerisyosyek che eecheen.
Psalms20:7 Imang'u alak kariisyegap lugeet ak alak paraisisyek; ago kibwaati acheek kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms20:8 Terteryote icheek ak kobutyo

Psalms21:1 Poiboitu laitoryat eng' kimnateng'ung'
Psalms21:2 Ki igoochi kiit ne machei muguleldanyi
Psalms21:3 Amu isip igoochini kaberuroigap myeeindo; igerchinee metit naaryeetap thahabu ne karaaran.
Psalms21:4 Kisoomin saboondo
Psalms21:5 Oo telunatennyi eng' yetuneng'ung'; ilaakyini teegisto ak etunateet.
Psalms21:6 Amu iyae ineendet koek perurto agoi koigeny; igoochini kogaskei eng' poiboiyetap togeng'ung'.
Psalms21:7 Amu imang'u `laitoryat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms21:8 Nyooru eung'ung' puuniguk tugul; nyooru eung'ung' ne po tai icheeget che wechin.
Psalms21:9 Iwong'u icheek eng' maat ne ng'eteteni eng' peetuutap nereegeguk. Lugui `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' nyitatennyi
Psalms21:10 Tuun ing'eme logoekwak iiste eng' ng'wony

Psalms22:1 Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms22:2 Ee Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms22:3 Ago ii tiliil
Psalms22:4 Ki imang'un kwanisyekyok; ki imang'un ak ki isaru.
Psalms22:5 Ki riirchin ak kinyoor saruunet; ki imang'un ak ki ma ililanso.
Psalms22:6 Ago anee ko aa kutyet
Psalms22:7 Rorechino tugul che keera; ak kochota eng' kutit
Psalms22:8 tiegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; si kosaruun; ingosar ineendet
Psalms22:9 Ago inyee ne ki imoong'wa eng' moetap kamennyu; inyee ne ki igoono amang'un ye ki achuchuni.
Psalms22:10 Ki kiwiircha oldang'ung' kobooch ami moo; kobooch ami moetap kamennyu
Psalms22:11 Amelooitena; amu neegit nyalilda; ak ma mi ne toreton.
Psalms22:12 Kagoyiema kiruugik che chaang'; kagoyiema kiruugik che koroomen che po Bashan.
Psalms22:13 Kagoseng'eng'ja
Psalms22:14 Kagitumda ko uu peek
Psalms22:15 Kagoyaam kimnateennyu ko uu rokyet; ak kanamgei ng'elyeptanyu ak tagilgilyet; ak kaimutya temburyegap meet.
Psalms22:16 Amu kagoyiema sesenik; kagogercha ooreet tuiyetap kiptengeginik. Katoor eunekyuk ak keelyekyuk.
Psalms22:17 Amuuchi aiit kawekyuk tugul; keera ak konjurura.
Psalms22:18 Pchechingei ngoroikyuk
Psalms22:19 Ago inyee
Psalms22:20 Saru saboondanyu eng' rotwetap chok
Psalms22:21 Sarwo eng' kutitap ng'etundo; ee
Psalms22:22 Amwachini kaineng'ung' tupchosyekyuk; alasun eng' kwenutap tuiyet:
Psalms22:23 Okweek che ogonyiti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms22:24 Amu ki ma sas anan kowech nyalildap ne kinyaliili; ama ung'e togeennyi ineendet; ago ki kas ye kingo riirchi ineendet.
Psalms22:25 Inyee ne alasu eng' kwenutap tuiyet ne oo; agoitoi che ki aaroorte eng' taitap icheek che iywei ineendet.
Psalms22:26 Amisyei che talaen ak kobiyong'so; ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che cheeng'ei ineendet. Ingosapcho mugulelwekwok koigeny!
Psalms22:27 Tuun ibwaati Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole poochin ng'wony tugul ak koweekyigei ineendet; tuun kutung'jinin inyee ortinwek tugul che po pororyosyek.
Psalms22:28 Amu po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatet; ak pou ineendet pororyosyek.
Psalms22:29 Tuun amisyei tugul che neryootiin che po ng'wony
Psalms22:30 Tuun poisyechin ineendet iyoteet; ki ityin Kiptaiyat eng' ibinwek
Psalms22:31 pwoonei kobartoi imandanyi eng' piik che tuun kisichei
Psalms23:1 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mestowondennyu
Psalms23:2 Koono arue ole mi susweek che nyalileen; indoiywa awo ole mi peegap kaalyeet
Psalms23:3 isoobi saboondanyu. Indoiywa abun ortinwegap imanda agobo kainennyi.
Psalms23:4 Ee
Psalms23:5 Ichobwoo amitwogik aamis eng' meset eng' ole mi puunikyuk; kaiilee metinnyu mwaita; kagonyi kigombennyu kot kong'irtagei.
Psalms23:6 Isubota iman myeeindo ak chamyet ne tala peetuusyek tugul kotee asabe
Psalms24:1 Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'wony ak tugul che nyiitaat olooto; ng'wony
Psalms24:2 amu ineendet ne ki lumdoi ng'wony eng' nyanjosyek
Psalms24:3 Ng'oo ne togostoi tulweetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak ng'oo ne tononi eng' oldanyi ne tiliil?
Psalms24:4 Ineendet ne tiliileen eunek ak ko tiliil muguleldanyi

Psalms24:6 Niito ibinda ne cheeng'ei ineendet

Psalms25:2 Ee Kamuktaindennyu

Psalms25:9 Indochin che talaen eng' kirwooget; ak ineeti che talaen ooreennyi.

Psalms25:16 Iweekyage ak irireena
Psalms25:17 Katesak nyalilwogik che po muguleldanyu; imaanda eng' pichiinwekyuk.

Psalms25:19 Keer puunikyuk amu chaang'; ak kowecho eng' wegeet ne koroom.

Psalms26:10 mi eunekwak kolgolyet
Psalms26:11 Ago anee

Psalms27:1 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko lapkeiyennyu ak yetunennyu; tos aiywei ng'oo? Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kimnateetap saboondanyu; aiywei ng'oo?
Psalms27:2 Ye ki chea che yaei yaityo
Psalms27:3 Agot ngo yiema lugeet
Psalms27:4 Ki amage kiit agenge Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms27:5 Amu ung'ena koonnyi eng' peetuutap nyalilda; ee
Psalms27:6 Ak koeeta nguno agee puunikyuk che yiema. Agoitoi koroseek che po kagasetapkei eng' emainnyi; atyeni ak alasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms27:7 Kasa
Psalms27:8 Ye ki le muguleldanyu
Psalms27:9 Ameung'ena togeng'ung'. Ameiste kiboityondeng'ung' eng' nereegek; inyee ne ki iegu toretindennyu. Ameona
Psalms27:10 Agot ngo ki kometa abba ak kamennyu
Psalms27:11 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

Psalms28:5 Amu ma mage kiy poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

Psalms29:1 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms29:2 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor teegisto ne nyoljin kainennyi; ogutung'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' telunatetap tiliilindo.
Psalms29:3 Miitei tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyanjosyek; tulei Kamuktaindetap teegisto
Psalms29:4 Tinyei kimnateet tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; nyiitaat `etunateet tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms29:5 Iriei `tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor taragonik; tonatoni `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor taragonik che po Lebanon.
Psalms29:6 Igoochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuloonoogap Lebanon kotorombenso ko uu moita; ak tulweetap Sirion
Psalms29:7 Petei tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laletap maat.
Psalms29:8 Itumdumi tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor surkwen; itumdumi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor surkwen ne po Kadesh.
Psalms29:9 Igoochin tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kenyelok koiiyo
Psalms29:10 Tebee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maraneet ko uu laitoryat; tebyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kolaitorani koigeny.
Psalms29:11 Igoochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik kimnateet! Ingoberuuri `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik eng' kaalyeet!

Psalms31:1 Amang'un inyee
Psalms31:2 Epcha iit
Psalms31:3 Amu inyee ko ii rwandennyu ak irimennyu; eng' nooto anyun indoiywa ak imutata amu kaineng'ung'.
Psalms31:4 Imaanda eng' mesteet ne ki kiriich agobo anee eng' ung'oot; amu inyee ko ii ole amwechini.
Psalms31:5 Kande saboondanyu eung'ung'. Ki ityaacha
Psalms31:6 Aweche icheek che isubi atebosyek che ma nyolu che po lembech; ago amang'u anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms31:7 Agasigei ak abaibaitu eng' rireeneng'ung'
Psalms31:8 Ama ichamde konama eutap puunyoot; ki icham kotonone keelyekyuk ole paraa.
Psalms31:9 Rireena
Psalms31:10 Kagowong'kei peetuusyekyuk amu arageneet
Psalms31:11 Kaegu ne iteweerat amu puunikyuk tugul
Psalms31:12 Kigeutyeno ko uu chii ne ki kome; ki aige tereet ne kigoiye.
Psalms31:13 Ki agas kataamsetap che chaang'
Psalms31:14 Ago ki amang'un inyee
Psalms31:15 Miitei peetuusyekyuk eung'ung'; sarwo eng' eunegap puunikyuk
Psalms31:16 Ingokweny togeng'ung' kiboityondeng'ung'. Sarwo eng' chamyeng'ung' ne tala.
Psalms31:17 Ameng' alilan
Psalms31:18 Ingonamak kuut kiplembechonik; che itaami che po imanda eng' menoteet
Psalms31:19 Ee
Psalms31:20 Iung'e icheek ole imi ole ung'aat si ma ityi chaamsetap piik. Iunye icheek eng' ung'oot eng' emait si ma nyoor polateet ne po ng'aleek.

Psalms31:22 Ago ki amwa eng' sartaet ale
Psalms31:23 Ocham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
