Psalms32:1 Igasatkei ne kigenyochi kaat pistoennyi
Psalms32:2 Paibai miising' chii ne ma iityin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto
Psalms32:3 Ye ki asise
Psalms32:4 Amu kichiila eung'ung' peet ak kemoi. Ki yaam poortanyu ko uu ye kabiit kemeut.
Psalms32:5 Ki amwaun chalwoktanyu
Psalms32:6 Ara anyun
Psalms32:7 Inyee ko ii oldanyu ole aung'egei; iriibo inyee si ma nyoorwo nyalilda. Iyiemena tyenwogigap yetunet.
Psalms32:8 Atigoonin ak aneetiin eng' ooreet ne ibune. Ageerotin ak ang'omitin.
Psalms32:9 Amoige paraisiit
Psalms32:10 Nyooru ng'waninwogik che chaang' kiptengekyot
Psalms32:11 Ogaaskei ak oboiboitu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms33:1 Oboiboitu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms33:2 Oweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi eng' ketubet; otyenji kalasunoik eng' kibugandet ne tinyei inoik taman.
Psalms33:3 Otyenji tyendo ne leel; obut komyee si kogasak tyendo.
Psalms33:4 Amu po iman ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak yaei poisyonikyik tugul eng' imanda.
Psalms33:5 Chamei ineendet imanda ak kirwooget
Psalms33:6 Ki kiyai kipsengwet eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms33:7 Iyumi peegap nyanjet koigei tulwo; ak konoree rirosyek chogenik.
Psalms33:8 Ingoiywei ng'wony tugul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Ingobotanso piik tugul che menyei ng'wony
Psalms33:9 Amu ki mwa
Psalms33:10 Walei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ruchinaigap pororyosyek koek puch; yaei kabwaatutigap piik koek che ma tilei kiy.
Psalms33:11 Tonondos ruchinaigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny
Psalms33:12 Iberuurot pororyet ne Kamuktaindennywa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; piik che ki kolewen koek porotennyi!
Psalms33:13 Ing'ururi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kipsengwet
Psalms33:14 Keeroti eng' ole menyei piik tugul che mi ng'wony.
Psalms33:15 Ineendet ne yaei mugulelwekwak tugul
Psalms33:16 Ma mi laitoryat ne saruunegei chaang'indap lugeet; ma kisaru ne nyigan eng' kimnateet ne oo.
Psalms33:17 Ki it puch paraisiit ne po lugeet eng' katerteeret; ama saru chii eng' kimnateennyi ne oo.
Psalms33:18 Ogeero
Psalms33:19 si kosar saboonwekwak eng' meet
Psalms33:20 Igeni saboonwekyok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms33:21 Ee poiboitu mugulelwekyok eng' ineendet
Psalms33:22 Ingotebenech rireeneng'ung'
Psalms34:1 Alasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul; tebee kutinnyu kalasunennyi kotugul.
Psalms34:2 Ilasugei saboondanyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kasei nooto che talaen ak kogaskei.
Psalms34:3 Ongilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms34:4 Ki acheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki wolwo
Psalms34:5 Inyal ineendet si inyooru kakweng'et; si ma nyoor kalilanet togoochikwak agoi.
Psalms34:6 Ki riir kimnyalilyandani
Psalms34:7 Menyei malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komoswek tugul che po icheeget che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms34:8 Ochamcham anyun si onai ole myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Paibai miising' chiito ne imang'u ineendet!
Psalms34:9 Oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms34:10 Rarchin kirugigap ng'etuunyik ak koamei rubeet; ago ma rarchin kiy age tugul ne myee icheeget che cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms34:11 Obwa lagochu
Psalms34:12 Ng'oo chii ne machei kosap keny
Psalms34:13 Riip ng'elyeptang'ung' eng' yaityo
Psalms34:14 Istoegei yaityo
Psalms34:15 Tokyingei konyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che po imanda
Psalms34:16 Ago kirindoi togeetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che yaei yaityo
Psalms34:17 Ye ki riiryo che po iman
Psalms34:18 Neegitee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheeget che ilyotiin mugulelwekwak
Psalms34:19 Chaang' nyalilwogigap ne po imanda; ago saru `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' chooto tugul.
Psalms34:20 Riibei kawekyik tugul
Psalms34:21 Parei yaitwogik sogoranik; ak kirwookyin che wechei ne po imanda.
Psalms34:22 Ityachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor saboonwegap kiboitiinikyik; ak ma kirwookyin agot agenge ne imang'u ineendet.
Psalms35:1 Obargei
Psalms35:2 Nam long'eet ak torgochet
Psalms35:3 Ng'usu ng'otit
Psalms35:4 Ingolilanso ak koteweerogis che cheeng'ei saboondanyu! Ingoweektagei let ak kotoptobenso icheeget che cheeng'ei koyaiywo ne ya.
Psalms35:5 Ingogergeit ak meteteek che ibei usoonet
Psalms35:6 Ingoimen ooreenywa ak kochabait
Psalms35:7 Amu ki uny mestennywa puch agobo anee eng' keriinget
Psalms35:8 Ingoche ineendet `ng'emisyet! Ak ingonam ineendet mesteet ne ki unyei; ingororokyi olooto eng' ng'emisyonooto!
Psalms35:9 Yeityo kobaibait saboondanyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms35:10 Leen kawekyuk tugul
Psalms35:11 Ng'eetos paorinigap lembech; ak teebena tuguuk che mangen.
Psalms35:12 Yaakwo yaityet eng' ne myee
Psalms35:13 Ago ye kingo myandos icheek ko ki alaachi kuniok; ki aming'in saboondanyu eng' karugutet. Ki asaa ang'uruuksei
Psalms35:14 ko uu yo ariirchini chorwa anan weeriit ne kitupche. Ki cham awendoti ak ki ang'uruuge ariir
Psalms35:15 Ago ki poiboitu ye ki ang'wali ak ki iyumgei. Ki iyumjagei kipreprebiinik
Psalms35:16 Ki ichota icheek miising'
Psalms35:17 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms35:18 Aweegun kongoi eng' tuiyet ne oo; alasun eng' ole mi piik che chaang'.
Psalms35:19 Amegoochi koboiboitunena puunikyuk puch
Psalms35:20 Amu ma ng'alaali che po kaalyeet
Psalms35:21 Ki iseng'eng'ja icheek miising'; ki le
Psalms35:22 Kaigeer inyee
Psalms35:23 Ng'eet
Psalms35:24 Irwooksewa
Psalms35:25 Amegoochi komwa eng' mugulelwekwak
Psalms35:26 Ingolilanso ak kotoptobenso che poiboi ye kanyoorwo kiy ne ya! Ingilaakyi kalilanet ak teweernateet che ilasunenogei.
Psalms35:27 Ingotyen eng' poiboiyet ak kogaskei icheek che machei imandanyu. Ingomwa icheek kotugul kole
Psalms35:28 Yeityo kong'alaale anyun ng'elyeptanyu imandang'ung'
Psalms36:1 Ng'alaaljin `yaityet pistoindet eng' muguleldanyi
Psalms36:2 Amu ilasugei ineendet
Psalms36:3 Ng'aleegap kutinnyi ko tengekto ak ng'aalseet; ma komage kiy kong'omit anan koyai ne myee.
Psalms36:4 Ruchin tengekto eng' itogunnyi; indogei ooreet ne ma myee; ama wechei yaityet.
Psalms36:5 Itei chamyeng'ung' ne tala kipsengwet
Psalms36:6 Kergei imandang'ung' ak tuloonoogap Kamuktaindet; kergei kirwoogutiguk ak rireet ne oo; ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms36:7 Karaaran ne tya chamyeng'ung' ne tala
Psalms36:8 Piyong'dos eng' akwaiyetap koong'ung'; ak igoochini koee che po aineetap poiboindang'ung'.
Psalms36:9 Amu mi oldang'ung' kondap peegap saboon; eng' lapkeiyeng'ung' kegeere lapkeiyet.
Psalms36:10 Ingotepto chamyeng'ung' ne tala icheek che ingenin; ak ingotepto yetuneng'ung' che po iman eng' mugulelwek.
Psalms36:11 Ameng' koit ole ami keelyegap menotik
Psalms36:12 Olooto ole ki kobutyi che yaei tengekto; kigetimda
Psalms37:1 Ameng' konyitin che yaei yaityo
Psalms37:2 Amu ma tenitu ketil ko uu susweek
Psalms37:3 Imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak iyai ne myee; meng'iisye eng' emet
Psalms37:4 Paibaitune Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms37:5 Igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kondochi pandang'ung'; imang'u ineendet si kosuldaun ne imache.
Psalms37:6 Yaei imandang'ung' kotook ko uu lapkeiyet
Psalms37:7 Imuuny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms37:8 Mete nereeknateet
Psalms37:9 Amu kiwong'u che yaei yaityo
Psalms37:10 Amu tomo kitigin
Psalms37:11 Ago namei emet che talaen; ak kogaaskei eng' kaalyeet ne oo.
Psalms37:12 Chobei `kiptengekyot yaityet agobo ne po imanda
Psalms37:13 Rorechin `Kiptaiyat ineendet
Psalms37:14 Kang'us kiptengeginik rotonikwak po chok
Psalms37:15 Toorei rotonikwak po chok mugulelwekwak
Psalms37:16 Kaigai che ng'ering' che tinyei ne po imanda kosiir chaang'indap che po kiptengeginik.
Psalms37:17 Amu ildos eunegap kiptengeginik: ago tiyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che po imanda.
Psalms37:18 Ingen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuusyegap che ititaatiin
Psalms37:19 Ma nyooru kalilanet eng' peetuusyek che yaacheen
Psalms37:20 Ago lustos che ma po iman
Psalms37:21 Chiito ne ma po iman kobesenisyei
Psalms37:22 Amu che ki koberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms37:23 Chobei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole punooti chii
Psalms37:24 Agot ngo terteryot
Psalms37:25 Ki aa ming'in ak ka aoositu nguno
Psalms37:26 Igoitoi kotugul eng' aiyebindo
Psalms37:27 Itabaanegei yaityo
Psalms37:28 Amu chamei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor imanda
Psalms37:29 Namei emet che po imanda
Psalms37:30 Ng'alaali eng' utaatyet ne po iman ak mwaei ng'elyeptanyi imanda.
Psalms37:31 Miitei muguleldanyi ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindennyi; ma ichabaitoi eng' kakwautikyik.
Psalms37:32 Sapchin kiptengekyot chii ne po imanda
Psalms37:33 Ago ma metochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eutap kiptengekyot
Psalms37:34 Igen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms37:35 Ki ageer kiptengekyot ne tinyei pounateet ne oo
Psalms37:36 Ki abun yooto peetuusyek alak
Psalms37:37 Riip chiito ne ititaat
Psalms37:38 Ago ki parei pistoik kibagenge; kagesunetap kiptengeginik ko ng'emisyet.
Psalms37:39 Punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetunetap che po imanda; ineendet irimennywa eng' peetuutap nyalilda.
Psalms37:40 Toreti `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek ak kosaru; saru icheek eng' kiptengeginik

Psalms38:2 Amu ki komwogo kipchaboniguk
Psalms38:3 Ma kosabei poortanyu amu nereegeguk; ama komi kamuung'et kawekyuk amu tengektonyu.
Psalms38:4 Amu kagomaluucha tengekwogikyuk; kagotemena ko uu mileet ne nyigiis.
Psalms38:5 Kagosamisitu mookyuk ak kogonunio
Psalms38:6 Kaarigage ak ang'uruuksei miising'; ariiroti peet komugul.
Psalms38:7 Amu nyiitaat ng'wanindo suennyu; ama kosabei poortanyu.
Psalms38:8 Kanyaratitu ak kagonyanya poortanyu; atigeni amu nyalildap muguleldanyu.

Psalms44:2 Keele
Psalms44:3 Amu ma nam emet eng' rotonikwak po chok

Psalms44:6 Ma kwangennyu ne amang'u
Psalms44:7 Ago inyee ne ki isarwech eng' puunikyok
Psalms44:8 Kilasunegei Kamuktaindet peetuut komugul
Psalms44:9 Ago kaibagaaktech ak kaigoonech kililanse; ama iwe inyee kobooto lugosyekyok.
Psalms44:10 Kegoonech kemwee puunikyok

Psalms44:13 Kegoonech keegu che iteweeri piikyok che po kok

Psalms44:20 Ngo ki kageutye kainetap Kamuktaindennyo

Psalms44:22 Kibarech peetuut komugul agobo inyee; ak ki iitech ko uu keechiirek che po eng'seet.
Psalms44:23 Ng'eet
Psalms44:24 Amu nee si iuny togeng'ung'

Psalms44:26 Ng'eet
Psalms45:1 Ing'irtogei tuguuk che myach eng' muguleldanyu; amwaitoi eng' kaitosyegap tyendo agobo laitoryat; kergei ng'elyeptanyu ak kalametap siriindet ne ng'oom.
Psalms45:2 Isiire weeriigap piik eng' korooronindo; kiroong'jin kuting'ung' myeeindo; eng' nooto anyun ki koberuurin Kamuktaindet koigeny.
Psalms45:3 Rat rotweng'ung' po chok
Psalms45:4 Eng' etunateng'ung' iwendote eng' katerteerisyet
Psalms45:5 Ng'atiben kipchaboniguk; eng' mugulelwegap puunigap laitoryat; ak kobutyin piik keelyeguk.
Psalms45:6 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms45:7 Ichame imanda ak iweche tengekto. Eng' nooto anyun
Psalms45:8 Ng'uu ngoroiguk tugul nyamdutyet ne po tuguuk che uu igomoik
Psalms45:9 Mi tiibiigap laitorinik kobooto kwonyiik che konyitotiin; tononi osotyotap laitoryat eng' eung'ung' ne po tai kolaachi tuguugap thahabu che punu Opir.
Psalms45:10 Kas
Psalms45:11 ak kocham anyun laitoryat karaaranindang'ung'. Amu ineendet ko kiptaiyandeng'ung'; igutung'ji anyun ineendet.
Psalms45:12 Tuun cheeng'ei chamet piigap Tyro kotinyei konunoik; ak kosaisain mogoreek.
Psalms45:13 Tinyei cheptap laitoryat teegisto miising' eng' ko; ki kinapchi ngoroikyik thahabu.
Psalms45:14 Kimutyin laitoryat kolaachi ngoroik che ki kinde lelesta
Psalms45:15 Kimutu eng' kagasetapkei ak poiboiyet
Psalms45:16 Ee laitoryat
Psalms45:17 Ayae kaineng'ung' koek ne kibwaati eng' ibinwek tugul; ak kolasun pororyosyek koigeny ak koigeny eng' nooto.

Psalms48:1 Oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms48:2 Mi tulweetap Zion ole karaaran ak ole tagunoot niito poiboindap ng'wony komugul
Psalms48:3 Eng' kooriik che eecheen che po nganasanooto ko kigoboorgei Kamuktaindet koek ole kimwechin.
Psalms48:4 Ogeero
Psalms48:5 Kingo keer nganasanooto
Psalms48:6 Ki potanso eng' olooto; ki nyoor ng'wanindo ko uu kwondo ne machei kosigiis.
Psalms48:7 Ibute melisyek che po Tarsis eng' usoonet ne punu kong'asiis.
Psalms48:8 Ko uu ye ki kigas ko kage keer eng' nganaseetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Psalms48:9 Ki kibwaat agobo chamyeng'ung' ne tala
Psalms48:10 Ko uu ole teptoi kaineng'ung'

Psalms48:12 Obendatee Zion
Psalms48:13 Obwaat komyee irimoikyik
Psalms48:14 “Kamuktaindet niito ko Kamuktaindennyo koigeny ak koigeny. Egu ineendet kandoindennyo koigeny.”
Psalms49:1 Ogas ni
Psalms49:2 che ma taagunotiin ak che taagunotiin
Psalms49:3 Ng'alaale kutinnyu utaatyet; po kaguiyet kabwaatutigap muguleldanyu.
Psalms49:4 Aepchini iit kalewenet; ak ang'aany mwaennyu ne po ung'oot eng' tyendap ketubet.
Psalms49:5 Amu nee si aiyweis eng' peetuusyegap kaimutik
Psalms49:6 Icheeget che imang'u tuguukwak
Psalms49:7 Ma mi eng' icheek ne imuuchi kotyach ng'eetap kamet eng' oor age tugul
Psalms49:8 amu pichiy kiit ne kityage saboonwekwak
Psalms49:9 si kobiit kosap ineendet agoi
Psalms49:10 Keerei ineendet kole pegu che utaatiin
Psalms49:11 Kereeriisyekwak ko kooriikwak koigeny
Psalms49:12 Ma tebyei chii agoi eng' teegistanyi; uu tyong'ik che pegu.
Psalms49:13 Ityin niito che mi perberyo oriinnywa; niito kagesunetap icheeget che chamei tuguuk che piitune ng'alaalutikwak.
Psalms49:14 Ki kichopchi icheek ye mi meet ko uu keechiirek; egu `meet mestowonnywa. Tetoi icheek kochute kererit; nunei itoondanywa eng' olooto
Psalms49:15 Ago ityaachi `Kamuktaindet saboondanyu komang'une kimnateetap meet
Psalms49:16 Meiywei ye kagigoochi chii mogornateet
Psalms49:17 Amu ma ibei kiy ye mee; ma choortagei teegistanyi kosubi ineendet.
Psalms49:18 Agot nga ki iberuuri saboondanyi ye kita kosabei
Psalms49:19 wendi ibindap kwanisyekyik; ama kogeerei icheek lapkeiyet koigeny.
Psalms49:20 Chiito ne tinyei teegisto
Psalms50:1 Katwek Ne po Kamuktaet
Psalms50:2 Eng' Zion
Psalms50:3 Nyoonei Kamuktaindennyo
Psalms50:4 Kuurei `inee parak kipsengwet ak ng'wony
Psalms50:5 “Oyumja piikyuk che tiliileen; chooto che ki kiyomiske ak icheek eng' tiseiywek!”
Psalms50:6 Mwaitoi kipsengwet imandanyi; amu Kamuktaindet ineendet ko kirwoogindet.
Psalms50:7 Oep iit
Psalms50:8 Ma kerin kong' agobo tiseiyweguk; ak mi tainnyu kagoochinoiguk che kebeelei kotugul.
Psalms50:9 Ma kwerye tany eng' kaptugung'ung'
Psalms50:10 Amu nenyu tyony age tugul ne po timiin
Psalms50:11 Angen toriitik tugul che miitei tuloonook
Psalms50:12 Nda ama rubeet
Psalms50:13 Tos aame panyeegap kirugiguk
Psalms50:14 Igoochi Kamuktaindet korosyotap kongoi; ak yaakyi Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' arorutiguk.
Psalms50:15 Kuura eng' peetuutap nyalilda; asi asaruun
Psalms50:16 Ago leenjin `Kamuktaindet kiptengekyot
Psalms50:17 Amu inyee ne iweche atep ne myee
Psalms50:18 Ye ki igeer choorindet
Psalms50:19 Ichamjini kuting'ung' komwa yaityet
Psalms50:20 Itebye ak ichaame ng'eetap kamenng'ung'; itaami weeriitap komet.
Psalms50:21 Ki iyai tuguuchuuto ak ki asiis; ki ileen ki kerge ak inyee. Ago agerin kong' nguno
Psalms50:22 “Ara anyun obwaat chuuto
Psalms50:23 Age tugul ne igoitoi korosyotap kongoi ko nooto ne iloswa; ak ineendet ne chobei atebeennyi komyee aboorchini yetunetap Kamuktaindet.”

Psalms51:2 Iundoena inne tengektonyu
Psalms51:3 Amu ang'aanye pistautikyuk; ak mi tainnyu ng'oogistonyu kotugul.
Psalms51:4 Ki ayaun tengekto inyeendet inyegei
Psalms51:5 Keero
Psalms51:6 Keero
Psalms51:7 Iunena husop

Psalms51:12 Weekwa poiboiyetap yetuneng'ung'; ak inama atonon eng' muguleldo ne chamei.
Psalms51:13 Yeityo aneet anyun pistoik ortinweguk; ak koweekyingei kiptengeginik.
Psalms51:14 Sarwo eng' ng'oogistap korotiik
Psalms51:15 Yaat kutinnyu
Psalms51:16 Amu mebaibaitune tiseiywot; ta kagoonin. Mebaibaitune agot kagoochinoik che kibeelei.

Psalms56:1 Rireena

Psalms56:4 Eng' Kamuktaindet

Psalms56:6 Iyumigei ak kounyegei
Psalms56:7 Tos chililso eng' tengekto? Iluul piik eng' nereegeguk
Psalms56:8 Iiti ombenennyu; inde peekyuk po kong' soteng'ung'. Tos ma mi chooto bukuing'ung'?
Psalms56:9 Weekyigei let puunikyuk eng' peetuut ne aguursei. Angen niito ale

Psalms57:5 Tororitu

Psalms58:1 Tos omwae imanda okweek pounik? Tos orwookyini eng' imanda weeriigap piik?

Psalms58:4 Ng'wonennywa ko uu ng'wonetap ndaret; kergei icheek ak ereneet ne ma kastoi

Psalms63:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms63:2 Ara uu nooto koageerin eng' ole-tiliil
Psalms63:3 Amu myee chamyeng'ung' ne tala kosiir saboondo; ilasun anyun kutinnyu.
Psalms63:4 Ara anyun alasun kota asabe; anamjini parak eunekyuk amu kaineng'ung'.
Psalms63:5 Piyonyi saboondanyu eng' igoorto ak akwaiyet; ak ilasun kutinnyu eng' poiboiyet
Psalms63:6 ye abwaatin ami itogunnyu
Psalms63:7 amu ki iegu toretindennyu
Psalms63:8 Isubotin saboondanyu miising'; nama eung'ung' ne po tai.

Psalms63:10 Kigoitoi kobek eng' kimnateetap rotwetap chok
Psalms63:11 Ago paibai laitoryat eng' Kamuktaindet; igasegei age tugul ne iyastos eng' ineendet; amu kigerei kutusweegap kiplembechonik.
Psalms64:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms64:2 Unya eng' kirwoogutigap ung'oot che po che yaei tengekto; si ma nyoorwo wasetapkei ne po kiptengeginik.
Psalms64:3 Che kagolit ng'elyebwekwak ko uu rotoogap chok
Psalms64:4 Si komwok eng' ung'oot ne ititaat
Psalms64:5 Kicheergei eng' mageet ne ya; kichaamjigei kouny mestonok
Psalms64:6 Cheeng'oti tengekwogik; mwaei icheek kole
Psalms64:7 Ago mwogei Kamuktaindet icheek; ak koguoten eng' yooto.
Psalms64:8 Amu ng'aleegap ng'elyebwekwak komaasi icheek; ak tugul che keerei icheek kolelechi metowek.

Psalms65:2 Ee inyee ne kasei saaet

Psalms65:4 Paibai miising' chiito ne ileweni
Psalms65:5 Ak iwolwech eng' imanda eng' tuguuk che imuisei
Psalms65:6 Ne iuuiiti tuloonook eng' kimnateennyi; Ak korategei eng' kamuktaet:
Psalms65:7 Ne igoochin tuleetap nyanjosyek kosiis
Psalms65:8 Ak koiyweisyei che menyei ole loo miising' amu kaboorunoiguk: Igoochini koboiboitu ole charunee asiis ak ole roroktoe.
Psalms65:9 Irutochini ng'wony
Psalms65:10 Inyiiti peek ole kigereer eng' ng'wony
Psalms65:11 Inyiiti kenyiit myeeindong'ung'; Ak sau akwaiyet eng' ortinweguk.

Psalms65:13 Nyiitootiin kewosyek keechiirek; Ak nyiitootiin peek atebwosyek; Igasegei amu poiboi ak kotyendos.
Psalms66:1 Otyenji Kamuktaindet eng' poiboiyet
Psalms66:2 Otyen toroornatetap kainennyi; Otoroor kalasunennyi.

Psalms66:4 Tuun ilasun ng'wony komugul
Psalms66:5 Obwa

Psalms66:9 Ne riibei saboonwekyok kosapcho
Psalms66:10 Ee Kamuktaindet

Psalms66:12 Ki igoochi piik kotyech metowekyok; Ki kibun maat ak peek; Ago ki imutwech kebwa ole tunenot.
Psalms66:13 Anyoone koong'ung' aibu kagoochinoik che kibeelei
Psalms66:14 Chooto che ki mwa ng'elyeptanyu
Psalms66:15 Ago kagoochinoik che kibeelei che akwaen
Psalms66:16 Obwa

Psalms66:18 Ye abwaat tengekto eng' muguleldanyu
Psalms66:19 Ago iman kogogas Kamuktaindet; ki koepchi iit tweguunetap saaennyu.
Psalms66:20 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet
Psalms67:1 Ingorirenech Kamuktaindet
Psalms67:2 si konaak oreng'ung' eng' ng'wony
Psalms67:3 Ingolasun piik

Psalms68:1 Ingong'eet Kamuktaindet
Psalms68:2 Iyeste icheek ko uu ye kiyestoi iyeto: Ko uu ye chootei temeniet eng' ye neegitee maat
Psalms68:3 Ago ingoboiboitu che po imanda; ingogaskei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet: Ee
Psalms68:4 Otyenji Kamuktaindet
Psalms68:5 Kwandap che ma tinyei sigiik
Psalms68:6 Igoochin Kamuktaindet che mi icheegei komeng'jin ak alak: Imutyin kimonjororinik poroteet: Ago menyei pistoik emet ne yaamaat.

Psalms68:13 Agot ngirue piusyegap keechiirek

Psalms68:17 Karisyegap Kamuktaindet ko eliphuusyek tiptem
Psalms68:18 Ki itogoste parak
Psalms68:19 Iberuurot Kiptaiyat
Psalms68:20 Kamuktaindet eng' acheek ko Kamuktaindet ne po saruunet; po Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ortinwek che kechilile eng' meet.
Psalms68:21 Ago tuei Kamuktaindet metowegap puunikyik
Psalms68:22 Ki le Kiptaiyat
Psalms68:23 Si kobiit irooch keeldong'ung' korotiik
Psalms68:24 Ki kogeer icheek panweguk
Psalms68:25 Ki indo tyeniik

Psalms68:27 Miitei Benjamin ne ming'in
Psalms68:28 Ki kong'at Kamuktaindeng'ung' kimnateng'ung': Igimiit
Psalms68:29 Ibun laitorinik kagoochinoik Amu hekalung'ung' eng' Jerusalem.
Psalms68:30 Kergong' tyondap timiin ne mi mutweek
Psalms68:31 Tuun mang'une pounik Misiri; Iyogoochin Kush eunekyik Kamuktaindet kochokyin.
Psalms68:32 Otyenji Kamuktaindet
Psalms68:33 Ineendet ne laanyei kipsengwetisyegap kipsengwet
Psalms68:34 Ingobunji kimnateet Kamuktaindet: Mi telunatennyi Israel
Psalms68:35 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms69:1 Sarwo
Psalms69:2 Karorokyi ng'atatyat ne oo
Psalms69:3 Koang'et eng' riirekyuk; kagoyaam moktanyu: Kago imenitu konyekyuk ye ta ageni Kamuktaindennyu.
Psalms69:4 Chaang' kosiir suumeekyuk che wecho puch; Kiimeen puunikyuk che mwaei lembech che machei kobara: Ak ki agoite chooto che ki ma arebee chii.
Psalms69:5 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms69:6 Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Psalms69:7 Amu ki aegu ne kirosyin agobo inyee: Ki kotuch togeennyu kalilanet.
Psalms69:8 Ki aegu too eng' che kitupche
Psalms69:9 Amu ki ama ng'etkondap koong'ung'; Ak ki kobwonjo rosyinetap icheeget che rosyinin.
Psalms69:10 Ak ye ki ariire
Psalms69:11 Ye ki alaagoti kuniet
Psalms69:12 Ng'alaali agobo anee che tebyei eng' ormariich; Ak ki aegu tyendap kibogitinik.
Psalms69:13 Ago anee
Psalms69:14 Sarwo eng' ng'atatyat
Psalms69:15 Amengosuta mogoochek
Psalms69:16 Wolwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms69:17 Ak ameung'e togeng'ung' kiboityondeng'ung'; Chokyi wolwo
Psalms69:18 Rikyi saboondanyu
Psalms69:19 Ingen rosyinet ne kirosyina
Psalms69:20 Kogoiri muguleldanyu rosyinet; ak aa rumot: Ak ki agen che tinyei rireenet
Psalms69:21 Ki koono tuguuk che ng'woneen koek amitwogik; Ak ye ki ama melel konaga siki aee.
Psalms69:22 Ingoek mesteet meesennywa ne mi tainnywa; Ak ingoek mesteet ye mi icheek eng' kaalyeet.
Psalms69:23 Ingoimenitu konyekwak
Psalms69:24 Rong'ji icheek nyitateng'ung'
Psalms69:25 Ingoguber ole menyei; Amat komeny chii emaisyekwak.
Psalms69:26 Amu usei icheek ineendet ne ki ibir; Ak komwaoti agobo arageneetap icheek che ki iguoten.
Psalms69:27 Tesyi tengekto age tengektonywa: Ak amat kobwonji icheek imandang'ung'.
Psalms69:28 Ingibukto icheek eng' bukuitap saboon
Psalms69:29 Ago aa kibananiat ak atinye arageneet: Ingotoroora yetuneng'ung'
Psalms69:30 Alasu kainetap Kamuktaindet eng' tyendo
Psalms69:31 Ak kobaibai nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir eito
Psalms69:32 Kagogeer che talaen
Psalms69:33 Amu kasei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ponondos
Psalms69:34 Ingolas ineendet kipsengwet ak ng'wony
Psalms69:35 Amu saru Kamuktaindet Zion
Psalms69:36 Nyabani ak icheek kesweegap otwogikyik olooto
Psalms70:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms70:2 Ingolilanso ak koteweerogis che cheeng'ei saboondanyu. Ingoweektagei let ak koteweerogis che poiboi amu ng'wanindanyu.
Psalms70:3 Ingeweekta koba let amu teweernatennywa. Che leen
Psalms70:4 Ingoboiboitu icheek tugul che cheeng'in
Psalms70:5 Ago anee ko aa panan ak ma tinye kiy; Chogu ole ami
Psalms71:1 Amang'un
Psalms71:2 Sarwo eng' imandang'ung'
Psalms71:3 Egu eng' anee rwandet ne amenye
Psalms71:4 Koono achilil
Psalms71:5 Amu inyee ne ageniin
Psalms71:6 Ki atienengei kong'etee ko kagisicho; Inyee ne ki imoong'wa eng' moetap iyoonyu ne kisicho. Neng'ung' kalasunennyu kotugul.
Psalms71:7 Auu kwang'utyet eng' che chaang'; ago inyee ko ii ole amwechini ne kiim.
Psalms71:8 Nyiei kutinnyu kalasuneng'ung'
Psalms71:9 Amewiirta ye tuun kaaositu; amebagaaktaa ye kagobet kimnateennyu.
Psalms71:10 Amu ng'alaalena puunikyuk; ak irwoochi icheek che sapchin saboondanyu
Psalms71:11 leen icheek
Psalms71:12 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms71:13 Ingolilanso ak kobetyo che puunigap saboondanyu; Ingotuch icheek rosyinet ak teweernateet che cheeng'ei koyaiywo ne ya.
Psalms71:14 Ago amang'u kotugul
Psalms71:15 Mwaitoi kutinnyu imandang'ung'
Psalms71:16 Anyoone kobooto poisyonik che kiimeen che po Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Amwae imandang'ung'
Psalms71:17 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms71:18 Ee
Psalms71:19 Toroor agine imandang'ung' miising'
Psalms71:20 Inyee ne ki iboorwech nyalilwogik che chaang' che koroomen
Psalms71:21 Tes etunatennyu
Psalms71:22 Alasun agane eng' kibugandet
Psalms71:23 Paibaitu kutinnyu miising' ye atyenun kalasunoik; Ak paibaitu saboondanyu
Psalms71:24 Ng'alaali ng'elyeptanyu agobo imandang'ung' peetuut komugul: Amu ililandos
Psalms72:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms72:2 Irwookyin piiguk eng' imanda
Psalms72:3 Ipchin tuloonook piiguk kaalyeet
Psalms72:4 Irwooksechin kibananogap piik
Psalms72:5 Iywein icheek kota komi asiista
Psalms72:6 Chorugei ineendet ko uu ropta ne choorchingei malelyet: Ko uu ropta ne inesyin ng'wony.
Psalms72:7 Eng' peetuusyekyik konyooru ne po imanda perurto; Ak chaang'indap kaalyeet agoi koma komi arawet.
Psalms72:8 Laitorani ineendet kobooch nyanjet agoi nyanjet age
Psalms72:9 Ing'uruukyin ineendet icheek che menyei surkwen; Ak komel temburyek puunikyik.
Psalms72:10 Ibu kagoochinoik laitorinigap Tarsus ak che po ngeguusyek; Igoitoi kagoochinoik laitorinigap Sheba ak Seba.
Psalms72:11 Ee
Psalms72:12 Amu saru ne nyalili ye kariir; Ak kibananiat
Psalms72:13 Riire kibananiat ak ne nyalili
Psalms72:14 Ityachi saboonwekwak eng' usiisyet ak koroomnateet; Ak punjin kamanuut korotiikwak eng' tainnyi:
Psalms72:15 Ak saptos icheek; ak kigoochi ineendet thahabu ne po Sheba: Ak saaei piik kotugul agobo ineendet; Iberuuri ineendet peetuut komugul.
Psalms72:16 Ak tuun piitu chaang'indap peek eng' ng'wony eng' tuloonook parak; Ak itumdumegei logoekyik ko uu Lebanon: Ak tunendos icheek che po nganaseet ko uu susweek che po ng'wony.
Psalms72:17 Tebyei kainennyi koigeny; Tebyei kainennyi kota komi asiista: Ak kiberuuri piik eng' ineendet; Ak kuure pororyosyek tugul ne paibai.
Psalms72:18 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet
Psalms72:19 Ak iberuurot kainennyi ne tinyei toroornatet agoi koigeny; Ak ingonyi ng'wony komugul toroornatennyi. Amen
Psalms72:20 Kagogeskei saautigap Daudi weeriitap Jesse.
Psalms73:1 Iman
Psalms73:2 Ago eng' anee ko ki neegit komasta keelyekyuk; ki neegit kochabaita kakwautikyuk.
Psalms73:3 Amu ki ama ng'etkong' agobo che mendos
Psalms73:4 Amu ma nyooru ng'wanindo; chamegei poorwekwak
Psalms73:5 Ma tinyei icheeget nyalilwogik ko uu piik alak; Ama nyooru pireet ko uu piik alak.
Psalms73:6 Eng' nooto anyun uu menoteet sirimdo ne mi kaatwekwak; katuch icheek koroomnateet ko uu ngoryeet.
Psalms73:7 Ibwanotin konyekwak eng' nerateet: tinyei tuguuk che siirei che machei mugulelwekwak.
Psalms73:8 Chotisyei
Psalms73:9 Kigotoroor kutusweekwak agobo kipsengwet
Psalms73:10 Eng' nooto anyun
Psalms73:11 Ak koleen icheek
Psalms73:12 Ogeero
Psalms73:13 Iman ki atiliil muguleldanyu puch
Psalms73:14 Amu kaanyooru pireet eng' peetuut komugul
Psalms73:15 Nda ki kamwa ale ang'alaali ko uu ni
Psalms73:16 Ye kinga cheeng' ole amuuchi anaita niito
Psalms73:17 Agoi among'ji kap Kamuktaindet ole-tiliil
Psalms73:18 Iman igoochini kotebee icheek komoswek che chaboen: Ak iwiirchini icheek ng'wony koba ng'emisyet.
Psalms73:19 Katepto ano kot kosip kong'emogis icheek eng' chokyinet; kagowong'kei eng' kamuisosyek.
Psalms73:20 Uu karwotitoet ye kagos chiito; Ko uu nooto
Psalms73:21 King'wanit muguleldanyu
Psalms73:22 Ki aa abusat
Psalms73:23 Agot nga uu nooto ami kobooten kotugul: Ki inam eunnyu ne po tai.
Psalms73:24 Inyee ne indoiywa eng' ruchineng'ung'
Psalms73:25 Ng'oo ne atinye eng' kipsengwet ne ma inyee? Ama mi age ne amache eng' ng'wony kosiirin.
Psalms73:26 Ichuchui poortanyu ak muguleldanyu: Ago Kamuktaindet kimnateetap muguleldanyu ak kebebertanyu koigeny.
Psalms73:27 Amu keero
Psalms73:28 Ago myee eng' anee ariikyi Kamuktaindet: Ki acham koek Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole amwechini
Psalms74:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms74:2 Ibwaat tuiyeng'ung' ne ki ial keny
Psalms74:3 Iyogoochi keeldong'ung' ole Ki kong'emak koigeny
Psalms74:4 Kogoborisenso puuniguk eng' kwenutap tuiyeng'ung'; Ki konde songolikwak koek kaboorunoik.
Psalms74:5 Ki uu icheek piik Che namjin parak aonok
Psalms74:6 Ago putei icheek nguno aonok ak kirisonok poisyennyi tugul ne kagiwai.
Psalms74:7 Kigobeel oldang'ung' ne tiliil; Ki koyai ole menyei kaineng'ung' kong'wanit agoi ng'wony.
Psalms74:8 Ki le eng' mugulelwekwak
Psalms74:9 Ma kigeere kaboorunoikyok; Ma komi maotyondo; Ama mi kwenunnyo age tugul ne ingen kole tyanitu.
Psalms74:10 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms74:11 Kalya si iweekte eung'ung'
Psalms74:12 Ago Kamuktaindet ko Laitoryandennyu kobooch keny
Psalms74:13 Ki ipchei inyee nyanjet eng' kimnateng'ung': Ki iri metowegap cheluguinik eng' peek.
Psalms74:14 Ki iri kotonogis metowegap tyong'ik che eecheen che po peek
Psalms74:15 Ki igereer kong'igap peek ak ainoosyek: Ki iteenyi ainoosyek che kirootei agoi.
Psalms74:16 Neng'ung' peetuut
Psalms74:17 Ki ipchei kiwotosyek tugul che po ng'wony: Ki iyai kemeut ak iwot.
Psalms74:18 Ibwaat niito
Psalms74:19 Ee
Psalms74:20 Ibwaat kayomiset: Amu nyiitaat komoswek che imenen che po ng'wony
Psalms74:21 Amengoweek kolilaananu ne tinyei usiisyet; Ingolas kaineng'ung' che nyalildos ak che ma tinyei kiy.
Psalms74:22 Ng'eet
Psalms74:23 Ameutyee ng'aleegap puuniguk: Togostoi kotugul polatetap icheeget che ng'eetyinin.
Psalms75:1 Kiweegun kongoi
Psalms75:2 Ye kanyooru poroindo ne choboot
Psalms75:3 Kigochoot ng'wony kobooto chechiik tugul che menyei olooto
Psalms75:4 Ki aleenji che mendos
Psalms75:5 Amotoroor miising' kuineng'wong'; Among'alaal eng' menoteet.
Psalms75:6 Amu ma punu katorooret kong'asiis
Psalms75:7 Ago kirwoogindet Kamuktaindet: Iming'ini age
Psalms75:8 Amu miitei kigombet eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms75:9 Ago amwaitoi anee koigeny
Psalms75:10 Atile kuinoigap kiptengeginik; Ago eegitu kuinoigap che po imanda.
Psalms76:1 Naat Kamuktaindet eng' Judah: Oo kainennyi eng' Israel.
Psalms76:2 Miitei koonnyi Salem
Psalms76:3 Ki iri eng' olooto kipchabonik che po kwanget; Long'eet ak rotwetap chok
Psalms76:4 Iluu ak itinye telunateet kosiir tuloonoogap che luulsei.
Psalms76:5 Kogeluul che nyigoonen
Psalms76:6 Ee Kamuktaindetap Jakobo
Psalms76:7 Kanyool kiywein inyeendet
Psalms76:8 Ki imwau kirwooget kogasak kobun kipsengwet; Ki iyweis emet
Psalms76:9 Ye kingo ng'eet Kamuktaindet korwooch
Psalms76:10 Iman ilasun nereegegap piik: Irategei nereegek che kang'et.
Psalms76:11 Oarorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Psalms76:12 Tilei ineendet saboonwegap pounik: Imui ineendet laitorinigap ng'wony.
Psalms77:1 Ariirchini Kamuktaindet; Ee
Psalms77:2 Ki acheeng' Kiptaiyat eng' peetuutap nyalildanyu: Ki aiite eunnyu kemoi
Psalms77:3 Abwaati Kamuktaindet
Psalms77:4 Iname konyekyuk kogos: Aiimigei kot koma muuchi ang'alaal.
Psalms77:5 Koabwaat peetuusyek che po keny. Kenyiisyek che ki kobunji keny miising'.
Psalms77:6 Abwaati tyendanyu kemoi: Ang'alaali ak muguleldanyu; Ak kogosyach saboondanyu eng' kagiiletapkei.
Psalms77:7 Tos toortaisyei Kiptaiyat agoi? Tos mata kobaibait kogeny?
Psalms77:8 Tos ki kogeskei rireenennyi koigeny? Tos ma kosuldoi arorutyennyi koigeny?
Psalms77:9 Tos kigoutye Kamuktaindet rireenennyi? Anan ki kogeer nereegekyik rireenennyi ne tala?
Psalms77:10 Ak ki ale
Psalms77:11 Abwaati poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Ak abwaati kwang'utiguk che po keny.
Psalms77:12 Abwaatoti agine tuguuk che ki iyai
Psalms77:13 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms77:14 Inyeendet Kamuktaindet ne iyae kwang'utik: Ki ibarte kimnateng'ung' eng' kwenutap pororyosyek.
Psalms77:15 Ki ityaach piiguk eng' eung'ung'
Psalms77:16 Kigeerin peek
Psalms77:17 Kirong' poolik peek; Kibiitune cheet parak: Ak ki iyeesta kipchaboniguk.
Psalms77:18 Ki mi tuugeetap tuleeng'ung' kipchurchuryet; ki ikweny ng'wony `kalyelosyek: ki potan ng'wony ak kotumdumgei.
Psalms77:19 Ki mi oreng'ung' nyanjet
Psalms77:20 Ki imut piiguk ko uu akweetap keechiirek
Psalms78:1 Oepchi iit ng'atuutyennyu
Psalms78:2 Ayaate kutinnyu eng' kalewenet; Amwae ng'aleek che ung'ootiin che po keny:
Psalms78:3 Che kigegas ak kenai
Psalms78:4 Ma kiung'e chooto lagokwak
Psalms78:5 Amu ki igimit paornateet eng' Jakobo
Psalms78:6 Si konai chooto ibinda ne piitu
Psalms78:7 Si konde kamang'unennywa eng' Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:8 Ak si ma tuun igei kwanisyekwak
Psalms78:9 Kiweektagei let lagogap Ephraim eng' peetuutap lugeet
Psalms78:10 Ki ma riip kayomisetap Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:11 Ak kiutye tuguukyik che kiga yai
Psalms78:12 Ki yai ineendet tuguuk che po kwong'eet eng' taitap kwanisyekwak
Psalms78:13 Kipcheune aeng' nyanjet
Psalms78:14 Ki indochi eng' pooldet peet
Psalms78:15 Kitui rwandosyek eng' surkwen
Psalms78:16 Ki imang'une rwandet peek che rootei
Psalms78:17 Ago kites icheek koyachi ineendet tengekto
Psalms78:18 Ak kityem Kamuktaindet eng' mugulelwekwak Eng' soometap amitwogik eng' kasennywa po myat.
Psalms78:19 Ee
Psalms78:20 Ogeero
Psalms78:21 Ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun
Psalms78:22 Amu ki ma iyan pichooto Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:23 Ago ki ng'at poolik eng' parak
Psalms78:24 Ak kiroong'ji mana si koam
Psalms78:25 Ki am piik amitwogigap che kiimeen: Ki iyookyi amitwogik kobiyong'so.
Psalms78:26 Ki igoochi usoonetap kong'asiis kous eng' kipsengwet: Ak ki indochi usoonet ne po murot tai eng' kimnateennyi.
Psalms78:27 Kiroong'ji icheek panyeek che tee temburyek
Psalms78:28 Ak ki igoochi kobutyi kwenutap nganasennywa
Psalms78:29 Ki amis anyun
Psalms78:30 Ago ki ma igeskei magennywa
Psalms78:31 Konyonji eng' yooto nereegegap Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:32 Agot nganda kinyoor chooto tugul ko kita koyai tengekto
Psalms78:33 Ki iwong' anyun peetuusyekwak kobetyo puch
Psalms78:34 Ye kingo par icheek
Psalms78:35 Ki ibwaat icheek kole Kamuktaindet ko rwandennywa
Psalms78:36 Ago ki iberber ineendet eng' kutusweekwak
Psalms78:37 Amu ki ma ko lititen mugulelwekwak eng' ineendet
Psalms78:38 Ago kinyochi kaat tengektonywa amu ki nyiitaat ineendet rireenetapkei
Psalms78:39 Ak ki ibwaat kole icheeget ko poorto kityo: Usoonet ne siirtoi
Psalms78:40 Ak kingelelji ineendet konyil ata eng' surkwen
Psalms78:41 Ak ki week kogeny kotyem Kamuktaindet
Psalms78:42 Ma ibwaat eunnyi
Psalms78:43 Ko uu ye ki yai kaboorunoikyik eng' Misiri
Psalms78:44 Ak ki wal peegap ainoosyekwak koek korotiik
Psalms78:45 Ki iyookto kalyang'ik koba kwenunnywa
Psalms78:46 Ak ki igoochi koam tinapchet ruratennywa
Psalms78:47 King'eme koigap ropta sabibukwak
Psalms78:48 Ak kibiree koiyat tuukwak
Psalms78:49 Ki wiirchi icheek koroomnatetap nereegekyik
Psalms78:50 Ki yachi nereegekyik ooreet; Ak ki ma riiree saboonwekwak eng' meet
Psalms78:51 Ak ki par kiboretook tugul eng' Misiri
Psalms78:52 Ago ki indochi piikyik ko uu keechiirek
Psalms78:53 Ki indochi eng' kaalyeet
Psalms78:54 Ak ki imut agoi koit kiwotetap oldanyi ole-tiliil
Psalms78:55 Ki oon pororyosyek eng' tainnywa
Psalms78:56 Ago kityem ak kongelelji Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising'
Psalms78:57 Ak kiweektagei let
Psalms78:58 Kitach ineendet kot konereech eng' oldinwekwak che sutotin
Psalms78:59 Ye kingo kas Kamuktaindet niito konereech
Psalms78:60 Ak kimeto anyun Hekaluut ne ki mi Shiloh
Psalms78:61 Ak ki igoito kimnateennyi keluul
Psalms78:62 Ki igoito piikyik ak icheek kebare rotwetap chok; Ak ki nereekyi porotennyi.
Psalms78:63 Ki par maat weeriikwak; Ama kityenji tiibiikwak tyendap katunisyet.
Psalms78:64 Ki kibare tisiikwak rotwetap chok; Ak ki ma iteiyo mosoogikwak.
Psalms78:65 Ki ng'eet anyun Kiptaiyat ko uu ne karuei
Psalms78:66 Ak ki parat puunikyik koweektagei let: Ak ki igoochi kolilaanso agoi.
Psalms78:67 Ak ki eesyo emaitap Joseph
Psalms78:68 Ago ki lewen ooreetap Judah
Psalms78:69 Ak ki teech oldanyi ne tiliil koigei ole sutot
Psalms78:70 Ki lewen Daudi agine kiboityondennyi
Psalms78:71 Ye ki isubu keechiirek che aboen
Psalms78:72 Kibai anyun icheek ko uu kagesunatetapkei ne po muguleldanyi; Ak ki indochi eng' utaatyetap eunekyik.
Psalms79:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms79:2 Kigogoochi muuswegap kiboitiniguk toriitigap parak koam
Psalms79:3 Kitumjinot Jerusalem korotiigap piiguk ko uu peek; Ak ki ma piit chii ne kitup icheek.
Psalms79:4 Kigeegu che iteweerotin eng' piik che neegiteenech
Psalms79:5 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms79:6 Rong'ji nereegeguk pororyosyek che ma ingenin
Psalms79:7 Amu kigoam Jakobo
Psalms79:8 Amebwaat iityech tengekwogigap kwanisyekyok: Ingosip kondoenech rireenosyeguk: Amu kigenyeratitu miising'.
Psalms79:9 Toretech
Psalms79:10 Amu nee si koleen pororyosyek
Psalms79:11 Ingonyo taing'ung' tigenetap kimonjororyot; Riip inyee eng' ooindap kimnateng'ung' che kagitoorchi meet;
Psalms79:12 Ak iyaakyi pororyosyek che neegiteenech konyil tisap eng' tegetikwak Kerennywa po kong'
Psalms79:13 Ak acheek anyun
Psalms80:1 Ep iit
Psalms80:2 Ing'eet kimnateng'ung' eng' taitap Ephraim
Psalms80:3 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms80:4 Ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek
Psalms80:5 Ki ibae icheek amitwogigap peegap kong'
Psalms80:6 Iyaech keegu che moitoseech pororyosyek che neegiteenech: ak roritos puunikyok icheegei eng' icheegei.
Psalms80:7 Ee Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek
Psalms80:8 Ki ibu inyee sabibuk eng' Misiri: ki ioon pororyosyek
Psalms80:9 Kisip ichopchi poroindo
Psalms80:10 Ki iuur urwennyi tuloonook
Psalms80:11 Ki iwaakta mooriikyik kot koit nyanjetap Mediterenian
Psalms80:12 Amu nee si ibut ng'otonokyik
Psalms80:13 Ng'emei icheek toret ne punu timiin
Psalms80:14 Kisaain
Psalms80:15 Ak keetit ne ki imiine eung'ung' ne po tai
Psalms80:16 Kigebeel eng' maat
Psalms80:17 Ingotebee eung'ung' chiitap eung'ung' ne po tai
Psalms80:18 Si ma kegetyinige let kemetoin: Isoobech
Psalms80:19 Ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek
Psalms81:1 Otyenji Kamuktaindet eng' kutit ne oo
Psalms81:2 Otyen tyendap kalasunet
Psalms81:3 Oguut iryageet ko kaleel arawet
Psalms81:4 Amu ng'atuutyet niito eng' Israel
Psalms81:5 Ki ng'at niito koek paornateet eng' Joseph
Psalms81:6 Ki aistoe tigikyennyi mileet: ki kiistoe eunekyik kitongok.
Psalms81:7 Ki iguurse eng' nyalilda
Psalms81:8 Ogas
Psalms81:9 Amat kobiitunenen kanamwet ne too; Anan igutung'ji kamuktain age tugul ne po pororyosyek alak.
Psalms81:10 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Psalms81:11 Ago ki ma epchi iit kutinnyu piikyuk; Ak ki ma ko magena kiy Israel.
Psalms81:12 Ki aunde anyun koba eng' uuindap mugulelwekwak
Psalms81:13 Pwo! Nda kiga epcha iit piikyuk
Psalms81:14 Ta kasip aterteerchi puunikwak
Psalms81:15 Yaegei koek che kase iit icheeget che wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Ago kata teptoi peetuusyekwak koigeny.
Psalms81:16 Kata pae icheek nganuuk che neryootiin kosiir: Ak kata abaenen kumyat ne punu rwandet kot ibiye.
Psalms82:1 Tononi Kamuktaindet eng' tuiyet ne oo ne po kipsengwet; irwoochi Kamuktaindet eng' kwenutap kamuktaik.
Psalms82:2 Orwoochi kirwooget ne ma po iman kot kotyanit
Psalms82:3 Orwooksechinechi ne panan ak ne ma tinyei sigiik: Oyachi ne po iman che kinyaliili ak ponoonik.
Psalms82:4 Osaru kibananiat ak ne ma tinyei kiy: Osaru icheek eng' eunegap kiptengeginik.
Psalms82:5 Ma ingen kiy
Psalms82:6 Ki amwa ale
Psalms82:7 nganda uu nooto
Psalms82:8 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms83:1 Ee Kamuktaindet
Psalms83:2 Amu
Psalms83:3 Kagotuiyogei si korwooch kirwooget ne ya agobo piiguk
Psalms83:4 Ki kole icheek
Psalms83:5 Amu kigong'alaaljigei ak kogasyin; Yaei icheek arorutyet si kogirinden:
Psalms83:6 Emaisyegap Edom ak Ismaelik; Moab
Psalms83:7 Gebal
Psalms83:8 Kanamgei agine Assyria kobooto icheek; Kogotoret lagogap Lot.
Psalms83:9 Yachi icheek ko uu ye ki iyachi Midian; Ko uu ye ki iyachi Sisera
Psalms83:10 Che ki pekyi En-dor; Ki ek ng'atateek che po ng'wony.
Psalms83:11 Yachi piikwak che taagunotiin kogergeit ak Oreb ak Seeb; Ee
Psalms83:12 Che ki mwa kole
Psalms83:13 Ee Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms83:14 Ko uu maat ne peelei timiin
Psalms83:15 Oon icheek anyun eng' kipchurchuryeng'ung'
Psalms83:16 Inyiit teweernateet togoochikwak; Si kobiit kocheeng' kaineng'ung'
Psalms83:17 Ingolilanso ak koiyweis koigeny; Ee
Psalms83:18 Si kobiit konai kole inyeendet inyegei ne kaineng'ung' ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms84:1 Korooron ne tya kooriguk
Psalms84:2 Amei emo saboondanyu
Psalms84:3 Kagonyoor chepkelembut koot
Psalms84:4 Poiboen icheek che menyei koong'ung': Ilasun kotugul.
Psalms84:5 Paibai chii ne mi kimnateennyi eng' inyee; Ineendet ne mi muguleldanyi ortinwek che paroen che pendi Zion.
Psalms84:6 Ye punei icheek atebweetap Riirek koyai koek kong'igap peek; Ilaakyin perurwogik ropta ne po tai.
Psalms84:7 Pendi kong'etee kimnateet agoi kimnateet
Psalms84:8 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms84:9 Keer
Psalms84:10 Myee peetuut agenge ne atebee seremusyeguk kosiir eliphuut. Achame ariip kurgeetap kootap Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms84:11 Amu Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ko uu asiista ak long'eet: Koonu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor myeeindo ak teegisto: Maete icheek che pendoti eng' imanda kiy age tugul ne myee.
Psalms84:12 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Psalms85:1 Ki iriree emeng'ung'
Psalms85:2 Ki inyochi kaat piiguk eng' tengekwogikwak
Psalms85:3 Ki iste nereegeguk tugul: Ki ituktoochi patai koroomnatetap nereegeguk.
Psalms85:4 Weekyeige
Psalms85:5 Tos inereekyinech agoi? Tos isube nereegeguk ibinwek tugul?
Psalms85:6 Tos ma isoobech kogeny
Psalms85:7 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms85:8 Nan agas kiit ne mwaei Kamuktaindet
Psalms85:9 Iman neegitee yetunennyi icheek che iywei ineendet; Si komeny telunateet emennyo.
Psalms85:10 Katuiyo rireenet ak imanda; Kang'ututkei imanda ak kaalyeet.
Psalms85:11 Kabiitune imanda ng'wony; Ak ing'ururi ng'wony imanda eng' kipsengwet.
Psalms85:12 Ee
Psalms85:13 Wendi imanda kondoe ineendet; ak kochopchin ooreet kakwautikyik.

Psalms86:2 Riip saboondanyu; amu aa chii ne po iman: Ee inyee Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms86:3 Rireena

Psalms86:5 Amu ii myee inyee Kiptaiyat
Psalms86:6 Kaswa saaennyu

Psalms86:12 Alasun

Psalms87:1 Mi lumeiywondennyi tuloonook che tiliileen.
Psalms87:2 Chamei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kurgotigap Zion Kosiir meng'otosyek tugul che po Jakobo.
Psalms87:3 Kimwaitaenen tuguugap teegisto
Psalms87:4 Amwae kainetap Rahab ak Babilon eng' icheek che ingeno: Ogeer Philistia
Psalms87:5 Ee

Psalms87:7 Mwaei icheek che tyeni ak icheeget che urerendos kole
Psalms88:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms88:2 Ingonyo saaennyu oldang'ung'; Epchi iit riirekyuk:
Psalms88:3 Amu nyiitaat nyalilwogik saboondanyu
Psalms88:4 Kagiitita che choorchingei keriinget; Auu chii ne ma tinyei toreto:
Psalms88:5 Ki kiwiircha ye mi che ki kobek
Psalms88:6 Kaindea keriinget ne loo miising'
Psalms88:7 Irurunya nereegeguk
Psalms88:8 Kaistoena che kingenge kolooegitu; kaiyaa aek ne wegot eng' icheek. Kigegera ak ma amuuchi among' saang'.
Psalms88:9 Kagochuchuiso konyekyuk amu nyalilda: Aguurin peetuut age tugul
Psalms88:10 Tos iboorchi kwang'utik piik che ki kobek? Tos ng'eetyo che ki kobek si kolasun?
Psalms88:11 Tos kiboortoi chamyeng'ung' ne tala eng' kererit? Anan imandang'ung' eng' ye mi ng'emisyet?
Psalms88:12 Tos naaksei kwang'utiguk eng' mesundeito? Tos naaksei imandang'ung' eng' emet ne po piik che ki keutye?
Psalms88:13 Ago ki ariirchin
Psalms88:14 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms88:15 Ki kinyalila kobooch koa ming'in agoi ra
Psalms88:16 Katucha nereegeguk che laldos; Kagowong'wa kamuisosyeguk.
Psalms88:17 Ki pwa koyiema ko uu peek peetuut komugul; Ki yiema komoswek tugul.
Psalms88:18 Ki istoena chamaneet ak chorweet
Psalms89:1 Atyeni agobo rireenetapkei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi koigeny: Aboortoi eng' kutinnyu imandang'ung' eng' ibinwek tugul.
Psalms89:2 Amu ki ale
Psalms89:3 Ki imwa ile
Psalms89:4 ‘Agimiiti kesweguk koigeny
Psalms89:5 Ilasu kipsengwet kwang'utiguk
Psalms89:6 Amu mi ng'oo eng' parak ne kirogendoe Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Tos mi ng'oo eng' weeriigap che kiimeen ne kergei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms89:7 Ineendet Kamuktaindet ne kiywei miising' eng' tuiyetap che tiliileen
Psalms89:8 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms89:9 Inyee ne ibou wasetapkei ne po nyanjet: Ye kang'eet mildaennyi pogei igeregong' kosiis.
Psalms89:10 Ki ituatui Rahab ko uu ne kagebar. Ki iyeste puuniguk eng' eutap kimnateng'ung'.
Psalms89:11 Cheguuk kipsengwet ak ng'wony agine: Inyee ne ki iyai ng'wony ak che nyiitaat olooto.
Psalms89:12 Ki itau iyai murot kaataam ak murot tai: Tyendos eng' poiboiyet Tabor ak Hermon eng' kaineng'ung'.
Psalms89:13 Itinye euut ne po kamuktaet: Kiim eung'ung'
Psalms89:14 Ole tebee ng'echereeng'ung' ne po pounateet ko imanda ak kirwooget: Indoenen rireenetapkei ak imanit.
Psalms89:15 Poiboen piik che ingen tyendap poiboiyet: Pendote icheek lapkeiyetap togeng'ung'
Psalms89:16 Igasegei peetuut komugul eng' kaineng'ung': Ak kitoroori icheek eng' imandang'ung'.
Psalms89:17 Amu inyee karaaranindap kimnateennywa: Ak kitoroori kuinennyo eng' chameng'ung'.
Psalms89:18 Amu po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor long'ennyo; Ak po Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel laitoryandennyo.
Psalms89:19 Ki ing'alaalji anyun cheguuk che tiliileen eng' ng'ang'utik
Psalms89:20 Ki anyooru Daudi kiboityondennyu; Ki aiile ineendet mwaitanyu ne tiliil:
Psalms89:21 Ne tuun kimitu eunnyu eng' ineendet; Igimiiti agine eunnyu ineendet.
Psalms89:22 Ma imuuchi puunyoot koyachi ineendet kiy ne ya; Anan konyaliil weeriitap yaityet ineendet.
Psalms89:23 Atuatui puunikyik eng' tainnyi
Psalms89:24 Ak tebyei kobooto ineendet imandanyu ak rireenennyu; Ak tororitu kuinennyi eng' kainennyu.
Psalms89:25 Agoochini eunnyi koboi nyanjet
Psalms89:26 Riirchino koleen
Psalms89:27 Ayae ineendet koek taaitanyu
Psalms89:28 Agonorchini rireenennyu koigeny
Psalms89:29 Achamjini iyotennyi agine kotebi koigeny. Ak ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet ko uu peetuusyegap kipsengwet.
Psalms89:30 Ago ngo pagaakta lagokyik ng'atuutyennyu
Psalms89:31 Ngot kobut kaneetisyosyekyuk
Psalms89:32 atigoone anyun pistoennywa kirokto
Psalms89:33 Ago ma istoi rireenennyu kot kogestagei eng' ineendet
Psalms89:34 Mabute kayomisennyu
Psalms89:35 Ki ayosye konyil agenge eng' tiliilindanyu; Ale
Psalms89:36 Tebyei iyotennyi koigeny
Psalms89:37 Ki kimiti koigeny ko uu arawet
Psalms89:38 Ago kiitimde ak ieesye
Psalms89:39 Ki isas kayomiset ne po kiboityondeng'ung'; ak ki ing'wanit naaryeennyi ne po laitornatet kot iwiirchi ng'wony.
Psalms89:40 Ki ibut ng'otonokyik tugul; Ki iluul irimoikyik.
Psalms89:41 Rebe ineendet tuguukyik piik che siirtoi: Ki koek ne iteweerat eng' piigap kokwennyi.
Psalms89:42 Ki itoroor eutap tai ne po puunikyik; Ki igoochi puunikyik tugul koboiboitu.
Psalms89:43 Ee
Psalms89:44 Ki iunde tiliilindanyi kogeskei. Ak ki iwiirchi ng'wony ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet.
Psalms89:45 Ki itil kong'ering'itu peetuusyegap ming'inatennyi; Ki ilaakyi ineendet teweernateet.
Psalms89:46 Iunyegei kot kotyanit
Psalms89:47 Ee
Psalms89:48 Tos ng'oo chii ne sabei ne ma keerei meet
Psalms89:49 Ee
Psalms89:50 Ibwaat
Psalms89:51 Nooto ne ki kogerisye kong' puuniguk
Psalms89:52 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi koigeny. Amen

Psalms97:1 Laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ingobaibait ng'wony; ingogaskei emotinwek che chaang' che mi ngeguusyek.

Psalms97:4 Ki ikwenyi ng'wony ilotikyik; Ki keer emet

Psalms97:6 Iboortoi kipsengwet imandanyi
Psalms97:7 Ingolilanso tugul che otei kanamonik che ki kiwai

Psalms97:11 Kigooljin lapkeiyet che po iman
Psalms97:12 Ogaaskei eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor okweek che oo po iman; Oweekyi kongoi kainennyi ne tiliil.

Psalms100:1 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kutitap poiboiyet
Psalms100:2 Oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kagasetapkei; obwa tainnyi otyenonu.
