Psalms100:4 Oba kurgotikyik kobooto mwaetap kongoi
Psalms100:5 Amu myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; tebyei rireenennyi koigeny
Psalms101:1 Atyeni agobo rireenet ak kirwooget
Psalms101:2 Atebye komyee eng' ng'omnateet eng' ooreet ne ititaat. Ee
Psalms101:3 Mandoi anee taitap konyekyuk kiy age tugul ne ya. Aweche poisyetap icheeget che mastoi; ma nama nooto.
Psalms101:4 Istoenage muguleldo ne mastaat; ma mage kiy anai kiy age tugul ne ya.
Psalms101:5 Ang'eme age tugul ne chaamoti chiitap kokwennyu eng' ung'oot; ma muitochini menotyo
Psalms101:6 Keerei konyekyuk piik che po iman eng' emet
Psalms101:7 Ma menyei koonnyu ineendet ne yaei ng'aalseet; ma kimiitu eng' tainnyu ineendet ne mwaei lembech.
Psalms101:8 Ang'eme karonet age tugul kiptengeginik tugul che po emet; si kobiit aisto yaik tugul che po tengekto eng' nganaseetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms102:1 Kas saaennyu
Psalms102:2 Ameung'ena togeng'ung' eng' peetuutap nyalildanyu! Epcha iit; wolwo chokyi eng' peetuut ne aguursei.
Psalms102:3 Petos peetuusyekyuk ko uu iyeto
Psalms102:4 Kagebir muguleldanyu ko uu susweek ak kagores; ak autye agot aam amitwogikyuk.
Psalms102:5 Amu tuugeetap tigenennyu ko kanamgei kawekyuk ak panyeek.
Psalms102:6 Aa uu chebo kibabaa ne po surkwen; kaige anee sugurut ne po surkwen.
Psalms102:7 Ariipsei
Psalms102:8 Rosyina puunikyuk peetuut komugul; icheeget che wecho miising' ko poisyee kainennyu ko chubisyee.
Psalms102:9 Aame oreek koek amitwogik
Psalms102:10 amu koroomindap nereegeguk ak nyitateng'ung'; amu ki iganaba ak iwiirta.
Psalms102:11 Uu peetuusyekyuk urwet ne iyaptagei; ak ki ares ko uu susweek.
Psalms102:12 Ago inyee
Psalms102:13 Ing'eete ak iriiree Zion
Psalms102:14 Amu poiboitu kiboitiniguk eng' koikyik
Psalms102:15 Iywei anyun pororyosyek kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms102:16 Teechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zion
Psalms102:17 Kagogas saaetap kibananiat
Psalms102:18 Ngesir niito agobo ibinda ne tuun piitu; si kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `piik che tuun ki sichei.
Psalms102:19 Ki kogeer ineendet olito po ng'wony eng' toroorindap oldanyi ne tiliil; ki keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'wony eng' kipsengwet
Psalms102:20 si kogas tigenetap kimonjororyot; si kotyach icheek che kigechopchi meet;
Psalms102:21 si kobarta piik kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Zion
Psalms102:22 Ye kagoyumgei piik
Psalms102:23 Ki yai kimnateennyu konyalul eng' ooreet; kitil peetuusyekyuk konwagitu.
Psalms102:24 Ki ale
Psalms102:25 Ki iyai ole tonone ng'wony keny
Psalms102:26 Petos icheek
Psalms102:27 Ago ii uu nooto inyee agoi
Psalms102:28 Tebyei ko riibotin lagogap kiboitiniguk
Psalms103:1 Ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms103:2 Ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms103:3 Ineendet ne nyoun kaat tengekwogiguk tugul; ak kosaabin eng' myanwogiguk tugul
Psalms103:4 ineendet ne ityaachi saboondang'ung' eng' ye mi ng'emisyet; ak kolaagun kuutweetap chamyet ne tala ak rireenosyek
Psalms103:5 ne koonin tuguuk che myach kot koyamin si kiweegun ming'inateng'ung' ko uu kipsiichit.
Psalms103:6 Yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poisyonigap imanda
Psalms103:7 Ki iboorchi Musa ortinwekyik
Psalms103:8 Nyiitaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rireenet ak ko po myeeindo
Psalms103:9 Ma kerei kong' kotugul
Psalms103:10 Tom koyaiywech ko uu ye nyoljin chalwogikyok
Psalms103:11 Amu ko uu ye toroor kipsengwet eng' ng'wony
Psalms103:12 Ko uu ye loochin kong'asiis ak cherongo
Psalms103:13 Ko uu ye riiree kwanda lagokyik
Psalms103:14 Amu ingen poorwekyok; ibwaati ineendet kole kitemburyek.
Psalms103:15 Ago chiito
Psalms103:16 amu punei yooto usoonet
Psalms103:17 Ago tebyei rireenetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny ak koigeny eng' icheek che iywei ineendet
Psalms103:18 eng' icheek che riibei kayomisennyi
Psalms103:19 Kigogimiit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet eng' kipsengwet; ak pou laitornatennyi tugul.
Psalms103:20 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms103:21 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms103:22 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms104:1 Ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms104:2 Inyee ne itugegei lapkeiyet ko uu ngoryeet; iitoi kipsengwet ko uu ngoryeet
Psalms104:3 Ineendet ne indoi kimurtoinigap kooriikyik peek parak
Psalms104:4 ineendet ne yaei usoonaik koek chechiik che kiyooktoi
Psalms104:5 Ki ilumda lumeiywek che tonone ng'wony
Psalms104:6 Ki ilaakyi ng'wony rireet ko uu ngoryeet; ki imaluuchi peek tuloonook.
Psalms104:7 Ki mweiso icheek eng' kereng'ung' po kong'
Psalms104:8 Ki togosta tuloonook
Psalms104:9 Ki inde kiwoteet si ma siir
Psalms104:10 Iyooktoi kong'igap peek korootyi atebwosyek; chokyogoni eng' tuloonook:
Psalms104:11 Inagi peek tyondo age tugul ne po timiin; imise sigirogap timiin meleldanywa.
Psalms104:12 Menyei toriitik che po parak ngeguusyekwak
Psalms104:13 Ibise peek tuloonook eng' kooriikyik; piyonyi ng'wony logoegap poisyoniguk.
Psalms104:14 Ibiityin tuuga susweek
Psalms104:15 ak divaik che iboiboi muguleldap chiito
Psalms104:16 Piyonyi peek keetiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; taragonigap Lebanon
Psalms104:17 Ole teechei kesonokwak `toriitik; kootap cheptalamyat piribiryet.
Psalms104:18 Po tuloonook che kooen ng'oroorek che po timiin; rwandosyek ko ole mwechin kenerok.
Psalms104:19 Ki inde arawet si koboor peetuusyek; ingen asiista ole roroktae.
Psalms104:20 Iyae mesundeito
Psalms104:21 Pooriseni neranigap ng'etuunyik ye mi logeennywa
Psalms104:22 Ye chor asiista komwei
Psalms104:23 Wendi chiito poisyennyi kwo kobois agoi koimen.
Psalms104:24 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms104:25 Mi oliin nyanjet
Psalms104:26 Pendi olooto melisyek
Psalms104:27 Igenin chuuto tugul
Psalms104:28 Iyumi icheek chooto che igoochini; ing'aanye eung'ung' ak piyang'dos icheek tuguuk che myach.
Psalms104:29 Ye keuny togeng'ung'
Psalms104:30 Iyooktoi Kabuuseng'ung' ne Tiliil
Psalms104:31 Ingotep toroorindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny; Ingobaibait Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' poisyonikyik.
Psalms104:32 Potani ng'wony ye kageer ineendet; twaei tuloonook ak koiyenso.
Psalms104:33 Atyenjini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotee asabe; atyenjini Kamuktaindennyu kalasunet kota asabe.
Psalms104:34 Ingochamagis kabwaatutikyuk eng' ineendet; agasigei eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms104:35 Ingiwong' kiptengeginik eng' ng'wony
Psalms105:1 Oweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms105:2 Otyenji
Psalms105:3 Olasunegei kainennyi ne tiliil; ingoboiboitu mugulelwegap icheek che cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms105:4 Ocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kimnateennyi; ocheeng' togeennyi kotugul.
Psalms105:5 Obwaat poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee che ki koyai
Psalms105:6 ee okweek
Psalms105:7 Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms105:8 Ibwaati kayomisennyi koigeny
Psalms105:9 Ne ki yai kobooto Abraham
Psalms105:10 ak ki igimityi Jakobo nooto koek ng'atuutyet
Psalms105:11 koleenji
Psalms105:12 Ye kita ko ng'ering' pichooto
Psalms105:13 Ki pendat kobunoot pororyet age agoi pororyet age; ki pun laitornatet age koba ye mi piik alak.
Psalms105:14 Ki ma chamji chii koyachi icheek ne ya; ee
Psalms105:15 kole
Psalms105:16 Ak ki kuur rubeet konyonji emet
Psalms105:17 Ki iyookto chii kondoe icheek; ki kialda Joseph koek otwogin.
Psalms105:18 Ki igoochi ng'wanindo keelyekyik eng' mugurek
Psalms105:19 agoi peetuut ne ki isulda ng'olyoondennyi
Psalms105:20 Ki iyookto laitoryat kityaach ineendet; agot pounindetap piik ko ki unda kwo.
Psalms105:21 Ki inde ineendet koek kiptaiyatap koonnyi
Psalms105:22 si korat pounikyik ko uu ye machei
Psalms105:23 Ki nyo Israel agine Misiri; ak ki uchi `Jakobo emetap Ham.
Psalms105:24 Ak ki tes piikyik miising'
Psalms105:25 Ki wal mugulelwekwak kowech piikyik
Psalms105:26 Ki iyookto Musa kiboityondennyi
Psalms105:27 Ki inde kwenunnywa kaboorunoikyik
Psalms105:28 Ki iyookto mesundeito
Psalms105:29 Ki wal peekwak koek korotiik
Psalms105:30 Ki yom mororochik emennywa
Psalms105:31 Ki twek
Psalms105:32 Ki igoochi koik ne kata ropta
Psalms105:33 Ki pir keetiikwak ak icheek che po sabibuk ak mogoonikwak; ak ki iri keetiigap kiwotosyekwak.
Psalms105:34 Ki twek
Psalms105:35 ak ki am sogoot age tugul ne po emennywa
Psalms105:36 Ki par kiboretook tugul eng' emennywa
Psalms105:37 Ak ki imong' icheek koibei fedha ak thahabu
Psalms105:38 Ki paibait Misiri ye kingo pa; amu kiga konyoor kaiyweisyet amu icheek.
Psalms105:39 Ki iito pooldet koek ne tuge; ak maat si kogoochi pichooto lapkeiyet kemoi.
Psalms105:40 Ki soom ak ki igoochi toriitik che taok
Psalms105:41 Ki yaat rwandet
Psalms105:42 Amu ki ibwaat ng'olyoondennyi ne tiliil
Psalms105:43 Ak ki imut piikyik komong' eng' poiboiyet
Psalms105:44 Ak ki igoochi icheek emotinwegap pororyosyek
Psalms105:45 si kobiit koriip kaneetisyosyekyik
Psalms106:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Ee
Psalms106:2 Ng'oo ne imuuchi komwa poisyonigap kamuktaet
Psalms106:3 Poiboen icheek che riibei kirwooget
Psalms106:4 Ibwaata
Psalms106:5 si ageer poroteetap cheguuk che kigelewen
Psalms106:6 Kigechalwogense kobooto kwanisyekyok
Psalms106:7 Ma iguiyo kwanisyekyok kwang'utiguk eng' Misiri; ma ibwaat chaang'indap rireenosyeguk; ago ki ingelelji Ne Toroor Miising' eng' ye neegit nyanjet
Psalms106:8 Ago ki sar icheek amu kainennyi
Psalms106:9 Ki kergong' Araraita ne Piriir agine
Psalms106:10 Ak ki sar icheek eng' eutap ineendet ne kiwechei icheek
Psalms106:11 Ak ki imaluuch peek puunikwak; ma ng'et agot agenge eng' icheek.
Psalms106:12 Ki iyan anyun ng'aleekyik; ki tyen kalasunennyi.
Psalms106:13 Ne matyanit koutye poisyonikyik; ma ingen ng'olyoondennyi.
Psalms106:14 Ago kinyoor mageet ne oo eng' surkwen
Psalms106:15 Ak ki igoochi kiit ne ki soom; ago ki igoochi kosogityo saboonwekwak.
Psalms106:16 Ki am ng'etkong' icheek agobo Musa agine eng' nganaseet
Psalms106:17 Ki yaatak ng'wony ak kilugui Datan
Psalms106:18 Ak ki lal maat eng' kwenunnywa; ak ki peel maat pichooto yaacheen.
Psalms106:19 Ki itany itoondap moita eng' Horeb
Psalms106:20 Ki wal anyun telunatennywa kogergeit ak eito ne ageti.
Psalms106:21 Ki iutye Kamuktaindet
Psalms106:22 Poisyonik che kikwong'ee eng' emetap Ham
Psalms106:23 Ki mwa anyun kole ng'emei ineendet icheek amu nooto
Psalms106:24 Ee
Psalms106:25 Ki ing'unyng'ung'so eng' emaisyekwak
Psalms106:26 Ki namji parak anyun eunnyi amu nooto
Psalms106:27 ak koiyestaat iyotennywa koyom pororyosyek
Psalms106:28 Ki namgei icheek ak Baal-peor
Psalms106:29 Kitach ineendet kot konereech amu poisyonikwak; ak king'eet koroito eng' kwenunnywa.
Psalms106:30 Ki tonon anyun Phineas
Psalms106:31 Ak ki kiit nooto koek imanda eng' ineendet
Psalms106:32 Kitach ineendet kogeny eng' peegap Meribah
Psalms106:33 amu ki igoochi icheek koimak inee eng' muguleldanyi
Psalms106:34 Ma par pororyosyek
Psalms106:35 Ago kiburuchkei kobooto pororyosyek
Psalms106:36 Ki oot icheek kanamonikwak
Psalms106:37 Ki igoito weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak koek tiseiywek che ki koochin oik.
Psalms106:38 Kitumda korotiik che ma tinyei tengek
Psalms106:39 Ki murwoniitu anyun eng' poisyonikwak
Psalms106:40 Ki nereekyi kot anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik. ak ki wech porotennyi.
Psalms106:41 Ki igoito icheek koba eunegap pororyosyek; ak kiboi icheek che kiwechei.
Psalms106:42 Ki inyaliil icheek puunikwak
Psalms106:43 Ki sar icheek konyil che chaang'
Psalms106:44 Ago ki keer pichiindanywa
Psalms106:45 Ak ki ibwaat kayomisennyi ne kigayomisyi icheek
Psalms106:46 Ki igoochi piik tugul che kiluulei icheek
Psalms106:47 Sarwech
Psalms106:48 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms107:1 Oweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi; amu myee ineendet: Amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny.
Psalms107:2 Ingomwa ko uu nooto che ki kotyach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms107:3 ak ki iyum komong' eng' emotinwek
Psalms107:4 Ki ombenoti eng' surkwen eng' turguito
Psalms107:5 Ki amoti rubeet ak melelda
Psalms107:6 Ki riirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nyalildanywa
Psalms107:7 Ki indochi agine eng' ooreet ne litit
Psalms107:8 Myee kolas `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu myeeindonyi
Psalms107:9 Amu igoochin kobiyo saboondo ne tinyei emosto
Psalms107:10 Icheek che kitebee mesundeito ak urwetap meet
Psalms107:11 amu ki ingelelji ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet
Psalms107:12 Eng' nooto anyun ki iming'in Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugulelwekwak eng' poisyet ne kibirtoegei
Psalms107:13 Ki riirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nyalildanywa
Psalms107:14 Ki imoong'une mesundeito ak urwetap meet
Psalms107:15 Myee kolas `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu myeeindonyi
Psalms107:16 Amu ki put kereiywegap sugunonik che po ormariichok
Psalms107:17 Ki nyalili che perber amu pistoennywa
Psalms107:18 wechei saboonwekwak amit age tugul
Psalms107:19 Koriirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nyalildanywa
Psalms107:20 Iyooktoi ng'olyoondennyi
Psalms107:21 Myee kolas `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu myeeindonyi
Psalms107:22 Ak ingogoito korosegap kongoi
Psalms107:23 Icheek che choorchingei nyanjet eng' melisyek
Psalms107:24 Keerei chuuto poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms107:25 Amu ng'atei ak kong'eeti kipchurchuryet
Psalms107:26 Togostoi kipsengwet
Psalms107:27 Iyongooti ak koterteeryoti ko uu chii ne kagobogit
Psalms107:28 Koriirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nyalildanywa
Psalms107:29 Igoochin anyun kipchurchuryet kosiis
Psalms107:30 Koboiboitu anyun amu kagomuung'do; ak komut agoi koit ole machei komuung'e.
Psalms107:31 Myee kolas `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu myeeindonyi
Psalms107:32 Ingolas icheek ineendet eng' tuiyetap piik
Psalms107:33 Walei ainoosyek koek surkwen
Psalms107:34 Walei emet ne iyiot koek surkwen ne po muunyuk
Psalms107:35 Walei surkwen koek tamboiyot
Psalms107:36 Ak igoochin komeny olooto che amei rubeet
Psalms107:37 Ak kogool mbareenik
Psalms107:38 Iberuuri anyun icheek
Psalms107:39 Ak kogeny
Psalms107:40 Renyei pounik
Psalms107:41 Ago itoroori ne panani si ma nyoor usiisyet
Psalms107:42 Keerei che po iman ak kogaskei; ak konamak kuut tengekto tugul.
Psalms107:43 Epchin iit ne utaat tuguuchuuto
Psalms108:1 Igiilotkei muguleldanyu
Psalms108:2 Ong'eetyee
Psalms108:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms108:4 Amu oo rireeneng'ung' kosiir kipsengwet
Psalms108:5 Tororitu
Psalms108:6 Si kesar chamaniguk
Psalms108:7 Kigotwek Kamuktaindet eng' oldanyi ole-tiliil: “Agasigei ye apchee Shekem
Psalms108:8 Nenyu Gilead
Psalms108:9 Moab ko tereet ne aunegei; awirchini kweiyondennyu Edom; aorene Philistia.”
Psalms108:10 Imuta ng'oo awo nganaseet ne ng'ootaat? Indoiywa ng'oo agoi Edom?
Psalms108:11 Tos ma iwiirtech inyee
Psalms108:12 Koonech toreteet kegirindae puunyoot: amu ma tilei kiy toretetap chii.
Psalms108:13 Kiyae tuguuk che kiimeen eng' Kamuktaindet: amu ineendet ne tyekyin ng'wony puunikyok.
Psalms109:1 Amesiis
Psalms109:2 Amu kaiseng'eng'ja kiptengekyot ak ng'aaliindet
Psalms109:3 Koyiemena ng'aleek che po wegeet
Psalms109:4 Ki achame ago ki ek puunikyuk
Psalms109:5 Ak ki igeerwo ne ya eng' ne myee
Psalms109:6 Inde chiito ne ya koboi ineendet; ak ingotonone puunyoot eunnyi ne po tai.
Psalms109:7 Ingonam ineendet tengekto ye kirwookyin; ak ingowalak saaennyi koek tengekto.
Psalms109:8 Ingong'ering'itu peetuusyekyik; ak ingonam age poisyennyi.
Psalms109:9 Ingoek lagokyik che ma kotinyei kwanda
Psalms109:10 Ingoombenot lagokyik
Psalms109:11 Ingorebe yaagindet tuguuk tugul che tinyei; ak ingoluul toek poisyennyi.
Psalms109:12 Amat kobiit chii ne riiree ineendet; amat kobiit ne riiree lagokyik che ma kotinyei kwanda.
Psalms109:13 Ingogeskei iyotennyi; ak ingobugok kainennywa eng' ibinda ne isubu.
Psalms109:14 Ingobwaatak tengektap kwanisyekyik eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amat kibukto tengektap kamet.
Psalms109:15 Ingotebee taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul
Psalms109:16 Amu ma ibwaat kobarta rireenet
Psalms109:17 Ki cham ineendet chubisyet
Psalms109:18 Ki ilaach chubisyet ko uu ngoryennyi
Psalms109:19 Ingoek eng' ineendet ngoryeet ne tugegei
Psalms109:20 Niito melektap puunikyuk ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms109:21 Ago poisye inyee agobo anee
Psalms109:22 Amu aa ne nyalili
Psalms109:23 Ki abetite ko uu urwet ne petei: ki onota ko uu chereng'endet.
Psalms109:24 Nyalulyotin kutung'oikyuk amu karugutetapkei; ak kagosagit poortanyu.
Psalms109:25 Kaegu ne kirasyin eng' icheek; ye keera
Psalms109:26 Toreto
Psalms109:27 Si kobiit konai kole niito ko eung'ung'; ak konai kole inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki iyai.
Psalms109:28 Ingochubis
Psalms109:29 Ingilaakyi teweernateet puunikyuk
Psalms109:30 Aweekyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi ne oo eng' kutinnyu; alasu ineendet eng' tuiyet.
Psalms109:31 Amu tonone eutap tai ne po ineendet ne panani
Psalms110:1 Kaleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandennyu
Psalms110:2 Iyooktoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirokto ne po kimnateng'ung' eng' Zion. Pou inyee eng' kwenutap puuniguk.
Psalms110:3 Chamdogei piiguk eng' peetuutap kimnateng'ung': eng' karaaranindap tiliilindo
Psalms110:4 Ki koyosyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms110:5 Mi Kiptaiyat eung'ung' ne po tai; tuun tyechatyechi laitorinik eng' peetuutap nereegekyik.
Psalms110:6 Tuun irwookyin pororyosyek
Psalms110:7 Eei ineendet peegap aineet eng' ooreet; yotei met anyun amu nooto.
Psalms111:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Aweekyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi eng' muguleldanyu komugul
Psalms111:2 Eechen poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms111:3 Poisyennyi ko teegisto ak etunateet; ak tebyei imandanyi koigeny.
Psalms111:4 Ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee si kibwaataat; po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor myeeindo ak ko nyiitaat rireenet.
Psalms111:5 Kigogoochi amitwogik che iywei ineendet; ibwaati kayomisennyi kotugul.
Psalms111:6 Ki koboorchi piikyik kimnateetap poisyonikyik
Psalms111:7 Poisyonigap eunekyik ko imanda ak kirwooget; isuldootiin kaneetisyosyekyik tugul.
Psalms111:8 Ki kigimit kotebi koigeny ak koigeny
Psalms111:9 Ki koyokyi piikyik katyaget; kigong'at kayomisennyi kobunji koigeny. Tiliil ak kiywei kainennyi.
Psalms111:10 Kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko taunetap utaatyet; tinyei kaguiyet ne myee icheek tugul che yaei chooto. Tebyei koigeny kalasunennyi.
Psalms112:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Paibai chii ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms112:2 Tuun kimitu iyotennyi eng' ng'wony; kiberuuri ooreetap che po iman.
Psalms112:3 Mi koonnyi mogornateet ak perurwogik; ak tebyei imandanyi koigeny.
Psalms112:4 Ng'eetei lapkeiyet eng' mesundeito koluuchin che po iman; tinyei myeeindo
Psalms112:5 Myee eng' chiito ne poisyei eng' myeeindo ak kobesendoi; chobei ng'aleekyik eng' imanda.
Psalms112:6 Amu ma koi kiisto; kibwaati ne po iman koigeny.
Psalms112:7 Ma iywei ineendet ng'aleek che yaacheen; igiilotkei muguleldanyi
Psalms112:8 Lumdaat muguleldanyi
Psalms112:9 Kigoseerseer
Psalms112:10 Keerei kiptengekyot
Psalms113:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Olasu
Psalms113:2 Iberuurot kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch nguno agoi koigeny.
Psalms113:3 Kobooch ko kachor asiis agoi kororokto nyolu kilas kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms113:4 Toroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pororyosyek tugul
Psalms113:5 Ng'oo ne kergei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms113:6 keerei ng'wony keerei kipsengwet ak ng'wony?
Psalms113:7 Ing'eeti kibananiat komang'une temburyek
Psalms113:8 si kogoochi kotebi ak pounik
Psalms113:9 Igoochin ne soon koriip koot
Psalms114:1 Ye kingo manda Israel eng' Misiri
Psalms114:2 koek Judah oldanyi ne tiliil
Psalms114:3 Ki keer nyanjet ineendet ak ki mwei; ki kiweekta Jordan kwo let.
Psalms114:4 Ki toroombenso tuloonook ko uu mengichik
Psalms114:5 Amin nee
Psalms114:6 Okweek tuloonook
Psalms114:7 Potan
Psalms114:8 ne ki wal rwandet koek tamboiyot
Psalms115:1 Amegoonech
Psalms115:2 Amu nee si komwa pororyosyek kole
Psalms115:3 Miitei Kamuktaindennyo kipsengwet; yaei ineendet kiy age tugul ne machei.
Psalms115:4 Po fedha ak thahabu kanamonikwak
Psalms115:5 Tinyei kutusweek
Psalms115:6 Tinyei itiik
Psalms115:7 Tinyei eunek
Psalms115:8 Kergeitu icheeget che kiyaei ak tuguuchooto; uu nooto age tugul ne imang'u chooto.
Psalms115:9 Ee Israel
Psalms115:10 Ee kootap Aron
Psalms115:11 Okweek che oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms115:12 Kigobwaatech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; iberuurech; iberuuri kootap Israel
Psalms115:13 Iberuuri icheek che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms115:14 Ingoyabak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor obaraitu
Psalms115:15 Oberuurotin eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms115:16 kipsengwet ko kipsengwet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. ago ki igoochi ng'wony weeriigap piik.
Psalms115:17 Ma ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki kobek
Psalms115:18 Ago kilasu acheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch nguno agoi koigeny. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!
Psalms116:1 Achame Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki kogas tweguunennyi ak soomutikyuk.
Psalms116:2 Ki koepcha iit
Psalms116:3 Ki yiema poroonigap meet
Psalms116:4 Ki aguur anyun kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms116:5 Po myeeindo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko po imanda; tinyei rireenetapkei Kamuktaindennyo.
Psalms116:6 Riibei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che nyerootiin; ki kinyerata
Psalms116:7 Iweekyigei kamuung'eng'ung'
Psalms116:8 Amu ki isaru saboondanyu eng' meet
Psalms116:9 Awendotee taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emotinwegap che saptos.
Psalms116:10 Ki atinye kayanet
Psalms116:11 ki amwa eng' sartaet ale: “Kiplembechonik piik tugul.”
Psalms116:12 Aweekyini nee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu konunoikyik tugul che koono?
Psalms116:13 Aname kigombetap yetunet
Psalms116:14 Agoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki aaroorchi
Psalms116:15 Kiit ne siirtoot miising' eng' korooronindo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko meetap chechiik che tiliileen.
Psalms116:16 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms116:17 Agoonin korosyot ne po kongoi
Psalms116:18 Agoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chooto che ki aaroorchi
Psalms116:19 eng' seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms117:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms117:2 Amu oo rireenennyi eng' acheek; ak tebyei koigeny imandap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!
Psalms118:1 Omwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi; amu myee ineendet; amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny.
Psalms118:2 Ingomwa Israel kole
Psalms118:3 Ingomwa kootap Aron nguno kole
Psalms118:4 Ingomwa nguno icheek che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Psalms118:5 Ki aguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pichiindanyu; ki wolwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kondea ole paraa.
Psalms118:6 Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komostanyu; ma yweisyei. Imuuchi koyaiywo nee chii?
Psalms118:7 Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komostanyu si ko toreto; ageere anyun eng' nyiganateet chooto che wecho.
Psalms118:8 Kaigai kimang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir kimang'u chii.
Psalms118:9 Kaigai kimang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir kimang'u pounik.
Psalms118:10 Ki yiema pororyosyek tugul; ang'eetoi icheek eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms118:11 Ki yiema; ee
Psalms118:12 Ki yiema ko uu segemik; ki pek ko uu maatap katok; ang'eetoi icheek eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms118:13 Ki iokta inyee ile abut
Psalms118:14 Kimnateennyu ak tyendanyu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kagoek yetunennyu.
Psalms118:15 Miitei emaisyegap che po iman kutitap poiboiyet ak yetunet: “Yaei eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che kiimeen.
Psalms118:16 Itoroorot eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Yaei eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che kiimeen.”
Psalms118:17 Ma mee
Psalms118:18 Ki pira Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising'
Psalms118:19 Oyatwa kurgotigap imanda
Psalms118:20 Ni ko kurgeetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; punei che po iman.
Psalms118:21 Amwaun kongoi
Psalms118:22 Koita ne ki eesyo teegik
Psalms118:23 Punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoni; kwang'utyet nooto eng' konyekyok.
Psalms118:24 Ni peetuut ne ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kiboiboi ak kigasegei nooto.
Psalms118:25 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms118:26 Iberuurot ineendet ne nyoonei eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kagiberuurok acheek eng' kaberuret ne punu kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Psalms118:27 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet
Psalms118:28 Ii Kamuktaindennyu
Psalms118:29 Omwachi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu myee ineendet
Psalms119:1 Poiboen che ititaatiin eng' ooreet
Psalms119:2 Poiboen icheek che riibei paornatosyekyik
Psalms119:3 ma yaei icheek che ma po iman; ago pendote ortinwekyik.
Psalms119:4 Ki ing'at kaneetisyosyeguk
Psalms119:5 Ee
Psalms119:6 Si ma lilan
Psalms119:7 Amwaun kongoi eng' lititindap muguleldo
Psalms119:8 Asubi ng'atuutiguk; amebagaaktaa agoi.
Psalms119:9 Itiliile nee mureno ooreennyi? Kogas iit
Psalms119:10 Ki acheeng'in eng' muguleldanyu tugul; amegoono alooitune ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:11 Kaagonoree muguleldanyu ng'olyoondeng'ung'. si ma yaun tengek.
Psalms119:12 Iberuurot inyee
Psalms119:13 Ki amwaite eng' kutinnyu kirwoogutik tugul che punu kuting'ung'.
Psalms119:14 Ki abaibaitune ooreetap paornatosyeguk
Psalms119:15 Abwaatati kaneetisyosyeguk ak ariibe ortinweguk.
Psalms119:16 Abaibaitu eng' ng'atuutiguk; ma utye ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:17 Yachi kiboityondeng'ung' eng' aiyebindo
Psalms119:18 Yaat konyekyuk
Psalms119:19 Aa kiprutoiyo eng' ng'wony; ameung'ena ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:20 Tonoksei saboondanyu amu emosto ne tinyei kotugul eng' kirwoogutiguk.
Psalms119:21 Ki iger kong' menotik che chubootiin
Psalms119:22 Istoena chotisyet ak sasisyet; amu ki ariip paornatosyeguk.
Psalms119:23 Ki tebi pounik kochaama: ago ki ibwaati kiboityondeng'ung' ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:24 Poiboiyennyu paornatosyeguk ak che ing'omita.
Psalms119:25 Namegei saboondanyu ak temburyek; isooba inyee ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:26 Ki abooru ortinwekyuk
Psalms119:27 Koono aguiyo ooreetap kaneetisyosyeguk
Psalms119:28 Chootei saboondanyu amu arageneet; igimita ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:29 Istoena ooreetap lembech; ak igoono ng'atuutyeng'ung' eng' myeeindo.
Psalms119:30 Ki alewen ooreetap imanda; ki ande tainnyu kirwoogutiguk.
Psalms119:31 Kinamegei ak paornatosyeguk
Psalms119:32 Alabati eng' ooreetap ng'atuutiguk
Psalms119:33 Ineeta
Psalms119:34 Koono kaguiyet
Psalms119:35 Koono abun ooreetap ng'atuutiguk; amu abaibaitune chooto.
Psalms119:36 Tokyi muguleldanyu paornatosyeguk
Psalms119:37 Iweech konyekyuk si ma keer che ma nyolu; ak isooba eng' ortinweguk.
Psalms119:38 Igimiityi kiboityondeng'ung' ne iywein
Psalms119:39 Istoena rosyinet ne aiywei; amu myachen kirwoogutiguk.
Psalms119:40 Keero
Psalms119:41 Ingobwanjo rireenosyeguk
Psalms119:42 Anyoor anyun kiit ne awoljini ineendet ne rosyina; amu amang'u ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:43 Amerep ng'olyoondeng'ung' ne po iman eng' kutinnyu; amu ki amang'u kirwoogutiguk.
Psalms119:44 Asubi ng'atuutiguk kotugul koigeny ak koigeny.
Psalms119:45 Awendoti eng' katyagnatet; amu ki acheeng' kaneetisyosyeguk.
Psalms119:46 Amwaitoi agine paornatosyeguk eng' taitap laitorinik
Psalms119:47 Abaibaitu eng' ng'atuutiguk
Psalms119:48 Anamjini parak eunekyuk atokyini ng'atuutiguk
Psalms119:49 Ibwaat ng'olyoot ne ki iarorchi kiboityondeng'ung'
Psalms119:50 Niito ko kagaigaennyu eng' nyalildanyu
Psalms119:51 Ki kororecha miising' menotik
Psalms119:52 Ki abwaat kirwoogutiguk che po keny
Psalms119:53 Ki anereech miising' kot
Psalms119:54 Ki koek ng'atuutiguk tyenwogikyuk eng' kootap rutoitanyu.
Psalms119:55 Ki abwaat kaineng'ung' kemoi
Psalms119:56 Ki ityon kaberuroniito
Psalms119:57 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebebertanyu; ki amwa ale asubi ng'aleeguk.
Psalms119:58 Ki ariirchi chamyeng'ung' eng' muguleldanyu komugul; rirena ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:59 Ki abwaat ortinwekyuk
Psalms119:60 Ki achokyi
Psalms119:61 Ki koratarata poroonigap kiptengeginik; ago tomo autye ng'atuutyeng'ung'.
Psalms119:62 Ang'eete kemoi kween amwaun kongoi amu kirwoogutiguk che po iman.
Psalms119:63 Aa chorweetap icheek tugul che iywein
Psalms119:64 Nyiitaat ng'wony rireeneng'ung'
Psalms119:65 Ki iyachi ne myee kiboityondeng'ung'
Psalms119:66 Ineeta kirwooget ne myee ak naet; amu ki ayan ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:67 Ki abetote ye kitom kinyalila; ago nguno asubi ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:68 Ii myee
Psalms119:69 Kogochop menotik lembechek agobo anee
Psalms119:70 Katimogis mugulelwekwak eng' akwaindo; ago abaibaitune ng'atuutyeng'ung'
Psalms119:71 Myee eng' anee amu ki kinyalila; si kobiit aneetkei ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:72 Kaigai eng' anee ng'atuutyetap kuting'ung' kosiir eliphusyegap thahabu ak fedha.
Psalms119:73 Ki yaa euneguk ak kogimita; koono kaguiyet
Psalms119:74 Keera che iywein ak koboiboitu; amu ki amang'u ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:75 Angen
Psalms119:76 Asaain ale ingoek chamyeng'ung' ne tala ne igaigaa
Psalms119:77 Ingobwanjo rireenosyeguk che po chamyet
Psalms119:78 Ingolilanso menotik; amu ki konyaliila puch
Psalms119:79 Ingoweekyagei che iywein
Psalms119:80 Ingoek ne ititaat muguleldanyu eng' ng'atuutiguk; si ma lilan.
Psalms119:81 Tanui saboondanyu amu machei yetuneng'ung'; ago amang'u ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:82 Kaimenitu konyekyuk agobo ng'olyoondeng'ung'
Psalms119:83 Amu kaige soteet ne ki kinde iyeto; ago ma utye ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:84 Egu ata peetuusyegap kiboityondeng'ung'? Irwookyini au che onota?
Psalms119:85 Kigobal keriingonik menotik agobo anee
Psalms119:86 Po iman ng'atuutiguk tugul; onota puch; toreto inyee!
Psalms119:87 Ki neegit kowong'wa eng' ng'wony; ago ki ma abagaakte kaneetisyosyeguk.
Psalms119:88 Isooba eng' chamyeng'ung' ne tala; si asup anyun paornateetap kuting'ung'.
Psalms119:89 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Psalms119:90 Yamu ibinwek tugul imandang'ung'; ki igimit inyee ng'wony
Psalms119:91 Tebyei icheek agoi kora ko uu kirwoogutiguk; amu otwogiguk tuguuk tugul.
Psalms119:92 Nda ki ma ek poiboiyennyu ng'atuutyeng'ung'
Psalms119:93 Ma koi autye kaneetisyosyeguk; amu ki isooba inyee eng' chooto.
Psalms119:94 Aa neng'ung'
Psalms119:95 Ki igeno kiptengeginik kole kobara; ago aruchini paornatosyeguk.
Psalms119:96 Ki ageer ole poochitu kagesunatetapkei tugul
Psalms119:97 Tya chamyet ne achame ng'atuutyeng'ung'! Nooto kabwaatennyu peetuut komugul.
Psalms119:98 Ing'omita ng'atuutiguk asiir puunikyuk
Psalms119:99 Atinye kaguiyet ne oo asiir kaneetikyuk tugul
Psalms119:100 Aguitosi asiir poisyek
Psalms119:101 Ki aistoe keelyekyuk ooreet age tugul ne ya
Psalms119:102 Tom amaste abagaakte kirwoogutiguk
Psalms119:103 Anyinyen ne tya ng'aleeguk ye achamchami; anyinyen kosiir kumyat eng' kutinnyu!
Psalms119:104 Anyooru kaguiyet eng' kaneetisyosyeguk; nooto aweche ooreet age tugul ne po lembech.
Psalms119:105 Taitap keelyekyuk ng'olyoondeng'ung'
Psalms119:106 Ki ayosye ak ki agimiit nooto
Psalms119:107 Kinyalila miising'; isooba
Psalms119:108 Asaain ale taach konunoigap kutinnyu
Psalms119:109 Aiboti saboondanyu eng' eunnyu kotugul; ago ma utye ng'atuutyeng'ung'.
Psalms119:110 Kagochop mesteet kiptengeginik agobo anee; ago ma maste abagaakte kaneetisyosyeguk.
Psalms119:111 Koanam paornatosyeguk koek poroteet ne po koigeny; amu chooto poiboiyetap muguleldanyu.
Psalms119:112 Ki atokyi muguleldanyu ale ayai ng'atuutiguk
Psalms119:113 Aweche icheek che po kabwaatutik aeng'; ago achame ng'atuutyeng'ung'.
Psalms119:114 Ii ole aung'egei ak ko ii long'ennyu: amang'u ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:115 Oba eng' ole ami
Psalms119:116 Tiia ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'
Psalms119:117 Tiia
Psalms119:118 Ki iwal koek puch icheek tugul che istoegei ng'atuutiguk; amu lembech ng'aalseennywa.
Psalms119:119 Iistoi ko uu pusagaryek kiptengeginik tugul che po ng'wony; achame anyun paornatosyeguk amu nooto.
Psalms119:120 Potani poortanyu amu aiywein; ak aiywei kirwoogutiguk.
Psalms119:121 Ki ayai kirwooget ak imanda; amebagaakyo usiikyuk.
Psalms119:122 Egu ne tononjin kiboityondeng'ung' eng' ne myee; amat kousa menotik.
Psalms119:123 Kaimenitu konyekyuk amu machei yetuneng'ung'
Psalms119:124 Yachi kiboityondeng'ung' ko uu rireeneng'ung'
Psalms119:125 Aa kiboityondeng'ung'
Psalms119:126 Kagoit peetuut ne kanyool kobois Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kagowal icheek ng'atuutyeng'ung' koek puch.
Psalms119:127 Achame anyun ng'atuutiguk amu nooto kosiir thahabu
Psalms119:128 Eng' nooto anyun aiiti ale lititen kaneetisyosyeguk tugul agobo tuguuk tugul; ak aweche ooreet age tugul ne po lembech.
Psalms119:129 Po kwong'eet paornatosyeguk; riibei anyun saboondanyu chooto amu nooto.
Psalms119:130 Igoitoi lapkeiyet ng'ang'utyetap ng'aleeguk; igoochi kaguiyet che matinyei kiy.
Psalms119:131 Ki aseng'eng'e
Psalms119:132 Iweekyage ak irireena
Psalms119:133 Igimiit tyegutikyuk eng' ng'olyoondeng'ung'; amat koboiywa tengek age tugul.
Psalms119:134 Ityacha eng' sastaet ne po chii
Psalms119:135 Ikweng'e kiboityondeng'ung' togeng'ung'; ak ineeta ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:136 Isururunee peek che chaang' konyekyuk
Psalms119:137 Ii po iman
Psalms119:138 Ki ing'at paornatosyeguk eng' imanda ak eng' lititindo ne oo.
Psalms119:139 Ki kowong'wa kagiilennyu pogei
Psalms119:140 Tiliil miising' ng'olyoondeng'ung'; chamei kiboityondeng'ung' anyun amu nooto.
Psalms119:141 Aa nyeraat
Psalms119:142 Imandang'ung' ko imanda ne wendi agoi koigeny; ak imanda ng'atuutyeng'ung'.
Psalms119:143 Kanama nyalilda ak pichiindo
Psalms119:144 Po iman paornatosyeguk agoi; koono kaguiyet si asap.
Psalms119:145 Ki aguurse eng' muguleldanyu komugul; wolwo
Psalms119:146 Ki aguurin; sarwo anyun
Psalms119:147 Ki aguurin kotom koeech; ki amang'u ng'aleeguk.
Psalms119:148 Asip agosu kota ko kemoi
Psalms119:149 Kas kutinnyu ko uu chamyeng'ung' ne tala; isooba
Psalms119:150 Karik icheek che isubi tengekto; ki kolooegitu eng' ng'atuutyeng'ung'.
Psalms119:151 Ii neegit inyee
Psalms119:152 Ki anai kobooch keny eng' paornatosyeguk
Psalms119:153 Ibwaat nyalildanyu
Psalms119:154 Ibesyeiwo ng'aleekyuk
Psalms119:155 Loo yetunet eng' kiptengeginik; amu ma cheeng'ei icheek ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:156 Eechen rireenosyeguk che po chamyet
Psalms119:157 Chaang' usiikyuk ak puunikyuk; ago tomo amaste eng' paornatosyeguk.
Psalms119:158 Ki ageer che ng'aalsei
Psalms119:159 Ibwaat ole achamdoi kaneetisyosyeguk; isooba ko uu chamyeng'ung' ne tala
Psalms119:160 Po iman ng'aleeguk tugul ko kagiyomo; ak tebyei koigeny kirwoogeng'ung' age tugul ne po iman.
Psalms119:161 Kigoonata puch pounik; ago iywei muguleldanyu ng'aleeguk.
Psalms119:162 Abaibai eng' ng'olyoondeng'ung'
Psalms119:163 Aweche ak asase lembechek; ago achame ng'atuutyeng'ung'.
Psalms119:164 Alasun konyil tisap eng' peetuut
Psalms119:165 Tinyei kaalyeet ne oo che chamei ng'atuutyeng'ung'; ama mi kiy ne inachi icheek.
Psalms119:166 Ki amang'u yetuneng'ung'
Psalms119:167 Kigosup saboondanyu paornatosyeguk; ak achame miising' kot.
Psalms119:168 Ki asup kaneetisyosyeguk ak paornatosyeguk; amu mi taing'ung' ortinwekyuk tugul.
Psalms119:169 Ingoriikyi taing'ung' riirekyuk ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: koono kaguiyet ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:170 Ingonyo taing'ung' soomennyu; sarwo ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
Psalms119:171 Ingotwek kutinnyu komwa kalasunet; amu ineeta ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:172 Ingotyen ng'elyeptanyu agobo ng'olyoondeng'ung'; amu po iman ng'atuutiguk.
Psalms119:173 Ingochobok eung'ung' kotoreta; amu ki alewen kaneetisyosyeguk.
Psalms119:174 Ki koama emosto agobo yetuneng'ung'
Psalms119:175 Ingosap saboondanyu
Psalms119:176 Ki abetote ko uu keechiiryet ne petoot; cheeng' kiboityondeng'ung'; amu ma utye ng'atuutiguk.

Psalms120:2 Saru saboondanyu
Psalms120:3 Kigoonin nee
Psalms120:4 Kipchabonik che litotin che po che kiimeen kobooto nesek che po keetit ne kiguure Junipa.
Psalms120:5 Pwo we

Psalms124:3 ta ki koluguech kesaptosi

Psalms125:1 Uu icheek che imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Tulweetap Zion

Psalms125:3 Amu ma laitorani kirokto ne po tengekto eng' ye mi che po iman; si ma iyogoochi che po iman

Psalms125:5 Ago icheek che mastoi kosubi ortinwekwak che kunuuren
Psalms126:1 Ye kiweekta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kigeluul che po Zion
Psalms126:2 Konyi anyun roryot kutusweekyok
Psalms126:3 Kogoyaiywech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che eecheen; che kiboiboitune.
Psalms126:4 Iweech chechook che kigeluul
Psalms126:5 Che kolsei eng' peegap kong' ko kesei eng' poiboiyet.

Psalms132:7 Kibendi meng'otosyekyik; kigutunyi eng' ng'echereetap keelyekyik keel.

Psalms132:11 Ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi eng' iman; ma weechegei let: Andoi age ne punu poortang'ung' kotebee ng'echereeng'ung' ne po pounatet.

Psalms132:14 Yuto ko komosta ole amuung'e koigeny; atebee yuto; amu ki amach.
Psalms132:15 Aberuuri miising' amitwogikyik; abae kibananookyik amitwogik kot kobiyong'so.
Psalms132:16 Alaakyini tisiikyik ak icheek yetunet; ak kogaskei eng' kutit ne oo eng' poiboiyet chechiik che tiliileen.
Psalms132:17 Ayae eng' olooto kuinetap Daudi kong'at; ki achop tait agobo nenyu ne iilat.
Psalms132:18 Alaakyini puunikyik kalilanet; ago tuneni eng' ineendet naaryeennyi ne po pounateet.

Psalms149:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tyendo ne leel
Psalms149:2 Ingobaibait Israel eng' yaindennyi; ingogaskei lagogap Zion eng' Laitoryandennywa.
Psalms149:3 Ingolas kainennyi ye urerendos
Psalms149:4 Amu paibai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' piikyik; igororoni eng' yetunet che iming'inegei.
Psalms149:5 Ingoboiboitu che tiliileen eng' telunateet; ingotyenso eng' poiboiyet eng' itogusyekwak.
Psalms149:6 Ingotebee kutusweekwak kalasunoik che eecheen che po Kamuktaindet
Psalms149:7 si kobiit koyaakyi mugetuut pororyosyek
Psalms149:8 korat laitorinikwak eng' nyororosyek
Psalms149:9 ak korwookyine kirwooget ne siraat. Tinyei teegisi chechiik tugul che tiliileen. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!
Psalms150:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Olasu Kamuktaindet eng' oldanyi ne tiliil; olasu ineendet eng' yamunetap kimnateennyi.
Psalms150:2 Olasu ineendet amu poisyonikyik che po kamuktaet; olasu ineendet ko uu ole tee etunatennyi ne telunoot miising'.
Psalms150:3 Olasu ineendet eng' cheetap iryageet; olasu ineendet eng' kibugandet ak ketubet!
Psalms150:4 Olasu ineendet eng' sugutit ne ming'in ak ureryet; olasu ineendet eng' kibugandinik che po inoik ak ndurerusyek.
Psalms150:5 Olasu ineendet eng' sanisyegap sugunonik che kibirei che cheitos; olasu ineendet eng' sanisyegap sugunonik che cheitos miising'.
Psalms150:6 Ingolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy age tugul ne tinyei kabuuset! Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!

Proverbs21:1 Uu ainoosyek muguleldap laitoryat eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; imuti kotokyigei oldo tugul ole machei.
Proverbs21:2 Leen chii po iman poisyonikyik tugul
Proverbs21:3 Keyaei iman ak kirwooget
Proverbs21:4 Koonyek che tinyei menoteet ak muguleldo ne meenei
Proverbs21:5 Tokyingei chaang'indo kityo kabwaatutigap che igiilegei; ago panani age tugul ne sartae.
Proverbs21:6 Ye kinyooru konoraik eng' lembeita ko uu kibungweret ne ki wiirchin komosi ak komosi ak uu mesteetap meet.
Proverbs21:7 Oone kiptengeginik koroomnatennywa
Proverbs21:8 Kunuur miising' ooreetap ineendet ne laei ng'oogisto
Proverbs21:9 Kaigai kemeny taban eng' koot parak
Proverbs21:10 Machei yaityet saboondap chiito ne ya; ma nyooru chameet chiitap kokwennyi eng' tainnyi.
Proverbs21:11 Ye kibir chotindet
Proverbs21:12 Ibwaati chiitap iman kootap kiptengekyot; ole kigabuitoi kiptengeginik eng' ng'emisyennywa.
Proverbs21:13 Ineendet ne timei itiikyik ye riirei kibananiat
Proverbs21:14 Imisi nereegek konunotyot ne ki koonu eng' ung'oot
Proverbs21:15 Poiboiyet eng' chiito ne po iman koyai kirwooget; ago kaimetapkei eng' yaigap tengekto.
Proverbs21:16 Imuunyi eng' tuiyetap che ki kobek chiito ne mastoi eng' ooreetap kaguiyet.
Proverbs21:17 Egu kibananiat chiito ne chamei ureryet
Proverbs21:18 Egu kiptengekyot ne kityage ne po iman; ak kogeeri kaberberindet che po iman.
Proverbs21:19 Kaigai kemeny surkwen
Proverbs21:20 Miitei konoraik che po kamanuutyet ne oo ak mwanik eng' meng'ootetap ne utaat
Proverbs21:21 Ineendet ne isubi imanda ak chamyet
Proverbs21:22 Laanyei chiito ne utaat nganaseetap che kiimeen
Proverbs21:23 Age tugul ne riibei kutinnyi ak ng'elyeptanyi koriibei saboondanyi si ma nyoor nyalilwogik.
Proverbs21:24 Kiguure chotindet chiito ne meenei ak kochaugei
Proverbs21:25 Parei chiito ne choriren magennyi; amu eesyoi eunekyik kobois.
Proverbs21:26 Mi ne kasei myat eng' keiyandit peet komugul; ago igoitoi ne po iman ama etei.

Proverbs22:1 Kaigai kelewen kainet ne myee kosiir mogornatosyek che chaang'; kaigai kelewen myeeindo ne po chamyet kosiir fedha ak thahabu.
Proverbs22:2 Ni ne amdoi mogoreek ak kibananook: Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yaindetap icheek tugul.
Proverbs22:3 Keerei chiito ne ng'oom yaityet ak kounygei; ago siirtoi abusanik ak konyoor nyalilda.
Proverbs22:4 Melektap kaming'inetapkei ak kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Proverbs22:5 Mi katook ak mestonok ooreetap chiito ne imaasat; looitune chooto ineendet ne riibei saboondanyi.
Proverbs22:6 Ineet lakweet koosup ooreet ne nyolu kobun

Proverbs24:6 amu iyae lugeeng'ung' eng' kandoet ne po utaatyet

Proverbs31:1 Ng'aleegap Laitoryat Lemuel; maonatet ne ki ineet kamet ineendet.
Proverbs31:2 Nee
Proverbs31:3 Amegoochi karusyek kimnateng'ung'
Proverbs31:4 Ma nyooljin laitorinik
Proverbs31:5 si ye kagoee
Proverbs31:6 Inage maiyek ineendet ne machei kolus
Proverbs31:7 ingoee ak koutye panandanyi
Proverbs31:8 Ng'alaal agobo ne namaat kuut
Proverbs31:9 Ng'alaal
Proverbs31:10 Ng'oo ne imuuchi konyoor kwondo ne nyolunot? Amu siirei miising' kamanuutyennyi
Proverbs31:11 Imang'u manong'otyondennyi ineendet
Proverbs31:12 Yachin ne myee osotyonnyi ineendet
Proverbs31:13 Cheeng'ei osotyondonooto koroorigap keechiirek ak katanit
Proverbs31:14 Uu ineendet melisyegap che ibooti tuguuk che ki aldoi; amu ibu amitwogikyik eng' ole loo.
Proverbs31:15 Ng'eetei kogeny kota ko kemoi
Proverbs31:16 Ibwaati agobo mbareet
Proverbs31:17 Kermenegei kimnateet
Proverbs31:18 Keerei kole tinyei keljinet mung'arennyi; ma meei tainnyi kemoi.
Proverbs31:19 Namei keetit ne kitae koroorik
Proverbs31:20 Aiyeep ineendet eng' kibananiat; ee
Proverbs31:21 Ma iywei kole tos nyoor piikyik kaitityetap teluji; amu ilaachi piik tugul che po koonnyi ngoroik che piriireen.
Proverbs31:22 Napchingei kitambaok che po lelesta; po ngoroikyik katanit ne karaaran ak ko po tuguuk che arusen ne piriir.
Proverbs31:23 Naat manong'otyondennyi eng' ormariichok
Proverbs31:24 Nabei osotyondonooto ngoroigap katanit si koalda; igoochin chemung'arainik mosibisyek.
Proverbs31:25 Kimnateet ak teegisto ko ngoroikyik
Proverbs31:26 Twegu eng' utaatyet
Proverbs31:27 Riibei komyee atebosyegap piigap koonnyi
Proverbs31:28 Ng'eetos lagokyik ak koguuree ineendet ne iberuurot; ilasu kogeny manong'otyondennyi ineendet kole
Proverbs31:29 “Ki koyai ne nyolunot tiibiik che chaang'
Proverbs31:30 Iberberisyei myeeindo
Proverbs31:31 Ogoochi logoegap eunekyik; ak ingolas poisyonikyik ineendet eng' ormariichok.
Ecclesiastes1:1 Chu ng'aleegap Amdoindet
Ecclesiastes1:2 Mwaei Amdoindet kole
Ecclesiastes1:3 Nee keljinet ne nyooru chiito
Ecclesiastes1:4 Siirtoi ibinda age ak nyoonei age
Ecclesiastes1:5 Charu asiista ak kororokto; ak choktoi kowendi ole charunee.
Ecclesiastes1:6 Usyin usoonet murot tai
Ecclesiastes1:7 Rootyin `ainoosyek tugul nyanja
Ecclesiastes1:8 Koonu ng'etatet tuguuk tugul; ng'etatet ne ma imuuchi chii komwa. Ma piyonyi konda che keerei
Ecclesiastes1:9 Nooto ne ki kobiit
Ecclesiastes1:10 Tos mi kiy ne mwaei piik kole
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ma mi kabwaato agobo ibinwek che po tai; ama ibwaati ibinwek che po let che ta kobwanei
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ki aa laitoryatap Israel eng' Jerusalem anee Amdoindet.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ki agiil muguleldanyu kocheeng' ak kosyach eng' utaatyet agobo tuguuk tugul che kiyaei eng' kurereetap kipsengwet. Ki igoochi Kamuktaindet weeriigap piik poisyet ne po nyalilda kotigone.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ki ageer poisyonik tugul che kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista; ak ogeero
Ecclesiastes1:15 Ma kimuuchi kilitit kiit ne kunuur; ama kimuuchi kiit ne ma mi.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ki amwachi muguleldanyu aleenji
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ak ki agiil muguleldanyu konai ak koobeesyo utaatyet; konai iywek ak perberyo. Ago ki ageer kogeny ale kaimetapkei puch niito.
Ecclesiastes1:18 Amu mi arageneet ne oo utaatyet ne oo: ak tesei arageneet ineendet ne tesei ng'omnateet.
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ki amwa eng' muguleldanyu ale
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ki amwa agobo roryot ale
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ki asyaach eng' muguleldanyu ole aboiboititoi poortanyu eng' divaik
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ki ayachigei poisyosyek che eecheen; ki ateekyigei kooriik; ki aminjige sabibuk;
Ecclesiastes2:5 ki abatyige mbareenik ak achop ole kiuure
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ki ayachigei tamboinik
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ki aal otwogik che murenik ak che tiibiik
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ki ayumjige kogeny fedha ak thahabu
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ki aa oo anyun ak ki atesage asiir tugul che ki indounena eng' Jerusalem; ak ki atepte utaatyennyu.
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ak ki ma aeete konyekyuk kiy age tugul ne kimach: ma aeete muguleldanyu poiboiyet age tugul
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ki ageer anyun poisyonik tugul che ki ayai
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ki awelelgei anyun acheeng' utaatyet
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ki ageer anyun ale siirei utaatyet perberyo
Ecclesiastes2:14 Tinyei koonyek che keertoe ne utaat
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ki ale anyun eng' muguleldanyu
Ecclesiastes2:16 Amu ma kibwaati ne utaat agoi
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ki awech anyun sabeet amu ki koono ng'wanindo poisyet ne kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista. Amu puch tugul ak kaimetapkei ne po puch.
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ki awech poisyennyu tugul ne ki abirtochigei eng' kurereetap asiista. Amu eng' ne matiny
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ak ng'oo ne ingen ngo tuun egu chiito ne utaat anan ko ne perber? Nganda uu nooto
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ki awelelgei anyun ak agoochi muguleldanyu koaragen amu poisyet tugul ne ki abirtochigei eng' kurereetap asiista.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Amu mi chiito ne yaei poisyennyi eng' ng'omnateet
Ecclesiastes2:22 Nee ne nyooru chiito eng' pirtoennyi pogei tugul
Ecclesiastes2:23 Amu po arageneet peetuusyekyik tugul
Ecclesiastes2:24 Ma mi kiit ne kaigai eng' chiito kosiir koamis ak koeeiso
Ecclesiastes2:25 Amu ng'oo ne imuuchi koamis
Ecclesiastes2:26 Amu igoochin Ineendet utaatyet ak naet
Ecclesiastes3:1 Mi kasartap kiy age tugul
Ecclesiastes3:2 Peetuut ne kisige chii ak peetuut ne meei chii; peetuut ne kiminsei ak peetuut ne kitutu chooto kiga kimin;
Ecclesiastes3:3 peetuut ne kibarisye ak peetuut ne kinyaise; peetuut ne kibutisyei
Ecclesiastes3:4 peetuut ne ki riirtos ak peetuut ne kiroritos; peetuut ne kiteitos ak peetuut ne kiurereni;
Ecclesiastes3:5 peetuut ne ki wiirtoi koik ak peetuut ne kiyumi koik; peetuut ne kitoroochegei ak peetuut ne ma kitoroochegei;
Ecclesiastes3:6 peetuut ne ki cheeng'sei ak peetuut ne kibeeti; peetuut ne kigonori ak peetuut ne kimetoi;
Ecclesiastes3:7 peetuut ne kigereeri ak peetuut ne kinabisye; peetuut ne kisistos ak peetuut ne ki ng'alaaldos;
Ecclesiastes3:8 peetuut ne ki chamisye ak peetuut ne kiwegisye; peetuut ne po lugeet ak peetuut ne po kaalyeet.
Ecclesiastes3:9 Nee keljinet ne nyooru ineendet ne poisyei eng' nooto pirtochingei?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ki ageer poisyet ne Ki kogoochi `Kamuktaindet weeriigap piik kotigone.
Ecclesiastes3:11 Ki koyai kiy age tugul kogararanit eng' peetuunnyi: ak ki inde mugulelwekwak kabwaatetap koigeny
Ecclesiastes3:12 Angen ale ma mi kiit ne myee eng' icheek kosiir koboiboitu
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ak kogeny konunetap Kamuktaindet konyaaljin chii age tugul koamis
Ecclesiastes3:14 Angen ale
Ecclesiastes3:15 No miitei
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ki ageer anyun kogeny eng' kurereetap asiista ale mi yaityet kapkirwooget
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ki amwa eng' muguleldanyu ale
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ki amwa eng' muguleldanyu ale
Ecclesiastes3:19 Amu kiit ne nyooru weeriigap piik konyooru tyong'ik
Ecclesiastes3:20 Pegu tugul ak kobendi komosta agenge. Po tugul ng'ung'unyek ak ketyingei tugul ng'ung'unyek.
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ng'oo ne ingen ngo wendi saboondap chiito parak ak ngo wendi ng'wony oriit ne po tyondo?
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ki ageer anyun ale
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ki aweege anyun ak ageer usiisyosyek tugul che kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista. Mi riiregap che ki kius
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ki alasu anyun che ki kobek kosiir che ta kosaptos;
Ecclesiastes4:3 Ki aiit ale kaigai ineendet ne tomo kesich
Ecclesiastes4:4 Yeityo ageer poisyet tugul ak poisyet age tugul ne po utaatyet
Ecclesiastes4:5 Namjin ne perber eunekyik tegeet
Ecclesiastes4:6 Kaigai kererutyet kobooto siisek
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ki aweege anyun ak ageer tangoita eng' kurereetap asiista:
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mi age ne mi ineegei
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kaigai aeng'u kosiir agenge
Ecclesiastes4:10 Amu ngo putyo
Ecclesiastes4:11 Kogeny
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ak ngo terteer `chiito ineendet ne mi ineegei
Ecclesiastes4:13 Kaigai nerana ne kibanania
Ecclesiastes4:14 Amu ki mang'une korgoreet konyo koek laitoryat; ee
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ki ageer tugul che saptos che pendoti eng' kurereetap asiista
Ecclesiastes4:16 Ki ma komi kagesunetap piik tugul
Ecclesiastes5:1 Riip keeldong'ung' ye iwendi kootap Kamuktaindet; amu kaigai keriikyi si kegas
Ecclesiastes5:2 Amat kosartae kuting'ung' ak amat kosartae muguleldang'ung' komwa kiy age tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
Ecclesiastes5:3 Amu nyoonei karwotitoet eng' poisyonik che chaang'; ak mwaei ne perber ng'aleek che chaang'.
Ecclesiastes5:4 Ye iyasye
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kaigai amearorte
Ecclesiastes5:6 Amengogoochi kuting'ung' poortang'ung' koyai tengek anan imwa eng' taitap malaikaiyat ile
Ecclesiastes5:7 Amu puch ng'aleek che chaang' ak chaang'indap karwotitaosyek
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ngot igeer kesastae kibananiat ak keistoi kirwooget ak imanda eng' koroomnateet eng' emet
Ecclesiastes5:9 Po tugul keljinetap ng'wony. Poisyechin agine laitoryat tuguugap mbar.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ma piyonyi robiinik ne chamei robiinik; ama piyonyi tuguuk che tesoksei ineendet ne chamei chaang'indap tuguuk. Puch niito agine.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ye tesak tuguuk
Ecclesiastes5:12 Anyiny rwondap chiito ne poisyei
Ecclesiastes5:13 Mi yaityet ne ng'waan ne ki ageer eng' kurereetap asiista
Ecclesiastes5:14 Petos mogornatosyechooto eng' poisyet ne ya; ak ngot ko ki kosich weeriit
Ecclesiastes5:15 Ko uu ye ki kisichei
Ecclesiastes5:16 Niito agine ko yaityet ne ng'waan
Ecclesiastes5:17 Amisyei kogeny eng' peetuusyekyik tugul eng' mesundeito ak tinyei arageneet ne ng'waan ak myando ak nereegek.
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ogeero
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ak chii age tugul agine ne ki igoochi Kamuktaindet mogornatosyek ak chaang'indap tuguuk
Ecclesiastes5:20 Amu ma kobwaati miising' peetuusyegap sabeennyi; amu woljin `Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' poiboindap muguleldanyi.
Ecclesiastes6:1 Mi yaityet ne ki ageer eng' kurereetap asiista
Ecclesiastes6:2 chiito ne igoochin `Kamuktaindet mogornatosyek
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ngot kosich chiito lagok pogol ak kosap kenyiisyek che chaang'
Ecclesiastes6:4 amu nyoonei puch ak kowendi eng' mesundeito
Ecclesiastes6:5 ama keer asiista anan konai. Tinyei niito kamuung'et kosiir ni Kai.
Ecclesiastes6:6 Agot ngo sap kenyiisyek eliphuut konyil aeng'
Ecclesiastes6:7 Po poisyet tugul ne po chiito kutinnyi
Ecclesiastes6:8 Amu tinyei keljinet nee chiito ne utaat kosiir ne perber? Anan tinyei nee chiito ne panan
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kaigai keereetap konda kosiir mageet ne ombenoti. Puch niito agine ak ko kaimetapkei ne po puch.
Ecclesiastes6:10 Kiy age tugul ne mi
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ng'aleek che chaang' kotesei tangoita
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ng'oo anyun ne ingen kiit ne myee agobo chii eng' sabeennyi
Ecclesiastes7:1 Kaigai kainet ne myee kosiir mwanik che po kamanuutyet ne oo. Ak kaigai peetuutap meet kosiir peetuut ne kisichei chii.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kaigai keba koot ne kiteiye
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kaigai arageneet kosiir roryot
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mi mugulelwegap che utaatiin koot ne kiteiye
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kaigai kegas kereetap kong' ne po chiito ne utaat
Ecclesiastes7:6 Amu uu kateretap katook che mi maat ne mi tereet ne kotkotaat
Ecclesiastes7:7 Igoochin iman sastaet chiito ne utaat koberberit; ak ng'emei `kiit ne kigoigoisye naet.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Kaigai kagesunetap kiy kosiir taunennyi; kaigai ne muitoi eng' muguleldonyi kosiir ne meenei.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Amesartae nereek eng' saboondang'ung'
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ameteep ile
Ecclesiastes7:11 Myee utaatyet ko uu ye myee poroteet. Ee
Ecclesiastes7:12 Amu riibei piich utaatyet ko uu riibseetap fedhaisyek. Ago telunatetap naet ko ni
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ibwaat poisyetap Kamuktaindet; tos ng'oo ne imuuchi kolitit kiit ne ki yai ineendet kogunuurit?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Paibaitu eng' peetuutap perurto
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ki ageer chooto tugul eng' peetuusyekyuk che po puch. Mi chiito ne po iman ne meitoi imandanyi ak mi chiito ne ya ne sabei keny ak koyaei yaityennyi.
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ameegu ne tinyei imanda ne siirtoot
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ameegu ne ya miising' anan iegu ne perber. Amu nee si imee kotom koit peetuung'ung'?
Ecclesiastes7:18 Karaaran iguiye niito komyee
Ecclesiastes7:19 Utaatyet ko kimnateetap chiito ne utaat ne siirei pounik taman che mi nganaseet.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Iman
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ameepchi iit kogeny ng'aleek tugul che kimwaei
Ecclesiastes7:22 Amu ingen agine muguleldang'ung' konyil che chaang' kole ki ichup aginye alak ko uu nooto.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ki ageer chuuto tugul eng' ng'omnateet ak ki ale
Ecclesiastes7:24 Kiit ne mi
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ki aweege ak kimach muguleldanyu konai ak kosyach ak kocheeng'
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ak anyooru kiit ne ng'waan kosiir meet
Ecclesiastes7:27 Ogeero
Ecclesiastes7:28 Ne ta kocheeng'ei saboondanyu
Ecclesiastes7:29 Ogeero
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ng'oo ne kergei ak chiito ne utaat? Ak ng'oo ne ingen kaweegetap kiy? Igoochin ng'omnatetap chiito togeennyi kooluu
Ecclesiastes8:2 Aboorun ale
Ecclesiastes8:3 Amesip iwe eng' tainnyi; ameyai kiy ne ya kotugul. Amu yaei laitoryat kiy age tugul ne iboiboegei.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Amu tinyei kimnateet ng'olyootap laitoryat; ak ng'oo ne imuuchi koleenji ineendet
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ma naei kiy ne ya age tugul ne riibei ng'atuutyet
Ecclesiastes8:6 Amu mi peetuut ak kirwooget ne po ng'olyoot age tugul
Ecclesiastes8:7 Amu ma naei kiit ne piitu
Ecclesiastes8:8 Ma mi chii ne tinyei kimnateet eng' koriisto si kogirinda koriis; anan kotinyei kimnateet koboi peetuutap meet; ama mi undaet eng' lugonooto. Ama saru yaityet ineendet ne igoochingei yaityonooto.
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ki ageer chuuto tugul
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ak ki ageer ketubei kiptengeginik
Ecclesiastes8:11 Amu ma sip kirwookyin poisyet ne ya
Ecclesiastes8:12 Agot ngo yai kiptengekyot yaityet konyil pogol
Ecclesiastes8:13 Ago ma myeeitu eng' kiptengeginik
Ecclesiastes8:14 Mi tangoita ne yaaksei eng' ng'wony; amu mi piik che po iman
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ki alasu anyun poiboiyet
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ye ki agiil muguleldanyu konai utaatyet ak ageer poisyet ne kiyaei eng' ng'wony
Ecclesiastes8:17 Ki ageer anyun poisyonik tugul che po Kamuktaindet
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ki abwaat chooto tugul eng' muguleldanyu ak kianai ale miitei eutap Kamuktaindet kobooto piik che po iman ak che utaatiin eng' poisyonikwak: ngo chamyet anan wegeet
Ecclesiastes9:2 Amu ityin piik tugul tuguuk tugul kogergeit. Ityin kiit agenge chii ne po iman ak kiptengekyot
Ecclesiastes9:3 Niito ko yaityet eng' tugul che kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista
Ecclesiastes9:4 Amu tinyei kamang'unet ineendet ne namegei ak tugul che saptos. Amu kaigai seset ne sabei kosiir ng'etundo ne kagome.
Ecclesiastes9:5 Amu ingen che saptos kole pegu. Ago ma naei kiy age tugul che ki kobek
Ecclesiastes9:6 Ki kobet chamyennywa
Ecclesiastes9:7 Ui oldang'ung'
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ingoleelagitu ngoroiguk kotugul; ameng' korerchi mwaita meting'ung'.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Otebi eng' poiboiyet ak osotyot ne ichame
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kiit age tugul ne iyae eng' eung'ung'
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ki aweege ak ageer eng' kurereetap asiista
Ecclesiastes9:12 Amu manai chiito agine peetuunnyi: uu njireenik che kinamei eng' regereiywot ne ya ak uu toriitik che kinamei eng' mesteet
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ki ageer kogeny utaatyet eng' kurereetap asiista ko uu ni ak ki ageer ale
Ecclesiastes9:14 Ki mi nganaseet ne ming'in ak ki mi piik che ng'ering' oriit. Ki nyo laitoryat ne oo kobookyi
Ecclesiastes9:15 Ki kinyoorchi nganasanooto kibananiat ne utaat ak ki sar nganaseet eng' utotyennyi; ago ma mi chii ne ki ibwaat kibananiandanooto.
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ki ale anyun
Ecclesiastes9:17 Kigasei ng'aleegap piik che utaatiin che kimwaei mutyo kosiir waagetap ne pou piik che perber.
Ecclesiastes9:18 Myee utaatyet kosiir kariik che po lugeet. Ago ng'emei kiptengekyot agenge myeinwek che chaang'.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Ko uu ye puldos mwanik che anyiny che po ng'amotyot amu kalyang'ik che pekyin
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mi muguleldap chiito ne utaat eunnyi ne po tai; ago mi muguleldap ne perber eunnyi ne po kaataam.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ye wendoti ne perber eng' ooreet
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ngot ityin nereegegap pounindet
Ecclesiastes10:5 Mi yaityet ne ki ageer eng' kurereetap asiista
Ecclesiastes10:6 kindoi perberyo komoswek che torooreen
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ki ageer otwogik kolaanyei paraisisyek ak kobunei keelyek pounik ko uu otwogik eng' ng'wony.
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ineendet ne palei keriinget kobutyin yooto
Ecclesiastes10:9 Iberchin koik chii age tugul ne waei
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ngo ng'utum aiywet
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ngot kosusiis ereneet kotom kigaigai
Ecclesiastes10:12 Myachen ng'aleegap chiito ne utaat; ago luguegei kutitap chiito ne perber.
Ecclesiastes10:13 Perperyo taunetap ng'aleegap ne perber
Ecclesiastes10:14 Tesei kogeny ne perber ng'aleek. Ma naei chii kiit ne piitu; ak ng'oo ne mwachin ineendet tuguuk che piitu let eng' ineendet?
Ecclesiastes10:15 Poisyetap che perber kogoochin age tugul eng' icheeget kong'et
Ecclesiastes10:16 Pwo eng' inyee
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ibaibai inyee
Ecclesiastes10:18 Kabuisei paragutap koot amu chorirnatetap chiito; robonu koot amu chorirnatet.
Ecclesiastes10:19 Kiyaei igoorto agobo roryot
Ecclesiastes10:20 Amesas laitoryat
Ecclesiastes11:1 Wiirchi amitwogiguk peek; amu tuun inyooru ko kagosiirto peetuusyek che chaang'.
Ecclesiastes11:2 Pchechii kebeberta piik tisap
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ngo nyi peek poolik
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ma kolsei ineendet ne riibei usoonet; ama kesei ineendet ne keerei poolik.
Ecclesiastes11:5 Ko uu ye mengen ooreetap usoonet anan ole nertoi kawegap lakweet eng' moetap ineendet ne managaat; uu nooto mengen poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne yaei tuguuk tugul.
Ecclesiastes11:6 Koolse karon
Ecclesiastes11:7 Anyiny iman lapkeiyet
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ngo sap chiito kenyiisyek che chaang'
Ecclesiastes11:9 Paibaitu murenoni
Ecclesiastes11:10 Iste anyun arageneet eng' muguleldang'ung'
Ecclesiastes12:1 Ibwaat kogeny Yaindeng'ung' eng' peetuusyegap ming'inateng'ung'
Ecclesiastes12:2 kotom koimenit asiista anan lapkeiyet anan arawet
Ecclesiastes12:3 eng' peetuut ye tuun potanso riibiigap koot ak kong'uruugis che kiimeen ak kosiisyo che ng'aisei amu ng'ering' ak koimenitu che ititoi eng' tirisyok.
Ecclesiastes12:4 Ye kageger kurgotik eng' ooreet
Ecclesiastes12:5 Ye iywei chii kobun toroorinwek ak kobiit kamuiset eng' ooreet
Ecclesiastes12:6 kotom kitaach porowetap fedha anan kotom ketui tereetap thahabu anan kotom koiye tereet eng' kondametut anan kotom koil tireet eng' ole kisiile peek
Ecclesiastes12:7 ak koweekyigei ng'ung'unyek ng'wony ko uu ye kinye
Ecclesiastes12:8 Mwaei anyun Amdoindet kole: Puch tugul
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ago
Ecclesiastes12:10 Ki cheeng' Amdoindet ng'aleek che taachaksei ak chooto che ki kisir eng' lititindo ng'aleek che po iman.
Ecclesiastes12:11 Uu kiplitok ng'aleegap piik che utaatiin ak uu kipchumarisyek che ki kigiich komyee
Ecclesiastes12:12 Kas anyun weeriinnyu kateunet. Ma mi ole igeesunegei sireetap bukuisyek che chaang'. Ak ng'etei poorto eng' somanutik che chaang'.
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ara nguno ko kagogasak tugul
Ecclesiastes12:14 Amu ipchin Kamuktaindet poisyet age tugul kapkirwooget
SongOfSongs1:1 Tyendo ne siirei tugul
SongOfSongs1:2 Ingong'ututena `ineendet kutinnyi
SongOfSongs1:3 Tinyei nyamdutyet ne myee mwaniguk
SongOfSongs1:4 Imuta
SongOfSongs1:5 Ee
SongOfSongs1:6 Ametang'ang'ja amu atuui
SongOfSongs1:7 Ee chamanennyu
SongOfSongs1:8 Ngo mengen
SongOfSongs1:9 Ee chamanennyu
SongOfSongs1:10 Korooron matong'oik kobooto lelestang'ung'
SongOfSongs1:11 Kiyaun acheek tuguugap lele che po thahabu
SongOfSongs1:12 Ye ki tebyei laitoryat eng' itogunnyi
SongOfSongs1:13 Uu chamanennyu loletap tuguuk che uu igomoik
SongOfSongs1:14 Uu chamanennyu temeet ne mi taaptogap piribirinik che mi mbareenigap sabibuk che po En-gedi.
