Isaiah1:1 Ng'ang'utyet ne ki ityi Isaiah weeriitap Amos
Isaiah1:2 Ogas
Isaiah1:3 Ingen eito chiitap ko po
Isaiah1:4 Pwo! Pororyet ne yaei tengekto
Isaiah1:5 Amu nee si kota kebirok
Isaiah1:6 Ma mi ole sabei kobooch keldebesyet agoi metit; ago tinyei mook ak kaneerutik
Isaiah1:7 Kigoguber emeng'wong'
Isaiah1:8 Kigebagaakta cheptap Zion ko uu keryet eng' mbareetap sabibuk
Isaiah1:9 Nda ki ma pagaakwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ng'etunenik che ng'ering' miising'
Isaiah1:10 Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah1:11 Tilei nee eng' anee chaang'indap tiseiywekwok? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kigonyia kagoochinoik che po peelset che po mengichik
Isaiah1:12 Ye obwa tainnyu osaa
Isaiah1:13 Amatata oibu kagoochinoik che ma tilei kiy; aweche nyamdutik che kibeelei. Ma amuuchi amuita agobo igoorwegap arawet ne kaleel ak sabato
Isaiah1:14 Wechei saboondanyu arawekwok che kaleel ak igoorwekwok che ki king'at. Inyalila tuguuchooto; kaang'et eng' laetap tuguuchooto.
Isaiah1:15 Ye oiite eunekwok
Isaiah1:16 Ounge
Isaiah1:17 oneetkei oyai ne myee! Ocheeng' kirwooget
Isaiah1:18 “Obwa anyun
Isaiah1:19 Ngot ochame ak ogase iit
Isaiah1:20 Ago ngot oeesye ak ongelelse
Isaiah1:21 Kaegundo ano chepkugoniot nganaseet ne ko po iman
Isaiah1:22 Kigoigei silingisyeguk michikyigek che kigenendoe silingisyek
Isaiah1:23 Ngelelik pouniguk
Isaiah1:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat
Isaiah1:25 Atokyinin eunnyu
Isaiah1:26 Aweegu kirwoogiguk ko uu eng' tai
Isaiah1:27 Tuun kityaachi Zion eng' kirwooget
Isaiah1:28 Ago tuun king'emei tuwai
Isaiah1:29 Amu ililandos icheek amu keetiik che ki omache
Isaiah1:30 Amu oigeitu keetit ne yaamdos sogekyik
Isaiah1:31 Ak koigei che kiimeen katanisyek che arurendos
Isaiah2:1 Ng'olyootap Isaiah weeriitap Amos
Isaiah2:2 Kimitu eng' peetuusyek che po let
Isaiah2:3 Tuun itendenjin olooto piik che chaang' koleen
Isaiah2:4 Ak korwooksechin `ineendet pororyosyek
Isaiah2:5 Ee kootap Jakobo
Isaiah2:6 Amu ki ibagaakte piiguk
Isaiah2:7 Nyiitaat emennywa kogeny fedha ak thahabu
Isaiah2:8 Nyiitaat emennywa kogeny kanamonik; ilasu poisyonigap eunekwak
Isaiah2:9 Ing'uruuksei chiito ne nyeraat
Isaiah2:10 Chut rwandet
Isaiah2:11 Kinyeroti che ieetegei
Isaiah2:12 Amu tuun piitu peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah2:13 eng' taragonik tugul che po Lebanon
Isaiah2:14 ak eng' tuloonook tugul che kooen
Isaiah2:15 ak eng' teekseet age tugul ne kooi
Isaiah2:16 eng' melisyek tugul che po Tarsis
Isaiah2:17 Kiming'ini kaeetetapkei ne po chiito
Isaiah2:18 Ak igeesugei kanamonik.
Isaiah2:19 Ak komwechi piik kebenonik che mi rwandosyek
Isaiah2:20 Eng' peetuunooto ko laktoi chiito kanamonikyik che po fedha
Isaiah2:21 si komwechi kebenonik
Isaiah2:22 Amomang'u chii
Isaiah3:1 Ogeer anyuno
Isaiah3:2 kobooto chiito ne kiim ak chiitap lugeet
Isaiah3:3 kobooto kiptaiyatap piik konom
Isaiah3:4 Agoochini lagok koek pounikwak
Isaiah3:5 Ak tuun kiusei piik
Isaiah3:6 Tuun namei `chii ng'eetap kamet eng' kootap kwandanyi
Isaiah3:7 Ago mwaei ineendet eng' peetuunooto kole
Isaiah3:8 Amu kogong'emak Jerusalem
Isaiah3:9 Paoryanjin icheek togoochikwak; ak komwaitoi tengekwogikwak ko uu Sodom
Isaiah3:10 Omwachi ne po iman oleenji
Isaiah3:11 Pwo eng' kiptengekyot! Yaitu eng' ineendet; amu kigoochin melektap poisyonigap eunekyik.
Isaiah3:12 Usei `lagok piikyuk
Isaiah3:13 Tononi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'alaaldowok
Isaiah3:14 Chutei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwooget
Isaiah3:15 Lyon anyun
Isaiah3:16 Ki mwa kogeny Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Amu menioti tiibiigap Zion
Isaiah3:17 piree anyun Kiptaiyat tiibiigap Zion pokpogenetap metowekwak
Isaiah3:18 Istoi Kiptaiyat eng' peetuunooto karaaranindap mugurekwak
Isaiah3:19 munaok
Isaiah3:20 chepkuloik
Isaiah3:21 peteinik ak munaok che korooron che po serut
Isaiah3:22 ngoroik che korooron che po tuiyosyek
Isaiah3:23 kioinik
Isaiah3:24 Ak tuun kigeeree nyamdutik che anyiny nunateet; ak kogeeree pireneet
Isaiah3:25 Kibare mureniguk rotwetap chok
Isaiah3:26 Ak koriiryo ormariichokyik ak koteiyo; ak koguber ak kotebee ng'wony.
Isaiah4:1 Ak tuun namei kwonyiik tisabu muren agenge eng' peetuunooto
Isaiah4:2 Korooronitu ak kotorooritu eng' peetuunooto temetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah4:3 Ak tuun kiguure ne itabaanat ineendet ne ki ng'et eng' Zion
Isaiah4:4 Ye tuun kagoundo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor simdap tiibiigap Zion
Isaiah4:5 Yeityo koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pooldet ak iyeto eng' peet kouur meng'ooteet tugul ne po tulweetap Zion
Isaiah4:6 Ak tuun piitu emait ne tuun kiuure peet eng' kiptoret
Isaiah5:1 Ngatyenji chamanennyu tyendo ne po chamyet agobo mbareennyi ne po sabibuk: Ki tinyei chamanennyu mbareetap sabibuk eng' tulweet ne ming'in ne akwai miising'.
Isaiah5:2 Ki pal keriinget koyieme ak koisto koik eng' yooto
Isaiah5:3 Ara anyun
Isaiah5:4 Nee ne kita ta keyaei ne siirei eng' mbareennyu ne po sabibuk
Isaiah5:5 “Ak nguno anyun amwaiwok kiit ne aitoi mbareennyu ne po sabibuk. Aistoi ng'otwennyi
Isaiah5:6 Ametoi keng'em
Isaiah5:7 Mbareetap sabibuk ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko kootap Israel
Isaiah5:8 Pwo eng' icheek che ituitos kooriik
Isaiah5:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah5:10 Amu yiei ekaisyek tamanu che po mbareetap sabibuk
Isaiah5:11 Pwo eng' icheek che ng'eetos karon miising'
Isaiah5:12 Mi eng' igoorwekwak ketubet ak kibugandet
Isaiah5:13 Kigeluul anyun piikyuk
Isaiah5:14 Nooto anyun
Isaiah5:15 Kinyeroti chiito ne nyeraat
Isaiah5:16 Ago itoroorot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' kirwoogetap imanda
Isaiah5:17 Yeityo koagetyo aaregap kechir ko uu eng' ole cham koagete
Isaiah5:18 Pwo eng' icheek che ichuutune ng'oogisto poroonik che po puch
Isaiah5:19 che mwaei kole
Isaiah5:20 Pwo eng' icheek che kuure `yaityet myeeindo
Isaiah5:21 Pwo eng' icheek che indogei kole ki utaatiin
Isaiah5:22 Pwo eng' icheek che koroomen koee divaik
Isaiah5:23 Che iityin imanda kiptengekyot agobo asoya
Isaiah5:24 Nooto anyun
Isaiah5:25 Ki nereekyi kot anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik
Isaiah5:26 Ak konamji ineendet parak songolyet koboorchi pororyo ne loo
Isaiah5:27 Ma piitu eng' icheek ne ng'etei anan ko ne ibuti; ama mi ne inuuchi anan ne ruei; ama kitustusi pireneet ne rategei
Isaiah5:28 Ng'atiben kipchabonikwak
Isaiah5:29 Uu porisenennywa ne po ng'etundo
Isaiah5:30 Ak komororchi icheek eng' peetuunooto ko uu mororetap nyanjet. Ak ngo keer chii emet
Isaiah6:1 Eng' kenyiit ne kimee Laitoryat Uzziah
Isaiah6:2 Ki tonondos seraphik eng' paragunnyi; ki tinyei age tugul kebebaik lo: kituge aeng' togeennyi
Isaiah6:3 Ak kitwekyi `age age koleenji: “Tiliil
Isaiah6:4 Ki itumdumgei lumeiywegap tugatugigap kurgeet amu tuugeetap ineendet ne kitwek
Isaiah6:5 Ki ale anyun
Isaiah6:6 Kitirirenjo anyun age eng' seraphik
Isaiah6:7 Ak kitwae kutinnyu
Isaiah6:8 Ki agas kutitap Kiptaiyat koleen
Isaiah6:9 Ak ki le
Isaiah6:10 Yai mugulelwegap pichu konyigiisitu
Isaiah6:11 Ki ateebee anyun
Isaiah6:12 ko kagouto `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik koba ole loo. Ak kochang'a emotinwek che kigemeto eng' emet.
Isaiah6:13 Ak ngot kota komi kebeberta agenge eng' taman
Isaiah7:1 Eng' peetuusyegap Ahaz weeriitap Jotham
Isaiah7:2 Ye kingo kas kootap Daudi keele kogonamgei Syria ak Ephraim ko ki potan muguleldo ne po Ahaz ak mugulelwegap piikyik ko uu ye itumdumi usoonet keetiigap timiin.
Isaiah7:3 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Isaiah koleenji
Isaiah7:4 ak ileenji ineendet
Isaiah7:5 Amu kagochaamin Syria kobooto Ephraim ak weeriitap Remaliah
Isaiah7:6 ongetogoste kebarge ak Judah
Isaiah7:7 kamwa ko uu ni Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah7:8 Amu metitap Syria ko Damasko
Isaiah7:9 Metitap Ephraim ko Samaria
Isaiah7:10 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Ahaz kogeny koleenji
Isaiah7:11 “Soom Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' kaboorunet; soom agot ngo miitei rireet
Isaiah7:12 Ago ki mwa Ahaz kole
Isaiah7:13 Ak ki mwa Isaiah kole
Isaiah7:14 Koonok anyun Kiptaiyat ineendet kaboorunet; ogeero
Isaiah7:15 Amei ineendet mwaitap cheego ak kumyat
Isaiah7:16 Amu kotom konai lakweet koeesyo ne ya
Isaiah7:17 Ibun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah7:18 Ak eng' peetuunooto koititenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kalyang'ik che mi tabanwek che looen che po ainoosyegap Misiri
Isaiah7:19 Si kobwa
Isaiah7:20 Inemu metit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto eng' rotweet ne ki alei
Isaiah7:21 Eng' peetuunooto
Isaiah7:22 tuun amei ineendet mwaitap cheego amu tuun koonu icheeget cheego che chaang'
Isaiah7:23 Ak tuun piitu eng' peetuunooto katook che rutei piich ak che toorei piich eng' komosta age tugul
Isaiah7:24 Wendi chiito olooto kotinyei kipchabonik ak kwanget
Isaiah7:25 Moriikyini peetuunooto tuloonook tugul che mengeechen che ki kibat
Isaiah8:1 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah8:2 si kobiit acheeng'jige paorinik che kiyani
Isaiah8:3 Ki awe anyun ye mi chebyoset ne maotyo; ak ki manach
Isaiah8:4 Amu kotom komuuch lakwanooto kotwek kole
Isaiah8:5 Ki ng'alaalwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny
Isaiah8:6 “Amu ki eesyo pichu peegap Siloa che rootei mutyo
Isaiah8:7 ara anyun
Isaiah8:8 ak kobokto kwo Judah
Isaiah8:9 Owaach
Isaiah8:10 Orwooch tugul
Isaiah8:11 Amu ki ng'alaalwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto eng' euut ne kiim
Isaiah8:12 “Amomwa ole
Isaiah8:13 Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ineegei ne ogonyiti; ak ingoek ineendet ne oiywei
Isaiah8:14 Ak koek ineendet ole-tiliil; ago egu koita ne inachi piich ak rwandet ne riichei piich eng' kooriik tuwai che po Israel
Isaiah8:15 Kinachi che chaang' eng' olooto
Isaiah8:16 Rat anyun paornateet
Isaiah8:17 Si agen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah8:18 Ogeero
Isaiah8:19 Ak ye mwaiwok kole
Isaiah8:20 Onamge ak ng'atuutik ak paornateet! Ngot koma ng'alaal icheek koosup ng'olyoondoniito
Isaiah8:21 Tuun siirtoe yooto
Isaiah8:22 ak kogeer ng'wony
Isaiah9:1 Ago ma mi mesundeito eng' emet ne ki tinyei pichiindo. Eng' peetuusyek che po tai
Isaiah9:2 Piik che kibendote mesundeito ko kogogeer lapkeiyet ne oo; icheek che ki menyei emetap urwetap meet ko nguno kogoluuchi lapkeiyet.
Isaiah9:3 Ki ites pororyet
Isaiah9:4 Amu koiiri chogitap lautyennyi
Isaiah9:5 Amu kibeelei kweonik tugul che po chiitap lugeet eng' wasetapkei
Isaiah9:6 Amu kagisikwech lakweet
Isaiah9:7 Pounatennyi ko tese tai agoi
Isaiah9:8 Ki iyookyi `Kiptaiyat Jakobo ng'olyoot
Isaiah9:9 Ak konai piik tugul
Isaiah9:10 “Kagobutyo matubaruuk
Isaiah9:11 Ara anyun ing'eeti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puunigap Rezin
Isaiah9:12 Ing'eeti piigap Syria eng' tai
Isaiah9:13 Nganda uu nooto koma weekyigei `piik ineendet ne kibir icheek
Isaiah9:14 Tilei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor metit ak katutyet eng' Israel
Isaiah9:15 Metit ko poiyot ne konyitot; ak katutyet ko maotyot ne ineeti lembechek.
Isaiah9:16 Amu ibeeti pichu icheeget che indochin ak keng'emei icheek che kindochin.
Isaiah9:17 Maboiboitu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' murenikwak
Isaiah9:18 Amu lalei yaityet ko uu maat
Isaiah9:19 Ki kolal emet eng' nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah9:20 Wiriti age eng' komostap eutap tai
Isaiah9:21 Amei `Manasseh Ephraim
Isaiah10:1 Pwo eng' icheek che ng'atei ng'atuutik che ma po iman
Isaiah10:2 kobeet ne nyalili eng' kirwooget
Isaiah10:3 Oyae nee anyun eng' peetuut ne ityinok pireeng'wong'
Isaiah10:4 Ing'uruukyin icheek kimonjororinik
Isaiah10:5 Pwo eng' Assyria
Isaiah10:6 Ayooktoi kobargei ak pororyet ne ya
Isaiah10:7 Ago ma ibwaati ko uu nooto
Isaiah10:8 Amu ki mwa kole
Isaiah10:9 Tos
Isaiah10:10 Ko uu ye kagonyoor eunnyu laitornatosyegap kanamonik
Isaiah10:11 tos mayachini Jerusalem ak kanamonikyik ko uu ye ki ayachi Samaria ak kanamonikyik?”
Isaiah10:12 Nooto anyun ye tuun kagoyai Kiptaiyat poisyennyi komugul eng' tulweetap Zion ak eng' Jerusalem
Isaiah10:13 Amu ki komwa kole
Isaiah10:14 Ko uu keswetap toriityon ne nyooru chii
Isaiah10:15 “Tos ichaugei aiywet eng' ineendet ne ebisye? Tos ieetegei musumeneet eng' ineendet ne tilisye? Ko uu nda itumdumi kirokto ne namei
Isaiah10:16 Igoochin anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah10:17 Ak koek maat lapkeiyetap Israel
Isaiah10:18 Ak kobeel ineendet toroornatetap osnennyi
Isaiah10:19 Ng'ering'itu keetiik che ng'etu che po osnennyi
Isaiah10:20 Eng' peetuunooto koma kotiegei kogeny che ki ng'et eng' Israel
Isaiah10:21 Weekyingei Kamuktaindet ne po kamuktaet
Isaiah10:22 Agot nganda uu piiguk che po Israel ng'aniek che po nyanjet
Isaiah10:23 Amu yaei Kiptaiyat
Isaiah10:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat
Isaiah10:25 Amu ta komi kitigin miising'
Isaiah10:26 Ak kong'eetyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ineendet pireet
Isaiah10:27 Ak eng' peetuunooto
Isaiah10:28 kagoit Ayaat
Isaiah10:29 kagoba kosiir ole kibunei
Isaiah10:30 Waach miising'
Isaiah10:31 Kamwei Madmena
Isaiah10:32 Tonone Nob eng' peetuuni po rani
Isaiah10:33 Ogeero
Isaiah10:34 Ak koluule ineendet kariik timiin ne oo
Isaiah11:1 Mang'une `mornet ooreetap Jesse
Isaiah11:2 Tebee ineendet `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah11:3 Mi poiboiyennyi kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amairwoochi ko uu ye keerei
Isaiah11:4 ago irwooksechin kibananook eng' imanda
Isaiah11:5 Ak egu imanda pireneet ne rategei
Isaiah11:6 Ak kotebi suiyot kobooto aarwetap keechiir
Isaiah11:7 Ak koaget teta ak magalaluut
Isaiah11:8 Ak kourerene lakweet ne reryei keriingetap ndaret
Isaiah11:9 Ma itoi kiy chii anan kong'emis eng' tulweennyu tugul ne tiliil; amu nyiei ng'wony naetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye nyiei peek nyanjet.
Isaiah11:10 Cheeng'ei pororyosyek eng' peetuunooto tigityotap Jesse
Isaiah11:11 Eng' peetuunooto koyogoito Kiptaiyat eunnyi kogeny ne po aeng'
Isaiah11:12 Tuun lumdoi penderet agobo pororyosyek
Isaiah11:13 Ak koistogei ng'et kondap Ephraim kogeny
Isaiah11:14 Ak kobookyi tigigoigap Philistiik eng' cherongo
Isaiah11:15 Ak kong'em Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kowong' ng'elyeptap nyanjetap Misiri; ak kotwaitwai eunnyi kotokyi aineet eng' usoonennyi ne peelsei
Isaiah11:16 Ak kobiit ooreet ne oo ne po piikyik che tuun ng'etu eng' Assyria
Isaiah12:1 Eng' peetuunooto imwae ile
Isaiah12:2 Ogeero
Isaiah12:3 Tuun orame anyun peek eng' poiboiyet
Isaiah12:4 Omwae eng' peetuunooto ole: “Oweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi
Isaiah12:5 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah12:6 Owaach miising' ak otyense
Isaiah13:1 Maotenet agobo Babilon
Isaiah13:2 Olumde penderet eng' tulweet ne churat
Isaiah13:3 Koang'at piikyuk che itabaanatiin
Isaiah13:4 Kas polatetap tuiyet eng' tuloonook
Isaiah13:5 Punu icheek emet ne loo
Isaiah13:6 Oteiye
Isaiah13:7 Nyaluldos anyun eunek tugul
Isaiah13:8 ak kotoptobenso. Namei icheek ng'waninwek ak aragenosyek; nyooru ng'wanindo ko uu kwondo ne amei moet. Ak kokwong'ee `age age; ak koigei togoochikwak togoochigap liplibenetap maat.
Isaiah13:9 Ogeero
Isaiah13:10 Amu kecheigap kipsengwet ak kecheikyik che iyumigei koma kogoonu lapkeiyennywa; imenitu asiista komachei kochor
Isaiah13:11 Ak abir ng'wony amu yaityennyi
Isaiah13:12 Ayae chiito koek ne ki cheeng'ei kosiir thahabu che korooron
Isaiah13:13 Ayae anyun kipsengwet kobotan
Isaiah13:14 Ko uu kenyeleet ne ki oonei
Isaiah13:15 Kitoorei age tugul ne kinyooru
Isaiah13:16 Kitonatoni lagokwak kogeerei; kiluulei kooriikwak
Isaiah13:17 Ogeero
Isaiah13:18 Ak kotonaton kwangokwak murenik; ama tinyei riirge eng' che kisichei; ma riiree lagok.
Isaiah13:19 Ak Babilon
Isaiah13:20 Ma komenyei piik kogeny
Isaiah13:21 Ago tebee olooto tyong'ik che po surkwen; ak konyi kooriikwak tyong'ik che irigendos; menyei olooto tyong'igap songolik
Isaiah13:22 Ak koteiyo suik eng' irimoikwak
Isaiah14:1 Amu riiree Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jakobo
Isaiah14:2 Ak komut pororyosyek icheek agoi oldanywa
Isaiah14:3 Ak imwa kalewenoni agobo laitoryatap Babilon eng' peetuut ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kamuung'et eng' arageneng'ung'
Isaiah14:4 ile
Isaiah14:5 Kigoiri Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirokta kiptengeginik
Isaiah14:6 che kibir pororyosyek eng' nereegek eng' piretap kotugul
Isaiah14:7 Mi ng'wony komugul kamuung'et ak kaalyeet; tyendos icheek kogeny.
Isaiah14:8 Ee
Isaiah14:9 Kagotumdumgei ye mi che ki kobek eng' oriit kotorogun ye inyone; ing'eetun piik che ki kobek
Isaiah14:10 Waluun tugul koleenjinin
Isaiah14:11 Kagichoorta etunateng'ung' kwo ye mi che ki kobek
Isaiah14:12 Ha-a
Isaiah14:13 Ki imwa eng' muguleldang'ung' ile
Isaiah14:14 Atogostoi asiir poolik; aigeitu Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'.”
Isaiah14:15 Ago anyun
Isaiah14:16 Injururin che keerin
Isaiah14:17 ne ki yai ng'wony koek surkwen
Isaiah14:18 Ruitos laitorinik tugul che po pororyosyek eng' toroornatet
Isaiah14:19 Ago kagiwiirchin saang' eng' kerering'ung' ko uu temeet ne kiwechei
Isaiah14:20 Motuitosi kobooto icheek eng' tubeet
Isaiah14:21 Ochopchi lagokyik parisyet amu ng'oogistap kwanisyekwak; si mang'eetyo ak konam ng'wony kobunji
Isaiah14:22 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Ang'eete agirinde icheek ak aiste eng' Babilon kainet ak icheek che ki ng'et
Isaiah14:23 Ak agoochi komeny emonooto chepswererinik
Isaiah14:24 Ki koyoosyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah14:25 ale atonatoni piigap Assyria eng' emennyu
Isaiah14:26 Niito chobeet ne kigechop agobo ng'wony komugul; ak ni ko euut ne ki kichuulji pororyosyek tugul.
Isaiah14:27 Amu Ki kochop Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah14:28 Ki piit lautyoni eng' kenyiit ne kimee Laitoryat Ahaz.
Isaiah14:29 Amebaibaitu
Isaiah14:30 Ak koamis kiboretook che po kibananook
Isaiah14:31 Itee
Isaiah14:32 Kiwoljin nee anyun piik che kiyooktoi
Isaiah15:1 Maotenet agobo Moab. Amu king'emei Ar ne po Moab eng' kemout agenge
Isaiah15:2 Katogosta Bayit
Isaiah15:3 Kermenegei kuniok eng' ortinwekwak. Iteei age tugul ak koriirei miising'
Isaiah15:4 Riirei Hesbon ak Eleale
Isaiah15:5 Riirei muguleldanyu amu Moab; mwechin Zoar piik che mweoti mwechin agoi Eglatselisiya. Amu togostoe Luhit koriiryoti; amu iteitos kateiyet ne po ng'emisyet eng' ooreet ne wendi Horonaim.
Isaiah15:6 Amu teng'dos peegap Nimrim; amu kagoresyo susweek
Isaiah15:7 Ibei anyun chaang'indap tuguuk che ki konyoor
Isaiah15:8 Amu ki koit riirek kiwotosyek tugul che po Moab; kiit kateiyennyi Eglaim
Isaiah15:9 Amu nyiitaat korotiik peegap Dimon
Isaiah16:1 Okweri aaregap keechiir eng' Shelah ne tokyingei surkwen
Isaiah16:2 Igeitu toriitik che ombenioti
Isaiah16:3 “Orwooch
Isaiah16:4 Ingomeny kobooten che kigetimda che po Moab
Isaiah16:5 Ki kimiiti ng'echereetap laitornatet eng' rireenet
Isaiah16:6 Kigegas menoteetap Moab
Isaiah16:7 Iteechin anyun Moab
Isaiah16:8 Amu restos mbareenigap Hesbon
Isaiah16:9 Arire anyun eng' riiregap Jaser agobo keetiigap sabibuk che po Sibma; aisenen peekyuk po kong'
Isaiah16:10 Kageisto kagasetapkei ak poiboiyet eng' mbareet ne rurei; ak ma piitu tyenwogik eng' mbareenik che po sabibuk
Isaiah16:11 Morori anyun moennyu ko uu ketubetap Moab
Isaiah16:12 Ye kagoborgei Moab
Isaiah16:13 Niito ng'olyoot ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Moab eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto.
Isaiah16:14 Ago kagomwa nguno Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Isaiah17:1 Maotenet agobo Damasko. Ogeero
Isaiah17:2 Kigebagaakta nganasoogap Aroer; punjin akwotisyegap keechiirek che ruitos
Isaiah17:3 Iwong'ugei kogeny irimeetap Ephraim
Isaiah17:4 Nyerotitu toroornatetap Jakobo eng' peetuunooto
Isaiah17:5 Ak kergeitu ak ye iyumi peek kesiindet
Isaiah17:6 Nganda uu nooto
Isaiah17:7 Inyali peetuunooto chii Yaindennyi
Isaiah17:8 Ama koiti kapkorosusyek kole kiy
Isaiah17:9 Igeitu eng' peetuunooto nganasookyik che kiimeen komoswek che kigebagaakta eng' timiin
Isaiah17:10 Amu kiutye Kamuktaindetap yetuneng'ung'
Isaiah17:11 ing'ote eng' peetuutap kolseng'ung'
Isaiah17:12 Pwo! Polatetap piik che chaang'
Isaiah17:13 Ruaei pororyosyek ko uu rwaetap peek che chaang'
Isaiah17:14 Ogeero
Isaiah18:1 Pwo! Emet ne tinyei kebebaik che cheitos
Isaiah18:2 ne iyooktoi piik che tononjin kobun nyanjet
Isaiah18:3 Okweek tugul che omenye ng'wony
Isaiah18:4 Amu kamwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni koleenjo: “Asise
Isaiah18:5 Amu ye tomo kobiit kesisyet
Isaiah18:6 Kibagakyin icheek tugul toriitik che koroomen che po tuloonook
Isaiah18:7 Ki ipchin eng' peetuunooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kagoochinet ne po piik che kooen ak ko ng'orng'oren
Isaiah19:1 Maotenet agobo Misiri. Ogeero
Isaiah19:2 Ak ang'eet Misiriik kobargei ak Misiriik
Isaiah19:3 Ak tuun kiyaei koek puch kimnateet Misiri eng' kwenunnyi
Isaiah19:4 Ak agoochi Misiriik kiptaiyat ne koroom koboi icheek; ak koboi icheek laitoryat ne koroom
Isaiah19:5 Ak koteenyo peek eng' nyanjet
Isaiah19:6 Ak kobulyo ainoosyek
Isaiah19:7 Ak koyaamyo morong'inik che mi aineetap aineet
Isaiah19:8 Tuun riirtos ramik che po njireenik
Isaiah19:9 Ililandos icheek che laei katanit ne karaaran
Isaiah19:10 Ak koilyo tolochikyik kotonogis
Isaiah19:11 Perberen miising' pounigap Zoan; kaabusak kirwoogetap kirwoogik che utaatiin miising' che po Pharaoh. Omwachindoi ano Pharaoh
Isaiah19:12 Mi ano anyun piiguk che ng'oomen? Ingomwaun nguno ak koyai konaak kiit ne kogochop Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek agobo Misiri.
Isaiah19:13 Kagoek che perber pounigap Zoan
Isaiah19:14 Kigoburukyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek muguleldap kamaaset eng' kwenunnyi; ak kogogoochi `icheek Misiri komasta eng' poisyennyi age tugul
Isaiah19:15 Ama komi poisyet age tugul agobo Misiri
Isaiah19:16 Eng' peetuunooto
Isaiah19:17 Ak koek emetap Judah kamuiset eng' Misiri
Isaiah19:18 Tuun piitu eng' peetuunooto nganasook muutu eng' emetap Misiri che ng'alaali kutitap Kanaanik
Isaiah19:19 Tuun piitu eng' peetuunooto kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwenutap emetap Misiri
Isaiah19:20 Tuun egu nooto kaboorunet ak paornateet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' emetap Misiri. Tuun riirchin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu usiikwak
Isaiah19:21 Ak konaak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Misiri
Isaiah19:22 Ak tuun pirei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiri
Isaiah19:23 Tuun piitu ooreet ne oo eng' peetuunooto ne ng'eetee Misiri agoi Assyria. Tuun pwoonei `piigap Assyria Misiri ak koba `Misiriik Assyria; ak kosa Misiriik kobooto piigap Assyria.
Isaiah19:24 Egu ne po somok Israel eng' peetuunooto
Isaiah19:25 Amu tuun iberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek icheek
Isaiah20:1 Eng' kenyiit ne ki wo Tartan Ashdod
Isaiah20:2 ki ng'alaal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Isaiah weeriitap Amos
Isaiah20:3 Yeityo komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Isaiah20:4 ara imuti ko uu nooto laitoryatap Assyria luulenik che po Misiri ak luulenigap Kush
Isaiah20:5 Koaragenso ak kolilaanso icheek
Isaiah20:6 Eng' peetuunooto ko tuun mwaei che menyei emoni po ngeguut
Isaiah21:1 Maonateet agobo ong'ateet ne po nyanjet. Ko uu ye ibuksei kipchurchuryet ne punu murot tai
Isaiah21:2 Kagiboorwo ng'ang'utyet ne ng'waan; iberberisyei kaberberindet
Isaiah21:3 Kanyi anyun arageneet suennyu; kanama ng'waninwek
Isaiah21:4 Rukrugeni muguleldanyu
Isaiah21:5 Iitoi meset
Isaiah21:6 Amu kamwaiwo Kiptaiyat kole: “Ui
Isaiah21:7 Ye keer lugeet
Isaiah21:8 Yeityo kowaach ineendet ko uu ng'etundo kole
Isaiah21:9 Keero
Isaiah21:10 Ee inyee
Isaiah21:11 Maonateet agobo Duma. Kuura age eng' Seir
Isaiah21:12 Mwaei riibindet kole
Isaiah21:13 Maonateet agobo Arabia. Omenye timiin eng' Arabia
Isaiah21:14 Oipchi peek icheek che amei melel; otorooktae amitwogik piik che kimweei
Isaiah21:15 Amu ki mwee icheek rotoogap chok
Isaiah21:16 Amu kagomwaiwo Kiptaiyat kole
Isaiah21:17 Ng'ering'itu anyun che ng'etu eng' mwogik ak murenik che kiimeen che po piigap Kedar.” Amu kagomwa niito Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah22:1 Maonateet agobo atebweetap ng'ang'utyet. Amin nee anyun
Isaiah22:2 Ee inyee ne nyiitaat polatosyegap piik
Isaiah22:3 Kimwei kibagenge pouniguk
Isaiah22:4 Ki amwa anyun ale
Isaiah22:5 Amu punu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek peetuutap nyalilda ni
Isaiah22:6 Ki ip Elam motyet
Isaiah22:7 Ki nyi atebwosyeguk che myach kariisyek che po lugeet
Isaiah22:8 Ak ki isto ineendet kiit ne kituchei Judah. Ki igeer inyee eng' peetuunooto kariigap lugeet eng' koot ne mi timiin.
Isaiah22:9 Ki ogeer ole chaang' ole ki kobutogis eng' nganaseetap Daudi
Isaiah22:10 Ak oiit kooriigap Jerusalem
Isaiah22:11 Ki obal keriingetap peek eng' kwenutap irimoik aeng'
Isaiah22:12 Eng' peetuunooto ko ki kuurso Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah22:13 Ak ogeero
Isaiah22:14 Ki ng'aang'jigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek itiikyuk koleen: “Ma kitiliilok iman eng' yaityoni kot obegu
Isaiah22:15 Kamwa ko uu ni Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah22:16 Iyae nee eng' yu? Omi ak ng'oo yu
Isaiah22:17 Keero
Isaiah22:18 Weleljiningei iman ak kowiirten iwe parak ko uu tagurgurwet eng' emet ne paraa; imechini olooto
Isaiah22:19 Aoonin eng' poisyeng'ung'
Isaiah22:20 Ak aguur otwogindennyu Eliakim weeriitap Hilkiah eng' peetuunooto
Isaiah22:21 alaakyi ineendet ngoryeeng'ung'
Isaiah22:22 Andoi tigikyennyi yaateiwotap kootap Daudi; ak yaatei ineendet
Isaiah22:23 Ak agiich ineendet ko uu kipchumaryat eng' ole kiim; ak koek ng'echereetap toroornatet eng' kootap kwandanyi.
Isaiah22:24 Ak kolaakyi icheek ineendet toroornatet tugul ne po kootap kwandanyi
Isaiah22:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Isaiah23:1 Maonateet agobo Tyro. Oteiye okweek melisyegap Tarsis; amu kageng'em kot koma komi koot
Isaiah23:2 Osisye
Isaiah23:3 Keljinennyi ko ki iyoteetap Sihor ne ki punu peek che chaang'
Isaiah23:4 Ililan
Isaiah23:5 Ye iit ng'aleek Misiri
Isaiah23:6 Olande Tarsis; oteiye
Isaiah23:7 Tos nganaseng'wong' ni ne po poiboiyet
Isaiah23:8 Ng'oo ne ki chop ng'olyoondoniito agobo Tyro
Isaiah23:9 Ki kochop nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah23:10 Pun emeng'ung' ko uu aineet
Isaiah23:11 Kigotokyi eunnyi nyanjet
Isaiah23:12 Ki le ma iboiboitu inyee
Isaiah23:13 Ogeero
Isaiah23:14 Oteiye
Isaiah23:15 Tuun kiutye Tyro kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap eng' peetuusyechooto
Isaiah23:16 “Nam ketubet
Isaiah23:17 Ak ye ibata kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisabu
Isaiah23:18 Ak koek mung'arennyi ak melektanyi tiliilindo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ma kigonori ama kibasei
Isaiah24:1 Ogeero
Isaiah24:2 Ak kiit ne uu eng' piik
Isaiah24:3 Ki yai emet koek ne ma tinyei kiy ak keng'em; amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito.
Isaiah24:4 Arageni ng'wony ak kowong'kei
Isaiah24:5 Ki kimurwon ng'wony amu piik che menyei; amu ki kobistoe ng'atuutik
Isaiah24:6 Ki koam anyun chubisyet ng'wony
Isaiah24:7 Riirtos divaik che leelach
Isaiah24:8 Siisei kagasetapkei ne po sugutit ne ming'in
Isaiah24:9 Ma koeei divaik kotyendos; ng'woneegitu maiyek eng' icheeget che eei.
Isaiah24:10 Kigebut nganaseet ne mi chemargeet; kigerei koot age tugul
Isaiah24:11 Mi riirek ortinwek amu divaik; kagoimenit poiboiyet tugul
Isaiah24:12 Ng'etu kubernateet eng' nganaseet
Isaiah24:13 Amu egu ko uu nooto eng' ng'wony ak eng' pororyosyek
Isaiah24:14 Waaktos chuuto
Isaiah24:15 Otoroor anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kong'asiis
Isaiah24:16 Kigegas tyenwogik che punu ole poochin ng'wony
Isaiah24:17 Kanyonjin kaiyweisyet ak keriinget ak mesteet
Isaiah24:18 Ineendet ne mwee polatetap kaiyweisyet kobutyi keriinget; ak ineendet ne togosune keriinget konamei mesteet. Amu yaatatin tirisyok eng' parak
Isaiah24:19 Ki kobutok ng'wony miising'
Isaiah24:20 Terteryoti ng'wony ko uu chiito ne kabogit
Isaiah24:21 Ak tuun pirei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto eng' parak lugeetap icheeget che torooreen
Isaiah24:22 Kiyum icheek tugul
Isaiah24:23 Ak kotoptoben arawet
Isaiah25:1 Ee
Isaiah25:2 Amu ki iyai nganaseet koek karurugutyet; ki iyai nganaseet ne ng'ootaat koek karaatya. Ki iyai kootap laitoryat ne po toek koek ole ma mi nganaseet; ma koi ta keteech kogeny.
Isaiah25:3 Konyitin anyun piik che kiimeen
Isaiah25:4 Amu ki iegu irimeetap kibananiat
Isaiah25:5 Iming'ini polatetap toek ko uu kiptoret eng' ole yaamaat; kinyeroti tyendap che imuisei ko uu kiptoret eng' tulugenet.
Isaiah25:6 Eng' tulwooni ko tuun yachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek pororyosyek tugul
Isaiah25:7 Tuun ng'emei ineendet eng' tulwooni kiit ne kituge piik tugul
Isaiah25:8 Ki kolugui ineendet meet koigeny. Tuun ibuchi Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peegap kong' eng' togoochik tugul; ak koisto teweernatetap piikyik eng' ng'wony komugul. Amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor niito.
Isaiah25:9 Ak tuun kimwaei eng' peetuunooto keele
Isaiah25:10 Amu imuunyi eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tulwooni
Isaiah25:11 Agot ngo iitoochi eunekyik kwenunnywa
Isaiah25:12 Ak kagobut ole ng'ootaat ne po teekseet ne kooi
Isaiah26:1 Tuun kityeni tyeni eng' emetap Judah eng' peetuunooto: Ki tinyei acheek nganaseet ne kiim; ng'atei ineendet yetunet koek inatusyek ak irimoik.
Isaiah26:2 Oyat ormariichok
Isaiah26:3 Iriibe ineendet kotebee kaalyeet ne ititaat
Isaiah26:4 Omang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny
Isaiah26:5 Amu kigochoor ineendet icheek che menyei ole toroor
Isaiah26:6 Kityechei; tyechei kibananiat
Isaiah26:7 Litit ooreetap ineendet ne po iman; inyee ne ii litit
Isaiah26:8 Eng' ooreetap kirwoogutiguk; Ee
Isaiah26:9 Amachin eng' saboondanyu kemoi; acheeng'in eng' saboondanyu kotom koeech. Amu ye mi ng'wony kirwoogutiguk
Isaiah26:10 Agot nda kiboorchi chameet kiptengekyot
Isaiah26:11 Kasutok eung'ung' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah26:12 Inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ing'atwech kaalyeet amu inyee ne ki iyaiywech kogeny poisyonikyok tugul.
Isaiah26:13 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah26:14 Ki kobek icheek
Isaiah26:15 Ki ites pororyet
Isaiah26:16 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah26:17 Ko uu kwondo ne tamono
Isaiah26:18 Ki kimonogotin
Isaiah26:19 Tuun saptos cheguuk che ki kobek; ng'eetos muuswekyuk. Ong'eetyee ak otyen
Isaiah26:20 Obwa
Isaiah26:21 Amu mong'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' oldanyi si kobiit kobir che menyei ng'wony amu yaityennywa. Ng'aanyei ng'wony kogeny korotiikyik
Isaiah27:1 Tuun pirei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto eng' rotwennyi ne po chok ne koroom ak ko oo ak kogim
Isaiah27:2 Eng' peetuunooto
Isaiah27:3 Anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ariibe; abisi kotugul
Isaiah27:4 Ma tinyei nereegek che ng'woneen. Kata myee nda koboryena katook che rutei piich ak che toorei piich! Ta katyegoti icheek
Isaiah27:5 Anan konam ineendet kimnateennyu
Isaiah27:6 Kimitu Jakobo eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei; piitei Israel ak kong'at
Isaiah27:7 Tos kabir ineendet ko uu ye kibir `icheek ineendet? Anan kagibar ineendet ko uu parisyetap icheek che ki par ineendet?
Isaiah27:8 Ki oborye ak ineendet ne yamei
Isaiah27:9 Tuun kiuundoi anyun eng' niito yaityetap Jakobo
Isaiah27:10 Amu mi ineegei nganaseet ne ng'ootaat
Isaiah27:11 Ye kagoresyo mooriikyik
Isaiah27:12 Tuun pirei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto logoekyik korara
Isaiah27:13 Ak tuun kiguutei iryageet ne oo eng' peetuunooto; icheek che kinegit kolusyo eng' emetap Assyria kobooto che kigetimda eng' emetap Misiri ko tuun pwoonei kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tulweet ne tiliil eng' Jerusalem.
Isaiah28:1 Pwo eng' chepkuletap menoteet ne po kibogitinigap Ephraim
Isaiah28:2 Ogeero
Isaiah28:3 Kityekyin ng'wony chepkuletap menoteet ne po kibogitinigap Ephraim;
Isaiah28:4 kergeitu taapteet ne resei ne po karaaranindap toroornatennyi
Isaiah28:5 Egu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' peetuunooto naaryeet ne po toroornatet
Isaiah28:6 ak kondochi kirwoogik eng' kap kirwooget koyai imanda
Isaiah28:7 Ago ki kochiliil chuuto ak icheek amu divaik
Isaiah28:8 Amu kigonyi mesosyek tugul kang'ung'daik ak simwek
Isaiah28:9 “Ineeti ng'oo ineendet naet? Ak ng'oo ne igoochin koguiyo ng'aleek? Icheek che kigeluge
Isaiah28:10 Amu kineeti ng'atuutyet kegetyingei ng'atuutyet
Isaiah28:11 Ago ng'alaaljin iman pichu eng' kutusweegap toek ak eng' kutit age;
Isaiah28:12 che ki mwachi ineendet koleenji
Isaiah28:13 Nooto anyun
Isaiah28:14 Ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor okweek piik saasiik
Isaiah28:15 Amu ki omwa ole
Isaiah28:16 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Isaiah28:17 Ak ayai kirwooget koek kiit ne litit
Isaiah28:18 Yeityo kewal kayomiseng'wong' ne ki oyomiske ak meet koek puch
Isaiah28:19 Ibok eng' peetuut age tugul ye siirtoi; amu siirtoi karonet age tugul peet ak kemoi; ak egu kamuiset kityo ye ogase ng'aleek.
Isaiah28:20 Amu nwagitu itoogut kosiir ne imuuchi koiitoegei chiito; ak kotendenit kiit ne ketugegei kot kosiir ne yamei kotugegei chiito.
Isaiah28:21 Amu ng'eetei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu eng' tulweetap Perasim
Isaiah28:22 Nooto anyun
Isaiah28:23 Oep iit
Isaiah28:24 Tos ibatisyei chiito ne ibatisyei kotugul si kogool? Tos ibati ak kobirei mogooroonik kotugul che po mbareennyi?
Isaiah28:25 Ye kagobirok mbaranooto komyeeit
Isaiah28:26 Amu itigoni ineendet komyee
Isaiah28:27 Amu ma kibore kesweegap ingweek kiit ne ng'atip
Isaiah28:28 King'oe nganuuk che kikwanyei; amu ma kiborei kotugul; agot ngo seer keldap chepkichutinnyi ak paraisisyekyik
Isaiah28:29 Punu niito agine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Isaiah29:1 Pwo eng' Jerusalem
Isaiah29:2 Ak aiim anyun Jerusalem
Isaiah29:3 Amu amuutin komoswek tugul
Isaiah29:4 Ak kinyeratin
Isaiah29:5 Ago kergeitu chaang'indap puuniguk ak ng'ung'unyek che pusbus
Isaiah29:6 nyoonjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ineendet eng' tuleet
Isaiah29:7 Ak kogergeit chaang'indap pororyosyek tugul che paregei ak Jerusalem
Isaiah29:8 Kergergeitu ak ye irwotitoi chiito ne amei rubeet
Isaiah29:9 Ogenisye ak okwong'ye; oyai ko uu ye omache ak ogorie! Kabogityo
Isaiah29:10 Amu kirong'jok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rwondo ne nyigiis
Isaiah29:11 Ak kagergeit eng' okweek ng'ang'utyet tugul ak ng'aleegap bukuit ne ki king'ooch
Isaiah29:12 Yeityo kigoochi chiito ne ma ineetat
Isaiah29:13 Ki le Kiptaiyat: Amu riikyino pichu kong'alaalwo
Isaiah29:14 Ara anyun
Isaiah29:15 Pwo eng' icheek che cheeng'ei miising' koung'e Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwoogennywa
Isaiah29:16 Ogabui tuguuk! Tos kiroge cheptereniot meneet? Imuuchi komwa kiit ne ki kiyaei agobo ineendet ne kiyaei
Isaiah29:17 Tos ma mi poroindo kitigin
Isaiah29:18 Eng' peetuunooto ko tuun kasei ng'aleegap bukuit piik che ma kastoi
Isaiah29:19 Tesei kogeny poiboiyennywa eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah29:20 Amu kiyaei ineendet ne imuisei koek puch
Isaiah29:21 che igoochin piik kochalwogense ng'aleekwak
Isaiah29:22 Mwaei ko uu ni anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah29:23 Ago ye keer ineendet lagokyik

Isaiah30:1 Pwo eng' lagok che ngelel
Isaiah30:2 che ng'eetos kochorchingei Misiri
Isaiah30:3 Egu anyun kimnateetap Pharaoh kalilaneng'wong'
Isaiah30:4 Amu mi pounikyik Zoan
Isaiah30:5 Ililandos tugul agobo piik che ma imuuchi konyoorunee kiy
Isaiah30:6 Maonateet agobo tyong'ik che po murot tai. Punei emetap nyalilda ak ng'wanindo

Isaiah30:8 Ui anyun nguno
Isaiah30:9 Amu icheeget ko piik che ngelel
Isaiah30:10 che mwachin keerik koleenji
Isaiah30:11 oistegei eng' ooreet

Isaiah32:1 Ogeero

Isaiah32:3 Ama kigerei konyegap icheeget che keertoi

Isaiah32:5 Ma keguure kogeny chiito ne perber ne tagunoot
Isaiah32:6 Amu ng'alaali ne perber kaberberisyet
Isaiah32:7 Yaacheen tuguuk che po rebindet; chobei chobutik che yaacheen si kobare che talaen ng'aleek che po lembech
Isaiah32:8 Ago chobei ne tagunoot tuguuk che taagunotiin; ak tebyei eng' tuguuk che taagunotiin.

Isaiah32:10 Amu kinyalilok eng' peetuusyek alak ko kagosiirto kenyiit
Isaiah32:11 Obotanse okweek kwonyiik che omuunyi; onyalilye
Isaiah32:12 Luchei tegetik koriirchin mbareenik che korooron

Isaiah32:19 Ago roboni koigap ropta kot koluul timiin; ak koluul nganaseet tugul.

Isaiah33:1 Pwo eng' inyee ne ing'emisyei
Isaiah33:2 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

Isaiah33:5 Toroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu menyei parak

Isaiah34:9 Ak kewal kereruusyekyik koek manget

Isaiah34:11 Ago punjin chebo kibabaa ak chepswererit; ak komeny olooto sugurut ak chepkugit. Ak kochuul eng' paragunnyi porowetap toiyet

Isaiah42:16 Ak amutune kipkoratinik ooreet ne ma naei; andochini eng' ortinwek che ma naei: awale mesundeito koek lapkeiyet eng' tainnywa
Isaiah42:17 Kiweektoi icheek koba let
Isaiah42:18 Ogas okweek che oo ming'otin; ak ogosu
Isaiah42:19 Ng'oo ne koraat
Isaiah42:20 Igeere tuguuk che chaang'

Isaiah42:22 Ago chu ko piik che ki kiluul
Isaiah42:23 Ng'oo eng' okweek ne chamei koepchi iit niito? Ne chamei koep iit ak kogas agobo peetuusyek che pwoonei?

Isaiah42:25 Kiroong'ji anyun nereegekyik che koroomen
Isaiah43:1 Ago mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kiyain kole ee Jakobo
Isaiah43:2 Ami kobooten ye ibune peek che chaang'; ak ye ibune ainoosyek
Isaiah43:3 Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'
Isaiah43:4 Amu koiegu eng' anee ne achame miising'
Isaiah43:5 Meiywei; amu ami kobooten: amutu iyoteng'ung' eng' kong'asiis
Isaiah43:6 Amwachini murot kaataam
Isaiah43:7 age tugul ne kimwaitoe kainennyu
Isaiah43:8 Omutu piik che koryotiin che tinyei koonyek

Isaiah43:16 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah43:17 ne imoong'u chepkichutit ak paraisiit kobooto lugeet ak kimnateet; ruitos tugul ng'wony
Isaiah43:18 Amat obwaat tuguuk che po tai

Isaiah43:20 Konyita tyong'igap timiin
Isaiah43:21 piik che ki ayachigei
Isaiah43:22 Ago ma iguura
Isaiah43:23 Ma igetwo aareguk koek kagoochinoiguk che kibeelei; ama igonyitena tiseiyweguk. Ma abirchin iotisye kagoochinoik
Isaiah43:24 Ma ialunena fedha tuguuk che uu mutweek che nyamdut
Isaiah43:25 Anee
Isaiah43:26 Ibwaatwa; ngeng'alaal tuwai: tetu ng'aleeguk

Isaiah44:4 ak kobiityo eng' ole mi susweek

Isaiah44:7 Ak ng'oo ne uu anee
Isaiah44:8 Amoiywei

Isaiah44:10 Ng'oo ne ki yai kamuktain
Isaiah44:11 Ogeero

Isaiah50:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Isaiah50:2 Kilya si ma piit chii ye ki anyoone? Kinga kuurse koma piit chii ne wolu? Tos kigonwagit eunnyu kot koma imuuch kotyach? Anan ma tinyei kamuget ne asaruunee? Keero
Isaiah50:3 Alaakyini kipsengwet tuindo
Isaiah50:4 Ki koono Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'elyepta ne po icheeget che ki kineet
Isaiah50:5 Ki koyaat Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor itinnyu
Isaiah50:6 Ki agoochi kobir patennyu piriik
Isaiah50:7 Amu toreto Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ma alilan anyun amu nooto: ki auuiit anyun togeennyu koigei rwandet ne uui
Isaiah50:8 Neegit ineendet ne iityina imanda; kibortosi ak ng'oo? Ngetononse tuwai: ng'oo punyondennyu? Ingonyo koriikyo.

Isaiah53:1 Ng'oo ne ki iyan ng'aleekyok? Ak ki king'aang'ji ng'oo eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?
Isaiah53:2 Amu tuun eetu eng' tainnyi ko uu keetit ne ng'arng'ar
Isaiah53:3 Ki kisas
Isaiah53:4 Ki ip iman ng'waninwekyok
Isaiah53:5 Ago ki kitoor agobo pistaosyekyok
Isaiah53:6 Ki uu acheek tugul keechiirek che ki kobetyo; kigosup age tugul eng' acheek ooreennyi; ak kigonde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet tengekwogikyok acheek tugul.
Isaiah53:7 Ki kinyalil
Isaiah53:8 Ki kinam eng' suryet ak kirwookyi; ak ng'oo ne ibwaati eng' ibindanyi kole ki kiisto ineendet eng' emetap che saptos: Amu ki kibir agobo pistoetap piikyuk.
Isaiah53:9 Ak ki yachi ineendet kererit kobooto kiptengegiinik
Isaiah53:10 Ago ki cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koguoten ineendet; ki igoochi arageneet; ye tuun iyai saboondanyi koek kagoochinet agobo tengekto
Isaiah53:11 Tuun keerei che pitunee ng'wanindap saboondanyi
Isaiah53:12 Apchechini anyun ineendet kebeberta kobooto piik che eecheen
Isaiah54:1 Tyen
Isaiah54:2 Ibaraa ye mi emaing'ung'
Isaiah54:3 Amu inaktoi komostap eutap tai ak ne po kaataam; ak konyaban iyoteng'ung' pororyosyek
Isaiah54:4 Meiywei
Isaiah54:5 Amu Yaindeng'ung' ko manong'otyondeng'ung'; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kainennyi ak Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel ko katyagindeng'ung'. Kiguure ineendet Kamuktaindetap ng'wony komugul.
Isaiah54:6 Amu kigoguurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu osotyot ne kigebagaakta
Isaiah54:7 Ki abagaakteen ne matya; ago ayumin eng' rireenet ne oo.
Isaiah54:8 Ki aung'enen togeennyu ne matya eng' nereegek che ing'irtogei; ago ariirenen eng' talasyet ne po koigeny
Isaiah54:9 Amu uu niito eng' anee peegap Noa: amu ko uu ye ki ayosye ale ma komarane emet peegap Noa kogeny
Isaiah54:10 Amu istogei tuloonook ak kiutoi tuloonook che mengeechen; ago ma istoenengei talasyennyu
Isaiah54:11 Ee inyee ne kinyaliili
Isaiah54:12 Ak ateege irimoiguk koik che piriireen
Isaiah54:13 Ak ineeti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lagoguk tugul; ak koeet kaalyeetap lagoguk.
Isaiah54:14 Ki kimiitin eng' imanda; ilooitu eng' nyalilda
Isaiah54:15 Keero
Isaiah54:16 Keero
Isaiah54:17 Ma kiberuuri karnet age tugul ne kiyaei si kogirinden; ak igikyini ng'elyepta age tugul ne kirindoin eng' kirwooget. Niito poroteetap otwogigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah55:1 Ee chii age tugul ne amei melel
Isaiah55:2 Amu nee si oboisyee fedha eng' tuguuk che ma amitwogik? Ak poisyeng'wong' agobo tuguuk che mobiyonyi? Oepcha iit miising'
Isaiah55:3 Oep iit
Isaiah55:4 Ogeero
Isaiah55:5 Keero

Isaiah55:9 Amu ko uu ye toroor kipsengwet kosiir ng'wony
Isaiah55:10 Amu ko uu ye roboni ak kobuti teluji kobunu kipsengwet
Isaiah55:11 uu nooto ng'olyoondennyu ne mang'une kutinnyu: ma weekyinagei puch
Isaiah55:12 Amu tuun omandoi eng' poiboiyet
Isaiah55:13 Piitei piribiryet kogeeri katok che toorei piich

Isaiah56:2 Iberuurot ne yaei chuuto

Isaiah57:1 Pegu che po iman
Isaiah57:2 Mong'jin ole mi kaalyeet; imuunyi eng' itogusyekwak
Isaiah57:3 Ago oriigu okweek weeriigap chepsogeiyot
Isaiah57:4 Ourerenjini ng'oo? Oseng'eng'jini ng'oo
Isaiah57:5 che olaali mageng'wong' eng' keetiik keel
Isaiah57:6 Mi kebebertang'ung' koik che chaboen che po atebweet; chooto
Isaiah57:7 Kainde itogung'ung' tulweet ne ki wo parak ak ko kooi miising': ak ki iwe kogeny olooto igoite tiseiywek.
Isaiah57:8 Ak ki itepte kiit ne po kabwaateng'ung' eng' ole po let eng' kereiywek ak tugatugik: amu ki ing'aang'jige age
Isaiah57:9 Ak ki iwe kaplaitoryat iibe mwanik
Isaiah57:10 Ki ing'et amu koindap oreng'ung'; ago ki ma imwa ile
Isaiah57:11 Ak ki iywei ng'oo anyun ak itoptoben kot imwa lembech
Isaiah57:12 Aboortoi imandang'ung'; ama kelun kiy eng' poisyoniguk.
Isaiah57:13 Ingosaruun ye iriire
Isaiah57:14 Ak mwaei ineendet kole
Isaiah57:15 Amu mwaei ko uu ni ineendet ne mi parak ak ko toroor ne menyei koigeny
Isaiah57:16 Amu ma kibortosi agoi
Isaiah57:17 Amu ki anereech agobo tengektap kasennyi ne po myat
Isaiah57:18 Ki ageer ortinwekyik
Isaiah57:19 Ayae logoegap kutusweek: Kaalyeet
Isaiah57:20 Ago uu kiptengeginik nyanjet ne wasegei; amu ma imuuchi komuuny
Isaiah57:21 Mwaei Kamuktaindennyu kole
Isaiah58:1 Waach miising'
Isaiah58:2 Ago cheeng'a peetuut age tugul
Isaiah58:3 Mwaei icheek kole
Isaiah58:4 Ogeero
Isaiah58:5 Tos nooto karugutetapkei ne ki alewen? Peetuut ne inyalili chii saboondanyi? Koabuch chii metinnyi ko uu mutwot
Isaiah58:6 Tos ma karugutetapkei ni ne ki alewen: ale kityaach ratuutigap yaityet
Isaiah58:7 Tos ma kebae amitwogiguk che amei rubeet
Isaiah58:8 Koluu anyun lapkeiyeng'ung' ko uu karonet
Isaiah58:9 Yeityo anyun iguurse
Isaiah58:10 ak ngot iriiree che amei rubo
Isaiah58:11 Ak kondoun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul
Isaiah58:12 Ak koteech piiguk karotwek che po keny: ak ing'eet lumeiywegap ibinwek che chaang'; ak keguurenen
Isaiah58:13 Ngot iiste keeldong'ung' eng' peetuutap sabato
Isaiah58:14 ibaibaegei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak agoonin ilaany komoswek che torooreen che po ng'wony; ak abaenen poroteetap Jakobo kwandang'ung': amu kagomwa niito kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Isaiah59:1 Ogeero
Isaiah59:2 ago ki kobesyenok tengekwogikwok Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Isaiah59:3 Amu murwonen eunekwok eng' korotiik
Isaiah59:4 Ma mi agot agenge ne cheeng'ei imanda ne po kirwooget
Isaiah59:5 Igenyi koigap ereneet
Isaiah59:6 Ma egu kooriigap kibroroginik ngoroik
Isaiah59:7 Ruachin keelyekwak yaityet
Isaiah59:8 Ma ingen icheek ooreetap kaalyeet; ama mi kirwooget eng' ortinwekwak: ki koyachigei ortinwek che kunuuren; ma ingen kaalyeet age tugul ne punei olooto.
Isaiah59:9 Loo anyun kirwooget eng' acheek
Isaiah59:10 Kisapsabisyoti kecheeng'e inaatut ko uu kipkoratinik
Isaiah59:11 Kimorori tugul ko uu magalaluusyek
Isaiah59:12 Amu ki kotesagis pistaosyekyok eng' taing'ung'
Isaiah59:13 ki kieesye Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pistoennyo
Isaiah59:14 Ak kikwa let kirwooget
Isaiah59:15 Ee
Isaiah59:16 Ak ki keer kole ma mi chii age tugul
Isaiah59:17 Ak ki ilaach imanda ko uu karnetap tegeet
Isaiah59:18 Yaakyin icheek ko uu poisyonikwak
Isaiah59:19 Iywei anyun kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' cherongo
Isaiah59:20 Ak konyo katyagindet Zion
Isaiah59:21 Ni anyun kayomisennyu ne kiyomisyinige ak icheek
Isaiah60:1 Ng'eet
Isaiah60:2 Amu
Isaiah60:3 Ak kobwonji pororyosyek lapkeiyeng'ung'
Isaiah60:4 Ing'eet met ak igeer komoswek tugul: iyumigei icheek tugul
Isaiah60:5 Igeer anyun ak kikwenyin
Isaiah60:6 Tuchin chaang'indap tambeesik
Isaiah60:7 Kiyumjinin akwotisyek tugul che po keechiiregap Kedar
Isaiah60:8 Ng'oo chu rwaei ko uu pooldet
Isaiah60:9 Igeno iman ngeguusyek
Isaiah60:10 Ak koteech toek irimoiguk
Isaiah60:11 Kiyatei kogeny ormariichoguk kotugul; ma kigerei peet anan kemoi; si koibun piik mogornatosyegap pororyosyek
Isaiah60:12 Amu lusei pororyet ak pounateet ne ma poisyeun; ee
Isaiah60:13 Nyonjinin toroornatetap Lebanon
Isaiah60:14 Ak kobwonjin weeriigap icheeget che ki inyaliilin kong'uruugonu; ak kogutung'so eng' keldebesaigap keelyeguk icheek tugul che kisasin; ak koguurenen
Isaiah60:15 Ak ko uu ye kiga kebagaakten
Isaiah60:16 Ichuchuni kogeny cheegap pororyosyek
Isaiah60:17 Aibu thahabu ageere sugunonik
Isaiah60:18 Ma kegasei kogeny koroomnateet eng' emeng'ung'
Isaiah60:19 Ma koegu asiista lapkeiyeng'ung' peet: ama kogoonin lapkeiyet kaluunetap arawet: ago egu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lapkeiyeng'ung' ne po koigeny; ak koek Kamuktaindeng'ung' toroornateng'ung'.
Isaiah60:20 Ma kororoktoi asiistang'ung'
Isaiah60:21 Ak koek che po imanda kogeny piiguk tugul
Isaiah60:22 Egu ne ming'in eliphuut
Isaiah61:1 Mi kobooto Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne po Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu ki ila Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobiit aamji logoiywek che myach che nyerootiin; ki koyookta anyaa che ilyotiin mugulelwek
Isaiah61:2 Si kobiit aamda kenyiit ne chamat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah61:3 si aaroorchi icheek che riirtos eng' Zion
Isaiah61:4 Ak koteech kogeny karatwek che po keny
Isaiah61:5 Ak kotononso toek koyaga akwotisyegap keechiirekwok
Isaiah61:6 Ago kiguurenok tisiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kuurenok piik kiboitinigap Kamuktaindennyo: oame mogornatosyegap pororyosyek
Isaiah61:7 Onyooru konyil aeng' agobo kalilaneng'wong'; ak koboiboitu eng' kebebertanywa kogeere toiyet: nyabani anyun icheek konyil aeng' eng' emennywa: punjin icheek poiboiyet ne po koigeny.
Isaiah61:8 Amu achame anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwooget
Isaiah61:9 Ak konaak iyotennywa eng' pororyosyek
Isaiah61:10 Abaibaitu miising' eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah61:11 Amu ko uu ye ing'atos tuguuk eng' ng'wony
Isaiah62:1 Masise agobo Zion
Isaiah62:2 Ak kogeer pororyosyek imandang'ung'
Isaiah62:3 Iegu kogeny naaryeetap korooronindo eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah62:4 Ma keguurenen kogeny Ne Ki kimeto; ama keguure emeng'ung' kogeny Karaita: ago kiguurenen Hepsi-ba
Isaiah62:5 Amu ko uu ye ituni mureno pergeiyat
Isaiah62:6 Kande riibiik irimoiguk
Isaiah62:7 amogoochini ineendet komuuny

Isaiah62:9 ago amei icheek che ki konori
Isaiah62:10 Omande
Isaiah62:11 Ogeero
Isaiah62:12 Ak koguure icheek
Isaiah63:1 Ng'oo ne punu Edom
Isaiah63:2 Amu nee si kobiriritu ngoroiguk
Isaiah63:3 Ki atyech aneege sabibuk eng' ole kitue; ak ki ma komi chii kobooto eng' pichooto; ee
Isaiah63:4 Amu kimi muguleldanyu peetuutap yaaktaetap mugetuut
Isaiah63:5 Ak ki ageerote
Isaiah63:6 Ak ki atyech piik eng' nereegekyuk
Isaiah63:7 Amwaitoi chamyet ne tala ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah63:8 Amu ki mwa kole
Isaiah63:9 Ki kinyalil ineendet eng' nyalilwogikwak tugul
Isaiah63:10 Ago ki ingelelso ak kogoochi arageneet Kabuusennyi ne Tiliil: ki kiwal anyun koek punyonnywa
Isaiah63:11 Ki ibwaat anyun peetuusyek che po keny
Isaiah63:12 ne ki chuul eunnyi ne po toroornatet koba kobooto eutap tai ne po Musa
Isaiah63:13 ne ki indochi icheek kobun rireet
Isaiah63:14 Ko uu ye choorchingei tuuga atebweet
Isaiah63:15 Keer anyun ng'wony eng' kipsengwet
Isaiah63:16 Amu ii kwandanyo
Isaiah63:17 Ee
Isaiah63:18 Ki nyaban piiguk che tiliileen; ago ne matya kotyech puunikyok oldang'ung' ne tiliil.
Isaiah63:19 Kageige piik che kitom ibou; ko uu icheeget che ma kimwaitae kaineng'ung'.
Isaiah64:1 Kata myee ibet kipsengwet
Isaiah64:2 ko uu ye peelei maat sigorik
Isaiah64:3 Ye ki ngiyai tuguuk che po kamuiset che ki ma kicheeng'
Isaiah64:4 Amu tomo kogas piik kobooch keny
Isaiah64:5 Otuitosi ak ineendet ne paibai ak koyaei imanda
Isaiah64:6 Amu ki kiige tugul chii ne po simdo
Isaiah64:7 Ama mi ne kuurei kaineng'ung'

Isaiah65:1 Teeba piik che ki ma koteeba; kigonyoorwo icheek che ki ma cheeng'a: ki aleenji pororyet ne ki ma kemwaitae kainennyu
Isaiah65:2 Ki aitoochi eunekyuk peet komugul piik che ingeleldos
Isaiah65:3 piik che tacha kimni kotugul
Isaiah65:4 che teebote kereeriisyek
Isaiah65:5 Che mwaei kole
Isaiah65:6 Ogeero
Isaiah65:7 tengekwogikwok
Isaiah65:8 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Isaiah65:9 Ak amutu ne ki kiii eng' Jakobo
Isaiah65:10 Ak koek Saron piutap akwotisyegap keechiirek
Isaiah65:11 Ago okweek che ometoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah65:12 aityinok anyun rotwetap chok
Isaiah65:13 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Isaiah65:14 ogeero
Isaiah65:15 Ak omete kaineng'wong' koek chubisyet eng' chechuuk che ki alewen
Isaiah65:16 si koek ne iberuuregei eng' ng'wony ne iberuuregei eng' Kamuktaindet ne po iman
Isaiah65:17 Ogeero
Isaiah65:18 Ago ogaaskei ak oboiboitu agoi agobo kiit ne atau ayae: amu atau ayae Jerusalem koek ne kiboiboitune
Isaiah65:19 Ak abaibaitune Jerusalem
Isaiah65:20 Ma piitu eng' olooto kogeny lakweet ne po peetuusyek che ng'ering' anan poiyot ne ma ilil: amu meei lakweet ko po kenyiisyek pogol

Isaiah65:22 Ma teeksei icheek
Isaiah65:23 Ma poisyei puch
Isaiah65:24 Ak ye tomo koguurso

Isaiah66:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Isaiah66:2 Amu kiyaei eunnyu tuguuchuuto tugul
Isaiah66:3 Ineendet ne parei teta ko kergei ak ineendet ne parei chiito; ineendet ne igoitoi aarwetap keechiir koek tiseiywot
Isaiah66:4 alewenjini anyun kaberberisyosyekwak
Isaiah66:5 Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah66:6 Waagaat ne po wasetapkei ne punu nganaseet
Isaiah66:7 Ki sigis amanyoor ng'wanindo; ki sich weeriit kotom kogas ng'wanindo.
Isaiah66:8 Ki kogas ng'oo ng'olyoot ne uu ni? Ki kogeer ng'oo tuguuk che uu chu? Tos kisichei emet eng' peetuut agenge? Tos kisichei pororyet eng' sait ne matya? Amu ki sich `Zion lagokyik
Isaiah66:9 Tos aeete kesich lakweet ne kogoyam kesich? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos arate moet ne agoochini kooi? Mwaei Kamuktaindeng'ung'.
Isaiah66:10 Oboiboitu okweek kobooto Jerusalem
Isaiah66:11 si kobiit ochuchun obiyong'se eng' kainaigap kagaigaosyekyik; si kobiit ochuchun tugul
Isaiah66:12 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole ogeero
Isaiah66:13 Agoigook ko uu ineendet ne igoigoi kamet; ak kigaigaak eng' Jerusalem.
Isaiah66:14 Ak ogeero
Isaiah66:15 Amu ogeero
Isaiah66:16 Amu irwooksechin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik tugul eng' maat ak eng' rotwennyi po chok: ak kochang'a che parei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Isaiah66:17 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Isaiah66:18 Amu angen poisyonikwak ak kabwaatutikwak: nyoonei peetuut
Isaiah66:19 Ak ande kaboorunet kwenunnywa
Isaiah66:20 Ak komut tupchosyekwok tugul komang'une pororyosyek tugul koek kagoochinet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Isaiah66:21 Ak ande alak eng' icheek kogeny koek Tisiik ak Lawiik
Isaiah66:22 Amu ko uu ye tebee tainnyu kipsengwet che leelach ak ng'wonyut ne leel
Isaiah66:23 Ak tuun pwoonei piik tugul koloswa eng' tainnyu kobooch ye kaleel arawet agoi koleel age
Isaiah66:24 Ak komanda koba kogeer muuswegap piik che ki ingelelja: amu ma pegu kutikwak

Jeremiah7:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Jeremiah7:2 tonone kurgeetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah7:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah7:4 Amomang'u ng'aleechu po lembech ak ole: “Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah7:5 Amu ngot olitit komyee ortinwekwok ak poisyonikwok
Jeremiah7:6 ngot ko mosastoe toondet
Jeremiah7:7 agoonok anyun omeny olito
Jeremiah7:8 Ago ogeero
Jeremiah7:9 Tos nyolu ochoorsei
Jeremiah7:10 yeityo obwa otonone tainnyu eng' koi
Jeremiah7:11 Tos kaek kooi kemwaitoe kainennyu kebeneetap rebiik eng' taing'wong'? Onai ole anee
Jeremiah7:12 Oba nguno oldanyu ne ki mi Shiloh
Jeremiah7:13 Ara anyun
Jeremiah7:14 ayachini anyun koyooto
Jeremiah7:15 Atimdak eng' tainnyu
Jeremiah7:16 Ara anyun inyee Jeremiah
Jeremiah7:17 Tos megeere tuguuk che yaei eng' nganasoogap Judah ak eng' ortinwegap Jerusalem?
Jeremiah7:18 Iyumi lagok kweenik
Jeremiah7:19 Tos tachei ng'oo pichooto konereech? Tos anee? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos matachegei icheegei
Jeremiah7:20 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole; Ogeero
Jeremiah7:21 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah7:22 Amu ki ma ang'alaalji kwanisyekwok anan ang'at icheek eng' peetuut ne ki amutu komang'une emetap Misiri
Jeremiah7:23 Ago ki ang'at icheek agobo ng'olyoondoni aleenji
Jeremiah7:24 Ago ma kas
Jeremiah7:25 Kobooch peetuut ne ki mong' kwanisyekwok eng' emetap Misiri agoi rani
Jeremiah7:26 Ago ma kasa
Jeremiah7:27 Ara anyun mwachi icheek ng'aleechuuto tugul. Ago ma kasin. Iguure icheek kogeny
Jeremiah7:28 Ileenjini icheek
Jeremiah7:29 Ee Jerusalem
Jeremiah7:30 Amu ki koyai lagogap Judah kiit ne ya eng' tainnyu
Jeremiah7:31 Kigoteech komoswek che torooreen che po Topet
Jeremiah7:32 Keero
Jeremiah7:33 Ak koek muuswegap pichu amitwogigap toriitik che po parak
Jeremiah7:34 Agoochini anyun kosiis tuugeetap poiboiyet ak ne po kagasetapkei
Jeremiah8:1 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah8:2 Kimaae eng' asiista ak eng' arawet ak eng' taitap tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet
Jeremiah8:3 Igaigai kolewen meet kosiir sabeet piik tugul che ng'etu
Jeremiah8:4 Imwachini kogeny ileenjini
Jeremiah8:5 Amu nee anyun si kochuchuigei pichu po Jerusalem eng' kachuchuget ne po agoi? Namei miising' ng'aalseet
Jeremiah8:6 Ki aep iit agas
Jeremiah8:7 Ee
Jeremiah8:8 Omuktoi ano anyun omwa ole
Jeremiah8:9 Ki teweeri piik che utaatiin
Jeremiah8:10 Agoochini anyun piik alak osotikwak
Jeremiah8:11 Ak kigonya moogap piikyuk kobir parak
Jeremiah8:12 Tos ki ililanso ye kingo yai tuguuk che kiwechei? Achicha
Jeremiah8:13 Ageesu icheek
Jeremiah8:14 Amu nee si ketebi ak kesistosi? Oyumgei ak ongebe nganasook che riibootin
Jeremiah8:15 Ki kigen kaalyeet
Jeremiah8:16 Kigasei eng' Dan waagaatap seruunegap paraisisyekyik. Potani emet komugul amu cheetap kateetap chechiik che kiimeen
Jeremiah8:17 Ogeer anyuno
Jeremiah8:18 Kata myee agaigaige si ma kase arageneet
Jeremiah8:19 Ogas kutitap riiregap piikyuk eng' emet ne loo miising'
Jeremiah8:20 Kagosiirto kesisyet
Jeremiah8:21 Ki kiguotena amu kaguotenetap piikyuk. Aa tuui
Jeremiah8:22 Tos ma mi mwanik che ki inyaise Gilead? Tos ma mi chepkerichoon olooto? Amu nee anyun si ma sap cheptap piikyuk?
Jeremiah9:1 Kata myee nda ka peei kityo metinnyu
Jeremiah9:2 Kata myee nda katinye eng' surkwen ole ruei kipruitoinik
Jeremiah9:3 Riichei ng'elyebwekwak ko uu ye riichei kwangokwak
Jeremiah9:4 Ingoriibegei anyun chii tugul chiitap kokwennyi
Jeremiah9:5 Iberberi age tugul chiitap kokwennyi
Jeremiah9:6 Mi anyun meng'ooteng'ung' kwenutap kaberberisyet; eesyoi konaa amu kaberberisyet
Jeremiah9:7 Ara anyun mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Jeremiah9:8 Kipchabet ne parisyei ng'elyebwekwak; mwaei kaberberisyet koigeny. Ng'alaaljin chii chiitap kokwennyi eng' kaalyeet
Jeremiah9:9 Tos manyone abire icheek agobo tuguuchu? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos mayaaktachinigei mugetuut eng' pororyet ne uu ni?
Jeremiah9:10 Amu ariire ak atei agobo tuloonook

Jeremiah9:12 Ak ateebee aleen

Jeremiah10:1 Ogas ng'olyoot ne mwaiwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah10:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah10:3 Amu tangoita pitonwegap piik
Jeremiah10:4 Ki lelesonjine fedha ak thahabu; ki igiige kipchumarisyek si ma twagei.
Jeremiah10:5 Uu icheek tiiret ne kimue toriitik
Jeremiah10:6 Ma mi ne ogerge
Jeremiah10:7 Ng'oo ne ma iywein
Jeremiah10:8 Ago uu icheek tugul tyong'ik ak ko abusotiin kaneetisyet ne kineeti kanamonik
Jeremiah10:9 Miitei fedha che ki kitany kolebelitu che ki kiibune Tarsis
Jeremiah10:10 Ago Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po iman; ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne sabei
Jeremiah10:11 Mwachi anyun icheek ko uu ni ileenji
Jeremiah10:12 Ki yai ng'wony eng' kamuktaennyi
Jeremiah10:13 Ye twek
Jeremiah10:14 Kergeitu chiito age tugul ak tyondo ama tinyei naet. Ililani kitang'indet age tugul ne po thahabu eng' kanamwennyi ne ki kiwai. Amu lembeita kanamwennyi ne ki kitany
Jeremiah10:15 Puch chooto
Jeremiah10:16 Ma uu chuuto kebebertap Jakobo; amu po tai ineendet eng' tuguuk tugul. Israel ko pororyetap porotennyi: kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek.”
Jeremiah10:17 Iyum eng' emet tuguuguk che po mung'aaret
Jeremiah10:18 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole

Jeremiah10:21 Amu kigoigei mestoweek tyong'ik

Jeremiah11:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah koleenji
Jeremiah11:2 “Ogas ng'aleegap kayomisoni
Jeremiah11:3 Mwachi icheek ileenji
Jeremiah11:4 ne ki ang'at kwanisyekwok eng' peetuut ne ki amutu icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri
Jeremiah11:5 Si kobiit agimiit kayasyoet ne ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwok
Jeremiah11:6 Ki leenjo kogeny anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah11:7 Amu ki abaoryanji kwanisyekwok eng' kagiiletapkei
Jeremiah11:8 Ago ma kas iit
Jeremiah11:9 Kimwaiwo kogeny koleenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah11:10 Ki koweekyigei tengekwogigap kwanisyekwak
Jeremiah11:11 Ara amwae anyun anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ale
Jeremiah11:12 Eng' yooto anyun kobendi nganasoogap Judah ak piik che menyei Jerusalem
Jeremiah11:13 Amu ko uu ole tee koitetap nganasoguk
Jeremiah11:14 Amesaa anyun agobo pichu
Jeremiah11:15 Tinyei iman nee chamanennyu eng' koonnyu
Jeremiah11:16 Kiguure Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaineng'ung'
Jeremiah11:17 Amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah11:18 Ki koono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor naet agobo chaamsennywa ak ki anai. Ki iboorwo ineendet poisyonikwak.
Jeremiah11:19 Ago ki auu aarwetap keechiir ne tala
Jeremiah11:20 Ago
Jeremiah11:21 Nooto anyun amu nee si komwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo piigap Anatoth
Jeremiah11:22 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Jeremiah11:23 ama piitu che ng'etu eng' icheek. Amu aipchini yaityet piigap Anatoth
Jeremiah12:1 Ii po iman
Jeremiah12:2 Ki imin icheek
Jeremiah12:3 Ago ingeno
Jeremiah12:4 Iteei emet kot kotyanit
Jeremiah12:5 Ngot ko ki orwai ak piik che punei keelyek
Jeremiah12:6 Ki koyaun kaberberisyet tupchosyeguk ak kootap kwandang'ung'. Ki koriirchin miising'. Ameyan icheek
Jeremiah12:7 Ki abagaakte koonnyu
Jeremiah12:8 Kigoigei porotennyu eng' anee
Jeremiah12:9 Tos ma igei porotennyu eng' anee toriityon ne legee
Jeremiah12:10 Kigong'em mbareennyu ne po sabibuk mestoweek che chaang'
Jeremiah12:11 Ki koyai koek karaatya; riirchino
Jeremiah12:12 Katogosta piik che luulsei koba tuloonook tugul che churyotin eng' surkwen. Amu parisyei rotwetap chok ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch tabanda age ne po emet
Jeremiah12:13 Ki kool `icheek nganuuk ak kagoges katook; kibirtogei ama kelji kiy. Ililandos icheek amu logoekwak

Jeremiah13:2 Ki aal anyun pireneet ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak arategei.
Jeremiah13:3 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po aeng'
Jeremiah13:4 “Nam pireneet ne kaial nooto kerategei ak ing'eet iwe Yufrets
Jeremiah13:5 Ara ki awe anyun
Jeremiah13:6 Kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang'
Jeremiah13:7 Ara ki awe anyun Yufrets ak kinga pal
Jeremiah13:8 Yeityo konyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah13:9 “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah13:10 Igeitu pirenoni ma kotilei kiy
Jeremiah13:11 Amu ko uu ye namegei pireneet ak suetap chii
Jeremiah13:12 Mwachi anyun icheek ng'olyoondoni
Jeremiah13:13 Ileenji anyun icheek
Jeremiah13:14 Ak atue chii age age
Jeremiah13:15 Ogas anyun

Jeremiah13:17 Ago ngot ko mogas ng'olyoondoniito
Jeremiah13:18 Mwachi laitoryat ak kametap laitoryat
Jeremiah13:19 Kigeger nganasook che po murot tai
Jeremiah13:20 Ong'eet met ak ogeer icheek che punu murot kaataam. Mi ano keechiirek che ki kigoonin
Jeremiah13:21 Tos mwaei nee ye tuun inde ineendet choronoguk koboun
Jeremiah13:22 Ak ngot imwa eng' muguleldang'ung' ile
Jeremiah13:23 Tos imuuchi kowal Ethiopiaindet iriryondennyi
Jeremiah13:24 Ayestoi anyun icheek
Jeremiah13:25 Kebebertang'ung' niito
Jeremiah13:26 Ang'aanye anyun agane ngoroiguk kot koit metit

Jeremiah14:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo kemeut.
Jeremiah14:2 Ki mwa kole
Jeremiah14:3 Iyooktoi piikwak che taagunotiin kiboitiinikwak koba ole mi peek: pendi agoi keriingonik
Jeremiah14:4 Ililandos che ibatisye ak kotuchei metowekwak
Jeremiah14:5 Ee
Jeremiah14:6 Tonondos ak icheek sigirogap timiin eng' tuloonook che churyotin
Jeremiah14:7 Nga paoryanjinech tengekwogikyok
Jeremiah14:8 Ee inyee kamang'unetap Israel
Jeremiah14:9 Amu nee si iige chii ne kakwong'
Jeremiah14:10 Mwachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pichu kole; “Ki cham ko uu nooto koombenso; tomo koisto keelyekwak. Mataachei anyun anee icheek amu nooto. Ago abwaati aneendet tengektonywa
Jeremiah14:11 Ak kimwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Jeremiah14:12 Agot ye irugutkei icheek
Jeremiah14:13 Ago ki amwa anyun ale
Jeremiah14:14 Ago ki leenjo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah14:15 Amu nooto anyun komwae Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni agobo maotik che maoteni eng' kainennyu; Nga ma ayookte icheek
Jeremiah14:16 Ak kewiirchi ortinwek che po Jerusalem piik che ki maotenjin
Jeremiah14:17 Mwachi icheek ng'olyoondoni ileenji
Jeremiah14:18 Ngot ale awo mbar

Jeremiah14:21 Amat iwechech amu kaineng'ung'
Jeremiah14:22 Tos mi eng' age tugul eng' kanamonik che ma tilei kiy che po pororyosyek
Jeremiah15:1 Yeityo koleenjo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah15:2 Ak ngo teebenen koleenjin
Jeremiah15:3 Ang'atyini icheek tuguuk ang'wan
Jeremiah15:4 Ak agoite icheek kewiirchi komosi ak komosi eng' pounatosyek tugul che po ng'wony
Jeremiah15:5 Amu ng'oo ne tos rireenen
Jeremiah15:6 Ki oeesya
Jeremiah15:7 Ki arur icheek eng' kiit ne kirurse
Jeremiah15:8 Atese mosoogikwak eng' anee kosiir ng'aniegap nyanjosyek. Amutyini icheek luulindet petkwen kobar kametap murenik. Agoochini koche ineendet tiritindo ak kamuisosyek.
Jeremiah15:9 Nyaluli ineendet ne kigosich lagok tisap
Jeremiah15:10 Pwo eng' anee
Jeremiah15:11 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah15:12 Tos imuuchi chii koiri karnet
Jeremiah15:13 Agoitoi tuguuguk ak konoraiguk keluul koma eng' alyet
Jeremiah15:14 Agoonok obe ak puunikwok emet ne mongen. Amu kagolal maat ne lalenen eng' nereegekyuk.
Jeremiah15:15 Ak ki amwa ale
Jeremiah15:16 Kingo piit ng'aleeguk
Jeremiah15:17 Ma ki tebi ak tuiyetap icheek che urerendos
Jeremiah15:18 Amu nee si kobunji agoi ng'wanindanyu
Jeremiah15:19 Ara mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah15:20 Ayain eng' pichu iegu irimeet ne ng'ootaat ne po sugunwet; obargei ak icheek ago ma iterteerin
Jeremiah15:21 Asaruun eng' eutap kiptengeginik
Jeremiah16:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah16:2 “Metunisyei
Jeremiah16:3 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo weeriik ak tiibiik che kisikyin olito
Jeremiah16:4 ‘Pegu icheek eng' meet ne ng'waan; ma kiriirchin
Jeremiah16:5 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole amewe koot ne kiriirye
Jeremiah16:6 Pekyin emoni che eecheen ak che mengeechen: ma kitubei
Jeremiah16:7 ama putuli piik magatiinik agobo icheek amu riirek
Jeremiah16:8 Amewe kootap igoorto
Jeremiah16:9 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah16:10 Ak ye tuun iboorchi pichu ng'aleechuuto tugul
Jeremiah16:11 Ileenji anyun icheek
Jeremiah16:12 ak ki oyai yaityet kosiir kwanisyekwok; amu

Jeremiah16:15 ago
Jeremiah16:16 Ogeero

Jeremiah16:21 Nooto anyun
Jeremiah17:1 Ki kisire lelutiktap Judah kalamitap karnet kobooto ng'atibindap koita ne ui; ki kimolji mugulelwekwak ak eng' kimnateet ne po kuinoigap kapkorosusyekwak;
Jeremiah17:2 kota kobwaati lagokwak
Jeremiah17:3 ak eng' tulweennyu ne mi kewanin. Achandoi keip tuguuguk che po kamanuut ak konoraiguk tugul
Jeremiah17:4 Ak ibagaaktoi aginye poroteng'ung' ne ki agoonin; ak agoonin ioot puuniguk eng' emet ne mengen: amu ki olaal maat eng' nereegekyuk
Jeremiah17:5 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Chuboot chii ne imang'u kipkosabei
Jeremiah17:6 Amu igeitu sondiit eng' surkwen
Jeremiah17:7 Iberuurot chiito ne imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah17:8 Amu igeitu ineendet keetit ne ki kiminji ole neegitee peek
Jeremiah17:9 Kaberberin muguleldo kosiir tuguuk tugul
Jeremiah17:10 Anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kasiagindetap muguleldo
Jeremiah17:11 Ko uu taiywet ne igeenyi aarek che ma chechiik
Jeremiah17:12 Uu kapkorosunnyo ng'echereetap toroornatet
Jeremiah17:13 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah17:14 Isooba
Jeremiah17:15 Keero
Jeremiah17:16 Ma achakte anee kot abagaakte asubin aek mestowot; ama amach peetuutap riirek. Ingen inyee kiit ne ki mang'une kutinnyu; kimi taing'ung'.
Jeremiah17:17 Amat imua; ii ole amwechini eng' peetuutap yaityet.
Jeremiah17:18 Ingolilanso che usa
Jeremiah17:19 Kimwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ui
Jeremiah17:20 ak ileenji icheek
Jeremiah17:21 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Oriipkei
Jeremiah17:22 anan oip lautik eng' kooriikwok eng' peetuutap sabato
Jeremiah17:23 ago ma kas
Jeremiah17:24 Ak ngot oepcha iit eng' kagiiletapkei
Jeremiah17:25 pwoonei anyun oriit laitorinik ak pounik che tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Daudi
Jeremiah17:26 Ak kobwa kobunu nganasoogap Judah
Jeremiah17:27 Ago ngot ko mogasa iit otabaan peetuutap sabato

Jeremiah18:2 ng'eet
Jeremiah18:3 Achoortegei anyun kootap cheptereniot
Jeremiah18:4 Ak kingo ng'emak tereet ne kiga kiyae meneet
Jeremiah18:5 Ki nyoonjo anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Jeremiah18:6 Ee kootap Israel
Jeremiah18:7 Eng' peetuut ne amwae agobo poror age tugul
Jeremiah18:8 ngot kosik eng' yaityennywa pororyonooto kaamwa
Jeremiah18:9 Ak eng' peetuut ne amwae agobo poror age tugul
Jeremiah18:10 ngot koyai yaityet eng' tainnyu
Jeremiah18:11 Ara anyun
Jeremiah18:12 Ago mwaei kole
Jeremiah18:13 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Oteebate pororyosyek
Jeremiah18:14 Tos petei teluji ne po Lebanon eng' rwandetap kewanin? Anan tos teng'dos peek che kaitit che rootune ole loo?
Jeremiah18:15 Amu kigoutyeno piikyuk
Jeremiah18:16 si koyai emennywa koek kwong'eet
Jeremiah18:17 Aseeri icheek eng' taitap puunyoot ko uu ye iseerisyei usoonetap kong'asiis; ageere pataikwak
Jeremiah18:18 Ki mwa anyun kole
Jeremiah18:19 Kasa
Jeremiah18:20 Tos kiyaaktoi yaityet eng' kiit ne myee? Amu kogobalji keriinget saboondanyu. Ibwaat ole ki atononde eng' taing'ung' ak ang'alaal che myach agobo icheek
Jeremiah18:21 Igoite anyun lagokwak
Jeremiah18:22 Ingogasak riirek eng' kooriikwak
Jeremiah18:23 Ago
Jeremiah19:1 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah19:2 ak obe agoi atebweetap weeriitap Hinom
Jeremiah19:3 Mwaa ile: Ogas okweek ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah19:4 Amu ki kometa icheek
Jeremiah19:5 ak ki koteekyi Baal komoswek che torooreen
Jeremiah19:6 keero
Jeremiah19:7 Ak ayai koek puch kirwoogutigap Judah ak Jerusalem eng' olito; ak agoochini kebare rotwetap chok eng' taitap puunikwak
Jeremiah19:8 Ak ayai nganasani koek kwong'eet ak ne kireenyei; kwong'ei age tugul ne siirtoi eng' yooto ak koreeny amu korotwek tugul che po olooto.
Jeremiah19:9 Ak agoochi icheek koam panyeegap weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak
Jeremiah19:10 Yeityo itui keregut eng' taitap piik che obendi tugul
Jeremiah19:11 ak ileenji icheek
Jeremiah19:12 Ayachini ko uu nooto olito
Jeremiah19:13 ak kogergeit kooriigap Jerusalem
Jeremiah19:14 Ki nyo anyun Jeremiah eng' Topet
Jeremiah19:15 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah20:1 Ki kas anyun Pasur weeriitap Imer tisiindet
Jeremiah20:2 Ki pir anyun Pasur maotyot Jeremiah
Jeremiah20:3 Ak ki ityaach Pasur Jeremiah komong' eng' keetichooto eng' peetuut ne po aeng'. Ki leenji anyun Jeremiah ineendet
Jeremiah20:4 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah20:5 Ak agoite kogeny mogornatosyek tugul che po nganasani
Jeremiah20:6 Ak inyee Pasur
Jeremiah20:7 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah20:8 Amu kotugul ye ang'alaali
Jeremiah20:9 Ak ngot amwa ale
Jeremiah20:10 Amu koagas kateweerisyetap che chaang'
Jeremiah20:11 Ago mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ko uu ineendet ne kiim ak komuisei: kinachi anyun usiikyuk
Jeremiah20:12 Ago
Jeremiah20:13 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah20:14 Ingochubok peetuut ne ki kisigena: amat kiberuur peetuut ne kisigena kamennyu.
Jeremiah20:15 Ingochubok chiito ne ki ipchin logoiywek che myach kwandanyu
Jeremiah20:16 Ak ingoigei chiichooto nganasook che ki kogabui Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah20:17 amu ma para ami moo; si koek kamennyu kererinnyu
Jeremiah20:18 Amu nee anyun si among' eng' moo
Jeremiah21:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah21:2 asoomin ale
Jeremiah21:3 Ki mwachi anyun Jeremiah koleenji
Jeremiah21:4 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah21:5 Ak kebaregei ak okweek eng' euut ne chuulaat
Jeremiah21:6 Ak abir piik che menyei nganasani
Jeremiah21:7 Ak ye ibata
Jeremiah21:8 Ak ileenji pichu
Jeremiah21:9 Ineendet ne tebee nganasani
Jeremiah21:10 Amu kaatokyi togeennyu nganasani aipchi yaityet
Jeremiah21:11 Ak okweek kootap laitoryatap Judah
Jeremiah21:12 Ee kootap Daudi
Jeremiah21:13 Keero
Jeremiah21:14 Ak abirok ko uu logoegap poisyonikwok
Jeremiah22:1 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Choorchigei kootap laitoryatap Judah
Jeremiah22:2 ile
Jeremiah22:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Oyai okweek kirwooget ak imanda
Jeremiah22:4 Amu ngot oyai iman kiito
Jeremiah22:5 Ago ngot ko mogas iit ng'aleechuuto
Jeremiah22:6 Amu mwaei ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo kootap laitoryat ne po Judah kole
Jeremiah22:7 Ak achop ng'emiik agobo inyee
Jeremiah22:8 Ak kosiirtoe pororyosyek che chaang' nganasani
Jeremiah22:9 Kowol anyun kole
Jeremiah22:10 Amoriirchi ne ki kome
Jeremiah22:11 Amu kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Shallum weeriitap Josiah laitoryatap Judah
Jeremiah22:12 ago mechin ole ki kiluulji
Jeremiah22:13 Pwo eng' ineendet ne teechei koonnyi koma eng' imanda
Jeremiah22:14 ne mwaei kole
Jeremiah22:15 Tos ilaitoran
Jeremiah22:16 Ki irwooksechi ne panan ak ne ma tinyei kiy; ki myeiit anyun. Tos ki ma konaena niito? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Jeremiah22:17 Ago matokyingei konyeguk ak muguleldang'ung' kiy age kobatee tuguugap ng'wen
Jeremiah22:18 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah
Jeremiah22:19 Kitubei ko uu ye kitubei sigiryet
Jeremiah22:20 Togoste Lebanon
Jeremiah22:21 Ki ang'alaalun eng' peetuusyegap poroteng'ung'; ago ki imwa ile
Jeremiah22:22 Paei usoonet mestoweguk tugul
Jeremiah22:23 Ee inyee ne imenye Lebanon
Jeremiah22:24 Ko uu ye asabe
Jeremiah22:25 ak andein eunegap icheeget che cheeng'ei saboondang'ung'
Jeremiah22:26 Ak atimden imande
Jeremiah22:27 Ago ma weekyingei emet ne machei saboonwekwak.
Jeremiah22:28 Tos chiichito Konia ne tereet ne kisasei ne ki koyie? Tos ineendet ko tereet ne ma kiboiboitune? Amu nee anyun si ketimda icheeget
Jeremiah22:29 Ee emoni
Jeremiah22:30 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah23:1 Pwo eng' mestoweek che ng'emei ak koyestoi keechiiregap akweennyu! Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Jeremiah23:2 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah23:3 Ak ayum che ki ng'et che po akweennyu komong' eng' emotinwek tugul ole kigaonji
Jeremiah23:4 Ak ande mestoweek che iyagi: ama koiyweisyei kogeny
Jeremiah23:5 Ogeero
Jeremiah23:6 Kisaru Judah eng' peetuusyekyik
Jeremiah23:7 Nooto anyun
Jeremiah23:8 Ago
Jeremiah23:9 Kagomea mugulel agobo maotik
Jeremiah23:10 Amu nyiitaat emet piik che yaei ibeetapkei; amu riirei emet amu kayasyoet; ki koyaam ole agete akwotisyek eng' surkwen; ya pandanywa
Jeremiah23:11 Amu murwoon maotyot ak tisiindet; ee
Jeremiah23:12 Egu anyun ooreenywa komoswek che chaboen eng' mesundeito: ki oonei kot kobutyo: amu aipchini yaityet
Jeremiah23:13 Ak ki ageer perberyo eng' maotigap Samaria; ki maotene Baal
Jeremiah23:14 Ki ageerchi maotigap Jerusalem ak icheek kiit ne samis miising'; yaei ibeetapkei
Jeremiah23:15 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek agobo maotik kole: Ogeero
Jeremiah23:16 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Jeremiah23:17 Mwachin icheek kotugul piik che sasa
Jeremiah23:18 Amu ng'oo ne ki kotonon eng' kapkirwoogetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah23:19 Ogeero
Jeremiah23:20 Ma weeksei nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah23:21 Ki ma ayookte maotichuuto
Jeremiah23:22 Ago nda kiga tononso eng' kapkirwoogennyu
Jeremiah23:23 Tos aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi ye neegit kityo
Jeremiah23:24 Tos imuuchi chii kounygei eng' komoswek che ung'ootiin
Jeremiah23:25 Ki agas kiit ne ki mwa maotik
Jeremiah23:26 Tebee kot kotyanit niito mugulelwegap maotik che maoteni lembechek
Jeremiah23:27 che leen kogoochi piikyuk koutye kainennyu eng' karwotitaosyekwak che mwachin chii tugul chiitap kokwennyi
Jeremiah23:28 Ingomwa maotyot karwotitoet ne koirwotyi; ak ineendet ne tinyei ng'olyoondennyu komwa eng' imanda. Ting'egei nee meteteek ak nganuuk? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Jeremiah23:29 Tos ma uu ng'olyoondennyu maat? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ma uu kiriswet ne tonei rwandet?
Jeremiah23:30 Nooto anyun
Jeremiah23:31 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah23:32 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah23:33 Ye teebenen pichu
Jeremiah23:34 Ak abire maotyot
Jeremiah23:35 Omwachi anyun okweek
Jeremiah23:36 Ama omwae mileetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny: amu egu ng'olyootap chii age tugul lautyennyi; amu ki omaas ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne sabei
Jeremiah23:37 Mwachi maotyot ko uu ni ileenji
Jeremiah23:38 Ago ngot omwa ole
Jeremiah23:39 nooto anyun
Jeremiah23:40 ak aibwok chotisyet ne po agoi
Jeremiah24:1 Ki iboorwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kitongok aeng' che po logoegap mogoonik che ki kinde taitap Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kingo kagoluul Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon
Jeremiah24:2 Ki mi kitonget age logoegap mogoonik che korooron miising'
Jeremiah24:3 Yeityo koleenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah24:4 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Jeremiah24:5 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah24:6 Amu ageere icheek si kotep eng' myeeindo
Jeremiah24:7 Ak agoochi icheek muguleldo ne naena
Jeremiah24:8 Ak ko uu kiit ne uu logoechu yaacheen po mogoonik
Jeremiah24:9 agoitoi icheek koek che ki wiirchin komosi ak komosi eng' pounatosyek tugul che po ng'wony si konyoor taiyet; koek teweernateet
Jeremiah24:10 Ak ayookyi icheek rotwetap chok
Jeremiah25:1 Ki nyoonji ng'olyoot Jeremiah agobo piik tugul che po Judah eng' kenyiit ne po ang'wan ne po Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah
Jeremiah25:2 ne ki mwachi maotyot Jeremiah piik tugul che po Judah
Jeremiah25:3 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch kenyiitap taman ak somok ne po Josiah weeriitap Ammon
Jeremiah25:4 Ak ki koyokwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor otwogikyik tugul che maotik
Jeremiah25:5 komwaei kole
Jeremiah25:6 amosubote kamuktaik che teer
Jeremiah25:7 Ago ki ma ogasa kora
Jeremiah25:8 Kamwa anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Amu ma ogas ng'aleekyuk
Jeremiah25:9 ogeero
Jeremiah25:10 Ak aistoe icheek anyun tuugeetap poiboiyet
Jeremiah25:11 Ak koek karaatya emoni komugul
Jeremiah25:12 Ak ye kagobata kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisabu
Jeremiah25:13 Ak aipchi emonooto ng'aleekyuk tugul che ki amwa agobo olooto
Jeremiah25:14 Amu yaei pororyosyek che chaang' ak laitorinik che eecheen icheek koek otwogikwak
Jeremiah25:15 Amu kamwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah25:16 Ak koeei

Jeremiah25:19 Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri
Jeremiah25:20 kobooto piik tugul che kiburuchkei
