Jeremiah25:22 ak laitorinik tugul che po Tyro
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan
Jeremiah25:24 ak laitorinik tugul che po Arabia
Jeremiah25:25 ak laitorinik tugul che po Shimri
Jeremiah25:26 ak laitorinik tugul che po murot kaataam
Jeremiah25:27 Ak ileenji icheek
Jeremiah25:28 Ak ngot koeesyo konam kigombet eng' eung'ung'
Jeremiah25:29 Amu
Jeremiah25:30 Maotenji anyun eng' ng'aleechu tugul
Jeremiah25:31 Itei polateet ole poochin ng'wony; amu poortos Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak pororyosyek
Jeremiah25:32 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Jeremiah25:33 Ak konyi emet eng' peetuunooto piik che parei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah25:34 Oteiye
Jeremiah25:35 Ama piitu ole mwechin mestoweek
Jeremiah25:36 Kutitap riiregap mestoweek
Jeremiah25:37 Ak kosiisyo piusyek che po kaalyeet amu nereegek che koroomen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Jeremiah25:38 Ki kometo ole ung'egei
Jeremiah26:1 Ki pun ng'olyondoni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taunetap laitornatetap Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah
Jeremiah26:2 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tonon eng' seremutap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah26:3 Abeere imuuchi kogas
Jeremiah26:4 Ak ileenji icheek
Jeremiah26:5 ogas ng'aleegap otwogikyuk maotik
Jeremiah26:6 ayae anyun kooi koigei Shiloh
Jeremiah26:7 Ak kigasei tisiik ak maotik ak piik tugul komwaei Jeremiah ng'aleechuuto eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Jeremiah26:8 Ak kingo kagogees Jeremiah ng'alaalet tugul ne kiga ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komwachi piik tugul
Jeremiah26:9 Amu nee si imaoten eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah26:10 Ak kingo kas pounigap Judah tuguuchuuto
Jeremiah26:11 Yeityo komwachi tisiik ak maotik
Jeremiah26:12 Yeityo komwachi Jeremiah pounik tugul ak piik tugul koleenji
Jeremiah26:13 Nooto anyun
Jeremiah26:14 Ago ogeero
Jeremiah26:15 Ago onai komyee ole
Jeremiah26:16 Yeityo komwachi pounik ak piik tugul tisiik ak maotik koleenji: Ma nyooljin meet chiichi; amu kagong'alaalwech eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo.
Jeremiah26:17 Kong'eetyo anyun poisyek alak che po emet
Jeremiah26:18 Ki maoten Mikaia meng'iindetap Moresheth eng' peetuusyegap Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah; ak ki ng'alaalji piik tugul che po Judah koleenji
Jeremiah26:19 Tos kita kobar Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah ak Judah tugul ineendet? Tos ki ma iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogaigai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah26:20 Ak ki mi chiito age agine ne ki maoten eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah26:21 Ak ye kingo kas Laitoryat Jehoiakim
Jeremiah26:22 Ak ki iyookto Laitoryat Jehoiakim piik koba Misiri
Jeremiah26:23 ak ki imut Uriah eng' Misiri
Jeremiah26:24 Ago ki riip Aikam weeriitap Sapan Jeremiah
Jeremiah27:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah ng'olyoondoni kobunu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taunetap laitornatetap Jeoikam weeriitap Josiah
Jeremiah27:2 koleenji
Jeremiah27:3 yeityo iyookyi laitoryatap Edom
Jeremiah27:4 ak iyomis icheek koba kapkiptainikwak koleenji kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah27:5 Ki ayai ng'wonyuni
Jeremiah27:6 Kaagoochi anyun emotinwechuuto tugul Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon
Jeremiah27:7 Ak koot pororyosyek tugul ineendet ak weeriitnnyi
Jeremiah27:8 Ak tuun abire pororyet ak pounateet ne maotei Nebukadnezar niito laitoryatap Babilon
Jeremiah27:9 Ago
Jeremiah27:10 amu maotenwok lembeita
Jeremiah27:11 Ago pororyet ne kase iit laitoryatap Babilon
Jeremiah27:12 Ak ki ang'alaalji Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah ko uu ng'aleechuuto tugul aleenji
Jeremiah27:13 Amu nee si imee
Jeremiah27:14 Amogas ng'aleegap maotik che ng'alaalwok koleenjinok
Jeremiah27:15 Amu ma ayoogu icheek
Jeremiah27:16 Ki ang'alaalji tisiik ak icheek ak pichu tugul aleenji
Jeremiah27:17 Amogas pichooto; oot laitoryatap Babilon si osapche: amu nee anyun si koek karaita nganasani?
Jeremiah27:18 Ago ngot ko maotik icheeget
Jeremiah27:19 Amu kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko uu ni agobo tolochik
Jeremiah27:20 che ki ma ip Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon
Jeremiah27:21 Ee
Jeremiah27:22 ki ibei koba Babilon
Jeremiah28:1 Ak eng' kenyinooto
Jeremiah28:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah28:3 Kotom kogeskei kenyiisyek aeng'
Jeremiah28:4 ak amutu kogeny konyo olito Jekoniah weeriitap Jehoiakim laitoryatap Judah
Jeremiah28:5 Ki mwachi anyun maotyot Jeremiah maotyot Hananiah eng' taitap tisiik ak eng' taitap piik tugul che kitonondos eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah28:6 ak ki le maotyot Jeremiah
Jeremiah28:7 Ago kas anyun ng'olyoondoni amwae eng' taing'ung' ak eng' taitap piik tugul:
Jeremiah28:8 Ki maoten maotik che po keny che ki indounena ak che ki indounenen agobo emotinwek che chaang'
Jeremiah28:9 Maotyot ne maoteni agobo kaalyeet
Jeremiah28:10 Ki inem anyun maotyot Hananiah chogit ne ki mi kaatitap maotyot Jeremiah
Jeremiah28:11 Ak ki ng'alaal Hananiah eng' taitap piik tugul kole
Jeremiah28:12 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah
Jeremiah28:13 ui ak imwachi Hananiah ileenji
Jeremiah28:14 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah28:15 Yeityo komwachi maotyot Jeremiah maotyot Hananiah
Jeremiah28:16 Nooto anyun
Jeremiah28:17 Kime anyun maotyot Hananiah eng' kenyinooto eng' arawetap tisap.

Jeremiah29:3 ki ip Elasa weeriitap Sapan

Jeremiah30:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah30:2 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah30:3 Keero
Jeremiah30:4 Ak chu ng'aleek che ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel ak Judah.
Jeremiah30:5 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kigegas tuugeet ne po potanet
Jeremiah30:6 Oteep anyun
Jeremiah30:7 Pwo eng' peetuunooto
Jeremiah30:8 Ak tuun airie eng' peetuunooto choginnyi ne mi kaating'ung'
Jeremiah30:9 Ago otei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
Jeremiah30:10 Meiywei anyun
Jeremiah30:11 Amu ami kobooten
Jeremiah30:12 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah30:13 Ma mi chii ne ng'alaaldaun
Jeremiah30:14 Kigoutyenen chamaniguk tugul: ma cheeng'in: amu kaaguotenin eng' kaguotenetap puunyoot eng' katigonetap ineendet ne koroom; amu ooindap yaityeng'ung'
Jeremiah30:15 Amu nee si iriir eng' kaguoteneng'ung'? Ma inyaaksei ng'wanindang'ung'. Koayaun anyun tuguuchuuto
Jeremiah30:16 Ki amei anyun icheek tugul che amin; kiluulei puuniguk tugul
Jeremiah30:17 Amu asaabin
Jeremiah30:18 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah30:19 Ak komang'une olooto kongoi ak kutitap icheeget che igasegei: ak ates icheek
Jeremiah30:20 Ak koigei lagokwak atkinye tai
Jeremiah30:21 Ak kobiitune icheek pounindennywa
Jeremiah30:22 Ak oegu piikyuk
Jeremiah30:23 Ogeero
Jeremiah30:24 Ma weeksei nereegek che ng'woneen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi koyai kogees
Jeremiah31:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah31:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah31:3 Kimong'jo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koloo
Jeremiah31:4 Ateechin kogeny ak iteegoksei
Jeremiah31:5 Ak imin kogeny sabibuk eng' tuloonoogap Samaria; minsei minik
Jeremiah31:6 Amu piitu peetuut ye ititendos riibiik eng' tuloonook che po Ephraim: kole
Jeremiah31:7 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Otyenji Jakobo eng' kaagaasetapkei
Jeremiah31:8 Keero
Jeremiah31:9 Pwoonei koriiryonu
Jeremiah31:10 Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah31:11 Amu ki ityaach `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jakobo
Jeremiah31:12 Ak kobwa kotyen eng' ole toroor eng' Zion
Jeremiah31:13 Kobaibait anyun pergeiyat eng' ureryet
Jeremiah31:14 Ak abae akwaindo saboonwegap tisiik kobiyong'so
Jeremiah31:15 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kigasei kutit eng' Ramah
Jeremiah31:16 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amat itee
Jeremiah31:17 Ak mi kamang'unet ne po peetuusyeguk che po let
Jeremiah31:18 Koagas iman koteechingei Ephraim
Jeremiah31:19 Ki asigu iman ko ki awelelage; ak ki arabach kubestanyu ko kagineta: Ki alilan
Jeremiah31:20 Tos weeriitnnyu ne achame
Jeremiah31:21 Lumjige kaboorunoik che po ooreet
Jeremiah31:22 Iombenoti kot kotyanit
Jeremiah31:23 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah31:24 Ak komeny olooto Judah ak nganasookyik tugul; kobooto kabotik
Jeremiah31:25 Amu kaabai kobiyo saboondo ne ng'etat
Jeremiah31:26 Ki agosu anyun
Jeremiah31:27 Ogeero
Jeremiah31:28 Ak ko uu ye ki ariip icheek si kobiit atut ak agabui ak ang'em
Jeremiah31:29 Ma komwaei eng' peetuusyechooto kole
Jeremiah31:30 Ago meei chii age tugul amu tengektanyi: ak kiliilei kelegap chiito age tugul ne amei sabibuk che mindilileen.
Jeremiah31:31 Ogeero
Jeremiah31:32 ma ko uu kayomiset ne ki kiyomiske ak kwanisyekwak eng' peetuut ne ki anamanu icheek amutu komong' eng' emetap Misiri; kayomiset nootonyu ne king'em icheek
Jeremiah31:33 Ago ni kayomiset ne kiyomisigei ak kootap Israel ye ibata peetuusyechooto
Jeremiah31:34 Ama koneeti kogeny chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi
Jeremiah31:35 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah31:36 Nda istoenagei ng'atuutichuuto
Jeremiah31:37 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah31:38 Ogeero
Jeremiah31:39 Ak ta kikwae porowet kolititiit kotokyigei tulweet ne ming'in ne kiguure Gareb
Jeremiah31:40 Ak koek ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor atebweet komugul ne po muuswek
Jeremiah32:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiitap taman ne po Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah
Jeremiah32:2 Kiyiem anyun lugeetap laitoryatap Babilon Jerusalem eng' peetuusyechooto: ak kiga kigerchi maotyot Jeremiah seremutap riibiik
Jeremiah32:3 Amu kiga koger ineendet Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah koleenji
Jeremiah32:4 ama chilili Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah eng' eutap Kaldeik
Jeremiah32:5 ak komut Zedekiah kwo Babilon
Jeremiah32:6 Ak imwa Jeremiah kole
Jeremiah32:7 Keero
Jeremiah32:8 Kinyonjo anyun Hanamel weeriitap imamennyu eng' seremutap riibiik ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah32:9 Ak ki aal mbaranooto ne ki mi Anatoth ne po Hanamel weeriitap imamennyu
Jeremiah32:10 Ak ki asir parweetap kayanjinet
Jeremiah32:11 Ki aip anyun parweetap kayanjinet ne po alyet
Jeremiah32:12 Ak ki agoochi anyun parwaanooto po kayanjinet ne po alyet Baruk weeriitap Neriah weeriitap Maseia
Jeremiah32:13 Ak ki ang'at Baruk eng' tainnywa aleenji
Jeremiah32:14 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah32:15 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah32:16 Kingo kaagoochi Baruk weeriitap Neriah parweetap kayanjinet ne po alyet
Jeremiah32:17 Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Keero
Jeremiah32:18 inyee ne iriiree eliphuusyek
Jeremiah32:19 ineendet ne oo eng' kirwooget
Jeremiah32:20 ne ki inde kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik emetap Misiri
Jeremiah32:21 ak ki imutu piiguk Israel komong' eng' emetap Misiri eng' kaboorunoik
Jeremiah32:22 ak igoochi emoni
Jeremiah32:23 ak ki pwa
Jeremiah32:24 Ogeero karurugutigap ng'ung'unyek ole punu piik kobwanei koluulei nganasani; ak kagigoochi nganasani eutap Kaldeik che paregei ak nganasanooto
Jeremiah32:25 Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah32:26 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah
Jeremiah32:27 keero
Jeremiah32:28 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero
Jeremiah32:29 ak kobwa Kaldeik che paregei ak nganasani
Jeremiah32:30 Amu ki koyai piigap Israel ak lagogap Judah ne ya eng' tainnyu kobooch ming'inatennywa: amu ki kotacha piigap Israel anereech eng' poisyonigap eunekwak
Jeremiah32:31 Amu ki koek eng' anee nganasani tagisyetap nereeknatennyu ak ne po nereegekyuk che ng'woneen kobooch peetuut ne kiteechei icheek agoi rani; kot aiste eng' tainnyu
Jeremiah32:32 amu yaityet tugul ne po piigap Israel ak ne po lagogap Judah
Jeremiah32:33 Ak ki kotuktocha patai
Jeremiah32:34 Ago ki inde tuguukwak che kiwechei
Jeremiah32:35 Ak ki teech komoswek che torooreen che po Baal
Jeremiah32:36 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah32:37 Ogeero
Jeremiah32:38 Ak koek piikyuk
Jeremiah32:39 ak agoochi icheek muguleldo agenge ak ooreet agenge
Jeremiah32:40 ak kiyomisigei ak icheek kayomiset ne po koigeny
Jeremiah32:41 Ee
Jeremiah32:42 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ko uu ye ki aipchi pichu yaityoni oo tugul
Jeremiah32:43 Ak keal mbareenik eng' emoni
Jeremiah32:44 Alei piik mbareenik eng' fedhaisyek
Jeremiah33:1 Ki nyoonji kogeny ne po aeng' `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah
Jeremiah33:2 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne yaei nooto
Jeremiah33:3 Kuura
Jeremiah33:4 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah33:5 Pwoonei kobaregei ak Kaldeik
Jeremiah33:6 Ogeero
Jeremiah33:7 Ak agoochi Judah ak Israel koweek eng' ole kiga kiluulji
Jeremiah33:8 Ak aun icheek eng' tengektonywa tugul
Jeremiah33:9 Ak koek nganasani eng' anee kainet ne kiboiboitune
Jeremiah33:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ta kegasei kogeny eng' olito
Jeremiah33:11 kigasei tuugeetap poiboiyet ak ne po kagasetapkei
Jeremiah33:12 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ta kobiitu kogeny eng' olito ole karaatya
Jeremiah33:13 Punei kogeny akwotisyegap keechiirek taitap ineendet ne iiti eng' nganasook che po emetap tuloonook
Jeremiah33:14 Ogeero
Jeremiah33:15 Agoochini kobityi Daudi Temetap imanda eng' peetuusyechooto ak eng' peetuunooto; ak korwooch kirwooget ak imanda eng' emet.
Jeremiah33:16 Kisaru Judah eng' peetuusyechooto; ak komeng'iis Jerusalem eng' chametapkei; ak ni kainet ne kimwaitoe
Jeremiah33:17 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma koi petyi chii Daudi ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po kootap Israel;
Jeremiah33:18 ama petyin chii tisiik Lawiik eng' tainnyu ne igoitoi kagoochinoik che kibeelei
Jeremiah33:19 Ak ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah koleenji
Jeremiah33:20 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ndaomuuchi obut arorutyennyu ne po peet
Jeremiah33:21 ta kimuuchi kebut agine kayomisennyu ne ki kiyomiske ak Daudi otwogindennyu
Jeremiah33:22 Ko uu ye ma kimuuchi kiit tuguuk che po kipsengwet
Jeremiah33:23 Ak ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah
Jeremiah33:24 tos mebwaati kiit ne kagomwa pichu kole ki gotimda `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koorchooto aeng' che ki kolewen? Sasei icheek ko uu nooto piikyuk
Jeremiah33:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ngot koma tononi arorutyennyu ne po peet ak ne po kemoi
Jeremiah33:26 atimdoi anyun agine iyoteetap Jakobo
Jeremiah34:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah34:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah34:3 amechililee eunnyi
Jeremiah34:4 Ago kas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah34:5 imee eng' kaalyeet; ak peelun icheek ko uu nooto ko uu ye kigebeelji kwanisyeguk
Jeremiah34:6 Yeityo komwachi maotyot Jeremiah Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah ng'aleechooto tugul eng' Jerusalem
Jeremiah34:7 ye ki paregei lugeetap laitoryatap Babilon ak Jerusalem
Jeremiah34:8 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah34:9 kole kotyach chii tugul otwogindennyi ne muren ak otwogindennyi ne tye
Jeremiah34:10 Ak ki kas iit pounik tugul ak piik tugul che kiga yai arorutyonooto
Jeremiah34:11 ago eng' let
Jeremiah34:12 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah34:13 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah34:14 Ye ibata kenyiisyek tisabu
Jeremiah34:15 Ak ki owalage anyun
Jeremiah34:16 ago ki owalage ong'wanit kainennyu
Jeremiah34:17 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma oepcha iit
Jeremiah34:18 Ak agoitoi piik che ki kobistoe kayomisennyu
Jeremiah34:19 pounigap Judah
Jeremiah34:20 agoitoi icheek koba eutap puunikwak
Jeremiah34:21 Ak agoitoi Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah ak pounikyik koba eutap puunikwak
Jeremiah34:22 Ogeero
Jeremiah35:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyegap Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah
Jeremiah35:2 ui kootap Rekabitik
Jeremiah35:3 Ki amut anyun Jaasania weeriitap Jeremiah
Jeremiah35:4 ki amutu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah35:5 Ak ki ande taabook che nyiitootiin divaik kobooto kigombok
Jeremiah35:6 Ago ki le
Jeremiah35:7 amoteeche koot
Jeremiah35:8 Ak kigegas iit kutitap kwandanyo Jonadab weeriitap Regap ko uu tugul che king'atech
Jeremiah35:9 anan keteekyigei kooriik che ki menye: ama ki tinyei mbareenigap sabibuk anan mbareenik anan kesweek:
Jeremiah35:10 ago kigemeng'oote emaisyek
Jeremiah35:11 Ago ye ki nyo Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon emoni
Jeremiah35:12 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah
Jeremiah35:13 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah35:14 Kagosulda ng'aleegap Jonadab weeriitap Regap
Jeremiah35:15 Ak ki ayookwok kogeny otwogikyuk tugul che maotik
Jeremiah35:16 Amu kagoyai weeriigap Jonadab weeriitap Regap ng'atuutyetap kwandanywa
Jeremiah35:17 mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah35:18 Ak ki mwachi Jeremiah kootap Rekabitik koleenji
Jeremiah35:19 mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah36:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah ng'olyoondoni ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiit ne po ang'wan ne po Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah
Jeremiah36:2 nam bukuit ne mamanat
Jeremiah36:3 Abeere tamangap kogas kootap Judah yaityet tugul ne kaatil ale ayachini icheek; si koweek chii tugul eng' icheek kometo ooreennyi ne ya
Jeremiah36:4 Ki kuur anyun Jeremiah Baruk weeriitap Neriah; ak kisir Baruk ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kimwaei Jeremiah
Jeremiah36:5 Ak ki ng'at Jeremiah Baruk
Jeremiah36:6 ui anyun isoman bukuiniito
Jeremiah36:7 Tamangap komwaita soomutikwak eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah36:8 Ak ki yai Baruk weeriitap Neriah ko uu tugul che ki ng'at maotyot Jeremiah ineendet
Jeremiah36:9 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po muut ne po Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah
Jeremiah36:10 Kisoman anyun Baruk ng'aleegap Jeremiah che ki kisirchi bukuit
Jeremiah36:11 Ak ye kingo kas Mikaia weeriitap Gemaria
Jeremiah36:12 kochoortagei kwo kootap laitoryat
Jeremiah36:13 Komwachi anyun Mikaia icheek ng'aleek tugul che kagas
Jeremiah36:14 Koyookto anyun pounik tugul Jeudi weeriitap Netania
Jeremiah36:15 Ak ki leenji icheek ineendet
Jeremiah36:16 Kingo kagogas ng'aleechooto tugul anyun
Jeremiah36:17 Yeityo koteebe icheek Baruk koleenji mwaiwech anyun ole ki itepte si isir ng'aleechuuto komwaei ineendet:
Jeremiah36:18 Kowolji anyun Baruk icheek koleenji kimwaiwo ng'aleechuuto tugul
Jeremiah36:19 Yeityo komwachi pounik Baruk
Jeremiah36:20 Ki pa anyun kaplaitoryat eng' seremut; ago kiga konde bukuinooto koot ne po oriit ne po Elisama siriindet; ak ki mwachi laitoryat ng'aleechooto tugul kogas.
Jeremiah36:21 Koyookto anyun laitoryat Jeudi kwo koip bukuit: ak ki inem eng' koot ne po oriit ne po Elisama siriindet. Ak kisooman Jeudi kogas laitoryat
Jeremiah36:22 Ki tebee laitoryat koot ne ki menyei eng' peetuusyegap kaitityet eng' arawetap sogool: ak kimi maat ne kilalei eng' kisigirit eng' tainnyi.
Jeremiah36:23 Ak kingo kagosoman Jeudi kartasisyek somok anan ang'wan
Jeremiah36:24 Ma iyweis
Jeremiah36:25 Ki igaigai anyun Elnatan ak Delaiah ak Gemaria laitoryat
Jeremiah36:26 Ak ki ng'at laitoryat Jerameel weeriitap laitoryat
Jeremiah36:27 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah
Jeremiah36:28 nam bukuit age kogeny
Jeremiah36:29 Ak imwa agobo Jehoiakim laitoryatap Judah ile
Jeremiah36:30 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Jehoiakim laitoryatap Judah ko uu ni kole: Ma sichei chii ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Daudi: ak ki wiirtoi muustonyi peet kobir asiista
Jeremiah36:31 Ak abire ineendet ak iyotennyi
Jeremiah36:32 Ki nam anyun Jeremiah bukuit age ne mamanat
Jeremiah37:1 Ak ki laitoran Zedekiah weeriitap Josiah kogeer Konia weeriitap Jehoiakim ne ki ieet Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon koek laitoryat eng' emetap Judah.
Jeremiah37:2 Ago ma kas ineendet
Jeremiah37:3 Ak ki iyookto Zedekiah laitoryat Jeukal weeriitap Selemya
Jeremiah37:4 Kinyonei anyun Jeremiah oriit ak komandoi eng' kwenutap piik: amu kitom korat chii ineendet eng' korgoreet.
Jeremiah37:5 Ak ki ibok lugeetap Pharaoh eng' Misiri: ak kingo kagogas Kaldeik che kiga koyiem Jerusalem ng'aleekwak
Jeremiah37:6 Yeityo konyonji ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Jeremiah
Jeremiah37:7 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah37:8 Ak kobwa Kaldeik kogeny
Jeremiah37:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amat oberberge
Jeremiah37:10 Amu nganda ki obar lugeet komugul ne po Kaldeik che kiboryenok
Jeremiah37:11 Ak kingo kagotogosta lugeetap Kaldeik koba eng' Jerusalem
Jeremiah37:12 kwo anyun Jeremiah eng' Jerusalem agoi emetap Benjamin
Jeremiah37:13 Ak ye kimi ormariichetap Benjamin
Jeremiah37:14 Kowolji anyun Jeremiah
Jeremiah37:15 Ak ki nereekyi pounik Jeremiah
Jeremiah37:16 Kingo kagoit Jeremiah kootap keriinget
Jeremiah37:17 koyookto anyun Zedekiah laitoryat kimut ineendet konyo: ak kiteepse laitoryat ineendet eng' ung'oot eng' koonnyi
Jeremiah37:18 Ki mwachi kogeny Jeremiah Laitoryat Zedekiah koleenji
Jeremiah37:19 Mi ano anyun nguno maotikwok che ki maotenwok
Jeremiah37:20 Asaain anyun
Jeremiah37:21 Ki ng'at anyun Zedekiah laitoryat
Jeremiah38:1 Ak ki kas Shepatiah weeriitap Matan ak Gedalia weeriitap Pasur
Jeremiah38:2 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah38:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah38:4 Koleenji anyun pounik laitoryat
Jeremiah38:5 Ak ki le Zedekiah laitoryat
Jeremiah38:6 Konam anyun icheek Jeremiah
Jeremiah38:7 Kingo kas anyun Ebed-melek Ethiopiaindet
Jeremiah38:8 komanda Ebed-melek eng' kootap laitoryat
Jeremiah38:9 kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat
Jeremiah38:10 Ki ng'at anyun Laitoryat Ebed-melek Ethiopiaindet
Jeremiah38:11 Komut anyun Ebed-melek piik
Jeremiah38:12 Ak ki leenji Ebed-melek Ethiopiaindet
Jeremiah38:13 Ki ichuut anyun Jeremiah eng' rogoonik
Jeremiah38:14 Ki iyookto anyun Zedekiah laitoryat kimut maotyot Jeremiah
Jeremiah38:15 Komwachi anyun Jeremiah Zedekiah
Jeremiah38:16 Ki iyasyechi anyun Zedekiah laitoryat Jeremiah eng' ung'oot
Jeremiah38:17 Ki leenji anyun Jeremiah Zedekiah
Jeremiah38:18 Ago ngot ko mewe indegei eunegap pounigap laitoryatap Babilon
Jeremiah38:19 Ak ki leenji Zedekiah laitoryat Jeremiah
Jeremiah38:20 Ago ki le Jeremiah
Jeremiah38:21 Ago ngot ieesye iwe
Jeremiah38:22 Keero
Jeremiah38:23 Ak komut osotiguk tugul komong' ak lagoguk komutyi Kaldeik: amechililee eunekwak
Jeremiah38:24 Koleenji anyun Zedekiah Jeremiah
Jeremiah38:25 Ago ngot kogas pounik kole kageng'alaal tuwai
Jeremiah38:26 ileenji icheek anyun
Jeremiah38:27 Ki pwa anyun pounik tugul kap Jeremiah
Jeremiah38:28 Ki tebee anyun Jeremiah seremutap riibiik agoi peetuut ne ki kiluule Jerusalem.
Jeremiah39:1 Ak kingo kageluul Jerusalem (eng' kenyiitap sogool ne po Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah
Jeremiah39:2 ki kibut nganasanooto eng' kenyiitap taman ak agenge ne po Zedekiah
Jeremiah39:3 kobwa anyun neganaset oriit pounik tugul che po laitoryatap Babilon
Jeremiah39:4 Ak kingo keer Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah ak murenik tugul che po lugeet
Jeremiah39:5 Ago ki isup icheek lugeetap Kaldeik
Jeremiah39:6 Ki par anyun laitoryatap Babilon weeriigap Zedekiah eng' Ribla
Jeremiah39:7 Ki par kogeny konyegap Zedekiah
Jeremiah39:8 Ak ki peel Kaldeik kootap laitoryat
Jeremiah39:9 Yeityo komut Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik
Jeremiah39:10 Ago ki pagaakta Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik
Jeremiah39:11 Ki ng'at anyun Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik
Jeremiah39:12 imut ineendet ak iriip komyee
Jeremiah39:13 Ki iyookto anyun Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik
Jeremiah39:14 ki iyookto kimut Jeremiah komong' eng' seremutap riibiik

Jeremiah40:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah40:2 Ki nam anyun kiptaiyatap riibiik Jeremiah
Jeremiah40:3 ak kagoip yaityonooto konyo
Jeremiah40:4 Keer anyuno
Jeremiah40:5 Ak ye ki tomo koweek
Jeremiah40:6 Ki wo anyun Jeremiah kap Gedalia weeriitap Aikam eng' Mispa
Jeremiah40:7 Ak kingo kas kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek che ki mi emotinwek
Jeremiah40:8 kobwa anyun kap Gedalia eng' Mispa
Jeremiah40:9 Ak ki iyasyechi Gedalia weeriitap Aikam weeriitap Sapan pichooto ak murenikwak
Jeremiah40:10 Ago amenye anee Mispa
Jeremiah40:11 Ko uu nooto
Jeremiah40:12 koweek anyun Yahudik tugul eng' komoswek tugul ole kiga ki oonji
Jeremiah40:13 Ki pwa kogeny Johanan weeriitap Karea
Jeremiah40:14 ak koleenji tos ingen ile ki iyook Baalis laitoryatap lagogap Ammon Ishmael weeriitap Netania kobarin? Ago ma iyan Gedalia weeriitap Aikam ng'aleekwak.
Jeremiah40:15 Kong'alaalji anyun eng' ung'oot
Jeremiah40:16 Ago ki leenji Gedalia weeriitap Aikam Johanan weeriitap Karea
Jeremiah41:1 Ki nyo anyun Ishmael weeriitap Netania weeriitap Elisama ne po iyoteetap kaplaitoryat
Jeremiah41:2 Ki ng'et anyun Ishmael weeriitap Netania
Jeremiah41:3 Ki par Ishmael kogeny Yahudik tugul che ki mi kobooto Gedalia eng' Mispa
Jeremiah41:4 Ak eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ko kagobar ineendet Gedalia
Jeremiah41:5 kobwa piik alage kobunu Shekem
Jeremiah41:6 Ak ki wo Ishmael weeriitap Netania eng' Mispa kotorookto icheek
Jeremiah41:7 Ak kingo kagoit kwenutap nganaseet
Jeremiah41:8 Ago ki piit piik tamanu eng' kwenunnywa che ki mwachi Ishmael koleenji
Jeremiah41:9 Ki inyiit anyun Ishmael weeriitap Netania keriingonooto piik che kiga kebar
Jeremiah41:10 Yeityo komut Ishmael piik tugul che ki ng'et eng' Mispa koek luulenik
Jeremiah41:11 Ago ye kingo kas Johanan weeriitap Karea ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek che ki mi kobooto ineendet
Jeremiah41:12 komut anyun piik tugul
Jeremiah41:13 Kingo keer anyun piik tugul che ki mi kobooto Ishmael Johanan weeriitap Karea
Jeremiah41:14 Kiwelelgei anyun piik tugul che kiga komut Ishmael eng' Mispa koek luulenik
Jeremiah41:15 Ago kichilil Ishmael weeriitap Netania eng' Johanan kobooto piikyik sisiit
Jeremiah41:16 Komut anyun Johanan weeriitap Karea ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek che ki mi kobooto ineendet
Jeremiah41:17 ak ki pa komeny Gerut Kimham
Jeremiah41:18 amu Kaldeik: amu ki iywei icheek
Jeremiah42:1 Ki riik anyun kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek
Jeremiah42:2 ak koleenji maotyot Jeremiah
Jeremiah42:3 si kobiit koboorwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ooreet ne kanyool kebendatee
Jeremiah42:4 Koleenji anyun `maotyot Jeremiah icheek
Jeremiah42:5 Ki mwachi anyun `icheek Jeremiah koleenji
Jeremiah42:6 Ngo ng'olyoo ne myee
Jeremiah42:7 Ak kingo pata peetuusyek tamanu
Jeremiah42:8 Ki kuur anyun ineendet Johanan weeriitap Karea
Jeremiah42:9 ak koleenji icheek
Jeremiah42:10 Ngot kota omeny emoni
Jeremiah42:11 Amoiywei laitoryatap Babilon
Jeremiah42:12 Ak agoonok rireenet
Jeremiah42:13 Ago ngot omwa ole
Jeremiah42:14 omwae oleen
Jeremiah42:15 ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah42:16 konamak anyun eng' olooto
Jeremiah42:17 Igeitu nooto eng' piik tugul che tokyingei Misiri kobendi kotebee olooto; pegu eng' rotwetap chok ak eng' rubeet
Jeremiah42:18 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah42:19 Kagong'alaal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo okweek
Jeremiah42:20 Amu ki oyachi kaberberisyet saboonwekwok; amu ki oyookto awo ye mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Jeremiah42:21 ak kaamwaiwok ng'aleechooto rani; ago ma ogas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' kiy age tugul ne kogoyogunena amwaiwok.
Jeremiah42:22 Onai anyun komyee ole
Jeremiah43:1 Ak ye kingo kagogees Jeremiah ng'alaalet ne ki ng'alaaljin piik tugul ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
Jeremiah43:2 komwa anyun Azariah weeriitap Hosaia
Jeremiah43:3 ago kaiberberin Baruk weeriitap Neriah si kogirindech
Jeremiah43:4 Ma kas iit anyun kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Johanan weeriitap Karea
Jeremiah43:5 Ago ki imut Johanan weeriitap Karea ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek piik tugul che ki ng'et che ki po Judah
Jeremiah43:6 murenik
Jeremiah43:7 ak kiit emetap Misiri; amu ki ma kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak ki pwa agoi Tapanes.
Jeremiah43:8 Yeityo konyonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah eng' Tapanes
Jeremiah43:9 Nam koik che eecheen
Jeremiah43:10 ak ileenji icheek
Jeremiah43:11 Ak konyo kobar emetap Misiri; che po meet kobendi meet
Jeremiah43:12 Ak alaal maat eng' kooriigap kanamonigap Misiri; ak kobeel ineendet kanamonichooto
Jeremiah43:13 Putei kogeny tolochigap Beth-shemesh
Jeremiah44:1 Ki nyoonji ng'olyoot Jeremiah agobo Yahudik tugul che ki menyei emetap Misiri
Jeremiah44:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah44:3 amu yaityennywa ne ki koyai kotacha anereech
Jeremiah44:4 Ago ki ayookwok otwogikyuk tugul
Jeremiah44:5 Ago ma kas
Jeremiah44:6 Kirong'kei anyun nereegekyuk che ng'woneen
Jeremiah44:7 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah44:8 amu otagena poisyonigap eunekwok
Jeremiah44:9 Tos ki outye yaitwogigap kwanisyekwok
Jeremiah44:10 Ma iming'ingei agoi rani
Jeremiah44:11 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah44:12 Ak anam che ng'etu che po Judah
Jeremiah44:13 Amu abire icheek che menyei emetap Misiri
Jeremiah44:14 kot koma chilil anan kong'et agot agenge eng' che kiga ng'et che po Judah
Jeremiah44:15 Ki wol anyun murenik tugul che ki ingen kole kibeeljin osotikwak nyamdutik kamuktaik che teer
Jeremiah44:16 Ma kigasun ng'olyoondonooto kemwaiwech eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Jeremiah44:17 Ago kiyae iman ng'olyoot age tugul ne kagemwa
Jeremiah44:18 Ago kobooch ngap kebagaakte kebeelji nyamdutik laitoryatap kipsengwet ne kwondo
Jeremiah44:19 Ak ye ki kibeeljini nyamdutik laitoryatap kipsengwet ne kwondo
Jeremiah44:20 Ki mwachi anyun Jeremiah piik tugul
Jeremiah44:21 Tos ki ma ibwaat `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek ama chut metinnyi
Jeremiah44:22 kot ko mata komuuch Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komuita
Jeremiah44:23 Amu ki obeel nyamdutik
Jeremiah44:24 Ki mwachi kogeny `Jeremiah piik tugul
Jeremiah44:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah44:26 Ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah44:27 Ogeero
Jeremiah44:28 Ak koweigei icheek che chililee rotwetap chok komong' eng' emetap Misiri
Jeremiah44:29 Ak ni kaboorunet eng' okweek
Jeremiah44:30 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero
Jeremiah45:1 Ki mwachi `maotyot Jeremiah Baruk weeriitap Neriah
Jeremiah45:2 Mwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah45:3 Ki imwa ile
Jeremiah45:4 Mwachi anyun ineendet ko uu ni
Jeremiah45:5 Ko tos
Jeremiah46:1 Ki nyoonji maotyot Jeremiah ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo pororyosyek.
Jeremiah46:2 Ng'aleegap Misiri: agobo lugeetap Pharaoh-neko laitoryatap Misiri
Jeremiah46:3 Ochop long'onik che mengech ak che eecheen ak ooriikyi lugeet.
Jeremiah46:4 Ochop paraisisyek ak olaany
Jeremiah46:5 Amu nee si ageere ko uu nooto? Aragendos ak koweechegei let; kagetuatui piikwak che kiimeen
Jeremiah46:6 Amat komwei ne chepchep
Jeremiah46:7 Ng'oo ni ng'eetei ko uu aineet
Jeremiah46:8 Ng'eetei Misiri ko uu aineet
Jeremiah46:9 Otogoste
Jeremiah46:10 Amu po peetuunooto Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah46:11 Togoste Gilead ak iip mwanik che kinyaise
Jeremiah46:12 Ki kogas pororyosyek agobo teweernateng'ung'
Jeremiah46:13 Ni ng'olyoot ne ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Jeremiah
Jeremiah46:14 Omwaite eng' Misiri
Jeremiah46:15 Amu nee si kibukto cheguuk che kiimeen? Ma tononso
Jeremiah46:16 Ki riich che chaang'
Jeremiah46:17 Kiwookyo eng' olooto kole polateet kityo Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri; ki kobagakta kosiirto peetuut ne kiga kichop.
Jeremiah46:18 Mwaei Laitoryat ne kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah46:19 Ee inyee chepto ne imenye Misiri
Jeremiah46:20 Rooryat ne karaaran miising' Misiri; ago kagonyo ng'emisyet ne punu murot kaataam
Jeremiah46:21 Uu kogeny piikyik che kesirei che mi kwenunnyi moek che neryootiin; amu kagoweigei let ak icheek
Jeremiah46:22 Wendi kutinnyi ko uu ereneet; amu pendi ak lugeet
Jeremiah46:23 Iluuli osnennyi
Jeremiah46:24 Kiteweeri cheptap Misiri; kindoi eutap piigap murot kaataam.
Jeremiah46:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah46:26 ak andoi icheek eutap icheeget che cheeng'ei saboonwekwak
Jeremiah46:27 Ago meiywei
Jeremiah46:28 Meiywei
Jeremiah47:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Jeremiah agobo Philistik
Jeremiah47:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero
Jeremiah47:3 Ye kas kirgirenetap keelyegap paraisisyegap piikyik che kiimeen
Jeremiah47:4 amu peetuut ne nyoonei koluulei Philistik tugul
Jeremiah47:5 Kanyonji Gaza poosto; kagiges Askelon
Jeremiah47:6 Ee
Jeremiah47:7 Imuktoi ano isiis
Jeremiah48:1 Ng'aleegap Moab: Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah48:2 Ma komi kalasunetap Moab; Ki kochop yaityet eng' Hesbon agobo emonooto
Jeremiah48:3 Kutitap riirek ne punu Horonaim
Jeremiah48:4 Kageng'em Moab; kagoriiryo lagokyik kot kegas.
Jeremiah48:5 Amu togostoi ole kitogostoe ne po Luhit koriiryoti kotugul; amu ki kogas pichiindap riiregap ng'emisyet eng' ole kichoortoegei ne po Horonaim.
Jeremiah48:6 Omwei
Jeremiah48:7 Amu-i
Jeremiah48:8 Ak nyoonjin luulindet nganaseet age tugul
Jeremiah48:9 Igoochi Moab kebebaik
Jeremiah48:10 Chuboot ineendet ne machuuljingei poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah48:11 Kigotebee Moab kaalyeet kobooch ming'inatennyi
Jeremiah48:12 Ogeer anyuno
Jeremiah48:13 Ak kolilaan Moab amu Kemos
Jeremiah48:14 Omuktoi ano omwa ole
Jeremiah48:15 Kigong'emak Moab
Jeremiah48:16 Kariikyi Moab nyalildanywa
Jeremiah48:17 Oriirchi ineendet okweek tugul che omi ole neegitee ineendet
Jeremiah48:18 Ee inyee chepto ne itebee Dibon
Jeremiah48:19 Ee inyee ne imenye Aroer
Jeremiah48:20 Kagiteweer Moab; amu kagebut: owaach ak oriirye; omwaite eng' Arnon
Jeremiah48:21 Ak kagonyonji kirwooget warenget; kanyonji Holon
Jeremiah48:22 ak Dibon
Jeremiah48:23 ak Kiriataim
Jeremiah48:24 ak Keryot
Jeremiah48:25 Kageisto kuinetap Moab
Jeremiah48:26 Ogoochi ineendet kobogit; amu ki kotoroorgei kogirinda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak mildoegei Moab kang'undaekyik
Jeremiah48:27 Tos ma ek Israel eng' inyee ne kirorechin? Tos ki kinyoor komi ak chooriik? Amu kotugul ye ing'alaali agobo ineendet
Jeremiah48:28 Ee okweek che omenye kebenonik; ak oige cheptuget ne teechei keswennyi eng' tabanwegap kurgeetap kebeneet.
Jeremiah48:29 Kigegas menoteetap Moab
Jeremiah48:30 Angen nereegekyik
Jeremiah48:31 Awaache anyun agobo Moab; ee
Jeremiah48:32 Ariirchinin eng' riirek che siirei che po Jaser
Jeremiah48:33 Ak kageisto kagasetapkei ak poiboiyet
Jeremiah48:34 Kagotwek icheek kobooch riiregap Hesbon agoi Eleale
Jeremiah48:35 Ageesu kogeny eng' Moab
Jeremiah48:36 Cheei anyun muguleldanyu agobo Moab ko uu ndurerusyek
Jeremiah48:37 Amu churat metit age tugul
Jeremiah48:38 Mi kateiyasyek kooriik tugul parak che po Moab ak eng' komosta age tugul eng' ortinwekyik: amu ki atui Moab ko uu tereet ne ma kiboiboitune
Jeremiah48:39 Kitepto ano si koyie! Iteitoi ano icheek! Katepto ano si kotukta patai Moab eng' kalilanet! Egu anyun Moab ne kirorechin ak koek ne kwong'ee icheek tugul che mi tabanwekyik.
Jeremiah48:40 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah48:41 Kageluul Keryot
Jeremiah48:42 Ak keng'em Moab si ma koegu pororyet
Jeremiah48:43 Kabwonjin kaiyweisyet
Jeremiah48:44 Ibutyin keriinget
Jeremiah48:45 Tonondos che mweei ama tinyei kimnateet eng' urwetap Hesbon: amu kamang'une maat Hesbon
Jeremiah48:46 Pwo! Inyee
Jeremiah48:47 Ago aweechi kogeny luulenigap Moab eng' peetuusyek che po let
Jeremiah49:1 Ng'aleegap lagogap Ammon: Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tos ma tinyei Israel weeriik? Ma tinyei ne namei tuguukyik? Amu nee anyun si konam Malkam Gad kobunji

Jeremiah49:3 Waach
Jeremiah49:4 Amu nee anyun si itoroorge eng' atebwosyek
Jeremiah49:5 Ogeero
Jeremiah49:6 Ago ye ibata aweegu kogeny che kigeluul che po lagogap Ammon
Jeremiah49:7 Ng'aleegap Edom: Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko uu ni
Jeremiah49:8 Omwei
Jeremiah49:9 Ngot kobwonjin kayumigap sabibuk
Jeremiah49:10 Ago ki ayai Esau koek ne ma tinyei kiy
Jeremiah49:11 Pagakte lagoguk che ma tinyei kwanisyek

Jeremiah49:24 Kogonyalul Damasko

Jeremiah49:26 Ibutos anyun neranikyik eng' ortinwekyik
Jeremiah49:27 Ak anaam maat eng' irimeetap Damasko
Jeremiah49:28 Ng'aleegap Kedar ak che po pounatosyegap Hasor
Jeremiah49:29 Luulei emaisyekwak ak akwotisyekwak che po keechiirek; ak koluul angookwak kobunji

Jeremiah49:31 Ong'eetyee
Jeremiah49:32 Ak keluul tambeesikwak
Jeremiah49:33 Ak koek Hasor ole menyei lelwek
Jeremiah49:34 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Jeremiah agobo Elam eng' taunetap laitornatetap Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah
Jeremiah49:35 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Keero
Jeremiah49:36 Ak aipchi Elam koriswek ang'wan che punu luukwek ang'wan che po kipsengwet
Jeremiah49:37 Ak agoochi Elam koaragen eng' taitap puunikwak
Jeremiah49:38 ak alum ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet eng' Elam
Jeremiah49:39 Ago aweechi kogeny luulenigap Elam eng' peetuusyek che po let
Jeremiah50:1 Ni ng'olyoot ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maotyot Jeremiah agobo Babilon
Jeremiah50:2 Omwaite eng' pororyosyek ak obarte
Jeremiah50:3 Amu nyoonei pororyet eng' murot kaataam kobookyin
Jeremiah50:4 Pwoonei eng' peetuusyechooto ak eng' peetuunooto
Jeremiah50:5 Teeboti agobo ole teptoi Zion kotokyigei olooto
Jeremiah50:6 Uu piikyuk keechiirek che petyotiin: ki ibeet mestowekwak icheek
Jeremiah50:7 Ki koam icheek piik tugul che kinyoor icheek: ak ki mwa puunikwak kole
Jeremiah50:8 Omwei eng' Babilon
Jeremiah50:9 Amu
Jeremiah50:10 Ak keluul Kaldea: piyang'dos tugul che luulei
Jeremiah50:11 Amu ogasigei
Jeremiah50:12 ililani kamenng'ung' miising': toptoben ineendet ne kisichok: ogeero
Jeremiah50:13 Ma ki menyei amu nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah50:14 Otetkei eng' lugeet obar Babilon
Jeremiah50:15 Owaage eng' komoswek tugul; kagochamdagei; kagoluulyo irimoikyik
Jeremiah50:16 Oiste leetaindet eng' Babilon
Jeremiah50:17 Uu Israel keechiirek che ki koiyesta; ki koon ng'etuunyik ineendet: kisip koam ineendet laitoryatap Assyria; ak eng' let koiri kawekyik Nebukadresar
Jeremiah50:18 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah50:19 Ak aweech Israel kogeny konyo ole agetye
Jeremiah50:20 Ki cheeng'ei tengektap Israel eng' peetuusyechooto ak eng' kenyisyechooto
Jeremiah50:21 Togoste emetap Merataim
Jeremiah50:22 Miitei emet polatetap pooryeet
Jeremiah50:23 Kibetita ano ak koildo ano kiriswetap ng'wony komugul! Ki egundo ano Babilon karaatya eng' pororyosyek!
Jeremiah50:24 Kaariich mesteet agobo inyee
Jeremiah50:25 Kogoyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole konoree kariikyik che po lugeet
Jeremiah50:26 Obwa obargei ak ineendet che obunu kiwotosyek che looen
Jeremiah50:27 Obar kirugikyik tugul; ochoorte koba ole kieng'se: Pwo! Icheek! Amu kagoit peetuunywa
Jeremiah50:28 Kutitap icheek che mweei ak kochililyo komong' eng' emetap Babilon
Jeremiah50:29 Kuur mwogik tugul kobargei ak Babilon
Jeremiah50:30 Ibutos anyun nerenikyik eng' ortinwekyik
Jeremiah50:31 Keero
Jeremiah50:32 Ak koriichkei kobut menotyot
Jeremiah50:33 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Kiusei piigap Israel kobooto lagogap Judah: ak kogiich piik tugul che kiluulei icheek; eesyoi kochunda icheek koba.
Jeremiah50:34 Kiim katyagindennywa; kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek: ng'alaaldochin ineendet icheek komyee
Jeremiah50:35 Mi rotwetap chok paragutap Kaldeik
Jeremiah50:36 Mi rotwetap chok paragutap piik che ichaugei
Jeremiah50:37 Mi rotwetap chok paragutap paraisisyekwak
Jeremiah50:38 Tebee kemeut paragutap ainoosyekyik
Jeremiah50:39 Menyei anyun olooto tyong'igap surkwen kobooto suik
Jeremiah50:40 Ko uu ye kigabui Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Sodom ak Gomorah ak nganasook che kineegite olooto
Jeremiah50:41 Ogeero
Jeremiah50:42 Tinyei kwangok ak ng'otwek; kolgoleen
Jeremiah50:43 Ki kogas laitoryatap Babilon kalasunennywa
Jeremiah50:44 Ogeero
Jeremiah50:45 Ogas anyun kirwoogetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah50:46 Potani ng'wony eng' cheetap lugeet ne kiluule Babilon
Jeremiah51:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah51:2 Ak ayookyi Babilon toek che seesei; kowong' tugul che mi emennyi: amu paregei icheek ak ineendet eng' peetuutap nyalilda kobunu komoswek tugul.
Jeremiah51:3 Amat koriich kwangennyi mwogindet
Jeremiah51:4 Ak kobutyo ko kagobek eng' emetap Kaldeik ko kagetoor eng' ortinwekyik.
Jeremiah51:5 Amu ma kimetoi Israel
Jeremiah51:6 Omwei eng' Babilon
Jeremiah51:7 Ki kigombetap thahabu Babilon eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah51:8 Kagobut Babilon kochaakta
Jeremiah51:9 Kata kimache kisoop Babilon
Jeremiah51:10 Kagomoong' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor imandanyo: obwa
Jeremiah51:11 Olit kipchabonik; onam long'onik komyee: kagong'eet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugulelwegap laitorinigap Medik; amu chobennyi ko kogirinda Babilon
Jeremiah51:12 Onamji parak songolyet
Jeremiah51:13 Ee
Jeremiah51:14 Kagoyosyechigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah51:15 Ki yai ng'wony eng' kamuktaennyi
Jeremiah51:16 ye twek
Jeremiah51:17 Kergeitu chiito age tugul ak tyondo ne ma tinyei naet; ililane kitang'indet age tugul ne po thahabu kanamwennyi ne ki kiwai: amu lembeita kanamwennyi ne ki kitany
Jeremiah51:18 Puch chooto
Jeremiah51:19 Ma uu chuuto kebebertap Jakobo; amu po tai ineendet eng' tuguuk tugul; ak Israel ko pororyetap porotennyi: kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek.
Jeremiah51:20 Inyee ko ii aiywennyu ne po pooryeet
Jeremiah51:21 ak atonatoni eng' inyee paraisiit kobooto chiito ne laanyei;
Jeremiah51:22 ak atonatoni eng' inyee chepkichutitap lugeet kobooto chiito ne laanyei; ak atonatoni eng' inyee muren ak kwony; ak atonatoni eng' inyee poiyo ak neran; ak atonatoni eng' inyee muren ak kobogoryo;
Jeremiah51:23 ak atonatoni eng' inyee mestowot ak akweennyi; ak atonatoni eng' inyee kabatindet kobooto eikyik che po chogit; ak atonatoni eng' inyee pounik ak kiptainik.
Jeremiah51:24 Ak ayaakyini Babilon ak piik tugul che menyei Kaldea
Jeremiah51:25 Keero
Jeremiah51:26 Ak ma ibei eng' inyee koita ne po luuita
Jeremiah51:27 Onamji parak songolyet eng' emet
Jeremiah51:28 Ochop pororyosyek kobargei ak ineendet
Jeremiah51:29 Ak kobotan emet ak komi eng' ng'wanindo: amu tonondos chobutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kichobei agobo Babilon
Jeremiah51:30 Ki kometo pooryeet murenigap Babilon che nyigoonen
Jeremiah51:31 Labati chiito ne kiyooktoi koip paronok kosubi age ne ibei paronok
Jeremiah51:32 kagenam tabarwek
Jeremiah51:33 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Jeremiah51:34 Ki koama Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon
Jeremiah51:35 Mwaei chii ne menyei Zion kole
Jeremiah51:36 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jeremiah51:37 Ak koek Babilon karurugutik
Jeremiah51:38 Porisendos ko uu ng'etuunyik che parnotik; morortos ko uu aaregap ng'etuunyik.
Jeremiah51:39 Ye tinyei tawirenet icheek
Jeremiah51:40 Amutu icheek ko uu aaregap keechiir che pendi ole kieng'see
Jeremiah51:41 Haa
Jeremiah51:42 Kagonyonji nyanjet Babilon: kagotuch ineendet chaang'indap mildaetapkei ne po peekyik.
Jeremiah51:43 Kagoek nganasookyik karaatya
Jeremiah51:44 Arwookyini Bel eng' Babilon
Jeremiah51:45 Omang'une piikyuk
Jeremiah51:46 Among' kotanuiso mugulelwekwok
Jeremiah51:47 Ogeero
Jeremiah51:48 Yeityo kotyen eng' poiboiyet kipsengwet ak ng'wony
Jeremiah51:49 Ko uu ye ki parei `Babilon Israel kobutyo
Jeremiah51:50 Oba okweek
Jeremiah51:51 Kililandosi
Jeremiah51:52 Ogeero
Jeremiah51:53 Agot nda togosta Babilon agoi kipsengwet
Jeremiah51:54 Waagaatap riirek ne punu Babilon
Jeremiah51:55 Amu luulei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Babilon
Jeremiah51:56 amu kagonyonji ineendet luulindet
Jeremiah51:57 Ak agoochini kobogityo pounikyik ak murenikyik che ng'oomen
Jeremiah51:58 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Kigabui irimoik che tebeesen che po Babilon kigeesu
Jeremiah51:59 Ni ng'olyoot ne king'atyi maotyot Jeremiah Seraiah weeriitap Neriah
Jeremiah51:60 Ak ki sirchi Jeremiah bukuit yaityet tugul ne tuun nyoonjin Babilon
Jeremiah51:61 Ak ki leenji Jeremiah Seraiah
Jeremiah51:62 ak ile
Jeremiah51:63 Ak ye kaisoman bukuini igeesu
Jeremiah51:64 ak imwa ile
Jeremiah52:1 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak agenge Zedekiah ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak agenge eng' Jerusalem: ak kainetap kamennyi ko ki Hamutal cheptap Jeremiah ne po Libna.
Jeremiah52:2 Ak ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah52:3 Ak ki piitune tuguuchooto nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jerusalem ak Judah kot kotimda icheek koba eng' tainnyi. Ak ki ingelelji Zedekiah laitoryatap Babilon.
Jeremiah52:4 Ak eng' kenyiitap sogool ne po laitornatennyi
Jeremiah52:5 Koyiem anyun nganaseet agoi kenyiitap taman ak agenge ne po laitoryat Zedekiah.
Jeremiah52:6 King'wanit rubeet eng' nganasanooto eng' arawetap ang'wan eng' peetuutap sogool ne po arawanooto
Jeremiah52:7 Kobut anyun piik irimeetap nganaseet ak ki mwei murenik tugul che po lugeet kemoi kobun ooreetap ormariichet ne ki mi kwenutap inatusyek aeng'
Jeremiah52:8 Ago ki oon lugeetap Kaldeik laitoryat
Jeremiah52:9 Komut anyun laitoryat
Jeremiah52:10 Ak ki par laitoryatap Babilon weeriigap Zedekiah kogeerei ineendet: ki par kogeny pounik tugul che po Judah eng' Ribla.
Jeremiah52:11 Ak ki par konyegap Zedekiah; ak korat laitoryatap Babilon ineendet eng' nyororosyek
Jeremiah52:12 Ak eng' arawetap muut
Jeremiah52:13 ak ki peel kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah52:14 Ak kibut lugeet tugul ne po Kaldeik ne ki mi kobooto kiptaiyatap riibiik
Jeremiah52:15 Yeityo komut koluul Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik piik che kibananook miising'
Jeremiah52:16 Ago ki pagaakta Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik
Jeremiah52:17 Ak kitui Kaldeik tolochigap sugunonik che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jeremiah52:18 Ak ki ip tereenik
Jeremiah52:19 Ak kigombok
Jeremiah52:20 Tolochichooto
Jeremiah52:21 Ago eng' tolochik
Jeremiah52:22 Ak kimi metitap sugunwet paragunnyi; ak kooindap tononetap metoto ko ki mitainik muut che po euut
Jeremiah52:23 Ak kimi logoek tamanwogik sogoolu ak lo komoswekyik; kibogol agenge logoechooto tugul che ki mi karichooto regerotiin eng' komoswek tugul.
Jeremiah52:24 Ak ki imut kiptaiyatap riibiik Seraiah tisiindet ne oo
Jeremiah52:25 Ak ki imut eng' nganaseet kiptaiyat ne ki pou lugeet: ak piik tisap eng' icheek che kigeerei togeetap laitoryat
Jeremiah52:26 Ak ki imut Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik pichooto
Jeremiah52:27 Ak kibir laitoryatap Babilon pichooto
Jeremiah52:28 Chu piik che ki imut Nebukadresar koluul: eng' kenyiitap tisap kogiluul Yahudik eliphuusyek somok ak tiptem ak somok:
Jeremiah52:29 eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po Nebukadresar komut koluul eng' Jerusalem piik pogolwogik sisiit ak sosom ak aeng'.
Jeremiah52:30 Eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak somok ne po Nebukadresar komut Nubusaraden kiptaiyatap riibiik
Jeremiah52:31 Ak eng' kenyiitap sosom ak tisap kobooch ngeluul Jehoiakin laitoryatap Judah
Jeremiah52:32 ak ki ng'alaalji ineendet eng' rireenetapkei
Jeremiah52:33 Ak ki wal ngoroikyik che po korgoreet
Jeremiah52:34 Ak ki igoochi laitoryatap Babilon ineendet kotugul kebebertanyi ne po amitwogik
Lamentations1:1 Kalya si koguber nganaseet ne ki nyiitaat piik! Amu nee si kotebi ko uu kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot
Lamentations1:2 Riirei miising' kemoi
Lamentations1:3 Ki kiluul Judah kwo nyalil
Lamentations1:4 Iteitos ortinwegap Zion
Lamentations1:5 Ki koek `usiikyik kandoik
Lamentations1:6 Kogoistoegei cheptap Zion toroornatennyi tugul; kogoigei pounikyik cheptirgichik che ma tinyei ole agetee. Kogomweiso icheek ama tinyei kimnateet eng' taitap chiito ne oonei.
Lamentations1:7 Ibwaati Jerusalem peetuusyegap nyalilda ak pichiinwekyik. Ibwaati tuguukyik tugul che ki iboiboi ineendet kobooch peetuusyek che po keny. Ibwaati ye ki ibutyin piikyik eutap puunyoot
Lamentations1:8 Ki koyai Jerusalem tengekto ne ya miising'; kogoek anyun kiit ne murwoon amu nooto. Sasei ineendet tugul che ki konyiti ineendet
Lamentations1:9 Ki mi simdanyi ngoroikyik; ma ibwaat kagesunennyi ne po let. Katururgei anyun eng' kwong'eet; ma tinyei kagaigaindet: Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Lamentations1:10 Kogoitoochi puunyoot eunnyi tuguukyik tugul che koboiboitune. Amu kagogeer kole kogochut pororyosyek oldanyi ne tiliil
Lamentations1:11 Tigendos piikyik tugul ye cheeng'ei amitwogik; ki kogoito tuguukwak che korooron si konyoorunee amitwogik che isoobi saboondo: Keero
Lamentations1:12 Tos ma kiy eng' okweek
Lamentations1:13 Ki iyook ineendet maat eng' parak koyookyi kawekyuk
Lamentations1:14 Ki rat eunnyi chogitap pistaosyekyuk; ki konamgei tugul
Lamentations1:15 Ki koyai `Kiptaiyat piik tugul che nyigoonen koek puch eng' kwenunnyu; ki koguurcho tuiyet ne ki king'at kole kotuatui neranikyuk. Ki kotyechatyech `Kiptaiyat pergeiyatap Judah ko uu ye kityechei ole kitue sabibuk.
Lamentations1:16 Ariire anyun agobo tuguuchuuto; saitoi peegap kong' eng' konyekyuk; amu loo eng' anee kagaigaindet ne kata isoobi saboondanyu. Ki koek lagokyuk kibananook
Lamentations1:17 Iitoi Zion eunekyik; ago ma mi chii ne igoigoi ineendet. Ki kong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Jakobo
Lamentations1:18 Po imanda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu ki angelelji ng'atuutyennyi. Asaok ale
Lamentations1:19 Ki aguur chamanikyuk
Lamentations1:20 Keero
Lamentations1:21 Ki kogas icheek ole atigendoi; ma mi chii ne igoigoa. Ki kogas puunikyuk tugul agobo nyalildanyu; poiboi icheek amu ki iyai ko uu nooto. Tuun iibu peetuut ne ki imwaite
Lamentations1:22 Ingobwa taing'ung' yaitwogikwak tugul; ak iyachi icheek
Lamentations2:1 Kalya si kotuge Kiptaiyat cheptap Zion pooldet eng' nereegekyik! Ki kotim karaaranindap Israel eng' kipsengwet konyo ng'wony
Lamentations2:2 Kigong'em Kiptaiyat meng'otosyek tugul che po Jakobo ama riiree. Ki kobut eng' nereegekyik irimoigap cheptap Judah. Ki koturuur icheek kobwa ng'wony eng' kalilanet pounateet ak pounikyik.
Lamentations2:3 Ki kotil kimnateetap Israel eng' nereegekyik che ng'woneen. Ki koweech eunnyi ne po tai konyo eng' taitap puunik. Ki kolal ineendet ko uu maat ne liplibeni eng' Jakobo
Lamentations2:4 Ki koriich kwangennyi ko uu puunyoot
Lamentations2:5 Ki igei Kiptaiyat puunyoot
Lamentations2:6 Ki koisto emainnyi eng' koroomnateet ko uu mbareet
Lamentations2:7 Ki kotiimda Kiptaiyat kaptisisyennyi
Lamentations2:8 Ki kochop Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'em irimeetap cheptap Zion; Ki kokwerto kiit ne kikwaise
Lamentations2:9 Isuwe kobendi ng'wony ormariichokyik; ki ng'em ak koiri temeleiywekyik. Mi laitoryandennyi ak pounikyik kwenutap pororyosyek ole ma mi ng'atuutyet; ma nyooru maotikyik ng'ang'utyet ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Lamentations2:10 Tebyei ng'wony poisyegap cheptap Zion
Lamentations2:11 Ibwandos konyekyuk amu peegap kong'
Lamentations2:12 Riirchin kametwagikwak koleenjin
Lamentations2:13 Abaoryanun aleen nee? Aragenen nee
Lamentations2:14 Ki kogeer maotiguk ng'ang'utik agobo inyee che po tangoita ak perberyo; ak tomo kong'aany kotook tengektong'ung'
Lamentations2:15 Icheek tugul che siirtoi ko iraprapchin eunek; reng'sei ak kolelechi metowekwak agobo cheptap Jerusalem
Lamentations2:16 Puuniguk tugul ko kagoyatyin kutusweekwak; reng'sei ak kosusei kelek; mwaei kole
Lamentations2:17 Ki koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nooto ki kochop; kagoyai ng'olyoondennyi kosulda ko uu ye kiga ng'at eng' peetuusyek che po keny; kagowiirta kwo ng'wony ama riiree; kagogoochi puunyoot koboiboitunenen
Lamentations2:18 Ki riirchi `mugulelwekwak Kiptaiyat: ee irimeetap cheptap Zion! Ingotenden peegap kong' ko uu aineet peet ak kemoi! Amemuuny
Lamentations2:19 Ng'eet
Lamentations2:20 Keero
Lamentations2:21 Ruitos ng'wony murenik ak poisyek eng' ortinwek; kagebar pergeinikyuk ak neranikyuk eng' rotwetap chok; Ki ibar icheek eng' peetuutap nereegeguk
Lamentations2:22 Ki iguur puunikyuk eng' komosta age tugul
Lamentations3:1 Aa chiito ne ki ageer nyalilda eng' nereegek che po kirokto ne po Kamuktaindet.
Lamentations3:2 Ki kondoiywo ak kogeno awendotee mesundeito ama lapkeiyet.
Lamentations3:3 Iman kiitocha eunnyi
Lamentations3:4 Ki koyai poortanyu ak iriryondennyu koosegitu; kigoiri kawekyuk.
Lamentations3:5 Kigong'ota kogirindaa ak koyiemena ng'wanindo ak nyalilda.
Lamentations3:6 Kigogoono atebee mesundeito
Lamentations3:7 Kigong'ota kot koma amuuchi achilil; kigoganapcha nyororosyek che nyigiisen.
Lamentations3:8 Ee
Lamentations3:9 Kigong'ote ortinwekyuk koik che ki kiwai
Lamentations3:10 Uu ineendet magalaluut ne sapchino
Lamentations3:11 Ki komaas ortinwekyuk ak kotonatona; ki koyaa aek chii ne mi ineegei.
Lamentations3:12 Ki koriich kwangennyi ak kondea aek kiit ne kimwogei.
Lamentations3:13 Ki komwogo kochut suennyu kipchabonigap motyennyi.
Lamentations3:14 Ki aegu ne rorechin piik tugul; ak aegu tyendanywa peet komugul.
Lamentations3:15 Kigonyiita ng'wanindo
Lamentations3:16 Ki koirie kelekyuk kibargoinik
Lamentations3:17 Ki iste saboondanyu kolooit eng' kaalyeet; ki autye ale poiboiyo ko nee.
Lamentations3:18 Ara ki amwa ale kagolus kimnateennyu
Lamentations3:19 Kabwaatetap nyalildanyu ak ombenateet
Lamentations3:20 Ibwaati saboondanyu chooto kotugul
Lamentations3:21 Ago abwaati niito
Lamentations3:22 Ki rireenosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kityo si ma kigeswech
Lamentations3:23 Leelachen rireenosyekyik karonet age tugul; oo imandang'ung'.
Lamentations3:24 “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kebebertanyu
Lamentations3:25 Myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' icheeget che igeni ineendet
Lamentations3:26 Myee eng' chii komong' ak kogen eng' muitaet yetunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Lamentations3:27 Myee eng' chii kogesen chogit eng' peetuusyegap ming'inatennyi.
Lamentations3:28 Ingotep ineegei ak kosiis
Lamentations3:29 Ingotoore kutinnyi temburyek; tamangap kobiit kamang'unet.
Lamentations3:30 Ingogoochi matandanyi ineendet ne irabaachi; ak inginyiit ineendet chotisyet.
Lamentations3:31 Amu ma timdoi Kiptaiyat agoi.
Lamentations3:32 Agot nga kon arageneet
Lamentations3:33 Amu ma kwetyin koibu nyalilda
Lamentations3:34 Ye kityechatyechi kimonjororinik tugul che po ng'wony;
Lamentations3:35 ye kimaase chii imaninnyi eng' taitap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'
Lamentations3:36 anan kibeet chii eng' imandanyi
Lamentations3:37 Ng'oo ineendet ne mwaei ak kosulda kioto
Lamentations3:38 Tos ma mang'une kutitap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' yaityet ak myeeindo?
Lamentations3:39 Amu nee anyun si kong'unyng'uny chiito
Lamentations3:40 Ongisyach ak ketyem ortinwekyok
Lamentations3:41 Ongetokyi mugulelwekyok kobooto eunekyok Kamuktaindet ne mi kipsengwet.
Lamentations3:42 Ki kibistoe ak ki kingelelse; ak tomo inyoiywech kaat.
Lamentations3:43 Ki itugegei nereegek ak ioonatech; ki ibarisye ama iriiree.
Lamentations3:44 Ki itugegei pooldet
Lamentations3:45 Ki iyaech keige tugun che kibuktoi kelaktoi ak pusagaryek tugun che ma kiy eng' pororyosyek.
Lamentations3:46 Ki koyatyech kutusweekwak puunikyok tugul.
Lamentations3:47 Kabwanjech kaiyweisyet ak pichiindo
Lamentations3:48 Rootei peekyuk po kong' ko uu ainoosyek
Lamentations3:49 Isururtoe peek konyekyuk che ma siisei
Lamentations3:50 agoi kogeer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Lamentations3:51 Iimi `konyekyuk saboondanyu eng' tuguuk che kiityi tiibiik tugul che po nganasennyu.
Lamentations3:52 Kigoona icheek ko uu toriit
Lamentations3:53 Ki koisto saboondanyu eng' keriinget
Lamentations3:54 Rootei peek kosiirei metinnyu; ki aleen
Lamentations3:55 Ki aguur kaineng'ung'
Lamentations3:56 Ki igas kutinnyu: “Ametiim itiiguk ye ariirchin agobo toreteet
Lamentations3:57 Ki iriigu eng' peetuut ne ki aguurin: ki imwa ile
Lamentations3:58 Ki itononji ng'aleegap muguleldanyu
Lamentations3:59 Ki igeer kanyalilenyu ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Lamentations3:60 Ki igeer yaaktaennywa tugul ne po mugetuut ak chobutikwak tugul che ki chop agobo anee.
Lamentations3:61 Ki igas inyee chotisyennywa
Lamentations3:62 Ki igas kutusweegap icheek che king'eetya ak kabwaatutikwak che ibwaati agobo anee peetuut komugul.
Lamentations3:63 Ye tebyei ng'wony icheek ak ko ng'eetos
Lamentations3:64 Iyaaktochini ng'wony icheek
Lamentations3:65 Igoochini mugulelwekwak kouegitu
Lamentations3:66 Ioonati icheek eng' nereegek
Lamentations4:1 Kalya si komurwoniitu thahabu! Kalya si kowalagiis thahabu che tiliileen miising'! Kagirong' koigap ole-tiliil eng' tabandap ooreet age tugul.
Lamentations4:2 Weeriigap Zion che po kamanuut ne oo ak ko uu thahabu che korooron
Lamentations4:3 Agot lelwek kogoochin aarekwak kinet kochuchun
Lamentations4:4 Yaamjin ng'elyeptap lakweet ne reryei kutinnyi amu melelda; soomei lagok amitwogik
Lamentations4:5 Icheeget che paegei amitwogigap talbisto kemetoi eng' ortinwek; icheeget che kinerta kalaaksetap ngoroik che piriireen ko tebee kapng'atat.
Lamentations4:6 Amu ki koeet piretap piikyuk kosiir kergong'yetap Sodom
Lamentations4:7 Ki tiliileen piikyik che taagunotiin kosiir teluji
Lamentations4:8 Ago eng' ra
Lamentations4:9 Kaigaen icheeget che parei rotwetap chok kosiir icheeget che parei rupeet; che mandoi sabeet mutyo
Lamentations4:10 Ki konam kwonyiik che ki tinyei rireenet lagokwak koyo; ki ek chooto amitwogikwak eng' ng'emisyetap piikyuk.
Lamentations4:11 Ki koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nereegekyik che ng'woneen kosulda
Lamentations4:12 Ki ma koyani laitorinigap ng'wony
Lamentations4:13 Ki piit ko uu niito amu tengekwogigap maotikyik
Lamentations4:14 Ombenioti eng' ortinwek ko uu kipkoratinik
Lamentations4:15 Ki wokyi piik koleenji
Lamentations4:16 Ki koseerseer `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet icheek; ma koiti `Inee icheek kogeny; ma koiti tisiik koek kiy
Lamentations4:17 Kagong'etyo konyekyok kigeni toreteet ne ma kigeere; ki kigen eng' kagenisyet kowelelegei pororyet ne ka ma imuuchi kosar chii.
Lamentations4:18 Ki cheeng' kakwautikyok
Lamentations4:19 Che ki onatech ko ki chepcheben kosiir kipsichinigap parak
Lamentations4:20 Ineendet ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Lamentations4:21 Paibaitu ak igaskei
Lamentations4:22 Piretap tengektong'ung'
Lamentations5:1 Ibwaat anyun
Lamentations5:2 Ki kigoochi porotennyo kiprutoin
Lamentations5:3 Ko keegu piich che ma tinyei sigiik ak che ma tinyei kwan. Kogoigei kametisyekyok mosoogik.
Lamentations5:4 Si ke ee peekyok
Lamentations5:5 Ichegeet che onatech
Lamentations5:6 Ki kigonugei kegoochi toretetap euut Misiri ak Assyria
Lamentations5:7 Ki yai tengek kwanisyekyok ak ma komi; ang'ni anyun kigegesen tengekwogikwak.
Lamentations5:8 Poiywech otwogik; ma mi chii ne sarwech kemang'une eunekwak.
Lamentations5:9 Kindoii saboonwekyok ng'oiyondit si kobiit kenyooru amitwogik
Lamentations5:10 Laldos irireenikyok ko uu ole kilaali amu rubeet ne lalei ne po iljet.
Lamentations5:11 Ki inyaliil `murenik kwonyiik eng' Zion ak konyaliil pergeinik eng' nganasoogap Judah.
Lamentations5:12 Ki igartaat pounik eng' eunekwak; ama nyoor teegisto poisyek.
Lamentations5:13 Kang'etyo neranik koganopi koitap pai
Lamentations5:14 Poisyek che cham komi ormariichet koma komi
Lamentations5:15 Ma komi poiboiyet mugulelwekyok; ki kowalak ureryennyo koek riirek.
Lamentations5:16 Ki kobut kuutweet eng' metowekyok; pwo eng' acheek amu ki keyai tengek.
Lamentations5:17 Amu nooto ko kagonyalulso mugulelwekyok; amu tuguuchuuto ka kagogoryo konyekyok.
Lamentations5:18 Amu tulweetap Zion
Lamentations5:19 Ago inyee
Lamentations5:20 Amu nee anyun si iutyenech agoi? Amu nee si imeteech ne tee noo?

Lamentations5:22 aiya ko ki ieesyech miising'
Ezekiel1:1 Ki ageer ng'ang'utigap Kamuktaindet eng' kenyiitap sosom
Ezekiel1:2 Eng' peetuut ne po muut ne po arawet
Ezekiel1:3 ko ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Ezekiel tisiindet
Ezekiel1:4 Ogeero! Ki ageer usoonetap ropta ne oo komang'une murot kaataam; pooldet ne oo
Ezekiel1:5 Ak ki mang'une kwenunnyi kergeindo ne po tuguuk ang'wan che saptos. Ki uu ni itoondanywa; ki tinyei itoonwek che uu che po chii.
Ezekiel1:6 Ki tinyei age tugul togoochik ang'wan
Ezekiel1:7 Ak ki chuulotin keelyekwak; ak ki uu keldebesaigap keelyekwak siyogap moita: ak ki ilildoi ko uu itoondap sugunwet ne sitaat.
Ezekiel1:8 Ki tinyei eng' kebebaikwak oriit che po komoswekwak ang'wan eunek che uu che po chiito. Ki tinyei icheeget ang'wanu togoochikwak ak kebebaikwak ko uu ni:
Ezekiel1:9 kiga namgei kebebaikwak; ki ma kogusegong' ye kibendi; kiwendi age tugul kogeerei tai.
Ezekiel1:10 Kergeindap togoochikwak ko ki uu ni: ki tinyei age tugul eng' icheek ko ang'wan togeet ne uu ne po chiito
Ezekiel1:11 Kibesyotin togoochikwak ak kebebaikwak eng' ole po parak; kiga namgei kebebaik aeng' eng' age tugul
Ezekiel1:12 Ki wo tai age tugul: ki pa icheek ole kamach muguleldo; ki ma kogusegong' ye kibendi.
Ezekiel1:13 Kergeindap tuguuchooto saptos ko ki uu itoondanywa ng'etetyot
Ezekiel1:14 Ak ki rwaei tuguuchooto saptos ak koweechegei ko uu kakweng'eetap kalyeleet.
Ezekiel1:15 Kingo ta ageere anyun tuguuchooto saptos
Ezekiel1:16 Ki uu itoondap tiroochooto kobooto poisyennywa
Ezekiel1:17 Ye ki pendi kobunei komoswekwak ang'wan: ki ma kogusegong' ye ki pendi.
Ezekiel1:18 Ki torooreen kariik che tyektoe tiroochooto ak ki imuisei; ak ki nyiitootiin koonyek komoswek tugul eng' kariikwak che tyektoe
Ezekiel1:19 Ak ye kingo pa tuguuchooto saptos
Ezekiel1:20 Ki pa ui tugul ole kamach kabuuset; kiwendi kabuuset olooto agine: ak ki kiganapta tiroochooto tuguuchooto; amu kimi kabuusetap kioto sabei
Ezekiel1:21 Kingo pa chuun
Ezekiel1:22 Ak kimi paragutap metitap kioto sabei kergeindap sengwetyet
Ezekiel1:23 Ak ki chuulotin kebebaikwak eng' kurereetap sengwetyet ko katokyigei `age age: ki tinyei age tugul kebebaik aeng' che tuchei komosi
Ezekiel1:24 Ak kingo pendi
Ezekiel1:25 Ak ki piit cheet eng' paragutap sengwetyet ne ki mi paragutap metowekwak: kingo tononso
Ezekiel1:26 Ak kimi paragutap sengwetyet
Ezekiel1:27 Ak ki ageer kiit ne uu itoondap taet
Ezekiel1:28 Ko uu ole teptoi itoondap chepkuinobor eng' poolik eng' peetuutap ropta
Ezekiel2:1 Ak kimwaiwo koleenjo
Ezekiel2:2 Ak ye ki ng'alaalwo ineendet
Ezekiel2:3 Kimwaiwo koleenjo
Ezekiel2:4 Ak ma tinye kalilanet lagok ak ko uueen mugulelwekwak. Kayookten iwe ye mi pichooto
Ezekiel2:5 Agot ngo kas icheek anan koma kas
Ezekiel2:6 Meiywei icheek anyun inyee
Ezekiel2:7 Mwachi icheek ng'aleekyuk
Ezekiel2:8 Ago kas inyee
Ezekiel2:9 Ki ageer anyun
Ezekiel2:10 Ki iito eng' tainnyu; ak ki kisir oriit ak saang'; ak kiga kisirchi yooto kateiyasyek
Ezekiel3:1 Kimwaiwo koleenjo
Ezekiel3:2 Ki ayaat anyun kutinnyu
Ezekiel3:3 Yeityo koleenjo
Ezekiel3:4 Ak ki leenjo
Ezekiel3:5 Amu ma kiyookten iwe ye mi piik che megase ng'aleekwak anan ko che po kutit ne uui
Ezekiel3:6 Ma kiyookten iwe pororyosyek che chaang' che po ng'aleek che teer anan ko che po kutit ne uui
Ezekiel3:7 Ago ma kasin kootap Israel; amu ma machei icheek kogasa; amu uueen metowo ago uueen mugulelwok koot tugul ne po Israel.
Ezekiel3:8 Keero
Ezekiel3:9 Kaayai turyetap togeng'ung' kouiit ko uu koita ne uui kosiir rwandet ne uui; ameiywei pichooto anan itoptoben eng' togoochikwak
Ezekiel3:10 Kimwaiwo ineendet kogeny koleenjo
Ezekiel3:11 Yeityo iwe ole mi che ki kiluul
Ezekiel3:12 Yeityo koganaba kabuusetap Kamuktaindet
Ezekiel3:13 Ak ki agas cheet ne po kebebaigap tuguuchooto saptos ye kitiinyegei
Ezekiel3:14 Koganaba anyun kabuusetap Kamuktaindet
Ezekiel3:15 Ki anyoo ye mi icheek che ki kiluul eng' Tel-abib ye neegitee aineetap Kebar. Ki anyoo ak ki atebee olooto
Ezekiel3:16 Ak kingo kagogeskei peetuusyek tisabu
Ezekiel3:17 Ee weeriitap chii
Ezekiel3:18 Ye amwachi kiptengekyot aleenji
Ezekiel3:19 Ago ngot iteechi kiptengekyot
Ezekiel3:20 Kogeny
Ezekiel3:21 Ago ngot iteechi chiito ne po iman
Ezekiel3:22 Ak kimi paragunnyu eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' olooto; ak ki leenjo
Ezekiel3:23 Ki ang'eet anyun ak awe warenget: ak ogeero
Ezekiel3:24 Kichuta anyun kabuusetap Kamuktaindet
Ezekiel3:25 Ago
Ezekiel3:26 ak ayae ng'eleptang'ung'
Ezekiel3:27 Ak ye ang'alaalun ayaate kuting'ung'

Ezekiel5:1 Ee inyee
Ezekiel5:2 Ak ibeel kebeberta agenge eng' somok eng' kwenutap nganaseet
Ezekiel5:3 Ak inam suumeek che ng'ering'
Ezekiel5:4 Ak inemu alak eng' chuuto kogeny
Ezekiel5:5 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole niito ko Jerusalem: ki ande kwenutap pororyosyek
Ezekiel5:6 Ak ki kongelelji kirwoogutikyuk amu ki yai sogornateet kosiir pororyosyek alak
Ezekiel5:7 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu oo piik che wasegei kosiir pororyosyek che mi komoswekwok

Ezekiel6:10 Ak konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ma amwa puch ale ayachini icheek yaityoni.
