Ezekiel18:9 ne ki kowendote ng'atuutikyuk
Ezekiel18:10 Ngot kosich chiichooto weeriit ne rebindet
Ezekiel18:11 ama yaei age eng' poisyonichuuto
Ezekiel18:12 ne ki koyachi ne ya kibananiat ak ne ma tinyei kiy
Ezekiel18:13 ne ki kogoito tuguuk si konyoorunee kelunet ne siirtoot
Ezekiel18:14 Ara anyun
Ezekiel18:15 ne tomo koamisye tuloonook
Ezekiel18:16 ne tomo koyachi chii age tugul kiy ne ya
Ezekiel18:17 ne kigoisto eunnyi si ma twa kibananiat
Ezekiel18:18 Ago ne uu kwandanyi
Ezekiel18:19 Ago omwae okweek ole
Ezekiel18:20 Meei chiito ne yaei tengekto: ma namei weeriit ng'oogistap kwandanyi
Ezekiel18:21 Ago ngot koweek kiptengekyot kometo tengekwogikyik tugul che ki koyai
Ezekiel18:22 Ma kiityin ineendet agot agenge eng' pistaosyekyik che ki koyai: sabei ineendet eng' imandanyi ne ki koyai.
Ezekiel18:23 Tos abaibai eng' meetap kiptengekyot? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: tos ma abaibai ngo week kometo ooreennyi si kosap?
Ezekiel18:24 Ago ye week ne po iman kometo imandanyi
Ezekiel18:25 Ago omwae ole
Ezekiel18:26 Ye week chiito ne po iman kometo imandanyi
Ezekiel18:27 Kogeny
Ezekiel18:28 Amu ruchin ak kometo pistaosyekyik tugul che ki koyai
Ezekiel18:29 Ago mwaei kootap Israel kole
Ezekiel18:30 Arwookwok anyun
Ezekiel18:31 Omete pistaosyekwok tugul che ki kogoonok obistoe; ak ochopchigei muguleldo ne leel ak sabeet ne leel: amu nee si obegu
Ezekiel18:32 Amu ma abaibai eng' meetap ineendet ne meei
Ezekiel19:1 Riir anyun agobo pounigap Israel
Ezekiel19:2 ak ile
Ezekiel19:3 Ak kibai age eng' aarekyik; kot koeet koek ng'etundo ne neran: ak ki ineetkei logeet
Ezekiel19:4 Ki kas pororyosyek agobo ineendet: ak kiname keriingennywa: ak ki ichuutune kombook agoi emetap Misiri.
Ezekiel19:5 Ak kingo keer kamet kole kigogenis ak ki kobet kamang'unennyi
Ezekiel19:6 Ak kiwendote kwenutap ng'etuunyik ak ki ek ng'etundo ne neran: ak ki ineetkei logeet
Ezekiel19:7 Ak ki nai kooriikwak che po laitorinik
Ezekiel19:8 Ki ibookyi anyun pororyosyek eng' komoswek tugul kobunu emotinwek tugul: ak kiitoochi ineendet mestennywa
Ezekiel19:9 Ak ki inde ineendet korgoreet
Ezekiel19:10 Ki uu kamenng'ung' keetitap sabibuk eng' mbareetap sabibuk eng' korotiguk
Ezekiel19:11 Ak ki tinyei keetiik che kiimeen che po kirokweegap icheek che pounisyei
Ezekiel19:12 Ago ki kitut eng' nereegek che ng'woneen
Ezekiel19:13 Kogeminji anyun surkwen
Ezekiel19:14 Ak kagomisok maat eng' keetiigap mooriikyik
Ezekiel20:1 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po tisap
Ezekiel20:2 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel20:3 Weeriitap chii
Ezekiel20:4 Tos irwookyini icheek
Ezekiel20:5 ak ileenji
Ezekiel20:6 ki ayogoochi eunnyu icheek eng' peetuunooto
Ezekiel20:7 ak ki amwachi icheek aleenji
Ezekiel20:8 Ago ki ingelelja
Ezekiel20:9 Ago ki aboisye amu kainennyu
Ezekiel20:10 Amutu anyun icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri
Ezekiel20:11 Ak ki agoochi icheek ng'atuutikyuk
Ezekiel20:12 Ki agoochi icheek kogeny sabatosyekyuk ak icheek
Ezekiel20:13 Ago ki ingelelja kootap Israel eng' surkwen: ma pendate ng'atuutikyuk
Ezekiel20:14 Ago ki aboisye anyun kainennyu
Ezekiel20:15 Kogeny
Ezekiel20:16 amu ki eesyo kirwoogutikyuk
Ezekiel20:17 Nganda uu nooto
Ezekiel20:18 Ak ki aleenji lagokwak eng' surkwen
Ezekiel20:19 aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'; obendate ng'atuutikyuk
Ezekiel20:20 ak otabaan sabatosyekyuk; si koek kaboorunet eng' kwenunnyo
Ezekiel20:21 Ago ki ingelelja ak icheek lagok; ma pendate ng'atuutikyuk anan koriip kirwoogutikyuk
Ezekiel20:22 Ago ki aiste eunnyu
Ezekiel20:23 Ak ki ang'werere icheek eunnyu eng' surkwen
Ezekiel20:24 amu ma yai kirwoogutikyuk
Ezekiel20:25 Ki agoochi anyun kogeny ng'atuutik che ki ma ko myachen
Ezekiel20:26 ak ki amurwon icheek eng' konunoikwak icheegei
Ezekiel20:27 Nooto anyun
Ezekiel20:28 Amu ye kinga muutu icheek kobwa emet
Ezekiel20:29 Yeityo aleenji icheek
Ezekiel20:30 Mwachi anyun kootap Israel ileenji
Ezekiel20:31 Ak ye ogoitoi kagoochinoikwok
Ezekiel20:32 ak ma piitu agot kitigin nooto obwaati; amu omwae ole
Ezekiel20:33 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Ezekiel20:34 Ak amutwok omong'u eng' pororyosyek
Ezekiel20:35 ak amutwak obwa surkwen ne po pororyosyek
Ezekiel20:36 Ko uu ye ki agere kong' kwanisyekwok eng' surkwen ne po emetap Misiri
Ezekiel20:37 Ak amutak obun kurereetap kirokto
Ezekiel20:38 Ak atiliilok aiste ngelelik eng' kwenung'wong'
Ezekiel20:39 Ago eng' okweek
Ezekiel20:40 Amu tuun ota koot komugul ne po Israel eng' tulweennyu ne tiliil
Ezekiel20:41 Ataachok ko uu nyamdutyet ne anyiny
Ezekiel20:42 Ak onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel20:43 Ak obwaat eng' olooto ortinwekwok ak poisyonikwok tugul
Ezekiel20:44 Ak onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel20:45 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel20:46 Ee
Ezekiel20:47 ak imwachi timdap murot tai
Ezekiel20:48 Ak kogeer piik tugul kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kanaami maata: ma kimisi.
Ezekiel20:49 Amwa anyun ale
Ezekiel21:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel21:2 Ee
Ezekiel21:3 ak ileenji emetap Israel
Ezekiel21:4 Amu aistoi eng' inyee chiito ne po iman ak ne ya
Ezekiel21:5 si konai piik tugul kole
Ezekiel21:6 Tigen anyun
Ezekiel21:7 Ak ye teebenen
Ezekiel21:8 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel21:9 Ee
Ezekiel21:10 kagelit si kobiit kobaris; kagesit si kobiit koigei kalyeleet: tos kiboiboitu anyun? Kirokto ne po weeriinnyu ne sasei keetit age tugul.
Ezekiel21:11 Ak ki kigon si kobiit kesit
Ezekiel21:12 Waach ak ite
Ezekiel21:13 Amu mi tyemisyet; egu nee anyun ngot koma komi kirokto ne sasisyei? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Ezekiel21:14 Maoten anyun inyee weeriitap chii
Ezekiel21:15 Koatokyi rotwetap chok ormariichokwak tugul
Ezekiel21:16 Iyumge
Ezekiel21:17 Arabachi eunekyuk
Ezekiel21:18 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel21:19 Ee
Ezekiel21:20 Lewen ooreet si kobiit koit rotwetap chok Rabbah ne po lagogap Ammon
Ezekiel21:21 Amu ki tonon laitoryatap Babilon eng' ole pesiap oor
Ezekiel21:22 Ki mi eunnyi ne po tai ng'oorset agobo Jerusalem
Ezekiel21:23 Ak egu nooto eng' icheek ng'oorset ne po puch eng' tainnywa
Ezekiel21:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki ogoonu kibwaat yaityeng'wong'
Ezekiel21:25 Ee inyee ne ya
Ezekiel21:26 mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Inemu chepkulet ak ireegu naaryeet: ma koigeitu niito kogeny: ieet nooto ming'in
Ezekiel21:27 Agabui
Ezekiel21:28 Maoten inyee weeriitap chii
Ezekiel21:29 kota kogeerchinin tangoita
Ezekiel21:30 Ker rotwetap chok. Arwoogun eng' ole ki kiyaenen
Ezekiel21:31 Ak aroong'jin nereegekyuk; aguutyinin maatap nereegekyuk: ak andein eunegap piik che uu tyong'ik
Ezekiel21:32 Iegu kweenik che kilaali; kitumjin korotiguk kwenutap emet. Ma kibwaatin kogeny; amu kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito.
Ezekiel22:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Ezekiel22:2 Ee
Ezekiel22:3 Ak imwa ile
Ezekiel22:4 Kanamin ng'oogisto amu korotiguk che kiitumde
Ezekiel22:5 Chotin che neegit kobooto che looen
Ezekiel22:6 Ogeero
Ezekiel22:7 Ki kosas icheek eng' inyee kwanda ak kamet; kigonyalil icheek toek eng' kwenung'ung': ki koyachi ne ya eng' inyee ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget.
Ezekiel22:8 Ki isas tuguukyuk che tiliileen
Ezekiel22:9 Ki kotebee chaamik kwenung'ung' si kotumdoi korotiik: ak kigoamisye tuloonook eng' inyee: ki koyai yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'.
Ezekiel22:10 Ki kong'aany eng' inyee kwanisyekwak kotebee aach ngor: kigosuup eng' kwenung'ung' kwondo ne ki itabaanat eng' peetuusyekyik che po arawet.
Ezekiel22:11 Ak ki koyai age kiit ne kiwechei kobooto osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi
Ezekiel22:12 Kigotaach icheek eng' inyee asoya si kotumda korotiik; ki ip kelunet ne siirtoot ak che tesatiin
Ezekiel22:13 Keer anyuno
Ezekiel22:14 Tos imuuchi komuita muguleldang'ung'
Ezekiel22:15 Ak aseerchin pororyosyek
Ezekiel22:16 Ak imurwongei inyegei
Ezekiel22:17 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Ezekiel22:18 Ee
Ezekiel22:19 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki oegu okweek tugul michikyigek che kigenendoe fedha
Ezekiel22:20 Ko uu ye kiyumjin maat ne oo fedha ak sugunwet ak karnook
Ezekiel22:21 Ee
Ezekiel22:22 Ko uu ye chotoos fedha eng' maat ne oo
Ezekiel22:23 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Ezekiel22:24 Ee
Ezekiel22:25 Miitei kwenunnyi chaamset ne po maotikyik
Ezekiel22:26 Ki kobut tisiikyik ng'atuutyennyu
Ezekiel22:27 Kaigei pounikyik eng' kwenunnyi suik che parisyei; si kotumda korotiik
Ezekiel22:28 Ak ki komalse maotikyik taartaarik che ma myachen
Ezekiel22:29 Kigoboisye piigap emet sastaet
Ezekiel22:30 Ki acheeng' anyun chii eng' kwenunnywa
Ezekiel22:31 Kaaroong'ji anyun nereegekyuk icheek amu nooto; kaagesu eng' maatap nereegekyuk: ki ande ortinwekwak metowekwak
Ezekiel23:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel23:2 Ee
Ezekiel23:3 Ak ki yai icheek kugoinatosyek eng' Misiri; ki yai kugoinatosyek eng' ming'inatennywa: ki kichiil kinaikwak eng' olooto
Ezekiel23:4 Kainaikwak ko ki Oholah
Ezekiel23:5 Ak ki yai Oholah kugoinatet ye kita ko nenyu; ak ki cham miising' chamanikyik
Ezekiel23:6 che ki ilaachi ngoroik che buluu
Ezekiel23:7 Ak ki yai kugoinatosyekyik kobooto icheek
Ezekiel23:8 Ama meto kugoinatosyekyik kobooch peetuusyegap Misiri; amu kiruiyo kobooto ineendet kobooch ming'inatennyi
Ezekiel23:9 Ki ande anyun ineendet eunegap chamanikyik
Ezekiel23:10 Ki ng'aany chuuto ineendet kotep aach ngor: ki imut weeriikyik ak tiibiikyik ak kobar kwonyooto eng' rotwetap chok: ki ek teweerya eng' kwonyiik; amu ki irwookyi ineendet.
Ezekiel23:11 Ak kigeerei niito Oholibah chepkamet
Ezekiel23:12 Ki cham miising' piigap Assyria
Ezekiel23:13 Ak ki ageer ale ki king'wanit; ki isup tuwai ooreet agenge.
Ezekiel23:14 Ak kites kugoinatosyekyik; amu ki keer itoonwegap piik che ki kisirchi inaat
Ezekiel23:15 che kirategei mosibisyek
Ezekiel23:16 Ak kingo keer icheek kocham
Ezekiel23:17 Ak ki pwanji ineendet Babilonik eng' itoogutap chamyet
Ezekiel23:18 Ki ng'aany anyun kugoinatosyekyik
Ezekiel23:19 Ago kites kugoinatosyekyik
Ezekiel23:20 Ak ki cham miising' chamanikyik
Ezekiel23:21 Ibwaat anyun yaityetap ming'inateng'ung'
Ezekiel23:22 Ara anyun
Ezekiel23:23 Babilonik ak Kaldeik tugul
Ezekiel23:24 Ak kobookyin kotinyei kariik
Ezekiel23:25 Ak atokyin ng'etkondanyu
Ezekiel23:26 Ireegunenen kogeny ngoroik
Ezekiel23:27 Ageesu yaityeng'ung' eng' inyee
Ezekiel23:28 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero
Ezekiel23:29 ak kogerin kong' eng' wegeet
Ezekiel23:30 Kiyaun tuguuchuuto
Ezekiel23:31 Ki isup ooreetap chepkomet; nooto anyun andoi kigombennyi eung'ung'.
Ezekiel23:32 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Iee kigombetap chepkomet
Ezekiel23:33 Kinyiitin pogitet ak arageneet
Ezekiel23:34 Iee ichololi
Ezekiel23:35 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki iutyeno
Ezekiel23:36 Kimwaiwo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny
Ezekiel23:37 Amu ki koyai ibeetapkei
Ezekiel23:38 Ki koyaiywo kogeny niito: ki kong'wanit oldanyu ne tiliil eng' peetuunooto
Ezekiel23:39 Amu ye kingo parchi lagokwak kanamonikwak
Ezekiel23:40 Ak kogeny ki oguur piik eng' ole loo: che kiga kiyookyi
Ezekiel23:41 ak ki itebee itoogut ne karaaran
Ezekiel23:42 Ak ki mi ak ineendet eng' yooto tuugeetap tuiyet ne kitalbisi: ak ki kimut eng' surkwen piik alak tugul kobooto kibogitinik; ak ki ilaakyi kariigap eunek icheek tuwai
Ezekiel23:43 Ki amwa anyun agobo ineendet ne ki yai ibeetapkei kobooch keny
Ezekiel23:44 Ak ki ipkei ak ineendet
Ezekiel23:45 Tuun irwookyin piigap iman icheek
Ezekiel23:46 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amutyini icheek tuiyet
Ezekiel23:47 Ak kolach tuiyet icheek eng' koik
Ezekiel23:48 Aistoi anyun ko uu nooto yaityet eng' emet
Ezekiel23:49 Ak kogeerwok ko uu yaityeng'wong'
Ezekiel24:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel24:2 Ee
Ezekiel24:3 Ak imwachi kalewenet koot ne ngelelyot
Ezekiel24:4 inde tuguuk che iyoi
Ezekiel24:5 Kwei keechiirek che myach eng' akweet
Ezekiel24:6 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Pwo! Nganaseet ne po korotiik
Ezekiel24:7 Amu mi korotiikyik kwenunnyi; ki inde rwandet ne ma mi kiy; ma tumji ng'wony
Ezekiel24:8 si kobiit kong'eet nereegek che ng'woneen konyo koyaakta mugetuut
Ezekiel24:9 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Pwo! Nganaseet ne po korotiik! Atese kogeny karurugutyet koeet.
Ezekiel24:10 Nde kweenik che chaang'
Ezekiel24:11 Yeityo igotkot teronooto komi puch eng' maata si kolal
Ezekiel24:12 Aiimigei puch eng' poisyet
Ezekiel24:13 Agot ye ki atiliilin eng' yaityetap simdang'ung'
Ezekiel24:14 Kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito
Ezekiel24:15 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Ezekiel24:16 Ee
Ezekiel24:17 Tigen
Ezekiel24:18 Ki ang'alaalji anyun piik karon; ak kime osotyondennyu koskoleny: ak ki ayai karon ko uu ye kiga king'ata.
Ezekiel24:19 Ak ki leenjo piik
Ezekiel24:20 Ki amwachi anyun aleenji
Ezekiel24:21 Ng'alaalji kootap Israel
Ezekiel24:22 Ak tuun oyae ko uu ye koayai: motuche kutusweekwok
Ezekiel24:23 Ak komi metowekwok angook che otaae
Ezekiel24:24 Egu anyun Ezekiel kaboorunet eng' okweek; oyae ko uu tugul che ki koyai ineendet: ye nyo niito
Ezekiel24:25 Ak inyee
Ezekiel24:26 tos manyonjinin eng' peetuunooto chiichooto chilili
Ezekiel24:27 Eng' peetuunooto
Ezekiel25:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel25:2 Ee
Ezekiel25:3 ak ileenji lagogap Ammon
Ezekiel25:4 keer anyun
Ezekiel25:5 Ak ayai Rabbah koek ole menyei tambeesik
Ezekiel25:6 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki irabrap euneguk
Ezekiel25:7 keer anyun
Ezekiel25:8 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu mwaei Moab ak Seir
Ezekiel25:9 keer anyuno
Ezekiel25:10 ayaatyini piigap kong'asiis
Ezekiel25:11 ak arwookyi Moab; si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Ezekiel25:12 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki koyai ne ya Edom koyaaktochigei mugetuut eng' kootap Judah
Ezekiel25:13 mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Achuule eunnyu atokyini Edom
Ezekiel25:14 Ak ayaakyi mugetuut Edom eng' eutap piik che miitei Israel
Ezekiel25:15 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu kagoyaakta mugetuut Philistiik
Ezekiel25:16 mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero
Ezekiel25:17 Ak ayaakyi icheek mugetuut ne koroom
Ezekiel26:1 Ak eng' kenyiitap taman ak agenge
Ezekiel26:2 Ee
Ezekiel26:3 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero
Ezekiel26:4 Ak kong'em irimoigap Tyro
Ezekiel26:5 Egu nganasanooto ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njireenik
Ezekiel26:6 Ak kebare rotwetap chok tiibiikyik che mi emet: si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Ezekiel26:7 Amu mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero
Ezekiel26:8 Pare rotwetap chok tiibiiguk che mi emet: ak koteech irimoik kotokyin
Ezekiel26:9 Ak konde injinisyek che kibutisye
Ezekiel26:10 Tuchin temburyegap paraisisyekyik amu chaang'indonywa: itumdumegei irimoiguk amu kirgirenetap paraisisyek che laanyei piik
Ezekiel26:11 Tiechei ortinweguk tugul eng' siyoogap paraisisyekyik: parei piiguk eng' rotwetap chok
Ezekiel26:12 Ak koluul mogornatosyeguk
Ezekiel26:13 Ak ageesu cheetap tyenwogiguk; ama kegasei kogeny cheetap ketubosyeguk.
Ezekiel26:14 Ak ayain iegu rwandet ne ma mi kiy: iegu ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njireenik; ma keteechin kogeny
Ezekiel26:15 Mwachin Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Tyro kole: Tos ma potandos ngeguusyek amu cheetap kabuteng'ung'
Ezekiel26:16 Kochoorgei anyun eng' ng'echerokwak che po laitornatet pounik tugul che po nyanjet
Ezekiel26:17 Ak koriiryo agobo inyee
Ezekiel26:18 Tuun potandos anyun ngeguusyek eng' peetuutap kabuteng'ung'; ee
Ezekiel26:19 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ye tuun ayain iegu nganaseet ne karaatya
Ezekiel26:20 achoorten anyun kobooto icheek che choorchingei keriinget
Ezekiel26:21 ayain iegu kamuiset
Ezekiel27:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Ezekiel27:2 Ee inyee
Ezekiel27:3 ak ileenji Tyro
Ezekiel27:4 Mi kiwotosyeguk kwenutap nyanjosyek
Ezekiel27:5 Ki koyai icheek pagoiniguk eng' piribirinik che punu Senir: ki koip taragonik eng' Lebanon si kobiit koyaun toloitap moinget.
Ezekiel27:6 Ki koyai icheek mugangoguk che kiwase peek
Ezekiel27:7 Ki po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kinde lelesta
Ezekiel27:8 Ki kiboitiniguk che po moinget
Ezekiel27:9 Kimenyin poisyegap Gebal kobooto piikyik che ng'oomen che kitimoti ole kaundur: kimi kwenung'ung' melisyek tugul che po nyanjet kobooto kiboitiinikwak si koyai mung'areng'ung'.
Ezekiel27:10 Ki mi lugeng'ung' piigap Persia
Ezekiel27:11 Ki mi piigap Abad kobooto lugeng'ung' irimoiguk parak komoswek tugul
Ezekiel27:12 Ki chemung'araindeng'ung' Tarsis amu chaang'indap mogornatosyek alak tugul; kiyaei mung'aaret eng' fedha
Ezekiel27:13 Ki chemung'arainiguk Javan
Ezekiel27:14 Kiyae mung'aaret icheek che po kootap Togarmah paraisisyegap poisyet
Ezekiel27:15 Ki chemung'arainiguk piigap Dedan: ki ek ole ialdoisye ngeguusyek che chaang': ki alunenen tuguuguk kelegap peeleek ak keetiik che tuuen.
Ezekiel27:16 Ki chemung'araindeng'ung' Syria
Ezekiel27:17 Ki chemung'arainiguk Judah
Ezekiel27:18 Ki chemung'araindeng'ung' Damasko amu chaang'indap tuguugap musoknateng'ung'
Ezekiel27:19 Kiyae mung'aaret Bedan ak Javan tuguuk che punu Usal: kibooto tuguuguk che po mung'aaret
Ezekiel27:20 Ki chemung'araindeng'ung' Dedan eng' ngoroik che kiitoi eng' paraisisyek.
Ezekiel27:21 Ki chemung'arainiguk Arabia
Ezekiel27:22 Chemung'arainigap Sheba ak che po Raamah ko ki chemung'arainiguk: kiyae mung'aaret tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny kosiir tugul
Ezekiel27:23 Haran
Ezekiel27:24 Ki chemung'arainiguk chuuto eng' tuguuk che korooron
Ezekiel27:25 Ki ibei tuguuguk che po mung'aaret melisyegap Tarsis: ak ki itesage
Ezekiel27:26 Ki komutun kiboitiniguk che po moinget inyoo peek che chaang': kiryebin usoonetap kong'asiis eng' kwenutap nyanjosyek.
Ezekiel27:27 Ibutyin kwenutap nyanjosyek mogornatosyeguk
Ezekiel27:28 Potandos kiwotosyek amu waagaatap piiguk che kweryei melisyek.
Ezekiel27:29 Chorugei eng' melisyekwak piik tugul che wasei peek eng' mugangok
Ezekiel27:30 Ak kowaach kot igas
Ezekiel27:31 ak kocher metowekwak amu inyee
Ezekiel27:32 Ak koriirchin eng' kateiyennywa
Ezekiel27:33 Ye kibun tuguuguk che po mung'aaret nyanjosyek
Ezekiel27:34 Eng' peetuut ne ki kiiriin eng' nyanjosyek eng' rirosyek
Ezekiel27:35 Kwong'enen piik tugul che menyei ngeguusyek
Ezekiel27:36 Renyin chemung'arainik che mi pororyosyek; ki iegu kamuiset ama ipiitu agoi.
Ezekiel28:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel28:2 Ee
Ezekiel28:3 keero
Ezekiel28:4 ki isikyigei mogornatosyek eng' utaatyeng'ung' ak naeng'ung'
Ezekiel28:5 ki ites mogornatosyeguk eng' utaatyeng'ung' ne oo ak eng' mung'areng'ung'
Ezekiel28:6 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki iyaige eng' muguleldang'ung' iige Kamuktaindet ne Toroor;
Ezekiel28:7 keer anyun
Ezekiel28:8 Ak kochoorten iwe keriinget; ak imeei eng' meosyegap che ki kibar
Ezekiel28:9 Tos ta imwae eng' taitap ineendet ne parin
Ezekiel28:10 Imee eng' meosyegap che ma kimuratan eng' eutap toek: amu kaamwa ng'olyoondoniito
Ezekiel28:11 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel28:12 Ee
Ezekiel28:13 Ki imi Eden
Ezekiel28:14 Kii kerubindet ne ki kiil ne ki iuurisyei: ak ki andein si itebee tulweet ne tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet; ki iwendote kwenutap koik che po maat.
Ezekiel28:15 Ki igeesunotkei eng' ortinweguk kobooch peetuut ne ki kiyaenen
Ezekiel28:16 Ki inyiitin icheek koroomnateet eng' chaang'indap mung'areng'ung'
Ezekiel28:17 Ki itoroorge eng' muguleldang'ung' amu karaaranindang'ung'
Ezekiel28:18 Ki imurwon oldinweguk che tiliileen eng' chaang'indap tengekwogiguk
Ezekiel28:19 Kwong'enen icheek tugul che ingenin che mi pororyosyek: ki iegu kamuiset
Ezekiel28:20 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel28:21 Ee
Ezekiel28:22 ileenji
Ezekiel28:23 Amu ayookyini ineendet koroito ak korotiik eng' ortinwekyik; ak kobutyo eng' kwenunnyi icheek che kogiguoten
Ezekiel28:24 Eng' kootap Israel koma kobiitu kogeny eng' komoswekwak tugul che sasei icheek ko uu kateet ne rutei ak kotoorei piich
Ezekiel28:25 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ye tuun kaayum kootap Israel komang'une pororyosyek ole kiga kiyestoochi
Ezekiel28:26 Ak komeny olooto eng' chametapkei; ee teechei kooriik
Ezekiel29:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiitap taman
Ezekiel29:2 Ee
Ezekiel29:3 ng'alaal
Ezekiel29:4 Ak andoi kombook tagilgiliguk
Ezekiel29:5 Abagaaktoin ko kagewiirchin surkwen
Ezekiel29:6 Ak konai piik tugul che menyei Misiri kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel29:7 Kingo namin icheek euut

Ezekiel29:9 Ak koguber emetap Misiri ak koek karaita
Ezekiel29:10 Keer anyun
Ezekiel29:11 Ma punei chii olooto
Ezekiel29:12 Ak ayai emetap Misiri koguber eng' kwenutap emotinwek che kuberotin

Ezekiel29:14 ak amutu kogeny piigap Misiri che ki kiluul
Ezekiel29:15 Egu pounateet ne nyeraat eng' tugul; ama kotorooregei kogeny kosiir pororyosyek: ak aming'ini icheek

Ezekiel31:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiit ne po taman ak agenge
Ezekiel31:2 Ee
Ezekiel31:3 Keero
Ezekiel31:4 Kibai peek ineendet
Ezekiel31:5 Kitororit anyun koindonyi kosiir keetiik tugul che po mbar; ak kitesagis mooriikyik
Ezekiel31:6 Ki teech toriitik tugul kesonokwak eng' mooriigap keetoto
Ezekiel31:7 Ki karaaran anyun eng' etunatennyi
Ezekiel31:8 Ma imuuch taragonik che ki mi mbareetap Kamuktaindet kouny ineendet: ki ma ko kergei piribirinik ak mooriikyik; ak ki ma ko kergei keetiik che uu kurinik ak mooriikyik; ak ki ma komi keetit age tugul eng' mbareetap Kamuktaindet ne kergei ak ineendet eng' karaaranindanyi.
Ezekiel31:9 Ki ayai ineendet kogararanit eng' chaang'indap mooriikyik: kot koam ng'etkong' keetiik tugul che po Eden
Ezekiel31:10 Kamwa anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu kiitoroorge eng' koindong'ung'
Ezekiel31:11 andoi ineendet eutap chiito ne kiim ne po pororyosyek; irwookyin iman: ki aoon amu yaityennyi.
Ezekiel31:12 Kigoep ineendet toek che kiywei che po pororyosyek ak kometo: ki kobutyo mooriikyik eng' tuloonook ak eng' atebwosyek tugul
Ezekiel31:13 Menyei toriitik tugul karaitanyi
Ezekiel31:14 si mata kotoroorgei eng' koindonywa keet age tugul eng' keetiik tugul che mi ye neegitee peek
Ezekiel31:15 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Eng' peetuut ne kichoorchigei ye mi che ki kobek ko ki ang'at riirek keriirchi ineendet: ki atuch rireet amu kiteenyo peek che chaang': ak ki ang'at Lebanon koriirchi ineendet
Ezekiel31:16 Ki agoochi pororyosyek kobotanso amu cheetap kabutennyi
Ezekiel31:17 Ki choortagei chooto ak icheek koba ye mi che ki kobek kobooto ineendet
Ezekiel31:18 Ogerge ak ng'oo anyun eng' toroornatet ak etunateet eng' kwenutap keetiigap Eden? Nganda uu nooto kechoortoin kobooto keetiigap Eden iwe ng'wony oriit: irue kwenutap che ma kimuratan

Ezekiel32:4 Si ametochin emet
Ezekiel32:5 Ak ande poortang'ung' tuloonook parak
Ezekiel32:6 Ak abise korotiguk emet ne ibire peek
Ezekiel32:7 Ak ye tuun ageesun atuch kipsengwet

Ezekiel32:21 Ng'alaaljin piik che kiimeen eng' che nyigoonen ineendet

Ezekiel34:22 asaru anyun keechiirekyuk

Ezekiel34:24 Ak aegu anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
Ezekiel34:25 Ak kiyomiskei ak icheek eng' kayomiset ne po kaalyeet

Ezekiel37:3 ak ki leenjo

Ezekiel37:6 Andeok inoik ak alaakwok panyeek ak atugenok iriryot

Ezekiel37:8 Ak ki ageer

Ezekiel37:22 Ak ayai icheek koek pororyet agenge eng' emet
Ezekiel37:23 Ama kong'wanitegei kanamonikwak kogeny
Ezekiel37:24 Ak koek otwogindennyu Daudi laitoryannywa; ak konyoor icheek tugul mestowot agenge: ak kobendatee kirwoogutikyuk ak koriip ng'atuutikyuk ak koyai.
Ezekiel37:25 Ak komeny emet ne ki agoochi Jakobo otwogindennyu
Ezekiel37:26 Ak kiyomiske ak icheek kogeny eng' kayomiset ne po kaalyeet: egu eng' icheek kayomiset ne wendi agoi koigeny: ak alumde icheek

Ezekiel38:6 kobooto Gomer ak lugosyekyik tugul; kobooto kootap Togarmah eng' tabanwek che looen che po murot kaataam
Ezekiel38:7 Choboge
Ezekiel38:8 Kibwonjinin ko kagosiirto peetuusyek che chaang': iite eng' kenyiisyek che po let emet ne ki kiweegune rotwetap chok
Ezekiel38:9 Ak itogosu
Ezekiel38:10 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Pwonjinin kabwaatutik eng' peetuunooto
Ezekiel38:11 ak imwa ile
Ezekiel38:12 si kobiit aluul ak aip parunenik; si kobiit ibar komoswek che ki karatwek che ki menyei nguno
Ezekiel38:13 Teebenen Sheba
Ezekiel38:14 Maoten anyun
Ezekiel38:15 Ak inyoo eng' oldang'ung' eng' tabanwek che looen che po murot kaataam
Ezekiel38:16 ak obwa obargei ak piikyuk Israel
Ezekiel38:17 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tos inyee ne ki amwaite keny eng' otwogikyuk maotigap Israel
Ezekiel38:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Ezekiel38:19 Amu kaamwa eng' ng'etkondanyu ak eng' maatap nereegekyuk
Ezekiel38:20 kot kobotanso eng' tainnyi njireenigap nyanjet
Ezekiel38:21 Ak aguur rotwetap chok kobargei ak ineendet agoi tuloonookyuk tugul
Ezekiel38:22 Agere kong' ineendet eng' koroito ak korotiik; ak ayookyi ineendet kobooto lugosyekyik
Ezekiel38:23 Ak atoroorge
Ezekiel39:1 Ee
Ezekiel39:2 ak awelelin
Ezekiel39:3 ak akwer kwangeng'ung' ne mi eung'ung' ne po kaataam
Ezekiel39:4 Ibutyini tuloonoogap Israel
Ezekiel39:5 Imeechini kewanin: amu kaamwa ng'olyoondoniito
Ezekiel39:6 Ak ayookyi maat Magog
Ezekiel39:7 Ak abarte kainennyu ne tiliil eng' piikyuk Israel; ama achamdoi kainennyu ne tiliil king'wanit kogeny: si konai pororyosyek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel39:8 Keero
Ezekiel39:9 Ak komanda icheek che menyei nganasoogap Israel
Ezekiel39:10 kot koma kobutei icheek kweenik anan koluul keet age tugul eng' osnosyek
Ezekiel39:11 Ak agoochini eng' peetuunooto Gog komosta ne kitupchin eng' Israel
Ezekiel39:12 Ak kotup kootap Israel icheek arawek tisap
Ezekiel39:13 Ee
Ezekiel39:14 Ak kotabaan piik kobunoot emet peetuusyek tugul
Ezekiel39:15 Ak ye punooti icheeget emet
Ezekiel39:16 Ak koek kogeny Hamona kainetap nganaseet. Ianyinyi emet ko uu nooto.
Ezekiel39:17 Ee
Ezekiel39:18 Oam panyeegap che kiimeen
Ezekiel39:19 Ak koam mwanik kot obiyong'se
Ezekiel39:20 Ak obiyong'dosi eng' mesennyu eng' paraisisyek ak kariisyek che po lugeet
Ezekiel39:21 Ak ande toroornatennyu kwenutap pororyosyek ak kogeer pororyosyek tugul kirwoogennyu ne kaayai
Ezekiel39:22 Konai anyun kootap Israel kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
Ezekiel39:23 Ak konai pororyosyek kole ki kiluul kootap Israel amu tengektonywa; amu ki ingelelja
Ezekiel39:24 Ki ayachi icheek ko uu murwoonindanywa ak ko uu pistaosyekwak; ak ki aung'e icheek togeennyu.
Ezekiel39:25 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amutu kogeny che ki kiluul che po Jakobo
Ezekiel39:26 Ak kogesen kalilanennywa
Ezekiel39:27 ye tuun kaamutu icheek kogeny komong' eng' pororyosyek
Ezekiel39:28 Ak konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
Ezekiel39:29 ama aung'e icheek togeennyu kogeny; amu kaaroong'ji Kabuusennyu kootap Israel
Ezekiel40:1 Ki mi paragunnyu eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak muut
Ezekiel40:2 Ki imutwaa eng' ng'ang'utigap Kamuktaindet anyo emetap Israel ak kondea tulweet ne kooi miising'
Ezekiel40:3 Ak ki imutwaa anyo yooto
Ezekiel40:4 Ak ki leenjo chiichooto
Ezekiel40:5 Ak ogeero
Ezekiel40:6 Ki it anyun ormariichet ne tokyingei kong'asiis
Ezekiel40:7 Ak ki ek kooindap koot age tugul ne po oriit tegat agenge
Ezekiel40:8 Ki ikwa kogeny keterut ne po ormariichet ne tokyingei koot
Ezekiel40:9 Yeityo kokwa keterut ne po ormariichet koek mitainik sisiit che po euut; ak ki ek tugatugikyik mitainik aeng' che po euut; ak kitokyingei keterut ne po ormariichet koot.
Ezekiel40:10 Ak ki somok kooriik che ki mi komosi ak komosin che po ormariichet ne kitokyingei kong'asiis; ki aechin tugul ko somok: ak ki aechin tugatugigap komosi ak komosin.
Ezekiel40:11 Ak ki ikwa tebeesindap ole kibunei eng' ormariichet
Ezekiel40:12 ak kimi tegeleiywot taitap koorichooto po oriit
Ezekiel40:13 Ak ki ikwa ormariichet kobooch koot parak ne po koot age agoi koot parak ne po koot age
Ezekiel40:14 Ki ikwa keterut
Ezekiel40:15 Ki ek mitainik konom che po euut kobooch taitap ormariichet ne kibunei kebendi oriit agoi taitap keterut ne po oriit ne po ormariichet.
Ezekiel40:16 Ak ki tinyei koorichooto po oriit tirisyok che regerotiin
Ezekiel40:17 Ki kimutwaa anyun anyo seremut ne ki mong'jin
Ezekiel40:18 Ki mi komoswek che ki kimal ole neegitee ormariichok
Ezekiel40:19 Yeityo kokwa tebeesindo kobooch ormariichet ne tabanu ng'wony
Ezekiel40:20 Ak ki ikwa koindo ak tebeesindo ne po ormariichetap seremut ne ki mong'jin ne tokyingei murot kaataam.
Ezekiel40:21 Ak kimi kooriikyik somogu che po oriit komosi ak komosin; ki aechin kakwautigap tugatugikyik kobooto che po keterunnyi
Ezekiel40:22 Ak ki aechin kakwautigap tirisyokyik
Ezekiel40:23 Ak kimi ormariichet ne kebunei kebendi seremut ne po oriit ne kitokyingei ormariichet ne po murot kaataam ak kimi ormariichet ne kitokyingei ormariichet ne po kong'asiis; ak ki ikwa kong'etee ormariichet age agoi ormariichet age
Ezekiel40:24 Ak ki imuta atokyigei murot tai
Ezekiel40:25 Ak ki tinyei tirisyok ormariichanooto kobooto keterunnyi eng' komoswek tugul che uu tirisyochu kabo tai: ki mitainik konom che po euut koindo
Ezekiel40:26 Ak kimi lang'eiywot ne tinyei tuguuk tisap che kityegoti
Ezekiel40:27 Ak kimi ormariichet ne kebunei kebendi seremut ne po oriit ne tokyingei murot tai: ak ki ikwa kong'etee ormariichet age agoi ormariichet age kotokyigei murot tai
Ezekiel40:28 Ki imutwaa anyun agoi seremut ne po oriit abune ormariichet ne po murot tai: ak ki ikwa ormariichet ne po murot tai ko uu mitainik chu kabo tai;
Ezekiel40:29 kobooto kooriikyik che po oriit
Ezekiel40:30 Ak kimi keterut komoswek tugul
Ezekiel40:31 Ak kitokyingei keterunnyi seremut ne po saang'; ak kimi itoonwegap tiironigap sosik tugatugikyik: ak ki tinyei lang'eiywot tuguuk sisiit che kityegoti ketogostoi.
Ezekiel40:32 Ak ki imutwaa anyo seremut ne po oriit ne tokyingei kong'asiis: ak ki ikwa ormariichet ko uu mitainik chu kabo tai;
Ezekiel40:33 kobooto kooriikyik che po oriit
Ezekiel40:34 Ak kitokyingei keterunnyi seremut ne sip kemong'jin; ak kimi itoonwegap tiironigap sosik tugatugikyik eng' komosi ak komosin: ak ki tinyei lang'eiywot tuguuk sisiit che kityegoti ketogostoi.
Ezekiel40:35 Ak ki imutwaa anyo ormariichet ne po murot kaataam: ak ki ikwa ko uu mitainik chu kabo tai;
Ezekiel40:36 kobooto kooriikyik che po oriit
Ezekiel40:37 Ak kitokyingei tugatugikyik seremut ne sip kemong'jin; ak ki tinyei tugatugichooto itoonwegap tiironigap sosik eng' komosi ak komosin
Ezekiel40:38 Ak kimi koot ne po oriit kobooto kurgennyi ye neegitee tugatugigap ormariichok; ki kiuune yooto kagoochinet ne kibeelei.
Ezekiel40:39 Ak kimi ye neegitee keterutap ormariichet
Ezekiel40:40 Ak kimi mesosyek aeng'u eng' komosta age eng' ole po saang' eng' ole kitogostoe kebendi ormariichet ne tokyingei murot kaataam; ak kimi mesosyek aeng'u komosta age che ki po keterut ne po ormariichet.
Ezekiel40:41 Ki mi mesosyek ang'wanu komosi
Ezekiel40:42 Ak kimi mesosyek ang'wanu
Ezekiel40:43 Ak ki kiratyi kombook komoswek tugul
Ezekiel40:44 Ak kimi saang'utap ormariichet ne po oriit kooriik che po oriit che po tyeniik eng' seremut ne po oriit
Ezekiel40:45 Ak kimwaiwo koleenjo
Ezekiel40:46 Ak po koot ne tokyingei murot kaataam tisiik che tononjin riipseetap kaptisisyet: chuuto ko weeriitap Zadok
Ezekiel40:47 Ak ki ikwa seremut
Ezekiel40:48 Ki imutwaa anyun anyo keterutap koot
Ezekiel40:49 Ki ek mitainik tiptem che po euut kooindap keterut
Ezekiel41:1 Yeityo komutwaa anyo Hekaluut
Ezekiel41:2 Ak ki mitainik taman che po euut tebeesindap ole kibunei kebendi oriit; ak komoswegap ole kibunei kebendi oriit ko ki mitainik muut che po euut eng' komosi
Ezekiel41:3 Ki wo anyun ineendet oriit
Ezekiel41:4 Ak ki ikwa koindonyi
Ezekiel41:5 Yeityo kokwa inaatutap koot
Ezekiel41:6 Ak kimitoti kooriik che ki kiyap koba parak konyil somok
Ezekiel41:7 Ak kitesagis koorchooto ki kiyap kobaraitu koba parak; ko uu ye kiyiem koot kotes koba parak; amu ye kiyiemei koot ko kitesak koba parak eng' komoswek tugul che po koot: kitesak anyun tebeesindap koot kwo parak; ki imuuchi chii kotogosta kong'etee koot ne tabanu ng'wony agoi koot ne tabanu parak kobunei koot ne po kween.
Ezekiel41:8 Ki ageer kogeny ale tinyei koot ole sutot eng' komoswekyik: kiyamegei lumeiywek che po kooriik che mi inaat ak tegat ne po mitainik lo che po euut.
Ezekiel41:9 Ki mitainik muut che po euut nyigiisindap inaatut ne po kooriik che mi inaat che tabanu saang'; ak ole kiga ng'et ko ki ye mi kooriik che po inaat che ki po koot.
Ezekiel41:10 Ak ki mitainik tiptem che po euut tebeesindo ne po kwenutap koorchooto mengeechen
Ezekiel41:11 Ak kitokyingei kurgotigap koorchooto po kween ole kiga ng'et
Ezekiel41:12 Ak ki mitainik tamanwogik tisap che po euut tebeesindap koot ne kitokyindos ak komosta ne ki mi taban eng' komosta ne tokyingei cherongo; ak ki mitainik muut che po euut nyigiisindap inaatutap koot eng' komoswek tugul
Ezekiel41:13 Kikwa anyun koot
Ezekiel41:14 ak ki ek mitainik pogol che po euut tebeesindap togeetap koot
Ezekiel41:15 Ak ki ikwa kooindap koot ne kitokyindos ak komosta ne ki mi taban
Ezekiel41:16 kobooto tugatugik
Ezekiel41:17 agoi kurgeet parak
Ezekiel41:18 Ki kiwai itoonwegap kerubik ak che po tiironigap sosik; ak kiga rubatkei tiironigap sosik ak kerubisyek; ak ki tinyei itoondo age tugul ne po kerubit togoochik aeng';
Ezekiel41:19 kitokyingei anyun togeet ne uu ne po chiito tiiret age
Ezekiel41:20 Kiga kiyai itoonwegap kerubisyek ak che po tiironigap sosik kong'etee ng'wony agoi paragutap kurgeet: ki uu nooto anyun inaatutap Hekaluut.
Ezekiel41:21 Ki tinyei koryosyek ang'wan tugatugigap kurgeetap Hekaluut; ak ki uu togeetap ole-tiliil itoondap Hekaluut.
Ezekiel41:22 Ki po keetiik kapkorosuut
Ezekiel41:23 Ak ki tinyei Hekaluut ak ole-tiliil kereiywek aeng' che po kurgotik.
Ezekiel41:24 Ak ki tinyei kereiywot age tugul kebeberwek aeng'
Ezekiel41:25 Ak ki kiwachi kereiywechooto po Hekaluut itoonwegap kerubisyek ak che po tiironigap sosik
Ezekiel41:26 Ak ki mi tirisyok che regerotiin ak itoonwegap tiironigap sosik eng' komosi ak komosin
Ezekiel42:1 Ki imutwaa anyun anyo seremut ne sip kemong'jin
Ezekiel42:2 Ki mitainik pogol agenge che po euut kooindap kooriik che ki mi murot kaataam
Ezekiel42:3 Ki mi komoswek aeng'u che ki kibendote che kiitoorchindos
Ezekiel42:4 Ak kimi taitap koorichooto ole ki kibunoti
Ezekiel42:5 Ki nwagen anyun kooriik che kitabanu parak; amu ki ibe poroindo komoswek che ki kibendote
Ezekiel42:6 Amu kimitoti kooriik che ki kiyap koba parak
Ezekiel42:7 Ki mitainik konom kooindap tooteet ne kitabanu saang' ole neegitee koorchooto mengeechen
Ezekiel42:8 Amu ki mitainik konom che po euut kooindap koorchooto kimi seremut ne sip kemong'jin: ak ogeero
Ezekiel42:9 Ak kimi kurgeet eng' kurereetap koorchooto mengeechen
Ezekiel42:10 Ki mi kooriik che mengeechen tooteet oriit ne po seremut ne tokyingei kong'asiis
Ezekiel42:11 Ak ki uu ooreet ne ki mi tainnywa kergeindap ooreet ne ki po kooriik che mengeechen che kitokyingei murot kaataam; ki aechin koindonywa ak tebeesindanywa: ak ki uu atebeennywa tugul ak kurgotikwak
Ezekiel42:12 Ak kimi kurgeet ne ki uu kurgotigap kooriik che mengeechen che kitokyingei murot tai
Ezekiel42:13 Ki leenjo anyun
Ezekiel42:14 Ye pa tisiik oriit
Ezekiel42:15 Ak kingo kagogees kakwaetap koot ne po oriit
Ezekiel42:16 Ki ikwae tegat ne kikwaise komostap kong'asiis
Ezekiel42:17 Ki ikwa komostap murot kaataam
Ezekiel42:18 Ki ikwa komostap murot tai
Ezekiel42:19 Kiwelelgei kotokyigei komostap cherongo
Ezekiel42:20 Ki ikwa komoswek ang'wan: ki kiyieme inaatut
Ezekiel43:1 Ye ibata komutwaa anyo ormariichet
Ezekiel43:2 ogeero
Ezekiel43:3 Ak ki uu itoondap liilinooto ng'ang'utyet ne kigageer
Ezekiel43:4 Ak ki nyo ko liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun ooreetap ormariichet ne tokyingei kong'asiis.
Ezekiel43:5 Ak kiganaba Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Ezekiel43:6 Ak ki agas kong'alaalwo chii eng' ko; ak ki tonon chii eng' ye ami.
Ezekiel43:7 Ak ki leenjo
Ezekiel43:8 ye kingo nde tugatukyennywa koriikyi tugatukyennyu
Ezekiel43:9 Ingoisto anyun nguno kugoinatennywa ak muuswegap laitorinikwak
Ezekiel43:10 Ee
Ezekiel43:11 Ak ngot kolilaanso amu tuguuk tugul che ki koyai
Ezekiel43:12 Niito ko ng'atuutyetap koot: egu ne tiliil miising' eng' tulweet parak komoswek tugul ole pooch. Ogeero
Ezekiel43:13 Chu ko kakwautigap kaptisisyet eng' mitainik che po euut: (kakwautyet ko kakwautyet agenge ne po euut ak tebeesindap euut:) egu kelut kakwautyet agenge ne po euut
Ezekiel43:14 Ak egu mitainik aeng' che po euut kobooch ng'wony agoi tegeleiywot ne tabanu ng'wony
Ezekiel43:15 Ak egu mitainik ang'wan che po euut kaptisisyet ole tabanu parak; ak kobooch ole kibeelse eng' kaptisisyet ak kwo parak
Ezekiel43:16 Ak egu kooindap ole kibeelse mitainik taman ak aeng' che po euut
Ezekiel43:17 Ak egu mitainik taman ak ang'wan che po euut
Ezekiel43:18 Ak ki leenjo
Ezekiel43:19 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Ezekiel43:20 Ak itaach korotiikyik
Ezekiel43:21 Ikwerye kogeny kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengekto
Ezekiel43:22 Ak igoite eng' peetuut ne po aeng' kwesta ne libwoop koek kagoochinetap tengekto; yeityo koanyiny icheek kaptisisyet ko uu ye kagagoanyinye kirgit.
Ezekiel43:23 Ye kaigeesu kaanyinyet
Ezekiel43:24 Ak igetu koriik taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel43:25 Ichobe eng' peetuusyek tisap kwesta koek kagoochinetap tengekto: chobei kirgit ne parnotyot kogeny
Ezekiel43:26 Yaei icheek kagaigaet agobo kaptisisyet eng' peetuusyek tisap koanyinyi; itabaani anyun ko uu nooto.
Ezekiel43:27 Ak ye kagobata peetuusyechooto
Ezekiel44:1 Yeityo komutwaa aweek abun ooreetap ormariichet ne sip kemong'jin
Ezekiel44:2 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel44:3 Ago pounindet
Ezekiel44:4 Yeityo komutwaa anyo ooreet ne po ormariichet ne po murot kaataam ne po taitap koot; ak ki ageer
Ezekiel44:5 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel44:6 Ak imwachi ngelelyot
Ezekiel44:7 amu ki omutu kipsagarek
Ezekiel44:8 Ama oriip ng'atuutyetap tuguukyuk che tiliileen: ago ki ondechigei okweegei riibiigap poisyennyu eng' oldanyu ne tiliil.
Ezekiel44:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole ma wendi oldanyu ne tiliil toondet age tugul ne Pororyosyek che ma kimuratan muguleldo ak poorto
Ezekiel44:10 Ago ibei tengektonywa Lawiik che ki koistoenagei kolooegitu
Ezekiel44:11 Ago egu icheek kiboitiinik eng' oldanyu ne tiliil
Ezekiel44:12 Ko uu ye kiboisyechin icheek piik eng' taitap kanamonikwak
Ezekiel44:13 Ama riikyino
Ezekiel44:14 Nganda uu nooto
Ezekiel44:15 Ago pwoonei koriikyino koboisyeiwo tisiik Lawiik
Ezekiel44:16 pendi oldanyu ne tiliil
Ezekiel44:17 Ak ye pa oriit kobun ormariichogap seremut ne po oriit
Ezekiel44:18 Ilaachi chepkuloigap katanit
Ezekiel44:19 Ak ye mandoi kobendi seremut ne sip kemong'jin
Ezekiel44:20 Ma icheru metowekwak
Ezekiel44:21 Ama eei tisiindet age tugul divaik ye wendi seremut ne po oriit.
Ezekiel44:22 Ama ituni mosoogik
Ezekiel44:23 Ak koneet piikyuk koobeesyo che tiliileen ak che ma tiliileen
Ezekiel44:24 Ak korwookyi che ibeligei; korwookyi ko uu kirwoogutikyuk: ak koriip ng'atuutikyuk ak kaneetisyosyekyuk eng' igoorwekyuk tugul che ki king'at; ak kotabaan sabatosyekyuk.
Ezekiel44:25 Ama riikyin muusto si ma ing'wanitkei: ago imuuchi kong'wanitkei amu kwanda anan kamet
Ezekiel44:26 Ak ye kagianyiny
Ezekiel44:27 Ak eng' peetuut ne wendi ole-tiliil
Ezekiel44:28 Ak konyoor poroteet; aa porotennywa: ak mogoochini icheek kiit ne namei kobunji eng' Israel; aa nenywa.
Ezekiel44:29 Amei kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin
Ezekiel44:30 Ak punjin tisiik tongoanik tugul che po tai che po kiy age tugul
Ezekiel44:31 Ma amei tisiik kiy age tugul ne kamee ineegei
Ezekiel45:1 Ak ye opchee emet eng' seretap parbareek koek poroteet
Ezekiel45:2 Punjin kebebertap emonooto komosta ne tiliil ne egu koindo pogol muut
Ezekiel45:3 Ak eng' niito kaikwa
Ezekiel45:4 Nooto ko kebeberta ne tiliil ne po kooret
Ezekiel45:5 Punjin Lawiik kiboitinigap koot
Ezekiel45:6 Ak omarar komosta ne punjin nganaseet koek eliphuusyek muut tebeesindo
Ezekiel45:7 Ak kobunji pounindet emet ne mi komosi ak komosi ne po kagoochinet ne tiliil ak ne po emet ne punjin nganaseet
Ezekiel45:8 Punjin ineendet emonooto eng' Israel. Ama kousei kogeny pounikyuk piikyuk; ago igoochin emet kootap Israel kobee pororyosyekwak.
Ezekiel45:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ingoyamak nooto
Ezekiel45:10 Oboisyee keruutik ak mitainik che po iman.
Ezekiel45:11 Aechin epah ak debeisyek aeng'
Ezekiel45:12 Ak yamei shekel agenge ak gerahisyek tiptem. Shekelisyek muut ko egu shekelisyek muut
Ezekiel45:13 Ni ko kagoochinet ne ogoitoi; kebeberta agenge eng' lo ne po epah eng' homer ne po nganuuk
Ezekiel45:14 Ak kebebertap mwaita ne ki king'at ne po debeisyek aeng' che po mwaita
Ezekiel45:15 kobooto aarwet agenge ne po akweetap keechiirek
Ezekiel45:16 Igoitoi piik tugul che po emet kagoochinoni agobo pounindet eng' Israel.
Ezekiel45:17 Ak koek poisyetap pounindet kagoochinoik che kibeelei
Ezekiel45:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Eng' arawet ne po tai
Ezekiel45:19 Ak konam tisiindet korotiigap kagoochinetap tengekto
Ezekiel45:20 Ak iyai ko uu nooto eng' peetuutap tisap ne po arawet agobo age tugul ne lelei
Ezekiel45:21 Eng' arawet ne po tai eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawanooto
Ezekiel45:22 Ak chobei eng' peetuunooto pounindet kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengekto
Ezekiel45:23 Ak kochopchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' peetuusyek tisap che po igoorto
Ezekiel45:24 Chobei kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin kiloinik taman agobo kirgit age tugul
Ezekiel45:25 Yaei ineendet ko uu niito eng' arawetap tisap
Ezekiel46:1 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kigerei eng' peetuusyek lo che po poisyet ormariichet ne po seremut ne po oriit
Ezekiel46:2 Ak kwo oriit pounindet kobunei ooreet ne po keterut ne po ormariichet ne po saang'
Ezekiel46:3 Ak kosa piigap emet eng' kurgeetap ormariichet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' sabatoisyek
Ezekiel46:4 Ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne igoitoi pounindet kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap sabato
Ezekiel46:5 ak kobooto mengit age tugul ko ibu kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin litainik taman ak tisap ak kebeberyat
Ezekiel46:6 Ak eng' peetuut ne kaleel arawet kigoito kirgit ne libwoop ne parnotyot; ak aarek lo che po keechiir
Ezekiel46:7 Ak agobo kirgit age tugul ak agobo mengit age tugul ko nyolu kochop ineendet litainik taman ak tisap ak kebeberyat che po kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin. Ak agobo che po aarek ko ingochop ko uu ye imuuchi
Ezekiel46:8 Ak ye wendi pounindet oriit
Ezekiel46:9 Ago ye pwa piigap emet taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' igoorwek che ki king'at
Ezekiel46:10 Ak ye pendi oriit
Ezekiel46:11 Ak eng' peetuusyegap igoorwek ak igoorwek che ki king'at
Ezekiel46:12 Ak ye chobei pounindet kagoochinetap chamyet
Ezekiel46:13 Ak ichobe aarwetap keechiir ne libwoop ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuut age tugul: ichobe nooto karonet age tugul.
Ezekiel46:14 Ak ichop kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin kiloinik aeng' eng' karonet age tugul kobooto arwanooto po keechiir ak litaiyat agenge ne po mwaita si keburukto peek che ng'ootiin che tambululeen. Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po agoi ne po kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul.
Ezekiel46:15 Kichobei anyun ko uu nooto aarwetap keechiir
Ezekiel46:16 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ngot kogoochi pounindet kagoochinet age eng' weeriikyik
Ezekiel46:17 Ago ngot kogoochi kebebertap porotennyi age eng' otwogikyik
Ezekiel46:18 Ago ma ibei pounindet poroteetap piik
Ezekiel46:19 Ki imutwaa anyun abun ole kibunei kebendi oriit
Ezekiel46:20 Ak ki leenjo
Ezekiel46:21 Yeityo komutwaa anyun anyo seremut ne sip kemong'jin
Ezekiel46:22 Ki mi seremusyek che mengeechen che ki king'ot eng' luukwechooto ang'wan che po seremut
Ezekiel46:23 Ak ki kiteech inaatut koyiem seremusyechooto ang'wan
Ezekiel46:24 Ki leenjo anyun
Ezekiel47:1 Ak ki imutwaa aweek anyo kurgeetap koot; ak ogeero
Ezekiel47:2 Yeityo komutwaa among' abun ooreetap ormariichet ne tokyingei murot kaataam
Ezekiel47:3 Ye ki wo chiito kotokyigei kong'asiis
Ezekiel47:4 Ki ikwa kogeny eliphuut agenge
Ezekiel47:5 Ye ibata
Ezekiel47:6 Ak koleenjo
Ezekiel47:7 Ye kinga weege anyun
Ezekiel47:8 Ki leenjo anyun
Ezekiel47:9 Ak kosap kiy age tugul ne sabei
Ezekiel47:10 Ak kotononse ngeguut ramiigap njireenik: ak koek ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njireenik kobooch En-gedi agoi En-eglaim; isubi njireenikwak kergeindonywa
Ezekiel47:11 Ago ma ki anyinyi komoswekyik che mi ng'atateek
Ezekiel47:12 Ak kobiit keetit age tugul ne ki amei eng' ngeguutap ainonooto
Ezekiel47:13 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Egu niito kiwoteet
Ezekiel47:14 Punjinok niito
Ezekiel47:15 Ak egu niito kiwotetap emet: eng' komostap murot kaataam
Ezekiel47:16 Hamath
Ezekiel47:17 Ak koek kiwoteet ne punu nyanjetap Mediterenian agoi Hasar-enon ne mi murot kaataam
Ezekiel47:18 Ak egu Jordan kiwotetap kong'asiis
Ezekiel47:19 Egu kiwotetap komostap tai kobooch Tamar agoi peegap Meriboth-kadesh
Ezekiel47:20 Egu kiwotetap cherongo nyanjetap Mediterenian
Ezekiel47:21 Opchechinigei anyun emoniito kobee ortinwegap Israel.
Ezekiel47:22 Opchei anyun eng' seretap parbareek koek poroteng'wong' kobooto toek che kitebee kwenung'wong'
Ezekiel47:23 Ak eng' ooreet age tugul ne katebee toondet
Ezekiel48:1 Chu anyun kainaigap ortinwek: kobooch tabandap murot kaataam
Ezekiel48:2 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Dan kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Asher.
Ezekiel48:3 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Asher
Ezekiel48:4 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Naphtali
Ezekiel48:5 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Manasseh kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Ephraim.
Ezekiel48:6 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Ephraim kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Reuben.
Ezekiel48:7 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Reuben
Ezekiel48:8 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Judah
Ezekiel48:9 Egu kooindap kagoochinet ne ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Ezekiel48:10 Ak punjin icheek
Ezekiel48:11 Punjin nooto tisiik che ki kitabaan eng' weeriitap Zadok
Ezekiel48:12 ak koek nooto eng' icheek kagoochinet ne punu kagoochinetap emet
Ezekiel48:13 Ak nyooru Lawiik kiwoteet ne koindo ko eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut
Ezekiel48:14 Ama aldoi emonooto
Ezekiel48:15 Ak koboisyee piik tugul emet ne kang'et
Ezekiel48:16 ak chu ko kakwautikyik; egu komostap murot kaataam mitainik eliphuusyek aeng' pogol aeng' ak konom
Ezekiel48:17 Ak tinyei nganaseet ole kiyagisye; egu ole tokyingei murot kaataam mitainik pogol agenge ak tiptem
Ezekiel48:18 Ak aechin kooindap ne ng'etu
Ezekiel48:19 Ak kobat emonooto icheek che poisyei eng' nganaseet che punu ortinwek tugul che po Israel.
Ezekiel48:20 Egu kagoochinet komugul kilomita taman ak aeng' ak kebeberyat eng' komoswek tugul ngo koindo
Ezekiel48:21 Ak kobunji pounindet ne ng'etu
Ezekiel48:22 Punjin kogeny pounindet kobooch emetap Lawiik
Ezekiel48:23 Ak eng' ortinwek che ng'etunotiin: kobooch komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Benjamin.
Ezekiel48:24 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Benjamin
Ezekiel48:25 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Simion
Ezekiel48:26 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Issakar kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Zebulun.
Ezekiel48:27 Ak kobooch kebeberta ne po Zebulun
Ezekiel48:28 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Gad
Ezekiel48:29 Niito emet ne opchechini ortinwegap Israel eng' seretap parbareek koek porotennywa
Ezekiel48:30 Ak chu ko ole kimandoe eng' nganaseet; eng' komostap murot kaataam
Ezekiel48:31 Ak kimwaitoe ormariichogap nganaseet kainaigap ortinwegap Israel; tokyingei murot kaataam ormariichok somogu: ormariichetap Reuben
Ezekiel48:32 ak eng' komostap kong'asiis koegu tegat eliphuusyek ang'wan ak pogol muut; ak ormariichok somok: chooto ko ormariichetap Joseph
Ezekiel48:33 Ak eng' komostap murot tai koegu tegat eliphuusyek ang'wan ak pogol muut; ak ormariichok somok: ormariichetap Simion
Ezekiel48:34 eng' komostap cherongo
Ezekiel48:35 Egu tegat eliphuusyek taman ak sisiit komoswek tugul: ak keguure kainetap nganasanooto kobooch peetuunooto
Hosea1:1 Ni ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki nyoonji Hosea weeriitap Beri eng' peetuusyegap Uzziah
Hosea1:2 Ye kingo ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hosea eng' tai
Hosea1:3 Ki wo anyun ak kotun Gomer cheptap Diblaim
Hosea1:4 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet
Hosea1:5 Eng' peetuunooto ko tuun airie kwangetap Israel eng' atebweetap Jezreel.”
Hosea1:6 Ak ki manach kogeny ak kosich chepto. Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet
Hosea1:7 Ago ariiree kootap Judah ak agoochi katerteerisyet icheek kobun eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa. Ma saruunee kwanget
Hosea1:8 Kingo kagolugee Lo-ruhama
Hosea1:9 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Hosea1:10 Ago tenitu piigap Israel ng'aniegap nyanja che ma kimuuchi kirogendoe kiy anan kiit; ak eng' ole ki kimwachine icheeget keele
Hosea1:11 Iyumigei piigap Judah ak piigap Israel
Hosea2:1 Omwachi ng'eetap kametwagikwok oleenji “Piikyuk
Hosea2:2 Oteechi kamenng'ung'
Hosea2:3 Ngo ma noo
Hosea2:4 Ma riiree lagokyik
Hosea2:5 Amu ki yaei kamet kugoinatet; ki yai teweernateet ineendet ne ki manachi icheek. Amu ki mwa kole
Hosea2:6 Nooto anyun
Hosea2:7 Isubi chamanikyik ko uu kotugul
Hosea2:8 Amu ma nai kole anee ne ki agoochini peek
Hosea2:9 Aweechi anyun peekyuk eng' peetuusyegap kesisyet
Hosea2:10 Ang'aanye teweernatennyi eng' taitap chamanikyik
Hosea2:11 Ageesu kogeny poiboiyennyi
Hosea2:12 Ang'eme keetiikyik che po sabibuk ak mogoonikyik
Hosea2:13 Aipchini ineendet pireet agobo peetuusyegap Baalik
Hosea2:14 Nooto anyun
Hosea2:15 Ak agoochi ineendet mbareenikyik che po sabibuk eng' olooto
Hosea2:16 Iguureno eng' peetuunooto “Manong'otyonnyu
Hosea2:17 Amu aistoi kainaigap Baalik eng' kutinnyi ama kibwaati kogeny kainaikwak.
Hosea2:18 Eng' peetuunooto ayae arorutyet agobo icheek kobooto tyong'igap timiin ak toriitigap parak
Hosea2:19 Ak atunin koigeny; ee
Hosea2:20 Achobe atunin eng' imanda; ak inai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Hosea2:21 Ak tuun awolu eng' peetuunooto
Hosea2:22 ak kowolji ng'wony peek
Hosea2:23 Ak agoole ineendet eng' emet; ak ariiree ineendet ne ki ma ki riiree; ak aleenji icheek che ki ma ko piikyuk
Hosea3:1 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Hosea3:2 Ki aal anyun kwonyooto eng' fedhaisyek taman ak muut ak baale che po homer agenge ak nusu.
Hosea3:3 Ak ki aleenji
Hosea3:4 Amu tebyei piigap Israel peetuusyek che chaang' ama tinyei laitoryat
Hosea3:5 Ye ibata koweek piigap Israel ak kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa ak Daudi laitoryandenywa; pwaanjin `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak myeeindonyi eng' kaiyweisyet eng' peetuusyek che po let.
Hosea4:1 Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Hosea4:2 Ma mi kiit age kobatee chubisyet
Hosea4:3 Riirei anyun emet
Hosea4:4 Ago amat kotiiyo chii eng' chooto
Hosea4:5 Ibuti peet
Hosea4:6 Ki keng'em piikyuk amu ma tinyei naet; amu ki ieesye naet
Hosea4:7 Ko uu ye kitesak
Hosea4:8 Paegei icheek tengektap piikyuk
Hosea4:9 Ak kiit ne uu eng' piik
Hosea4:10 Amisyei
Hosea4:11 kugoinatet. Divaik ak divaik che leelach
Hosea4:12 Soomei piikyuk kirwooget eng' keetiik
Hosea4:13 Enyei tiseiywek eng' tuloonook parak
Hosea4:14 Ma pirei tiibiikwok ye yaei kugoinatet
Hosea4:15 Agot ngiyae inyee Israel kugoinatet
Hosea4:16 Ko uu rooryat ne uui met
Hosea4:17 Ki konamgei Ephraim ak kanamonik; pagakte ineegei.
Hosea4:18 Ki komindililitu tuguukwak che eei
Hosea4:19 ki kotuch usoonet ineendet eng' kebebaikyik; ak ililandos amu tiseiywekwak.
Hosea5:1 Ogas niito
Hosea5:2 Ki kotes miising' `pistoik parisyet; ago agere kong' icheek tugul.
Hosea5:3 Angen Ephraim
Hosea5:4 Poisyonikwak koma chamjin icheek koweekyigei Kamuktaindennywa amu tinyei sabeetap kugoinatet
Hosea5:5 Ak paoryani menoteetap Israel eng' tainnyi; ibutos anyun Israel ak Ephraim eng' tengektonywa; ibuti Judah agine kobooto icheek.
Hosea5:6 Pendi icheek kobooto akwotisyekwak che po keechiirek ak che po tuuga kocheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago ma nyooru ineendet
Hosea5:7 Kigoberber `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kigosich lagok che kipsagarek. Amei `arawet ne kaleel icheek kobooto mbareenikwak.
Hosea5:8 Oguut igoondit eng' Gibea
Hosea5:9 Egu karaatya Ephraim eng' peetuutap kereetap kong'; ki abooru eng' kwenutap pororyosyegap Israel kiit ne tuun piitu.
Hosea5:10 Uu pounigap Judah piik che inaktoe kiwoteet. Aroong'jini icheek nereegekyuk ko uu peek.
Hosea5:11 Kisastoe Ephraim
Hosea5:12 Auu anyun eng' Ephraim kiptorotyot
Hosea5:13 Kingo keer Ephraim myandanyi
Hosea5:14 Amu aigeitu ng'etundo eng' Ephraim
Hosea5:15 Aweekyinigei anyun oldanyu
Hosea6:1 “Obwa
Hosea6:2 Isoobech ye ibata peetuusyek aeng'u: ak kong'eeteech eng' peetuut ne po somok
Hosea6:3 Ongenai anyun
Hosea6:4 Ee Ephraim
Hosea6:5 Ki awai anyun icheek eng' maotik; ki abare icheek ng'aleegap kutinnyu: ak uu kirwoogutiguk lapkeiyet ne mong'u.
Hosea6:6 Amu amache rireenetapkei
Hosea6:7 Ago ki kobistoe icheek kayomiset ko uu Adam: ki koberbera eng' olooto.
Hosea6:8 Gilead ko nganaseetap icheek che yaei tengekto
Hosea6:9 Ko uu ye sapchin lugosyegap rebiik chii
Hosea6:10 Ki ageer kiit ne samis eng' kootap Israel: mi kugoinatet
Hosea6:11 Ee Judah
Hosea7:1 Ye kata amache asoop Israel
Hosea7:2 Ama ibwaati eng' mugulelwekwak kole abwaati yaityennywa tugul: yiemei icheek anyun poisyonikwak; mi tainnyu chooto.
Hosea7:3 Iboiboi laitoryat eng' yaityennywa
Hosea7:4 Icheek tugul ko piik che yaei ibeetapkei; uu kapkoima ole ilaali peelindetap magatiinik; ma iywokyin maat kobooch kityo kokwonykwonyi magatyat agoi koguut.
Hosea7:5 Ki eeiso pounik kot kobogityo miising' eng' maiyek eng' peetuutap laitoryannyo; ki chuul eunnyi kobooto chotiik.
Hosea7:6 Amu Ki kochop mugulelwekwak koigei kapkoima
Hosea7:7 Peelei piich icheek tugul ko uu kapkoima ak koamei kirwoogikwak; ki kobutyo laitorinikwak tugul: ma mi eng' icheek ne kuura.
Hosea7:8 Puruchigei Ephraim ak pororyosyek; Ephraim ko magatyat ne ma kiwechwech.
Hosea7:9 Ki koam kipsagarek kimnateennyi ama naei
Hosea7:10 Ak paoryani menoteetap Israel eng' tainnyi: agot ngo uu nooto koma weekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa
Hosea7:11 Uu Ephraim cheptuget ne perber
Hosea7:12 Ye pa
Hosea7:13 Pwo eng' icheek! Amu ki koombeniot kometaa: ingonyonji icheek ng'emisyet! Amu ki kongelelja: agot nganda amache atyach icheek
Hosea7:14 Ama riircho eng' mugulelwekwak
Hosea7:15 Agot nganda ki aneet icheek ak agimiit eunekwak
Hosea7:16 Weektogei
Hosea8:1 Kuut iryageet. Nyoonji kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu kipsiichit: amu ki kobistoe icheek kayomisennyu
Hosea8:2 Tuun riirchino kole
Hosea8:3 Ki kometa Israel kiit ne ki myee: isubi puunyoot ineendet.
Hosea8:4 Ki konde laitorinik
Hosea8:5 Ki kometo moitang'ung'
Hosea8:6 Amu ki punu niito Israel; kiyaei musogindet
Hosea8:7 Amu koolei usoonet
Hosea8:8 Ki kelugui Israel: mi icheek nguno kwenutap pororyosyek ko uu tereet ne ma kotilei kiy.
Hosea8:9 Amu kitogosta koba Assyria
Hosea8:10 Ee
Hosea8:11 Amu ki kotes Ephraim kapkorosusyek si koyae tengekto
Hosea8:12 Agot nda asirchini ineendet ng'atuutikyuk eng' kaneetisyosyek eliphuusyek taman
Hosea8:13 Ye enyei icheek tiseiywegap kagoochinoikyuk
Hosea8:14 Amu kigoutye Israel Yaindennyi
Hosea9:1 Amat ibaibaitu
Hosea9:2 Mabaei icheek rwanyut ne kiboorsee ak ole kitue sabibuk
Hosea9:3 Ma menyei icheek emetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago weekyingei Ephraim Misiri
Hosea9:4 Ma roong'jin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoigap divaik
Hosea9:5 Tos oyae nee eng' peetuutap tuiyet ne ki king'at
Hosea9:6 Ogeero
Hosea9:7 Kagoit peetuusyek che kiitu pireet
Hosea9:8 Ki riibindet Ephraim kobooto Kamuktaindennyu: ago ne uu maotyot
Hosea9:9 Kigong'emgei miising'
Hosea9:10 Ki ageer ale uu Israel sabibuk eng' surkwen; ki ageer kwanisyekwok ale uu tongoaniatap mogoywet eng' kenyinnyi ne po tai: ago ki pwanji Baal-peor
Hosea9:11 Tirireni toroornatetap Ephraim ko uu toriityon: ma piitu sigisyet
Hosea9:12 Agot nganda igui lagokwak
Hosea9:13 Ki kimiinji Ephraim komosta ne karaaran ko uu ye ki ageer Tyro; ago imutyin Ephraim lagokyik parindet.
Hosea9:14 Igoochi
Hosea9:15 Mi yaityennywa tugul Gilgal; amu ki awech icheek eng' olooto: aoone icheek koba eng' koonnyu amu yaityetap poisyonikwak: ma achame kogeny; pistoik pounikwak tugul.
Hosea9:16 Kogibir Ephraim
Hosea9:17 Oone Kamuktaindennyu icheek
Hosea10:1 Israel ko keetitap sabibuk ne tuneni kot
Hosea10:2 Pcheat muguleldanywa; tinyei ng'oogisto: putei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kapkorosusyekwak
Hosea10:3 Mwaei anyun icheek nguno kole ma ki tinyei laitoryat: amu ma kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak imuuchi laitoryat koyaiywech nee?
Hosea10:4 Mwaei icheek ng'aleek che po puch
Hosea10:5 Iyweisyei miising' piik che menyei Samaria amu kanamonigap moegap Beth-aben: amu riirchin piigap emonooto olooto
Hosea10:6 Ki ibei moato kwo Assyria koek kagoochinet ne ki ipchin laitoryat Jareb: nyooru Ephraim teweernateet
Hosea10:7 Ki istoi laitoryatap Samaria
Hosea10:8 King'emei kogeny komoswek che torooreen che po Aben
Hosea10:9 Ee Israel
Hosea10:10 Atigooni icheek ye kamach; ak koyumgei pororyosyek koborye
Hosea10:11 Ephraim ko rooryat ne ki kineet
Hosea10:12 Ogooljigei eng' imanda
Hosea10:13 Ki obat yaityet
Hosea10:14 Piitu anyun wasetapkei eng' piiguk
Hosea10:15 Yaiywok anyun Bethel ko uu nooto amu yaityeng'wong' ne oo: kibarei laitoryatap Israel ko kairir emet.
Hosea11:1 Ki achame Israel kota ko ming'in
Hosea11:2 Kinga testai aguur icheek
Hosea11:3 Ago ki anee ne ki aneet Ephraim kowendot; ki aganabate eng' eunekyuk; ago ki ma nai kole ki asoobi icheek.
Hosea11:4 Ki achuutune icheek poroonigap chii
Hosea11:5 Ma weekyingei ineendet emetap Misiri; ago egu `Assyrianindet laitoryandennyi
Hosea11:6 Ak kobutyi rotwetap chok nganasookyik
Hosea11:7 Kagobegechi piikyuk kochuchuigei kometaa: agot ngo kuurso icheek koguurchi icheek ineendet ne mi parak
Hosea11:8 Amuktoi ano ameteen
Hosea11:9 Ma yae koroomnatetap nereegekyuk
Hosea11:10 Pendoti icheek kosuboti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

Hosea12:2 Ibeligei kogeny Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Judah
Hosea12:3 Ki nam kwaryatap ng'eetap kamet komi moo; ak ki tinyei kimnateet kobooto Kamuktaindet ko kagoeet:
Hosea12:4 ee
Hosea12:5 ineendet Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kainennyi.
Hosea12:6 Iweekyigei anyun Kamuktaindeng'ung': riip rireenet ak kirwooget
Hosea12:7 Chemung'araindet ineendet
Hosea12:8 Ak ki mwa Ephraim kole iman
Hosea12:9 Ago aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobooch emetap Misiri; taagoonin kogeny imeny emaisyek
Hosea12:10 Ki ang'alaalji maotik
Hosea12:11 Tos mi tengek Gilead? Puch piikwak tugul; enyei kiruugik eng' Gilgal: kapkorosusyekwak ko uu koik che kagiruruuch eng' mbar ne ibatat.
Hosea12:12 Ak kimwechi Jakobo emetap Aram
Hosea12:13 Ak ki imoong' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eng' emetap Misiri eng' maotyot
Hosea12:14 Kitagis miising' Ephraim: nooto anyun tebee korotiikyik ineendet
Hosea13:1 Ye kingo ng'alaal Ephraim
Hosea13:2 Ak yaei nguno icheek tengekto kosiir
Hosea13:3 Kergeitu anyun ak poldetap karon
Hosea13:4 Ago
Hosea13:5 Ki ariibin teer eng' surkwen
Hosea13:6 Kibiyong'so ko uu kiit ne ki uu ole ki agete; kibiyong'so
Hosea13:7 Auu anyun eng' icheeget ng'etundo: asapchini eng' ooreet ko uu cheplanget:
Hosea13:8 kituitosi ak icheek ko uu magalaluut ne kagibare aarekyik
Hosea13:9 Ng'emisyeng'ung' niito
Hosea13:10 Mi ano anyun laitoryandeng'ung'
Hosea13:11 Ki agoonin laitoryat eng' nereegekyuk
Hosea13:12 Ratat yaityetap Ephraim
Hosea13:13 Pwaanjin ineendet aragenosyek che po kwondo ne machei kosigiis: ineendet ko weeriit ne ma ng'oom; amu kait peetuut ne ma nyoljin kota kotebee moo.
Hosea13:14 Atyachi icheek komong' eng' kimnateet ne po kererit; asaru icheek eng' meet. Ee meet
Hosea13:15 Agot ngo nyoor perurto ineendet eng' kwenutap tupchosyekyik
Hosea13:16 Ibei Samaria ng'oogistonyi; amu ki kongelelji Kamuktaindennyi: ibutos eng' rotwetap chok; kitonatoni lagokwak
Hosea14:1 Ee Israel
Hosea14:2 Ip ng'aleek
Hosea14:3 Ma sarwech Ashur; ma kilaanye paraisisyek: ama keleenjini kogeny poisyonigap eunekyok
Hosea14:4 Asoobi kachuchugeng'wong' pogei
Hosea14:5 Aigeitu rewoot eng' Israel: yiei ineendet ko uu taapteet ne karaaran
Hosea14:6 Iwaktoi mooriikyik
Hosea14:7 Weeksei icheeget che menyei urwennyi; saptos ko uu peek
Hosea14:8 Tuun mwaei Ephraim kole
Hosea14:9 Ng'oo ne ng'oom
Joel1:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joel weeriitap Pethuel kole
Joel1:2 Ogas ng'olyoondoni
Joel1:3 Omwachi lagokwok agobo niito
Joel1:4 Ki am chereng'endet che kiituuch munene; ak ki am tinapchet che kiituuch chereng'endet; ak ki am masaek che kiituuch tinapchet.
Joel1:5 Kimaini chu! Ong'eetyee ak oriirye; owaakye
Joel1:6 Amu kagobookyi emennyu `pororyet pororyet ne oo ak ko kiim; kelekyik ko kelegap ng'etundo
Joel1:7 Kagong'em ketinnyu ne po sabibuk
Joel1:8 Oteeiye ko uu pergeiyat ne iyuegei kuniet agobo manong'otyotap ming'inatennyi.
Joel1:9 Kageisto kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin ak kagoochinet ne kieei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Riirtos tisiik
Joel1:10 Kagong'emak mbareet
Joel1:11 Olilanse
Joel1:12 Kagoyaam keetitap sabibuk
Joel1:13 Ogermenegei kuniok ak oteeiye
Joel1:14 Otabaan karugutetapkei
Joel1:15 Pwo amu peetuunooto! Amu kagoriik peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joel1:16 Tos ma ki isto amitwogik kegeerei
Joel1:17 Nundos kesweek eng' ng'ung'unyekwak; kagong'emogis chogenik
Joel1:18 Tigendos tyong'ik ne tya! Kaiimgei akwotisyegap tuuga
Joel1:19 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Joel1:20 Ee
Joel2:1 Oguut iryageet eng' Zion
Joel2:2 peetuutap mesundeito ak tuindo
Joel2:3 Amisyei maat eng' tainnywa; ak lalei liplibenetap maat eng' let. Eng' tainnywa ko uu emet mbareetap Eden
Joel2:4 Uu itoondanywa itoondap paraisisyek
Joel2:5 Uu rwaennywa kirgirenetap kariisyegap lugeet rwaei eng' tuloonook parak
Joel2:6 Pichiityin pororyosyek eng' tainnywa
Joel2:7 Ruaei ko uu che nyigoonen; laanyei irimeet ko uu piigap lugeet; wendi age tugul ooreennyi kotokyingei tai
Joel2:8 Ama toortai `age age; wendi age tugul eng' ooreennyi: siarei kariik
Joel2:9 Torombenjin nganaseet; rwaei eng' irimeet; laanyei kobendi kooriik oriit; chutei tirisyok ko uu chooriik.
Joel2:10 Potani emet eng' tainnywa; potandos kipsengwet: imenitu asiista ak arawet
Joel2:11 Ak kotwek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap lugeennyi; amu oo kabuureitanyi; amu kiim ineendet ne yaei ng'olyoondennyi kosulda; amu oo peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak komuisei miising'; ng'oo ne imuuchi komuita?
Joel2:12 Ago mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole oweekyage agot nguno eng' mugulelwekwok tugul
Joel2:13 ak ogereer mugulelwekwok
Joel2:14 Ng'oo ne ingen ngo tos ma week ak kowal kabwaatutikyik
Joel2:15 Oguut iryageet eng' Zion
Joel2:16 oyum piik
Joel2:17 Ingoriiryo tisiik
Joel2:18 Ki am ng'etkong' anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu emennyi
Joel2:19 Ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik koleenji
Joel2:20 ago aistoi kolooit eng' okweek lugeet ne punu murot kaataam
Joel2:21 Ee emoni
Joel2:22 Amoiyweisye
Joel2:23 Ogaaskei anyun
Joel2:24 Ak konyi peek rwanyusyek che kiboorsee
Joel2:25 Ak ageerwok che po kenyiisyek che ki am chereng'endet
Joel2:26 Ak oam che chaang' ak obiyong'se
Joel2:27 Ak onai ole ami kwenutap Israel
Joel2:28 Ak ye ibata chooto
Joel2:29 ak aroong'jini kogeny Kabuusennyu otwogik che murenik ak tiibiik eng' peetuusyechooto.
Joel2:30 Ak abarte kwang'utik eng' kipsengwet ak eng' ng'wony
Joel2:31 Ak koimenit asiista
Joel2:32 Ak tuun kisaru age tugul ne kuurei kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu tuun miitei che chilildos eng' tulweetap Zion ak Jerusalem
Joel3:1 Amu
Joel3:2 ak amut icheek koba atebweetap Jehoshaphat; ak arwookyi icheek eng' olooto amu piikyuk ak amu porotennyu Israel
Joel3:3 Ak kigoseer parbareek agobo piikyuk: ak ki kogoito ng'etet agobo chepkugoniot
Joel3:4 Ee Tyro
Joel3:5 Amu ko uu ye ki oip fedhaisyekyuk ak thahabusyekyuk
Joel3:6 ki oalde kogeny lagogap Judah ak lagogap Jerusalem oaldochi weeriitap Yunanik
Joel3:7 ogeero
Joel3:8 ak aalde weeriikwok ak tiibiikwok koba eutap lagogap Judah
Joel3:9 Omwaite ng'olyoondoni eng' pororyosyek; ochop lugeet: oong'et piik che nyigoonen; ingorik murenik tugul che po lugeet
Joel3:10 Otany mogomboikwok che po tuuga koek rotoogap chok
Joel3:11 Ochogu
Joel3:12 Ingong'eetkei pororyosyek
Joel3:13 Ogese chepkeswet
Joel3:14 Piik che chaang'
Joel3:15 Imenitu asiista ak arawet
Joel3:16 ak pooriseni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Zion
Joel3:17 Onai anyun ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'
Joel3:18 Ak saune peetuunooto divaik che anyiny tuloonook
Joel3:19 Kuberi Misiri
Joel3:20 Ago tebyei Judah koigeny
Joel3:21 Ak aanyiny korotiikwak che tomo aanyiny: amu menyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zion.
Amos1:1 Ng'aleegap Amos
Amos1:2 Ki mwa kole
Amos1:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Damasko amu pistaosyekyik somok
Amos1:4 Ara ayookyini maat kootap Hazael
Amos1:5 Ak airii temeleiywotap Damasko
Amos1:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Gaza amu pistaosyekyik somok
Amos1:7 Ara ayookyini maat irimeetap Gaza
Amos1:8 Aistoi ne menyei Ashdod
Amos1:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Tyro amu pistaosyekyik somok
Amos1:10 Ara ayookyini maat irimeetap Tyro
Amos1:11 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Edom
Amos1:12 Ara ayookyini maat Teman
Amos1:13 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Maawechi pireet ne abire lagogap Ammon amu pistaosyekyik somok
Amos1:14 Ara anaami maat eng' irimeetap Rabbah
Amos1:15 Ak keluul laitoryannywa
Amos2:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Moab amu pistaosyekyik somok
Amos2:2 Ayookyini anyun maat Moab ak kobeel irimosyegap Keryot; ak kome Moab eng' wasetapkei
Amos2:3 Aistoi kirwoogindet eng' kwenunnyi
Amos2:4 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: Amu pistaosyekyik somok
Amos2:5 Ara ayookyini maat Judah ak kobeel irimosyegap Jerusalem.
Amos2:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: Amu pistaosyekyik somok
Amos2:7 Ityorchin metowegap kibananook temburyegap ng'wony
Amos2:8 Eng' ole neegitee kapkorosuut age tugul
Amos2:9 Ago ki abar Amorindet eng' tainnywa
Amos2:10 Ki amutwak kogeny otogosu eng' emetap Misiri
Amos2:11 Ki ande alak eng' weeriikwok koek maotik
Amos2:12 Ago koigoochi Nasiritik divaik koe; ak ong'at maotik oleenji
Amos2:13 Ogeero
Amos2:14 Ak kobetyi chepchebindo che mweei
Amos2:15 Amaimuuchi kotonon ineendet ne namei kwanget
Amos2:16 Ak komwei aach ngor eng' peetuunooto ineendet ne nyigan eng' che nyigoonen
Amos3:1 Ogas ng'olyoondoni kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo okweek
Amos3:2 Okweegei kityo che angen eng' ortinwek tugul che po ng'wony. Nooto anyun aiitwok pireet amu tengekwogikwok tugul.
Amos3:3 Tos pendat piik aeng'u ngot koma kasyindos?
Amos3:4 Tos pooriseni ng'etundo eng' timiin ngo ma par tyondo? Tos pooriseni ng'etundo ne neran eng' kebenennyi ngot koma am kiy?
Amos3:5 Tos ibutyin toriityon mesteet ne mi ng'wony eng' ole ma mi mesteet ne namei ineendet? Tos iwir mesteet ama twa kiy?
Amos3:6 Tos kiguutei iryageet eng' nganaseet
Amos3:7 Iman ma yaei kiy Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotom kong'aang'ji ung'ootyennyi otwogikyik maotik.
Amos3:8 Kagoborisen ng'etundo
Amos3:9 Omwaite eng' kooriigap laitoryat eng' Ashdod
Amos3:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Amos3:11 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Piitu puunyoot ne mi komoswek tugul eng' emet
Amos3:12 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ko uu ye saru mestowot keelyek aeng' anan motwet ne po itit eng' kutitap ng'etundo; kisaru anyun ko uu nooto piigap Israel che tebee Samaria eng' luuitap kiit ne kilyeldoe
Amos3:13 Ogas okweek
Amos3:14 Eng' peetuut ne tuun aiityini pireet Israel amu pistaosyekyik
Amos3:15 Ak abut kootap peetuusyegap kaitityet kobooto ne po peetuusyegap lalang'indo; ak keng'em kooriik che ki kiteege kelegap peeleek
Amos4:1 Ogas ng'olyoondoni
Amos4:2 Ki koyosyo Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tiliilindanyi kole
Amos4:3 Ak omande obun komoswek che kibutok eng' irimeet
Amos4:4 Obwa Bethel
Amos4:5 ak ogoite korosyotap kongoi ne po kiit ne kaginde mermereek
Amos4:6 Ki agoonok agine iljet eng' nganasookwok tugul
Amos4:7 Ak ki aeetenak kogeny ropta
Amos4:8 Koombeniot anyun nganasook aeng'u anan ko somok koba nganaseet age si koe peek
Amos4:9 Ki abirenok chelalityet ak uchatet
Amos4:10 Ki ayookwok koroito ko uu ni ki po Misiri; ki abar murenikwok eng' rotwetap chok
Amos4:11 Ki ang'em ageesu alak eng' okweek
Amos4:12 Ayaun ko uu nooto anyun
Amos4:13 Amu
Amos5:1 Ogas ng'olyoondoni amwae eng' riirek agobo okweek
Amos5:2 Kagobut
Amos5:3 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Nganaseet ne kocham komandoe piik eliphuut kong'etyin pogolu
Amos5:4 Amu mwachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Israel kole: “Ocheeng'a si osapche!
Amos5:5 Amocheeng' Bethel
Amos5:6 Ocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si osapche
Amos5:7 Ee okweek che oweechi kirwooget koek ng'wonet
Amos5:8 Ineendet ne yaei Koremerik ak Kapsomoguk
Amos5:9 ne ipchin che kiimeen ng'emisyet koche
Amos5:10 Wechei icheek ineendet ne kerei kong' eng' ormariichet
Amos5:11 Amu ki otyechatyech kibananook
Amos5:12 Amu angen ole tee chaang'indap pistaosyekwok ak ole tee ooindap tengekwogikwok; okweek che onyalili piik che po iman
Amos5:13 Siisei anyun ne ng'oom eng' peetuusyek che uu chooto; amu yaacheen peetuusyechooto.
Amos5:14 Ocheeng' che myach ak koma yaityet
Amos5:15 Owech yaityet ak ocham che myach
Amos5:16 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Amos5:17 Ak kobiit riirek eng' mbareenik tugul che po sabibuk; amu abune kwenung'ung'
Amos5:18 Pwo eng' okweek che omache peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Amu nee si omache peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Mesundeito peetuunooto
Amos5:19 ko uu ye kamwee `chiito ng'etundo
Amos5:20 Tos ma imenitu peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ama lapkeitu? Ee
Amos5:21 Aweche
Amos5:22 Ee
Amos5:23 Oistoena cheetap tyenwogikwok; amu ma mache agas anyinyindap kibugandinikwok.
Amos5:24 Ago ingoroot kirwooget ko uu peek
Amos5:25 Ee kootap Israel
Amos5:26 Ee
Amos5:27 Agoitook anyun keluulok
Amos6:1 Pwo eng' icheek che mi kaalyeet eng' Zion
Amos6:2 Osiirte oba Kalne
Amos6:3 Okweek che oistoi kolooit peetuut ne ya
Amos6:4 Pwo eng' icheek che ruitos eng' itogusyek che po kelegap peeleek
Amos6:5 icheek che tyeni tyenwogik che po puch eng' cheetap kibugandet; che chopchingei tuguuk che po tyenwogik
Amos6:6 che eei divaik eng' pagulisyek
Amos6:7 Egu anyun icheek che tai kondoe che kiluulei
Amos6:8 Ki koyosyechigei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Amos6:9 Ak ngot kong'et piik tamanu eng' koot agenge
Amos6:10 Ak ye sut chii `imamet
Amos6:11 Amu
Amos6:12 Tos rwaei paraisisyek eng' rwandet? Tos ibate `chii eik olooto? Ko owal kirwooget koek kiit ne ng'waan
Amos6:13 Okweek che oboiboitune kiit ne po puch
Amos6:14 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Amos7:1 Ki iboorwo Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: ogeero
Amos7:2 Ak ye kingo kagoam susweek kogees eng' emet
Amos7:3 Ki wal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutikyik agobo niito; kole “Ma piitu ko uu nooto
Amos7:4 Ki iboorwo Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: kiguur Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maat kobeelisye; ak ki peel rireet ne oo ak konam kobeel emet.
Amos7:5 Yeityo amwa ale
Amos7:6 Ki wal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutikyik agobo niito; “Ma piitu niito agine
Amos7:7 Ki iboorwo ineendet ko uu ni: ogeero
Amos7:8 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Amos7:9 ak koguber komoswek che torooreen che po Isak
Amos7:10 Ki iyookto anyun tisiindet Amasia ne po Bethel keguur Jeroboam laitoryatap Israel
Amos7:11 Amu mwaei Amos kole
Amos7:12 Ki leenji kogeny `Amasia Amos
Amos7:13 ago mat kota imaoten kogeny eng' Bethel
Amos7:14 Ki wolji anyun `Amos Amasia
Amos7:15 Ki kuura Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ayagisyei
Amos7:16 Kas anyun nguno ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Imwae inyee ile
Amos7:17 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Egu osotyondeng'ung' chepkugoniot eng' nganaseet
Amos8:1 Ki iboorwo Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: Ki mi kitongetap logoek che po kemeut.
Amos8:2 Ak ki leenjo
Amos8:3 Ak koek tyenwogik che po Hekaluut kateiyosyek eng' peetuunooto
Amos8:4 Ogas ng'olyoondoni
Amos8:5 oleen
Amos8:6 kole si kobiit keale kibananook fedha
Amos8:7 Kogoyosyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' telunatetap Jakobo
Amos8:8 Tos ma potani emet amu niito
Amos8:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Amos8:10 Awale igoorwekwok koek riirek
Amos8:11 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Amos8:12 Ak koombeniot kong'etee nyanjet age agoi nyanjet age
Amos8:13 Eng' peetuunooto ko tuun tanuitos pergeinik che korooron ak murenik
Amos8:14 Icheeget che iyastos eng' tengektap Samaria
Amos9:1 Ki ageer Kiptaiyat kotonone ole neegitee kaptisisyet
Amos9:2 Agot ngo pal agoi ye mi che ki kobek
Amos9:3 Agot ngo ung'egei tulweetap Karmel parak
Amos9:4 Agot ngo luul puunikwak
Amos9:5 Amu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Amos9:6 Ineendet ne teechei kooriikyik eng' kipsengwet
Amos9:7 Tos mou lagogap Ethiopik eng' anee
Amos9:8 Keerei konyegap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pounateet ne tinyei tengekto
Amos9:9 Amu
Amos9:10 Pegu eng' rotwetap chok kiptengeginik tugul che po piikyuk
Amos9:11 Ang'eeti eng' peetuunooto emaitap Daudi ne ki kobut
Amos9:12 Si kobiit konam `icheek piik che ki ng'et che po Edom
Amos9:13 Ogeero
Amos9:14 Ak amutu kogeny piikyuk Israel che kiga keluul
Amos9:15 Ak amin icheek eng' emennywa
Obadiah1:1 Ng'ang'utyetap Obadiah. Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni agobo Edom: Ki kegas ng'aleek che punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Obadiah1:2 Keero
Obadiah1:3 Ki koberberin menoteetap muguleldang'ung'
Obadiah1:4 Agot ngitiriren iwe parak miising' ko uu kipsiichit
Obadiah1:5 Ngot kobwonjin chooriik
Obadiah1:6 Kisiaktoi ano tuguugap Esau! Kicheeng'doi ano konoraikyik che ung'ootiin!
Obadiah1:7 Ki kong'aalin che ki onamegei tugul
Obadiah1:8 Eng' peetuunooto
Obadiah1:9 Ak toptobendos mureniguk che nyigoonen
Obadiah1:10 Tuchin teweernateet amu koroomnateet ne ki iyachi ng'eetap kamenng'ung' Jakobo
Obadiah1:11 Eng' peetuut ne ki itononi eng' pitoniin
Obadiah1:12 Ago amat igeer peetuutap ng'eetap kamenng'ung' eng' peetuutap tiritindanyi
Obadiah1:13 Amechut ormariichetap piikyuk eng' peetuutap nyalildanywa; ee
Obadiah1:14 Ametonone ole tuiyechin ortinwek
Obadiah1:15 Amu kariikyi `peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyek tugul. Ko uu ye ki iyai
Obadiah1:16 Amu ko uu ye ki oeisee eng' tulweennyu ne tiliil
Obadiah1:17 Ago piitu che chilildos eng' tulweetap Zion
Obadiah1:18 Ak koek kootap Jakobo maat
Obadiah1:19 Ak konam icheek che po murot tai tulweetap Esau kobunji; ak konam icheek che menyei emet ne soi ne po Philistiik; ak konam emetap Ephraim ak emetap Samaria kobunji
Obadiah1:20 Ak konam che kiga keluul che po lugoniito po piigap Israel che mi kwenutap Kanaanik
Obadiah1:21 Ak togosu `saruunik tulweetap Zion korwookyi tulweetap Esau; ak kobunji pounateet `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Jonah1:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jona weeriitap Amitai
Jonah1:2 “Ng'eet
Jonah1:3 Ago king'eet Jona koleen komwechi Tarsis komwee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki choortagei kwo Joppa ak konyoor meeliit ne wendi Tarsis. Ki igoito anyun tuguuk che yamegei ak panda ak kolaany meeliit kobooto alak kole koba tugul Tarsis
Jonah1:4 Ago ki iyookyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyanjet usoonet ne oo
Jonah1:5 Ki iyweis anyun kiboitinigap meeliit
Jonah1:6 Ki wo anyun kiptaiyatap moinget ole mi ineendet ak koleenji
Jonah1:7 Ak ki leenjigei kiboitinigap moinget
Jonah1:8 Ki mwachi anyun ineendet koleenji
Jonah1:9 Ak ki leenji icheek
Jonah1:10 Ki iyweis anyun piik miising'
Jonah1:11 koteebee anyun pichooto ineendet koleenji
Jonah1:12 Ak ki leenji icheek
Jonah1:13 Ago ki was `pichooto peek eng' kimnateet koleen kokweri meeliit koweek kwo ngeguut; ago ma imuuch
Jonah1:14 Ki riirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji
Jonah1:15 Koganap anyun Jona ak kowiirchi nyanjet; ak kosiis anyun nyanjet eng' wasetapkei.
Jonah1:16 Koiywei anyun pichooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising'
Jonah1:17 Ak ki chop `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor njiryot ne oo si kobiit kolugui Jona; ak ki tebee `Jona moetap njiryot peetuusyek somok ak kemousyek somok.
Jonah2:1 Ki sa anyun `Jona Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi komi `moetap njiryot
Jonah2:2 Ak ki le
Jonah2:3 Ki iwiircha rireet
Jonah2:4 Ki amwa ale
Jonah2:5 Ki yiema peek
Jonah2:6 Ki achoortegei agoi kelusyegap tuloonook; ki rata ng'wony kobooto temeleiywekyik agoi. Ago ki imutu kora saboondanyu komong' eng' keriinget
Jonah2:7 Ye ki tanui saboondanyu
Jonah2:8 Icheek che isubi atebosyek che ma nyolu che po lembech
Jonah2:9 Ago kobooto mwaetap kongoi aeng'un tiseiywot; che ki aaroorun ayaagun. Po `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetunet!”
Jonah2:10 Ak ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor njiryot
Jonah3:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jona ne po aeng'
Jonah3:2 “Ng'eet
Jonah3:3 Kong'eet anyun Jona kwo Nineveh
Jonah3:4 Ak ki toi Jona kochut nganaseet eng' pandap peetuut agenge
Jonah3:5 Ak ki iyan `piigap Nineveh Kamuktaindet; ak ki mwaita karugutetapkei
Jonah3:6 Ye kingo it ng'aleek kaplaitoryatap Nineveh
Jonah3:7 Ak ki mwaita kibarasta eng' Nineveh komugul keele
Jonah3:8 Ago ingetuge icheek tugul kuniok
Jonah3:9 Ng'oo ne ingen? Imuuch koweek Kamuktaindet ak kowal kabwaatutikyik
Jonah3:10 Kingo keer Kamuktaindet poisyonikwak
Jonah4:1 Ago ki ma ibaibai Jona ng'olyoondonooto agot kitigin
Jonah4:2 Ki sa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Jonah4:3 Ara anyun
Jonah4:4 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Jonah4:5 Ki wo anyun Jona saang'utap nganaseet ak kotep ng'wony eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po nganaseet ak koteekyigei keryet eng' olooto
Jonah4:6 Ak ki chop Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet silangwet
Jonah4:7 Ago kingo eech eng' peetuut ne po aeng'
Jonah4:8 Ak kingo chor asiista kochop Kamuktaindet usoonet ne punu kong'asiis ne imelisyei; ak ki peel asiista metitap Jona kot kotanui ak kisoomjigei kole kome. Ak ki le

Jonah4:10 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

Micah1:1 Ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki nyoonji Mikah meng'iindetap Moresheth eng' peetuusyegap Jotham
Micah1:2 Ogas okweek pororyosyek
Micah1:3 Amu
Micah1:4 Ak kochootyo tuloonook eng' keelyekyik
Micah1:5 Piitu chuuto amu pistoetap Jakobo
Micah1:6 Ayae anyun Samaria koek karurugutyetap emet
Micah1:7 Ak kebir ketuatui kanamonikyik tugul che ki kiwai
Micah1:8 Ateei ak awaache amu niito
Micah1:9 Amu ma inyaaksei mookyik; amu kagonyo kot koit Judah; itei ormariichetap piikyuk
Micah1:10 Amat imwaite ng'olyoondoniito eng' Gath
Micah1:11 Osiirte
Micah1:12 Amu igeni miising' chiito ne menyei Marot kole konyoor myeeindo: amu kachoorchigei yaityet ormariichetap Jerusalem kobunu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Micah1:13 Ratyi chepkichutitap lugeet paraisiit ne chepchep
Micah1:14 Igoochini anyun Moreset-gat kagoochinetap saisere: egu kooriigap Aksip kiit ne po ng'aalseet eng' laitorinigap Israel.
Micah1:15 Ta amutun chiito ne nyoonei konamin ibunji
Micah1:16 Ingochurin met
Micah2:1 Pwo eng' icheek che chobei tengekto ak kotilei eng' itogusyekwak ole yaitoi yaityet! Ye kagoeech koyaei
Micah2:2 Kasei myat mbareenik
Micah2:3 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero
Micah2:4 Mwaei eng' peetuunooto kalewenet agobo inyee
Micah2:5 Menyooru anyun chiito ne wiirtoi porowet eng' parbaryat eng' tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
Micah2:6 Mwaei icheek kole amomaoten. Ma maotenjin icheek chuuto: ma petos chotisyosyek.
Micah2:7 Ee kootap Jakobo
Micah2:8 Ago kota koboryena piikyuk ko uu puunyoot: oreegune ngoryeet ne tabanu parak icheek che siirtoi eng' kaalyeet
Micah2:9 Otimdoi kwonyiigap piikyuk koba eng' kooriikwak che korooron; orebe toroornatennyu lagokwak agoi.

Micah2:11 Ngot komwa lembech chiito ne wendoti eng' usoonet ak lembechek
Micah2:12 Ee Jakobo
Micah2:13 Kagondoe putindet icheek: kagobutis ak koba agoi ormariichet

Micah3:7 Ak kolilaanso keerik
