Micah5:1 Iyumge anyun
Micah5:2 Ago inyee
Micah5:3 Igoitoi anyun ineendet icheek kot koit peetuut ne sigisyei ineendet ne tinyei ng'wanindo: tuun weekyingei anyun che ki ng'et che po tupchosyekyik
Micah5:4 Ak kotonon kobai akweennyi eng' kimnateetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Micah5:5 Egu chiichito kalyennyo ye tuun kait Assyrianindet emennyo
Micah5:6 Ak kong'em emetap Assyria eng' rotwetap chok

Micah5:8 Ak kotebee piik che ki ng'et che po Jakobo kwenutap pororyosyek
Micah5:9 Ingitoroor eung'ung' eng' paragutap puuniguk
Micah5:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole tuun abare eng' peetuunooto paraisisyeguk eng' kwenung'ung'
Micah5:11 ak abar nganasoogap emeng'ung'
Micah5:12 ak aiste ponisosyek eng' eung'ung'; ama inyooru kogeny chepsogeinik:
Micah5:13 ak aiste eng' kwenung'ung' kanamoniguk che ki kiwai ak tolochiguk; ak ma ilasu kogeny poisyonigap euneguk.
Micah5:14 Ak atutu Aserik eng' kwenung'ung'; ak ang'em nganasoguk.
Micah5:15 Ak ayaaktochi mugetuut eng' nereegek ak eng' nereegek che ng'woneen

Micah6:11 Tos atiliiliitu ngatinye tuguuk che kirogendoisye che po yaityet

Micah7:1 Pwo eng' anee! Amu aa uu yo kagiyum logoegap kemei
Micah7:2 Ki kobet chii ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emet
Micah7:3 Igiilegei eng' eunekwak koyai kiit ne ya; soomsei pounindet ak kirwoogindet komachei kiit ne kigoigoisye; ak mwaei chiito ne oo mageet ne ya ne po saboondanyi; chobei icheek ko uu nooto.
Micah7:4 Ne myee eng' icheek ko uu kateet ne rutei piich: ne litit miising' eng' icheek ko ya kosiir ng'ootweetap katook: kagoit peetuutap riibiguk
Micah7:5 Amomang'u chorweet
Micah7:6 Amu iteweeri weeriit kwanda
Micah7:7 Ago amang'u anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ageni Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap yetunennyu: kasa Kamuktaindennyu
Micah7:8 amebaibaitunena
Micah7:9 Amuitoi eng' nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Micah7:10 Yeityo kogeer anyun punyondennyu
Micah7:11 Peetuut ne kiteechei irimoiguk! Ki istoi kolooit ng'atuutyet eng' peetuunooto.
Micah7:12 Pwonjinin icheek eng' peetuunooto
Micah7:13 Nganda uu nooto koegu emet karaatya amu icheek che menyei olooto
Micah7:14 Iyage piiguk eng' kiroktong'ung'
Micah7:15 Aboorchini ineendet tuguuk che kikwong'ee ko uu eng' peetuusyek che ki imong'u eng' emetap Misiri.
Micah7:16 Keerei pororyosyek ak kolilaanso amu kimnateennywa tugul: kere eunekwak kutusweekwak
Micah7:17 Melei ng'ung'unyek ko uu ereneet; mong'u kobotanionu eng' komoswekwak che ung'egei ko uu tuguuk che ichuutegei ng'wony: pwoonei eng' kaiyweisyet ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Micah7:18 Ng'oo Kamuktaindet ne uu inyee
Micah7:19 Tuun weeksei kogeny ak korirenech; tuun istoiwech tengekwogikyok: tuun iwiirchini tugul rirosyegap nyanjet.
Micah7:20 Iyachini Jakobo imanit
Nahum1:1 Maonateet agobo Nineveh. Kitabuut ne po ng'ang'utyetap Nahum Elkosindet.
Nahum1:2 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet ne amei ng'etkong' ak koyaaktoi mugetuut; yaaktoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugetuut ak tinyei nereek; yaakyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugetuut puunikyik
Nahum1:3 Ma sip konereechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Nahum1:4 Kere kong' nyanjet ak kogoochin koyaam
Nahum1:5 Potandos tuloonook eng' tainnyi
Nahum1:6 Ng'oo ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taitap nereegekyik? Ak ng'oo ne imuuchi komuita eng' koroomnatetap nereegekyik? Kirong'u nereegekyik che ng'woneen ko uu maat
Nahum1:7 Myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Nahum1:8 Ak eng' maraneet ne oo
Nahum1:9 Amu nee si otete ogirinde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ineendet ne iwong'u; ma ng'eetei puunyo konyil.
Nahum1:10 Nganda uu icheek katook che king'walgei

Nahum1:13 Airie choginnyi eng' kaating'ung'

Nahum1:15 Ogeero! Mi tuloonook kelyegap ineendet ne ibu logoiywek che myach

Nahum3:19 Ma mi kiy ne isoobi moeng'ung'; ng'waan moeng'ung'. Tugul che kasei ng'aleek agobo inyee
Habakkuk1:1 Maonateet ne ki keer maotyot Habakkuk.
Habakkuk1:2 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Habakkuk1:3 Amu nee si iboorwo tengekto
Habakkuk1:4 Ki kochoriren ng'atuutyet amu nooto; ama komi kirwooget ne kirwoochi. Yiemei kiptengekyot chiito ne po iman; kirwoochi anyun kirwooget kimaasi.
Habakkuk1:5 Ogeer
Habakkuk1:6 Amu

Habakkuk1:8 Chepcheben kogeny paraisisyekwak kosiir keteet
Habakkuk1:9 Pwoonei tugul agobo koroomnateet; tokyin togoochikwak eng' kimnateet ko uu usoonetap kong'asiis; ak koyumi luulenik ko uu ng'aniek.
Habakkuk1:10 Ee
Habakkuk1:11 Iwiktogei ko uu usoonet
Habakkuk1:12 Tos

Habakkuk1:14 ak igoochini piik koigei njireenigap nyanjet
Habakkuk1:15 Name icheek tugul kateet ne uu kombet
Habakkuk1:16 Eng'jin anyun regereiywondennyi ne kiname njireenik
Habakkuk1:17 Tos tumdoi anyun tuguuk che mi regereiywondennyi

Habakkuk2:12 Pwo! Ineendet ne teege nganaseet korotiik
Habakkuk2:13 Ogeero

Habakkuk2:18 Tilei nee kanamwet ne ki kiwai
Habakkuk2:19 Pwo ineendet ne leenjin keetit
Habakkuk2:20 Ago mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor hekalunnyi ne tiliil; ingosiis ng'wony komugul eng' tainnyi.
Habakkuk3:1 Saaet ne ki sa maotyot Habakkuk
Habakkuk3:2 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Habakkuk3:3 Ki nyo Kamuktaindet eng' Teman
Habakkuk3:4 Ki uu kakweng'ennyi lapkeiyet; Kimang'une eunnyi lapkeiyet ne uu ne po keelyegap asiista: Ak kimi yooto ole kiung'e kamuktaennyi.
Habakkuk3:5 Ki indoe ineendet koroito
Habakkuk3:6 Ki tonon ak kokwa ng'wony; ki keer ak kotumdum pororyosyek: Ak ki iseerak tuloonook che po koigeny; ki ing'uruukso tuloonook che po koigeny; ki uu panwekyik peetuusyek che po keny.
Habakkuk3:7 Ki ageer emaisyegap Kushan komi nyalilda: Kibotanso tuguuk che kioiye emet che po Midian.
Habakkuk3:8 Tos ki nereekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ainoosyek? Tos ki nyo nereeknateng'ung' agobo ainoosyek
Habakkuk3:9 Ki kityaach kwangeng'ung'; Ki po iman ng'olyootap kayasyosyek ne ki kiyasyechi pororyosyek. Ki ibete emet ainoosyek.
Habakkuk3:10 Ki iyweis tuloonook ye kigeerin; Kisiirto usoonetap nyanjet; Kitul rireet
Habakkuk3:11 Kitononso asiista ak arawet eng' meng'ootennywa
Habakkuk3:12 Ki ibun emet inereegoti
Habakkuk3:13 Ki imong'u agobo yetunetap piiguk
Habakkuk3:14 Ki toore `kiplitokyik kandoindetap piikyik che po lugeet: Ki pwa ko uu kipchurchuryet kole koseera: Ki uu poiboindanywa che amei kibananook eng' ung'oot.
Habakkuk3:15 Ki ityegee inyee nyanjet paraisisyeguk
Habakkuk3:16 Ki agas
Habakkuk3:17 Amu ngot koma yiei mogoywet
Habakkuk3:18 Aboiboitu kora eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor

Zephaniah3:1 Pwo! Ineendet ne ngelelyot ne ki kong'wanit
Zephaniah3:2 Ki ma kas iit mwaet; kimataach katigonet; ki ma imang' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki ma riikyi Kamuktaindennyi.
Zephaniah3:3 Uu pounikyik che mi kwenunnyi ng'etunyik che porisendos
Zephaniah3:4 Piik che tangusen ak koberberisyei maotikyik: ki komurwon tisiikyik ole-tiliil
Zephaniah3:5 Po iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi kwenunnyi; ma yaei tengekto; iboortoi kirwoogennyi karonet age tugul
Zephaniah3:6 Ki abar pororyosyek; Ki kong'emogis irimoikwak che torooreen; ki abut ortinwekwak kot koma kobunei chii: Ki kong'emogis nganasookwak kot koma komi chii

Zephaniah3:11 Ma tuun ililani eng' peetuunooto amu poisyoniguk tugul che ki iyaiywo eng' pistoet. Tuun aistoi komong' eng' kwenung'ung' menotik ak che itoroorigei
Zephaniah3:12 Ago abagachi eng' kwenung'ung' piik che kinyaliili ak ko kibananook
Zephaniah3:13 Ma koyaei tengekto piik che ki ng'et che po Israel

Zephaniah3:20 Amutwok eng' peetuusyechooto
Haggai1:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel pounindetap Judah
Haggai1:2 “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Mwaei pichu kole tomo koit peetuusyek che nyoljinech kebwa
Haggai1:3 Ki nyo anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maotyot Haggai kole
Haggai1:4 “Tos myee omenye okweek kooriikwok che ki kitetee pagoinik ak kobutoot Hekaluunnyu?”
Haggai1:5 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Haggai1:6 Ki ogol che chaang'
Haggai1:7 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Haggai1:8 Otogoste tulweet ak oibu keetiik
Haggai1:9 “Ki ocheeng' che chaang'
Haggai1:10 Ki kirat kipsengwet anyun amu okweek si ma kon rewoot
Haggai1:11 Ak ki ang'at kobiit kemeut eng' emet ak eng' tuloonook
Haggai1:12 Ki kas iit anyun Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel
Haggai1:13 Ki ng'alaal anyun Haggai
Haggai1:14 Ki ichirchir Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldap Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel pounindetap Judah
Haggai1:15 eng' peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawetap lo
Haggai2:1 eng' peetuutap tiptem ak agenge ne po arawetap tisap
Haggai2:2 “Ng'alaalji Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel
Haggai2:3 ‘Ng'oo eng' okweek ne ki ng'et ne ki keer kooi kotinyei toroornatennyi ne po tai? Ak ogeertoi ano nguno? Tos ma uu puch eng' konyekwok?
Haggai2:4 Nyiganitu
Haggai2:5 Niito ng'olyoot ne ki kiyomisyige ye ki obwane eng' Misiri
Haggai2:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: ‘Eng' ne matya kota atumdumi kogeny konyil agenge kipsengwet ak ng'wony
Haggai2:7 Atumdumi pororyosyek tugul
Haggai2:8 ‘Chechuuk fedhaisyek
Haggai2:9 Eetu toroornatet ne po let ne po kooi kosiir ne po tai
Haggai2:10 Eng' peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawetap sogool
Haggai2:11 “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: oteebe tisiik agobo ng'atuutik
Haggai2:12 Ngot koibe chiito ngoryennyi panyeek che itabaanatiin
Haggai2:13 Yeityo komwa Haggai kole
Haggai2:14 Kowol anyun Haggai kole
Haggai2:15 Ak asoomok anyun nguno
Haggai2:16 Ye kingwo chii kocheeng' karurugutyetap keruutik tiptem
Haggai2:17 Ki abirenok chelalityet ak uchatet ak koigap ropta eng' poisyonik tugul che po eunekwok; ago ma oweekyagei
Haggai2:18 Asoomok ale
Haggai2:19 Tos ta komi peek choge? Ee
Haggai2:20 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Haggai ne po aeng'
Haggai2:21 “Ng'alaalji Zerubabel
Haggai2:22 Agabui ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po pounatosyek
Haggai2:23 ‘Eng' peetuunooto
Zechariah1:1 Eng' arawetap sisiit eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' ne po laitornatetap Darius ko ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Zekariah weeriitap Berekiah weeriitap Ido
Zechariah1:2 ki konereekyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising' kwanisyekwok.
Zechariah1:3 Mwachi anyun icheek ileenji
Zechariah1:4 Amoigei kwanisyekwok
Zechariah1:5 Kwanisyekwok
Zechariah1:6 Ago tos ki ma ityi kwanisyekwok ng'aleekyuk ak ng'atuutikyuk che ki ang'at otwogikyuk maotik? Ak ki week icheek ak kole
Zechariah1:7 Eng' peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawetap taman ak agenge ne arawetap Sebat
Zechariah1:8 Ki anyooru keereet kemoi agobo chiito ne ki kweryei paraisiit ne piriir ak kotonone keetiigap momonik oriit; ak ki mi patennyi paraisisyek alage che piriireen
Zechariah1:9 Ki ale anyun
Zechariah1:10 Ki wol anyun chiito ne ki tonone kwenutap momonichooto kole
Zechariah1:11 Ak ki wolji `icheek malaikayatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki tonone kwenutap momonichooto koleenji
Zechariah1:12 Ki wol anyun malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Zechariah1:13 Ak ki wol Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'aleek che myach ak ko po kagaigaet kowolji malaikaiyandanooto ki ng'alaalwo.
Zechariah1:14 Ki leenjo anyun malaikaiyandanooto ki ng'alaalwo: “Ititenji ileenji
Zechariah1:15 Ak anereechi miising' agobo pororyosyek che kalyandos; amu ye kita anereechi kitigin
Zechariah1:16 Ko uu nooto mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole kaaweekyigei Jerusalem ariiree; ki teekyin koonnyu nganasanooto
Zechariah1:17 Itechi kogeny ileenji
Zechariah1:18 Ak ki ang'eet met ak ageer
Zechariah1:19 Ki ateebee malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo aleenji
Zechariah1:20 Ak ki iboorwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kitong'ik ang'wan.
Zechariah1:21 Ki ateep anyun ale
Zechariah2:1 Ki ang'eet met ak ageer
Zechariah2:2 Yeityo ateebee aleenji
Zechariah2:3 Ki wo anyun malaikaiyandanooto ki ng'alaalwo
Zechariah2:4 ak koleenji ineendet
Zechariah2:5 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Zechariah2:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole “Eiye
Zechariah2:7 Ee mwechi Zion
Zechariah2:8 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ne kagoyookta ineendet agobo toroornatennyi
Zechariah2:9 Ogeero
Zechariah2:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole “Tyen ak ibaibaitu
Zechariah2:11 Ak konamgei pororyosyek che chaang' ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto ak koek piikyuk; ak ameny kwenung'ung'.” Inae niito ile ki iyookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek anyo ole imi.
Zechariah2:12 Ak konam Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Judah koek kebebertanyi eng' emet ne tiliil
Zechariah2:13 Osisye
Zechariah3:1 Ak ki iboorwo `ineendet tisiindet ne oo nooto Joshua kotonone taitap malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Zechariah3:2 Ak ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani
Zechariah3:3 Ki ilaachi Joshua ngoroik che murwonen
Zechariah3:4 Ak ki wol ineendet koleenji icheek che kitonone tainnyi
Zechariah3:5 Ki ale anyun
Zechariah3:6 Ak kibaoryanji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua eng' kimnateet
Zechariah3:7 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ngot iwendote ortinwekyuk
Zechariah3:8 Kas anyun nguno
Zechariah3:9 Amu
Zechariah3:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek
Zechariah4:1 Ak ki nyo kogeny malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo
Zechariah4:2 Ak ki leenjo
Zechariah4:3 ak kimi mseituni aeng'u ye neegitee tainooto
Zechariah4:4 Ak ki awolji malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo aleenji
Zechariah4:5 Kowol anyun malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo
Zechariah4:6 Kowol koleenjo
Zechariah4:7 Ii ng'oo
Zechariah4:8 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole
Zechariah4:9 ki lumei Zerubabel lumeiywotap koi; ak ko eunekyik che igeesu kogeny; ak inai ile Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ne ki iyookwo anyo ole omi.
Zechariah4:10 Amu ng'oo ne ki kosas peetuutap tuguuk che mengeechen? Amu tuun poiboitu icheek
Zechariah4:11 Ki ateebee anyun ineendet aleenji
Zechariah4:12 Ak ki ateebee ne po aeng' aleenji ineendet
Zechariah4:13 Ak ki wol koteebena kole mengen kiit ne po chuuto. Ak ki ale
Zechariah4:14 Koleenjo anyun
Zechariah5:1 Ki ang'eet met anyun kogeny ak ageerte
Zechariah5:2 Ak kitep koleenjo
Zechariah5:3 Kimwaiwo anyun koleenjo
Zechariah5:4 Ayooktoi kitabuunooto
Zechariah5:5 Ki wo anyun malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo
Zechariah5:6 Ak ki atep ale
Zechariah5:7 ak ogeero
Zechariah5:8 Ak ki le
Zechariah5:9 Ki ang'eet met anyun ak ogeero
Zechariah5:10 Ki aleenji anyun malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo
Zechariah5:11 Ak ki leenjo
Zechariah6:1 Ki ang'eet met kogeny
Zechariah6:2 Ki piriireen paraisisyek che po chepkichutit ne po tai
Zechariah6:3 ak ki leelach paraisisyegap chepkichutit ne po somok; ak kibusyenen ak ko murwonen paraisisyegap chepkichutit ne po ang'wan.
Zechariah6:4 Ki awolji ateebee anyun malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo aleenji nee chu o
Zechariah6:5 Ak ki wol malaikaiyat koleenjo chuuto ko usoonaik ang'wan che po kipsengwet che pendi eng' ole katonone eng' taitap Kiptaiyat ne po ng'wony komugul.
Zechariah6:6 Wendi chepkichutit ne po paraisisyek che tuuen kotokyingei emet ne po murot kaataam; ak ki pa che leelachen koosup chooto
Zechariah6:7 Ak ki pa paraisisyek che murwonen
Zechariah6:8 Ki kuuro anyun ak koleenjo
Zechariah6:9 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo
Zechariah6:10 Imut piik alak eng' che ki kiluul
Zechariah6:11 Ee
Zechariah6:12 ak imwachi ineendet ileenji mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko uu ni kole keero
Zechariah6:13 ee
Zechariah6:14 Ak kobunjin chepkuloichooto Helem
Zechariah6:15 Ak kobwa icheek che mi ole loo ak koteech Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Zechariah7:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zekariah
Zechariah7:2 Kiga koyookto anyun icheek che po Bethel Sareser ak Regem-melek
Zechariah7:3 ak kong'alaalji tisiigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ak maotik
Zechariah7:4 Ki nyoonjo anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek koleenjo
Zechariah7:5 ng'alaalji piik tugul che po emet ak tisiik
Zechariah7:6 Ak ye oame
Zechariah7:7 Tos manyoljok ogas ng'aleek che ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maotik che po tai
Zechariah7:8 Ak ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zekariah koleenji
Zechariah7:9 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Zechariah7:10 amous kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot
Zechariah7:11 Ago ki eesyo kogas iit
Zechariah7:12 Ee
Zechariah7:13 Ak ko uu ye kingo riirchi ineendet icheek ama kogas
Zechariah7:14 ago aiyestoi icheek eng' kipchurchuryet eng' pororyosyek tugul che ki tomo konai. Ki ek anyun emet karaatya eng' let
Zechariah8:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek koleenjo
Zechariah8:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Amo ng'etkong' agobo Zion
Zechariah8:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kaaweekyigei Zion
Zechariah8:4 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ta komenyei poisyek ak chebyosok ortinwegap Jerusalem kotinyei chii age tugul kiroktonyi amu osindo?
Zechariah8:5 Ak konyi ortinwek che po nganaseet ng'etiik ak tiibiik che urerendos eng' ortinwechooto?
Zechariah8:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ngot ko po kwong'eet eng' konyegap piik che ng'etu eng' pichu eng' peetuusyechooto
Zechariah8:7 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ogeero
Zechariah8:8 ak amutu icheek ak komeny kwenutap Jerusalem. Ak koek `icheek piikyuk ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa
Zechariah8:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Ingogimegitu eunekwok
Zechariah8:10 Amu kingo tomo koit peetuusyechooto ko ki ma konyooru chii melekto
Zechariah8:11 Ago nguno koma ayachini ichu ki ng'et ko uu eng' peetuusyek che po tai
Zechariah8:12 Amu tuun piitu keswootap kaalyeet; tuun yiei keetitap sabibuk
Zechariah8:13 Ak ko uu ye ki oegu che chubootiin eng' pororyosyek
Zechariah8:14 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Ko uu ye kigabwaat ayaiywok yaityet
Zechariah8:15 kaabwaat anyun kogeny eng' peetuusyechuuto ayachi ne myee Jerusalem kobooto kootap Judah; amoiywei.
Zechariah8:16 Chu tuguuk che tuun oyae: Ingomwachi chii age tugul eng' okweek chiitap kokwennyi imanit; oyai kirwooget ne po imanit ak kaalyeet eng' ormariichokwok.
Zechariah8:17 Amat kobwaat chii age tugul eng' okweek yaityet eng' muguleldanyi agobo chiitap kokwennyi
Zechariah8:18 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek koleenjo
Zechariah8:19 “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Egu eng' kootap Judah poiboiyet ak kaagaasetapkei
Zechariah8:20 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Tuun pwoonei pororyosyek ak piik che menyei nganasook che chaang';
Zechariah8:21 ak koba piik che po nganaseet age nganaseet age koleenji
Zechariah8:22 Ee
Zechariah8:23 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Tuun namei piik tamanu eng' peetuusyechooto
Zechariah9:1 Nyigiisindap ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo emetap Hadrak
Zechariah9:2 kobooto Hamath agine ne mi kiwotennyi
Zechariah9:3 Ak kiteekyigei Tyro irimeet
Zechariah9:4 Ogeero
Zechariah9:5 Keerei Askelon ak koiyweis; keerei Gaza agine
Zechariah9:6 Ak komeny `chiito ne po sarbuch Ashdod
Zechariah9:7 Ak aiste korotiikyik eng' kutinnyi
Zechariah9:8 Ak ameng'iisye ayiem koonnyu si agirinda lugeet
Zechariah9:9 Paibaitu miising'
Zechariah9:10 Ak ang'em chepkichutitap lugeet eng' Ephraim
Zechariah9:11 Ago eng' inyee
Zechariah9:12 Oweekyigei irimeet
Zechariah9:13 Amu ki ariikyigei Judah ko uu kwanget
Zechariah9:14 Ak kotook Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' paragunnywa
Zechariah9:15 Ak koriip Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek icheek; ak kogees ak kotyekyi ng'wony koik che ki wiirtoe porowet; ak koeeiso ak kowaakyo ko uu che kae divaik
Zechariah9:16 Eng' peetuunooto
Zechariah9:17 Amu oo ne tya myeeindonyi ak korooronindonyi! Igoochin `peek murenik koneryo
Zechariah10:1 Osoom Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ropta eng' peetuusyek che po ropta ne po let
Zechariah10:2 Amu ki komwa terapik tangoita
Zechariah10:3 Anereekyini mestoweek
Zechariah10:4 Mang'une `ineendet koita ne po luuita
Zechariah10:5 Ak koigei piik che nyigoonen
Zechariah10:6 Ak agimiit kootap Judah
Zechariah10:7 Ak koigei icheek che po Ephraim chiito ne nyigan
Zechariah10:8 Aititenjini icheek
Zechariah10:9 Ak agool icheek eng' kwenutap pororyosyek; ak kobwaata komi emotinwek che looen: ak komeng'iis kobooto lagokwak
Zechariah10:10 Amutu icheek kogeny komang'une emetap Misiri
Zechariah10:11 Ak peek che mildogei eng' nyanjet
Zechariah10:12 Agimiiti icheek eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kobendatee kainennyi
Zechariah11:1 Yaat kurgotiguk
Zechariah11:2 Waach
Zechariah11:3 Kutitap mestoweek che waaktos! Amu kageng'em toroornatennywa; kutitap ng'etuunyik che neran che porisendos! Amu kageng'em menoteetap Jordan.
Zechariah11:4 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu kole: “Iyage akweetap keechiirek che kienyei.
Zechariah11:5 Icheek che alei ko enyei ak koba koma nyoor kergong'yet. Che aldoi komwaei koleen
Zechariah11:6 Amu ma ariiree kogeny piik che menyei emoni
Zechariah11:7 Ki ayage anyun akweetap keechiirek che kienyei
Zechariah11:8 Ak ki ang'em mestoweek somok eng' arawet agenge; amu kigong'et saboondanyu agobo icheek
Zechariah11:9 Ki amwa anyun ale
Zechariah11:10 Ak ki anam kiroktonyu Myeeindo
Zechariah11:11 Ak kibutok eng' peetuunooto: ak ki nai anyun che nyerootiin che po akweetap keechiirek
Zechariah11:12 Ak ki aleenji icheek
Zechariah11:13 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Zechariah11:14 Yeityo aep apcheune aeng' kiroktonyu age
Zechariah11:15 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Zechariah11:16 Amu
Zechariah11:17 Pwo! Mestowot ne ma tilei kiy ne pagaktoi akweet! Ingooep rotwetap chok eunnyi ak kobol kondanyi ne po tai
Zechariah12:1 Nyigiisindap ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel.
Zechariah12:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Zechariah12:3 Ak ayae Jerusalem eng' peetuunooto koek koita ne nyigiis ne iimi piik tugul; nyooru perutik che chaang' icheek che kanabi koyato: ak koyumjigei ineendet pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony.
Zechariah12:4 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto kole
Zechariah12:5 Ak komwa pounigap Judah eng' mugulelwekwak kole
Zechariah12:6 Ayae eng' peetuunooto pounigap Judah koigei rokyietap maat ne mi kweenik
Zechariah12:7 Sip kosaru Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emaisyegap Judah
Zechariah12:8 Riibei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto piik che menyei Jerusalem; ak koigei ne nyalulat eng' icheek Daudi eng' peetuunooto; ak koigei kootap Daudi Kamuktaindet
Zechariah12:9 Ak acheeng' abar eng' peetuunooto pororyosyek tugul che ibookyin Jerusalem.
Zechariah12:10 Ak ande muguleldap myeeindo ak ne po saaet kootap Daudi
Zechariah12:11 Piitu eng' peetuunooto kateeiyet ne oo eng' Jerusalem
Zechariah12:12 Ak kootee emet
Zechariah12:13 iteeitos che po kootap Lawi icheegei
Zechariah12:14 iteeitos ortinwek tugul che kang'et
Zechariah13:1 Tuun kiyaatyin kootap Daudi ak piik che menyei Jerusalem
Zechariah13:2 Ak mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole tuun aistoi eng' peetuunooto kainaigap kanamonik eng' emet
Zechariah13:3 Ak ngot ko tuun komaoten age tugul
Zechariah13:4 Ak tuun ililandos maotik eng' peetuunooto
Zechariah13:5 ago mwaei kole ma aa maotyot
Zechariah13:6 Ak keteebe keleenji
Zechariah13:7 Ng'eet
Zechariah13:8 Ki istoi
Zechariah13:9 Ak amut kebeberato po somok kobun maat
Zechariah14:1 Ogeero
Zechariah14:2 Amu tuun ayumi pororyosyek tugul kobookyi Jerusalem kobargei; ak kenam nganaseet ak keluul kooriik
Zechariah14:3 Yeityo kwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Zechariah14:4 Ak tuun tononie keelyekyik eng' peetuunooto tulweetap mseituni
Zechariah14:5 Ak omwei obun atebweetap tuloonookyuk; amu itei atebweetap tuloonoogap Asel: ee
Zechariah14:6 Ak ma iluu lapkeiyet eng' peetuunooto amaimenitu:
Zechariah14:7 ago peetuut agenge ne naat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ma peet
Zechariah14:8 Ak tuun mang'une peek che saptos Jerusalem eng' peetuunooto; pendi kebeberta age kotokyingei nyanjetap Mediterenian ne mi kong'asiis
Zechariah14:9 Ak koek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitoryatap ng'wony komugul: egu agenge Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto
Zechariah14:10 Kiwolei emet tugul koigei Arabah
Zechariah14:11 Ak komeny piik olooto
Zechariah14:12 Ak piitu koroitap ng'wony ne pire `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik tugul che ki pargei ak Jerusalem: nundos poorwekwak kota kotonondos
Zechariah14:13 Punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto wasetapkei ne oo
Zechariah14:14 Ak kobargei Judah agine ak Jerusalem; ak kiyomo mogornatosyek che po pororyosyek tugul
Zechariah14:15 Ak piitu ko uu nooto
Zechariah14:16 Ak age tugul ne ng'etu eng' pororyosyek tugul che ki ibookyin Jerusalem
Zechariah14:17 Ak age tugul ne po ortinwek tugul che po ng'wony ne ma togostoi Jerusalem kolasu Laitoryat
Zechariah14:18 Ak ngot koma togosta ooreetap kootap Misiri
Zechariah14:19 Egu niito piretap Misiri
Zechariah14:20 Tuun kisirchin eng' peetuunooto cheptingiloogap paraisisyek kole
Zechariah14:21 Ee
Malachi1:1 Nyigiisindap ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki igoochi `Malaki Israel.
Malachi1:2 Ki achamak
Malachi1:3 awech Esau
Malachi1:4 Nga mwaei Edom kole ki kiterterech
Malachi1:5 Tuun ogeere ak omwa ole
Malachi1:6 Igoochin konyit weeriit kwandanyi
Malachi1:7 Ogoitoi magatiinik che murwonen eng' kaptisisyennyu ak omwae oleen
Malachi1:8 Ye ogoitoi che koryotiin koek tiseiywek
Malachi1:9 Asoomok anyun ale
Malachi1:10 Kaigai onde chii ne kerei kurgotik si molaal maat eng' kaptisisyennyu puch! Ma paibai eng' okweek agot kitigin
Malachi1:11 Amu oo kainennyu eng' pororyosyek kobooch ole charunee asiis agoi ole roroktoe; ak kigoitoi eng' komosta age tugul nyamdutik che kibeelei agobo kainennyu
Malachi1:12 Ago ong'waniti ye omwae ole
Malachi1:13 Omwae kogeny ole
Malachi1:14 Ago chuboot kaberberindet
Malachi2:1 Ee okweek tisiik
Malachi2:2 Ngot ko momache ogas
Malachi2:3 Ogeero
Malachi2:4 Ak onai ole ki ayookwok ng'atuutyoniito
Malachi2:5 Ki mi kayomisennyu ne po saboondo ak kaalyeet kobooto ineendet; ak ki agoochi tuguuchooto ineendet si kobiit koiyweis
Malachi2:6 Ki mi kutinnyi ng'atuutyetap imanit
Malachi2:7 Amu kanyool koriip kutitap tisiindet naet
Malachi2:8 Ago ki omaste eng' ooreet; ki onach che chaang' eng' ng'atuutyet; ki ong'em kayomisetap Lawi
Malachi2:9 Ki ayaak anyun oegu che kisasei ak ko nyerootiin eng' taitap piik tugul
Malachi2:10 Tos ma ki tinyei acheek tugul kwanda agenge? Tos ma yaech Kamuktaindet agenge? Amu nee si koberber chii age tugul eng' acheek tupchennyi
Malachi2:11 Kigong'em Judah kayaneet
Malachi2:12 Igeesu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne yachin ineendet kiito
Malachi2:13 Ak ni kiit age ne oyae kogeny
Malachi2:14 Ago oteebe ole
Malachi2:15 Tos ki ma yaak Kamuktaindet okweek tuwai oegu poorto agenge ak oegu saboondo agenge? Amu nee si koek agenge? Ki cheeng'ei iyoteet ne iywei Kamuktaindet. Oriip anyun mugulelwekwok
Malachi2:16 Amu aweche peesyet
Malachi2:17 Kooiim Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'aleekwok. Ago oteebe ole
Malachi3:1 Ogeero
Malachi3:2 Ago ng'oo ne imuuchi komuita eng' peetuutap nyonunennyi? Ak ng'oo ne tononi ye katook? Uu ineendet maat ne ki tiliilisye
Malachi3:3 ak kotep ng'wony ko uu kitong'iin ak ko uu katiliilindetap fedha. Itiliili `inee ooreetap Lawiik ak kotiliil icheek ko uu ye kitiliili thahabu ak fedha; si kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik eng' imanda.
Malachi3:4 Si kochamak anyun kagoochinetap Judah ak ne po Jerusalem eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu eng' peetuusyek ak eng' kenyiisyek che po keny.
Malachi3:5 Ak arikyok eng' kirwooget
Malachi3:6 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor
Malachi3:7 Ki omaste kobooch peetuusyegap kwanisyekwok
Malachi3:8 Tos chorei chii Kamuktaindet? Ago ochoora. Ago oteebe ole
Malachi3:9 Kichubok eng' chubeet
Malachi3:10 Oibu kebeberwek tugul che po taman kobwa choge
Malachi3:11 Ak agerwok kong' ne amisyoti
Malachi3:12 Ak koguurenok pororyosyek tugul piik che poiboi
Malachi3:13 Kigouegitu ng'aleekwok che ki omwaitaena
Malachi3:14 Ki omwa ole
Malachi3:15 Ak nguno keguure menotik piik che poiboi
Malachi3:16 Ki ng'alaaljigei anyun che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki ep iit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogas ak ki kisir eng' tainnyi bukuitap kabwaatet agobo icheek che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kobwaati kainennyi.
Malachi3:17 Ak mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Malachi3:18 Yeityo oweege ak obesye chiito ne po iman ak kiptengekyot
Malachi4:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole
Malachi4:2 Ago okweek che oiywei kainennyu kochorchinok asiista ne po imanda ne ting'ee kanyaiset kebebaikyik; ak omande
Malachi4:3 Ak otyech kiptengeginik; amu egu oreek eng' keldebesaigap keelyekwok eng' peetuut ne ayae niito
Malachi4:4 “Obwaat Ng'atuutyetap otwogindennyu Musa ne ki ang'at eng' Horeb
Malachi4:5 “Ogeero
Malachi4:6 Weechei `inee mugulelwegap kwanisyek kotokyigei lagokwak
Matthew1:1 Kaarooretap ooreetap Jeso Kristo
Matthew1:2 Ki sich `Abraham Isak
Matthew1:3 Ki sich `Judah Phares ak Zara eng' Tamar
Matthew1:4 Ki sich `Ram Aminadab
Matthew1:5 Ki sich `Salmon Boaz eng' Rahab
Matthew1:6 kosich `Jesse Laitoryat Daudi. Ki sich `Daudi Solomon eng' chepyoset ne ki po Uriah
Matthew1:7 kosich `Solomon Rehoboam
Matthew1:8 Ki sich `Asa Jehoshaphat
Matthew1:9 Ki sich `Uzziah Jotham
Matthew1:10 Ki sich `Hezekiah Manasseh
Matthew1:11 Ki sich `Josiah Jekoniah ak che tupcho
Matthew1:12 Kingo kagimut koba Babilon
Matthew1:13 Ki sich `Zerubabel Abiud
Matthew1:14 Ki sich `Asor Zadok
Matthew1:15 Ki sich `Eliud Eleazar
Matthew1:16 Ki sich `Jakobo Joseph manong'otyotap Maria ne kisich Jeso ne kiguure Kristo.
Matthew1:17 Ki ek ibinwek tugul taman ak ang'wan kobooch Abraham agoi Daudi; ak kobooch Daudi agoi kamutet ne ki kimut piik koba Babilon ko ki ek ibinwek taman ak ang'wan; ak kobooch ngap kimut piik koba Babilon agoi Kristo ko ki ek ibinwek taman ak ang'wan.
Matthew1:18 Ki uu ni sigeetap Jeso Kristo: Ye kingo kagogosyin Joseph kotungei ak Maria kametap Jeso
Matthew1:19 Amu ki chii ne po imanda Joseph sandennyi
Matthew1:20 Ago ye kingo ta kobwaati tuguuchu
Matthew1:21 Tuun sichei ineendet weeriit ak iguure kainennyi Jeso
Matthew1:22 Koyaak tuguuchu tugul si kobiit kosulda ne ki kamwa Kiptaiyat eng' maotyot kole
Matthew1:23 “Ogeero
Matthew1:24 Ki ng'eet Joseph eng' rwondonyi ak koyai ko uu ye ki kang'at malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat
Matthew1:25 nga ma riikyi ineendet kot kosich weeriit
Matthew2:1 Ak ye kingo kagesich Jeso eng' Bethlehem ne po Judea eng' peetuusyek che po laitoryat Herod
Matthew2:2 koteeboti kole
Matthew2:3 Ye kingo kas nooto laitoryat Herod
Matthew2:4 Ki kuur `ineendet tisiik che eecheen tugul ak siriik che po piik ak koteepse ole ki kisikyin Kristo.
Matthew2:5 Ki wolji koleenji
Matthew2:6 ‘Ak inyee Bethlehem
Matthew2:7 Ki kuur anyun Herod eng' ung'oot piik che ng'oomen si kogine kasarta ne kitaagu kecheiyat.
Matthew2:8 Ki iyookto anyun koba Bethlehem ak ki leenji
Matthew2:9 Kingo kagogas ng'aleegap laitoryat
Matthew2:10 Ye kingo keer kecheiyat
Matthew2:11 Ki pa koot oriit ak ki keer lakweet ne ming'in kobooto kamennyi Maria. Ki ing'uruukso eng' teegis kolas ineendet ak kotyach konoraikwak che po kamanuut
Matthew2:12 Ak ko uu ye kiga kiteechi eng' karwotitoet keleenji amoweekyigei Herod
Matthew2:13 Ye kingo kagoba icheek
Matthew2:14 Ki ng'eet Joseph eng' kemoi komut lakweet ak kamet koba Misiri.
Matthew2:15 Ki tebee olooto agoi kome Herod si kosulda ne ki mwa Kiptaiyat eng' maotyot kole
Matthew2:16 Kingo keer Herod kole king'al `ng'oomotik ineendet
Matthew2:17 Ki isulda anyun eng' peetuunooto ne ki kamwa maotyot Jeremiah kole:
Matthew2:18 “Ki kegas tuugeet eng' Ramah
Matthew2:19 Ye kingo kagome Herod
Matthew2:20 koleenji
Matthew2:21 Ki ng'eet komut lakweet ak kamet koba emetap Israel.
Matthew2:22 Ago ye kingo kas kole pou `Arkelau Judea eng' pounateet ne ki po kwandanyi Herod
Matthew2:23 Ki tebee nganaseet ne kiguure Nazareth si kobiit kosulda ne ki kamwa maotik kole
Matthew3:1 Ki nyo eng' peetuusyechooto Johana kabatisanindet koamdaati eng' surkwen ne po Judea
Matthew3:2 koleen
Matthew3:3 Ni ineendet ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah kole
Matthew3:4 Ki ilaachi Johana sambutap tambeesik
Matthew3:5 Ki ng'etyo anyun piigap Jerusalem ak Judea komugul
Matthew3:6 ak ki kibatisan icheek eng' aineet ne po Jordan
Matthew3:7 Ago ye kingo keer che chaang' che po Pharisaik ak Sadukaik kobwonjin kabatisanennyi
Matthew3:8 Oii logoek che nyoljin siguunet.
Matthew3:9 Amat obwaat ole
Matthew3:10 Agot nguno ko kagiting'e aiywet tigitigap keetiik; kiebei keetit age tugul ne ma iyei logoek che myach ak kewiirchi ma.
Matthew3:11 Abatisanook eng' peek agobo siguunet; ineendet ne isubwo ko tinyei kimnateet kosiiro
Matthew3:12 Tinyei eng' eunnyi keibennyi
Matthew3:13 Ki nyo anyun Jeso kobunu Galilaya konyo Jordan ole mi Johana
Matthew3:14 Ago kimachei Johana koeesyo
Matthew3:15 Ago ki wolji Jeso koleenji
Matthew3:16 Kingo kagibatisan Jeso
Matthew3:17 Ak ki mang'une tuugeet kipsengwet
Matthew4:1 Ki imut anyun Kabuuset ne Tiliil Jeso kotogosta kwo surkwen si koyoom chesawilyet.
Matthew4:2 Ak ye kingo kagorugutkei peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam eng' let koam ruhebeet.
Matthew4:3 Ak ki nyo yoomindet ak koleenji
Matthew4:4 Ago ki wolji kole
Matthew4:5 Yeityo komut chesawilyet ineendet kwo nganaseet ne tiliil; ki imut kwo kimonjogut ne po Hekaluut
Matthew4:6 ak koleenji
Matthew4:7 Ki leenji Jeso
Matthew4:8 Ki imut kogeny `chesawilyet ineendet kwo tulweet ne kooi miising'
Matthew4:9 ak koleenji
Matthew4:10 Ki leenji Jeso anyun
Matthew4:11 Ki pagaach chesawilyet anyun ineendet; ak ogeero
Matthew4:12 Ye kingo kas Jeso kole kigerat Johana
Matthew4:13 Ki wo eng' Nazareth ak kwo kotebee Kapernaum
Matthew4:14 si kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah kole
Matthew4:15 “Emetap Zebulun ak emetap Naphtali
Matthew4:16 Piik che ki tebee mesundeito ko ki kogeer lapkeiyet ne oo
Matthew4:17 Kobooch yooto kotoi Jeso koamda
Matthew4:18 Ak ye kiwendotee ngeguutap araraita ne po Galilaya
Matthew4:19 Ak koleenji
Matthew4:20 Ak eng' yooto
Matthew4:21 Ki ye kingo ta kowendi eng' olooto
Matthew4:22 Ak ki pagaach moinget ak kwandanywa
Matthew4:23 Ak kiwendoti Jeso eng' Galilaya komugul
Matthew4:24 Ara kiyesta ng'aleek agobo ineendet eng' Syria komugul
Matthew4:25 Ak ki isup ineendet tuiyosyek che eecheen che ki punu Galilaya ak Decapolis ak Jerusalem ak Judea ak Jordan pitoniin.
Matthew5:1 Ye kingo keer `Jeso tuiyosyek
Matthew5:2 Ki yaat kutinnyi ak koneet icheek koleenji:
Matthew5:3 Poiboen che ponoon eng' muguleldo
Matthew5:4 Poiboen che aragendos
Matthew5:5 Poiboen che talaen
Matthew5:6 Poiboen che amei rubo ak melelda agobo imanda
Matthew5:7 Poiboen che rireegei
Matthew5:8 Poiboen che tiliileen mugulelwek
Matthew5:9 Poiboen che yaei kaalyeet
Matthew5:10 Poiboen che kageusaus agobo imanda
Matthew5:11 Oboiboi ye churook piik
Matthew5:12 Oboiboitu ak ogaaskei miising'
Matthew5:13 Oo muunyugap ng'wony
Matthew5:14 Oo lapkeiyatap ng'wony. Ma kimuuchi keuny nganaseet ne mi tulweet parak.
Matthew5:15 Ak ma inaami piik tait
Matthew5:16 Ongoluu lapkeiyeng'wong' ko uu nooto eng' taitap piik
Matthew5:17 Moleen ki anyoo abut Ng'atuutyet anan Maotik
Matthew5:18 Amu amwaiwok iman ale
Matthew5:19 Nooto anyun
Matthew5:20 Amu amwaiwok ale
Matthew5:21 Ki ogas keele ki kileenji icheek che po keny
Matthew5:22 Ago amwaiwok ale
Matthew5:23 Nooto anyun ngigoite kagoochineng'ung' eng' kaptisisyet
Matthew5:24 ibagaakte kagoochineng'ung' eng' taitap kaptisiisyo ak iwe anyun ochamyegei korook ak ne otupche
Matthew5:25 Ochamyegei ak punyondeng'ung' kota imi ooreet ak ineendet; si ma imutyin `punyondeng'ung' kirwoogindet
Matthew5:26 Amwaun iman ale
Matthew5:27 Ki ogas keele ki kimwa keele mogesesen.
Matthew5:28 Ago amwaiwok ale
Matthew5:29 Ngo riichin kondang'ung' ne po tai
Matthew5:30 Ak ngo riichin eung'ung' ne po tai
Matthew5:31 Ki kimwa kogeny keele age tugul ne oonei osotyonnyi
Matthew5:32 Ago amwaiwok ale age tugul ne oonei osotyonnyi
Matthew5:33 Ki ogas kogeny keele kigemwachi icheek che po keny keleenji
Matthew5:34 Ago amwaiwok ale
Matthew5:35 anan agobo ng'wony
Matthew5:36 Anan iyasye agobo meting'ung'
Matthew5:37 Ago ingoek ng'alaaleng'wong'
Matthew5:38 Ki ogas keele ki kimwa keele konda eng' konda ak keldet eng' keldet.
Matthew5:39 Ago amwaiwok ale
Matthew5:40 Ngomutyin age tugul kapkirwook
Matthew5:41 Ak age tugul ne pirchinin iwe mailit agenge
Matthew5:42 Igoochi ineendet ne soomin
Matthew5:43 Ki ogas keele ki kimwa keele cham chiitap kokweng'ung'
Matthew5:44 Ago amwaiwok ale
Matthew5:45 si oegu weeriigap Kwandang'wong' ne mi kipsengwet; amu igoochin asiistanyi kochorchi che yaach ak che myach
Matthew5:46 Amu ngot ochame icheek che chamok
Matthew5:47 Ak ngot ogati che otupche kityo
Matthew5:48 Nooto anyun
Matthew6:1 Oriipkei si moyai imandang'wong' eng' taitap piik ole si kogeerok icheek; amu ngo yai ko uu nooto ko monyooru melekto kobun Kwandang'wong' ne mi kipsengwet.
Matthew6:2 Ko uu nooto anyun
Matthew6:3 Ago ye igoite kagoochinoik
Matthew6:4 si kobiit kobunji ung'oot kagoochinoiguk; ak kogoonin melekto Kwandang'ung' ne keerei eng' ung'oot.
Matthew6:5 Ak ye osaae
Matthew6:6 Ago ye imache isaa inyee
Matthew6:7 Ak ye osaae
Matthew6:8 Nooto anyun amoigei icheek; amu ingen Kwandang'wong' tuguuk che omache
Matthew6:9 Nooto anyun osaa ko uu ni: “Kwandanyo ne mi kipsengwet; Ingoloosunok kaineng'ung'.
Matthew6:10 Ingonyo laitornateng'ung'. Ingoyaak mageng'ung' eng' ng'wony ko uu ye yaaksei eng' kipsengwet.
Matthew6:11 Koonech ra amitwogikyok che po kotugul.
Matthew6:12 Ak inyoiywech kaat lelutikyok
Matthew6:13 Amemutech ole mi yoomseet
Matthew6:14 Amu ngo nyochini kaat piik kachiliilutikwak
Matthew6:15 Ago ngo monyochini kaat piik kachiliilutikwak
Matthew6:16 Kogeny ye orugutkei
Matthew6:17 Ago ye irugutkei inyee
Matthew6:18 si ma keer piik kole irugutige
Matthew6:19 Amogonorchigei konoraik eng' ng'wony
Matthew6:20 ago ogonorchigei konoraik eng' kipsengwet
Matthew6:21 amu ole mi konorweng'ung'
Matthew6:22 Taitap poorto konda; nooto anyun
Matthew6:23 Ago ngo ya kondang'ung'
Matthew6:24 Ma mi chii ne imuuchi koot kiptainik aeng'; amu imuuch kowech age ak kocham age
Matthew6:25 Amwaiwok anyun ale
Matthew6:26 Ogeer toriitik che po parak; ma kolsei ama kesisyei ama iyumjin choge
Matthew6:27 Ak imuuchi ng'oo ne kereri met eng' okweek kotesyi koindonyi kakwautyet agenge ne po euut?
Matthew6:28 Ak amu nee anyun si ogereer met agobo ngoroik? Obwaat taaptook che po keeweet
Matthew6:29 ago amwaiwok ale
Matthew6:30 Ago ngo laakyin Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto susweek che po keeweet
Matthew6:31 Nooto anyun amogereer met
Matthew6:32 Amu cheeng'ei tuguuchu tugul Pororyosyek; amu ingen Kwandang'wong' ne po kipsengwet kole omokyinigei tuguuchu tugul.
Matthew6:33 Ago ocheeng' korook laitornatennyi
Matthew6:34 Nooto anyun amogereer met agobo mutai
Matthew7:1 Amorwooch
Matthew7:2 Amu kirwooget ne orwoochi ko tuun kirwoogunenok nooto
Matthew7:3 Kalya si igeer petbetyat ne mi kondap ne otupche
Matthew7:4 Anan imwachindoi ano ne otupche ileenjini
Matthew7:5 Chombilindoni
Matthew7:6 Amogoochi sesenik kiit ne itabaanat
Matthew7:7 Osoom si kegoonok; ocheeng' si onyooru; ogonygony si keyatwok.
Matthew7:8 Amu age tugul ne soomei kigoochin; ak ne cheeng'ei konyooru; ak ineendet ne igonygonyi keyatyin.
Matthew7:9 Tos ng'oo eng' okweek ne ngo soom weeriinnyi magatyat
Matthew7:10 Anan ngo soom njiryot
Matthew7:11 Ngot ongen okweek anyun nga oo yaach ogoochi lagokwok kagoochinoik che myach
Matthew7:12 Nooto anyun
Matthew7:13 Obun okweek kurgeet ne mariich; amu kurgeet ne paraa ak ooreet ne tebees ko wendi ng'emisyet
Matthew7:14 Mariich kurgeet ak ko pichiy ooreet ne wendi saboon ak ng'ering' che nyooru.
Matthew7:15 Oriibegei maotik che po lembech
Matthew7:16 Onae icheek logoekwak. Tos kesei piik sabibuk eng' katook
Matthew7:17 Uu nooto keetit age tugul ne myee
Matthew7:18 Ma imuuchi keetit ne myee kooi logoek che yaach
Matthew7:19 Keetit age tugul ne mayiei logoek che myach keebei ak kewiirchi ma.
Matthew7:20 Nooto anyun onae icheek logoekwak.
Matthew7:21 Ma age tugul ne leenjino “Kiptaiyat
Matthew7:22 Leenjino che chaang' peetuunooto

Matthew8:6 kole

Matthew9:9 Ak kingo siirto Jeso eng' olooto
Matthew9:10 Ye ki amisyei Jeso eng' ko

Matthew9:12 Ago kingo kas

Matthew9:17 Amaindo piik divaik che leelach lolotinwek che oosen: amu kereri lolotinwek
Matthew9:18 Kingo ta komwachin icheek ng'aleechu
Matthew9:19 Ak king'eet Jeso
Matthew9:20 Ogeero
Matthew9:21 amu ki mwa eng' muguleldanyi
Matthew9:22 Ago ki welelgei Jeso kogeer ineendet ak kole
Matthew9:23 Ak kingo it Jeso kootap pounindet

Matthew9:25 Ago kingo kageoon tuiyet koba saang'
Matthew9:26 Ak kiyesto ng'olyoondonooto eng' emonooto komugul.
Matthew9:27 Ak kingo siirto Jeso kwo eng' olooto
Matthew9:28 Ak kingo kakwa ko
Matthew9:29 Kotwa anyun konyekwak
Matthew9:30 Ak ki yaatagis konyekwak. Ak ki kergong' Jeso miising'
Matthew9:31 Ago ki pa
Matthew9:32 Ak ye kita kobendi
Matthew9:33 Ak kingo kageoon oindet
Matthew9:34 Ago ki mwa Pharisaik
Matthew9:35 Ak kiwendote Jeso nganasook tugul
Matthew9:36 Ago ye kingo keer tuiyosyek
Matthew9:37 Ki leenji anyun kasubikyik

Matthew10:1 Ki kuur anyun `Jeso kasubikyik taman ak aeng'
Matthew10:2 Chu kainaik che po che kiyooktoi taman ak aeng': ne tai ko Simion ne kiguure Petero
Matthew10:3 Philipu ak Bartolomayo; Thomas
Matthew10:4 Simion kanaanindet
Matthew10:5 Ki iyookto Jeso chuuto taman ak aeng' ak kong'at icheek koleenji
Matthew10:6 ago kaigai obe ole mi keechiirek che petyotiin che po kootap Israel.
Matthew10:7 Ye obendi
Matthew10:8 Osoop che myandos
Matthew10:9 Amocheeng'jige thahabu
Matthew10:10 anan lolet ne po ooreet
Matthew10:11 Ocheeng' chiito ne nyolu eng' nganaseet age tugul ne oo anan ne ming'in ne omong'jini
Matthew10:12 Ak ye obe ko
Matthew10:13 Ak ngo nyolu koyooto
Matthew10:14 Ak age tugul ne mataachok anan kogas ng'aleekwok
Matthew10:15 Amwaiwok iman ale
Matthew10:16 “Ogeero
Matthew10:17 Ago oriibegei piik; amu imutyinok kapkirwooget
Matthew10:18 ak kimutyinok taitap pounik ak laitorinik agobo anee
Matthew10:19 Ago ye igoitook
Matthew10:20 Amu ma okweek che ong'alaali
Matthew10:21 “Ak kong'wekta chiito ng'eetap kamet kong'wekyi meet
Matthew10:22 Ak kowechok piik tugul agobo kainennyu. Ago ineendet ne muitoi agoi kagesunet kesaru.
Matthew10:23 “Ago ye kiusook eng' nganasani omwechi nganaseet age; amu amwaiwok iman ale
Matthew10:24 “Ma siirei ne kineeti kaneetindennyi
Matthew10:25 Yamei kotep ne kineeti ko uu kaneetindennyi
Matthew10:26 “Moiywei anyun icheek; amu ma mi kiy ne tugoot ne ma tuun king'aanyei
Matthew10:27 Ne amwaiwok eng' mesundeito
Matthew10:28 Amoiywei icheek che parei poorto ago ma imuuchi kobar saboondo; ago kaigai oiywei ineendet ne imuuchi kong'em saboondo kobooto poorto eng' Gehenna.
Matthew10:29 Ma ki aldoe toriitik aeng' che mengeechen kebebertap taman ne po dinarit? Ama ibutyin ng'wony agenge eng' icheek ama chamji Kwandang'wong'.
Matthew10:30 Ago iitotin agot suumeek tugul che po metowekwok.
Matthew10:31 Nooto anyun amoiywei; osiire toriitik che mengeechen che chaang'.
Matthew10:32 “Nooto anyun age tugul ne ibortoa eng' taitap piik
Matthew10:33 Ago age tugul ne eesyoa eng' taitap piik
Matthew10:34 “Moleen ki anyoo aipchi ng'wony kaalyeet; ki ma anyoo aipchi kaalyeet
Matthew10:35 Amu ki anyoo atoiye chii ak kwanda
Matthew10:36 egu puunigap chii piikyik.
Matthew10:37 Ineendet ne chamei kwanda anan kamet kosiiro koma nyoljino; ak ineendet ne chamei weeriit anan cheptonyi kosiiro koma nyoljino.
Matthew10:38 Ak ineendet ne ma ibei kimurtoiyondennyi ak kosubwo
Matthew10:39 Ineendet ne riibei saboondanyi kobeeti; ak ineendet ne ibeeti saboondanyi agobo anee ko tuun nyooru.
Matthew10:40 “Ineendet ne taachok ko kataacha
Matthew10:41 Ineendet ne taachei maotyo eng' kainetap maotyo konyooru melektap maotyo; ak ineendet ne taachei chii ne po iman eng' kainetap chiito ne po iman konyooru melektap chiito ne po iman.
Matthew10:42 Ak age tugul ne igoochin agenge eng' chu mengeechen agot kigombet ne po peek che kaitit kityo amu kasubiin ineendet
Matthew11:1 Ak ye kingo kagong'at `Jeso kasubikyik taman ak aeng' kogees
Matthew11:2 Ak kingo kas Johana eng' korgoreet poisyosyek che po Kristo
Matthew11:3 ak koteebe ineendet kole
Matthew11:4 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji
Matthew11:5 keertoi che koryotiin
Matthew11:6 Ak paibai age tugul ne ma nyoorunena kanagut eng' ui tugul.”
Matthew11:7 Ak ye kita kobendi chu pandanywa
Matthew11:8 Ki omande ogeer nee? Chiito ne ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen? Ogeero
Matthew11:9 Ago kilya si omande? Si kobiit ogeer maotyot? Ee
Matthew11:10 Niito ko ineendet
Matthew11:11 Amwaiwok iman ale
Matthew11:12 Ak kobooch peetuusyek che po Johana Kabatisanindet agoi nguno korwochin piik pounatetap kipsengwet
Matthew11:13 Amu ki maotenso maotik tugul ak Ng'atuutik agoi koit peetuusyegap Johana.
Matthew11:14 Ak ngo chame otaach ko uu nooto
Matthew11:15 Ineendet ne tinyei iitiik che kastoe
Matthew11:16 “Ago aroge nee ibini? Kergei ak lagok che tebyei eng' ole kiyae mung'aaret
Matthew11:17 ak kole
Matthew11:18 Amu ki nyo Johana ak ki ma amis anan koeeiso
Matthew11:19 Ki nyo Weeriitap chii koamis ak koeeiso
Matthew11:20 Ki toi anyun koger kong' nganasook che ki kiyae poisyonikyik che po kamuktaet
Matthew11:21 Pwo! Wee Korazin! Pwo! Wee Bethsaida! Amu nda kiga kiyai eng' Tyro ak Sidon poisyonik che po kamuktaet che ki kiyai eng' okweek
Matthew11:22 Ago amwaiwok ale
Matthew11:23 Ak inyee
Matthew11:24 Ago amwaiwok ale
Matthew11:25 Eng' peetuusyechooto kowol Jeso kole
Matthew11:26 ee
Matthew11:27 Ki kogoono tuguuk tugul Abba: ama mi ne ingen Weeriit
Matthew11:28 “Obwanjo
Matthew11:29 Otiiny kaat choginnyu ak oneetenage; amu aa tala ak aming'inige eng' muguleldo: si osich kamuung'et eng' saboonwekwok.
Matthew11:30 Amu nyumnyum choginnyu
Matthew12:1 Eng' kasarata
Matthew12:2 Ago ye kingo keer Pharisaik koleenji ineendet
Matthew12:3 Ago ki leenji icheek
Matthew12:4 Ki wo kootap Kamuktaindet ak koam magatiinik che itabaanatiin che ki ma kochamdaat eng' ng'atuutik koam ineendet anan che ki mi kobooto ineendet
Matthew12:5 Anan tomo osoman eng' ng'atuutik keele eng' peetuutap sabato kong'waniti tisiik sabato eng' Hekaluut
Matthew12:6 Ago amwaiwok ale
Matthew12:7 Ago nda ki ongen kaguiyetap ‘amache rireenetapkei ma tiseiywek
Matthew12:8 amu Weeriitap chii ko kiptaiyatap sabato.”
Matthew12:9 Kiwechigei eng' olooto ak kwo agoi sinagoginnywa
Matthew12:10 ki miitei chiito ne ki meat euut. Komachei kong'ach ineendet
Matthew12:11 Kowolji koleenji
Matthew12:12 Po kamanuut anyun ne tya chiito kosiir keechiiryet? Ara anyun
Matthew12:13 Eng' yooto
Matthew12:14 Ki manda anyun Pharisaik ak korwooch agobo ole partoi ineendet.
Matthew12:15 Ye kingo nai Jeso agobo nooto
Matthew12:16 ak kong'at kole mat kobarta ineendet
Matthew12:17 si kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah kole
Matthew12:18 “Ogeero
Matthew12:19 Matiitos
Matthew12:20 Ma iriei tegat ne chisot
Matthew12:21 Ak imang'u pororyosyek kainennyi.”
Matthew12:22 Ki kimutyi anyun chiito ne ki tinyei oindet ak ko koraat ak konamaat kuut. Ki isoop ineendet
Matthew12:23 Ki kwong'yo anyun tuiyosyek tugul koleen
Matthew12:24 Ago kingo kas Pharisaik
Matthew12:25 Ki ingen ineendet kabwaatutikwak ak ki leenji
Matthew12:26 Ngo oon `Setani Setani
Matthew12:27 Ngaon oik eng' Beelsebul
Matthew12:28 Ago ngaon oik eng' Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet
Matthew12:29 Anan
Matthew12:30 Ineendet ne ma kimi tuwai kogirindaa
Matthew12:31 Nooto anyun amwaiwok ale
Matthew12:32 Age tugul ne mwaitoe yaityo Weeriitap chii kenyochin kaat
Matthew12:33 “Oyai keetit komyeeit
Matthew12:34 Lagochu po erenooi
Matthew12:35 Ibune chii ne myee tuguuk che myach konorwennyi ne myee
Matthew12:36 “Amwaiwok ale
Matthew12:37 Ki ityinin imanda eng' ng'aleeguk
Matthew12:38 Ki wol alage `eng' siriik ak eng' Pharisaik kowolji ineendet koleenji
Matthew12:39 Ki wolji kole
Matthew12:40 Ko uu ye ki mi Jona peetuusyek somok ak kemousyek somok moetap njiryot ne oo miising'
Matthew12:41 Tuun tonondos piigap Nineveh ak ibini eng' kapkirwook ak korwookyi
Matthew12:42 Ng'eetei tuun laitoryat kobogoryot koyoop murot komostap tai ak ibini eng' kapkirwook ak korwookyi
Matthew12:43 “Ye kagomang'une chii `tamirmiryet ne murwoon
Matthew12:44 komwa kole
Matthew12:45 Yeityo kwo anyun komut oik alak tisap che yaach kosiir ineendet ak kochut ak komeny olooto; ak eng' let koyaitu atebeetap chiichooto kosiir ne ki po tai. Egu ko uu nooto agine eng' ibini ya.”
Matthew12:46 Kingo ta kong'alaaljin tuiyosyek
Matthew12:47 Ki mwachi chii age koleenji
Matthew12:48 Ago ki wolji ineendet koleenji
Matthew12:49 Kotokyin eunnyi kasubikyik
Matthew12:50 Amu age tugul ne yaei mageetap Abba ne mi kipsengwet
Matthew13:1 Ki wo Jeso peetuunooto komanda eng' koot ak kwo kotebee ngeguutap araraita.
Matthew13:2 Ki iyumjigei ineendet tuiyosyek che eecheen kot koit kolaany moingetap peek ak kotep ng'wony
Matthew13:3 Ki mwachi icheek tuguuk che chaang' eng' kalewenaik koleenji
Matthew13:4 ak kingo ta koletoi
Matthew13:5 Ki ibutyi alak ole mi koik
Matthew13:6 Kingo chor asiista
Matthew13:7 Ki ibutyi kesweek alak ole ki mi katook
Matthew13:8 Ki ibutyi alak ng'ung'unyek che myach
Matthew13:9 Ineendet ne tinyei itiik che kastoi
Matthew13:10 Ki pwa kasubik ak koleenji
Matthew13:11 Kowolji koleenji
Matthew13:12 Amu age tugul ne tinyei
Matthew13:13 Ang'alaaljini eng' kalewenaik amu nganda keertoi koma keerei kiy
Matthew13:14 Isuldaat eng' icheek maonateetap Isaiah ne leen
Matthew13:15 Amu kwalilenotin mugulelwegap pichu
Matthew13:16 “Ago iberuurotin konyekwok
Matthew13:17 Amwaiwok iman ale
Matthew13:18 “Ogas anyun okweek kalewenet ne po kolindet.
Matthew13:19 Ye kasei chii age tugul ng'olyootap laitornatet ama iguiyo
Matthew13:20 Nooto ne ki kilechi ole mi koik
Matthew13:21 ago amu ma tinyei tigitik ineendet
Matthew13:22 Nooto ne ki kilechi ole mi katook
Matthew13:23 Ne ki kilechi ng'ung'unyek che myach
Matthew13:24 Ki mwachi kalewenet age koleenji
Matthew13:25 ago ye kita koruitos piik
Matthew13:26 Ago ye kingo piityo minutik
Matthew13:27 Ki pwa otwogik che po chiitap koot ak koleenji
Matthew13:28 Kowolji koleenji
Matthew13:29 Ago ki leenji
Matthew13:30 Ingobiityo tugul agoi kesisyet
Matthew13:31 Ki mwachi kalewenet age koleenji
Matthew13:32 Ming'in iman eng' kesweek tugul
Matthew13:33 Ki mwachi kogeny kalewenet age koleenji
Matthew13:34 Ki mwachi Jeso tuiyosyek tuguuchuuto tugul eng' kalewenaik; ki ma ng'alaalji icheek ama eng' kalewenet
Matthew13:35 si kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot kole: “Ayaate kutinnyu eng' kalewenaik; amwae tuguuk che ki kiuny kobooch koga kelumda ng'wony.”
Matthew13:36 Ki pagaakta anyun tuiyosyek
Matthew13:37 Ki wolji kole
Matthew13:38 ak mbareet ko ng'wony. Kesweek che myach ko weeriik che po laitornatet
Matthew13:39 Puunyoot ne ki koolei chemulbainik ko chesawilyet. Kesisyet ko kagesunetap ng'wony ak kesik ko malaikaisyek.
Matthew13:40 Ko uu ye kiyumi chemulbainik ak kebeel eng' maat
Matthew13:41 Iyooktoi Weeriitap chii malaikaisyekyik
Matthew13:42 ak kowiirchi maat ne oo
Matthew13:43 Iluu anyun che po imanda ko uu asiista eng' laitornatetap Kwandanywa. Ineendet ne tinyei iitiik
Matthew13:44 “Kergei pounatetap kipsengwet ak kiy ne po kamanuut ne ung'aat eng' mbar ne kinyoor chii ak kouny. Ki wo kogasategei ak koalda tugul che ki tinyei si koale mbaranooto.
Matthew13:45 “Kogeny
Matthew13:46 ak ye kingo kagonyoor sonoiyat agenge ne po alyet ne oo
Matthew13:47 “Kora
Matthew13:48 Ye kingo kagonyi
Matthew13:49 Egu ko uu nooto eng' kagesunetap ng'wony. Tuun pwoonei malaikaisyek koobeesyo che yaacheen eng' kwenutap che po imanda
Matthew13:50 ak kowiirchi maat ne lalei
Matthew13:51 “Kaoguiye tuguuchuuto tugul?” Kowol kole
Matthew13:52 Koleenji anyun
Matthew13:53 Ye kingo kagogees Jeso kalewenaichu
Matthew13:54 Ki it nganaseennyi ne po kaa
Matthew13:55 Tos ma weeriitap musogindet ni? Ma kiguure kamet Maria ak weeriik che tupcho ko Jakobo
Matthew13:56 Tos ma mi chepkametwagik tugul kobootech? Ki nyoorunee ano anyun chiichi tuguuchuuto tugul?”
Matthew13:57 Ki inach icheek ng'aleekyik. Ago ki leenji `Jeso icheek
Matthew13:58 Ma yai kwang'utik che chaang' eng' olooto amu pistoennywa.
Matthew14:1 Ki kas eng' peetuusyechooto pounindet Herod logoiywek agobo Jeso
Matthew14:2 ak ki leenji otwogikyik
Matthew14:3 Kiga konam `Herod Johana
Matthew14:4 Amu ki leenji Johana ineendet
Matthew14:5 Nganda kimachei Herod kobar ineendet
Matthew14:6 Ago ye kingo it peetuut ne po kabwaatetap sigeetap Herod
Matthew14:7 Ak ki iyasyechi Herod kogoochi kiy age tugul ne kasoom.
Matthew14:8 Ak ye kingo kagong'ulang'ul kamet
Matthew14:9 Ki aragenji laitoryat ng'olyoondoni; ak amu konyit ne kiting'e icheek che kitebyei ak ineendet eng' amisyet
Matthew14:10 ki iyookto anyun keetil metitap Johana eng' korgoreet.
Matthew14:11 Ak ki kiip metinnyi eng' tageito
Matthew14:12 Ki pwa anyun kasubikyik
Matthew14:13 Ye kingo kas Jeso
Matthew14:14 Ak kingo mong' kogeer tuiyet ne oo
Matthew14:15 Eng' koskoleng'unooto
Matthew14:16 Ago ki leenji Jeso
Matthew14:17 Ak ki leenji
Matthew14:18 Koleenji
Matthew14:19 Ki ng'at tuiyosyek kotep ng'wony eng' susweek. Ki inam magatinichooto muut ak injirenichooto aeng' ak konyal kipsengwet ak koberuur. Kibuutul ak kogoochi kasubikyik magatiinichooto
Matthew14:20 Ki amis tugul kot kobiyong'so
Matthew14:21 Icheek che ki amis ko ki neegit murenik eliphuusyek muut ama kiit kobogorisyek ak lagok.
Matthew14:22 Ak ki ichirchir eng' yooto kasubikyik kolaany moingetap peek
Matthew14:23 Ak kingo kagoyomis tuiyosyek koba
Matthew14:24 Ago kigaiit moinget peek kween
Matthew14:25 Ak eng' riipseet ne po ang'wan ne po kemoi kwo ole mi icheeget
Matthew14:26 Ak ye kingo keer kasubikyik ineendet kobunei araraita parak
Matthew14:27 Ago ki ng'alaalji Jeso icheek eng' yooto koleenji
Matthew14:28 Ak ki wolji Petero koleenji
Matthew14:29 Ak ki le
Matthew14:30 Ago ye kingo keer usoonet

Matthew14:32 Ak ye kingo kagolaany icheek moinget
Matthew14:33 Ak ki ilas ineendet icheek che ki mi moinget
Matthew14:34 Ak ye kingo kagolanda
Matthew14:35 Ak ye kingo nai piigap koronooto ineendet
Matthew14:36 ak ki igaigai ineendet kole kotwa agot tabandap ngoryennyi: ak kisopchi tugul che kitwa.

Matthew15:8 ‘Teecha pichu eng' kutusweekwak
Matthew15:9 Ilaswo icheek puch; kaneetisyosyekwak che ineetisye ko ng'atuutigap piik.’ ”

Matthew16:2 Ago ki wolji icheeget koleenji
Matthew16:3 ak ngo ek karon omwa ole
Matthew16:4 Cheeng'ei kaboorunet ibinda ne ya

Matthew17:1 Kingo pata peetuusyek lo komut Jeso Petero
Matthew17:2 Kiwalak ineendet eng' tainnywa

Matthew18:1 Ki pwanji `kasubik Jeso eng' sainooto ak koteebe kole
Matthew18:2 Ki kuur lakweet ne ming'in ak kotonon eng' kwenunnywa
Matthew18:3 ak kole
Matthew18:4 Nooto anyun age tugul ne iming'inegei ko uu lakwani ming'in
Matthew18:5 Ak age tugul ne taachei lakweet ne ming'in ne uu ni eng' kainennyu ko kataacha.
Matthew18:6 “Ago age tugul ne inachi age eng' chu mengech iyana
Matthew18:7 Pwo ng'wony amu kanagutik! Pwoonei kanagutik iman; ago pwo eng' chiichooto punu kanagutyet!
Matthew18:8 “Ngo nachin eung'ung' anan keeldong'ung'
Matthew18:9 Ak ngo nachin kondang'ung'
Matthew18:10 “Oriip si mosas age eng' chu mengech; amu amwaiwok ale malaikaisyekwak eng' kipsengwet ko keerei kotugul togeetap Abba ne mi kipsengwet.
Matthew18:11 Amu ki nyo Weeriitap chii kosar ne kiga kobet.
Matthew18:12 Oleen nee okweek? Ngo tinyei chii keechiirek pogol
Matthew18:13 Ak ngo nyoor
Matthew18:14 Ko uu nooto anyun koma mageetap Kwandang'wong' ne mi kipsengwet
Matthew18:15 “Ngo chalwogenjin ne otupche
Matthew18:16 Ago ngo ma kasin
Matthew18:17 Ngo eesyo kogas icheek
Matthew18:18 “Amwaiwok iman ale
Matthew18:19 Amwaiwok kogeny
Matthew18:20 Amu ole katuiyechi aeng'u anan somok eng' kainennyu
Matthew18:21 Ki nyo anyun Petero ak koteep kole
Matthew18:22 Kowolji Jeso kole
Matthew18:23 Nooto anyun kiyanie pounatetap kipsengwet laitoryat anum
Matthew18:24 Ye kingo toi koiit
Matthew18:25 Ak amu ki ma kotinyei kiy ne yaaktae
Matthew18:26 Ki ibutyi ng'wony anyun otwogindonooto kosaisai ineendet kole
Matthew18:27 Koriree kiptaiyandanooto inee
Matthew18:28 “Ago kimanda otwogindonooto kai
Matthew18:29 Ki ibutyi ng'wony anyun ne kiboisyei tuwai
Matthew18:30 Ago ki eesyo; ak ki wo kotoorchi ineendet korgoreet
Matthew18:31 “Ye kingo keer anyun che kiboisyei tugul tuguuk che kagoyaagiis
Matthew18:32 Ki kuur anyun kiptaiyandennyi ineendet konyo ak koleenji
Matthew18:33 Tos ki ma nyoljin iriiree ne oboisyei tuwai
Matthew18:34 “Eng' nereeknateet koging'at kiptaiyandennyi kigoochi ineendet kergong'yet ne ng'waan
Matthew18:35 Yaiywok ko uu nooto agine Abba ne po kipsengwet
Matthew19:1 Ye kingo kagogees Jeso ng'aleechu
Matthew19:2 Ki isup ineendet tuiyosyek che eecheen; ak ki isoop icheek eng' olooto.
Matthew19:3 Ki pwanji ineendet `alage eng' Pharisaik ak kotyem kole
Matthew19:4 Kowolji kole
Matthew19:5 ak ki le
Matthew19:6 Si ma ko aeng' ago poorto agenge. Nooto anyun
Matthew19:7 Ki leenji anyun pichooto ineendet
Matthew19:8 Ki mwachi icheek koleenji
Matthew19:9 Amwaiwok ale
Matthew19:10 Koleenji kasubikyik ineendet
Matthew19:11 Ago ki leenji `ineendet icheek
Matthew19:12 Amu miitei sirorinik che ki kisich ko uu nooto kobooch mootinwegap kametwagikwak; miitei piik che ki kimooch; ak miitei piik che ki imoigei agobo pounatetap kipsengwet. Ineendet ne imuuchi kotaach ni
Matthew19:13 Ki kimutyi anyun lagok che mengech
Matthew19:14 Ki le Jeso
Matthew19:15 Ye kingo konoor eunekyik icheek
Matthew19:16 Ki nyoonji chii ak kole
Matthew19:17 Ak ki leenji ineendet

Matthew19:28 Ki leenji `Jeso icheek
Matthew19:29 Ak age tugul ne ki kobagakta kooriik
Matthew19:30 Ago che chaang' che po tai ko tuun egu che po let; ak che po let ko tuun egu che po tai.
Matthew20:1 “Amu kergei pounatetap kipsengwet ak chiitap ko po koot
Matthew20:2 Ye kingo kagoyanjin ak meechooto kogoochi dinarit agenge eng' peetuut agenge
Matthew20:3 Ki manda ko neegit sait somok ak kogeer alak kotonondos eng' ye mi ole keyae mung'aaret ama tinyei poisyet.
Matthew20:4 Ak ki leenji icheek
Matthew20:5 Ki manda kogeny ko neegit sait lo ak eng' sait sogool

Matthew20:27 ak age tugul ne machei koek ne po tai eng' kwenung'wong' koek otwogindeng'wong';

Matthew24:1 Ye ki mandoi Jeso eng' Hekaluut kowendi pandanyi
Matthew24:2 Ago ki wolji ineendet icheek kole
Matthew24:3 Ye kitebyei ng'wony eng' tulweetap Mseituni
Matthew24:4 Kowolji Jeso koleenji
Matthew24:5 Amu tuun pwoonei che chaang' eng' kainennyu koleen
Matthew24:6 Tuun ogase agobo lugoosyek ak ng'aleek agobo paretapkei; oriipkei si moaragense; amu pwoonei tuguuchu matiny; ago tomo koitu kagesunet.
Matthew24:7 Amu tuun setyin pororyet age pororyet age
Matthew24:8 Ago tuguuchu tugul ko taunetap ng'waninwek.
Matthew24:9 “Ak kogoitok icheek kinyaliilak ak kebaraak; ak kowechok pororyosyek tugul agobo kainennyu.
Matthew24:10 Tuun ibutyin tengek che chaang'
Matthew24:11 Tuun ng'eetos maotik che chaang' che po lembech ak kobeet che chaang'.
Matthew24:12 Ak amu tesoksei yaityet
Matthew24:13 Ago ineendet ne muitoi agoi kagesunet
Matthew24:14 Ak logoiywechu myach po laitornatet ko tuun keamdaati eng' ng'wony komugul koek paornateet eng' pororyosyek tugul; ak koit anyun kagesunet.
Matthew24:15 “Ye ogeer anyun kiit ne kiwechei ne po ng'emisyet kotonone ole-tiliil
Matthew24:16 ko ingomwechi tuloonook anyun icheek che mi Judea;
Matthew24:17 ama choorugei ineendet ne mi koot parak si konem tuguuk che mi koonnyi;
Matthew24:18 ama weekyingei let ne mi mbar si koip ngoryennyi.
Matthew24:19 Pwo eng' icheek che chii oo ak che tinyei lagok che reritos eng' peetuusyechooto!
Matthew24:20 Osaa anyun si ma piit mweeng'wong' eng' peetuusyegap kaititindo anan eng' peetuutap sabato.
Matthew24:21 Amu tuun piitu nyalilda ne oo
Matthew24:22 Ak nda ma kiga keetil konwagitu peetuusyechooto
Matthew24:23 “Ngo mwaiwok chii age tugul eng' peetuunooto kole
Matthew24:24 Amu tuun ng'eetos Kristoisyek che po lembech ak maotik che po lembech
Matthew24:25 Ogeero
Matthew24:26 Nooto anyun ngo mwaiwok kole
Matthew24:27 Ko uu ye mong'u kalyeleet eng' kong'asiis ak kegeerot agoi cherongo
Matthew24:28 Oldo age tugul ole mi muusto
Matthew24:29 “Ne ma tyanit ko kagogeskei nyalilda ne po peetuusyechooto
Matthew24:30 “Ak kotook anyun eng' kipsengwet kaboorunetap Weeriitap chii
Matthew24:31 Ak tuun iyooktoi malaikaisyekyik ak cheet ne oo ne po iryageet
Matthew24:32 “Oneetkei anyun kalewenetap mogoywet: ye kang'arng'aritu mooriikyik
Matthew24:33 Ara uu nooto
Matthew24:34 Amwaiwok iman ale
Matthew24:35 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng'wony
Matthew24:36 “Ago ma naei chii age tugul agobo peetuunooto ak sainooto
Matthew24:37 Ko uu ole kiteptoi peetuusyechu ki po Noah
Matthew24:38 Ko uu eng' peetuusyechooto ye kitom kobiit maraneet ko ki amisyei ak koeisei
Matthew24:39 ak ki ma nai icheek agoi koit maraneet ak kogees icheek tugul
Matthew24:40 Tuun poisyei murenik aeng'u eng' mbar; kimuti age
Matthew24:41 Tuun ng'aisei kobogorisyek aeng'u eng' koita agenge; kimuti age
Matthew24:42 Oriipse anyun
Matthew24:43 Ago onai ni: nda kiga nai chiitap ko po koot kole sait ngoro ne nyoonei choriindet
Matthew24:44 Nooto anyun ochoboge ak okweek
Matthew24:45 “Ng'oo anyun otwogindet ne kiyani ak ko utaat
Matthew24:46 Paibai otwogindonooto nyooru kiptaiyandennyi komi koboisye ye weigei ineendet.
Matthew24:47 Amwaiwok iman ale
Matthew24:48 Ago ngo mwa otwogindet ne ya eng' muguleldanyi
Matthew24:49 ak kotoi kobir otwogik
Matthew24:50 nyoonei anyun kiptaiyatap otwogindonooto eng' peetuut ne leen ineendet ma nyoonei
Matthew24:51 ak kobir miising' ak kogoochi kebebertanyi kobooto chombilik
Matthew25:1 “Ki yanie anyun pounatetap kipsengwet pergeinik taman che ki ip taisyekwak ak koba kotorookta sandetap katunisyet.
Matthew25:2 Ki perberen muutu eng' icheek ak ki utaatiin muutu.
Matthew25:3 Ye kingo ip che perber taisyekwak
Matthew25:4 ago ki ip che utaatiin mwanik eng' chuboisyekwak kobooto taisyekwak.
Matthew25:5 Ak ye kita kogaegei sandet
Matthew25:6 Ago ki piit waagaat kemoi kween
Matthew25:7 Ki ng'eetyo anyun pergeinichooto tugul
Matthew25:8 Ak ki leenji anyun che perber che utaatiin
Matthew25:9 Ago ki wolji che utaatiin
Matthew25:10 Ak kingo ta kobendi koalisyei
Matthew25:11 Ak eng' let kobwa pergeinik chugai ak icheek
Matthew25:12 Ago ki wol kole
Matthew25:13 Nooto anyun oriipse
Matthew25:14 “Amu uu ye wendi chii emet age
Matthew25:15 Ki igoochi age talendaisyek muut
Matthew25:16 Ki wo anyun ineendet ne kitaach talendaisyek muut ak kwo koboisyee
Matthew25:17 Ki yai ko uu nooto agine ne kitaach aeng' ak kinyoor aeng' alak.
Matthew25:18 Ago ineendet ne kitaach agenge kogiwo kobal ng'wony ak kounyee yooto fedha ne po kiptaiyandennyi.
Matthew25:19 “Ye kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang'
Matthew25:20 Ak ki nyo ineendet ne kiga taach talendaisyek muut koibu talendaisyek muut alak ak kole
Matthew25:21 Ki leenji kiptaiyandennyi
Matthew25:22 “Ak ki nyo agine ne kiga taach talendaisyek aeng' ak kole
Matthew25:23 Ki leenji kiptaiyandennyi
Matthew25:24 “Ki nyo agine ne kiga taach talendait agenge ak kole
Matthew25:25 ara ki aiywei
Matthew25:26 “Ago ki wolji kiptaiyandennyi ak koleenji
Matthew25:27 Kiga nyoljin anyun indeiywo fedhaisyekyuk ole tesoksei
Matthew25:28 Orebee anyun ineendet talendait
Matthew25:29 Amu age tugul ne tinyei
Matthew25:30 Otoorchin anyun otwogindet ne ma tilei kiy mesundeito ne po saang'
Matthew25:31 “Ye nyo Weeriitap chii eng' toroornatennyi
Matthew25:32 Tuun kiyumji tainnyi pororyosyek tugul
Matthew25:33 ak konde keechiirek eunnyi ne po tai ak ng'oroorek eng' kaataam.
Matthew25:34 “Yeityo komwachi `Laitoryat icheek che mi eunnyi ne po tai koleenji
Matthew25:35 amu ki ama rubeet ak ki ogoono aam
Matthew25:36 ki ami aach ngor ak ki olaaksewo
Matthew25:37 Kowolji anyun che po imanda koleenji
Matthew25:38 Ak ki kigeerin au ko ii too ak ketaachin
Matthew25:39 Ak ki kigeerin au imyani anan eng' korgoreet ak kerutochin?’
Matthew25:40 Ak kowolji Laitoryat koleenji
Matthew25:41 “Koleenji anyun icheek che mi murot kaataam
Matthew25:42 amu ki ama rubeet ak ki ma ogoono aam
Matthew25:43 ki aa too ak ki ma otaacha
Matthew25:44 “Kowol anyun icheek kole
Matthew25:45 Kowolji anyun kole
Matthew25:46 Ak pendi chu ole mi nyalilda ne po koigeny; ago pendi che po imanda ole mi saboondap koigeny.”
Matthew26:1 Ye kingo kagogees Jeso ng'aleechu tugul
Matthew26:2 “Ongen ole ye ibata peetuusyek aeng'u koek igoortap paska
Matthew26:3 Ki iyumgei anyun tisiik che eecheen ak poisyegap pichooto eng' seremutap kootap tisiindet ne oo
Matthew26:4 ak kitet icheek ng'aleek kole si konam Jeso eng' ng'aalseet ak kobar ineendet.
Matthew26:5 Ago ki mwa icheek kole
Matthew26:6 Ak ye ki mi Jeso Bethania eng' kootap Simion ne ki tinyei mogondosaik
Matthew26:7 konyonji ineendet kobogoryot ne ki tinyei chuboit ne mi mwaita ne nyamdut ne mi parak miising' alyennyi
Matthew26:8 Ago ye kingo keer kasubik
Matthew26:9 Amu kota ki aldoe mwai tuguuk che chaang'
Matthew26:10 Ago ye kingo nai Jeso
Matthew26:11 Amu otinye kotugul kibananook; ago ma mi anee kobootok kotugul.
Matthew26:12 Amu ye roong'ji mwaita poortanyu
Matthew26:13 Amwaiwok iman ale

Matthew26:15 ak kole
Matthew26:16 Ak kobooch yooto kocheeng' ineendet poroindo ne ng'wektoe ineendet.

Matthew26:18 Ki le ineendet
Matthew26:19 Ak ki yai kasubik ko uu ye ki ng'at Jeso
Matthew26:20 Ye kingo ek koskoleny kotebi eng' amisyet kobooto kasubikyik chooto taman ak aeng';
Matthew26:21 ak ye kita koamisyei
Matthew26:22 Ak ki iimak icheek miising' ak kotoi komwachi ineendet age tugul koleenji
Matthew26:23 Ki wol kole
Matthew26:24 Wendi Weeriitap chii
Matthew26:25 Ki teebee Judas
Matthew26:26 Ye ki amisyei
Matthew26:27 Ki nam kigombet
Matthew26:28 amu chu ko korotiikyuk che po arorutyet
Matthew26:29 Amwaiwok ale
Matthew26:30 Ye kingo kagotyen tyendo
Matthew26:31 Ki mwachi Jeso icheek koleenji
Matthew26:32 Ago ye tuun king'eeta
Matthew26:33 Ago ki wol Petero kole
Matthew26:34 Koleenji Jeso
Matthew26:35 Koleenji Petero
Matthew26:36 Ki pa anyun Jeso kobooto icheek ole kiguure Gethsemane
Matthew26:37 Ki imut Petero ak weeriik aeng' che po Zebedayo
Matthew26:38 Ki mwachi ineendet anyun icheek koleenji
Matthew26:39 Ak ki wo tai kitigin
Matthew26:40 Ki nyo koweek ole mi kasubik ak konyoor icheek koruitos
Matthew26:41 Oriipse ak osaae
Matthew26:42 Ki wo kogeny ne po aeng' ak ki sa kole
Matthew26:43 Ki nyo koweek kogeny ak konyoor icheek koruitos
Matthew26:44 Ki pagaach icheek kogeny
Matthew26:45 Ki nyoonji anyun kasubik ak koleenji
Matthew26:46 Ong'eetyee
Matthew26:47 Kingo ta kong'alaali
Matthew26:48 Kiga komwachi icheek kabooruno
Matthew26:49 Ki nyoonji Jeso eng' yooto ak kole
Matthew26:50 Ki leenji `Jeso ineendet
Matthew26:51 Eng' sainooto
Matthew26:52 Koleenji Jeso anyun
Matthew26:53 Anan ileen ma muuchi asoom Abba
Matthew26:54 Isuldoitoi ano anyun siruutik
Matthew26:55 Ki leenji `Jeso tuiyosyek eng' sainooto
Matthew26:56 Ago kabwa chu tugul
Matthew26:57 Ki imut icheeget che kiga nam Jeso kwo kootap tisiindet ne oo ne kiguure Caiaphas
Matthew26:58 Ago ki isubot Petero ineendet eng' ye loo kot koit seremutap kootap tisiindet ne oo
Matthew26:59 Ak ki cheeng' tisiik che eecheen ak kapkirwooget komugul paornateet ne po lembech agobo Jeso
Matthew26:60 ago ki ma nyoor
Matthew26:61 ak kole
Matthew26:62 Ki tonon tisiindet ne oo ak koleenji
Matthew26:63 Ago ki siis Jeso. Ki leenji tisiindet ne oo
Matthew26:64 Koleenji Jeso
Matthew26:65 Kigereer anyun tisiindet ne oo ngoroikyik ak kole
Matthew26:66 Oleen nee?” Kowol icheek kole
Matthew26:67 Kising'ilji togeennyi ak koluch; ak korabach alak
Matthew26:68 kole
Matthew26:69 Kitebyei Petero eng' seremutap koot. Ak ki wo chepto ye mi ineendet ak koleenji
Matthew26:70 Ago ki eesyo eng' taitap tugul kole
Matthew26:71 Kingo kagomanda kwo keter
Matthew26:72 Ki eesyo kogeny eng' kayasyoet kole
Matthew26:73 Ne ma tya kobwa che kitonondos eng' ye neegit ak koleenji Petero
Matthew26:74 Ki toi anyun kochubis ak koyasyo kole
Matthew26:75 Ki ibwaat Petero ng'olyoot ne kiga komwa Jeso kole
Matthew27:1 Ye kingo kagoeech
Matthew27:2 Ki rat ineendet
Matthew27:3 Ye kingo keer Judas anyun kole kagirwookyi Jeso
Matthew27:4 Ki mwa kole
Matthew27:5 Ki wiirchi fedhaisyechooto Hekaluut
Matthew27:6 Ak ki nam tisiik che eecheen fedhaisyechooto ak kole
Matthew27:7 Ki irwooch ak kotil koboisyee fedhaisyechooto koale mbareetap cheptereniot si koek ole kitupchin toek.
Matthew27:8 Amu nooto anyun ko ki kiguuree mbaranooto mbareetap korotiik agoi rani.
Matthew27:9 Ki isulda anyun ne ki kagimwa eng' maotyot Jeremiah keele
Matthew27:10 ak ki igoito icheek koale mbareet ne po cheptereniot ko uu ye ki kang'ata Kiptaiyat.”
Matthew27:11 Ki tonon Jeso anyun eng' taitap pounindet ak kiteebe pounindet koleenji
Matthew27:12 Ago ye kingo taam ineendet tisiik che eecheen ak poisyek
Matthew27:13 Komwachi anyun Pilato ineendet koleenji
Matthew27:14 Ago mawolji kiy
Matthew27:15 Ki cham kotyakyin pounindet tuiyet kimonjororyot agenge ne kacham icheek eng' peetuutap igoorto.
Matthew27:16 Eng' kasarata
Matthew27:17 Ye kingo kagoyumgei anyun
Matthew27:18 Ki ingen kole kagigoito ineendet eng' ng'etkonda.
Matthew27:19 Ye kingo ta kotononjin kirwooget
Matthew27:20 Kisaisai tisiik che eecheen ak poisyek tuiyosyek kole kosoom kityaach Barabbas ak kebar Jeso.
Matthew27:21 Ki leenji pounindet icheek kogeny
Matthew27:22 Koleenji Pilato
Matthew27:23 koteebee koleenji
Matthew27:24 Ye kingo keer Pilato kole mata komuuch koyai kiy ago ki neegit kotoigei chemargeet
Matthew27:25 Ki wol piik tugul kole
Matthew27:26 Ki ityakyi Barabbas ak ye kingo kagobir `Pilato Jeso
Matthew27:27 Ki imut anyun kiplugotinigap pounindet Jeso kwo Praitorium
Matthew27:28 Ki ireegune ngoroikyik ak kolaakyi sambut ne piriir.
Matthew27:29 Kitaa ngatyetap katook ak konde metinnyi. Ki inde tegat eunnyi ne po tai ak ko kutung'so eng' tainnyi ak kochotei koleen
Matthew27:30 Kising'ilji ineendet ak konam tegat kokwere metinnyi.
Matthew27:31 Ye kingo kagochot ineendet
Matthew27:32 Ye ki mi kobendi
Matthew27:33 Ye kingo it ole kiguure Golgota
Matthew27:34 kogoochi ineendet siki koe che ki kiburukto tuguuk che ng'woneen
Matthew27:35 Kingo kagogartaat ineendet
Matthew27:36 ak kotep ng'wony koriip ineendet eng' olooto.
Matthew27:37 Ki inde paragutap metinnyi kataamset ne ki kisir keele
Matthew27:38 Ki kigartaat ineendet ak rebiik aeng' eng' yooto
Matthew27:39 Kichurachur ineendet che kisiirtoi ak koleglegoti metowekwak
Matthew27:40 koleen
Matthew27:41 Kichurachur ko uu nooto ak icheek tisiik che eecheen kobooto siriik ak poisyek koleen
Matthew27:42 “Ki sar alak; ama imuuchi kosargei. Ineendet Laitoryatap Israel; ingochoorgei nguno eng' kimurtoiyot
Matthew27:43 Imang'u Kamuktaindet; ingosar ineendet nguno ngot komachei amu ki le
Matthew27:44 Kichurochur ak icheek ko uu nooto rebiik che kiga kigartaat kobooto ineendet.
Matthew27:45 Ki imenit anyun emet komugul kong'etee sait lo agoi sait sogool.
Matthew27:46 Ye kingo olo po sait sogool
Matthew27:47 Kingo kas alak eng' icheek che kitonondos eng' olooto
Matthew27:48 Eng' yooto kolabat age eng' icheek kwo konem sponjit ak konyiit siki
Matthew27:49 Ki mwa chuun alak kole
Matthew27:50 Ki kuurso Jeso kogeny eng' kutit ne oo
Matthew27:51 Ogeero
Matthew27:52 Ki yaatagis kereeriisyek ak ki king'eet poorwegap piik che chaang' che tiliileen che ki ruitos.
Matthew27:53 Kingo kagong'eet Jeso
Matthew27:54 Ye kingo keer chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol ak icheeget che ki mi kobooto ineendet koriibei Jeso potaneetap ng'wony
Matthew27:55 Ki mi eng' olooto kobogorisyek che chaang' che kigeerei eng' ye loo
Matthew27:56 Ki Maria Magdalene age eng' kobogorisyechooto kobooto Maria kametap Jakobo ak Joses
Matthew27:57 Kingo kagoek koskoleng'
Matthew27:58 Ki wo chiichooto ole mi Pilato
Matthew27:59 Ki ip Joseph poorto ak kotaae angeetap katanit ne tiliil
Matthew27:60 ak konde kererinnyi ne leel ne kiga kobal eng' rwandet. Kimilji koita ne oo kurgeetap kererit kogeree yeityo kwo.
Matthew27:61 Ki mi yooto Maria Magdalene ak Maria age kotebyei eng' taitap kererit.
Matthew27:62 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi
Matthew27:63 ak koleenji
Matthew27:64 Ng'at anyun keriip kererit komyee agoi peetuut ne po somok
Matthew27:65 Koleenji Pilato icheek
Matthew27:66 Koba anyun ak ribiik koriip kererit; king'ooch koita ak koriip kererit komyee.
Matthew28:1 Kingo neegit kogeskei peetuutap sabato
Matthew28:2 Keero
Matthew28:3 Ki uu kalyeleet itoondanyi
Matthew28:4 Ki potanso asigarik kot koigei piich che kagobek amu ki iywei ineendet.
Matthew28:5 Ki mwachi malaikaiyat kobogorisyek koleenji
Matthew28:6 Ma komi yu; amu kagong'eet
Matthew28:7 ak obe ochakte omwachi kasubikyik oleenji
Matthew28:8 Ara ki pa kochaakta kobagaach kererit eng' kaiyweisyet ak poiboiyet ne oo
Matthew28:9 Ak ogeero
Matthew28:10 Ki leenji Jeso anyun icheek
Matthew28:11 Ye kita kobendi
Matthew28:12 Kingo kagoyumgei ak poisyek
Matthew28:13 koleenji
Matthew28:14 Ngo kas pounindet ng'olyoondoniito
Matthew28:15 Kotaach anyun fedhaisyek ak koyai ko uu ye kaginet. Ak ki yom ng'olyoondoniito Yahudik
Matthew28:16 Ki pa Galilaya kasubik tamanu ak agenge
Matthew28:17 Ye kingo keer `icheek ineendet
Matthew28:18 Ak ki nyoonji `Jeso icheek ak koleenji
Matthew28:19 Nooto anyun oba ak oyai piigap pororyosyek tugul koek kasubik
Matthew28:20 oneet icheek koosup tuguuk tugul che kaang'atak. Ak ogeero
Mark1:1 Taunetap logoiywek che myach che po Jeso Kristo
Mark1:2 Ko uu ye ki kisir eng' maotyot Isaiah keele
Mark1:3 tuugeetap chii ne kuursei eng' surkwen koleen
Mark1:4 Ki nyo Johana kobatisanisyei eng' surkwen ak koamdoi kabatisanet ne po siguunet agobo nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogik.
Mark1:5 Ak ki pwanji `piik ineendet kobunu emet komugul ne po Judea ak meng'iigap Jerusalem tugul; ak ki ibatisan icheek eng' aineetap Jordan
Mark1:6 Ki ilaachi Johana sambut ne po tambeesik ak ki rategei pireneetap muito
Mark1:7 Ak ki amda kole
Mark1:8 Ki abatisanak eng' peek; ago ibatisanook ineendet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil.”
Mark1:9 Ki nyo anyun Jeso eng' peetuusyechooto kobunu Nazareth ne po Galilaya
Mark1:10 Yeityo kogatogos eng' peek
Mark1:11 Ak ki mong' tuugeet eng' kipsengwet kole
Mark1:12 Ak koma tyanit komut Kabuuset ne Tiliil ineendet kotokyi surkwen.
Mark1:13 Ki tebi ineendet eng' surkwen peetuusyek artam koyomei Setani; ak kitebyei ak tyong'ik che po timiin; ak ki poisyechin ineendet malaikaisyek.
Mark1:14 Kingo kagenam Johana
Mark1:15 koleen
Mark1:16 Ye kiwendi Jeso kobunei tabandap araraita ne po Galilaya
Mark1:17 Koleenji `Jeso icheek
Mark1:18 Ak ki pagaakta regereiywekwak ak koosup ineendet.
Mark1:19 Ak ye ki pa kitigin
Mark1:20 Ki kuur `ineendet icheek; ak ki pagaakta kwandanywa Zebedayo komi moinget kobooto otwogik
Mark1:21 Ki pa anyun Kapernaum; ak ye kibetut ne po sabato
Mark1:22 Ki kwong'yo icheek eng' kaneetisyennyi
Mark1:23 Ki mi sainooto eng' sinagoginnywa chii ne ki tinyei tamirmiryet ne murwoon
Mark1:24 kole
Mark1:25 Ago ki kergong' `Jeso ineendet koleenji
Mark1:26 Ak kibirabirto ineendet ak kowaachei eng' kutit ne oo
Mark1:27 Ki tang'any tugul
Mark1:28 Kong'eetee yooto ko kinaak inee eng' komoswek tugul che po Galilaya.
Mark1:29 Ye kingo mong' eng' sinagogit
Mark1:30 Ki myani kametap kwondap Simion kolalee maat ak kiruei
Mark1:31 Ki nyo ak konam eunnyi
Mark1:32 Kingo ek koskoleny
Mark1:33 Ak ki iyumgei nganaseet komugul eng' kurgat.
Mark1:34 Ki isoop che chaang' che ki myandos eng' myanwek che teerchiin
Mark1:35 Eng' karon kogairir emet
Mark1:36 Ki isup `Simion ak icheek che ki mi tugul.
Mark1:37 Kingo nyoor ineendet
Mark1:38 Kowolji koleenji
Mark1:39 Ki wo koyom Galilaya komugul
Mark1:40 Ki nyoonji ineendet `chii ne ki tinyei mogondosaik kosoomei ak kogutunyi koleenjin
Mark1:41 Kiriree ineendet ak koyogoito eunnyi kotwa ak koleenji
Mark1:42 Eng' yooto
Mark1:43 Ki kergong' ineendet ak kotyakta kwo;
Mark1:44 koleenji
Mark1:45 Ago kimanda inee ak kotoi komwaitaat ak kobarastaat ng'olyoondonooto kot ko mata komuuch kowendoot Jeso eng' nganaseet kegeeroti
Mark2:1 Kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang' ak koweek kogeny Kapernaum
Mark2:2 Ki iyumgei piik che chaang' kot koma ng'et poroin
Mark2:3 Ki pwa piich ang'wanu koganabu chii ne ki meat poor.
Mark2:4 Ago ye ki mata komuuch komutyi ineendet amu tuiyet
Mark2:5 Kingo keer Jeso kayanennywa
Mark2:6 Ago ki miitei olooto siriik alak che kitebyei ak kobwaati eng' mugulelwekwak koleen
Mark2:7 “Amu nee si komwaei chiichi ko uu ni? Ang' kagowech! Ng'oo ne imuuchi konyochi chii kaat tengekwogik kobatee Kamuktaindet ineegei?”
Mark2:8 Ki nai anyun Jeso eng' saboondanyi kole ka ibwaati ko uu nooto icheegei
Mark2:9 Nee ne nyumnyum
Mark2:10 Ago si onai ole tinyei Weeriitap chii kimnateet eng' ng'wony konyochi kaat tengekwogik.” Koleenji anyun chiichooto ki meat poorto
Mark2:11 “Amwaun aleenjinin
Mark2:12 Ki ng'eet anyun ak koip itogunnyi
Mark2:13 Ki wo Jeso kogeny tabandap araraita; ak ki pwa tuiyet komugul ye mi ineendet
Mark2:14 Ye kisiirtoi
Mark2:15 Ye ki amisyei eng' kootap Lawi
Mark2:16 Kingo keer siriigap Pharisaik koamisyei ineendet kobooto kiptengeginik ak taagigap aisuruut
Mark2:17 Ye kingo kas Jeso koleenji icheek
Mark2:18 Ki irugutegei kasubigap Johana ak che po Pharisaik
Mark2:19 Kowolji `Jeso icheek koleenji
Mark2:20 Ago pwoonei peetuusyek che keistoe sandet icheek
Mark2:21 “Ma mi chii ne napchin akwot ne leel ngoryeet ne oos
Mark2:22 Ama miitei chii ne indoi divaik che leelach lolotinwek che oosen; ngot yai ko uu nooto
Mark2:23 Kibunei ineendet mbareenigap peek eng' peetuutap sabato
Mark2:24 Ak ki leenji `Pharisaik ineendet
Mark2:25 Ak ki leenji icheeget
Mark2:26 Ki wo kootap Kamuktaindet
Mark2:27 Ak ki leenji `ineendet icheek
Mark2:28 Ara anyun Weeriitap chii ko kiptaiyat agot ne po sabato.”
Mark3:1 Ki wo sinagogit kogeny
Mark3:2 Ki riibe `icheek kogeer ngo tos isoop chiichooto eng' peetuutap sabato si kobiit kogikyi ineendet leluut.
Mark3:3 Ak ki leenji chiito ne meat euut
Mark3:4 Koleenji anyun icheek
Mark3:5 Ki tooben icheeget konereechi eng' ng'wanindo ne oo amu uuindap mugulelwekwak
Mark3:6 Ki manda koba saang' eng' kasarata Pharisaik ak Herodik kotet agobo ole imuuch kobarta ineendet.
Mark3:7 Ki pa Jeso ak kasubikyik kotokyigei araraita
Mark3:8 Ki pwa kora tuiyosyek kobun Judea
Mark3:9 Ki mwachi kasubikyik kochopchi moingetap peek ne ming'in amu chaang'indap piik; si ma chiil `piik ineendet
Mark3:10 amu kiga kosoop che chaang' kot koit komach age tugul ne ki tinyei kaimut kole ta tiny ineendet.
Mark3:11 Eng' ui tugul ye kingo keer tamirmirik che murwonen ineendet
Mark3:12 Ki kergong' icheek kole si ma ng'ang'nda ineendet.
Mark3:13 Ki wo kotokyigei tulweet ak koguur chooto kimachei ineendet
Mark3:14 Ki lewen taman ak aeng'
Mark3:15 ak konyoor kimnateet ne onen oik.
Mark3:16 Ki lewen chooto taman ak aeng'

Mark3:18 ak Andrea
Mark3:19 ak Judas Iskaryot nooto king'wekta ineendet.
Mark3:20 Ki wo kaa
Mark3:21 Ye kingo kas piikyik
Mark3:22 Ki mwa siriik che ki punu Jerusalem kole
Mark3:23 Kingo kagoguur icheek
Mark3:24 Ngo pcheak pororyet inegei
Mark3:25 Ak ngot kopcheak koot
Mark3:26 Ngo ng'eet Setani koboryegei ak kopcheak

Mark3:29 Ago age tugul ne inachi Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Mark3:30 Amu ki mwa kole “Tinyei tamirmiryet ne murwoon.”
Mark3:31 Ki pwa kamet ak che tupcho ak kotononso eng' saang'

Mark3:33 Ak ki wolji icheek kole

Mark3:35 Amu chii age tugul ne yaei mageetap Kamuktaindet
Mark4:1 Ki toi kogeny koneetis eng' tabandap araraita. Ki iyumjigei ineendet tuiyet ne oo miising' kot kolaany moingetap peek kotebee araraita
Mark4:2 Ki ineet icheek tuguuk che chaang' eng' kalewenaik
Mark4:3 “Oep iit! Ki wo leetaindet koleetais.
Mark4:4 Ak ye kileetaisye
Mark4:5 Ki ibutyi alage ole mi koik
Mark4:6 Ak kingo chor asiista
Mark4:7 Ki ibutyi alage ole mi katook
Mark4:8 Kobutyi alage ng'ung'unyek che myach ak koiiyo logoek
Mark4:9 Ak ki mwa kole
Mark4:10 Ye ki mi ineegei
Mark4:11 Ki leenji `ineendet icheek
Mark4:12 si eng' ‘keeret kogeerei ama ibestos
Mark4:13 Ki leenji icheek
Mark4:14 Ineendet ne leetoi ng'olyoot ko koolsei.

Mark4:16 Ak chu ak icheek ko chooto che kagilechi ole mi koik
Mark4:17 Ago ma tinyei tigitik
Mark4:18 Ak alak
Mark4:19 ak ye kait kaimutigap ng'wony
Mark4:20 Ak chooto che kagilechi ng'ung'unyek che myach
Mark4:21 Ki leenji icheek
Mark4:22 Ma miitei kiy ne ung'aat ne ma tuun king'aanyei
Mark4:23 Ngo tinyei chii iitiik che kastoe
Mark4:24 Ak ki mwachi icheek koleenji
Mark4:25 Amu ineendet ne tinyei
Mark4:26 Ak ki mwa kole
Mark4:27 ak koru ak kong'eet

Mark4:29 Ago ye kagoruryo peek
