Mark5:1 Ki it icheek pitet age ne po araraita
Mark5:2 Ak kingo kagolong' eng' moingetap peek
Mark5:3 Ki menyei ye mi kereeriisyek; ak ki ma komi chii ne kita komuuchi korat ineendet agot eng' nyororoit;
Mark5:4 amu kiga kerate ineendet mugurek ak nyororosyek konyil che chaang'
Mark5:5 Ki waagaati peetuusyek tugul
Mark5:6 Kingo keer `ineendet Jeso eng' ye loo
Mark5:7 ak kowaach eng' tuugeet ne oo kole
Mark5:8 Amu kigaleenji ineendet
Mark5:9 Ak ki teebe ineendet koleenji
Mark5:10 Ki soom ineendet miising' kole
Mark5:11 Ak ki mi tegeiyatap tulweet akweet ne oo ne po toorook che ki agetoos.
Mark5:12 Ak ki soom koleenji
Mark5:13 Ki iyanji icheek
Mark5:14 Ki mweiso anyun che ki iyagi toorook ak komwaitaat eng' nganaseet ak eng' emet. Ak ki pwa anyun piik kogeer kiit ne kagoyaak.
Mark5:15 Ki pwa ole ki mi Jeso ak kogeer ineendet ne kiga konam oik
Mark5:16 Ki mwaita paorinik komwachi piik kiit ne kiyaak eng' ineendet ne ki tinyei oik
Mark5:17 Ki toi piik komwachi ineendet kole kwo eng' kiwotosyekwak.
Mark5:18 Ye ki laanyei moingetap peek
Mark5:19 Ki ma chamji Jeso
Mark5:20 Ki nam pandanyi ak kotoi komwaita eng' Decapolis tuguuk che eecheen che kayachi `Jeso ineendet; ak ki kwong'yo piik tugul.
Mark5:21 Ye kingo kagolanda Jeso kogeny eng' moinget kwo pitoniin
Mark5:22 Ki nyo agenge eng' pounigap sinagogit ne kiguure Jairo
Mark5:23 ak kosoom miising' koleenji
Mark5:24 Ki pa anyun kobooto ineendet. Ki isup ineendet tuiyet ne oo ak ki igiich ineendet.
Mark5:25 Ki mi kobogoryo ne kiga komandae korotiik eng' kenyiisyek taman ak aeng'.
Mark5:26 Kiga konyalil ineendet miising' agobo chepkerichinik che chaang'
Mark5:27 Kingo kas agobo Jeso
Mark5:28 Ki leenjigei
Mark5:29 Ye kingo tiiny
Mark5:30 Kingo nai Jeso kole
Mark5:31 Ak ki leenji `kasubikyik ineendet
Mark5:32 Kiguskong' kotabendo komoche konai kole ng'oo ne katiiny.
Mark5:33 Ago ki nyo kobogoryondonooto ko kagonai kiit ne kageyachi
Mark5:34 Ki leenji ineendet
Mark5:35 Kingo ta kong'alaali ineendet
Mark5:36 Ago ma mage kiy Jeso ng'olyoot ne kagimwa
Mark5:37 Ki ma chamji chii koosup ineendet kobatee Petero
Mark5:38 Ki it `icheek kootap pounindetap sinagogit
Mark5:39 Ye kingo kakwo ko
Mark5:40 Ak kirorechi ineendet kochot. Ye kingo kagoon ineendet pichooto tugul koba saang'
Mark5:41 Kingo kagonam eutap lakweet koleenji
Mark5:42 Ki ng'eet chebooto ak kowendot; (ki po kenyiisyek taman ak aeng'). Eng' yooto ko ki nam icheek kwong'eet ne oo.
Mark5:43 Ki ng'at `ineendet icheek miising' kole amat konai chii ng'olyoondoniito
Mark6:1 Ki mong' ineendet eng' olooto ak konyo agoi nganaseetap emennyi
Mark6:2 Kingo it sabato kotoi koneetis eng' sinagogit
Mark6:3 Tos ma musogindet niito
Mark6:4 Ak ki leenji `Jeso icheek
Mark6:5 Ki mata komuuch koyai kwang'utyo age tugul eng' olooto
Mark6:6 Ak ki kwong' ineendet amu pistoennywa. Ak kiwendote nganasook koneetisyoti.
Mark6:7 Ki kuurchigei anyun taman ak aeng'
Mark6:8 Ki ng'at icheek koleenji
Mark6:9 oba olaachi kweonik ago mat olaach sumotik aeng'.
Mark6:10 Ye kobe ko age tugul
Mark6:11 Ak oldo age tugul ne mataachak
Mark6:12 Ki manda ak koamdaat kole kanyool kosik piik.
Mark6:13 Ki oon oik che chaang'
Mark6:14 Ki kas laitoryat Herod agobo nooto; amu kiga konaak kainenetap Jeso ak ki le alak
Mark6:15 Ago ki mwa alak kole
Mark6:16 Ago ye kingo kas Herod kole
Mark6:17 Amu kiga koyookto `Herod ineendet piik
Mark6:18 Amu ki mwachi `Johana Herod koleenji
Mark6:19 Ak kiwech `Herodias ineendet
Mark6:20 amu ki iywei `Herod Johana ak ki riip
Mark6:21 Ki it anyun peetuut ne nyolu
Mark6:22 Kingo nyo ko cheptap Herodias ak koureren
Mark6:23 Ak ki iyasyechi kole
Mark6:24 Ki manda ak komwachi kamet kole
Mark6:25 Ak yeityo konyo kochook agoi ole mi laitoryat ak kosoom kole
Mark6:26 Ki aragen anyun miising' laitoryat; ago amu kayosyautikyik
Mark6:27 Ara ki iyookto laitoryat asigarindet age eng' che kiriipsei kong'at kole keip metitap Johana. Ki wo anyun kotil metit eng' korgoreet
Mark6:28 ak ki ip metoto eng' tageito
Mark6:29 Ye kingo kas kasubikyik agobo ng'olyoondonooto
Mark6:30 Ki iyumjigei Jeso che kiyooktoi ak komwachi ineendet tuguuk tugul che kiga koyai ak tugul che kiga koneet.
Mark6:31 Ki mwachi icheek koleenji
Mark6:32 Ak ki pa icheegei eng' moingetap peek kolang'ji surkwen.
Mark6:33 Ak kigeeroti piik kobendi
Mark6:34 Ak kingo lang' Jeso kogeer tuiyet ne oo
Mark6:35 Ye kimachei koimen
Mark6:36 Mete piik koba emet ak nganasook che mi komoswek ole neegit
Mark6:37 Ago ki wolji koleenji
Mark6:38 Ki leenji icheek
Mark6:39 Ki ng'at kole kobuur piik eng' susweek che nyalileen
Mark6:40 Ara ki tep ng'wony kotetatkei
Mark6:41 Ki nam magatinichooto muut ak njireenik aeng'
Mark6:42 Ki amis tugul ak kibiyong'so.
Mark6:43 Ki iyum katuganik che ki nyi kereboonik taman ak aeng'
Mark6:44 Icheeget che ki am magatinichooto ko ki murenik eliphuusyek muut.
Mark6:45 Ki ichiich `Jeso kasubikyik kolaany moinget si kondoe ineendet koba pitoniin agoi Bethsaida
Mark6:46 Ye kingo kagobagaakta icheek
Mark6:47 Kingo ek koskoleny
Mark6:48 Kingo keer icheeget konyalildos eng' poisyetap mugangok che ki kwerye moinget
Mark6:49 ago kingo keer icheek ineendet kowendoti eng' araraita parak
Mark6:50 amu ki keer icheek tugul ineendet
Mark6:51 Ki laany ineendet moinget kwo ole mi icheek ak ki siis usoonet. Ki kwong'yo miising' pichooto
Mark6:52 amu ki ma nai icheek agobo magatiinik
Mark6:53 Ye kingo kagolanda
Mark6:54 Ye kingo mong' eng' moinget
Mark6:55 ak korwaat eng' koronooto komugul
Mark6:56 Ak oldo tugul ole ki mong'ji nganasook che mengeechen
Mark7:1 Ki iyumjigei ineendet Pharisaik ak alak eng' siriik che kiga pun Jerusalem
Mark7:2 ak ki keer alak eng' kasubikyik koamei magatiinik eng' eunek che murwonen
Mark7:3 Amu ngot koma iun eunekwak komyee Pharisaik ak Yahudik tugul koma amisyei
Mark7:4 ak ye punu ye mi ole kiyae mung'aaret
Mark7:5 ki teebee ineendet `Pharisaik ak `siriik kole
Mark7:6 Ki mwachi icheek koleenji
Mark7:7 Ilaswo puch; ng'atuutigap piik kaneetisyosyek che ineetisye.’
Mark7:8 Obagaaktoi ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet
Mark7:9 Ki leenji icheek
Mark7:10 Amu ki le Musa
Mark7:11 Ago omwae ole ngo leenji chii kwanda anan kamet
Mark7:12 ko mata ochamji anyun ineendet kotoret kwanda anan kamet.
Mark7:13 Oyai anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet koek puch eng' piteeng'wong' ne ki ong'at. Ak oyae tuguuk alak che chaang' che uu chooto.”
Mark7:14 Ki kuur tuiyet kogeny kobwa ye mi ineendet ak koleenji
Mark7:15 Ma mi kiy ne mi chii saang' ne ngwo oriitinnyi komuuchi kong'wanit ineendet
Mark7:16 Ngo tinyei chii iitiik che kastoe
Mark7:17 Ye kingo pagaakta tuiyet kwo ko
Mark7:18 Ki leenji icheek
Mark7:19 amu ma chut muguleldanyi ago chutei moet
Mark7:20 Ak ki le
Mark7:21 Amu mang'une oriit
Mark7:22 kasetap myat
Mark7:23 Mang'une oriit tuguuchuuto tugul yaacheen ak kong'wanit chii.”
Mark7:24 Ki ng'eet ineendet eng' olooto ak kwo agoi tabanwegap Tyro ak Sidon. Ki wo koot age ak ki ma mach konai chii
Mark7:25 Ak eng' sainooto
Mark7:26 Ki po Yunanik kobogoryondonooto
Mark7:27 Ak ki leenji ineendet
Mark7:28 Ago ki wolji ineendet koleenji
Mark7:29 Ak ki leenji kobogoryondonooto
Mark7:30 Ki wo anyun koonnyi ak konyoor lakweet koruei eng' itook
Mark7:31 Ki manda kogeny eng' tabanwegap Tyro
Mark7:32 Ki kimutyi ineendet chii ne miing'at
Mark7:33 Ki imut chiichooto kwo taban eng' tuiyet
Mark7:34 Ki inyal kipsengwet
Mark7:35 Eng' niito anyun koyatagis iitiikyik ak kotyagak ng'elyeptanyi
Mark7:36 Ak ki ng'at icheek kole mat komwachi chii; ago ye kites kong'at icheek
Mark7:37 Ak ki kwong'yo miising' ne siirei koleen
Mark8:1 Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki piit kogeny tuiyet ne oo ak ki ma kotinyei kiy ne amei
Mark8:2 “Ariiree tuiyet
Mark8:3 Ngot aunde koba oldanywa koma am kiy
Mark8:4 Ki wolji kasubikyik kole
Mark8:5 ki teebee icheek koleenji
Mark8:6 Ki ng'at anyun tuiyet kotep ng'wony. Ki nam magatinichooto tisap ak kingo kagomwa kongoi
Mark8:7 Ki tinyei njireenik che mengeechen che ng'ering'; ak kingo kagoberuur
Mark8:8 Ki amis ak kobiyong'so. Ak ki iyum katuganik
Mark8:9 Ak icheeget ko ki olo po eliphuusyek ang'wan. Ak kiunda icheek koba.
Mark8:10 Ak yeityo anyun kolaany moingetap peek kobooto kasubikyik ak koba komoswegap Dalmanuta.
Mark8:11 Ki pwa Pharisaik ak kotoi koteepse ineendet. Kotyemei ineendet
Mark8:12 Ki ibuus ne nyigiis eng' muguleldannyi ak kole
Mark8:13 Ak ki pagaakta icheek
Mark8:14 Ak kiutye icheek koip magatiinik; ki ma kotinyei kiy eng' moinget kobatee magatyat agenge kityo.
Mark8:15 Ki itigon icheek koleenji
Mark8:16 Ki ng'alaaljingei icheegei koleen
Mark8:17 Ak kingo nai Jeso
Mark8:18 Otinye koonyek
Mark8:19 Yu kinga puutulji magatiinik muut piik eliphuusyek muut
Mark8:20 “Ak tisap eng' piik eliphuusyek ang'wan
Mark8:21 Koleenji icheek
Mark8:22 Ki it anyun Bethsaida. Ak kimutyi `icheek ineendet chii ne koraat ak kosoom kotwa ineendet.
Mark8:23 Ki nam eutap kipkoratyandanooto ak komut komandae nganaseet; ak ye kingo kagong'utyi konyekyik ak kogonoor eunekyik ineendet
Mark8:24 Ki inyal parak ak kole
Mark8:25 Yeityo kotwa eunekyik kogeny konyekyik; ak ki ichiil koonyek ak kisop
Mark8:26 Ki unda kwo kaa
Mark8:27 Ki pa Jeso ak kasubikyik agoi nganasook che po Caesarea Philippi. Eng' ooreet koteebe `ineendet kasubikyik koleenji
Mark8:28 Komwachi koleenji
Mark8:29 ki teebee icheeget kole
Mark8:30 Ak ki ng'at icheek kole amat komwachi chii agobo ineendet.
Mark8:31 Ki toi koneet icheek kole
Mark8:32 Ki mwa ng'olyoondonooto kotook. Ak ki nam `Petero ineendet ak kotoi koger kong'.
Mark8:33 Ago kiwelelgei ak kogeer kasubikyik

Mark8:35 Amu age tugul ne machei kosar saboondanyi kobeeti; ak age tugul ne ibeeti saboondanyi agobo anee ak logoiywek che myach kosaru.
Mark8:36 Amu nyooru porot nee chii
Mark8:37 Amu igoitoi nee chii kowale saboondanyi?
Mark8:38 Amu age tugul ne ililani agobo anee kobooto ng'aleekyuk eng' ibinita po sokseet ak tengek
Mark9:1 Ak ki leenji icheek
Mark9:2 Kingo pata peetuusyek lo

Mark9:5 Koleenji `Petero Jeso “Kaneetindoni

Mark9:8 Ye kingo kuskong' eng' yooto kogeer komoswek tugul

Mark9:10 Ki riip ng'olyoondonooto ak koteebegei agobo kaguiyetap ng'eetyeet.

Mark9:12 Koleenji icheek
Mark9:13 Ago amwaiwok ale

Mark9:18 ak oldo tugul ole namjin eng' kimnateet

Mark9:26 Kingo kagowaach tamirmiryet ak kobirto ineendet miising'

Mark9:29 Ak ki leenji icheek

Mark12:23 Tuun eng' ng'eetyeet kobunjin ng'oo eng' `icheek osotyondonooto? Amu kiga kobunji chooto tisap.”

Mark14:44 Ak kiga koarorchi ng'wektaindet icheek
Mark14:45 Ak kingo it

Mark14:50 Ak ki pagaakta icheek tugul ineendet ak komwei.
Mark14:51 Ak ki isup ineendet mureno age
Mark14:52 ak kometo ngoryonooto po katanit
Mark14:53 Ki imut Jeso anyun kwo ole mi tisiindet ne oo: ak koyumjigei ineendet tisiik tugul che eecheen ak poisyek ak siriik.
Mark14:54 Ak ki isup Petero ineendet eng' ye loo
Mark14:55 Ki cheeng' anyun tisiik che eecheen ak kapkirwooget komugul paornateet eng' Jeso si kobiit kobar; ago ki ma nyoor.
Mark14:56 Amu kibaoryanji che chaang' lembech agobo ineendet ak ma namgei paornatennywa.
Mark14:57 Ak kitononso alak
Mark14:58 Kigegas komwaei ineendet koleen
Mark14:59 Agot eng' nooto koma namgei paornatennywa.
Mark14:60 Ki tonon anyun tisiindet ne oo eng' kwenunnywa
Mark14:61 Ago ki siis
Mark14:62 Ak ki le Jeso
Mark14:63 Ak kigereer ngoroikyik tisiindet ne oo
Mark14:64 Kaogas ng'aleek che yaach che mwaei: obwaati nee? Ak ki irwookyi tugul kole nyoljin meet.
Mark14:65 Ak ki toi alak kosing'ilji ineendet ak kotuch togeennyi
Mark14:66 Ak kingo ta komi Petero seremut ole po ng'wony
Mark14:67 ak kingo keer Petero koyue maat
Mark14:68 Ago ki tiiyo kole
Mark14:69 Ak ki keer chebooto ineendet ak kotoi kogeny komwachi che tonondos eng' ye neegit
Mark14:70 Ak kitiiyo kogeny. Ak ne matya koleenji icheek kogeny che kitonondos eng' ye neegit Petero
Mark14:71 Ak ki toi kochubis
Mark14:72 Ak koma tyanit koote kipsoiywet ne po aeng'. Ak ki ibwaat anyun Petero ng'olyoondonooto
Mark15:1 Ak yeityo ko kaech kotet ng'aleek tisiik che eecheen kobooto poisyek ak siriik
Mark15:2 Ak kiteebe Pilato kole
Mark15:3 Ak ki itaam `ineendet tisiik che eecheen eng' tuguuk che chaang'.
Mark15:4 Ak kiteebe Pilato kogeny
Mark15:5 Ago mata kowol ng'olyoo Jeso
Mark15:6 Ki cham kotyakyin Pilato piik kimonjororyot agenge eng' peetuutap igoorto
Mark15:7 Ak ki mi chiito age ne ki kiguure Barabbas
Mark15:8 Ki togosta tuiyet ak kotoi kosoom ineendet koyachi ko uu ye cham koyaei kotugul.
Mark15:9 Ak ki wolji Pilato icheek
Mark15:10 Amu kiga nai kole
Mark15:11 Ak ki cheer tisiik che eecheen tuiyet kole
Mark15:12 Ak ki wol Pilato kogeny kole
Mark15:13 Ak ki polyo icheek kogeny
Mark15:14 Ak ki leenji Pilato icheek
Mark15:15 Ak kimach Pilato kobaibai tuiyet
Mark15:16 Ak ki imut kiplugotinik ineendet kwo kapkirwook oriit
Mark15:17 Ak ki ilaakyi ngoryeet ne aruus ne piriir
Mark15:18 ak ki toi kogat ineendet kole
Mark15:19 Ak kikwer metinnyi eng' tegat
Mark15:20 Ak kingo kagochotachot ineendet
Mark15:21 Ak kibirchi chiito ne kisiirtoi
Mark15:22 Ak kimut ineendet kwo oldo ne kiguure Golgota
Mark15:23 Ak ki igoochi divaik che purugot ak tuguuk che uu igomoik: ago ma taach.
Mark15:24 Ak kogartaat
Mark15:25 Ak ki igartaat ineendet
Mark15:26 Ak ki kisirchi ng'aleegap kataamset agobo ineendet metinnyi parak keele
Mark15:27 Ak ki igartaat rebiik aeng' kobooto ineendet; age eng' eunnyi ne po tai
Mark15:28 Ak ki isulda anyun sireet ne mwaei kole
Mark15:29 Ak ki churochur che ki siirtoi
Mark15:30 sarugei
Mark15:31 Ak ki churochur ineendet ko uu nooto tisiik che eecheen ak icheek
Mark15:32 Ingochoorgei nguno Kristo
Mark15:33 Ak kingo it sait lo
Mark15:34 Ak eng' sait sogool kotwek Jeso eng' kutit ne oo kole
Mark15:35 Ak kingo kas alak eng' che kitonondos eng' ye neegit
Mark15:36 Ak ki labat chiito age
Mark15:37 Koriir anyun Jeso eng' kutit ne oo
Mark15:38 Ki kereer angeet ne kiga kioiye Hekaluut kween kobooch parak agoi ng'wony.
Mark15:39 Ak kingo keer chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol
Mark15:40 Ak ki mi ak icheek kobogorisyek che kigeerei eng' ye loo: ki mi eng' icheeget Maria Magdalene
Mark15:41 che ki isubi ak koboisyechin ineendet ye ki mi Galilaya; kobooto kobogorisyek alak che chaang' che kitogosu Jerusalem kobooto ineendet.
Mark15:42 Ak kingo ek koskoleny
Mark15:43 konyo Joseph ne po Arimatea
Mark15:44 Ak ki kwong' Pilato amu kagagome: ak koguur chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol koteebe ngo kagome keny.
Mark15:45 Ak kingo kagonai eng' kiptaiyandanooto
Mark15:46 Ak ki al angeet ne po katanit
Mark15:47 Ak kigeerei Maria Magdalene ak Maria kametap Joses ole kaginde ineendet.
Mark16:1 Ak kingo kagosiirto sabato koal Maria Magdalene
Mark16:2 Ak eng' karon inne
Mark16:3 Ak kong'alaaljigei icheegei kole
Mark16:4 Ak kingo ng'eet met
Mark16:5 Ak kingo chut kererit
Mark16:6 Ak ki leenji icheek
Mark16:7 Ago
Mark16:8 Ak kimanda saang' eng' kererit
Mark16:9 Ak kingo ng'eet Jeso anyun karon miising' eng' peetuutap tai ne po wigiit
Mark16:10 Ki wo komwachi icheeget che ki mi kobooto ineendet
Mark16:11 Ak kingo kas icheek kole sabei
Mark16:12 Ak kingo pata tuguuchu
Mark16:13 Ki pa anyun ak komwachi chuun alak
Mark16:14 Ak kingo pata nooto
Mark16:15 Ak ki leenji
Mark16:16 Ineendet ne iyani ak kibatisan kesaru; ago ineendet ne ma iyani ko tuun kirwookyin.
Mark16:17 Ak isubi kaboorunoichu icheek che iyani: oonei oik eng' kainennyu; ak kong'alaali ng'alaalet ne leel;
Mark16:18 namei erenook
Mark16:19 Ye kingo kagong'alaal ak icheeget `Kiptaiyat Jeso
Mark16:20 Ak ki pa anyun
Luke1:1 Amu ki konde eunekwak che chaang' kotet ng'aleek agobo tuguuchooto ki kosulda eng' kwenunnyo
Luke1:2 ko uu ye ki mwaiwech paorinik che ki keer kobooch taunet ak icheek che ki amdoi ng'olyoot.
Luke1:3 Ko uu ye ki achigil tuguuk tugul kobooch taunet
Luke1:4 si kobiit inai eng' iman ng'aleechooto ki kineetin.
Luke1:5 Eng' peetuusyegap laitornatetap Herod eng' Judea ko ki mi tisiindet age ne ki kiguure Zekariah
Luke1:6 Ak ki po iman icheek tuwai eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
Luke1:7 Ak ki ma kotinyei lakwa
Luke1:8 Ak ye kita koyaei tisiisyet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
Luke1:9 ko uu piteetap tisiisyet
Luke1:10 Ak ki mi saang' tuiyet komugul ne po piik
Luke1:11 Ak ki mong'ji malakaiyatap Kiptaiyat kotonone komostap tai ne po kapkorosuut ne kibeelee nyamdutik.
Luke1:12 Ak kingo keer Zekariah ineendet koaragen ak koiyweis.
Luke1:13 Ago ki leenji malaikaiyat ineendet
Luke1:14 Inyooru poiboiyet ak kagasetapkei; ak poiboitu piik che chaang' eng' sigennyi.
Luke1:15 Amu tuun egu ne oo eng' taitap Kiptaiyat
Luke1:16 Ak koweekyi `piigap Israel che chaang' Kamuktaindennywa.
Luke1:17 Ak kowendot eng' tainnyi eng' muguleldo ak kimnateetap Elijah
Luke1:18 Ak ki leenji `Zekariah malaikaiyat
Luke1:19 Ak ki wolji `malaikaiyat koleenji
Luke1:20 Keero
Luke1:21 Ak ki igen `piik Zekariah kot kokwong'yo
Luke1:22 Ak ye kingo mong' saang'
Luke1:23 Ak ye kingo keskei peetuusyegap otisyennyi
Luke1:24 Ak ye kingo pata peetuusyechooto komanach osotyonnyi Elizabeth ak kiunygei arawek muut
Luke1:25 “Koyaiywo ko uu niito Kiptaiyat eng' peetuusyek che ki ibwaata
Luke1:26 Ki iyookto `Kamuktaindet malaikaiyat Gabriel eng' arawetap lo kwo nganaseet ne po Galilaya
Luke1:27 kwo ole mi chepto pergeiya ne kiga kebwatererchi muren age ne kiguure Joseph
Luke1:28 Ak ki nyo ole mi chebooto
Luke1:29 Ago ki iimgei miising' ineendet eng' mwaonooto
Luke1:30 Ak ki leenji malaikaiyat ineendet
Luke1:31 Ak keero
Luke1:32 Egu ne oo ineendet ak tuun kiguuree Weeriitap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'; ak kogoochin `Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po kwandanyi Daudi:
Luke1:33 ak tuun laitorane kootap Jakobo koigeny; punjin laitornatennyi koigeny.”
Luke1:34 Ak ki leenji `Maria malaikaiyat
Luke1:35 Ak ki wolji malaikaiyat koleenji
Luke1:36 Ak keero
Luke1:37 Amu ma mi ng'olyoo ne punu Kamuktaindet ne ma kiim.”
Luke1:38 Ak ki le Maria
Luke1:39 Ki ng'eet anyun Maria eng' peetuusyechooto kwo kochaakta emetap tuloonook
Luke1:40 ak ki wo agoi kootap Zekariah ak kogat Elizabeth.
Luke1:41 Ak ye kingo kas Elizabeth kagateetap Maria
Luke1:42 ak komwa eng' kutit ne oo
Luke1:43 Ak katepto ano kot anyooru niito
Luke1:44 Keero
Luke1:45 Ak paibai kobogoryondonooto iyani; amu tuun isuldoi tuguuk che ki kemwachi ineendet che punu Kiptaiyat.”
Luke1:46 Ak ki le Maria
Luke1:47 Ak kagobaibait saboondanyu eng' Kamuktaindet Yetindennyu
Luke1:48 amu kagogeer nyeraatyetap otwogindennyi. Ogeero
Luke1:49 amu kagoyaiywo ineendet ne po kamuktaet tuguuk che eecheen; ak tiliil kainennyi.
Luke1:50 Tebyei rireenennyi eng' ibinda agoi ibinda eng' icheeget che konyiti ineendet.
Luke1:51 Ki koboor kimnateet eng' eunnyi; ak kigoiyesta che menotik eng' kabwaatutigap mugulelwekwak.
Luke1:52 Kagochoor pounik eng' ng'echerokwak
Luke1:53 Kagobae che amei rubeet tuguuk che myachen
Luke1:54 Kagotoret otwogindennyi Israel
Luke1:55 ko uu ye ki ng'alaalji kwanisyekyok
Luke1:56 Ak ki tebi Maria ak Elizabeth neegit arawek somok; yeityo koweek kwo kaa.
Luke1:57 Ki it anyun peetuut ne sigisye Elizabeth; kosich weeriit.
Luke1:58 Ak kogas piigap kokwennyi ak piigap ooreennyi kole kagoboorchi Kiptaiyat rireenennyi kwonyooto; ak kiboiboitu tugul.
Luke1:59 Ak kingo it peetuut ne po sisiit
Luke1:60 Ak ki wol kamet kole
Luke1:61 Ak ki leenji icheek ineendet
Luke1:62 Ki ng'alaaljine icheek euut kwanitap lakweet
Luke1:63 Kosoom kiit ne kisirei
Luke1:64 Koyaatak anyun kutinnyi sainooto
Luke1:65 Ak ki nyoonji kaiyweisyet tugul che ki menyei komoswekwak; ak ki kimwaita ng'aleechuuto tugul koyom emetap tuloonook ne po Judea.
Luke1:66 Ak kigonoree mugulelwekwak ng'aleechooto icheek tugul che ki kas
Luke1:67 Ki nyi anyun Kabuuset ne Tiliil kwandanyi Zekariah
Luke1:68 “Iberuurot Kiptaiyat
Luke1:69 Kagong'eetwech kuinetap yetunet eng' kootap Daudi kiboityondennyi
Luke1:70 Ko uu ye ki mwa eng' kutusweegap maotikyik che tiliileen che ki mi kobooch ko kagitoi ng'wony
Luke1:71 si kosarwech eng' puunikyok ak eng' eunegap tugul che wechech.
Luke1:72 Si koriiree kwanisyekyok
Luke1:73 kayosyet ne ki iyasyechi kwandanyo Abraham
Luke1:74 si kobiit kogoonech
Luke1:75 eng' tiliilindo ak eng' imanda eng' tainnyi eng' peetuusyekyok tugul.
Luke1:76 Ee lakwani
Luke1:77 si igoochi piikyik naet ne po yetunet eng' nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogikwak
Luke1:78 amu muguleldo ne rireegei ne po Kamuktaindet nenyo
Luke1:79 si koluuchi icheeget che tebyei eng' mesundeito ak che mi urwetap meet; si kondochi keelyekyok kot koit ooreetap kaalyeet.”
Luke1:80 Ak ki ner lakwanooto
Luke2:1 Ki pun anyun ng'atuutyet Caesarea Agusto eng' peetuusyechooto kole
Luke2:2 Ne po tai sirisyoni ye ki pounindetap Syria
Luke2:3 Ki pa anyun tugul si kesir
Luke2:4 Ki togos agine Joseph eng' Galilaya kobunu nganaseetap Nazareth
Luke2:5 si kobiit kesir ineendet kobooto murerennyi Maria
Luke2:6 Ak kiit sigeetap lakweet
Luke2:7 Ak ki sich weeriinnyi ne po tai; ak kolaakyi ngoroigap lakwandit
Luke2:8 Ak ki mi emonooto mestoweek che kitebyei eng' keeweet koriibei akweennywa ne po keechiirek kemoi.
Luke2:9 Ak ki tonon malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat eng' ole neegitee icheek
Luke2:10 Ak ki leenji `malaikaiyat icheek
Luke2:11 amu kagisikwok Yetindet rani
Luke2:12 Ak ni kaboorunet eng' okweek: Onyooru lakweet ko kagilaakyi ngoroigap lakwandit
Luke2:13 Ak ki mi eng' sainooto kobooto malaikaiyandanooto chaang'indap lugosyegap kipsengwet che ki ilasu Kamuktaindet koleen
Luke2:14 Po teegisto Kamuktaindet
Luke2:15 Ak kingo kagoweek malaikaisyek koba kipsengwet
Luke2:16 Ak ki pwa anyun kochook
Luke2:17 Ak ye kingo keer kobarta mwaet ne kagagemwachi agobo lakwanooto.
Luke2:18 Ak ki kwong'yo tugul che ki kas ng'aleechooto ki mwachi mestoweek.
Luke2:19 Ago ki riip Maria ng'aleechooto tugul
Luke2:20 Ak ki week anyun mestoweek
Luke2:21 Ak kingo it peetuusyek sisiit che kiyatitoe ineendet
Luke2:22 Ak kingo kagobata peetuusyegap katiliilennywa ko uu Ng'atuutyetap Musa
Luke2:23 (ko uu ye ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat
Luke2:24 ak kogoito korosyot ko uu ye ki kimwa eng' Ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat
Luke2:25 Ogeero
Luke2:26 Ak kiga kong'aang'ji ineendet Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Luke2:27 Ki nyo anyun Hekaluut eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil: ak ye kingo muut sigiik lakweet Jeso
Luke2:28 konam anyun lakweet eng' eunekyik
Luke2:29 “Ee
Luke2:30 amu kagogeer konyekyuk yetuneng'ung'
Luke2:31 ne ki ichop eng' taitap piik tugul;
Luke2:32 lapkeiyet ne po ng'ang'utyet ne king'aang'jin Pororyosyek
Luke2:33 Ak ki kwong'yo Joseph ak kametap lakweet agobo tuguuchooto kagimwa agobo ineendet;
Luke2:34 ak ki iberuur Simion icheek
Luke2:35 (ee agot inyeendet ko tuun torei rotwetap chok muguleldang'ung';) si kobiit kong'ang'agis kabwaatutigap mugulelwegap piik che chaang'.”
Luke2:36 Ak ki miitei agine Anah
Luke2:37 Ak ki tebi ko kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot kenyiisyek tamanwogik sisiit ak ang'wan)
Luke2:38 Ak ki nyo eng' sainooto ak kogoochi Kamuktaindet kongoi
Luke2:39 Ak kingo kagogees tugul ko uu Ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat
Luke2:40 Ak kiner lakweet
Luke2:41 Ki cham kobendi sigiikyik kenyiit age tugul Jerusalem eng' igoorto ne po paska.
Luke2:42 Ak ye ki po kenyiisyek taman ak aeng'
Luke2:43 ak ye kingo woong' peetuusyek
Luke2:44 ago ki leen mi kobooto piik che ki pendi tugul
Luke2:45 ak ye ki ma nyoor ineendet
Luke2:46 Ak ye kingo keskei peetuusyek somogu
Luke2:47 ak ki kwong'yo icheek tugul che ki epchin iit ineendet amu naennyi ak waluunaikyik.
Luke2:48 Ak ye kingo keer ineendet
Luke2:49 Ak ki leenji icheek
Luke2:50 Ki ma iguiyo icheek ng'olyoondonooto kamwachi.
Luke2:51 Ki choorgei anyun kobooto icheeget
Luke2:52 Ki tesak utaatyetap Jeso
Luke3:1 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po taman ak muut ne po laitornatetap Tiberia Caesarea
Luke3:2 eng' peetuusyek che po tiseinateet ne oo ne po Anas ak Caiaphas
Luke3:3 Ak ki nyo komoswek tugul che po tabanwegap Jordan
Luke3:4 ko uu ye ki kisir eng' bukuitap ng'aleegap maotyot Isaiah
Luke3:5 Tuun kilong'u atebweet age tugul
Luke3:6 ak tuun keerei piik tugul yetunetap Kamuktaindet.’ ”
Luke3:7 Ki mwachi anyun tuiyosyek che kibendi ole mi ineendet
Luke3:8 Oii anyun logoek che nyoljin siguunet
Luke3:9 Agot nguno ko kaginde aiywet tigitigap keetiik: nooto anyun
Luke3:10 Ak kiteebe ineendet tuiyosyek kole
Luke3:11 Ak ki wolji icheek koleenji
Luke3:12 Ak ki pwa ak icheek taagigap aisuruut si kibatisan
Luke3:13 Ak ki mwachi `icheek koleenji
Luke3:14 Ak kiteebe kiplugotinik ak icheek koleenji
Luke3:15 Ak kingo ta koogeni piik kiit ne piitu
Luke3:16 kowolji Johana icheek tugul koleenji
Luke3:17 Tinyei keibet eng' eunnyi
Luke3:18 Ki amji anyun piik logoiywek che myach kobooto katigonutik alak che chaang'.
Luke3:19 Ago ye kingo kagoger kong' Johana kirwoogindet Herod agobo Herodias
Luke3:20 kotesyi niito anyun chuun tugul
Luke3:21 Ak ye kingo kagibatisan piik tugul
Luke3:22 ak kochoorchigei ineendet Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Luke3:23 Kingo tau Jeso koneetisyei
Luke3:24 Heli ko ki weeriitap Matat

Luke4:1 Ak ki week Jeso kobunu Jordan ko nyiitaat Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Luke4:2 ak kotebi peetuusyek artam koyomei chesawilyet. Ak ma am kiy eng' peetuusyechooto: ak ye kingo keskei peetuusyechooto
Luke4:3 Ak ki leenji chesawilyet
Luke4:4 Ak ki wolji `Jeso ineendet koleenji
Luke4:5 Ak ki imut anyun yoomindet kotogosta
Luke4:6 Ak ki leenji anyun chesawilyet ineendet
Luke4:7 Ngot iloswa anyun
Luke4:8 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji
Luke4:9 Ki imut anyun ineendet Jerusalem
Luke4:10 amu ki kisir keele
Luke4:11 ak kogeny
Luke4:12 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji
Luke4:13 Ak ye kingo kes chesawilyet yoomseet age tugul
Luke4:14 Koweek anyun Jeso Galilaya eng' kimnateetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil: ak ki yom logoiywek korotinwek tugul agobo ineendet eng' ole neegitee olooto.
Luke4:15 Ak ki ineetisyei eng' sinagogisyekwak
Luke4:16 Ki nyo anyun Nazareth
Luke4:17 Ak ki kigoochi ineendet bukuit ne mamanat ne po maotyot Isaiah. Ak ki ng'aany bukuit
Luke4:18 Mi Kabuusetap Kiptaiyat kobooto
Luke4:19 Si kobiit aamda kenyiit ne chamat eng' Kiptaiyat.
Luke4:20 Ak ki maman bukuit
Luke4:21 Ak ki toi koleenji pichooto
Luke4:22 Ak kibaoryanji tugul ineendet ak kokwong'yo eng' ng'aleek che po myeeindo che kamang'une kutinnyi: ak ki le icheek
Luke4:23 Ak ki wolji icheek koleenji
Luke4:24 Ak ki leenji
Luke4:25 Ago amwaiwok iman ale
Luke4:26 ago ma kiyookto Elijah kwo ye mi age eng' icheek
Luke4:27 Ak ki mi che chaang' che ki tinyei mogondosaik eng' Israel eng' peetuusyegap maotyot Elisha; ak ki ma kisoop chii eng' icheek kobatee Naaman ineegei
Luke4:28 Ak ki nyi nereegek icheek tugul eng' sinagogit ye kingo kas ng'aleechuuto;
Luke4:29 ak king'eetyo kotoorta ineendet komanda eng' nganaseet
Luke4:30 Ago kisiirtoe kwenunnywa kwo.
Luke4:31 Ak kichoorchigei anyun Kapernaum
Luke4:32 ak ki kwong'yo eng' kaneetisyennyi; amu ki tinyei kimnateet ng'olyoondennyi.
Luke4:33 Ak ki mi chii sinagogit
Luke4:34 kole
Luke4:35 Ak ki kergong' `Jeso ineendet ak koleenji
Luke4:36 Ak ki kwong'yo pichooto tugul
Luke4:37 Ak ki yom anyun logoiywek komoswek tugul che po emonooto agobo ineendet.
Luke4:38 Ak ki manda eng' sinagogit ak kwo kap Simion. Ki amei kametap osotyotap Simion eseet ne koroom; ak ki saisai `piik Jeso agobo ineendet.
Luke4:39 Ak kotonon eng' ye neegit
Luke4:40 Ak ye ki neegit kororokto asiista
Luke4:41 Komang'une anyun `oik piik che chaang'
Luke4:42 Ak ye kingo kagoeech
Luke4:43 Ago ki leenji icheek
Luke4:44 Ak ki amdaat anyun eng' sinagogisyek che po Galilaya.
Luke5:1 Ak ye kingo ta kogiichi tuiyet ineendet
Luke5:2 ak ki keer moingonik aeng' che po peek kotonondos eng' ngeguutap araraita: ago kiga kochoorgei ramik koba komwet regereiywekwak che kiname njireenik.
Luke5:3 Ak ki laany moinget age
Luke5:4 Ak ye kingo kagogees ng'alaalennyi
Luke5:5 Ak ki wol Simion kole
Luke5:6 Ak ye kingo kagoyai ko uu nooto
Luke5:7 ak king'wech piik che kiboisyei tugul che ki mi moinget age
Luke5:8 Ago ye kingo keer Simion Petero
Luke5:9 Amu ki kwong'
Luke5:10 ki kwong'yo ak icheek Jakobo ak Johana weeriigap Zebedayo
Luke5:11 Ak ye kingo kagoget moingonikwak kobwa ngeguut
Luke5:12 Ak kingo ta komiitei nganaseet age
Luke5:13 Ak ki iyogoito Jeso anyun eunnyi
Luke5:14 Ak ki ng'at anyun koleenji
Luke5:15 Ak kitesak miising' koiyesta logoiywekyik: ak ki iyumgei tuiyosyek che chaang' kobwa si kogas ng'aleekyik ak kisoop eng' myanwekwak.
Luke5:16 Ago kiitabaangei ineegei kwo surkwen kosa.
Luke5:17 Ak ki ineetisyei eng' peetuut age eng' peetuusyechooto; ak ki mi Pharisaik ak kaneetik che po ng'atuutik kotebyei eng' olooto
Luke5:18 Ak ogeero
Luke5:19 Ak ye ki mata konyoor ole imute kwo ko amu chaang'indap piik
Luke5:20 Ak kingo keer Jeso kayanennywa
Luke5:21 Ak ki toi siriik ak Pharisaik kobwaat agobo ng'olyoondonooto kole
Luke5:22 Ago ye kingo nai Jeso anyun kabwaatutikwak
Luke5:23 Nee ne nyumnyum
Luke5:24 Ago si kobiit onai ole tinyei kimnateet Weeriitap chii eng' ng'wony konyochi kaat piik tengekwogik (koleenji chiito ne ki meat poorto)
Luke5:25 Ak king'eet anyun eng' tainnywa
Luke5:26 Ak kokwong'yo icheek tugul ak kolas Kamuktaindet; ak ki nyi icheek kaiyweisyet
Luke5:27 Ak kingo pata tuguuchu kwo kogeer taagindetap aisuruut
Luke5:28 Ak ki pagaakta tugul
Luke5:29 Ak kichopchi Lawi ineendet igoorto ne oo eng' koonnyi; ak ki mi tuiyet ne oo ne po taagigap aisuruut ak piik alak che kitebyei eng' amisyet kobooto ineendet.
Luke5:30 Ak ki ing'unyng'ung'ji Pharisaik ak siriikwak kasubikyik
Luke5:31 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji
Luke5:32 Ki ma anyoo aguur che po iman
Luke5:33 Ak ki leenji ineendet
Luke5:34 Ak ki leenji Jeso icheek
Luke5:35 Ago pwoonei peetuusyek che tuun ki istoe icheek sandet
Luke5:36 Ak ki mwachi icheek anyun kalewenet kogeny koleenji
Luke5:37 Ama mi chii ne indoi divaik che leelach lolotinwek che oosen; ngo yai ko uu nooto ko kereri divaik lolotinwek
Luke5:38 Ago kanyool kinde divaik che leelach lolotinwek che leelachen.
Luke5:39 Ama mi chii ne ngo kagoee divaik che po keny kota komach che leelach: amu mwaei kole
Luke6:1 Ak ki punei mbareenigap peek eng' peetuutap sabato; ak kibut kasubikyik mesiisegap peek
Luke6:2 Ago ki mwa alage che po Pharisaik kole
Luke6:3 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji
Luke6:4 Ki wo kootap Kamuktaindet ak kocher magatiinik che itabaanatiin
Luke6:5 Ak ki mwachi icheek koleenji
Luke6:6 Ak ki wo sinagogit eng' sabato age
Luke6:7 Ak ki riip ineendet siriik ak Pharisaik kole kogeer ngo tos isoop chii eng' peetuutap sabato; si konyoor ooreet ne itaame.
Luke6:8 Ago ki nai kabwaatutikwak; ak koleenji chiichooto ne ki tinyei euut ne meat
Luke6:9 Ki leenji `Jeso icheek
Luke6:10 Ak ki keerot `Jeso piik tugul
Luke6:11 Ak ki nereekso miising': ak ki ng'alaaljigei icheegei agobo kiit ne itoi Jeso.
Luke6:12 Ki wo Jeso anyun eng' peetuusyechooto
Luke6:13 Ak ye kingo eech
Luke6:14 Simion
Luke6:15 ak Matayo ak Thomas
Luke6:16 Judas weeriitap Jakobo
Luke6:17 Ak kichoortagei kobooto icheeget
Luke6:18 ak ki kisoop icheeget che ki inyalili oik che murwonen.
Luke6:19 Ak ki cheeng' tuiyet komugul kotwa ineendet: amu ki punu ineendet kamuktaet
Luke6:20 Ak kigeerot kasubikyik
Luke6:21 Oboiboi okweek che amok rubeet nguno
Luke6:22 “Oboiboi okweek ye wechok piik ak kowook
Luke6:23 Oboiboitu eng' peetuunooto ak otorombense eng' poiboiyet
Luke6:24 Ago pwo eng' okweek che oo mogore! Amu kaotaach kagaigaeng'wong'.
Luke6:25 Pwo eng' okweek che oo piyong'otin nguno! Amu tatun koamok rubeet. Pwo eng' okweek che ororitosi nguno! Amu tatun oteitosi ak orirtosi.
Luke6:26 Pwo eng' okweek ye mwaei piik tugul che myach agobo okweek! Amu kigoyachi ko uu nooto kwanisyekwak maotik che po lembech.
Luke6:27 “Ago amwaiwok okweek che ogase
Luke6:28 oberuur icheek che chubook
Luke6:29 Ak ineendet ne irabaachin matanda age igoochi matanda age; ak ineendet ne rebenen ngoryeeng'ung' ko meete agot sumeng'ung'.
Luke6:30 Igoochi chii age tugul ne soomin; ak ineendet ne rebenen tuguuguk ko matata isoom kogeny.
Luke6:31 Ak ko uu ye omache koyaiywok piik
Luke6:32 “Ngo cham anyun icheeget che chamok
Luke6:33 Ak ngo yachi che myach icheeget che yaiywok che myach
Luke6:34 Ak ngo pesendochi piik che omang'u ole tuun onyoorunee
Luke6:35 Ago ocham puunikwok
Luke6:36 Oegu che tinyei rireenetapkei
Luke6:37 “Amorwookyi
Luke6:38 ogoite
Luke6:39 Ak ki mwachi kalewenet koleenji
Luke6:40 Ma siirei kasubindet kaneetindennyi: ago ineendet ne ki konetak kogergeitu ak kaneetindennyi.
Luke6:41 Ak amu nee si igeere petbetyat ne miitei kondap ng'eetap kamenng'ung'
Luke6:42 Anan imuktoi ano ileenji ng'eetap kamenng'ung'
Luke6:43 “Amu ma mi keetit ne myee ne yiei logoek che yaach; ama mi keetit ne ya ne yiei logoek che myach.
Luke6:44 Amu kinae keetit age tugul logoekyik. Amu ma putei piik logoegap mogoonik eng' katook
Luke6:45 Inemu chiito ne myee kiit ne myee kobunu konorwet ne myee ne mi muguleldanyi; ak inemu chiito ne ya kiit ne ya kobunu konorwet ne ya ne mi muguleldanyi: amu che mwaei kutinnyi ko che nyiitaat muguleldo.
Luke6:46 “Amu nee si oguureno Kiptaiyat
Luke6:47 Chii age tugul ne nyoonjino
Luke6:48 kergei ineendet ak chiito ne teechei koot
Luke6:49 Ago ineendet ne kasei
Luke7:1 Ak kingo kagogesyi ng'aleekyik tugul iitiigap piik
Luke7:2 Ki mi chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol
Luke7:3 Ak ye kingo kas agobo Jeso
Luke7:4 Ak ye kingo it icheeget ole mi Jeso
Luke7:5 amu chamei pororyennyo
Luke7:6 Kwo anyun Jeso kobooto icheeget. Ak ye ki ma kota ko loo eng' koyooto
Luke7:7 nooto anyun
Luke7:8 Agot anee
Luke7:9 Ak ye kingo kas Jeso ng'aleechuuto
Luke7:10 Ak kingo week anyun che kiga kiyookto
Luke7:11 Ak ye kingo kagobata peetuunooto
Luke7:12 Ak ye kiga riikta ormariichetap nganaseet
Luke7:13 Ak ye kingo keer `Kiptaiyat ineendet
Luke7:14 Ak kiriikta ye neegit ak kotwa kiit ne ki kisute ineendet: ak kitononso anyun che kisutei. Ak ki leenji `Jeso ineendet
Luke7:15 Ak ki ng'eet anyun ne koga kome
Luke7:16 Ak ki iyweis tugul: ak kolas Kamuktaindet kole
Luke7:17 Ak ki yom ng'olyoondoniito agobo ineendet Judea komugul
Luke7:18 Ak ki mwachi `kasubigap Johana ineendet tuguuchuuto tugul.
Luke7:19 Ak kiguurchigei Johana aeng' che po kasubikyik ak koyookto koba ole mi Kiptaiyat
Luke7:20 Ak ye kiga it piik ole mi ineendet
Luke7:21 Eng' sainooto kosoop che chaang' che ki tinyei myanwogik ak korotwek ak tamirmirik che yaacheen; ak ki igoochi kipkoratinik che chaang' kogeerto.
Luke7:22 Kowolji koleenji
Luke7:23 Ak paibai age tugul ne ma nyoorunena kanagut.”
Luke7:24 Kingo kagoba che kiga koyookto Johana
Luke7:25 Ago ki omande ogeer nee okweek? Chiito ne ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen? Ogeero
Luke7:26 Ago ki omande ogeer nee? Maotyot? Ee
Luke7:27 Niito ne ki kisir agobo ineendet
Luke7:28 Amwaiwok ale
Luke7:29 Ak ye kingo kas piik tugul
Luke7:30 Ago ki eesyo Pharisaik ak ng'amotigap Ng'atuutik
Luke7:31 Ak ki le Kiptaiyat
Luke7:32 Kergei ak lagok che tebyei eng' ye mi ole keyae mung'aaret
Luke7:33 Amu ki nyo Johana Kabatisanindet ama am magatya anan divaik; ak omwae anyun ole
Luke7:34 Ki nyo Weeriitap chii koamis ak koeeiso; ak omwae ole
Luke7:35 Ak naat utaatyet keele po iman
Luke7:36 Ak ki mach age eng' Pharisaik kole koamis ak ineendet. Ak ki wo kootap Pharisaindonooto
Luke7:37 Ak ogeero
Luke7:38 ak ki tonon eng' let ole neegitee keelyekyik
Luke7:39 Ak ye kingo keer nooto Pharisaindonooto ne kiguurei ineendet
Luke7:40 Ak ki wolji Jeso ineendet koleenji
Luke7:41 Kole
Luke7:42 Ak ye ki ma kotinyei kiy ne yaakyin
Luke7:43 Kowol Simion kole
Luke7:44 Ak kingo weleljigei kobogoryot
Luke7:45 Ma ing'ututa; ago ineendet
Luke7:46 Ma iilee metinnyu mwaita: ago kagoiile inee keelyekyuk mwaita ne nyamdut.
Luke7:47 Nooto anyun ne kamwaun ale
Luke7:48 Koleenji kobogoryondonooto
Luke7:49 Ak ki toi icheeget che ki miitei amisyet kobooto ineendet
Luke7:50 Ak ki leenji kobogoryot
Luke8:1 Ak kingo pata nooto
Luke8:2 ak kobogorisyek alak che kiga kosoop eng' tamirmirik che yaacheen ak myanwogik
Luke8:3 ak Joana osotyotap Kusa kiboityotap Herod
Luke8:4 Ak kingo yomogei tuiyet ne oo
Luke8:5 Ki wo kolindet koleeta kesweekyik: ak ye kita koletoi
Luke8:6 Ak ki ibutyi alak rwandet; ak ye kingo piityo
Luke8:7 Ak ki ibutyi alak kwenutap katook; ak ki piityo katook kobooto keswechooto
Luke8:8 Ak ki ibutyi alak ng'ung'unyek che myach
Luke8:9 Ak kiteebe kasubikyik ole teptoi kalewenoni.
Luke8:10 Ak ki le
Luke8:11 “Kalewenonooto ko ni: Kesweek ko ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet.
Luke8:12 Ak chooto mi ooreet taban ko icheeget che ki kogas; yeityo konyo chesawilyet
Luke8:13 Ak icheeget che mi rwandet parak
Luke8:14 Ak che ki ibutyi katook
Luke8:15 Ak che mi ng'ung'unyek che myach
Luke8:16 “Ma mi chii ne ye kagonaam tait kotuge kiy
Luke8:17 “Amu ma mi kiy ne keunyei ne ma tuun ng'ang'oksei; ama mi kiy ne po ung'oot
Luke8:18 “Oriipkei anyun eng' ole ogastoi: amu age tugul ne tinyei ko tuun kigoochin; ak ineendet ne ma tinyei ko tuun kirebe agot ne leen tinyei.”
Luke8:19 Ak ki pwanji ineendet `kamet ak che tupcho
Luke8:20 Ak ki kimwachi keleenji
Luke8:21 Ago ki wolji koleenji
Luke8:22 Ak ki laany moingetap peek eng' peetuut age eng' peetuusyechooto
Luke8:23 Ak kingo ta kobendi
Luke8:24 Ak ki pwa ole mi ineendet ak kong'eet
Luke8:25 Ak ki leenji icheek
Luke8:26 Ki it anyun emetap Gerasenik
Luke8:27 Ak ye kingo nyo ngeguutap araraita
Luke8:28 Ak kingo keer Jeso
Luke8:29 Amu ki ng'at tamirmiryet ne murwoon komong' eng' chiichooto. Amu kiga nam eng' peetuusyek che chaang': ak ki kiriibei miising'
Luke8:30 Ak kiteebe Jeso
Luke8:31 Ak ki soom kole si ma ng'at koba keriinget ne ma tinyei ole poochin.
Luke8:32 Ak ki mi olooto akweet ne oo ne po toorook che ki agetoos eng' tulweet: ak ki soom icheek miising' kole kochamji kochut tooroochooto. Kochamji anyun.
Luke8:33 Ak ki mong' anyun oik eng' chiichooto
Luke8:34 Ak kingo keer che ki iyagisyei tuguuk che kabiit
Luke8:35 Ak ki pa kogeer kiit ne kagoyaak; ak ki pwa ole mi Jeso
Luke8:36 Ak ki mwachi icheek che kageerei tuguuk che kabiit
Luke8:37 Ak ki soom anyun piik tugul che po ole neegitee emetap Gerasenik kole
Luke8:38 Ago ki soom ineendet chiito ne kamandae oik kole
Luke8:39 “Iweekyigei koong'ung'
Luke8:40 Ak ye ki weeksei Jeso
Luke8:41 Ak ogeero
Luke8:42 amu ki tinyei chepto ne ki kisich ineegei
Luke8:43 Ak ki mi kobogoryot age ne kimandae korotiik kenyiisyek taman ak aeng'
Luke8:44 Ki nyo anyun kobun let eng' ineendet ak kotwa tabandap ngoryennyi: ak koma tyanit kosiisyo korotiik.
Luke8:45 Ak ki le Jeso
Luke8:46 Ago ki le Jeso
Luke8:47 Ak ye kingo keer kobogoryot kole
Luke8:48 Ak ki leenji
Luke8:49 Ak ye kita kong'alaali
Luke8:50 Ago kingo kas Jeso
Luke8:51 Ak ye kingo kagoit koot
Luke8:52 Ak ki riirtos piik tugul
Luke8:53 Ak kirorechi ineendet anyun kochot
Luke8:54 Ago ki nam ineendet eutap chebooto
Luke8:55 Koweek anyun saboondanyi
Luke8:56 Ak ki kwong'yo miising' sigiikyik; ak ki ng'at ineendet icheek koleenji
Luke9:1 Ki kuur anyun taman ak aeng' koyumgei
Luke9:2 Ak ki iyookto koamda laitornatetap Kamuktaindet
Luke9:3 Koleenji
Luke9:4 Ak koot age tugul ne omong'jini
Luke9:5 Ak alak tugul che mataachak
Luke9:6 Koba anyun kobunoot nganasook
Luke9:7 Ak ki kas anyun kirwoogindet Herod tuguuk tugul che ki koyaak: ki iimgei miising'
Luke9:8 ak kileen alak
Luke9:9 Ak ki le Herod
Luke9:10 Ak ye kingo week che kiyooktoi
Luke9:11 Ago kingo nai tuiyosyek koosup: ak kitaach icheeget
Luke9:12 Ak ye kimachei koimen
Luke9:13 Ago ki leenji icheek
Luke9:14 Amu ki olo po murenik eliphuusyek muut. Ak ki leenji kasubikyik
Luke9:15 Ak ki yai anyun ko uu nooto
Luke9:16 Ak ki nam magatinichooto muut ak injirenichooto aeng'
Luke9:17 Ak ki amis
Luke9:18 Ak ye ki saaei ineegei
Luke9:19 Ak ki wolji icheek koleenji
Luke9:20 Ak ki leenji icheek
Luke9:21 Ago ki itigon icheek
Luke9:22 kole
Luke9:23 Ki mwachi tugul koleenji
Luke9:24 Amu age tugul ne machei kosar saboondanyi kobeeti; ak age tugul ne ibeeti saboondanyi agobo anee
Luke9:25 Amu keljin nee chii
Luke9:26 Amu age tugul ne ililanjino ak ng'aleekyuk ko tuun ililanjin agine Weeriitap chii chiichooto
Luke9:27 Ago amwaiwok iman ale
Luke9:28 Ak kingo keskei olo po peetuusyek sisiit
Luke9:29 Ak ye kita kosaaei
Luke9:30 Ak ogeero
Luke9:31 che ki kotook eng' liilindo
Luke9:32 Ak kiga pirto met Petero kobooto icheeget che ki mi ak ineendet: ago ye kingo kos

Luke9:34 Ak ye kita komwaei tuguuchuuto
Luke9:35 Ak ki mong' kutit eng' pooldet
Luke9:36 Ak ye kingo pata kutinooto
Luke9:37 Ak peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto
Luke9:38 Ak ogeero
Luke9:39 ak keero
Luke9:40 Ak koariirchi kasubiguk ale koon; ago ma imuuch.”
Luke9:41 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji
Luke9:42 Ak kingo ta konyonei
Luke9:43 Ak ki kwong'yo tugul agobo ooindap Kamuktaindet. Ago kingo ta kokwong'dos tugul agobo tuguuk che kayai Jeso
Luke9:44 “Ongochut ng'aleechu iitiikwok: amu tuun kigoitoi Weeriitap chii kwo eunegap piik.”
Luke9:45 Ago ma iguiyo icheek mwaonooto; kiung'ak eng' icheeget
Luke9:46 Kotoi anyun koteebegei kole
Luke9:47 Ak kingo nai Jeso kabwaatutigap mugulelwekwak
Luke9:48 ak ki leenji icheek
Luke9:49 Ak ki wolji Johana koleenji
Luke9:50 Ago ki leenji `Jeso ineendet
Luke9:51 Ak ye ki neegit miising' koit peetuusyek che kitaage ineendet eng' parak
Luke9:52 koyookto che ibei ng'aleek koba kondoe ineendet: koba anyun
Luke9:53 Ak ma taach ineendet
Luke9:54 Ak ye kingo keer nooto kasubikyik Jakobo ak Johana
Luke9:55 Ago kiweleljigei icheek
Luke9:56 Koba anyun nganaseet age.

Luke9:59 Ak ki leenji age

Luke9:62 Ago ki leenji `Jeso ineendet
Luke10:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu kolewen Kiptaiyat piik alak tamanwogik tisap ak icheek
Luke10:2 Ago ki leenji icheek
Luke10:3 Oba: ogeero kaayooktok ko uu aaregap keechiirek eng' kwenutap suik.
Luke10:4 Amoip lolet
Luke10:5 Ak koot age tugul ne omong'jini
Luke10:6 Ak ngo miitei weeriitap kaalyeet yooto
Luke10:7 Ak otebee koyooto anyun
Luke10:8 Ak nganaseet age tugul ne omong'jini
Luke10:9 ak osoop che myandos eng' olooto
Luke10:10 Ago nganaseet age tugul ne omong'jini
Luke10:11 kagibukyok temburyek che po nganaseng'wong'
Luke10:12 Ago amwaiwok ale
Luke10:13 “Pwo! Wee Korazin! Pwo! Wee Bethsaida! Amu nda kiga kiyai eng' Tyro ak Sidon poisyonik che po kamuktaet ko uu che kogiyai eng' okweek
Luke10:14 Ago tuun kaigaitu Tyro ak Sidon eng' kirwooget
Luke10:15 Ak inyee Kapernaum
Luke10:16 “Ineendet ne kasook kogasa agane; ak ineendet ne eesyook koeesyoo agane; ak ineendet ne eesyoo koeesyoi ineendet ne ki iyookwo.”
Luke10:17 Ki week anyun pichooto tamanwogik tisabu eng' poiboiyet
Luke10:18 Ak ki leenji
Luke10:19 Ogeero
Luke10:20 Ago amoboiboitu amu ng'olyoondoni
Luke10:21 Eng' sainooto kobaibait Jeso eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Luke10:22 “Ki kogoono tuguuk tugul Abba: ak ma mi chii ne ingen Weeriit kole ng'oo
Luke10:23 Ak kiweleljigei kasubik
Luke10:24 amu amwaiwok ale
Luke10:25 Ogeero
Luke10:26 Ak ki leenji
Luke10:27 Ak ki wolji ineendet koleenji
Luke10:28 Ak ki leenji
Luke10:29 Ago ye kimachei komyeeitkei
Luke10:30 Kowolji Jeso koleenji
Luke10:31 Ak kichoortaegei tisiindet age oranooto; ak kingo keer ineendet korop taban.
Luke10:32 Ak ye kingo it Lawindet yooto
Luke10:33 Ago ye kita kowendi Samarindet age eng' pandanyi
Luke10:34 kwo ole mi ineendet
Luke10:35 Ak mutai konem dinarisyek aeng'
Luke10:36 Eng' chuuto somok
Luke10:37 Ak ki le
Luke10:38 Ak ye kita komi pandanywa
Luke10:39 Ak ki tinyei chepkamet ne kiguure Maria
Luke10:40 Ago ki iimgei Marta eng' poisyonik che chaang'; ak konyonji ineendet ak koleenji
Luke10:41 Ago ki wolji Kiptaiyat koleenji
Luke10:42 ago kiit agenge ne kemachei: amu kagolewen Maria kebeberta ne myee
Luke11:1 Ak ye kita kosaaei eng' oldo age
Luke11:2 Ak ki leenji icheek
Luke11:3 Koonech ye kiech amitwogikyok che po kotugul.
Luke11:4 Nyoiywech kaat tengekwogikyok; ko uu ye kinyoe kaat acheek pesenwogikyok. Amemutech ole mi yoomseet.’ ”
Luke11:5 Ak ki leenji
Luke11:6 amu kagoit chorwennyu ne punu rutoi
Luke11:7 Ak kowolji ne mi ko
Luke11:8 Amwaiwok ale
Luke11:9 Ak amwaiwok agane ale
Luke11:10 Amu age tugul ne soomei
Luke11:11 Ak ng'oo eng' okweek kwanda ne ngo soom weeriit magatyat
Luke11:12 Anan ngo soom koitap ingok
Luke11:13 Ngo ngen okweek che oo yaach ogoochi lagokwok tuguuk che myach
Luke11:14 Ak ki oon ineendet oindet ne namaat kuut. Ak ye kingo kagomanda oindet
Luke11:15 Ago ki le alak
Luke11:16 Ak kityem alak ineendet komage kaboorunet ne punu kipsengwet.
Luke11:17 Ago ki nai ineendet kabwaatutikwak
Luke11:18 Ak ngo pchegei agine Setani
Luke11:19 Ngot aoone oik eng' Beelsebul
Luke11:20 Ago ngot aoone oik eng' mornetap Kamuktaindet
Luke11:21 “Ak chii ne tinyei kimnateet ak kotinyei kariikyik che riibe koonnyi
Luke11:22 ak ye nyoonji chiito ne kiim kosiir ineendet ak koterteer
Luke11:23 Ineendet ne ma kimi tuwai kogirindaa; ak ineendet ne ma kiyumi tuwai koiyestooti.
Luke11:24 “Ye kagomanda tamirmiryet ne murwoon eng' chiito
Luke11:25 Ak ye iit
Luke11:26 Kwo anyun
Luke11:27 Ak ye kita komwaei ng'aleechu
Luke11:28 Ago ki le ineendet
Luke11:29 Ak ye kingo yumjigei ineendet tuiyosyek
Luke11:30 Amu ko uu ye ki ek kaboorunet Jona eng' piigap Nineveh
Luke11:31 Tuun ng'eetei laitoryat kobogoryot ne po murot tai eng' kirwooget kobooto piigap ibini
Luke11:32 Tuun tonondos piigap Nineveh ak ibini eng' kirwooget
Luke11:33 “Ma mi chii ne ngo kagonaam tait
Luke11:34 Taitap poortang'ung' kondang'ung': ngo myee kondang'ung'
Luke11:35 Keer anyun ngo lapkeiyet ne mi oriing'ung' ko mesundeito.
Luke11:36 Ngo nyiitaat poortang'ung' komugul lapkeiyet
Luke11:37 Ak ye kita kong'alaali
Luke11:38 Ak ye kingo keer Pharisaindet
Luke11:39 Koleenji `Kiptaiyat
Luke11:40 Okweek che oo perber
Luke11:41 Ogoite kagoochinoik che po tuguuk che mi oriit; ak ogeero
Luke11:42 Ago pwo eng' okweek Pharisaik! Amu ogoitoi kebebertap taman ne po heduosmon ak keetiik che mengech che ng'uu
Luke11:43 Pwo eng' okweek Pharisaik! Amu ochame ng'echerok che torooreen eng' sinagogisyek
Luke11:44 Pwo eng' okweek! Amu oo kerge ak kereeriisyek che mataagu
Luke11:45 Ak ki wolji ng'amotyot age ne po ng'atuutik
Luke11:46 Ak kole
Luke11:47 Pwo eng' okweek! Amu oteeche kereeriisyegap maotik
Luke11:48 Ki oegu anyun paorinik ak ochamyechini poisyonigap kwanisyekwok: amu icheeget che kibarei ak oteeche okweek kereeriisyekwak.
Luke11:49 Ki le anyun `utaatyetap Kamuktaindet amu nooto
Luke11:50 si kobiit komage ibini
Luke11:51 kobooch korotiigap Abel agoi korotiigap Zekariah
Luke11:52 “Pwo eng' okweek ng'amotigap ng'atuutik! Amu ki oip yaateiwot ne po ng'omnateet ama obe oriit okweeget
Luke11:53 Ak ye kingo mong' eng' olooto
Luke11:54 koriip kole tamangap konyoor ng'olyoo ne mang'une kutinnyi.
Luke12:1 Eng' saisyechooto
Luke12:2 Ago ma mi kiy ne tugoot
Luke12:3 Amu kiy age tugul ne omwae eng' mesundeito kotun kegasei eng' ole lapkei; ak che ki ochaamji itit eng' koot oriit kotun kemwaitoi eng' koot parak.
Luke12:4 Ak amwaiwok choronokyuk ale
Luke12:5 Ago ateiywok si onai ineendet ne kanyool oiywei: Oiywei ineendet
Luke12:6 Tos ma ki aldae toriitik muut che mengeechen kebebertap muut ne po dinarit? Ama utye Kamuktaindet agot agenge.
Luke12:7 Ago iitotin suumeek tugul che po metowekwok. Amoiywei anyun: osiire okweek toriitik che chaang' che mengeechen.
Luke12:8 Ak amwaiwok ale age tugul ne ibortaa eng' taitap piik
Luke12:9 Ago ineendet ne eesyoa eng' taitap piik kotun keesyoi agine eng' taitap malaikaisyek che po Kamuktaindet.
Luke12:10 Ak age tugul ne mwaei ng'olyoo ne ya agobo Weeriitap chii
Luke12:11 Ak ye kimutak ye mi sinagogisyek
Luke12:12 amu ineetook Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' sainooto kiit ne nyolu omwa.
Luke12:13 Ki leenji anyun chiito age eng' tuiyet
Luke12:14 Ago ki leenji ineendet
Luke12:15 Ak ki leenji icheek
Luke12:16 Ak ki mwachi kalewenet koleenji
Luke12:17 Ak ki ibwaat eng' muguleldanyi kole
Luke12:18 Ak ki le
Luke12:19 Si aleenji saboondanyu
Luke12:20 Ago ki leenji Kamuktaindet
Luke12:21 Ki igees Jesu kole
Luke12:22 Ki leenji anyun kasubikyik
Luke12:23 Amu siirei sabeet amitwogik
Luke12:24 Obwaat chepkuginik
Luke12:25 Ak ng'oo eng' okweek ne imuuchi kogereer met si kotes koindonyi eng' kakwautyet agenge ne po euut?
Luke12:26 Ngo momuuchi anyun oyai agot kiy kitigin
Luke12:27 Obwaat taaptook
Luke12:28 Ago ngo laaksechin Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto susweek che po keeweet che mi ra
Luke12:29 Amocheeng' che oame
Luke12:30 Amu cheeng'ei tuguuchuuto tugul pororyosyegap ng'wony: ago ingen Kwandang'wong' kole omakyinige tuguuchuuto.
Luke12:31 Ago ocheeng' okweek laitornatetap Kamuktaindet
Luke12:32 Amoiywei
Luke12:33 Oalde che otinye
Luke12:34 Amu ole mi konorweng'ung'
Luke12:35 Ongogermenogis suenutikwok
Luke12:36 ak ogergeitu ak piik che igeni kiptaiyannywa
Luke12:37 Poiboen otwogichooto
Luke12:38 Ak ngo nyo eng' riipseet ne po aeng'
Luke12:39 Ago onai ni ole
Luke12:40 Ochopkei ak okweek: amu nyoonei Weeriitap chii eng' sait ne mobwaati.
Luke12:41 Ki leenji anyun Petero
Luke12:42 Kole anyun Kiptaiyat
Luke12:43 Paibai otwogindonooto
Luke12:44 Amwaiwok iman ale
Luke12:45 Ago ngo mwa otwogindonooto eng' muguleldanyi
Luke12:46 weeksei anyun kiptaiyat ne po otwogindonooto eng' peetuut ne kama koogeni
Luke12:47 Ak otwogindonooto
Luke12:48 ago ineendet ne ki ma kongen
Luke12:49 “Ki anyoo awirchi maat ng'wony; nee anyun neta amache
Luke12:50 Ago atinye kabatisanet ne tatun kibatisanena; kamarigitya ne tya agoi kosulda!
Luke12:51 Tos oleen ki anyoo agoonu kaalyeet konyo ng'wony? Amwaiwok ale
Luke12:52 amu kobooch nguno kopchegei piik muutu che mi koot agenge
Luke12:53 Pchegei
Luke12:54 Ki mwachi anyun tuiyet koleenji
Luke12:55 Ak ye ogeer usoonet ne usune murot tai
Luke12:56 Chombilichu
Luke12:57 “Kalya si morwoch okweegei agobo tuguuk che po imanda?
Luke12:58 Amu ye ta obendi ak punyondeng'ung' taitap kirwoogindet
Luke12:59 Amwaun ale
Luke13:1 Ki mi piik alage eng' peetuusyechooto che ki mwachi ineendet agobo piigap Galilaya
Luke13:2 Ak kowolji koleenji
Luke13:3 Amwaiwok ale
Luke13:4 Anan chooto taman ak sisiit
Luke13:5 Amwaiwok ale
Luke13:6 Ak ki mwa kalewenoni
Luke13:7 Koleenji riibindetap mbareetap sabibuk
Luke13:8 Ak ki wolji koleenji
Luke13:9 ak ngo i logoek kong'etee nguno
Luke13:10 Ak ki ineetisyei eng' sinagogit age eng' peetuutap sabato.
Luke13:11 Ak ogeero
Luke13:12 Ak kingo keer `Jeso ineendet
Luke13:13 Ak ki igonoor eunekyik ineendet
Luke13:14 Ki nereech anyun pounindetap sinagogit
Luke13:15 Ago ki wolji Kiptaiyat
Luke13:16 Ak kobogoryondoni
Luke13:17 Ak ye kingo ta komwaei tuguuchu
Luke13:18 Ki mwa anyun
Luke13:19 Kergei ak keswootap karadali
Luke13:20 Ak ki mwa kogeny kole
Luke13:21 Kergei ak mermereek
Luke13:22 Ak kibunoot nganasook che eecheen ak che mengech
Luke13:23 Ak ki leenji chiito age
Luke13:24 Ogiilgei obun kurgeet ne mariich: amu amwaiwok ale
Luke13:25 Ak ye tuun kang'eet chiitap ko po koot
Luke13:26 Otau anyun ole
Luke13:27 Ak tuun mwaei kole
Luke13:28 Koek anyun riirek ak nyeetap kelek
Luke13:29 Ak tuun pwoonei kobunu kong'asiis ak cherongo
Luke13:30 Ak ogeero
Luke13:31 Ki pwa Pharisaik alak eng' sainooto ak koleenji
Luke13:32 Ak ki leenji icheek
Luke13:33 Ago kanyool awo pandanyu rani ak mutai ak peetuut ne po somok: amu ma nyooljin komechi maotyondo oldo age kobatee Jerusalem.’
Luke13:34 “Ee
Luke13:35 Ogeero
Luke14:1 Ak ye kingwo kootap age eng' pounik che po Pharisaik eng' peetuutap sabato
Luke14:2 Ak ogeero
Luke14:3 Ak ki wolji Jeso ng'amotigap ng'atuutik ak Pharisaik
Luke14:4 Ago ki siisyo. Ak ki nam ineendet ak kosoop
Luke14:5 Ak koleenji icheeget
Luke14:6 Ak ki mata komuuch anyun kowolji ineendet kogeny agobo tuguuchuuto.
Luke14:7 Ak ki mwachi kalewenet che kiga kiguur
Luke14:8 Ye kaguurchin chii age tugul igoortap katunisyet
Luke14:9 si ye nyo ineendet ne kaguurok okweek tuwai
Luke14:10 Ago ye kiguurin
Luke14:11 Amu age tugul ne itoroorigei kiming'ini; ak ineendet ne iming'inegei kitoroori.
Luke14:12 Ki mwachi anyun chiichooto kiga kuurso agine
Luke14:13 Ago ye ichop igoorto
Luke14:14 si kiberuurin; amu ma tinyei icheeget che weegun: amu tuun kiweegun eng' ng'eetyeetap che po iman.”
Luke14:15 Ak kingo kas tuguuchuuto chiito age ne ki mi kobooto ineendet eng' amisyet
Luke14:16 Ago ki leenji
Luke14:17 ak ki iyookto otwogindennyi eng' saitap amitwogik
Luke14:18 Ak kotoi tugul eng' mageet agenge komwa kiit ne karaany. Ki leenji chiito ne po tai
Luke14:19 Kole age
Luke14:20 Kole age
Luke14:21 Konyo anyun otwogindonooto
Luke14:22 Ak ki le otwogindonooto
Luke14:23 Koleenji anyun kiptaiyat otwogindennyi
Luke14:24 Amu amwaiwok ale
Luke14:25 Ak ye kingo ta kobendi inee ak tuiyosyek che chaang'
Luke14:26 “Ngo nyoonjo chii
Luke14:27 Ak chii age tugul ne ma ibei kimurtoiyondennyi
Luke14:28 Amu ng'oo eng' okweek
Luke14:29 Si ma ye kagotonon lumeiywot
Luke14:30 kole
Luke14:31 “Anan ng'oo laitoryat ne wendi kobaregei ak laitoryat age
Luke14:32 Anan
Luke14:33 Nooto anyun
Luke14:34 “Myachen muunyuk: ago ngo kagogeskei anyinyindanyi
Luke14:35 Ma kotilei kiy eng' emet anan eng' kapng'atat: kilaktoi. Ineendet ne tinyei iitiik che kastoe
Luke15:1 Ak kiriikyi ineendet taagigap aisuruut tugul ak kiptengeginik si kobiit kogas ineendet.
Luke15:2 Ak ki ing'unyng'ung'so Pharisaik ak siriik
Luke15:3 Ak ki mwachi icheek kalewenoni
Luke15:4 Ng'oo chii eng' okweek
Luke15:5 Ak ye kigonyoor
Luke15:6 Ak ye kagoit kaa
Luke15:7 Amwaiwok ale
Luke15:8 Ng'oo kobogoryot ne tinyei fedhaisyek taman
Luke15:9 Ak ye kagonyoor
Luke15:10 Uu nooto anyun
Luke15:11 Ak ki mwa kole
Luke15:12 Ki leenji weeriit ne ming'in kwandanyi
Luke15:13 Ak kingo pata peetuusyek che matya koyum weerooto ming'in tuguukyik tugul
Luke15:14 Ak kingo kagogesta tugul
Luke15:15 Ak ki wo kogakta chiito age ne po emonooto; ak ki iyookto kwo koyaga toorook eng' mbareet.
Luke15:16 Ak kimachei miising' kole kobiyo meteteek che ki amei toorook: amu ma igoochi chii kiy.
Luke15:17 Ak kingo pwaat
Luke15:18 Ang'eete ak awe kap Abba aleenji
Luke15:19 ma ko nyoljino kota keguureno weeriing'ung': ingaek ko uu age eng' otwogiguk.’
Luke15:20 Ki ng'eet anyun kwo kapkwandanyi. Ago
Luke15:21 “Ak ki leenji weeriit
Luke15:22 Ago ki leenji kwanda otwogikyik
Luke15:23 ak ogetu moita ne neraat
Luke15:24 amu weeriinnyu ni
Luke15:25 “Ak ki mi weeriinnyi ne oo mbar: ak kingo riik ye neegit koot
Luke15:26 Ak kiguur age eng' otwogik
Luke15:27 Ak ki leenji
Luke15:28 Ago kinereech
Luke15:29 Ago ki wolji kwandanyi koleenji
Luke15:30 ago ye ka ngo nyo weeriitang'ung'et
Luke15:31 Ak ki leenji
Luke15:32 Ago kanyoolu keboiboitu ak kigaske: amu kiga kome weeri otupche
Luke16:1 Ak ki leenji ineendet kasubikyik kogeny
Luke16:2 Ak kiguur ineendet koleenji
Luke16:3 Ak ki le riibindonooto eng' muguleldanyi
Luke16:4 Kaanai kiit ne ayae
Luke16:5 Ak kingo kuur age tugul eng' pesenigap kiptaiyandennyi
Luke16:6 Kole
Luke16:7 Yeityo koleenji age
Luke16:8 Ak ki ichoi kiptaiyandennyi otwogindonooto ki ma ko po imanda amu kayai eng' ng'ulaatyet: amu ng'ulaatiin weeriigap ng'wonyuni eng' ibindanywa kosiir weeriigap lapkeiyet.
Luke16:9 Ak amwaiwok ale
Luke16:10 Ineendet ne kiyani eng' che ng'ering'
Luke16:11 Uu nooto anyun
Luke16:12 Ak ngo ki mata oegu che kiyani eng' tuguugap chiito age
Luke16:13 Ma mi otwogindet ne imuuchi koot kiptainik aeng': amu tos wech age
Luke16:14 Ak ki kas Pharisaik tuguuchuuto tugul. Ki chamei silingisyek icheeget
Luke16:15 Ak ki leenji
Luke16:16 Ki tebi Ng'atuutyetap Musa ak kaneetisyosyegap maotik agoi koit Johana: kobooch peetuunooto keamdoi logoiywek che myach che po laitornatetap Kamuktaindet
Luke16:17 Ago nyumnyum kosiirto kipsengwet ak ng'wony
Luke16:18 Age tugul ne oonei osotyonnyi
Luke16:19 Ak ki mi chii anum ne ki mogoryo ne ki ilaachi ngoroik che arusen ne piriir
Luke16:20 ak ki mi kibanania ne ki kiguure Lazaro ne ki kimogoni eng' kurgennyi
Luke16:21 ak kimachei kebae tuguuk che ibutos eng' meesetap mogoryondonooto; ee
Luke16:22 Ak kime kibananiandanooto peetuut age
Luke16:23 Ak ye ki mi ye mi che ki kobek konyal parak
Luke16:24 Ak ki ite kole
Luke16:25 Ago ki le Abraham
Luke16:26 Ak ne siirei chu tugul
Luke16:27 Ak ki le
Luke16:28 amu atinye che kitupche muut; kwo koteechi icheek
Luke16:29 Ak ki leenji Abraham
Luke16:30 Ago ki le
Luke16:31 Ak ki leenji
Luke17:1 Ki leenji kasubikyik anyun
Luke17:2 Kita kaigai eng' ineendet kirooch kaatinnyi koitap pai ne oo ak kewiirchi araraita
Luke17:3 Oriipkei: ngo chiliilun ne otupche
Luke17:4 Ak ngo chalwogenjin konyil tisap eng' peetuut agenge
Luke17:5 Ak ki leenji che kiyooktoi Kiptaiyat
Luke17:6 Ak ki le Kiptaiyat
Luke17:7 Ago mi ng'oo eng' okweek ne tinyei otwogindet ne ibatisyei anan ne iyagi keechiirek
Luke17:8 Tos ma kaigai koleenji ineendet
Luke17:9 Tos weekyin otwogindonooto kongoi amu kayai tuguuk che kagaging'at?
Luke17:10 Uu nooto tuun ak okweek
Luke17:11 Ak ye ki mi ooreet kowendi Jerusalem
Luke17:12 Ak kingo mong'ji nganaseet age
Luke17:13 ak kiwaach kole
Luke17:14 Ak kingo keer icheek
Luke17:15 Ak kingo keer age eng' icheek kole kagosap
Luke17:16 ak ki ibutyi keelyekyik koweekyi kongoi; ak ki Samarindet chiichooto.
Luke17:17 Ak ki wol Jeso kole
Luke17:18 Tos ma piit agot agenge ne kaweek kogoochi kalasunet Kamuktaindet
Luke17:19 Ak koleenji ineendet
Luke17:20 Ak kingo teebee Pharisaik kole “Nyoonei au laitornatetap Kamuktaindet”
Luke17:21 ama kimwaei keele
Luke17:22 Ak ki leenji kasubikyik
Luke17:23 Ak tuun leenjinok
Luke17:24 amu uu kalyeleet
Luke17:25 Ago kanyool konyalil eng' tuguuk che chaang' ak koeesyo ineendet ibini.
Luke17:26 Ak ko uu ole ki piitunda eng' peetuusyegap Noah
Luke17:27 Ki amisyei
Luke17:28 Uu nooto agine
Luke17:29 ago eng' peetuut ne kimanda Lot eng' Sodom koroobon maat ak koik che laldos che ki punu kipsengwet
Luke17:30 uu nooto eng' peetuut ne kibooru Weeriitap chii.
Luke17:31 Eng' peetuunooto
Luke17:32 Obwaat osotyotap Lot.
Luke17:33 Age tugul ne cheeng'ei kosar saboondanyi kobeeti: ak age tugul ne ibeeti saboondanyi koriibei.
Luke17:34 Amwaiwok ale
Luke17:35 Tuun ng'oisei kobogorisyek aeng'u kibagenge; kimuti age
Luke17:36 Tuun mi piik aeng'u mbar: kimuti age
Luke17:37 Ak ki wolji ineendet koleenji
Luke18:1 Ki mwachi anyun kalewenet kole
Luke18:2 koleenji
Luke18:3 ak ki mi mosoget age nganasanooto; ne kinyonei ole mi kotugul
Luke18:4 Ak ki eesyo eng' peetuusyek alak: ago eng' let
Luke18:5 ago amu inyalila mosogani
Luke18:6 Ak ki le Kiptaiyat
Luke18:7 Tos ma yachin Kamuktaindet imanda che lewenotin
Luke18:8 Amwaiwok ale
Luke18:9 Ak ki mwachi kogeny kalewenoni alak che ki imang'ugei kole
Luke18:10 koleenji
Luke18:11 Ki tonon Pharisaindet kosa kong'alaal ineegei kole
Luke18:12 Arugutige konyil aeng' eng' wigiit; agoitoi kebeberta ne po taman eng' tuguuk tugul che anyooru.’
Luke18:13 Ago ki tonon taagindetap aisuruut eng' ye loo
Luke18:14 Amwaiwok ale
Luke18:15 Ak ki imutyi `piik ineendet manyurunik
Luke18:16 Ago kiguur Jeso icheek kobwonji
Luke18:17 Amwaiwok iman ale
Luke18:18 Ak ki teebe ineendet pounindet age
Luke18:19 Ak ki leenji Jeso

Luke18:21 Ak ki le

Luke18:23 Ago ye kingo kas ineendet tuguuchu
Luke18:24 Ak kingo keer `Jeso ineendet
Luke18:25 Amu nyumnyum eng' tambeesyet kochut kondap sindanut
Luke18:26 Ki mwa anyun che ki kasei
Luke18:27 Ki le
Luke18:28 Kole Petero
Luke18:29 Ak ki leenji icheek
Luke18:30 ne ma nyooru che chaang' kosiir eng' peetuusyechu
Luke18:31 Ak ki imut taman ak aeng' kobwa ole mi
Luke18:32 Amu kindoi ineendet eunegap Pororyosyek
Luke18:33 ak kobire kipchoritiit

Luke18:35 Ak kingo riikyi Jeriko
Luke18:36 ak kingo kas kosiirtoi tuiyet

Luke18:38 Ak kiwaach
Luke18:39 Ak ki kergong' ineendet anyun che ki indoi
Luke18:40 Ak ki tonon Jeso
Luke18:41 kole
Luke18:42 Ak ki leenji Jeso
Luke18:43 Ki keerto anyun koma tyanit
Luke19:1 Kimong'ji anyun Jeriko ak kobun kwenut.
Luke19:2 Ak ogeero
Luke19:3 Ak ki cheeng'ei kole kogeer Jeso si konai kole ng'oo ineendet; ago ki ma imuuch amu tuiyet
Luke19:4 Ak ki labat kondo
Luke19:5 Ak ye kingo it Jeso yooto
Luke19:6 Ak ki chook
Luke19:7 Ak ye kingo keer pichooto
Luke19:8 Ak ki tonon Zakayo
Luke19:9 Ak ki leenji Jeso
Luke19:10 Amu ki nyo Weeriitap chii kocheeng' ak kosar ne kiga kobet.”
Luke19:11 Ak ye kingo ta kogasei icheek tuguuchu
Luke19:12 Ki mwa anyun kole
Luke19:13 Yeityo koguur otwogikyik taman
Luke19:14 Ago kiwech ineendet piigap emennyi

Luke19:16 Ak ki nyo tainnyi chiito ne po tai
Luke19:17 Ak ki leenji ineendet
Luke19:18 Ak ki nyo ne po aeng'
Luke19:19 Ak ki leenji nooto agine
Luke19:20 “Ak ki nyo age
Luke19:21 amu ki aiywein
Luke19:22 Koleenji anyun ineendet
Luke19:23 kilya anyun si mende fedhaisyekyuk ole kiwalawale
Luke19:24 Ak ki mwachi icheek che kitonondos eng' ye neegit
Luke19:25 Ak ki leenji icheek ineendet
Luke19:26 Amwaiwok ale
Luke19:27 Ago omutu anyun puunichuchuk kobwa yu
Luke19:28 Ak ye kiga komwa ko uu nooto
Luke19:29 Ak ye kingo kagoriikta Bethphage ak Bethania
Luke19:30 koleenji
Luke19:31 Ak ngo teebenak chii age tugul
Luke19:32 Koba anyun che kagagiyookto
Luke19:33 Ak ye kita kotyachi moitap sigiryet
Luke19:34 Ak ki leenji
Luke19:35 Ak kiget konyo ole mi Jeso: yeityo koiito ngoroikwak eng' moata po sigiryet
Luke19:36 Ak ye kiwendi
Luke19:37 Ak kingo riikta tegeiyatap tulweetap Mseituni
Luke19:38 koleen
Luke19:39 Ak ki leenji Pharisaik alage che po tuiyet ineendet
Luke19:40 Ak ki wolji koleenji
Luke19:41 Ak kingo riik
Luke19:42 koleen

Luke19:44 ak kowiirchin ng'wony
Luke19:45 Ak ki wo Hekaluut oriit
Luke19:46 koleenji icheek
Luke19:47 Ak ki ineetisyei peetuut age tugul eng' Hekaluut. Ago ki cheeng' tisiik che eecheen ak siriik ak che taagunotiin eng' piik
Luke19:48 ak ma nyoor kiit ne ki imuuchi koyai; amu ki epchin iit piik tugul ineendet miising'.
Luke20:1 Ak ye ki ineeti piik eng' peetuut age eng' Hekaluut
Luke20:2 ak ki mwachi ineendet koleenji
Luke20:3 Ak ki wolji koleenji
Luke20:4 Kabatisaneetap Johana ko ki punu kipsengwet
Luke20:5 Ak ki ng'alaaljigei icheegei
Luke20:6 Ago ngot kemwa keele
Luke20:7 Ak ki wol kole
Luke20:8 Ak ki leenji `Jeso icheek
Luke20:9 Ak ki toi komwachi piik kalewenoni
Luke20:10 Ak kingo it peetuut koyookyi otwogindet meechooto
Luke20:11 Ak ki iyookto kogeny otwogindet age: ak kibir nooto agine
Luke20:12 Ak ki iyookto kogeny ne po somok: ak ki iguoten agine ak kotoorchi saang'.
Luke20:13 Ak ki le chiitap ko po mbareet
Luke20:14 Ago ye kingo keer meek ineendet
Luke20:15 Ak ki toorta komanda eng' mbareetap sabibuk ak kobar. Itoi nee anyun chiitap ko po mbareet pichooto?
Luke20:16 Nyoonei anyun ineendet ak kobar meechooto tugul
Luke20:17 Ak ki ichiilji kong' icheek ak kole
Luke20:18 Ak chii age tugul ne ibutyin koyata koilei konyaknyagansei; ak ineendet ne ibutyin koyata
Luke20:19 Ak ki cheeng' siriik ak tisiik che eecheen konam ineendet eng' sainooto; ak ki iywei icheek piik: amu ki nai kole mwaei kalewenoni agobo icheek.
Luke20:20 Ak kiriibooti icheeget ineendet ak koyookto segeik
Luke20:21 Ak kiteebe ineendet kole
Luke20:22 Tos chamdoi ng'atuutik kigoochi kodi Caesarea
Luke20:23 Ago ki nai ng'aalseennywa
Luke20:24 Oboorwo dinarit
Luke20:25 Ak ki leenji icheek
Luke20:26 Ak ki ma imuuch koname mwaonooto eng' taitap piik; ak ki kwong'yo eng' waluunennyi
Luke20:27 Ak ki pwanji ineendet `Sadukaik alak
Luke20:28 kole
Luke20:29 Ki mi anyun weeriik tisabu che kitupcho: ak kiitunis ne po tai
Luke20:30 ak ki indi ne po aeng';
Luke20:31 ak uu nooto ne po somok; ak ki igei nooto tugul ko tisap
Luke20:32 Ak kingo pata kome agine kobogoryondonooto.
Luke20:33 Tuun eng' ng'eetyeet anyun koegu osotyotap ng'oo eng' icheek? Amu kiitun icheek tugul ko tisap.”
Luke20:34 Ki leenji `Jeso icheek
Luke20:35 ago che kiityin keele nyoljin konyoor peetuusyechooto pwoonei
Luke20:36 amu ma komuuchi kobek agoi: amu kergeitu ak malaikaisyek; ak icheeget ko weeriigap Kamuktaindet
Luke20:37 Ago ng'eetos che ki kobek
Luke20:38 Ineendet koma Kamuktaindet ne po che ki kobek
Luke20:39 Ak ki wolji siriik alak koleenji
Luke20:40 Amu ki mata kogany icheek koteebe ineendet teebut age tugul kogeny.
Luke20:41 Ak ki leenji icheek
Luke20:42 Amu ki mwa Daudi ineendet eng' bukuitap Tyenwogigap Kalasunet
Luke20:43 Agoi ayai puuniguk koek ng'echereetap keelyeguk.’
Luke20:44 Kuuree anyun Daudi ineendet Kiptaiyat
Luke20:45 Ak ki mwachi kasubikyik kogasei piik tugul koleenji
Luke20:46 Oriipkei eng' siriik
Luke20:47 ak korebe mosoogik kooriikwak
Luke21:1 Ak ki keer `Jeso mogoreek kondai kagoochinoikwak ole kiyumjin
Luke21:2 ak kogeer mosoget age ne kibanania kondai sendeisyek aeng' che mengech.
Luke21:3 Ak ki le
Luke21:4 amu kagonde chu tugul eng' chaang'indonywa ole kindoi kagoochinoik; ago kagonde ineendet eng' panandanyi tugul che tinyei
Luke21:5 Ak kingo ta kong'alaali alak agobo Hekaluut
Luke21:6 Eng' tuguuchu ogeere
Luke21:7 Ak kiteebe
Luke21:8 Ak ki le
Luke21:9 Ak ye tuun ogas agobo lugoosyek ak chemargeet
Luke21:10 Koleenji anyun icheek
Luke21:11 ak kobiit potanosyek che eecheen che po ng'wony
Luke21:12 Ago ye tomo kobiit chuuto
Luke21:13 Egu paornateet eng' okweek.
Luke21:14 Oegu che pegechinotin eng' mugulelwekwok
Luke21:15 amu agoonok kutit ak utaatyet
Luke21:16 Ak kong'wektak sigiikwok
Luke21:17 Ak kowechok piik tugul agobo kainennyu.
Luke21:18 Ak ma petei sumeiyot agenge ne po metowekwok.
Luke21:19 Ak eng' muitaeng'wong' onyooru saboonwekwok.
Luke21:20 Ak ye tuun ogeer lugoosyek koyiem Jerusalem
Luke21:21 Ingomwechi anyun che mi Judea tuloonook; ak ingomanda che mi kwenutap nganasanooto; ak amat kota koba oriit icheek che mi emonooto.

Luke21:23 Pwo eng' icheek che chiioo ak che tinyei lagok che reritos eng' peetuusyechooto! Amu piitu pichiindo ne oo eng' ng'wony
Luke21:24 Ak kobutyo icheek eng' ng'atibindap rotwetap chok
Luke21:25 Ak kobiit kaboorunoik eng' asiista ak eng' arawet ak eng' kecheik; ak kobiit eng' ng'wony pichiindap pororyosyek
Luke21:26 ak kobek mugulelwegap piik amu kaiyweisyet
Luke21:27 Ak eng' peetuunooto kogeer anyun Weeriitap chii konyonei eng' pooldet kobooto kimnateet ak liilindo ne oo.
Luke21:28 Ak ye toi kosulda tuguuchuuto
Luke21:29 Ak ki mwachi icheek kalewenet; kole
Luke21:30 ye ing'atyo ogeere ak onae okweek ole
Luke21:31 Uu nooto anyun ak okweek
Luke21:32 Amwaiwok iman ale
Luke21:33 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng'wony: ago ma koi siirto ng'aleekyuk.
Luke21:34 “Ago oriipkei anyun okweek
Luke21:35 amu uu nooto tuun nyoonjin piik tugul che menyei ng'wony komugul.
Luke21:36 Ago oriipkei eng' peetuut age tugul
Luke21:37 Ak ki ineetisyei eng' Hekaluut peetuut age tugul; ak kimandoi kemout age tugul
Luke21:38 Ak kimusyin piik tugul ineendet eng' Hekaluut

Luke22:4 Ak ki wo kong'alaal ak tisiik che eecheen ak kiptainik

Luke23:1 Ki ng'eetyo anyun tuiyet komugul

John1:1 Eng' taunet ko ki mi Ng'olyoot
John1:2 Ki mi ineendet ak Kamuktaindet eng' taunet.
John1:3 Ki kiyai tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet; ak ma mi kiy agot agenge ne ki piit ama eng' ineendet. Kiy ne ki yaak
John1:4 eng' ineendet ko ki saboondo
John1:5 ak iluu lapkeiyet eng' mesundeito; ak ma iterteer `mesundeito lapkeiyonooto.
John1:6 Ki nyo chii ne ki iyook Kamuktaindet
John1:7 Ki nyo chiichooto koek paoryat
John1:8 Ki ma ko lapkeiyonooto ineendet
John1:9 Ki mi lapkeiyet ne po iman
John1:10 Ki mi ng'wony ineendet
John1:11 Ki nyoonji chechiik
John1:12 Ago tugul che kitaach ineendet
John1:13 che ki kisich ama eng' korotiik
John1:14 Ak ki ek Ng'olyoot poorto ak komeny kwenunnyo (ak ki kigeer toroornatennyi
John1:15 Ki paoryanji ineendet `Johana
John1:16 Amu ko ki kitaach acheek tugul che po nyiennyi
John1:17 Amu ki kigoon ng'atuutyet eng' Musa; konyo myeeindo ak imanit eng' Jeso Kristo.
John1:18 Ma mi chii ne ki keer Kamuktaindet ole kigoi; kigong'ang'wech Kamuktaindet Weeriit ne ki kisich ineegei

John1:20 Ak ki ng'aany ineendet
John1:21 Ak kiteebe ineendet kole

John1:23 Ki le
John1:24 Ak icheeget che ki kiyok ko ki po Pharisaik.

John1:32 Ak kibaoryan Johana
John1:33 Ak ki ma angen ineendet: ago ineendet ne ki iyookwo abatisane peek
John1:34 Ak ki ageer
John1:35 Kogeny eng' peetuut ne ki isubu peetuunooto
John1:36 ak ki keerot `ineendet Jeso kowendoti

John1:48 Koleenji `Nathanael ineendet
John1:49 Kowolji Nathanael kole

John2:2 Kiga kiguurchi katunisyet Jeso agine kobooto kasubikyik.
John2:3 Ye kingo rar divaik
John2:4 Ak ki leenji `Jeso ineendet
John2:5 Koleenji kamet otwogik
John2:6 Ak ki mi olooto tereenik lo che eecheen che po peek
John2:7 Koleenji `Jeso icheek
John2:8 Ak ki leenji
John2:9 Ak ye kingo chamcham pounindetap igoorto peek che kagoek divaik
John2:10 ak koleenji

John2:12 Kingo pata niito
John2:13 Ak kiga riik paska ne po Yahudik
John2:14 Ak kinyoor kotebyei eng' Hekaluut che ki aldoi eiik ak keechiirek ak cheptugenik
John2:15 ak ki yai kipchoritiit ne po rogoonik che ki sach
John2:16 ak ki leenji icheeget che ki aldoi cheptugenik

John2:23 Ye ki mi Jerusalem eng' paska

John3:2 ki nyo chiichooto ole mi ineendet kemoi

John3:5 Kowolji Jeso koleenji
John3:6 Ne ki kisich eng' poorto ko poorto; ak ne ki kisich eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ko kabuuset.
John3:7 Amekwong' amu kamwaun ale

John3:10 Kowolji Jeso koleenji
John3:11 Amwaun
John3:12 Ngamwaiwok tuguuk che po ng'wony
John3:13 Ma mi chii ne ki togosta kipsengwet
John3:14 Ak ko uu ye ki igartaat Musa ereneet eng' surkwen
John3:15 si konyoor saboondap koigeny eng' ineendet age tugul ne iyani.
John3:16 Amu ki cham Kamuktaindet ng'wony miising'
John3:17 Amu ki ma iyookyi `Kamuktaindet Weeriit ng'wony korwookyi ng'wony; ago si kesar ng'wony eng' ineendet.”
John3:18 Ma kirwookyin chii ne iyani ineendet: ago ineendet ne ma iyani
John3:19 Ak ni kirwooget
John3:20 Amu wechei lapkeiyet chii tugul ne yaei yaityo
John3:21 Ago nyoonei ole mi lapkeiyet ineendet ne yaei imanda
John3:22 Kingo pata tuguuchu konyo Jeso ak kasubikyik emet ne kiguure Judea; ak kibeni olooto kobooto icheek
John3:23 Ak ki ibatisanisyei Johana agine eng' Aenon ne neegitee Salim
John3:24 Amu kitom ketoorchi Johana korgoreet.
John3:25 Ki piit anyun teebutyet eng' alak che po kasubigap Johana ak Yahudyot agobo katiliilet.
John3:26 Ak ki pwanji Johana
John3:27 Kowol Johana kole
John3:28 Ki obaoryanjo okweeget ole ki amwa ale
John3:29 Sandet ineendet ne tinyei murereet: ago paibai miising' chorweetap sandet
John3:30 Nyoljin ineendet koeet ne matiny
John3:31 Oo ineendet ne punu parak kosiir tugul: ineendet ne po ng'wony ko po ng'wony
John3:32 Paoryanjin ineendet kiit ne ki kogeer ak ne ki kogas; ama mi chii ne taachei paornatennyi.
John3:33 Ineendet ne kagotaach paornatennyi ko kagonde ng'ooksennyi
John3:34 Amu ng'alaali ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ineendet ne ki iyoogu Kamuktaindet; amu ma koonu ineendet Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' karagendoet.

John4:32 Ago ki leenji icheek

John4:40 Nooto anyun
John4:41 Ak ki iyan alak che chaang' amu ng'olyoondennyi;
John4:42 ak ki leenji kobogoryot

John4:50 Koleenji `Jeso ineendet

John4:52 koteebee anyun kole kogaigaitu kotya. Koleenji anyun pichooto ineendet
John4:53 Konai anyun kwanda kole ko sainooto ne komwachin Jeso koleenjin
John4:54 Nooto kaboorunet ne po aeng' ne ki yai Jeso kobooch ngo mong' eng' Judea konyo Galilaya.
John5:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu kobiit igoorto ne po Yahudik; ak kotogosta Jeso Jerusalem.
John5:2 Ak miitei Jerusalem tamboiyot
John5:3 Ki ruitos eng' olooto piik che chaang' che ki myandos: che koryotiin
John5:4 amu ki chorchingei malaikaiyat ne po Kiptaiyat tamboiyot peetuusyek alak
John5:5 Ak ki mi yooto chiito age
John5:6 Ak ye kingo keer Jeso chiichooto koruei
John5:7 Kowolji chiito ne myani koleenji
John5:8 Koleenji Jeso anyun
John5:9 Ak kisop chiichooto koma tyanit
John5:10 Ki leenji anyun Yahudik ineendet ne kagisoop
John5:11 Ago ki wolji icheek koleenji
John5:12 koteebee anyun pichooto ineendet kole
John5:13 Ago ki ma nai ineendet ne kagisoobi kole ka ng'oo: amu kiga kwo Jeso
John5:14 Kingo pata nooto konyoorchi Jeso ineendet Hekaluut
John5:15 Ki wo anyun chiichooto
John5:16 Ki us anyun Yahudik Jeso amu ng'olyoondoniito
John5:17 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji
John5:18 Ki cheeng' anyun Yahudik miising' kole kobar ineendet amu niito
John5:19 Ki wolji anyun Jeso icheek koleenji
John5:20 Amu chamei Kwanda Weeriit
John5:21 Amu ko uu ye ing'eeti Kwanda che ki kobek ak kosoobi
John5:22 Amu ma irwookyin Kwanda chii age tugul
John5:23 si kobiit koteech tugul Weeriit
John5:24 “Amwaiwok
John5:25 Amwaiwok
John5:26 Amu ko uu ye tinyei Kwanda saboondo ineegei
John5:27 ak ki igoochi kimnateet koyai kirwooget
John5:28 Amokwong'ee niito: amu nyoonei sait
John5:29 ak komong'; ng'eetyin saboondo che kiyaei ne myee; ak kong'eetyi kirwooget icheeget che kiyaei ne ya.”
John5:30 Ma muuchi ayai kiy aneege: arwoochi ko uu ye agase
John5:31 Ngabaoryanjinigei
John5:32 Mi age ne paoryanjino; ak angen ale po iman paornateet ne paoryanjino.
John5:33 Ki oyokyi ng'olyoot Johana
John5:34 Ago paornateet ne ataache koma punu chii: ago amwae tuguuchu
John5:35 Kitait ineendet ne kilalei kokweng'sei: ak ki ocham oboiboitune lapkeiyennyi eng' peetuusyek che matya.
John5:36 Ago paornateet ne atinye ko oo kosiir ne po Johana: amu poisyonik che ki koono Kwanda agees
John5:37 Ak kibaoryanjo Kwanda ineendet ne ki iyookwo. Tom ogas kutinnyi ole kinye kora
John5:38 Ama tebyei eng' okweek ng'olyoondennyi: amu moyani ineendet ne ki iyoogu Kamuktaindet.
John5:39 Cham osyachi eng' siruutik
John5:40 ago mochame obwanjo
John5:41 Mataache kalasunet eng' piik.
John5:42 Ago angenok ale motinye chamyetap Kamuktaindet eng' oriing'wong'.
John5:43 Ki anyoo eng' kainetap Abba
John5:44 Omuuchi eng' nee oyan
John5:45 Mo leen ang'ang'ndook eng' Kwanda: miitei age ne ng'ang'dook
John5:46 Amu nda ki koyan Musa
John5:47 Ago ngo moyani siruutikyik
John6:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu kwo Jeso pitet age ne po araraitap Galilaya
John6:2 Ak ki isup ineendet tuiyet ne oo
John6:3 Ak kitogosta Jeso tulweet
John6:4 Ak kiga riik paska
John6:5 Kingo ng'eet met anyun Jeso
John6:6 Kimwaei ni kotyeme ineendet: amu ki ingen ineendet kiit ne machei koyai.
John6:7 Kowolji `Philipu ineendet koleenji
John6:8 Koleenji ineendet age ne po kasubikyik
John6:9 “Mi yu weeriit age
John6:10 Ki mwa Jeso kole
John6:11 Ki nam anyun `Jeso magatiinik; ak kingo kagogoito kongoi
John6:12 Ak ye kingo piyong'so
John6:13 Koyum anyun katuganichooto
John6:14 Ye kingo keer anyun pichooto kaboorunet ne kayai
John6:15 Kingo nai Jeso kole neegit kobwa si konam ineendet eng' kimnateet
John6:16 Ak ye kingo ek koskoleny
John6:17 ak ki laany moingetap peek
John6:18 Ak kiwasegei araraita amu kiusei usoonet ne oo.
John6:19 Ye kingo kagoba anyun eng' araraita ole po maelisyek somok anan ko somok ak kebeber
John6:20 Ago ki leenji icheek
John6:21 Kocham anyun kotaach ineendet eng' moinget: ak ne matyaniit
John6:22 Kibetuut ne ki isubi nooto kogeer tuiyet ne kitononi eng' araraita pitoniin
John6:23 (ago ki pwa moingonik alage eng' Tiberia ye neegitee kooret ole ki ame magatiinik ye kingo kagogoito Kiptaiyat kongoi):
John6:24 Ye kingo keer tuiyet anyun kole ma mi Jeso olooto
John6:25 Ak ye kingo nyoor ineendet eng' pitet age ne po araraita

John6:27 Amoboisye agobo amitwogik che pegu
John6:28 Ki leenji anyun icheek ineendet
John6:29 Kowolji Jeso koleenji
John6:30 Ki leenji icheek ineendet anyun
John6:31 Ki am kwanisyekyok mana eng' surkwen; ko uu ye ki kisir keele
John6:32 Koleenji anyun `Jeso icheek
John6:33 Amu magatyat ne po Kamuktaindet ko nooto choorugei eng' kipsengwet
John6:34 Koleenji anyun `icheek ineendet
John6:35 Koleenji `Jeso icheek
John6:36 Ago kaamwaiwok ale
John6:37 Pwonjino tugul che koono Kwanda; ak ineendet ne nyoonjino koma oone matiny.
John6:38 Amu ki achooruge eng' kipsengwet
John6:39 Ak ni mageetap ineendet ne ki iyookwo
John6:40 Amu ni mageetap Abba
John6:41 Ki ing'unyng'ung'so anyun Yahudik
John6:42 Ak ki le

John6:45 Ki kisir eng' maotik

John6:47 Amwaiwok
John6:48 Aa magatyat ne po saboon.
John6:49 Ki am kwanisyekwok mana eng' surkwen
John6:50 Ni magatyat ne choorugei eng' kipsengwet
John6:51 Aa magatyat ne sabei ne ki choorgei eng' kipsengwet: ngo am chii age tugul magatyandani
John6:52 Kiboryo anyun Yahudik icheegei
John6:53 Koleenji Jeso anyun icheek
John6:54 Ineendet ne amei poortanyu ak koeei korotiikyuk kotinyei saboondap koigeny; ak ang'eeti ineendet eng' peetuutap let.
John6:55 Amu amdit iman poortanyu
John6:56 Ineendet ne amei poortanyu ak koeei korotiikyuk komenya
John6:57 Ko uu ye ki iyookwo Kwanda ne sabei
John6:58 Ni magatyandanooto ne ki choorgei eng' kipsengwet: ma ko uu ye ki am kwanisyek ak kobek: ineendet ne amei magatyandani kosabei koigeny.”
John6:59 Ki mwa tuguuchu eng' sinagogit
John6:60 Ye kingo kas ni che chaang' eng' kasubikyik
John6:61 Ago ki nai Jeso eng' oriitinnyi kole ing'unyng'ung'jin kasubikyik ng'olyoondoniito. Koleenji icheek
John6:62 Teptoi ano anyun ngot ko tuun ogeer Weeriitap chii kotogostoi ole ki mi atkinye?
John6:63 Kabuuset ne igoitoi saboondo; ma tilei kiy poorto: ng'aleek che kaamwawok ko kabuuset ak saboondo.
John6:64 Ago miitei alak eng' okweek che ma iyani.” Amu ki nai Jeso kobooch taunet icheeget che ma iyani
John6:65 Ak ki le

John6:69 Ak ki kiyan ak kingen keele ii Ne Tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet.”

John7:1 Ak kingo pata tuguuchu kowendot Jeso eng' Galilaya: amu ma cham kowendot eng' Judea

John7:3 Ki leenji anyun tupchosyekyik

John7:6 Koleenji anyun `Jeso icheek

John10:1 Amwaiwok
John10:2 Ago mestowotap keechiirek ineendet ne punei kurgeet.
John10:3 Yaatyin ineendet riibindetap kurgeet; ak kasei keechiirek kutinnyi: ak kuurei keechiirekyik eng' kainaikwak
John10:4 Ak ye kagomaanda ineendet chechiget tugul koba saang'
John10:5 Ak ma chamei koosup toondet
John10:6 Komwachi Jeso icheek kalewenoni: ago ma iguiyo icheek kole nee tuguuchooto ki kamwachi.
John10:7 Koleenji anyun Jeso icheek kogeny
John10:8 Choriik ak ko rebiik tugul che ki indounena: ago ma kas keechiirek icheek.
John10:9 Aa kurgeet: ngwo chii age tugul ko ne puna anee
John10:10 Nyoonei choriindet si kochoor
John10:11 Aa mestowot ne myee: igoitoi mestowot ne myee saboondanyi agobo keechiirek.
John10:12 Ago ineendet ne otwogin
John10:13 Mweei ineendet ne otwogin amu otwogin koma mage kiy keechiirek.
John10:14 Aa mestowot ne myee. Angen chechuuk ak kongeno chechuuk
John10:15 ko uu ye ingeno Kwanda
John10:16 Ak atinye keechiirek alak
John10:17 Chama anyun Kwanda amu nooto
John10:18 Marebena chii
John10:19 Ki piit toiyet kogeny eng' Yahudik agobo ng'aleechuuto.
John10:20 Ak ki le che chaang' eng' icheek
John10:21 Kole alage
John10:22 Ak kimi igoortap katabaanet eng' Jerusalem: ak kibetusyegap kaititindo;
John10:23 ak kiwendot Jeso eng' Hekaluut eng' keterut ne po Solomon.
John10:24 Ki pwa anyun Yahudik koyiem ineendet
John10:25 Kowolji Jeso koleenji
John10:26 Ago moyani
John10:27 Kasei kutinnyu keechiirekyuk
John10:28 Agoochini icheek saboondap koigeny; ak ma koi lusyo
John10:29 Oo Abba
John10:30 Anee ak Kwanda
John10:31 Ki nam anyun Yahudik koik kogeny koleen kolach ineendet.
John10:32 Kowolji Jeso koleenji
John10:33 Kowolji `Yahudik ineendet koleenji
John10:34 Kowolji `Jeso pichooto
John10:35 Ngo kigoguure ineendet icheek ‘kamuktaik’
John10:36 tos omwae agobo ineendet
John10:37 Ngot koma yai poisyosyegap Kwandanyu
John10:38 Ago ngayai
John10:39 Ki cheeng' anyun kogeny konam ineendet: ago kibetito eng' eunekwak.
John10:40 Ak ki wo kogeny Jordan komosin ole ki ibatisanisye Johana eng' tai; ak ki tebi eng' olooto.
John10:41 Ak ki pwanji `che chaang' ineendet; ak kole
John10:42 Ak ki iyan ineendet che chaang' eng' olooto.
John11:1 Ak kimyan chiito age ne kiguure Lazaro
John11:2 Ak ki Maria niito ne ki iil Kiptaiyat eng' mwaita
John11:3 Ki iyookyi chepkametwogichooto ineendet ng'olyoot
John11:4 Ago ye kingo kas Jeso nooto kole
John11:5 Ak ki chamei Jeso Marta
John11:6 Kingo kas anyun kole myani
John11:7 Kingo pata niito anyun
John11:8 Koleenji kasubik
John11:9 Kowol Jeso kole
John11:10 Ago ngo wendot chii kemoi
John11:11 Komwa tuguuchu: ak ye ibata koleenji icheek
John11:12 Koleenji anyun kasubik ineendet
John11:13 Ago kimwaei Jeso agobo meennyi: ak kileen icheek abeere mwaei agobo rwondo ne kiga konuuch.
John11:14 Ki mwachi anyun Jeso icheek komyee
John11:15 Ago abaibai agobo okweek amu ki ma ami oliindo

John11:17 Ye kingo it Jeso anyun
John11:18 Ki neegitee Bethania Jerusalem
