John11:21 Koleenji Marta anyun Jeso
John11:22 Ago angen agot nguno ale
John11:23 Koleenji `Jeso ineendet
John11:24 Koleenji Marta ineendet
John11:25 Koleenji Jeso
John11:26 ak chii age tugul ne sabei ak koyanan koma meei matiny. Tos iyani inyee niito?
John11:27 Koleenji
John11:28 Ak ye kingo kagomwa niito chebooto
John11:29 Ak ye kingo kas nooto
John11:30 (Ago ki tomo koit Jeso nganasanooto
John11:31 Ki isup anyun Yahudik chebooto
John11:32 Ye kingo it anyun Maria ole mi Jeso
John11:33 Ye kingo keer Jeso anyun ineendet koriirei
John11:34 ak kole
John11:35 Koriir Jeso.
John11:36 Kole anyun Yahudik
John11:37 Ago ki le alak eng' icheek
John11:38 Kogas anyun Jeso king'wan kogeny eng' oriitinnyi konyonei kererit. Ki kebeneet
John11:39 Kole Jeso
John11:40 Koleenji `Jeso ineendet
John11:41 Koisto anyun koita. Ak ki ing'eet metit Jeso ak kole
John11:42 Ak kaanai ale igasa eng' ui tugul
John11:43 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto
John11:44 Komong' anyun ineendet ne kiga me
John11:45 Ki iyan anyun ineendet che chaang' che po Yahudik che kigabwa ole mi Maria
John11:46 Ago ki pa alak ole mi Pharisaik
John11:47 Ki kuur anyun `tisiik che eecheen ak Pharisaik tuiyetap kirwoogik
John11:48 Ngot kebagaakte ineendet ko uu ni
John11:49 Ak ki leenji age eng' icheek
John11:50 mongen ole myeeitu eng' okweek ngo mechi piik chiito agenge
John11:51 Ki ma komwaei ineegei nooto
John11:52 ma agobo pororyet ineegei
John11:53 Kobooch peetuunooto anyun ak kwo tai
John11:54 Mata kowendot Jeso anyun eng' ole taagu eng' ole mi Yahudik
John11:55 Kiga koriik paska ne po Yahudik: ak ki pa che chaang' eng' emet kotogosta Jerusalem kotom koit paska
John11:56 Ki cheeng' anyun Jeso
John11:57 Kiga ng'at tisiik che eecheen ak Pharisaik
John12:1 Ak kingo ta komi peetuusyek lo si koit paska konyo Jeso Bethania
John12:2 Kichopchi icheek eng' olooto ineendet amitwogik che po lagat: koboisyechi Marta; ago ki mi Lazaro kobooto icheek che ki amisyei ak ineendet.
John12:3 Ki inem anyun Maria mwaita ne nyamdut ne po ratilit agenge
John12:4 Ago ki le Judas Iskaryot
John12:5 “Ko amu nee si ma ki aldae mwai dinarisyek pogol somok
John12:6 Ki mwa ni anyun
John12:7 Kole Jeso
John12:8 Amu mi kibananook kobootok kotugul; ago ma mi anee ak okweek kotugul.”

John12:10 Ago ki irwooch tisiik che eecheen kole kobar Lazaro agine;

John12:14 Ak ye kingo kagonyoor Jeso moitap sigiryet
John12:15 “Meiywei

John12:18 Ki pa anyun tuiyet amu nooto kotorookta ineendet
John12:19 Kimwachigei anyun Pharisaik icheegei kole
John12:20 Ak ki mi Yunanik alage eng' che kigaba kotogosta kosa eng' igoorto.
John12:21 Ki pwa chooto anyun ole mi Philipu
John12:22 Ki nyo Philipu komwachi Andrea: ak ki pwa Andrea ak Philipu komwachi Jeso.
John12:23 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji
John12:24 Amwaiwok
John12:25 Ineendet ne chamei saboondanyi kobeeti; ak ineendet ne wechei saboondanyi eng' ng'wonyuni koriip kot koit saboondap koigeny.

John17:1 Ki mwa Jeso ng'aleechu; ak konyal kipsengwet
John17:2 ko uu ye ki igoochi ineendet kimnateet koboi piik tugul
John17:3 Ak ni saboondap koigeny
John17:4 Ki atoroorin eng' ng'wony
John17:5 Ak nguno
John17:6 Ki aboorchi kaineng'ung' piik che ki igoono eng' ng'wony. Ki cheguuk
John17:7 Kagonai nguno kole punun tuguuk tugul che ki igoono;
John17:8 amu ki agoochi icheek ng'aleek che ki igoono ak ki kotaach
John17:9 Asaae agobo icheek: ma saae agobo ng'wony
John17:10 ak tuguuk tugul chechuuk ko cheguuk
John17:11 Ak ma amite ng'wony
John17:12 Ki ariip eng' kaineng'ung' icheek che ki igoono
John17:13 Ak kanyonjin nguno; ak amwae tuguuchu eng' ng'wony
John17:14 Ki agoochi ng'olyoondeng'ung'; ak kawech ng'wony icheek
John17:15 Masaae ale imut icheek eng' ng'wony
John17:16 Ma po ng'wony icheek
John17:17 Itiliil icheek eng' imanit: imanit ng'olyoondeng'ung'.
John17:18 Ko uu ye ki iyookwo anyo ng'wony
John17:19 Ak atabaanige agobo icheek si kobiit kitabaan icheek eng' imanit.
John17:20 Amasaae agobo chu kityo
John17:21 si kobiit koek icheek tugul agenge; ko uu ye imi inyee Abba
John17:22 Ak kaagoochi icheek toroornatet ne ki igoono; si kobiit koek agenge ko uu ye ki agenge acheek;
John17:23 anee eng' icheek

John17:25 “Ee Abba ne po imanda

Acts1:12 Koweek anyun koba Jerusalem kobunu tulweet ne kiguure tulweetap Mseituni
Acts1:13 Ye kingo kagoba ko
Acts1:14 Ki tebi chu tugul eng' kabwaatet agenge eng' kagiiletapkei ne po saaet
Acts1:15 Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki tonon Petero eng' kwenutap che tupcho (piik che kigatuiyo
Acts1:16 “Che kitupche
Acts1:17 Amu ki kiititech
Acts1:18 (Ak kinyoor chiichi mbareet eng' melektap tengektanyi; ak kingo put kosyep moo
Acts1:19 Kinaak ng'olyoondonooto eng' tugul che menyei Jerusalem
Acts1:20 “Amu siraat eng' kitabuut ne po Tyenwogigap Kalasunet kole
Acts1:21 Ingobiit age eng' piik che ki cham kebendoti tugul eng' peetuusyek tugul ye ki cham komong'u Kiptaiyat Jeso ak komandoi eng' kwenunnyo
Acts1:22 kotaune kabatisanetap Johana agoi peetuut ne ki kimuti kwo parak. Kanyool koek age eng' pichuuto paoryat kobootech agobo ng'eetyeennyi.”
Acts1:23 Ara ki lewen piik aeng'
Acts1:24 Ak ki sa kole
Acts1:25 si kobiit konam kebeberta eng' poisyoni ak kayooktaoni
Acts1:26 Kiseer parbareek agobo icheek
Acts2:1 Kingo it peetuutap Pentekoste
Acts2:2 Ak ki mong' eng' sainooto cheet ne punu kipsengwet ko uu usoonet ne usei eng' kimnateet ne oo
Acts2:3 Ak ki mong'ji ng'elyebwek che pcheotin
Acts2:4 Ki nyi icheek tugul Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak ki toi kong'alaale kutusweek alak
Acts2:5 Ki mi Yahudik che ki menyei Jerusalem
Acts2:6 Kingo kas cheonooto
Acts2:7 Ak ki tang'any tugul ak kokwong'yo komwaei koleen
Acts2:8 Ak katepto ano si kegas acheek chii tugul eng' kutinnyo
Acts2:9 Echeek alak ko Partik
Acts2:10 Phrygia ak Pamphylia
Acts2:11 Kretik ak Arabuuk
Acts2:12 Ki tang'any tugul ak kogereer met
Acts2:13 Ago kichombil alak kole
Acts2:14 Ago ki tonon Petero kobooto taman ak aeng' ak koleenji eng' kutit ne oo: “Okweek piigap Judea ak okweek tugul che omenye Jerusalem
Acts2:15 Ma pogityo pichu
Acts2:16 Achicha
Acts2:17 ‘Tuun eng' peetuusyek che po let
Acts2:18 Ee
Acts2:19 Ak abarte kwang'utik eng' kipsengwet parak
Acts2:20 Kiwolei asiista koek mesundeito
Acts2:21 Ak age tugul ne kuurei kaineetap Kiptaiyat ko tuun kisaru.’
Acts2:22 “Okweek piigap Israel
Acts2:23 Ineendet ne ki igoito Kamuktaindet eng' pegechinetap ng'olyoondennyi ak naet ne kiga kechop eng' tai
Acts2:24 Ago ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet ineendet
Acts2:25 Amu ki mwa Daudi agobo ineendet kole
Acts2:26 Amu nooto anyun kogasegei muguleldanyu ak kibaibait ng'elyeptanyu; kobooto nooto komeng'iisyei poortanyu agine eng' kamang'unet.
Acts2:27 Amu mebagakyini saboondanyu ye mi che ki kobek
Acts2:28 Ki igoono anai ortinwegap saboondo; inyiitwa poiboiyet eng' taing'ung'.’
Acts2:29 “Che kitupche
Acts2:30 Ak amu kimaotyo
Acts2:31 Kingo keer niito anyun kong'alaal agobo ng'eetyeetap Kristo kole
Acts2:32 Ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet Jeso niito
Acts2:33 Amu itoroorot ineendet eng' eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet
Acts2:34 Amu ki ma togosta Daudi kipsengwet
Acts2:35 agoi ayai puuniguk koek ng'echereetap keelyeguk.’
Acts2:36 “Ingonai anyun komyee koot komugul ne po Israel kole
Acts2:37 Kingo kas anyun niito
Acts2:38 Koleenji `Petero icheek
Acts2:39 Amu neng'wong' kayomisoni
Acts2:40 Ak kibaoryan eng' ng'aleek alak che chaang' ak ko ki il koleenji
Acts2:41 Ki kibatisan anyun icheeget che kitaach ng'olyoondennyi
Acts2:42 Ki igiiljingei icheek tugul kaneetisyetap che kiyooktoi ak yamdaet
Acts2:43 Ki nyoor chii tugul kaiyweisyet
Acts2:44 Ki mi tugul kibagenge che kiga koyan ak ki yamdoi tuguuk tugul.
Acts2:45 Ki alda mbareenikwak ak tuguuk alak che ki tinyei ak kopchechi icheek tugul che tee che kinyaliili chii age tugul.
Acts2:46 Ki mi Hekaluut peetuut age tugul kotebyei eng' kabwaatet agenge
Acts2:47 kolasu Kamuktaindet ak ki poiboi piik tugul agobo icheek. Ak eng' peetuut age tugul ko ki tesyin `Kiptaiyat icheek piik chooto ki nyooru sorunet.
Acts3:1 Ki togosta Petero ak Johana hekaluut eng' sait ne po saaet
Acts3:2 Ak ki kiganabi chiito ne ki salamwo kobooch komi moetap kamet
Acts3:3 ko ye kingo keer `ineendet Petero ak Johana komachei koba hekaluut oriit
Acts3:4 Ak ki ichiilji kong' `Petero ineendet kobooto Johana
Acts3:5 Ak ki inyal `ineendet icheek
Acts3:6 Ago ki le Petero
Acts3:7 Konam anyun ineendet eut ne po tai
Acts3:8 Ki ng'eet kochokyi
Acts3:9 Ak ki keer piik tugul ineendet kowendoti ak kolosu Kamuktaindet:
Acts3:10 ak ki nai icheeget kole
Acts3:11 Ak kingota konamoti chiichooto Petero ak Johana
Acts3:12 Ak ye kingo keer Petero
Acts3:13 Kamuktaindet ne po Abraham
Acts3:14 Ago ki otiiye okweek Ineendet ne Tiliil ak ko po Imanda
Acts3:15 ak ki obar Ne Oo ne po saboondo; ne ki ing'eet Kamuktaindet eng' che ki pek; kibaorinigap nooto acheek.
Acts3:16 Ak kagogoochi kainennyi chiichi kimnateet
Acts3:17 Ak nguno anyun
Acts3:18 Ago tuguuk che kiga koboor Kamuktaindet eng' tai eng' kutuswegap maotik tugul
Acts3:19 Osigu anyun ak owalage
Acts3:20 si koyook Kristo ne ki kilewenwok
Acts3:21 ne kanyool kotaach kipsengwet agoi peetuusyek che kiwale tuguuk tugul komiagitu
Acts3:22 Ki mwa Musa iman
Acts3:23 Ak tuun king'emei kiwong'u eng' kwenutap piik
Acts3:24 Ee
Acts3:25 O weeriigap maotik
Acts3:26 Ak ye kingo kagong'eet Kamuktaindet kiboityondennyi
Acts4:1 Kingo ta kong'alaaljin `Petero ak Johana piik
Acts4:2 kotinyei nereegek amu ki ineet piik ak koamda eng' Jeso ng'eetyeetap che ki pek.
Acts4:3 Ak ki nam icheeget ak kotoorchi korgoreet agoi mutai amu kiga koimen.
Acts4:4 Ago ki iyan che chaang' eng' icheek che ki kas ng'olyoot; ak ki ek koitetap murenik olo po eliphuusyek muut.
Acts4:5 Ak eng' peetuut ne ki isubi nooto koyumgei pounik ak poisyek ak siriik eng' Jerusalem;
Acts4:6 ak Anas tisiindet ne oo
Acts4:7 Ak kingo kagonde icheek kwenunnywa
Acts4:8 Kingo nyi anyun Petero Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Acts4:9 ngemachei keginenech rani agobo poisyet ne myee ne ko ki yachi chiito ne nyalulat
Acts4:10 ingonaak anyun eng' okweek tugul
Acts4:11 Jeso niito ko ‘koita ne ki osas okweek teegik
Acts4:12 Ama mi yetunet eng' chiito age
Acts4:13 Kingo keer `icheek nyiganatetap Petero ak Johana
Acts4:14 Kingo keer chiito ne kogisoop kotononi kobooto icheek
Acts4:15 Ago ye kingo kagong'at icheek komanda eng' kapkirwook
Acts4:16 kole
Acts4:17 Ago si mata koiyestaat eng' kwenutap piik
Acts4:18 Ara ki kuur icheek ak kong'at koleenji amatata kong'alaal anan koneetis agot kitigin eng' kainetap Jeso.
Acts4:19 Ago ki wolji `Petero ak `Johana icheek koleenji
Acts4:20 Amu ma kimuuchi kesisye kobatee kemwa tuguuk che ki kegeer ak che kigegas.”
Acts4:21 Kingo kagoger kong' icheek kogeny
Acts4:22 Amu kisiirei artam kenyiisyegap chiichooto kiyaak eng' ineendet kwang'utyoniito po kasaabet.
Acts4:23 Ak kingo kageunda
Acts4:24 Kingo kas icheek komwachi Kamuktaindet eng' kutit ne oo eng' kabwaatet agenge
Acts4:25 ne ki imwa eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' kutitap kwandanyo Daudi kiboityondeng'ung'
Acts4:26 Kitetegei laitorinigap ng'wony
Acts4:27 Amu iman kituitos eng' nganasani Herod ak Pontio Pilato agine kobooto Pororyosyek ak piigap Israel
Acts4:28 si koyai kiit age tugul ne kisip kong'at eung'ung' ak ng'omnateng'ung' kole kosulda.
Acts4:29 Ak nguno anyun
Acts4:30 ye iitoi inyee eung'ung' isoobi piik; si koyaak kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik eng' kainetap Kiboityondeng'ung' ne Tiliil
Acts4:31 Kingo kagosa
Acts4:32 Ak ki po muguleldo agenge ak saboondo agenge tuiyet ne kiga koyan. Ma mwa chii agot agenge kole nenyi kiy age tugul ne ki tinyei
Acts4:33 Ak kibaoryan che kiyooktoi eng' kimnateet ne oo agobo ng'eetyetap Kiptaiyat Jeso
Acts4:34 Amu ki ma komi agot agenge eng' kwenunnywa ne kibanani kiy
Acts4:35 konde keelyegap che kiyooktoi; ak ki kipchechi chii age tugul ne ki nyalili.
Acts4:36 Ki mi Lawindet
Acts4:37 ak ki ip silingisyek konde keelyegap che kiyooktoi.
Acts5:1 Ago ki mi chiito age ne ki kiguure Anania
Acts5:2 ak kiituuch kebebertap che ki kialdae
Acts5:3 Ago ki le Petero
Acts5:4 Kingo ta komi
Acts5:5 Kingo kas Anania ng'aleechu
Acts5:6 Ak king'eetyo `murenik ak kotaae muusto angeet
Acts5:7 Ye ki neegit kogeskei saisyek somogu
Acts5:8 Koleenji `Petero ineendet
Acts5:9 Ago ki leenji `Petero ineendet
Acts5:10 Ak ki ibutyi keelyekyik sainooto ak kome. Ye kingo pwa ko anyun murenik konyoor ko kagome
Acts5:11 Konyonji anyun kaiyweisyet ne oo kaniset komugul kobooto tugul che ki kas tuguuchooto.
Acts5:12 Kiyaogis eng' eunegap che kiyooktoi kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che chaang' eng' kwenutap piik. Ak ki mi tugul eng' kabwaatet agenge eng' keterut ne po Solomon.
Acts5:13 Ago eng' piik alak ko ki mata kobiit chii ne kita kogany konamgei ak icheeget
Acts5:14 Ak kitesak kayanik eng' Kiptaiyat kosiir
Acts5:15 kot komut icheek che myandos kobwa ortinwek
Acts5:16 Ki iyomogei tuiyet ne punu nganasook che neegitee Jerusalem
Acts5:17 Ago ki tonon tisiindet ne oo
Acts5:18 konam che kiyooktoi ak kotoorchi korgoreet ne po piik tugul.
Acts5:19 Ago ki yaat malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat kurgotigap korgoreet kemoi ak komut icheek komong' saang'
Acts5:20 “Oba
Acts5:21 Kingo kas ko uu nooto
Acts5:22 Ago kingo it kiplugotinik koma nyoor icheek; ak kiweektagei icheek ak komwaita
Acts5:23 kole
Acts5:24 Ak kingo kas ng'aleechu kiptaiyatap Hekaluut ak tisiik che eecheen
Acts5:25 Ak ki nyo chii ak koleenji
Acts5:26 Kwo anyun kiptaiyat kobooto kiplugotinik ak komut kobwa
Acts5:27 Kingo kagomut icheek kobwa
Acts5:28 kole
Acts5:29 Ago ki wol Petero ak che kiyooktoi kole
Acts5:30 Ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet ne po kwanisyekyok Jeso
Acts5:31 Ineendet ne kiitoroor Kamuktaindet eng' eunnyi ne po tai koek Ne Oo ago Yetindet
Acts5:32 Ak ki paorinik acheek che po tuguuchu
Acts5:33 Kingo kas icheek niito
Acts5:34 Ago ki tonon Pharisain eng' kapkirwook ne ki kiguure Gamaliel
Acts5:35 Ak ki leenji icheek
Acts5:36 Amu kingo tomo koit peetuusyechu
Acts5:37 Kingo pata chiichooto kong'eet Judas ne po Galilaya eng' peetuusyek che po sirisyetap kainaigap piik
Acts5:38 Ara anyun
Acts5:39 ago ngot ko po Kamuktaindet
Acts5:40 ak kingo kagoguur che kiyooktoi kobwa ole mi icheek
Acts5:41 Koba anyun eng' taitap kapkirwook koboiboi amu kagiit keele nyoljin konyoor kateweerisyet agobo Kainanooto.
Acts5:42 Ak ki ma siisyo eng' peetuut age tugul koneetis ak koamdoi eng' Hekaluut ak eng' kooriik
Acts6:1 Eng' peetuusyechooto anyun
Acts6:2 Koguur anyun tamanu ak aeng' tuiyet ne po kasubik ak koleenji
Acts6:3 Ko uu nooto anyun
Acts6:4 Ago si ki kiiljige acheek saaet
Acts6:5 Ki cham anyun tuiyet komugul ng'olyoondonooto; ak ki lewen Stepano
Acts6:6 Ki inde chooto anyun taitap che kiyooktoi
Acts6:7 Kitesak anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet; ak kotesak miising' koitetap kasubik eng' Jerusalem; ak kogas iit kayaneet tuiyet ne oo ne po tisiik.
Acts6:8 Ak kinyiitat Stepano myeeindo ak kamuget
Acts6:9 Ago king'eetyo alak che po sinagogit ne po Che Ityagotin (ko uu ye ki kiguuree)
Acts6:10 Ago ki ma imuuch icheek kogirinda utaatyet ak Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne ki ng'alaale ineendet.
Acts6:11 Kogaigai anyun eng' ung'at piik komwa kole
Acts6:12 Kong'eetng'eet anyun piik konereekso ak poisyek
Acts6:13 ak konde paorinik che po lembech
Acts6:14 amu kigegas ineendet komwaei koleen
Acts6:15 Ki ichiilji kong' anyun ineendet `piik tugul che kitebyei eng' kapkirwook
Acts7:1 koteebee anyun tisiindet ne oo kole
Acts7:2 Kowol Stepano kole
Acts7:3 Ki leenji
Acts7:4 Komong' anyun eng' emetap Kaldeik ak komeny Haran. Kingo kagome kwandanyi
Acts7:5 Ki ma igoochi ineendet poroteet eng' olooto
Acts7:6 Ak ki mwa Kamuktaindet ko uu ni
Acts7:7 Ago arwookyini pororyonooto ne ratei icheek. Ak ye ibata nooto komong' ak koboisyeiwo eng' olito.
Acts7:8 Ki igoochi ineendet arorutyet ne po kamuratanet. Ki sich anyun `Abraham Isak ak komuratan ineendet eng' peetuut ne po sisiit. Kosich `Isak Jakobo
Acts7:9 “Ye kingo am ng'et kong' poisyechooto agobo Joseph
Acts7:10 ak ki sar ineendet eng' nyalilwogikyik tugul
Acts7:11 Ki nyo anyun rubeet Misiri komugul ak Kanaan
Acts7:12 Ago ye kingo kas Jakobo kole miitei peek Misiri
Acts7:13 Ak eng' panda ne po aeng' koboorchigei `Joseph tupchosyekyik; ak kinaak eng' Pharaoh piigap Joseph.
Acts7:14 Ak ki iyookto Joseph kole keguur kwandanyi Jakobo ak piikyik tugul
Acts7:15 Kochoortagei anyun Jakobo kwo Misiri. Ki me ineendet eng' olooto ko uu kwanisyekyok.
Acts7:16 Ki kila icheek koba Shekem ak ki kitupchi kererit ne kiga al Abraham eng' kamanuutyetap fedha eng' weeriigap Hamor eng' Shekem.
Acts7:17 “Ye kingo riik peetuut ne po arorutyet
Acts7:18 agoi kobiit laitoryat age eng' Misiri
Acts7:19 Ki ng'oomenji ineendet pororyennyo
Acts7:20 Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki kisich Musa ak ki karaaran ineendet miising'; ak ki kigu eng' kootap kwandanyi arawek somok;
Acts7:21 ak kingo kagemeto
Acts7:22 Ak ki kineet Musa utaatyet tugul ne po Misiriik ak ki kiim eng' ng'aleekyik ak poisyonikyik.
Acts7:23 “Ye kingo it olo po kenyiisyek artam
Acts7:24 Ye kingo keer kinyaliili age eng' icheek
Acts7:25 Ki leen ineendet naei tupchosyekyik kole igoochin Kamuktaindet icheek saruunet eng' eunnyi
Acts7:26 Ak eng' peetuut ne isubi nooto kochunji icheek koboortos
Acts7:27 Ago ki toorta ineendet ne ki yachi nin age ne ya
Acts7:28 Imache ibara ko uu ye koibar Misirindet amut?
Acts7:29 Ki mwee Musa anyun ng'olyoondonooto
Acts7:30 “Kingo pata kenyiisyek artamu
Acts7:31 Ak kingo keer Musa
Acts7:32 ‘Aa Kamuktaindet ne po kwanisyeguk
Acts7:33 Koleenji Kiptaiyat anyun ineendet
Acts7:34 Ki ageer iman nyalildap piikyuk che miitei Misiri
Acts7:35 “Musa niito ne ki eesyo icheek
Acts7:36 Ki imut chiichi anyun icheek komanda
Acts7:37 Musa niito ko nooto ne ki leenji piigap Israel
Acts7:38 Ye kimi tuiyet eng' surkwen
Acts7:39 Ki ma kas iit kwanisyekyok ineendet
Acts7:40 koleenji Aron: ‘Yaiywech kanamonik kondoenech; amu ma kingen ole katepto Musa niito
Acts7:41 Ki yai anyun moita eng' peetuusyechooto
Acts7:42 Ago ki ituktoochi patai Kamuktaindet icheek
Acts7:43 Ki oip okweek emait ne po Molok
Acts7:44 “Ki tinyei kwanisyekyok Emait ne po Paornateet eng' surkwen
Acts7:45 Ne ki ip kwanisyekyok ak icheek eng' peetuusyekwak
Acts7:46 ne kinyoor chameet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
Acts7:47 Ago ki Solomon ne kiteekyi ineendet koot.
Acts7:48 “Ago ma menyei Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' kooriik che kiyae eunek; ko uu ye mwaei maotyot
Acts7:49 ‘Ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet kipsengwet
Acts7:50 Tos ma eunnyu ne kiyaei tuguuchu tugul?’
Acts7:51 “Okweek che uui kaat che ma kimuratan mugulelwek ak iitiik
Acts7:52 Ng'oo eng' maotik ne ma us kwanisyekwok? Ak ki par che kisip koboor nyonunetap Chiito ne po Imanda; ne kaoegu okweek nguno ng'wektoik ak rumiik.
Acts7:53 Okweek che ki otaach Ng'atuutyet ko uu ye ki king'at eng' malaikaisyek
Acts7:54 Ye kingo kas ng'aleechuuto kong'woneegitu miising' eng' mugulelwekwak
Acts7:55 Ago ki inyal kipsengwet kochiilji kong' ko nyiitaat ineendet Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Acts7:56 Ak ki le
Acts7:57 Ago ki polyo eng' kutit ne oo
Acts7:58 ak ki toorta ineendet komanda eng' nganaseet
Acts7:59 Kolach anyun Stepano
Acts7:60 Ak kigutuny ak komwa eng' kutit ne oo kole
Acts8:1 Ak ki iyan Saulo agine agobo pareetap Stepano. Ki ng'eet peetuunooto usiisyet ne oo agobo kaniset ne ki mi Jerusalem
Acts8:2 Kotup anyun Stepano `piik che ki konyiti Kamuktaindet
Acts8:3 Ago ki inyaliil miising' `Saulo kaniset
Acts8:4 Ki pa anyun icheek che kiga koyesta
Acts8:5 Ak kichoortagei Philipu nganaseet ne po Samaria
Acts8:6 Ak ki epchi iit tuiyosyek eng' yamdaet agenge ng'aleek che kimwaei Philipu
Acts8:7 Amu kimanda tamirmirik che murwonen eng' che chaang' che ki tinyei
Acts8:8 Ara ki piit poiboiyet ne oo eng' nganasanooto.
Acts8:9 Ki mi chiito age ne ki kiguure Simion
Acts8:10 Ki epchin iit `icheek tugul ineendet
Acts8:11 Ak ki epchin iit ineendet
Acts8:12 Ago ye kingo yan ng'aleegap Philipu ye ki amdoi logoiywek che myach agobo laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ak kainetap Jeso Kristo
Acts8:13 Ki iyan Simion agine ak kingo kagibatisan kotebi kobooto Philipu. Ak kingo keer koyaogis kaboorunoik ak poisyonigap kimnateet kokwong'.
Acts8:14 Kingo kas anyun che kiyooktoi che ki mi Jerusalem kole kogotaach Samaria ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet
Acts8:15 Ye kingo kagochoorgei icheek
Acts8:16 amu kitom kochoorchigei agot agenge eng' pichooto. Kiga kibatisan icheek eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat Jeso kityo.
Acts8:17 Yeityo kogonoor icheek eunekwak
Acts8:18 Ye kingo keer anyun Simion kole kaga kigoochin chii Kabuuset ne Tiliil ngo konoor `che kiyooktoi eunekwak
Acts8:19 ak kole
Acts8:20 Ago ki leenji Petero ineendet
Acts8:21 Metinye kebeberta anan motwet eng' ng'olyoondoni
Acts8:22 Sigu anyun eng' tengeging'ung'et ak isaa Kiptaiyat
Acts8:23 Amu ageere ale imi eng' ng'wanindo ak eng' ratuutyetap tengekto.”
Acts8:24 Ak ki wol Simion kole
Acts8:25 Ye kingo kagobaoryan anyun Petero ak Johana ak komwa ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat
Acts8:26 Ki mwachi malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat anyun Philipu koleenji
Acts8:27 Ara king'eet anyun ineendet ak kwo. Ak keero ki mi chiitap Ethiopia ne ki kimooch
Acts8:28 ak ki weeksei kaa anyun
Acts8:29 Ak ki leenji `Kabuuset ne Tiliil Philipu anyun
Acts8:30 Ak ki labat Philipu ak kogas ineendet kosomani bukuitap maotyot Isaiah
Acts8:31 Ak ki le
Acts8:32 Ak chu siruutik che kisomanoti
Acts8:33 Ki kiisto kirwoogennyi eng' kaming'inennyi pogei. Ng'oo ne tuun mwaitoi ibindanyi? Amu kinemu saboondanyi eng' ng'wony.”
Acts8:34 ki teebee `chiichooto ki kimooch Philipu koleenji
Acts8:35 Kong'aany anyun Philipu kutinnyi
Acts8:36 Ye kingo ta kobendi eng' ooreet
Acts8:37 Ak ki le Philipu
Acts8:38 Kong'at anyun kotonon chepkichutit
Acts8:39 Ye kingo long' eng' peek
Acts8:40 Ak ki took Philipu eng' Azoto. Ye kisiirtoi kobune emonooto
Acts9:1 Ye kita konereechi Saulo koboisyee kamuiset ak parisyet agobo kasubigap Kiptaiyat. Ki wo kaptisiindet ne oo
Acts9:2 ak kosoom ineendet paronok che ibei koba Damasko agobo sinagogisyek
Acts9:3 Ye kita kowendi ak ko kariikta Damasko
Acts9:4 Ki ibutyi
Acts9:5 Ak ki le
Acts9:6 Ago ng'eet
Acts9:7 Ak kitononso konam kuut piik che kibendi kobooto ineendet
Acts9:8 Ki ng'eet anyun Saulo
Acts9:9 Ki tar ineendet peetuusyek somok ama keerei kiy
Acts9:10 Ki mi kasubindet age Damasko ne ki kiguure Anania. Ki leenji `Kiptaiyat ineendet eng' ng'ang'utyet
Acts9:11 Koleenji Kiptaiyat
Acts9:12 ak kagogeer ineendet eng' ng'ang'utyet chiito ne kiguure Anania
Acts9:13 Ago ki wol Anania kole
Acts9:14 ak tinyei eng' yuto kimnateet ne punu tisiik che eecheen si korat tugul che kuurei kaineng'ung'.”
Acts9:15 Ago ki leenji Kiptaiyat
Acts9:16 amu aboorchini ineendet ole tee chaang'indap tuguuk che kanyool konyoorunee nyalilda agobo kainennyu.”
Acts9:17 Ki wo anyun Anania
Acts9:18 Ak eng' sainooto kobutyo eng' konyekyik tuguuk che uu peerik
Acts9:19 ak ki amis ak ki nyoor kimnateet. Ki tebi ineendet peetuusyo alak kobooto kasubik che ki mi Damasko.
Acts9:20 Ak ne matyanit koamda agobo Jeso eng' sinagogisyek kole
Acts9:21 Ki kwong'yo tugul che ki kas ineendet ak kole
Acts9:22 Ago kitesak Saulo kogimit
Acts9:23 Ak ye kingo keskei peetuusyek che chaang'
Acts9:24 ago kinaak eng' Saulo chobennywa ne po ung'oot. Ki riip icheek ormariichok peet ak kemoi kole si kobar ineendet;
Acts9:25 ago ki imut `kasubikyik ineendet kemoi
Acts9:26 Ye kingo nyo `Saulo Jerusalem kotyem kole koyomogei ak kasubik; ago ki iywei `icheek tugul ineendet
Acts9:27 Ago ki imut Barnaba ineendet kwo ole mi che kiyooktoi
Acts9:28 Ara ki mi kobooto icheek ak komong'u eng' Jerusalem
Acts9:29 Ki ng'alaali ak kobeligei kobooto Yahudik che ki kutinnywa ko Yunanik; ago ki cheeng'ei kotugul kole kobar ineendet.
Acts9:30 Ye kingo nai tupchosyek
Acts9:31 Konyoor anyun kamuung'et kaniset eng' emet komugul ne po Judea
Acts9:32 Ye kiwendote Petero komoswek tugul
Acts9:33 Ak kinyoorchi olooto chiito age ne ki kiguure Ainea
Acts9:34 Koleenji anyun `Petero ineendet
Acts9:35 Ak kigeer ineendet tugul che ki menyei Lydda ak Sharon
Acts9:36 Ki mi agenge eng' kasubik Joppa ne ki kiguure Tabita
Acts9:37 Ak kimyan eng' peetuusyechooto
Acts9:38 Ak amu kineegityin Lydda ak Joppa
Acts9:39 Kong'eet anyun Petero ak koba ak icheek. Ak kingo kagoit
Acts9:40 Komaanda Petero tugul koba saang'
Acts9:41 Ki igoochi ineendet eunnyi ak konam kotoret ineendet kong'eet. Ye kingo kagoguur che tiliileen ak mosoogik
Acts9:42 Kinaak niito eng' Joppa komugul
Acts9:43 Ak ki tebi eng' Joppa peetuusyek che chaang' kobooto chiito age ne ki kiguure Simion ne teiteindetap muiywek.
Acts10:1 Ki mi chiito age Caesarea ne ki kiguure Korneli
Acts10:2 Ki chiito ne kigonyiti ak koywei Kamuktaindet kobooto koonnyi tugul; ki igoochin piik kagoochinoik che chaang' ak kosaaei Kamuktaindet kotugul.
Acts10:3 Eng' koskoleng'ut age olo po sait sogool ne po peet ko ki keer eng' ng'ang'utyet kimni
Acts10:4 Keer `Korneli ineendet miising' eng' kaiyweisyet ak kole
Acts10:5 Iyookte nguno anyun piik koba Joppa
Acts10:6 ineendet ko toondetap Simion ne teiteindetap muiywek
Acts10:7 Ye kingo kakwa malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalji ineendet
Acts10:8 ak kingo kagomwachi icheek ng'aleek tugul
Acts10:9 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi ye kita kobendi
Acts10:10 Ak ki am rubeet ak kimach koamis; ak ye ki kichobei amitwogik
Acts10:11 Ki keer kipsengwet koyaatak
Acts10:12 Ki mi oriit tyong'ik alak tugul che po keelyek ang'wan ak tuguuk che ichuutegei che po ng'wony ak toriitik che po parak.
Acts10:13 Ki nyoonji anyun tweguunet koleenji
Acts10:14 Ago ki le Petero
Acts10:15 Ki nyoonji anyun tweguunet kogeny ne po aeng' koleenji
Acts10:16 Ki yaak kiito konyil somok
Acts10:17 Ak ye kita koiimegei Petero miising' eng' muguleldanyi kole ibooru nee ng'ang'utyoni kagogeer
Acts10:18 ak koguurso ak koteep ngo mi Simion olooto
Acts10:19 Ye kita kobwaati Petero agobo ng'ang'utyonooto
Acts10:20 Ng'eet anyun nguno
Acts10:21 Ara kichoortagei anyun Petero kwo ole mi pichooto ak kole
Acts10:22 Ak ki le
Acts10:23 Koguur anyun kobwa ko ak kochopchi icheek ole ruitos. Ak king'eet karon koba kobooto pichooto ak tupchosyek alak che ki punu Joppa.
Acts10:24 Ak peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto koit Caesarea. Ki igeni icheek `Korneli
Acts10:25 Ye kingwo ko Petero
Acts10:26 Ago ki ing'eet `Petero ineendet koleenji
Acts10:27 Ak kingo ta kong'alaaljindos tuwai
Acts10:28 koleenji anyun icheek
Acts10:29 Amu nooto anyun
Acts10:30 Kole anyun Korneli
Acts10:31 ak kole
Acts10:32 Iyookte anyun piik koba Joppa si koguurun Simion ne kainet ne po aeng' ko Petero; miitei ineendet ko toondet eng' kootap Simion teiteindetap muiywek
Acts10:33 Ki ayoogu anyun piik eng' sainooto kobwa ole imi; ak kaiyai ne myee amu kainyo. Ki mi anyun yu nguno acheek tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
Acts10:34 Ki ng'aany anyun Petero kutinnyi
Acts10:35 ago taachaksei eng' ineendet chiito ne iywei ineendet ak koyaei iman eng' pororyet age tugul.
Acts10:36 Ng'olyoot ne ki iyookyi ineendet piigap Israel
Acts10:37 Ongen okweek ng'olyoondonooto
Acts10:38 ongen ole ki iil `Kamuktaindet Jeso ne po Nazareth eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak eng' kamuktaet; kiwendot ineendet ak koyaei ne myee
Acts10:39 Ki paorinik acheek che po tuguuk tugul che ki yai eng' emetap Yahudik ak eng' Jerusalem. Ki par `icheek ineendet kogartaat eng' keetit;
Acts10:40 ago ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' peetuutap somok ak kogoito kotook
Acts10:41 ma eng' piik tugul ago eng' paorinik che kiga sip kolewen Kamuktaindet
Acts10:42 King'atech keamji piik ak kebaoryan keele niito ko ineendet ne ki inde Kamuktaindet koek Kirwoogindet ne po che saptos ak che ki kobek.
Acts10:43 Paoryani maotik tugul agobo ineendet kole nyooru nyoetap kaat amu tengekwogikyik eng' kainennyi age tugul ne iyani ineendet.”
Acts10:44 Ye kita komwaei Petero ng'aleechu
Acts10:45 Icheek che po kamuratanet che ki iyani che kibwanei kobooto Petero ko ki kwong'yo amu kageroong'ji Pororyosyek ak icheek konunetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil;
Acts10:46 amu kigasei icheek kong'alaali eng' kutusweek che teerchiin ak kotoroori Kamuktaindet. Koteep anyun Petero kole
Acts10:47 “Imuuchi chii koete peek
Acts10:48 Ki ng'at anyun kole kibatisan icheek eng' kainetap Jeso Kristo. Kosoom anyun `icheek ineendet kole kota kobeni peetuusyek alak.
Acts11:1 Ki kas anyun che kiyooktoi ak tupchosyek che ki mi Judea kole kogotaach ak icheek Pororyosyek ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet.
Acts11:2 Kingo kagonyo `Petero Jerusalem
Acts11:3 koleen
Acts11:4 Ago ki toi Petero kotetyi icheek komyee ng'aleechooto
Acts11:5 “Ki ami nganaseetap Joppa asaae
Acts11:6 Ye kinga keer miising' ko ki ageer tyong'igap ng'wony che po keelyek ang'wan ak tyong'ik che po timiin ak tuguuk che ichuutegei ak toriitik che po parak.
Acts11:7 Ago ki agas kutit koleenjo
Acts11:8 Ak ki amwa ale
Acts11:9 Ago ki wol kutinooto ne po aeng' kobunu kipsengwet kole
Acts11:10 Ki yaak kioto konyil somok
Acts11:11 Ak eng' sainooto ko kitonondos piik somogu eng' taitap koot ole ki kimi
Acts11:12 Kong'ata anyun Kabuuset ne Tiliil kole keebe tugul
Acts11:13 Kimwaiwech ko uu ye kiga keer malaikaiyat kotononi eng' koonnyi
Acts11:14 konyo komwaun ng'aleek che kisaruunenen
Acts11:15 Ak ye kinga tau ang'alaal
Acts11:16 Abwaat anyun ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat
Acts11:17 Ngo ki igoochi anyun Kamuktaindet icheek konunet ne kergei ak ne ki koonech ye kingi yan Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo
Acts11:18 Kingo kas ng'aleechuuto
Acts11:19 Ki pa anyun icheek che kiga yesta amu usiisyet ne king'eet agobo Stepano agoi koit Phoenisia
Acts11:20 Ago ki mi alak eng' icheek
Acts11:21 Ki mi eutap Kiptaiyat kobooto icheek
Acts11:22 Ki kas ng'aleek agobo icheek kaniset ne ki mi Jerusalem
Acts11:23 Kingo it ineendet ak kogeer myeeindap Kamuktaindet
Acts11:24 Barnaba ko ki chii ne myee ak ki nyiitaat Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak kayaneet. Ki tesak anyun piik ko chang'a che ki pwanji Kiptaiyat.
Acts11:25 Ki wo agoi Tarsis kocheeng' Saulo
Acts11:26 ak kingo kagonyoor
Acts11:27 Ki choorgei anyun maotik eng' peetuusyechooto eng' Jerusalem kobwa Antiok.
Acts11:28 Ak ki tonon age eng' icheek ne ki kiguure Agabo ak koboor eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil kole tuun ityin rubeet ne oo ng'wony komugul; ak ki isulda niito eng' peetuusyegap Klaudio.
Acts11:29 Kichopkei komyee kasubik koyookyi toreteet tupchosyek che ki menyei Judea
Acts11:30 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto
Acts12:1 Ye ki neegit peetuusyechooto kotoi laitoryat Herod kous alak che po kaniset.
Acts12:2 Ki par Jakobo ng'eetap kametap Johana eng' rotwetap chok.
Acts12:3 Ak ye kingo keer kole ki ibaibai nooto Yahudik
Acts12:4 Kingo kagonam ineendet
Acts12:5 Ye ki kiriipe Petero anyun eng' korgoreet
Acts12:6 Eng' kemounooto ki machei `Herod komoong' ineendet
Acts12:7 Ak ogeero
Acts12:8 Ak koleenji malaikaiyat ineendet
Acts12:9 Ak ki wo Petero saang' ak koosup ineendet; ak ki ma nai kole iman kiit ne kayai malaikaiyat
Acts12:10 Kingo kagosiir riipseet ne po tai ak ne po aeng'
Acts12:11 Ye kingo pwaat Petero
Acts12:12 Ara ye kingo kagobwaat komyee
Acts12:13 Ak ye kingo kongony kurgeetap ormariichet
Acts12:14 Ak kingo nai chebooto kutitap Petero
Acts12:15 Ki leenji `icheek ineendet
Acts12:16 Ago kites Petero kogongony; ak kingo kagoyat
Acts12:17 Ago ki iboorchine `ineendet icheek euut kosiisyo
Acts12:18 Ak kingo kagoeech
Acts12:19 Ye kingo kagocheeng' `Herod ineendet
Acts12:20 Ki nereekyi miising' `Herod piigap Tyro ak Sidon. Ara ki pwanji `icheek ineendet eng' kabwaatet agenge
Acts12:21 Ak eng' peetuut ne ki king'at
Acts12:22 Ak ki polyo piik kole
Acts12:23 Eng' sainooto anyun kobir ineendet `malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat
Acts12:24 Ago ki testai ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet
Acts12:25 Ye kingo kagogees poisyennywa Barnaba ak Saulo
Acts13:1 Eng' kaniset ne ki mi Antiok ko ki mi maotik ak kaneetik: Barnaba
Acts13:2 Ye kiboisyechin Kiptaiyat ak korugutegei
Acts13:3 Ak ye kingo kagorugutkei ak kosaaei
Acts13:4 Kingo kagoyookto icheek `Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Acts13:5 Ye ki miitei Salamis
Acts13:6 Ak kingo kagobun emet komugul ne ki ikween peek agoi koit Paphos
Acts13:7 Ki mi `ineendet kobooto pounindet
Acts13:8 Ago ki kirinda icheek `Eluma ng'oorindet (amu uu nooto kainennyi ye kiweech)
Acts13:9 Ago ki nyi `Kabuuset ne Tiliil Saulo
Acts13:10 ak kole
Acts13:11 Ak keer nguno anyuno
Acts13:12 Kingo keer anyun pounindet kiit ne kayaak
Acts13:13 Ki pa anyun Paulo ak che ki mi kobooto ineendet kobun moinget eng' Paphos
Acts13:14 Ak kingo pun icheek Perga
Acts13:15 Kingo pata somaneetap ng'atuutyet ak siruutigap maotik koyookto pounigap sinagogit piik koba ole mi icheek
Acts13:16 Kotonon anyun Paulo ak koboorchine euut
Acts13:17 Ki lewen Kamuktaindet ne po pichu Israel kwanisyekyok ak kotoroor pichooto ye ki punootik eng' emetap Misiri
Acts13:18 Ak kimuitoochi icheek eng' atebosyekwak eng' olo po kenyiisyek artam eng' surkwen.
Acts13:19 Kingo kagong'em pororyosyek tisap eng' emetap Kanaan
Acts13:20 ak kingo pata tuguuchu kogoochi icheek kirwoogik agoi Samuel maotyot.
Acts13:21 Ak kingo pata kosoom laitoryat; ak ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet icheek Saulo weeriitap Kish eng' kenyiisyek artam
Acts13:22 Kingo kagoisto ineendet
Acts13:23 Ki imutyi `Kamuktaindet Israel Yetindet
Acts13:24 ye kiga sip koamji `Johana piik tugul che po Israel
Acts13:25 Ak ye ki neegit kogees Johana pandanyi
Acts13:26 “Che kitupche
Acts13:27 Amu ki ma nai ineendet `meng'iigap Jerusalem kobooto pounikwak
Acts13:28 Nganda ki ma nyoor eng' ineendet ng'olyoot ne igoochin kome
Acts13:29 Ye kingo kagogees tuguuk tugul che kiga kisir agobo ineendet
Acts13:30 Ago ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek.
Acts13:31 Ak ki keer ineendet eng' peetuusyek che chaang' icheek che kitogosu kobooto ineendet kobunu Galilaya kobwanei Jerusalem
Acts13:32 Ak ki ibwook logoiywek che myach che po arorutyet
Acts13:33 ko uu ye kigosuldochi `Kamuktaindet lagokyok nooto
Acts13:34 Ak ko uu ye ki ing'eet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek
Acts13:35 Amu ki mwa agine eng' Tyendo age kole
Acts13:36 Amu ye kingo kagoboisyechi Daudi kirwoogutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ibindanyi
Acts13:37 Ago ma keer nunet ineendet ne ki ing'eet Kamuktaindet.
Acts13:38 Ingonaak anyun eng' okweek
Acts13:39 ak kiityin imanda eng' ineendet age tugul ne iyani
Acts13:40 Oriipkei anyun
Acts13:41 ‘Ogeero
Acts13:42 Ak kingo ta komandoi icheek
Acts13:43 Kingo kagomanda tuiyet eng' sinagogit
Acts13:44 Ak eng' sabato ne isubi nooto
Acts13:45 Ago ye kingo keer `Yahudik tuiyosyek
Acts13:46 Kong'alaal anyun Paulo ak Barnaba eng' nyiganateet koleen
Acts13:47 Amu king'atech Kiptaiyat ko uu nooto kole
Acts13:48 Kingo kas Pororyosyek ng'olyoondoniito
Acts13:49 Ak ki yom ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat koronooto tugul.
Acts13:50 Ago ki inde `Yahudik ng'aleegap chaamset kobogorisyek che konyiti Kamuktaindet ak ko taagunotiin
Acts13:51 Ago kilelekyi icheek temburyek che mi keelyekwak
Acts13:52 Ak ki nyi kasubik poiboiyet ak Kabuuset ne Tiliil.
Acts14:1 Ye kingo mi Paulo ak Barnaba Ikonio
Acts14:2 Ago kiim Yahudik che kibistoik saboonwegap Pororyosyek kot kogoochi kowech tupchosyek.
Acts14:3 Ki tebee olooto anyun peetuusyek che chaang' ak kong'alaali eng' nyiganateet agobo Kiptaiyat
Acts14:4 Ago kipcheigei tuiyet ne po nganaseet; ak ki namgei alage ak Yahudik
Acts14:5 Ak ye kimachei Pororyosyek ak Yahudik kobooto pounikwak kobookyi icheek
Acts14:6 kosip konai
Acts14:7 ak ki amda logoiywek che myach eng' olooto.
Acts14:8 Ki mi chii age eng' Lystra ne ki ma ko kiimeen keelyekyik ak ki tomo kowendot
Acts14:9 Ki kas chiichooto Paulo kong'alaali. Ak kingo ochiilji kong' `Paulo chiichooto
Acts14:10 komwa eng' kutit ne oo kole
Acts14:11 Ak kingo keer tuiyosyek kiit ne kayai Paulo
Acts14:12 Ak kiguure Barnaba
Acts14:13 Ak tisiindetap Seu ne ki mi hekalunnyi taitap nganaseet ko kiget tuuga ak sinendoik kobwa kurgotik
Acts14:14 Ago ye kingo kas agobo nooto che kiyooktoi Barnaba ak Paulo kogereer ngoroikwak ak korwai koba kwenutap tuiyet
Acts14:15 “Choronochu
Acts14:16 Ki pagaakyi `ineendet pororyosyek tugul eng' ibinwek che ki kosiirto kobendat eng' ortinwekwak.
Acts14:17 Ago ki ma tebi puch ineendet ama tinyei paorya
Acts14:18 Agot eng' ng'aleechu ki mwa
Acts14:19 Ago ki pwa Yahudik che ki punu Antiok ak Ikonia ak kolom tuiyosyek. Kilach `icheek Paulo eng' koik
Acts14:20 Ago ye kitonondos kasubik ko kayiem ineendet
Acts14:21 Ye kingo kagoamji logoiywek che myach nganasanooto
Acts14:22 Ki igimitoti saboonwegap kasubik
Acts14:23 Ak kingo kagolewenji icheek `poisyek eng' kaniset age tugul
Acts14:24 Ki pa kobun Pisidia ak koit Pamphylia.
Acts14:25 Kingo kagoamda ng'olyoot eng' Perga
Acts14:26 Kotaune olooto ko ki pun moinget agoi Antiok
Acts14:27 Kingo kagobwa
Acts14:28 Ak ki tebi peetuusyek che chaang' olooto kobooto kasubik.
Acts15:1 Ki choorgei anyun piik alak che ki punu Judea ak koneet tupchosyek kole
Acts15:2 Ak ye kingo kagotiiyo Paulo ak Barnaba miising' ak koteebegei miising' kobooto icheek
Acts15:3 Kingo kagoyomis anyun icheek kaniset eng' pandanywa
Acts15:4 Kingo kagoit Jerusalem
Acts15:5 Ago kitononso alak eng' kasubiigap Pharisaik che iyanotin kole
Acts15:6 Ki iyumgei che kiyooktoi ak poisyek si kobiit kogeer ole teptoi ng'olyoondoniito.
Acts15:7 Ak kingo kagoteebegei miising'
Acts15:8 Ak kibaoryanji icheek `Kamuktaindet ne ingen mugulelwegap piik
Acts15:9 ak ki ma ibesyech ak icheeget
Acts15:10 Kalya nguno anyun si otyem Kamuktaindet kot onde chogit kaatitap kasubik
Acts15:11 Ago kiyani keele kisarwech eng' myeeindap Kiptaiyat Jeso
Acts15:12 Kosiisyo anyun tuiyet komugul; ak koepchi iit Barnaba ak Paulo kotetyin icheek kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che kiga koyai Kamuktaindet eng' icheek eng' kwenutap Pororyosyek.
Acts15:13 Ak kingo kagosiisyo
Acts15:14 Kagomwa Simion ko uu ye ki rutoochi `Kamuktaindet Pororyosyek eng' tai
Acts15:15 Kanamgei niito ak ng'aleegap maotik
Acts15:16 ‘Ye ibata tuguuchu aweege
Acts15:17 si kocheeng' piik che ng'etunotiin Kiptaiyat
Acts15:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat
Acts15:19 “Nooto anyun
Acts15:20 ago ongesirchi icheek keleenji kotabaanegei murwoonindap kanamonik
Acts15:21 Amu ki tinyei Musa kobooch ibinwek che po keny eng' nganasook tugul
Acts15:22 Kogeer anyun che kiyooktoi ak poisyek
Acts15:23 kobooto parweet: “Kisirchini `acheek che kiyooktoi ak tupchosyek che poisyek
Acts15:24 Ko uu ye ko kegas keele
Acts15:25 kagigeer keele myee eng' acheek
Acts15:26 piik che ki kogoito saboonwekwak amu kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo.
Acts15:27 Kagiyogu anyun Judah ak Sila
Acts15:28 Amu kigeere keele kagomyeeit eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak eng' acheek
Acts15:29 keele otabaanegei tuguuk che kieng'jin kanamonik
Acts15:30 Ye kingo kagiyookto koba anyun
Acts15:31 Kingo kagosoman koboiboitu agobo kagaigaet.
Acts15:32 Ki igiil `Judah ak `Sila tupchosyek eng' ng'aleek che chaang'
Acts15:33 Ak kingo kagotebee olooto peetuusyek alak
Acts15:34 Ago ki cham Sila kota kotebee olooto.
Acts15:35 Ago ki tebee Paulo ak Barnaba Antiok
Acts15:36 Kingo pata peetuusyek alak koleenji `Paulo Barnaba
Acts15:37 Ki machei Barnaba miising' komut Johana ne ki kiguure Mariko
Acts15:38 Ago ki ibwaat Paulo kole ma myee kimut ineendet ne kiga kobagaakta icheek eng' Pamphylia
Acts15:39 Ak king'eetyo ng'aleek che koroomen kot kopcheigei icheegei. Ki imut `Barnaba Mariko ak kobun moinget agoi Cyprus.
Acts15:40 Ago ki lewen `Paulo Sila ak koba
Acts15:41 Ak kobun Syria ak Cilicia
Acts16:1 Ki wo kora Paulo agoi Derbe ak Lystra. Ki mi olooto agenge eng' kasubik ne ki kiguure Timoteo
Acts16:2 Kibaoryanjin ineendet `tupchosyek che ki mi Lystra ak Ikonio kole myee.
Acts16:3 Ki machei Paulo chiichito koba tuwai; ak ki imut ineendet ak komuratan amu Yahudik che ki mi komoswechooto
Acts16:4 Ak ye kibendi pandanywa kobunoti nganasook kogoochi icheek ng'atuutik
Acts16:5 Ki kigimit anyun kanisosyek eng' kayaneet
Acts16:6 Ki pa anyun kobun kooret ne po Phrygia ak Galatia
Acts16:7 Ye kingo toorchigei Mysia
Acts16:8 ak kingo siir Mysia
Acts16:9 Ki nyoonji anyun ng'ang'utyet Paulo kemoi; ki mi chiitap Makedonia ne kitononi
Acts16:10 Ye kingo kagogeer ng'ang'utyet
Acts16:11 Ki kibun anyun moinget kebunu Traos
Acts16:12 Ak keng'eetyo eng' olooto keebe Philippi
Acts16:13 Ak eng' peetuutap sabato kemandae ormariichet keebe ole neegitee aineet
Acts16:14 Ki mi kobogoryot age ne ki kiguure Lydia
Acts16:15 Ye kiga kibatisan ineendet ak piigap koonnyi
Acts16:16 Peetuut age ye ki kibendi ole kisaae
Acts16:17 Ki isubot Paulo kebendi tugul
Acts16:18 Ak ki yai ineendet ko uu nooto eng' peetuusyek che chaang'. Ago ki aragen Paulo miising'
Acts16:19 Ago kingo keer kiptainikyik kole kagobet kamang'unetap keljinennywa
Acts16:20 Kingo kagomut icheek kobwa taitap kirwoogik
Acts16:21 ak ineeti pitonwek che ma chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik ketaach anan kisup
Acts16:22 Ak ki ng'eet tuiyet kibagenge kobookyi icheek
Acts16:23 Ak kingo kagobir icheek miising'
Acts16:24 Kingo kagonyoor ng'atuutyet ne uu nooto
Acts16:25 Eng' olo po kemoi kween ko ki saaei Paulo ak Sila ak kotyenjin Kamuktaindet tyenwogik ak ki epchin iit tyenwagikwak kimonjororinik alak.
Acts16:26 Ak ki potan emet miising' eng' sainooto kot kotumdumgei lumeiywegap korgoreet; ak eng' sainooto koyatagis kurgotik tugul ak kotyagogis tuguuk che ki kirate chii tugul.
Acts16:27 Kingo siir eng' rwondo riibindetap korgoreet ak kogeer kurgotigap korgoreet ko yaatatin
Acts16:28 Ago ki mwa Paulo eng' kutit ne oo kole
Acts16:29 Ak kiguur keip taisyek
Acts16:30 Ak ki imut komong' saang' ak kole
Acts16:31 Koleenji
Acts16:32 Ak ki amdechi ineendet ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat
Acts16:33 Ki imut icheek sainooto po kemoi ak kounji pirutikwak; ak ki kibatisan ineendet ak piikyik eng' sainooto.
Acts16:34 Ara ki imut koba koonnyi ak kogoochi amitwogik
Acts16:35 Ak ye kingo kagoeech
Acts16:36 Ak ki mwachi riibindetap korgoreet Paulo ng'aleechooto kole
Acts16:37 Ago ki leenji Paulo icheek
Acts16:38 Ki mwachi kiptainigap kiplugotinik ng'aleechuuto kirwoogik ak ki iywei kingo kas kole icheeget ko Romanik.
Acts16:39 Ki pwa anyun kogaigai icheek. Kingo kagomut icheek kobwa saang' kosoom kole koba eng' nganaseet.
Acts16:40 Ki manda anyun eng' korgoreet ak ki pa agoi kootap Lydia; ak kingo kagogeer tupchosyek kogaigai icheek ak koba.
Acts17:1 Kingo kagobun icheek Amphipoli ak Apolonia
Acts17:2 Ak ki wo Paulo ole mi icheek
Acts17:3 kong'aang'jin ak koboorchin komyee kole kiga nyoljin Kristo konyalil ak kong'eet kogeny eng' che ki pek; ak kole “Jeso niito aamwok
Acts17:4 Ki iyan anyun alage eng' icheek ak konamgei ak Paulo ak Sila. Ki yai ko uu nooto tuiyet ne oo ne po Yunanik che ki konyiti Kamuktaindet ak che chaang' eng' kobogorisyek che taagunotiin.
Acts17:5 Ago ki am ng'etkonda Yahudik
Acts17:6 Ye ki mata konyoor
Acts17:7 ak kagotaach `Jason icheek. Yaei pichuuto tugul tuguuk che etei ng'atuutigap Caesarea
Acts17:8 Ye kingo kas tuguuchuuto
Acts17:9 Ak kingo kagonam `icheek tuguugap katyaget kobun Jason ak piik alak
Acts17:10 Ak ne matyanit koyookto tupchosyek Paulo ak Sila kemoi koba Berea; ak kingo it olooto
Acts17:11 Ak ki myachen pichu kosiir chooto po Thessalonike
Acts17:12 Ki iyan anyun che chaang' eng' icheeget ak kobogorisyek che po Yunanik
Acts17:13 Ago kingo nai Yahudik che po Thessalonike kole amdoi Paulo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet eng' Berea agine
Acts17:14 Ki iyookto anyun koma tyanit `tupchosyek Paulo kot koit araraita
Acts17:15 Ago icheeget che ki imuti Paulo ko ki imut agoi Athens; ak kingo taach ng'atuutyet koipchi Sila ak Timoteo kole koba ole mi ineendet kochook
Acts17:16 Kingo ta koogeni `Paulo icheek eng' Athens
Acts17:17 Kong'alaal anyun eng' sinagogit kobooto Yahudik ak piik che konyiti Kamuktaindet
Acts17:18 Ak ki tuiyo kobooto ineendet alak che po ng'amotigap Epikurio ak Stoiko. Ak kole alak
Acts17:19 Ara ki nam `icheek ineendet ak komut kwo agoi Areopago ak kole
Acts17:20 Amu keipchi iitiikyok tuguuk alak che leelach: nooto anyun kimache kenai kiit ne ibooru tuguuchuuto.”
Acts17:21 Ki ma kotinyei piik tugul che po Athens ak toek che ki mi olooto
Acts17:22 Ki tonon anyun Paulo eng' kwenutap Areopago ak kole
Acts17:23 Amu ye ki asiirtoi ak ageer tuguuk che osaae
Acts17:24 Kamuktaindet ne ki yai ng'wony ak tuguuk tugul che miitei olooto
Acts17:25 Ama kiboisyechin eng' eunegap piik
Acts17:26 Ki yai eng' `chiito agenge pororyet age tugul ne po piik si komeny ng'wony komugul
Acts17:27 si kobiit kocheeng' Kamuktaindet
Acts17:28 Amu ‘Eng' ineendet kesaptosi ak kebendoti ak kemi’; ko uu ye ki komwa alage eng' siriikwok che po tyenwogigap kalasunet kole
Acts17:29 Ngo ki lagogap Kamuktaindet anyun
Acts17:30 Ki ma mage kiy anyun Kamuktaindet peetuusyek che ki ma komi naet; ago kang'at anyun nguno kole kosik piik tugul eng' komosta age tugul.
Acts17:31 Amu Ki kochop peetuut ne tuun irwookyine ng'wony eng' imanda eng' chiichooto ki kolewen; ak agobo niito ko ki koboorchi komyee piik tugul ye ki ing'eet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek.”
Acts17:32 Ye kingo kas anyun agobo ng'eetyeetap che ki pek
Acts17:33 Eng' yooto ko kimanda anyun Paulo eng' kwenunnywa.
Acts17:34 Ago ki namgei piik alak ak ineendet ak koyan; ki age eng' icheeget ko Dionusio Areopagindet
Acts18:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu kwo Paulo eng' Athens
Acts18:2 Ki nyoorchi yooto Yahudyot age ne kiguure Aquila
Acts18:3 amu ki kergei poisyennyi ak nenywa
Acts18:4 Ak eng' sabato age tugul ko ki ng'alaali eng' sinagogit
Acts18:5 Ago ye kingo choorgei Sila ak Timoteo kobunu Makedonia
Acts18:6 Ye kingo kirinda ak komwa icheek ng'aleek kochup ineendet
Acts18:7 Ki wo anyun eng' olooto ak kwo kootap chiito age ne kiguure Tito Justo
Acts18:8 Ak Krispo
Acts18:9 Ak kemout age ko ki leenji `Kiptaiyat Paulo eng' ng'ang'utyet
Acts18:10 amu ami kobooten
Acts18:11 Ki tebee olooto kenyiit agenge ak arawek lo
Acts18:12 Ago ye kingo kirwoogindetap Akayo Galio
Acts18:13 Kole icheek
Acts18:14 Ago ye kimachei Paulo kotwek
Acts18:15 ago ngo teebutik agobo ng'aleek ak kainaik ak ng'atuutyeng'wong' okweeget
Acts18:16 Ak ki oon icheek koba eng' ye mi ng'echereetap kirwooget.
Acts18:17 Ak ki nam tugul Sosten
Acts18:18 Ak kingo kagotebi Paulo peetuusyek che chaang'
Acts18:19 Kingo it Epheso
Acts18:20 Ak kingo mwachi kole
Acts18:21 ago kingo pagaktoi icheek
Acts18:22 Ye kingo kagolanda Caesarea
Acts18:23 Ak kingo kagotebi olooto eng' peetuusyo
Acts18:24 Ki nyo Epheso Yahudyot age ne keguure Apolo
Acts18:25 Kiga kineet chiichito ooreetap Kiptaiyat; ak amu ki tinyei kagiiletapkei eng' muguleldanyi
Acts18:26 Ki toi kong'alaal eng' nyiganateet eng' sinagogit. Ago ye kingo kas Prisila ak Aquila
Acts18:27 Ak ye ki machei Apolo kolanda kwo Akaia
Acts18:28 amu ki iguiyechi Yahudik komyee eng' kimnateet eng' taitap piik
Acts19:1 Ak ye kita komi Apolo Korinto
Acts19:2 Ki leenji icheek
Acts19:3 Ak ki leenji
Acts19:4 Kole Paulo
Acts19:5 Ye kingo kas niito
Acts19:6 Ak ye kingo kagogonoor `Paulo eunekyik icheeget
Acts19:7 Ak ki olo po taman ak aeng' pichooto tugul.
Acts19:8 Ki wo sinagogit oriit ak kong'alaal eng' nyiganateet eng' arawek somok
Acts19:9 Ago ye kingo uegitu mugulelwegap alak ak kobistoe
Acts19:10 Ki yaak ko uu nooto eng' kenyiisyek aeng'; kot kogas ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat tugul che ki menyei Asia
Acts19:11 Ak ki yai Kamuktaindet poisyonigap kimnateet che teer eng' eunegap Paulo:
Acts19:12 kot keipchi che myandos kitambaok ak angook che kiga kotiiny poortanyi
Acts19:13 Ak ki toi Yahudik alage che ki ombenoti
Acts19:14 Ak ki mi weeriik tisabu che po Skeba
Acts19:15 Ak ki wolji tamirmiryet ne ya icheek
Acts19:16 Ak kitorombenji chiichooto ki tinyei tamirmiryet ne ya icheek
Acts19:17 Ak kinaak niito eng' tugul
Acts19:18 Ki pwa ak icheek che chaang' che ki iyan
Acts19:19 Ki ip anyun bukuisyekwak `piik che chaang' eng' icheek che kiyaei ng'oorset
Acts19:20 Kotesak ko uu nooto anyun ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat eng' kimnateet ak koterteer.
Acts19:21 Kingo pata anyun tuguuchuuto
Acts19:22 Ye kingo kagoyookto aeng' eng' icheek che kiboisyechin ineendet koba Makedonia
Acts19:23 Ak king'eet polateet ne oo eng' peetuusyechooto agobo Oranooto;
Acts19:24 Chiito age ne kiguure Demetrios ko ki kitang'indet ne po fedha
Acts19:25 Ki iyum chuuto kibagenge
Acts19:26 Ogeere ak ogase ole
Acts19:27 Ma keele kityo piitu pichiindap sasisyet ne kisasei poisyennyo; ago kiiti keele ma kiy hekaluutap kamuktain ne oo ne kobogoryot Artemi
Acts19:28 Ye kingo kas niito
Acts19:29 Ak konyi anyun nganaseet polateet; ak korwai kibagenge ye mi ureryet
Acts19:30 Ak ye kimachei kwo Paulo oriit ole mi piik
Acts19:31 Ak ki iyookto ng'olyoot piik alage che eecheen che po Asia
Acts19:32 Kiboldos anyun alage
Acts19:33 Ak ki imut Aleksanda komong' eng' tuiyet
Acts19:34 Ago ye kingo nai kole ineendet ko Yahudyot
Acts19:35 Kingo kagomwachi siriindetap nganaseet tuiyet kosiisyo
Acts19:36 Ak ngo ma kimuuchi ketiiyo agobo tuguuchu
Acts19:37 Amu kaomutu pichu
Acts19:38 Ngo tinyei anyun Demetrios ak musogik che mi kobooto ineendet
Acts19:39 Ago ngo cheeng' okweek ng'olyoo agobo tuguuk alak
Acts19:40 Amu mi pichiindo ne tos kirwookwech agobo polateet ne po rani
Acts19:41 Ak kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto

Acts20:2 Ak kingo kagobun komoswechooto
Acts20:3 Ak kingo kagotebee olooto arawek somok
Acts20:4 Ak ki pa kobooto ineendet agoi Asia Sopatro ne po Berea
Acts20:5 Ago kiga kondo chuuto
Acts20:6 Ak ki kibun moinget eng' Philippi ko kagobata peetuusyegap magatyat ne ma kinde mermereek
Acts20:7 Ak eng' peetuutap tai ne po wigiit ye kiga kiyumge si kebuutul magatyat
Acts20:8 Ak ki mi taisyek che chaang' eng' koot ne po parak
Acts20:9 Ak kitebee tirisyet neraneet age ne ki kiguure Eutuko ak kibirto met; ak kita koamji Paulo koek keny
Acts20:10 Ak kichoortagei Paulo
Acts20:11 Ak kingo togosta
Acts20:12 Ak ki imut nerananooto ko kagosap
Acts20:13 Ago ki kindoi acheek keebe meeliit
Acts20:14 Ak ye ki ngetuiye ak ineendet eng' Assos
Acts20:15 Ak ki kibe eng' olooto kebun moinget
Acts20:16 Amu kiga kobegechi Paulo kwo kosiirtoe Epheso eng' moinget
Acts20:17 Ak ki iyookto eng' Mileto keguur poisyegap kaniset eng' Epheso.
Acts20:18 Ak ye kingo pwa ole mi ineendet
Acts20:19 aboisyechini Kiptaiyat eng' kaming'inetapkei tugul
Acts20:20 ko uu ye ki ma ariiny amwaiwok kiy age tugul ne imuuchi kotoretook
Acts20:21 abaoryanjini Yahudik kobooto Yunanik siguunet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ak kayaneet eng' Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo.
Acts20:22 Ak ogeer anyun nguno
Acts20:23 kobatee kityo paoryanjino Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' nganaseet age tugul
Acts20:24 Ago ma iiti saboondanyu ale kiy ne achame kot
Acts20:25 “Ak nguno anyun
Acts20:26 Abaoryani anyun eng' taing'wong' peetuuni
Acts20:27 Amu ma ariiny amwaiwok maguutik tugul che po Kamuktaindet.
Acts20:28 Oriipkei anyun okweeget
Acts20:29 Angen ale ye kaawe komong'jok suik che koroomen
Acts20:30 Ak tuun ng'eetos alage eng' kwenung'wong' komwaei ng'aleek che imaasi piich
Acts20:31 Oriipse anyun
Acts20:32 “Ara anyun
Acts20:33 Ma agase myat fedha che po chii age tugul
Acts20:34 Ongen okweek ole kibois eunechu agobo tuguuk che ki anyalili
Acts20:35 Ki agoonok kaboorunet eng' tuguuk tugul
Acts20:36 Ak kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto
Acts20:37 Ak ki riiryo icheek tugul miising'
Acts20:38 koaragendos kosiir agobo ng'olyoot ne kiga komwa

Acts21:2 Ye ki ngenyooru meeliit ne landoi kowendi Phoenisia
Acts21:3 Ak ye kiga kegeer Cyprus
Acts21:4 Ak ye kiga kenyooru kasubik
Acts21:5 Ak kingo kagigesu peetuusyechooto
Acts21:6 ak kigoochigei saisere. Kelaany anyun meeliit koweek icheek koba kaa.
Acts21:7 Ak ye kiga kigeesu panda ne po moinget kebunu Tyro
Acts21:8 Ak eng' peetuut ne po aeng' keebe
Acts21:9 Ki tinyei chiichito tiibiik ang'wan
Acts21:10 Ak ye kita ketebye eng' peetuusyek che chaang' eng' olooto
Acts21:11 Ak kingo kagoit ole kimi
Acts21:12 Ak ki ngegas ng'aleechuuto

Acts21:17 Kingeit Jerusalem
Acts21:18 Ak peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto keebe acheek ak Paulo kap Jakobo; ak ki mi poisyek tugul.

Acts21:20 Kingo kas icheek ng'olyoondonooto
Acts21:21 Ak ki kiboorchi icheek agobo inyee
Acts21:22 Nee anyun nguno? Ma kogas icheek iman kole kaiitu.
Acts21:23 Yai anyun ni kimwaun: Ki tinyei piik ang'wan che ki koarorta kiy eng' kayasyoet;
Acts21:24 imut anyun pichu
Acts21:25 Ago eng' Pororyosyek che ki koyan
Acts21:26 Komut anyun Paulo murenjoto
Acts21:27 Ye kimachei kogeskei peetuusyek tisabu

Acts21:30 Kowaskei anyun nganaseet komugul
Acts21:31 Ak ye ki cheeng'ei kobar ineendet
Acts21:32 Komut sainooto kiplugotinik ak kiptainigap pogolwogik
Acts21:33 Konyo anyun kiptaiyat ne oo koriik
Acts21:34 Ak kobolyo alak eng' tuiyet komwaei kiit age komwaei alage kiit age: ak ye ki ma imuuch konai komyee kiit ne po polateet
Acts21:35 Ak kingo it lang'eiywot
Acts21:36 amu ki isubi tuiyet ne po piik

Acts21:39 Ago ki le Paulo

Acts24:1 Ak kingo pata peetuusyek muutu
Acts24:2 Ak kingo kageguur
Acts24:3 kitaach anyun eng' ortinwek tugul ak eng' komoswek tugul
Acts24:4 Ago si mata again miising'
Acts24:5 amu ki kegeer chiichi keele ineendet ko chii ne itoitos piich
Acts24:6 Ki tyem kogeny kole kong'wanit Hekaluut
Acts24:7 Ago ki nyo ole ki mi Lusia kiptaiyat ne oo ne po kiplugotinik
Acts24:8 Imuuchi inai tuguuchu tugul eng' ineendet ye igine inyeendet
Acts24:9 Ak ki iyomechigei Yahudik kataamsonooto
Acts24:10 Ak kingo kagoboorchine pounindet Paulo euut
Acts24:11 Imuuchi inai ile tomo kosiir peetuusyek taman ak aeng' kobooch ngap atogoste Jerusalem awe asaa.
Acts24:12 Ama nyoorwo icheek eng' Hekaluut kibeligei ak chii age tugul
Acts24:13 Amaimuuchi icheek koboorun komyee tuguuk che itaamena.
Acts24:14 Ago kang'ang'un niito
Acts24:15 atinye kamang'unet eng' Kamuktaindet
Acts24:16 Ak achobegei anyun agane eng' ng'olyoondoni atebee kotugul kabwaatet ne ma tinyei kanagut eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ak piik.
Acts24:17 “Ak kingo pata kenyiisyek che chaang' anyoo aipchi piigap pororyennyu kagoochinoik ak tuguuk che kigoitoi.
Acts24:18 Ye ki ayae niito
Acts24:19 Ago ki mi Yahudik alak che ki punu Asia; myee nda kami yu icheek eng' taing'ung' si komwaitaa ngo ting'ena icheek ng'olyoo.
Acts24:20 Anan ingomwa pichu icheeget poisyet ne ya ne kinyoor
Acts24:21 kobatee tweguunet agenge ne ki ariirchi atononi eng' kwenunnywa
Acts24:22 Amu ki ingen Felix komyee agobo Oranooto
Acts24:23 Ak kong'at chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol kole keriip ineendet
Acts24:24 Ago kingo pata peetuusyek alage
Acts24:25 Ak ye kita kong'alaali agobo imanda
Acts24:26 Ki imang'u kole togot kogoochi Paulo silingisyek: kiguur anyun ineendet konyil che chaang'
Acts24:27 Ago kingo keskei kenyiisyek aeng'u
Acts25:1 Kingo kagoit Pesto koronooto
Acts25:2 Ak ki mwachi tisiik che eecheen ak piik che taagunotiin che po Yahudik ng'aleek che kiting'e Paulo; ak kogaigai icheek ineendet
Acts25:3 kosoom chamdaet agobo ineendet
Acts25:4 Ago ki wol Pesto kole keriip Paulo eng' Caesarea
Acts25:5 Ak kole ineendet
Acts25:6 Ak kingo kagotebi eng' kwenunnywa kobooto icheek eng' peetuusyek che ma siirei sisiit anan ko taman
Acts25:7 Ak kingo kagoit
Acts25:8 ago ki mwa Paulo eng' ng'aleek che kisaruunegei
Acts25:9 Ago ye kimachei Pesto kobaibai Yahudik
Acts25:10 Ago ki le Paulo
Acts25:11 Ngo aa kiptengekyo
Acts25:12 Ak kingo kagong'alaal anyun Pesto ak piigap kapkirwook
Acts25:13 Ak kingo kagosiirto peetuusyek alage
Acts25:14 Ak ye kita kobeniei peetuusyek che chaang'
Acts25:15 Ne kimwaiwo ng'aleekyik tisiik che eecheen ak poisyegap Yahudik ye ki ami Jerusalem

Romans1:19 amu tuguugap Kamuktaindet che naotin ko taagunotiin eng' icheek; ki kong'aang'ji Kamuktaindet icheek.

Romans1:26 Amu niito ki pagaakyi Kamuktaindet icheek maguutik che po teweernateet. Ki wal kobogorisyekwak piteet ne nyolu koek ne ma nyolu.

Romans6:9 kingen keele ki king'eet Kristo komong' eng' che ki kobek: ma komeei kogeny; ma kotinyei meet pounateet eng' ineendet kogeny.
Romans6:10 Amu meet ne kime
Romans6:11 Ko uu nooto oiityige ak okweek ole ki obekyi tengek
Romans6:12 Nooto anyun amochamji tengek koboi poorwekwok che pegu

Romans6:18 ak ye kingi tyachak eng' tengek

Romans6:20 Amu ye kita ko oo otwogigap tengekto
Romans6:21 Ki otinye logoek nee eng' peetuusyechooto eng' tuguuk che olilane nguno? Amu kagesunetap tuguuchooto ko meet.
Romans6:22 Ago nguno ko kagityaachak eng' tengekto
Romans6:23 Amu melektap tengek ko meet; ago konunetap chamyet ne po Kamuktaindet ko saboondap koigeny eng' Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo.

Romans7:11 amu kinyoor tengek poroindo eng' ng'atuutyet kong'ala

Romans7:17 Nguno anyun koma ko anee ne ayae
Romans7:18 Amu angen ale eng' anee
Romans7:19 Amu nooto myee ne kata ayae
Romans7:20 Ago ngot ayae ne ma mache
Romans7:21 Ageere anyun ng'atuutyet
Romans7:22 Amu abaibai eng' Ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet eng' chiito ne po oriit:
Romans7:23 ago ageere ng'atuutyet ne teer eng' kebeberwegap poortanyu
Romans7:24 Ee
Romans7:25 Amwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi eng' Jeso Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo. Nooto anyun
Romans8:1 Nooto anyun ma komi kirwooget eng' icheek che miitei eng' Kristo Jeso.
Romans8:2 Amu kagotyacha ng'atuutyetap Kabuusetap saboon eng' Kristo Jeso amang'une ng'atuutyetap tengek ak meet.
Romans8:3 Amu kiit ne ki ma imuuch Ng'atuutyet koyai
Romans8:4 si kobiit kosulda kayomisetap Ng'atuutyet eng' acheek
Romans8:5 Amu icheek che isubi poorto kogereeri met agobo tuguugap poorto; ago icheek che isubi Kabuuset ne Tiliil kogereeri met agobo tuguugap Kabuuset ne Tiliil.
Romans8:6 Amu kererwegap met che po poorto ko meet; ago kererwegap met che po Kabuuset ne Tiliil ko saboondo ak kaalyeet:
Romans8:7 amu kererwegap met che po poorto ko puunyoondit eng' Kamuktaindet; amu ma kase iit Ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet
Romans8:8 ak icheeget che mi poorto kotemenee kobaibai Kamuktaindet.
Romans8:9 Ago ma omi eng' poorto ago eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Romans8:10 Ak ko ngo mi Kristo eng' okweek
Romans8:11 Ago ngo menyok Kabuusetap ineendet ne ki ing'eet Jeso komang'une che ki pek
Romans8:12 Nooto anyun
Romans8:13 amu ngo subi poorto
Romans8:14 Amu tugul che indochin Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet
Romans8:15 Amu ki ma otaach kogeny muguleldap otwoknot ne koonok oiyweisye; ago ki otaach Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne ki kiyaenak oegu lagogap Kamuktaindet. Eng' nooto anyun ye kiriire keele
Romans8:16 ko paoryani Kabuuset ne Tiliil ineendet ak mugulelwekyok kole ki lagogap Kamuktaindet;
Romans8:17 ak ngo ki lagok
Romans8:18 Amu aiiti ale nyalilwogik che po peetuusyechu koma nyolu kiroge toroornatet ne tuun king'ang'wech.
Romans8:19 Amu igeni miising' ak koganyei yaeet komugul ng'ang'et ne po weeriigap Kamuktaindet.
Romans8:20 Amu ki kigoochi yaeet tugul kogas iit kiit ne ma tilei kiy
Romans8:21 si kobiit kityaach yaeet komugul agine eng' otwoknateetap ng'emisyet agoi katyaget ne po toroornatetap lagogap Kamuktaindet.
Romans8:22 Amu kingen keele tigeni ak kogasei ng'wanindo yaeet komugul kobootech agoi nguno.
Romans8:23 Ak ma uu nooto kityo
Romans8:24 Amu kigesarwech eng' kamang'unet: ago kamang'unet ne kigeerei koma kamang'unet; amu ng'oo ne imang'u nooto keerei?
Romans8:25 Ago ngimang'u nooto ma kigeere
Romans8:26 Ak toreti ko uu nooto agine Kabuuset ne Tiliil nyalulennyo: amu ma kingen kesaa ko ye nyolu; ago saiywech Kabuuset ne Tiliil ineendet eng' tigenoik che ma kimuuchi kemwa;
Romans8:27 ak ineendet ne isyachi mugulelwek kongen kiit ne ibwaati Kabuuset ne Tiliil
Romans8:28 Ak kingen keele
Romans8:29 Amu Kamuktaindet ne kisip konai icheek
Romans8:30 ak icheeget che kisip kolewen
Romans8:31 Kimwae nee anyun eng' tuguuchuuto? Ngo mi Kamuktaindet komostanyo
Romans8:32 Ineendet ne ki ma riiree Weeriinnyi
Romans8:33 Ng'oo ne itaami che ki lewen Kamuktaindet? Kamuktaindet ne iityin imanda;
Romans8:34 ng'oo ineendet ne igikyin? Kristo Jeso ne kime
Romans8:35 Ibestoseech ng'oo eng' chamyetap Kristo? Nyalilda
Romans8:36 Ko uu ye ki kisir
Romans8:37 Ago
Romans8:38 Amu angen komyee ale ma imuuchi kobesyech meet
Romans8:39 anan toroorindo
Romans9:1 Amwae iman eng' Kristo
Romans9:2 ale atinye arageneet ne oo ak ng'wanindo ne ma igeesugei eng' muguleldanyu.
Romans9:3 Amu kata amache ale king'wanita aneendet eng' Kristo agobo tupchosyekyuk
Romans9:4 che Yahudik; che ki kiyai koek lagok
Romans9:5 ne chechwaak kwanisyek
Romans9:6 Ago ma keele kogoek puch ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet. Amu ma Yahudik icheek tugul
Romans9:7 ama keele lagok icheek tugul
Romans9:8 Nooto anyun
Romans9:9 Niito anyun ko ng'olyootap arorutyet
Romans9:10 Ak ma uu nooto kityo; ago ye kingo kagomanach Rebeka agine eng' agenge
Romans9:11 amu ye ki tomo kesich lagok
Romans9:12 ki kileenji ineendet
Romans9:13 Agot ko uu ye siraat
Romans9:14 Kimwae nee anyun? Mi ne ma po imanda eng' Kamuktaindet? Achicha
Romans9:15 Amu mwachin ineendet Musa koleenjin
Romans9:16 Nooto anyun ma po ineendet ne machei
Romans9:17 Amu mwachin sireet Pharaoh koleenjin
Romans9:18 Nooto anyun ineendet ne machei koriiree
Romans9:19 Ileenjino anyun
Romans9:20 Chiichi! Ii ng'oo ne tos iwolji Kamuktaindet kiy? Tos mwachin `kiit ne ki kimimii mimiindet koleenjin
Romans9:21 Anan ma tinyei cheptereniot kimnateet eng' meneet
Romans9:22 Tos nee anyun
Romans9:23 ak si kobiit kobarta mogornatosyegap toroornatennyi eng' tereenik che po rireenetapkei che kiga sip kochopchi telunateet
Romans9:24 agot acheek che ki kuurech
Romans9:25 Ko uu ye mwaei agine eng' Hosea kole

Romans10:1 Che kitupche

Romans10:3 Amu ye ki ma nai icheek imandap Kamuktaindet

Romans10:6 Ago mwaei imanda nooto po kayaneet ko uu ni
Romans10:7 anan
Romans10:8 Ago mwaei nee? “Neegitenen ng'olyoot
Romans10:9 amu nging'aany eng' kuting'ung' ile Jeso ko Kiptaiyat
Romans10:10 Amu iyani chii eng' muguleldo agoi imanda; ak ng'aanyei eng' kutit agoi saruunet.
Romans10:11 Amu mwaei sireet kole
Romans10:12 Amu ma mi kabesyet eng' Yahudyot ak Yunanindet; amu Kiptaiyandanooto ko Kiptaiyatap tugul ak aiyeep eng' icheek tugul che kuurei ineendet.
Romans10:13 Amu age tugul ne kuurei kainetap Kiptaiyat

Romans10:19 Ago amwae ale

Romans11:1 Amwae anyun ale
Romans11:2 Ki ma toorta `Kamuktaindet piikyik che kisip konai. Anan ma onai ne mwaei sireet agobo Elijah? Ko uu ye king'andoi `ineendet Yahudik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet kole
Romans11:3 “Kiptaiyat
Romans11:4 Ago leenjin nee waluunetap Kamuktaindet? Kaatukyigei murenik eliphuusyek tisap
Romans11:5 Agot ko uu nooto anyun agine eng' peetuusyechu
Romans11:6 Ago ngot ko po myeeindo
Romans11:7 Nee anyun? Ki ma nyoor Israel nooto ki cheeng'ei; ago kinyoor lewenik
Romans11:8 ko uu ye siraat kole
Romans11:9 Mwaei Daudi kole
Romans11:10 Ingoimenitu konyekwak
Romans11:11 Amwae anyun ale
Romans11:12 Ngot koegu kabutennywa mogornatosyegap ng'wony
Romans11:13 Ago ang'alaalwok okweek che oo po Pororyosyek. Ko uu ye aa kayooktoindet ne po Pororyosyek
Romans11:14 si agoochi ng'etkonda eng' oor age tugul icheeget che kiborto agenge
Romans11:15 Amu ngo toortaennywa ko katuiyetap
Romans11:16 Ak ngo tiliil tongoaniat
Romans11:17 Ago ngot ko ki kiiri mooriik alak
Romans11:18 mechauge ile isiire mooriik: ago
Romans11:19 Imwae anyun ile
Romans11:20 Myee; ki kiiri icheek amu pistoennywa
Romans11:21 amu ngo ki ma riiree Kamuktaindet mooriik che ki po keetoto ye kinye
Romans11:22 Keer anyuno myeeindo ak koroomnatetap Kamuktaindet: eng' icheek che kibutyo
Romans11:23 Ak ngo ma tebi icheek eng' pistoennywa
Romans11:24 Amu ngo kigetilin eng' mseituni ne po timiin eng' piteennyi
Romans11:25 Amu ma mache oegu che mongen ung'ootyoni
Romans11:26 ak uu nooto tuun kisaru Israel tugul: ko uu ye siraat kole
Romans11:27 Ak ni arorutyennyu eng' icheek
Romans11:28 Ago puunik icheek eng' okweek
Romans11:29 Amu ma tinyei ndara konunoigap Kamuktaindet ak kuursennyi.
Romans11:30 Amu ko uu ye ki ongelelji Kamuktaindet eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto
Romans11:31 ko uu nooto ak icheek chu
Romans11:32 Amu ki koratyi Kamuktaindet tugul eng' pistoet
Romans11:33 Ee tyanitu anyun ooindo ne po mogornatosyegap utaatyet ak naetap Kamuktaindet! Ak kirwoogutikyik che ma isiagaksei
Romans11:34 “Amu ng'oo ne ki konai kabwaatutigap Kiptaiyat? Anan ng'oo ne ki koek kaneetindennyi?

Romans11:36 Amu pou ineendet
Romans12:1 Nooto anyun che kitupche
Romans12:2 Amoyaniegei ateptap peetuusyechu: ago ingewalak eng' kaleelitetap kabwaatutikwok
Romans12:3 Amu amwachini chii age tugul ne mi kwenung'wong'
Romans12:4 Amu agot ko uu ye ki tinyei kebeberwek che chaang' eng' poorto agenge
Romans12:5 ko uu nooto eng' acheek che ki chaang'
Romans12:6 Ak ketinye konunoik che teerchiin ko uu myeeindo ne kigegoonech
Romans12:7 anan poisyet
Romans12:8 anan ineendet ne iteitoi
Romans12:9 Ingoek chamyet ne ma tinyei ng'aalseet. Wech miising' nooto ya; onamge ak ne myee.
Romans12:10 Ochamyee eng' chamyet ne uu ne po tupchosyek; ingoiit chiito age chiito age kosiir ineendet eng' teegisto;
Romans12:11 eng' kagiiletapkei amochoriren; ogiilgei miising' eng' mugulelwekwok
Romans12:12 oboiboitu eng' kamang'unet; omuitoi eng' nyalilda; ogiiljigei saaet kotugul;
Romans12:13 otoret che tiliileen eng' tuguuk che pononi; oaiyebitu eng' toek.
Romans12:14 Oberuur che usook; oberuur
Romans12:15 Oboiboitu kobooto che poiboi; oriirye kobooto che riirtos.
Romans12:16 Oegu che tinyei kabwaatet agenge okweegei eng' okweegei. Among'asyige tuguuk che torooreen
Romans12:17 Amoyaakyi chii yaityo eng' yaityo. Ibwaat tuguuk che po teegisto eng' taitap piik tugul.

Romans12:20 “Ngo am rubeet punyondeng'ung'

Romans13:1 Ingogas iit chii tugul pounatosyek che eecheen: amu ma mi pounooto
Romans13:2 Nooto anyun ineendet ne kirindoi pounateet
Romans13:3 Amu ma po pounik kamuiset eng' poisyonik che myach
Romans13:4 amu ineendet ko kiboityotap Kamuktaindet eng' inyee
Romans13:5 Nooto anyun kanyool ogas iit
Romans13:6 Amu ng'olyoondoniito anyun ogoitoi aisuruut agine; amu icheeget ko kiboitinigap poisyetap Kamuktaindet
Romans13:7 Ogoochi tugul tuguuk che nyoljin: kodi eng' ineendet ne nyoljin kodi; aisuruut eng' ineendet ne nyoljin aisuruut; kaiyweisyet eng' ineendet ne nyoljin kaiyweisyet; teegisto eng' ineendet ne nyoljin teegisto.
Romans13:8 Amobesen chii kiy age tugul
Romans13:9 Amu eng' mwaonooto kimwaei keele: Amoipkei; Amerumisye; Amechoorse; Amegase myat kiy ne po chii
Romans13:10 Ma yachin chamyet kiy ne ya chiitap kokwennyi: nooto anyun chamyet ko kasuldaetap Ng'atuutyet.

Romans14:1 Ago otaach ineendet ne nyalulat eng' kayaneet
Romans14:2 Tinyei chiito age kayaneet koam tuguuk tugul: ago ineendet ne nyalulat koamei ingweek.
Romans14:3 Amat kosas ne amei ne ma amei; ak amat korwookyi ineendet ne ma amei

Romans15:1 Nooto anyun kanyoljech acheek che ki kiimeen kegesen nyalulnatetap che ma kiimeen
Romans15:2 Ingobaibai age tugul eng' acheek chiitap kokwennyi eng' nooto myee
Romans15:3 Amu ki ma ibaibaigei Kristo ineegei; ago ko uu ye ki kisir keele
Romans15:4 Amu tuguuk alak tugul che ki kisir keny ko ki kisir si kinetkei
Romans15:5 Ingogoonok anyun Kamuktaindet ne po muitaet ak kagaigaet oegu che otinye kabwaatet agenge okweegei eng' okweegei ko uu ye machei Kristo Jeso:
Romans15:6 si kobiit otoroor Kamuktaindet ineendet Kwandap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo eng' mageet agenge ak kutit agenge.
Romans15:7 Nooto anyun otaachkei
Romans15:8 Amu amwae anyun ale ki keyai Kristo koek kiboityotap kamuratanet agobo imanitap Kamuktaindet
Romans15:9 ak si kotoroor Pororyosyek Kamuktaindet amu rireenennyi; ko uu ye ki kisir keele

Romans15:11 Ak kogeny

Romans16:1 Kande eunekwok Poibe ne kitupche ne cheboityotap kaniset ne mi Kenkrea:
Romans16:2 ale otaach ineendet eng' Kiptaiyat
Romans16:3 Ogat Priska ak Aquila che ki kiboitiinik tugul eng' Kristo Jeso
Romans16:4 che ki chobootiin kogoito saboonwekwak agobo saboondanyu; che ma mwachini kongoi aneege
Romans16:5 ak ogat kaniset ne mi koonnywa. Ogat Epeneto ne achame miising'
Romans16:6 Ogat Maria
Romans16:7 Ogat Androniko ak Junia
Romans16:8 Ogat Ampliato ne achame miising' eng' Kiptaiyat.
Romans16:9 Ogat Urbano kiboityondennyu ne kiboisyei tugul eng' Kristo
Romans16:10 Ogat Apele ne chamat eng' Kristo. Ogat icheek che po kootap Aristobulo.
Romans16:11 Ogat Herodion ne po ornyo. Ogat icheek che po kootap Narkiso
Romans16:12 Ogat Truphena ak Truphosa
Romans16:13 Ogat Rupo ne lewenot eng' Kiptaiyat
Romans16:14 Ogat Asunkrito
Romans16:15 Ogat Pilologo ak Julia
Romans16:16 Ogatkei eng' ng'ututet ne tiliil. Igatok kanisosyek tugul che po Kristo.
Romans16:17 Kasoomok anyun che kitupche
Romans16:18 Amu icheeget che uu chooto
Romans16:19 Amu ki kogasak eng' piik tugul kaseng'wong' po iit. Nooto anyun abaibai eng' okweek: ago amache oeguche utaatiin eng' nooto myee
Romans16:20 Ak tuun tuei Kamuktaindet ne po kaalyeet Setani eng' keelyekwok ko neegit. Ingotep kobootok myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo.
Romans16:21 Igatok Timoteo ne kiboityot kobooto; ak Lukio ak Jason ak Sosipatros
Romans16:22 Anee Tertio ne kasirei parwaani
Romans16:23 Igatok Gaio ne ami koonnyi
Romans16:24 Ingotep kobootok tugul myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo. Amen.
Romans16:25 Nguno eng' ineendet ne imuuchi kogimitok ko uu logoiywekyuk che myach ak amdaetap Jeso Kristo
Romans16:26 ago kagong'ang'ak nguno
Romans16:27 po Kamuktaindet ne utaat ineegei toroornatet koigeny
1Corinthians1:1 Paulo
1Corinthians1:2 kisirchini kanisetap Kamuktaindet ne miitei Korinto
1Corinthians1:3 Ingotep kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet ne punu Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo.
1Corinthians1:4 Amwachini Kamuktaindet nenyu kongoi kotugul agobo okweek
1Corinthians1:5 amu kigeyaak oegu mogoreek miising' eng' ineendet eng' kiy age tugul
1Corinthians1:6 ko uu ye ki kigimit paornateetap Kristo eng' okweek:
1Corinthians1:7 si moletu eng' konunotyot age tugul; ogeni ng'ang'utyetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo.
1Corinthians1:8 Ne igimitok agine agoi let
1Corinthians1:9 Kamuktaindet ko ne kiyani
1Corinthians1:10 Asoomok miising' anyun
1Corinthians1:11 Amu ki komwoiwo icheek che mi kootap Kloe agobo okweek
1Corinthians1:12 Ki it anyun ne amwae ko ni
1Corinthians1:13 Tos pcheat Kristo? Tos ki kigartatwok Paulo? Anan ki kibatisanjok kainetap Paulo?
1Corinthians1:14 Amwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi amu ma abatisan chii eng' okweek
1Corinthians1:15 si ma mwa chii age tugul kole ki kibatisanjok kainennyu.
1Corinthians1:16 Nga ki abatisan che po kootap Stephana ak icheek: mangen kogeny
1Corinthians1:17 Amu ma iyookwo Kristo abatisanis
1Corinthians1:18 Amu perberyo ng'olyootap kimurtoiyot eng' icheeget che lustos; ago eng' acheek che kisaru ko kimnateetap Kamuktaindet.
1Corinthians1:19 Amu ki kisir keele
1Corinthians1:20 Mi ano ne utaat? Mi ano siriindet? Mi ano kiptiyotyot ne po kenyisyechu? Tos ma yai Kamuktaindet ng'omnatetap ng'wonyuni koberberit?
1Corinthians1:21 Amu eng' utaatyet ne po Kamuktaindet koma nai ng'wony Kamuktaindet eng' utotyennyi
1Corinthians1:22 Amu soomei Yahudik kaboorunoik
1Corinthians1:23 ago ki amdoi acheek Kristo ne ki kigartaat
1Corinthians1:24 ago eng' icheek che ki kiguur
1Corinthians1:25 Amu perberyo ne po Kamuktaindet ko utaat kosiir utaatyetap piik; ak nyalulnatetap Kamuktaindet ko kiim kosiir ne po piik.
1Corinthians1:26 Amu
1Corinthians1:27 ago ki lewen Kamuktaindet tuguuk che perber che po ng'wony
1Corinthians1:28 ak ki lewen Kamuktaindet tuguuk che ma taagunotiin che po ng'wony
1Corinthians1:29 si mat koloskei chii age tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet.
1Corinthians1:30 Ago oo po ineendet okweek eng' Kristo Jeso
1Corinthians1:31 si koek
1Corinthians2:1 Ak ye ki Anyoonjok tupchosyechu
1Corinthians2:2 Amu ki abegechi ale ma mache anai kiy age tugul eng' kwenung'wong' kobatee Jeso Kristo
1Corinthians2:3 Ki ami kobootok eng' nyalulet
1Corinthians2:4 Ak ng'alaalennyu ak ng'olyoondennyu ne ki aamdoi ko ki ma ko ng'aleegap kagaigaet che po utaatyet
1Corinthians2:5 si ma tonone kayaneng'wong' utaatyetap piik

1Corinthians14:1 Osup chamyet; ak ocheeng' miising' konunoik che po Kabuuset
1Corinthians14:2 Amu ineendet ne ng'alaali eng' kutit ne ma kigasei koma ng'alaaljin piik
1Corinthians14:3 Ago ineendet ne amdoi kong'alaaljin piik ng'aleegap teekseet
1Corinthians14:4 Ineendet ne ng'alaali eng' kutit koteechegei ineegei; ago ineendet ne amdoi koteechei kaniset.
1Corinthians14:5 Amakwok anyun okweek tugul ong'alaal eng' kutusweek
1Corinthians14:6 Ago nguno anyun
1Corinthians14:7 Agot tuguuk che masaptos
1Corinthians14:8 Amu ngo chei iryageet cheet ne ma kiguitos
1Corinthians14:9 Ou nooto ak okweek
1Corinthians14:10 Uu keele

1Corinthians14:16 Amu ngo ma uu nooto
1Corinthians14:17 Amu iman

1Corinthians14:19 ago achame amwa ng'aleek muut eng' ng'omnatennyu eng' kanisa
1Corinthians14:20 Che kitupche
1Corinthians14:21 Ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutyet keele
1Corinthians14:22 Nooto anyun kutusweek ko po kaboorunet
1Corinthians14:23 Nooto anyun ngo yumgei kaniset komugul
1Corinthians14:24 Ago ngo amda tugul
1Corinthians14:25 ak king'aanyei ung'ootigap muguleldanyi; ak kobutyi ng'wony anyun kong'uruuk kolas Kamuktaindet
1Corinthians14:26 Nee anyun
1Corinthians14:27 Ngo ng'alaal chii age tugul eng' kutit ne ma kigasei
1Corinthians14:28 ago ngo ma mi weegindetap ng'aleek
1Corinthians14:29 Ak ingong'alaalso maotik aeng'u anan ko somok; ingoguiyo alage.
1Corinthians14:30 Ago ngeng'aang'ji ng'olyoo age ne tebyei eng' yooto

1Corinthians14:32 ak kase iit mugulelwegap `maotik maotik;
1Corinthians14:33 amu Kamuktaindet koma Kamuktaindet ne po polateet
1Corinthians14:34 ingosiisyo kobogorisyek eng' kanisosyek: amu ma ki chamjin icheeget kong'alaal; ago ingogas iit
1Corinthians14:35 Ak ngo machei icheek koneetkei kiy
1Corinthians14:36 Nee anyun? Tos okweek che ki mong'unenok ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet? Anan kibwanjok okweegei?

1Corinthians14:38 Ago ngo ma ingen chii age tugul kiy
1Corinthians14:39 Nooto anyun
1Corinthians14:40 Ago ingoyaogis tuguuk tugul ko uu ye nyolu ak eng' chobeet ne myee.
1Corinthians15:1 Aboorwok anyun

1Corinthians15:3 Amu ki agoonok eng' tai nooto ki ataach agane
1Corinthians15:4 ak ki kitup; ak ki king'eet eng' peetuutap somok ko uu ye mwaei siruutik;
1Corinthians15:5 ak ki mong'ji Kepha; ye ibata
1Corinthians15:6 yeityo komong'ji tupchosyek che siirei pogol muut komi tugul
1Corinthians15:7 yeityo komong'ji Jakobo; ye ibata
1Corinthians15:8 ak let eng' tugul
1Corinthians15:9 Amu aa ne ming'in eng' kiyooktoik

1Corinthians15:41 Miitei liilindo ne po asiista

2Corinthians11:15 Ma kiy ne oo anyun ngo walegei otwogikyik koigei kiboitinigap imanda; ne kagesunennywa konamegei ak poisyonikwak.

2Corinthians11:20 Amu omuitochini chiito

2Corinthians11:25 Ki kibirena kirokweek konyil somok

2Corinthians13:1 Ni ko ne po somok anyonjinok. Ki kimiiti ng'olyoot age tugul eng' kutusweegap paorinik aeng' anan ko somok.

Galatians1:1 Paulo
Galatians1:2 ak tupchosyek tugul che mi kobooto
Galatians1:3 Ingotep kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet ne punu Kamuktaindet Kwanda
Galatians1:4 ne ki igoitogei agobo tengekwogikyok
Galatians1:5 nenyi toroornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen.
Galatians1:6 Akwong'e amu oistoige ochoktoi eng' ineendet ne kiguurok eng' myeeindap Kristo
Galatians1:7 che ma teer: kobatee mi alage che iimok
Galatians1:8 Agot ngo acheek
Galatians1:9 Ko uu ye kiga kemwa eng' tai
Galatians1:10 Tos agoigoi nguno piik anan Kamuktaindet? Anan acheeng'e abaibai piik? Ngot kota aboiboi piik
Galatians1:11 Amu aboorwok anyun
Galatians1:12 Amu ki ma ataach eng' chii
Galatians1:13 Amu ki ogas agobo atebeennyu eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto eng' kayaneetap Yahudik
Galatians1:14 ak ki atese tai eng' kayaneetap Yahudik kosiir siritoikyuk che chaang' eng' piigap emennyu agiiligei miising' kosiir agobo pitonwegap kwanisyekyuk.

Galatians1:19 Ago ma ageer alak eng' che kiyooktoi
Galatians1:20 Ara anyun

Galatians2:1 Kingo pata anyun kenyiisyek tamanu ak ang'wan atogoste kogeny awe Jerusalem kobooto Barnaba
Galatians2:2 Ak ki atogoste eng' ng'ang'utyet; ak ki atetyi icheek logoiywek che myach che aamdooti eng' kwenutap Pororyosyek
Galatians2:3 Ago ma kibirchi Tito
Galatians2:4 amu tupchosyek che po lembech che ki kimut kobwa oriit eng' ung'oot
Galatians2:5 eng' icheeget che ki ma ki kas iit
Galatians2:6 Ago icheeget che ki kiiti keele taagunotiin (ngo uu ole teptoi icheek
Galatians2:7 Ago ye kingo keer icheek kole ki kigoono ariip logoiywek che myach agobo icheeget che ma kimuratani
Galatians2:8 (amu ineendet ne ki imuktoochi Petero koek kayooktoindet eng' che kimuratani
Galatians2:9 ak ye kingo nai Jakobo ak Kepa ak Johana
Galatians2:10 kobatee kimakwech icheek kibwaat kibananook; kioto ne ki ating'ee kagiiletapkei agane ale ayai.
Galatians2:11 Ago ye kingo nyo Kepa Antiok
Galatians2:12 Amu ye kitom kobwa alage che ki punu kap Jakobo

Galatians2:15 Acheek che ki Yahudik eng' sigeet
Galatians2:16 ago kingen keele ma kiityin chii imanda eng' poisyonigap ng'atuutik
Galatians2:17 Ago

Ephesians1:1 Paulo

Ephesians1:3 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet Kwandap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo
Ephesians1:4 ko uu ye kilewenech eng' ineendet ye kitom kelumda
Ephesians1:5 ko uu ye kiga sip kolewenech kenamech keegu weeriik eng' Jeso Kristo eng' ineendet
Ephesians1:6 agoi kalasunetap toroornatetap myeeindonyi
Ephesians1:7 ne ki tinyei eng' ineendet katyagennyo eng' korotiikyik
Ephesians1:8 che ki yai kotesak eng' acheek eng' utaatyet tugul ak naet
Ephesians1:9 ko kagoboorwech ung'ootyet ne po magennyi
Ephesians1:10 agoi tononjinet ne po riipseetap peetuusyek che yamegei
Ephesians1:11 ne kiyaech eng' ineendet keegu porotennyi
Ephesians1:12 si kobiit keegu kalasunetap toroornatennyi
Ephesians1:13 Ki ogas ak okweek eng' ineendet ng'olyootap imanit
Ephesians1:14 ne tongoaniatap porotennyo
Ephesians1:15 Amu niito anyun
Ephesians1:16 ko mata asiis agoito kongoi agobo okweek
Ephesians1:17 ale ingogoonok Kamuktaindet ne po Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo
Ephesians1:18 ko kagokweng'ogis konyegap mugulelwekwok
Ephesians1:19 ak kiit ne uu ooindo ne siirtoot ne po kamuktaennyi eng' acheek che kiyani
Ephesians1:20 ne ki yai eng' Kristo
Ephesians1:21 ne toroor kosiir laitornatet tugul
Ephesians1:22 ak ki inde tuguuk tugul kogas iit eng' keldebesaigap keelyekyik
