Ephesians2:1 Ak kigosabok okweek
Ephesians2:2 che ki obendote ye kinye ko uu piteetap ng'wonyuni
Ephesians2:3 che ki kimenye agot acheek tugul kwenunnywa eng' maguutik che yaach che po poorto
Ephesians2:4 ago Kamuktaindet
Ephesians2:5 agot ye ki kibegunotin eng' yaitwogikyok
Ephesians2:6 ak ki ing'eetech kobooto ineendet
Ephesians2:7 si kobiit kobarta eng' kenyiisyek che pwoonei mogornatosyek che siirtoot che po myeeindonyi eng' talasyet ne tokyineigei eng' Kristo Jeso:
Ephesians2:8 amu kigesorwok eng' myeeindo eng' kayaneet; ago ma punwok niito: konunetap Kamuktaindet;
Ephesians2:9 ama po poisyonik
Ephesians2:10 Amu kiboisyennyi acheek
Ephesians2:11 Nooto anyun obwaat
Ephesians2:12 ole ki omi taban eng' Kristo eng' peetuusyechooto
Ephesians2:13 Ago nguno eng' Kristo Jeso okweek che ki oo looen eng' peetuusyek alak
Ephesians2:14 Amu ineendet ko kalyennyo
Ephesians2:15 ko kagowong' eng' poortanyi puunyoondit
Ephesians2:16 ak kotuiyo icheek tuwai eng' poorto agenge ak Kamuktaindet eng' kimurtoiyot
Ephesians2:17 Ak ki nyo koamwok kaalyeet okweek che ki oo looen
Ephesians2:18 amu kinyooru acheek tuwai eng' ineendet ooreennyo eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil agenge
Ephesians2:19 Nooto anyun ma ko oo toek ak punootik ago oo piigap nganaseet agenge ak che tiliileen
Ephesians2:20 Kigeteechak eng' lumdaetap che kiyooktoi ak maotik
Ephesians2:21 ne kituiyechin teekseet age tugul ne ki kinamnyo koek agenge
Ephesians2:22 ki kiteechak ak okweek oegu agenge eng' ineendet
Ephesians3:1 Amu niito anee Paulo
Ephesians3:2 ngo ki ogas agobo tononjinetap myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne ki kigoono agobo okweek;
Ephesians3:3 ko uu ye ki kiboorwo eng' ng'ang'utyet ung'ootyet
Ephesians3:4 si
Ephesians3:5 ne ki ma kiboorchi weeriigap piik eng' ibinwek alak ko uu ye kageng'aang'ji nguno che kiyooktoi chechiik che tiliileen ak maotik eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil;
Ephesians3:6 keele
Ephesians3:7 che ki kiyaena aek kiboityot
Ephesians3:8 Ki kigoono myeini
Ephesians3:9 ak kiguiyechi piik tugul kiit ne uu tononjinetap ung'ootyet ne kiga kiuny kobooch kenyiisyek che ki kosiirto
Ephesians3:10 si kobiit konaak eng' kaniset nguno utaatyet ne oo ne po Kamuktaindet eng' laitornatosyek ak pounatosyek eng' komoswegap kipsengwet
Ephesians3:11 ko uu mageetap koigeny ne kisip kolewen eng' Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo:
Ephesians3:12 ki tinyei eng' ineendet nyiganateet ak kamang'unet ne kiriikyine ineendet amu kiyani ineendet.
Ephesians3:13 Eng' nooto anyun asoomok ale amat komeak mugulel amu nyalilwogikyuk agobo okweek
Ephesians3:14 Amu niito anyun agutung'jini Kwanda
Ephesians3:15 ne nyoorunee ineendet kainennywa ooreet age tugul ne po kapchii
Ephesians3:16 si kobiit kogoonok
Ephesians3:17 si kobiit komeny Kristo mugulelwekwok eng' kayaneet; si kobiit
Ephesians3:18 onyooru kimnateet oguiye kobooto tugul che tiliileen ole tee tebeesindo ak koindo ak toroorindo ak loindo ne wendi ng'wony
Ephesians3:19 ak onai chamyetap Kristo ne siirei naet
Ephesians3:20 Ingobunji anyun ineendet ne imuuchi koyai miising' inne kosiir tugul che kisoome anan che kibwaati ko uu kamuktaet ne poisyei eng' acheek
Ephesians3:21 toroornatet eng' kaniset ak eng' Kristo Jeso agoi ibinwek tugul che po koigeny ak koigeny. Amen.
Ephesians4:1 Nooto anyun
Ephesians4:2 eng' kaming'inetapkei tugul ak mutyonet
Ephesians4:3 ogiiligei oriibe yamdaet ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' ratuutyetap kaalyeet.
Ephesians4:4 Agenge poorto
Ephesians4:5 Kiptaiyat agenge
Ephesians4:6 Kamuktaindet agenge ne Kwandap tugul
Ephesians4:7 Ago ki kigoochi age tugul eng' acheek myeeindo ko uu kakwaet ne po konunetap Kristo.
Ephesians4:8 Mwaei eng' nooto anyun kole
Ephesians4:9 (Nooto anyun
Ephesians4:10 Ineendet ne ki choortagei ko ineendet ne ki togosta parak miising' kosiir kipsengwet tugul
Ephesians4:11 Ak ki igoochi alak koek che kiyooktoi: ak alak
Ephesians4:12 si koyai che tiliileen koek che ititaatiin
Ephesians4:13 agoi keit acheek tugul yamdaetap kayaneet
Ephesians4:14 si mata keegu lagok
Ephesians4:15 ago ki ng'alaali che po iman eng' chamyet
Ephesians4:16 eng' ineendet keropchindos ak kituitos poorto tugul
Ephesians4:17 Amwae anyun ni
Ephesians4:18 che imenen eng' nautikwak
Ephesians4:19 che ki igoochigei mageet ne ya agobo tuguuk che yaacheen
Ephesians4:20 Ago ki ma oneetkei Kristo ko uu nooto;
Ephesians4:21 ngo ki ogas ineendet
Ephesians4:22 ale oregu chiito ne po keny
Ephesians4:23 asi owalage oleelagitu eng' nautigap saboonwekwok
Ephesians4:24 ak olaach chiito ne leel
Ephesians4:25 Nooto anyun oiste lembeita
Ephesians4:26 Onereech
Ephesians4:27 amat ogoochi poroindo chesawilyet.
Ephesians4:28 Ineendet ne kigochoorso ko matata kochoorso: ago kaigai kobois
Ephesians4:29 Amat komang'une ng'olyoo age tugul ne ya kutusweekwok
Ephesians4:30 Ak amogoochi arageneet Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne ki kindaenak ng'ookset agoi peetuutap katyaget.
Ephesians4:31 Ingoistogei eng' okweek ng'wanindo tugul
Ephesians4:32 ilak otebi eng' talasyet okweegei eng' okweegei
Ephesians5:1 Oegu anyun kasubiigap Kamuktaindet
Ephesians5:2 ak obendate chamyet
Ephesians5:3 Ago ko uu ye nyoljin piik che tiliileen ko matong'alaale eng' kwenung'wong' sokseet
Ephesians5:4 anan teweernat
Ephesians5:5 Amu ongen niito iman ole
Ephesians5:6 Amat koberberak chii eng' ng'aleek che ma namegei ak kiy
Ephesians5:7 Nooto anyun
Ephesians5:8 amu ki oo mesundeito eng' peetuusyek alak
Ephesians5:9 (amu logoiyatap lapkeiyet ko eng' myeeindo tugul ak imanda ak imanit)
Ephesians5:10 si onai nooto taachaksei eng' Kiptaiyat;
Ephesians5:11 amoyai yamdaet ak poisyonigap mesundeito
Ephesians5:12 amu tuguuk che yaei icheek eng' ung'oot ko teweernat ngeleen kemwa.
Ephesians5:13 Ago tuguuk tugul che kigerei kong' ko ng'ang'aksei eng' lapkeiyet: amu kiy age tugul ne kiboortoi ko lapkeiyet.
Ephesians5:14 Nooto anyun
Ephesians5:15 Oriipkei anyun miising' eng' ole oteptoi eng' panwekwok
Ephesians5:16 oboisyee saisyek komyee
Ephesians5:17 Nooto anyun amoberberitu
Ephesians5:18 Amat obogitye eng' maiyek
Ephesians5:19 ong'alaaljinigei eng' tyenwogigap kalasunet ak tyenwogik che ki kisir ak tyenwogigap saboon
Ephesians5:20 ogoitoi kongoi kotugul agobo tuguuk tugul eng' kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo
Ephesians5:21 Oming'injigei kei eng' kaiyweisyetap Kristo.
Ephesians5:22 Osotichu
Ephesians5:23 Amu manong'otyot ko metitap osotyot
Ephesians5:24 Ago ko uu ye kase iit kaniset Kristo
Ephesians5:25 Manong'otaichu
Ephesians5:26 si kobiit kotabaan
Ephesians5:27 si kobiit komutyigei kaniset
Ephesians5:28 Ko uu nooto kanyolji manong'otaik ak icheek kocham osotikwak ko uu ye chamei poorwekwak icheegei. Ineendet ne chamei osotyonnyi kochamegei ineegei:
Ephesians5:29 amu ma mi chii ne wechei poortanyi; ago paei ak koriibei
Ephesians5:30 amu ki kebeberwek che po poortanyi.
Ephesians5:31 Amu ng'olyoondoni
Ephesians5:32 Oo ung'ootyoni: ago ang'alaali agobo Kristo ak kaniset.
Ephesians5:33 Ago ingocham chii age tugul osotyonnyi
Ephesians6:1 Lagochu
Ephesians6:2 Teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung' (niito ng'atuutyet ne po tai ne pooto kayomiset)
Ephesians6:3 si kobiit komyeeit eng' inyee
Ephesians6:4 Ak okweek
Ephesians6:5 Otwogichu
Ephesians6:6 ama eng' otwoknateet ne kigeerei
Ephesians6:7 oyae poisyet eng' chamyet
Ephesians6:8 ongen ole kiy age tugul ne myee ne yaei chii age tugul

Ephesians6:12 Amu ma po kabelennyo pogei poorto ak korotiik
Ephesians6:13 Nooto anyun onam kariigap lugeet komugul che po Kamuktaindet
Ephesians6:14 Otononse anyun
Ephesians6:15 ak ko kaoratyi keelyekwok pekyinet ne po logoiywek che myach che po kaalyeet;

Ephesians6:17 Ak onam kuutweetap yetunet

Ephesians6:21 Ago si kobiit onai ak okweek ng'aleekyuk
Ephesians6:22 ne koayokwok agobo ng'olyoondoniito
Ephesians6:23 Ingotebi kaalyeet kobooto tupchosyek
Ephesians6:24 Ingotep myeeindo kobooto icheek tugul che chamei Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo eng' atepto ne ma ng'emaksei.
Philippians1:1 Paulo ak Timoteo
Philippians1:2 Ingotep myeeindo kobootok ak kaalyeet che punu Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo.
Philippians1:3 Amwachini Kamuktaindet nenyu kongoi agobo kabwaatennyu tugul ne abwaatok
Philippians1:4 eng' soomennyu age tugul agobo okweek tugul
Philippians1:5 amu yamdaeng'wong'
Philippians1:6 angen komyee ng'olyoondoniito
Philippians1:7 ko uu ye myee eng' anee abwaat ko uu niito agobo okweek tugul
Philippians1:8 Amu Kamuktaindet paoryandennyu
Philippians1:9 Ak ni ko saaennyu ale kotesak chamyeng'wong' miising' inne eng' naet ak kaguiyet tugul;
Philippians1:10 si kobiit onai komyee tuguuk che po telunateet; si kobiit oegu che ma tinyei keniisyet
Philippians1:11 ko oo nyiitootiin eng' logoegap imanda
Philippians1:12 Ago amache
Philippians1:13 kot kotook monjorornatennyu agobo Kristo eng' kiplugotinik tugul che po kaplaitoryat
Philippians1:14 ak tinyei che chaang' eng' che kitupche eng' Kiptaiyat nyiganateet ne oo kosiir
Philippians1:15 Amdoi alage Kristo eng' ng'etkonda
Philippians1:16 amdoi alage eng' chamyet
Philippians1:17 ago amdoi alage Kristo eng' toiyet
Philippians1:18 Nee anyun? Kobatee kityo eng' ooreet age tugul
Philippians1:19 Amu angen ale walaksei niito koegu yetunennyu
Philippians1:20 Ko uu eng' kagenisyennyu ne ageni miising' ak kamang'unennyu
Philippians1:21 Amu eng' anee ngasabe ko Kristo
Philippians1:22 Ago ngasabe eng' poorto
Philippians1:23 Amu kagigikyo kwenutap tuguuk aeng'
Philippians1:24 ago ngatebi eng' poorto konyolu kosiir agobo okweek.
Philippians1:25 Ak atinye kamang'unoni
Philippians1:26 si kobiit kotesak kalasuneng'wong' eng' Kristo Jeso eng' anee
Philippians1:27 Ago ingoek atebeeng'wong' ne nyoljin logoiywek che myach che po Kristo: si ngot anyoo ageerok anan ngo ma mi anee
Philippians1:28 amat komuok puunik eng' kiy age tugul: nooto kaboorunet ne tagunoot ne po luseet eng' icheek
Philippians1:29 amu ki kigoonok agobo Kristo
Philippians1:30 otinye lugonooto ki ogeerena
Philippians2:1 Ngo miitei anyun kagaigaet age tugul eng' Kristo
Philippians2:2 osulde anyun poiboiyennyu
Philippians2:3 Amoyai kiy age tugul eng' toiyet
Philippians2:4 amat kogeer chii age tugul eng' okweek tuguukyik kityo
Philippians2:5 Ingotebenok ateboni
Philippians2:6 ne
Philippians2:7 ago kiyaigei ineendet koek puch ak konam itoondap otwogindet
Philippians2:8 ak kingo took eng' itoondap chii
Philippians2:9 Nooto anyun
Philippians2:10 si kobiit kogutuny kutundo age tugul eng' kainetap Jeso
Philippians2:11 si kong'aany ng'elyepta age tugul kole Jeso Kristo ko Kiptaiyat
Philippians2:12 Nooto anyun
Philippians2:13 amu Kamuktaindet ne poisyei eng' okweek si omach
Philippians2:14 Oyai tuguuk tugul ama eng' kang'unyng'unyosyek ak tiiyasyek;
Philippians2:15 si kobiit oegu che ma tinyei leluut ak ko libwoben
Philippians2:16 oboortoi ng'olyootap saboondo; si kobiit anyoor ne alasunegei eng' peetuutap Kristo
Philippians2:17 Ee
Philippians2:18 ak ko uu nooto oboiboitu ak okweek
Philippians2:19 Ago amang'u eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso ale ayookwok Timoteo ko neegit
Philippians2:20 Amu ma tinye chii age ne kergei kabwaatennyi ak nenyu
Philippians2:21 Amu cheeng'ei icheek tugul chechwaak
Philippians2:22 Amu ongen atebeennyi komyee
Philippians2:23 Amang'u anyun ale
Philippians2:24 ago amang'u eng' Kiptaiyat ale anyoone aneendet agane ko neegit.
Philippians2:25 Ago ki abwaat ale nyolu ayookwok Epaphroditus
Philippians2:26 amu kiting'enok emosto okweek tugul
Philippians2:27 amu kimyan iman
Philippians2:28 Kayogu ineendet anyun eng' kagiiletapkei ne oo
Philippians2:29 Otaach ineendet anyun eng' Kiptaiyat eng' poiboiyet tugul; ak ogonyit che uu nooto:
Philippians2:30 amu ki neegit kome agobo poisyetap Kristo

Philippians3:2 Oriibegei sesenik
Philippians3:3 amu ki kamuratanet acheek
Philippians3:4 agot ngamuuchi amang'kei agot eng' poorto. Ngo pwaati chii age tugul koleen tinyei kamang'unet eng' poorto
Philippians3:5 Ki kimuratana eng' peetuut ne po sisiit
Philippians3:6 eng' kagiiletapkei
Philippians3:7 Ago tuguuk che ki poroteet eng' anee
Philippians3:8 Ee iman
Philippians3:9 ak kenyoorwo eng' ineendet
Philippians3:10 si kobiit anai ineendet ak kamuktaet ne po ng'eetyeennyi
Philippians3:11 si kobiit anyoor eng' oor age tugul aiityi ng'eetyeetap che ki pek.

Philippians4:2 Asoome miising' Euodia
Philippians4:3 Ee
Philippians4:4 Oboiboitu eng' Kiptaiyat kotugul: ak amwae kogeny ale
Philippians4:5 Ingonaak mutyoneng'wong' eng' piik tugul. Kagoriik Kiptaiyat.
Philippians4:6 Amogereeri met eng' kiy age tugul; ago eng' kiy age tugul ko eng' saaet ak soomet kobooto kongoi

Philippians4:10 Ago koabaibaitu miising' eng' Kiptaiyat
Philippians4:11 Ma ng'alaali amu ma tinye kiy: amu ki aneetkei
Philippians4:12 Angen ole ateptoi eng' terterindo
Philippians4:13 Amuuchi ayai tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet ne igimita.
Philippians4:14 Ago ki oyai ne myee
Philippians4:15 Ak ongen okweeget okweek Philippik
Philippians4:16 amu agot eng' Thessalonika ko ki oyookwo atkai tugul tuguuk che ki ma atinye.
Philippians4:17 Ma keele acheeng'e konunet; ago acheeng'e logoek che tesoksei eng' koiiteng'wong'.
Philippians4:18 Ago atinye tuguuk tugul
Philippians4:19 Ago inyiitwok Kamuktaindet nenyu kiit age tugul ne obononi ko uu mogornatosyekyik eng' toroornatet eng' Kristo Jeso.
Philippians4:20 Nguno anyun ingobunji Kamuktaindet nenyo
Philippians4:21 Ogat age tugul ne tiliil eng' Kristo Jeso. Igatok tupchosyek che mi kobooto.
Philippians4:22 Igatok tugul che tiliileen
Philippians4:23 Ingotep myeeindap Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo kobooto saboonwekwok.
Colossians1:1 Paulo
Colossians1:2 kisirchini che tiliileen che kitupche che iyanotin eng' Kristo
Colossians1:3 Kigoochini kongoi Kamuktaindet Kwandap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo
Colossians1:4 ye ki ngegas agobo kayaneng'wong' eng' Kristo Jeso
Colossians1:5 amu kamang'unet ne kigegonorwok eng' kipsengwet
Colossians1:6 ne kigoityok; ko uu ole teptoi agine eng' ng'wony komugul koiyiei logoek ak ko tesoksei
Colossians1:7 ko uu ye ki oneetkei eng' Epapra chamanennyo ne kiboisyei tugul
Colossians1:8 ne ki iboorwech chamyeng'wong' ne mi eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil.
Colossians1:9 Amu niito anyun
Colossians1:10 si obendate ko uu ye nyolu eng' Kiptaiyat
Colossians1:11 kigimitok eng' kamuktaet tugul
Colossians1:12 ogoochini kongoi Kwanda
Colossians1:13 ne kisarwech kemang'une kimnateetap mesundeito
Colossians1:14 ne ki tinyei eng' ineendet katyagennyo
Colossians1:15 Ineendet itoondap Kamuktaindet ne ma taagu
Colossians1:16 amu ki kitoi keyai tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet
Colossians1:17 ak po tai ineendet eng' tuguuk tugul
Colossians1:18 Ak ineendet metitap poorto
Colossians1:19 Amu ki chamak komyee keele komeny nyiyet tugul eng' ineendet;
Colossians1:20 si kotuiyechigei tuguuk tugul ineendet
Colossians1:21 Ak nganda ki oo kipsagarek eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto
Colossians1:22 eng' poortanyi ne po panyeek
Colossians1:23 ngo tebi iman eng' kayaneet
Colossians1:24 Abaibai anyun nguno eng' nyalilwogikyuk agobo okweek
Colossians1:25 ak
Colossians1:26 ung'ootyet ne ki kiuny kobooch kenyiisyek tugul che ki kosiirto ak ibinwek: ago nguno
Colossians1:27 che ki cham Kamuktaindet kong'aang'ji kiit ne uu mogornatosyegap toroornatet ne po ung'ootyoniito eng' Pororyosyek
Colossians1:28 ineendet ne kimwaitoi
Colossians1:29 abirtochinigei agine nooto

Colossians2:5 Amu agot ngo ma mi anee eng' poorto
Colossians2:6 Ko uu ye ki otaach anyun Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyat
Colossians2:7 ko oo lumdootin ak ko oo teegotin eng' ineendet

Colossians2:9 amu menyei eng' ineendet eng' poorto nyiyet tugul ne po Kamuktaindet
Colossians2:10 ak keyaok oegu che nyiitootiin eng' ineendet
Colossians2:11 ki kimuratanak eng' ineendet eng' kamuratanet ne ki ma kiyae eunek

Colossians2:14 ko kagobuch sireet ne po arorutik ne kiga kogikyech
Colossians2:15 ko kagorek pounatosyek ak kimnatosyek

Colossians2:17 che urwetap tuguuk che pwoonei; ago poorto ko po Kristo.

Colossians2:19 ama namei komyee Metit
Colossians2:20 Ko uu ye ki obegu kobooto Kristo omang'une kaneetisyosyek che po tai che po ng'wony

Colossians3:3 Amu ki obegu

Colossians4:1 Kiptainichu
Colossians4:2 Ogiiligei kotugul eng' saaet
Colossians4:3 osaiywech ak acheek
Colossians4:4 si aboortoi
Colossians4:5 Obendoti eng' ng'omnateet eng' taitap icheeget che mi saang'
Colossians4:6 Ingotep ng'aleekwok eng' myeeindo kotugul
Colossians4:7 Mwaiwok ng'aleekyuk tugul Tukiko
Colossians4:8 ne koayokwok amu ng'olyoondoniito
Colossians4:9 kobooto Onesmus
Colossians4:10 Igatok Aristarko ne ki kimonjororinik tuwai
Colossians4:11 ak Jeso
Colossians4:12 Igatok Epapra
Colossians4:13 Amu abaoryani agobo ineendet
Colossians4:14 Igatok Luka
Colossians4:15 Ogat tupchosyek che miitei Laodikia
Colossians4:16 Ak ye kagesoman parwaani eng' kwenung'wong'
Colossians4:17 Ak omwachi Arkipo oleenji
Colossians4:18 Kagatennyu anee Paulo eng' eunnyu. Obwaat monjorornatennyu. Ingotep myeeindo kobootok.
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo
1Thessalonians1:2 Kimwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi kotugul agobo okweek tugul
1Thessalonians1:3 kibwaati ne ma kisise
1Thessalonians1:4 Amu kingen
1Thessalonians1:5 keele ki ma pwonjok logoiywekyok che myach eng' ng'olyoot kityo
1Thessalonians1:6 Ak ki oegu kasubikyok
1Thessalonians1:7 kot oegu kaboorunoik eng' tugul che iyani eng' Makedonia ak eng' Akaia.
1Thessalonians1:8 Amu ki kogasak ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat kobun olong'wong'
1Thessalonians1:9 Amu icheeget che iboortoi agobo acheek ole ki kibwanunde oldang'wong'; ak ko uu ye ki oweekyigei Kamuktaindet olakte kanamonik
1Thessalonians1:10 ak ogeni Weeriinnyi ne punu kipsengwet
1Thessalonians2:1 Amu ongen okweek
1Thessalonians2:2 ago kingo kaginyalilech eng' tai ak kiteweerech eng' Philippi
1Thessalonians2:3 Amu ma po kateunennyo leluut
1Thessalonians2:4 ago ko uu ye ki koyanwech Kamuktaindet keegu che tononjin logoiywek che myach
1Thessalonians2:5 Amu ki ma kinyoorwech eng' sait age tugul keboisyee ng'aleegap kachaunetapkei
1Thessalonians2:6 ama kicheeng'e teegisto eng' piik
1Thessalonians2:7 Ago ki kitalaen eng' kwenung'wong'
1Thessalonians2:8 ko uu nooto
1Thessalonians2:9 Amu obwaati
1Thessalonians2:10 Oo paorinik okweek
1Thessalonians2:11 ko uu ye ongen ole ki kiteechindoite chii age tugul eng' okweek
1Thessalonians2:12 si kobiit obendate ko uu ye nyolu eng' Kamuktaindet
1Thessalonians2:13 Kimwachini anyun Kamuktaindet kongoi
1Thessalonians2:14 Amu okweek anyun
1Thessalonians2:15 che ki par Kiptaiyat Jeso ak maotik
1Thessalonians2:16 etenech keng'alaalji Pororyosyek si kobiit kesar; inyiiti kotugul tengekwogikwak: ago nyoonjin icheek nereeknateet agoi let.
1Thessalonians2:17 Ago
1Thessalonians2:18 amu ki kimache kebwa olong'wong'
1Thessalonians2:19 Amu tos nee kamang'unennyo
1Thessalonians2:20 Amu okweek toroornatennyo ak poiboiyennyo.
1Thessalonians3:1 Nooto anyun ye kingo mata kimuuch kemuite
1Thessalonians3:2 ak kiyogu Timoteo
1Thessalonians3:3 si ma ing'eak chii age tugul eng' nyalilwogichuuto; amu ongen okweeget ole ki kilewenwech chooto.
1Thessalonians3:4 Amu iman
1Thessalonians3:5 Amu ng'olyoondoniito ye ki mata amuuch amuita
1Thessalonians3:6 Ago
1Thessalonians3:7 amu ng'olyoondoniito anyun
1Thessalonians3:8 amu kisoptosi nguno
1Thessalonians3:9 Amu kongoi nee ne kimuuchi kigoochi Kamuktaindet kogeny agobo okweek
1Thessalonians3:10 kisaae miising' kemoi ak peet si kobiit kegeer togoochikwok
1Thessalonians3:11 Ingondochi anyun pandanyo kebwa oldang'wong'
1Thessalonians3:12 ingogoonok Kiptaiyat otesage ak obaraitu eng' chamyet okweegei eng' okweegei
1Thessalonians3:13 si kobiit kogimit mugulelwekwok ko motinye kiy ne kimuuchi kirwoogunenok eng' tiliilindo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet nenyo ak ko Kwandanyo
1Thessalonians4:1 Ne po let anyun
1Thessalonians4:2 Amu ongen ng'atuutik che ki kigoonok acheek eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso.
1Thessalonians4:3 Amu niito mageetap Kamuktaindet
1Thessalonians4:4 Si kobiit konai chii tugul eng' okweek komuuchkei
1Thessalonians4:5 ma eng' mageet ne po kasetap myat
1Thessalonians4:6 amat koyai chii kachiliilut anan koyachi ne ya tupchennyi eng' ng'olyoondoniito: amu Kiptaiyat yaaktaindetap mugetuut eng' tuguuchuuto tugul
1Thessalonians4:7 Amu ki ma kuurchech Kamuktaindet simdo
1Thessalonians4:8 Ineendet ne eesyoi
1Thessalonians4:9 Ago ma nyolu kesirwak agobo chamyetap tupchosyek; amu oneetotin okweeget eng' Kamuktaindet si ochamye;
1Thessalonians4:10 amu oyae ko uu nooto iman eng' tupchosyek tugul che miitei Makedonia komugul. Ago kiteeiywok
1Thessalonians4:11 ak oneetkei otebi eng' mutyonet
1Thessalonians4:12 si obendate ko uu ye nyolu eng' taitap icheek che mi saang'
1Thessalonians4:13 Ago ma kimache anyun
1Thessalonians4:14 Amu ngiyani keele kime Jeso ak kong'eet kogeny
1Thessalonians4:15 Amu kimwaiwok ni eng' ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat
1Thessalonians4:16 Amu choorugei Kiptaiyat ineendet eng' kipsengwet
1Thessalonians4:17 ak acheek anyun che kisoptosi
1Thessalonians4:18 Nooto anyun ogaigaigei okweegei eng' ng'aleechuuto.
1Thessalonians5:1 Ma nyolu anyun kesirwak
1Thessalonians5:2 Amu ongen okweeget komyee ole nyoonei peetuutap Kiptaiyat ko uu choriin ne nyoonei kemoi.
1Thessalonians5:3 Ye mwaei icheek koleen
1Thessalonians5:4 Ago okweek
1Thessalonians5:5 amu okweek tugul ko oo weeriitap lapkeiyet
1Thessalonians5:6 nooto anyun among' keruiye ko uu piik alak
1Thessalonians5:7 Amu icheeget che ruitos koruitos kemoi; ak icheeget che pogitos kobogitos kemoi.
1Thessalonians5:8 Ago ongeegu che kiriibegei
1Thessalonians5:9 Amu ki ma lewenjech Kamuktaindet nereeknateet
1Thessalonians5:10 ne kimechech
1Thessalonians5:11 Nooto anyun ogaigaige okweegei eng' okweegei
1Thessalonians5:12 Ago kisoomok
1Thessalonians5:13 ak ogonyit icheek miising' inne eng' chamyet agobo poisyennywa. Otebi eng' kaalyeet okweegei eng' okweegei.
1Thessalonians5:14 Ak kitigoonok
1Thessalonians5:15 Ogeer si ma yaakyi chii age tugul chiito age yaityo eng' yaityo; ago osup nooto myee kotugul
1Thessalonians5:16 Oboiboitu peetuusyek tugul;
1Thessalonians5:17 osaae kotugul;
1Thessalonians5:18 omwae kongoi eng' tuguuk tugul: amu niito mageetap Kamuktaindet eng' Kristo Jeso eng' okweek.
1Thessalonians5:19 Amogirinde Kabuuset ne Tiliil;
1Thessalonians5:20 amosas maonatosyek;
1Thessalonians5:21 otyem tuguuk tugul; onam miising' nooto myee;
1Thessalonians5:22 oistoegei kiy age tugul ne ya.
1Thessalonians5:23 Ak ingotabaanak eng' katabaanet ne nyiitaat Kamuktaindet ne po kaalyeet; ak ingoriiboogis komyee mugulelwekwok ak saboonwekwok ak poorwekwok
1Thessalonians5:24 Ineendet ne kuurok ko ineendet ne kiyani
1Thessalonians5:25 Tupchosyechu
1Thessalonians5:26 Ogat tupchosyek tugul eng' ng'ututet ne tiliil.
1Thessalonians5:27 Ayosyewok eng' Kiptaiyat ale kesomanji parwaani che kitupche tugul.
1Thessalonians5:28 Ingotebi myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo kobootok.
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo
2Thessalonians1:2 Ingotep kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet che punu Kamuktaindet Kwanda ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo.
2Thessalonians1:3 Kanyool kemwachi Kamuktaindet kongoi peetuusyek tugul agobo okweek
2Thessalonians1:4 kot kichounenok kei okweek eng' kanisosyegap Kamuktaindet amu muitaeng'wong' ak kayaneet eng' usiisyosyekwok tugul ak nyalilwogik che omuitoi;
2Thessalonians1:5 niito kaboorunet ne tagunoot ne po kirwoogetap imanda ne po Kamuktaindet; si kobiit kiitok keele onyolu eng' laitornatetap Kamuktaindet
2Thessalonians1:6 si ngo kiy ne po imanda eng' Kamuktaindet koyaakyi mugetuut ne po nyalilda icheeget che inyalilok
2Thessalonians1:7 ak kogoonok kamuung'et kobootech
2Thessalonians1:8 eng' maat ne lalei
2Thessalonians1:9 che tuun nyooru pireet
2Thessalonians1:10 ye tuun nyo si kobiit kitoroor eng' chechiik che tiliileen; ak kekwong'ee icheek tugul che iyani (amu ki kiyan paornatennyo eng' okweek)
2Thessalonians1:11 Nooto anyun kisaiywok kotugul
2Thessalonians1:12 si kobiit kitoroor kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso eng' okweek
2Thessalonians2:1 Kisoomok anyun
2Thessalonians2:2 si motoptobense ochokyi eng' kabwaatutikwok anan oaragense
2Thessalonians2:3 amat kong'alak chii eng' kiy age tugul; amu ma itu peetuunooto
2Thessalonians2:4 ineendet ne kirindoi ak kotorooregei kogirindoi tugul che kiguure Kamuktaindet anan che kilasu; si kotep anyun eng' hekaluutap Kamuktaindet
2Thessalonians2:5 Tos mobwaati
2Thessalonians2:6 Ak nguno ongen nooto ne raanyei
2Thessalonians2:7 Amu poisyei nguno ung'ootyetap ngelelnateet; kobatee mi agenge ne raanyei nguno
2Thessalonians2:8 Ak yeityo keng'aany ngelelyot
2Thessalonians2:9 nyonunennyi konamegei ak poisyetap Setani kobooto kamuget tugul ak kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che po lembech
2Thessalonians2:10 kobooto keniisyet tugul che ma po imanda agobo icheek che lustos; amu ma taach chamyetap imanit
2Thessalonians2:11 Amu niito anyun
2Thessalonians2:12 si kobiit kirwookyi icheek tugul che ma iyan imanit
2Thessalonians2:13 Ago kanyool kemwachi Kamuktaindet kongoi kotugul agobo okweek
2Thessalonians2:14 kiguurok anyun eng' chooto eng' logoiywekyok che myach
2Thessalonians2:15 Nooto anyun
2Thessalonians2:16 Nguno anyun
2Thessalonians2:17 kogaigai mugulelwekwok ak kogimit icheek eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee ak ng'olyoot.
2Thessalonians3:1 Ne po let anyun
2Thessalonians3:2 ak si kobiit kesarwech eng' piik che ngelelik ak che yaacheen; amu ma tinyei tugul kayaneet.
2Thessalonians3:3 Ago po iman Kiptaiyat
2Thessalonians3:4 Ak ki tinyei kamang'unet eng' Kiptaiyat agobo okweek
2Thessalonians3:5 Ingondochi Kiptaiyat mugulelwekwok agoi chamyetap Kamuktaindet ak muitaetap Kristo.
2Thessalonians3:6 King'atok anyun
2Thessalonians3:7 Amu ongen okweeget ko uu ye kanyool oyai ko uu ye kiyae: amu ki ma kitebi acheek eng' kwenung'wong' ko uu piik che ma riibegei;
2Thessalonians3:8 ama ki am amitwogigap chii age tugul puch
2Thessalonians3:9 ma amu keele ma ki tinyei kimnateet
2Thessalonians3:10 Amu agot ye ki kimi kobootok
2Thessalonians3:11 Amu kigase agobo alak eng' kwenung'wong' che pendoti eng' pistoet
2Thessalonians3:12 Ago king'ate ak kiteechini che uu chooto eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo
2Thessalonians3:13 Ago okweek
2Thessalonians3:14 Ak ngo ma kase iit chii age tugul ng'olyoondennyo eng' parwaani
2Thessalonians3:15 Amoiit ineendet ole puunyoot
2Thessalonians3:16 Nguno anyun ingogoonok kaalyeet Kiptaiyat ineendet
2Thessalonians3:17 Kagatennyu anee Paulo eng' eunnyu
2Thessalonians3:18 Ingotep myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo kobootok okweek tugul.
1Timothy1:1 Paulo
1Timothy1:2 asirchini Timoteo lakweennyu
1Timothy1:3 Ko uu ye ki asoomin ale itebee Epheso
1Timothy1:4 anan koepchi iit atindonik ak tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto
1Timothy1:5 Ago kasuldaetap ng'atuutyoni ko chamyet ne punu muguleldo ne tiliil ak kabwaatet ne myee ak kayaneet ne ma tinyei keniisyet:
1Timothy1:6 ye kingo kagochiliil piik alak eng' tuguuchuuto
1Timothy1:7 chamei koek kaneetigap Ng'atuutyet
1Timothy1:8 Ago kingen keele myee Ng'atuutyet
1Timothy1:9 kongen kole ki ma kiyai Ng'atuutyet agobo chii ne po imanda
1Timothy1:10 agobo che soksei
1Timothy1:11 ko uu ye mwaei logoiywek che myach che po toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne iberuurot
1Timothy1:12 Amwachini kongoi ineendet
1Timothy1:13 nganda ki aa chii ne chubisyei eng' tai
1Timothy1:14 ak kitesak myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo kobarait kobooto kayaneet ak chamyet ne mi eng' Kristo Jeso.
1Timothy1:15 Po iman ng'olyoondoni
1Timothy1:16 ago ki anyooru rireenetapkei amu ng'olyoondoni
1Timothy1:17 Ingobunji anyun nguno Laitoryat ne po koigeny
1Timothy1:18 Kagoonin kayomisoni inyee lakweennyu Timoteo
1Timothy1:19 iname kayaneet ak kabwaatet ne myee; che
1Timothy1:20 eng' chooto ko Humenayo ak Aleksanda; che ki agoochi Setani
1Timothy2:1 Ne po tai anyun abooru ale ingoyaak soomutik
1Timothy2:2 agobo laitorinik ak tugul che tinyei pounateet; si kobiit ketebee kaalyeet ak mutyonet eng' kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ak teegisto.
1Timothy2:3 Myee niito ak ko taagaksei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet Yetindennyo;
1Timothy2:4 ne machei kole kesar piik tugul
1Timothy2:5 Amu miitei Kamuktaindet agenge
1Timothy2:6 ne ki igoitogei koek ne kityage tugul; ne tuun kibaoryanjin eng' peetuusyekyik;
1Timothy2:7 ki kindea anyun agobo nooto aek amdoindet ak kayooktoindet (amwae imanit
1Timothy2:8 Amache anyun ale kosaaei murenik eng' komosta age tugul
1Timothy2:9 Ko uu nooto kobogorisyek ingolaachkei eng' kalaakset ne nyolu
1Timothy2:10 ago (ko uu ye nyoljin kobogorisyek che ibortogei kole piigap Kamuktaindet icheeget) eng' poisyonik che myach.
1Timothy2:11 Ingoneetkei kobogoryot eng' mutyonet kobooto kasetap iit.
1Timothy2:12 Ago ma chamjini kobogoryot koneetis
1Timothy2:13 Amu ki kiyai Adam korook
1Timothy2:14 ak ki ma king'al Adam
1Timothy2:15 ago kisaru eng' sigisyet
1Timothy3:1 Po iman ng'olyoondoni
1Timothy3:2 Kanyolji anyun riibindet koek ne ma kigeerchin ng'olyoo ne ma litit
1Timothy3:3 ne ma kimaiya
1Timothy3:4 ne pou koonnyi komyee
1Timothy3:5 (ago ngo ma nai chii ole poundoi koonnyi
1Timothy3:6 Ama chii ne kota koyani
1Timothy3:7 Ak kogeny konyaaljin kotinyei paornateet ne myee eng' icheeget che mi saang'; si ma ibutyi teweernateet ak mesteetap chesawilyet.
1Timothy3:8 Ko uu nooto kiboitinigap kaniset kanyool kotebi eng' teegisto
1Timothy3:9 che namei ung'ootyetap kayaneet eng' kabwaatet ne tiliil.
1Timothy3:10 Ak nyolu ketyem chuuto ak icheek korook; ingoyai anyun icheek poisyetap kiboitiinik ngo ma kigeerchin ng'olyoo ne ma litit.
1Timothy3:11 Ko uu nooto kobogorisyek
1Timothy3:12 Ingoek kiboitinigap kaniset manong'otaigap osotyot agenge
1Timothy3:13 Amu icheeget che ki kobois komyee eng' poisyonooto po kiboitiinik
1Timothy3:14 Kasirun tuguuchu
1Timothy3:15 ago ngot agagei
1Timothy3:16 Ak ne matiny
1Timothy4:1 Ago mwaei Kabuuset ne Tiliil kotook
1Timothy4:2 eng' chombilisyetap piik che ng'alaali lembech
1Timothy4:3 che etei kitunis
1Timothy4:4 Amu myee yautyet age tugul ne po Kamuktaindet
1Timothy4:5 amu kitiliili eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ak saaet.
1Timothy4:6 Ngot ibwaatyi che kitupche tuguuchu
1Timothy4:7 ago eesye atindonik che po tangoita che ma namegei ak ooreetap Kamuktaindet
1Timothy4:8 amu porot ne matya kagiiletapkei ne po poorto; ago poroteet eng' tuguuk tugul kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet
1Timothy4:9 Po iman ng'olyoondoni
1Timothy4:10 Kiyae anyun poisyet ne oo amu niito ak ki kiiligei
1Timothy4:11 Ng'at tuguuchu ak ineet.
1Timothy4:12 Amat kosas chii ming'inateng'ung'; ago egu kaboorunet eng' icheek che iyani
1Timothy4:13 Agoi anyo
1Timothy4:14 Amebagaakte iboisyee konunet ne itinye
1Timothy4:15 Igiiljige tuguuchuuto; igoochigei miising'; si kotook eng' piik tugul pandang'ung' ne po tai.
1Timothy4:16 Riipkei
1Timothy5:1 Amerasyi poiyo
1Timothy5:2 chebyosok ko uu kametisyek
1Timothy5:3 Teech mosoogik che mosoogik iman.
1Timothy5:4 Ago ngo tinyei mosoget age tugul lagok anan mochogoronik
1Timothy5:5 Ak ineendet ne mosoget iman
1Timothy5:6 Ago ineendet ne suegei ko kagome agot ngo sabei.
1Timothy5:7 Ng'at tuguuchuuto
1Timothy5:8 Ago ngo ma riibei chii piikyik
1Timothy5:9 Amat kesirchi ole kisirchin mosoogik kotom koit kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo
1Timothy5:10 ne kimwaitae ineendet poisyonik che myach; ngo kigo pai lagok
1Timothy5:11 Ago eesye mosoogik che mengeechen; amu ye kagongelelji Kristo
1Timothy5:12 tinyei kirwooget anyun
1Timothy5:13 Kobooto nooto anyun koneetkei koek chorirenik
1Timothy5:14 Nooto anyun achame ale kitun mosoogik che ta ko mengeechen
1Timothy5:15 amu agot nguno ko kagomasta alak koosup Setani.
1Timothy5:16 Ngo tinyei kobogoryot ne iyanaat mosoogik
1Timothy5:17 Ingiityi poisyek che pou komyee
1Timothy5:18 Amu mwaei siruutyet kole
1Timothy5:19 Ametaach kataamset agobo poiyo
1Timothy5:20 Kergong' eng' taitap piik tugul icheeget che yaei tengekwogik
1Timothy5:21 Kang'atiin anyun eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
1Timothy5:22 Amegonoor chii age tugul eunek eng' sartaet
1Timothy5:23 Kobooch nguno ko mata iee peek kityo
1Timothy5:24 Taagunotiin tengekwogigap piik alak
1Timothy5:25 Ko uu nooto agine miitei poisyonik che myach che taagunotiin; ak che ma uu chooto koma imugaksei koung'ogis.
1Timothy6:1 Ingoiityi otwogik alak tugul che ratotiin kole nyoljin kiptainikwak teegisto tugul
1Timothy6:2 Ak icheek che tinyei kiptainik che iyanotin
1Timothy6:3 Ngo neeti chii age tugul kaneetisyet ne teer
1Timothy6:4 komeenei
1Timothy6:5 pooryosyegap piik che ki kong'emogis kabwaatutikwak
1Timothy6:6 Ago kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet kobooto yametapkei eng' tuguuk che ki tinyei
1Timothy6:7 amu ki ma kiibu kiy konyo ng'wony
1Timothy6:8 ago ki tinyei amitwogik ak ngoroik; yamech chooto.
1Timothy6:9 Ago icheek che machei koek mogoreek kobutyin yoomseet ak mesteet ak maguutik che chaang' che perberen
1Timothy6:10 Amu chametap silingisyek ko tigityot agenge ne po yaitwogik alak tugul. Kigong'asyigei piik alage kot kometo kayaneet ak ki kotorgei eng' aragenosyek che chaang'.
1Timothy6:11 Ago inyee
1Timothy6:12 Yai lugeet ne myee ne po kayaneet
1Timothy6:13 Kang'atiin anyun eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
1Timothy6:14 ale iriip ng'atuutyet amanyoor peruut
1Timothy6:15 ne tuun iboortoi eng' peetuusyekyik
1Timothy6:16 ne tinyei ineegei saboondap koigeny
1Timothy6:17 Ng'at mogoreek che po peetuusyechu
1Timothy6:18 ile koyai ne myee
1Timothy6:19 kogonorchigei lumdaet ne myee
1Timothy6:20 Ee
1Timothy6:21 ne kigosup alage ak ki kochiliil eng' kayaneet. Ingotep myeeindo kobooten.
2Timothy1:1 Paulo
2Timothy1:2 asirchini Timoteo
2Timothy1:3 Amwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi
2Timothy1:4 atinye emosto ageerin
2Timothy1:5 ye kingi pwatwa kayaneet ne ma tinyei keniisyet ne mi eng' inyee; ne ki menyei korook eng' ingogo Lois
2Timothy1:6 Abwaatun anyun amu niito ale iywokyi konunet ne po Kamuktaindet
2Timothy1:7 Amu ki ma koonech Kamuktaindet muguleldap nyogoryet
2Timothy1:8 Amelilanji anyun paornateetap Kiptaiyandennyo
2Timothy1:9 ne kisarwech ak koguurech eng' kuurseet ne tiliil
2Timothy1:10 ago kagotook nguno eng' tagunetap Yetindennyo Kristo Jeso
2Timothy1:11 ki kindea agobo nooto aek amdoindet
2Timothy1:12 Anyooru anyun nyalilwogichu ak icheek agobo nooto: ago ma lilani; amu angen ineendet ne ki ayan
2Timothy1:13 Nam itoondap ng'aleek che po iman che ki igasena
2Timothy1:14 Riip eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne menyei eng' acheek
2Timothy1:15 Ingen ni ile
2Timothy1:16 Ingogoochi Kiptaiyat rireenet kootap Onesiporo: amu kitoreta konyil che chaang'
2Timothy1:17 ago
2Timothy1:18 ingogoochi Kiptaiyat ineendet konyoor rireenet ne po Kiptaiyat eng' peetuunooto! Ak ingen komyee ole tee poisyet ne ki yai eng' Epheso.
2Timothy2:1 Kimitu anyun
2Timothy2:2 Ak tuguuk che ki igasena eng' kwenutap paorinik che chaang'
2Timothy2:3 Nam yamdaet ne po nyalilda
2Timothy2:4 Ma mi asigarindet
2Timothy2:5 Ak ngot koyai chii agine kabeletapkei eng' ureryosyek
2Timothy2:6 Nyoljin kabatindet ne yaei poisyet ne uui
2Timothy2:7 Ruchi komyee kiit ne amwae; amu koonin Kiptaiyat kaguiyet eng' tuguuk tugul.
2Timothy2:8 Ibwaat Jeso Kristo
2Timothy2:9 ne anyoorunee nyalilda
2Timothy2:10 Nooto anyun amuitoi eng' tuguuk tugul amu che ki kilewen
2Timothy2:11 Po iman ng'olyoondoni: Amu ngo kigebegu kobooto ineendet
2Timothy2:12 ngemuite
2Timothy2:13 ngo ma ki po iman
2Timothy2:14 Ibwaatyi icheek tuguuchuuto
2Timothy2:15 Igiilgei ibartegei ile ki koyanun Kamuktaindet iegu kiboityot ne manyol kolilaan
2Timothy2:16 Istoegei ng'aleek che ma namegei ak ooreetap Kamuktaindet: amu tesoksei koyaagitu kosiir eng' yaityet
2Timothy2:17 ak amei ng'olyoonnywa ko uu chepsergechet: eng' icheek ko Humenayo ak Pileto;
2Timothy2:18 piik che ki kochiliil eng' imanit
2Timothy2:19 Ago tononi lumeiywot ne kiim ne po Kamuktaindet
2Timothy2:20 Ago eng' koot ne oo koma mi tereenigap thahabu ak fedha kityo
2Timothy2:21 Ngo tiliilgei anyun chii eng' tuguuchuuto
2Timothy2:22 Ago mwee maguutik che po neranik
2Timothy2:23 Ago eesye teebutik che perberen che ma punu kaneetisyet
2Timothy2:24 Ama nyoljin otwogindetap Kiptaiyat koyai pooryeet
2Timothy2:25 ne kere kong' eng' mutyonet icheek che kirindoi; tamangap kogoochi Kamuktaindet icheek siguunet ne po naetap imanit
2Timothy2:26 ak kosargei icheek komang'une mesteetap chesawilyet
2Timothy3:1 Ago nai ni ile pwoonei eng' peetuusyek che po let egosyek che pichiien.
2Timothy3:2 Amu egu piik che chamegei icheegei
2Timothy3:3 che ma tinyei chamyet
2Timothy3:4 ng'wektoik
2Timothy3:5 che tinyei kergeindap kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet
2Timothy3:6 Amu pitunee chuuto che itoti kooriik
2Timothy3:7 Che ineetegei kotugul
2Timothy3:8 Ak ko uu Janne ak Jambre
2Timothy3:9 Ago matesei tai: amu taagu perberindanywa eng' piik tugul
2Timothy3:10 Ago ki isup inyee kaneetisyennyu
2Timothy3:11 usiisyosyek
2Timothy3:12 Ee
2Timothy3:13 Ago tesoksei kiptengeginik ak keniik eng' yaityet
2Timothy3:14 Ago tebi inyee eng' tuguuk che ki ineetkei
2Timothy3:15 ak kobooch ko ii lakwa ko ki ingen siruutik che tiliileen che imuuchi kong'omitin agoi yetunet eng' kayaneet ne miitei eng' Kristo Jeso.
2Timothy3:16 Punu kabuusetap Kamuktaindet siruutyet age tugul
2Timothy3:17 si kobiit koek chiitap Kamuktaindet
2Timothy4:1 Kang'atiin anyun eng' taitap Kamuktaindet
2Timothy4:2 amde ng'olyoot; choboge eng' peetuut ne nyolu
2Timothy4:3 Amu nyoonei peetuut ne ma tuun epchin iit agot kitigin kaneetisyet ne po imanit; ago
2Timothy4:4 ak koeesyo koepchi iit imanit
2Timothy4:5 Ago riipkei inyee eng' tuguuk tugul
2Timothy4:6 Amu kigoitoa nguno
2Timothy4:7 Ki ayai lugeet ne myee
2Timothy4:8 kobooch nguno ko kagegonorwo kuutweet ne po imanda
2Timothy4:9 Igiilgei ak inyonja ko neegit:
2Timothy4:10 amu ki kobagakta Dema
2Timothy4:11 Luka ineegei ne mi kobooto. Imutu Mariko
2Timothy4:12 Ago ki ayookte Tukiko kwo Epheso.
2Timothy4:13 Ye inyoo iibu sumet ak bukuisyek
2Timothy4:14 Ki yaiywo ne ya miising' Aleksanda
2Timothy4:15 riibegei ineendet; amu ki kirinda ng'aleekyok miising' kot.
2Timothy4:16 Ma piit chii ne kitoreta eng' waluunennyu ne po tai; ki pagaakta tugul: amat kiityi icheek ng'olyoondoniito.
2Timothy4:17 Ago ki tonon Kiptaiyat kobooto
2Timothy4:18 Sarwo Kiptaiyat eng' poisyet age tugul ne ya
2Timothy4:19 Igat Priska ak Aquila
2Timothy4:20 Ki tebi Erasto eng' Korinto: ago ki abagaach Tropimo eng' Mileto komyani.
2Timothy4:21 Igiilgei nyoo kotom koit peetuusyek che po kaitityet. Igatin Eubulo
2Timothy4:22 Ingotep Kiptaiyat kobooto saboondang'ung'. Ingotep myeeindo kobootok.
Titus1:1 Paulo
Titus1:2 eng' kamang'unet ne po saboondap koigeny
Titus1:3 ago ki ng'aany ng'olyoondennyi eng' peetuusyekyik eng' amdaet
Titus1:4 asirchini Tito
Titus1:5 Ki abagaakteen eng' Krete amu ng'olyoondoni
Titus1:6 ngot komi chii age tugul ne ma tinyei leluut
Titus1:7 Amu kanyolji riibindetap kaniset koek chii ne ma tinyei leluut
Titus1:8 ago ne taachei toek
Titus1:9 ne namei ng'olyoot ne kiyani ko uu ole teptoi kaneetisyet
Titus1:10 Amu mi piik che chaang' che ma kase iit
Titus1:11 che kanyool keger kutusweekwak; che itarng'aanyi ko komugul
Titus1:12 Ki le age eng' icheek
Titus1:13 Po iman paornataniito. Kergong' anyun eng' kimnateet amu nooto
Titus1:14 ama epchin iit atindonigap Yahudik
Titus1:15 Tiliileen tuguuk tugul eng' icheek che tiliileen: ago ma mi kiy ne tiliil eng' icheeget che murwonen che ma iyanotin; ago murwonen nautikwak ak kabwaatutikwak.
Titus1:16 Mwaei kole ingen Kamuktaindet; ago eesyoi ineendet eng' poisyonikwak
Titus2:1 Ago ng'alaal inyee agobo ng'aleek che nyoljin kaneetisyet ne po iman:
Titus2:2 si koriipkei poisyek che kagoeegitu
Titus2:3 ko uu nooto chebyosok che kagoeegitu
Titus2:4 si kobiit koneet osotik che mengeechen kocham manong'otaikwak
Titus2:5 koek che pou kabwaatutikwak
Titus2:6 iteechi neranik ak icheek koek che pou kabwaatutikwak;
Titus2:7 ibartegei inyeendet eng' tuguuk tugul iegu kaboorunet ne po poisyonik che myachen; eng' kaneetisyeng'ung' ibarte atebeet ne ma ng'emaksei
Titus2:8 ng'aleek che po iman
Titus2:9 Ingogas iit otwogik kiptainikwak
Titus2:10 amaek che kooen eun
Titus2:11 Amu ki kotook myeeindap Kamuktaindet
Titus2:12 Ineetech kole keeesye ooreet ne ma tokyingei Kamuktaindet
Titus2:13 kigeni kamang'unet ne iberuurot
Titus2:14 ne ki igoitogei agobo acheek
Titus2:15 Mwaa tuguuchuuto ak iteechi ak iger kong' kobooto pounateet tugul. Amat kosasin chii age tugul.
Titus3:1 Ibwaatyi icheek koming'injigei pounik
Titus3:2 amat komwa kiy ne ya agobo chii age tugul
Titus3:3 Amu ki kiberberen agacheek keny
Titus3:4 Ago ye kingo took talasyetap Kamuktaindet Yetindennyo
Titus3:5 kosarwech
Titus3:6 ne kiroong'wech eng' aiyebindo eng' Jeso Kristo Yetindennyo;
Titus3:7 si
Titus3:8 Po iman ng'olyoondoni
Titus3:9 ago istoegei teebutik che perber
Titus3:10 Eesye chiito ne ibu toiyet ye kagitigon ne po tai ak ne po aeng';
Titus3:11 ingen ile chiito ne uu nooto ko ki komaasta
Titus3:12 Ye tuun kayogu Artema
Titus3:13 Igiilgei imonorsechi eng' pandanywa Sena ng'amotyotap ng'atuutik ak Apolo
Titus3:14 Ak ingoneetkei piikyok ak icheek koyai poisyonik che myachen kotugul
Titus3:15 Igatin tugul che kemi tugul. Igat icheek che chamech eng' kayaneet. Ingotep myeeindo kobootok okweek tugul.
Philemon1:1 Paulo
Philemon1:2 ak Apia chepkamennyo
Philemon1:3 Ingotep myeeindo kobootok ak kaalyeet
Philemon1:4 Amwachini Kamuktaindet nenyu kongoi kotugul
Philemon1:5 agase agobo chamyeng'ung'
Philemon1:6 Asaae ale si koek yamdaetap kayaneng'ung' ne poisye komyee
Philemon1:7 Amu ki atinye poiboiyet ne oo ak kagaigaet eng' chamyeng'ung'
Philemon1:8 Nooto anyun
Philemon1:9 ago
Philemon1:10 Asoomin miising' agobo lakweennyu Onesmus
Philemon1:11 Eng' tai ko ki ma kotoretin ineendet eng' kiy
Philemon1:12 Kaaweegun ineendet ne muguleldanyu.
Philemon1:13 Ki tamache ale araany ketebi tuwai
Philemon1:14 ago ma amach ayai kiy kotom agas kiit ne ibwaati; si ma pun myeeindong'ung' torchinet
Philemon1:15 Amu abeere ki ibesyenengei eng' peetuusyek che matya
Philemon1:16 ma ko uu otwogin kogeny ago kogosiir otwogin
Philemon1:17 Nooto anyun ngiita ile ki agenge eng' poisyet
Philemon1:18 Ago ngo ki koyaun kiy ne ya
Philemon1:19 aneendet Paulo ne kasir eng' eunnyu
Philemon1:20 Ee
Philemon1:21 Kasirun amu amang'u kaseng'ung' po iit
Philemon1:22 Ago kobooto chooto ichobwa ole anyoo arue: amu amang'u ale eng' saautikwok amuuchi keeweekwo Anyoonjok.
Philemon1:23 Igatin Epapra ne ki kimonjororinik tuwai
Philemon1:24 ko uu nooto Mariko
Philemon1:25 Ingotep myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo kobooto saboonwekwok. Amen.
Hebrews1:1 Kamuktaindet
Hebrews1:2 ko ne kagong'alaalwech eng' peetuusyechu po let eng' Weeriinnyi
Hebrews1:3 ineendet ko kakweng'eetap liilindanyi
Hebrews1:4 Ko kagoek ne karaaran kosiir malaikaisyek
Hebrews1:5 Amu ki mwachi malaikaisyek ngorcho koleenji
Hebrews1:6 Ak ye imut kogeny taita konyo ng'wony komwa kole
Hebrews1:7 Ak ki mwa agobo malaikaisyek kole
Hebrews1:8 Ago ki mwa agobo Weeriit kole
Hebrews1:9 Ichame imanda ak iweche tengekto; eng' nooto anyun
Hebrews1:10 Ak kogeny
Hebrews1:11 petos chooto
Hebrews1:12 ak imamani ko uu ngoryeet ne tabanu parak
Hebrews1:13 Tos ki mwachi malaikaisyek ngorcho eng' peetuut age
Hebrews1:14 Tos malakaisyek tugul koma saboonwek che mi poisyet
Hebrews2:1 Eng' nooto anyun kanyool kenam miising' kosiir tuguuchooto ki kegas
Hebrews2:2 Amu ngo tononot ng'olyoot ne ki kimwau eng' malaikaisyek ak kigonyoor pistoet age tugul ak ngelelnateet melekto ne kageerchinet ne po imanda;
Hebrews2:3 kechilildoi ano anyun
Hebrews2:4 ak kibaoryani agine Kamuktaindet kobooto icheeget
Hebrews2:5 Amu ma igoochi malaikaisyek koboi ng'wonyut ne nyoonei
Hebrews2:6 Ago paoryani chiito age eng' komosta age
Hebrews2:7 Ki iyai ineendet koming'init kitigin eng' malaikaisyek; Ilaakyini ineendet kuutweetap toroornatet ak teegisto
Hebrews2:8 Ki inde tuguuk tugul kogas iit eng' keldebesaigap keelyekyik. Eng' nooto anyun ko uu ye ki inde tuguuk tugul kogas iit ineendet
Hebrews2:9 Ago kigeere ineendet ne ki kiyai koming'init kitigin eng' malaikaisyek
Hebrews2:10 Amu kinyolji ineendet
Hebrews2:11 Amu ineendet ne itiliilisyei ak icheek che kitiliili kobunu agenge: eng' nooto anyun koma keerei ineendet kalilanet koguure icheek che kitupche
Hebrews2:12 kole
Hebrews2:13 Ak kogeny
Hebrews2:14 Amu yamdoi anyun lagok korotiik ak poorto
Hebrews2:15 si kobiit kotyach icheek tugul che ki ratotiin peetuusyekwak tugul eng' kaiyweisyetap meet.
Hebrews2:16 Amu iman ma namei itoondap malaikaisyek
Hebrews2:17 Eng' nooto anyun kinyolji keyai ineendet eng' tuguuk tugul kogergeit ak tupchosyekyik
Hebrews2:18 Amu ko uu ye kinyalil ineendet ye ki kiyomei
Hebrews3:1 Nooto anyun
Hebrews3:2 ne ki ek ne kiyani eng' ineendet ne ki lewen
Hebrews3:3 Amu ki kiit keele nyoljin toroornatet ne oo kosiir Musa
Hebrews3:4 Amu teechei chiito koot age tugul; ago ineendet ne kiteechei tuguuk tugul ko Kamuktaindet.
Hebrews3:5 Ak ki ek Musa iman ne kiyani eng' kootap Kamuktaindet tugul ko uu kiboityot
Hebrews3:6 ago Kristo ko uu weeriit
Hebrews3:7 Nooto anyun
Hebrews3:8 Ko matouiit mugulelwekwok
Hebrews3:9 Ye kiyoma kwanisyekwok kotyema
Hebrews3:10 Eng' nooto anyun ki anereekyi ibini
Hebrews3:11 Ko uu ye ki ayosye eng' nereegekyuk ale
Hebrews3:12 Oriipkei anyun che kitupche
Hebrews3:13 ago oteechigei peetuut age tugul
Hebrews3:14 amu kigeegu yamdoigap Kristo
Hebrews3:15 ye ta kemwaei keele
Hebrews3:16 Amu ng'oo che kitagis ye kingo kas? Tos ma icheek tugul che ki mang'une Misiri eng' Musa?
Hebrews3:17 Ak ng'oo che ki nereekyi ineendet kenyiisyek artam? Tos ma icheeget che kichalwogenso
Hebrews3:18 Ak ng'oo che ki iyasyechi ineendet kole ma koi iit kamuung'ennyi
Hebrews3:19 Kigeere anyun keele ki ma imuuch icheek koit amu ma iyan.
Hebrews4:1 Ongiywei anyun yo ta komi arorutyet ne keite kamuung'ennyi
Hebrews4:2 Amu ki kiamwech iman logoiywek che myach
Hebrews4:3 Amu acheek che ki kiyan keite kamuung'onooto; ko uu ye ki komwa ineendet kole
Hebrews4:4 Amu ki komwa ko uu ni eng' komosta age agobo peetuutap tisap kole
Hebrews4:5 ak eng' yu agine komwa kole
Hebrews4:6 Eng' nooto anyun amu miitei poroindo ne po alak koit olooto
Hebrews4:7 kamwa kogeny agobo peetuut age
Hebrews4:8 Amu nda kiga kogoochi Joshua icheek kamuung'et
Hebrews4:9 Ng'etunoot anyun kamuung'eetap sabato agobo piigap Kamuktaindet.
Hebrews4:10 Amu ineendet ne kagoit kamuung'eetap Kamuktaindet ko kagomuuny eng' poisyonikyik
Hebrews4:11 Ongigiilgei anyun si keit kamuung'onooto
Hebrews4:12 Amu sabei ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet
Hebrews4:13 Ama mi kiy age tugul ne ki kiyai ne ma taagu eng' tainnyi: ago ng'ang'otin ak yaatatin tuguuk tugul eng' taitap koonyek che po ineendet ne tuun kitetyini atebosyekyok.
Hebrews4:14 Amu ki tinyei tisiindet ne oo ne kigochut kipsengwet
Hebrews4:15 Amu ma ki tinyei tisiindet ne oo ne ma imuuchi kogaswech nyalulnatosyekyok; ago ne ki kiyoom ko uu acheek eng' tuguuk tugul
Hebrews4:16 Ongeriikyi anyun ng'echereet ne po myeeindo eng' nyiganateet
Hebrews5:1 Amu tisiindet age tugul ne oo
Hebrews5:2 ineendet ne imuuchi koriiree kimanainik ak che mastoi

Hebrews5:4 Ama mi chii ne igoochingei ineegei teegisi
Hebrews5:5 Ko uu nooto anyun

Hebrews5:7 Ne ki eng' peetuusyek che kimi eng' poorto

Hebrews5:9 ak kingo kageyai koek ne ititaat
Hebrews5:10 ne kiguure Kamuktaindet tisiindet ne oo ko uu kiit ne ki uu Melkisedek.

Hebrews5:12 Amu eng' ye kita nyolu oegu kaneetik
Hebrews5:13 Amu age tugul ne luei cheego kotom konai koboisyee komyee ng'olyootap imanda; amu manyurut ineendet.
Hebrews5:14 Ago po piik che eecheen amitwogik che uueen
Hebrews6:1 Nooto anyun ongebagaakte mata ongeng'alaale ng'aleek che po tai che po Kristo
Hebrews6:2 ne po kaneetisyetap kabatisanosyek

Hebrews6:4 Amu eng' icheek che kisip kigoochi lapkeiyet ak kochamcham konunet ne po kipsengwet
Hebrews6:5 ak kochamcham ng'olyoot ne myee ne po Kamuktaindet
Hebrews6:6 ak kochuchuigei anyun

Hebrews6:8 ago ngo iiyo katook che toorei piich ak che rutei piich

Hebrews6:10 amu Kamuktaindet

Hebrews6:19 ne ki tinyei ne uu nangetap saboondo

Hebrews7:1 Amu Melkisedeki-niito
Hebrews7:2 ne kipchechi agine Abraham kebebertap taman ne po tugul ne ye kiweech
Hebrews7:3 ne ma tinyei kwanda
Hebrews7:4 Obwaat anyun ole kite ooindap chiichi
Hebrews7:5 Ak tinyei iman weeriitap Lawi che namei poisyetap tisiisyet
Hebrews7:6 ago ki nam kebeberwegap taman eng' Abraham ineendet ne ki ma ki itito icheek eng' ooreenywa
Hebrews7:7 Ago ne ma mi tiyet age tugul
Hebrews7:8 Ak eng' yu kotaachei piik che pegu kebeberwegap taman; ago eng' olooto
Hebrews7:9 Ak
Hebrews7:10 amu kita komi poortap kwandanyi
Hebrews7:11 Ak nda ki mi kagesunatetapkei eng' tiseinatetap Lawiik (amu ki nyoorunee yooto piik Ng'atuutyet)
Hebrews7:12 Amu ngot kowalak tiseinateet
Hebrews7:13 Amu ineendet ne kimwaitae tuguuchu ko po pororyet age
Hebrews7:14 Amu taagu keele ki punu Kiptaiyandennyo ooreetap Judah; pororyet ne ki ma mwaitae Musa ng'olyoo age tugul eng' ng'aleegap tisiik.
Hebrews7:15 Ak taagu komyee kosiir
Hebrews7:16 ne ki kiyai
Hebrews7:17 amu kibaoryani keele
Hebrews7:18 Amu miitei metoet ne po ng'atuutyet ne kiga kindoune
Hebrews7:19 (amu ma yai Ng'atuutyet kiy koek ne ititaat)
Hebrews7:20 Ama yaaksei ama kiyasyo
Hebrews7:21 (amu ki kiyai icheek koek tisiik ama mi kayasyoet eng' ineendet ne mwaei agobo ineendet kole
Hebrews7:22 Ko uu nooto anyun ki ek Jeso tononjinindet ne po arorutyet ne myee kosiir.
Hebrews7:23 Ago icheeget ko ki kiyai koek tisiik ko ki chaang' eng' koitet
Hebrews7:24 Ago amu tebyei ineendet koigeny
Hebrews7:25 Eng' nooto anyun komuuchi kogeny kosar agoi kasuldaet icheek che pwaanjin Kamuktaindet eng' ineendet
Hebrews7:26 Amu nyoljinech tisiindet ne oo ne uu ni
Hebrews7:27 ne ma nyoljin kogoito tiseiywek peetuut age tugul
Hebrews7:28 Amu indoi Ng'atuutyet piik che nyalulyotin koek tisiik che eecheen; ago ng'olyootap kayasyoet
Hebrews8:1 Nguno anyun
Hebrews8:2 kiboityot ne poisye eng' ole-tiliil ne emait ne po iman
Hebrews8:3 Amu kindoi tisiindet age tugul ne oo si kogoitoi kagoochinoik ak tiseiywek: nooto anyun konyolu kotinyei agine tisiindoni kiit ne igoitoi.
Hebrews8:4 Nda mi ng'wony
Hebrews8:5 che poisyei eng' karogutyet ak urwetap tuguuk che po kipsengwet
Hebrews8:6 Ago kagosich nguno poisyet ne myee kosiir
Hebrews8:7 Amu nda ki ma ko rartaat arorutyet ne po tai
Hebrews8:8 Amu ye kingo nyoorchi lelutik icheek
Hebrews8:9 Ma ko uu kayomiset ne ki kiyomiske ak kwanisyekwak eng' peetuut ne ki anam eunekwak si amut komong' eng' emetap Misiri; amu ki ma koteptoi kayomisennyu
Hebrews8:10 Amu ni kayomiset ne tuun kiyomisyinige ak kootap Israel. Ye ibata peetuusyechooto
Hebrews8:11 Amu koneeti chii tugul chiitap kokwennyi
Hebrews8:12 Amu tuun ariiree icheek amu tengekwogikwak
Hebrews8:13 Amu ki mwa kole
Hebrews9:1 Nooto anyun
Hebrews9:2 Amu kiga kichop emait; ne po tai ko ole ki mi keldap tait
Hebrews9:3 Ak ki ngesiir angeet ne po aeng'
Hebrews9:4 ne tinyei kapkorosutap thahabu
Hebrews9:5 ak ki mi paragunnyi kerubisyegap liilindo che ki iuuri kerwetap rireenet; tuguuk che ma kimuuchi keng'alaale nguno agenge agenge.
Hebrews9:6 Ak kingo kagechop anyun tuguuchuuto ko uu nooto
Hebrews9:7 ago
Hebrews9:8 Ibooru Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' ng'olyoondoni kole
Hebrews9:9 ne kalewenetap peetuusyechu; ki kigoitoi eng' kalewenonooto agine kagoochinoik ak tiseiywek
Hebrews9:10 amu (kobooto amitwogik ak che kieei ak kaunsosyek che teerchiin) chooto ko ng'atuutik che po poorto kityo
Hebrews9:11 Ago Kristo
Hebrews9:12 ama eng' korotiigap kwesik ak moek
Hebrews9:13 Amu ngot kotiliili agoi kaunetap poorto korotiigap kwesik ak kiruugik
Hebrews9:14 kotiliili anyun ne tya korotiigap Kristo
Hebrews9:15 Ak amu ng'olyoondoniito ineendet ko katuiyoindetap kayomiset ne leel
Hebrews9:16 Amu ole miitei arorutyet ne po nametap tuguuk ko kanyool komiitei meetap ineendet ne kiyaei.
Hebrews9:17 Amu tinyei arorutyet kimnateet ye kabiit meet: tos kiim kota kosabei ineendet ne kiyaei?
Hebrews9:18 Eng' nooto anyun agot arorutyet ne po tai
Hebrews9:19 Amu ye kingo kagomwachi Musa piik tugul kayomiset age tugul ko uu eng' Ng'atuutyet
Hebrews9:20 komwaei kole
Hebrews9:21 Ak koisee kogeny korotiik emait kobooto tuguuk che kiboisyee.
Hebrews9:22 Ak eng' Ng'atuutyet ko uu keele
Hebrews9:23 Kinyolu anyun kitiliil itoonwegap tuguuk che po kipsengwet eng' chooto; ago kitiliile tuguuk che po kipsengwet tiseiywek che myach kosiir chuuto.
Hebrews9:24 Amu ki ma mong'ji Kristo ole-tiliil ole ki kiyae eunek
Hebrews9:25 ma si kogoitogei konyil che chaang': ko uu ye wendi tisiindet ne oo ole-tiliil eng' kenyiit age tugul koibei korotiik che ma chechiik;
Hebrews9:26 amu nda ki uu nooto anyun ta kinyooljin konyalil konyil che chaang' kobooch ngelumda ng'wony; ago kagong'ang'ak nguno konyil agenge eng' kagesunetap kenyiisyek si kobiit koisto tengekto eng' tiseiywot ne ki ineendet.
Hebrews9:27 Ak ko uu ye ki king'at agobo piik kobek konyil agenge
Hebrews9:28 ko uu nooto Kristo agine
Hebrews10:1 Amu tinyei Ng'atuutyet urwetap tuguuk che myachen che pwoonei
Hebrews10:2 Nda ki uu nooto
Hebrews10:3 Ago eng' tiseiywechooto komiitei kabwaatetap tengekwogik kenyiit age tugul.
Hebrews10:4 Amu ma imugaksei eng' korotiigap kiruugik ak kwesik konem tengekwogik.
Hebrews10:5 Eng' nooto anyun ye kingo nyo Kristo ng'wony
Hebrews10:6 Ki ma ibaibaitu eng' kagoochinoik che kibeelei komugul ak che po tengekwogik:
Hebrews10:7 Amwa anyun ale
Hebrews10:8 Mwaei ng'aleechu mi meto yu kole
Hebrews10:9 yeityo komwa anyun ineendet kole
Hebrews10:10 Ki kitiliilech anyun eng' ma ko nooto eng' kagoitoetap poortap Jeso Kristo konyil agenge ak koyam.
Hebrews10:11 Ak tononi iman tisiindet age tugul eng' peetuut age tugul koboisyei ak kogoitoi konyil che chaang' tiseiywechooto
Hebrews10:12 ago tisiindoni
Hebrews10:13 koogeni kobooch yooto agoi keyai puunikyik koek ng'echereetap keelyekyik.
Hebrews10:14 Amu ki koyai koek che ititaatiin agoi koigeny eng' kagoitoet agenge icheek che ki kitiliil.
Hebrews10:15 Ak paoryanjinech agine Kabuuset ne Tiliil: amu kingo pata komwa kole
Hebrews10:16 Ni kayomiset ne tuun kiyomisyinige ak icheek Ye ibata peetuusyechooto
Hebrews10:17 Ama abwaati chalwogikwak ak tengekwogikwak kogeny.
Hebrews10:18 Ye miitei anyun nyoetap kaat ne po chuuto
Hebrews10:19 Ko uu nooto anyun
Hebrews10:20 eng' ooreet ne leel ak kosabei
Hebrews10:21 ak amu ki tinyei tisiindet ne oo ne pou kootap Kamuktaindet;
Hebrews10:22 ongeriikte anyun eng' muguleldo ne po iman eng' nyiietap kayaneet
Hebrews10:23 ongenam miising' ng'ang'eetap kamang'unennyo si mawalak; amu iman ineendet ne ki iaroru:
Hebrews10:24 Ak ongibwaatkei acheegei eng' acheegei ki kimitkei eng' chamyet ak poisyosyek che myach;
Hebrews10:25 ama kibagaaktoi kituiyegei acheegei eng' acheegei
Hebrews10:26 Amu ngot kekwetyini keyae tengek ko kagetaach naetap imanit
Hebrews10:27 ago kagenet ne po kirwooget eng' kaiyweisyet
Hebrews10:28 Meei chiito ne kasas Ng'atuutyetap Musa koma mi rireenet
Hebrews10:29 obwaatitoi ano okweek
Hebrews10:30 Amu kingen ineendet ne ki komwa kole
Hebrews10:31 Kiit ne pichiy kot kibutyi eunegap Kamuktaindet ne sabei.
Hebrews10:32 Ago obwaat peetuusyek che po keny
Hebrews10:33 ye ki oegu
Hebrews10:34 Amu ki oriree icheek che ki ratotiin
Hebrews10:35 Amowiirte anyun nyiganateng'wong'
Hebrews10:36 Amu nyolu otinye muitaet
Hebrews10:37 Amu ta komi kitigin miising'
Hebrews10:38 Ago sabei nenyu ne po imanda eng' kayaneet
Hebrews10:39 Ago acheek koma ki po icheek che ichuchuchegei kobendi luseet: ago ki po icheek che iyani kot koit saruunetap saboondo.
Hebrews11:1 Nooto anyun kayaneet ko naetap tuguuk che kimang'u
Hebrews11:2 Amu ki kibaoryanjine nooto poisyek.
Hebrews11:3 Kinae eng' kayaneet keele ki kiyai ng'wonyusyek eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet
Hebrews11:4 Ki igoochi Abel Kamuktaindet eng' kayaneet tiseiywot ne myee kosiir ne po Kain
Hebrews11:5 Ki kimut Enok eng' kayaneet si ma keer meet; ak ki mata kogeer chii ineendet
Hebrews11:6 ak ngo ma mi kayaneet koma imugaksei kibaibai ineendet: amu ineendet ne riikyin Kamuktaindet konyaaljin koyan kole mi ineendet
Hebrews11:7 Ki yai Noah moinget eng' kayaneet
Hebrews11:8 Ki kas iit Abraham eng' kayaneet ye ki ngeguur
Hebrews11:9 Ki ek eng' kayaneet kiprutoiyot eng' emetap arorutyet
Hebrews11:10 amu ki igeni nganaseet ne tinyei lumeiywek
Hebrews11:11 Ki sich agot Sara agine kimnateet eng' kayaneet komanach ko kagosiirto kenyiisyekyik
Hebrews11:12 nooto anyun ki kisich eng' agenge
Hebrews11:13 Ki pek chuuto tugul eng' kayaneet
Hebrews11:14 Amu icheek che mwaei tuguuk che uu chooto kobooru kole cheeng'ei emet ne nenywa.
Hebrews11:15 Ak nda kiga ibwaat iman emoni ki mang'une
Hebrews11:16 Ago machei kot nguno emet ne karaaran kosiir nooto
Hebrews11:17 Kingo kagetyem Abraham
Hebrews11:18 one kiga kemwachi keleenji
Hebrews11:19 koiit kole imuuchi Kamuktaindet kong'eet agot eng' che ki kobek
Hebrews11:20 Ki iberuur Isak eng' kayaneet Jakobo ak Esau
Hebrews11:21 Ki iberuur Jakobo eng' kayaneet
Hebrews11:22 Ki mwa Joseph eng' kayaneet agobo mandaetap piigap Israel ye ki neegit kome; ak kogoon ng'atuutyet agobo kawekyik.
Hebrews11:23 Ki uny sigiikyik Musa eng' kayaneet eng' arawek somok kingo kagesich
Hebrews11:24 Ki eesyo Musa eng' kayaneet
Hebrews11:25 kolewen keyachi ne ya kobooto piigap Kamuktaindet
Hebrews11:26 koiit teweernateet ne kiteweeri Kristo kole mogornatosyek che eecheen kosiir konoraik che po Misiri: amu ki igeni melekto.
Hebrews11:27 Ki pagaakta Misiri eng' kayaneet
Hebrews11:28 Ki yai paska eng' kayaneet
Hebrews11:29 Kilandae “Araraita ne piriir” eng' kayaneet ko uu ye punei emet ne yaamaat; ak ye kileen kotyem Misiriik koyai ko uu nooto kelugui.
Hebrews11:30 Eng' kayaneet kogilulyo irimoigap Jeriko
Hebrews11:31 Eng' kayaneet koma me chepkugoniot Rahab kobooto icheek che kingelelik
Hebrews11:32 Ara nee anyun age neta amwae? Amu mayama poroindo ngot amwa agobo Gideon
Hebrews11:33 che ki iterteer laitornatosyek eng' kayaneet
Hebrews11:34 ki imis kimnateet ne po maat
Hebrews11:35 Kitaach kwonyiik piikwak che kiga kobek
Hebrews11:36 ak ki kityem alak eng' chombilet
Hebrews11:37 ki kilach eng' koik
Hebrews11:38 (che ki ma konyaaljin ng'wony icheek)
Hebrews11:39 Ak kingo kagosich chuuto tugul paornateet ne ki kibaoryanji amu kayanennywa
Hebrews11:40 amu kisip kochobwech Kamuktaindet kiit ne myee kosiir
Hebrews12:1 Nooto anyun
Hebrews12:2 kegeere Jeso ne kandoindet ak ko kawong'unindet ne po kayaneet
Hebrews12:3 Obwaat miising' ineendet ne kimuita eng' kirindaetapkei ne po kiptengeginik agobo ineendet
Hebrews12:4 Tom oyai lugeet kot kotumdagei korotiik
Hebrews12:5 ak ki outye kateunet
Hebrews12:6 Amu ineendet ne chamei Kiptaiyat
Hebrews12:7 Omuite eng' kergong'yetne koonook yaiywok Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto ko uu ye yachin weeriikyik; ng'oo weeriit ne ma keregong' kwanda?
Hebrews12:8 Ago ngot ko motinye katigonet
Hebrews12:9 Ak ki kitinyei kwanisyek che po poorwekyok che ki kereech kong'
Hebrews12:10 Amu ki kerisye kong' icheek peetuusyek che ng'ering' ko uu ye kigeerei kole myee; ago ineendet
Hebrews12:11 Ma taagu kereetap kong' tugul keele po poiboiyet eng' peetuunnyi; ago po arageneet: ago ye ibata koiichi icheeget che kinetegei nooto
Hebrews12:12 Eng' nooto anyun onamji parak eunek che nyalulyotin
Hebrews12:13 ak oyachi keelyekwok ortinwek che lititen
Hebrews12:14 Ogiilgei otebi eng' kaalyeet kobooto piik tugul
Hebrews12:15 ogeer si ma rartae chii myeeindap Kamuktaindet; si ma piit tigityotap ng'wanindo ak konyalilis
Hebrews12:16 si ma piit ne soksei
Hebrews12:17 Amu ongen ole kingo mach eng' let konam kaberuret
Hebrews12:18 Amu ma oit tulweet ne kimuuchi ketwa
Hebrews12:19 ak cheetap iryageet
Hebrews12:20 amu ki ma imuuch komuita eng' ng'olyoondonooto ki king'at keele
Hebrews12:21 ak nooto ki took
Hebrews12:22 ago kaoit okweek tulweetap Zion
Hebrews12:23 ak tuiyetap piik tugul ak kaniset ne po che po tai eng' sigeet che kigesir eng' kipsengwet
Hebrews12:24 ak Jeso katuiyoindetap kayomiset ne leel
Hebrews12:25 Ogeer
Hebrews12:26 ne ki itumdum ng'wony kutinnyi peetuunooto: ago kagoaror anyun nguno
Hebrews12:27 Ago ng'olyoondoniito
Hebrews12:28 Nooto anyun
Hebrews12:29 amu Kamuktaindet nenyo ko maat ne igeesu.
Hebrews13:1 Ingotep ko uu nooto chamyetap che kitupche.
Hebrews13:2 Amoutye oboorchi toek chamyet: amu ki kotaach alak malaikaisyek eng' nooto amaingen.
Hebrews13:3 Obwaat icheek che mi eng' ratisyosyek
Hebrews13:4 Ingogonyit tugul katunisyet
Hebrews13:5 Oegu che ityagatin eng' chametap silingisyek; ingoyamak tuguuk che otinye; amu ki komwa ineendet kole
Hebrews13:6 Nooto anyun kimwae eng' nyiganateet ne myee keele
Hebrews13:7 Obwaat icheek che ki indoiywok
Hebrews13:8 Kergei Jeso Kristo eng' amut ak ra
Hebrews13:9 Amatata ongobeetook kaneetisyosyek che pesyotin che teer: amu myee kolumdaak muguleldo eng' myeeindo; ma eng' amitwogik
Hebrews13:10 Ki tinyei kaptisisyet
Hebrews13:11 Amu poorwegap tyong'ichooto ki ibu tisiindet ne oo korotiikwak kobwa ole-tiliil agobo tengekto
Hebrews13:12 Nooto anyun
Hebrews13:13 Ongebe anyun ole mi ineendet eng' saang'utap ormariich
Hebrews13:14 Amu ma ki tinyei eng' yu nganaseet ne tebyei koigeny
Hebrews13:15 Nooto anyun ongigoochi Kamuktaindet eng' ineendet korosyotap kalasunet kotugul
Hebrews13:16 Oyai che myachen
Hebrews13:17 Ogas iit che indoiywok
Hebrews13:18 Osaa agobo acheek: amu kiyani keele ki tinyei kabwaatet ne myee
Hebrews13:19 Ak asoome miising' kot ale oyai ko uu nooto
Hebrews13:20 Ingoyaak Kamuktaindet ne po kaalyeet
Hebrews13:21 oegu che ochobootiin eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee si oyai magennyi
Hebrews13:22 Ago asoomok miising'
Hebrews13:23 Onai ole ko kityaach tupchennyo Timoteo; ngot konyo ko neegit
Hebrews13:24 Ogat tugul che indoiywok
Hebrews13:25 Ingotep myeeindo kobootok okweek tugul. Amen.
James1:1 Jakobo
James1:2 Tupchosyekyuk
James1:3 ongen ole ibu muitaet tyemetap kayaneng'wong'.
James1:4 Ak ingoek muitaet ne tinyei poisyet ne ititaat
James1:5 Ago ngot kobetyi chii age tugul eng' okweek utaatyet
James1:6 Ago ingosoom eng' kayaneet
James1:7 Amat kobwaat chiichooto kole sichei kiy eng' Kiptaiyat
James1:8 chiitap kabwaatutik aeng'
James1:9 Ago ingobaibait ne tupchet ne ko nyeraat
James1:10 ak ingobaibait mogoryot
James1:11 Amu charu asiista kobooto usoonet ne peelei tuguuk
James1:12 Paibai chiito ne muitoi eng' yoomseet: amu ye kagoterteer
James1:13 Amat komwa chii ye kagiyoom kole kayooma Kamuktaindet. Amu ma yoomei Kamuktaindet yaityet
James1:14 Ago kiyoomei chii tugul
James1:15 ak ye kagomanach mageet ne ya
James1:16 Amat ongegenaak
James1:17 Kagoitoet age tugul ne myee ak konunotyot age tugul ne ititaat ko po parak
James1:18 Ki isichech eng' magennyi eng' ng'olyootap imanit
James1:19 Ongen ng'olyoondoni
James1:20 amu ma yaei nereegegap chii imandap Kamuktaindet.
James1:21 Eng' nooto anyun omete simdo tugul ak chaang'indap yaitwogik
James1:22 Ago oegu che yaei ng'olyoot
James1:23 Amu ngot koek chii age tugul kasindetap ng'olyoot
James1:24 amu keeregei
James1:25 Ago ineendet ne isyachi ng'atuutyet ne ititaat
James1:26 Ngo leen chii tinyei atebeet ne uu ne po kayanik
James1:27 Kayaneet ne tiliil ne ma tinyei murwoonindo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet Kwanda
James2:1 Tupchosyekyuk
James2:2 Ngot konyo chii ole otuiyechini ne tinyei peteiyot ne po thahabu
James2:3 ak ogonyit ineendet ne ilaachi ngoroik che korooron
James2:4 koma obesyegei okweegei
James2:5 Ogaso
James2:6 Ago kaosas kibananiat. Tos ma inyalilok mogoreek
James2:7 Machubei icheek kainet ne po teegisto ne kimwaitaenok?
James2:8 Ago ngot osulde Ng'atuutyetap kaplaitoryat
James2:9 ago ngot otiytiy piik
James2:10 Amu chiito age tugul ne riibei Ng'atuutyet komugul
James2:11 Amu ineendet ne ki mwa kole
James2:12 Omwa ak oyai ko uu piik che tuun kirwookyin eng' ng'atuutyetap katyaknateet.
James2:13 Amu ma tinyei kirwooget rireenetapkei eng' ineendet ne ma iboor rireenetapkei: itorooregei rireenetapkei kogirindoi kirwooget.
James2:14 Kelu nee
James2:15 Ngot komi aach ngor ng'eetap kamenng'ung'
James2:16 ak koleenji icheek age eng' okweek
James2:17 Ko kiit ne uu agine kayaneet
James2:18 Ago imuuchi komwa chiito kole
James2:19 Iyani ile agenge Kamuktaindet; iyae ne myee: iyani ak icheek oik
James2:20 Ago imache inai
James2:21 Ki ma kiityi imanda kwandanyo Abraham eng' poisyonik
James2:22 Igeere ile kibois kayaneet kobooto poisyonikyik
James2:23 ak ki isulda siruutyet ne mwaei koleen
James2:24 Ogeere ole kiityin chii imanda eng' poisyonik
James2:25 Ak ko uu nooto
James2:26 Amu ko uu ye meat poorto ne ma tinyei kabuuset
James3:1 Amat koek che chaang' eng' okweek kaneetik
James3:2 Amu kibutosi acheek tugul eng' tuguuk che chaang'. Ngot koma ibut chii age tugul eng' ng'olyoo
James3:3 Ngot kinde kariik kutusweegap paraisisyek
James3:4 Ogeer melisyek ak icheek
James3:5 Uu nooto agine ng'elyepta
James3:6 Ak ng'elyepta ko maat. Ng'wonyut ne po tengekto eng' kebeberwekyok ko ng'elyepta
James3:7 Amu kibaei tyong'ik alak tugul
James3:8 ago ma imuuchi chii koboi ng'elyepta: yaityet ne ma pounaksei
James3:9 Kilasune nooto Kiptaiyat ak ko Kwanda: ak kichube piik
James3:10 punu kutit agenge kaberuret ak chubisyet. Che kitupche
James3:11 Tos kutune konda agenge peek che anyiny ak che ng'woneen?
James3:12 Che kitupche
James3:13 Ng'oo ne utaat eng' okweek ak koguitos? Ingobarta poisyonikyik eng' atebeet ne myee eng' kaming'inetapkei ne po ng'omnateet.
James3:14 Ago ngot otinye ng'etkonda ne ng'waan ak toiyet eng' mugulelwekwok
James3:15 Ma punu parak utaatyoni po ng'wony
James3:16 Amu ole miitei ng'etkonda ak toiyet
James3:17 Ago utaatyet ne punu parak ko ne tai ko tiliil
James3:18 Ak kegolei logoegap imanda eng' kaalyeet agobo icheek che yaei kaalyeet.
James4:1 Punu ano lugoosyek ak pooryosyek eng' kwenung'wong'? Ma punu maguutikwok che poortos eng' kebeberwekwok?
James4:2 Ogase myat
James4:3 Osoome
James4:4 Okweek che oibegei
James4:5 Anan obwaati ole ng'alaali puch siruutik
James4:6 Ago koonu myeeindo ne tesat. Leen anyun
James4:7 Nooto anyun
James4:8 Oriikyi Kamuktaindet
James4:9 Onginyaliilak
James4:10 Oming'inge eng' taitap Kiptaiyat
James4:11 Amomwaitaegei ng'aleek che yaach okweegei
James4:12 Ne koonu Ng'atuutyet ak korwoochi ko agenge
James4:13 Ogas anyun
James4:14 ago mongen kiit ne piitu karon. Nee sabeeng'wong'? Amu okweek ko oo kibungweret
James4:15 Amu kata nyoljinok ole
James4:16 Ago nguno otoroorige eng' kachaunosyekwok pogei: katorooretapkei age tugul ne uu nooto ko ya.
James4:17 Eng' ineendet anyun
James5:1 Ogas anyun
James5:2 Kagonunio mogornatosyekwok
James5:3 Kagong'emogis thahabusyekwok ak fedhaisyekwok; ak tuun egu ng'emisyennywa paornateet eng' okweek
James5:4 Ogeero
James5:5 Ki omeng'iisye eng' ng'wony eng' kabaibaetapkei
James5:6 Ki orwookyi
James5:7 Omuite anyun
James5:8 Omuite anyun ak okweek; ogimiit mugulelwekwok: amu kagoneegitit nyonunetap Kiptaiyat.
James5:9 Among'unyng'ung'jige okweegei
James5:10 Tupchosyechu
James5:11 Ogeero
James5:12 Ago ne siirei tuguuk tugul
James5:13 Mi chii eng' okweek ne nyalili? Ingosa. Mi ne paibai? Ingotyen kalasunet.
James5:14 Miitei ne myani eng' kwenung'wong'? Ingoguur poisyegap kaniset; ak kosa icheek agobo ineendet
James5:15 ak kosoop saaetap kayaneet ineendet ne myani
James5:16 Ong'aang'jige anyun kachiliilutikwok okweegei

James5:18 Ak ki sa kogeny; ak kigon kipsengwet ropta
James5:19 Che kitupche
James5:20 ko ingonai kole ineendet ne walei kiptengekyot kobagaakta mastaetap ooreennyi kosaru saboondo eng' meet
1Peter1:1 Petero
1Peter1:2 ko uu eng' naetap Kamuktaindet Kwanda ne kisip konai
1Peter1:3 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet Kwandap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo
1Peter1:4 ketaach poroteet ne ma ng'emaksei
1Peter1:5 okweek che ki riibei eng' kimnateetap Kamuktaindet eng' kayaneet si onyooru yetunet ne choboot keng'aany eng' peetuutap let.
1Peter1:6 Ne oboiboi miising' eng' nooto
1Peter1:7 si kenyoor eng' kalasunet ak toroornatet ak teegisto
1Peter1:8 ne ochame nganda tomo ogeer; ineendet ne nganda mogeere nguno
1Peter1:9 ye tuun onyooru kasuldaetap kayaneng'wong'
1Peter1:10 Ki cheeng' maotik ak kogilgilye miising' inne agobo yetunanooto
1Peter1:11 ye ki cheeng'ei peetuut ne ineet anan ole uu peetuut ne ki iboorchin Kabuusetap Kristo ne ki miitei eng' icheek
1Peter1:12 Che ki king'aang'ji
1Peter1:13 Eng' nooto anyun ogermen suenutigap kabwaatutikwok
1Peter1:14 ko uu lagok che kase iit
1Peter1:15 ago ko uu ye tiliil ineendet ne kiguurok
1Peter1:16 amu ki kisir keele
1Peter1:17 Ak ngot oguure ineendet oleen Kwanda
1Peter1:18 ongen ole ki kityaachak omang'une atebeeng'wong' ne po puch ne ki onyooru eng' kwanisyekwok
1Peter1:19 ago eng' korotiik che po kamanuutyet ne oo
1Peter1:20 ne kisip konaam iman kotom kelumda ng'wony
1Peter1:21 che oo kayanik eng' Kamuktaindet amu ineendet
1Peter1:22 Amu ki otiliil saboonwekwok eng' kasetap iit ne ogase iit imanit kot koit chamyetap tupchosyek ne ma tinyei keniisyet
1Peter1:23 amu kigesichok kogeny
1Peter1:24 Amu
1Peter1:25 Ago tebyei koigeny ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat. Niito ko ng'olyootap logoiywek che myach che ki kiamwok.
1Peter2:1 Oiste anyun yaityet tugul
1Peter2:2 omach miising' cheego che po ng'omnatetap saboon
1Peter2:3 ngo ki ochamcham ole Kiptaiyat ko po myeeindo:
1Peter2:4 obwanjini ineendet koita ne sabei
1Peter2:5 ak okweek
1Peter2:6 Amu mi eng' sireet kole
1Peter2:7 Eng' okweek anyun che oyani kochamaat miising' ineendet: ago eng' icheek che ma iyani
1Peter2:8 ak ko
1Peter2:9 Ago okweek ko oo pororyet ne kigelewen
1Peter2:10 Okweek che ki ma ko oo pororyet eng' tai
1Peter2:11 Chamanichu
1Peter2:12 okweek che otinye atebeet ne nyolu eng' kwenutap Pororyosyek
1Peter2:13 Ogas iit kiit age tugul ne ng'atei piik amu Kiptaiyat: agot ngo laitoryat
1Peter2:14 anan ko pounik
1Peter2:15 Amu uu nooto mageetap Kamuktaindet
1Peter2:16 ko uu che ityagatin
1Peter2:17 Oteech piik tugul. Ocham che otupche. Oiywei Kamuktaindet. Oteech laitoryat.
1Peter2:18 Okweek che oo otwogik
1Peter2:19 Amu chamaksei niito
1Peter2:20 Amu teegis nee
1Peter2:21 Amu ki kiguurchok niito: amu kinyalil Kristo agine agobo okweek
1Peter2:22 ineendet ne ki ma yai tengek
1Peter2:23 ne ye ki ngeng'emji kuut
1Peter2:24 ineendet ne ki ip tengekwogikyok eng' poortanyi eng' keetit parak
1Peter2:25 Amu ki obetooti ko uu keechiirek; ago kaoweekyigei Mestowot ak ko Riibindetap saboonwekwok.
1Peter3:1 Uu nooto
1Peter3:2 ye keerei atebeeng'wong' ne tiliil ne pooto kaiyweisyet.
1Peter3:3 Amaek lelestanywa lelesta ne po saang'
1Peter3:4 ago ingoek chiito ne ung'aat ne tinyei muguleldo ne po sabeet
1Peter3:5 Ki uu nooto kwonyiik che tiliileen chu ki po keny che ki imang'u Kamuktaindet
1Peter3:6 Ko uu ye ki kase iit `Sara Abraham
1Peter3:7 Okweek manong'otaichu
1Peter3:8 Ne po let anyun
1Peter3:9 che mayaaktoi yaityo eng' yaityo
1Peter3:10 Amus
1Peter3:11 Ingoistoegei yaityo
1Peter3:12 Amu tokyingei konyegap Kiptaiyat che po imanda
1Peter3:13 Ak ng'oo ne yaiywok ne ya
1Peter3:14 Ago ngot onyalili agobo imanda
1Peter3:15 ago ogonyit Kristo koek Kiptaiyat ne tiliil eng' mugulelwekwok: ak oegu che chobootiin kotugul owolji chii tugul ne teebenok ng'olyoo agobo kamang'unet ne miitei eng' okweek
1Peter3:16 otinye kabwaatet ne myee; si ye kitaamok
1Peter3:17 Amu kaigai ngot ko nooto mageetap Kamuktaindet
1Peter3:18 Amu kime Kristo agine konyil agenge agobo tengekwogik
1Peter3:19 ki wo eng' nooto agine koamji saboonwek che ki mi korgoreet
1Peter3:20 che ki ma kogase iit eng' tai
1Peter3:21 kergeindap tuguuchuuto ko kabatisanet
1Peter3:22 ne kikwa kipsengwet ak komi eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet; ak ki kiyai malaikaisyek ak pounatosyek ak kimnatosyek kogas iit ineendet.
1Peter4:1 Nooto anyun ko uu ye kinyalil Kristo eng' poorto
1Peter4:2 si ko mata osapche eng' poorto eng' peetuusyekwok che ng'etunotiin eng' maguutik che yaach che po piik
1Peter4:3 Amu ki koyam peetuusyek che ki kosiirto kosulda mageetap Pororyosyek
1Peter4:4 tuguuk che keerei icheek kole kwong'eet amu morwochini osubi kimargatinooto kobooto icheek
1Peter4:5 che tuun tetyin ng'aleek ineendet ne choboot korwookyi che saptos ak che ki kobek.
1Peter4:6 Amu niito ko ki kiamji logoiywek che myach agot che ki kobek
1Peter4:7 Ago kagoriik kagesunetap tuguuk tugul; nooto anyun oegu che oriibegei
1Peter4:8 ne siirei tuguuk tugul ko ochamyee miising' okweegei; amu tuchei chamyet chaang'indap tengekwogik:
1Peter4:9 otaachge okweegei eng' okweegei ama eng' kang'unyng'unyet:

1Peter4:16 ago nginyalil chii amu Kristyanindet

1Peter4:18 Ak ngot ko pichiy kesar chii ne po imanda

2Peter1:1 Simion Petero
2Peter1:2 Ingotesak myeeindo ak kaalyeet eng' okweek eng' naet ne ongen Kamuktaindet ak Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo.
2Peter1:3 Amu ki koonech `kamuktaetap Kamuktaindet tuguuk tugul che nyoljin saboondo ak kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet
2Peter1:4 Ki kogoonech eng' chooto arorutik che myachen miising' ak ko eecheen inne; si kobiit oegu eng' chuuto yamdoigap atebeetap Kamuktaindet
2Peter1:5 Ee
2Peter1:6 ak otesyi `riibetapkei naet; ak otesyi `muitaet riibetapkei; ak otesyi `kayweetap Kamuktaindet muitaet;
2Peter1:7 ak otesyi `chametap tupchosyek kayweetap Kamuktaindet; ak otesyi `chamyet chametap tupchosyek.
2Peter1:8 Amu ngot ko miitei eng' okweek tuguuchuuto ak ko tesatin
2Peter1:9 Amu ineendet ne ma tinyei tuguuchuuto
2Peter1:10 Eng' nooto anyun che kitupche
2Peter1:11 Amu ki koonok ko uu nooto eng' chaang'indo ochut laitornatetap koigeny ne po Kiptaiyandennyo ak ko Yetindet Jeso Kristo.
2Peter1:12 Nooto anyun achobegei kotugul abwaatwok tuguuchuuto
2Peter1:13 Ak abwaati ale myee kota ami eng' poori
2Peter1:14 angen ale nyoonei kochogu metoetap poortanyu
2Peter1:15 Ee
2Peter1:16 Ma kisup atindonik che ki kichobei eng' ng'omnateet ye ki ngemwaiwok kimnateet ak nyonunetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo
2Peter1:17 amu kitaach teegisto ak toroornatet eng' Kamuktaindet Kwanda
2Peter1:18 ak ki kigas kutiniito kobunu kipsengwet
2Peter1:19 Ak ki tinyei ng'olyootap maonateet ne po iman inne; ne oyae ne myee ye oriip
2Peter1:20 ye kaonai ni korook
2Peter1:21 Amu ma mi maonateet ne ki kobiit eng' mageetap chii: ago ki ng'alaaldos piik eng' Kamuktaindet
2Peter2:1 Ago ki piit maotik che po lembech ak icheek eng' kwenutap piik

2Peter2:3 Ak kocheeng'jingei poroteet eng' okweek eng' ng'aleegap ng'aalseet amu kasennywa ne po myat: che ma igaegei kirwoogennywa kobooch keny

2Peter2:6 ak ngot ko kigabui ak kowal nganasoogap Sodom ak Gomorah koek oreek si koek kaboorunet eng' icheek che ta kotebyei koma iywei Kamuktaindet;

2Peter2:15 kingo pagaakta ooreetap iman
2Peter2:16 ago ki kigergong' amu pistoennyi; ki ng'alaal sigiryet ne namaat kuut eng' kutitap chii ak koraany iywegap maotyondonooto.

2Peter2:18 Amu

2Peter2:22 Ki koyaak eng' icheeget ko uu ye mwaei kalewenetap iman

2Peter3:2 si obwaat ng'aleek che ki mwa maotik che tiliileen eng' tai
2Peter3:3 korook

1John1:1 Nooto ne ki mi kobooch taunet
1John1:2 (ak king'ang'ak saboonooto
1John1:3 nooto ki kegeer ak kegas ko nooto ne keamwok ak okweek
1John1:4 Kagi sirwok anyun tuguuchuuto si kobiit kosulda poiboiyennyo.
1John1:5 Ak ni ng'olyoot ne ki kigas eng' ineendet ak keamwok
1John1:6 Ngot kemwa keele ki tinyei yamdaet kobooto ineendet ak kebendoti eng' mesundeito
1John1:7 ago ngot kebendote lapkeiyet
1John1:8 Ngot kemwa keele ma ki tinyei tengek
1John1:9 Ngot keng'aanye tengekwogikyok
1John1:10 Ngot kemwa keele tomo keyai tengek
1John2:1 Lagokyuk che mengech
1John2:2 ak ineendet tiseiywot ne po tengekwogikyok; ago ma po tengekwogikyok kityo
1John2:3 Ak kingen eng' ni keele kingen ineendet
1John2:4 Ineendet ne mwaei kole
1John2:5 ago ineendet ne riibei ng'olyoondennyi
1John2:6 ineendet ne mwaei kole menyei eng' ineendet konyaaljin agine kowendot ko uu ye kiga wendot ineendet.

1John2:8 Ak kogeny
1John2:9 Ineendet ne mwaei kole mi eng' lapkeiyet
1John2:10 Ineendet ne chamei ne tupcho komenyei eng' lapkeiyet
1John2:11 Ago ineendet ne wechei ne tupcho komi eng' mesundeito

1John3:1 Ogeero
1John3:2 Chamanichu
1John3:3 Ak chii age tugul ne tinyei kamang'unoni agobo ineendet kotiliilegei
1John3:4 Chii age tugul ne yaei tengek koyaei pistoet: amu tengekto ko pistoet.
1John3:5 Ak ongen ole ki king'aany ineendet si kobiit koip tengekwogik; ama mi tengek eng' ineendet.
1John3:6 Chii age tugul ne menyei ineendet koma yaei tengek: ak chii age tugul ne yaei tengek ko tomo kogeer ineendet
1John3:7 Lagochu mengech
1John3:8 ineendet ne yaei tengek ko po chesawil; amu ki yai chesawilyet tengek kobooch taunet. Kigeng'aany Weeriitap Kamuktaindet amu nooto
1John3:9 Chii age tugul ne kigesich eng' Kamuktaindet koma yaei tengek
1John3:10 Ng'ang'aksei lagogap Kamuktaindet eng' niito
1John3:11 Amu ni ng'olyoot ne ki ogas kobooch taunet
1John3:12 Ma ko uu Kain ne ki po ineendet ne ya
1John3:13 Amokwong'ye che kitupche
1John3:14 Kingen keele kigemang'une meet kemong'ji saboondo
1John3:15 Chii age tugul ne wechei ne tupcho ko rumin: ak ongen ole ma mi rumin ne tinyei saboondap koigeny ne menyei eng' ineendet.
1John3:16 Kingen eng' niito chamyet
1John3:17 Ago chiito ne tinyei tuguugap ng'wonyuni

1John3:19 Kinae eng' niito keele ki po imanit

1John3:23 Ak ni ng'atuutyennyi

1John4:1 Chamanichu
1John4:2 Ongen eng' ni Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet. Ng'aang'et age tugul ne ng'aanyei kole ki nyo Jeso Kristo eng' poorto ko punu Kamuktaindet:
1John4:3 ak ng'aang'et age tugul ne ma ng'aanyei kole Jeso
1John4:4 Oo po Kamuktaindet
1John4:5 Po ng'wony icheeget
1John4:6 Kiboo Kamuktaindet `acheek. Ineendet ne ingen Kamuktaindet kogaseech; ineendet ne ma po Kamuktaindet koma kaseech. Kingen eng' niito muguleldap imanit
1John4:7 Chamanichu
1John4:8 Ineendet ne ma tinyei chamyet koma ingen Kamuktaindet; amu Kamuktaindet ko chamyet.
1John4:9 Kigeng'aany eng' niito chamyetap Kamuktaindet eng' acheek
1John4:10 Niito chamyet
1John4:11 Chamanichu
1John4:12 Ma mi chii ne ki kogeer Kamuktaindet ole kigoi; ngot kechamdosi
1John4:13 kingen eng' niito keele kimenye eng' ineendet ak komenyech ineendet
1John4:14 Ak ki kegeer ak kebaoryani keele ki iyook `Kwanda Weeriit konyo koek Yetindetap ng'wony.
1John4:15 Age tugul ne ng'aanyei kole Jeso ko Weeriitap Kamuktaindet
1John4:16 Ak kingen ak ki kiyan chamyet ne ting'enech Kamuktaindet; Kamuktaindet ko chamyet; ineendet ne menyei chamyet komenyei Kamuktaindet
1John4:17 Kigeyai chamyet koek ne ititaat eng' acheek
1John4:18 Ma mi kaiyweisyet eng' chamyet: ago oonei chamyet ne ititaat kaiyweisyet

1John5:3 Amu ni chamyetap Kamuktaindet
1John5:4 Amu age tugul ne kigesich eng' Kamuktaindet koterteeri ng'wony. Ak ni ko katerteeret ne iterteeri ng'wony
1John5:5 Ak ng'oo ineendet ne iterteeri ng'wony
1John5:6 Ni ko ineendet ne ki nyo eng' peek ak korotiik
1John5:7 Amu mi somogu che paoryani:

1John5:11 Ak paornatanooto ko ni
1John5:12 Ineendet ne tinyei Weeriit kotinyei saboondo: ineendet ne ma tinyei Weeriitap Kamuktaindet koma tinyei saboondo.

1John5:14 Ak ni nyiganateet ne ketinye eng' ineendet
1John5:15 ak ngot kingen keele kaseech eng' kiit age tugul ne kisoome
1John5:16 Ngot kogeer chii tupchennyi koyaei tengekto ne ma po meet
1John5:17 Kiy age tugul ne ma po imanda ko tengek: ak mi tengekto ne ma po meet.
1John5:18 Kingen keele ma yaei tengekto chii age tugul ne kigesich eng' Kamuktaindet; ago ineendet ne kigesich eng' Kamuktaindet koriibei ineendet

1John5:20 Ak kingen keele kigonyo Weeriitap Kamuktaindet
