Revelation18:19 Ak kolakyin temburyek metowekwak
Revelation18:20 “Paibaitu eng' ineendet inyee kipsengwet
Revelation18:21 Ak kisut malaikaiyat ne kiim koita ne uu koitap pai ne oo
Revelation18:22 Ama kegasei kogeny eng' inyee putigap ketubosyek ak che tyendos ak putigap ndurerusyek ak che kuutei iryagook; ama kenyooru musogindet ne po musoknateet age tugul eng' inyee kogeny agoi; ama kegasei cheetap koitap pai eng' inyee kogeny agoi;
Revelation18:23 ama kokweng'sei lapkeiyetap tait eng' inyee kogeny agoi; ama kegasei kutitap sandet ak murereet eng' inyee kogeny agoi; amu ki piik che eecheen che po ng'wony chemung'arainiguk; amu ki kiberber pororyosyek tugul eng' panisyeng'ung'.”
Revelation18:24 Ak ki kinyoorchi ineendet korotiigap maotik ak che po piik che tiliileen
Revelation19:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu
Revelation19:2 amu po iman ak ko po imanda kirwoogutikyik; amu kagorwookyi chepkugoniot ne oo
Revelation19:3 Ak ki mwa kogeny ne po aeng' kole
Revelation19:4 Ak ki ibutyi ng'wony poisyek tiptemu ak ang'wan che saptos ak kolas Kamuktaindet ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet
Revelation19:5 Ak ki mong' kutit eng' ng'echereetap laitornatet
Revelation19:6 Ak ki agas kiit ne uu kutitap tuiyet ne oo
Revelation19:7 Ongeboiboitu ak kigaske miising'
Revelation19:8 Ki kigoochi ineendet kolaachkei eng' katanit ne karaaran
Revelation19:9 Ak koleenjo
Revelation19:10 Ak ki abutyi keelyekyik alasu ineendet. Ak koleenjo
Revelation19:11 Ak ki ageer koyaatak kipsengwet
Revelation19:12 Ak ki uu konyekyik liplibenetap maat
Revelation19:13 Ak ki ilaachi ngoryeet ne ki kiroong'ji korotiik: ak kiguure kainennyi “Ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet.”
Revelation19:14 Ak ki isubi ineendet lugoosyek che mi kipsengwet che ketei paraisisyek che leelach
Revelation19:15 Ak ki mang'une kutinnyi rotwetap chok ne ng'atip
Revelation19:16 Ak kotinyei eng' ngoryennyi ak eng' kubestanyi kainet ne ki kisir kole
Revelation19:17 Ak ki ageer malaikaiyat kotononi eng' asiista; ak kiwaach eng' kutit ne oo
Revelation19:18 si kobiit oam poorwegap laitorinik
Revelation19:19 Ki ageer tyondo ak laitorinigap ng'wony kobooto lugosyekwak
Revelation19:20 Ak ki kinam tyondo
Revelation19:21 Ak ki kibar icheek che ki ng'et eng' rotwetap chok ne ki mang'une kutitap ineendet ne kitebee paraisiit
Revelation20:1 Ak ki ageer malaikaiyat kochoorugei eng' kipsengwet
Revelation20:2 Ak konam maswetit
Revelation20:3 ak kowiirchi ineendet keriinget ne ma igoksei
Revelation20:4 Ak ki ageer ng'echerogap laitornatet
Revelation20:5 Ma sapcho che kiga kobek agoi kogeskei kenyiisyek eliphuut agenge. Niito ko ng'eetyeet ne po tai.
Revelation20:6 Paibai ak ko tiliil ne tinyei yamdaet eng' ng'eetyeet ne po tai. Mabou icheek meet ne po aeng'; ago egu icheek tisiigap Kamuktaindet ak ko po Kristo
Revelation20:7 Ye igeskei kenyiisyek eliphuut agenge
Revelation20:8 ak komong' koberber pororyosyek che miitei luukwek ang'wan che po ng'wony
Revelation20:9 Ak kotogosta koyom ng'wony ak koyiem ye mi che tiliileen
Revelation20:10 Ak ki kiwiirchi chesawilyet ne ki iberber icheek araraitap maat ak koik che laldos
Revelation20:11 Ki ageer ng'echereet ne oo ak ko leel ne po laitornatet
Revelation20:12 Ak ki ageer che ki kobek
Revelation20:13 Ak kigon nyanjet che ki kobek che ki mi oriitinnyi; ak kigon meet ak ye mi che ki kobek
Revelation20:14 Ak ki kiwiirchi meet ak ye mi che ki kobek
Revelation20:15 Ak ngot kenyoor chii age tugul ne ki ma kisirchi bukuitap saboondo
Revelation21:1 Ak ki ageer kipsengwet ne leel ak ng'wony ne leel; amu ki kosiirto kipsengwet ne po tai ak ng'wonyut ne po tai; ama komi nyanjet kogeny.
Revelation21:2 Ki ageer nganaseet ne tiliil
Revelation21:3 Ak ki agas kutit ne oo komang'une ng'echereetap laitornatet kole
Revelation21:4 ak kous ineendet peegap kong' alak tugul eng' konyekwak. Amaa komi meet kogeny; ama komi kateiyet kogeny
Revelation21:5 Ak ki mwa ineendet ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet kole
Revelation21:6 Ak koleenjo
Revelation21:7 Ineendet ne iterteeri konamei tuguuchu; ak aegu Kamuktaindet nenyi
Revelation21:8 Ago che iyweisyei
Revelation21:9 Ak ki nyo age eng' malaikaisyechooto tisap che ki tinyei taabook tisap
Revelation21:10 Ak ki imuta eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil agoi tulweet ne oo ak ko kooi
Revelation21:11 kotinyei liilindap Kamuktaindet: ne kergei lapkeiyennyi ak koita ne po kamanuutyet ne oo
Revelation21:12 Ki tinyei irimeet ne oo ak ko kooi; ak kotinyei kurgotik taman ak aeng'
Revelation21:13 Ki mi komostap kong'asiis kurgotik somogu
Revelation21:14 Ak ki tinyei irimeetap nganaseet lumeiywek taman ak aeng'
Revelation21:15 Ki tinyei ineendet ne ki ng'alaalwo tegat ne po thahabu si kokwae nganaseet
Revelation21:16 Ak ki aechin irimosyek tugul ang'wanu che po nganaseet
Revelation21:17 Ki ikwa irimennyi
Revelation21:18 Ak ki kiteege jasipi irimennyi: ak ki thahabu che tiliileen nganaseet
Revelation21:19 Ak ki kilelesonji lumeiywegap irimeet ne po nganaseet eng' koik alak tugul che po kamanuutyet ne oo. Lumeiywot ne po tai ko ki jasipi; ne po aeng' ko sapphire; ne po somok ko kalkedo; ne po ang'wan ko sumaragdo;
Revelation21:20 ne po muut ko sardonukso; ne po lo ko sardio; ne po tisap ko krusolito; ne po sisiit ko berulo; ne po sogool ko topasio; ne po taman ko krusopraso; ne po taman ak agenge ko huakinto; ne po taman ak aeng' ko ametusto.
Revelation21:21 Ak kurgotik taman ak aeng' ko ki sonoek taman ak aeng' che korooron; age tugul eng' kurgotik ko ki po sonoiyat agenge
Revelation21:22 Ama ageer hekaluut eng' nganaseet; amu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet ak Aarwet ko hekalunnyi.
Revelation21:23 Ak ma machei nganaseet asiista
Revelation21:24 Ak kobendoti pororyosyek eng' lapkeiyennyi
Revelation21:25 Amagoi kiger kurgotikyik peet amu ma mi kemout olooto.
Revelation21:26 Ak ibu icheek toroornatet ak teegistap pororyosyek kobwa oriit.
Revelation21:27 Ak ma koi wo oriit kiy age tugul ne murwoon
Revelation22:1 Ak ki iboorwo aineetap peegap saboon
Revelation22:2 eng' kwenutap oriitinnyi. Ak ki mi keetitap saboon ainonooto
Revelation22:3 Ama komi chubisyet kogeny: ak tuun mi oriitinnyi ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Kamuktaindet ak ne po Aarwet: ak yachin poisyet ineendet otwogikyik;
Revelation22:4 ak keerei togeennyi; ak mi kainennyi togoochikwak.
Revelation22:5 Ama komi kemout kogeny; ama machei lapkeiyetap tait
Revelation22:6 Ak ki leenjo
Revelation22:7 “Ogeero
Revelation22:8 Anee Johana ne ki agas tuguuchu ak ageer. Ak ye kinga kas ak ageer
Revelation22:9 Ak koleenjo
Revelation22:10 Ak ki leenjo
Revelation22:11 Ineendet ne ma po imanda
Revelation22:12 “Ogeero
Revelation22:13 Aa Alpha ak ko aa Omega
Revelation22:14 Poiboen icheek che mwetei ngoroikwak
Revelation22:15 Mi saang' sesenik
Revelation22:16 “Anee Jeso ne kaayogu malaikaiyandennyu si kobaoryanwok tuguuchu eng' kanisosyek. Aa tigityot ak keswootap Daudi
Revelation22:17 Mwaei Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak murereet kole
Revelation22:18 Abaoryanjini chii age tugul ne kasei ng'aleek che po maonateetap bukuini
Revelation22:19 Ak ngo nem chii age tugul ng'aleek eng' bukuitap maonatoni
Revelation22:20 Mwaei ineendet ne paoryanjin tuguuchu kole
